Exodus18:14 Pilnam ham a saii boeih te Moses masae loh a hmuh tih
Exodus18:15 Te vaengah Moses loh a masae te
Exodus18:16 Amih taengah te olka a om vaengah kai taengah ha pawk. Te vaengah hlang pakhat neh a hui laklo ah lai ka tloek tih Pathen kah oltlueh neh a olkhueng te ka ming sak
Exodus18:17 Te vaengah a masae loh Moses te
Exodus18:18 Namah neh na taengkah pilnam he khaw na tawn la na tawn uh coeng. Namah ham rhih aih tih dumlai khaw namah bueng loh na rhoe thai moenih.
Exodus18:19 Ka ol he ngai laeh
Exodus18:20 Te vaengah amih te oltlueh neh olkhueng khaw thuituen lamtah a pongpa ham longpuei neh a saii ham bibi te amih tueng saw.
Exodus18:21 Te phoeiah namah loh pilnam pum khui lamloh Pathen aka rhih tatthai hlang
Exodus18:22 A tue boeih dongah pilnam te laitloek pah saeh. Dumlai aka om boeih khaw a puei mah nang taengla ham pawk puei saeh. Olka a phoeng boeih tah amih loh laitloek pah saeh. Te vaengah nang ham yanghoep saeh lamtah nang te n'yingyawn uh saeh.
Exodus18:23 Ol he na ngai daengah ni Pathen loh nang uen bangla na pai thai vetih pilnam boeih he khaw a hmuen te ngaimong la a paan eh
Exodus18:24 Moses loh a masae ol te a hnatun tih a thui te boeih a saii.
Exodus18:25 Te dongah Moses loh Israel boeih khuiah hlang tatthai rhoek te a coelh tih amih te pilnam soah a lu
Exodus18:26 A tue boeih ah pilnam te a lai a tloek uh tih dumlai aka kuel te Moses taengla a khuen uh. Ol phoeng boeih tah amih loh lai a tloek uh.
Exodus18:27 Te phoeiah Moses loh a masae te a phih tih anih te amah kho la voei.
Exodus19:1 Israel ca rhoek Egypt kho lamloh a nong phoeikah hla thum dongah a om khohnin ah Sinai khosoek la pawk uh.
Exodus19:2 Te phoeiah Rephidim lamloh hlah uh tih Sinai khosoek la pawk uh. Khosoek kah a rhaeh uh vaengah Israel tah tlang dan ah pahoi rhaeh.
Exodus19:3 Te vaengah Moses tah Pathen taengla cet. Te dongah BOEIPA loh anih te tlang lamloh a khue tih
Exodus19:4 Egypt taengah ka saii te na hmuh uh coeng. Nangmih te atha phae dongah kam phueih tih kamah taengla nangmih kang khuen.
Exodus19:5 Te dongah ka ol he na ngai rhoe na ngai tih ka paipi na tuem atah pilnam cungkuem khui lamloh kamah taengah lungthen la na om uh ni. Diklai pum khaw kamah kah ni.
Exodus19:6 Te phoeiah nangmih te kamah taengah khosoih ram neh hlangcim namtu la na om uh ni. He ol he Israel ca taengah thui pah
Exodus19:7 Te phoeiah Moses te mael tih pilnam kah a hamca rhoek te a khue. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh amah ol a uen boeih te amih mikhmuh ah a phoe pah.
Exodus19:8 Te vaengah pilnam pum loh huek a doo tih
Exodus19:9 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses taengah
Exodus19:10 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Exodus19:11 A thum khohnin ah tah sikim la om uh saeh. A thum hnin ah BOEIPA tah pilnam pum mikhmuh ah Sinai tlang la ha rhum ni.
Exodus19:12 Pilnam te a kaepvai ah rhi suem pah lamtah
Exodus19:13 A soah kut loh taek boel saeh. Tedae dae la dae saeh lamtah kap khaw kap saeh. Jubilee la a sol vaengah tlang la aka cet te tah rhamsa khaw hlang khaw hing boel saeh
Exodus19:14 Te dongah Moses te tlang lamloh pilnam taengla suntla tih pilnam te a ciim phoeiah a himbai te a til uh.
Exodus19:15 Te vaengah pilnam te
Exodus19:16 A thum hnin kah mincang a pha tangloeng vaengah rhaek ol neh cingmai a thah loh tlang soah om. Te vaengah tuki ol te bahoeng tlungluen tih rhaehhmuen kah pilnam khaw boeih lakueng.
Exodus19:17 Pathen doe ham Moses loh pilnam te rhaehhmuen lamkah a khuen tih tlang yung ah pai uh.
Exodus19:18 BOEIPA te hmai neh a rhum dongah Sinai tlang khaw a pum la khuu. A hmaikhu te hmailing hmaikhu bangla luei tih tlang a pum la muep lakueng.
Exodus19:19 Tuki ol khaw ha thoeih tih bahoeng len. Moses loh a voek vaengah Pathen loh a ol neh a doo.
Exodus19:20 Te vaengah BOEIPA tah Sinai tlang kah tlang soi la ha rhum. Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te tlang soi la a khue tih Moses khaw cet hang.
Exodus19:21 Tedae BOEIPA loh Moses te
Exodus19:22 Khosoih rhoek pataeng khaw BOEIPA taengla aka mop rhoek ciim uh saeh. Amih taengah BOEIPA pung ve
Exodus19:23 Te phoeiah Moses loh BOEIPA taengah
Exodus19:24 Te dongah BOEIPA loh amah te
Exodus19:25 Moses te pilnam taengla suntla tangloeng tih amih te a thui pah.
Exodus20:1 Pathen loh ol cungkuem he a thui tih
Exodus20:2 Kai na Pathen YAHWEH loh nang te Egypt kho kah sal im lamloh kang khuen.
Exodus20:3 Ka mikhmuh ah a tloe pathen te nang ham om boel saeh.
Exodus20:4 Namah ham mueithuk neh vaan so lamkah khaw
Exodus20:5 Te rhoek taengah bakop boel lamtah amih taengah thothueng boeh. Kai YAHWEH
Exodus20:6 Kai aka lungnah tih ka olpaek aka tuem taengah tah a thawng thawng la sitlohnah tueng.
Exodus20:7 Na Pathen YAHWEH ming te a poeyoek la muk boeh. A ming a poeyoek la aka muk te BOEIPA loh a hmil moenih.
Exodus20:8 Sabbath hnin te ciim hamla poek.
Exodus20:9 Hnin rhuk thotat lamtah na bitat te boeih saii.
Exodus20:10 Tedae a rhih hnin tah na BOEIPA Pathen ham Sabbath ni. Na bitat cungkuem dongah
Exodus20:11 BOEIPA loh vaan neh diklai
Exodus20:12 Na nu neh na pa te thangpom. Te daengah ni na Pathen YAHWEH loh nang taengah m'paek diklai ah na hinglung a vang eh.
Exodus20:13 Hlang ngawn boeh.
Exodus20:14 Samphaih boeh.
Exodus20:15 Huen boeh.
Exodus20:16 Na hui te laithae laipai neh doo boeh.
Exodus20:17 Na hui kah im te nai boeh. Na hui kah a yuu
Exodus20:18 Te vaengah pilnam boeih loh olthang neh hmaithoi
Exodus20:19 Te phoeiah Moses taengah
Exodus20:20 Te dongah Moses pilnam te
Exodus20:21 Te vaengah pilnam a hla la pai tih Moses tah Pathen om nah yinnah taengla thoeih.
Exodus20:22 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Exodus20:23 Kai neh thuidoek ham te saii uh boeh. Cakben pathen neh sui pathen khaw namamih ham saii uh boeh.
Exodus20:24 Kai hamla diklai hmueihtuk saii lamtah a soah na hmueihhlutnah neh na rhoepnah khaw
Exodus20:25 Kai hamla lungto hmueihtuk na saii atah a soah lungrhaih khoeng boeh. A soah na cunghang na hnonah koinih hmueihtuk ni na poeih eh.
Exodus20:26 Ka hmueihtuk kah tangtlaeng soah yoeng boeh. A soah na yah te poelyoe boeh.
Exodus21:1 Te phoeiah laitloeknah he amih mikhmuh ah khueh pah.
Exodus21:2 Hebrew sal te na lai atah kum rhuk thotat saeh lamtah kum rhih hlang dongah tah sayalh la cet yungyi saeh.
Exodus21:3 Amah bueng hoengpoek la ha pawk atah amah bueng hoengpoek la cet saeh. A yuu a va a om atah a yuu khaw amah neh cet saeh.
Exodus21:4 A boei loh anih te yuu a paek tih anih ham canu capa a sak atah a yuu neh a ca tah a boei kah ni. Tedae amah te amah bueng hoengpoek la cet saeh.
Exodus21:5 Tedae sal loh
Exodus21:6 Te vaengah anih te a boei loh Pathen mikhmuh la khuen saeh lamtah thohkhaih taeng neh rhungsut taengla thoeih saeh. Te vaengah a boei loh a hna te ciphuem neh vueh pah saeh kumhal ham anih taengah thotat saeh.
Exodus21:7 Te phoeiah hlang loh a canu te sal la a yoih atah
Exodus21:8 A boei mik ah a thae atah anih te amah ham tuentah saeh lamtah lat saeh. Salnu taengah a hnukpoh coeng dongah salnu te kholong pilnam taengla yoih ham taemrhai boel saeh.
Exodus21:9 Salnu te a capa ham a tuentah coeng atah anih te amah canu kah hamsum bangla saii pah saeh.
Exodus21:10 Amah ham te a tloe a loh atah
Exodus21:11 He pathum he anih ham a saii pah pawt atah
Exodus21:12 Hlang a boh tih a duek atah amah khaw duek rhoe duek saeh.
Exodus21:13 Anih loh rhaem ngawn pawt dae Pathen loh anih kut ah a rhul sak oeh atah nang ham hmuen ka khueh vetih te lam te rhaelrham bitni.
Exodus21:14 Tedae hlang loh a hui te ngawn ham taengnah neh a lokhak atah anih te ka hmueihtuk dong lamloh khuen lamtah duek saeh.
Exodus21:15 A manu a napa aka taam khaw duek rhoe duek saeh.
Exodus21:16 Hlang aka huen neh te te a yoih vaengah a kut ah a hmuh pah khaw duek rhoe duek saeh.
Exodus21:17 A manu a napa aka tap khaw duek rhoe duek saeh.
Exodus21:18 Hlang rhoi te oelh uh rhoi tih hlang pakhat loh a hui te lungto neh
Exodus21:19 thoo tih poeng ah a conghol neh a pongpa atah anih aka ngawn te hmil mai saeh. A bipoei phu tah pae saeh lamtah hoeih rhoe hoeih sak saeh.
Exodus21:20 Hlang loh a salpa neh a salnu te conghol neh a taam tih a kut hmuiah a duek atah a phuloh ham te a phulo kuekluek saeh.
Exodus21:21 Tedae hnin hnih hnin at neh a thoh atah anih te amah tangka coeng dongah phulo boel saeh.
Exodus21:22 Hlang a hnueih vaengah huta bungvawn te a si tih a ca te thoeng mai ni. Tedae yoethae puei pawt cakhaw huta kah a va amah lamloh a hoe te tah sah rhoe sah saeh. Tedae rhokhan tarhing la pae saeh.
Exodus21:23 Tedae yoethae a puei atah hinglu ham te hinglu na paek van ni.
Exodus21:24 Mik yueng mik
Exodus21:25 Hmai-ung yueng hmai-ung
Exodus21:26 Hlang loh a salpa mik a salnu mik te a ngawn pah tih a rhawp sak atah a mik yueng te sayalh la hlah saeh.
Exodus21:27 A salpa no neh a salnu no te a hom sak atah a no yueng anih te sayalh la hlah saeh.
Exodus21:28 Vaito loh tongpa khaw
Exodus21:29 Tedae vaito te hlaem hlavai ah khaw a toh noek dongah a kungmah te a rhalrhing sak lalah ngaithuen pawt tih tongpa khaw huta khaw a duek sak atah vaito te dae saeh lamtah a kungmah khaw duek saeh.
Exodus21:30 Anih taengah tlansum a suk atah te lamloh a hoe boeih te a hinglu kah tlansum pae van saeh.
Exodus21:31 Capa khaw a thoeh tih canu khaw a thoeh akhaw he laitloeknah bangla a taengah saii saeh.
Exodus21:32 Vaito loh salpa khaw
Exodus21:33 Hlang loh tangrhom khaw a ong tih hlang loh rhom khaw a vueh vaengah te te muek pawt tih vaito khaw laak khaw a cungku atah
Exodus21:34 Tangrhom kungmah loh thuung saeh lamtah a boei te tangka la mael saeh. Tedae aka duek te anih hut la om saeh.
Exodus21:35 Hlang pakhat kah vaito loh a hui kah vaito te a si tih a duek atah vaito hing te yoi rhoi saeh lamtah a tangka te tael uh rhoi saeh. Te phoeiah aka duek te khaw tael uh rhoi saeh.
Exodus21:36 Tedae hlaem hlavai ah khaw vaito kah a toh noek te a ming lalah a kungmah loh te te a khoem pawt atah vaito yueng te vaito neh thuung rhoe thuung saeh lamtah aka duek te anih hut la om saeh.
Exodus22:1 Hlang loh vaito khaw
Exodus22:2 Umlawt ah hlanghuen a hmuh tih a boh vaengah a duek atah a taengah thii kap boel saeh.
Exodus22:3 Khomik a thoeng atah a soah thii kap saeh lamtah aka huen loh sah rhoe sah saeh. A khueh pawt atah a huen dongah amah khaw yoi uh saeh.
Exodus22:4 A huen te a kut dongah a hmuh la a hmuh atah vaito khaw
Exodus22:5 Hlang lohma neh misurdum a laem sak vaengah a rhamsa te a hlah tih a rhamsa loh a tloe lohma li te a laem pa atah a khohmuen lamkah a then
Exodus22:6 Hmai puek tih hling a dom vaengah canghlom neh canghli khaw
Exodus22:7 Hlang loh a hui te tangka khaw hnopai khaw khoembael sak ham a paek. Tedae im lamkah te hlang loh a huen tih hlanghuen te a hmuh atah a rhaep la thuung saeh.
Exodus22:8 Hlanghuen te a hmuh pawt atah a hui kah hno dongah a kut hlah pawt cakhaw im kung te Pathen taengla kun saeh.
Exodus22:9 Boekoeknah olka cungkuem dongah vaito khaw
Exodus22:10 Hlang loh a hui taengah laak neh vaito
Exodus22:11 Te vaengah a hui kah hnopai soah a kut hlah pawt ham amih rhoi laklo BOEIPA kah olhlo om saeh. A kungmah long khaw doe saeh lamtah sah boel saeh.
Exodus22:12 Tedae anih taeng lamloh a huen la a huen atah a kungmah te sah saeh.
Exodus22:13 Te te a ngaeh rhoe a ngaeh tila laipai hang khuen atah saha te sah boel saeh.
Exodus22:14 Hlang loh a hui taeng lamkah a vat dae a taengah a kungmah a om pawt vaengah a khaem sak tih a duek atah sah rhoe sah saeh.
Exodus22:15 A kungmah te a taengah a om atah sah boel saeh. Te te a kutloh coeng atah a thapang neh mael saeh.
Exodus22:16 tongpa loh oila a bae mueh te a yoek tih a taengah a yalh atah a yuu la oei rhoe oei saeh.
Exodus22:17 A napa loh hula te anih taengah paek ham a aal la a aal atah oila kah maan bangla tangka thuek pah saeh.
Exodus22:18 Hlangbi khaw hing sak boeh.
Exodus22:19 Rhamsa taengkah aka yalh boeih tah duek rhoe duek saeh.
Exodus22:20 YAHWEH amah bueng taeng pawt ah pathen tloe rhoek taengah aka nawn tah thup saeh.
Exodus22:21 Yinlai khaw vuelvaek boeh
Exodus22:22 Nuhmai neh cadah boeih tah phaep boeh.
Exodus22:23 Na phaep la na phaep tih kai taengah a pang la a pang atah a pangngawlnah te ka hnatun rhoe ka hnatun pah ni.
Exodus22:24 Te vaengah ka thintoek sai vetih nangmih te cunghang neh kang ngawn ni. Na yuu rhoek te nuhmai la
Exodus22:25 Nangmih taengkah ka pilnam mangdaeng te tangka na hlah pah atah a taengah puhlah bangla om boeh. Anih te a casai khueh pah boeh.
Exodus22:26 Na hui kah himbai te na laikoi la na laikoi atah khomik a khum hlan ah amah taengla mael laeh.
Exodus22:27 A himbai khaw te kah himbai bueng ni a vin sokah a himbai dongah metlam a yalh eh? Ka lungvatnah oeh dongah ka taengla a pang vaengah ka hnatun pah ni ta.
Exodus22:28 Pathen te thaephoei boeh
Exodus22:29 Na thaihhmin neh na tuihuem khaw hloh thil boeh
Exodus22:30 Na vaito taeng neh na boiva taengah khaw saii tangloeng. Hnin rhih khuiah a manu neh om saeh lamtah hnin rhet dongah tah kamah taengla m'pae.
Exodus22:31 Kamah taengah hlang cim la om uh laeh. Khohmuen kah saha saa khaw ca uh boeh. Te te ui ham voeih pah.
Exodus23:1 A poeyoek kah olthang khuen boeh. Kuthlahnah kah laipai la om ham halang neh na kut hlaengtang boeh.
Exodus23:2 Boethae dongah tah hlangping hnuk khaw om boeh. Kaengyai taengah hlangping neh kaengyai ham tuituknah dongah doo boeh.
Exodus23:3 Tattloel long khaw a tuituknah dongah n'hiin boel saeh.
Exodus23:4 Na thunkha kah vaito khaw
Exodus23:5 A taengah na tlo-oeng la na tlo-oeng mai cakhaw na lunguet kah laak te a hnorhih dangah a kol te na hmuh atah anih taengah na tlo-oenng te khaw toeng laeh.
Exodus23:6 Na taengkah khodaeng te a tuituknah dongah a laitloeknah phaelh pah boeh.
Exodus23:7 A honghi olka lamloh lakhla lamtah halang he ka tang sak pawt dongah ommongsitoe neh aka dueng khaw ngawn boeh.
Exodus23:8 Kapbaih khaw lo boeh
Exodus23:9 Yinlai khaw nen boeh
Exodus23:10 Na khohmuen te kum rhuk tawn lamtah a vueithaih khaw coi.
Exodus23:11 Tedae a kum rhih te hmil lamtah haai sak. Te daengah ni na pilnam khodaeng loh a caak vetih a noi te khohmuen mulhing loh a caak. Na misurdum ham na olive ham khaw te te saii.
Exodus23:12 Hnin rhuk khuiah na bibi te saii lamtah a rhih hnin ah duem dae. Na vaito neh na laak khaw duem vetih na salnu kah a ca neh yinlai khaw a thasai ni.
Exodus23:13 Nangmih taengah a cungkuem la ka thui te ngaithuen uh. Pathen tloe rhoek ming khaw phoei uh boeh
Exodus23:14 Kum khat ah kai ham khotue voei thum lam uh.
Exodus23:15 Nang kan uen bangla vaidamding khotue te tuem uh lamtah hnin rhih khuiah vaidamding ca uh. Egypt lamloh na hlah uh vaengkah Abib hla te khoning la om vetih ka mikhmuh ah kuttling la ha phoe boel saeh.
Exodus23:16 Khohmuen na tawn te na bibi dongkah thaihcuek
Exodus23:17 Na khuikah tongpaca boeih tah kum khat ah voei thum Boeipa Yahovah mikhmuh ah phoe saeh.
Exodus23:18 Kai kah hmueih thii te tolrhu neh nawn boeh. Ka khotue kah maehtha khaw mincang duela rhaeh boel saeh.
Exodus23:19 Na khohmuen kah thaihcuek tanglue te na BOEIPA Pathen kah im la khuen. Ma-ae ca te a manu suktui neh thong boeh.
Exodus23:20 Longpuei ah nang aka ngaithuen ham neh ka hmoel hmuen hil nang aka khuen ham na mikhmuh ah puencawn kan tueih coeng ne.
Exodus23:21 A mikhmuh ah ngaithuen lamtah a ol te hnatun. Anih te veet boeh
Exodus23:22 A ol te na hnatun rhoela na hnatun tih ka thui te boeih na ngai atah na thunkha te ka thunkha nah vetih nang aka daengdaeh te ka dum van ni.
Exodus23:23 Ka puencawn he nang hmai ah pongpa vetih nang te Amori neh Khitti taengla
Exodus23:24 Amih kah pathen taengah bakop boel lamtah amih taengah thothueng boeh. Amih kah khoboe bangla saii boeh. Te rhoek te koengloeng rhoe koengloeng lamtah a kaam te phaek la phaek pah.
Exodus23:25 BOEIPA na Pathen taengah tho na thueng daengah ni na buh neh na tui khaw a yoethen vetih na khui lamkah tlohtat te kang khoe eh.
Exodus23:26 Na khohmuen ah thangyah neh caya khaw om pawt vetih na khohnin kah a tarhing te ka cup sak ni.
Exodus23:27 Kai taengkah mueirhih te na hmai ah ka tueih vetih a taengla na thoeng thil pilnam boeih te ka khawkkhek ni. Na thunkha boeih te nang taengah a rhawn ka duen sak.
Exodus23:28 Nang mikhmuh ah khoingal te ka tueih vetih Khivee
Exodus23:29 Kum khat nen tah na mikhmuh lamloh anih te ka haek mahpawh. Khohmuen te khopong la om vetih na taengah kohong mulhing pung aih ve.
Exodus23:30 Na pungtai hil na mikhmuh lamloh bet bet ka haek daengah ni khohmuen te na pang eh.
Exodus23:31 Na khorhi te carhaek tuipuei lamloh Philisti tuipuei duela
Exodus23:32 Amih taeng neh amih kah pathen taengah paipi saii boeh.
Exodus23:33 Na khohmuen ah khosa uh boel saeh
Exodus24:1 Moses taengah
Exodus24:2 Tedae Moses amah bueng te BOEIPA taengah mop saeh. Amih te mop uh boel saeh lamtah pilnam khaw a taengla cet uh boel saeh
Exodus24:3 Te phoeiah Moses te cet tih BOEIPA ol boeih neh laitloeknah boeih te pilnam taengah a thui pah. Pilnam pum loh ol pakhat la a doo uh tih
Exodus24:4 Moses loh BOEIPA ol te boeih a daek. Mincang ah thoo tih tlang hmuiah hmueihtuk neh Israel koca hlai nit kah kaam hlai nit a suem.
Exodus24:5 Te phoeiah Israel ca cadong te a tueih tih hmueihhlutnah te a khuen uh. Te vaengah BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih la vaito a nawn uh.
Exodus24:6 Moses loh thii rhakthuem te a loh tih baeldung dongah a khueh tih thii rhakthuem te hmueihtuk a haeh thil.
Exodus24:7 Te phoeiah paipi cabu a loh tih pilnam kah hna ah a tae. Te dongah
Exodus24:8 Te phoeiah Moses loh thii te a loh tih pilnam a haeh thil. Te vaengah
Exodus24:9 Te phoeiah Moses neh Aaron
Exodus24:10 Te vaengah Israel Pathen kah a kho hmui te minhum laiboeng kutngo bangla
Exodus24:11 Tedae Israel ca hlangcong rhoek te a kut thueng thil pawh. Te dongah Pathen a hmuh uh lalah a caak uh tih a ok uh bal pueng.
Exodus24:12 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Exodus24:13 Te dongah Moses neh a taengah aka thotat Joshua tah thoo tih Moses te Pathen kah tlang dongla luei.
Exodus24:14 A hamca rhoek te khaw
Exodus24:15 Moses te tlang la a luei van neh cingmai loh tlang te a thing.
Exodus24:16 BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah Sinai tlang ah pai tih cingmai loh hnin rhuk a dah. A hnin rhih dongah tah Moses te cingmai khui lamloh a khue.
Exodus24:17 BOEIPA thangpomnah mueimae khaw Israel ca rhoek kah mik ah tah tlang som aka hlawp hmai bangla tueng.
Exodus24:18 Te vaengah Moses te cingmai khui la kun tih tlang la luei. Moses te tlang ah khothaih sawmli neh khoyin sawmli om.
Exodus25:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Exodus25:2 Israel ca rhoek te thui pah lamtah hlang boeih lamkah khosaa te kai taengla hang khuen uh saeh. A lungbuei kah a puhlu bangla kai kah khosaa te doe pah.
Exodus25:3 Khosaa he amih taeng lamkah sui neh cak neh rhohum khaw
Exodus25:4 Hlampai a thim
Exodus25:5 Tutal pho thimyum neh saham pho khaw rhining thing khaw
Exodus25:6 Botui hmaivang ham neh koelhnah situi ham neh botui bo-ul ham situi khaw.
Exodus25:7 Hnisui neh rhangpho dongkah ham oitha lung neh saboi lung khaw coi laeh.
Exodus25:8 Te phoeiah kai ham rhokso saii uh lamtah a khui ah ka om eh.
Exodus25:9 Kai loh nang boeih kan tueng vanbangla dungtlungim muei neh a hnopai boeih kah muei te khaw saii tangloeng.
Exodus25:10 Rhining thing te thingkawng a yun dong nit neh tintan
Exodus25:11 Te phoeiah a khui ah sui cilh ben lamtah a hman ah khaw ben. A sokah a kong te a kaep ah sui neh saii pah.
Exodus25:12 Te phoeiah sui te a kutcaeng pali la hlawn lamtah a kho pali te buen pah. Te vaengah khat ben kah a vae dongah kutcaeng panit
Exodus25:13 Te phoeiah rhining thing te a cung la saii lamtah sui ben thil.
Exodus25:14 A cung te thingkawng vae kah a kutcaeng khuila rholh lamtah te nen te thingkawng kawt saeh.
Exodus25:15 Thingkawng kutcaeng dongah a cung om saeh lamtah te lamloh dul boel saeh.
Exodus25:16 Te phoeiah nang taengah kam paek ham laipainah te thingkawng khuiah khueh.
Exodus25:17 A tlaeng khaw sui cilh neh a yun dong nit tintan neh a daang dong khat tintan ah saii.
Exodus25:18 Sui cakhli te cherubim rhoi la saii bal lamtah te rhoi te thingkawng tlaeng kah a hmoi rhoi ah khueh.
Exodus25:19 Cherub pakhat te he kah a hmoi ah
Exodus25:20 Cherubim aka om rhoi loh a phae te a so la phuel saeh lamah a phae neh thingkawng tlaeng soah khu rhoi saeh. Te vaengah pakhat loh a manuca taengah a maelhmai hmaitoh saeh lamtah cherubim maelhmai te tingkawng tlaeng taengah mael saeh.
Exodus25:21 A tlaeng te thingkawng soah a so la tloeng lamtah nang taengah olphong kam paek te thingkawng khuiah khueh.
Exodus25:22 Teah te nang kan tuentah vetih Israel ca rhoek ham nang kang uen olphong cungkuem te thingkawng tlaeng so lamkah cherubim rhoi laklo lamloh nang taengah kan thui ni.
Exodus25:23 Rhining thing te caboei a yun dong nit
Exodus25:24 Te te sui cilh neh ben thil lamtah te ham te a kaepvai kah a kong te sui neh saii pah.
Exodus25:25 A kae ham te a kaep ah kutsom pakhat khueh lamtah a kae dongkah a kaep ah a kong te sui neh saii.
Exodus25:26 Te ham te sui kutcaeng pali saii lamtah kutcaeng te a kho pali dongkah a kil pali ah bang pah.
Exodus25:27 Kutcaeng rhoek a kae voeivang ah caboei aka kawt ham a cung rholhnah la om saeh.
Exodus25:28 A cung te rhining thing saii bal lamtah sui ben thil. Te nen te caboei kawt saeh.
Exodus25:29 Bael neh yakbu neh tui-um neh tuisi-am khaw saii. Sui cilh neh te rhoek te saii lamtah te rhoek nen te tuisi doeng saeh.
Exodus25:30 Ka mikhmuh kah a hmai buh te caboei soah khueh yoeyah.
Exodus25:31 Hmaitung te sui cilh cakben neh saii bal. Hmaitung kah a hlit neh
Exodus25:32 Hmaitung te a kaep lamloh a kong parhuk cawn saeh. A vae khat lamloh hmaitung kong pathum neh a vae pabae lamloh hmaitung a kong pathum cawn saeh.
Exodus25:33 A kong pakhat dongah rhaimuem rhaiphuelh neh noepai bunang pathum
Exodus25:34 Te dongah hmaitung dongkah rhaimuem rhaiphuelh neh noepai bunang he pali lo saeh.
Exodus25:35 Hmaitung lamloh a kong parhu a thoeng dongah te lamkah a kong rhoi hmuiah rhaimuem pakhat
Exodus25:36 Te lamkah a rhaimuem neh a kong te a pum la sui cilh cakben neh pakhat la om saeh.
Exodus25:37 Hmaithoi parhih saii bal lamtah hmaithoi te tok pah. Te vaengah a hmai rhalvang ah khaw tue saeh.
Exodus25:38 A paitaeh neh a baelphaih khaw sui cilh saeh.
Exodus25:39 He hnopai boeih he amah sui cilh talent khat he saii saeh.
Exodus25:40 Tedae so lamtah tlang ah nang a muei kan tueng bangla saii
Exodus26:1 Te phoeiah dungtlungim te hlampai lingdik
Exodus26:2 Himbaiyan pakhat a yun te dong kul dong rhet saeh lamtah a daang dong li saeh. Himbaiyan boeih ham himbaiyan pakhat kah cungnueh pakhat dongah om saeh.
Exodus26:3 Himbaiyan panga te khat neh khat cong uh saeh lamtah
Exodus26:4 Himbaiyan pakhat kah buenyang a bawt hil te a hmoi ah rhuikawl a thim la vaeh pah. A pabae rhui at dongkah himbaiyan a hmoi dongah khaw a bawt hil te tlam te saii bal.
Exodus26:5 Himbaiyan pakhat dongah rhuikawl sawmnga saii lamtah a pabae rhui at dongkah himbaiyan hmoi ah pumpi sawmnga khaw saii pah. Rhuikawl te khat loh khat te doe saeh.
Exodus26:6 Te phoeiah sui rhuithu sawmnga saii lamtah himbaiyan pakhat te pakhat dongla rhuithu neh phaai sak. Te dongah dungtlungim te pakhat la om saeh.
Exodus26:7 Dungtlungim sokah tamkui ham te maae mul himbaiyan saii. Himbaiyan te hlai khat ah saii.
Exodus26:8 Himbaiyan pakhat te a yun dong sawmthum neh a daang te dong li lo ni. Himbaiyan hlai khat ham te himbaiyan pakhat kah cungnueh pakhat dongah om saeh.
Exodus26:9 Himbaiyan panga te amah ah cong lamtah himbaiyan parhuk te amah ah cong bal. Te phoeiah a parhuk kah himbaiyan te dap hmai kah imdan ah rhaep pah.
Exodus26:10 Himbaiyan pakhat kah a hmoi ah buenyang a bawt hil rhuikawl sawmnga saii lamtah a pabae kah himbaiyan a hmoi ah buenyang te rhuikawl sawmnga khueh pah.
Exodus26:11 Te phoeiah rhohum rhuithu sawmnga saii lamtah rhuithu te rhuikawl neh ban pah. Dap te phaai uh saeh lamtah pakhat la om saeh.
Exodus26:12 Dap kah himbaiyan lamloh a hoei saa la aka hoei himbaiyan ngancawn te dungtlungim kah imthael ah dingkoei saeh.
Exodus26:13 Te vaengah dap kah himbaiyan a yun aka hoei te he ben ah dong khat neh ke ben ah dong khat tah dungtlungim kah a vae ah a hup om saeh lamtah khat ben ah khaw khat ben ah khaw khuk saeh.
Exodus26:14 Te phoeiah dap kah imphu te tutal pho thimyum neh a so kah imphu la saham pho te saii thil.
Exodus26:15 Dungtlungim kah a longlaeng la rhining thing aka pai te saii.
Exodus26:16 A yun kah a longlaeng te dong rha neh a daang kah a longlaeng pakhat he dong khat tintan lo saeh.
Exodus26:17 A longlaeng dongkah dangkam rhoi khaw pakhat te a pakhat dongah kiba uh saeh. Dungtlungim a longlaeng boeih ham khaw te tlam te saii tangloeng.
Exodus26:18 Dungtlungim ham a longlaeng te tuithim ben la tuithim kah a ngong ham tah a longlaeng pakul saii.
Exodus26:19 A longlaeng pakul dangah cak buenhol sawmli saii pah. A longlaeng pakhat ka a lo panit ham a dangah buenhol panit om vetih a longlaeng pakhat a lo rhoi ham a dangah buenhol panit om ni.
Exodus26:20 Dungtlungim kah impalai ham khaw a pabae la tlangpuei saa ah a longlaeng pakul om saeh.
Exodus26:21 A buenhol sawmli te khaw cak la om saeh. A longlaeng pakhat dangah buenhol panit
Exodus26:22 Dungtlungim kah a bawtnah ham te tuipuei ben ah a longlaeng parhuk caeh sak.
Exodus26:23 Imthael ben ah dungtlungim kah a hmuidong ham a longlaeng panit khueh pah.
Exodus26:24 Te vaengah a dang lamloh tungbok la om saeh. Tedae a soi ah hmabuet la rhen om saeh lamtah kutcaeng pakhat khuila kun saeh. Te rhoi kah a om bangla imki rhoi dongah khaw om saeh.
Exodus26:25 Te dongah a longlaeng parhet neh a buenhol te cak buenhol la hlai rhuk lo ni. A tlonglaeng pakhat kah dongah buenhol panit
Exodus26:26 Dungtlungim kah impalai pakhat dongkah a longlaeng ham thohkalh la rhining thing panga khueh pah.
Exodus26:27 Dungtlungim pabae ben impalai kah a longlaeng ham thohkalh panga
Exodus26:28 A longlaeng laklung kah thohkalh tah a hmoi khat lamloh a hmoi hil a bangli ah rholh saeh.
Exodus26:29 A longlaeng te khaw sui ben thil. Thohkalh rholhnah a kutcaeng te khaw sui neh saii. Te phoeiah thohkalh rhoek te sui ben thil.
Exodus26:30 Tlang ah a rhimong n'tueng bangla dungtlungim te thoh pah.
Exodus26:31 Hniyan khaw hlampai a thim
Exodus26:32 Te te ngun buenhol pali sokah sui a ben thil rhining tung pali dongkah sui voei dongah pae.
Exodus26:33 Hniyan te rhuithu dangah na ban phoeiah tah hniyan khui ah olphong thingkawng te pahoi kun puei. Te vaengah hniyan loh nangmih ham te hmuencim laklo neh hmuencim kah hmuencim koek laklo te phih saeh.
Exodus26:34 A tlaeng te khaw hmuencim lakah hmuencim kah olphong thingkawng soah khueh pah.
Exodus26:35 Hniyan kah kawtpoeng ah caboei te hol pah. Dungtlungim kaep tuithim kah caboei danah hmaitung om saeh lamtah tlangpuei ben ah caboei te khueh bal.
Exodus26:36 Dap Thohka ham himbaiyan khaw hlampai a thim
Exodus26:37 Himbaiyan ham rhining tung panga ah saii lamtah te te sui ben thil. Te sui voei ham khaw rhohum buenhol panga hlawn pah.
Exodus27:1 Rhining thing hmueihtuk a yun dong nga neh a daang dong nga ah saii. Hmueihtuk te hniboeng la om saeh lamtah a sang te dong thum lo saeh.
Exodus27:2 Te phoeiah a ki te a kil pali ah saii pah. Te lamkah a ki aka om khaw rhohum ben thil.
Exodus27:3 A duen ham a am neh a hmaisoh khaw
Exodus27:4 Rhohum vairhuek dongkah kutngo la pahak saii lamtah vairhuek dongkah a hmoi pali ah rhohum kutcaeng pali saii pah.
Exodus27:5 Te te hmueihtuk kong dangah a laedil la khueh lamtah vairhuek te hmueihtuk boengli hil om saeh.
Exodus27:6 Te phoeiah rhining thing thingpang te hmueihtuk ham a cung la saii lamtah te te rhohum ben thil.
Exodus27:7 A cung te kutcaeng khuila rholh lamtah hmueihtuk a koh vaengah a cung a vae rhoi ah om saeh.
Exodus27:8 Te te thingphael aka khui neh saii lamtah tlang ah nang n'tueng bangla saii tangloeng.
Exodus27:9 Tuithim ben ah dungtlungim vongup ham tuithim thoh te thung pah. Te vaengah vongtung hamla hnitang te a yun dong yakhat ah a hmoi pakhat la rhuih tah pah.
Exodus27:10 A tung pakul neh a buenhol pakul te rhohum saeh lamtah tung dongkah voei neh a yaeltlang ngun saeh.
Exodus27:11 Tlangpuei ben ah khaw thoh te a yun la a yun yakhat lo van saeh. A tung bal khaw a tung pakul neh a buenhol pakul tah rhohum vetih tung dongkah voei neh a yaeltlang ngun saeh.
Exodus27:12 Khotlak ben kah vongtung la thoh a daang dong sawmnga lo saeh. A tung parha neh a buenhol khaw parha lo saeh.
Exodus27:13 Vongtung kah a daang te khocuk khothoeng ben ah dong sawmnga lo saeh.
Exodus27:14 A hlaep kah thoh te dong hlai nga vetih a tung pathum neh a buenhol khaw pathum saeh.
Exodus27:15 A pabae a hlaep ah khaw thoh dong hlai nga neh a tung pathum
Exodus27:16 Vongtung vongka kah himbaiyan ham te dong kul ah a thim
Exodus27:17 Vongup kaepvai kah tung boeih cak neh cen saeh. A voei khaw cak saeh lamtah a buenhol te rhohum saeh.
Exodus27:18 Vongtung kah a yun te dong yakhat vetih a daang dong sawmnga
Exodus27:19 Dungtlungim kah hnopai boeih neh a thothuengnah boeih dongkah khaw
Exodus27:20 Namah loh Israel ca rhoek te uen lamtah hmaithoi dongah hmaivang la phat tok ham olive situi cil a sui te nang taengla hang khuen uh saeh.
Exodus27:21 Laipainah hmai
Exodus28:1 Namah loh Israel ca rhoek khui lamkah na maya Aaron neh a taengkah anih ca rhoek te namah taengah khueh laeh. Aaron amah neh Aaron ca rhoek Nadab
Exodus28:2 Na maya Aaron ham himbai cim te thangpomnah neh boeimangnah la khueh pah.
Exodus28:3 Namah loh cueihnah mueihla ka cung sak tih lungbuei kah aka cueih boeih te thui pah. Te vaengah kai taengkah khosoih la aka ciim uh Aaron kah himbai te hui uh saeh.
Exodus28:4 Te himbai dongah rhangpho neh hnisui
Exodus28:5 Amih loh sui neh a thim neh
Exodus28:6 Hnisui te sui
Exodus28:7 Te dongkah a hmoi rhoi ah aka om te holhnam rhoi ah hlin saeh lamtah phaai uh saeh.
Exodus28:8 A pholip dongah cihin khaw a kutngo bangla amah dongah om saeh lamtah sui
Exodus28:9 Te phoeiah oitha lung panit te lo lamtah a soah Israel ca ming tarhit pah.
Exodus28:10 A ming parhuk te lungto pakhat dongah ming parhuk vetih aka coih te lungto pabae dongah amamih kah rhuirhong bangla tarhit pah.
Exodus28:11 Kutthai kutnaep
Exodus28:12 Lungto rhoi te hnisui dongkah holhnam dongla Israel ca rhoek kah poekkoepnah lungto la hulh pah. Te vaengah Aaron loh amih ming te BOEIPA mikhmuh kah poekkoepnah la a laengpang rhoi ah vah saeh.
Exodus28:13 Te phoeiah sui oibom saii.
Exodus28:14 Sui cilh neh cangtui-rhaica te rhuinit hulh lamtah te te kutci neh rhuivaeh la khueh. Te phoeiah rhuivaeh cangtui-rhaica te oibom dongah khit.
Exodus28:15 Hnisui dongkah kutngo bangla laitloeknah rhangpho na saii khaw bibi la moeh. Te te sui neh hlampai
Exodus28:16 Te te yaep lamtah a yun khap at neh a daang khap at ah hniboeng la om saeh.
Exodus28:17 Te soah lungto hulhnah te a than pali la dueh. Than cuek te lungling
Exodus28:18 A than bae dongah khocillung
Exodus28:19 A than thum dongah oithii
Exodus28:20 A than li dongah timsuih
Exodus28:21 Lungto rhoek khaw Israel ca hlai nit ming la sum uh saeh. Kutbuen thingthuk dongkah a ming bangla hlang boeih he koca hlai nit dongah amah ming neh om uh saeh.
Exodus28:22 Rhangpho soah cangtui-rhaica cuehnah te sui cilh rhuivaeh neh kutnaep la saii.
Exodus28:23 Rhangpho dongkah sui kutcaeng panit saii lamtah rhangpho kah a hmoi rhoi ah kutcaeng nit la buen.
Exodus28:24 Sui rhuivaeh rhoi te rhangpho hmoi kah kutcaeng rhoi dongla khih pah.
Exodus28:25 Te phoeiah rhuivaeh rhoi kah a hmoi rhoi te oibom rhoi dongla hlin lamtah a maelhmai hmai a hnisui dongah holhnam dongla khih pah.
Exodus28:26 Te phoeiah sui kutcaeng panit saii lamtah te te rhangpho kah a hmoi rhoi la khit. A hmuidong te hnisui saa dongah a khui la det.
Exodus28:27 Te phoeiah sui kutcaeng panit saii lamtah te te a hmai kah a dang
Exodus28:28 Rhangpho kah a kutcaeng lamloh hnisui kah kutcaeng duela a kutcaeng te pin saeh lamtah hnisui kah cihin duela hamnak thim neh om saeh. Te daengah ni hnisui dong lamkah rhangpho te khaw a hawl pawt eh.
Exodus28:29 Te dongah Aaron Israel ca ming te a lungbuei dongkah laitloeknah rhangpho dongah vah saeh lamtah hmuencim la a kun vaengah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah poekkoepnah la om yoeyah saeh.
Exodus28:30 Laitloeknah rhangpho khuiah Urim neh Thummim khueh pah lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh la a kun vaengah Aaron kah lungbuei ah om. Te vaengah Aaron loh Israel ca kah laitloeknah te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a lungbuei ah phuei yoeyah saeh.
Exodus28:31 Hnisui hnikul te a thim la boeih saii.
Exodus28:32 A hmoi a laklung ah a lu ham a rhai om saeh. A rhai kaepvai te rhawnmoep rhai a om bangla kutnaep la a yen neh om saeh. Te daengah ni te a pawn pawt eh.
Exodus28:33 A hnihmoi ah tale a thim
Exodus28:34 Hnikul kah hnihmoi dongah sui hling neh tale thaih
Exodus28:35 Aaron soah thohtat ham om tih BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmuencim la a kun vaengah a ol pa saeh. Te daengah ni a vuenva vaengah a duek pawt eh.
Exodus28:36 Te phoeiah sui cilh tamlaep te saii lamtah a sokah kutbuen thingthuk te
Exodus28:37 Te te hamrhui thim dongah khih pah lamtah lupong dongah om saeh. Lupong hmai ah ah om saeh.
Exodus28:38 Te vaengah Aaron tal ah om vetih cimcaihnah dongah a ciim Israel ca rhoek kah thaesainah te amih kah cimcaihnah kutdoe boeih te Aaron loh phuei saeh. Te daengah ni amih ham khaw a tal dongah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah kolonah la phat a om eh.
Exodus28:39 Hnitang angkidung te cueh lamtah hnitang lupong khaw saii. Te phoeiah lamko saii lamtah kutnaep la en.
Exodus28:40 Aaron koca rhoek ham khaw angkidung khueh pah lamtah amih ham lamko saii pah. Samkhuem khaw amih thangpomnah ham neh boeimangnah ham saii pah.
Exodus28:41 Te te na maya Aaron neh a taengkah anih koca rhoek te bai sak lamtah amih te koelh. Amih kut te cung sak lamtah amih te ciim. Te phoeiah kai taengla khosoih uh saeh.
Exodus28:42 Amih ham a yah saa aka dah la takhlawk hnii saii pah lamtah a chinghen lamloh a phai duela dah saeh.
Exodus28:43 Aaron neh anih koca loh tingtunnah dap khuila a kun uh vaengah khaw
Exodus29:1 Kamah taengah khosoih sak ham a ciim uh vaengah amih taengah he ol bangla saii. Te vaengah saelhung ca khuikah vaito pakhat neh tutal panit a hmabuet te khuen pah.
Exodus29:2 Te vaengah vaidamding buh
Exodus29:3 Te rhoek te kodawn pakhat dongah sang lamtah kodawn khaw
Exodus29:4 Te phoeiah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te tingtunnah dap thohka la khuen lamtah amih te tui neh sil.
Exodus29:5 Te phoeiah himbai te lo lamtah Aaron te angkidung neh hnisui hnikul khaw
Exodus29:6 A lu soah lupong muei sak lamtah lupong te cimcaihnah rhuisam khuem sak.
Exodus29:7 Te phoeiah koelhnah situi lo lamtah a lu ah suep lamtah anih te koelh.
Exodus29:8 Anih koca rhoek te khaw hang kuen lamtah angkidung bai sak.
Exodus29:9 Aaron neh a ca rhoek te lamko vah sak lamtah amih te samkhuem khuem sak. Te te khosoihbi dongah kumhal khosing la om saeh lamtah Aaron kut neh anih koca kah kut te cung sak.
Exodus29:10 Vaitotal te tingtunnah dap hmai la khuen lamtah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut te vaitotal lu soah tloeng saeh.
Exodus29:11 Te phoeiah vaitotal te tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah ngawn.
Exodus29:12 Vaito thii te lo lamtah na kutdawn neh hmueihtuk ki dongah pae. Te phoeikah thii boeih te hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah hawk.
Exodus29:13 Te phoeiah a kotak aka thing a tha boeih neh
Exodus29:14 Tedae vaito saa neh a pho khaw
Exodus29:15 Tutal pakhat te khuen bal lamtah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut te tutal lu soah tloeng uh saeh.
Exodus29:16 Tutal te na ngawn phoeiah a thii te lo lamtah hmueihtuk kaepvai ah haeh.
Exodus29:17 Te phoeiah tu te maehpoel la sah. Tedae a kotak neh a kho te sil lamtah maehpoel neh a lu te khueh.
Exodus29:18 Tu a pum te hmueihtuk soah BOEIPA kah hmueihhlutnah la phum. Te te BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah la om saeh.
Exodus29:19 A pabae kah tutal te khuen bal lamtah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut te tutal kah a lu soah loh tloeng saeh.
Exodus29:20 Tu te na ngawn phoeiah a thii te lo lamtah Aaron hna kah hnapae so neh a ca rhoek hna kah a bantang hnapae dongah khaw
Exodus29:21 Te phoeiah hmueihtuk sokah thii neh koelhnah situi te lo lamtah Aaron so neh a himbai soah khaw
Exodus29:22 Te phoeiah tu tha neh a kawl
Exodus29:23 Kodawn lamkah buh hluem at neh buh tha laep khat neh vaidamrhawm pakhat te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah vaidamding la om saeh.
Exodus29:24 A cungkuem te Aaron kut dong neh anih koca rhoek kut ah tloeng lamtah te te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la thueng.
Exodus29:25 Te phoeiah amih kut lamkah te lo lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmueihtuk ah hmueihhlutnah neh hmuehmuei botui la phum. Te tah BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah la om saeh.
Exodus29:26 Saboi tu kah a rhang te Aaron ham loh pah lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la thueng pah. Te phoeiah nang ham maehvae la om saeh.
Exodus29:27 Thueng hmueih kah a rhang te a ciim phoeiah tah khosaa kah a laeng te thueng pah. Te te Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek ham ni saboi tu lamloh a ludoeng pah.
Exodus29:28 He tah Israel ca rhoek taeng lamloh Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek ham kumhal khosaa kah oltlueh la om saeh. Te khosaa tah Israel ca rhoek lamloh BOEIPA taengah amih kah khosaa la a nawn rhoepnah hmueih la om saeh.
Exodus29:29 Aaron kah cimcaihnah himbai khaw anih phoeikah amah koca rhoek ham om pah saeh. Te dongah amih te koelh saeh lamtah amih kut te khaw amamih ah cung saeh.
Exodus29:30 A ca rhoek khui lamloh anih yueng hmuencim ah thotat ham tingtunnah dap khuila aka kun khosoih loh hnin rhih khuiah te te bai saeh.
Exodus29:31 Saboi tu te lo lamtah a saa te hmuen cim ah thong.
Exodus29:32 Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh tingtunnah dap thohka kah tu saa neh kodawn dongkah kah buh te ca saeh.
Exodus29:33 Te dongah te te amih a dawth tangtae tih ciim hamla a kut aka cung long tah ca saeh. Tedae te te a cim dongah kholong loh ca boel saeh.
Exodus29:34 Tedae saboi maeh neh buh te mincang duela a coih atah a coih te hmai neh hoeh laeh. Te tah a cim dongah ca uh boel saeh.
Exodus29:35 Te dongah nang kang uen boeih te Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek ham saii lamtah amih kut te hnin rhih khuiah cung sak laeh.
Exodus29:36 Dawthnah ham hnin at ham boirhaem vaito nawn lamtah te ham na dawth nen te hmueihtuk dongah ciim sak. Te phoeiah hmueihtuk te ciim hamla koelh.
Exodus29:37 Hmueihtuk ham hnin rhih khuiah dawth pah lamtah ciim. Te vaengah hmueihtuk te a cim kah a cim koek la om vetih hmueihtuk neh aka ben uh boeih khaw a ciim eh.
Exodus29:38 Hmueihtuk soah na nawn te tah kum khat tu ca vetih hnin at ham pumnit yoeyah saeh.
Exodus29:39 Tuca pakhat te mincang ah nawn lamtah tuca pabae te kholaeh ah nawn.
Exodus29:40 Bunang pali la a sui situi neh a thoek vaidam doh
Exodus29:41 Tuca pabae te tah kholaeh ah mincang khosaa neh tuisi la nawn. Te nen BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah la saii.
Exodus29:42 Na cadilcahma ham khaw tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hmueihhlutnah la om yoeyah saeh. Te ah nang te pahoi voek ham namah pahoi kan tuentah bitni.
Exodus29:43 Israel ca te khaw pahoi ka tuentah bal vetih ka thangpomnah loh a ciim ni.
Exodus29:44 Tingtunnah dap neh hmueihtuk te ka ciim tangloeng vetih Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te kamah taengah khosoih sak ham ka ciim ni.
Exodus29:45 Israel ca rhoek lakli ah kho ka sak vetih amih taengah Pathen la ka om ni.
Exodus29:46 Te vaengah Egypt kho lamloh amih aka khuen
Exodus30:1 Bo-ul hlupnah hmueihtuk na saii vaengah rhining thing mah saii.
Exodus30:2 Hmueihtuk te a yun dong khat neh a daang dong khat saeh lamtah hniboeng la om saeh. Amah lamloh a ki hil a sang dong nit lo saeh.
Exodus30:3 Te te a imphu khaw
Exodus30:4 A vae rhoi kah a khopnah hmui ah sui kutcaeng panit saii pah. A vae rhoi kah na saii phoeiah tah te kah te hmueihtuk aka kawt ham thingpang rholhnah la om saeh.
Exodus30:5 Thingpang te rhining thing saii lamtah sui neh ben thil.
Exodus30:6 Hmueihtuk te olphong sokah a tlaeng hmai
Exodus30:7 Te dongah te Aaron loh mincang
Exodus30:8 Aaron loh hlaemhmah kah hmaithoi a vang vaengah khaw bo-ul te phum saeh. Te te na cadilcahma ham khaw BOEIPA mikhmuh ah saii yoeyah saeh.
Exodus30:9 Te soah te kholong kah bo-ul neh hmueihhlutnah khaw khocang khaw khuen boeh. Te soah tuisi khaw doeng boeh.
Exodus30:10 Aaron loh kum khat ah vai tah hmueihtuk ki dongah boirhaem thii neh dawth saeh. Kum khat ah vai tah hmueihtuk dongah na cadilcahma ham dawthnah neh dawth pah saeh. Te tah BOEIPA ham a cim kah a cim koek ni.
Exodus30:11 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Exodus30:12 Israel ca rhoek kah hlangmi te tae lamtah amih te soep. Te vaengah hlang boeih loh a hinglu kah tlansum te BOEIPA taengah pae uh saeh. Amih te ming a soep daengah ni a soep vanbangla tlohthae loh amih soah a om pawt eh.
Exodus30:13 Ming soep ham aka paan boeih loh gerah pakul neh aka tluk hmuencim shekel te shekel ngancawn ah pae uh saeh. Shekel khat dong shekel rhakthuem he BOEIPA kah khosaa ni.
Exodus30:14 Ming soep ham aka paan kum kul ca neh a so boeih long tah BOEIPA taengah khosaa pae saeh.
Exodus30:15 Na hinglu dawth ham BOEIPA kah khosaa na khueh te shekel pakhat kah rhakthuem lakah hlanglen long khaw pueh boel saeh lamtah tattloel long khaw hnop boel saeh.
Exodus30:16 Israel ca rhoek taeng lamkah dawthnah tangka na doe te tingtunnah dap ah thothuengnah ham pae. Na hinglu aka dawth ham te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah Israel ca rhoek kah poekkoepnah la om saeh
Exodus30:17 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Exodus30:18 Silh vaengkah ham rhohum baeldung khaw saii lamtah a kho khaw rhohum saeh. Te te tingtunnah dap laklo neh hmueihtuk laklo ah hol lamtah tui pahoi tawn thil.
Exodus30:19 Te lamlong te Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut
Exodus30:20 Tingtunnah dap im khuila a kun uh vaengah tui hlu uh saeh. Te daengah ni BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah phum ham neh thohtat ham hmueihtuk la a thoeih vaengah a duek uh pawt eh.
Exodus30:21 A kut a kho te a silh uh daengah ni a duek uh pawt eh. Te dongah amah ham neh a tiingan ham khaw
Exodus30:22 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek bal tih
Exodus30:23 “Namah bal loh namah ham boeilu botui murrah pi ya nga
Exodus30:24 valaeng khaw hmuencim kah shekel dongah ya nga neh olive situi bunang khat ah lo laeh.
Exodus30:25 Te phoeiah aka thungnom bibi kah yuhnah si bangla hmuencim koelhnah situi he saii lamtah hmuencim kah koelhnah situi la om saeh.
Exodus30:26 Te nen te tingtunnah dap neh olphong thingkawng khaw
Exodus30:27 caboei neh a tubael boeih khaw
Exodus30:28 hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk neh a hnopai boeih khaw
Exodus30:29 Te rhoek te na ciim tangloeng daengah ni a cim kah a cim la om te te aka ben boeih khaw a cimcaih eh.
Exodus30:30 Aaron neh anih koca rhoek khaw koelh lamtah kamah taengah khosoih sak ham amih te ciim laeh.
Exodus30:31 Israel ca te khaw thui pah lamtah
Exodus30:32 Hlang pum dongah yuh nah boel saeh lamtah te kah a lantang neh te bang te saii boeh. Te kah a cim te nangmih taengah khaw a cim la om saeh.
Exodus30:33 Te bang aka thungnom tih kholong taengah te aka pae hlang te tah a pilnam lamloh hnawt saeh
Exodus30:34 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Exodus30:35 Te te thungnom kutci loh cilrhik la a thoek
Exodus30:36 Te te a tip la neet lamtah tingtunnah dap khuikah olphong hmai ah khueh. Te ah te nang kan tuentah vetih nangmih ham hmuencim kah hmuencim koek la om ni.
Exodus30:37 Te bo-ul na saii vaengkah a lan a tang neh namah ham saii boeh. BOEIPA ham namah taengah a cim om.
Exodus30:38 Te te him ham te bang aka saii hlang te a pilnam lamloh hnawt saeh
Exodus31:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih

Exodus31:15 Hnin rhuk khuiah bitat te saii saeh. Tedae hnin rhih dongah koiyaeh Sabbath tah BOEIPA ham khaw cim saeh. Sabbath hnin ah bitat aka saii boeih tah duek rhoe duek saeh.

Exodus33:1 BOEIPA loh Moses taengah

Exodus33:4 Pilnam loh ol thae he a yaak vaengah nguekcoi uh tih hlang loh a pum dongkah a cangen khaw oi uh pawh.
Exodus33:5 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses te Israel ca rhoek te thui pah. Nangmih he rhawn thah pilnam ni. Na khui ah mikhaptok ah vai ka pongpa vetih nang kan thup ve. Na cangen khaw na pum dong lamloh pit laeh. Na taengah mebang ka saii ham khaw ka ming ngawn
Exodus33:6 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh a cangen te Horeb tlang ah a dul uh.
Exodus33:7 Moses loh dap te a puen tih rhaehhmuen lamkah a lakhla la rhaehhmuen vongvoel ah amah la a tuk. Te te tingtunnah dap la a khue tih BOEIPA aka dawt boeih loh rhaehhmuen vongvoel kah tingtunnah dap te a paan.
Exodus33:8 Moses te dap la a caeh vaengah pilnam pum khaw thoo uh tih hlang he amah kah dap thohka ah pai uh. Te vaengah dap khuila a kun hil Moses hnuk te a paelki uh.
Exodus33:9 Dap khuila Moses a kun van neh cingmai tung ha suntla. Te vaengah dap thohka ah pai tih Moses te a voek.
Exodus33:10 Dap thohka kah aka pai cingmai tung te pilnam loh boeih a hmuh. Te dongah pilnam te boeih thoo tih hlang he amah kah dap thohka ah ni a bakop uh coeng.

Exodus33:12 Te phoeiah Moses loh BOEIPA te
Exodus33:13 Na mikhmuh ah mikdaithen ka hmuh van coeng atah na longpuei te kai m'ming sak laeh. Namah kan ming daengah man na mikhmuh ah mikdaithen khaw ka hmuh ve. Namtom he na pilnam la hmuh mai
Exodus33:14 Tedae

Exodus34:1 BOEIPA loh Moses taengah
Exodus34:2 Mincang ah sikim la om lamtah mincang neh Sinai tlang la ha luei. Te phoeiah tlang lu ah kamah taengla pahoi pai.
Exodus34:3 Tedae na taengah hlang ha luei boel saeh lamtah hlang pakhat pataeng tlang tom ah phoe boel saeh. Boiva neh saelhung khaw tlang dan ah he luem uh boel saeh
Exodus34:4 Te dongah lungto cabael rhoi te lamhma kah bangla a saek. Mincang ah Moses te thoo tih BOEIPA loh amah a uen bangla Sinai tlang ah yoeng. Te vaengah lungto cabael rhoi te a kut dongah a pom.
Exodus34:5 Te phoeiah BOEIPA te cingmai neh ha rhum tih a taengah pahoi pai. Te vaengah BOEIPA ming neh a doek.
Exodus34:6 BOEIPA te a hmai ah a pah pah vaengah tah
Exodus34:7 Sitlohnah he thawngkhat ham khaw a kueinah dongah thaesainah
Exodus34:8 Te vaengah Moses tah diklai la koe buluk tih bakop.

Exodus34:10 Boeipa loh
Exodus34:11 Tihnin ah nang kang uen te namah ham ngaithuen. Na mikhmuh lamloh
Exodus34:12 Namah khaw ngaithuen
Exodus34:13 A hmueihtuk te palet pah lamtah a kaam te phaek pah. Anih kah Asherah khaw vung pah.
Exodus34:14 A ming mah thatlai YAHWEH coeng tih Pathen tah a thatlai thai dongah pathen tloe taengah bakop boeh.
Exodus34:15 A pathen taengkah a cukhalh neh a pathen te a nawn uh dongah a hmueih te caak ham nang n'khue akhaw khohmuen kah khosa taengah moi na bop ve.
Exodus34:16 A canu te na capa ham na lo cakhaw a canu khaw a Pathen hnukah cukhalh uh. Te dongah na ca rhoek te amih kah pathen taengah cukhalh hae ni.
Exodus34:17 Mueihlawn pathen khaw namah ham saii boeh.
Exodus34:18 Nang kang uen bangla vaidamding khotue te hnin rhih yaeh lamtah vaidamding mah ca. Egypt lamloh Abib hla dongah na thoh dongah Abib hla ah tingtunnah om saeh.
Exodus34:19 Bung lamkah cacuek boeih
Exodus34:20 Tedae laak cacuek tah tu neh lat. Na lat pawt bal atah pahoi at laeh. Na capa caming boeih tah lat lamtah ka mikhmuh ah kuttling la phoe boel saeh.
Exodus34:21 Hnin rhuk khuiah thotat lamtah hnin rhih dongah tah lophoh vaengah khaw duem lamtah cangah vaengah khaw nduem.
Exodus34:22 Cang dongkah cangah vaengkah thaihcuek khotue yalh neh kum thoknah cangyom khotue te namah ham saii.
Exodus34:23 Namah khuikah tongpaca boeih tah kum khat ah voei thum Israel Pathen
Exodus34:24 Namtom te na mikhmuh lamloh ka haek vetih na khorhi khaw kang aeh ni. BOEIPA na Pathen mikhmuh la kum khat ah voei thum phoe ham na caeh daengah ni na khohmuen te hlang loh ham veet pawt eh.
Exodus34:25 Kai kah hmueih thii te tolrhu neh ngawn boeh. Yoom khotue kah hmueih loh mincang duela rhaeh boel saeh.
Exodus34:26 Na khohmuen kah tanglue thaihcuek te BOEIPA na Pathen im la khuen. Maae ca te a manu suktui neh thong boeh
Exodus34:27 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Exodus34:28 BOEIPA neh a om vaengah khothaih hni sawmli
Exodus34:29 Moses te Sinai tlang lamloh a suntlak vaengah Moses kut dongah olphong cabael rhoi khaw om. Tlang lamloh a suntlak neh amah te a voek pueng dongah a maelhmai vin a phii te khaw Moses loh ming pawh.
Exodus34:30 Aaron neh Israel ca boeih loh Moses te a hmuh uh vaengah a maelhmai vin tarha a phii coeng dongah a taengla mop ham a rhih uh.
Exodus34:31 Tedae Moses loh amih te a khue dongah Aaron neh rhaengpuei kah khoboei boeih tah anih taengla mael uh tih Moses loh amih te a voek.
Exodus34:32 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhoek boeih te mop uh. Te vaengah Sinai tlang ah BOEIPA anih taengkah a thui boeih te amih a uen.
Exodus34:33 Moses loh amih taengah a thui te a khah van neh a maelhmai te a lumuekhni neh a dah.
Exodus34:34 Tedae BOEIPA amah te voek ham a mikhmuh la kun tih amah ha pawk daengah lumuekhni a lim pueng. Ha pawk phoeiah tah amah a uen te Israel ca rhoek ham a thui pah.
Exodus34:35 Israel ca rhoek loh Moses maelhmai te a hmuh vaengah Moses kah maelhmai vin a phii pah. Tedae Boeipa amah te voek ham a kun hil Moses loh lumuekhni neh a maelhmai te a dah.

Exodus35:3 Sabbath hnin ah tah na tolrhum tom ah hmai toih uh boeh.
Exodus35:4 Moses loh Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih te
Exodus35:5 Nangmih taeng lamloh BOEIPA ham khosaa khuen uh. A lungbuei aka hlangcong boeih loh BOEIPA kah khosaa te sui neh cak neh rhohum khaw

Exodus35:22 Lungbuei ah aka hlangcong boeih tah a yuu a va la kun uh tih tlaeloh neh hnaii khaw
Exodus35:23 Hlang boeih loh te te a hmuh vaengah a thim neh daidi khaw
Exodus35:24 Khosaa aka ludoeng boeih loh cak neh rhohum te BOEIPA kah khosaa la a khuen uh. Te te aka hmu boeih loh rhining thing te thothuengnah bitat cungkuem ham a khuen uh.
Exodus35:25 Lungbuei aka cueih nu boeih loh a kut neh a hnuh uh tih hnitah te a thim neh daidi
Exodus35:26 Amih a lungbuei a cahoeh pah nu boeih loh cueihnah neh a hnuh maae mul khaw a khuen uh.
Exodus35:27 Khoboei rhoek loh oitha lungto neh hnisui rhangpho ham saboi lungto a khuen uh bal.
Exodus35:28 Botui neh hmaivang ham situi khaw
Exodus35:29 Huta tongpa a lungbuei aka puhlu boeih

Exodus35:32 Te phoeiah sui neh ngun dongah khaw

Exodus35:34 amah a lungbuei kah te thuinuet ham Dan koca lamkah Ahisamak capa Oholiab te a paek.

Exodus36:2 Te phoeiah Moses loh Bazelel
Exodus36:3 Te phoeiah hmuencim thothuengnah bitat la saii ham Israel ca rhoek loh a khuen khosaa cungkuem te Moses mikhmuh lamloh a doe uh. Amih loh te te mincang
Exodus36:4 Te phoeiah hmuencim kah bitat boeih aka saii hlang cueih boeih neh hlang boeih khaw amah kah bitat a saii lamloh ha pawk uh.
Exodus36:5 Te phoeiah Moses te a voek uh tih
Exodus36:6 Te phoeiah Moses loh a uen bangla rhaehhmuen ah ol a thak uh tih
Exodus36:7 Bitat ham a rhoeh la a om phoeiah bitat cungkuem dongah te te hnonah ham khaw coih coeng.
Exodus36:8 Bitat aka saii khuiah lungbuei aka cueih boeih loh dungtlungim te a saii uh. Himbaiyan yungrha te hnitang la a tah tih a thim
Exodus36:9 Himbaiyan pakhat kah a yun he dong kul dong rhet
Exodus36:10 Himbaiyan yung nga te pakhat neh pakhat a cong tih himbaiyan yung nga te khaw khat neh khat cong uh.
Exodus36:11 Himbaiyan pakhat kah a hmoi phai ah rhuikawl a thim te rhui at a bawt hil a buen pah. Te tlam te a tloe himbaiyan hmoi kah rhui at a bawt hil a saii.
Exodus36:12 Himbaiyan yung khat dongah rhuikawl sawmnga a saii tih himbaiyan a pabae khaw rhui at la a hmoi ah rhuikawl sawmnga a saii. Te dongah khat neh khat rhuikawl neh a doe sak.
Exodus36:13 Te phoeiah sui rhuithu sawmnga a saii tih rhuithu lamloh himbaiyan khat neh khat te a hlinghlui dongah dungtlungim khaw pakhat la om.
Exodus36:14 Dungtlungim kah dap ham himbaiyan te maae mul neh a saii tih himbaiyan yung hlai khat a saii.
Exodus36:15 Himbaiyan yungat te a yun dong sawmthum
Exodus36:16 Himbaiyan yung nga te hloep a cong tih himbaiyan yung rhuk te pakhat la a cong.
Exodus36:17 Himbaiyan pakhat kah a hmoi ah a bawt due rhuikawl sawmnga te rhui at la a saii tih a pabae himbaiyan kah a hmoi ah rhuikawl sawmnga ham buenyang a saii.
Exodus36:18 Te dongah rhohum rhuithu sawmnga a saii dap te a hlinghlui tih pakhat la a om sak.
Exodus36:19 Dap imphu te tutal pho a thimyum neh a sokah imphu la saham pho neh a saii.
Exodus36:20 Te phoeiah dungtlungim ham a longlaeng te rhining thing aka pai te a saii.
Exodus36:21 A longlaeng pakhat te a yun dong rha neh a daang dong khat phoeiah dong kaek lo tih a longlaeng te rhip vai uh.
Exodus36:22 A longlaeng pakhat dongah dangkam rhoi khaw khat neh khat kiba uh. Te tlam te dungtlungim kah a longlaeng te boeih a saii.
Exodus36:23 Dungtlungim kah a longlaeng te tuithim ah tuithim saa kah a longlaeng te yung kul a saii.
Exodus36:24 A longlaeng pakhat dangah dangkam rhoi ham buenhol panit neh a longlaeng yung kul ham cakben buenhol sawmli a saii. Te dongah a longlaeng pakhat dangah buenhol panit neh dangkam panit om.
Exodus36:25 Dungtlungim khat ben tlangpuei saa ah a longlaeng pakul a khueh.
Exodus36:26 A longlaeng pakhat dangah buenhol panit
Exodus36:27 Dungtlungim kah imthael khotlak sa ham tah a longlaeng yung rhuk a saii.
Exodus36:28 Imthael ah dungtlungim kah a ngong ham khaw a longlaeng panit a khueh.
Exodus36:29 Te te hmui lamloh tungbok la om vetih a soi ah tah kutcaeng pakhat khuiah pakhat la rhenten ben uh. Te rhoi dongkah bangla imki rhoi kah ham khaw a saii.
Exodus36:30 Te dongah a longlaeng parhet vaengah a longlaeng pakhat hmuikah buenhol panit
Exodus36:31 Dungtlungim impalai kah a longlaeng pakhat ham thohkalh panga te rhining thing a saii.
Exodus36:32 Dungtlungim khat ben impalai kah a longlaeng dongah khaw thohkalh panga tih dungtlungim khotlak imthael kah a longlaeng dongkah ham thohkalh panga om.
Exodus36:33 Tedae a bangli kah thohkalh a saii long tah a longlaeng te a hmoi lamloh a bawt hil a bangli ah yong phai.
Exodus36:34 A longlaeng te khaw sui a ben thil tih thohkalh rholhnah ham a kutcaeng te sui ni a saii. Thohkalh te khaw sui a ben thil.
Exodus36:35 Te phoeiah hniyan te a thim
Exodus36:36 Te ham te rhining tung pali a saii tih sui a ben thil. A voei te sui tih te dongkah buenhol pali ham te cak a hlawn.
Exodus36:37 Dap thohka kah himbaiyan te a saii vaengah a thim
Exodus36:38 A tung panga neh a voei rhoek te khaw a soi ah a ben pah tih a yaeltlang te sui
Exodus37:1 Bezalel loh rhining thing te thingkawng a yun dong nit ngancawn
Exodus37:2 Te phoeiah a khui a hman ah sui cilh a ben thil tih a kaep a kong khaw sui neh a saii.
Exodus37:3 A kho pali dongah sui kutcaeng pali a hlawn. A vae khat ben ah kutcaeng panit
Exodus37:4 Rhining thing thingpang la a suih tih sui a ben thil.
Exodus37:5 Thingpang te thingkawng aka kawt ham thingkawng vae kah kutcaeng dongah a rholh.
Exodus37:6 A tlaeng te sui cilh neh a yun dong nit tintan neh a daang dong at tintan la a saii.
Exodus37:7 Sui cakben cherubim panit te a saii tih te rhoi te a tlaeng kah a hmoi rhoi ah a ben.
Exodus37:8 Thingkawng tlaeng lamloh khat ben a hmoi ah cherubim pakhat neh khat ben a hmoi ah cherubim pakhat tih cherubim te a hmoi ah a hmuicue panit a saii.
Exodus37:9 Cherubim aka om rhoi loh a phae a phuel hang rhoi tih a phae neh thingkawng tlaeng te a khu rhoi. A maelhmai rhoi khaw pakhat loh a manuca taengla mael. Te dongah cherubim kah maelhmai te thingkawng tlaeng soah hum uh.
Exodus37:10 Te phoeiah rhining thing te caboei a yun dong nit neh a daang dong khat
Exodus37:11 Te te sui cilh a ben thil a kaep kah a khopnah khaw sui ni a saii.
Exodus37:12 Te ham te a kae a kaep ah kutsom pakhat a khueh tih a kae soah a khopnah te sui neh pin a saii.
Exodus37:13 Te ham te sui kutcaeng pali a hlawn tih kutcaeng te a kho pali kah a kil pali ah a buen.
Exodus37:14 A kae kah voeivang ah caboei aka kawt ham thingpang rholhnah kutcaeng om.
Exodus37:15 Caboei aka kawt ham thingpang te rhining thing a suih tih sui a ben thil.
Exodus37:16 Te phoeiah caboei dongkah hnopai la a bael neh a yakbu khaw
Exodus37:17 Hmaitung la sui cilh cakben neh a saii tih hmaitung kah a kho neh a bunang kong khaw a saii. Te lamloh a paimuem neh a rhaiphuelh om.
Exodus37:18 A vae khat ben lamloh hmaitung kah a kong pathum
Exodus37:19 A kong pakhat dongah rhaimuem rhaiphuelh neh noepai bunang pathum
Exodus37:20 Hmaitung dongah noepai bunang pali khaw rhaimuem rhaiphuelh neh a khueh.
Exodus37:21 A kong panit hmuiah rhaimuem pakhat neh
Exodus37:22 Te lamkah a rhaimuem neh a kong te sui cilh a boh neh pakhat la boeih om.
Exodus37:23 Hmaithoi parhih neh a paitaeh khaw a baelphaih khaw sui cilh ni a saii.
Exodus37:24 Te hmaithoi a hnopai boeih te sui cilh talent khat neh a saii.
Exodus37:25 Te phoeiah rhining thing te bo-ul hmueihtuk a yun dong khat
Exodus37:26 Te te sui cilh neh a imphu neh a pangbueng phai khaw a ki khaw a ben thil tih hmui a kaep kah a khopnah te sui a saii.
Exodus37:27 Te ham te a khopnah hmui ah sui kutcaeng panit a saii. Te te hmueihtuk aka kawt ham thingpang rholhnah la a vae rhoi ah a buen.
Exodus37:28 Rhining thing te thingpang la a suih tih sui a ben thil.
Exodus37:29 Hmuencim kah koelhnah situi neh aka thungnom kutci bangla botui bo-ul cil khaw a saii.
Exodus38:1 Rhining thing te hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk
Exodus38:2 A kil pali ah a ki a saii pah tih a ki aka om rhoek te rhohum a ben thil.
Exodus38:3 Te phoeiah hmueihtuk dongkah hnopai cungkuem
Exodus38:4 Hmueihtuk ham a loengboeng hmui lamloh a kong hmui hil rhohum vairhuek dongkah bibi bangla pahak a saii.
Exodus38:5 Thingpang rholhnah ham rhohum pahak kah a hmuicue pali ah kutcaeng pali a hlawn.
Exodus38:6 Rhining thing te thingpang la a suih tih rhohum a ben thil.
Exodus38:7 Te aka kawt ham te hmueihtuk vae kah kutcaeng khuiah thingpang a rholh tih hmueihtuk te thingphael aka khui rhoi neh a khop.
Exodus38:8 Aka thotat nu kah mangthuinah lamloh rhohum baeldung neh rhohum kho khaw a saii. Amih te tingtunnah dap thohka ah thotat uh.
Exodus38:9 Tuithim ben kah ah vongtung a saii tih
Exodus38:10 A tung pakul neh a buenhol pakul te rhohum tih tung dongkah voei neh a yaeltlang tah cak a saii.
Exodus38:11 Tlangpuei saa kah dong yakhat ham khaw tung pakul neh a buenhol pakul te rhohum tih
Exodus38:12 Khotlak ben kah imbang khaw dong sawmnga lo. A tung parha neh a buenhol parha lo. Tung dongkah voei neh a yaeltlang te cak a ben.
Exodus38:13 Khothoeng ben ah khaw dong sawmnga lo.
Exodus38:14 A kaep kah imbang te dong hlai nga lo. A tung pathum neh a buenhol pathum om.
Exodus38:15 A Vongup vongka hlaep kah imbang pabae te he ben ah khaw ke ben ah khaw dong hlai nga lo. A tung pathum neh a buenhol khaw pathum om.
Exodus38:16 Vongup kaepvai kah imbang boeih te hintang a tah thil.
Exodus38:17 Te vaengah tung dongkah buenhol tah rhohum tih tung dongkah voei neh a yaeltlang cak neh a saii. Te dongah vongup kah tung boeih te a soi kah cak ben phoeiah cak neh a cen uh.
Exodus38:18 Vongup vongka kah himbaiyan khaw kutci neh a thim
Exodus38:19 A tung pali neh a buenhol pali tah rhohum a saii. A voei tah cak neh a soi neh a yaeltlang tah cak ben la om.
Exodus38:20 Dungtlungim ham neh a kaepvai vongtung ham khaw rhohum hlingcong boeih a saii.
Exodus38:21 He dungtlungim la a hlum he khosoih Aaron koca Ithamar kut dongkah Levi thohtatnah
Exodus38:22 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vabangla Judah koca lamkah Hur capa Uri kah a ca Bezalel loh a cungkuem te a saii.
Exodus38:23 Tedae a taengah moehnah neh a thim la
Exodus38:24 Hmuencim bitat cungkuem dongah sui khaw bitat la boeih a saii. Te vaengah thueng hmueih dongkah sui mah hmuencim kah shekel ah talent pakul pako phoeiah shekel ya rhih sawmthum om coeng.
Exodus38:25 Rhaengpuei kah a soep cak he khaw talent yakhat neh hmuencim kah shekel ah shekel thawngkhat ya rhih sawmrhih panga lo.
Exodus38:26 Hlangmi pakhat dongah beka pakhat
Exodus38:27 Te vaengah hmuencim buenhol neh hniyan buenhol la a hlawn ham cak te talent yakhat lo coeng. Buenhol pakhat dongah talent khat van tih talent yakhat lamloh buenhol yakhat rhoeh.
Exodus38:28 Te dongah thawngkhat ya rhih neh sawmrhih panga te tung dongkah voei la a saii. Te phoeiah a soi ah a ben tih a cen.
Exodus38:29 Te phoeiah thueng hmueih rhohum talent sawmrhih neh shekel thawng nit ya li lo.
Exodus38:30 Te nen te tingtunnah dap thohka kah buenhol neh rhohum dapim hmueihtuk khaw
Exodus38:31 vongtung phai kah buenhol khaw
Exodus39:1 Hmuencim ah aka thotat kah hnithun himbai khaw a thim
Exodus39:2 Te phoeiah sui hnisui te a thim
Exodus39:3 Sui phaldaep te a daep tih hamrhui khaw a thim la
Exodus39:4 Holhnam te a hmuicue rhoi ah hlinghlui ham a saii uh tih a hmoi te a hlinghlui.
Exodus39:5 A pholip dongkah cihin khaw a bibi bangla a soah sui
Exodus39:6 Sui oibom dongkah a det oitha lungto te a saii tih kutbuen thingthuk te Israel ca rhoek kah ming la a thuk.
Exodus39:7 Te te BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Israel ca rhoek ham poekkoepnah lungto la hnisui kah holhnam dongah a bang.
Exodus39:8 Rhangpho te khaw sui hnisui dongkah kutngo bangla bibi moehnah neh a thim
Exodus39:9 Rhangpho a saii te hniboeng la om tih a yaep
Exodus39:10 A soah lungto a than
Exodus39:11 A than bae dongah ah khocillung
Exodus39:12 a than thum dongah tamsenlung
Exodus39:13 A than li dongah timsuih
Exodus39:14 Lungto te khaw Israel ca hlai nit ming neh a khueh. Lungto ming tarhing ah koca hlai nit ham khaw a ming te kutbuen thingthuk la rhip a khueh pah.
Exodus39:15 Rhangpho dongkah cuehnah cangtui-rhaica khaw sui cilh rhuivaeh dongkah kutngo la a saii.
Exodus39:16 Sui oibom panit neh sui kutcaeng panit a saii tih kutcaeng rhoi te rhangpho kah a hmoi rhoi ah a bang.
Exodus39:17 Sui rhuivaeh rhoi te rhangpho hmoi kah kutcaeng rhoi dongah a khih uh.
Exodus39:18 Rhuivaeh rhoi kah a hmoi rhoi te oibom rhoi dongla a hlinghlui. Te rhoek te a hmai kah hnisui holhnam dongla a khih uh.
Exodus39:19 Te phoeiah sui kutcaeng panit te a saii uh tih hnisui a khui
Exodus39:20 Sui kutcaeng rhoi a saii uh tih te rhoi te hnisui cihin sokah a rhui voeivang taeng
Exodus39:21 Rhangpho dongkah a kutcaeng rhoi neh te hnisui dongkah kutcaeng rhoi te hamrhui a thim neh a pin. BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla hnisui kah cihin soah a om daengah ni rhangpho hnisui dong lamloh a hawl pawt eh.
Exodus39:22 Te phoeiah hnikul te hnisui dongkah kutngo bangla a saii tih a thim la boeih a tah.
Exodus39:23 Hnikul kah a rhai te a laklung ah rhawnmoep kah a rhai bangla om tih a rhai ham a kongnah khaw pin a om dongah pawn mahpawh.
Exodus39:24 Hnikul dongkah hnihmoi ah tale thaih a saii tih a thim
Exodus39:25 Sui cilh te hling la a saii tih hling te hnikul hnihmoi kah tale laklo
Exodus39:26 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla aka thotat ham kah hnikul hmoi ah te hling neh tale thaih
Exodus39:27 Te phoeiah Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek ham hnitang kutngo a tah angkidung te a hui uh.
Exodus39:28 Hnitang lupong neh lukhuem khaw
Exodus39:29 Lamko te khaw hnitang la a tah tih BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla a kutngo te a thim
Exodus39:30 Rhuisam tamlaep cim te khaw sui cilh neh a saii tih a soah kutbuen dongkah thingthuk cadaek te BOEIPA ham Cim tila a daek.
Exodus39:31 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla te te a so ah lupong dongah khih ham hamrhui a thim neh hlinghlui.
Exodus39:32 Tingtunnah dap ah dungtlungim kah thothuengnah boeih a coeng tangloeng coeng. Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh vaengah a cungkuem dongah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen te ni a saii uh van.
Exodus39:33 Te phoeiah dungtlungim te Moses taengah dap neh a hnopai boeih
Exodus39:34 Imphu
Exodus39:35 Olphong thingkawng neh a thingpang khaw a tlaeng khaw
Exodus39:36 Caboei neh a hnopai boeih neh a hmai kah buh
Exodus39:37 A hmaithoi cim kah hmaitung neh hmaithoi bong khaw
Exodus39:38 Sui hmueihtuk neh koelhnah situi khaw
Exodus39:39 rhohum hmueihtuk neh rhohum pahak khaw
Exodus39:40 vongtung loh imbang kah a tung neh a buenhol khaw
Exodus39:41 Hmuencim ah aka thotat ham hnithun himbai te khaw
Exodus39:42 BOEIPA loh Moses taengah boeih a uen vanbangla Israel ca rhoek loh thothuengnah cungkuem te a saii uh.
Exodus39:43 Moses loh bitat cungkuem te a hmuh vaengah BOEIPA kah a uen bangla buelh a saii uh. A saii tangloeng dongah amih te Moses loh a uem.
Exodus40:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Exodus40:2 Hla lamhmacuek kah hlasae lamhmacuek khohnin ah tingtunnah dap kah dungtlungim te a thoh.
Exodus40:3 Te vaengah olphong thingkawng te pahoi khueh lamtah thingkawng soah hniyan neh khuk thil.
Exodus40:4 Caboei te khaw khuen lamtah a phu te tael pah. Hmaitung te khuen bal lamtah a hmaithoi te tok pah.
Exodus40:5 Olphong thingkawng hmai ah bo-ul ham sui hmueihtuk te hol lamtah dungtlungim ham thohka kah himbaiyan te yan pah.
Exodus40:6 Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk te tingtunnah dap kah dungtlungim thohka hmai ah hol.
Exodus40:7 Baeldung te tingtunnah dap laklo neh hmueihtuk laklo ah hol lamtah tui pahoi loei pah.
Exodus40:8 Vongtung te pin thoh lamtah vongtung vongka kah himbaiyan te yan pah vetih
Exodus40:9 Koelhnah situi te lo lamtah dungtlungim neh a khuikah a cungkuem te koelh. Te neh a hnopai cungkuem te na ciim daengah ni a cim la a om eh.
Exodus40:10 Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk neh a hnopai boeih te koelh. Hmueihtuk te ciim lamtah hmueihtuk te a cim a cim koek la om saeh.
Exodus40:11 Baeldung neh a kho te khaw koelh lamtah ciim.
Exodus40:12 Te phoeiah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te tingtunnah dap thohka la khuen lamtah amih te tui hluk.
Exodus40:13 Aaron te a cim himbai bai sak lamtah koelh. Anih te ciim lamtah kamah taengah khosoih saeh.
Exodus40:14 A ca rhoek te khaw khuen lamtah amih te angkidung puei sak.
Exodus40:15 Α napa na koelh bangla amih te koelh lamtah kamah taengah khosoih saeh. Khosoihbi he a cadilcahma ham kumhal due amih koelhnah la om rhoe om saeh
Exodus40:16 BOEIPA loh anih saii sak ham a uen boeih te Moses loh a saii.
Exodus40:17 Te dongah a kum bae dongkah lamhma cuek hla a pha neh hlasae dongkah lamhma cuek hnin ah dungtlungim te a pai sak.
Exodus40:18 Moses loh dungtlungim te thoh vaengah a buenhol a buen tih a longlaeng te a paek. A thohkalh te a rholh tih a tung te khaw a ling.
Exodus40:19 Dungtlungim sokah dap te a dih tih BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla dap imphu te a so
Exodus40:20 Te phoeiah olphong te a khuen tih thingkawng khuiah a khueh. Thingpang te thingkawng dongah a rholh phoeiah tah a tlaeng te thingkawng soah a so lamloh a tloeng.
Exodus40:21 Te phoeiah thingkawng te dungtlungim khuila a khuen tih himbaiyan dongkah hniyan te a yan thil. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla olphong thingkawng te a khuk.
Exodus40:22 Caboei te tah tingtunnah dap khuikah dungtlungim kaep
Exodus40:23 A soah BOEIPA hmai kah buh te
Exodus40:24 Hmaitung te tah tingtunnah dap khuikah caboei dan
Exodus40:25 Hmaithoi te BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a tok.
Exodus40:26 Sui hmueihtuk te tingtunnah dap khuikah hniyan hmai ah a khueh.
Exodus40:27 A soah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla botui bo-ul khaw a phum.
Exodus40:28 Te phoeiah dungtlungim thohka kah himbaiyan te a bang.
Exodus40:29 Hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk te tingtunnah dap kah dungtlungim thohka ah a khueh tih te soah te hmueihhlutnah neh khocang khaw BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla a nawn.
Exodus40:30 Baeldung te tingtunnah dap laklo neh hmueihtuk laklo ah a hol tih hluk ham tui khaw pahoi a khueh.
Exodus40:31 Te nen te Moses neh Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut a kho a silh uh.
Exodus40:32 Tingtunnah dap khuila a kun ham vaengah khaw
Exodus40:33 Dungtlungim ham neh hmueihtuk ham vongtung pin a tung tih vongup vongka kah himbaiyan a yan daengah Moses loh bitat a coeng.
Exodus40:34 Te vaengah tingtunnah dap te cingmai loh a thing tih BOEIPA thangpomnah loh dungtlungim ah bae.
Exodus40:35 A soah cingmai yaal tih BOEIPA kah thangpomnah loh dungtlungim ah a bae dongah Moses loh tingtunnah dap khuila kun ham coeng pah pawh.
Exodus40:36 A longpueng khing ah dungtlungim dong lamloh cingmai a caeh van vaengah ni Israel ca rhoek khaw a caeh uh.
Exodus40:37 Tedae cingmai a caeh pawt atah a caeh hnin duela cet uh van pawh.
Exodus40:38 A longpueng khing Israel imkhui pum kah mikhmuh ah tah khothaih ah dungtlungim sokah BOEIPA cingmai neh khoyin ah hmai a om pah.
Leviticus1:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a khue tih tingtunnah dap lamkah a voek vaengah
Leviticus1:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah amih te thui pah.
Leviticus1:3 Nawnnah ham hmueihhlutnah te saelhung mai koinih a tal aka cuem te tingtunnah dap thohka ah nawn saeh lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a kolonah ham nawn saeh.
Leviticus1:4 Te vaengah hmueihhlutnah kah a lu soah a kut tloeng saeh lamtah anih ham a dawth te doe saeh.
Leviticus1:5 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah saelhung ca te ngawn saeh lamtah khosoih Aaron ca rhoek loh a thii te khuen saeh. Te vaengah thii te tingtunnah dap thohka kah hmueihtuk so neh a kaepvai ah haeh uh saeh.
Leviticus1:6 Hmueihhlutnah te hlaih saeh lamtah maehpoel la tloek saeh.
Leviticus1:7 Aaron koca khosoih rhoek loh hmueihtuk ah hmai toih uh saeh lamtah hmai soah thing hueng uh saeh.
Leviticus1:8 Maehpoel
Leviticus1:9 A kotak neh a kho te tui neh sil saeh lamtah khosoih loh BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmueihhlutnah hmaihlutnah la hmueihtuk ah boeih phum saeh.
Leviticus1:10 Tedae anih kah nawnnah te boiva khui lamkah koinih hmueihhlutnah ham tah tu khaw
Leviticus1:11 Tekah te BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmueihtuk kaep kah tlangpuei ben ah ngawn saeh lamtah Aaron koca khosoih rhoek loh a thii te hmueihtuk so neh a kaepvai ah haeh uh saeh.
Leviticus1:12 A pum te maehpoel la tloek saeh lamtah a lu neh a tha te khosoih loh hmueihtuk sokah thing toih hmai dongah tloeng saeh.
Leviticus1:13 Tedae a kotak neh a kho rhoek te tui neh sil saeh. Te phoeiah khosoih loh khuen saeh lamtah BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmueihhlutnah hmaihlutnah la hmueihtuk ah boeih phum saeh.
Leviticus1:14 BOEIPA taengah anih kah nawnnah ham hmueihhlutnah te vaa khui lamkah koinih vahu mai khaw
Leviticus1:15 Te vaengah khosoih loh hmueihtuk la khuen. A lu te a paimaelh pah phoeiah hmueihtuk ah phum saeh. A thii te hmueihtuk pangbueng dongah ci saeh.
Leviticus1:16 Tedae a tukpoe neh a dii te poelh saeh lamtah hmueihtuk khothoeng kah maehhloi hmuen ah voei saeh.
Leviticus1:17 Vaa te a phae let pah saeh lamtah boe boel saeh. Te phoeiah khosoih loh BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmueihhlutnah hmaihlutnah la hmueihtuk sokah thing toih hmai dongah phum saeh.
Leviticus2:1 Hlinglu loh BOEIPA taengla khocang a khuen vaengah vaidam te anih kah nawnnah la om saeh. Te vaengah vaidam te situi suep saeh lamtah hmueihtui te a soah phul saeh.
Leviticus2:2 Te phoeiah Aaron koca khosoih rhoek taengla khuen saeh. Vaidam te kutvang ah mawk paco saeh lamtah situi hmueihtui boeih neh BOEIPA ham hmueihtuk kah hmaihlutnah soah khosoih loh kamhoeinah hmuehmuei botui la phum saeh.
Leviticus2:3 Khocang khui lamkah a coih te tah Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek ham om tih BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah khuiah aka cim khuikah aka cim koek la om.
Leviticus2:4 Hmaiulh dongkah cangrhoh khocang nawnnah na khuen atah vaidam
Leviticus2:5 Nang kah nawnnah khocang te thiphael dongkah koinih vaidam te situi neh thoek lamtah vaidamding la om saeh.
Leviticus2:6 Buhkam te aek lamtah a khocang la a soah situi suep thil.
Leviticus2:7 Tedae nang kah nawnnah khocang te thi-am dongkah koinih vaidam te situi neh saii saeh.
Leviticus2:8 Te rhoek khui lamkah a saii khocang te BOEIPA taengla na khuen vaengah khosoih te a kamhoei phoeiah hmueihtuk la thoeih saeh.
Leviticus2:9 Khocang khuikah kamhoeinah te khosoih loh ludoeng saeh lamtah hmueihtuk kah hmaihlutnah soah BOEIPA ham hmuehmuei botui la phum saeh.
Leviticus2:10 Tedae khocang kah a coih te Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek ham om saeh. BOEIPA hmaihlutnah khuiah aka cim khuikah aka cim koek ni.
Leviticus2:11 BOEIPA taengah na khuen khocang boeih te tolrhu nuen boel saeh. Tolrhu mai khaw
Leviticus2:12 Thaihcuek nawnnah te BOEIPA taengla na khuen vaengah hmueihtuk soah hmuehmuei botui bangla nawn uh boel saeh.
Leviticus2:13 Na khocang nawnnah boeih te lungkaeh neh thoek lamtah na Pathen kah lungkaeh moi toeng boeh. Na khocang khui lamkah na nawnnah boeih te lungkaeh nawn thil.
Leviticus2:14 BOEIPA taengah thaihcuek khocang na khuen atah a vueilue te hmai neh rhoh lamtah cangthai yenkip te namah kah thaihcuek khocang la nawn.
Leviticus2:15 Tete situi suep thil lamtah khocang te hmueihtui la tloeng thil.
Leviticus2:16 Te phoeiah yenkip khui lamkah neh situi lamkah kamhoeinah
Leviticus3:1 Anih kah nawnnah tah rhoepnah hmueih te a saelhung khui lamkah a tal mai khaw a la mai khaw a nawn atah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a cuemthuek te nawn saeh.
Leviticus3:2 Te vaengah a nawnnah saelhung kah a lu dongah a kut tloeng saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap thohka ah ngawn saeh. Te phoeiah thii te Aaron koca khuikah khosoih rhoek loh hmueihtuk kaepvai ah haeh uh saeh.
Leviticus3:3 Rhoepnah hmueih khui lamkah a kotak aka dah maehtha neh a kotak dongkah maehtha boeih te BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah hamla khuen saeh.
Leviticus3:4 A kuel rhoi neh a uen dongkah a tha khaw
Leviticus3:5 Te phoeiah Aaron koca rhoek loh hmueihtuk dongah hmueihhlutnah thing hmai soah BOEIPA ham hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah la phum uh saeh.
Leviticus3:6 Tedae a nawnnah boiva te BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih la a nawn atah a tal mai khaw
Leviticus3:7 Anih kah nawnnah te tuca neh a nawn atah BOEIPA kah mikhmuh ah nawn van saeh.
Leviticus3:8 Te vaengah anih kah nawnnah tu kah a lu soah a kut tloeng saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap hmai ah ngawn saeh. Te phoeiah a thii te Aaron koca rhoek loh hmueihtuk kaepvai ah haeh uh saeh.
Leviticus3:9 Te phoeiah a songrhuh voeivang kah a kawl tha a hmabuet neh
Leviticus3:10 Te phoeiah a kuel rhoi neh a uen dongkah a tha khaw
Leviticus3:11 BOEIPA taengkah hmaihlutnah buh la hmueihtuk soah khosoih loh phum saeh.
Leviticus3:12 Tedae anih kah nawnnah te maae mai khaw BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a nawn atah
Leviticus3:13 maae lu soah a kut tloeng saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap hmai ah ngawn saeh. Te phoeiah a thii te Aaron koca rhoek loh hmueihtuk kaepvai ah haeh uh saeh.
Leviticus3:14 Te phoeiah hmaihlutnah nawnnah khui lamkah a kotak aka dah a tha neh a kotak dongkah a tha boeih te BOEIPA taengah nawn saeh.
Leviticus3:15 Te phoeiah a kuel rhoi neh a uen dongkah a tha khaw
Leviticus3:16 a tha boeih te khosoih loh hmueihtuk kah hmaihlutnah buh soah BOEIPA ham hmuehmuei botui la phum saeh.
Leviticus3:17 Na tolrhum boeih kah na cadilcahma ham kumhal khosing la aka om
Leviticus4:1 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses a voek tih
Leviticus4:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Hinglu pakhat loh tohtamaeh ah BOEIPA kah olpaek boeih soah tholh mai ni. A saii tueng pawt khaw a lamkah pakhat khaw a saii mai ni.
Leviticus4:3 A koelh tangtae khosoih loh pilnam kah dumlai khuila lai a hmuh atah tekah tholhnah a laihmuh dongah boirhaem la saelhung khuikah vaitotal ca cuemthuek te BOEIPA taengah nawn saeh.
Leviticus4:4 Te vaengah vaitotal te tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA mikhmuh la khuen saeh. Te phoeiah a kut te vaito kah a lu soah tloeng saeh lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah vaito te ngawn saeh.
Leviticus4:5 A koelh tangtae khosoih loh vaito thii te lo saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap khuila khuen saeh.
Leviticus4:6 Te phoeiah khosoih loh a kutdawn te thii khuila nuem saeh lamtah thii te hmuencim hniyan hmai kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah voei rhih haeh saeh.
Leviticus4:7 Te phoeiah thii te tingtunnah dap khuikah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah botui bo-ul la hmueihtuk ki dongah khosoih loh pae saeh. Tedae vaito thii aka coih boeih te tah tingtunnah dap thohka kah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah hawk saeh.
Leviticus4:8 Boirhaem vaito tha boeih neh a kotak soah khoep aka dah maehtha te khaw
Leviticus4:9 A kuel rhoi neh a uen kaep dongkah a tha te khaw
Leviticus4:10 Rhoepnah hmueih vaito kah a tha vanbangla khosoih loh ludoeng saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk dongah phum saeh.
Leviticus4:11 Tedae vaito pho neh a saa boeih khaw
Leviticus4:12 vaito pum te rhaehhmuen vongvoel kah maehhloi a lunnah hmuen tlaai la khuen saeh lamtah hoeh saeh. Maehhloi lunnah kah thing hmai dongah hoeh saeh.
Leviticus4:13 Te dongah Israel rhaengpuei pum loh palang uh tih hlangping mikhmuh lamkah olka a rhael vaengah BOEIPA olpaek boeih khuikah mai khaw saii pawt koi pakhat te a saii uh atah boe uh coeng.
Leviticus4:14 Tholh uh tih a tholhnah te amah loh a ming coeng atah saelhung khuikah vaitotal ca te hlangping loh boirhaem la khuen uh saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap hmai ah tloeng uh saeh.
Leviticus4:15 Te vaengah rhaengpuei khuikah patong rhoek loh BOEIPA mikhmuh kah vaito lu soah a kut tloeng uh saeh. Te phoeiah vaito te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah ngawn uh saeh.
Leviticus4:16 Te phoeiah a koelh tangtae khosoih loh vaito thii te tingtunnah dap khuila khuen saeh.
Leviticus4:17 Te phoeiah khosoih loh a kutdawn te thii khuila nuem saeh lamtah hniyan hmai kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah voei rhih haeh saeh.
Leviticus4:18 thii te khaw tingtunnah dap ah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmueihtuk ki dongah pae saeh. Tedae thii aka coih te tingtunnah dap thohka kah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah hawk saeh.
Leviticus4:19 Te vaengah maehtha boeih te ludoeng saeh lamtah hmueihtuk dongah phum saeh.
Leviticus4:20 A saii vaengah boirhaem vaito a saii vanbangla rhoepnah vaito te saii saeh. Te daengah ni khosoih loh amih ham a dawth pah vetih amih te khodawk a ngai eh.
Leviticus4:21 Te phoeiah vaito te rhaehhmuen vongvoel la khuen saeh lamtah lamhma kah hlangping kah boirhaem vaito a hoeh bangla hoeh saeh.
Leviticus4:22 Khoboei khaw tholh tih a BOEIPA Pathen kah olpaek khat khat khui lamkah saii pawt koi te tohtamaeh ah a saii vaengah boe coeng.
Leviticus4:23 Tedae tholhnah dongah a tholh te amah loh a ming van neh nawnnah ham maae a tal ca a cuemthuek te khuen saeh.
Leviticus4:24 Maae tal lu soah a kut tloeng saeh. BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hmueihhlutnah a ngawn nah hmuen ah boirhaem te ngawn saeh.
Leviticus4:25 Te phoeiah boirhaem thii te khosoih loh a kutdawn neh lo saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk ki dongah pae saeh. Te phoeikah thii te hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah hawk saeh.
Leviticus4:26 Tedae a tha boeih te rhoepnah hmueih tha bangla hmueihtuk ah phum saeh. Te daengah ni anih kah tholhnah kongah khosoih loh anih ham a dawth pah vetih khodawk a ngai eh.
Leviticus4:27 BOEIPA olpaek dongkah saii pawt koi khat khat te tolrhum pilnam lamkah hinglu pakhat mai loh tohtamaeh ah a saii tholh tih boe coeng.
Leviticus4:28 Tedae a tholhnah neh a tholh te amah loh aming atah a tholhnah neh a tholh kongah a nawnnah ham te maae a la ca a cuemthuek te khuen saeh.
Leviticus4:29 Te vaengah boirhaem lu soah a kut tloeng saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah hmuen ah boirhaem te ngawn saeh.
Leviticus4:30 Te phoeiah thii te khosoih loh a kutdawn neh lo saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk ki dongah paek saeh. Tedae thii kah a coih boeih te hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah hawk saeh.
Leviticus4:31 A tha boeih te rhoepnah hmueih tha a hluep vanbangla hluep saeh lamtah BOEIPA taengkah hmuehmuei botui la hmueihtuk dongah khosoih loh phum saeh. Te daengah ni anih ham te khosoih loh a dawth pah vetih anih te khodawk a ngai eh.
Leviticus4:32 Tedae a nawnnah ham te tuca ni a khuen atah a la a cuemthuek te boirhaem la khuen saeh.
Leviticus4:33 Te vaengah boirhaem lu soah a kut tloeng saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah a ngawn nah hmuen ah boirhaem la ngawn saeh.
Leviticus4:34 Te phoeiah boirhaem thii te khosoih loh a kutdawn neh lo saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk ki dongah koelh saeh. Te phoeikah thii aka coih boeih te hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah hawk saeh.
Leviticus4:35 Tedae a tha boeih te rhoepnah hmueih dongkah tuca tha a hluep vanbangla hluep saeh lamtah BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah hmueihtuk dongah khosoih loh phum saeh. Te daengah ni anih kah tholhnah kongah khosoih loh a dawth pah vetih a tholh te khodawk a ngai eh
Leviticus5:1 Hinglu pakhat te tholh tih thaephoeinah ol a yaak. Te vaengah amah te laipai la a om dongah a hmuh tih a ming. Tedae a puen pawt atah anih kah thaesainah te phuei saeh.
Leviticus5:2 Hinglu pakhat loh rhalawt hno khaw
Leviticus5:3 Hlang kah a tihnai dongkah khaw
Leviticus5:4 Hinglu pakhat loh a cungkuem dongah thaehuet ham neh voelphoeng ham a hmuilai neh khungrhap la a toemngam mai ni. Hlang he olhlo neh a khungrhap coeng dongah te te a phah a khaw a ming akhaw te pakhat dongah anih boe saeh.
Leviticus5:5 Tedae he rhoek khuikah khat nen khaw a boe mai akhaw te kah a tholh te loh phoe saeh.
Leviticus5:6 Te vaengah a tholhnah neh a tholh bangla BOEIPA taengah a hmaithennah khuen saeh. Boirhaem la boiva khuikah tu a la mai khaw
Leviticus5:7 Tedae boiva kangna khaw a kut loh a na pawt atah a tholh bangla a hmaithennah te vahu phiknit mai khaw
Leviticus5:8 Te phoeiah khosoih taengla khuen saeh lamtah boirhaem ham te nawn lamhma saeh. A lu te a rhawn lamloh paimaelh pah saeh lamtah boe boel saeh.
