Leviticus5:9 Te phoeiah boirhaem thii te hmueihtuk pangbueng dongah haeh saeh lamtah aka coih thii aka coih te boirhaem hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah ci saeh.
Leviticus5:10 Tedae a pabae te tah laitloeknah vanbangla hmueihhlutnah saii saeh. Te vaengah
Leviticus5:11 Tedae vahu phiknit mai khaw
Leviticus5:12 Te vaengah khosoih taengla khuen saeh lamtah kamhoeinah te khosoih loh a kut dongah a bae mawk la paco saeh. Te phoeiah boirhaem te BOEIPA hmueihtuk kah hmaihlutnah soah phum saeh.
Leviticus5:13 Te daengah ni te khuikah pakhat nen khaw a tholh vanbangla a tholhnah dongah khosoih loh anih ham a dawth pah vetih anih te khodawk a ngai eh. Tedae khosaa bangla khosoih hamla om saeh.
Leviticus5:14 BOEIPA loh Moses a voek tih
Leviticus5:15 “Hinglu pakhat loh tholh tih BOEIPA taengah boekoeknah la boe a koek mai ni. Te vaengah hnokhueh neh kut khoom kawng dongah a imben taengah a basa atah
Leviticus5:16 Hmuencim dongah lai a hmuh te a sah phoeiah panga neh thap saeh lamtah khosoih taengla thak saeh. Te daengah ni khosoih loh anih kah hmaithennah ham te tutal neh a dawth pah vetih anih te khodawk a ngai eh.
Leviticus5:17 Hinglu pakhat loh BOEIPA olpaek khat khat khuikah saii pawt koi te pakhat khaw a saii tholh coeng dae a boe te khaw a ming pawt atah amah kah thaesainah te phuei van saeh.
Leviticus5:18 Te vaengah a phu aka ting boiva khuikah tutal a cuemthuek te khosoih taengah hmaithennah la khuen saeh. Te daengah ni anih loh ming pawt tih tohtamaeh la a taengphael te khosoih loh anih ham a dawth pah vetih anih te khodawk a ngai eh.
Leviticus5:19 He tah a boe
Leviticus6:1 Te phoeiah Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Leviticus6:2 “Hinglu pakhat loh tholh tih BOEIPA taengah boekoeknah la boe a koekmai ni. Te vaengah
Leviticus6:3 hnohma khaw a hmuh lalah basa tih hlang taengkah a saii boeih khuikah pakhat mai neh a honghi la a toemngam dongah tholh mai thai
Leviticus6:4 anih laihmu la om vetih a boe coeng dongah a huenkoe a rhawth te khaw
Leviticus6:5 A honghi neh a toemngam tih a dang boeih te khaw dumlai sahnah khohnin vaengah tah a kungmah te a muel la koep sah saeh. Te te a kungmah ham panga neh thap saeh lamtah pae saeh.
Leviticus6:6 Te vaengah hmaithennah ham tutal a hmabut te BOEIPA taengah khuen saeh lamtah tekah tutal neh a phu aka tluk boiva te khosoih taengla hmaithennah ham thak saeh.
Leviticus6:7 Te daengah ni BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khosoih loh anih ham a dawth pah vetih anih khaw dumlai a saii boeih dong lamloh khodawk a ngai eh
Leviticus6:8 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus6:9 Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te uen lamtah hmueihhlutnah olkhueng he thui pah. Hmueihtuk sokah hmaikol hmuen ah hmueihhlutnah loh khoyin puet neh mincang due om saeh lamtah a soah hmueihtuk hmai loh rhong saeh.
Leviticus6:10 Te vaengah khosoih loh amah kah takhlawk himbai te bai saeh lamtah takhlawk hnii te a pum dongah na saeh. Te phoeiah hmueihtuk sokah hmueihhlutnah hmai ah aka tlum maehhloi te kol saeh lamtah hmueihtuk taengah khueh saeh.
Leviticus6:11 Te phoeiah a himbai te pit saeh lamtah himbai a tloe bai. Maehhloi te rhaehhmuen vongvoel kah hmuen saelh la thak saeh.
Leviticus6:12 Hmueihtuk dongkah hmai te khaw phat rhong saeh lamtah thi boel saeh. Te dongah mincang mincang vaengah khosoih loh thing toih thil saeh. Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah te tloeng thil saeh lamtah rhoepnah maehtha soah phum saeh.
Leviticus6:13 Hmai te hmueihtuk soah phat rhong saeh lamtah thi boel saeh.
Leviticus6:14 Tahae kah he tah Aaron koca rhoek loh BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmueihtuk hmai la khocang a khuen vaengkah olkhueng ni.
Leviticus6:15 Khocang vaidam te a kutvang neh lo saeh lamtah situi neh hmueihtui boeih te khocang soah khueh saeh. Te phoeiah BOEIPA taengah kamhoeinah hmuehmuei botui la hmueihtuk ah phum saeh.
Leviticus6:16 Tedae a coih te tah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh ca uh saeh lamtah a caak vaengah tingtunnah dap vongup kah hmuen cim ah vaidamding neh ca uh saeh.
Leviticus6:17 Ka hmaihlutnah lamloh amih kah hamsum ka paek te tolrhu neh thong boel saeh. Te tah boirhaem bangla
Leviticus6:18 BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah lamloh na cadilcahma rhoek ham kumhal buhvae coeng ni. Aaron koca khui lamkah tongpa boeih long tah ca saeh lamtah te te aka ben boeih long tah amah te ciim uh saeh
Leviticus6:19 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus6:20 Tahae kah nawnnah dongah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh khocang vaidam
Leviticus6:21 Tekah khocang te thiphael dongah situi neh saii. A kae phoeiah a nuei kamat te khuen lamtah BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui la nawn.
Leviticus6:22 Te vaengah a koelh tangtae khosoih neh amah koca rhoek khuikah a hnukthoi loh saii saeh. BOEIPA ham kumhal kah buhvae la boeih phum saeh.
Leviticus6:23 Tedae khocang boeih he rhuemtuet la om saeh lamtah khosoih loh ca boel saeh
Leviticus6:24 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus6:25 “Boirhaem tah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a cim tih a cim tangkik dongah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te voek lamtah hmueihhlutnah a ngawn nah hmuen ah boirhaem a ngawn vaengkah olkhueng he thui pah.
Leviticus6:26 Laihmuh saa he te khosoih loh hmuen cim ah ca saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap vongup ah ca saeh.
Leviticus6:27 Tekah a saa aka ben boeih loh ciim uh saeh lamtah himbai khaw a thii loh a haeh atah a haeh boeih te hmuen cim ah til uh.
Leviticus6:28 Te vaengah lai am dongah a thong atah te te bop saeh. Tedae rhohum am dongah a thong atah met saeh lamtah tui neh lae saeh.
Leviticus6:29 Te tah cim tih a cim tangkik oeh dongah khosoih tongpa boeih loh ca saeh.
Leviticus6:30 Tedae tholh dawth ham vaengah tingtunnah dap khuikah hmuencim la a thii a khuen boirhaem boeih te ca boel saeh lamtah hmai neh hoeh saeh
Leviticus7:1 Te dongah hmaithennah olkhueng he a cim khuikah a cim koek la om.
Leviticus7:2 Hmueihhlutnah a ngawn uh hmuen ah hmaithennah te ngawn uh saeh lamtah a thii te hmueihtuk kaepvai ah haeh saeh.
Leviticus7:3 Te vaengah a kawl dongkah a tha boeih neh a kotak aka dah maehtha te nawn saeh.
Leviticus7:4 A kuel rhoi neh a uen kaep dongkah maehtha khaw
Leviticus7:5 Te phoeiah hmaithennah te BOEIPA taengkah hmueihtuk sokah hmaihlutnah dongah khosoih loh phum saeh.
Leviticus7:6 Hmueihlutnah maeh te khosoih tongpa boeih loh hmuen cim ah ca uh saeh lamtah a cim khuikah a cim koek la ca saeh.
Leviticus7:7 Boirhaem khaw hmaithennah khaw a olkhueng pakhat la a om dongah dawth ham koi te khosoih hut la om.
Leviticus7:8 Te dongah khosoih loh hlang khat khat kah hmueihhlutnah te a nawn pah vaengah a nawn hmueihhlutnah kah a pho khaw khosoih amah hut la om saeh.
Leviticus7:9 Tapkhuel dongkah a thong khocang boeih
Leviticus7:10 Situi neh a thoek khaw
Leviticus7:11 Tedae tahae kah he tah BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih a nawn vaengkah olkhueng ni.
Leviticus7:12 Uemonah ham a nawn atah uemonah hmueih la situi neh a thoek vaidamding vaidam laep khaw
Leviticus7:13 Te vaengkah tolrhu buhham vaidam laep te uemonah
Leviticus7:14 Te vaengkah BOEIPA taengla a nawn
Leviticus7:15 Rhoepnah dongkah uemonah hmueih saa te tah amah nawnnah hnin ah ca saeh lamtah mincang duela paih boel saeh.
Leviticus7:16 Tedae olcaeng neh kothoh nawnnah hmueih tah a nawn khohnin vaengah hmueih te ca saeh lamtah a caknoi te a vuen ah ca saeh.
Leviticus7:17 Hmueih saa khui lamkah a coih te a thum hnin ah hmai neh hoeh saeh.
Leviticus7:18 Amah kah rhoepnah hmueih saa te a thum hnin dongah a caak la a caak atah anih kah a nawn te doe pah mahpawh. Anih te a nawt a na pawt atah dikyik dikyak la om ni. Te te aka ca hinglu tah amah kah thaesainah te amah loh phuei saeh.
Leviticus7:19 Rhalawt hno boeih dongah a ben maeh te ca boel saeh lamtah hmai neh hoeh saeh. Tedae aka caih maeh saa boeih tah ca saeh.
Leviticus7:20 Hinglu pakhat loh BOEIPA taengkah rhoepnah hmueih saa a caak vaengah amah te amah dongah a ti a hnai a om atah tekah hinglu te a pilnam khui lamloh hnawt saeh.
Leviticus7:21 Hinglu te rhalawt cungkuem dongah
Leviticus7:22 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus7:23 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Vaito
Leviticus7:24 Te dongah maehrhok tha neh saha tha tah bibi khat khat dongah hnonah mai cakhaw ca rhoe ca uh boeh.
Leviticus7:25 Khat khat long ni BOEIPA taengkah hmaihlutnah ham a nawn rhamsa tha te a caak atah
Leviticus7:26 Na tolrhum boeih ah vaa lamkah khaw
Leviticus7:27 Hinglu khat khat loh thii khat khat ni a caak atah tekah hinglu te pilnam lamloh hnawt saeh
Leviticus7:28 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus7:29 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih aka khuen long tah rhoepnah hmueih khui lamkah a nawnnah te BOEIPA taengla pawk puei saeh.
Leviticus7:30 BOEIPA taengkah hmaihlutnah ham te a kut loh a khuen vaengah a tha neh a rhang te khuen saeh. A rhang te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la thueng saeh.
Leviticus7:31 Maehtha te khosoih loh hmueihtuk soah phum saeh. Tedae a rhang te Aaron ham neh anih koca rhoek hamla om saeh.
Leviticus7:32 Te dongah nangmih kah rhoepnah hmueih khui lamkah bantang benkah a laeng te tah khosoih taengah khosaa la pae uh.
Leviticus7:33 Aaron koca rhoek khui lamkah rhoepnah thii neh maehtha aka nawn ham maehvae la bantang laeng te om saeh.
Leviticus7:34 Rhoepnah hmueih khuiah thueng hmueih kah a rhang neh a laeng he Israel ca rhoek taeng lamkah khosa la ka loh tih Israel ca rhoek taengkah kumhal maehvae la khosoih Aaron neh anih koca rhoek taengah ka paek coeng.
Leviticus7:35 He tah BOEIPA taengah khosoih la a nuen hnin vaengah BOEIPA hmaihlutnah khui lamkah Aaron kah maeham neh anih koca rhoek kah maeham ni
Leviticus7:36 Anih a koelh hnin van vaengah Israel ca rhoek loh khosoih rhoek taengah paek ham koi te tah cadilcahma due kumhal khosing la khueh ham BOEIPA loh a uen coeng.
Leviticus7:37 Hekah olkhueng dongkah hmueihhlutnah ham
Leviticus7:38 BOEIPA loh Sinai tlang ah Moses a uen vanbangla amah a uen khohnin vaengah Israel ca rhoek amamih kah nawnnah te Sinai khosoek kah BOEIPA taengah a nawn uh.
Leviticus8:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus8:2 “Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te amah neh himbai khaw
Leviticus8:3 Te phoeiah rhaengpuei boeih loh tingtunnah dap thohka ah tingtun uh saeh
Leviticus8:4 Te dongah BOEIPA kah a uen vanbangla Moses loh a saii tih rhaengpuei loh tingtunnah dap thohka ah tingtun uh.
Leviticus8:5 Te phoeiah Moses loh rhaengpuei taengah saii ham koi BOEIPA loh a uen te a thui pah.
Leviticus8:6 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te a pai sak tih tui neh a silh.
Leviticus8:7 Aaron te angkidung a paek tih lamko a vah sak. Hnikul te a bai sak tih hnisui te a sui pah. Cihin neh a yen phoeiah hnisui khaw a hlin pah.
Leviticus8:8 Rhangpho te a buen pah vaengah Urim neh Thummim te rhangpho khuiah a det pah.
Leviticus8:9 A lu ah lupong a muei sak bal tih BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla sui tamlaep neh rhuisam cim te a hmai kah lupong soah a khuem sak.
Leviticus8:10 Te phoeiah Moses loh a koelhnah situi te a loh tih dungtlungim neh a khuikah aka om boeih te a koelh tih a ciim.
Leviticus8:11 Te phoeiah situi te hmueihtuk soah voei rhih a haeh tih hmueihtuk neh a tubael boeih
Leviticus8:12 Te phoeiah a koelhnah situi te Aaron lu soah a suep tih anih te ciim ham a koelh.
Leviticus8:13 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron koca rhoek te a pai sak tih amih te angkidung a bai sak. BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla amih te lamko a vah sak tih amih te samkhuem a khuem sak.
Leviticus8:14 Boirhaem vaito te a khuen vaengah boirhaem vaito lu soah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut a tloeng uh.
Leviticus8:15 Vaito te a ngawn phoeiah a thii te Moses loh a khuen tih hmueihtuk ki neh a kaepvai ah a kutdawn neh a koelh. Te phoeiah hmueihtuk te a caih sak tih thii te hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah a hawk. Te daengah te anih dongah a dawth ham koi te a ciim pah.
Leviticus8:16 A kotak dongkah maehtha boeih neh a thin dongkah a thinhnun khaw
Leviticus8:17 Tedae vaito pho neh a saa khaw
Leviticus8:18 Hmueihhlutnah tutal te khaw a khuen tih tutal a lu soah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut a tloeng thil uh.
Leviticus8:19 Te phoeiah a ngawn tih a thii te hmueihtuk so neh a kaepvai ah Moses loh a haeh.
Leviticus8:20 Tu te khaw maehpoel la a sah tih a lu neh maehpoel khaw
Leviticus8:21 Tedae a kotak neh a kho te tui neh a silh. Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla tutal pum boeih te BOEIPA ham hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah la hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk soah Moses loh a phum.
Leviticus8:22 A pabae kah tutal te saboi la a nawn. Te phoeiah tutal kah a lu soah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a kut a tloeng uh.
Leviticus8:23 Tu te a ngawn phoeiah a thii te Moses loh a loh tih Aaron bantang a hnapae neh bantang kut kah kutpuei dongah khaw
Leviticus8:24 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron koca rhoek te a pai sak tih amih kah bantang hna kah hnapae neh bantang kut kah kutpuei dongah khaw
Leviticus8:25 Te phoeiah maehtha neh a kawl khaw
Leviticus8:26 BOEIPA mikhmuh kah vaidamding kodawn dongkah vaidamding vaidam laep pakhat
Leviticus8:27 Te phoeiah Aaron kut neh anih koca rhoek kah kut ah boeih a tloeng tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih te a thueng.
Leviticus8:28 Te phoeiah amih kut dong lamkah saboi te Moses loh a loh tih BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah la hmueihtuk sokah hmueihhlutnah dongah saboi te a phum.
Leviticus8:29 Te phoeiah a rhang te Moses loh a loh tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la a thueng. Saboi tutal te tah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Moses amah kah maehvae la a khueh.
Leviticus8:30 Te phoeiah Moses loh a koelhnah situi neh hmueihtuk sokah thii te a loh tih Aaron neh anih kah himbai dongah khaw
Leviticus8:31 Te phoeiah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek taengah Moses loh
Leviticus8:32 Tedae maeh neh buhham aka coih te hmai neh hoeh uh.
Leviticus8:33 Te phoeiah nangmih kah koiyaeh hnin tah na kut dongah hnin rhih cum saeh. Khohnin hnin rhih a cup hil tingtunnah dap thohka lamloh moe uh boeh.
Leviticus8:34 Tihnin ah a saii vanbangla nangmih kah te saii ham neh dawth ham khaw BOEIPA loh ng'uen coeng.
Leviticus8:35 Te vaengah khoyin khothaih hnin rhih tah tingtunnah dap thohka ah om uh. BOEIPA kah a kuek te kang uen bangla na tuem uh daengah ni na duek uh pawt eh
Leviticus8:36 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses kut ah a uen hno boeih te Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh a saii.
Leviticus9:1 Hnin rhet a lo vaengah Moses loh Aaron
Leviticus9:2 Te vaengah Aaron taengah
Leviticus9:3 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah
Leviticus9:4 BOEIPA tah tihnin ah nangmih taengla a phoe ham coeng dongah vaito khaw
Leviticus9:5 Te dongah Moses kah a uen te tingtunnah dap hmai la a khuen uh. Te phoeiah rhaengpuei boeih loh mop uh tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pai uh.
Leviticus9:6 Te vaengah Moses loh
Leviticus9:7 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron taengah
Leviticus9:8 Te dongah hmueihtuk te Aaron loh a paan tih amah ham boirhaem la vaitoca te a ngawn.
Leviticus9:9 Te phoeiah thii te Aaron koca rhoek loh Aaron taengla a khuen pa uh. Te dongah a kutdawn te thii khuila a nuem tih hmueihtuk ki dongah a koelh phoeiah thii te hmueihtuk kah khoengim taengah a bueih.
Leviticus9:10 Te phoeiah BOEIPA Moses taengkah a uen vanbangla boirhaem kah a tha
Leviticus9:11 Te phoeiah a saa neh a pho te rhaehhmuen vongvoel ah hmai neh a hoeh.
Leviticus9:12 Hmueihhlutnah te a ngawn phoeiah thii te Aaron koca rhoek loh a pom uh tih hmueihtuk kaepvai ah a haeh.
Leviticus9:13 Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah te a taengah maehpoel la a pom pa uh tih a lu neh hmueihtuk dongah a phum.
Leviticus9:14 Te phoeiah a kotak neh a kho rhoek te a silh tih hmueihtuk dongkah hmueihhlutnah soah a phum.
Leviticus9:15 Te phoeiah pilnam kah nawnnah te a nawn. Te vaengah pilnam kah boirhaem maae te a loh tih a ngawn phoeiah lamhma kah bangla a hlup pah.
Leviticus9:16 Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah te a khuen tih laitloeknah vanbangla a saii.
Leviticus9:17 Te phoeiah khocang te a khuen tih a kut dongkah a bae neh hmueihtuk sokah mincang hmueihhlutnah dongah a phum thil.
Leviticus9:18 Te phoeiah pilnam kah rhoepnah hmueih la vaitotal neh tutal te a ngawn. thii te Aaron koca rhoek loh a thueng uh tih hmueihtuk kaepvai ah a haeh.
Leviticus9:19 Tedae vaito neh tu kah a tha khaw
Leviticus9:20 a rhang dongkah a tha khaw a tloeng uh tih a tha te hmueihtuk dongah a phum.
Leviticus9:21 Tedae a rhang rhoek neh bantang laeng te tah Moses loh a uen vanbangla BOEIPA mikhmuh kah Aaron loh thueng hmueih la a thueng.
Leviticus9:22 Te phoeiah Aaron loh a kut te pilnam taengla a phuel tih yoethen a paek. Te daengah boirhaem
Leviticus9:23 Te phoeiah Moses neh Aaron loh tingtunnah dap khuikla kun rhoi. Te dongah ha moe rhoi tih pilnam te yoethen a paek rhoi vaengah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah loh pilnam cungkuem taengah a tueng pah.
Leviticus9:24 Te vaengah BOEIPA maelhmai lamloh hmai ha thoeng tih hmueihtuk dongkah hmueihhlutnah neh maehtha te a hlawp. Pilnam boeih loh a hmuh vaengah tamhoe uh tih a hmai a buluk uh.
Leviticus10:1 Aaron ca rhoi Nadab neh Abihu loh amah amah baelphaih te a loh rhoi tih hmai soah a tloeng rhoi. Te phoeiah bo-ul te a khueh thil rhoi tih hmai hloeh neh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a khueh rhoi. Te te amih rhoi taengah a uen dae moenih.
Leviticus10:2 Te vaengah BOEIPA hmai lamkah hmai ha thoeng tih amih rhoi te a hlawp dongah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah duek rhoi.
Leviticus10:3 Te dongah Moses loh Aaron taengah
Leviticus10:4 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron kah a napa noe Uzziel ca rhoi Mishael neh Elizaphan te a khue tih
Leviticus10:5 Te dongah Moses kah olpaek vanbangla halo uh tih amih rhoi te a angkidung dongah rhaehhmuen vongvoel la a koh uh.
Leviticus10:6 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron
Leviticus10:7 Te dongah tingtunnah dap thohka lamkah moe uh boeh. Na soah BOEIPA kah koelhnah situi dongah na duek uh ve
Leviticus10:8 BOEIPA loh Aaron te a voek tih
Leviticus10:9 “Namah neh namah taengkah na ca rhoek loh tingtunnah dap khuila na kun uh vaengah misurtui khaw
Leviticus10:10 Cimcaihnah laklo neh rhongingnah laklo ah
Leviticus10:11 Israel ca rhoek thuinuet ham oltlueh cungkuem te khaw BOEIPA loh amih ham Moses kut ah a thui pah.
Leviticus10:12 Te dongah Moses loh Aaron
Leviticus10:13 Kai ng'uen van coeng dongah BOEIPA hmaihlutnah khui lamkah khocang te namah kah buhvae neh namah koca rhoek kah buhvae la hmuen cim ah ca uh.
Leviticus10:14 Tedae Israel ca rhoek kah rhoepnah hmueih khuiah thueng hmueih kah a rhang neh khosaa kah a laeng tah namah kah maehvae neh
Leviticus10:15 Khosaa kah a laeng neh thueng hmueih kah a rhang khaw maehtha hmaihlutnah khaw BOEIPA mikhmuh kah thueng hmueih la thueng ham khuen uh. BOEIPA kah a uen vanbangla namah ham neh na ca rhoek ham kumhal ah maehvae la om saeh
Leviticus10:16 Te phoeiah boirhaem maae te Moses loh a tlap a tlap hatah vawl ana hai pa uh. Te dongah Aaron koca rhoek khuiah aka sueng Eleazar neh Ithamar taengah a thintoek tih
Leviticus10:17 “A cim kah a cim boirhaem he balae tih hmuencim hmuen ah na caak uh pawh? He khaw rhaengpuei kah thaesainah aka phuei tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah amih kah tholh aka dawth hamla nangmih taengah m'paek dae.
Leviticus10:18 A thii te hmuencim la a khuen moenih ko he. Kang uen bangla hmuencim ah ca khaw ca uh yap mai saw
Leviticus10:19 Te vaengah Aaron loh Moses taengah
Leviticus10:20 Tedae Moses loh a yaak vaengah a mikhmuh ah a thuem sak.
Leviticus11:1 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Leviticus11:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek rhoi lamtah
Leviticus11:3 Rhamsa khuiah a khomae rhak tih a khomae dongkah a khorhaek aka thal neh caknaih aka naih boeih te tah ca uh.
Leviticus11:4 Tedae caknaih aka naih neh khomae aka rhak khuiah Kalauk he ca uh boeh. Caknaih a naih dae a khomae a rhak pawt dongah nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:5 Saphih he khaw caknaih a naih dae a khomae a rhak pawt dongah nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:6 Saveh khaw caknaih a naih dae a khomae a rhak pawt dongah nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:7 Ok he a khomae rhak tih a khomae dongkah a khorhaek thal dae caknaih a naih pawt dongah nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:8 A saa te ca uh boeh. A rhok khaw ben uh boeh. Te rhoek te nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:9 Tui dongkah aka om boeih khuiah he ca uh. tui dongkah khaw
Leviticus11:10 Tedae tuitunli dongkah khaw
Leviticus11:11 Nangmih ham konawhnah la a om uh dongah a saa te ca uh boeh. A rhok te khaw tuei uh.
Leviticus11:12 A phae khaw
Leviticus11:13 Vaa khuiah he rhoek tah tuei uh
Leviticus11:14 murhung neh maisi hui khaw
Leviticus11:15 vangak neh anih hui boeih
Leviticus11:16 Tuirhuk khaw
Leviticus11:17 thathawt
Leviticus11:18 abuu
Leviticus11:19 bungrho
Leviticus11:20 Vaa bangla om tih a kho pali neh aka yuel rhulcai boeih khaw nangmih ham konawhnah ni.
Leviticus11:21 Tedae vaa bangla om tih a kho pali neh yuel cakhaw diklai dongah cungpet nah ham a kho phoeiah a kho aka khueh rhulcai boeih tah ca uh.
Leviticus11:22 Kaisih neh a hui
Leviticus11:23 Tedae vaa bangla om tih a kho pali aka khueh rhulcai boeih tah nangmih ham konawhnah ni.
Leviticus11:24 A rhok aka ben boeih tah
Leviticus11:25 A rhok aka phuei boeih long khaw a himbai te til saeh. Anih te kholaeh duela poeih uh ni.
Leviticus11:26 Rhamsa boeih khaw a khomae rhak tih a khorhaek aka thal pawt neh caknaih aka naih pawt tah nangmih ham rhalawt. Te te aka ben boeih tah poeih uh ni.
Leviticus11:27 A kho pali neh aka yuel mulhing boeih khuiah a kut neh aka yuel boeih khaw nangmih ham rhalawt. A rhok aka ben boeih tah kholaeh duela a poeih ni.
Leviticus11:28 A rhok aka phuei long tah a himbai te til saeh. Hlaem duela te poeih uh vaengah tah amih te nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:29 Diklai kah aka luem rhulcai khuiah saham
Leviticus11:30 tawkke
Leviticus11:31 Rhulcai boeih khuiah nangmih ham aka rhalawt rhoek te a duek vaengah aka ben boeih khaw kholaeh duela poeih uh ni.
Leviticus11:32 A duek vaengah anih soah aka cungku boeih tah poeih uh ni. Te dongah thing hnopai boeih neh himbai khaw
Leviticus11:33 Tedae amih khuikah te lai umam khat khat khuila a tlak atah a khui neh a khui kah boeih khaw a poeih dongah rhek dae uh laeh.
Leviticus11:34 Caak ham cakok khat khat te tekah am tui loh a pha thil atah a poeih coeng. Te dongah umam khat khat khui lamkah ok ham koi tui khaw boeih a poeih coeng.
Leviticus11:35 Amih rhok loh a cuhu thil boeih tah tapkhuel khaw
Leviticus11:36 Tedae tuisih neh tangrhom tui tungnah a tlak thil atah tuicil la om mai cakhaw a rhok aka ben te a poeih.
Leviticus11:37 Tedae te cangti ballung boeih tah a rhok loh tlak thil cakhaw cuem ngawn dongah tue ngawn saeh.
Leviticus11:38 Tedae cangti te tui dongah a khueh vaengah a rhok loh a cuhu thil atah nangmih ham rhalawt.
Leviticus11:39 Na caak ham koi rhamsa a duek vaengah khaw a rhok aka ben tah hlaem duela poeih uh ni.
Leviticus11:40 A rhok aka ca tah a himbai te til saeh. Anih khaw hlaem duela poeih uh ni. A rhok aka phuei te khaw a himbai te til saeh. Hlaem due la poeih uh ni.
Leviticus11:41 Diklai ah aka luem rhulcai boeih khaw konawhnah
Leviticus11:42 A bung neh aka colh boeih
Leviticus11:43 Aka luem rhulcai boeih neh na hinglu te rhun uh boeh. Amih nen khaw poeih uh boel lamtah amih long khaw nang m'poeih uh boel saeh.
Leviticus11:44 Kai tah nangmih Pathen BOEIPA ni. Te dongah ciim uh lamtah kai cim bangla a cim la om uh. Te dongah diklai kah aka colh rhulcai boeih dongah na hinglu te poeih uh boeh.
Leviticus11:45 Nangmih kah Pathen la om ham Egypt khohmuen lamloh nangmih aka khuen khaw BOEIPA kamah ni. Te dongah kai ka cim bangla a cim om uh.
Leviticus11:46 He tah rhamsa neh vaa
Leviticus11:47 rhalawt laklo neh cuemcaih laklo ah
Leviticus12:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus12:2 Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Huta he vawn tih capa a cun atah pumom tue vaengah a poeih uh bangla hnin rhih khuiah poeih uh.
Leviticus12:3 Tedae hnin rhet vaengah camoe kah yahhmui saa te rhet pah saeh.
Leviticus12:4 Te phoeiah ciimnah thii dongah khohnin sawmthum hnin thum khosa saeh. A caihcilnah khohnin a cum hlan atah aka cim boeih te ben boel saeh lamtah rhokso lam khaw cet boel saeh.
Leviticus12:5 Tedae huta a cun atah pumom vaengkah bangla yalh khat khuiah poeih uh la om saeh. Te dongah ciimnah thii dongah khohnin sawmrhuk hnin rhuk khosa saeh.
Leviticus12:6 A caihcilnah khohnin a cup vaengah atah capa canu kah hmueihhlutnah ham tu kum khat ca neh boirhaem la vahui ca neh vahu mai khaw tingtunnah dap thohka kah khosoih taengla khuen saeh.
Leviticus12:7 Te phoeiah anih ham te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nawn pah saeh lamtah dawth pah saeh. Te daengah ni anih kah pumthim thii te a caihcil eh. He tah huta tongpa aka cun ham olkhueng ni.
Leviticus12:8 Tedae a kut loh boiva kangna khaw a hmuh pawt atah vahu phiknit mai khaw
Leviticus13:1 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Leviticus13:2 “Hlang a vin a saa dongah a phuem mai khaw
Leviticus13:3 A vin saa dongkah a tloh te khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a hma dongkah a mul te a bok la a om tih a tloh kah a hmuethma khaw a vin saa khuila dawp a dung atah hmaibae tloh coeng ni. Tedae khosoih loh so saeh lamtah anih a poeih uh ti saeh.
Leviticus13:4 Te vaengah a vin saa dongkah dikdak la bok dae a hmuethma loh a vin khuila dung pawt tih a mul khaw a bok la a om pawt atah hlang tlo te khosoih loh hnin rhih khoh dae saeh.
Leviticus13:5 A rhih hnin vaengah khosoih loh so saeh. Tedae tloh a mikhmuh hmuen la om tih a vin khuila tloh rhoeng mai mahpawh. Te vaengah anih te khosoih loh pabae la hnin rhih parhaeng saeh.
Leviticus13:6 A hnin rhih dongah anih te khosoih loh pabae la so bal saeh. Te vaengah a hma te maat tih a vin dongkah a hma khaw a rhoeng pawt atah khosoih loh caihcil coeng ti saeh. Phai la a om dongah a himbai te a suk vetih caihcil bitni.
Leviticus13:7 Tedae a ciimnah ham khosoih taengla a tueng phoeiah a vin dongkah phai a rhoeng la a rhoeng atah khosoih taengah pabae la tueng bal saeh.
Leviticus13:8 Khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a vin dongkah phai te a rhoeng atah anih te khosoih loh poeih uh coeng ti saeh. Te te hmaibae ni.
Leviticus13:9 Hmaibae tloh he hlang dongah a om van neh khosoih taengla khuen saeh.
Leviticus13:10 Khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a vin te a bok la phuem tih
Leviticus13:11 A vin a saa dongkah hmaibae he rhung coeng tih a poeih uh coeng. Anih te rhalawt coeng tih khosoih loh anih parhaeng voel boel saeh.
Leviticus13:12 Tedae a vin dongah hmaibae te hnai khaw hnai mai ni. Te vaengah khosoih mik kah hmuhnah boeih ah hlangtlo kah a vin boeih te hmaibae loh a lu lamkah a kho duela a thing mai ni.
Leviticus13:13 Te vaengah khosoih loh so saeh lamtah a pumsa tom te hmaibae loh a thing tih tloh te a bok la boeih a om atah anih te caihcil coeng ti saeh. Anih te cim ngawn.
Leviticus13:14 Tedae a pum dongah a saa thing a phoe tue vaengah tah aka poeih uh la om ni.
Leviticus13:15 Tedae a saa te khosoih loh a haeng la a hmuh saeh daengah ni poeih uh a ti eh. A saa a haeng atah hmaibae coeng tih anih rhalawt om.
Leviticus13:16 Tedae a saa thing te hoilae uh tih a bok la a poeh atah khosoih taengla koep khuen saeh.
Leviticus13:17 Khosoih loh a sawt tih a tloh te a bok la a poeh atah khosoih loh anih caihcil coeng ti saeh. A tloh te cim ngawn.
Leviticus13:18 A pumsa kah a vin dongkah buhlut om tih hoeih mai ni.
Leviticus13:19 Te buhlut hmuen ah a bok la aka phuem mai khaw
Leviticus13:20 Khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a hmuethma loh a vin khuila dung tih a mul khaw a bok la a poeh atah khosoih loh anih poeih uh coeng ti saeh. Buhlut dongkah aka puek hmaibae tloh ni.
Leviticus13:21 Tedae te te khosoih so saeh lamtah a mul te a khuiah bok mai pawt nim? Te te a vin lakah dung pawt tih nuk mai ni. Te vaengah anih te khosoih loh hnin rhih parhaeng saeh.
Leviticus13:22 Tedae a vin dongah ni a rhoeng la a rhoeng atah khosoih loh anih te poeih uh coeng ti saeh. Te te tloh coeng ni.
Leviticus13:23 Tedae dikdak te amah hmuen la om tih buhlut kah vinhnahlo khaw a rhoeng pawt atah anih te khosoih loh caihcil coeng ti saeh.
Leviticus13:24 A vin a saa khaw hmai ung bangla om tih dikdak aka bok te khaw aka ung thai a ling a bok la a om atah
Leviticus13:25 Te vaengah dikdak dongkah a mul te a bok la poeh tih a hmuethma loh a vin khuila a dung atah hmai ung dongkah aka phoe hmaibae coeng ni. Te dongah khosoih loh anih poeih uh coeng ti saeh. Te te hmaibae tloh coeng ni.
Leviticus13:26 Tedae khosoih loh a sawt vaengah dikdak dongkah a mul khaw bok voel pawt tih a vin khuila dung pawt dae a nuk atah anih te khosoih loh hnin rhih parhaeng bal saeh.
Leviticus13:27 A hnin rhih dongah khosoih loh koep so saeh lamtah a vin dongah ni a rhoeng la a rhoeng atah khosoih loh anih poeih uh coeng ti saeh. Te te hmaibae tloh coeng ni.
Leviticus13:28 Tedae dikdak te amah hmuen la om tih a vin dongah khaw rhoeng pawt tih a ung kah a phuem te a nukyum mai ni. A ung kah vinhnahlo la om dongah anih te khosoih loh caihcil coeng ti saeh.
Leviticus13:29 tongpa khaw huta mai khaw
Leviticus13:30 Tloh te khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a hmuethma loh a vin khuila dung tih a mul khaw huephuep a ae atah khosoih loh anih poeih uh coeng ti saeh. A lu neh a baengpae kah a thak te hmaibae ni.
Leviticus13:31 Tedae thak tloh te khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a hmuethma te a vin khuila dung pawt tih a sam muem mai mahpawh. Te vaengah khosoih loh thak tloh kongah hnin rhih parhaeng dae saeh.
Leviticus13:32 A hnin rhih dongah a tloh te khosoih loh koep so saeh. Te vaengah thak te rhoeng pawh
Leviticus13:33 Te vaengah vo saeh lamtah a thak te tah vo boel saeh. Te phoeiah aka thak te khosoih loh a pabae la hnin rhih parhaeng saeh.
Leviticus13:34 A hnin rhih dongah a thak te khosoih loh koep so saeh. Te vaengah a vin dongkah a thak te rhoeng pawt tih a hmuethma khaw a vin khuila a dung pawt atah khosoih loh anih caihcil coeng ti saeh. Te phoeiah a himbai suk saeh lamtah caihcil saeh.
Leviticus13:35 Tedae a ciimnah hnukah a thak te a vin dongah a rhoeng la a rhoeng mai ni.
Leviticus13:36 Te vaengah khosoih loh so saeh lamtah a vin dongkah a thak te a rhoeng atah a mul aka ae te khaw khosoih loh rhae hnukdawn boel saeh. Anih te rhalawt coeng ni.
Leviticus13:37 Tedae thak te a mikhmuh hmuen la om tih a sam muem a cawn atah a thak te hoeih tih caih coeng. Te dongah anih te khosoih loh caihcil coeng ti saeh.
Leviticus13:38 tongpa khaw
Leviticus13:39 Te vaengah khosoih loh so saeh lamtah a vin saa dongkah dikdak la nuk tih a bok te a vin dongah bungsap bangla a cuen atah anih te cim ngawn.
Leviticus13:40 Hlang he a lu poel tih lukoelh la om cakhaw cuemcaih ngawn.
Leviticus13:41 A baengpae neh a hmai lamloh a lu te tlaai tih talkoelh la om cakhaw cim ngawn.
Leviticus13:42 Tedae lukoelh dongah khaw
Leviticus13:43 Te vaengah anih te khosoih loh so saeh. Tloh aka phuem te a lukoelh soah khaw
Leviticus13:44 Hlang te pahuk atah anih te rhalawt coeng tih amah te poeih uh coeng. A lu ah a tloh a om dongah khosoih loh anih poeih uh coeng ti saeh.
Leviticus13:45 A pum dongah tloh neh aka pahuk tah himbai pawn neh om uh saeh lamtah a lu khaw a pham la om saeh. Te phoeiah a hmui te buem saeh lamtah rhalawt coeng
Leviticus13:46 A pum dongah tloh neh rhalawt la a poeih uh tue khuiah tah anih te tolrhum rhaehhmuen vongvoel ah amah bueng khosa saeh.
Leviticus13:47 Hmaibae tloh te a pum dongkah himbai
Leviticus13:48 hnitah dongah khaw
Leviticus13:49 Tloh te himbai dongah khaw
Leviticus13:50 Te vaengah tloh te khosoih loh so saeh lamtah hlangtlo te hnin rhih parhaeng saeh.
Leviticus13:51 A hnin rhih dongah a tloh te koep sawt pah saeh. Tloh te himbai dongah khaw
Leviticus13:52 Te dongah tloh aka om himbai neh hnitah khaw
Leviticus13:53 Tedae khosoih loh a sawt vaengah a tloh te himbai dongah khaw
Leviticus13:54 Te vaengah khosoih loh uen saeh lamtah a pum dongkah tloh te sil saeh. Te phoeiah anih te a pabae la hnin rhih parhaeng saeh.
Leviticus13:55 Tedae a tloh te a silh phoeiah khosoih loh so saeh. Te vaengah a tloh te rhoeng pawt cakhaw tloh te a hmuethma loh a lang pawt atah anih te rhalawt coeng ni. A hnuk a hmai ah impap om tih hmai neh hoeh laeh.
Leviticus13:56 Tedae khosoih loh so saeh lamtah a silh phoeiah a tloh a maat atah a himbai neh maehpho khaw
Leviticus13:57 Tedae himbai neh hnitah dongah khaw
Leviticus13:58 Tedae himbai neh hnitah khaw
Leviticus13:59 He tah tumul neh hlamik himbai khaw
Leviticus14:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus14:2 “He tah aka pahuk te ciimnah khohnin ah khosoih taengla a khuen vaengkah aka olkhueng ni.
Leviticus14:3 Te dongah khosoih te rhaehhmuen vongvoel la cet saeh. Te phoeiah khosoih loh so saeh lamtah aka pahuk kah hmaibae tloh te a hoeih atah
Leviticus14:4 khosoih loh uen saeh lamtah caihcil sak ham aka hing vathawt phiknit a cimbit neh lamphai thing
Leviticus14:5 Te phoeiah khosoih loh uen saeh lamtah vathawt pakhat te lai am khuikah tui hing soah ngawn saeh.
Leviticus14:6 Vathawt pakhat te a hing la khuen saeh lamtah lamphai thing neh
Leviticus14:7 Te phoeiah hmaibae aka caihcil soah voei rhih haeh thil saeh lamtah caihcil coeng ti saeh. Te phoeiah vaa hing te khohmuen hoeng la tueih saeh.
Leviticus14:8 Te phoeiah aka caihcil coeng long te a himbai suk saeh lamtah a sam boeih vo saeh. Te phoeiah tui hlu saeh lamtah caihcil uh saeh. Te phoeiah rhaehhmuen khuila ha kun saeh. Tedae dap tol ah hnin rhih khosa saeh.
Leviticus14:9 Tedae hnin rhih a lo vaengah a lu neh a baengpae dongkah a sam boeih
Leviticus14:10 A hnin rhet dongah tutal a hmabut pumnit neh tumanu kum ca a hmabut pumat
Leviticus14:11 Te phoeiah khosoih taengah nawn saeh lamtah aka caihcil hlang te tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah caihcil saeh.
Leviticus14:12 Te vaengah tutal pakhat te khosoih loh lo saeh lamtah situi khap at neh hmaithennah la rhen nawn saeh. Te phoeiah thueng hmueih te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng saeh.
Leviticus14:13 Tuca te hmaithennah boirhaem bangla khosoih ham cim tih a cim koek coeng dongah boirhaem neh hmuen cim dongkah hmueihhlutnah a ngawn nah hmuen ah ngawn saeh.
Leviticus14:14 Te vaengah hmaithennah thii te khosoih loh lo saeh. Te phoeiah aka caihcil hlang kah bantang hna
Leviticus14:15 Khap dongkah situi te khaw khosoih loh lo saeh lamtah khosoih kah banvoei kutpha dongah bueih saeh.
Leviticus14:16 Te phoeiah khosoih loh a banvoei kutpha dongkah situi khuila bantang kutdawn te nuem saeh lamtah situi te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a kutdawn neh voei rhih haeh saeh.
Leviticus14:17 A kutpha dongkah situi aka coih te khosoih loh aka caihcil kah bantang hna hnapae dongah khaw
Leviticus14:18 Khosoih kutpha dongah situi aka coih te aka caihcil kah a lu dongah hluk pah saeh lamtah anih ham te khosoih loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah dawth pah saeh.
Leviticus14:19 Te vaengah boirhaem te khosoih loh nawn saeh lamtah hmueihhlutnah te a ngawn phoeiah a tihnai lamkah aka caihcil ham dawth pah saeh.
Leviticus14:20 Hmueihtuk dongkah hmueihhlutnah neh khocang te khaw khosoih loh nawn saeh. Te phoeiah anih ham te khosoih loh dawth pah saeh lamtah caihcil saeh.
Leviticus14:21 Tedae anih te tattloel oeh tih a kut loh a na pawt atah anih ham a dawth pah vaengkah thueng hmueih la hmaithennah tuca pakhat
Leviticus14:22 vahu phiknit mai khaw
Leviticus14:23 Te te a rhet hnin dongah tah amah kah a ciimnah ham te tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khosoih taengla khuen saeh.
Leviticus14:24 Te vaengah hmaithennah tuca neh situi khap at te khosoih loh lo saeh lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la khosoih loh thueng saeh.
Leviticus14:25 Hmaithennah tuca te khaw ngawn saeh. Te phoeiah hmaithennah thii te khosoih loh lo saeh lamtah aka caihcil kah bantang hna hnapae neh bantang kut kah kutnu dongah khaw
Leviticus14:26 Situi te khaw khosoih loh khosoih kah banvoei kutpha dongah bueih saeh.
Leviticus14:27 banvoei kutpha dongkah situi te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khosoih loh a bantang kutdawn neh voei rhih haeh saeh.
Leviticus14:28 A kutpha dongkah situi te khosoih loh a caihcil sak hlang kah bantang hna hnapae dongah
Leviticus14:29 Khosoih kutpha dongkah situi aka coih te a caihcil sak kah a lu soah hluk pah saeh lamtah anih ham te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah dawth pah saeh.
Leviticus14:30 Te phoeiah amah kut loh a na van te vahu neh vahui ca khuikah khat khat te nawn saeh.
Leviticus14:31 A kut loh a na dong kah pakhat te boirhaem la
Leviticus14:32 He tah a pum dongah hmaibae tloh om dae a ciimnah ham a kut loh aka na pawt ham olkhueng ni
Leviticus14:33 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Leviticus14:34 “Kai loh nangmih taengah khohut la kam paek Kanaan kho la na kun uh vaengah na khohut
Leviticus14:35 Im kung amah te cet saeh lamtah khosoih taengah puen saeh. Te vaengah
Leviticus14:36 Te vaengah khosoih loh uen saeh lamtah tloh te sawt ham khosoih a kun hlan ah a im te saekboe saeh. Te daengah ni im khuiah boeih te a poeih uh pawt eh. Te phoeiah im te sawt ham khosoih kun saeh.
Leviticus14:37 Te phoeiah tloh te so saeh. Tloh te im pangbueng dongah a hma a hing neh a ling la om tih a hmuethma khaw pangbueng khuila dung mai ni.
Leviticus14:38 Te phoeiah khosoih te imkhui lamkah im thohka la cet saeh lamtah im te hnin rhih parhaeng pah saeh.
Leviticus14:39 A hnin rhih dongah khosoih loh koep mael saeh lamtah so saeh. Te vaengah a tloh te im pangbueng dongah a phoei mai thai.
Leviticus14:40 Tedae khosoih loh uen saeh lamtah tloh aka om lungto te phil uh saeh. Te phoeiah khopuei vongvoel kah rhalawt hmuen la voei uh saeh.
Leviticus14:41 Te phoeiah im te a khui khaw
Leviticus14:42 Te phoeiah lungto a thai lo uh saeh lamtah lamhma lungto yuneg la khueh uh saeh. Dikpo khaw a thai lo saeh lamtah im te bol saeh.
Leviticus14:43 Lungto te a phil tih im a kuet phoeikah a bol hnukah khaw tloh te puek im dongla a phoei mai thai.
Leviticus14:44 Tedae khosoih te cet lamtah so saeh. Te vaengah tloh te im khuiah a pung atah hmaibae loh a dom im khui te a rhalawt coeng.
Leviticus14:45 Te dongah im dongkah lungto neh thing khaw
Leviticus14:46 Te te parhaeng hnin khuiah a im khuila aka kun tah kholaeh due poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus14:47 Im khuiah aka yalh tah a himbai te suk saeh. Im khuiah caak aka ca long khaw a himbai te suk saeh.
Leviticus14:48 Tedae khosoih ha pawk la ha pawk tih a sawt vaengah a im ah tloh a pung voel pawt atah im te koep bol saeh. Tloh a hoeih coeng dongah im te khaw khosoih loh caihcil coeng ti saeh.
Leviticus14:49 Te dongah im ciim ham vaa phiknit
Leviticus14:50 Te phoeiah vaa pakhat te lai am dongah tui hing soah ngawn saeh.
Leviticus14:51 Lamphai thing neh pumpiding te khaw
Leviticus14:52 Im te khaw vaa thii
Leviticus14:53 Tedae vaa hing te khopuei vongvoel kah khohmuen hoeng la a hlah phoeiah im ham dawth pah saeh lamtah caihcil sak saeh.
Leviticus14:54 He tah hmaibae tloh neh thak cungkuem ham khaw
Leviticus14:55 himbai neh im khuikah hmaibae ham khaw
Leviticus14:56 a phuem
Leviticus14:57 rhalawt neh a He hmaibae olkhueng he rhalawt hnin neh cuemcaih hnin ah khaw aka thuinuet ham olkhueng ni
Leviticus15:1 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Leviticus15:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek rhoi lamtah thui pah rhoi. Hlang pakhat te a pumsa dong lamkah pumthim om tih a buk pah vaengah anih te rhalawt coeng.
Leviticus15:3 Anih kah pumthim te a ti a hnai la om tih a pumsa dongkah aka long pumthim mai khaw
Leviticus15:4 A hnai loh a hnai thil thingkong khat khat dongah aka yalh khaw aka poeih uh la om vetih anih loh a hnai thil hnopai khat khat dongkah aka ngol khaw aka poeih uh la om.
Leviticus15:5 Anih kah thingkong aka ben boeih long tah a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui neh sil uh saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:6 A pum aka hnai loh a ngol thil hnopai dongah aka ngol long khaw a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:7 Aka hnai kah a pumsa aka ben long khaw a himbai suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:8 A cuem te a hnai loh a phuh atah a himbai suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:9 A pum aka hnai loh a ngol thil ngoldoelh boeih khaw aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:10 Anih dangkah aka om boeih te aka ben boeih khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh. Tekah hno aka phuei long tah a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:11 A pum dongah aka hnai hlang aka taek boeih khaw a kut te tui neh a lae pawt atah a himbai suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh duela aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:12 Lai am khaw a pum buk loh a ben atah rhek dae saeh. Tedae thing baelyak boeih te tah tui neh lae saeh.
Leviticus15:13 A pumthim aka buk te a caihcil van atah a ciimnah ham hnin rhih due tae saeh. Te phoeiah a himbai te suk saeh lamtah a pumsa te tui hing neh sil lamtah caihcil saeh.
Leviticus15:14 A hnin rhet dongah vahu phiknit mai khaw
Leviticus15:15 Te vaengah pakhat te boirhaem la
Leviticus15:16 Hlang te a yangtui a yae atah a pumsa tom te tui neh sil saeh. Anih te khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:17 Himbai khat khat mai khaw
Leviticus15:18 Huta tongpa a yalh hmaih vaengkah yangtui te khaw tui neh sil rhoi saeh. Amih rhoi khaw kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:19 Huta khaw a pumsa pumthim om tih thii a buk tih vaengah pumom bangla hnin rhih om saeh. Te vaengah anih aka ben boeih tah kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:20 Pumom vaengkah a yalh thil hnopai boeih khaw aka poeih uh la om tih a ngol thil hnopai boeih te a poeih uh.
Leviticus15:21 Anih kah thingkong aka ben boeih loh a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih khaw kholaeh due poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:22 A ngol thil hnopai khat khat aka ben boeih long khaw a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anih khaw kholaeh due poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:23 A thingkong khaw
Leviticus15:24 Hlang loh a yalh a yalh puei tih pum a om atah hnin rhih khuiah poeih uh la om saeh. Te vaengah a yalh thil thingkong boeih khaw aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:25 Huta he khohnin a sen pumthim la a thii buk tih a pumom tue pawt ah khaw
Leviticus15:26 Pumthim a om tue khuiah a yalh thil thingkong boeih khaw pumom vaengkah thingkong vanbangla om. A ngol thil hnopai boeih khaw pumom tue vaengkah a tihnai vanbangla anih te rhalawt la om ni.
Leviticus15:27 Tekah hnopai aka ben boeih khaw a poeih coeng dongah a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Anit khaw kholaeh due poeih uh la om saeh.
Leviticus15:28 Tedae a pumthim te a caihcil phoeiah hnin rhih hil tae saeh lamtah caihcil saeh.
Leviticus15:29 A rhet hnin dongah vahu phiknit mai khaw vahui ca phiknit mai khaw amah ham lo saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap thohka kah khosoih taengla khuen saeh.
Leviticus15:30 Te vaengah pakhat te boirhaem la
Leviticus15:31 Israel ca rhoek loh a tihnai khui lamkah cue uh saeh. Te daengah ni amih khui kah ka dungtlungim te a poeih vaengkah amamih kah a tihnai dongah a duek uh pawt eh.
Leviticus15:32 He tah a pum lamloh a hnai neh yangtui aka coe loh a poeih ham
Leviticus15:33 a pumom vaengkah hainakthak neh pumthim aka buk ham khaw
Leviticus16:1 Aaron ca rhoi loh BOEIPA mikhmuh la a moe rhoi hatah duek rhoi. Amih rhoi a duek phoeiah Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek.
Leviticus16:2 Te vaengah Moses taengah BOEIPA loh
Leviticus16:3 Aaron te hmuencim la a kun atah boirhaem la saelhung khuikah vaito ca neh hmueihhlutnah la tutal te khuen saeh.
Leviticus16:4 A pumsa dongah takhlawk angkidung cim te bai saeh lamtah takhlawk hnii te na saeh. Te phoeiah takhlawk lamko te vah saeh lamtah takhlawk lupong te muei saeh. He rhoek he himbai cim ni. Te dongah a pumsa te tui neh a silh phoeiah te te bai saeh.
Leviticus16:5 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhaengpuei taeng lamkah boirhaem la maae ca pumnit neh hmueihhlutnah la tutal pakhat te lo saeh.
Leviticus16:6 Te vaengah boirhaem vaito te Aaron loh amah ham nawn saeh lamtah amah ham neh a imkhui ham dawth saeh.
Leviticus16:7 Maae rhoi te khaw lo saeh lamtah tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah tloeng saeh.
Leviticus16:8 Te phoeiah Aaron loh maae rhoi ham hmulung naan saeh lamtah hmulung pakhat te BOEIPA ham
Leviticus16:9 BOEIPA kah hmulung loh a nan maae te Aaron loh khuen saeh lamtah boirhaem la nawn saeh.
Leviticus16:10 Tedae sombawknah ham hmulung loh a nan maae te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a hing la pai sak saeh. Te phoeiah sombawknah te khosoek la hlah saeh lamtah amah thloh te dawth saeh.
Leviticus16:11 Te phoeiah boirhaem vaito te Aaron loh amah ham khuen saeh lamtah amah ham neh a imkhuikho ham dawth saeh. Te phoeiah boirhaem vaito te amah ham ngawn saeh.
Leviticus16:12 Te vaengah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmueihtuk dongkah hmai alh te baelphaih a bae neh botui bo-ul kah a vai a kutnarhum a bae pom saeh lamtah im khuikah hniyan khuila khuen saeh.
Leviticus16:13 Te phoeiah bo-ul te BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmai dongah tloeng saeh. Te vaengah bo-ul kah a hu loh olphong sokah a tlaeng te a khuk daengah ni a duek pawt eh.
Leviticus16:14 Vaito thii te khaw lo saeh lamtah thingkawng tlaeng kah a hmai khothoeng benla a kutdawn neh haeh saeh. Thingkawng tlaeng kah a hmai ah khaw thii te a kutdawn neh voei rhih haeh saeh.
Leviticus16:15 Te phoeiah pilnam kah boirhaem maae te ngawn saeh lamtah a thii te im khuikah hniyan khuila khuen saeh. Tekah thii te khaw vaito thii a saii bangla saii saeh lamtah thingkawng tlaeng dongah khaw
Leviticus16:16 Te tlam te hmuencim ham khaw
Leviticus16:17 Tholh dawth ham hmuencim la kun tih koep ha pawk hlandue hlang pakhat khaw tingtunnah dap khuiah om boel saeh. Te vaengah amah ham neh a imkhui ham khaw
Leviticus16:18 Te phoeiah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah hmueihtuk la cet saeh lamtah amah ham koep dawth bal saeh. Te vaengah vaito thii neh maae thii te lo saeh lamtah hmueihtuk ki dongkah a kaepvai ah koelh saeh.
Leviticus16:19 thii te khaw a kutdawn neh voei rhih haeh saeh lamtah amah a caihcil phoeiah Israel ca rhoek a ti a hnai lamkah ciim saeh.
Leviticus16:20 Hmuencim
Leviticus16:21 Te vaengah Aaron loh a kut te kut bok la maae hing kah a lu dongah tloeng saeh. Te phoeiah Israel ca rhoek kah thaesainah boeih neh amih kah boekoek boeih
Leviticus16:22 Te vaengah amih kah thaesainah boeih te maae loh khohmuen hoeng la phuei saeh lamtah maae te khosoek ah hlah saeh.
Leviticus16:23 Te phoeiah Aaron te tingtunnah dap khuila kun saeh. Hmuencim la a kun vaengkah a bai takhlawk himbai te pit saeh lamtah pahoi khoem saeh.
Leviticus16:24 A pum te khaw hmuen cim kah tui neh sil saeh lamtah a himbai te bai saeh. Te phoeiah halo saeh lamtah amah kah hmueihhlutnah neh pilnam kah hmueihhlutnah te nawn saeh. Te phoeiah amah ham neh pilnam ham te dawth saeh.
Leviticus16:25 Boirhaem kah a tha te khaw hmueihtuk dongah phum saeh.
Leviticus16:26 Sombawknah maae aka hlah long khaw a himbai te suk saeh lamtah a pum te tui neh sil saeh. Te phoeiah rhaehhmuen la kun saeh.
Leviticus16:27 Tholh dawth nah ham hmuencim koek la a thii a khuen boirhaem vaito neh boirhaem maae te khaw rhaehhmuen vongvoel la thak saeh lamtah a vin khaw
Leviticus16:28 Te te aka hoeh long khaw a himbai suk saeh lamtah a pum te tui neh a silh phoeiah rhaehhmuen khuila koep kun saeh.
Leviticus16:29 Te dongah hla rha dongkah a hla rhih vaengah tah na hinglu te phaep uh. Nangmih khui kah mupoe neh nangmih taengah aka bakuep yinlai loh bitat pakhat khaw na saii uh pawt ham te nangmih taengah kumhal khosing la om saeh.
Leviticus16:30 Tekah khohnin dongah nangmih te na tholhnah cungkuem khui lamkah caihcil sak ham BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nangmih ham a dawth vetih na caihcil uh ni.
Leviticus16:31 Sabbath khaw nangmih ham koiyaeh la om tih na hinglu na phaep ham te kumhal khosing la om coeng.
Leviticus16:32 Te vaengah a napa hnukthoi ah khosoih ham a koelh tih a kut tloeng thil tangtae khosoih loh takhlawk himbai neh himbai cim te bai saeh lamtah dawth van saeh.
Leviticus16:33 Te phoeiah hmuencim kah rhokso neh tingtunnah dap ham dawth pah saeh. Hmueihtuk ham khaw dawth saeh lamtah khosoih rhoek ham neh pilnam hlangping boeih ham khaw dawth bal saeh.
Leviticus16:34 Te dongah tahae kah he BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla amamih kah tholhnah cungkuem dongah kum khat ah voeikhat a saii tih Israel ca rhoek ham tholh a dawth vaengkah ham nangmih taengah kumhal khosing la om saeh
Leviticus17:1 Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Leviticus17:2 “Aaron
Leviticus17:3 Israel imkhui lamkah hlang khat khat loh vaito mai khaw
Leviticus17:4 Te vaengah BOEIPA dungtlungim hmai kah BOEIPA taengah nawnnah la nawn ham tingtunnah dap thohka ah khuen boel saeh. Tekah hlang te thii aka long sak la poek saeh. Thii a long sak coeng dongah tekah hlang te a pilnam khui lamkah hnawt saeh.
Leviticus17:5 Kohong khaepdan ah a nawn hmueih te khaw Israel ca rhoek loh hang khuen ngawn saeh. Te vaengah tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA taeng neh khosoih taengah khuen uh saeh lamtah BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih la nawn uh saeh.
Leviticus17:6 Te vaengah thii te tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA hmueihtuk dongah khosoih loh haeh saeh. Te phoeiah maehtha te BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui la phum saeh.
Leviticus17:7 Tedae amih loh a taengah a cukhalh puei uh maae taengah amamih kah hmueih koep nawn uh boel saeh. He tah amamih ham neh a cadilcahma ham khaw kumhal khosing la om saeh.
Leviticus17:8 Te phoeiah Israel imkhui kah hlang boeih neh amih lakli kah aka bakuep tih hmueihhlutnah hmueih aka nawn yinlai khaw thui pah.
Leviticus17:9 BOEIPA taengah nawn ham kangna khaw tingtunnah dap thohka la a khuen pawt atah tekah hlang te a pilnam lamkah hnawt saeh.
Leviticus17:10 Israel imkhui lamkah hlang khat khat long khaw
Leviticus17:11 Ba dongah tikoinih pumsa kah hinglu he thii dongah om. Te dongah ni nangmih kah hinglu ham hmueihtuk soah na dawth uh vaengah hinglu thii la dawth ham ni kai loh nangmih taengah kam paek.
Leviticus17:12 Te dongah
Leviticus17:13 Tedae Israel ca rhoek khui lamkah hlang khat khat long mai khaw
Leviticus17:14 Pumsa boeih kah hinglu tah a thii dongah om tih a thii khaw a hinglu dongah om. Te dongah
Leviticus17:15 Te phoeiah tolrhum mupoe neh yinlai khuikah hinglu boeih loh maehrhok neh saha te a caak atah a himbai te suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh. Kholaeh due aka poeih uh la om saeh lamtah caihcil saeh.
Leviticus17:16 Tedae himbai te suk pawt tih a pum te a silh pawt atah amah kah thaesainah te amah loh phuei van saeh
Leviticus18:1 Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Leviticus18:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Kai tah BOEIPA na Pathen ni.
Leviticus18:3 Egypt kho ah na om uh vaengkah bibi bangla saii uh boeh. Te phoeiah kai loh nangmih kam pha sak Kanaan kho kah khoboe bangla om uh boel lamtah amih kah khosing te awt uh boeh.
Leviticus18:4 Kai kah laitloeknah he ngai uh lamtah ka khosing te vai ham ngaithuen uh. Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen Yahweh ni.
Leviticus18:5 Te dongah kai kah khosing aka ngaithuen tih ka laitloeknah aka ngai hlang te tah tekah khosing dongah hing van ni. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus18:6 Hlang la aka om hlang long tah amah kah a pum a saa boeih te a yah hliphen ham paan boel saeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus18:7 Na pa kah a yah khaw
Leviticus18:8 Na pa yuu kah a yah
Leviticus18:9 Na ngannu
Leviticus18:10 Na capa canu neh na canu canu kah a yah khaw namah kah a yah la a om boeiloeih dongah amih kah a yah te hliphen boeh.
Leviticus18:11 Na pa yuu canu kah a yah khaw
Leviticus18:12 Na pa ngannu kah
Leviticus18:13 Na nu kah a tanu
Leviticus18:14 Na pa manuca kah a yah khaw hliphen boeh. Anih yuu neh na pi khaw paan pah boeh.
Leviticus18:15 Na langa kah a yah te hliphen pah boeh. Na ca yuu kah a yah khaw hliphen pah boeh.
Leviticus18:16 Na manuca yuu kah a yah
Leviticus18:17 Na yuu neh a canu
Leviticus18:18 Na yuu amah a hing lalah a yah hliphen pah ham neh daengdaeh ham a tanu te lo boeh.
Leviticus18:19 Te phoeiah huta te a ti a hnai neh pumom tue vaengah a yah hliphen pah ham paan boeh.
Leviticus18:20 Na imben kah a yuu aka poeih ham khaw na tamtah tii te khueh boeh.
Leviticus18:21 Na tiingan te Molek taengah khumpael sak ham pae boeh. Te dongah na Pathen ming te poeih boeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus18:22 tongpa puei khaw huta thingkong bangla yalh puei boeh. Te ta tueilaehkoi ni.
Leviticus18:23 Rhamsa khat khat neh aka poeih uh ham khaw na tamtah khueh boeh. Huta long khaw rhamsa neh pitpom tih
Leviticus18:24 He boeih nen he poeih uh boeh. Namtom rhoek khaw he boeih nen he a poeih uh dongah ni nangmih mikhmuh ah ka haek.
Leviticus18:25 Khohmuen pataeng a poeih uh dongah amah kah thaesainah te ka cawh pah tih
Leviticus18:26 Tedae nangmih loh ka khosing neh ka laitloeknah he ngaithuen uh. Te dongah te bang tueilaehkoi boeih te tolrhum mupoe long khaw
Leviticus18:27 Nangmih mikhmuh kah tolrhum hlang rhoek loh he rhoek kah tueilaehkoi boeih he a saii uh dongah khohmuen khaw a poeih uh.
Leviticus18:28 Te dongah nangmih mikhmuh kah namtom a tha bangla na khohmuen na poeih uh van tih nangmih khaw khohmuen loh n'tha boel saeh.
Leviticus18:29 U hlang khaw he rhoek kah tueilaehkoi hno khat khat a saii atah aka saii hlanghing boeih te pilnam lamkah hnawt saeh.
Leviticus18:30 Te dongah nangmih mikhmuh kah tueilaehkoi khosing aka saii rhoek te vai pawt ham kamah loh ka kuek te ngaithuen uh. Te daengah ni amih taengah pum te na poeih uh pawt eh. Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA ni
Leviticus19:1 Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Leviticus19:2 “Israel ca rhoek rhaengpuei boeih te voek lamtah thui pah. Na Pathen BOEIPA kamah he ka cim dongah a cim la om uh.
Leviticus19:3 Hlang boeih loh a manu neh a napa te rhih lamtah ka Sabbath khaw tuem uh. Kai tah na BOEIPA Pathen.
Leviticus19:4 Mueirhol rhoek taengla hooi uh boeh. Mueihlawn pathen rhoek khaw namamih ham saii uh boeh. Kai tah na Pathen BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:5 BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih na nawn vaengah khaw nangmih taengah kolonah la nawn uh.
Leviticus19:6 Na hmueih te amah khohnin neh a vuen ah ca. Tedae a thum hnin duela a coih atah hmai neh hoeh saeh.
Leviticus19:7 A thum hnin ah dikyik dikyak te koep a caak la a caak atah anih te moeithen mahpawh.
Leviticus19:8 Te te aka ca loh BOEIPA kah a cimcaihnah te a poeih dongah amah kah thaesainah te phuei saeh. Tekah hlanghing te a pilnam lamloh hnawt saeh.
Leviticus19:9 Na khohmuen kah cang na ah uh vaengah khaw na lo saa te boeih at boel lamtah na cangvuei kah a mo khaw boeih yoep boeh.
Leviticus19:10 Na misur khaw boeih yun boel lamtah na misur mo te koep rhut boeh. Te tah mangdaeng ham neh yinlai ham hnoo pah. Kai tah nangmih kah BOEIPA Pathen ni.
Leviticus19:11 Huen uh boeh. Basa uh boeh. Hlang khat neh khat loh a imben taengah rhilat uh boeh.
Leviticus19:12 Kai ming neh a honghi te toemngam uh boeh kai BOEIPA na Pathen ming he na poeih uh ve.
Leviticus19:13 Na hui te hnaemtaek boeh
Leviticus19:14 Hnapang te tap boeh
Leviticus19:15 Tiktamnah te dumlai la saii uh boeh. tattloel maelhmai khaw dan uh boeh
Leviticus19:16 Na pilnam taengah caemtuh ham dongpoeng boeh
Leviticus19:17 Na manuca te na thin neh hmuhuet boeh. Na tluung tueng atah na imben khaw tluung lamtah anih kah tholhnah te tah rhooi boeh.
Leviticus19:18 Na pilnam koca taengah phulo boel lamtah lunguen boeh. Tedae na hui te namah pum bangla lungnah. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:19 Ka khosing he ngaithuen uh
Leviticus19:20 Hlang khat khat loh huta taengah yalh tih yangtui a hlah phoeiah hlang kah salnu te a veet mai ni. Te vaengah a lat ham dae lat uh pawt tih poenghalnah a paek pawt atah huta te lai la om cakhaw hlang hoeng la a om pawt dongah duek sak uh boel saeh.
Leviticus19:21 Tedae tongpa loh hmaithennah tutal te tingtunnah dap thohka kah BOEIPA taengah hmaithennah la khuen saeh.
Leviticus19:22 Tongpa khaw tholhnah neh lai a hmuh coeng dongah amah ham hmaithennah tutal neh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khosoih loh dawth pah saeh. Te vaengah anih te tholhnah neh a laihmuh khui lamloh khodawkngai saeh.
Leviticus19:23 Khohmuen la na kun uh tih caak ok kung khat khat na ling uh vaengah a thaih te yahhmui rhet banghui la a muel la ca boeh kum thum om sak dae.
Leviticus19:24 A kum li dongkah a thaih boeih te tah BOEIPA taengah cangkoeinah buhcim la om saeh.
Leviticus19:25 Tedae a kum nga dongkah a thaih te ca uh lamtah a vuei khaw nangmih ham tomthap saeh. Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:26 Thii te ca uh boeh
Leviticus19:27 Na lu kah baengki te rhuep uh boeh. Na hmuimul ngalh ngalh khaw kuet uh boeh.
Leviticus19:28 Hinglu ham namah saa te a boenahhma khueh uh boeh. Na pum dongah mangthun ngo khaw khueh uh boeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:29 Cukhalh dongah na tanu te poeih uh boeih. Te daengah ni khohmuen loh cukhalh pawt vetih khohmuen ah khonuen rhamtat a baetawt pawt eh.
Leviticus19:30 Kai kah Sabbath he ngaithuen uh lamtah ka rhokso khaw rhih uh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:31 Nangmih aka poeih ham rhaitonghma taengla hooi uh boeh. Hnam khaw tlap uh boeh. Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:32 Sampok hmai ah thoh pah lamtah patong maelhmai hiin lah. Te phoeiah na Pathen khaw rhih lah. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:33 Na khohmuen ah aka bakuep yinlai te vuelvaek boeh.
Leviticus19:34 Nangmih taengah aka bakuep yinlai te namamih lamkah mupoe bangla om van saeh. Egypt kho ah yinlai la na om uh van dongah anih te namah pum bangla lungnah. Kai tah na Pathen BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus19:35 Laitloeknah dongkah cungnueh ham
Leviticus19:36 Nangmih taengah duengnah cooi
Leviticus19:37 Ka khosing boeih te ngaithuen uh lamtah ka laitloeknah boeih te vai uh lah. Kai tah BOEIPA ni
Leviticus20:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus20:2 “Israel ca rhoek taengah thui pah. Israel ca rhoek neh Israel taengah aka bakuep yinlai khui lamkah hlang khat khat loh a tiingan te Molek taengah a paek atah vang khuikah pilnam loh lungto neh dae uh saeh lamtah duek rhoela duek saeh.
Leviticus20:3 Tekah hlang te kai loh ka hmai ka khueh thil ni. A tiingan te Molek taengla a paek tih ka rhokso te a poeih phoeiah ka ming cim te a thae sak dongah a pilnam khui lamkah ka khoe ni.
Leviticus20:4 Tedae Molek taengah a tiingan aka pae hlang te khohmuen pilnam loh a mik a him a him thil uh tih a duek sak uh pawt atah
Leviticus20:5 tekah hlang neh a huiko te kai loh ka hmai ka khueh thil van vetih anih neh anih taengkah aka cuk aka halh boeih khaw
Leviticus20:6 Rhaitonghma neh hnam hnukah cukhalh ham aka mael hinglu te khaw ka hmai ka khueh thil bal ni. Tekah hlanghing te a pilnam khui lamkah ka khoe ni.
Leviticus20:7 Kai tah na BOEIPA Pathen la ka om dongah nangmih khaw ciim uh lamtah a cim la om uh.
Leviticus20:8 Kai kah khosing he ngaithuen uh lamtah vai uh. Kai tah nangmih aka ciim BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus20:9 Hlang khuikah hlang loh a manu neh a napa te a tap atah duek rhoe duek saeh. A manu a napa a tap dongah amah thii te amah pum ah tla saeh.
Leviticus20:10 Hlang yuu neh aka samphaih tih
Leviticus20:11 Hlang te a napa yuu taengah yalh tih a napa kah a yah te a poelyoe pah atah amih rhoi te duek rhoe duek rhoi saeh lamtah a thii te amamih dongah om saeh.
Leviticus20:12 Hlang te a langa taengah a yalh atah amih rhoi te duek rhoe duek saeh. Amah thii te amah dongah pitpom ham a saii rhoi.
Leviticus20:13 Huta thingkong bangla tongpa neh tongpa aka yalh te khaw tueilaehkoi ni. Amamih rhoi kah a saii vanbangla duek rhoe duek rhoi saeh lamtah a thii te amamih rhoi tlak thil saeh.
Leviticus20:14 tongpa pakhat loh huta neh a manu te rhen a loh te khaw khonuen rhamtat ni. Amih te hmai neh hoeh uh. Te daengah ni nangmih khui ah khonuen rhamtat a om pawt eh.
Leviticus20:15 Rhamsa taengah a tamtah aka khueh hlang te tah duek rhoe duek sak lamtah rhamsa te ngawn uh.
Leviticus20:16 Rhamsa boeih te khaw amah taengah kui sak ham ni huta loh a paan atah huta te ngawn lamtah rhamsa khaw duek rhoe duek sak uh. A thii te amah pum dongah tla saeh.
Leviticus20:17 A napa canu
Leviticus20:18 Hlang pakhat loh pumthim aka tlo huta te a yalh puei atah anih kah a yah ni a hli a phen pah tih pumthim ni a tai pah. Huta amah long khaw a rhoi tih a thii pumthim te a tai dongah amih rhoi te pilnam khui lamkah khoe uh saeh.
Leviticus20:19 Na nu kah a tanu neh na pa ngannu kah a yah khaw na hli na phen mahpawh. Te dongah amah saa aka yan tah amamih kah thaesainah te phuei uh saeh.
Leviticus20:20 Hlang pakhat mai long ni a napi te a yalh puei atah a nupu kah a yah ni a hli a phen. Te dongah a tholh te phuei saeh lamtah poeih cakol la duek saeh.
Leviticus20:21 U bang hlang long khaw a manuca kah a yuu aka rhawt pah tah rhalawt la om. A manuca kah a yah te a hliphen dongah cakol la duek saeh.
Leviticus20:22 Te dongah ka khosing te ngaithuen lamtah ka laitloeknah boeih te vai uh. Te daengah ni kai loh kam pha sak khohmuen loh nangmih te n'lok thil pawt vetih
Leviticus20:23 Namtom kah khosing bangla pongpa uh boeh. Te boeih te a saii uh tih amih te ka muei a puel dongah nangmih mikhmuh lamkah ka haek.
Leviticus20:24 Tedae amih kah khohmuen te na pang ham
Leviticus20:25 Te dongah rhamsa aka cuem te rhalawt khui lamloh
Leviticus20:26 BOEIPA kamah ka cim dongah kai taengah a cim la om uh. Kamah taengah om sak ham ni pilnam rhoek khui lamkah nangmih te kan hoep.
Leviticus20:27 Te dongah tongpa khaw huta khaw
Leviticus21:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus21:2 amah pumsa
Leviticus21:3 a ngannu a va om pawt tih anih dongah oila la aka hangdang ham atah poeih uh mai saeh.
Leviticus21:4 Amah aka poeih ham a pilnam khuikah boei nen khaw poeih uh boel saeh.
Leviticus21:5 A lu te lungawng la kuet rhoe kuet uh boel saeh. A baengpae neh a baengki khaw vo uh boel saeh. A pumsa te a boenah neh boe uh boel saeh.
Leviticus21:6 A Pathen ham a cim la om uh saeh lamtah a Pathen ming te poeih uh boel saeh. Te dongah BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah
Leviticus21:7 Pumyoi neh huta rhong te lo uh boel saeh. A va aka ma huta khaw lo uh boel saeh. Te dongah a Pathen ham a cim la om saeh.
Leviticus21:8 Khosoih long tah na Pathen kah buh a nawn dongah amah te ciim uh saeh. Nangmih aka ciim BOEIPA kamah he ka cim dongah khosoih khaw nang taengah a cim la om saeh.
Leviticus21:9 Khosoih tongpa kah a canu khaw a cuk a halh loh a poeih atah a napa ni a poeih. Te dongah anih te hmai neh hoeh uh saeh.
Leviticus21:10 A manuca khui lamkah a lu dongah koelhnah situi a suep pah tih himbai bai ham a kut a tloeng thil khosoih a ham long tah a lu dongkah lupong te dul boel saeh lamtah a himbai te phen boel saeh.
Leviticus21:11 Aka duek hinglu boeih taengah khaw cet boel saeh. A napa ham neh a manu ham khaw poeih uh boel saeh.
Leviticus21:12 Rhokso lamkah khaw nong boel saeh. Anih soah a Pathen kah koelhnah situi rhuisam a om coeng dongah a Pathen kah rhokso te poeih boel saeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus21:13 A yuu khaw a cuemnah neh lo saeh.
Leviticus21:14 Nuhmai
Leviticus21:15 Anih te BOEIPA kamah loh ka ciim coeng dongah a pilnam khuikah a tii a ngan long khaw poeih boel saeh
Leviticus21:16 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses a voek tih
Leviticus21:17 “Aaron te voek lamtah a cadilcahma ham khaw
Leviticus21:18 A pum dongah a lolh a maih aka om hlang boeih
Leviticus21:19 A pum dongah kut tlawt
Leviticus21:20 tingkhun khaw
Leviticus21:21 Khosoih Aaron kotiingan khuikah hlang khat khat te a pum dongah a lolh a maih atah BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah nawn ham ha mop boel saeh. A Pathen kah buh te nawn ham ha mop boel saeh.
Leviticus21:22 A Pathen kah buh tah a cim uet ah cim tih aka cim van loh ca saeh.
Leviticus21:23 Te dongah a pum dongah a lolh a maih aka om loh hniyan khuila kun boel saeh lamtah hmueihtuk taengla mop boel saeh. Te daengah ni ka rhokso te a poeih pawt eh. Amih te BOEIPA kamah long ni ka ciim
Leviticus21:24 Te dongah Moses loh Aaron neh anih koca rhoek taengah
Leviticus22:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus22:2 “Aaron neh anih koca rhoek taengah thui pah. Israel ca kah buhcim te hai pa uh saeh. Te daengah ni kai ham a ciim uh vanbangla ka ming cim he a poeih uh pawt eh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:3 Na cadilcahma ham khaw thui pah. Israel ca rhoek tah BOEIPA ham a ciim uh coeng dongah buhcim te na tii na ngan khat khat khui lamkah hlang khat khat long ni a pum dongkah a ti a hnai neh a nawn atah tekah hlanghing te ka mikhmuh lamkah khoe uh saeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:4 Aaron tiingan khuikah hlang khat khat te pahuk tih a hnai atah a caihcil hlanhil buhcim te ca boel saeh. Te phoeiah rhalawt hinglu khat khat aka ben neh yangtui aka coe hlang khaw
Leviticus22:5 Rhulcai khat khat te a ben tih amah aka poeih uh hlang te khaw
Leviticus22:6 te te aka ben hinglu te khaw kholaeh duela poeih uh. Te dongah a pum te tui neh a silh pawt atah buhcim te ca boel saeh.
Leviticus22:7 Tedae khomik a tlak phoeiah atah koep caihcil bitni. Te vaengah buhcim dongkah amah buh te koep ca saeh.
Leviticus22:8 Maehrhok neh saha sa a caak nen te poeih uh boel saeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:9 Ka kueknah te a ngaithuen uh daengah ni tholh loh a poeih tih aka duek ham long khaw amah tholh te a phueih pawt eh. Kai tah amih aka ciim BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:10 Kholong hlang khat khat long khaw buhcim te ca boel saeh. Khosoih kah impah neh kutloh long khaw buhcim te ca boel saeh.
Leviticus22:11 Tedae khosoih loh a tangka
Leviticus22:12 Khosoih canu khaw kholong hlang taengla a om coeng atah khocang neh buhcim te ca boel saeh.
Leviticus22:13 Tedae khosoih canu nuhmai la om mai tih tiingan om mueh la a hlak uh atah a napa im la mael saeh lamtah a napa kah buh te a camoe vaengkah bangla ca saeh. Tedae kholong boeih long tah ca boel saeh.
Leviticus22:14 Hlang loh buhcim te tohtamaeh la a caak atah panga neh thap pah saeh lamtah buhcim te khosoih taengah pae saeh.
Leviticus22:15 Te dongah BOEIPA taengah Israel ca rhoek kah a tloeng buhcim te poeih uh boel saeh.
Leviticus22:16 Amih te BOEIPA kamah loh ka ciim coeng dongah amih kah buhcim aka ca tah amamih kah thaesainah lai te amamih loh phuei saeh
Leviticus22:17 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus22:18 “Aaron neh anih koca rhoek khaw Israel ca rhoek boeih te khaw voek lamtah thui pah. Israel imkhui kah hlang boeih khaw
Leviticus22:19 nangmih taengah kolonah ham saelhung khuikah khaw
Leviticus22:20 A pum dongah khat khat te a lolh a maih atah khuen boeh. Nang ham kolonah khaw om hae mahpawh.
Leviticus22:21 Hlang loh olcaeng soep sak ham BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih a nawn atah kothoh bangla kolonah ham saelhung khaw boiva khaw a cuemthuek la om saeh. A pum dongah a lolh a maih khat khat khaw om boel saeh.
Leviticus22:22 Mikdael khaw
Leviticus22:23 Tedae kothoh ham tah vaito mai khaw tu mai khaw sahoei neh vitvawt lamkhaw na nawn suidae olcaeng ham tah doe mahpawh.
Leviticus22:24 Te dongah a neet tangtae
Leviticus22:25 Kholong ca kut lamkah te khaw na Pathen kah buh la nawn boeh. Amih sokah a lolh a maih khat khat loh amih rhoek te a poeih thai dongah nangmih ham a kolo mahpawh
Leviticus22:26 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus22:27 “Vaito khaw
Leviticus22:28 Tedae vaito khaw
Leviticus22:29 BOEIPA taengah uemonah hmueih na nawn uh vaengah namamih taengah kolonah la nawn uh.
Leviticus22:30 Khohnin pakhat dongah hlawp ca uh lamtah mincang duela paih uh boeh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:31 Te dongah ka olpaek tuem uh lamtah vai uh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:32 Israel ca rhoek taeng ah ka ciim vanbangla ka ming cim te poeih uh boeh. Kai tah nangmih aka ciim BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus22:33 Nangmih kah Pathen la om ham ni nangmih te Egypt kho lamkah kan doek. Kai tah BOEIPA ni
Leviticus23:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus23:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. BOEIPA kah khoning te hoe uh lamtah ka kah khoning vaengah a cim tingtunnah te khueh uh.
Leviticus23:3 Hnin rhuk khuiah bi saii uh saeh. Hnin rhih dongah koiyaeh Sabbath la om saeh lamtah a cim tingtunnah om saeh. BOEIPA kah Sabbath vaengah na tolrhum tom ah bitat khat khaw saii uh boeh.
Leviticus23:4 Amah khoning vaengah tahae kah BOEIPA khotue he doek uh lamtah a cim tingtunnah khueh uh.
Leviticus23:5 Hla lamhma dongkah hlasae hnin hlai li hlaem ah BOEIPA kah Yoom om ni.
Leviticus23:6 Hlasae hnin hlai nga dongah BOEIPA kah vaidamding khotue om saeh lamtah hnin rhih khuiah vaidamding ca uh.
Leviticus23:7 A cuek khohnin dongah nangmih ham a cim tingtunnah om saeh lamtah thohtatnah bitat boeih tah saii boeh.
Leviticus23:8 Hnin rhih khuiah BOEIPA taengla hmaihlutnah nawn uh. A hnin rhih dongah a cim tingtunnah om saeh lamtah thohtatnah bitat boeih te tah saii uh
Leviticus23:9 Te phoeiah Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Leviticus23:10 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Kai loh nangmih taengah kam paek khohmuen la na kun uh tih cang na ah uh atah na cangah cuek kah canghmuei te khosoih taengla thak uh.
Leviticus23:11 Canghmuei te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng saeh. Nangmih taengah kolonah ham khosoih loh Sabbath vuen ah thueng saeh.
Leviticus23:12 Canghmuei na thueng uh hnin vaengah tu kum khat ca te BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah ham a cuemthuek la nawn uh.
Leviticus23:13 Situi neh a thoek khocang vaidam doh nit te BOEIPA ham hmaihlutnah hmuehmuei botui la om saeh. Tuisi ham misurtui bunang pali khueh saeh.
Leviticus23:14 Na Pathen kah nawnnah a khohnin tuung na pha hlan atah vaidam khaw
Leviticus23:15 Thueng hmueih la canghuei na khuen tue phoeikah Sabbath vuen lamkah te tae lamtah Sabbath voeirhih a cum due om sak.
Leviticus23:16 Sabbath voei rhih na tae vuen kah hnin sawmnga vaengah khocang cangthai te BOEIPA taengla nawn uh.
Leviticus23:17 Na tolrhum lamkah thueng hmueih vaidam hluem nit
Leviticus23:18 Te vaengah vaidam hluem rhih
Leviticus23:19 Te phoeiah boirhaem ham maae tal pakhat neh rhoepnah hmueih ham tu kum khat ca pumnit te nawn uh.
Leviticus23:20 Thaihcuek buh te thueng hmueih la BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khosoih loh thueng saeh lamtah BOEIPA taengkah a cim tuca panit te tah khosoih ham la om saeh.
Leviticus23:21 Tekah khohnin tuung dongah a cim tingtunnah om ham na hoe uh lamtah namahmih kah thohtatnah bitat boeih te tah saii uh boeh. He tah Na tolrhum boeih kah na cadilcahma ham kumhal khosing la om saeh..
Leviticus23:22 Na khohmuen kah cang na ah uh vaengah khaw na khohmuen te hmangrhong kaep due khap uh boeh. Cang na ah uh vaengah khaw na cang mo te boeih yoep uh boeh. Mangdaeng neh yinlai ham hnoo pa uh. Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA ni
Leviticus23:23 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus23:24 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Hla hlarhih khuikah lamhmacuek hla te nangmih ham a cim tingtunnah tamlung poekkoepnah koiyaeh om saeh.
Leviticus23:25 Te vaengah thohtatnah bitat boeih tah saii uh boel lamtah BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah nawn ni
Leviticus23:26 Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek.
Leviticus23:27 “A hla rha khuikah a hla rhih dongah khaw nangmih ham a cim tingtunnah neh dawthnah hnin te om saeh. Te vaengah na hinglu te phaep uh lamtah BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah nawn uh.
Leviticus23:28 Na Pathen BOEIPA kah mikhmuh ah nangmih kah te dawth ham dawthnah khohnin la a om dongah tekah khohnin tuung ah bitat pakhat khaw saii uh boeh.
Leviticus23:29 Tekah khohnin tuung dongah a pum aka phaep pawt hlanghing boeih tah a pilnam lamkah khoe van saeh.
Leviticus23:30 Tekah khohnin tuung dongah bitat khat khat te hlanghing khat khat loh saii mai ngawn saeh. Tedae tekah hlanghing te a pilnam khui lamkah ka milh sak ni.
Leviticus23:31 Bitat pakhat khaw na saii uh pawt ham te na tolrhum boeih kah na cadilcahma rhoek ham kumhal khosing la om saeh.
Leviticus23:32 Nangmih kah koiyaeh Sabbath ah te na hinglu phaep uh. Hla ko dongkah hlaem ah tah hlaem lamloh hlaem hil na Sabbath yaeh uh
Leviticus23:33 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus23:34 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Hla rhih dongkah hnin hlai nga dongah pohlip khotue te BOEIPA ham hnin rhih khuiah om saeh.
Leviticus23:35 Khohnin lamhmacuek
Leviticus23:36 Hnin rhih khuiah BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah nawn uh. Hnin rhet te nangmih kah a cim tingtunnah la om saeh. Pahong vaengah khaw BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah nawn uh lamtah thohtatnah bitat boeih te saii uh boeh.
Leviticus23:37 BOEIPA kah khoning rhoek te a cim tingtunnah la hoe uh. Tekah khohnin vaengah a khohnin loh a kuek te tah hmueihhlutnah khaw
Leviticus23:38 BOEIPA kah Sabbath khaw amah vaengah
Leviticus23:39 Hla rhih phoeikah hnin hlai nga dongah khohmuen kah a vuei a thaih te khoem uh bal lamtah BOEIPA kah khotue te hnin rhih lam uh. A cuek khohnin dongah koiyaeh om vetih a rhet khohnin dongah khaw koiyaeh om bal ni.
Leviticus23:40 A cuek khohnin dongah rhuepomnah thing thaih neh rhophoe bom
Leviticus23:41 Kum khat ah hnin rhih tah BOEIPA ham khotue na lam uh ham te na cadilcahma taengah kumhal khosing la om saeh lamtah hla rhih dongah lam uh.
Leviticus23:42 Dungtlungim ah hnin rhih khosa uh. Israel khuikah mupoe boeih longtah dungtlungim khuiah khosa saeh.
Leviticus23:43 Te daengah ni kamah loh Egypt kho lamkah Israel ca rhoek ka mawt vaengah dungtlungim ah ka om sak te na cadilcahma loh a ming eh. Kai tah na Pathen BOEIPA ni
Leviticus23:44 Te dongah BOEIPA kah khoning te Israel ca rhoek ham Moses loh a thui pah.
Leviticus24:1 Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Leviticus24:2 “Israel ca rhoek te uen lah. Te vaengah olive situi cil a sui te khuen saeh hmaiim dongah hmaivang te phat vang saeh.
Leviticus24:3 Tekah hmaiim te tingtunnah dap khuikah olphong hniyan kah a voel ah Aaron loh ten saeh lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khoyin lamkah mincang duela pai yoeyah saeh. Te te na cadilcahma rhoek taengah kumhal khosing la om saeh.
Leviticus24:4 Hmaiim rhoek te BOEIPA mikhmuh kah a cim hmaitung soah ten yoeyah saeh.
Leviticus24:5 Vaidam te khaw lo lamtah vaidam laep parha hlai nit la kaeng saeh. Vaidam doh nit tah vaidam laep pakhat la rhip om saeh lamtah
Leviticus24:6 BOEIPA mikhmuh kah caboei cim soah than at dongah parhuk neh than nit la tloeng.
Leviticus24:7 Tekah a than dongah hmueihtui cil te khueh bal lamtah vaidam te BOEIPA taengah kahoeinah hmaihlutnah la om saeh.
Leviticus24:8 Kumhal paipi vanbangla Israel ca rhoek taeng lamkah vaidam te Sabbath hnin
Leviticus24:9 Tekah vaidam te a Aaron neh anih koca rhoek kah a hut la a om dongah aka cim te a cim vanbangla hmuen cim ah dawk ca uh saeh. BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah khuiah tekah vaidam tah Aaron ham kumhal buhvae la om saeh
Leviticus24:10 Te vaengah Israelhoel nu kah a capa neh Egypt hlang kah a capa te Isreal ca rhoek taengah cet tih rhaehhmuen khuikah Israelhoel nu kah a capa neh Israel hlang te a hnueih uh rhoi.
Leviticus24:11 Te vaengah Israelhoel nu kah a capa loh ming a sal a pham tih a tap. Te dongah anih te Moses taengla a thak uh hatah a manu ming tah Dan koca khuikah Dibri nu Shelomith la pawk.
Leviticus24:12 Te dongah a lungbuei loh BOEIPA olpaek te a puk duela anih te thongim ah a khoh uh.
Leviticus24:13 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus24:14 Thae aka phoei te rhaehhmuen vongvoel la khuen uh. Aka ya boeih loh anih lu soah a kut tloeng uh saeh. Anih te rhaengpuei boeih loh dae uh saeh.
Leviticus24:15 Isreal ca rhoek te khaw voek lamtah thui pah. Hlang khat khat long ni a Pathen te a tap atah a tholh te amah loh yook van saeh.
Leviticus24:16 Te dongah BOEIPA ming aka toeh tah duek rhoe duek saeh. rhaengpuei boeih loh anih te dae rhoe dae uh. Yinlai khaw tolrhum mupoe khaw BOEIPA ming a toeh atah duek saeh.
Leviticus24:17 Hlang kah hinglu khat khat aka ngawn hlang khaw duek rhoe duek saeh.
Leviticus24:18 Rhamsa kah hinglu aka ngawn long khaw hinglu te hinglu neh thuung saeh.
Leviticus24:19 Hlang loh a imben te nganboh a paek atah a saii vanbangla amah taengah saii pah van saeh.
Leviticus24:20 Rhuh tlawt ham rhuh tlawt
Leviticus24:21 Rhamsa aka ngawn khaw a yueng thuung sak lamtah hlang aka ngawn tah duek saeh.
Leviticus24:22 Kai tah nangmih kah BOEIPA Pathen la ka om dongah nangmih taengkah laitloeknah he pakhat la om saeh lamtah yinlai ham khaw
Leviticus24:23 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek te Moses loh a voek. Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh dongah thae aka phoei te rhaehhmuen vongvoel la a khuen uh tih lungto neh a dae uh.
Leviticus25:1 Sinai tlang ah BOEIPA loh Moses a voek tih
Leviticus25:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Kai loh nangmih taengah kam paek khohmuen te na kun thil uh vaengah khohmuen loh BOEIPA ham Sabbath te yaeh saeh.
Leviticus25:3 Na khohmuen te kum rhuk tawn lamtah na misur khaw kum rhuk na hloe khuiah a thaih te bit.
Leviticus25:4 Tedae a kum rhih dongah tah khohmuen ham koiyaeh Sabbath la om saeh. BOEIPA kah Sabbath na khohmuen te tawn boeh. Na misur khaw hloe boeh.
Leviticus25:5 Na cang pong te at boeh. Na khohai misur khaw bit boeh. Khohmuen kah koiyaeh kum la om saeh.
Leviticus25:6 Na Khohmuen kah Sabbath vaengah tah cakok te namah ham neh na salpa ham khaw
Leviticus25:7 Na khohmuen kah na rhamsa neh mulhing loh a caak ham khaw a thaih boeih om ni.
Leviticus25:8 Te dongah kum rhih kum rhih kah Sabbath voei rhih tae lamtah voei rhih a cup phoeikah kum sawmli pako vaengah Sabbath kum la om saeh.
Leviticus25:9 Hla rhih dongkah hlasae hnin rha vaengah tamlung neh tuki na ueng ni. Tholh dawthnah khohnin ah khaw na khohmuen boeih ah tuki na ueng ni.
Leviticus25:10 Kum sawmnga kum te ciim uh lamtah kho khuikah khosa rhoek boeih ham sayalhnah hoe uh. Te te nangmih ham jubilee la om saeh. Hlang kah a khohut te mael lamtah hlang boeih te a huiko taengla mael uh.
Leviticus25:11 A sawmnga kum te nangmih ham jubilee kum la om saeh lamtah
Leviticus25:12 Tekah jubilee tah nangmih ham a cim la a om dongah khohmuen kah a thaih te na caak uh ni.
Leviticus25:13 Tekah jubilee kum vaengah hlang kah a khohut te mael uh.
Leviticus25:14 Hnoyoih te na imben taengah na yoih uh tih
Leviticus25:15 Jubilee phoeikah kum na tae soah na imben kah khohmuen te na lai uh vetih neh a vuei a thaih kum na tae soah yoi saeh.
Leviticus25:16 A cangvuei kah a tarhing te namah taengah han yoih coeng dongah a kum loh amah tarhing ah yet tih a lainah loh rhoeng cakhaw kum kah a tarhing te hnah pah lamtah a lainah te hnah pah.
Leviticus25:17 Hlang pakhat long he a imben te vuelvaek boel saeh. Tedae kai tah nangmih kah BOEIPA Pathen la ka om dongah na Pathen te rhih lah.
Leviticus25:18 Te dongah ka khosing te vai uh lamtah ka laitloeknah te ngaithuen uh. Te te na saii uh daengah ni diklai ah ngaikhuek la kho na sak uh eh.
Leviticus25:19 Diklai long khaw a thaih a paek vetih kodam la na caak ni. A khuiah khaw ngaikhuek la kho na sak uh ni.
Leviticus25:20 Tedae
Leviticus25:21 kai kah yoethennah he kum rhuk khuiah nangmih ham kang uen vetih kum thum ham a vuei a thaih om bitni.
Leviticus25:22 Kum rhet dongah tawn uh lamtah cang rhuem te kum ko hil ca uh. Cangah a pha duela cang rhuem te ca uh.
Leviticus25:23 Nangmih tah kai taengah yinlai neh n lampah uh dae khohmuen tah kamah taengah a ti ham dongah khohmuen te khaw yoi boeh.
Leviticus25:24 Te dongah na khohut khohmuen boeih dongah khohmuen ham tlannah khueh uh.
Leviticus25:25 Na manuca te daeng tih a khohut te a yoih atah khohmuen aka tlan ham anih neh aka yoei uh loh ham paan saeh lamtah a manuca kah hnoyoih te koep tlan saeh.
Leviticus25:26 Aka tlan ham hlang ni a om pawt tih khohmuen a tlannah rhoeh te a kut loh pha pawh
Leviticus25:27 a hnoyoih kah kum te tae saeh lamtah a hoei te koe a yoi thil hlang taengah thuung saeh. Te phoeiah amah khohut te lat saeh.
Leviticus25:28 Tedae anih taengah a mael rhoeh te a kut loh a dang pawt atah a hnoyoih te aka lai kut dongah jubilee kum duela om dae saeh. Tedae jubilee vaengah hlah pah saeh lamtah amah khohut taengla mael saeh.
Leviticus25:29 Hlang loh tolrhum khopuei vongtung khuikah im te a yoih mai ni. Tedae a yoihnah kum a thok hil a tlannah om saeh lamtah a tlannah tue te khueh saeh.
Leviticus25:30 Kum loh cup tih a thok duela a tlan pawt atah khopuei vongtung khuikah im te im aka lai neh anih kah cadilcahma taengah a ti la pai saeh lamtah jubilee vaengah khaw hlah boel saeh.
Leviticus25:31 Vongup kah im mai cakhaw a kaepvai ah vongtung a om pawt atah khohmuen longhma bangla poek uh saeh. Anih ham tlannah om saeh lamtah jubilee vaengah hlah pah saeh.
Leviticus25:32 Levi khopuei kah khopuei im tah amih kah khohut ni. Levi ham tah kumhal ah tlannah om saeh.
Leviticus25:33 Israel ca rhoek khuiah Levi rhoek long tah a khopuei neh a im bueng he amih kah a khohut la a khueh uh dongah Levi rhoek long tah tlan saeh. A khohut khopuei kah im a yoih tangtae khaw jubilee vaengah koep lat saeh.
Leviticus25:34 Tedae amih Levi khopuei kah khohmuen khocaak te tah amamih kah kumhal a khohut la a om coeng dongah yoi uh boel saeh.
Leviticus25:35 Na manuca te daeng tih nang taengah a kut a hmawn oeh atah anih te yinlai neh lampah banghui lam khaw talong lamtah namah taengah hing sak.
Leviticus25:36 Anih taeng lamkah a casai neh a pueh a kan khaw lo boeh. Na Pathen te na rhih daengah ni na manuca loh nang taengah a hing eh.
Leviticus25:37 Anih te a casai la tangka pu boeh. Na cang khaw a pueh a kan la yoi boeh.
