Leviticus25:38 Kai tah nangmih taengah Pathen la om ham neh nang taengah Kanaan khohmuen paek ham Egypt khohmuen lamkah nangmih aka doek na Pathen BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus25:39 Na taengkah na manuca te daeng tih nang taengla amah a yoih uh atah sal kah thotatnah bangla anih te thohtat sak boeh.
Leviticus25:40 Namah taengah kutloh neh lampah bangla om saeh lamtah Jubilee kum hil nang taengah thotat saeh.
Leviticus25:41 Te phoeiah amah neh a ca rhoek te nang taeng lamkah nong saeh lamtah a huiko taengla mael saeh. Te vaengah a napa kah khohut la mael saeh.
Leviticus25:42 Kamah kah sal la om ham amih te Egypt kho lamkah ka loh. Amih te sal yoih la yoi uh boel saeh.
Leviticus25:43 Anih te mangkhak la taemrhai boeh. Na Pathen te rhih lah.
Leviticus25:44 Na kaepvai namtom taeng lamkah sal
Leviticus25:45 Nangmih loh na lai uh tih nangmih taengah aka bakuep lampah ca rhoek neh nangmih taengkah a huiko lamloh na kho kah nangmih lakliah a cun uh te khaw khohut bangla nangmih taengah om uh saeh.
Leviticus25:46 Te dongah amih te namah phoeikah na ca rhoek taengah kumhal kah a pang khohut la pang sak lamtah thohtat sak. Tedae na manuca Israel ca rhoek khat khat neh anih kah a manuca soah mangkhak la taemrhai boeh.
Leviticus25:47 Nang taengkah yinlai neh lampah kut long pataeng a kae vaengah a taengkah na manuca tah daeng tih na taengkah yinlai lampah taengah khaw
Leviticus25:48 a yoih uh phoeiah khaw a manuca khui lamkah khat khat long ni tlannah a khueh atah tlan saeh.
Leviticus25:49 A nupu long khaw
Leviticus25:50 Anih a yoih lamkah a lai kum te jubilee kum duela tae pah saeh. Te phoeiah a kum tarhing dongkah a khohnin vanbangla a yoih tangka te om saeh lamtah anih te kutloh bangla om saeh.
Leviticus25:51 Kum a muep a ngaih pueng atah a yet tarhing la a lainah tangka dong lamkah te tlannah la pae saeh.
Leviticus25:52 Tedae jubilee kum duela kum cavilcavel ni a ngaih coeng atah a kum tarhing te poek pah saeh lamtah a tlannah te pae van saeh.
Leviticus25:53 Kum at phoeiah kum at kutloh bangla om saeh. Anih te na mikhmuh ah mangkhak la taemrhai boeh.
Leviticus25:54 Te tlam pataeng a tlan thai pawt atah Jubilee kum vaengah anih te a ca rhoek neh rhenten hlah saeh.
Leviticus25:55 Israel ca rhoek he kamah taengah ka sal rhoek kah sal la om ham ni Egypt kho lamkah ka loh. Kai tah nangmih kah BOEIPA Pathen ni.
Leviticus26:1 Mueirhol khaw
Leviticus26:2 Ka Sabbath te tuem uh lamtah ka rhokso te rhih uh. Kai tah BOEIPA ni.
Leviticus26:3 Ka khosing te na vai uh atah ka olpaek khaw ngaithuen uh lamtah saii uh.
Leviticus26:4 Te daengah ni amah tuetang vaengah nangmih ham khonal kan tueih vetih diklai loh a cangpai m'paek phoeiah khohmuen kah thingkung long khaw a thaih a thaih eh.
Leviticus26:5 Te vaengah na cangtil loh misurbit due a pha vetih na misurbit loh na rhoktuh tue te a pha ni. Na buh khaw kodam la na caak uh vetih na khohmuen ah ngaikhuek la kho na sak uh ni.
Leviticus26:6 Khohmuen te rhoepnah ka paek vetih lakueng om mueh la na yalh uh ni. Khohmuen lamkah boethae mulhing khaw ka kangkuen sak vetih na khohmuen te cunghang loh khawkkhek mahpawh.
Leviticus26:7 Na thunkha pataeng na hloem vaengah na mikhmuh kah cunghang dongah cungku uh ni.
Leviticus26:8 Te vaengah nangmih khuikah panga loh yakhat te a hloem uh vetih yakhat loh thawngrha khaw a hloem ni. Na thunkha rhoek khaw na mikhmuh kah cunghang dongah cungku uh ni.
Leviticus26:9 Nangmih taengla ka mael vetih kam pungtai sak phoeiah kan rhoeng sak ni. Ka paipi te khaw nangmih taengah ka thoh ni.
Leviticus26:10 Cang rhuem aka ip te na caak uh vetih cang thai ham te cang rhuem na hlah uh ni.
Leviticus26:11 Nangmih lakli ah ka dap ka khueh vetih nangmih te ka hinglu loh tuei voel mahpawh.
Leviticus26:12 Nangmih lakli ah ka pongpa vetih nangmih kah Pathen la ka om vaengah nangmih khaw ka pilnam la na om uh ni.
Leviticus26:13 Egypt kho lamkah nangmih aka doek te khaw na BOEIPA Pathen kamah ni. Amih sal la na om khui lamkah na hnamkun hnokohcung khaw ka khaem tih nangmih te a dueng la kan caeh sak.
Leviticus26:14 Tedae ka ol na ngai uh pawt tih hekah olpaek boeih he na vai uh pawt atah
Leviticus26:15 ka khosing te na sawtsit uh tih na hinglu loh ka laitloeknah te a tuei dongah ka olpaek boeih te vai pawt ham ka paipi te na phae uh atah
Leviticus26:16 kai loh nangmih ham hekah he ka saii van ni. Te vaengah kositloh neh mik hum satloh te nangmih soah lungmitnah la kan hlak vetih na hinglu a mueipuel ni. Na cangti khaw a poeyoek la na tuh vetih na thunkha long ni a caak eh.
Leviticus26:17 Nangmih taengah ka hmai ka khueh vetih na thunkha rhoek kah mikhmuh ah na paloe uh ni. Na lunguet rhoek loh nangmih te n'taemrhai uh vetih nangmih n'hloem pawt cakhaw rhaelrham uh.
Leviticus26:18 He rhoek phoeiah khaw ka ol te na yaak uh pawt atah namamih kah tholh dongah voeirhih duela nangmih te toel ham ka khoep van ni.
Leviticus26:19 Nangmih kah hoemdamnah sarhi te ka khaem vetih na vaan ke thi bangla
Leviticus26:20 Na khohmuen loh a cangpai m'pae pawt dongah na thadueng khaw a poeyoek la boeih vetih khohmuen kah thingkung khaw a thaih thaii mahpawh.
Leviticus26:21 Kai taengah boekoekthingka la na om uh tih ka ol ngai ham na huem uh pawt van atah na tholh tarhing ah hmasoe parhih duela nangmih soah kan khoep sak van ni.
Leviticus26:22 Kohong mulhing te nang taengla kan tueih vetih namamih khaw cakol la n'khueh uh ni. Na rhamsa te a thup vaengah voehvoeh na muei uh vetih na longpuei khaw sut pong ni.
Leviticus26:23 He phoeiah pataeng kai taengah na toel uh pawt tih kai soah boekoekthingka la na pongpa uh mai ni.
Leviticus26:24 Te vaengah kai ngawn tah nangmih taengah boekoekthingka la ka lo vetih namamih kah tholhnah dongah voeirhih duela kang ngawn van ni.
Leviticus26:25 Phulohnah paipi neh phu aka lo cunghang te nangmih soah kang khuen ni. Na khopuei ah kan coi phoeiah nangmih lakli ah duektahaw kan tueih vetih thunkha kut dongah kam voeih ni.
Leviticus26:26 Nangmih kah thahuelnah buh te kai loh ka khah vaengah na buh te huta parha loh tapkhuel pakhat dongah a thong uh ni. Te vaengah na buh te amah tarhing neh ham phom uh vetih na caak uh suidae na hah uh mahpawh.
Leviticus26:27 He phoeiah pataeng kai taengah na khinngai uh pawt tih kai soah boekoekthingka la na pongpa uh atah
Leviticus26:28 nangmih taengah kosi neh boekoekthingka la ka lo van vetih nangmih te namamih kah tholh dongah voeirhih duela kan toel ni.
Leviticus26:29 Te vaengah na capa rhoek kah a saa te na caak uh vetih na canu rhoek kah a saa khaw na caak uh ni.
Leviticus26:30 Nangmih kah hmuensang te ka mit sak vetih na bunglawn khaw ka vung ni. Nangmih kah mueirhol thingkoh soah na rhok te ka hmoek vetih nangmih te ka hinglu loh a tuei ni.
Leviticus26:31 Na khopuei te imrhong la ka khueh vetih na rhokso khaw ka pong sak ni. Nangmih kah hmuehmuei botui khaw ka him mahpawh.
Leviticus26:32 Khohmuen te khaw ka pong sak vetih a khuikah kho aka sa na thunkha rhoek te pong uh ni.
Leviticus26:33 Nangmih te namtom rhoek taengah kan thaek kan yak phoeiah na hnukah cunghang neh kan thun ni. Te vaengah na khohmuen loh khopong la om vetih na khopuei rhoek khaw imrhong la poeh uh ni.
Leviticus26:34 Khohmuen loh a Sabbath te a pong tue khuiah uum saeh. Nangmih te na thunkha khohmuen ah na om uh vaengah khohmuen khaw kangkuen saeh lamtah a Sabbath te uum saeh.
Leviticus26:35 A khuiah kho na sak uh vaengkah na Sabbath ah a duem pawt yueng te a pong tue khuiah tah duem saeh.
Leviticus26:36 Nangmih khuikah aka sueng rhoek pataeng a thunkha rhoek kah khohmuen ah a thinko te rhiyawpnah paek ni. Amih te hloem pawt cakhaw hawn a yawn ol loh a hloem vaengah cunghang kah a hloem bangla yonglong ah rhaelrham uh vetih cungku uh ni.
Leviticus26:37 N'hloem uh pawt cakhaw cunghang ha dongkah bangla hlang long he a manuca pataeng a paloe thil vetih na thunkha rhoek hmai ah na oelnah om mahpawh.
Leviticus26:38 Namtom taengah na milh uh vetih na thunkha rhoek kah khohmuen loh nangmih te n'yoop ni.
Leviticus26:39 Nangmih khui lamkah aka sueng rhoek te na thunkha rhoek kah khohmuen ah amamih kah thaesainah dongah muei uh vetih
Leviticus26:40 A boekoeknah la kai taengah boe a koek uh tih kai soah boekoekthingka la a caeh uh vaengah amamih kah thaesainah neh a napa rhoek kah thaesainah te a omtoem uh mai ni.
Leviticus26:41 Kai khaw amih taengah boekoekthingka la ka cet vetih amih te thunkha rhoek kah khohmuen la ka thak ni. Tedae amih kah thinko pumdul loh a kunyun daengah ni amamih kah thaesainah khaw a moeithen eh.
Leviticus26:42 Jakob taengkah ka paipi khaw
Leviticus26:43 Amih om mueh la a pong sut vaengah amih kah a hnoo khohmuen loh amah kah Sabbath te a uum ni. Ka laitloeknah a hnawt uh tih a hinglu loh ka khosing a tuei dongah amih kah thaesainah a thung ni.
Leviticus26:44 Kai tah amih kah BOEIPA Pathen la ka om dongah amih he a thunkha rhoek kah khohmuen ah a om vaengah pataeng amih taengkah ka paipi phae ham neh amih thup ham aih tah amih te ka hnawt pawt vetih ka tuei mahpawh.
Leviticus26:45 Kai loh amih taengah BOEIPA Pathen la om ham te tah namtom rhoek kah mikhmuh ah Egypt kho lamkah ka khuen patuel rhoek kah paipi te amih ham ka thoelh pueng ni.
Leviticus26:46 Hekah oltlueh neh laitloeknah neh olkhueng rhoek he Moses kut neh Sinai tlang ah BOEIPA loh amah laklo neh Israel ca rhoek laklo ah a khueh.
Leviticus27:1 BOEPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Leviticus27:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Hlang khat khat loh na hinglu phu neh BOEIPA taengah olcaeng a rhaisang sak atah
Leviticus27:3 na phu te tongpa kum kul ca lamkah kum sawmrhuk ca rhoek te tah hmuencim kah shekel ah tangka shekel sawmnga te na phu la om saeh.
Leviticus27:4 Tedae anih te huta la a om atah shekel sawmthum na phu la om saeh.
Leviticus27:5 Te vaengah kum nga ca lamkah kum kul ca te tah tongpa ham shekel pakul neh huta ham shekel parha te na phu la om saeh.
Leviticus27:6 Tedae hla khat ca lamkah kum nga ca te tah tongpa ham tangka shekel panga te na phu la om saeh lamtah huta ham tangka shekel pathum te na phu la om saeh.
Leviticus27:7 Kum sawmrhuk ca lamkah a so te tah tongpa te shekel hlai nga te
Leviticus27:8 Na phu te a daeng bal oeh atah amah te khaw khosoih kah mikhmuh ah pai saeh lamtah khosoih loh a phu tloek pah saeh. Aka caeng kut loh a na tarhing ah khosoih loh rhan pah saeh.
Leviticus27:9 Rhamsa te BOEIPA taengkah nawnnah ham a nawn uh bal atah BOEIPA taengah a paek boeih te tah a cimcaih la om saeh.
Leviticus27:10 A thae te a then neh
Leviticus27:11 Tedae rhalawt rhamsa boeih BOEIPA taengkah nawnnah ham khuen uh boel saeh. Tedae rhamsa te khosoih kah mikhmuh ah tloeng saeh.
Leviticus27:12 Te vaengah a thae a then khaw anih te khosoih loh a phu tloek saeh lamtah khosoih kah a tloek te na phu la om saeh.
Leviticus27:13 Tedae amah loh a tlan la a tlan atah na phu te panga neh thap van saeh.
Leviticus27:14 Hlang pakhat mai long khaw a im te BOEIPA ham a cim la a ciim coeng atah a thae a then khaw khosoih loh a phu tloek saeh lamtah khosoih kah a phu a tloek vanbangla a phu khaw om van saeh.
Leviticus27:15 Tedae a im a ciim tangtae te a tlan atah a phu te tangka a pueh panga neh koep thap saeh lamtah amah hut la koep om saeh.
Leviticus27:16 Hlang pakhat mai loh khohmuen khui lamkah amah khohut te BOEIPA ham a ciim atah a cangti a cuk tarhing la a phu om saeh lamtah cangtun tii hma at cuk te tangka shekel sawmnga neh ting van saeh.
Leviticus27:17 Jubilee kum dongah a khohmuen te a ciim atah a phu te amah tarhing la om saeh.
Leviticus27:18 Tedae a khohmuen te jubilee poengah a ciim atah jubilee kum duela aka sueng te khosoih loh tae saeh lamtah a kum tarhing kah tangka vanbangla a phu te hnop van saeh.
Leviticus27:19 A hoep mueh tangtae khohmuen te koep a tlan la a tlan atah khohmuen phu tangka te a pueh panga neh koep thap thil saeh lamtah amah hut la koep om saeh.
Leviticus27:20 Tedae khohmuen te tlan pawt tih hlang taengla patoeng a yoih coeng atah khohmuen te koep tlan voel boel saeh.
Leviticus27:21 Jubilee a poeng vaengah khohmuen loh BOEIPA taengah a cim la a om pueng atah khohmuen bangla yaehtaboeih la aka om te tah khosoih kah khohut la om saeh.
Leviticus27:22 Amah kah khohut khohmuen pawt dae a kho lai te BOEIPA ham a ciim atah
Leviticus27:23 Jubilee kum a pha duela a phu yet te khosoih loh tae saeh lamtah BOEIPA ham a cimcaih sak khohnin van vaengah a phu te pae saeh.
Leviticus27:24 Jubilee kum vaengah tah khohmuen a lai vaengkah a kungmah taengah amah kah khohmuen khohut vanbangla bal saeh.
Leviticus27:25 Na phu boeih boeih hmuencim kah shekel neh tae la om vetih gerah pakul ah shekel pakhat la om saeh.
Leviticus27:26 Rhamsa khuikah a cacuek boeih he BOEIPA kah caming omthang la a om dongah vaito mai khaw tu mai khaw BOEIPA hut tangtae te tah hlang long he ciim boel saeh.
Leviticus27:27 Tedae rhalawt rhamsa mai khaw namah kah phu bangla a lat mai ni. Tedae te te a panga neh thap saeh. A tlan pawt daengah ni namah ka a phu bangla a yoih eh.
Leviticus27:28 Tedae hlang loh a khueh khui boeih lamkah hlang khaw
Leviticus27:29 Hlang pataeng yaehtaboeih la a ha boeih te tah lat boel saeh lamtah duek rhoe duek sak saeh.
Leviticus27:30 Khohmuen cangtii khaw
Leviticus27:31 Te dongah hlang khat khat mai loh amah kah parha pakhat te a tlan la a tlan atah amah kah panga neh thap thil saeh.
Leviticus27:32 Saelhung khaw
Leviticus27:33 A thae a then khaw hnukdawn boel saeh lamtah thovael boel saeh. A tho la a tho atah aka om tangtae neh a hnothung te a cim la rhen om coeng tih tlan thai mahpawh
Leviticus27:34 Tahae kah olpaek rhoek he Israel ca rhoek ham Sinai tlang ah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen.
Numbers1:1 Egypt kho lamloh a coe phoeikah a kum bae
Numbers1:2 “Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih hlangmi te amah huiko neh
Numbers1:3 Kum kul ca lamloh a so
Numbers1:4 Amah a napa imkhui kah a lu hlang te koca pakhat lamloh hlang pakhat tah nangmih rhoi taengah om saeh.
Numbers1:5 Te dongah he kah hlang ming aka om rhoek nangmih rhoi te m'pai puei saeh. Reuben ham Shedeur capa Elizur
Numbers1:6 Simeon ham te Zurishaddai capa Shelumiel
Numbers1:7 Judah ah Amminadab capa Nahshon
Numbers1:8 Issakhar ah Zuar capa Nethanel
Numbers1:9 Zebulun ah Helon capa Eliab
Numbers1:10 Joseph koca ah Ephraim kah Ammihud capa Elishama neh Manasseh kah Pedahzur capa Gamaliel
Numbers1:11 Benjamin ah Gideoni capa Abidan
Numbers1:12 Dan ah Ammishaddai capa Ahiezer
Numbers1:13 Asher ah Okran capa Pagiel
Numbers1:14 Gad ah Deuel capa Eliasaph
Numbers1:15 Naphtali ah Enan capa Ahira Enan saeh
Numbers1:16 He mingthang rhoek he rhaengpuei loh a napa rhoek koca kah khoboei neh Israel thawngkhat kah a lu la a khue uh.
Numbers1:17 Te phoeiah ming a phoei hlang rhoek te Moses neh Aaron loh a loh.
Numbers1:18 A hla bae kah hnin at ah tah rhaengpuei boeih te a tingtun sak. Te vaengah kum kul ca neh a so hang tah a hlangmi la amah huiko neh a napa rhoek imko tarhing la ming a khueh uh.
Numbers1:19 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla amih te Sinai khosoek ah a soep.
Numbers1:20 Te vaengah Israel caming
Numbers1:21 Amih Reuben koca te thawng sawmli thawng rhuk neh ya nga la a soep.
Numbers1:22 Simeon koca kah a rhuirhong tah
Numbers1:23 Amih Simeon koca te thawng sawmnga thawng ko neh ya thum la a soep.
Numbers1:24 Gad koca kah a rhuirhong tah
Numbers1:25 Amih Gad koca te thawng sawmli thawng nga neh ya rhuk sawmnga la a soep uh.
Numbers1:26 Judah koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:27 Amih Judah koca te thawng sawmrhih thawng li neh ya rhuk la a soep uh.
Numbers1:28 Issakhar koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:29 Amih Issakhar koca te thawng sawmnga thawng li neh ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers1:30 Zebulun koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:31 Amih Zebulun koca te thawng sawmnga thawng rhih neh ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers1:32 Joseph koca ah Ephraim koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:33 Amih Ephraim koca te thawng sawmli neh ya nga a soep uh.
Numbers1:34 Manasseh koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:35 Amih Manasseh koca te thawng sawmthum thawng hnih yahnih la a soep uh.
Numbers1:36 Benjamin koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:37 amih Benjamin koca te thawng sawmthum thawng nga ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers1:38 Dan koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:39 amih Dan koca te thawng sawmrhuk thawng hnih neh ya rhih la a soep uh.
Numbers1:40 Asher koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:41 amih Asher koca te thawng sawmli thawng khat neh ya nga la a soep uh.
Numbers1:42 Naphtali koca kah a rhuirhong te
Numbers1:43 amih Naphtali koca te thawng sawmnga thawng thum neh ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers1:44 He he aka soep rhoek loh a soep vaengah Moses neh Aaron khaw
Numbers1:45 Te dongah ni Israel ca rhoek loh a napa rhoek kah imkhui pakhat ah kum kul ca lamloh a so hang
Numbers1:46 Te vaengkah a soep boeih te thawng ya rhuk neh thawng thum neh ya nga neh sawmnga lo uh.
Numbers1:47 Tedae Levi te tah a napa koca lamloh amih lakli ah ana soep uh thil pawh.
Numbers1:48 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers1:49 “Levi koca bueng tah soep thil boel lamtah amih khuikah a lu te Israel ca khui la khuen boeh.
Numbers1:50 Tedae namah loh Levi te laipainah dungtlungim so neh a hnopai cungkuem so neh a taengkah a cungkuem soah khueh. Amih loh dungtlungim neh a hnopai boeih te kawt uh saeh. Amih te thotat uh saeh lamtah dungtlungim taengah pin rhaeh uh saeh.
Numbers1:51 Dungtlungim te khuen ham vaengah te te Levi rhoek loh suntlak puei saeh. Dungtlungim a rhaeh ham vaengah khaw te te Levi rhoek loh thoh uh saeh. Tedae hlangthawt loh a paan atah duek saeh.
Numbers1:52 Israel ca khuikah hlang he amah kah rhaehhmuen ah rhaeh saeh lamtah hlang he amah caempuei kah a hnitai neh om saeh.
Numbers1:53 Te vaengah Levi rhoek tah laipainah dungtlungim kaepah rhaeh uh saeh. Te daengah ni thinhulnah loh Israel ca rhaengpuei soah a tlak pawt eh. Te dongah laipainah dungtlungim kah tuemkoi te Levi rhoek loh ngaithuen uh saeh.
Numbers1:54 Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla a cungkuem te a saii uh.
Numbers2:1 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Numbers2:2 “Hlang he a napa imko kah miknoek neh a hnitai hmuiah rhaeh uh saeh. Israel ca rhoek te tingtunnah dap taengah a hla la pin rhaeh uh saeh.
Numbers2:3 Khothoeng khocuk la Judah lambong kah hnitai te amah kah caempuei neh rhaeh saeh. Te vaengah Amminadab capa Nahshon te Judah koca rhoek kah khoboei saeh.
Numbers2:4 A caempuei khaw thawng sawmrhih thawng li neh ya rhuk la a soep.
Numbers2:5 A hmatoeng ah aka rhaeh Issakhar koca neh Issakhar ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Zuar capa Nethanel saeh.
Numbers2:6 A caempuei khaw thawng sawmnga thawng li neh ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers2:7 Zebulun koca neh Zebulun ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Helon capa Eliab saeh.
Numbers2:8 A caempuei khaw thawng sawmnga thawng rhih neh ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers2:9 Judah rhaehhmuen kah boeih te thawng yakhat neh thawng sawmrhet neh thawng rhuk ya li la soep uh. Amih kah caempuei te a pacuek cet saeh.
Numbers2:10 Reuben rhaehhmuen kah hnitai tah tuithim ah amah caempuei neh om tih Shedeur capa Elizur te Reuben koca kah khoboei saeh.
Numbers2:11 A caempuei neh anih te thawng sawmli thawng rhuk neh ya nga la soep uh.
Numbers2:12 A hmatoeng ah aka rhaeh Simeon koca neh Simeon ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Zurishaddai capa Shelumiel saeh.
Numbers2:13 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmnga thawng ko neh ya thum la a soep uh.
Numbers2:14 Gad koca neh Gad ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Reuel capa Eliasaph saeh.
Numbers2:15 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmli thawng nga neh ya rhuk sawmnga la a soep uh.
Numbers2:16 Reuben rhaehhmuen kah boeih te thawng yakhat neh thawng sawmnga thawng khat neh ya li sawmnga la a soep uh. Amih kah caempuei te a pabae ah cet saeh.
Numbers2:17 Te vaengah Levi rhaehhmuen kah tingtunnah dap lambong laklung ah cet saeh. A rhaeh uh vanbangla hlang he amah hnitai hmuikah amah kah hmuen ah cet tangloeng saeh.
Numbers2:18 Ephraim caem kah hnitai a caempuei neh khotlak ah om saeh lamtah Ephraim ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Ammihud capa Elishama saeh.
Numbers2:19 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmli neh ya nga lo.
Numbers2:20 A hmatoeng te Manasseh koca saeh lamtah Manasseh ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Pedahzur capa Gamaliel saeh.
Numbers2:21 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmthum thawng hnih ya hnih la a soep uh.
Numbers2:22 Benjamin koca neh Benjamin ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Gideoni tah capa Abidan saeh.
Numbers2:23 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmthum tah thawng nga neh ya li la a soep uh.
Numbers2:24 Ephraim caem te thawng yakhat phoeiah thawng rhet neh ya khat la boeih soep uh tih amih kah caempuei te a pathum ah cet saeh.
Numbers2:25 Dan caem kah hnitai tah a caempuei neh tlangpuei ah om saeh lamtah Dan ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Ammishaddai capa Ahiezer saeh.
Numbers2:26 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmrhuk thawng hnih neh ya rhih a soep uh.
Numbers2:27 A hmatoeng kah aka rhaeh Asher koca neh Asher ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Okran capa Pagiel saeh.
Numbers2:28 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmli thawng khat ya nga a soep.
Numbers2:29 Naphtali koca neh Naphtali ca rhoek kah khoboei tah Enan capa Ahira saeh.
Numbers2:30 A caempuei neh amih te thawng sawmnga thawng thum neh ya li a soep uh.
Numbers2:31 Dan caem khuikah boeih he thawng yakhat neh thawng sawmnga thawng rhih ya rhuk la a soep uh tih a hnukkhoem la a hnitai neh cet uh saeh.
Numbers2:32 Israel ca rhoek te a napa rhoek imkhui neh a soep tih a caempuei lamloh a caem te boeih a soep vaengah thawng ya rhuk neh thawng thum ya nga sawmnga lo
Numbers2:33 Tedae Levi rhoek tah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Israel ca khui ah soep uh thil pawh.
Numbers2:34 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla a cungkuem te Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh. A hnitai hmuiah rhaeh uh tih hlang he amah koca ah a napa imkhui neh cet uh.
Numbers3:1 He tah BOEIPA loh Sinai tlang ah Moses a voek hnin kah Aaron neh Moses rhuirhong ni.
Numbers3:2 Aaron ca rhoek he a ming ah
Numbers3:3 Khosoih Aaron ca rhoek he khosoih sak ham ming a koelh pah tih a kut ah a buem sak.
Numbers3:4 Tedae Nadab neh Abihu tah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah duek rhoi. Sinai khosoek kah BOEIPA mikhmuh la imlang hmai a khuen dongah amih rhoi te ca khueh rhoi pawh. Te dongah Eleazar neh Ithamar a napa Aaron mikhmuh ah khosoih rhoi.
Numbers3:5 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers3:6 Levi koca te khuen lamtah khosoih Aaron mikhmuh ah pai sak. Te vaengah a taengah thotat uh saeh.
Numbers3:7 Te vaengah anih kah tuemkoi neh tingtunnah dap hmai ah rhaengpuei boeih kah tuemkoi khaw
Numbers3:8 Tingtunnah dap hnopai boeih neh im kah dungtlungim kah thothuengnah dongkah thothueng ham dongah Israel ca rhoek kah tuemkoi te ngaithuen uh saeh.
Numbers3:9 Levi rhoek te Aaron taeng neh a ca rhoek taengah pae. Amih te Israel ca rhoek taeng lamloh a taengah pae rhoe pae saeh.
Numbers3:10 Aaron neh a capa rhoek te soep lamtah a khosoihbi te ngaithuen saeh. Tedae te aka paan hlangthawt tah duek saeh
Numbers3:11 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers3:12 “Kai loh Levi te Israel ca rhoek khui lamloh
Numbers3:13 Caming boeih kamah ham coeng dongah Egypt kho kah caming boeih ka ngawn khohnin ah ni Israel khuikah caming boeih te kamah ham ka ciim coeng. Hlang lamloh rhamsa khaw kai YAHWEH kamah ham ni a om uh
Numbers3:14 BOEIPA loh Moses te Sinai khosoek ah a voek tih
Numbers3:15 Levi koca rhoek te a napa imko ah a huiko neh soep lamtah tongpa boeih hla khat ca lamloh a so hang tah soep thil
Numbers3:16 Te dongah BOEIPA kah ol a uen bangla Moses loh amih te a soep.
Numbers3:17 Levi koca rhoek khui Gershon
Numbers3:18 Gershon koca te a cako ah Libni neh Shimei he a ming thum van.
Numbers3:19 Kohath koca rhoek khaw a cako ah Amram
Numbers3:20 Merari koca rhoek khaw a cako ah Mahli neh Mushi om. Amih he a napa imkhui lamloh Levi koca la om uh.
Numbers3:21 Gershon lamloh Libni koca neh Shimei koca a om dongah amih rhoi he Gershon kah a huiko ni.
Numbers3:22 Amih kah a soep tarhing ah hla khat ca lamloh a so hang tongpa boeih te thawng rhih neh ya nga la a soep uh.
Numbers3:23 Gershon cako te dungtlungim kah tahael khotlak ben ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers3:24 Gershon kah a napa imkhui ah Lael capa Eliasaph te khoboei van.
Numbers3:25 Gershon koca loh Tingtunnah dap kah dungtlungim neh dap imphu khaw
Numbers3:26 vongtung dongkah imbang neh vongtung thohka kah himbaiyan
Numbers3:27 Kohath lamloh Amrami cako neh Izhari cako
Numbers3:28 Hlangmi la
Numbers3:29 Kohath ca rhoek tah a cako la dungtlungim kaep kah tuithim ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers3:30 Kohath cako kah a napa imkhui ah Uzziel capa Elizaphan he khoboei van.
Numbers3:31 Te vaengah amih loh thingkawng neh caboei khaw
Numbers3:32 Levi khoboei rhoek kah khoboei
Numbers3:33 Merari lamloh Makhali cako neh Musihe cako tih amih te Merari koca rhoek van.
Numbers3:34 A hlangmi la
Numbers3:35 Merari cako kah a napa imkhui ah Abihail capa Zuriel te khoboei tih dungtlungim kaep kah tlangpuei ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers3:36 Te vaengah Merari ca rhoek kah a hutnah dungtlungim a longlaeng neh a thohkalh
Numbers3:37 Vongtung phai kah tung neh a buenhol khaw
Numbers3:38 Dungtlungim hmai kah khothoeng neh
Numbers3:39 Levi te boeih a soep hil Moses neh Aaron loh BOEIPA ol bangla a soep. Amih koca te hla khat ca lamloh a so hang tongpa boeih te thawng kul hnih lo uh.
Numbers3:40 BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers3:41 Israel ca rhoek lamkah caming boeih yueng la Levi
Numbers3:42 Te dongah BOEIPA loh amah a uen bangla Moses loh Israel ca rhoek kah caming boeih te a soep.
Numbers3:43 Te vaengah tongpa caming aka om hla khat ca lamloh a so hang boeih te
Numbers3:44 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers3:45 “Israel ca rhoek khuikah caming boeih yueng la Levi
Numbers3:46 Te dongah tlansum khaw Levi soah te Israel ca caming lamloh ya hnih sawmrhih pathum neh poeng pah.
Numbers3:47 Hlangmi pakhat ham te shekel la shekel panga
Numbers3:48 Tangka te Aaron taeng neh anih koca rhoek taengla na paek vaengah amih kah tlansum te poeng pah
Numbers3:49 Te dongah Levi kah a lat soah aka poeng rhoek taeng lamkah tlansum tangka te Moses loh a loh.
Numbers3:50 Israel ca caming taeng lamloh tangka te hmuencim shekel ah thawng khat ya thum sawmrhuk panga a doe.
Numbers3:51 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla BOEIPA ol tarhing ah ni Moses loh tlansum tangka te Aaron taeng neh anih koca rhoek taengla a paek.
Numbers4:1 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Numbers4:2 “Levi koca khui lamloh Kohath ca rhoek kah a lu te a napa rhoek imkhui neh a cako ah tae pah.
Numbers4:3 Kum sawmthum ca lamloh a so hang neh kum sawmnga ca hil tah tingtunnah dap ah bitat saii ham caempuei la boeih kun.
Numbers4:4 Tingtunnah dap khuiah hmuencim kah hmuencim koek ah Kohath koca kah thothuengnah tah he coeng ni.
Numbers4:5 Lambong a thoeih vaengah Aaron neh anih koca rhoek te kun uh saeh. Te vaengah himbaiyan dongkah hniyan te dul uh lamtah laipainah thingkawng te khuk thil saeh.
Numbers4:6 Te phoeiah a soah a sing la saham pho neh dah saeh. A so khit ah himbai a thim duk a phaih phoeiah a cung rholh uh saeh.
Numbers4:7 A hmai caboei soah himbai thim a phaih tih a soah bael neh yakbu
Numbers4:8 Te rhoek soah himbai hlarhui a lingdik phaih lamtah saham pho imphu neh te te khuk uh saeh. Te phoeiah a cung te rholh uh saeh.
Numbers4:9 Te vaengah himbai thim lo uh lamtah vangnah hmaitung neh a hmaithoi khaw
Numbers4:10 Amah te neh a hnopai boeih te saham pho imphu neh cun uh saeh lamtah cunghloeng dongah buen uh saeh.
Numbers4:11 Sui hmueihtuk soah khaw himbai thim neh khuk saeh. Te phoeiah te te saham pho imphu neh khuk uh saeh lamtah a cung rholh uh saeh.
Numbers4:12 Thohtatnah hnopai cungkuem te khuen uh saeh lamtah hmuencim ah te nen te thotat uh saeh. Himbai thim khuila a sang tih saham pho imphu neh a khuk phoeiah cunghloeng dongah buen uh saeh.
Numbers4:13 Te phoeiah hmueihtuk te kol uh saeh lamtah a soah himbai thim phaih uh saeh.
Numbers4:14 Te phoeiah a thohtat vaengkah a hnopai cungkuem te
Numbers4:15 Aaron neh anih koca rhoek loh hmuencim neh hmuencim kah hnopai cungkuem a khuk te a coeng tih rhaehhmuen puen ham vaengah a hnuk ah koh pah ham Kohath koca rhoek kun uh saeh. Tedae hnocim te ben uh boel saeh duek uh ve. He rhoek he tingtunnah dap khuiah Kohath koca rhoek kah hnophueih la om saeh hamla.
Numbers4:16 Khosoih Aaron capa Eleazar loh hmaivang situi neh bo-ul botui khaw
Numbers4:17 BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Numbers4:18 “Kohathi cako koca te Levi khui lamloh hnawt boeh.
Numbers4:19 Tedae he he amih ham na saii daengah ni hmuencim kah hmuencim taengla a mop uh vaengah hing uh vetih a duek uh pawt eh. Aaron neh anih koca rhoek a kun vaengah amih te hlang khat rhip kah a thothuengnah ham neh a hnophueih ham khueh uh saeh.
Numbers4:20 Tedae hmuencim te hmuh ham yap kun uh boel saeh
Numbers4:21 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers4:22 Gershon koca kah a lu te khaw a napa rhoek imkhui lamloh a cako ah tae pah.
Numbers4:23 Capa kum sawmthum lamloh a so hang loh kum sawmnga ca hil soep pah. Amih te tingtunnah dap ah caempuei la thohtat ham neh thothuengnah dongah thothueng ham boeih ha pawk uh saeh.
Numbers4:24 He thothuengnah he Gershon cako kah a thothueng neh a hnophueih la om saeh.
Numbers4:25 Te dongah dungtlungim kah himbaiyan neh tingtunnah dap kah a imphu khaw
Numbers4:26 vongup kah imbang neh dungtlungim dongkah vongtung vongka thohka kah himbaiyan neh hmueihtuk kaepvai kah a rhuimal khaw
Numbers4:27 Aaron neh a capa kah ol bangla Gershon koca rhoek kah thothuengnah cungkuem dongah a hnophueih boeih neh a thothuengnah boeih te om pah saeh. Te phoeiah amih te a hutnah bangla a hnophueih boeih te soep pah.
Numbers4:28 He he tingtunnah dap ah Gershon koca cako kah thothuengnah coeng ni. Amih hut te khosoih Aaron capa Ithamar kut hmuiah om saeh.
Numbers4:29 Merari koca te a cako ah a napa rhoek imko neh soep pah.
Numbers4:30 Amih te kum sawmthum ca lamloh a so hang neh kum sawmnga ca hil soep pah. Amih te tingtunnah dap ah thothuengnah neh thothueng ham caempuei la boeih kun saeh.
Numbers4:31 Tingtunnah dap ah amih kah thothuengnah boeih la he he a hnophueih neh a hutnah la om saeh. Dungtlungim kah a longlaeng neh a thohkalh khaw
Numbers4:32 vongtung kaepvai kah tung neh a buenhol khaw
Numbers4:33 Tingtunnah dap kah a thothuengnah boeih dongah Merari koca cako thothuengnah he khosoih Aaron capa Ithamar kut hmuiah om saeh
Numbers4:34 Te dongah Moses
Numbers4:35 Kum sawmthum ca lamloh a so hang neh kum sawmnga ca hil
Numbers4:36 Amih te a cako la a soep vaengah thawng hnih ya rhih neh sawmnga lo uh.
Numbers4:37 Tingtunnah dap kah ah tho aka thueng Kohathi cako boeih he a soep vaengah Moses kut dongkah BOEIPA ol bangla Moses neh Aaron loh a soep.
Numbers4:38 Gershon koca te a cako la a napa rhoek imkhui lamloh
Numbers4:39 kum sawmthum ca lamloh a so hang neh kum sawmnga ca hil tingtunnah dap kah thothuengnah dongah caempuei la aka kun boeih te a soep.
Numbers4:40 Anmih te a cako la a napa imkhui neh a soep vaengah thawng hnih ya rhuk sawmthum lo uh.
Numbers4:41 Tingtunnah dap ah aka thotat Gershon koca cako boeih he a soep vaengah BOEIPA ol bangla Moses neh Aaron loh a soep.
Numbers4:42 Te dongah Merari koca cako te a napa rhoek imkhui neh a cako te a tae.
Numbers4:43 Kum sawmthum ca lamloh a so hang kum sawmnga ca hil
Numbers4:44 Amih te a soep vaengah a cako ah thawng thum neh yahnih lo.
Numbers4:45 Merari koca cako a soep vaengah Moses kut dongkah BOEIPA ol bangla Moses neh Aaron loh a soep.
Numbers4:46 Moses
Numbers4:47 tongpaca kum sawmthum neh a so hang kum sawmnga ca hil
Numbers4:48 a soep vaengah amih te thawng rhet ya nga sawmrhet lo.
Numbers4:49 BOEIPA ol bangla amih te Moses kut ah a soep. Hlang khat rhip kah a thothuengnah ham neh a hnophueih ham khaw BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla a tae uh.
Numbers5:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers5:2 “Israel ca te uen lamtah aka pahuk boeih neh aka hnai boeih khaw
Numbers5:3 tongpa lamloh huta hil rhaehhmuen kah vongvoel la tueih
Numbers5:4 Israel ca rhoek loh a ngai tangloeng tih amih te rhaehhmuen kah a voel la a tueih uh. BOEIPA loh Moses taengah a uen bangla Israel ca rhoek loh a saii tangloeng uh.
Numbers5:5 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers5:6 “Isreal ca rhoek te tongpa khaw huta khaw thui pah. BOEIPA taengah boekoeknah la boekoek ham hlang kah tholhnah cungkuem a saii uh dongah a hinglu te boe coeng.
Numbers5:7 Te dongah tholhnah a saii uh te phoe uh saeh lamtah a hmaithennah te a lu taengah mael saeh. Te phoeiah te te a panga neh koei saeh lamtah anih aka boe sak taengah pae saeh.
Numbers5:8 Tedae aka tlan ham hlang neh a taengah hmaithennah a sah ham a om pawt atah
Numbers5:9 Israel ca rhoek kah a cim boeih lamloh khocang cungkuem khaw khosoih taengla khuen saeh lamtah anih ham om saeh.
Numbers5:10 Hlang he amah
Numbers5:11 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers5:12 “Israel ca rhoek taengah thui pah lamtah amih te
Numbers5:13 anih te tongpa loh yangtui kah a khaan neh a yalh puei atah a va mikhmuh lamloh hlipdah uh tih thuh uh cakhaw amah poeih uh coeng. Tedae anih taengah laipai om pawt tih anih tu pawh
Numbers5:14 Anih soah thatlainah mueihla a pha akhaw
Numbers5:15 tongpa loh a yuu te khosoih taengla khuen saeh lamtah anih ham a nawnnah te cangtun vaidam cangnoek parha khuen saeh. Tekah kah thatlainah kah khocang dongah a soah situi khaw bueih boel saeh lamtah hmueihtui khaw a soah khueh boel saeh. Poekkoepnah khocang loh thaesainah te thoelh saeh.
Numbers5:16 Te phoeiah anih te khosoih loh khuen saeh lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pai sak saeh.
Numbers5:17 Te vaengah khosoih loh lai am dongah tui cim khuen saeh. Dungtlungim cirhong ah aka om laipi te khaw khosoih loh lo saeh lamtah tui khuiah sang saeh.
Numbers5:18 Te phoeiah khosoih loh huta te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pai sak saeh lamtah huta lu te lim pah saeh. Thatlainah khocang dongkah poekkoepnah khocang neh khosoih kut ah aka om tih thae a phoei thil khahing tui te a kut ah pae saeh.
Numbers5:19 Anih te khosoih loh toemngam saeh lamtah huta te
Numbers5:20 Tedae nang te na va hmui lamloh na taengphael tih na poeih uh vaengah hlang loh nang te na va a om pawt ah a tamtah te a khueh khaming
Numbers5:21 Te vaengah khosoih loh huta te thaephoeinah olhlo neh toemngam saeh. Khosoih loh huta te
Numbers5:22 Thaephoei tui he na ko khuila kun saeh lamtah na bung thung saeh
Numbers5:23 He kah thaephoeinah he khosoih loh cabu khuiah daek saeh lamtah khahing tui neh huih saeh.
Numbers5:24 Thaephoei khahing tui te huta tul saeh lamtah thaephoei tui te a khuiah khahing la kun saeh.
Numbers5:25 Te vaengah khosoih loh huta kut lamkah thatlainah khocang te lo saeh. Tedae khocang te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng saeh lamtah hmueihtuk la khuen saeh.
Numbers5:26 Te phoeiah khosoih loh kamhoeinah khocang te paco saeh lamtah hmueihtuk ah a phum phoeiah a hnuk la huta te tui tul saeh.
Numbers5:27 Anih te poeih uh tih a va taengah boekoeknah neh boekoek la a om atah tui a tul tih a khuila thaephoei tui a kun vaengah khahing ni. Te vaengah a bung thung vetih a phai pim ni. Huta te a pilnam khui ah thaephoeinah la om ni.
Numbers5:28 Tedae huta te poeih uh pawt tih a cim atah anih te a hmil vetih tiingan a yom ni.
Numbers5:29 He tah Huta loh a va hman ah na taengphael tih a poeih uh vaengkah ham thatlainah olkhueng ni.
Numbers5:30 Tongpa khaw a soah thatlainah mueihla loh a pah tih a yuu taengah a thatlai akhaw a yuu te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pai sak saeh. Te vaengah hekah olkhueng cungkuem he khosoih loh anih taengah saii pah saeh.
Numbers5:31 Tongpa te thaesainah lamloh hmil cakhaw huta tah amah kah thaesainah te phuei saeh
Numbers6:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers6:2 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah amih te tongpa khaw huta khaw thui pah. Hlangcoelh kah olcaeng dongah caeng ham neh BOEIPA taengah cue uh ham a rhaisang atah
Numbers6:3 Misurtui neh yu dong lamloh cue uh saeh lamtah misurtui a thuui neh yu a thuui khaw o boel saeh
Numbers6:4 A rhuisam kah a tue khuiah tah misur misurtui neh a muu lamloh a saii boeih khaw
Numbers6:5 A rhuisam dongkah olcaeng tue khuiah tah paihat loh anih lu te paan boel saeh. BOEIPA taengah a cue uh khohnin a cup hil a cim la om saeh lamtah a lu dongkah sammuei sam sai saeh.
Numbers6:6 BOEIPA ham a cue uh tue khuiah aka duek hinglu taengla mop boel saeh.
Numbers6:7 A napa ham neh a manu ham khaw
Numbers6:8 A rhuisam kah khohnin khuiah tah anih te BOEIPA taengah cim saeh.
Numbers6:9 Aka duek khaw anih taengah bangrhuet la pahoi a duek atah a rhuisam lu a poeih coeng. Te dongah a lu te vo saeh lamtah a ciimnah khohnin dongkah a rhih hnin ah vo saeh.
Numbers6:10 A rhet nah hnin ah vahu phiknit mai khaw
Numbers6:11 Khosoih loh phikat te boirhaem la
Numbers6:12 A rhuisam kah khohnin ah BOEIPA taengah cue uh saeh lamtah hmaithennah la tu kum khat ca te khuen saeh. Tedae lamhma khohnin kah bangla a rhuisam poeih ham cungku uh ve.
Numbers6:13 He he hlangcoelh kah olkhueng coeng ni. A rhuisam khohnin a cup khohnin ah anih te tingtunnah dap thohka la khuen saeh.
Numbers6:14 Te vaengah BOEIPA taengah a nawnnah tah kum khat tu a tal pakhat a hmabuet te hmueihhlutnah la
Numbers6:15 Vaidamding kodawn pakhat te vaidam laep vaidam la situi neh nom saeh lamtah vaidamding vaidamrhawm khaw situi neh koelh saeh. Te phoeiah a khocang neh a tuisi la khuen saeh.
Numbers6:16 Te phoeiah khosoih loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah khuen saeh lamtah anih kah boirhaem neh a hmueihhlutnah te saii pah saeh.
Numbers6:17 Tutal te BOEIPA taengah rhoepnah hmueih la vaidamding kodawn khat neh nawn saeh. Te phoeiah khosoih loh anih kah khocang neh a tuisi te saii pah saeh.
Numbers6:18 Tingtunnah dap thohka kah Hlangcoelh loh a rhuisam lu te vo saeh. Te phoeiah a rhuisam lu dongkah sam te lo saeh lamtah rhoepnah hmueih dang kah hmai dongah phum saeh.
Numbers6:19 Te phoeiah khosoih loh tutal kah a laeng a hmin neh kodawn dongkah vaidamding laep at
Numbers6:20 Te rhoek te khosoih loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la thueng saeh. Khosoih ham thueng hmueih kah a rhang neh khosaa kah a laeng te a cim phoeiah tah hlangcoelh loh misurtui khaw o mai saeh.
Numbers6:21 He tah BOEIPA taengah amah nawnnah la aka caeng hlangcoelh kah olkhueng ni. A kut loh a pha voel lamloh amah kah rhuisam dongah a olcaeng ol bangla a caeng coeng. Te dongah amah kah rhuisam olkhueng bangla saii saeh
Numbers6:22 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers6:23 “Aaron taeng neh anih koca rhoek taengah thui pah lamtah Israel ca rhoek te
Numbers6:24 “BOEIPA loh nang yoethen m'pae saeh lamtah nang n'dawndah saeh.
Numbers6:25 BOEIPA loh nang soah a maelhmai han sae sak saeh lamtah nang n'rhen saeh.
Numbers6:26 BOEIPA loh nang taengah a maelhmai han hoi saeh lamtah nang taengah ngaimongnah hang khueh saeh
Numbers6:27 Kai ming he Israel ca rhoek soah khueh uh pai saeh lamtah kai loh amih yoethen ka pae pai eh
Numbers7:1 Moses loh dungtlungim a thoh te a coeng khohnin a pha coeng dongah te te a koelh tih a ciim. A hnopai cungkuem neh hmueihtuk khaw
Numbers7:2 Te phoeiah Israel khoboei rhoek
Numbers7:3 Te vaengah amih kah nawnnah te BOEIPA mikhmuh la a khuen uh. Tihil leng parhuk neh saelhung hlai nit
Numbers7:4 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers7:5 “Amih lamkah te doe lamtah tingtunnah dap thothuengnah dongah thothueng vaengkah la om saeh. Te te Levi taengah a thothuengnah tarhing la rhip pae
Numbers7:6 Te dongah Moses loh leng neh saelhung te a loh tih Levi taengah a paek.
Numbers7:7 Leng panit neh saelhung pumli te Gershon koca rhoek taengah amih thothuengnah tarhing bangla a paek.
Numbers7:8 Leng pali neh saelhung pumrhet te amamih kah thothuengnah tarhing ah khosoih Aaron capa Ithamar kut hmuiah Merari koca rhoek te a paek.
Numbers7:9 Tedae Kohath koca rhoek te tah amamih kah laengpang dongah hmuencim kah thothuengnah a phueih uh dongah pae pawh.
Numbers7:10 Te te a koelh ham khohnin ah khoboei rhoek loh hmueihtuk kah nawnnah te a khuen uh. Te phoeiah khoboei rhoek loh amamih kah nawnnah te hmueihtuk hmai ah a nawn uh.
Numbers7:11 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers7:12 Anih kah nawnnah lamhmacuek khohnin ah Judah koca lamkah Amminadab capa Nahshon loh a nawn.
Numbers7:13 A nawnnah khaw cakben bael pakhat ah a khiing ya sawmthum lo tih cakben baelcak pakhat he hmuencim shekel ah shekel sawmrhih lo. Te rhoi dongah vaidam te khocang la situi neh malh a thoek.
Numbers7:14 Bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat he sui lungrha neh tluk.
Numbers7:15 Saelhung ca la vaito pumat
Numbers7:16 Boirhaem ham maae tal pumat
Numbers7:17 Rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:18 A hnin bae dongah Issakhar khoboei Zuar capa Nethanel loh a nawn.
Numbers7:19 Anih kah nawnnah la a khuen te cakben bael pakhat dongah a khiing ya sawmthum
Numbers7:20 Sui parha aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:21 vaito saelhung ca pakhat
Numbers7:22 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:23 rhoepnah hmueih ham saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:24 A hnin thum dongah Zebulun ca rhoek kah khoboei Helon capa Eliab kah nawnnah a khueh.
Numbers7:25 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum
Numbers7:26 Sui parha aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:27 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:28 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:29 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:30 A hnin li dongah Reuben koca kah khoboei Shedeur capa Elizur loh a nawn.
Numbers7:31 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum
Numbers7:32 sui parha aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:33 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:34 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:35 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:36 A hnin nga dongah Simeon koca rhoek kah khoboei Zurishaddai capa Shelumiel kah om.
Numbers7:37 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:38 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:39 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:40 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:41 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:42 A hnin rhuk dongah Gad koca rhoek kah khoboei Deuel capa Eliasaph kah om.
Numbers7:43 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:44 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:45 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:46 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:47 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:48 A hnin rhih dongah Ephraim koca rhoek kah khoboei Ammihud capa Elishama kah om.
Numbers7:49 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:50 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:51 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:52 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:53 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:54 A hnin rhet dongah Manasseh koca rhoek kah khoboei Pedahzur capa Gamaliel kah om.
Numbers7:55 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:56 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:57 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:58 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:59 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:60 A hnin ko dongah Benjamin koca rhoek kah khoboei Gideoni capa Abidan kah om.
Numbers7:61 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:62 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:63 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:64 boirhaem la maae ca pumat
Numbers7:65 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:66 A hnin rha dongah Dan koca rhoek kah khoboei Ammishaddai capa Ahiezer kah om.
Numbers7:67 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:68 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat
Numbers7:69 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:70 Boirhaem ham maae ca pumat
Numbers7:71 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:72 A hnin hlai at hnin dongah Asher koca roek kah khoboei Okran capa Pagiel kah om.
Numbers7:73 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:74 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat om.
Numbers7:75 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:76 Boirhaem ham maae ca pumat
Numbers7:77 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:78 A hnin hlai nit hnin dongah Naphtali koca roek kah khoboei Enan capa Ahira kah om.
Numbers7:79 Anih kah nawnnah dongah cak bael pakhat he a khiing ya sawmthum lo
Numbers7:80 Sui parha neh aka tluk tih bo-ul aka bae yakbu pakhat om.
Numbers7:81 Saelhung ca vaitotal pumat
Numbers7:82 Boirhaem ham maae ca pumat
Numbers7:83 rhoepnah hmueih la saelhung pumnit
Numbers7:84 Israel khoboei rhoek lamloh te te koelh khohnin kah hmueihtuk nawnnah he
Numbers7:85 Bael ya sawmthum khaw cak kak ni. Baelcak sawmrhih boeih te a pum la cakben hnopai tih hmuencim kah shekel dongah thawng hnih ya li lo.
Numbers7:86 Sui yakbu hlai nit te bo-ul neh bae. Yakbu te a lang a lang lo tih yakbu dongkah sui boeih he hmuencim kah shekel neh ya pakul lo.
Numbers7:87 Hmueihhlutnah ham saelhung boeih te vaito hlai nit
Numbers7:88 Rhoepnah hmueih saelhung boeih khaw vaito pakul pali
Numbers7:89 Amah te voek ham tingtunnah dap khuila Moses a kun van neh olphong thingkawng tlaeng sokah cherubim rhoi laklo lamloh anih taengah a thui ol te a yaak tih anih te a voek.
Numbers8:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers8:2 “Aaron te voek lamtah amah taengah thui pah. Hmaithoi te namah loh hmaitung hmai a dan ah tok lamtah hmaithoi parhih la vang saeh
Numbers8:3 Te dongah Aaron loh a ngai tangloeng tih BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla hmaitung hmai kah a dan ah hmaithoi te a tok.
Numbers8:4 He hmaitung dongkah kutngo he a kho lamloh a rhaiphuelh duela sui cakben a boh thil. Te kah cakben te khaw BOEIPA loh Moses a tueng a mueimae bangla hmaitung te a saii van.
Numbers8:5 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers8:6 “Levi te Israel ca khui lamloh lo lamtah caihcil laeh.
Numbers8:7 Amih caihcil ham vaengah he he amih ham saii pah. Amih te cangcai tui haeh thil lamtah a pum tom ah paihat caeh sak. Te phoeiah a himbai te suk uh saeh lamtah caihcil uh saeh.
Numbers8:8 Te vaengah saelhung ca dongkah vaito neh a khocang dongkah situi neh a thoek vaidam te khuen uh saeh. Te phoeiah saelhung ca dongkah vaito pabae tah boirhaem la khuen.
Numbers8:9 Levi rhoek te tingtunnah dap hmai la khuen lamtah Israel ca rhoek te rhaengpuei la boeih tingtun sak.
Numbers8:10 Levi rhoek te BOEIPA mikhmuh la khuen lamtah Israel ca rhoek loh a kut te Levi soah tloeng uh saeh.
Numbers8:11 Israel ca rhoek khui lamkah Levi rhoek te Aaron loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la thueng saeh lamtah BOEIPA kah thothuengnah dongah tho aka thueng la om uh saeh.
Numbers8:12 Levi rhoek long khaw a kut te vaito lu soah tloeng uh saeh lamtah pumat te boirhaem la nawn saeh. Te phoeiah pumat te Levi rhoek ham aka dawth la BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah la nawn saeh.
Numbers8:13 Te vaengah Levi rhoek te Aaron mikhmuh neh anih koca rhoek kah mikhmuh ah pai lamtah amih te BOEIPA taengah thueng hmueih la thueng pah.
Numbers8:14 Levi rhoek te Israel ca rhoek khui lamloh hoep tangloeng lamtah Levi rhoek te kamah taengah om uh saeh.
Numbers8:15 Te phoeiah tah Levi rhoek te tingtunnah dap ah thothueng ham kun uh saeh. Te vaengah amih te caihcil lamtah amih te thueng hmueih la thueng pah.
Numbers8:16 Israel ca khui lamloh amih te bung boeih kah cacuek yueng la kamah taengah m'pae rhoe m'pae saeh. Israel ca kah caming boeih te kamah ham ka loh coeng.
Numbers8:17 Israel ca khui kah caming boeih he kamah ham ni. Egypt kho ah hlang khaw rhamsa khaw
Numbers8:18 Levi rhoek te Israel ca rhoek khui kah caming boeih yueng la ka loh.
Numbers8:19 Tingtunnah dap ah Israel ca rhoek kah thothuengnah dongah thothueng ham neh Israel ca rhoek ham aka dawth pah la
Numbers8:20 Te dongah Moses
Numbers8:21 Te phoeiah Levi rhoek te ciim uh tih a himbai te a suk uh. Aaron loh amih te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thueng hmueih la a thueng. Amih caihcil sak ham te Aaron loh amih ham a dawth pah.
Numbers8:22 Te phoeiah tah Levi rhoek te a thothuengnah dongah thothueng ham tingtunnah dap kah Aaron mikhmuh neh anih koca rhoek kah mikhmuh la pawk uh. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Levi rhoek ham te amamih taengah a saii van.
Numbers8:23 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers8:24 “Levi ham he tah kum kul kum nga ca lamloh a so hang mah tingtunnah dap kah thothuengnah khuiah caempuei la thotat ham kun saeh.
Numbers8:25 Tedae kum sawmnga ca lamlong tah caempuei lamloh mael saeh lamtah thothuengnah dongah khaw thotat voel boel saeh.
Numbers8:26 Tedae tuemkoi ngaithuen ham te tingtunnah dap ah a manuca te bong saeh. Te phoeiah thothuengnah dongah amah a thotat ham ngawn moenih. Levi rhoek te amamih kah hutnah te khueh pah
Numbers9:1 Egypt khohmuen lamloh a coe uh phoeikah a kum bae hla lamhma vaengah
Numbers9:2 Israel ca rhoek loh amah khoning vaengah Yoom te saii saeh.
Numbers9:3 Tahae hlasae kah hnin hlai li hlaem vaengah saii uh. Te te amah khotue vaengah a khosing cungkuem neh a tiktamnah cungkuem bangla saii uh
Numbers9:4 Te dongah Yoom saii ham te Moses loh Israel ca rhoek taengah a thui pah.
Numbers9:5 Te dongah Yoom te lamhmacuek la hlasae hnin hlai li hlaem ah tah Sinai khosoek ah a saii uh. A cungkuem dongah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh van.
Numbers9:6 Hlang hinglu lamloh rhalawt la aka om hlang rhoek khaw om. Te dongah te khohnin ah Yoom saii uh thai pawh. Tedae amah khohnin ah Moses mikhmuh neh Aaron mikhmuh la tawn uh.
Numbers9:7 Te kah hlang rhoek loh a taengah
Numbers9:8 Moses loh amih te
Numbers9:9 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers9:10 “Israel ca rhoek te thui pah. Hlang pakhat he hinglu kongah rhalawt la a om vaengah khaw
Numbers9:11 Te te a hla bae dongkah hnin hlai li hlaem ah saii uh saeh lamtah vaidamding te ankhaa neh hmaeh uh saeh.
Numbers9:12 Te te mincang hil paih uh boel saeh. A rhuh khaw paep sak uh boel saeh lamtah a cungkuem dongah Yoom kah khosing bangla saii uh saeh.
Numbers9:13 Tedae hlang te tuicil tih longpueng ah khaw om pawt dae Yoom saii ham a toeng atah a pilnam lamloh a hinglu thup pah kangna saeh. Amah khoning ah BOEIPA kah nawnnah te a khuen pawt dongah te kah hlang te amah tholhnah amah loh phuei saeh.
Numbers9:14 Nangmih taengah yinlai bakuep mai cakhaw Yoom kah khosing neh a rhimong bangla BOEIPA kah Yoom te saii saeh. A saii vaengah a khosing te nangmih ham neh yinlai ham khaw
Numbers9:15 Dungtlungim a thoh hnin ah cingmai loh dungtlungim kah laipainah dap te a khuk. Te vaengah hlaemhmah lamloh mincang hil dungtlungim dongah hmai kah mueimae bangla tueng.
Numbers9:16 Cingmai loh phueih a khuk vaengah tah khoyin ah hmai kah a mueimae la tueng.
Numbers9:17 Cingmai te dap so lamloh loh nong ham ka a ong phoei daengah ni Israel ca rhoek khaw a hlah uh. Tedae cingmai duem nah hmuen ah Israel ca rhoek khaw pahoi rhaeh uh.
Numbers9:18 Israel ca rhoek te BOEIPA kah olka dongah cet uh tih BOEIPA olka dongah rhaeh uh. Cingmai te dungtlungim soah a duem hnin boeih ah amih khaw rhaeh uh.
Numbers9:19 Cingmai loh dungtlungim soah khohnin a yet a uelh vaengah tah Israel ca rhoek loh BOEIPA kah a kuek te a ngaithuen uh tih cet uh voel pawh.
Numbers9:20 Cingmai te dungtlungim dongah khohnin kolkalh om cakhaw BOEIPA olka dongah rhaeh uh tih BOEIPA olka dongah cet uh.
Numbers9:21 Cingmai te hlaem lamloh mincang hil om tih mincang ah khaw cingmai te a thoeih daengah ni a caeh uh. Khothaih neh khoyin ah khaw cingmai a caeh vaengah cet uh van.
Numbers9:22 Khohnin neh hla neh kum neh dungtlungim soah cingmai te uelh. A soah a om vaengah tah Israel ca rhoek te rhaeh uh tih cet uh pawh. Tedae a thoeih daengah ni a caeh uh.
Numbers9:23 BOEIPA kah olka dongah rhaeh uh tih BOEIPA kah olka dongah cet uh. BOEIPA kah a kuek te Moses kut dongkah BOEIPA olka te a ngaithuen uh.
Numbers10:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers10:2 “Namah ham cak olueng panit saii lamtah cakben boh thil. Te rhoi te nang ham rhaengpuei tingtunnah neh lambong hlahnah lam khaw om saeh.
Numbers10:3 Te te a ueng uh vaengah tah rhaengpuei boeih he tingtunnah dap thohka ah nang taengla tuentah uh saeh.
Numbers10:4 Tedae pakhat bueng a ueng uh atah Israel thawng khat kah boeilu
Numbers10:5 Tamlung pacuek na ueng vaengah khothoeng ah aka rhaeh caem rhoek te hlah uh saeh.
Numbers10:6 Tamlung pabae neh a ueng bal vaengah tuithim ah aka rhaeh caem te hlah uh saeh. Amih hlahnah ham tamlung neh ueng uh saeh.
Numbers10:7 Tedae hlangping te tingtun sak ham vaengah na ueng uh akhaw yuhui uh boeh.
Numbers10:8 Te vaengah Aaron koca khosoih rhoek loh olueng te ueng uh saeh lamtah nangmih ham neh na cadilcahma ham khaw kumhal kah khosing la om saeh.
Numbers10:9 Na khohmuen ah rhal taengah caemtloek la na caeh uh vaengah khaw
Numbers10:10 Na kohoenah hnin ah khaw
Numbers10:11 A kum bae hla bae dongah hlasae hnin kul a pha vaengah
Numbers10:12 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek te a hlahnah Sinai khosoek lamloh cet uh tih Paran khosoek ah tah cingmai te a pai pah.
Numbers10:13 Te vaengah Moses kut dongkah BOEIPA olka bangla ana cet lamhma uh.
Numbers10:14 Te dongah lamhma la Judah koca caem kah hnitai te amamih kah caempuei tarhing ah a khuen. Te vaengah Amminadab capa Nahshon loh amah kah caempuei te a mawt.
Numbers10:15 Issakhar ca rhoek koca kah caempuei te Zuar capa Nethanel loh a mawt.
Numbers10:16 Zebulun ca rhoek koca kah caempuei te Helon capa loh Eliab a mawt.
Numbers10:17 Dungtlungim a hlak van nen tah dungtlungim aka phuei Gershon koca rhoek neh Merari koca rhoek cet uh.
Numbers10:18 Te phoeiah Reuben caem kah hnitai te amamih kah caempuei tarhing ah cet. Te vaengah Shedeur capa Elizur loh a caempuei te a mawt.
Numbers10:19 Simeon ca rhoek kah koca caempuei te Zurishaddai capa Shelumiel loh a mawt.
Numbers10:20 Gad ca rhoek kah koca caempuei te Deuel capa Eliasaph loh a mawt.
Numbers10:21 Te phoeiah rhokso aka kawt Kohathi te cet. Tedae amih a pawk hlan ah dungtlungim te a thoh uh coeng.
Numbers10:22 Te phoeiah Ephraim koca caem kah hnitai te amamih kah caempuei tarhing la cet. Te vaengah Ammihud kah capa Elishama loh anih kah caempuei te a mawt.
Numbers10:23 Manasseh ca rhoek kah koca caempuei te Pedahzur capa Gamaliel loh a mawt.
Numbers10:24 Benjamin ca rhoek kah koca caempuei te Gideoni capa Abidan loh a mawt.
Numbers10:25 Te phoeiah Dan koca caem kah hnitai te cet. Te vaengah caem boeih te amamih caempuei dongah tingtun uh tih a caempuei te Ammishaddai capa Ahiezer loh a mawt.
Numbers10:26 Asher ca rhoek kah koca caempuei rhoek te Okran capa Pagiel loh a mawt.
Numbers10:27 Naphtali ca kah koca caempuei te Enan capa Ahira loh a mawt.
Numbers10:28 Israel ca rhoek kah a longcaeh he amamih kah caempuei neh te cet uh.
Numbers10:29 Te vaengah Moses loh Moses amah masae Median koca Reuel capa Hobab taengah
Numbers10:30 Tedae amah te
Numbers10:31 Tedae
Numbers10:32 Kaimih neh n'caeh mai akhaw a then la om bitni. BOEIPA loh kaimih taengah n'bawn sak van bangla nang taengah kam bawn sak khaw ana om bitni ni
Numbers10:33 Te phoeiah BOEIPA tlang lamloh hnin thum longcaeh la cet uh. Te vaengah amih ham duemnah aka tlap la hnin thum longcaeh hil amih hmai ah BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng te a caeh pah.
Numbers10:34 Rhaehhmuen lamloh a caeh uh neh hnin takuem amih soah BOEIPA kah cingmai a om pah.
Numbers10:35 Thingkawng a caeh van neh Moses loh
Numbers10:36 A duem vaengah khaw
Numbers11:1 Pilnam te BOEIPA hna ah a thae la kohuet uh tih BOEIPA loh a yaak vaengah a thintoek te sai. Te dongah BOEIPA hmai loh amih taengah a dom tih rhaehhmuen a bawtnah te a hlawp.
Numbers11:2 Te vaengah pilnam te Moses taengah pang tih Moses te BOEIPA taengah a thangthui daengah hmai khaw duek.
Numbers11:3 BOEIPA kah hmai loh amih te a dom dongah te kah hmuen ming te Taberah la a khue.
Numbers11:4 Amih khui ah aka boihlum kah hoehhamnah te a ngaidam uh. Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek khaw mael uh tih a rhah neh
Numbers11:5 Egypt ah nga n'caak te n'ngai uh coeng. Yilpuet yiltang neh anthing khaw
Numbers11:6 Tedae mamih kah hinglu tah rhae coeng tih mamih mikhmuh kah manna pawt atah a cungkuem he om voel pawh.
Numbers11:7 Manna khaw mah sungsin muu bangla
Numbers11:8 Pilnam loh van tih a yoep uh. Kuelhsum dongah a kuelh uh
Numbers11:9 Rhaehhmuen ah buemtui a bo hatah khoyin ah te nen te manna tla
Numbers11:10 Pilnam loh a cako neh
Numbers11:11 Te vaengah Moses loh BOEIPA te
Numbers11:12 Kai loh pilnam pum he ka yom tih kai loh ka sak nim? Kai taengah tah
Numbers11:13 He pilnam pum taengah paek ham maeh te kai taengah me lamkah nim a om eh? Kai taengah rhap uh tih
Numbers11:14 He pilnam pum phueih ham tah kai bueng neh ka coeng moenih
Numbers11:15 Kai he he tla nan saii oeh atah kamah he nan ngawn khaw nan ngawn laeh mako. Na mikhmuh ah mikdaithen ka dang atah ka yoethae he ka hmu boel eh
Numbers11:16 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers11:17 Ka suntla vetih nang te pahoi kam voek bitni. Te vaengah nang dongkah Mueihla te ka pet vetih amih soah ka khueh ni. Pilnam kah hnorhih te nang n'yingyawn puei daengah ni nang namah bueng ham na phueih pawt eh.
Numbers11:18 Pilnam te
Numbers11:19 Hnin at bueng na ca mahpawh
Numbers11:20 Hla bal hnin bal na hnarhong lamloh a coe vaengah nangmih ham kona-awk la om bitni. Na khui ah BOEIPA na hnawt uh tih na rhap uh. A mikhmuh ah
Numbers11:21 Tedae Moses loh
Numbers11:22 Amih ham boiva neh saelhung ngawn cakhaw amih te cung venim? Tuitunli kah nga boeih te amih ham kol pah cakhaw amih te cung venim?” a ti nah.
Numbers11:23 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers11:24 Te phoeiah Moses te cet tih pilnam taengah BOEIPA ol a thui. Te phoeiah pilnam kah a hamca khui lamloh hlang sawmrhih te a coi tih amih te dap kaepvai ah a pai sak.
Numbers11:25 Te vaengah BOEIPA te cingmai khuiah ha suntla tih anih te a voek. Te phoeiah anih dongkah Mueihla te a pet tih a ham rhoek hlang sawmrhih soah a paek. Amih soah Mueihla a om van neh tonghma uh dae khoep uh hae pawh.
Numbers11:26 Te vaengah hlang panit tah rhaehhmuen ah uelh rhoi. Pakhat ming tah Eldad tih pabae te a ming Medad ni. Amih rhoi soah mueihla om tih amih rhoi khaw thum rhoi. Tedae dap la mop rhoi pawt tih rhaehhmuen ah tonghma rhoi.
Numbers11:27 Te dongah camoe pakhat te yong tih Moses taengah a puen pah. Te vaengah
Numbers11:28 Te dongah Moses loh a cacawn lamkah a tueihyoeih Nun capa Joshua loh a doo tih
Numbers11:29 Tedae Moses loh anih te
Numbers11:30 Te phoeiah Moses te Israel a ham rhoek neh a rhaehhmuen la khoem uh.
Numbers11:31 Te phoeiah BOEIPA taeng lamloh khohli a tueih tih tuipuei lamkah tanghuem a khuen pah. Te vaengah rhaehhmuen la hnin at longcaeh
Numbers11:32 Pilnam te thoo tih khothaih puet
Numbers11:33 Maeh te a no laklo ah a ai hlan vaengah BOEIPA kah thintoek te pilnam taengah sai tih BOEIPA loh pilnam te hmasoe puei neh muep a ngawn.
Numbers11:34 Te vaengah maeh hue pilnam te pahoi a up uh dongah te hmuen ming khaw Kiborthhattaavah la a khue.
Numbers11:35 Pilnam te Kiborthhattaavah lamloh Hazeroth la puen uh tih Hazeroth ah om uh.
Numbers12:1 Moses loh Kushi nu a loh vanbangla a loh Kushi nu kah a kongmai dongah Miriam neh Aaron loh a thet.
Numbers12:2 Te vaengah
Numbers12:3 Tedae Moses tah a kodo uet ah diklai hman kah hlang boeih lakah kodo tangkik hlang la om.
Numbers12:4 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah khaw Miriam taengah khaw
Numbers12:5 Te vaengah BOEIPA te cingmai tung la suntla tih dap thohka ah pai. Te phoeiah Aaron neh Miriam te a khue tih amih rhoi thoeih rhoi.
Numbers12:6 Te phoeiah
Numbers12:7 Ka sal Moses tah te moenih
Numbers12:8 Ka ka dongkah olka te anih taengah ka thui vaengah a hmuethma khaw olkael a om moenih. BOEIPA muei a paelki vaengah he balae tih ka sal Moses taengah cal ham khaw na rhih pawh?” a ti nah.
Numbers12:9 BOEIPA kah thintoek te amih rhoi taengah sai tih cet.
Numbers12:10 Te phoeiah cingmai te dap so lamloh nong. Te vaengah Miriam te vuelsong bangla pahuk tih Aaron te Miriam taengla a mael vaengah tarha ana pahuk coeng.

Numbers13:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers13:2 “Namah kah hlang rhoek te tueih lamtah Kanaan kho te yaam uh saeh. Te te Israel ca rhoek taengah ka paek coeng. A napa rhoek koca lamloh hlang pakhat
Numbers13:3 Te dongah BOEIPA kah olka bangla Moses loh amih te Paran khosoek lamloh a tueih. Amih tah Israel ca rhoek kah a lu hlang boeih ni.
Numbers13:4 Te rhoek khuiah a ming la Reuben koca lamloh kah Zakkuur capa Shammua
Numbers13:5 Simeon koca lamloh Khori capa Shaphat
Numbers13:6 Judah koca lamloh Jephunneh capa Kaleb
Numbers13:7 Issakhar koca lamloh Joseph capa Igal
Numbers13:8 Ephraim koca lamloh Nun capa Hosea
Numbers13:9 Benjamin koca lamloh Raphu capa Palti
Numbers13:10 Zebulun koca lamloh Sodi capa Gaddi
Numbers13:11 Joseph koca lamloh Manasseh koca
Numbers13:12 Dan koca lamloh Gemalli capa Ammiel
Numbers13:13 Asher koca lamloh Michael capa Sethur
Numbers13:14 Naphtali koca lamloh Vophsi capa Nahbi
Numbers13:15 Gad koca lamloh Makhi capa Geuel
Numbers13:16 Te kah hlang rhoek te a ming Moses loh khohmuen yaam ham a tueih. Te vaengah Moses loh Nun capa Hosea te Joshua la a khue.
Numbers13:17 Moses loh amih te Kanaan khohmuen yaam ham a tueih. Te vaengah amih te tuithim lamloh pahoi cet uh lamtah tlang la yoeng uh.
Numbers13:18 Khohmuen neh a khuikah khosa pilnam te so uh. Aka tlungluen nim
Numbers13:19 A khuiah kho a sak te mebang khohmuen nim? Then nim
Numbers13:20 Diklai te ul nim
Numbers13:21 Te dongah cet uh tih khohmuen te Zin khosoek lamloh Lebokhamath Rehob duela a yaam uh.
Numbers13:22 Te dongah tuithim longah cet uh tih Hebron la pawk uh. Te vaengah Anakim cahlah Sheshai Ahiman neh Talmai ana om coeng. Hebron he Egypt Zoan mikhmuh ah kum rhih khuiah a thoh.
Numbers13:23 Eshkol soklong la a pawk uh vaengah thingluei te a saih uh tih misur a su pakhat te panit loh cunghloeng dongah a koh. Te vaengah tale thaih neh thaibu thaih te a khuen uh.
Numbers13:24 Israel ca rhoek loh te lamkah thaihsu te a haih uh kawng dongah te hmuen te Eshkol soklong a sui.
Numbers13:25 Khohnin likip a thok vaengah khohmuen aka yaam lamloh mael uh.
Numbers13:26 Cet tih Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah khaw
Numbers13:27 A taengla a puen uh vaengah
Numbers13:28 Lungli lungla la
Numbers13:29 Amalek loh tuithim khohmuen ah kho a sak
Numbers13:30 Tedae Kaleb loh pilnam te Moses mikhmuh ah a sim tih

Numbers13:32 Khohmuen a yaam uh te theetnah la a khuen uh tih Israel ca rhoek taengah
Numbers13:33 Teah te Anakim koca Nephilim te ka hmuh uh. Nephilim lamkah phoeiah tah kaimih mik ah tangku bangla kai om uh coeng tih amih mik ah khaw ka om van
Numbers14:1 Rhaengpuei boeih hol uh tih a ol te a huel uh. Te phoeiah pilnam he tekah khoyin ah rhap uh.
Numbers14:2 Israel ca pum he Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah nul uh. Te rhoi taengah rhaengpuei boeih loh
Numbers14:3 cunghang dongah cungku ham he BOEIPA loh balae tih he khohmuen la mamih n'khuen. Mamih yuu ca he maeh la om uh pawn ni. Egypt la mael he mamih ham then ngai pawt nim? a Boeipa loh mamih he hela ingkhueh uh? Egypt ramla koep mael he then ngai mah pawt a? Moses neh Aaron taengah ati na uh.
Numbers14:4 Te vaengah hlang loh a manuca taengah
Numbers14:5 Te vaengah Moses neh Aaron tah Israel ca rhaengpuei hlangping boeih kah mikhmuh ah a maelhmai te a buenglueng rhoi.
Numbers14:6 Tedae khohmuen aka yaam khuikah Nun capa Joshua neh Jephunneh capa Kaleb long tah a himbai te a phen rhoi.
Numbers14:7 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih te a thui rhoi tih
Numbers14:8 BOEIPA he mamih taengah hmae tih mamih he te khohmuen la m'pawk sak vaengah suktui neh khoitui aka long khohmuen te mamih taengah m'paek bitni.
Numbers14:9 BOEIPA bueng te tloelh uh boeh
Numbers14:10 Te vaengah rhaengpuei pum loh amih rhoi te lungto neh dae ham cai uh. Tedae BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah tingtunnah dap kah Israel ca boeih taengah a phoe pah.
Numbers14:11 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers14:12 Amih te duektahaw neh ka ngawn vetih ka haek ni. Tedae nang te namtom tanglue la kang khueh vetih amih lakah na pilnu ngai ni
Numbers14:13 Tedae Moses loh BOEIPA taengah
Numbers14:14 He khohmuen kah khosa rhoek taengah thui uh saeh. He pilnam lakli ah BOEIPA namah na om te a yaak uh tih BOEIPA namah taengah mik neh mik khaw hmu uh rhoi coeng. Nang kah cingmai khaw amih soah pai. Amih mikhmuh ah khothaih kah cingmai tung neh khoyin ah hmai tung la na caeh pah.
Numbers14:15 He pilnam he hlang pakhat bangla na duek sak koinih nang olthang a yaak vaengah namtom loh a thui bal ni.
Numbers14:16 Te vaengah
Numbers14:17 Thui ham na ti vanbangla ka Boeipa kah thadueng te pomsang mai laeh saeh.
Numbers14:18 BOEIPA tah thintoek a ueh tih sitlohnah khaw puh. Thaesainah neh boekoek khaw a phueih pah dae pa rhoek kah thaesainah te ca rhoek soah khongthum
Numbers14:19 Na sitlohnah dongkah boeilennah neh Egypt lamloh tahae hil pilnam na khuen bangla he pilnam kah thaesainah he khodawkngai mai
Numbers14:20 Te dongah BOEIPA loh
Numbers14:21 Kai ka hingnah la ka om dongah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah he diklai pum ah bae.
Numbers14:22 Egypt neh khosoek ah ka tueng sak kamah kah thangpomnah neh ka miknoek te hlang boeih loh a hmuh. Tedae kai he voei rha khaw n'noemcai uh tih kai ol he hnatun uh pawh.
Numbers14:23 A napa rhoek taengah ka toemngam pah khohmuen te hmu uh pawt vetih kai aka tlaitlaek boeih loh te hmu mahpawh.
Numbers14:24 Ka sal Kaleb tah a khuiah mueihla tloe a om tih kai hnukah hnawn uh. Te dongah anih te a pawk ham koi khohmuen la pahoi ka khuen vetih a tiingan loh te te a pang ni.
Numbers14:25 Kol kah khosa Amalek neh Kanaan te thangvuen ah mael laeh saeh lamtah nangmih ham khosoek kah carhaek tuipuei longpuei te paan uh laeh
Numbers14:26 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Numbers14:27 Boethae he rhaengpuei ham me hil nim kai taengah a nul uh ve? Amih Israel ca rhoek kah kohuetnah loh kai taengah a nul uh khaw ka yaak coeng.
Numbers14:28 Kai hingnah BOEIPA kah olphong he amih taengah thui pah. Kai hna ah na thui bangla nangmih taengah ka saii van mahpawt nim?
Numbers14:29 Na hlangmi boeih khuiah capa kum kul lamloh a so hang na soep thil boeih khaw kai taengah na nul vanbangla na rhok te he khosoek ah yalh ni.
Numbers14:30 A khuiah nangmih khosak sak ham ka kut ka phuel coeng dae Jephunneh capa Kaleb neh Nun capa Joshua phoeiah tah te khohmuen la nangmih na kun uh mahpawh.
Numbers14:31 Na ca rhoek khaw maeh la om pawnko na ti uh cakhaw amih te pawk puei vetih khohmuen na hnawt uh te khaw a ming uh bitni.
Numbers14:32 Tedae nangmih tah namamih rhok te he khosoek ah ni a yalh eh.
Numbers14:33 Na ca rhoek te khosoek ah boiva aka dawn la kum likip om uh vetih na rhok a cing hil khosoek ah nangmih kah pumyoihnah te a phueih uh ni.
Numbers14:34 Khohnin la hnin likip khuiah khohmuen na yaam uh vaengkah khohnin tarhing ah a kum dongah khaw hnin at te kum khat la om ni. Nangmih kah thaesainah te kum sawmli na phueih uh vaengah kai kah noihhainah te na ming uh bitni.
Numbers14:35 Kai BOEIPA loh ka thui coeng atah he boethae rhaengpuei boeih taengah ka saii het mahpawt nim. Kai aka tuentah rhoek te he khosoek ah khawk uh tih pahoi duek uh ni.
Numbers14:36 Te dongah Moses loh khohmuen yaam ham a tueih hlang a mael uh vaengah tah rhaengpuei boeih te a taengah rhaeh la rhaeh uh tih khohmuen kawng te theetnah la a khuen.
Numbers14:37 Khohmuen kah theetnah aka khuen hlang rhoek tah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah lucik dongah a thae la duek uh.
Numbers14:38 Tedae khohmuen yaam ham aka cet hlang rhoek khui lamloh Nun capa Joshua neh Jephunneh capa Kaleb tah hing
Numbers14:39 Moses loh he ol he Israel ca boeih taengah a thui vaengah pilnam bung bung nguekcoi uh.
Numbers14:40 Mincang ah thoo uh tih tlang som la luei uh. “Amah dae la he
Numbers14:41 Te vaengah Moses loh
Numbers14:42 Cet uh boeh
Numbers14:43 Nangmih mikhmuh ah Amalek neh Kanaan om lah ko. BOEIPA hnuk lamloh na mael uh dongah cunghang neh na cungku uh ni. Nangmih taengah BOEIPA om mahpawh
Numbers14:44 Te vaengah tlang som la luei ham calak uh dae BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng neh Moses tah rhaehhmuen khui lamloh nong pawh.
Numbers14:45 Tlang kah khosa Amalek neh Kanaan te ha suntla vaengah tah Amih te a ngawn uh tih Hormah duela amih te a phop uh.
Numbers15:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers15:2 “'Kai loh nangmih taengah kam paek ham na tolrhum khohmuen la na pawk uh vaengah
Numbers15:3 BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah hmaihlutnah khaw
Numbers15:4 BOEIPA taengah amah kah nawnnah aka khuen long tah situi bunang pali neh a thoek khocang vaidam doh te khuen saeh.
Numbers15:5 Tuisi la misurtui bunang pali ah hmoel pah. Hmueihhlutnah neh hmueih ham khaw tuca neh rhip saii.
Numbers15:6 Tutal ham tah situi bunang pathum neh a thoek khocang vaidam doh nit hmoel pah.
Numbers15:7 Tuisi ham misurtui bunang khoi thum te BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui la nawn.
Numbers15:8 Hmaihhlunah saelhung ca khaw
Numbers15:9 Saelhung ca nen tah situi bunang ngancawn neh a thoek khocang vaidam doh thum te khuen saeh.
Numbers15:10 Tuisi ham misurtui bunang ngancawn ah khuen lamtah hmaihlutnah khaw BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui la nawn.
Numbers15:11 Vaito ham pakhat
Numbers15:12 Hlangmi tarhing ah na saii te a hlangmi bangla pakhat rhip ham saii tangloeng.
Numbers15:13 Tolrhum mupoe boeih loh he he saii kuekluek saeh lamtah tah te rhoek te BOEIPA taengkah hmaihlutnah hmuehmuei botui la khuen saeh.
Numbers15:14 Nangmih taengah aka bakuep yinlai khaw namamih khui kah bangla na cadilcahma ham hmaihlutnah te BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui la nawn saeh lamtah na saii uh bangla saii van saeh.
Numbers15:15 Hlangping kah khosing he nangmih ham neh yinlai aka bakuep ham khaw pakhat la om saeh. Na cadilcahma kah kumhal khosing nen khaw yinlai te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nangmih bangla om van saeh.
Numbers15:16 Nangmih ham neh nangmih taengah aka bakuep yinlai ham he olkhueng pakhat neh laitloeknah pakhat mah om saeh
Numbers15:17 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers15:18 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah amih te
Numbers15:19 khohmuen kah buh te na caak vaengah BOEIPA taengah khosaa tloeng uh.
Numbers15:20 Na buhhuem tanglue vaidam laep te khocang la tloeng uh lamtah cangtilhmuen kah khocang bangla tloeng uh.
Numbers15:21 Nangmih kah buhhuem tanglue khui lamkah te na cadilcahma due BOEIPA taengah khocang la pae uh.
Numbers15:22 Tedae na palang dongah BOEIPA loh Moses taengah a thui olpaek he boeih na vai uh moenih.
Numbers15:23 Te boeih te BOEIPA loh Moses kut dongah nangmih te ng'uen. Te khohnin lamkah BOEIPA loh a uen he a voel kah na cadilcahma ham hil pawn ni.
Numbers15:24 Rhaengpuei mik lamloh la a saii khaming
Numbers15:25 Khosoih loh Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih ham a dawth pah daengah ni tohtamaeh dongah khaw amih te khodawk a ngai eh. Te vaengah amih loh amamih kah nawnnah te BOEIPA taengah hmaihlutnah la khuen uh saeh. Amih kah tohtamaeh dongah amamih kah boirhaem te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah tloeng uh saeh.
Numbers15:26 Te daengah ni Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih ham neh amih lakli ah aka bakuep yinlai ham
Numbers15:27 Hinglu pakhat long he tohtamaeh la a tholh khaming
Numbers15:28 BOEIPA mik ah tohtamaeh kah hlangtholh la aka taengphael hinglu ham khosoih dawth pah saeh. Anih ham dawth pah daengah ni anih te khodawk a ngai eh.
Numbers15:29 Israel ca lamkah mupoe neh a khui kah aka bakuep yinlai ham khaw tohtamaeh la a saii vaengkah olkhueng he nangmih taengah pakhat la om saeh.
Numbers15:30 Tedae kut thueng neh aka saii hinglu tah mupoe khaw
Numbers15:31 BOEIPA ol te a sawtsit tih a olpaek te a phae dongah amah sokah amah kah thaesainah bangla a hinglu te hnawt rhoe hnawt pah saeh
Numbers15:32 Israel ca rhoek te khosoek ah a om uh vaengah Sabbath hnin ah thing aka coi hlang te a hmuh uh.
Numbers15:33 Te dongah thing aka coi amah te aka hmu rhoek loh Moses
Numbers15:34 Tedae anih taengah metla saii ham khaw a puk pawt dongah thongim khuila a up uh.
Numbers15:35 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses taengah
Numbers15:36 Te dongah anih te rhaengpuei pum loh rhaehhmuen vongvoel la a khuen uh tih lungto neh a dae uh dongah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla duek.
Numbers15:37 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers15:38 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah amih te thui pah. Amih ham maelaw te a cadilcahma due a himbai hmoi ah saii uh saeh lamtah hamnak hmoi kah maelaw dongah a thim khueh uh saeh.
Numbers15:39 Maelaw la nangmih taengah om vetih te te na hmuh uh daengah ni BOEIPA kah olpaek cungkuem te na poek uh eh. Te te na ngai uh van daengah ni na thinko hnuk neh na mik hnuk te na yaam uh pawt eh. Nangmih tah te rhoi hnukah ni na cukhalh uh.
Numbers15:40 Kai kah olpaek cungkuem he na poek uh tih na ngai uh daengah ni na Pathen taengah a cim la na om uh eh.
Numbers15:41 Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen la om ham Egypt kho lamloh nangmih aka khuen nangmih kah Pathen YAHWEH ni. Kai tah nangmih kah Pathen YAHWEH ni

Numbers16:6 He he saii uh lamtah Korah neh a hlangboel boeih aw
Numbers16:7 Te rhoek dongah hmai khueh lamtah te nen te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah bo-ul tawn pah. Thangvuen ah khaw BOEIPA kah coelh hlang om bitni. Anih te Levi koca nangmih taengah muep cim ngawn
Numbers16:8 Moses loh Korah te akhue tih
Numbers16:9 Israel Pathen loh nangmih te Israel rhaengpuei taeng lamloh amah taengla khuen ham
Numbers16:10 Nang neh na manuca boeih
