Numbers16:12 Te phoeiah Eliab koca Dathan neh Abiram te khue ham Moses loh a tah.
Numbers16:13 Tedae
Numbers16:14 Suktui neh khoitui aka long khohmuen la kaimih nang khuen pawt bueng kolla khohmuen neh misurdum khaw kaimih ham rho nan paek loela he. Hlang te a mik na koeih aya? Ka lo uh mahpawh
Numbers16:15 Te vaengah Moses te sai khungdaeng tih BOEIPA taengah
Numbers16:16 Te phoeiah Moses loh Korah te
Numbers16:17 Hlang loh amah baelphaih khuen saeh lamtah a khuiah bo-ul khueh pah. Te vaengah hlang kah a baelphaih khaw
Numbers16:18 Te dongah hlang tom loh a baelphaih te a loh tih a khuiah hmai a poep uh. Te soah bo-ul a poep thil phoeiah tah tingtunnah dap thohka kah Moses neh Aaron taengah pai uh.
Numbers16:19 Tingtunnah dap thohka kah amih hmai ah Korah loh rhaengpuei boeih te a tingtun sak. Te vaengah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah rhaengpuei boeih taengah a tueng pah.
Numbers16:20 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Numbers16:21 He rhaengpuei khui lamloh tuiphih rhoi lamtah amih te mikhaptok ah ni ka khah eh
Numbers16:22 Tedae a maelhmai dongah bakop rhoi tih
Numbers16:23 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers16:24 Rhaengpuei te voek lamtah thui pah. Korah
Numbers16:25 Moses te thoo tih Israel kah a ham rhoek Dathan neh Abiram neh anih hnukah aka cet rhoek te a paan.
Numbers16:26 Rhaengpuei taengah a thui pah tih
Numbers16:27 Te dongah Korah
Numbers16:28 Te vaengah Moses loh
Numbers16:29 Hlang cungkuem a duek bangla he rhoek duek tih hlang cungkuem aka cawhkung bangla amih neh cawh koinih BOEIPA loh kai n'tueih mahpawh.
Numbers16:30 Tedae BOEIPA loh hnothai a suen tih diklai loh a ka a ang khaming. Te vaengah amamih neh amih taengkah a cungkuem te dolh saeh lamtah a hingnah te saelkhui la suntla uh saeh. Te vaengah he kah hlang rhoek loh BOEIPA a tlaitlaek uh te na ming uh bitni
Numbers16:31 He ol cungkuem a thui te a khah van neh diklai te a dang ueth coeng.
Numbers16:32 Te dongah diklai loh a ka a ang tih amih
Numbers16:33 Amih neh amih taengkah boeih te saelkhui ah a hing la a suntlak uh phoeiah tah amih te diklai loh a et tih hlangping lakli lamloh milh uh.
Numbers16:34 Te dongah amih kaepvai kah Israel pum long tah
Numbers16:35 Te phoeiah hmai te BOEIPA taeng lamloh ha puek tih bo-ul aka nawn hlang yahnih sawmnga te hlawp.
Numbers16:36 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers16:37 “Khosoih Aaron capa Eleazar te thui pah. Baelphaih te ungkhang laklo lamloh koeih saeh lamtah hmai te khaw a ciim coeng dongah voelh thaek saeh.
Numbers16:38 Amih kah hinglu kongah he hlangtholh rhoek kah baelphaih rhoek he phaldaep la phal uh saeh lamtah hmueihtuk dongkah a ben ham khaw te te saii uh saeh. Te rhoek te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nawn uh saeh lamtah ciim uh saeh. Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek aka ham miknoek la om saeh
Numbers16:39 Te dongah a khuen uh tih aka ung tangtae rhohum baelphaih te khosoih Eleazar a loh. Te phoeiah te te hmueihtuk dongkah ben ham a daep uh.
Numbers16:40 Israel ca rhoek ham poekkoepnah la a om daengah ni Aaron tiingan lamkah mueh atah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah bo-ul phum ham kholong hlang a mop pawt eh. Te dongah BOEIPA Moses kut dongah a uen vanbangla Korah neh a hlangboel bang tah om boel saeh.
Numbers16:41 A vuen ah tah Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih te Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah nul tih
Numbers16:42 Tedae rhaengpuei loh Moses neh Aaron te a tingtun thil uh tih tingtunnah dap la mael uh. Te vaengah cingmai loh tarha a thing tih BOEIPA kah thangpomnah khaw tueng.
Numbers16:43 Te daengah Moses neh Aaron te tingtunnah dap hmai la moe rhoi.
Numbers16:44 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers16:45 “He rhaengpuei khui lamloh cungpet rhoi lamtah amih te mikhaptok ah ni ka khah eh
Numbers16:46 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron taengah
Numbers16:47 Te dongah Moses kah a thui bangla Aaron loh a loh tih hlangping khui la yong. Te vaengah tlohthae loh pilnam tarha a phoei coeng. Tedae bo-ul te a phum tih pilnam ham a dawth pah.
Numbers16:48 Aka duek laklo neh aka hing laklo ah a pai vaengah lucik khaw cing.
Numbers16:49 Korah ol ah a duek uh bueng kolla lucik ah aka duek rhoek he thawng hlai li ya rhih lo uh.
Numbers16:50 Lucik a cing daengah Aaron khaw tingtunnah dap thohka kah Moses taengla mael.
Numbers17:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers17:2 “Israel ca rhoek te thui pah lamtah amih taeng lamkah conghol te lo. Conghol te a napa imkhui tarhing la a khoboei boeih taeng lamkah khaw lo saeh. A napa rhoek imkhui tarhing kah conghol te hlai nit lo ni. Te vaengah hlang te a ming neh a conghol dongah daek pah.
Numbers17:3 Aaron ming te Levi conghol soah daek lamtah a napa rhoek imsawn kah a lu pakhat ham conghol pakhat van saeh.
Numbers17:4 Te rhoek te tingtunnah dap khuikah olphong hmai ah khueh pah. Te rhoek ah ni nangmih ham kan tuentah coeng.
Numbers17:5 Te vaengah ka coelh hlang te ana om vetih anih te a conghol duei ni. Te vaengah nangmih rhoi taengah aka nul
Numbers17:6 Te dongah Moses loh Israel ca rhoek te a thui pah tih amih kah khoboei boeih loh khoboei pakhat ham conghol pakhat
Numbers17:7 Moses loh conghol te olphong dap kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a hang.
Numbers17:8 A vuen ah Moses te olphong dap khuila a kun vaengah Levi imkhui kah Aaron conghol tah tarha aka duei pah. Rhaiphuelh khaw phuelh. Te phoeiah tamlaep bangla a khooi pah tih noe bangla a thaih pah.
Numbers17:9 Moses loh conghol boeih te BOEIPA mikhmuh lamloh Israel ca boeih taengla a khuen tih a sawt uh phoeiah hlang boeih a conghol te a loh uh.
Numbers17:10 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers17:11 BOEIPA loh amah a uen bangla Moses loh a ngai tih a saii van.
Numbers17:12 Israel ca rhoek loh Moses te a voek uh tih
Numbers17:13 BOEIPA kah dungtlungim te aka paan la aka paan boeih tah duek ni. Pal hamla khum uh mai sih a eya?” a ti uh.
Numbers18:1 BOEIPA loh Aaron te
Numbers18:2 Namah manuca
Numbers18:3 Nang kah hutnah neh dap pum kah a kuek te ngaithuen uh saeh. Tedae hmuencim kah hnopai taeng neh hmueihtuk taengah mop uh boel saeh. Te daengah ni amih khaw nangmih taengah a duek uh pawt eh.
Numbers18:4 Nang taengah naep uh saeh lamtah dap khuikah thohtatnah cungkuem dongah tingtunnah dap kah a kuek te ngaithuen uh saeh. Tedae kholong tah nangmih taengla ha mop uh boel.
Numbers18:5 Hmuencim kah a kuek neh hmueihtuk kah a kuek te ngaithuen uh. Te daengah ni thinhulnah he Israel ca rhoek soah koep a om pawt eh.
Numbers18:6 Kai loh na manuca Levi te Israel ca khui lamloh ka loh coeng ne. Tingtunnah dap kah thothuengnah dongah thothueng ham nangmih te kutdoe la BOEIPA taengah m'paek coeng.
Numbers18:7 Tedae namah neh na taengkah na ca rhoek tah hmueihtuk kah olka boeih neh hniyan khui lamkah te nangmih kah khosoihbi la ngaithuen uh. Nangmih ham kutdoe la khosoihbi kam paek kah thohtatnah dongah thotat uh. Tedae kholong aka mop te tah duek saeh
Numbers18:8 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Aaron taengah
Numbers18:9 Amih kah nawnnah boeih dongah hmai khui lamkah a cim
Numbers18:10 Te te a cim
Numbers18:11 He khaw nang ham ni. Israel ca rhoek te thueng hmueih cungkuem khui lamloh amih kah kutdoe khosaa hoep pah. Te te nang taeng neh na capa rhoek taengah khaw
Numbers18:12 BOEIPA taengah situi tha boeih neh misur thai hangcil boeih
Numbers18:13 BOEIPA taengla a khuen a khohmuen kah thaihcuek boeih te nang ham om bitni. Na imkhui kah aka cim boeih loh te te ca saeh.
Numbers18:14 Israel khuikah yaehtaboeih boeih he nang ham ni.
Numbers18:15 Pumsa cungkuem bung lamkah cacuek boeih
Numbers18:16 A lat koi te hla khat a kuep ca vaengah namah loh a phu vanbangla cak shekel panga neh lat. Hmuencim kah shekel ah tah te te gerah kul lo.
Numbers18:17 Vaito cacuek
Numbers18:18 A saa te nang ham thueng hmueih kah a rhang banghui la om tih bantang laeng khaw nang ham ni.
Numbers18:19 BOEIPA taengah Israel ca rhoek kah a paek
Numbers18:20 BOEIPA loh Aaron taengah
Numbers18:21 Israel kah parha pakhat boeih he Levi koca rhoek ham ka paek coeng ne. Tingtunnah dap kah thothuengnah dongah aka thotat amih ham a thothuengnah kah a yueng a tlang rho la ka paek.
Numbers18:22 Tholhnah aka phuei ham rhung neh aka duek ham rhung tah
Numbers18:23 Tedae tingtunnah dap kah thothuengnah dongah he Levi amah mah thothueng saeh lamtah na cadilcahma kah kumhal khosing la te rhoek loh amamih kah thaesainah te phuei uh saeh. Israel ca lakli ah rho phaeng uh boel saeh.
Numbers18:24 Israel ca rhoek kah parha pakhat
Numbers18:25 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers18:26 “Levi te voek lamtah amih te thui pah. Israel ca taeng lamkah parha pakhat te doe pah
Numbers18:27 Nangmih kah khosaa te nangmih ham canghlom khui lamkah cangpai bangla
Numbers18:28 Nangmih khaw Israel ca rhoek taeng lamkah na dang na parha pakhat boeih lamkah te BOEIPA kah khosaa la tloeng uh. Te khui lamkah te BOEIPA kah khosaa la khosoih Aaron taengah pae uh.
Numbers18:29 Nangmih kah kutdoe cungkuem khui lamkah khaw
Numbers18:30 Te dongah amih te thui pah. Te lamkah a a kuel tha la na tloeng uh khaw Levi ham tah cangtilhmuen kah cangthaih neh va-am kah a thaih la a nawt bitni.
Numbers18:31 Te te na hmuen takuem neh na imkhui ah ca uh. Te te tingtunnah dap ah nangmih kah thothuengnah a yueng a tlang la nangmih kah thapang ni.
Numbers18:32 Te khui lamkah a tha te na tloeng uh vaengah tholhnah la na phuei uh mahpawh. Te dongah Israel ca rhoek kah hmuencim te na poeih uh pawt daengah ni na duek uh pawt eh
Numbers19:1 BOEIPA loh Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah a thui pah tih
Numbers19:2 “BOEIPA kah a uen bangla olkhueng dongkah kah khosing he Israel ca taengah voek lamtah thui pah. Nang taengla vaito ling a hmabuet hang khuen uh saeh. Te te a soah a lolhmaih om boel saeh lamtah a soah hnamkun khuen boel saeh.
Numbers19:3 Te te khosoih Eleazar taengah pae saeh. Te phoeiah rhaehhmuen kah vongvoel la khuen saeh lamtah a mikhmuh ah ngawn saeh.
Numbers19:4 Te kah thii te khosoih Eleazar loh a kutdawn dongah naek saeh. Te phoeiah te kah a thii te tingtunnah dap hmai ah voei rhih haeh saeh.
Numbers19:5 Te phoeiah vaito te a mikhmuh ah hoeh saeh. A pho neh a saa khaw
Numbers19:6 Te phoeiah khosoih loh lamphai thing
Numbers19:7 Te phoeiah khosoih loh a himbai te suk saeh lamtah a pum khaw tui neh sil saeh. Te phoeiah rhaehhmuen la kun cakhaw khosoih te kholaeh due poeih uh la om saeh.
Numbers19:8 Te te aka hoeh long khaw a himbai te tui neh suk saeh. A pum te tui neh a silh ah pataeng hlaem due aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Numbers19:9 Te phoeiah hlang cuem loh vaito hloi te kol saeh lamtah rhaehhmuen vongvoel kah hmuen cuem ah khueh saeh. Te boirhaem tah Israel ca rhaengpuei ham khaw pumom tui dongkah tuemkoi la om saeh.
Numbers19:10 Vaito hloi aka kol tah a himbai a suk phoeiah khaw hlaem due aka poeih uh la om saeh. Te dongah Israel ca ham neh amih khui ah aka bakuep yinlai ham khaw kumhal kah khosing la om saeh.
Numbers19:11 Duek rhok aka ben hlang kah hinglu boeih tah hnin rhih khuiah aka poeih uh la om saeh.
Numbers19:12 A hnin thum dongah anih te amah cilpoe uh saeh lamtah a hnin rhih dongah caihcil saeh. A hnin thum dongah a cilpoe pawt atah a hnin rhih dongah khaw caihcil mahpawh.
Numbers19:13 Hlang hinglu aka duek te aka ben boeih tah duek tih a cilpoe pawt atah BOEIPA kah dungtlungim te a poeih. Te dongah tekah hinglu te Israel lamloh khoe saeh. Pumom tui te a pum dongah haeh pawt dongah a soah a tihnai kap pueng tih rhalawt.
Numbers19:14 He tah dap ah hlang a duek vaengkah kah olkhueng ni. Tekah dap la aka mop boeih neh dap khuikah boeih tah hnin rhih poeih uh ni.
Numbers19:15 A soah amhuep amtlaeng aka om pawt tih aka ah hnopai boeih te khaw rhalawt la om.
Numbers19:16 Diklai hman kah cunghang neh aka duek kah rhok khaw
Numbers19:17 Hlang rhalawt ham tah boirhaem kah ungkhang laipi te loh pah lamtah am khuiah tui hing bueih thil saeh.
Numbers19:18 Hlang cuem loh pumpiding a loh tih tui ah a nuem phoeiah tah dap dongah khaw
Numbers19:19 Te phoeiah a hnin thum dong neh hnin rhih dongah tah hlang cuem loh hlang rhalawt soah haeh saeh. A hnin rhih te dongah tah anih te cilpoe saeh. Te vaengah a himbai suk saeh lamtah tui hlu saeh
Numbers19:20 Poeih uh tih aka cilpoe uh pawt hlang tah BOEIPA kah rhokso a poeih dongah hlangping khui lamloh a hinglu hnawt pah saeh. Pumom tui te anih soah a haeh pawt dongah anih te rhalawt.
Numbers19:21 Amih ham kumhal kah khosing la om coeng tih pumom tui aka haeh tah a himbai suk uh saeh. Te dongah pumom tui aka ben khaw hlaem duela poeih uh ni.
Numbers19:22 A soah rhalawt loh a ben boeih khaw poeih uh. Te te aka ben hinglu khaw hlaem duela poeih uh ni
Numbers20:1 Israel ca rhoek te hla lamhmacuek ah tah rhaengpuei boeih loh Zin khosoek la pawk uh. Pilnam te Kadesh ah kho a sak vaengah Miriam duek tih pahoi a up uh.
Numbers20:2 Tedae rhaengpuei ham tui om pawt tih Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah tingtun uh.
Numbers20:3 Te dongah pilnam loh Moses te a ho tih a voek uh hatah
Numbers20:4 Bang ham nim BOEIPA kah hlangping he
Numbers20:5 He hmuen thae la kaimih khuen ham te Egypt lamloh kaimih nan caeh puei he bang ham nim? Cangti
Numbers20:6 Te dongah Moses neh Aaron tah hlangping mikhmuh lamloh tingtunnah dap thohka la cet rhoi tih a maelhmai neh a bakop rhoi vaengah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah amih rhoi taengah a phoe pah.
Numbers20:7 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers20:8 “Conghol te pom lamtah namah neh na manuca Aaron khaw rhaengpuei khui ah tingtun van. Amih mikhmuh ah thaelpang te voek lamtah a tui m'paek bitni. Te vaengah thaelpang lamkah tui te amih ham khuen lamtah rhaengpuei neh a rhamsa te tul
Numbers20:9 Te dongah amah a uen van bangla Moses loh BOEIPA mikhmuh lamkah conghol te a loh.
Numbers20:10 Te phoeiah Moses neh Aaron tah thaelpang hmai ah hlangping neh tingtun uh tih amih te
Numbers20:11 Moses loh a kut a thueng tih thaelpang te a conghol neh hnavoei a boh. Te vaengah tui muep phuet tih rhaengpuei neh a rhamsa loh a ok.
Numbers20:12 Tedae BOEIPA loh Moses taeng neh Aaron taengah
Numbers20:13 He Israel ca rhoek loh BOEIPA a ho nah Meribah tui ni. Tedae amih taengah amah ciim uh coeng.
Numbers20:14 Kadesh lamlong tah Moses loh Edom manghai taengla puencawn a tueih tih
Numbers20:15 A pa rhoek he Egypt la suntla uh tih kum te yet Egypt ah kho ka sak uh. Tedae Egypt loh kaimih taeng neh a pa rhoek taengah khaw thae a huet uh.
Numbers20:16 Tedae BOEIPA taengla ka pang uh dongah kaimih ol a yaak tih puencawn han tueih. Te phoeiah kaimih he Egypt lamloh n'khuen tih na khorhi bawt kah khopuei Kadesh ah ka om uh coeng he.
Numbers20:17 Na khohmuen lamlong he ka kat uh mai eh. Lohma long neh misurdum long khaw ka kat uh mahpawh
Numbers20:18 Tedae Edom loh anih te
Numbers20:19 Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek loh
Numbers20:20 “Cet uh boeh
Numbers20:21 Israel paek ham neh a khorhi long kat ham Edom loh a aal van neh Israel khaw a taeng lamloh hoi uh.
Numbers20:22 Kadesh lamloh a caeh uh phoeiah Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih Hor tlang la pawk uh.
Numbers20:23 Edom khohmuen rhi kah Hor tlang ah BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron te a voek tih
Numbers20:24 “Aaron te a pilnam taengla na khoem uh saeh. Meribah tui ah ka ol te nan koek uh dongah Israel ca rhoek taengah ka paek khohmuen la kun boel saeh.
Numbers20:25 Aaron neh a capa Eleazar te khuen lamtah Hor tlang cet.
Numbers20:26 Aaron kah a himbai te pit pah lamtah a capa Eleazar te bai sak. Aaron tah duek vetih pahoi khoem uh pawn ni
Numbers20:27 BOEIPA kah a uen bangla Moses loh a ngai tih rhaengpuei boeih kah mikhmuh ah Hor tlang la cet uh.
Numbers20:28 Te phoeiah Moses loh Aaron kah a himbai te a pit pah tih a capa Eleazar te a bai sak. Te vaengah Aaron tah tlang lu ah pahoi duek coeng tih Moses neh Eleazar bueng te tlang lamloh suntla rhoi.
Numbers20:29 Rhaengpuei boeih loh Aaron a pal te a hmuh uh vaengah tah Aaron te Israel imkhui pum loh Khohnin sawmthum a rhah uh.
Numbers21:1 Tuithim kah khosa Arad manghai Kanaan loh Atharim longpuei ah Israel a pawk te a yaak vaengah Israel te a vathoh tih tamna la a sol.
Numbers21:2 Te vaengah Israel loh BOEIPA taengah olcaeng neh a caeng tih
Numbers21:3 BOEIPA loh Israel kah ol te a yaak dongah Kanaan te a paek. Te dongah amih neh a khopuei te a thup tih a hmuen ming te Hormah a sak.
Numbers21:4 Hor tlang lamloh carhaek tuili longpuei la Edom khohmuen te lan ham cet uh. Tedae longpueng ah pilnam kah hinglu tah a huet pah.
Numbers21:5 Te dongah pilnam loh Pathen taeng neh Moses taengah
Numbers21:6 Te dongah BOEIPA loh pilnam taengah minyuk rhul te a tueih pah tih pilnam te a tuk dongah Israel khui lamkah pilnam muep duek.
Numbers21:7 Te vaengah pilnam te Moses taengla cet tih
Numbers21:8 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers21:9 Te phoeiah Moses loh rhohum rhul te a saii tih rholik dongah a tai. Te a om phoeiah atah rhul loh hlang a tuk akhaw rhohum rhul te a paelki tih hing.
Numbers21:10 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhoek te thoeih uh tih Oboth ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers21:11 Oboth lamloh thoeih uh tih khomik khocuk kah Moab dan
Numbers21:12 Te lamloh cet uh tih Zered soklong ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers21:13 Te lamloh cet uh tih Amori khorhi lamkah aka pawk khosoek kah Arnon rhalvangan ah rhaeh uh. Moab khorhi kah Arnon tah Moab laklo neh Amori laklo ah om.
Numbers21:14 Te dongah BOEIPA kah caemtloek cabu khuiah tah “Suphah kah Vaheb neh Arnon soklong
Numbers21:15 Soklong kah tuibah te Ar khosa la a doo tih Moab khorhi te a pangnat.
Numbers21:16 Te lamloh Beer la thoeih uh tih tekah tuito ah tah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers21:17 Te vaengah Israel loh hekah laa he a hlai. Tuito puet lah
Numbers21:18 Tuito te mangpa rhoek loh a too uh tih
Numbers21:19 Mattanah lamloh kaloh Nahaliel
Numbers21:20 Bamoth lamloh Moab khohmuen kah kolrhawk
Numbers21:21 Israel loh Amori manghai Sihon taengah puencawn a tueih tih
Numbers21:22 “Na khohmuen longah ka kat mai eh
Numbers21:23 Tedae Sihon loh Israel te a khorhi longah kat sak pawh. Sihon loh a pilnam boeih te a coi tih Israel doe ham khosoek la cet uh. Jahaz la a pawk vaengah Israel te a tloek.
Numbers21:24 Te dongah Israel loh anih te cunghang ha neh a tloek tih a khohmuen te Arnon lamloh Jabbok hil
Numbers21:25 Israel ca loh te kah khopuei boeih te a loh pah. Te dongah Israel loh Amori khopuei rhoek boeih ah khaw
Numbers21:26 Amori manghai Sihon kah khopuei Heshbon phoeiah tah lamhma kah Moab manghai te a tloek tih a kut lamkah a khohmuen pum te Arnon duela a loh.
Numbers21:27 Te dongah aka thuidoek rhoek loh
Numbers21:28 Hmai te Heshbon lamloh puek tih Sihon khorha lamkah hmaisai loh Arnon kah hmuensang boei
Numbers21:29 Anunae Moab nang aih te
Numbers21:30 Amih te n'dong tih Heshbon tah Dibon duela milh
Numbers21:31 Te dongah Israel loh Amori khohmuen ah kho a sak.
Numbers21:32 Te phoeiah Moses loh Jazer ah longyam la a tueih tih a khobuel rhoek te a buem
Numbers21:33 Te phoeiah mael uh tih Bashan longpuei a paan uh. Te vaengah Bashan manghai Oga tah amih doe hamla amah khaw a pilnam boeih khaw
Numbers21:34 Tedae BOEIPA loh Moses taengah
Numbers21:35 Te dongah a taengah rhaengnaeng khaw a sueng pawt hil amah khaw
Numbers22:1 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhoek te cet uh tih Jerikho kah Jordan rhalvangan phai
Numbers22:2 Israel loh Amori taengah a saii boeih te Zippor capa Balak loh a hmuh.
Numbers22:3 Israel he khaw muep a ping dongah Moab khaw pilnam mikhmuh ah bakuep. Israel ca rhoek kah mikhmuh ah Moab a mueipuel.
Numbers22:4 Te dongah Moab loh Midian kah a hamca rhoek taengah
Numbers22:5 Te dongah a pilnam paca rhoek kah khohmuen tuiva kaep kah Pethor Beor capa Balaam taengah puencawn a tueih. Anih te a khue tih
Numbers22:6 Te dongah halo lamtah he pilnam he kai lakah tah a tlung oeh dongah kai yueng la thaephoei thil mai laeh. Anih ngawn ham neh khohmuen lamloh anih ka haek thai khaming. Yoethen na paek hlang te a yoethen tih thae na phoei thil te tah thaephoei a yook te ka ming
Numbers22:7 Te dongah Moab kah a hamca neh Midian kah a hamca rhoek khaw
Numbers22:8 Te vaengah amih te
Numbers22:9 Te vaengah Pathen loh Balaam te a paan tih
Numbers22:10 Balaam loh Pathen taengah
Numbers22:11 Egypt lamkah aka pawk pilnam loh diklai hman a khuk coeng ke. Te dongah halo anih te kai yueng la tap laeh. Anih tloek ham neh anih haek ham a coeng khaming
Numbers22:12 Pathen loh Balaam te
Numbers22:13 Te dongah Balaam te mincang ah thoo tih Balak kah mangpa rhoek te
Numbers22:14 Te dongah Moab mangpa rhoek tah thoo uh tih Balak taengla pawk uh. Te vaengah
Numbers22:15 Tedae Balak loh amih lakah a yet ngai neh aka lalh ngai mangpa rhoek te a koei tih koep a tueih.
Numbers22:16 Balaam taengla a pawk uh vaengah amah te
Numbers22:17 Nang te muep kan thangpom rhoe kan thangpom vetih kai taengah na thui boeih te ka ngai bitni. Te dongah halo lamtah he pilnam he kai yueng la tap mai
Numbers22:18 Tedae Balaam loh a doo tih Balak kah sal taengah
Numbers22:19 Te dongah nangmih khaw he ah he hlaem at om uh mai laeh. Te daengah ni BOEIPA loh kai taengah thui hamla mebang a thap khaw ka ming eh
Numbers22:20 Khoyin ah tah Pathen te Balaam taengla cet tih amah te
Numbers22:21 Balaam te mincang ah thoo tih a laak te a khih tih Moab mangpa rhoek taengla cet.
Numbers22:22 Tedae anih a caeh dongah Pathen thintoek te sai. Te dongah BOEIPA puencawn tah anih te longpueng ah khingkhoekkung bangla a pai pah. Te vaengah amah te a laak dongah ngol tih a taengah a tueihyoeih rhoi om.
Numbers22:23 Te vaengah BOEIPA kah puencawn tah longpuei ah pai tih a kut dongah a cunghang a yueh te laak loh a hmuh. Te dongah laak te long lamloh hooi uh tih lohma la cet. Te dongah longpuei la mael sak ham Balaam laak te a taam.
Numbers22:24 Tedae BOEIPA kah puencawn te misurdum kah longcaek ah a pai pah. He ah khaw vongtung
Numbers22:25 Laak loh BOEIPA kah puencawn te a hmuh vaengah pangbueng te a nen tih Balaam kho te pangbueng dongah a nen thil. Te dongah laak a taam te a khoep.
Numbers22:26 Tedae BOEIPA kah puencawn loh koep a kan tih banvoei bantang la mael ham la longpuei aka om pawh hmuen ah a caek la pai.
Numbers22:27 Laak loh BOEIPA kah puencawn te a hmuh vaengah Balaam dangah a kol pah. Te vaengah Balaam thintoek te sai tih laak te conghol neh a taam.
Numbers22:28 Te vaengah BOEIPA laak kah ka te a ong pah tih Balaam te
Numbers22:29 Balaam loh laak te
Numbers22:30 Laak loh Balaam te
Numbers22:31 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Balaam mik te a phen pah. Te dongah a kut ah a cunghang a pom tih longpuei ah aka pai BOEIPA kah puencawn te a hmuh. Te daengah buluk tih a thintoek neh bakop.
Numbers22:32 BOEIPA kah puencawn loh anih te
Numbers22:33 Laak loh kai m'hmuh dongah ka mikhmuh lamloh voei thum a rhael. Ka mikhmuh lamloh rhael pawt koinih nang te khaw kang ngawn pawn vetih anih bueng ka hing sak khaming.
Numbers22:34 Balaam loh BOEIPA kah puencawn taengah
Numbers22:35 BOEIPA kah puencawn loh Balaam te
Numbers22:36 Balaam halo te Balak loh a yaak van neh khorhi khobawt
Numbers22:37 Te vaengah Balak loh Balaam te
Numbers22:38 Balaam loh Balak te
Numbers22:39 Te phoeiah Balaam te Balak taengah cet tih Kirjathhuzoth la pawk rhoi.
Numbers22:40 Te vaengah Balak loh saelhung neh boiva khaw a ngawn tih Balaam taeng neh amah taengkah mangpa rhoek taengah a thak.
Numbers22:41 Mincang a pha vaengah Balak loh Balaam te a loh tih Bamothbaal la a khuen. Te vaengah pilnam a bawtnah lamloh pahoi tueng.
Numbers23:1 Balaam loh Balak taengah
Numbers23:2 Balaam kah a thui bangla Balak loh a saii tangloeng tih Balak neh Balaam loh hmueihtuk dongah vaito neh tutal te a paan puei.
Numbers23:3 Te phoeiah Balaam loh Balak te
Numbers23:4 Pathen loh Balaam te ana mah tangloeng tih a taengah
Numbers23:5 BOEIPA loh Balaam kah ka ah ol a khueh phoeiah tah
Numbers23:6 Te dongah anih te a mael hatah a hmueihhlutnah taengah amah neh Moab mangpa tom te tarha pai uh.
Numbers23:7 Te phoeiah a thuidoeknah a poh tih
Numbers23:8 Pathen loh a tap pawt te metlam ka tap vetih
Numbers23:9 Lungpang soi lamloh amah te ka hmuh tih som rhoek lamloh amah te ka mae. Pilnam he bueng he kho a sak tih namtom khuiah ana moeh moenih.
Numbers23:10 Jakob laipi neh Israel hlopli kah hlangmi te unim aka tae thai? Ka hinglu khaw aka thuem kah dueknah dongah duek saeh lamtah ka hmailong khaw amah la om saeh
Numbers23:11 Te vaengah Balak loh Balaam te
Numbers23:12 Te dongah a doo tih
Numbers23:13 Te dongah amah te Balak loh
Numbers23:14 Te phoeiah anih te Pisgah somtung kah Zophim khohmuen la a khuen. Te vaengah hmueihtuk parhih a suem tih hmueihtuk soah vaito neh tutal a nawn.
Numbers23:15 Te phoeiah Balak te
Numbers23:16 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Balaam te a mah tih a ka dongah ol a sang pah phoeiah
Numbers23:17 Te phoeiah a taengla a mael hatah anih kah hmueihhlutnah taengah amah kah Moab mangpa rhoek khaw tarha ana pai uh. Te vaengah Balak loh anih te
Numbers23:18 Te dongah a thuidoeknah te a poh tih
Numbers23:19 Pathen tah laithae hlang pawt tih hlang capa bangla dam a ti a? A ti coeng phoeiah a saii moenih a? A thui phoeiah a thoh puei moenih a?
Numbers23:20 Yoethen paek ham ka dang dongah a yoethen coeng tih ka yueh thai moenih ne.
Numbers23:21 Jakob khuiah boethae te paelki pawt tih Israel khuiah thakthaenah a hmuh moenih. A Pathen YAHWEH tah a taengah om tih a khui ah manghai kah tamlung la a om pah.
Numbers23:22 Pathen loh amih te Egypt lamloh amah taengah cung ki bangla a khuen.
Numbers23:23 Jakob te lung loh a noeng moenih
Numbers23:24 Pilnam te sathuengnu bangla a thoh tih sathueng bangla a kuel. Maeh a ngaeh tih salaem thii a ok duela yalh tlaih pawh.
Numbers23:25 Te dongah Balak loh Balaam te
Numbers23:26 Balaam loh a doo tih Balak taengah
Numbers23:27 Te phoeiah Balak loh Balaam taengah
Numbers23:28 Te dongah Balak loh Balaam te khopong hmai la aka dan Peor somtung la a khuen.
Numbers23:29 Balaam loh Balak te
Numbers23:30 Te dongah Balaam kah a thui bangla Balak loh a ngai tih vaito neh tutal hmueihtuk soah a nawn.
Numbers24:1 Israel yoethen paek te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hoeikhang tila Balaam loh a hmuh dongah lung te doe ham voei vai khaw cet pawh. Te dongah a maelhmai te khosoek la a khueh.
Numbers24:2 Balaam loh a mik a huel vaengah Israel te amah koca la kho a sak tih Pathen Mueihla a soah a om te a hmuh.
Numbers24:3 Te vaengah a thuidoeknah te a poh tih Beor capa Balaam olphong neh mikdai dai hlang kah olphong te a thui.
Numbers24:4 Pathen ol aka ya kah olphong tah Tlungthang mikhlam aka tla te a hmuh tih a mik a dai.
Numbers24:5 Jakob nang kah dap neh Israel nang kah dungtlungim tah metlam a hoeikhang.
Numbers24:6 Soklong bangla langdai
Numbers24:7 A tuiduen lamloh tui sih tih a tiingan khaw tui yet dongah om. A manghai Agag lakah a vetih a ram a phueih ni.
Numbers24:8 Pathen loh anih te Egypt lamloh amah taengah cung ki bangla a loh. A rhal namtom te a ngaeh coeng dongah a rhuh te a cilh vetih a thaltang neh a phop ni.
Numbers24:9 Sathueng neh sathuengnu bangla koisu tih yalh phoeiah tah anih aka haeng te unim? Nang loh yoethen na paek te a yoethen tih nang loh thae na phoei khaw thaephoei a yook.
Numbers24:10 Te vaengah Balak kah thintoek te Balaam taengah sai tih a kut te a paeng. Balak loh Balaam te
Numbers24:11 Te dongah namah hmuen la nang te yong laeh. Nang te kan thangpom rhoe kan thangpom eh ka ti coeng dae BOEIPA loh nang te thangpomnah lamkah n'hloh coeng ne
Numbers24:12 Te dongah Balaam loh Balak te
Numbers24:13 Kai he Balak loh cak neh sui a im kah a bae la m'pae cakhaw BOEIPA olka te poe hamla ka coeng moenih. Then cakhaw thae cakhaw ngai ham om. Ka lungbuei lamlong pataeng BOEIPA kah a thui te ni ka thui eh ka ti.
Numbers24:14 Kai tah ka pilnam taengla ka cet pawn ni he. Halo lamtah hmailong tue ah he pilnam loh na pilnam soah a saii ham te nang kang uen eh
Numbers24:15 Te phoeiah a thuidoeknah a dangrhoek tih Beor capa Balaam kah olphong neh mik aka dai hlang kah olphong te a thui.
Numbers24:16 Pathen kah olthui ka ya tih Khohni mingnah aka ming
Numbers24:17 Amah te ka hmuh dae tahae ah moenih
Numbers24:18 Edom kah a pang om vetih a thunkha Seir kah a pang om cakhaw Israel loh thadueng neh a saii ni.
Numbers24:19 Jakob lamloh a taemrhai vetih khopuei kah rhaengnaeng te a milh sak ni.
Numbers24:20 Amalek te a hmuh vaengah a thuidoeknah a poh tih
Numbers24:21 Keni te a hmuh vaengah a thuidoeknah te a poh tih
Numbers24:22 Tedae hatah Assyria loh nang n'sol duela Kain te hlup hamla om bitni
Numbers24:23 A thuidoeknah a poh tih
Numbers24:24 Kittim lihmoi lamkah timbaw rhoek neh Assyria khaw phaep uh ni. Eber khaw a phaep uh ni. Tedae amah khaw pocinah ham ni
Numbers24:25 Te phoeiah Balaam te thoo tih aka cet te amah hmuen la mael. Te dongah Balak khaw amah longpuei la cet.
Numbers25:1 Israel te Shittim ah kho a sak vaengah pilnam tah cukhalh hamla Moab nu rhoek taengah poeih uh.
Numbers25:2 Te vaengah pilnam te amih kah pathen hmueih kung la a khue uh. Te dongah pilnam loh a caak tih amih kah pathen taengah bakop uh.
Numbers25:3 Tedae Israel te Baalpeor neh a sun uh dongah BOEIPA kah thintoek tah Israel taengah sai.
Numbers25:4 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers25:5 Te dongah Moses loh Israel kah laitloek rhoek taengah
Numbers25:6 Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek khui lamkah hlang pakhat te pakcak ha pawk tih a manuca rhoek taengkah Moses mikhmuh neh tingtunnah dap thohka kah aka rhap Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih kah mikhmuh ah Median nu te a khuen pah.
Numbers25:7 Khosoih Aaron capa Eleazar koca Phinekha loh a hmuh vaengah rhaengpuei lakli lamloh thoo tih a kut dongah cai a muk.
Numbers25:8 Te phoeiah Israel hlang hnukah popuei khuila kun tih a boktlap la Israel tongpa neh huta te a kotak hil a thun. Te daengah lucik khaw Israel ca taeng lamloh cing.
Numbers25:9 Tedae lucik ah aka duek he thawng kul thawng li lo.
Numbers25:10 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers25:11 “Amih lakli ah ka thatlainah neh ka thatlai vaengah Khosoih Aaron capa Eleazar koca Phinekha loh ka kosi te Israel ca rhoek taeng lamkah a mael sak. Te dongah ni Israel ca rhoek te ka thatlainah neh ka khah pawh.
Numbers25:12 Te dongah thui pah
Numbers25:13 A Pathen ham a thatlai pah tih Israel ca rhoek ham a dawth pah yueng te anih ham neh amah hnukkah a tiingan ham kumhal ah khosoihbi paipi la om ni
Numbers25:14 Te vaengah Median nu neh a ngawn la a ngawn Israel hlang a ming tah
Numbers25:15 Median nu a ngawn uh kah a ming tah amah Midian khuiah a napa im kah namtu boeilu
Numbers25:16 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers25:17 “Median te daengdaeh lamtah amih te ngawn.
Numbers25:18 Amih loh nangmih te a rhaithinah neh n'daengdaeh. Peor kah ol dongah khaw Midian khoboei canu Kozbi kah ol dongah nangmih te n'rhaithi bal. Peor ol bangla a tanu te lucik hnin ah ngawn
Numbers26:1 Lucik a om hnukah BOEIPA loh Moses neh khosoih Aaron capa Eleazar te a voek tih
Numbers26:2 “Israel ca rhaengpuei boeih hlangmi te tongpaca khui lamloh kum kul neh a so hang tah a napa imko neh Israel khuiah caempuei la aka cet boeih te soep laeh
Numbers26:3 Te dongah Moses neh khosoih Eleazar loh amih te Moab kolken kah Jerikho Jordan ah a voek tih
Numbers26:4 “Tongpaca khui lamkah kum kul neh a so hang tah BOEIPA kah a uen bangla tae
Numbers26:5 Israel caming Reuben lamloh Reuben koca rhoek
Numbers26:6 Khetsron lamloh Khetsron koca
Numbers26:7 Reuben koca he a soep vaengah thawng sawmli thawng thum neh ya rhih sawmthum lo.
Numbers26:8 Pallu koca lamloh Eliab
Numbers26:9 Eliab koca la Nemuel
Numbers26:10 Diklai loh a ka te a ang tih amih te dolh vaengah Korah hlangboel tah duek. Hmai loh a hlawp hlang yahnih sawmnga khaw rholik banghui la om uh.
Numbers26:11 Tedae Korah ca rhoek a duek uh moenih.
Numbers26:12 Simeon koca khaw amamih cako ah
Numbers26:13 Zerah lamloh Zarkhii koca
Numbers26:14 Simeon koca he thawng kul thawng hnih neh ya hnih lo.
Numbers26:15 Gad ca rhoek khaw amah cako ah
Numbers26:16 Ozni lamloh Ozni koca
Numbers26:17 Arod lamloh Arodi koca
Numbers26:18 Gad ca rhoek kah koca he thawng sawmli neh ya nga la a soep.
Numbers26:19 Judah ca rhoi he Er neh Onan dae Er neh Onan te Kanaan khohmuen ah duek.
Numbers26:20 Judah ca rhoek khaw amah koca la om uh. Shelah lamloh Shelahni koca
Numbers26:21 Perez ca rhoek ah
Numbers26:22 Amih Judah koca rhoek he thawng sawmrhih thawng rhuk neh ya nga la a soep.
Numbers26:23 Issakhar koca khaw amah cako lamtah
Numbers26:24 Jashub lamloh Jashub koca
Numbers26:25 Issakhar koca he thawng sawmrhuk thawng li ya thum la a soep.
Numbers26:26 Zebulun ca rhoek khaw amah cako lamtah Sered lamloh Sered koca
Numbers26:27 Amih Zebulon koca rhoek he thawng sawmrhuk neh ya nga la a soep.
Numbers26:28 Joseph ca rhoek he amah cako lamtah Manasseh neh Ephraim.
Numbers26:29 Manasseh koca la
Numbers26:30 Gilead ca rhoek he
Numbers26:31 Asriel lamloh Asriel koca
Numbers26:32 Shemida kah Shemida koca
Numbers26:33 Hepher capa Zelophehad he a taengah ca tongpa om pawt tih huta rhoek dawk om. Zelophehad canu rhoek kah a ming tah Mahlah
Numbers26:34 Manasseh koca rhoek he khaw a hlangmi la thawng sawmnga thawng hnih neh ya rhih la a soep uh.
Numbers26:35 Ephraim ca rhoek he amah koca lamtah
Numbers26:36 Shuthela ca rhoek he khaw
Numbers26:37 Ephraim ca koca rhoek he a hlangmi la thawng sawmthum thawng hnih neh ya nga la a soep uh. He rhoek he Joseph ca rhoek lamkah amih koca rhoek ni.
Numbers26:38 Benjamin kah ca lamkah amih koca rhoek he
Numbers26:39 Shupham lamloh Shuphami koca la
Numbers26:40 Bela ca rhoi Ard neh Naaman om. Ardee koca neh Naaman lamkah Naamani koca om.
Numbers26:41 Benjamin ca rhoek he amah koca ah tah a hlangmi la thawng sawmli thawng nga neh ya rhuk la a soep uh.
Numbers26:42 Dan ca rhoek he amah koca ah tah Shuham lamloh Shuhami koca la om. He rhoek ni amih koca khuiah ah Dan koca la aka om.
Numbers26:43 Shuhami koca boeih he a hlangmi la thawng sawmrhuk thawng li neh ya li la a soep.
Numbers26:44 Asher ca rhoek he amah koca ah tah
Numbers26:45 Beriah ca rhoi
Numbers26:46 Asher kah canu ming tah Serah ni.
Numbers26:47 Asher ca rhoek kah koca he a hlangmi lamtah kah thawng sawmnga thawng thum neh ya li a soep.
Numbers26:48 Naphtali ca rhoek he amah koca lamtah
Numbers26:49 Jezer lamloh Jezeri koca la
Numbers26:50 Naphtali koca rhoek he amah koca lamtah a hlangmi khaw thawng sawmli thawng nga neh ya li lo uh.
Numbers26:51 Israel ca rhoek he hlangmi la thawng ya rhuk neh thawngkhat ya rhih sawmthum lo.
Numbers26:52 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te voek tih
Numbers26:53 “Amih te a ming tarhing ah khohmuen he rho la tael uh saeh.
Numbers26:54 Miping ham tah a rho te len sak lamtah a sii ham tah a rho te hnop pah. Hlang te a ka neh a soep tarhing ah a rho te phaeng saeh.
Numbers26:55 Khohmuen te hmulung loh dawk tael saeh lamtah a napa koca rhoek kah ming tarhing la pang uh saeh.
Numbers26:56 hmulung kah a ka tarhing ah hlangping neh hlangsi laklo ah a rho te tael saeh
Numbers26:57 Levi rhoek kah hlangmi he amah koca lamtah
Numbers26:58 He Levi koca khui lamkah
Numbers26:59 Amram kah a yuu ming tah Levi canu Jochebed ni. Anih te Egypt ah Levi ham a cun pah coeng. Anih long khaw Amram ham Aaron
Numbers26:60 Aaron loh Nadab neh Abihu
Numbers26:61 Tedae Nadab neh Abihu tah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah kholong hmai a khuen rhoi dongah duek rhoi.
Numbers26:62 Te vaengah amih kah hlangmi aka om rhoek tongpa hlakhat ca neh a so hang boeih tah thawng kul neh thawng thum la a soep uh. Tedae amih te Israel ca lakli ah rho a phaeng pawt dongah Israel ca rhoek lakli ah soep uh thil pawh.
Numbers26:63 He rhoek he Moses neh khosoih Eleazar loh a soep vaengah Jerikho Jordan kah Moab kolken ah Israel ca rhoek te a soep rhoi.
Numbers26:64 Tedae Moses neh khosoih Aaron kah a soep khui lamloh Sinai khosoek kah Israel ca rhoek a soep vaengkah hlang te tah te rhoek taengah thum pawh.
Numbers26:65 Amih te khosoek ah duek rhoe duek ham khaw
Numbers27:1 Joseph capa Manasseh koca kah
Numbers27:2 Amih te Moses mikhmuh neh khosoih Eleazar mikhmuh ah
Numbers27:3 “A pa he khosoek ah duek tih amah he BOEIPA aka tuentah kah hlangboel lakli neh Korah kah hlangboel khuiah khaw a om moenih. Amah kah tholhnah dongah duek tih a taengah ca tongpa om pawh.
Numbers27:4 Balae tih a cako khui lamloh a pa ming a hma eh? A taengah ca tongpa a om pawt neh a pa kah manuca lakli ah kaimih he khohut m'pae van
Numbers27:5 Te dongah Moses loh amih kah laitloeknah te BOEIPA mikhmuh la a khuen.
Numbers27:6 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers27:7 “Zelophehad canu rhoek kah a thui te thuem
Numbers27:8 Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah thui pah. Hlang he duek tih a taengah ca tongpa a om pawt atah anih kah rho te a canu taengah mael.
Numbers27:9 Anih te canu a om pawt atah anih kah rho te a manuca taengah pae.
Numbers27:10 Anih te manuca a om pawt bal atah anih kah rho te a napa kah a manuca taengah pae.
Numbers27:11 A napa te a manuca a om pawt atah anih kah rho te a cako khuiah anih neh aka yoei a thii a saa taengah pae lamtah pang saeh. BOEIPA loh Moses a uen bangla Israel ca rhoek ham laitloeknah khosing la om saeh
Numbers27:12 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Numbers27:13 Te te na hmuh van phoeiah tah na maya Aaron a khoem uh bangla nang khaw na pilnam taengla na khoem uh ni.
Numbers27:14 Rhaengpuei kah tohhaemnah dongah Zin khosoek ah ol na koek dongah. Zin khosoek
Numbers27:15 Te dongah Moses loh BOEIPA te a thui pah tih
Numbers27:16 “Pumsa boeih kah Mueihla Pathen BOEIPA loh rhaengpuei soah hlang pakhat khueh saeh.
Numbers27:17 Anih te amih mikhmuh ah vuenva vetih amih mikhmuh ah kunael bitni. Te vaengah amih a khuen vetih amih te a pawk puei bitni. Te dongah amih
Numbers27:18 BOEIPA loh Moses taengah
Numbers27:19 Anih te khosoih Eleazar mikhmuh neh rhaengpuei boeih kah mikhmuh ah pai sak lamtah amah te amih mikhmuh ah rhep uen.
Numbers27:20 Na mueithennah te anih taengah na pak daengah ni Israel ca rhoek rhaengpuei boeih loh a ngai uh eh.
Numbers27:21 Te vaengah khosoih Eleazar mikhmuh ah pai saeh lamtah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah Urim kah laitloeknah bangla anih te dawt saeh. Amah taengkah Israel ca boeih neh rhaengpuei boeih taengah khaw a ol bangla vuenva uh saeh lamtah anih ol bangla kunael uh saeh
Numbers27:22 BOEIPA loh amah a uen bangla Moses loh a saii. Te dongah Joshua te a khuen tih khosoih Eleazar mikhmuh neh rhaengpuei boeih kah mikhmuh ah anih te a pai sak.
Numbers27:23 Te phoeiah tah anih soah a kut a tloeng tih BOEIPA loh Moses kut ah a thui bangla anih te a uen.
Numbers28:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers28:2 “Israel ca te uen lamtah amih te thui pah. Kai kah nawnnah neh kai buh khaw
Numbers28:3 Te dongah he he amih te thui pah. Sainoek hmueihhlutnah dongah hnin at ham tu kum khat ca
Numbers28:4 Mincang ah tu pumat nawn lamtah tu pabae te kholaeh vaengah nawn.
Numbers28:5 Khocang ham tah cangnoek parha dongkah vaidam te bunang pali dongkah a sui situi neh thoek pah.
Numbers28:6 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah he Sinai tlang ah ni BOEIPA taengkah hmaihlutnah hmuehmuei botui la ana saii coeng.
Numbers28:7 Tuisi bunang pali neh tu pumat te hmuencim ah BOEIPA kah cangsi tuisi la suep.
Numbers28:8 Tuca pabae mincang kah khosaa neh a tuisi bangla kholaeh ah saii lamtah BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah la nawn.
Numbers28:9 Sabbath hnin ah tah kumkhat tu ca a hmabuet pumnit
Numbers28:10 Sabbath ah he Sabbath hmueihhlutnah phoeiah sainoek hmueihhlutnah neh tuisi khaw khueh pah.
Numbers28:11 Nangmih kah hla sae vaengah BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah ham saelhung ca vaito pumnit
Numbers28:12 Vaito pumat dongah situi neh a thoek khocang vaidam doh thum
Numbers28:13 Hmaihlutnah Tuca pumat dongah situi neh a thoek khocang vaidam doh at
Numbers28:14 Amih kah tuisi la misurtui he vaito pumat dongah bunang ngancawn cet saeh lamtah tutal pumat dongah bunang khoi thum saeh
Numbers28:15 BOEIPA taengkah boirhaem la maae ca pumat phoeiah khaw sainoek hmueihhlutnah te a tuisi neh nawn saeh.
Numbers28:16 Hla lamhmacuek kah hlasae hnin hlai li vaengah BOEIPA taengla Yoom om ni.
Numbers28:17 Tekah hla dongkah hnin hlai nga vaengah hnin rhih khotue ah vaidamding ca saeh.
Numbers28:18 A cuek hnin ah hmuencim kah tingtunnah om saeh lamtah thohtatnah bitat boeih tah saii uh boeh.
Numbers28:19 BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnnah hmaihlutnah na nawn vaengah saelhung ca vaito pumnit neh tutal pumat
Numbers28:20 Situi neh a thoek a khocang vaidam te vaito pumat dongah doh thum saeh lamtah tutal ham tah doh nit saii pah.
Numbers28:21 Tu pumrhih dongah tu pumat ham doh at
Numbers28:22 Nangmih ham aka dawth la boirhaem maae ca khaw pumat saeh.
Numbers28:23 Mincang kah hmueihhlutnah phoeiah sainoek hmueihhlutnah ham khaw he rhoek he saii uh.
Numbers28:24 hmaihlutnah buh he hnin rhih khuiah hnin takuem BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui neh
Numbers28:25 A hnin rhih dongah tah nangmih ham hmuencim kah tingtunnah la om saeh. Te vaengah thohtanah bitat boeih tah saii uh boeh.
Numbers28:26 BOEIPA taengah khocang a thai na nawn uh vaengkah thaihcuek khohnin ah khaw nangmih ham hmuencim kah tingtunnah te yalh khat khuiah om saeh lamtah nangmih kah thohtatnah bitat boeih tah saii uh boeh.
Numbers28:27 Tedae saelhung ca dongkah vaito pumnit neh tutal pumat
Numbers28:28 Situi neh a thoek a khocang vaidam te vaito pumat dongah doh thum saeh lamtah tutal pumat dongah doh nit saeh.
Numbers28:29 Tuca pumrhih dongah tuca pumat ham te doh at
Numbers28:30 Nangmih ham tholh aka dawth la maae ca pumat saeh.
Numbers28:31 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah voel ah khaw a khosaa khueh lamtah a tuisi neh nangmih taengah hmabuet la om saeh.
Numbers29:1 A hla rhih dongkah hlasae a hnin khat vaengah nangmih ham hmuencim kah tingtunnah om saeh. Nangmih ham tamlung khohnin la a om dongah thohtatnah kah bitat boeih tah saii boeh.
Numbers29:2 BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui la saelhung ca vaito pumat
Numbers29:3 Amih kah khocang tah situi neh a thoek vaidam saeh lamtah vaito pumat dongah doh thum
Numbers29:4 Tuca pumrhih ham khaw tuca pumat dongah doh at saeh.
Numbers29:5 Nangmih ham aka dawth la maae ca pumat te boirhaem la om saeh.
Numbers29:6 Hlasae kah hmueihhlutnah neh a khocang voel ah
Numbers29:7 A hla rhih dongkah a hnin rha vaengah nangmih ham a cim tingtunnah om. Te vaengah na hinglu te phaep uh lamtah bitat boeih te saii uh boeh.
Numbers29:8 BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah te hmuehmuei botui kuen uh lamtah saelhung vaito ca pumat tutal pumat
Numbers29:9 Situi neh a thoek a khocang vaidam he vaito pumat dongah doh thum
Numbers29:10 Tuca pumrhih ham khaw tu pumat dongah doh at
Numbers29:11 Maae ca pumat te boirhaem la om saeh. Tholh dawthnah boirhaem voel ah sainoek hmueihhlutnah neh a khocang khaw a tuisi khaw om saeh.
Numbers29:12 Hla rhih dongkah hnin hlai nga vaengah nangmih ham hmuencim kah tingtunnah om saeh. Thohtatnah bitat boeih tah saii uh boel lamtah BOEIPA ham hnin rhih khuiah khotue te lam uh.
Numbers29:13 BOEIPA taengah hmuehmuei botui hmaihlutnah ham hmueihhlutnah a khuen uh vaengkah
Numbers29:14 Situi neh a thoek a khocang vaidam khaw
Numbers29:15 Tuca hlai li vaengah tuca pumat dongah doh at doh at saeh.
Numbers29:16 Maae ca pumat te boirhaem la om saeh. Sainoek hmueihhlutnah voel ah a khocang neh a tuisi om saeh.
Numbers29:17 A hnin bae dongah saelhung ca vaitotal pum hlai nit
Numbers29:18 A khocang neh a tuisi te laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:19 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah
Numbers29:20 A hnin thum dongah vaito pum hlai khat
Numbers29:21 A khocang neh a tuisi te laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:22 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah neh a khocang
Numbers29:23 A hnin li dongah vaito pumrha
Numbers29:24 A khocang neh a tuisi te laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:25 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah
Numbers29:26 A hnin nga dongah vaito pumko
Numbers29:27 A khocang neh a tuisi te laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:28 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah
Numbers29:29 A hnin rhuk dongah vaito pumrhet
Numbers29:30 A khocang neh a tuisi te laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:31 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah
Numbers29:32 A hnin rhih dongah vaito pumrhih
Numbers29:33 A khocang neh a tuisi te a laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:34 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah
Numbers29:35 A hnin rhet dongah tah nangmih ham pahong la om vetih thohtatnah bitat boeih tah saii uh boeh.
Numbers29:36 Hmueihhlutnah dongah vaitotal pumat
Numbers29:37 A khocang neh a tuisi te laitloeknah bangla amah tarhing ah vaitotal rhoek ham khaw
Numbers29:38 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah
Numbers29:39 Na olcaeng neh na kothoh lamkah a voel ah
Numbers29:40 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses taengah a cungkuem a uen bangla Moses loh Israel ca rhoek taengah a thui pah.
Numbers30:1 Moses loh Israel ca rhoek koca kah boeilu rhoek te a voek tih BOEIPA loh a uen bangla ol he a thui pah.
Numbers30:2 tongpa he BOEIPA taengah olcaeng a caeng vaengah khaw
Numbers30:3 Huta he BOEIPA taengah olcaeng a caeng tih a camoe ah a napa im kah rhuikhih loh a khih mai ni.
Numbers30:4 A hinglu dongah a khih a olcaeng neh a rhuikhih te a napa loh a yaak dae a napa loh anih te a ngam tak. Te vaengah a olcaeng boeih te cak vetih a hinglu dongah a khih rhuikhih boeih te khaw cak ni.
Numbers30:5 A napa loh a yaak hnin ah anih te khaban koinih a olcaeng boeih neh a hinglu dongkah a khih a rhuikhih te cak mahpawh. Te vaeng daengah napa loh anih te a khaban dae BOEIPA loh anih te khodawk a ngai ni.
Numbers30:6 A va taengah om khaw om mai tih amah sokah a olcaeng neh a hmuilai kah olhlo te a hinglu dongah a khih khaming.
Numbers30:7 Te vaengah a va loh a yaak tih a yaak hnin ah pataeng anih te hil a phah tak atah a olcaeng te cak vetih a hinglu dongah a khih a rhuikhih te cak ni.
Numbers30:8 Tedae a va loh a yaak hnin ah anih te a khaban khaming. Te vaengah amah sokah a olcaeng neh a hinglu dongah a khih a hmuilai kah olhlo khaw a phae coeng dongah BOEIPA loh anih te khodawk a ngai ni.
Numbers30:9 Nuhmai olcaeng neh vama kah a hinglu dongah a khih boeih boeih tah amah soah pai ni.
Numbers30:10 A va im kah a caeng mai akhaw
Numbers30:11 A va loh a yaak vaengah a taengah hil a phah tih anih khaban pawt daengah ni a olcaeng boeih cak vetih a hinglu dongah a khih a rhuikhih boeih khaw a cak eh.
Numbers30:12 A va loh a yaak hnin ah te te a phae
Numbers30:13 Olcaeng cungkuem neh
Numbers30:14 Tedae a taengah a va te la hnin hnin ah a ngam la ngam khaming. A yaak hnin ah pataeng a taengah a ngam dongah huta kah olcaeng boeih te cak tih a sokah a rhuikhih boeih cak.
Numbers30:15 A yaak neh te te a phae la a phae atah huta kah amah loh thaesainah te phueih saeh.
Numbers30:16 He oltlueh he tongpa laklo neh a yuu taengkah ham
Numbers31:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers31:2 “Na pilnam te coi lamtah Israel ca rhoek kah tawnlohnah neh Median soah phulo laeh
Numbers31:3 Te dongah Moses loh pilnam te a voek tih
Numbers31:4 Israel koca boeih khui lamloh lam koca khat ah thawng khat
Numbers31:5 Te dongah Israel a thawng a thawng khui lamloh koca khat ah thawng khat te hol uh tih thawng hlai nit te caempuei la pumcum uh.
Numbers31:6 Te phoeiah Moses loh amih koca pakhat lamkah thawng te caempuei la a tueih. Te vaengah khosoih Eleazar capa Phinekha khaw a kut dongkah hmuencim hnopai neh tamlung olueng neh caempuei la cet.
Numbers31:7 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses te a uen bangla Midian te a muk uh tih tongpa boeih te a ngawn uh.
Numbers31:8 Midian manghai rhoek te khaw amih kah rhok dongah a ngawn uh. Midian manghai panga
Numbers31:9 Israel ca rhoek loh Midian kah huta camoe khaw a rhamsa boeih neh a boiva boeih a mawt uh tih a thadueng boeih khaw a poelyoe pa uh.
Numbers31:10 Amih kah tolrhum lakli
Numbers31:11 Kutbuem boeih khaw
Numbers31:12 Te phoeiah tamna neh kutbuem hnorhawt te khaw Jerikho kah Jordan kaep
Numbers31:13 Moses
Numbers31:14 Tedae caem aka soep thawng khat mangpa rhoek neh caempuei caemtloek lamkah aka pawk yakhat mangpa taengah Moses a thintoek.

Numbers31:16 Peor kah olka dongah BOEIPA taeng lamloh boekoeknah la hol uh ham Balaam kah ol lamloh Israel ca rhoek taengla amih ha pawk coeng ne. Te dongah ni lucik loh BOEIPA kah hlangboel a tlak thil.
Numbers31:17 Te dongah camoe lakli kah tongpa boeih te ngawn uh lamtah tongpa kah thingkong dongah tongpa aka ming huta boeih khaw ngawn uh.
Numbers31:18 Tedae huta khuiah khaw tongpa kah thingkong aka ming hlan camoe boeih tah namamih ham hlun uh.
Numbers31:19 Nangmih hinglu aka ngawn boeih neh rhok aka ben boeih tah hnin rhih khuiah rhaehhmuen vongvoel la rhaeh uh. A hnin thum neh a hnin rhih dongah namamih neh na tamna te khaw cilpoe uh.
Numbers31:20 Himbai boeih neh maehpho dongkah hnopai boeih

Numbers31:22 “Sui neh cak

Numbers31:24 A hnin rhih dongah na himbai te na suk uh tih na caihcil uh phoeiah rhaehhmuen la kun uh
Numbers31:25 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers31:26 Hnorhawt dongkah hlangmi te
Numbers31:27 Caempuei la a khuen tih caem aka tu laklo neh rhaengpuei boeih laklo ah hnorhawt te tael pah.
Numbers31:28 Caempuei la aka cet caemtloek hlang rhoek khui lamloh ya nga vaengah hinglu pakhat tah hlang khaw
Numbers31:29 A rhakthuem te lo lamtah BOEIPA kah khosaa la khosoih Eleazar ham pae.
Numbers31:30 Israel ca rhoek kah te a rhakthuem ah coelh pah. Sawmnga lamloh pakhat tah hlang khaw
Numbers31:31 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Moses neh khosoih Eleazar loh a saii.
Numbers31:32 Caempuei pilnam loh a poelyoe hnorhawt dong lamloh maeh coih la aka om he boiva he thawng ya rhuk neh thawng sawmrhih thawng nga
Numbers31:33 saelhung thawng sawmrhih neh thawng hnih
Numbers31:34 Laak thawng sawmrhuk neh thawng khat lo.
Numbers31:35 Hlang kah hinglu khaw tongpa kah thingkong aka ming pawh huta he a pum la hinglu thawng sawmthum thawng nit lo.
Numbers31:36 Caempuei la aka kun kah hamsum rhakthuem he a pum la boiva he thawng ya thum neh thawng sawmthum thawng rhih ya nga lo.
Numbers31:37 BOEIPA kah mangmu te boiva dong lamloh ya rhuk sawmrhih panga
Numbers31:38 Saelhung thawng sawmthum thawng rhuk lo. Te vaengah BOEIPA ham amih kah mangmu te sawmrhih pumnit lo.
Numbers31:39 Laak thawng thumkip neh ya nga vaengah BOEIPA ham amih mangmu pum sawmrhuk pakhat lo.
Numbers31:40 Hlang kah hinglu khaw thawng hlai rhuk vaengah BOEIPA ham amih kah mangmu te hinglu thumkip panit lo.
Numbers31:41 Te dongah BOEIPA Moses a uen vanbangla BOEIPA kah khosaa mangmu te Moses loh khosoih Eleazar taengah a paek.
Numbers31:42 Israel ca rhakthuem lamloh caem aka muk hlang taeng lamkah khaw Moses loh a tael pah.
Numbers31:43 Hlangboel rhakthuem lamloh boiva thawng ya thum neh thawng sawmthum thawng rhih ya nga lo.
Numbers31:44 Saelhung he thawng thumkip neh thawng rhuk lo.
Numbers31:45 Laak thawng sawmthum neh ya nga lo.
Numbers31:46 Hlang kah hinglu thawng hlai rhuk lo.
Numbers31:47 Israel ca rhoek rhakthuem dongkah te Moses a loh. Sawmnga ah pakhat tah hlang lamkah khaw

Numbers31:49 Moses taengah
Numbers31:50 Te dongah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah kaimih kah hinglu ham aka dawth la hlang loh a hmuh sui hnopai
Numbers31:51 Te dongah Moses neh khosoih Eleazar amih taeng lamloh sui neh kutsai hnopai boeih te a doe.
Numbers31:52 Te dongah thawngkhat mangpa rhoek neh yakhat mangpa rhoek taeng lamloh BOEIPA taengah khosaa la a tloeng uh sui boeih he shekel thawng hlai rhuk ya rhih sawmnga lo.
Numbers31:53 Caempuei hlang rhoek long khaw amah kah hlang te a poelyoe uh.
Numbers31:54 Te phoeiah Moses neh khosoih Eleazar thawngkhat neh yakhat mangpa rhoek lamkah sui te a doe tih tingtunnah dap la BOEIPA mikhmuh ah Israel ca rhoek ham poekkoepnah la a khuen.
Numbers32:1 Te vaengah Reuben ca rhoek te boiva muep om tih Gad ca taengah khaw ping uh khungdaeng. Te phoeiah Jazer khohmuen neh Gilead khohmuen te a sawt vaengah a hmuen khaw boiva hmuen la tarha a hmuh uh.

Numbers33:1 He tah Moses neh Aaron kut hmuiah amamih kah caempuei neh Egypt kho lamloh a coe uh vaengkah Israel ca rhoek kah longcaeh ni.
Numbers33:2 Moses loh BOEIPA olka bangla a longpueng kah a pongthohnah te a daek. He rhoek he a longpueng uh vaengkah amih kah pongthohnah ni.
Numbers33:3 A hla lamhmacuek dongkah hla sae hnin hlai nga dongah Raameses lamloh cet uh. Yoom vuen ah Israel ca rhoek te coe uh tih Egypt pum kah mikhmuh ah kut a thueng uh.
Numbers33:4 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh a ngawn Egypt te a up uh. Amih kah caming boeih neh a pathen rhoek soah BOEIPA loh tholhphu a thuung.
Numbers33:5 Israel ca rhoek te Raameses lamloh cet tih Sukkoth ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:6 Sukkoth lamloh cet uh tih khosoek hmoi kah Etham ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:7 Etham lamloh a caeh uh vaengah Baalzephon rhaldan kah Pihahiroth la mael uh tih Migdol rhaldan ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:8 Pihahiroth rhaldan lamloh a caeh uh vaengah tuipuei laklung ah khosoek la kat uh. Etham khosoek ah hnin thum longcaeh te cet uh tih Marah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:9 Marah lamloh cet uh tih Elim la pawk uh. Elim ah tuiphuet tui hlai nit neh rhophoe sawmrhih om tih pahoi rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:10 Elim lamloh cet uh tih carhaek tuipuei ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:11 Carhaek tuipuei lamloh cet uh tih Sin khosoek ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:12 Sin khosoek lamloh cet uh tih Dophkah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:13 Dophkah lamloh cet uh tih Alush ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:14 Alush lamloh cet uh tih Rephidim ah rhaeh uh. Tedae teah te pilnam kah a ok ham tui om pawh.
Numbers33:15 Rephidim lamloh cet uh tih Sinai khosoek ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:16 Sinai khosoek lamloh cet uh tih Kiborthhattaavah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:17 Kiborthhattaavah lamloh cet uh tih Hazeroth ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:18 Hazeroth lamloh cet uh tih Rithmah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:19 Rithmah lamloh cet uh tih Rimmonperez la rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:20 Rimmonperez lamloh cet uh tih Libnah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:21 Libnah lamloh cet uh tih Rissah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:22 Rissah lamloh cet uh tih Kehelathah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:23 Kehelathah lamloh cet uh tih Shepher tlang ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:24 Shepher tlang lamloh cet uh tih Haradah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:25 Haradah lamloh cet uh tih Makheloth ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:26 Makheloth lamloh puen uh tih Tahath ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:27 Tahath lamloh cet uh tih Terah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:28 Terah lamloh cet uh tih Mithkah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:29 Mithkah lamloh cet uh tih Hashmonah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:30 Hashmonah lamloh cet uh tih Moserah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:31 Moserah lamloh cet uh tih Benejaakan ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:32 Benejaakan lamloh cet uh tih Horhagidgad ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:33 Horhagidgad lamloh cet uh tih Jobathah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:34 Jobathah lamloh puen uh tih Abronah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:35 Abronah lamloh puen uh tih Eziongeber ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:36 Eziongeber lamloh cet uh tih Kadesh kah Zin khosoek ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:37 Kadesh lamloh cet uh tih Edom khohmuen bawt kah Hor tlang ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:38 Hor tlang ah tah khosoih Aaron khaw BOEIPA kah olka bangla cet coeng tih Egypt kho lamloh Israel ca rhoek a coe uh phoeikah kum likip
Numbers33:39 Aaron he a kum ya pakul pathum a lo ca vaengah Hor tlang ah duek.
Numbers33:40 Te vaengah Kanaan khohmuen ah Israel ca rhoek a pawk te tuithim kah kho aka sa Arad manghai Kanaan loh a yaak.
Numbers33:41 Hor tlang lamloh puen uh tih Zalmonah ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:42 Zalmonah lamloh puen uh tih Punon ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:43 Punon lamloh puen uh tih Oboth ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:44 Oboth lamloh puen uh tih Moab khorhi kah Ijeabarim ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:45 Iyim lamloh puen uh tih Gad Dibon ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:46 Gad Dibon lamloh puen uh tih Almondiblathaim ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:47 Almondiblathaim lamloh puen uh tih Nebo rhaldan kah Abarim tlang ah rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:48 Abarim tlang lamloh puen uh tih Jerikho Jordan kah lo Moab kolken ah tih rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:49 Jordan kah Moab kolken ah te Bethjeshimoth lamloh Abelshittim duela rhaeh uh.
Numbers33:50 Jerikho Jordan kah Moab kolken ah BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers33:51 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah amih te thui pah. Nangmih Kanaan khohmuen la Jordan te kat uh.
Numbers33:52 Te vaengah khohmuen kah khosa boeih te na mikhmuh lamloh haek uh. Amih kah ngaihlihnah cungkuem te thup uh lamtah a mueihlawn mueihlip boeih te khaw thup uh. Amih kah hmuensang boeih te khaw tulh uh.
Numbers33:53 Khohmuen te pang uh lamtah a khuiah khosa uh. Khohmuen te pang hamla nangmih taengah kam paek coeng.
Numbers33:54 Khohmuen te hmulung neh tael uh. Nangmih kah koca aka ping ham tah a rho te kum sak lamtah a sii ham tah a rho te sih pah. Amah ham hmulung dongah a naan te tah anih ham om pawn vetih na pa rhoek kah koca tarhing ah pang uh.
Numbers33:55 Khohmuen kah khosa rhoek te na mikhmuh lamloh na haek uh pawt atah amih lamkah na sueng sak uh te nangmih mik ah miktlaeh banlga
Numbers33:56 Amih taengah saii ham ka cai vanbangla nangmih taengah khaw ka saii ni
Numbers34:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers34:2 “Israel ca rhoek te uen lamtah amih te thui pah. Nangmih Kanaan khohmuen la aka kun rhoek aw
Numbers34:3 Tuithim baengki ah Zin khosoek lamloh Edom ngong phai Edom te nangmih ham om bitni. Tuithim khorhi tah lungkaeh li a bawt lamloh khothoeng hil nangmih ham om bitni.
Numbers34:4 Nangmih ham khorhi tah tuithim kah Akrabbim kham ah a hil vetih Zin a poeng duela om ni. Te phoeiah Kadeshbarnea tuithim lamloh a hmoi ah pawk vetih Hazaraddar a pha phoeiah Azmon la pawk ni.
Numbers34:5 Azmon lamkah soklong khorhi te Egypt la a hil vetih a bawtnah tuipuei ah om ni.
Numbers34:6 Khotlak kah khorhi te khaw tuipuei len hil te nangmih ham om vetih khotlak khorhi te nangmih ham khorhi la om ni.
Numbers34:7 Tlangpuei khorhi te tuipuei len lamloh nangmih ham om vetih Hor tlang te namamih ham thuun thil uh.
Numbers34:8 Hor tlang lamloh Lebokhamath te thuun uh lamtah khorhi hmoi te Zedad la pawk saeh.
Numbers34:9 Te phoeiah khorhi te Ziphron la pawk vetih a Hazarenan bawt om ni. He tah nangmih ham tlangpuei kah khorhi la om ni.
Numbers34:10 Khothoeng kah khorhi te Hazarenan lamloh Shepham duela nangmih ham thuun sak.
Numbers34:11 Riblah Shepham lamkah khorhi te Ayin khothoeng ah suntla saeh lamtah khorhi aka suntla te khothoeng kah Kinnereth tuipuei kah hlaep la khoe saeh.
Numbers34:12 Khorhi te Jordan la suntla bal aeh lamtah a bawtnah te lungkaeh li ah om saeh. He tah khohmuen kaepvai ah nangmih ham rhilung la om ni
Numbers34:13 Te phoeiah Moses loh Israel ca rhoek te a uen tih
Numbers34:14 A napa rhoek kah imsawn tarhing ah Reuben ca rhoek kah koca neh a napa rhoek imsawn tarhing ah Gad ca rhoek koca loh a yo uh. Amih kah rho te Manasseh koca rhakthuem a loh.
Numbers34:15 Koca panit neh koca rhakthuem loh a rho te khothoeng ah khocuk kah Jerikho Jordan kah rhalvangan ah a doe uh coeng
Numbers34:16 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers34:17 He kah ming aka om hlang rhoi
Numbers34:18 Khoboei khaw koca pakhat lamloh khoboei pakhat tah khohmuen aka tael la lo.
Numbers34:19 He hlang rhoek a ming tah
Numbers34:20 Simeon ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Ammihud capa Samuel
Numbers34:21 Benjamin koca lamloh Khislon capa Elidad
Numbers34:22 Dan ca rhoek koca kah khoboei Jogli capa Bukki
Numbers34:23 Joseph capa Manasseh ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Ephod capa khoboei Hanniel
Numbers34:24 Ephraim ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Shiphtan capa khoboei Kemuel
Numbers34:25 Zebulun ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Parnach capa khoboei Elizaphan
Numbers34:26 Issakhar ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Azzan capa khoboei Paltiel
Numbers34:27 Asher ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Shelomi capa khoboei Ahihud
Numbers34:28 Naphtali ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Ammihud capa khoboei Pedahel saeh
Numbers34:29 Te rhoek te Kanaan khohmuen ah Israel ca rhoek phaeng sak ham BOEIPA loh a uen.
Numbers35:1 BOEIPA loh Moses te Jerikho Jordan kah Moab kolken ah a voek tih
Numbers35:2 Israel ca rhoek te uen lamtah amih kah khohut rho lamloh Levi te pae uh saeh. Khosa ham khopuei rhoek neh a kaepvai ah khopuei kah khocaak te Levi ham pae uh saeh.
Numbers35:3 Te daengah ni amih khosa rhoek ham khaw khopuei om vetih a rhamsa ham neh a khuehtawn ham khaw
Numbers35:4 Khopuei kah khocaak te khopuei pangbueng lamloh vongvoel kaepvai dong thawngkhat hil tah Levi taengah pae uh.
Numbers35:5 Te dongah khopuei kah vongvoel lamloh khothoeng ben te dong thawng hnih
Numbers35:6 Khopuei khuiah khaw hlipyingnah khopuei parhuk te Levi taengah pae uh. Te te hlang aka ngawn tah te la rhaelrham sak ham pae uh. Amih te khopuei sawmli panit pae uh.
Numbers35:7 Levi taengah na paek uh khopuei boeih amih kah khocaak nen tah kho sawmli parhet lo saeh.
Numbers35:8 Khopuei te Israel ca kah khohut khui lamloh pae uh. A yet taeng lamkah tah kum sak uh lamtah a sii taeng lamkah tah sih pa uh. Hlang long he amah rho dongkah olka tarhing ah a pang vanbangla a khopuei khui lamkah te Levi taengah pae saeh
Numbers35:9 BOEIPA loh Moses te a voek tih
Numbers35:10 “Israel ca rhoek te voek lamtah amih te thui pah. Nangmih te Kanaan kho khuila Jordan na kat uh vaengah
Numbers35:11 Namamih ham khopuei kang uh lamtah nangmih ham hlipyingnah khopuei la om saeh. Te daengah ni tohtamaeh ah hinglu a boh tih aka ngawn loh te lam a rhaelrham eh.
Numbers35:12 Te vaengah khopuei rhoek te nangmih taengah hinglu aka suk taeng lamloh hlipyingnah la om saeh. Te daengah ni laitloeknah dongah rhaengpuei mikhmuh la a pai hlan hilah hlang aka ngawn te a duek pawt eh.
Numbers35:13 Khopuei parhuk na paek uh te nangmih ham hlipyingnah khopuei la om saeh.
Numbers35:14 Khopuei pathum te Jordan kah rhalvangan ah pae uh lamtah khopuei pathum te Kanaan khohmuen ah pae uh.
Numbers35:15 Israel ca rhoek ham neh yinlai ham khaw
Numbers35:16 Tedae aka ngawn long khaw anih te thi hnopai neh a boh tih a duek sak atah hlang aka ngawn te duek rhoe duek saeh.
Numbers35:17 Aka ngawn loh a kut dongkah lungto neh a duek la a thuk tih a duek atah hlang aka ngawn amah te duek rhoe duek saeh.
Numbers35:18 Hlang aka ngawn loh a kut kah thing hnopai nen khaw a duek la a boh tih a duek atah hlang aka ngawn amah te duek rhoe duek saeh.
Numbers35:19 Thii aka suk amah loh hlang aka ngawn te duek sak saeh. Anih te amah neh a hum uh vaengah amah loh anih te duek sak saeh.
Numbers35:20 Hmuhuetnah neh a thaek
Numbers35:21 thunkha thunhling la anih te a kut neh a thoek tih a duek atah sak atah aka thoek te duek rhoe duek saeh. Hlang aka ngawn thii aka suk amah neh a hum uh vaengah hlang aka ngawn te duek sak saeh.
Numbers35:22 Tedae thunkha thunhling pawt ah buengrhuet la a thaek akhaw
Numbers35:23 lungto nen khaw a duek sak khaming. A hmuh pawt vaengah anih te a tlak thil tih a duek oeh atah anih te thunkha aih pawt tih a boethae a tlap aih moenih.
Numbers35:24 Te dongah rhaengpuei loh hlang aka ngawn neh thii phu aka suk laklo ah he kah laitloeknah bangla laitloek uh saeh.
Numbers35:25 Te vaengah rhaengpuei loh hlang aka ngawn te thii phu aka suk kut lamloh huul saeh. Rhaengpuei loh anih te a hlipyingnah khopuei la thak uh saeh lamtah rhaelrham saeh. Tedae Hmuencim kah situi neh a koelh khosoih ham a dueknah rhi hil tah te ah te khosa saeh.
Numbers35:26 Tedae hlang aka ngawn te a hlipyingnah khopuei la rhaelrham tih khorhi te a poe khaw a poe khaming.
Numbers35:27 Te vaengah anih te thii aka suk loh a hlipyingnah khopuei rhi kah vongvoel ah a hmuh tih thii aka suk loh ngawn atah aka ngawn te a taengah thii long boel saeh.
Numbers35:28 Khosoih ham a dueknah rhi hil tah a hlipyingnah khopuei ah khosa saeh. Tedae khosoih ham a dueknah hnukah tah hlang aka ngawn te amah kah khohut khohmuen la mael saeh.
Numbers35:29 He rhoek he nangmih ham neh na cadilcahma ham khaw na tolrhum boeih ah laitloeknah khosing la om saeh.
Numbers35:30 Hinglu aka ngawn boeih tah laipai olka kah bangla hlang aka ngawn te ngawn saeh. Tedae laipai pakhat bueng neh hinglu te duek sak ham doo boel saeh.
Numbers35:31 Hlang aka ngawn kah hinglu ham tlansum te doe uh boeh. Amah a duek hamla aka halang te tah duek rhoe duek saeh.
Numbers35:32 Khosoih a dueknah rhi hil tah a hlipyingnah khopuei la rhaelrham ham neh khohmuen kah khosa la mael sak ham tlansum te lo boeh.
Numbers35:33 Thii loh khohmuen te a poeih coeng dongah a khuiah nangmih loh khohmuen te poeih uh boeh. A soah thii te a long coeng dongah thii aka long sak kah thii nen pawt atah khohmuen ham a dawth thai moenih.
Numbers35:34 A khuiah kho aka sa nangmih loh te kah khohmuen te poeih uh boeh. Kai he a khui ah kho ka sak. Kai YAHWEH he Israel ca rhoek a laklung ah kho ka sak.
Numbers36:1 Joseph ca rhoek kah koca lamloh Manasseh capa
Numbers36:2 Te vaengah
Numbers36:3 Tedae Israel ca kah koca pakhat ca lamkah pakhat taengah khaw a yuu la om uh koinih a pa rhoek kah rho khui lamloh amih kah rho te n'tloek pah ni. Amih a om nah koca kah rho te a thap vetih mamih kah rho he hmulung lamloh a hnop ni.
Numbers36:4 Israel ca rhoek ham jubilee om bal vaengah khaw amih a om nah koca kah rho ham ni amih kah rho te a thap eh. Te vaengah a pa koca kah rho lamloh amih kah rho la a yueh ni
Numbers36:5 Te dongah Moses loh BOEIPA olka bangla Israel ca rhoek te a uen tih
Numbers36:6 Ol he BOEIPA loh Zelophehad canu rhoek ham khaw a uen coeng tih
Numbers36:7 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek kah rho he koca pakhat lamloh koca a tloe taengla tinghil boel saeh. Israel ca khuikah hlang long tah a napa koca kah rho dongah balak uh saeh.
Numbers36:8 Israel ca koca khuiah rho aka pang canu boeih tah
Numbers36:9 Rho he koca pakhat lamloh a tloe koca taengla tinghil boel saeh. Hlang he Israel ca
Numbers36:10 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Zelophehad canu rhoek loh a saii uh van.
Numbers36:11 Zelophehad canu rhoek Mahlah
Numbers36:12 Joseph capa Manasseh ca rhoek kah koca khuiah yuu la a om uh dongah amih kah rho a napa huiko kah koca khuiah om van.
Numbers36:13 He kah olpaek neh laitloeknah BOEIPA loh Jerikho Jordan kaep
Deuteronomy1:1 Hekah olka he Jordan rhalvang kah khosoek
Deuteronomy1:2 Te vaengah Seir tlang long kah Horeb lamkah Kadeshbarnea he hnin rha hlai at longcaeh hla pueng.
Deuteronomy1:3 Kum likip a lo vaengkah a hla hlai at kah hla lamhma cuek dongah BOEIPA kah a uen boeih te Israel ca rhoek ham Moses loh a thui pah.
Deuteronomy1:4 Heshbon ah aka ngol Amori manghai Sihon neh Edrei kah Ashtaroth ah aka ngol Bashan manghai Oga a tloek phoeiah
Deuteronomy1:5 Moab kho kah Jordan rhalvang ah BOEIPA kah olkhueng te Moses loh koe a thuicaih tih
Deuteronomy1:6 “Mamih kah BOEIPA Pathen loh Horeb ah a thui tah
Deuteronomy1:7 Nangmih te hooi uh lamtah hlah uh laeh. Amori tlang neh a imben boeih ah
Deuteronomy1:8 Nangmih mikhmuh kah khohmuen kam paek he hmuh uh. Cet uh lamtah pang uh. Tekah khohmuen te ni BOEIPA loh na pa rhoek Abraham taengah
Deuteronomy1:9 Te vaeng tue ah nang mih taengah ka thui vanbangla
Deuteronomy1:10 BOEIPA na Pathen loh nangmih m'ping sak coeng dongah tihnin ah tah vaan kah aisi bangla na yet coeng.
Deuteronomy1:11 Na pa rhoek kah BOEIPA Pathen loh nangmih taengkah a thui vanbang la nangmih te a pueh thawng khat lam khaw n'thap saeh lamtah yoethen m'pae saeh.
Deuteronomy1:12 Tedae nangmih kah laipuei neh hnophueih neh tuituknah te kai loh metlam ka phueih thai eh?
Deuteronomy1:13 Te dongah namah koca khui lamkah aka cueih tih aka yakming neh aka ming thai hlang rhoek te namamih ham tuek uh lamtah amih te nangmih kah a lu la ka khueh eh
Deuteronomy1:14 Te vaengah kai te nan doo uh tih
Deuteronomy1:15 Te dongah aka cueih tih aka ming hlang rhoek te namamih koca rhoek kah a lu la ka khueh eh. Te vaengah thawngkhat kah mangpa rhoek
Deuteronomy1:16 Te vaengah nangmih taengkah laitloek rhoek te ka uen tih
Deuteronomy1:17 Laitloeknah dongah hlang maelhmai so uh boeh. Tanoe kangham la na yaak akhaw hlang mikhmuh ah bakuep uh boeh. Laitloeknah he Pathen hut la a om dongah nangmih ham aka kuel olka te tah kai taengla hang khuen uh lamtah n'yaak sak uh
Deuteronomy1:18 Te vaeng tue kah nangmih kang uen olka boeih te saii uh.
Deuteronomy1:19 Te dongah mamih BOEIPA Pathen kah a uen vanbangla Horeb lamkah m'puen uh tih khosoek khoham khaw boeih na hmuh uh. Rhih aka om Amori tlang long la n'cet uh tih Kadeshbarnea te m'pha uh.
Deuteronomy1:20 Te vaengah nangmih taengah
Deuteronomy1:21 Na pa rhoek kah BOEIPA Pathen loh nangmih taengah
Deuteronomy1:22 Te vaengah kai taengla boeih na capit uh tih
Deuteronomy1:23 Tekah olka ka mik dongah a thuem van dongah koca pakhat ah hlang pakhat neh hlang hlai nit te nangmih khui lamkah ka tuek.
Deuteronomy1:24 Te dongah hooi uh tih tlang la a yoeng uh phoeiah Eshkol soklong la pawk uh tih kho a hip uh.
Deuteronomy1:25 Te vaengah khohmuen thaihtae te a kut neh a loh uh tih mammih taengla han suntlak puei uh phoeiah mamih ham olka ham voeih uh. Mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA loh mamih taengah m'paek khohmuen kah a then te khaw a thui uh.
Deuteronomy1:26 Tedae caeh ham na huem uh pawt dongah na BOEIPA Pathen kah ol te na koek uh.
Deuteronomy1:27 Namamih kah dap khuiah pataeng na cailak uh tih
Deuteronomy1:28 Kaimih ta melam ka caeh uh eh? Mah manuca aka cet rhoek loh
Deuteronomy1:29 Nangmih te
Deuteronomy1:30 Nangmih mikhmuh kah aka cet na Pathen BOEIPA loh Egypt ah nangmih ham namamih mikhmuh kah a saii bang boeih la nangmih ham a vathoh bitni.
Deuteronomy1:31 Hekah hmuen na pha uh due na caeh uh vaengah longpueng khing ah hlang loh a ca a poeh bangla khosoek ah BOEIPA na Pathen loh nangmih m'poeh te khaw na hmuh uh coeng.
Deuteronomy1:32 Tedae tekah olka a om lalah nangmih loh BOEIPA na Pathen te na tangnah uh pawh.
Deuteronomy1:33 Longpueng ah na rhaeh nah ham nangmih kah hmuen tlap te nangmih mikhmuh ah halo. Khoyin ah hmai neh longpuei te nangmih n'tueng tih khothaih ah cingmai neh na cet uh.
Deuteronomy1:34 Nangmih kah olka ol te BOEIPA loh a yaak vaengah a thintoek tih ol a caeng.
Deuteronomy1:35 “Na pa rhoek taengah paek ham ka caeng khohmuen then te he kah boethae thawnpuei hlang rhoek khuikah hlang loh hmu mahpawh.
Deuteronomy1:36 Jephunneh capa Kaleb long tah te a hmuh ni. BOEIPA hnukah a tlun van dongah a soah a cawt vanbangla khohmuen te anih taeng neh a ca rhoek taengah aka paek ni
Deuteronomy1:37 Nangmih kongah kai taengah khaw BOEIPA loh a thintoek tih
Deuteronomy1:38 Na mikhmuh ah aka pai Nun capa Joshua tah kun ni. Israel te anih loh a pang ham coeng dongah anih te mah talong laeh.
Deuteronomy1:39 Na ca te maeh la om ni na ti uh cakhaw a tue thae then aka ming mueh na ca rhoek tah kun uh ni. Te dongah amih te khohmuen ka paek vetih amih loh a pang uh ni.
Deuteronomy1:40 Tedae nangmih te namamih mael uh lamtah carhaek li longpuei kah khosoek te paan uh
Deuteronomy1:41 Te vaengah kai he nan doo uh tih
Deuteronomy1:42 Tedae BOEIPA loh kai taengah
Deuteronomy1:43 Nangmih taengah ka thui dae na ngai uh pawt tih BOEIPA ol te na koek uh. Na lokhak uh tih tlang la na luei uh.
Deuteronomy1:44 Te dongah nangmih aka doe ham tlang ah aka om Amori te halo tih khoi loh a cuk thil bangla nangmih te n'hloem uh phoeiah Seir lamkah Hormah duela nangmih te m'phop uh.
Deuteronomy1:45 Te vaengah na balkhong uh tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah na rhap uh dae nangmih ol te BOEIPA loh a yaak voel mueh la nangmih taengah a hna khaw kaeng pawh.
Deuteronomy1:46 Te dongah ni Kadesh kah na om uh te khohnin la khohnin a yet na om uh.
Deuteronomy2:1 Te phoeiah
Deuteronomy2:2 Te dongah BOEIPA loh kai m'voek tih
Deuteronomy2:3 'Hekah tlang khaw puet na hil uh coeng. Te dongah tlangpuei ben la mael uh laeh.
Deuteronomy2:4 Na pilnam te khaw uen lamtah namamih loh thui pah. Seir ah aka om na manuca Esau koca rhoek kah khorhi aka paan nangmih te n'rhih uh ni. Te dongah boeih ngaithuen uh.
Deuteronomy2:5 Amih kah khohmuen te nangmih taengah kam paek pawt oeh dongah amih te huek boeh. Na kho khopha kah a laeh pataeng khaw Seir tlang te tah Esau kah rho lamni ka paek coeng.
Deuteronomy2:6 Buh khaw amih taengah tah tangka neh lai uh lamtah ca uh. Tui pataeng khaw amih taengah tah tangka neh lai uh lamtah o uh.
Deuteronomy2:7 Hekah khosoek khoham ah na van uh te BOEIPA na Pathen loh a ming tih na kut dongkah bitat boeih dongah BOEIPA na Pathen loh na yoe a then sak. Tahae due kum sawmli khuiah nangmih te hno loh m'vaitah moenih
Deuteronomy2:8 Te dongah Seir ah kho aka sa mah manuca Esau koca rhoek te m'poeng uh tih kolken longpuei Elath neh Eziongeber lamkah n'hooi uh tih Moab khosoek longpuei la n'khum uh.
Deuteronomy2:9 Tedae BOEIPA loh kai taengah
Deuteronomy2:10 Hlamat lamkah anih khuiah aka om Emim pilnam khaw Anakim bangla tlung khaw tlung
Deuteronomy2:11 Rapha te khaw Anakim bangla a poek uh dongah amih te Moab loh Emim la a khue uh.
Deuteronomy2:12 Seir ah khaw a hmai ah Khori rhoek kho a sak uh coeng. Tedae Esau ca rhoek loh amih te a huul uh. Amih te a mikhmuh lamloh mitmoeng uh. A rho khohmuen ah Israel saii bangla amih yueng la kho a sak uh. Te te BOEIPA loh amih taengah a paek.
Deuteronomy2:13 Tahae ah thoo uh lamtah Zered soklong te kan uh
Deuteronomy2:14 Kadeshbarnea lamkah n'cet uh tih Zered soklong m'poeng uh duela a tue loh sawmthum neh kum rhet di coeng. BOEIPA loh a caeng vanbangla rhaehhmuen lamkah thawnpuei caemtloek hlang rhoek khaw boeih khum uh coeng.
Deuteronomy2:15 Amih a mitmoeng uh duela rhaehhmuen khui lamkah amih aka khawkkhek la BOEIPA kut khaw amih taengah om.
Deuteronomy2:16 Pilnam khui lamkah caemtloek hlang boeih khaw duek tih aka boeih bangla om coeng.
Deuteronomy2:17 Te dongah BOEIPA loh kai m'voek tih
Deuteronomy2:18 'Moab khorhi kah Ar te tihnin ah vawl poeng laeh.
Deuteronomy2:19 Ammon koca rhoek taengla na pawk vaengah amih te dum boeh. Caemtloek nen khaw amih te huek boeh. Ammon koca rhoek kah khohmuen te nang taengah rho la kam paek moenih Lot koca rhoek ham ni rho la ka paek.
Deuteronomy2:20 Te te a khui ah lamhma la Rapha rhoek a om uh van coeng dongah Rapha khohmuen la a poek. Tedae Ammoni rhoek longtah amih te Zamzomi la a khue uh.
Deuteronomy2:21 Amih te Anakim bangla pilnam loh len khaw len
Deuteronomy2:22 Seir kah aka om te Esau koca rhoek ham a saii pah tih Khori rhoek a mit sak bangla amih khaw a mikhmuh ah a haek uh dongah tihnin due amih yueng la Esau koca rhoek loh kho a sak uh.
Deuteronomy2:23 Gaza vongup khui duela aka om Avvii khaw Kaptor lamkah aka lo Kapthorim rhoek loh a mit sak tih amih yueng la tloep om bal.
Deuteronomy2:24 Thoo uh laeh. Cet uh lamtah Arnon soklong ke kat uh. Na kut dongah kam paek Amori kah Heshbon manghai Sihon te so lamtah a khohmuen te pahoi huul. Te phoeiah anih te caemtloek neh huek.
Deuteronomy2:25 Tihnin ah he ka tong vetih nang ham birhihnah ka khueh ni. Vaan hmui boeih kah pilnam rhoek loh a mikhmuh ah nang kah hinyahnah olthang a yaak uh vaengah tlai uh vetih na mikhmuh ah kilkul uh ni.
Deuteronomy2:26 Te phoeiah Kedemoth khosoek lamkah puencawn rhoek te Heshbon manghai Sihon taengla rhoepnah olka neh ka tueih tih
Deuteronomy2:27 'Na khohmuen long ah ka lan mai eh. Longpuei pakhat te ka vai vetih banvoei bantang la ka phael mahpawh.
Deuteronomy2:28 Buh khaw kai taengah tangka neh yoi lamtah ka ca eh. Tui khaw kai taengah tangka la han yoi lamtah ka o eh. Ka kho nen mah dawk ka lan mai eh.
Deuteronomy2:29 BOEIPA ka Pathen loh kaimih taengah m'paek khohmuen la Jordan lamkah ka lan uh vaengah Seir ah aka om Esau koca rhoek neh Ar ah aka om Moab rhoek loh kai ham a saii uh bangla sai van mai
Deuteronomy2:30 Te vaengah mamih lan sak ham te Heshbon manghai Sihon loh a kohuem pawh. Tedae tihnin kah bangla BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang kut dongah paek a ngaih dongah ni Sihon kah mueihla te a mangkhak sak tih a thinko khaw a ning sak.
Deuteronomy2:31 Tedae BOEIPA loh kai taengah
Deuteronomy2:32 Te vaengah Sihon neh amah pilnam pum loh caemtloek neh mamih doe ham Jahaz ah ha pawk.
Deuteronomy2:33 Tedae anih te mamih kah BOEIPA Pathen loh mamih mikhmuh la han thak dongah amah neh anih koca rhoek kah a ca khaw
Deuteronomy2:34 Te vaengah a khopuei boeih te m'buem pa uh tih khopuei takuem te n'thup uh. Huta tongpa neh camoe rhaengnaeng khaw m'paih uh pawh.
Deuteronomy2:35 Tedae rhamsa te mamih ham m'poelyoe uh tih khopuei rhoek te kutbuem la m'buem uh.
Deuteronomy2:36 Arnon soklong tuikung kah Aroer lamkah soklong khopuei Gilead pataeng khaw mamih ham aka phoeng khorha la om pawh. Tedae mamih kah BOEIPA Pathen loh mamih mikhmuh ah boeih a tloeng.
Deuteronomy2:37 Tedae Ammon koca rhoek kah khohmuen tah mamih BOEIPA Pathen kah a uen vanbangla Jabbok soklong paem boeih neh tlang kah khopuei boeih khaw ben uh boeh.
Deuteronomy3:1 Bashan longpuei la n'hooi uh tih n'caeh uh vaengah khaw Bashan manghai Oga neh a pilnam pum loh caemtloek neh mamih doe ham Edrei ah ha pawk.
Deuteronomy3:2 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh kai te
Deuteronomy3:3 Bashan manghai Oga neh a pilnam boeih te khaw mamih kut dongah mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA loh m'paek van coeng dongah rhaengnaeng a om pawt hil anih te n'tloek uh.
Deuteronomy3:4 Te vaeng tue ah a khopuei rhoek boeih te n'buem uh tih amih taeng lamloh n'loh mueh khorha pakhat khaw om pawh. Bashan ah Oga ram Argob paeng boeih he khopuei sawmrhuk lo.
Deuteronomy3:5 Tekah khopuei boeih kah vongtung tah cak tih thohkhaih neh thohkalh khaw sang. Khopuei khat bueng lamloh vangcahlang khaw muep ping.
Deuteronomy3:6 Heshbon manghai Sihon taengkah n'saii uh bangla amih te khaw n'thup uh tih khopuei takuem kah huta tongpa neh camoe khaw n'thup uh.
Deuteronomy3:7 Tedae rhamsa boeih neh khopuei rhoek kah kutbuem te tah mamih ham ni m'poelyoe uh.
Deuteronomy3:8 Te vaengah Jordan rhalvang Arnon soklong lamkah Hermon tlang duela aka om Amori manghai rhoi kut lamkah khohmuen te n'loh uh.
Deuteronomy3:9 Hermon te Sidoni rhoek loh Sirion a ti uh tih Amori rhoek loh Senir a ti uh.
Deuteronomy3:10 Tlangkol khopuei rhoek boeih neh Gilead boeih khaw
Deuteronomy3:11 Te dongah Bashan manghai Oga bueng ni Rapha hlangrhuel la aka sueng. Te vaengah anih kah soengca thi soengca aih te hlang kah a dong la a daang te dong li neh a yun dong ko la Ammon koca rhoek kah Rabbah hmuen ah om pawt het a?
Deuteronomy3:12 Te vaeng tue kah khohmuen m'pang te Arnon soklong kah Aroer neh Gilead tlang a rhakthuem neh khopuei rhoek te Reuben koca neh Gad koca taengah ka paek coeng.
Deuteronomy3:13 Gilead kah a coih neh Oga ram Bashan pum te Manasseh koca rhakthuem taengah ka paek coeng. Bashan pum kah Argob paeng boeih he Rapha khohmuen la a tkhue.
Deuteronomy3:14 Manasseh capa Jair loh Argob paeng pum te Geshuri neh Maakathi khorhi duela a loh. Te dongah te rhoek te anih ming neh tihnin due
Deuteronomy3:15 Makir te khaw Gilead ka paek coeng.
Deuteronomy3:16 Tedae Gilead lamkah Arnon soklong due
Deuteronomy3:17 kolken neh Jordan khorhi khaw
Deuteronomy3:18 Te vaeng tue ah ni nangmih te kang uen tih
Deuteronomy3:19 Tedae na yuu na ca rhoek neh na boiva te tah ka ming vanbangla boiva khaw muep a yet oeh pueng dongah nangmih ham kam paek na khopuei rhoek ah te om uh mai saeh.
Deuteronomy3:20 Nangmih bangla na manuca rhoek te BOEIPA loh a duem sak duela na BOEIPA Pathen loh amih taengah khohmuen a paek te amih loh Jordan rhalvang khaw a pang uh thil van coeng. Te dongah hlang he nangmih taengah kam paek vanbangla a rho taengla mael saeh.
Deuteronomy3:21 Joshua khaw amah te vaeng tue ah ka uen tih
Deuteronomy3:22 Nangmih hamla na BOEIPA Pathen loh a vathoh thil coeng dongah amih te rhih boeh
Deuteronomy3:23 Amah te vaeng tue ah BOEIPA taengla ka bih tih
Deuteronomy3:24 'Aw Boeipa
Deuteronomy3:25 Jordan rhalvang la bet ka lan mai saeh lamtah khohmuen then Lebanon tlang then te khaw ka hmu laem eh
Deuteronomy3:26 Tedae nangmih kongah BOEIPA te kai taengah a lungoe tih ka ol hnatun pawh. Te vaenagah BOEIPA loh kai taengah
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisgah som la luei lamtah tuitunli neh tlangpuei khaw
Deuteronomy3:28 Tedae Joshua te uen lamtah talong khaw talong
Deuteronomy3:29 Te dongah ni Bethpeor imdan kah kolrhawk ah kho n'sak uh.
Deuteronomy4:1 Israel aw oltlueh neh laitloeknah te hnatun laeh. Te te vai hamla nangmih kan cang puei. Te daengah ni na hing uh tih na pha uh vaengah khaw na pa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA loh nangmih taengah m'paek khohmuen te na pang uh eh.
Deuteronomy4:2 Kai loh nangmih kang uen olka he thap khaw thap uh boeh
Deuteronomy4:3 Baalpeor ah BOEIPA loh a saii te na mik loh a hmuh uh coeng. Baalpeor hnukah aka cet hlang boeih te na BOEIPA Pathen loh nangmih khui lamkah a mitmoeng sak coeng.
Deuteronomy4:4 Tedae na BOEIPA Pathen aka ben nangmih tah tihnin due boeih na hing uh.
Deuteronomy4:5 So lah
Deuteronomy4:6 Pilnam kah mikhmuh ah na cueihnah neh na yakmingnah ham khaw he he ngaithuen uh lamtah vai uh. Tekah oltlueh boeih te a yaak uh vaengah
Deuteronomy4:7 Amah te mamih loh n'khue uh takuem ah mamih kah BOEIPA Pathen bangla aka hmaiben pathen te mebang pilnu ham lae a om eh.
Deuteronomy4:8 Tihnin kah nangmih mikhmuh ah ka tloeng olkhueng boeih bangla aka dueng oltlueh neh laitloeknah he mebang pilnu ham bal lae?
Deuteronomy4:9 Tedae namah te ngaithuen uh lamtah na hinglu khaw rhep ngaithuen. Na mik loh a hmuh hno te koeloe na hnilh ve
