Deuteronomy28:33 Pilnam loh na khohmuen cangthaih neh na thaphu boeih han caak te na ming. Hnin takuem hnaemtaek neh neet koi bueng la na om ni.
Deuteronomy28:34 Na mikhmuh kah a hmuethma te na hmuh vaengah pavai la na coeng ni.
Deuteronomy28:35 Khuklu neh phai dongkah buhlut thae neh BOEIPA loh nang ng'ngawn vetih na kho khopha lamloh na luki duela na hoeih thai mahpawh.
Deuteronomy28:36 Namah neh namah soah na ludoeng na manghai te namah neh na pa rhoek a ming mueh namtom taengla BOEIPA loh n'thak koinih lungto thingngo pathen tloe ni tho na thueng hae eh.
Deuteronomy28:37 Tedae BOEIPA loh nang te m'vai vetih pilnam boeih taengah imsuep la
Deuteronomy28:38 Lohma ah cangtii muep na khuen cakhaw kaisih loh a hnom vetih hah na coi ni.
Deuteronomy28:39 Misur na phung tih na thotat cakhaw
Deuteronomy28:40 Na khorhi boeih ah nang hamla olive om cakhaw na olive te hul vetih situi khaw na hluk hae mahpawh.
Deuteronomy28:41 Capa canu na cun cakhaw tamna la cet uh vetih nang taengah om uh mahpawh.
Deuteronomy28:42 Na thingkung boeih neh khohmuen thaihtae te tungrhit loh a thok sak ni.
Deuteronomy28:43 Na taengkah yinlai loh nang soah a so
Deuteronomy28:44 Nang taengah cangpu han hlah lat vetih nang loh anih cangpu na hlah thai mahpawh. Anih te a lu la om vetih nang te a mai la na om ni.
Deuteronomy28:45 A olpaek neh a khosing ngaithuen ham te nang kang uen lalah BOEIPA na Pathen ol te na ngai pawt atah he rhoek kah rhunkhuennah boeih he nang soah thoeng ni. Na mitmoeng duela nang n'hloem vetih n'tuuk ni.
Deuteronomy28:46 Kumhal ah namah ham neh na tii na ngan ham miknoek neh kopoekrhai la om uh ni.
Deuteronomy28:47 Cangpai a khawk vaengah kohoenah thinko thennah neh BOEIPA na Pathen taengah tho na thueng pawh.
Deuteronomy28:48 Te dongah BOEIPA loh nang taengla na thunkha han tueih te khokha khui neh tuihalh khui ah
Deuteronomy28:49 A ol na yakming pawh namtu
Deuteronomy28:50 maelhmai aka tlung
Deuteronomy28:51 Na mitmoeng duela na rhamsa ca neh na khohmuen thaihtae te han caak ni. Cangpai misur thai situi khaw nang hamla paih mahpawh. Nang kah saelhung saelca neh suentae boiva te a milh sak ni.
Deuteronomy28:52 Nang kah hmuen sang vongtung neh na khohmuen tom kah na pangtung thil na vong cak loh tim hlan khuiah na vongka khui tom ah nang te n'daengdaeh vetih
Deuteronomy28:53 Te vaengah na bungko thaihtae lamkah na capa neh na canu saa te na caak ni. Te te na thunkha loh nang soah a caeknah la vongup ah n'kilh dongah ni na Pathen BOEIPA loh nang taengah m'paek.
Deuteronomy28:54 Na khuikah tongpa mongkawt hlangcong loh a manuca
Deuteronomy28:55 Na vongka pum te vongup ah na thunkha loh nang te a caeknah la n'kilh vaengah ba pakhat khaw a coih pah mahpawh. Te dongah a ca saa te hnap a caak vetih hlang pae mahpawh.
Deuteronomy28:56 Na khuikah mongkawt nu neh a kho khopha te diklai dongah khueh ham aka noem pawh hlangcong khaw
Deuteronomy28:57 Na thunkha loh nang te na vongka khuiah a caeknah la n'kilh vaengah a kho laklo lamloh aka thoeng a casak neh a cun nawn amah ca pataeng vongup khuikah yinhnuk ah thincavat la boeih a caak ni.
Deuteronomy28:58 A ming thangpom ham neh rhih ham aka om BOEIPA na Pathen rhih ham tahae kah cabu dongah a daek olkhueng ol boeih he vai hamla na ngaithuen pawt atah
Deuteronomy28:59 BOEIPA loh na kah hmasoe khaw
Deuteronomy28:60 Nang taengla ha tlung vaengah na rhih Egypt tloh boeih te nang soah ham phoe sak ni.
Deuteronomy28:61 Na mit na moeng duela olkhueng cabu dongkah a daek mueh tlohtat cungkuem neh hmasoe cungkuem te nang soah BOEIPA loh ham phoe sak ni.
Deuteronomy28:62 BOEIPA na Pathen ol te na ngai pawt dongah vaan aisi bangla khawk na om uh cakhaw hlang sii la na cul ni.
Deuteronomy28:63 BOEIPA loh nangmih khophoengpha sak ham neh ping sak ham a ngaingaih vanbangla nangmih te milh sak ham neh mitmoeng sak ham khaw BOEIPA a ngaingaih dongah pang hamla na kun thil khohmuen lamloh m'phuk ni.
Deuteronomy28:64 Diklai khobawt lamloh diklai khobawt duela pilnam tom taengah BOEIPA loh nang te n'taekyak bal vetih na pa rhoek neh namah long khaw na ming noek pawh lungto thingngo pathen tloe taengah tho na thueng ni.
Deuteronomy28:65 Namtom rhoek taengah hoep tlaih pawt vetih na khopha ham pataeng ngolbuel om mahpawh. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh nang te lungbuei lingloengneh mik khahoeinah
Deuteronomy28:66 Na hmailong ham khaw na hingnah loh ngaihuet ngaikaek la om vetih khoyin khothaih birhih hut la na hingnah khaw na tangnah tlaih mahpawh.
Deuteronomy28:67 Na mik neh a hmuethma na hmuh vaengah na thinko kah birhihnah neh na birhih ni. Mincang pueng ah kholaeh ka pha venim na ti vetih hlaemhmah vaengah mincang ka pha venim na ti ni.
Deuteronomy28:68 Nang taengah ka thui longpuei kah sangpho te hmuh hamla koep khoep boeh. BOEIPA loh nang Egypt la koep m'bal sak ve. Na thunkha rhoek taengah namah te salnu salpa la pahoi na yoi uh cakhaw n'lai uh mahpawh.
Deuteronomy29:1 Te hae kahhe Moab kho ah Israel ca rhoek neh moi a boh vaengah tahae kah olka he BOEIPA loh Moses a uen tih Horeb ah khaw amih taengah moi a boh thil bal.
Deuteronomy29:2 Te vaengah Israel pum te Moses loh a hueh tih
Deuteronomy29:3 Noemcainah a len len neh kopoekrhai a len len te na mik loh miknoek la a hmuh coeng.
Deuteronomy29:4 Tedae ming thai ham lungbuei
Deuteronomy29:5 Nangmih te khosoek ah kum likip kam mawt tih na pum dongkah na himbai loh hmawn pawh. Na kho dongkah na khokhom khaw hmawn pawh.
Deuteronomy29:6 Buh na ca uh pawt tih misurtui neh yu na ok uh pawt daengah kai he BOEIPA na Pathen la nan ming uh.
Deuteronomy29:7 Hekah hmuen na pha uh vaengah caemtloek neh mamih doe hamla Heshbon manghai Sihon neh Bashan manghai Oga ha pawk tih amih rhoi te n'tloek uh.
Deuteronomy29:8 Amih khohmuen te n'loh uh tih Reuben koca
Deuteronomy29:9 Te dongah paipi ol he ngaithuen uh lamtah vai uh. Te daengah ni na saii boeih te na cangbam uh thai eh.
Deuteronomy29:10 Tihnin ah nangmih na Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh kah aka pai nangmih boeih khaw
Deuteronomy29:11 na yuu na ca neh na rhaehhmuen khuiah na thing aka top tih na tui aka than yinlai khaw
Deuteronomy29:12 BOEIPA na Pathen kah paipi neh tihnin ah BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang taengah a saii a olcaeng khuila kun puei laeh.
Deuteronomy29:13 Tihnin ah nang te amah kah pilnam la pai sak vetih namah taeng neh na pa rhoek Abraham
Deuteronomy29:14 Tahae kah paipi neh olcaeng he namah neh namah loh na saii pawt tih kamah long ni ka saii.
Deuteronomy29:15 Tihnin kah BOEIPA Pathen mikhmuh kah aka pai mamih taeng aka om neh tihnin kah mamih taengah aka om pawt rhoek taengah khaw a saii.
Deuteronomy29:16 Egypt kho ah metla ng'om tih namtom lakli ah na caeh uh vaengah metla na caeh uh khaw namamih loh na ming uh.
Deuteronomy29:17 Amih taengkah a sarhingkoi la thingngo
Deuteronomy29:18 Mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA taeng lamloh a thinko aka maelh tih namtom pathen taengah thothueng hamla aka cet huta
Deuteronomy29:19 Te dongah tahae kah thaephoei ol a yaak vaengah a thinko khuiah yoethen pae uh vetih
Deuteronomy29:20 BOEIPA loh anih te khodawkngai ham a ngaih moenih. BOEIPA kah thintoek neh amah hlang taengkah a thatlainah tah khuu yoeyah ni. Te dongah he cabu dongkah a daek thaephoeinah boeih he anih soah kol ni. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh anih ming te vaan hmui lamloh a phae ni.
Deuteronomy29:21 Te dongah tahae kah olkhueng cabu khuiah a daek thaephoeinah paipi cungkuem van bangla Israel koca boeih khui kah khaw BOEIPA loh yoethaenah la a boe ni.
Deuteronomy29:22 Te vaengah nangmih hnuk lamkah aka thoo na ca rhoek
Deuteronomy29:23 Kat neh lungkaeh khohmuen ungkhang boeih he tawn uh pawt vetih baelhing loh pakhat khaw a daih mueh la poe mahpawh. Sodom neh Gomorrah imrhong bangla Admah neh Zeboiim khaw BOEIPA loh amah kah kosi thintoek neh a palet ni.
Deuteronomy29:24 Te vaengah namtom rhoek loh balae tih khohmuen he BOEIPA loh thintoek thinling neh boeih a saii aih
Deuteronomy29:25 Tedae
Deuteronomy29:26 Cet uh tih pathen tloe taengah tho a thueng uh dongah amih taengah bakop uh. Te pathen rhoek loh amih te ming uh pawt tih amih ham boe a soep moenih.
Deuteronomy29:27 Te dongah cabu dongkah a daek rhunkhuennah boeih he khuen thil ham BOEIPA kah thintoek tah khohmuen taengah sai coeng.
Deuteronomy29:28 BOEIPA loh amih te khohmuen khui lamkah thintoek kosi thinhul bat la a phuk vetih kho tloe ah tihnin kah bangla a voeih ni.
Deuteronomy29:29 Mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA taengah thuh cakhaw kumhal duela vai ham olkhueng ol boeih he mamih taeng neh mamih kah n'ca rhoek taengah ha phoe coeng.
Deuteronomy30:1 BOEIPA na Pathen loh namtom rhoek boeih taengla nang n'heh tih nang mikhmuh ah ka tloeng yoethennah neh rhunkhuennah hno boeih loh nang pum dongah a thoeng daengah ni na thinko te na maelh pueng eh.
Deuteronomy30:2 Na Pathen BOEIPA taengla mael lamtah a cungkuem la a ol te ngai laeh. Te ni kai loh nang kang uen. Tihnin ah namah neh na ca rhoek khaw na thinko boeih neh
Deuteronomy30:3 Na BOEIPA Pathen loh na thongtlak te koep n'hlawt vetih nang n'haidam bitni. Te vaengah BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang n'taekyaak nah pilnam cungkuem taeng lamloh nang te m'mael puei vetih koep n'coi ni.
Deuteronomy30:4 Vaan khobawt duela nang aka heh la om mai cakhaw te lamkah te BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang n'coi vetih koep n'loh ni.
Deuteronomy30:5 Na pa rhoek kah a pang khohmuen la BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang ng'khuen tih na pang vaengah nang te khophoeng m'pha sak vetih na pa rhoek lakah khaw nang te m'ping sak ni.
Deuteronomy30:6 BOEIPA na Pathen te na thinko boeih
Deuteronomy30:7 Tedae nang aka hmuhuet tih nang aka hloem na thunkha rhoek soah tahae kah thaephoeinah boeih he BOEIPA na Pathen loh khueh pah ni.
Deuteronomy30:8 Nang khaw koep na bal tih BOEIPA ol na hnatun ham neh a olpaek te boeih na vai ham ni tihnin ah kai loh kang uen.
Deuteronomy30:9 Te daengah ni BOEIPA na Pathen loh na kut dongkah bibi boeih neh na bungko thaihtae dongah khaw
Deuteronomy30:10 Tahae kah olkhueng cabu dongah a daek tangtae a olpaek neh a khosing ngaithuen ham BOEIPA na Pathen ol te na ngai mak atah. Na thinko boeih
Deuteronomy30:11 Tihnin ah kai loh nang uen olpaek he nang hamla rhaisang pawt tih a hla moenih.
Deuteronomy30:12 “Mamih ham vaan la ulae aka luei vetih mamih ham aka lo eh. Tedae mamih n'yaak sak vetih man n'saii uh sue
Deuteronomy30:13 “Mamih ham tuitunli kah rhalvangan la ulae aka kat vetih mamih ham aka lo eh. Tedae mamih n'yaak sak vetih man n'saii uh sue
Deuteronomy30:14 Tedae namah taengkah na ka dongah olka loh rhep ha yoei coeng dongah na saii ham khaw na thinko khuiah om coeng.
Deuteronomy30:15 Tihnin kah na mikhmuh ah ka tloeng hingnah neh hnothen
Deuteronomy30:16 BOEIPA na Pathen na lungnah tih a longpuei ah pongpa ham neh a olpaek
Deuteronomy30:17 Tedae ol na ngai mueh la na thinko na maelh atah n'heh ni. Te vaengah pathen tloe rhoek taengla na bakop vetih amih taengah tho na thueng ve.
Deuteronomy30:18 Jordan na poeng tih pang ham na kun thil khohmuen ah m'milh
Deuteronomy30:19 Tihnin ah hingnah neh dueknah
Deuteronomy30:20 Na pa rhoek Abraham
Deuteronomy31:1 Moses te cet tih Israel pum taengah hekah olka he a thui.
Deuteronomy31:2 Te vaengah amih te
Deuteronomy31:3 Na hmai kah aka kat BOEIPA na Pathen amah loh namtom rhoek he na mikhmuh ah a mitmoeng sak vetih amih te na pang ni. BOEIPA loh a thui vanbangla Joshua tah nang hmai ah kat ni.
Deuteronomy31:4 Amori manghai Sihon neh Oga a saii tih a khohmuen neh rhenten a phae bangla BOEIPA loh a saii ni.
Deuteronomy31:5 Amih te BOEIPA loh na mikhmuh la han thak vaengah nang kang uen olpaek bangla amih taengah boeih na saii ni.
Deuteronomy31:6 Thaahuel uh lamtah namning sak uh. Amih maelhmai te rhih uh boel lamtah na sarhing uh boeh. Nang taengkah aka cet BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang ng'rhael pawt vetih nang ng'hnoo mahpawh
Deuteronomy31:7 Te phoeiah Moses loh Joshua a khue tih Israel pum kah mikhmuh ah
Deuteronomy31:8 Nang mikhmuh ah aka pongpa BOEIPA amah long he nang taengah om vetih nang ng'rhael mahpawh
Deuteronomy31:9 Te phoeiah olkhueng he Moses loh a daek tih
Deuteronomy31:10 Hekah he kum rhih thok tih pohlip khotue laiba hlahnah kum kah khoning vaengah a thui tih amih te Moses loh a uen.
Deuteronomy31:11 Amah hmuen tuek kah BOEIPA na Pathen mikhmuh ah phoe hamla Israel pum loh ha pawk vaengah Israel pum kah a hna kaep ah olkhueng he doek pah.
Deuteronomy31:12 Huta tongpa camoe
Deuteronomy31:13 Te vaengah pang hamla Jordan na kat thil khohmuen kah na hingnah tue khuiah ah aka ming noek pawh a ca rhoek loh BOEIPA na Pathen rhih ham hnatun uh saeh lamtah cang uh saeh.
Deuteronomy31:14 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Moses te
Deuteronomy31:15 Te vaengah BOEIPA tah dap ah cingmai tung la tueng tih cingmai tung khaw dap thohkah ah pai.
Deuteronomy31:16 Te vaengah Moses te BOEIPA loh
Deuteronomy31:17 Tekah khohnin ah tah ka thintoek loh anih taengah sai vetih amih te ka hnoo ni. Te vaengah amih taeng lamloh ka maelhmai ka thuh vetih maeham la poeh ni. Yoethae cungkuem neh citcai loh anih a hmuh ni. Te khohnin ah
Deuteronomy31:18 Boethae cungkuem te a saii tih pathen tloe rhoek taengah a hooi uh khohnin van vaengah kai long khaw ka maelhmai ka thuh rhoe ka thuh tak van ni.
Deuteronomy31:19 Te dongah hekah laa he namah loh daek laeh. Israel ca rhoek te tuuk lamtah a ka dongah hoei pah. Te daengah ni hekah laa loh Israel ca rhoek taengah kai kah laipai la om saeh.
Deuteronomy31:20 A napa rhoek taengah ka toemngam tangtae tih
Deuteronomy31:21 Tedae ana om saeh
Deuteronomy31:22 Te dongah laa he Moses loh amah khohnin vaengah a daek tih Israel ca rhoek te a cang puei.
Deuteronomy31:23 Te phoeiah Nun capa Joshua te a uen tih
Deuteronomy31:24 Olkhueng ol he a soep hil cabu dongah daek ham te Moses loh a coeng tih om coeng.
Deuteronomy31:25 Te phoeiah BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng aka kawt Levi rhoek te Moses loh a uen tih
Deuteronomy31:26 “Olkhueng cabu he lo laeh. BOEIPA na Pathen paipi thingkawng kaep ah khueh lamtah nang taengah laipai la om saeh.
Deuteronomy31:27 Na boekoek neh na rhawn a mangkhak khaw kai loh ka ming. Nangmih taengkah ka hing tue vaengah pataeng BOEIPA aka koek la na om uh atah ka duek phoei aisat oeih.
Deuteronomy31:28 Nangmih koca kah patong rhoek neh na rhoiboei boeih loh kai taengla ha tingtun uh laeh. Vaan neh diklai he amih taengah ka laipai puei saeh lamtah a hna ah olka he ka thui lah eh.
Deuteronomy31:29 Ka dueknah hnukah khaw ka ming coeng. A po la na po vetih nangmih taengah kang uen bangla longpuei lamloh na nong uh ni. Hmailong khohnin ah yoethaenah loh nangmih m'mah ni. Na kut dongkah khoboe neh amah veet hamla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae ni na saii uh eh.
Deuteronomy31:30 Te dongah hekah laa lung he a boeih due Israel hlangping boeih kah a hna ah Moses loh a thui pah.
Deuteronomy32:1 Vaan nang loh hnatun lamtah ka thui lah eh. Ka ka dongkah ol he diklai nang loh ya lah.
Deuteronomy32:2 Ka rhingtuknah he khotlan bangla tlan saeh. Toian dongkah dotui neh baelhing dongkah mueitui bangla
Deuteronomy32:3 BOEIPA ming te ka khue vetih
Deuteronomy32:4 Uepomnah Pathen kah longpuei tah boeih tiktam tih
Deuteronomy32:5 Anih te poci coeng. BOEIPA kah a ca rhoek moenih. Amih te voeldak neh vawva cadil la om tih a lolhmaih la om.
Deuteronomy32:6 Pilnam ang neh cueih aka khueh mueh
Deuteronomy32:7 Khosuen tue te poek lamtah
Deuteronomy32:8 Khohni loh namtom a phaeng vaengah
Deuteronomy32:9 A pilnam he BOEIPA kah khoyo la om tih
Deuteronomy32:10 Anih te khosoek neh rhungnah neh khopong laipuem kho ah a hmuh. A mik dongkah thenhnaih bangla a kueinah dongah
Deuteronomy32:11 A bu dongkah a vaca te atha bangla haenghang. A phae a khong tih a phuel phoeiah
Deuteronomy32:12 Anih te BOEIPA bueng loh a mawt tih anih taengah kholong pathen loh a om puei moenih.
Deuteronomy32:13 Anih te diklai hmuensang hmuensang ah a ngol sak. Khohmuen paiso khaw a cah tih
Deuteronomy32:14 Vaito suknaeng neh boiva kah suktui nen khaw
Deuteronomy32:15 Tedae Jeshurun te tha putsut tih
Deuteronomy32:16 Amah te kholong rhoek nen khaw
Deuteronomy32:17 Rhaithae rhoek te Pathen pawt mai ah a nawn uh. A thai la aka phoe paek pathen rhoek te na pa rhoek loh a ming noek moenih. A rhih khaw a rhih uh moenih.
Deuteronomy32:18 Nang aka sa lungpang te na hmaai tih nang aka poe sak Pathen te na hnilh.
Deuteronomy32:19 BOEIPA loh a hmuh ngawn dae
Deuteronomy32:20 A cadilcahma loh calaak uh tih
Deuteronomy32:21 Pathen pawt nen khaw amih loh kai n'thatlai thil uh tih a honghi neh kai m'veet uh. Te dongah pilnam pawt nen khaw amih te ka thatlai thil vetih
Deuteronomy32:22 Ka thintoek te hmai la ka hlae vetih Saelkhui laedil la ung kangna saeh. Diklai neh a cangpai khaw ung saeh lamtah tlang yung khaw hlawp kangna saeh.
Deuteronomy32:23 Amih te kamah kah boethae thaltang neh ka khoengvoep sak vetih
Deuteronomy32:24 Khokha loh a thah vetih rhaekhmai loh a dom ni. Lucik khahing neh rhamsa no te amih taengah ka tueih pah vetih
Deuteronomy32:25 Kawtpoeng ah cunghang loh n'cakol sak vetih
Deuteronomy32:26 Amih te ka phaek saeh lamtah
Deuteronomy32:27 Thunkha kah konoinah dongah ka bakuep sak pawt akhaw a rhal hmat uh lah ve. “Mamih kut a pomsang vetih
Deuteronomy32:28 Namtom tah a cilsuep moelh tih
Deuteronomy32:29 Cueih uh koinih lungming la om uh vetih
Deuteronomy32:30 Pakhat loh thawngkhat metlam a hloem vetih
Deuteronomy32:31 Amih kah lungpang te
Deuteronomy32:32 Amih kah misur tah
Deuteronomy32:33 A misurtui tah tuihnam sue neh minta sue bangla muen.
Deuteronomy32:34 Hekah he kamah taengah ka tung pawt tih
Deuteronomy32:35 Amih kho loh a paloe tue vaengah
Deuteronomy32:36 BOEIPA loh a pilnam kah lai a tloek pah vetih
Deuteronomy32:37 Te dongah
Deuteronomy32:38 Amih kah hmueih tha aka ca tih
Deuteronomy32:39 Kai kamah tah amah moek la ka om tih
Deuteronomy32:40 Ka kut he vaan la ka phuel tih
Deuteronomy32:41 Ka cunghang te khopha bangla ka tah coeng. Ka kut dongkah laitloeknah loh pha koinih
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thaltang khaw thii ka rhuihmil sak vaengah
Deuteronomy32:43 A pilnam te namtom rhoek loh tamhoe puei saeh. A sal rhoek kah thii phu te loh vaengah
Deuteronomy32:44 Te phoeiah Moses te halo tih
Deuteronomy32:45 Moses loh Israel pum taengah hekah olka cungkuem a thui te a khah.
Deuteronomy32:46 Te phoeiah amih te
Deuteronomy32:47 He nangmih ham a hong ol pawt tih he ni na hingnah. He ol nen ni khohmuen ah hinglung a vang eh. Te te pang ham pahoi ni Jordan te na kat uh
Deuteronomy32:48 Tekah khohnin tuung dongah Moses te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Deuteronomy32:49 Jerikho imdan Moab kho kah Abarim tlang
Deuteronomy32:50 Na maya Aaron loh Hor tlang ah duek tih a pilnam taengah a khoem uh bangla nang khaw tlang la na luei tih na duek vaengah na pilnam taengla khoem uh van laeh.
Deuteronomy32:51 Zin khosoek
Deuteronomy32:52 Te dongah khohmuen te a hla lamloh na hmuh vetih Israel ca rhoek taengah ka paek khohmuen la na kun mahpawh
Deuteronomy33:1 Pathen kah hlang Moses loh a duek hlanah tahae kah yoethennah he Israel ca rhoek taengah yoethen la a paek.
Deuteronomy33:2 “BOEIPA tah Sinai lamloh halo tih Seir lamloh thoeng. Amih ham Paran tlang lamloh a sae pah tih a bantang lamloh hlangcim a thawngsang neh thoeng. Amih ham olkhan hmai a khuen.
Deuteronomy33:3 Na kut dongkah a hlangcim boeih loh pilnam a lungnah tih
Deuteronomy33:4 Jakob vangpum kah khoh la olkhueng he
Deuteronomy33:5 Jeshurun ah manghai la a om vaengah pilnam kah a lu rhoek loh Israel koca rhoek taengla tingtun uh.
Deuteronomy33:6 Reuben tah hing mai saeh lamtah duek boel saeh. Anih te hlang sii la om boel saeh.
Deuteronomy33:7 Judah kawng dongah he khaw
Deuteronomy33:8 Levi kawng dongah khaw
Deuteronomy33:9 “A manu neh a napa ka phoe pawh
Deuteronomy33:10 Nang kah laitloeknah te Jakob ham neh
Deuteronomy33:11 Aw BOEIPA anih kah a thadueng te yoethen pae lamtah
Deuteronomy33:12 Benjamin kawng dongah
Deuteronomy33:13 Joseph khawng dongah
Deuteronomy33:14 khomik dongkah cangvuei cangtham
Deuteronomy33:15 hlamat kah tlang som
Deuteronomy33:16 diklai cangtham a soeprhaep nen khaw yoethen a paek. Te dongah tangpuem khuikah aka om kolonah te
Deuteronomy33:17 A rhuepomnah vaito cacuek neh a cung ki loh pilnam neh Ephraim a thawng a sang
Deuteronomy33:18 Zebulun kawng dongah khaw
Deuteronomy33:19 Tlang kah pilnam rhoek te khue uh pahoi lamtah
Deuteronomy33:20 Gad kawng dongah khaw
Deuteronomy33:21 A tanglue te amah ham a sawt tih
Deuteronomy33:22 Dan kawng khaw
Deuteronomy33:23 Naphtali kawng dongah
Deuteronomy33:24 Asher kawng dongah khaw
Deuteronomy33:25 Thicung neh rhohum he na thohkalh la om lamtah
Deuteronomy33:26 Vaan ke a ngol thil tih
Deuteronomy33:27 Hlamat Pathen kah a khuisaek neh
Deuteronomy33:28 Te vaengah Jakob kah a mik Israel bueng ni
Deuteronomy33:29 Israel nang tah na yoethen pai. Nang kah bomkung photling neh na hoemnah cunghang
Deuteronomy34:1 Te phoeiah Moses te Moab kolken lamloh Nebo tlang
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali pum neh Ephraim kho khaw
Deuteronomy34:3 Negev neh Jerikho kolbawn vannaem kah rhophoe khopuei Zoar duela BOEIPA loh a tueng.
Deuteronomy34:4 Te phoeiah anih te BOEIPA loh
Deuteronomy34:5 Te dongah BOEIPA kah sal Moses tah BOEIPA kah olthui vanbangla Moab kho ah pahoi duek.
Deuteronomy34:6 Te dongah anih te Bethpoer kho Bethpeor imdan Moab kho kah kolrhawk ah a up uh. Tedae anih kah phuel te tihnin duela hlang loh a ming moenih.
Deuteronomy34:7 Te dongah Moses he a duek vaengah kum ya pakul lo ca coeng dae a mik khaw hmang pawt tih a thaa khaw bawt hlan.
Deuteronomy34:8 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh Moab kolken ah Moses te khohnin sawmthum a rhah uh tih Moses ham nguekcoinah
Deuteronomy34:9 Tedae Nun capa Joshua te Moses loh a kut a tloeng thil dongah cueihnah mueihla neh baetawt. Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh anih ol te a hnatun uh tih BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla a saii uh.
Deuteronomy34:10 Te dongah Moses bangla BOEIPA aka ming tih maelhmai neh maelhmai rhoi aka tong uh tonghma he Israel khuiah koep phoe pawh.
Deuteronomy34:11 Egypt kho kah Pharaoh taeng neh a sal rhoek boeih
Deuteronomy34:12 Te dongah ni a tlungluen kut boeih neh a rhimomnah boeih khaw Israel pum kah mikhmuh ah Moses loh duelhduelh a saii.
Joshua1:1 BOEIPA kah sal Moses a duek phoeiah Moses aka bong Joshua
Joshua1:2 “Ka sal Moses duek coeng. Te dongah thoo lamtah namah neh pilnam pum loh Jordan he kat lamtah kai loh Israel ca rhoek taengah ka paek khohmuen la kun lah.
Joshua1:3 Moses taengah ka thui vanbangla na khopha loh a cawt hmuen boeih te nangmih kam paek bitni.
Joshua1:4 Khosoek lamkah Lebanon tuiva puei duela
Joshua1:5 Na hingnah a tue khui boeih na hmai ah hlang loh m'pai thil thai mahpawh. Moses taengkah ka om bangla nang taengah ka om van ni. Nang te kang rhael pawt vetih nang kan hnoo mahpawh.
Joshua1:6 Amih taengah paek ham a napa rhoek taengah ka caeng tangtae khohmuen te pilnam nang loh na pang sak coeng dongah thaahuel lamtah namning sak.
Joshua1:7 Ka sal Moses loh nang ng'uen olkhueng te boeih ngaithuen tih saii hamla thaahuel lamtah nam khak ning sak. Anih taeng lamloh banvoei bantang la taengphael boeh. Te daengah ni na caeh nah takuem ah lungming la na om uh eh.
Joshua1:8 Olkhueng cabu he na ka dong lamloh na hlong mahpawh. Khoyin khothaih na thuep daengah ni a khuikah a daek bangla boeih saii ham na ngaithuen eh. Te vaengah na longpuei thaihtak vetih lungming la na om uh ni.
Joshua1:9 Nang kang uen moenih a? Thaahuel lamtah namning sak. Na caeh nah takuem ah BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang taengla a om coeng dongah na sarhing sak boeh
Joshua1:10 Te dongah pilnam kah rhoiboei rhoek te Joshua loh uen tih
Joshua1:11 “Rhaehhmuen khui la cet uh laeh. Pilnam te uen uh lamtah thui pah. Na lampu ham te sikim uh laeh. Hnin thum dongah ngawn tah Jordan te m'poeng uh pawn ni. BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang pang sak ham m'paek khohmuen te pang hamla paan uh laeh
Joshua1:12 Tedae Reuben koca
Joshua1:13 “BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh nangmih taengah n'uen olka te poek lah. Nangmih duem sak ham te BOEIPA na Pathen loh a thui tih khohmuen he nangmih taengah m'paek coeng.
Joshua1:14 Huta camoe neh na boiva tah Moses loh nangmih taengah m'paek Jordan rhalvangan kah khohmuen ah om uh mai saeh. Tedae nangmih tatthai hlangrhalh boeih long tah na manuca rhoek kah a hmai ah caem la cet uh lamtah na manuca rhoek te BOEIPA loh nangmih bangla a duem sak due amih te bom uh.
Joshua1:15 BOEIPA na Pathen loh amih a paek khohmuen te amih long khaw pang uh van saeh. Te phoeiah namih kah rho khohmuen la bal uh lamtah BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh khocuk Jordan rhalvangan ah nangmih m'paek te huul uh van
Joshua1:16 Te dongah Joshua te a doo uh tih
Joshua1:17 Moses ol te boeih ka ngai uh bangla nang ol te ka ngai uh van ni. Moses taengkah a om bangla BOEIPA na Pathen loh nang taengah om van saeh.
Joshua1:18 Nang kah olthui aka koek tih nang kah olka nan uen te pakhat kangna khaw aka hnatun pawt hlang boeih tah duek pai saeh. Tedae thaahuel lamtah namning sak
Joshua2:1 Nun capa Joshua loh hlang panit te Shittim lamloh longyam la duem a tueih tih
Joshua2:2 Te dongah
Joshua2:3 Jerikho manghai loh Rakhab te a tah tih
Joshua2:4 Tedae tekah huta hlang rhoi te a khuen tih a thuh. Te phoeiah hlang rhoi te kai taengla halo ngawn ue. Tedae amih rhoi te me lamkah rhoi nim ka ming moenih.
Joshua2:5 Khohmuep kah vongka khaih ham a om vaengah tekah hlang rhoi te cet rhoi coeng. Tekah hlang rhoi loh mela a caeh ka ming pawt dae a hnukah tlek na hloem uh atah na kae uh khaming
Joshua2:6 Tedae anih long ngawn tah amih rhoi te imphu la a yoeng puei tih imphu kah a yaan hlamik kong khuila a det.
Joshua2:7 Te dongah amih rhoi te Jordan longpuei kah lamkai due la tongpa rhoek loh a hloem uh. Amih rhoi aka hloem rhoek loh a caeh uh van neh vongka khaw tloep a khaih uh.
Joshua2:8 Tedae amih rhoi a ih hlanah Rakhab te imphu la yoeng tih tekah hlang rhoi taengah
Joshua2:9 “Khohmuen he BOEIPA loh nangmih taengah m'paek tih na mueirhih loh kaimih n'nan khaw ka ming. Te dongah diklai khosa boeih loh nangmih mikhmuh ah paci uh.
Joshua2:10 Egypt lamkah na lo uh vaengah BOEIPA loh carhaek li kah tui te na mikhmuh ah metlam a haang sak tih Jordan rhalvangan kah Amori manghai rhoi Sihon neh Oga na saii uh tih na thup uh khaw ka yaak uh.
Joshua2:11 Ka yaak uh vaengah ka thinko paci tih nangmih mikhmuh ah pakhat khaw a mueihla om voel pawh. BOEIPA na Pathen amah te tah vaan so neh diklai khuila aka om Pathen pai ni.
Joshua2:12 Te dongah BOEIPA rhang neh kai taengah olcaeng rhoi mai laeh. Nangmih taengah sitlohnah ka saii van dongah nangmih long khaw a pa imkhui ah sitlohnah hang khueh van lamtah oltak la kai taengah miknoek m'pae lah.
Joshua2:13 A nu neh a pa khaw
Joshua2:14 Te dongah hlang loh anih te
Joshua2:15 Te dongah amih rhoi te bangbuet lamloh rhuivaeh neh a hlak. Anih im te khopuei vongtung pangbueng kaep ah om tih amah khaw vongtung kaepah kho a sak.
Joshua2:16 Te phoeiah amih rhoi te
Joshua2:17 Te dongah hlang rhoi loh anih te
Joshua2:18 Kho khuila kaimih ka kun uh atah ngaiuepnah rhui a lingdik he kaimih nan hlak nah bangbuet ah khit lamtah na nu na pa khaw
Joshua2:19 Te vaengah na im thohkhaih lamloh tollong la aka coe boeih te tah amah thii te amah lu dongla kap vetih kaimih tah ka ommongsitoe uh ni. Tedae im khuiah namah taengla aka om khat khat te ni kut a hlah thil oeh atah a thii te kaimih lu dongla tla saeh.
Joshua2:20 Tedae mamih kah olka he na doek atah mamih taengah na toem na ngam na olhlo lamloh ommongsitoe la ka om uh van ni
Joshua2:21 Huta long khaw
Joshua2:22 Te dongah cet rhoi tih tlang la pawk rhoi. Amih aka hloem rhoek halo hlan khuiah teah te hnin thum kho a sak rhoi. Aka hloem rhoek loh longpuei tom ah a tlap uh dae hmu uh pawh.
Joshua2:23 Te phoeiah hlang rhoi te bal rhoi. Tlang lamloh suntla tih rhaelrham rhoi. Tedae Nun capa Joshua taengla a pawk rhoi vaengah amih taengkah a hmuh rhoi te boeih a thui pah rhoi.
Joshua2:24 Joshua taengah
Joshua3:1 Te dongah Joshua khaw mincang ah thoo. Shittim lamloh hlah uh tih amah neh Israel ca rhoek boeih loh Jordan la puen uh. Tedae a kat uh hlanah pahoi rhaeh uh.
Joshua3:2 Hnin thum a thok phoeiah tah
Joshua3:3 Te vaengah pilnam te a uen uh tih
Joshua3:4 Tedae anih neh nangmih laklo ah lakhla la om saeh. Te vaengah anih laklo kah a sen dong thawngkhat tluk tah anih taengla na yoei uh mahpawh. Te daengah ni hlaemhlavai na pongpa nah noek pawh longpuei te anih rhang neh na cet uh vetih longpuei na ming uh eh
Joshua3:5 Te phoeiah pilnam te Joshua loh
Joshua3:6 Khosoih rhoek te khaw Joshua loh a uen tih
Joshua3:7 Te vaengah Joshua te BOEIPA loh
Joshua3:8 Paipi thingkawng aka kawt khosoih rhoek te namah loh uen lamtah thui pah. Jordan tui kaeng te na pha uh vaengah Jordan ah pai uh dae
Joshua3:9 Te dongah Joshua loh Israel ca rhoek te
Joshua3:10 Te phoeiah Joshua loh
Joshua3:11 Diklai pum kah Boeipa paipi thingkawng tah nangmih mikhmuh ah Jordan la kat coeng ke.
Joshua3:12 Te dongah Israel koca lamloh hlang hlai nit te namamih ham tuek uh laeh. Koca pakhat lamloh hlang pakhat
Joshua3:13 Te vaengah ana om bitni
Joshua3:14 Te dongah pilnam rhoek khaw Jordan kat hamla dap lamloh hlah uh tih khosoih rhoek loh pilnam kah mikhmuh ah paipi thingkawng te a koh uh.
Joshua3:15 Thingkawng aka kawt rhoek loh Jordan te a pha uh coeng. Te phoeiah thingkawng aka kawt khosoih kho te tui kaeng ah a nuem uh. Te dongah Jordan te cangah tue puet tuikaeng tom la li.
Joshua3:16 Te vaengah a so lamkah aka long tui te pai tih som pakhat aka pai te Zarethan kaep kah Adam khopuei due khawk li phai. Lungkaeh tuitunli la aka om Arabah tuili la aka long rhoek khaw boeih a phih uh dongah pilnam loh Jerikho imdan ah kat uh phai.
Joshua3:17 Te vaengah BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng aka kawt khosoih rhoek tah Jordan laklung kah lanhak dongah khak pai uh tih Jordan aka kat ham namtu te boeih a soep uh duela Israel pum tah lanhak dong longah a lan uh.
Joshua4:1 Jordan aka kat namtom boeih loh a soep la a om van vaeng daengah Joshua te BOEIPA loh a voek tih
Joshua4:2 “Pilnam lamkah te namamih ham hlang hlai nit tuek laeh. Koca khat lamloh hlang pakhat
Joshua4:3 Te phoeiah amih te uen lamtah thui pah. Jordan tuilung
Joshua4:4 Te dongah Joshua loh hlang hlai nit te a khue. Te te koca pakhat lamkah hlang pakhat
Joshua4:5 Te phoeiah amih te Joshua loh
Joshua4:6 Te daengah ni miknoek he nangmih khui ah a om eh. Thangvuen ah na ca rhoek loh nangmih te n'dawt tih
Joshua4:7 Te vaengah amih taengah
Joshua4:8 Te dongah Joshua loh a uen vanbangla Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh. BOEIPA loh Joshua taengkah a thui bangla Jordan tuilung lamkah lungto hlai nit te Israel ca rhoek kah koca tarhing la a koh uh tih rhaehim te a paan puei phoeiah a khueh uh.
Joshua4:9 Te dongah paipi thingkawng aka kawt khosoih kho kah rhaltawt hmuen
Joshua4:10 Pilnam taengah Joshua loh thui hamla BOEIPA loh a uen hno te Joshua taengah Moses loh boeih a uen vanbangla boeih a coeng due thingkawng aka kawt khosoih rhoek khaw Jordan tuilung ah pai uh. Te vaengah pilnam long khaw baang kat uh van.
Joshua4:11 Aka kat ham koi pilnam loh boeih a soep van neh BOEIPA thingkawng neh khosoih rhoek khaw pilnam kah mikhmuh ah kat phai van.
Joshua4:12 Reuben koca rhoek
Joshua4:13 Jerikho kolken ah caemtloek ham thawng sawmli tluk loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pumcum uh tih caempuei la khoong uh.
Joshua4:14 Te khohnin ah BOEIPA loh Joshua te Israel pum kah mikhmuh ah a pomsang tih a hing tue khuiah Moses a rhih uh bangla anih khaw a rhih uh.
Joshua4:15 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Joshua te a voek tih
Joshua4:16 “Olphong thingkawng aka kawt khosoih rhoek te uen lamtah Jordan lamkah ha luei uh saeh
Joshua4:17 Te dongah Joshua loh khosoih rhoek te a uen tih
Joshua4:18 Te dongah BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng aka kawt khosoih rhoek loh Jordan tuilung lamkah ha luei la ha luei uh. Tedae khosoih rhoek kah a khopha loh lanhak la a cawt van neh Jordan tui khaw amah hmuen la bal tih hlaem hlavai kah bangla tuikaeng tom ah khawk li.
Joshua4:19 Te dongah pilnam loh Jordan lamkah ha luei uh tih a hla khat dongkah a hnin rha vaengah tah Jerikho khocuk rhi kah Gilgal ah rhaeh uh.
Joshua4:20 Te vaengah Jordan lamkah a khuen uh lungto hlai nit te Joshua loh Gilgal ah a ling.
Joshua4:21 Israel ca rhoek te khaw a voek tih
Joshua4:22 na ca rhoek te khaw tukkil uh lamtah
Joshua4:23 Na Pathen BOEIPA loh carhaek tuipuei kah a saii bangla na poeng hil na mikhmuh kah Jordan tui te na Pathen BOEIPA loh a kak sak. Te te mamih loh m'poeng hil mamih mikhmuh ah a rhae sak.
Joshua4:24 BOEIPA kah tlungluen kut te diklai pilnam rhoek loh boeih ming uh kangna saeh. Te daengah ni na hing tue khui boeih ah BOEIPA na Pathen te na rhih eh
Joshua5:1 Amih a kat khuiah BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh lamkah Jordan tui a haang sak te Jordan khotlak rhalvangan kah Amori manghai boeih neh tuitunli phaikah Kanaan manghai rhoek boeih loh a yaak uh vaengah a thinko paci uh tih Israel ca rhoek kah mikhmuh ah ta a khuikah mueihla om voel pawh.
Joshua5:2 Te tue ah Joshua te BOEIPA loh
Joshua5:3 Te dongah Joshua amah loh lungpang cunghang a saii tih Israel ca rhoek kah yahhmui te Haaraloth som ah a rhet pah.
Joshua5:4 Joshua loh yahhmui a rhet pah kawng te he tlam he om. Egypt lamkah aka hlah uh pilnam boeih neh caemtloek hlang boeih
Joshua5:5 Pilnam aka pawk boeih te yahhmui rhet la om ngawn coeng dae Egypt lamkah ha hlah uh tih longpueng khosoek kah aka thaang pilnam boeih tah yahhmui rhet uh pawh.
Joshua5:6 BOEIPA ol te a yaak uh pawt dongah Egypt lamkah aka lo caemtloek hlang kah namtu boeih loh a mitmoeng duela Israel ca rhoek loh khosoek ah kum likip poengdoe uh. Te dongah Tekah khohmuen amih tueng voel pawt ham ni BOEIPA loh amih te a tap. Suktui neh khoitui aka long khohmuen te mamih taengah paek hamla a napa rhoek taengah BOEIPA loh a caeng dae.
Joshua5:7 Amih yueng la aka poe a ca rhoek te tah longpueng ah yahhmui a rhet uh pawt dongah pumdul la aka om rhoek te Joshua loh yahhmui a rhet pah.
Joshua5:8 Yahhmui rhet te namtom boeih loh a coeng uh van neh a saibawn due rhaehhmuen ah om uh.
Joshua5:9 Joshua te khaw BOEIPA loh
Joshua5:10 Israel ca rhoek loh Gilgal ah a rhaeh uh vaengkah hlasae hnin hlai li hlaem ah Yoom te Jerikho kolken ah a saii uh.
Joshua5:11 Yoom vuen ah khohmuen cangrhuem
Joshua5:12 Khohmuen cangrhuem a caak uh vuen ah manna khaw duem van coeng. Te dongah Israel ca rhoek ham manna om voel pawt dae tekah kum dongah tah Kanaan kah khohmuen cangthaih ni a caak uh coeng.
Joshua5:13 Jerikho kho ah Joshua loh a om vaengah a dan van dae a hmai ah hlang pakhat pai tih a kut neh cunghang a yueh te lawt a hmuh. Te dongah anih te Joshua loh a paan tih
Joshua5:14 Te vaengah
Joshua5:15 Te dongah BOEIPA kah caempuei mangpa loh Joshua te
Joshua6:1 Jerikho ngawn Israel ca rhoek loh a tlaeng la a tlaeng aka voei aka bal khaw om voel pawh.
Joshua6:2 Te vaengah Joshua te BOEIPA loh
Joshua6:3 Te dongah caemtloek hlang boeih loh khopuei ke hil uh lamtah khopuei te voei khat vael uh. Te tlam te hnin rhuk khuiah saii.
Joshua6:4 Te vaengah khosoih parhih loh jubilee tuki parhih te thingkawng hmai ah khawt uh saeh. Tedae a hnin rhih dongkah khopuei voei rhih vael uh vaengah tuki te khosoih rhoek loh ueng uh saeh.
Joshua6:5 Jubilee ki a ueng vetih tuki ol na yaak na yaak uh vaengah pilnam boeih te tamlung neh bungbung yuhui uh saeh. Te vaengah khopuei vongtung te cungku vetih pilnam te tluektluek cet uh bitni
Joshua6:6 Te dongah Nun capa Joshua loh khosoih rhoek te a khue tih
Joshua6:7 Te phoeiah pilnam te
Joshua6:8 Joshua loh pilnam te a uen phoei van atah jubilee tuki parhih aka kawt khosoih loh BOEIPA hmai la khong uh tih tuki te a ueng uh. Te phoeiah BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng hnuk te a vai uh.
Joshua6:9 Aka pumcum tangtae ngawn tah lamhma la khong uh. Tuki aka ueng khosoih rhoek khaw thingkawng hnukah vai hamla rhutrhut cet uh tih tuki te a ueng uh.
Joshua6:10 Tedae pilnam te Joshua loh a uen tih
Joshua6:11 Te dongah BOEIPA kah thingkawng te a hil puei tih khopuei te voei khat a vael phoeiah rhaehhmuen a paan uh tih rhaehhmuen ah rhaeh uh
Joshua6:12 Joshua te mincang ah thoo bal tih BOEIPA kah thingkawng khosoih rhoek te a khuen.
Joshua6:13 Te vaengah jubilee tuki parhih aka kawt khosoih parhih te BOEIPA kah thingkawng hmai ah cet cet uh tih
Joshua6:14 A pabae khohnin ah khaw khopuei te voei khat a hil uh bal tih rhaehhmuen la bal uh. Te tlam te hnin rhuk a saii uh.
Joshua6:15 A hnin rhih dongkah mincang a pha vaengah thoo uh tih khopuei te voei rhih a tiktamnah hil a hil uh. Tekah khohnin dongah ni khopuei te voei rhih dawk a hil uh.
Joshua6:16 A voei rhih dongah tah khosoih rhoek loh tuki te a ueng uh. Te vaengah pilnam te Joshua loh
Joshua6:17 Te vaengah khopuei neh a khuikah aka om boeih te BOEIPA taengah yaehtaboeih la boeih om. Tedae pumyoi Rakhab longtah puencawn rhoi te a thuh tih a tueih dongah amah neh a im kah boeih tah hing uh saeh.
Joshua6:18 Tedae yaehtaboeih te tah nangmih loh ngaithuen uh. Yaehtaboeih te loh ham na yakvawt uh koinih Israel kah rhaehhmuen te yaehtaboeih la na khueh uh vetih na lawn uh ve.
Joshua6:19 Cak neh sui khaw
Joshua6:20 Te dongah pilnam loh a yuhui vaengah tuki te a ueng uh. Tuki ol te pilnam loh a yaak vaengah pilnam loh tamlung neh a bukbuk yuhui uh. Te vaengah vongtung te a dang lamkah loh cungku. Te dongah pilnam loh khopuei khuila tluek tluek boeih kun uh tih khopuei te a buem uh.
Joshua6:21 Te vaengah khopuei khuikah huta
Joshua6:22 Te vaengah khohmuen aka hip hlang panit taengah Joshua loh
Joshua6:23 Te dongah cadong longyam rhoi te cet rhoi tih Rakhab neh a manu a napa khaw
Joshua6:24 Khopuei neh a khuikah aka om boeih te hmai neh a hoeh uh. Tedae cak neh sui khaw
Joshua6:25 Tedae pumyoi Rakhab neh a napa cako neh anih taengkah aka om boeih tah boeih ngawn tah Jerikho hip ham Joshua kah a tueih puencawn rhoi te a thuh dongah Joshua loh a hlun tih tihnin due Israel lakli ah kho a sak.
Joshua6:26 Te vaeng tue ah Joshua loh a toemngam tih
Joshua6:27 BOEIPA loh Joshua taengah a om van dongah kho takuem ah a mingthangnah khaw om.
Joshua7:1 Tedae Israel ca rhoek te yaehtaboeih dongah boekoeknah la boe a koek uh. Judah koca khuikah Zerah kah a ca Zabdi ko Karmee capa Akhan loh yaehtaboeih la aka om te a loh. Te dongah BOEIPA kah a thintoek loh Israel ca rhoek taengah sai.
Joshua7:2 Te vaengah Jerikho lamkah hlang rhoek te Bethel khothoeng Bethaven kaepkah aka om Ai la Joshua loh tueih tih
Joshua7:3 Joshua taengla a mael uh vaengah tah
Joshua7:4 Te dongah pilnam khui lamkah hlang thawng thum tluk tah cet uh van dae Ai hlang rhoek mikhmuh ah rhaelrham uh.
Joshua7:5 Amih khui lamkah hlang sawmthum parhuk tluk te Ai hlang rhoek loh a ngawn. Amih te vongka hmai lamloh Shebarim duela a hloem uh tih singling ah a tloek vaengah pilnam tah a thinko paci tih tui bangla om uh.
Joshua7:6 Te dongah Joshua loh a himbai te a phen tih a BOEIPA kah thingkawng hmai ah kholaeh due a maelhmai neh diklai la bakop. Amah neh Israel a hamca rhoek long khaw a lu dongah laipi a poep uh.
Joshua7:7 Te vaengah Joshua loh
Joshua7:8 Aw Boeipa Israel loh a thunkha rhoek kah mikhmuh ah a rhawn a maelh te balae ka ti eh.
Joshua7:9 Kanaan neh khohmuen kah khosa boeih loh ya koinih kaimih he m'vael uh vetih kaimih ming he diklai lamkah a hnawt uh ni ta. Te vaengah na boeilen ming te metlam na saii eh?
Joshua7:10 Te dongah Joshua te BOEIPA loh
Joshua7:11 Israel he tholh tih ka paipi khaw a poe. Amih te ka uen lalah yaehtaboeih te a loh uh bal tih a huen uh bal. Te lalah khaw basa uh tih amamih kah hnopai khuiah a khueh uh bal.
Joshua7:12 Israel ca rhoek he a thunkha rhoek mikhmuh ah pai thai mahpawh. Yaehtaboeih la a om uh dongah a thunkha kah mikhmuh ah khaw a rhawn ni hikhik a hooi uh eh. Na khui lamkah yaehtaboeih te na khoe uh pawt atah nangmih taengah om hamla ka coeng thai voel moenih.
Joshua7:13 Thoo lamtah pilnam ke ciim laeh. Te vaengah
Joshua7:14 Te dongah mincang ah namamih koca rhoek loh ha capit uh laeh. BOEIPA loh a buem koca long tah amah huiko neh ha pawk uh saeh. BOEIPA loh a buem huiko long tah a imkhuikho neh ha pawk uh saeh. BOEIPA loh a buem imkhuikho long khaw a hlang rhoek neh ha pawk saeh.
Joshua7:15 Yaehtaboeih aka buem tah ana om saeh
Joshua7:16 Mincang a thoh vaengah Joshua taengla Israel koca rhoek loh ha capit uh tih Judah koca te a tuuk.
Joshua7:17 Judah kah a hui a ko ha pawk vaengah Zarkhii kah a huiko te a tuuk. Zarkhii huiko khuikah hlang la a pawk dongah Zabdi te a tuuk.
Joshua7:18 Anih imkhui kah hlang la a pawk dongah Judah koca Zerah ko Zabdi kah a ca Karmee capa Akhan te a tuuk.
Joshua7:19 Te dongah Akhan te Joshua loh
Joshua7:20 Te vaengah Akhan loh Joshua te a doo tih
Joshua7:21 Kutbuem te ka sawt tih ka hmuh vaengah Shinar himbai then yungat
Joshua7:22 Te dongah Joshua loh puencawn rhoek te a tueih tih dap la a yong uh vaengah tah dap khuiah a thuh tih a laedil ah cak ana om tangloeng.
Joshua7:23 Te dongah amih te dap khui lamkah a loh uh tih Joshua neh Israel ca rhoek taengla boeih a khuen uh. Te phoeiah BOEIPA hmai ah a rha uh.
Joshua7:24 Te phoeiah Zerah capa Akhan neh cak khaw
Joshua7:25 Te phoeiah Joshua loh
Joshua7:26 Te dongah anih sokah a kuk lungkuk te tihnin duela muep om pueng. Tedae BOEIPA thintoek thinsa a sah coeng dongah tekah a hmuen ming khaw tihnin due Akor kol la a khue.
Joshua8:1 Joshua te BOEIPA loh
Joshua8:2 Te dongah Ai neh a manghai te Jerikho neh a manghai na saii bangla saii bal. A kutbuem neh a rhamsa te namamih ham poelyoe uh. Khopuei kah a hael ah namah kah rhongngol te khueh
Joshua8:3 Te dongah Joshua neh caemtloek pilnam boeih loh Ai te tloek ham thoo uh. Te vaengah Joshua loh tatthai hlangrhalh hlang thawng sawmthum te a coelh tih khoyin ah a tueih.
Joshua8:4 Te phoeiah amih te a uen tih
Joshua8:5 Kamah khaw kamah taengkah pilnam boeih long khaw khopuei ke m'paan uh pawn ni. Lamhma kah bangla mamih aka mah ham ha moe uh atah amih mikhmuh ah n'rhaelrham uh ni.
Joshua8:6 Te vaengah khopuei lamkah mamih n'cing duela mamih hnuk han hloem uh saeh lamtah amih mikhmuh kah n'rhaelrham uh vaengah lamhma kah vanbangla
Joshua8:7 Te vaengah nangmih loh rhongngol kung lamkah thoo uh lamtah khopuei te huul uh. BOEIPA na Pathen loh na kut dongah han tloeng bitni.
Joshua8:8 Ana om saeh
Joshua8:9 Te dongah Joshua kah a tueih rhoek te rhong la cet uh tih Ai khotlak kah Ai neh Bethel laklo ah ngol uh. Tedae tekah hlaem ah Joshua tah pilnam lakli ah rhaeh van.
Joshua8:10 Joshua khaw mincang ah thoo tih pilnam te a soep. Te phoeiah mah neh Israel a hamca rhoek tah Ai pilnam mikhmuh ah cet.
Joshua8:11 Pilnam caemtloek boeih loh a taengah cet uh tih thoeih uh. Khopuei hmai a pha uh vaengah Ai tlangpuei kolrhawk laklo
Joshua8:12 Te phoeiah hlang thawng nga tluk a khuen tih khopuei khotlak Bethel neh Ai laklo ah amih te rhongngol la a khueh.
Joshua8:13 Pilnam te khopuei tlangpuei rhaehhmuen boeih neh khopuei tuitun ah hnukdawn la tluep a khueh Joshua loh khoyin ah kol la cet.
Joshua8:14 Tedae Ai manghai loh a hmuh vaengah khopuei tongpa rhoek te baang thoo tih Israel mah ham caem la cet uh. A pilnam pum loh Arabah hmai kah tingtunnah ah om uh dae khopuei kah a hael ah a rhongngol thil te ming pawh.
Joshua8:15 Amih mikhmuh ah Joshua neh Israel pum loh kolong uh tih khosoek long la rhaelrham uh.
Joshua8:16 Te dongah amih hloem ham Ai khopuei kah pilnam pum te a hueh tih Joshua hnuk a hloem uh dongah khopuei lamloh bang cing uh.
Joshua8:17 Israel hnuk aka hloem mueh hlang te Ai neh Bethel ah om pawh. Khopuei te a ah oem la a hnoo uh tih Israel te a hloem uh.
Joshua8:18 BOEIPA loh Joshua taengah
Joshua8:19 Te dongah rhongngol loh amah hmuen lamkah koe thoo tih a yong uh vaengah a kut te a phuel pah. Te vaengah khopuei la kun uh tih a buem uh. Khopuei te khaw hmai neh kuelh a hlup uh.
Joshua8:20 Ai kah hlang rhoek loh a hnuk la mael uh tih a hmuh uh vaengah khopuei kah hmaikhu loh vaan la tarha luei hang coeng. Tedae heben hebang la rhaelrham ham khaw a hmuen om voel pawt tih khosoek la aka rhaelrham pilnam long khaw a khuplet la han hloem coeng.
Joshua8:21 Rhongngol loh khopuei a buem tih khopuei kah hmaikhu a luei te Joshua neh Israel pum loh a hmuh vaengah Ai kah hlang rhoek te kuplet a tloek uh.
Joshua8:22 Amih mah ham khopuei lamkah aka coe rhoek te khaw he ben he bang la Israel loh a laklung ah a om sak uh. Te dongah amih te amah taengah rhaengnaeng neh hlangyong paih mueh la a ngawn uh.
Joshua8:23 Tedae Ai manghai te a hing la a tuuk uh tih Joshua taengla a khuen uh.
Joshua8:24 Ai kah khosa boeih te Israel loh a ngawn tih a khah sak phoeiah te khosoek lohma kah te khaw a hloem uh tih cunghang ha neh boeih a cungku sak uh. Amih te a cing phoeiah Israel tah boeih mael uh tih Ai te cunghang ha neh a tloek uh.
Joshua8:25 Tekah khohnin ah Ai kah hlang boeih tongpa lamloh huta hil thawng hlai nit la boeih cungku uh.
Joshua8:26 Ai kah khosa rhoek te boeih a thup hlan khuiah Joshua loh a kut a yueh mueh la soe neh a nuen.
Joshua8:27 Tedae khopuei kah rhamsa neh a kutbuem tah BOEIPA loh Joshua a uen olka vanbangla Israel loh amamih ham a poelyoe uh.
Joshua8:28 Te phoeiah Ai te Joshua loh a hoeh tih tihnin due
Joshua8:29 Ai manghai te khaw kholaeh tue due thing dongah a kuiok sak uh. Khomik a tlak vaengah tah Joshua loh a uen vanbangla thing dongkah a rhok te a hlak uh tih khopuei vongka kah thohka ah a voeih uh. Anih sokah lungto
Joshua8:30 Te vaengah Joshua loh Israel Pathen BOEIPA kah hmueihtuk te Ebal tlang ah a suem.
Joshua8:31 BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh Israel ca rhoek a uen tih Moses kah olkhueng cabu dongah a daek vanbangla
Joshua8:32 Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek kah mikhmuh ah a daek Moses olkhueng te rhaepnit la lungto dongah pahoi a daek.
Joshua8:33 Te vaengah Israel pum neh a hamca rhoek khaw
Joshua8:34 Te phoeiah olkhueng cabu khui ah boeih a daek vanbangla yoethennah neh rhunkhuennah olkhueng ol te boeih a hoe.
Joshua8:35 Moses kah a uen olka dongah aka om pawt boeih te tah Joshua loh Israel hlangping pum neh huta camoe taengah khaw
Joshua9:1 Jordan khotlak
Joshua9:2 Te dongah Joshua vahthoh thil ham neh Israel te ol thikat thil tun coi uh thae.
Joshua9:3 Tedae Gibeon khosa rhoek long khaw Joshua loh Jerikho neh Ai taengah a saii te a yaak.
Joshua9:4 Te dongah amih te taengnah neh a saii uh tih cet uh. Te phoeiah sayuep bangla a laak dongah tolkhui a rhuem
Joshua9:5 A kho dongkah khokhom rhuem tih tairhi coeng. A pum dongkah himbai khaw rhuem coeng tih a buham buh boeih rhae tih a ap om coeng.
Joshua9:6 Gilgal rhaehhmuen kah Joshua taengla a pha uh vaengah tah Joshua taeng neh Israel hlang rhoek taengah
Joshua9:7 Tedae Israel hlang rhoek loh Khivee te a doo tih
Joshua9:8 Joshua taengah khaw
Joshua9:9 Te vaengah anih te
Joshua9:10 Te dongah Jordan rhalvang kah Amori manghai rhoi
Joshua9:11 Te dongah kaimih kah a hamca rhoek neh ka khohmuen kah khosa boeih loh kaimih he ng'uen uh tih
Joshua9:12 Nangmih taengla lo ham ka hlah uh hnin ah ka im kah buh bae kan cun uh dae tahae ah daeh tih a ap om coeng he.
Joshua9:13 Tuitang he khaw misur a thai ni ka loei uh dae vik ueth coeng he. Ka himbai neh ka khokhom longpueng te set puet ah hmawn boeih coeng
Joshua9:14 Te vaengah BOEIPA yilka a dawt uh mueh la amih kah buhcun te a hlang rhoek loh a paco uh.
Joshua9:15 Te dongah Joshua loh amih neh rhoepnah a saii tih amih hing sak ham paipi khaw a saii. Khoboei rhaengpuei long khaw amih taengah ol a caeng uh.
Joshua9:16 Tedae amih neh moi a boh uh phoeikah hnin thum dongah amih te a kaepvai neh a yoei kah khosa rhoek ni tila a yaak uh.
Joshua9:17 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh cet uh tih a hnin thum dongah tah amih kah khopuei la pawk uh. Te vaengah amih kah khopuei la Gibeon
Joshua9:18 Israel Pathen BOEIPA rhang neh khoboei rhaengpuei loh amih taengah a toemngam coeng dongah Israel ca rhoek loh amih te tloek uh van pawh. Te dongah khoboei rhoek te rhaengpuei loh boeih a rhaeba tak.
Joshua9:19 Te dongah rhaengpuei boeih taengah khoboei rhoek boeih loh
Joshua9:20 Amih te hing sak ham he n'saii uh van daengah ni amih taengah n'toemngam uh olhlo loh mamih soah thinhul bat la a om pawt eh
Joshua9:21 Te dongah amih te
Joshua9:22 Te dongah Joshua loh amih te a khue tih a voek. Amih te
Joshua9:23 Te dongah nangmih tah thaephoei thil la om vetih na khui lamkah sal pataeng lohnaa mueh la ka Pathen im ham thing top neh tui than la om laeh
Joshua9:24 Te dongah Joshua te a doo uh tih
Joshua9:25 Tedae kaimih he na kut dongah ka om uh. Kaimih taengah na saii ham tueng tah na mikhmuh ah then tih thuem na ti bangla saii mai
Joshua9:26 Te tlam te amih a saii van tih amih te Israel ca kut lamloh a huul coeng dongah amih te ngawn uh pawh.
Joshua9:27 Te vaeng khohnin ah amih te tihnin duela rhaengpuei neh a hmuen tuek ah BOEIPA hmueihtuk ham thing top neh tui than la Joshua loh a khueh.
Joshua10:1 Joshua loh Ai a buem vaengah Jerikho neh Jerikho manghai taengkah a saii bangla Ai neh Ai manghai taengah a saii tih a thup te khaw
Joshua10:2 Ram kah khopuei rhoek khuiah Gibeon tah pakhat nah khopuei bangla len. Ai lakah a len dongah tongpa hlangrhalh boeih long pataeng mat a rhih uh.
Joshua10:3 Te dongah Jerusalem manghai Adonizedek loh Hebron manghai Hoham
Joshua10:4 Te vaengah
Joshua10:5 Te dongah Amori kah manghai panga neh Jerusalem manghai
Joshua10:6 Te vaengah Gibeon kah hlang rhoek te Gilgal rhaehhmuen kah Joshua taengla a tueih uh tih
Joshua10:7 Te dongah Joshua amah neh amah taengkah caemtloek pilnam boeih
Joshua10:8 Tedae BOEIPA loh Joshua taengah
Joshua10:9 Gilgal lamkah khoyin khing a caeh puei vaengah Joshua loh amih taengla buengrhuet pawk.
Joshua10:10 Amih te Israel mikhmuh ah BOEIPA loh a khawkkhek tih Gibeon ah hmasoe len neh a tloek uh. Te phoeiah amih te Bethhoron tangkham long ah a hloem tih Azekah neh Makkedah duela a tloek.
Joshua10:11 Amih khaw Israel mikhmuh lamloh Bethhoron singling ah rhaelrham uh. Tedae amih te BOEIPA loh Azekah duela vaan lamkah lungcang len neh a lun thil. Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh cunghang neh a ngawn lakah lungcang rhael dongah aka duek te muep duek uh ngai.
Joshua10:12 Te dongah Joshua loh BOEIPA te a voek tih
Joshua10:13 Te dongah a thunkha namtom te phu a loh hil khomik loh duem tih hla khaw uelh. Jashar cabu dongah khaw
Joshua10:14 A mikhmuh ah tekah khohnin bang neh BOEIPA loh hlang ol a hnatun tih Israel ham aka vathoh BOEIPA he a om noek moenih.
Joshua10:15 Te phoeiah Joshua neh Israel pum loh te Gilgal kah rhaehhmuen la bal uh.
Joshua10:16 Te vaengah manghai panga te rhaelrham uh tih Makkedah kah lungko khuiah thuh uh.
Joshua10:17 Tedae Joshua taengah a puen pa tih
Joshua10:18 Te dongah Joshua loh
Joshua10:19 Tedae nangmih loh na thunkha hnuk na hloem uh te toeng uh mueh la amih te tloek uh. Amih te nangmih kut dongah BOEIPA na Pathen loh han tloeng coeng dongah a khopuei la kun sak ham amih te hlah uh boeh
Joshua10:20 Joshua neh Israel ca rhoek loh amih te bawt a tloek vaengah hmasoe len muep om tih dalh milh uh. Tedae amih khuiah aka coe tih rhaengnaeng rhoek tah khopuei hmuencak la pawk uh.
Joshua10:21 Te dongah pilnam pum loh Makkedah rhaehhmuen kah Joshua taengah sading la mael uh. A hmui a lai loh Israel ca rhoek hlang pakhat khaw hlavawt pawh.
Joshua10:22 Te vaengah Joshua loh lungko kah a rhai te ong uh lamtah lungko khui lamkah manghai panga te kai taengla hang khuen uh
Joshua10:23 Te dongah lungko khui kah manghai panga la Jerusalem manghai
Joshua10:24 Manghai rhoek te Joshua taengla a khuen uh vaengah Israel hlang boeih te Joshua loh a khue tih anih taengla aka pawk caemtloek hlang kah rhalboei rhoek taengah
Joshua10:25 Te phoeiah amih te Joshua loh
Joshua10:26 Amih te khaw Joshua loh a tloek tih a duek sak. Thing panga dongah a kuiok sak tih kholaeh due thing dongah dingkoei uh.
Joshua10:27 Khotlak tue a lo vaengah Joshua loh a uen tih amih te thing dong lamloh a hlak uh. Amih te a thuh nah uh lungko khuiah pahoi a voeih uh tih lungko rhai kah lungnu a kuk uh te tihnin due hnorhuh la om pueng.
Joshua10:28 Tekah khohnin dongah Joshua loh Makkedah te a loh tih cunghang ha neh a ngawn. A manghai neh a khuikah hinglu boeih te khaw a thup pah tih rhaengnaeng khaw paih pawh. Jerikho manghai taengkah a saii bangla Makkedah manghai taengah khaw a saii.
Joshua10:29 Te phoeiah Joshua neh Israel pum te Makkedah lamloh Libnah la kat uh tih Libnah te a vathoh thil uh.
Joshua10:30 Libnah te khaw BOEIPA loh Israel kut ah a paek. Te dongah a manghai te cunghang ha neh a ngawn tih a khuikah hinglu boeih te rhaengnaeng khaw hlun pawh. Te vaengah Jerikho manghai taengkah a saii bangla a manghai taengah khaw a saii.
Joshua10:31 Te phoeiah Joshua neh Israel pum loh Libnah lamkah Lakhish la thoeih tih vathoh thil
Joshua10:32 Lakhish te khaw Israel kut dongah BOEIPA loh a paek. A hnin bae dongah te te a buem thai tih cunghang ha neh a tloek. A khuikah hinglu boeih te khaw Libnah bangla boeih a saii.
Joshua10:33 Te vaengah Lakhish te bom ham Gezer manghai Horam te cet. Tedae anih khaw Joshua neh a pilnam loh rhaengnaeng a sueng pawt hil a tloek.
Joshua10:34 Te phoeiah Joshua neh Israel pum te Lakhish lamkah Eglon la thoih uh tih vathoh thil hamla a rhaeh thil uh.
Joshua10:35 Amah khohnin ah Eglon te a buem uh tih cunghang ha neh a ngawn uh. A khuikah hinglu boeih te khaw amah khohnin ah Lakhish a saii bangla boeih a thup.
Joshua10:36 Te phoeiah Joshua neh Israel pum tah Eglon lamloh Hebron la cet tih a tloek uh.
Joshua10:37 Te te a buem uh vaengah a manghai neh a khopuei boeih
Joshua10:38 Te phoeiah Joshua neh Israel pum te Debir la bal tih a vathoh thil uh.
Joshua10:39 Debir a buem vaengah khaw a manghai neh a khopuei boeih te cunghang ha neh a ngawn uh. Hebron a saii bangla Debir khaw a saii tih rhaengnaeng om mueh la a khuikah hinglu boeih te a thup uh. Libnah neh Libnah manghai taengkah a saii bangla Debir manghai taengah khaw a saii.
Joshua10:40 Te dongah Israel Pathen BOEIPA kah a uen vanbangla Joshua loh tlang paengpang boeih neh Negev khaw
Joshua10:41 Te phoeiah Joshua loh Kadeshbarnea lamloh Gaza due
Joshua10:42 Tedae Israel ham te Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh a vathoh pah dongah ni te rhoek kah manghai rhoek neh a khohmuen te Joshua loh voei khat la boeih a buem thai.
Joshua10:43 Te daengah Joshua neh Israel pum tah Gilgal kah rhaehhmuen la bal uh.
Joshua11:1 Hazor manghai Jabin loh a yaak vaengah Madon manghai Jobab
Joshua11:2 tlangpuei tlang neh Kinnereth tuithim kolken kah manghai rhoek te khaw
Joshua11:3 Khocuk khotlak kah Kanaan neh Amori
Joshua11:4 Te dongah amih te a lambong boeih neh pilnam loh tuipuei tuikaeng kah laivin bangla muep ha pawk uh tih a marhang khaw khawk
Joshua11:5 Tekah manghai rhoek loh boeih tuentah uh thae tih ha suntla uh. Te phoeiah Israel tloek ham Merom kah tui taengah tun rhaeh uh.
Joshua11:6 Tedae BOEIPA loh Joshua taengah
Joshua11:7 Te dongah Joshua amah neh caemtloek pilnam boeih loh Merom tui taengah thaeng cet tih amih te a tloek uh.
Joshua11:8 Te vaengah amih te BOEIPA loh Israel kut dongla a tloeng. Te dongah amih te a tloek uh tih Sidon puei
Joshua11:9 BOEIPA loh a uen vanbangla Joshua loh amih taengah a saii. A marhang khaw a haih pah tih a leng te khaw hmai neh a hoeh pah.
Joshua11:10 Tekah khohnin dongah Joshua loh ha bal tih Hazor neh Hazor manghai te a buem. Hazor tah a hmai ah ram takuem kah a lu la a om dongah cunghang neh a ngawn.
Joshua11:11 A khuikah hinglu boeih te khaw cunghang ha neh a ngawn tih hiil aka khueh boeih a hlun mueh la a thup phoeiah Hazor te hmai neh a hoeh.
Joshua11:12 Te dongah BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh a uen vanbangla manghai khopuei boeih neh a manghai boeih te Joshua loh a buem vaengah cunghang ha neh a ngawn tih a thup.
Joshua11:13 Tedae som kah aka pai khopuei boeih te Israel loh hoeh pawt tih Hazor amah bueng ni Joshua loh a hoeh.
Joshua11:14 Khopuei rhoek kah kutbuem boeih neh rhamsa te Israel ca rhoek loh amamih ham a poel a yoe uh. Tedae hlang boeih te cunghang ha neh a ngawn tih hiil aka khueh boeih tah a mit a moeng hilah hlun voel pawh.
Joshua11:15 BOEIPA loh a sal Moses a uen vanbangla Joshua te khaw Moses loh a uen. Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen olka boeih te a hmaii mueh la Joshua loh a saii.
Joshua11:16 Te dongah Joshua loh tlang kah khohmuen tom neh Negev pum khaw
Joshua11:17 Seir la aka luei Halak tlang lamkah Lebanon kolbawn Baalgad khaw
Joshua11:18 Tekah manghai boeih te Joshua loh caemtloek neh a saii vaengah khohnin long khaw muep puh.
Joshua11:19 Gibeon kah khosa Khivee pawt atah Israel ca rhoek taengah moi aka thuung a om pawt dongah khopuei te caem neh boeih a loh.
Joshua11:20 Amih loh BOEIPA taengah a lungbuei aka pom la om tih Israel te caem neh a mah uh. Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla amih te mitmoeng sak ham lungmacil om mueh la a thup sak.
Joshua11:21 Te vaeng tue ah Joshua loh a paan bal tih Hebron
Joshua11:22 Israel ca khohmuen ah aka Anakim tah a hlun pawh. Gaza
Joshua11:23 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses boeih a uen vanbangla khohmuen pum te Joshua loh a loh. Te phoeiah Israel taengah amah koca kah boelnah bangla Joshua rho a paek tih khohmuen khaw caemtloek lamloh mong van.

Joshua12:5 Hermon tlang neh Salkhah

Joshua13:1 Joshua khaw a khohnin loh patong benla a paan coeng dongah BOEIPA loh
Joshua13:2 Tekah khohmuen aka sueng la
Joshua13:3 Egypt imdan Shihor lamkah tlangpuei Ekron khorhi due Kanaan boei panga la a hmoel Philisti
Joshua13:4 tuithim lamkah Kanaan khohmuen pum neh Sidoni lungko
Joshua13:5 Ghiblii khohmuen neh khocuk kah Lebanon pum
Joshua13:6 Lebanon lamkah Misrephothmayim due tlang aka om boeih Sidoni boeih te Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh ah kai loh ka haek vetih nang kang uen vanbangla Israel taengah rho la dawk tael pah.
Joshua13:7 Khohmuen he koca pako neh Manasseh koca hlangvang ham rho la tael pah bal laeh.
Joshua13:8 Reuben koca neh Gad koca ngawn tah BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh amih a paek vanbangla khocuk kah Jordan rhalvangan ah Moses loh amih a paek te amamih kah rho la a loh uh coeng
Joshua13:9 Arnon soklong kaep Aroer lamkah soklong bangli kah khopuei neh Medeba tlangkol boeih
Joshua13:10 Heshbon ah aka manghai Amori manghai kah Sihon khopuei boeih neh Ammon ca rhoek kah khorhi due
Joshua13:11 Gilead neh Geshuri khorhi
Joshua13:12 Ashtaroth neh Edrei ah aka manghai Bashan Oga kah a ram boeih
Joshua13:13 Tedae Geshuri neh Maakathi tah Israel ca rhoek loh haek uh pawh. Te dongah Geshuri neh Maakah loh tihnin duela Israel lakli ah kho a sak.
Joshua13:14 Tedae Levi koca te tah rho pae pawh. Amah taengah a thui pah vanbangla Israel Pathen BOEIPA kah hmaihlutnah te anih kah rho la om coeng.
Joshua13:15 Reuben ca rhoek kah koca te amah huiko tarhing ah Moses loh a paek.
Joshua13:16 Te vaengah Arnon soklong kaep kah Aroer khorhi neh soklong bangli kah khopuei
Joshua13:17 Heshbon neh Dibon tlangkol kah khopuei boeih
Joshua13:18 Jahaz
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim
Joshua13:20 Bethpeor
Joshua13:21 tlangkol khopuei boeih
Joshua13:22 Te vaengkah hlang aka bi Balaam
Joshua13:23 Te dongah Jordan neh Jordan rhi he Reuben ca rhoek kah khorhi
Joshua13:24 Gad koca te khaw Gad ca rhoek taengkah amah huiko tarhing la Moses loh a phaeng coeng.
Joshua13:25 Te dongah Jazer khorhi neh Gilead khopuei boeih
Joshua13:26 Heshbon lamloh Ramah Mizpeh neh Betonim duela
Joshua13:27 tuikol ah khaw Bethharam neh Bethnimrah
Joshua13:28 He tah Gad koca rhoek rho neh amih huiko kah khopuei vangca rhoek ni.
Joshua13:29 Te phoeiah Manasseh koca hlangvang neh Manasseh ca rhoek kah cako ngancawn la aka om te amah huiko tarhing la Moses loh a phaeng.
Joshua13:30 Te dongah Mahanaim lamloh Bashan manghai Oga kah a ram pum la aka om Bashan boeih
Joshua13:31 Gilead ngancawn neh Bashan ah Oga ram kah khopuei rhoek la Ashtaroth neh Edrei te Manasseh capa Makir koca rhoek
Joshua13:32 He rhoek he Jerikho khocuk Jordan rhalvangan kah Moab kolken ah ni Moses loh a phaeng coeng.
Joshua13:33 Tedae Levi koca te tah Moses loh rho pae pawh. Amih taengah a thui pah vanbangla Israel Pathen BOEIPA tah amih kah rho la om coeng.
Joshua14:1 Kanaan kho ah Israel ca rhoek loh a pang uh he khaw khosoih Eleazar
Joshua14:2 Koca pako neh hlangvang ham rho he BOEIPA loh a uen vanbangla hmulung neh Moses kut loh a yueh pah.
Joshua14:3 Koca panit neh hlangvang te Jordan rhalvangan ah Moses loh rho a paek coeng. Tedae amih khui ah Levi te tah rho a paek moenih.
Joshua14:4 Joseph ca rhoi te Manasseh neh Ephraim koca la om uh. Levi te khohmuen khuikah khoyo pae uh pawt dae khosak nah ham khopuei neh a boiva
Joshua14:5 BOEIPA loh Moses a uen vanbangla Israel ca rhoek loh a saii uh tih khohmuen a tael uh.
Joshua14:6 Te vaengah Gilgal kah Joshua taengah Judah koca rhoek te thoeih uh. Te dongah Kenizzi Jephunneh capa Kaleb loh
Joshua14:7 Kum sawmli ka lo ca vaengah BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh khohmuen hip hamla Kadeshbarnea lamloh kai n'tueih tih ka thinko kah aka om vanbangla olka khaw ka bal puei.
Joshua14:8 Te vaengah kamah neh ka cet hmaih ka manuca rhoek loh pilnam kah lungbuei a yut sak. Tedae kai tah BOEIPA ka Pathen hnukah ni ka tukkoei.
Joshua14:9 Te dongah Moses loh amah khohnin ah a toemngam tih
Joshua14:10 Kum sawmli kumnga vaengah a thui vanbangla BOEIPA loh kai tahae due n'hlun coeng he. BOEIPA loh Moses taengah hekah olka a thui vaengah Israel he khosoek ah ni a pongpa. Te dongah kai khaw tihnin ah kum sawmrhet kum nga ka lo ca coeng he.
Joshua14:11 Moses loh kai n'tueih hnin vaengkah bangla tihnin ah ka tlungluen pueng ta. Ka thadueng khaw ka thadueng nah pueng dongah caemtloek ham pataeng ka caeh rhoe ka caeh ham om.
Joshua14:12 Te dongah he kah tlang he kai taengah m'pae laeh. Te khohnin ah BOEIPA loh a thui te na yaak coeng. Te khohnin ah Anakim neh khopuei tanglue khaw cakrhuet dae
Joshua14:13 Te dongah Joshua loh yoethen a paek tih Hebron he Jephunneh capa Kaleb taengah rho la a paek.
Joshua14:14 Israel Pathen BOEIPA hnukah a tukkoei dongah Hebron tah tihnin duela Kenizzi Jephunneh capa Kaleb kah rho la om.
Joshua14:15 Hebron ming he khaw hlamat vaengah tah Anakim khuikah hlang len Kiriatharba tila om tih a khohmuen te caemrhal lamloh mong.
Joshua15:1 Judah ca rhoek neh a hui a ko tarahing ah tuithim kah Zin khosoek Edom khorhi
Joshua15:2 Te dongah lungkaeh li hmoi lamloh tuithim la aka hooi uh longken khaw
Joshua15:3 Akrabbim kham tuithim ah a khuen tih Zin la kat. Te phoeiah Kadeshbarnea tuithim la cet tih Khetsron la a kat sak. Te lamkah loh Addar te a paan tih Karka la mael.
Joshua15:4 Te phoeiah Azmon la kat phai tih Egypt soklong te a doo. Te lamkah te tuili rhi kah longrhael ah aka om aka om tah nangmih ham tuithim khorhi la om.
Joshua15:5 Lungkaeh li lamkah loh Jordan tuikung due khothoeng khorhi la om tih tuili longken lamloh Jordan tuikung ah tlangpuei ben kah khorhi la om.
Joshua15:6 Te phoeiah Bethhoglah khorhi la luei hang tih Bethkolken tlangpuei a paan phoeiah Reuben capa Bohan kah lungto rhi la luei.
Joshua15:7 Te phoeiah Akor kol lamloh Debir khorhi la luei bal tih soklong tuithim kah Adummim kham dan Gilgal ah tlangpuei la hooi uh. Te phoeiah khorhi loh Enshemesh tui te a paan tih Enrogel ah a bawtnah om.
Joshua15:8 Kolrhawk khorhi tuithim kah Jebusi tlanghlaep Jerusalem la yong. Te phoeiah khorhi te tlangpuei kah Rapha kol hmoi
Joshua15:9 Te phoeiah khorhi te tlang so lamloh Nephtoah tuisih tui la ngooi thuk tih Ephron tlang kah khopuei rhoek te a paan phoeiah Kiriathjearim kah Baalah khorhi la rhum.
Joshua15:10 Baalah khotlak lamkah khorhi te Seir tlang la a ken bal tih Kesalon tlangpuei kah Jearim tlang hlaep la yong. Te phoeiah Bethshemesh la suntla tih Timnah la kat.
Joshua15:11 Te phoeiah khorhi te tlangpuei kah Ekron hlaep la pawk tih Shikkron khorhi ngooi. Te phoeiah Baalah tlang a pah tih Jabneel a pha phoeiah tuitun rhi ah a bawtnah om.
Joshua15:12 Te dongah khotlak tuili puei khorhi neh Judah ca rhoek kah khorhi he
Joshua15:13 BOEIPA kah olpaek vanbangla Joshua loh Judah koca lakli ah Jephuneh capa Kaleb ham Anakim napa Kiriatharba kah Hebron te khoyo la a phaeng.
Joshua15:14 Te lamkah Anak koca pathum Sheshai
Joshua15:15 Te lamloh Debir khosa rhoek khaw a khoong thil. Debir kah a ming rhuem tah Kiriathsepher ni.
Joshua15:16 Te vaengah Kaleb loh
Joshua15:17 Te dongah Kiriathsepher te Kaleb kah a manuca Kenaz capa Othniel loh a loh tih anih yuu la a canu Akcah te a paek.
Joshua15:18 Huta loh ham paan vaengah a napa taengkah khohmuen bih hamla a va te a vueh tih laak dong lamloh pawlh bit uh. Te dongah anih te Kaleb loh
Joshua15:19 Te dongah

Joshua16:1 Joseph koca rhoek ham hmulung a yueh vaengah Jordan khocuk Jerikho kah Jerikho tui kaepah khosoek la luei tih Jerikho lamloh Bethel tlang la
Joshua16:2 Bethel lamloh Luz la cet tih Arkii Ataroth khorhi la kat.
Joshua16:3 Te phoeiah khotlak kah Japhletee khorhi la suntla tih a dang Bethhoron neh Gezer khorhi
Joshua16:4 Te tlam te ni Joseph koca Manasseh neh Ephraim te phaeng la om.
Joshua16:5 Ephraim koca ah amih cako kah khorhi aka om tah khocuk ah Atarothaddar lamkah Bethhoron kholu due te amih kah rho khorhi la om.
Joshua16:6 Te phoeiah tlangpuei kah Mikmthath tuili rhi te a paan tih khocuk Taanathshiloh rhi la a keen phoeiah khocuk kah Janoah la kat.
Joshua16:7 Te phoeiah Janoah lamkah Ataroth neh Naarah la aka suntla te Jerikho a doo tih Jordan la pawk.
Joshua16:8 Tappuah lamloh tuili rhi ah Kanah soklong la cet tih tuitunli ah a bawtnah om. He Ephraim ca rhoek kah koca rhoek ah amah cako kah rho la om.
Joshua16:9 Hekah khopuei he Manasseh ca rhoek kah rho la aka om khopuei vangca rhoek boeih khui ah Ephraim ca rhoek ham khotlueh la om.
Joshua16:10 Tedae Gezer kah khosa Kanaani te tah haek uh pawh. Te dongah Kanaani loh Ephraim lakli ah tihnin due kho a sak tih aka thotat saldong la om.
Joshua17:1 Joseph caming Manasaeh koca ham hmulung a yueh vaengah Gilead napa Manasseh kah caming Makir tah caemtloek hlang la a om dongah anih ham tah Gilead neh Bashan a om pah.
Joshua17:2 Manasseh ca rhoek neh amih cako khuiah aka mueh pueng Abiezer koca rhoek ham neh Helek koca rhoek ham khaw
Joshua17:3 Tedae Manasseh koca
Joshua17:4 Te vaengah amih te khosoih Eleazar hmai neh Nun capa Joshua hmai ah khaw
Joshua17:5 Te dongah Gilead kho neh Jordan rhalvangan ah Bashan phoeiah tah Manasseh kah khoyo parha te a koep thil uh.
Joshua17:6 Manasseh nu rhoek he a nganpa lakli ah rho a dang uh phoeiah Manasseh ca rhoek taengkah aka coih Gilead kho te khaw a bawn thil.
Joshua17:7 Te dongah Manasseh khorhi he Asher Mikmthath lamloh Shekhem hmai la cet tih Entappuah khosa rhoek taengkah bantang rhi la yong.
Joshua17:8 Tappuah kho he Manasseh ham om coeng dae Manasseh khorhi kah Tappuah te tah Ephraim koca rhoek hamla om bal.
Joshua17:9 Te phoeiah khorhi te tuithim kah Kanah soklong la suntla. Soklong kah khopuei rhoek he Manasseh khopuei lakli ah om dae Ephraim hut la om. Tedae soklong tlangpuei kah Manasseh khorhi tah tuipuei ah ni a hmoi a om pueng.
Joshua17:10 Te dongah Ephraim ham he tuithim ah
Joshua17:11 Te dongah Issakhar
Joshua17:12 Tedae he khopuei rhoek he huul hamla Manasseh ca rhoek loh coeng uh thai pawh. Te dongah te rhoek paengpang ah khosak ham Kanaani loh a na.
Joshua17:13 Israel ca rhoek kah a noeng la a om dongah Kanaani te saldong la a paek sak akhaw a haek rhoe a haek moenih.
Joshua17:14 Te vaengah Joseph koca rhoek loh Joshua te a voek uh tih
Joshua17:15 Te dongah amih te Joshua loh
Joshua17:16 Joseph koca rhoek loh
Joshua17:17 Tedae Joshua loh Joseph imko Ephraim neh Manasseh taengah
Joshua17:18 Nang ham tlang pakhat bueng om cakhaw duup khaw na hum vetih hmangrhong hmanglae loh nang ham ha om bitni. Kanaan rhoek te thi leng neh amah ham tlungluen ngawn cakhaw na haek bal bitni
Joshua18:1 Israel ca rhoek loh rhaengpuei la Shiloh ah boeih tingtun uh. Te ah te tingtunnah dap te a khueh uh tih amamih mikhmuh ah khohmuen te a khoem.
Joshua18:2 Tedae Israel ca rhoek khuikah koca parhih loh amamih kah rho a dang mueh la om pueng.
Joshua18:3 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek taengah Joshua loh
Joshua18:4 Namamih ham te koca khuikah hlang pathum ah tuek uh lamtah amih te ka tueih eh. Te vaengah thoo uh saeh lamtah khohmuen te hip saeh. Te phoeiah a kawng te amamih kah rho tarhing la daek uh saeh lamtah kai taengla ha kun uh saeh.
Joshua18:5 Khoyo te parhih la boe uh lamtah tuithim kah amah khorhi ah Judah loh om saeh. Tlangpuei kah amah khorhi ah Joseph imko om van saeh.
Joshua18:6 Te phoeiah khohmuen kawng nangmih loh khoyo parhih la na daek uh te ka taengla hang kuen uh. Te vaengah mamih kah BOEIPA Pathen mikhmuh ah hmulung te nangmih ham ka thuinuet eh.
Joshua18:7 Tedae Levi ham khoyo tah nangmih lakli ah nuet boel saeh. BOEIPA khosoihbi te anih kah rho la om coeng. Gad
Joshua18:8 Te dongah hlang rhoek te thoo uh tih a caeh uh vaengah khohmuen kawng daek ham aka cet rhoek te Joshua loh a uen tih
Joshua18:9 Te vaengah hlang rhoek te cet uh tih kho takuem la pawk uh. Khopuei rhoek te cabu dongah khoyo parhih la a daek uh tih Shiloh rhaehhmuen kah Joshua taengla mael uh.
Joshua18:10 Te dongah Shiloh kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah amih ham hmulung te Joshua loh a yueh pah tih amamih boelnah bangla Israel ca rhoek ham khohmuen te Joshua loh pahoi a tael pah.
Joshua18:11 Benjamin ca rhoek te amah koca kah hmulung a naan vaengah amah huiko tarhing ah amih kah khorhi te hmulung loh Judah ca rhoek neh Joseph ca rhoek laklo ah a nan.
Joshua18:12 Amih kah khorhi te Jordan kah tlangpuei kaep ah om. Tlangpuei ah Jerikho tlanghlaep ah khorhi te luei tih khotlak tlang la yoeng. Te phoeiah a hmoi te cet cet tih Bethaven khosoek la pawk.
Joshua18:13 Te lamkah khorhi te Luz la
Joshua18:14 Te phoeiah khorhi aka hooi te tlang lamkah tuithim tuipuei kil a hil tih tuithim kah Bethhoron imdan la
Joshua18:15 Tuithim saa ah Kiriathjearim ngoe lamkah te tuipuei rhi ah a khuen tih Nephtoah tuisih tui ah pawk.
Joshua18:16 Te phoeiah khorhi kolrhawk rhaldan ah tlang yung la
Joshua18:17 Te phoeiah tlangpuei la hooi uh tih Enshemesh te a paan phoeiah Adummim kham dan kah Geliloth la pawk tih Reuben koca rhoek kah Bohan lungnu la suntla thuk.
Joshua18:18 Tlangpuei ah kolken rhaldan kah tlanghlaep la cet bal tih kolken la pawk.
Joshua18:19 Te phoeiah khorhi te tlangpuei ah Bethhoglah tlanghlaep la kat. Khorhi kah a hmoi a hmoi tah tlangpuei kah lungkaeh tuili longken ah khaw
Joshua18:20 Jordan loh khothoeng ben ah Benjamin koca rhoek kah rho te amah cako ham rhilung neh a suem pah.

Joshua20:1 Joshua te BOEIPA a voek tih

Joshua21:1 Levi napa rhoek a lu rhoek te khosoih Eleazar
Joshua21:2 Te vaengah Kanaan kho Shiloh ah amih te a voek uh tih
Joshua21:3 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh amamih kah rho khui lamkah te BOEIPA ol vanbangla khopuei neh a khocaak rhoek te Levi ham a suem pa uh.
Joshua21:4 Kohathi kah a hui a ko ham hmulung a naan vaengah Levi khui lamkah khosoih Aaron ca rhoek ham te Judah koca khui lamkah khaw
Joshua21:5 Kohath koca aka coih rhoek ham te Ephraim koca cako khui lamkah
Joshua21:6 Gershon ca rhoek ham khaw Issakhar koca cako khui lamkah
Joshua21:7 Merari ca rhoek ham khaw a hui a ko tarhing ah Reuben koca khui lamkah
Joshua21:8 Te tlam te BOEIPA loh Moses kut ah a uen vanbangla khopuei rhoek neh a khocaak rhoek he Israel ca rhoek loh Levi rhoek ham hmulung neh a suem pa uh.
Joshua21:9 A ming la a khue khopuei rhoek te Judah ca rhoek cako neh Simeon ca rhoek cako khui lamkah khaw a suem pa uh.
Joshua21:10 hmulung lamhma loh a nan coeng dongah Aaron ca rhoek ham te Kohathi huiko khui lamkah neh Levi ca rhoek khui lakah khaw a om pah.
Joshua21:11 Judah tlang ah Anak napa Kiriatharba kah Hebron neh a kaepvai kah a khocaak te amih ham a suem pa uh.
Joshua21:12 Tedae khopuei vangca kah lohma te tah Jephunneh capa Kaleb taengah a khohut la paek uh.
Joshua21:13 Hlang aka ngawn kah hlipyingnah khopuei la Hebron neh a khocaak
Joshua21:14 Jattir neh a khocaak
Joshua21:15 Holon neh a khocaak
Joshua21:16 Ayin neh a khocaak

Joshua21:18 Anathoth neh a khocaak
Joshua21:19 Khosoih Aaron ca rhoek kah khopuei boeih he khopuei neh a khocaak bung hlai thum a lo pah.
Joshua21:20 Kohath ca rhoek khui lamkah aka hoei Levi Kohath ca rhoek kah a hui a ko
Joshua21:21 Te vaengah amih te hlang aka ngawn kah hlipyingnah khopuei Shekhem neh Ephraim tlang kah a khocaak

Joshua21:23 Dan koca rhoek khui lamkah Eltekeh neh a khocaak

Joshua21:26 Kohath ca rhoek kah a hui a ko aka coih rhoek ham a pum la khopuei neh a khocaak parha a lo pah.
Joshua21:27 Levi kah a hui a ko Gershon ca rhoek ham khaw Manasseh koca hlangvang taeng lamkah hlang aka ngawn kah hlipyingnah khopuei
Joshua21:28 Issakhar koca rhoek taeng lamkah Kishion neh a khocaak Daberath neh a khocaak
Joshua21:29 Jarmuth neh a khocaak

Joshua21:33 A pum boeih la a hui a ko tarhing ah Gershon rhoek kah khopuei he khopuei hlai thum neh a khocaak rhoek te om.
