1Samuel1:7 Kum khat phoeiah kum khat BOEIPA im a paan vaengah khaw hue a sak. Te dongah rhap tih buh ca pawh.
1Samuel1:8 Te dongah anih te a va Elkanah loh
1Samuel1:9 Te daengah Shiloh kah Hannah loh buh caak ah ok ham thoo. Te vaengah khosoih Eli BOEIPA bawkim rhungsut taengkah ngolkhoel dongah ngol.
1Samuel1:10 Hannah tah a hinglu khahing tih a rhah doe a rhah doela BOEIPA taengah thangthui.
1Samuel1:11 Te vaengah olcaeng neh a caeng tih
1Samuel1:12 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thangthui te a koe coeng dongah Eli loh a ka te a sawt pah.
1Samuel1:13 Hannah te a lungbuei khuiah cal tih a hmui ni dawk a tat coeng. Tedae a ol a yaak pawt dongah Eli loh anih te yurhui la a poek.
1Samuel1:14 Te dongah anih te Eli loh
1Samuel1:15 Hannah loh a doo tih
1Samuel1:16 Ka kohuet cungkuem neh tahae ah ka konoi nen ni ka thangthui. Na sal nu kah a muen he na kodang ah dueh boel mai.
1Samuel1:17 Eli loh doo tih
1Samuel1:18 Te dongah
1Samuel1:19 Mincang ah thoo uh tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah tho a thueng uh. Te phoeiah bal uh tih Ramah kah a im te a paan uh. Te vaengah Elkanah loh a yuu Hannah te a ming hatah Hannah te BOEIPA loh a poek.
1Samuel1:20 Khohnin a thoknah a pha vaengah Hannah te vawn tih ca a cun. Camoe he
1Samuel1:21 Elkanah loh BOEIPA taengah khoning hmueih neh a olcaeng nawn ham te a cako ah boeih cet uh.
1Samuel1:22 Tedae Hannah tah a caeh kolla a va taengah
1Samuel1:23 Te dongah anih te a va Elkanah loh
1Samuel1:24 Camoe te suk a kan vanneh vaito kum thum
1Samuel1:25 Vaito te a ngawn uh tih camoe te Eli taengla a thak uh.
1Samuel1:26 Te phoeiah Hananah loh
1Samuel1:27 Camoe ham he ka thangthui tih amah taeng lamkah ka bih vanbangla ka huithuinah te ka taengah BOEIPA loh m'paek coeng.
1Samuel1:28 Te dongah anih he BOEIPA ham ni ka bih tih anih a tue khohnin aka om boeih khaw BOEIPA ham ni ka bih coeng
1Samuel2:1 Te phoeiah Hannah te thangthui tih
1Samuel2:2 BOEIPA bangla aka cim om pawh. Nang aka puet khaw om pawt tih
1Samuel2:3 BOEIPA tah lungming Pathen la om tih
1Samuel2:4 Hlangrhalh rhoek kah lii te paep cakhaw
1Samuel2:5 Aka soep rhoek loh buh a kutloh uh daengah bungpong khaw a toeng uh. Caya long pataeng parhih khaw a sak coeng dongah
1Samuel2:6 BOEIPA loh a duek sak tih
1Samuel2:7 BOEIPA loh a talh dae koep a boei sak
1Samuel2:8 Diklai kah tungpuei tah BOEIPA koe la om tih
1Samuel2:9 A hlangcim rhoek kah a hlangcim kho te a ngaithuen. Tedae halang rhoek kah thadueng loh pakhat khaw a na pawt dongah hmaisuep ah ngam uh.
1Samuel2:10 Amah aka oelh la aka oelh te tah BOEIPA loh a rhihyawp sak tih
1Samuel2:11 Te phoeiah Elkanah loh Ramah la a im te a paan. Tedae camoe tah khosoih Eli taengah BOEIPA bibi la om.
1Samuel2:12 Te vaengah Eli ca rhoi tah muen rhoi ca tih BOEIPA te ming rhoi pawh.
1Samuel2:13 Te vaengah pilnam lamkah hlang boeih loh hmueih a nawn tih khosoih rhoek kah hamsum vaengah uh khosoih kah tueihyoeih pakhat te maeh thong la halo hatah a kut dongah ciksum a sum pathum te a pom.
1Samuel2:14 Anih loh baeldung khaw
1Samuel2:15 Maehtha te a phum uh hlan ah pataeng khosoih kah tueihyoeih te halo tih hmueih aka ngawn hlang taengah
1Samuel2:16 Tedae anih te hlang pakhat loh
1Samuel2:17 Tedae cadong rhoi tholhnah tah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a len koek la om coeng. Tekah hlang rhoi loh BOEIPA khocang ni a tlaitlaek rhoi coeng.
1Samuel2:18 Samuel tah takhlawk hnisui te a sui tih BOEIPA mikhmuh kah bi aka bi camoe la om.
1Samuel2:19 A kum kum kah a tue a pha vaengah tah Hannah khaw hmueih nawn ham a va neh a cet rhoi. Te vaengah a manu loh Samuel ham hnikul ca a saii tih a khuen pah.
1Samuel2:20 Te vaengah Elkanah neh a yuu te Eli loh yoethen a paek tih
1Samuel2:21 Hannah te BOEIPA loh a hip dongah vawn tih capa pathum neh canu panit a cun. Te vaengah camoe Samuel tah BOEIPA taengah rhoeng hang.
1Samuel2:22 Eli he bahoeng patong coeng dae a ca rhoi loh Israel pum taengah a saii rhoi boeih te khaw
1Samuel2:23 Te dongah amih rhoi te
1Samuel2:24 Ka ca rhoi nang te tlam moenih
1Samuel2:25 Hlang pakhat te hlang pakhat soah a tholh atah anih ham te Pathen loh lai a rhoe pueng. Tedae hlang pakhat te BOEIPA soah a tholh coeng atah anih ham te ulae aka thangthui pa eh
1Samuel2:26 Camoe Samuel tah a pong a pa neh boeilen tih BOEIPA taeng neh hlang taengah khaw hoeikhang hang.
1Samuel2:27 Te vaengah Pathen kah hlang te Eli taengla halo tih
1Samuel2:28 Ka mikhmuh ah hnisui aka vah ham neh ka hmueihtuk la aka cet tih bo-ul aka phum ka khosoih la sak ham ni Israel koca rhoek boeih khui lamkah anih ka tuek tih Israel ca rhoek kah a hmaihlutnah boeih te na pa imkhui ah ka paek.
1Samuel2:29 Balae tih
1Samuel2:30 Te dongah Israel Pathen BOEIPA olphong loh
1Samuel2:31 A tue a pha vaengah namah kah na ban khaw
1Samuel2:32 Israel te boeih voelphoeng cakhaw na khuirhung kah rhal ni na paelki eh. Na hing tue khuiah na imkhui ah patong om mahpawh.
1Samuel2:33 Na mik khah sak ham neh na hinglu yaai sak ham ka hmueihtuk dong lamloh nang kah hlang te ka pat sak moenih. Tedae na imkhui kah hlang rhoek te a pueh a kan la boeih duek uh ni.
1Samuel2:34 Te dongah na ca rhoi
1Samuel2:35 Te vaengah ka thinko kah bangla aka cak khosoih te kamah ham ka thoh vetih ka hinglu dongkah te a saii ni. Anih ham khaw im ka thoh pah vetih ka cak sak vaengah ka koelh hlang kah a mikhmuh ah khohnin takuem pongpa ni.
1Samuel2:36 Na imkhui kah aka sueng boeih khaw cak hlii neh buh hluem te a taengah bakop thil ham ham paan ni. Te vaengah
1Samuel3:1 Camoe Samuel tah Eli mikhmuh ah BOEIPA hamla thotat. Te vaeng tue ah BOEIPA kah ol khaw kuelka pueng tih mangthui khaw pungtai pawh.
1Samuel3:2 Te khohnin ah Eli tah a hmuen ah yalh. A mik khaw hmaang coeng tih hmu thai voel pawh.
1Samuel3:3 Pathen kah hmaiim a thih hlanah Samuel khaw BOEIPA kah bawkim ah yalh. Teah te Pathen kah thingkawng om.
1Samuel3:4 Te vaengah Samuel te BOEIPA loh a khue hatah
1Samuel3:5 Te phoeiah Eli taengla yong tih
1Samuel3:6 Te phoeiah Samuel a khue te BOEIPA loh koep a rhaep. Te dongah Samuel te thoo tih Eli taengla cet. Te vaengah
1Samuel3:7 Te vaengah Samuel loh BOEIPA te hmat hlan tih BOEIPA ol khaw anih taengah phoe hlan.
1Samuel3:8 A pathum dongah khaw BOEIPA loh a rhaep tih Samuel te a khue. Te dongah a thoh hang neh Eli taengla cet tih
1Samuel3:9 Te vaengah Samuel te Eli loh
1Samuel3:10 Te phoeiah BOEIPA te ha pawk tih pai. A noek noek kah bangla
1Samuel3:11 Te daengah Samuel te BOEIPA loh
1Samuel3:12 Tekah khohnin dongah a imkhui ah ka thui ham ka tong tih ka khah boeih nen te Eli ka pai thil ni.
1Samuel3:13 Amah im ah kai loh lai ka tloek te amah taengah ka puen coeng. Kumhal duela thaesainah te a ming. A ca rhoi te pamdah tih amih rhoi taengah a ueih moenih.
1Samuel3:14 Eli imkhui te ka toemngam coeng dongah Eli imkhui kah thaesainah a dalh te hmueih nen khaw khocang nen khaw kumhal duela dawth boel saeh
1Samuel3:15 Samuel khaw mincang duela yalh tih BOEIPA im kah thohkhaih te a ong. Tedae a manghmuhnah te Eli taengah thui ham Samuel loh a rhih.
1Samuel3:16 Tedae Samuel te
1Samuel3:17 Te phoeiah
1Samuel3:18 Te daengah Samuel loh olka boeih te phah kolla Eli taengah a thui pah. Te vaengah
1Samuel3:19 Samuel a puel hang vaengah BOEIPA khaw anih taengah om. Te vaengah BOEIPA ol pakhat khaw diklai la rhul sak pawh.
1Samuel3:20 Dan lamloh Beersheba duela Israel pum loh Samuel tah BOEIPA kah tonghma la cak coeng tila a ming uh.
1Samuel3:21 Shiloh kah a phoe ham te BOEIPA loh a khoep. Te dongah BOEIPA tah BOEIPA ol nen ni Shiloh kah Samuel taengla a phoe pah.
1Samuel4:1 Te phoeiah Samuel ol Israel pum taengla pawk. Te dongah Israel tah caem khuikah Philisti te mah hamla cet tih Ebenezer ah rhaeh uh. Te vaengah Philisti tah Aphek ah rhaeh.
1Samuel4:2 Philisti khaw Israel mah ham rhong a pai uh tih caemtloek khaw a yaal uh. Te vaengah Israel tah Philisti mikhmuh ah yawk tih hlang thawng li tluk te lohma li ah maehlaep bangla a tloek uh.
1Samuel4:3 Te dongah pilnam loh rhaehhmuen la a pawk uh vaengah Israel khuikah a hamca rhoek te
1Samuel4:4 Te dongah pilnam te Shiloh la a tueih tih te lamkah Caempuei BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng
1Samuel4:5 BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng te rhaehhmuen la ha pawk vaengah Israel pum loh tamlung neh muep yuhui uh tih diklai khaw pangngawl.
1Samuel4:6 Tamlung ol te Philisti loh a yaak vaengah
1Samuel4:7 Te vaengah Philisti rhoek loh
1Samuel4:8 Anunae mamih aih he
1Samuel4:9 Tanglue uh lamtah Philisti hlang bangla om uh
1Samuel4:10 Tedae Philisti rhoek loh a tloek uh vaengah Israel yawk tih hlang boeih loh amah kah dap la rhaelrham uh. Te vaengah hmasoe len muep om tih Israel rhalkap thawng sawmthum tah vik cungku uh.
1Samuel4:11 Pathen kah thingkawng te vik a loh uh tih Eli ca rhoi Hophni neh Phinekha khaw duek.
1Samuel4:12 Te vaengah caem lamkah Benjamin hlang pakhat te yong tih hnin at neh Shiloh a pha. Tedae a himbai te a phen tih diklai neh a lu a phul thil.
1Samuel4:13 A pha vaengah Eli tah longpuei hmatoeng bawt kah ngolkhoel dongah pahoi ana ngol. A lungbuei a om dongah Pathen thingkawng ham te a thuen doela a tawt. Te vaengah khopuei ah puen hamla hlang ha pai tih khopuei khaw boeih pang.
1Samuel4:14 Pangngawlnah ol te Eli loh a yaak vaengah
1Samuel4:15 Eli tah kum sawmko kum rhet a lo ca coeng tih dongah a mik hmaang tih hmu thai voel pawh.
1Samuel4:16 Tekah hlang loh Eli taengah
1Samuel4:17 Ol aka phong loh a doo tih
1Samuel4:18 Pathen kah thingkawng te a poek vaengah ngolkhoel dong lamloh vongka hmatoeng ah a hnuk la palet uh tih a rhawn a tlawt pah. Tekah hlang patong aka duek te rhih. Tedae amah loh Israel te kum sawmli lai a tloek pah.
1Samuel4:19 Te vaengah Phinekha kah a yuu
1Samuel4:20 A duek tue vaengah tah a taengkah aka pai rhoek loh
1Samuel4:21 Tedae Pathen kah thingkawng a loh uh dongah Israel kah a thangpomnah khaw
1Samuel4:22 Te dongah
1Samuel5:1 Philisti loh a loh Pathen thingkawng te Ebenezer lamloh Ashdod la a khuen uh.
1Samuel5:2 Te dongah Philisti loh a khuen Pathen thingkawng te Dagon im la a det uh tih Dagon taengah a khueh uh.
1Samuel5:3 A vuen ah Ashodi rhoek te a thoh uh vaengah Dagon tah BOEIPA thingkawng hmai ah diklai la a hmai longah tarha ana cungku. Te dongah Dagon te a loh uh tih amah hmuen la koep a khueh uh.
1Samuel5:4 A vuen mincang kah a thoh uh vaengah khaw Dagon te BOEIPA uh thingkawng tih hmai ah diklai la a hmai longah tarha cungku bal. Dagon kah a lu neh a kut kutpha rhoi khaw thohkong dongah a khuek tih Dagon bueng te sueng.
1Samuel5:5 Te dongah Dagon khosoih long khaw
1Samuel5:6 BOEIPA kut loh Ashodi te a nan tih a pong sak. Ashdod neh a khorhi khui te tungueh nen khaw
1Samuel5:7 Ashdod hlang rhoek loh hmuh uh vaengah
1Samuel5:8 Te dongah Philisti boei rhoek te boeih a tah uh tih a tingtun uh vaengah
1Samuel5:9 Thingkawng a mael hnukah khaw khopuei te BOEIPA kut loh a om thil pueng tih soekloeknah a len la muep om. Khopuei kah hlang te tanoe kangham la a ngawn tih amih pum dongah rhilcolh la puek pa uh.
1Samuel5:10 Te dongah Pathen kah thingkawng te Ekron la a thak uh. Tedae Pathen kah thingkawng te Ekron la a pawk van neh Ekroni rhoek pang uh tih
1Samuel5:11 Te dongah Philisti boei rhoek te boeih a tah uh tih a tingtun uh vaengah
1Samuel5:12 Hlang te tungueh rhilcolh neh a ngawn tih duek uh ngawn pawt dae khopuei kah a pang rhoe mah vaan la luei.
1Samuel6:1 BOEIPA kah thingkawng tah Philisti kho ah hla rhih om.
1Samuel6:2 Te vaengah Philisti rhoek loh khosoih neh hlang aka bi te a khue tih
1Samuel6:3 Te vaengah
1Samuel6:4 Te dongah
1Samuel6:5 Te dongah khohmuen aka phae nangmih kah tungueh
1Samuel6:6 Balae tih Egypt rhoek neh Pharaoh kah a lungbuei a thangpom bangla na thinko na thangpom uh. Amih te a poelyoe daengah Israel te a tueih tih a caeh sak uh moenih a?
1Samuel6:7 Lo uh lamtah leng a thai pakhat ah saii uh laeh. Tedae vaito rhoi hnamkun aka mawt pawh vaito cacun la om saeh lamtah vaito rhoi te leng dongah khit uh. Tedae a ca rhoi te a manu rhoi taeng lamloh im la bal puei uh.
1Samuel6:8 BOEIPA thingkawng te lo uh lamtah leng dongla tloeng uh. Sui hnopai te khaw a kaep kah thakvoh dongah khueh uh lamtah hmaithennah la khuen sak. Te phoeiah mah thingkawng te tueih uh lamtah cet saeh.
1Samuel6:9 Tedae amah khorhi kah Bethshemesh longpuei a pha duela so uh lah
1Samuel6:10 Hlang rhoek long khaw te tlam te a saii uh. Te dongah vaito cacun pumnit te a loh uh tih leng dongla a khih uh. Tedae a ca rhoi te tah im ah a pael uh.
1Samuel6:11 Te phoeiah BOEIPA kah thingkawng khaw
1Samuel6:12 Te vaengah vaito khaw Bethshemesh longpuei dongkah longpuei pakhat ah tluek tluek cet. Long pakhat dongah cet uh tih a rhung doela cet uh. Banvoei bantang ah taengphael kolla Philisti boei rhoek khaw Bethshemesh khorhi duela amih hnukah cet uh.
1Samuel6:13 Te vaengah Bethshemesh kol ah cang aka at rhoek loh a mik a huel uh tih thingkawng te a sawt uh vaengah hmuh hamla a kohoe uh.
1Samuel6:14 Tedae leng loh Bethshemesh kah Joshua lo la a pawk vaengah pahoi pai. Teah te lungnu a om hatah leng dongkah thing te a top uh tih vaito rhoi te BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah la a nawn uh.
1Samuel6:15 Te phoeiah BOEIPA thingkawng neh thakvoh khaw
1Samuel6:16 Philisti boei panga long khaw a sawt uh tih amah khohnin dongah Ekron la balang uh.
1Samuel6:17 Philisti rhoek loh BOEIPA taengah hmaithennah la a mael sui rhilcolh rhoek te
1Samuel6:18 Sui su te tah Philisti khopuei boeih tarhing ah
1Samuel6:19 Tedae BOEIPA thingkawng khuila aka so Bethshemesh hlang rhoek te a ngawn bal tih pilnam khuikah hlang tongpa thawng sawmnga phoeiah sawmrhih te a ngawn. Pilnam te BOEIPA loh hmasoe len neh a ngawn dongah pilnam khaw nguekcoi.
1Samuel6:20 Te dongah Bethshemesh hlang rhoek loh
1Samuel6:21 Te dongah Kiriathjearim kah khosa rhoek taengla puencawn a tueih uh tih
1Samuel7:1 Te dongah Kirathjearim hlang rhoek ha pawk uh neh BOEIPA thingkawng te a khuen uh tih som kah Abinadab im te a paan puei uh. Te vaengah a capa Eleazar te BOEIPA thingkawng aka khoem la a ciim uh.
1Samuel7:2 Kiriathjearim ah thingkawng a ngol khohnin lamloh a kum khaw sen coeng. Tedae kum kul a lo daengah Israel imkhui pum te BOEIPA hnukah rhathi uh.
1Samuel7:3 Te dongah Samuel loh Israel imkhui boeih te a voek tih
1Samuel7:4 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek loh Baal neh Ashtoreth te a voeih uh tih
1Samuel7:5 Te dongah Samuel loh
1Samuel7:6 Mizpah la a coi uh thae vaengah tui a than uh tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a bueih uh. Tekah khohnin dongah caak a yaeh uh tih BOEIPA taengah
1Samuel7:7 Mizpah ah Israel ca rhoek a coi uh thae te Philisti loh a yaak vaengah Israel te Philisti boei rhoek loh a caeh thil uh. Israel ca rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah Philisti te a rhih uh.
1Samuel7:8 Te dongah Samuel te Israel ca rhoek loh
1Samuel7:9 Samuel loh suktui aka yawn tuca pakhat a loh phoeiah cet tih BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah la boeih a khuen. Te phoeiah BOEIPA te Samuel loh Israel yueng la a doek hatah BOEIPA loh a doo pah.
1Samuel7:10 Samuel loh hmueihhlutnah a paan vaengah Philisti rhoek tah caemtloek la Israel taengah thoeih uh. Tedae tekah khohnin dongah Philisti te BOEIPA loh a ol ue neh rhaek bangla a daeh tih a khawkkhek dongah amih te Israel mikhmuh ah yawk uh.
1Samuel7:11 Te vaengah Mizpah lamkah Israel hlang rhoek te ha pawk uh tih Philisti te a hloem uh. Te dongah Phlilisti te Bethkar kungdak duela a tloek uh.
1Samuel7:12 Te phoeiah Samuel loh lungto pakhat a loh tih Mizpah laklo neh Shane laklo ah a khueh. “Tahae duela BOEIPA loh mamih m'bom coeng
1Samuel7:13 Philisti rhoek khaw kunyun uh coeng tih Israel khorhi a paan ham koep khoep uh voel pawh. Samuel tue khuiah tah Philisti khaw BOEIPA kut ah ni a om.
1Samuel7:14 Te dongah Israel taengkah khopuei Philisti loh a loh rhoek
1Samuel7:15 Samuel a hing tue khuiah Israel te lai a tloek pah.
1Samuel7:16 A kum kum ah voeikhat carhil tah cet tih Bethel khaw
1Samuel7:17 Tedae Ramah la a maelnah amah im ah Israel te lai a tloek pah tih BOEIPA ham hmueihtuk pahoi a suem.

1Samuel8:2 Te vaengah a ca cacuek ming tah Joel
1Samuel8:3 A ca rhoi te amah long
1Samuel8:4 Te dongah Israel kah a hamca rhoek tah boeih coi uh thae tih Ramah kah Samuel te a paan uh.
1Samuel8:5 Te phoeiah anih te
1Samuel8:6 Tedae ol te Samuel mik ah lolh coeng. “Kaimih lai aka tloek la kaimih taengah manghai m'pae
1Samuel8:7 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Samuel te
1Samuel8:8 Egypt lamkah amih ka caeh puei khohnin lamloh tahae khohnin duela tekah khoboe te boeih a saii uh. Kai he n'hnoo uh tih Pathen tloe rhoek taengah tho a thueng uh. Amih tangkhuet loh nang taengah khaw a saii uh.
1Samuel8:9 Te dongah amih ol te hnatun mai. Tedae amih te rhalrhing‘ rhoe rhalrhing sak lamtah manghai kah laitloeknah te amih taengah thui pah. Anih te amih soah manghai bitni
1Samuel8:10 Te dongah Samuel loh BOEIPA ol boeih te amah taeng lamloh manghai aka bih pilnam taengah a thui.
1Samuel8:11 Te vaengah
1Samuel8:12 Te phoeiah a tawn te phoh pah ham
1Samuel8:13 Na tanu rhoek te khaw buhpoep la
1Samuel8:14 Na khohmuen neh na misur khaw
1Samuel8:15 Na cangtii neh na misur te parha ah pakhat a loh vetih a imkhoem neh a sal taengla a paek ni.
1Samuel8:16 Na salpa neh na sal huta khaw
1Samuel8:17 Nangmih kah boiva te a loh vetih namamih te anih kah sal la na om uh ni.
1Samuel8:18 Tekah khohnin ah namamih ham na tuek uh na manghai kongah na pang uh cakhaw amah khohnin ah nangmih te BOEIPA loh n'doo van mahpawh
1Samuel8:19 Tedae Samuel ol te hnatun ham pilnam loh a aal uh tih
1Samuel8:20 Te daengah ni kaimih khaw namtom rhoek bangla boeih ka om uh eh. Ka manghai long tah kaimih ham lai a tloek vetih kaimih hmai ah lamhma ni

1Samuel9:1 Benjamin hlang kah a capa Aphiah
1Samuel9:2 Anih taengah capa pakhat tongpang then
1Samuel9:3 Saul napa Kish kah laak rhoek a hma pah hatah Kish loh a capa Saul taengah
1Samuel9:4 Te dongah Ephraim tlang te a paan tih Shalisha kho khaw a lan dae hmu rhoi pawh. Te phoeiah Shaalim kho la cet rhoi dae a om pawt dongah Benjamin kho te a lan rhoi akhaw hmu rhoi pawh.
1Samuel9:5 Zuph kho te a pha rhoi vaengah Saul loh a taengkah cadong te
1Samuel9:6 Tedae cadong loh Saul te
1Samuel9:7 Te dongah Saul loh a tueihyoeih taengah
1Samuel9:8 Tueihyoeih loh Saul te a rhaep la a doo tih
1Samuel9:9 Hlamat vaengah Israel khuikah hlang te Pathen dawt ham a caeh atah
1Samuel9:10 Te dongah Saul loh a taengca taengah
1Samuel9:11 Khopuei kham ah a yoeng rhoi vaengah tui than la aka lo hula rhoek te a hmuh rhoi tih amih te
1Samuel9:12 Te vaengah amih rhoi te a doo uh tih
1Samuel9:13 Buh ca la hmuensang ah a caeh hlanah khopuei la na kun rhoi atah anih te na hmuh bitni. Anih a pawk hlan khuiah tah pilnam long khaw ca hlan ni. Hmueih te anih loh yoethen a paek tih a khue rhoek loh a caak uh. Te dongah tahae rhoe ah anih taengla cet rhoi lamtah amah te tlek na hmuh rhoi bitni
1Samuel9:14 Te dongah khopuei te a paan rhoi tih kho lung la a pha rhoi vaengah tah hmuensang la aka cet Samuel te amih rhoi aka doe la tarha ha pawk.
1Samuel9:15 Saul a pha hlan kah hnin at vaengah Samuel hna te BOEIPA loh a hnacueh pah coeng tih
1Samuel9:16 “Thangvuen he vaeng tue ah Benjamin kho lamkah hlang pakhat te nang taengla kan tueih ni. Te vaengah anih te ka pilnam Israel soah rhaengsang la koelh lamtah ka pilnam te Philisti kut lamloh khang saeh. Ka pilnam kah a pangngawlnah te kai taengla ham pha te ka hmuh dam coeng
1Samuel9:17 Samuel loh Saul hmuh vaengah BOEIPA loh
1Samuel9:18 Saul tah vongka khui ah Samuel taengla thoeih tih
1Samuel9:19 Saul te Samuel loh a doo tih
1Samuel9:20 Laak rhoek te khaw namah taeng lamkah loh khohnin hnin thum hma coeng dae na hmuh la om coeng dongah te na lungbuei ah mawn sak boeh. Israel pum kah a sahnaih te ulae? Nang taeng neh na capa imkhui boeih taengah moenih a?
1Samuel9:21 Saul loh a doo tih
1Samuel9:22 Samuel loh Saul neh a taengca te a khuen tih imkhui la a kun puei. Tedae a khue hlang sawmthum tluk kah a lu ah amih rhoi te hmuen a paek.
1Samuel9:23 Te phoeiah Samuel loh imtawt taengah
1Samuel9:24 Te dongah imtawt loh maeh laeng te a pom tih Saul hmai ah a tloeng pah. Te phoeiah
1Samuel9:25 Hmuensang lamloh khopuei ha suntlak phoeiah imphu ah Saul neh a cal puei.
1Samuel9:26 Mincang a pha tom vaengah thoo rhoi tih Samuel loh Saul te imphu
1Samuel9:27 Amih te khopuei a bawt la suntla uh tih
1Samuel10:1 Te phoeiah
1Samuel10:2 Tihnin ah kai taeng lamloh na cet vetih Zelzah kah Benjamin khorhi Rakhel phuel ah hlang panit na hmuh ni. Te vaengah tlap hamla na caeh thil laak rhoek a hmuh te nang taengah a thui bitni. Laak kawng te na pa loh a toeng tih nangmih rhoi ham a mawn dongah
1Samuel10:3 Te lamloh voelh na poeng vaengah Tabor thingnu la na pawk vetih Bethel Pathen taengla aka cet hlang pathum te na hum uh ni. Pakhat loh maae ca pumthum a phueih ni
1Samuel10:4 Te vaengah nang te sading la n'dawt vetih vaidam hluem nit m'paek uh tekhaw amih kut lamloh doe pah.
1Samuel10:5 Te phoeiah Philisti khohung rhoek om nah Pathen som na pha ni. Khopuei te na paan vaengah hmuensang lamkah aka suntla tonghma hlop at te na hum uh ni. Amih hmai ah thangpa
1Samuel10:6 Te vaengah BOEIPA Mueihla loh nang soah a thaihtak bitni. Amih taengah na tonghma pah vetih hlang te a tloe la na maelh ni.
1Samuel10:7 Te vaengah miknoek he nang taengah thoeng rhoe thoeng ni. Pathen te nang taengah a om coeng dongah na kut a hmuh te nang ham saii la om ni.
1Samuel10:8 Kai hmai ah Gilgal la ana suntla laeh. Kai khaw a hnin rhih dongah rhoepnah hmueih ngawn ham neh hmueihhlutnah tloeng ham nang taengla ka suntla van ni. Nang taengla ka pawk duela n'rhing lamtah na saii koi te namah taengah kan tueng bitni
1Samuel10:9 Te dongah Samuel taeng lamloh nong ham a nam a hooi vaengah anih ham te Pathen loh lungbuei a tloe la vik a maelh dongah amah khohnin dongah miknoek khaw boeih thoeng.
1Samuel10:10 Som ah tah anih aka doe ham tonghma rhui at te tarha ha pawk uh. Pathen Mueihla loh anih te a thaihtak sak dongah amih lakli ah a tonghma pah.
1Samuel10:11 Tonghma rhoek taengah a tonghma van te hlaemvai lamkah anih aka ming boeih loh a hmuh uh. Pilnam khuiah khaw hlang loh a hui taengah
1Samuel10:12 Tedae te lamkah hlang loh a doo tih
1Samuel10:13 A tonghma te a toeng phoeiah hmuensang a paan.
1Samuel10:14 Te vaengah Saul kah a napanoe loh Saul neh a taengca te
1Samuel10:15 Te dongah Saul kah napanoe loh
1Samuel10:16 Te dongah a napanoe te Saul loh
1Samuel10:17 Te phoeiah pilnam te Samuel loh Mizpah kah BOEIPA taengla a khue.
1Samuel10:18 Te phoeiah Israel ca rhoek te
1Samuel10:19 Tedae nangmih kah yoethae cungkuem neh citcai lamloh nangmih aka khang na Pathen te tihnin ah nangmih loh na hnawt uh tih
1Samuel10:20 Israel koca rhoek boeih te Samuel loh a paan tih Benjamin koca te a tuuk.
1Samuel10:21 Te phoeiah Benjamin koca te a cako
1Samuel10:22 Te dongah BOEIPA taengah
1Samuel10:23 Te dongah yong uh tih Saul te a loh uh. Te vaengah pilnam lakli ah pai hang dae a laengpang lamloh a so hang mah pilnam boeih lakah sang.
1Samuel10:24 Te phoeiah Pilnam pum te Samuel loh
1Samuel10:25 Te phoeiah mangpa kah laitloeknah te Samuel loh pilnam ham a thui pah. Cabu dongah khaw a daek tih BOEIPA hmai ah a tloeng. Te daengah pilnam pum te Samuel loh a im la boeih a tueih.
1Samuel10:26 Saul khaw Gibeah kah amah im la a caeh hatah Pathen loh a lungbuei a bi pah tangtae tatthai hlang te tah anih taengla cet uh.
1Samuel10:27 Tedae aka muen ca rhoek long tah
1Samuel11:1 Ammoni Nahash te cet tih Jabesh Gilead te a rhaeh thil. Te vaengah Nahash taengah Jabesh hlang boeih loh
1Samuel11:2 Tedae amih te Ammoni Nahash loh
1Samuel11:3 Te dongah anih te Jabesh a hamca rhoek loh
1Samuel11:4 Te dongah puencawn rhoek loh Saul kah Gibeah a pha uh vaengah pilnam kah a hna ah ol a thui pa uh hatah pilnam pum loh a ol a huel uh tih rhap uh.
1Samuel11:5 Te vaengah Saul tah lohma lamloh saelhung hnukah pakcak ha pawk. Te dongah Saul loh
1Samuel11:6 Pathen Mueihla loh Saul soah a thaihtak sak tih te rhoek kah ol te a yaak a yaak vaengah a thintoek khaw muep sai.
1Samuel11:7 Te dongah vaito rhoi a loh tih a tloek. Te phoeiah puencawn rhoek kut neh Israel khorhi tom ah a pat tih
1Samuel11:8 Te vaengah Bezek kah rhoek te a soep hatah Israel ca thawng ya thum neh Judah hlang thawng sawmthum om uh.
1Samuel11:9 Te vaengah aka pawk puencawn rhoek te
1Samuel11:10 Te dongah Jabesh hlang rhoek loh
1Samuel11:11 A vuen ah pilnam te Saul loh hlop thum la a boel tih mincang khopo ah rhaehhmuen khui te a muk uh. Ammon te khosae duela a tloek uh. Te dongah aka sueng rhoek khaw taekyaak uh tih amih khuiah tun bok pataeng paih uh pawh.
1Samuel11:12 Te phoeiah pilnam loh Samuel taengah
1Samuel11:13 Tedae Saul loh
1Samuel11:14 Te phoeiah pilnam te Samuel loh
1Samuel11:15 Te dongah pilnam pum loh Gilgal la cet uh tih Saul te Gilgal kah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pahoi a manghai sak uh. Te vaengah rhoepnah hmueih te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pahoi a ngawn uh tih Saul neh Israel hlang boeih loh bahoeng a kohoe uh.
1Samuel12:1 Samuel loh Israel pum taengah
1Samuel12:2 Nangmih hmai ah manghai pakhat cet pawn ni ne. Kai he ka patong tih sampok loh n'rhol cakhaw ka ca rhoek he nangmih taengah om uh van coeng. Kai khaw ka camoe lamloh tihnin duela nangmih hmai ah ka cet van coeng.
1Samuel12:3 Heah he kai ka om tih BOEIPA hmai neh amah kah messiah hmai ah kai n'doo cakhaw
1Samuel12:4 Tedae
1Samuel12:5 Te phoeiah pilnam te
1Samuel12:6 Te phoeiah pilnam taengah Samuel loh
1Samuel12:7 Te dongah pai uh lamtah BOEIPA kah duengnah cungkuem loh nangmih ham neh na pa rhoek ham a saii vanbangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nangmih kah lai ka tloek pawn ni.
1Samuel12:8 Jakob loh Egypt a paan tih na pa rhoek loh BOEIPA a doek uh. Te dongah BOEIPA loh Moses neh Aaron a tueih vanbangla na pa rhoek te Egypt lamkah a khuen rhoi tih he hmuen ah kho a sak sak.
1Samuel12:9 Tedae BOEIPA a Pathen te a hnilh uh. Te dongah amih te Hazor caempuei kah mangpa Sisera kut la
1Samuel12:10 Te daengah BOEIPA te a khue uh tih a voek uh. Te vaengah
1Samuel12:11 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Jerubbaal
1Samuel12:12 Nangmih aka paan Ammon ca rhoek kah manghai Nahash te na hmuh uh vaengah BOEIPA na Pathen he nangmih kah manghai la om dae ta kai taengah tah
1Samuel12:13 Te dongah manghai na bih uh na coelh uh vanbangla BOEIPA loh nangmih ham manghai m'paek coeng he ne.
1Samuel12:14 BOEIPA te na rhih uh tih amah taengah tho na thueng uh atah
1Samuel12:15 Tedae BOEIPA ol te na hnatun uh pawt tih BOEIPA ol te na koek uh atah nangmih khaw na pa rhoek bangla BOEIPA kut loh n'cuuk thil ni.
1Samuel12:16 BOEIPA loh nangmih mikhmuh ah a saii hno len he pai uh lamtah hmu uh laeh.
1Samuel12:17 Tihnin he cang hamla cangah tue moenih nama? BOEIPA te ka khue vetih rhaek ol neh khotlan han tueih ve. Te dongah namah ham manghai na bih uh te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah na boethae ni muep na saii uh tila ming uh lamtah hmu uh
1Samuel12:18 Tekah khohnin dongah Samuel loh BOEIPA a khue hatah BOEIPA loh rhaek ol neh khotlan han tueih pah. Te dongah pilnam boeih loh BOEIPA neh Samuel te bahoeng a rhih.
1Samuel12:19 Samuel taengah pilnam boeih loh
1Samuel12:20 Te dongah pilnam te Samuel loh
1Samuel12:21 A hong hnukah taengphael uh boeh
1Samuel12:22 A ming tanglue kong ah BOEIPA loh a pilnam a phap sut moenih. Nangmih he a pilnam la saii ham BOEIPA loh a ngaih.
1Samuel12:23 Nangmih yueng la thangthui ham te ka toeng tih BOEIPA taengah ka tholh ham tah kai lamkah savisava. Te dongah nangmih te longpuei ah a then neh a thuem khaw kan thuinuet ni.
1Samuel12:24 BOEIPA te rhih uh lamtah na thinko boeih neh oltak dongah amah te thothueng thil uh. Nangmih te n'pantai sak te khaw hmu uh.
1Samuel12:25 Tedae na thae la na thae uh van atah namamih khaw na manghai neh na khoengvoep uh bitni
1Samuel13:1 Saul a manghai kum neh Israel soah kum nit a manghai nen tah
1Samuel13:2 Israel hlang thawng thum te Saul loh amah ham a coelh. Te vaengah Mikmash kah Saul taeng neh Bethel tlang ah a thawng thawng om uh tih Benjamin Gibeah kah Jonathan taengah khaw a thawng thawng la om uh. Pilnam hlangrhuel rhoek te amah dap la boeih a tueih.
1Samuel13:3 Geba kah Philisti khohung te Jonathan loh a tloek tih Philisti rhoek loh a yaak uh. Te dongah Saul loh kho takuem ah tuki a ueng tih
1Samuel13:4 Israel pum loh a yaak uh vaengah
1Samuel13:5 Te dongah Philisti loh Israel te vathoh thil ham
1Samuel13:6 Pilnam taengah lai a suk pah tih puen a cak te Israel hlang loh a hmuh vaengah pilnam tah lungko khuila
1Samuel13:7 Hebrew rhoek khaw Gad kho kah Jordan neh Gilead la kat uh. Tedae Saul amah tah Gilgal ah om pueng tih a hnukkah pilnam boeih long tah lakueng uh.
1Samuel13:8 Te dongah a khoning bangla Samuel te hnin rhih khuiah a rhing mai a rhing mai. Tedae Samuel te Gilgal la a pawk pawt dongah pilnam khaw Saul taeng lamloh taekyak uh.
1Samuel13:9 Te dongah Saul loh
1Samuel13:10 Tedae hmueihhlutnah a nawn te a khah van neh Samuel te tarha ha pawk tih anih doe ham neh uem hamla Saul te cet.
1Samuel13:11 Samuel loh
1Samuel13:12 Tedae
1Samuel13:13 Tedae Samuel loh Saul te
1Samuel13:14 Tedae na ram he pai voel mahpawh. BOEIPA loh nang ng'uen te na tuem pawt dongah amah kah thinko aka tong hlang ni BOEIPA loh a toem
1Samuel13:15 Te phoeiah Samuel te thoo tih Gilgal lamloh Benjamin Gibeah la cet. Pilnam te Saul loh a soep vaengah hlang ya rhuk tluk amah taengah a om pah.
1Samuel13:16 Saul
1Samuel13:17 Te vaengah Philisti caem lamkah kutpo rhoek te
1Samuel13:18 Rhoi at te Bethhoron longpuei la hooi uh tih rhoi at te kolrhawk la aka dan khosoek rhi kah longpuei la hooi uh.
1Samuel13:19 Te vaengah Israel kho tom ah kutthai ana om pawt hatah Philisti loh
1Samuel13:20 Tedae a thecung neh a tuktong mai khaw
1Samuel13:21 Tedae thecung neh tuktong khaw
1Samuel13:22 Te dongah caemtloek tue a pha vaengah Saul neh Jonathan taengkah pilnam he pakhat kut dongah khaw cunghang neh caai hmu voel pawh. Tedae Saul neh a capa Jonathan taengah ah dawk hmuh la om.
1Samuel13:23 Te vaengah Philisti rhaltawt hmuen tah Mikmash lamkai la pawk coeng.
1Samuel14:1 Hnin at a om nen tah Saul capa Jonathan loh a hno phuei cadong te
1Samuel14:2 Te vaengah Saul tah Gibeah bawt ah
1Samuel14:3 Te vaengah hnisui aka bai tih Shiloh ah BOEIPA kah khosoih la aka om Eli capa Phinekha koca Ikhabod mana Ahitub capa Ahijah khaw om. Tedae Jonathan a caeh te pilnam loh a ming moenih.
1Samuel14:4 Philisti rhaltawt hmuen paan ham te Jonathan loh a laklo kah lamkai longah a mae. Te vaengah rhalvangan khat benah thaelpang cangngok la om tih rhalvangan khat benah thaelpang cangngok la om bal. Pakhat a ming ah Bozez tih pakhat tah a ming ah Seneh ni.
1Samuel14:5 Lungto cangngok pakhat te tlangpuei kah Mikmash imdan ah

1Samuel14:12 Te dongah rhaltawt hlang rhoek loh Jonathan neh a hno phuei te a doo tih
1Samuel14:13 Jonathan te a kut a kho neh a luei vaengah a hno phuei loh a hnukah a rhoi van. Te vaengah Jonathan mikhmuh kah aka cungku rhoek te a hno phuei loh a hnukah a ngawn pah.
1Samuel14:14 Jonathan neh a hno phuei loh a tloek lamhma dongah khohmuen kah rhoi hma ngancawn ah hlang pakul tluk tah hmasoe la om.
1Samuel14:15 Te vaengah lambong khuiah khaw
1Samuel14:16 Benjamin Gibeah kah Saul kah rhaltawt rhoek loh a sawt uh vaengah tah hlangping te tarha paci tih he ben he bang la a caeh pah.
1Samuel14:17 Te dongah Saul loh a taengkah pilnam te

1Samuel14:19 Saul loh khosoih te a voek vaengah Philisti rhaehhmuen khuikah hlangping aka pongpa te a yet la muep pongpa uh. Te dongah khosoih te Saul loh
1Samuel14:20 Te daengah Saul neh a taengkah pilnam pum te a hueh tih caem te a paan uh. Tedae hlang kah cunghang loh a hui te a cuk thil tarha dongah soekloeknah loh len khungdaeng.
1Samuel14:21 Hebrew rhoek loh hlaem hlavai ah tah Philisti taengla om uh tih rhaehhmuen kaepvai ah amih taengla cet uh. Tedae amih khaw Saul neh Jonathan taengkah Israel taengla koep om uh.
1Samuel14:22 Philisti rhoek rhaelrham coeng tila Ephraim tlang ah aka thuh Israel hlang boeih loh a yaak uh vaengah caemtloek dongah amih taengah koep kaibaeng uh.
1Samuel14:23 Tekah khohnin ah Israel te BOEIPA loh a khang dongah caem long Bethaven a poeng phai.
1Samuel14:24 Te khohnin ah Israel hlang te a tueihno coeng. Saul loh pilnam te a tap tih
1Samuel14:25 Te daengah khohmuen pum loh duup neh diklai hman kah khoitui aka om te a paan uh pueng.
1Samuel14:26 Pilnam loh duup khuiah khoitui tuicip te lawt a thoeng thil. Tedae olhlo te pilnam loh a rhih dongah a ka khuila a kut puei pawh.
1Samuel14:27 Tedae a napa loh pilnam a toem a ngam vaengah Jonathan loh ya pawh. Te dongah a kut dongkah caitueng hmuidong te a khoh tih duup kah khoitui khuila a nuem. A hmuh lawt neh a kut te a ka dongla a coh hatah a mik a tueng pah.
1Samuel14:28 Te vaengah pilnam khuikah hlang pakhat loh a doo tih
1Samuel14:29 Te vaengah Jonathan loh
1Samuel14:30 A thunkha kah kutbuem a hmuh uh te pilnam loh tihnin ah ca lammah ca van mai koinih Philisti khuiah hmasoe yet pawt suidae a?
1Samuel14:31 Tekah khohnin ah Philisti te Mikmash lamloh Aijalon duela a tloek uh tih pilnam khaw mat tawn.

1Samuel14:48 Caem neh a saii tih Amalek te a tloek dongah anih aka reth kut lamloh Israel te a huul.
1Samuel14:49 Saul ca rhoek he Jonathan khaw

1Samuel16:1 BOEIPA loh Samuel te
1Samuel16:2 Tedae Samuel loh
1Samuel16:3 Tedae
1Samuel16:4 BOEIPA loh a thui te Samuel loh a saii tih Bethlehem a pha hatah anih doe ham te khopuei hamca rhoek te lakueng uh tih
1Samuel16:5 Te dongah
1Samuel16:6 A pha vaengah Eliab te a hmuh hatah
1Samuel16:7 Tedae BOEIPA loh Samuel te
1Samuel16:8 Te dongah Jesse loh Abinadab te a khue tih Samuel mikhmuh ah a thak hatah
1Samuel16:9 Te phoeiah Jesse loh Shammah te thawt hatah
1Samuel16:10 Jesse loh a parhih ca te Samuel hmai ah a thawt coeng dae Jesse te Samuel loh
1Samuel16:11 Te dongah Jesse te Samuel loh
1Samuel16:12 A tah tih ha pawk vaengah anih a lingphung la sakthen mik neh mueihmuh khaw then. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh
1Samuel16:13 Te daengah Samuel loh situi ki te a loh tih a manuca rhoek kah lakli ah David te a koelh. Te dongah te khohnin lamlong tah BOEIPA kah Mueihla loh David te sarhi a tak tih a so la cungphoek hang. Te phoeiah Samuel te thoo tih Ramah la cet.
1Samuel16:14 Tahae ah BOEIPA kah Mueihla tah Saul taeng lamloh nong coeng tih BOEIPA lamkah mueihla thae loh anih te a let sak coeng.
1Samuel16:15 Te dongah Saul te a sal rhoek loh
1Samuel16:16 Na mikhmuh kah na sal rhoek taengah ka boeipa loh thui lamtah rhotoeng tum aka ming hlang pakhat te tlam uh saeh. Te daengah ni Pathen kah mueihla thae te nang soah a om a om vaengah a kut neh rhotoeng te a tum vetih nang ham a then eh
1Samuel16:17 Te dongah Saul loh a sal rhoek te
1Samuel16:18 Te vaengah camoe rhoek khuikah pakhat loh a doo tih
1Samuel16:19 Saul loh Jesse taengla puencawn rhoek te a tueih tih
1Samuel16:20 Te dongah Jesse loh laak
1Samuel16:21 David te Saul taengla a pawk vaengah a mikhmuh ah pai. Te vaengah anih te bahoeng a lungnah dongah anih kah hnopai phuei la pahoi a om sak.
1Samuel16:22 Te phoeiah Saul loh Jesse taengla hlang a tueih tih
1Samuel16:23 Pathen kah mueihla loh Saul te a pha tih a om thil takuem vaengah
1Samuel17:1 Philisti lambong rhoek te coi uh thae tih caemtloek ham Judah khuikah Sokoh ah tingtun uh. Te vaengah Sokoh laklo neh Azekah laklo kah Ephesdammim ah Philisti rhoek te rhaeh uh.
1Samuel17:2 Te dongah Saul neh Israel hlang te tingtun uh tih Elah ah rhaeh uh. Te phoeiah Philisti te doe hamla caemtloek rhong a pai uh.
1Samuel17:3 Te vaengah Philisti te tlang pakhat ah pai tih Israel khaw tlang pakhat ah pai van. Amih laklo ah kolrhawk om.
1Samuel17:4 Te vaengah Philisti rhaehhmuen lamloh pumlen hlang pakhat ha pawk. Anih tah Gath lamkah tih a ming ah Goliath ni. Anih kah a sang te dong rhuk neh khap at lo.
1Samuel17:5 A lu ah rhohum lumuek neh a caempho lip te a pueinak nah. Caempho te a khiing rhohum shekel thawng nga lo.
1Samuel17:6 A kho rhoi dongkah rhohum khocin neh a laengpang laklo ah rhohum soe om bal.
1Samuel17:7 A thaltang neh a caai tueng te hni tah tampai bangla om tih a caai sum te thi shekel ya rhuk neh a saii. Te vaengah photlinglen aka pom te a hmai ah cet.
1Samuel17:8 Te phoeiah Israel caem rhoek te a pai thil tih a doek. Te vaengah amih te
1Samuel17:9 Anih loh kai te hnueih hamla a na tih kai ng'ngawn atah nangmih taengah sal la ka om uh eh
1Samuel17:10 Te dongah Philisti loh
1Samuel17:11 Amih Philisti ol te Saul neh Israel pum loh a yaak vaengah rhihyawp uh tih bahoeng a rhih uh.
1Samuel17:12 David tah Judah Bethlehem lamkah Ephraim hlang kah a capa ni. Anih Ephraim hlang kah a ming tah Jesse a taengah ca tongpa parhet om. Tekah hlang khaw Saul tue vaengah tah hlang lakli ah patong lamni a van coeng.
1Samuel17:13 Jesse ca rhoek khuikah a ham rhoek pathum loh Saul hnukah ah bang uh tih caemtloek la cet uh. Caemtloek la aka cet a ca pathum ka a ming tah; a cacuek Eliab
1Samuel17:14 Te vaengah David tah camoe pueng tih a ham pathum longni Saul hnuk a vai uh.
1Samuel17:15 Te dongah David te Saul taeng lamloh bal tih a napa kah boiva te luem puei ham Bethlehem la cet.
1Samuel17:16 Philisti loh a thoh vanneh kholaeh duela thoeih uh tih khohnin sawmli khuiah a pai thil.
1Samuel17:17 Te vaengah Jesse loh a capa David te
1Samuel17:18 Sukkhal tlang rha te thawngkhat kah mangpa ham khuen pah. Na maya rhoek te sading kawng te hip lamtah amih kah mingphanah te han khuen
1Samuel17:19 Te vaengah Saul neh amih Israel hlang boeih long tah Philisti te Elah ah a vathoh thil uh.
1Samuel17:20 David te mincang ah thoo tih boiva te aka dawn kung taengah a hlah. Te phoeiah sawn uh tih Jesse loh a uen bangla cet. Namtlak a paan hatah caem la aka khoong tatthai rhoek longtah caemtloek ham yuhui uh.
1Samuel17:21 Te vaengah caem te caem neh mah hamla Israel neh Philisti loh rhong a pai.
1Samuel17:22 David loh amah taengkah hnopai te hno khoem kut ah a tloeng tih caem lakli la yong. A pha vaengah a maya rhoek taengah sadingnah kawng te a dawt.
1Samuel17:23 Amih neh a cal vaengah
1Samuel17:24 Tekah hlang te Israel hlang boeih loh a hmuh uh vaengah bahoeng a rhih uh tih a mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham uh.
1Samuel17:25 Israel hlang longtah
1Samuel17:26 Te dongah David loh a taengkah aka pai hlang rhoek te a dawt tih
1Samuel17:27 Te dongah anih ham pilnam loh hekah olka he a thui pah tih
1Samuel17:28 Hlang rhoek taengah a thui te a maya a ham Eliab loh a yaak vaengah Eliab kah thintoek te David taengla sai tih
1Samuel17:29 Tedae David loh
1Samuel17:30 Te phoeiah anih taeng lamkah te a tloe hmai la mael tih olka te koep a dawt hatah olka te lamhma kah olka bangla anih te pilnam loh a thuung.
1Samuel17:31 David kah a thui ol te a yaak uh vaengah
1Samuel17:32 Saul taengah David loh
1Samuel17:33 Tedae David te Saul loh
1Samuel17:34 Tedae David loh Saul taengah
1Samuel17:35 Tedae a hnukah ka hlak tih ka ngawn
1Samuel17:36 Na sal long he sathueng neh vom khaw a tloek coeng. A hing Pathen kah caem aka veet pumdul Philisti te amih banglam ni a om
1Samuel17:37 Te phoeiah David loh
1Samuel17:38 Te phoeiah Saul loh amah kah himbai te David a bai sak tih
1Samuel17:39 David loh a himbai soah a cunghang te a vah tih caeh hamla huel uh dae amah te noem uh tloel. Te dongah David loh Saul taengah
1Samuel17:40 Te dongah a kut dongkah a cunghol a khuen tih soklong kah lungto lungpuelh panga a coelh thil tih boiva aka tudawn hnopai dongkah sungkoi khuiah a yom. Te phoeiah a kut dongkah payai neh Philisti taengla thoeih.
1Samuel17:41 A pha vaengah Philisti te cet phai tih David taengla a paan phai. Te vaengah Philisti hlang a hmai ah hlang pakhat loh photlinglen a pom pah.
1Samuel17:42 Philisti loh a paelki. Te vaengah David te a hmuh. Tedae camoe om tih a lingphung la
1Samuel17:43 Te dongah David te Philisti loh
1Samuel17:44 Te phoeiah David te Philisti loh
1Samuel17:45 Tedae David loh Philisti te
1Samuel17:46 Tihnin ah nang he BOEIPA loh kai kut dongah n'tloeng pawn ni. Te vaengah nang te kan ngawn vetih na pum dongkah na lu te kang rhaih vetih Philisti lambong kah a rhok te tihnin ah vaan kah vaa neh diklai mulhing taengla ka paek ni. Te vaengah Israel lakli ah Pathen om tila diklai pum loh a ming ni.
1Samuel17:47 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh cunghang neh
1Samuel17:48 Te vaengah Philisti te thoo tih cet phai. David te doe hamla a moeh. Tedae David te cu tih Philisti doe hamla caem te a yong thil.
1Samuel17:49 David loh a hno khuila a kut a puei. Te lamkah lungto te a loh tih a dong hatah Philisti te a tal ah a dae. A tal dongah lungto kun tih a hmai longah diklai la cungku.
1Samuel17:50 Philisti te David loh payai neh
1Samuel17:51 David te yong tih Philisti te a pai thil. A capang khuikah cunghang te a tuuk tih a bong phoeiah anih te a duek sak. Te neh a lu a rhaih pah vaengah tah a hlangrhalh duek coeng tila a hmuh uh tih Philisti rhoek khaw rhaelrham uh.
1Samuel17:52 Te vaengah Israel neh Judah hlang rhoek te thoo uh tih yuhui uh. Te phoeiah kolrhawk neh Ekron vongka la aka pawk Philisti rhoek te a hloem uh. Te dongah Philisti kah a rhok he Shaaraim longpuei neh Gath
1Samuel17:53 Philisti a hlak uh lamkah a bal uh phoeiah Philisti rhaehhmuen te Israel ca loh a reth.
1Samuel17:54 Philisti kah a lu te David loh a loh tih Jerusalem la a khuen. Tedae a hnopai te tah a dap ah a khueh pah.
1Samuel17:55 Philisti doe hamla David a caeh te a hmuh vaengah Saul loh caempuei mangpa Abner te
1Samuel17:56 Te dongah manghai loh
1Samuel17:57 Te dongah Philisti ngawn lamkah aka mael David te Abner loh a loh tih Saul kah mikhmuh ah a pawk puei. Te vaengah Philisti lu te a kut dongah a pom.
1Samuel17:58 Te phoeiah Saul loh
1Samuel18:1 Saul taengah a thui te a khah van neh Jonathan kah a hinglu neh David kah a hinglu he hlaengtang uh rhoi. Te dongah Jonathan te a lungnah tih anih khaw Jonathan loh amah kah hinglu bangla a lungnah.
1Samuel18:2 Tekah khohnin lamkah longah David Saul loh a loh tih
1Samuel18:3 David te Jonathan loh amah hinglu bangla a lungnah dongah moi a boh pah.
1Samuel18:4 Te dongah Jonathan loh a hnikul te a pit tih a himbai khaw
1Samuel18:5 A cungkuem dongah Saul loh anih a tueih vanbangla David khaw cet tih a cangbam. Te dongah anih te Saul caemtloek hlang rhoek kah soah a khueh tih pilnam boeih kah mikhmuh ah khaw Saul kah a sal rhoek kah mikhmuh ah khaw mikhmai then a dang.
1Samuel18:6 Philisti aka tloek lamloh David ha bal phoeiah amih te khaw bal uh. Te vaengah manghai Saul doe hamla Israel khopuei tom lamkah huta rhoek loh kamrhing neh
1Samuel18:7 Te vaengah huta rhoek loh a nueih doela a doo uh tih
1Samuel18:8 Te vaengah Saul te ta-oe lungoe. Tekah olka te a mikhmuh ah thae ni a huet pah. Te dongah Saul loh
1Samuel18:9 Te khohnin lamkah long tah Saul loh David te thaesainah neh a mikmuelh coeng.
1Samuel18:10 A vuen ah tah Pathen kah mueihla thae te Saul soah thaihtak tih a im khui ah a tonghma pah. Khohnin khohnin ah David loh a kut neh rhotoeng a tum pah dae Saul kut dongah caai ni a om.
1Samuel18:11 Te vaengah Saul loh David te
1Samuel18:12 David he BOEIPA loh a om puei dongah Saul loh a rhih. Tedae David amah te Saul taeng lamloh vik nong.
1Samuel18:13 Te dongah Saul loh David te amah taeng lamloh a tueih tih amah yueng la thawngkhat kah mangpa la a khueh. Te dongah David khaw pilnam kah mikhmuh la mop van tih pongpa van.
1Samuel18:14 A longpuei ah David te BOEIPA loh boeih a cangbam tih anih te a om puei.
1Samuel18:15 Anih loh bahoeng a cangbam te Saul loh a hmuh vaengah a mikhmuh ah bakuep coeng.
1Samuel18:16 David he Israel neh Judah pum loh a lungnah dongah amah amih mikhmuh ah mop van tih pongpa van.
1Samuel18:17 Te vaengah David te Saul loh
1Samuel18:18 Tedae David loh Saul taengah
1Samuel18:19 Tedae Saul canu Merab te David taengla paek ham a tue a pha vaengah tah anih te Mekoloti Adriel yuu la a paek.
1Samuel18:20 David loh Saul canu Mikhal a lungnah tih Saul taengla a puen pa uh hatah olka te a mikhmuh ah a thuem sak.
1Samuel18:21 Te vaengah Saul loh
1Samuel18:22 Te phoeiah Saul loh a sal rhoek te
1Samuel18:23 Tekah ol te Saul kah sal rhoek loh David hna ah a thui uh. Tedae David loh
1Samuel18:24 Te dongah Saul taengla a sal rhoek te puen uh tih David kah a thui olka te a thui pah.
1Samuel18:25 Saul loh
1Samuel18:26 Te olka te a sal rhoek loh David taengla a puen pa uh vaengah tah
1Samuel18:27 Te dongah David te thoo tih a hlang rhoek te a caeh puei. Te phoeiah Philisti hlang yahnih te a ngawn. Amih kah yahhmui te David loh a khuen tih manghai loh a cava nah ham a kuek te manghai taengah a cuum sak. Te daengah a yuu la a canu Mikhal te Saul loh David taengah a paek.
1Samuel18:28 Saul loh a sawt vaengah David taengah BOEIPA om tih Saul canu Mikhal loh David a lungnah te a ming.
1Samuel18:29 David a rhih te Saul loh koep koep a koei dongah hnin takuem ah Saul he David kah thunkha la a om pah.
1Samuel18:30 Philisti mangpa rhoek ha pawk tih amih taengah aka cet dingdoeng la a om vaengah khaw Saul kah a sal rhoek te David loh boeih a cangbam dongah a ming khaw then tangkik.
1Samuel19:1 Saul loh a capa Jonathan taengah khaw a sal rhoek taengah khaw David te duek sak hamla boeih a thui pah. Tedae Saul capa Jonathan longtah David te bahoeng a ngaih.
1Samuel19:2 Te dongah Jonathan te David taengah a puen tih
1Samuel19:3 Kai khaw ka cet vetih na om nah lohma kah a pa kut dongah kana pai bitni. Te vaengah nang kawng te kamah loh a pa taengah ka thui pah vetih mebang ka hmuh akhaw nang taengah ka puen bitni
1Samuel19:4 David kawng te Jonathan loh a napa Saul taengah a then la a thui pah tih
1Samuel19:5 A kut dongah a hinglu te a hmoel tih Philisti a ngawn khaw
1Samuel19:6 Saul loh Jonathan ol te a yaak vaengah
1Samuel19:7 Te dongah Jonathan loh David te a khue tih olka he khaw anih taengah Jonathan loh boeih a thui pah. Te phoeiah David te Jonathan loh Saul taengla a khuen tih hlaem hlavai kah bangla a mikhmuh ah a om pah.
1Samuel19:8 Caemtloek loh a koei tih a om vaengah David te hlah uh tih Philisti te a vathoh thil. Te vaengah amih te hmasoe len neh a ngawn tih Philisti khaw David mikhmuh lamkah rhaelrham uh.
1Samuel19:9 Tedae BOEIPA kah mueihla thae loh Saul soah a om vaengah tah a kut dongkah caai neh a im khuiah ngol. Te vaengah David loh kut a luem nah.
1Samuel19:10 Saul loh David neh pangbueng te caai neh daeng rhenten hamla a moeh coeng dae Saul kah mikhmuh ah a phaelhael tak dongah caai te pangbueng dongah tlaeh. David khaw tekah khoyin ah rhaelrham tih a poeng a hal.
1Samuel19:11 Te dongah anih te dawn tih mincang ah ngawn hamla Saul loh David im la puencawn a hlah. Tedae a yuu Mikhal te David taengla puen tih
1Samuel19:12 Te dongah Mikhal loh David te bangbuet longah a suntlak tih a caeh sak daengah yong pueng tih a poeng a hal pueng.
1Samuel19:13 Te phoeiah Mikhal loh sithui te a loh tih baiphaih dongah a soei. A lu ah maae mul aka khueh pah tih himbai neh a khuk.
1Samuel19:14 David te tuuk hamla Saul loh puencawn rhoek a tueih vaengah tah
1Samuel19:15 Tedae David te sawt hamla Saul loh puencawn rhoek te a tueih tih
1Samuel19:16 Tedae baiphaih dongkah sithui vik te a lu dongah maae mul hoeng la puencawn rhoek loh kak a thoeng thil uh.
1Samuel19:17 Te dongah Saul loh Mikhal te
1Samuel19:18 David te yong tih a loeih phoeiah Ramah kah Samuel te a paan. Te vaengah Saul loh anih taengah a saii te a taengah boeih a thui pah. Te phoeiah Samuel neh cet rhoi tih Naioth ah om rhoi.
1Samuel19:19 Tedae Saul taengla a puen pa uh tih
1Samuel19:20 Te dongah David tuuk hamla Saul loh puencawn rhoek te a tueih. Te vaengah tonghma tarhoi te tonghma uh tih amih taengah Samuel cawkdawk la a pai te a hmuh uh. Saul kah puencawn rhoek khaw Pathen Mueihla loh a om thil dongah amih khaw boeih tonghma uh.
1Samuel19:21 Saul taengla a puen uh dongah puencawn a tloe rhoek a tueih hatah amih khaw nunan tonghma uh. Te dongah Saul loh a pathum duela a rhaep tih puencawn rhoek te a tueih hatah amih khaw tonghma uh sumsoek.
1Samuel19:22 Te dongah amah khaw Ramah la cet tih Seku kah tangrhom puei la pawk. Te vaengah a dawt tih
1Samuel19:23 Te dongah Ramah Naioth la pahoi cet. Tedae anih khaw Pathen Mueihla loh a om thil dongah cet cet tih Ramah Naioth a pha duela voek tonghma bal.
1Samuel19:24 Amah khaw a himbai a pit tih Samuel mikhmuh ah amah tonghma bal. Te khothaih puet khoyin puet pumtling la yalh. Te dongah

1Samuel20:6 Na pa loh kai in hah n'toem tih
1Samuel20:7 Tete then a ti atah na sal he sading la om ni. Tedae anih te sai la sai mai koinih anih te yoethaenah neh rhoeh coeng tila ming laeh.
1Samuel20:8 Tedae BOEIPA kah paipi rhangneh na sal taengah sitlohnah khueh mai. Na sal he namah taengla khuen mai. Thaesainah he ni ka khuiah a om atah kai he namah loh n'duek sak

1Samuel20:14 Tedae kai he ka phat hing pawt atah BOEIPA kah sitlohnah te kai taengah saii boeh. Tedae kai ka duek vailaih moenih.
1Samuel20:15 Na sitlohnah te ka imkhui dong lamloh kumhal duela haih boeh. BOEIPA loh David kah thunkha rhoek te diklai hman kah hlang lamloh a haih vaengah pataeng haih boel saeh

1Samuel20:32 Tedae Jonathan loh a napa Saul te a doo tih

1Samuel20:42 Te phoeiah David te Jonathan loh
1Samuel21:1 David te hlah uh tih a caeh vanneh Jonathan khaw amah kho la bal. David tah Nob kah khosoih Ahimelek taengla pawk. Tedae David doe ham te Ahimelek te lakueng tih
1Samuel21:2 David loh khosoih Ahimelek te
1Samuel21:3 Na kut dongah vaidam panga tah om aya? Na hmuh duen khaw ka kut dongah pae laeh
1Samuel21:4 Khosoih loh David te a doo tih
1Samuel21:5 Te vaengah David loh khosoih te a doo tih amah taengah
1Samuel21:6 Te vaengah buh a om pawt dongah BOEIPA mikhmuh lamkah a rhoe a hmai buh cim te khosoih loh David a paek. Te khohnin ah buh bae neh a tho ham koi te vik a loh coeng.
1Samuel21:7 Tekah khohnin ah Saul sal rhoek khui lamkah hlang pakhat
1Samuel21:8 Te phoeiah Ahimelek te David loh
1Samuel21:9 Khosoih loh
1Samuel21:10 Tekah khohnin ah David te hlah uh tih Saul mikhmuh lamloh aka yong te Gath manghai Akhish taengla pawk.
1Samuel21:11 Tedae anih te Akhish kah sal rhoek loh
1Samuel21:12 Tekah olka te David loh a thinko ah a khueh tih Gath manghai Akhish mikhmuh ah mat a rhih.
1Samuel21:13 Te dongah amih mikhmuh ah a om a ih te a thovael tih amih kut dongah yan uh. Vongka thohkhaih dongah a khoeih a khoeih tih a tamkai te a hmuimul dongla a tlak sak.
1Samuel21:14 Te dongah Akhish loh a sal rhoek taengah
1Samuel21:15 Pavai ka nai tih nim pavai he kai taengla nang khuen uh? Kai im khuila kun saeh a he?
1Samuel22:1 Gath lamkah loh David cet tih Adullam lungko la a poeng a hal. Te vaengah a manuca rhoek neh a napa imkhui loh boeih a yaak uh tih anih taeng la suntla uh.
1Samuel22:2 Te vaengah a caeknah kah hlang boeih
1Samuel22:3 David tah te lamloh Moab Mizpeh la cet tih
1Samuel22:4 Te tlam te Moab manghai kah mikhmuh ah amih te a khuen tih rhalvong khuiah David a om tue khuiah Moab manghai neh kho a sak uh.
1Samuel22:5 Tonghma Gad loh David taengah
1Samuel22:6 David neh anih taengkah hlang rhoek a phoe te Saul loh a yaak. Te vaengah Saul te Gibeah thaehhing kah kolanhlaeng hmuiah ngol tih a kut dongah caai a pom. A sal rhoek long khaw anih te boeih vai a pai thil uh.
1Samuel22:7 Saul loh amah aka pai thil a sal rhoek te
1Samuel22:8 Nangmih loh kai he boeih nan hlaengtang thil uh ngawn dae kai capa loh Jesse capa neh paipi a saii vaengah kai hna ah a kun moenih. Tihnin kah bangla kai he rhongngol thil ham ka capa loh ka sal a pai puei te kai ham ko aka thae tih kai hna ah aka thui khaw na om uh moenih
1Samuel22:9 Tedae Saul kah sal rhoek taengah aka pai Edom hoel Doeg loh a doo tih
1Samuel22:10 Anih ham BOEIPA a dawt pah tih anih te lampu a paek. Te phoeiah Philisti Goliath kah cunghang te anih taengla a paek
1Samuel22:11 Te dongah manghai loh Ahitub capa khosoih Ahimelek neh Nob ah khosoih aka bi a napa imkhui boeih te a tah tih a khue. Te dongah amih te manghai taengla boeih ha pawk uh.
1Samuel22:12 Saul loh
1Samuel22:13 Te phoeiah anih te Saul loh
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelek loh manghai te a doo tih
1Samuel22:15 Tihnin ah anih ham Pathen ka dawt he ka uem a
1Samuel22:16 Tedae manghai loh
1Samuel22:17 Te phoeiah manghai loh a taengkah aka pai aka cungpoeh rhoek taengkah
1Samuel22:18 Te vaengah manghai loh Doeg te
1Samuel22:19 Khosoih rhoek kah khopuei Nob te khaw cunghang ha neh a ngawn tih
1Samuel22:20 Tedae Ahitub capa Ahimelek kah a capa pakhat tah loeih. Anih ming tah Abiathar tih David hnukah yong.
1Samuel22:21 Saul loh BOEIPA kah khosoih rhoek a ngawn te Abiathar loh David taengla a puen pah.
1Samuel22:22 David loh Abiathar taengah
1Samuel22:23 Kai taengah khosa lamtah kai kah hinglu han toem khaw
1Samuel23:1 David taengla puen uh tih
1Samuel23:2 Tedae David loh BOEIPA a dawt tih
1Samuel23:3 Tedae David kah hlang rhoek loh
1Samuel23:4 Te dongah BOEIPA te David loh a rhaep la koep a dawt. Te vaengah anih te BOEIPA loh a doo tih
1Samuel23:5 Te dongah David te amah hlang
1Samuel23:6 Ahimelek capa Abiathar loh Keilah kah David taengla a yong vaengah a kut dongah hnisui a suntlak puei.
1Samuel23:7 Keilah la David a pawk te Saul taengla a puen pah. Te vaengah Saul loh
1Samuel23:8 Te dongah caemtloek ham neh Keilah la suntla tih David neh a hlang rhoek te dum hamla Saul loh pilnam pum te a yaak sak.
1Samuel23:9 Saul loh boethae neh amah a rhim thil te David loh a ming tih khosoih Abiathar te
1Samuel23:10 Te phoeiah David loh
1Samuel23:11 Keilah boei rhoek he anih kut dongla ka ka tloeng aya. Na sal loh a yaak bangla Saul ha suntla aya. Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh
1Samuel23:12 Te dongah David loh
1Samuel23:13 Te daengah David thoo tih amah kah hlang rhoek hlang ya rhuk tluk neh Keilah lamloh nong uh tih cet uh. A caeh uh phoei daengah Keilah lamloh David loh a loeih te Saul taengla a puen pa uh. Te dongah a caeh ham khaw vik a toeng.
1Samuel23:14 David tah khosoek ah khaw
1Samuel23:15 Horesh kah Ziph khosoek ah David a om vaengah a hinglu mae pah ham Saul ha pawk te David loh a hmuh.
1Samuel23:16 Saul capa Jonathan te thoo tih Horesh kah David taengla cet
1Samuel23:17 Te vaengah David te
1Samuel23:18 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah amih rhoi loh paipi a saii rhoi. Tedae David tah Horesh ah kho a sak tih
1Samuel23:19 Ziphim rhoek loh Gibeah kah Saul taengla cet uh tih
1Samuel23:20 Na hinglu kah a hue bang boeih la manghai namah te kaimih taengla ha suntla lammah ha suntla dae. Anih te manghai kut ah kan det bitni
1Samuel23:21 Saul loh
1Samuel23:22 Cet uh laeh
1Samuel23:23 Te dongah so uh lamtah a thuh nah te congket conglong khaw boeih ming uh. Te phoeiah kai taengah rhuemtuet la ha mael lamtah nangmih taengla ka lo eh. Khohmuen ah anih te khoem a om mai khaming
1Samuel23:24 Te dongah thoo uh tih Ziph la Saul hmai ah cet uh. Te vaengah David neh a hlang rhoek tah Arabah kah khopong bantang duela
1Samuel23:25 Saul neh a hlang rhoek loh tlap ham cet uh. Tedae David taengla a puen uh dongah Maon khosoek kah thaelpang la suntla tih kho a sak. Saul loh a yaak vaengah Maon khosoek la David te a hloem.
1Samuel23:26 Saul te tlang kah a hael pakhat ah a caeh vaengah David neh a hlang rhoek khaw tlang kah a hael pakhat ah cet uh. Tedae David tah Saul hmai lamkah caeh hamla tamto coeng. Te vaengah Saul neh a hlang rhoek loh David neh a hlang rhoek te tuuk hamla a vael uh.
1Samuel23:27 Te vaengah puencawn te Saul taengla ha pawk tih
1Samuel23:28 Saul loh David hnuk a hloem te a mael tak tih
1Samuel23:29 Te phoeiah David tah te lamloh cet tih Engedi rhalmahim ah kho a sak.
1Samuel24:1 Philisti hnuk lamloh Saul a mael van neh a taengla puen uh tih
1Samuel24:2 Te dongah Saul loh Israel boeih khui lamkah hlang coelh thawng thum te a khuen tih sathai lungpang dan kah David neh a hlang rhoek te tlap ham cet.
1Samuel24:3 Saul loh boiva kah tanglung longpuei kaep te a paan. Te vaengah lungko tapkhoeh a om dongah a kho khuk hamla Saul loh a kun thil. Te vaengah David neh a hlang rhoek tah lungko kah a hlaep ah om uh.
1Samuel24:4 Te vaengah David kah hlang rhoek loh
1Samuel24:5 Saul kah hni hmoi a hlueng pah dongah David khaw a lungbuei loh a ngawn van.
1Samuel24:6 Te dongah a hlang rhoek taengah
1Samuel24:7 Tedae a hlang rhoek te David loh ol neh a daeh tih amih loh Saul a tlai uh thil ham khaw ngaih puei pawh. Saul ngawn tah lungko lamloh thoo tih longpuei te a paan.
1Samuel24:8 Te phoeiah David khaw thoo van tih lungko
1Samuel24:9 David loh Saul te
1Samuel24:10 Ti hnin ah na mik loh a hmuh coeng he. Ti hnin ah lungko khuiah ni nang he BOEIPA loh ka kut dongla m'paek coeng tih nang te ngawn ham pataeng a thui coeng. Tedae nang te kang rhen dongah
1Samuel24:11 A pa so lah he
1Samuel24:12 Kai laklo neh nang laklo ah BOEIPA loh laitloek nawn saeh. Nang lamkah kah khaw BOEIPA loh kai taengah phulo nawn saeh. Tedae ka kut loh nang n'cuuk thil boel saeh.
1Samuel24:13 Yan kah thuidoeknah loh a thui vanbangla halang lamloh halangnah ni a thoeng. Te dongah ka kut loh nang n'cuuk thil boel saeh.
1Samuel24:14 Israel manghai loh ulae a thoeng thil? U hnuk lae na hloem? Ui duek hnuk neh uihli hnuk a?
1Samuel24:15 Te dongah BOEIPA he laitloekkung la om saeh lamtah kai laklo neh nang laklo ah laitloek nawn saeh. Ka tuituknah khaw hmu saeh lamtah ho saeh. Nang kut lamkah pataeng kai n'tang sak nawn saeh
1Samuel24:16 Hekah ol he David loh Saul taengah a thui boeih phoeiah tah Saul loh
1Samuel24:17 Te phoeiah David te
1Samuel24:18 Tihnin kah na phoe vanbangla kai taengah a then ni na saii pai. Kai he nang kut dongah BOEIPA loh n'det coeng dae kai nang ngawn pawh.
1Samuel24:19 Hlang pakhat loh a thunkha te a hmuh coeng atah longpuei ah a then la a tueih a? Tihnin ah kai taengah na saii te BOEIPA loh nang taengah a then neh n'thuung saeh.
1Samuel24:20 Manghai rhoela na manghai vetih na kut ah Israel ram pai ni tila ka ming coeng ne.
1Samuel24:21 Te dongah kamah hnukah ka tii ka ngan na saii pawt ham neh
1Samuel24:22 Te dongah David loh Saul taengah ol a caeng. Te phoeiah Saul te amah im la cet tih David neh a hlang rhoek tah rhalvong la cet uh.
1Samuel25:1 Samuel tah duek coeng. Te dongah Israel pum te tingtun uh tih anih te a rhaengsae uh. Te phoeiah Ramah kah amah im ah a up uh. Te vaengah David te thoo tih Paran khosoek la suntla.
1Samuel25:2 Te vaengah Maon ah hlang pakhat om tih Karmel ah a bibi om. Tekah hlang tah bahoeng boei tih a taengah tu thawng thum neh maae thawngkhat a khueh. Te dongah Karmel kah a tu te a mul vok ham a om pah.
1Samuel25:3 Tekah hlang ming tah Nabal tih
1Samuel25:4 Nabal loh a tu a vok te David loh khosoek ah a yaak coeng.
1Samuel25:5 Te dongah David loh cadong hlangrha a tueih. Te vaengah cadong rhoek te David loh
1Samuel25:6 Te vaengah 'Namah te hingnah neh sading la
1Samuel25:7 Namah ham a dawn coeng tih namah ham a vok uh te ka yaak coeng. Kaimih taengah khaw om uh coeng. Amih loh hmaithae sak pawt tih amih te pakhat khaw a ha moenih. Amih te Karmel ah khohnin yungah om uh.
1Samuel25:8 Na ca rhoek te dawt lamtah namah taengah a thui uh bitni. Te dongah khohnin then dongah ha mop lamtah na mik dongkah na mikdaithen te camoe rhoek loh hmu van saeh. Na kut loh a loh te tah na sal rhoek taengah khaw
1Samuel25:9 Te dongah David kah camoe rhoek loh a pha uh neh te rhoek kah olka boeih te David ming neh Nabal taengah a thui uh tih a khueh uh.
1Samuel25:10 Tedae Nabal loh David kah sal rhoek te a doo tih
1Samuel25:11 Ka buh neh ka tui khaw
1Samuel25:12 Te dongah David kah camoe rhoek tah a longpuei la ki buung uh tih mael uh. A pha uh neh te rhoek kah olka boeih te David taengla puen uh.
1Samuel25:13 Te dongah David loh a hlang rhoek te
1Samuel25:14 Te vaengah camoe rhoek lamkah camoe pakhat loh Nabal yuu Abigal taengah puen tih
1Samuel25:15 Tekah hlang rhoek tah kaimih taengah bahoeng then uh. Khohmuen kah kaimih taengah pongpa uh tih a om tue khuiah hmaithae a om kolla pakhat pataeng ka talae uh pawh.
1Samuel25:16 Khoyin neh khothaih ah khaw kaimih taengah vongtung la om uh. Kaimih neh a om tue khuiah tah amih taengah boiva a luem sak uh.
1Samuel25:17 Te dongah ming lamtah hmuh van lah. Mamih kah boeipa te boethae neh khah hamla balae na saii thai. Anih voek ham khaw amah ni a imkhui pum ah muen ca rhoe
1Samuel25:18 Te dongah Abigal tah koe hlah uh tih vaidam hluem yakhat
1Samuel25:19 Te phoeiah a tueihyoeih rhoek te
1Samuel25:20 Amah te laak dongah ngol tih tlang hlaep la suntla. Anih doe ham te David neh a hlang rhoek te suntla vaengah amih te ana doe.
1Samuel25:21 Te vaengah David loh
1Samuel25:22 David kah thunkha rhoek te Pathen loh saii saeh. Mincang duela ka sueng atah anih hut boeih te pangbueng yun thil saeh lamtah khoep van saeh
1Samuel25:23 Abigal loh David te a hmuh vaengah laak dong lamloh koe rhum. David hmai ah baluk tih a hmai longah diklai la bakop.
1Samuel25:24 A kho taengah a yalh pah tih
1Samuel25:25 A ming bangla hlang muen Nabal te ka boeipa loh a lungbuei ah dueh boel mai saeh. Anih te a ming khaw Nabal van tih a taengah boethae halang ni a om. Tedae ka boeipa kah camoe rhoek nan tueih te na salnu kai loh ka hmuh moenih.
1Samuel25:26 BOEIPA kah hingnah dongah ka boeipa nang kah hingnah hinglu khaw om. Thii long khui lamkah te BOEIPA loh nang n'hloh tih namah ham ni na kut khaw a khang. Te dongah na thunkha rhoek neh ka boeipa taengah thae aka tlap rhoek tah Nabal bangla om uh pawn saeh.
1Samuel25:27 Ka boeipa taengah na imom loh hang khuen yoethennah he ka boeipa kho kung ah aka bat camoe rhoek te pae mai saeh.
1Samuel25:28 Na salnu kah boekoeknah te phuei mai. Ka boeipa ham te BOEIPA loh a saii a saii bitni. Ka boeipa kah a vathoh tah BOEIPA kah caemtloek dongah a imkhui khaw cak. Namah tue khuiah tah na pum dongah boethae hmu boel saeh.
1Samuel25:29 Nang hloem ham neh na hinglu mae hamla hlang te thoo mai ni. Tedae ka boeipa kah hinglu tah BOEIPA na Pathen loh hingnah hnocun dongah ben la om bitni. Na thunkha rhoek kah a hinglu te tah kutpha khui kah payai bangla a dong ni.
1Samuel25:30 Nang ham hnothen te boeih a thui tih Israel soah rhaengsang la nang ng'uen te BOEIPA loh a saii vaengah tah ka boeipa hamla thoeng bitni.
1Samuel25:31 Ka boeipa lungbuei kah longkoek hmuitoel khaw
1Samuel25:32 David loh Abigal te
1Samuel25:33 Kai lamkah loh thii long sak ham neh ka kut dongkah tawnloh ham khaw ti hnin ah kai nan hloh coeng dongah na omih khaw a yoethen tih namah na yoethen pai.
1Samuel25:34 Israel Pathen BOEIPA kah hingnah dongah amah long ni nang kah thaehuet khui lamloh kai n'hloh. Kai doe ham te a loe loe la na pawk pawt koinih
1Samuel25:35 Te dongah a taengla a kut dongah a khuen pah te David loh a loh tih
1Samuel25:36 Nabal taengla Abigal a pha vaengah a im kah buhkoknah tah manghai kah buhkoknah bangla tarha ana om pah. Te vaengah Nabal kah lungbuei tah a khuiah umya coeng tih amah khaw muep rhui coeng. Te dongah a yit a len akhaw mincang khosae duela anih taengah ol thui pah pawh.
1Samuel25:37 Mincang a pha vaengah Nabal kah misurtui khaw boeih. Te vaengah a yuu loh a taengah olka te a puen pah hatah a lungbuei te a khui ah a duek pah sut tih amah te lungto bangla sut ngol.
1Samuel25:38 Te dongah hnin rha tluk a om phoeiah Nabal te BOEIPA loh a boh tih duek.
1Samuel25:39 Nabal a duek te David loh a yaak van vaengah
1Samuel25:40 Te dongah David kah sal rhoek loh Karmel kah Abigal te a paan uh tih amah taengah a thui uh vaengah
1Samuel25:41 Te vaengah thoo tih a hmai longah diklai la bakop thuk. Te phoeiah
1Samuel25:42 Abigal tah koe thoo tih laak dongah ngol. Te phoeiah a kho taengah aka pongpa hula panga neh David kah puencawn rhoek hnukah cet tih David yuu la pahoi om.
1Samuel25:43 Jezreel kah Ahinoam te khaw David loh a loh tih
1Samuel25:44 Tedae Saul loh a canu Mikhal
1Samuel26:1 Ziphim rhoek loh Gibeah kah Saul te a paan uh tih
1Samuel26:2 Te dongah Saul te thoo tih Ziph khosoek ah David tlap ham te Israel kah a coelh hlang thawng thum neh Ziph khosoek la suntla.
1Samuel26:3 Khopong imdan
1Samuel26:4 David loh longyam a tueih daengah Saul he rhep ha pawk tila a ming.
1Samuel26:5 Te dongah David te thoo tih Saul a rhaeh nah hmuen te a pha. Te vaengah Saul neh anih kah caempuei mangpa Ner capa Abner a yalh nah hmuen te David loh a hmuh. Saul te namtlak ah yalh tih a kaep
1Samuel26:6 Te dongah David loh a doo tih Khitti Ahimelek neh Joab mana Zeruiah capa Abishai te a dawt. Te dongah
1Samuel26:7 Te dongah David neh Abishai loh pilnam te khoyin ah a paan. Te vaengah Saul tah namtlak ah muelh yalh tih a caai te a lu
1Samuel26:8 Te vaengah Abishai loh David te
1Samuel26:9 Tedae David loh Abishai te
1Samuel26:10 Te phoeiah David loh
1Samuel26:11 BOEIPA rhang saeh
1Samuel26:12 Te dongah Saul lu kah tui um neh caai te David loh a loh pah. Muelh ih ham te BOEIPA loh amih boeih soah a pha sak dongah haenghang uh pawh. Te dongah amih a caeh tak khaw hmu uh pawt tih ming uh pawh.
1Samuel26:13 Te phoeiah David te rhalvangan la khat tih a laklo kah muep a hla nah hmuen kah tlang som ah pai.
1Samuel26:14 Te phoeiah David loh pilnam neh Ner capa Abner te khue tih
1Samuel26:15 David loh Abner te
1Samuel26:16 Hno na saii te a then moenih. BOEIPA kah hingnah dongah
1Samuel26:17 Te vaengah David ol te Saul loh a hmat tih
1Samuel26:18 Te phoeiah
1Samuel26:19 Ka boei manghai long khaw a sal ol he ya van laem saeh. BOEIPA loh kai soah nang m'vueh atah khocang he him saeh. Tedae hlang ca rhoek atah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah amih thaephoei thil saeh. BOEIPA rho dongah thawth ham khohnin vaengah kai n'haek tih
1Samuel26:20 Israel manghai loh tlang ah varhung aka hloem bangla uihli pakhat tlap ham ha pawk cakhaw BOEIPA mikhmuh mikhmuh lamloh ka thii he lai la tlak sak boel saeh
1Samuel26:21 Saul loh
1Samuel26:22 Te dongah David loh a doo
1Samuel26:23 A duengnah neh a uepomnah te BOEIPA loh hlang taengah thuung nawn saeh. Tihnin ah BOEIPA loh na kut a tloeng coeng dae BOEIPA kah a koelh soah ka kut hlah ham ka huem moenih.
1Samuel26:24 Tihnin ah na hinglu he ka mikhmuh ah a pantai vanbangla ka hinglu he BOEIPA mikhmuh ah pantai van saeh. Citcai boeih khui lamkah kai he n'huul nawn saeh
1Samuel26:25 Te daengah David te Saul loh
1Samuel27:1 David loh a lungbuei ah
1Samuel27:2 Te phoeiah David te thoo tih
1Samuel27:3 David amah neh a hlang rhoek khaw
1Samuel27:4 Gath la David a yong te Saul taengla a puen pah ngawn dae David tlap koep ham te khoep rhoe khoep voel pawh.
1Samuel27:5 Te vaengah David loh Akhish taengah
1Samuel27:6 Tekah khohnin ah anih te Akhish loh Ziklag kho te a paek. Te dongah Ziklag he tihnin hil Judah manghai rhoek kah la om.
1Samuel27:7 David loh Philisti khohmuen ah kho a sak te a khohnin khaw amah tarhing atah kum at neh hla li lo coeng.
1Samuel27:8 Te vaengah David neh a hlang rhoek loh cet uh tih Geshuri neh Gezari te a cuuk thil uh. Tedae te khohmuen kah khosa rhoek Gezari neh Amalek rhoek tah khosuen lamloh Shur neh Egypt kho duela na paan tangtae ni.
1Samuel27:9 Khohmuen te David loh a ngawn tih huta khaw tongpa khaw hing sak pawh. Tedae boiva
1Samuel27:10 Te vaengah Akhish loh
1Samuel27:11 Tedae David kah a saii neh a thui soah
1Samuel27:12 Te vaengah Akhish loh David te a tangnah tih

1Samuel28:2 Te dongah David loh Akhish te
1Samuel28:3 Tahae ah Samuel duek tih
1Samuel28:4 Philisti rhoek te coi uh thae tih aka cet uh te Shunem ah rhaeh uh. Te vaengah Saul loh Israel pum te a coi tih Gilboa ah rhaeh uh.
1Samuel28:5 Saul loh Philisti caem a hmuh vaengah a rhih tih a lungbuei mat lakueng.
1Samuel28:6 Te vaengah BOEIPA te Saul loh a dawt dae BOEIPA loh anih te mang nen khaw
1Samuel28:7 Te vaengah Saul loh a sal rhoek te
1Samuel28:8 Te dongah Saul te sa uh tih himbai a tloe a bai. Te phoeiah amah taengkah hlang rhoi te a caeh puei tih khoyin ah huta taengla pawk. Te vaengah
1Samuel28:9 Tedae amah te huta loh
1Samuel28:10 Tedae anih te Saul loh BOEIPA ming neh a toemngam tih
1Samuel28:11 Huta loh
1Samuel28:12 Huta loh Samuel te a hmuh hatah a ol a len la pang. Te phoeiah huta loh Saul te a voek tih
1Samuel28:13 Te vaengah anih te manghai loh
1Samuel28:14 Te phoeiah
1Samuel28:15 Samuel loh Saul te
1Samuel28:16 Samuel loh
1Samuel28:17 Ka kut dongkah a thui bangla BOEIPA loh amah ham a saii coeng. Te dongah BOEIPA loh na kut dongkah ram te a phen tih na hui David taengah a paek coeng.
1Samuel28:18 BOEIPA ol te na ngai pawt tih a thintoek thinsa bangla Amalek te na saii pawh. Te dongah hekah hno he BOEIPA loh tihnin ah nang taengah a saii.
1Samuel28:19 Israel khaw namah neh BOEIPA loh Philisti kut ah n'tloeng ni. Thangvuen ah namah neh kai taengkah na ca rhoek khaw
1Samuel28:20 Te dongah Saul te a yungkhawt la diklai dongah kung pahoi yalh. Samuel ol te bahoeng a rhih tih khoyin khothaih caak a caak pawt dongah a thadueng khaw om pawh.
1Samuel28:21 Te vaengah Saul taengla huta loh a paan hatah mat a let te a hmuh tih
1Samuel28:22 Na salnu kah ol te namah long khaw hnatun mai laeh. Na hmai ah buh kamat khaw kan tawn saeh lamtah ca mai dae. Te daengah ni na thadueng om vetih longpuei ah na caeh thai eh
1Samuel28:23 Tedae a aal tih
1Samuel28:24 Te phoeiah huta loh im kah vaitoca ka a toitup te koe a ngawn
1Samuel28:25 Te phoeiah Saul hmai neh a sal rhoek hmai ah a tawn pah tih a caak uh. Te phoeiah thoo tih amah tekah khoyin ah pahoi cet uh.
1Samuel29:1 Philisti loh a caem boeih te Aphek ah a coi uh tih
1Samuel29:2 Philisti boei rhoek tah yakhat nen khaw thawngkhat nen khaw kat uh dae David tah a hael ah a hlang rhoek neh Akhish neh kat uh.
1Samuel29:3 Te vaengah Philisti mangpa rhoek loh
1Samuel29:4 Tedae Philisti mangpa rhoek te anih taengah a thintoek uh. Te dongah amah vik te Philisti mangpa rhoek loh
1Samuel29:5 Anih te David moenih a? Anih te lam neh a doo uh tih
1Samuel29:6 Akhish loh David te a khue tih
1Samuel29:7 Te dongah mael lamtah ngaimong la cet mai laeh. Philisti boei rhoek kah mikhmuh ah boethae saii boel mai
1Samuel29:8 David loh Akhish te
1Samuel29:9 Te dongah David te Akhish loh a doo tih
1Samuel29:10 Te dongah namah neh naka pawk hmaih na boeipa kah sal rhoek neh mincang ah thoo uh. Mincang ah na thoo uh vetih kho a tueng neh pahoi na cet mako
1Samuel29:11 Te dongah David amah neh a hlang rhoek tah mincang ah caeh hamla thoo coeng tih Philisti kho la mael. Tedae Philisti rhoek tah Jezreel la cet uh.
1Samuel30:1 David neh a hlang rhoek loh a thum hnin ah Ziklag a pha uh. Te vaengah Amalek loh tuithim neh Ziklag ah cu uh. Te phoeiah Ziklag te a tloek uh tih hmai neh a hoeh uh.
1Samuel30:2 Te vaengah a khuikah huta rhoek te tanoe kangham la a kol uh. Hlang tah a duek sak muehla a vai uh tih a longpuei ah cet uh.
1Samuel30:3 Tedae David neh a hlang rhoek te khopuei la ha pawk uh vaengah hmai ah tarha ana hoeh tih a yuu a canu neh a‘WH oila te ana sol pa uh.
1Samuel30:4 Te dongah David neh amah taengkah pilnam loh a ol a huel tih rhap uh. Te vaengah a khuikah thadueng a bawt hil rhap uh.
1Samuel30:5 David yuu rhoi Jezreel Ahinoam neh Karmel Nabal yuu Abigal khaw a khuen uh.
1Samuel30:6 Pilnam pum loh amah ca amah ca ham neh a tanu rhoek ham a hinglu te rhip a phaep uh. Te dongah amah te dae ham te pilnam loh a thui coeng dongah David loh puen a cak tangkik. Tedae David tah BOEIPA a Pathen dongah ni a pangtung.
1Samuel30:7 Te phoeiah David loh Ahimelek capa
1Samuel30:8 David loh BOEIPA te a dawt tih
1Samuel30:9 Te dongah David neh amah taengkah hlang ya rhuk loh cet uh. Tedae Besor soklong a pha uh vaengah aka coih rhoek loh uelh uh.
1Samuel30:10 Te dongah David amah neh hlang ya li loh a hloem uh dae Besor soklong a poeng uh lamkah aka tawn hlang yahnih tah paa uh.
1Samuel30:11 Te vaengah lohma li ah Egypt hlang te a hmuh uh tih David taengla a khuen uh. Te phoeiah anih te buh a paek uh tih a caak phoeiah tui a tul uh.
1Samuel30:12 Te phoeiah anih te thaidae thaidae phaklung pakhat neh
1Samuel30:13 Anih te David loh
1Samuel30:14 Kaimih loh Kerethi tuithim
1Samuel30:15 Te dongah anih te David loh
1Samuel30:16 Tedae anih a suntlak a vaengah tah Philisti kho lamkah neh Judah kho lamkah kutbuem boeih te muep a loh uh coeng dongah diklai hman boeih ah aka ca
1Samuel30:17 Amih te David loh hlaemhmah lamloh a vuen kholaeh duela a ngawn. Te dongah amih lamkah hlang tah loeih pawh. Kalauk dongah aka ngol camoe hlang ya li bueng rhaelrham uh.
1Samuel30:18 Te daengah Amalek kah a loh rhoek te David loh boeih a lat tih a yuu rhoi te khaw David loh a lat.
1Samuel30:19 Te vaengah amih te tanoe kangham
1Samuel30:20 Te vaengah David loh boiva neh saelhung te boeih a loh tih a hmai la a vai uh. Te vaengah
1Samuel30:21 Te vaengah David taengla hlang yahnih ha pawk tih a tawn doela David hnuk ah cet uh. Amih tah Besor soklong ah a om sak tih David doe ham neh anih taengkah pilnam te doe hamla ha pawk uh. Te dongah David te pilnam thoeih tih amih te sading la a voek.
1Samuel30:22 Tedae David hnuk aka vai hlang rhoek khuikah boethae neh aka muen hlang boeih loh a doo uh vaengah
1Samuel30:23 Tedae David loh
1Samuel30:24 Caemtloek la aka suntla rhoek kah hamsum la na ti ol te u long a hnatun eh? Te dongah hnopai taengah aka om rhoek khaw hamsum la yen tael uh thae saeh
1Samuel30:25 Te dongah te khohnin lamkah a so hang ah tah tekah ol te oltlueh neh laitloeknah la a saii tih tihnin due Israel ham a om pah.
1Samuel30:26 David te Ziklag la a pha vaengah kutbuem te Judah kah a hamca rhoek taeng neh a hui rhoek taengla a pat tih
1Samuel30:27 Te rhoek te Bethel ah
1Samuel30:28 Aroer ah
1Samuel30:29 Rakal ah khaw
1Samuel30:30 Hormah ah khaw
1Samuel30:31 Hebron neh David amah neh a hlang rhoek kah pongpa nah hmuen boeih taengah a tael.
1Samuel31:1 Philisti loh Israel a vathoh thil tih
1Samuel31:2 Te vaengah Saul neh anih ca rhoek te Philisti loh meh a duep uh tih Saul ca rhoek Jonathan
1Samuel31:3 Saul taengah caemrhal a tlung coeng dongah hlang loh lii a kah neh anih te khoem tong uh. Te dongah lipom hma loh mat a tluek sak.
1Samuel31:4 Te vaengah a hno phuei te Saul loh
1Samuel31:5 Saul a duek te a hno phuei loh a hmuh vaengah amah khaw a thum dongah cungku tih duek.
1Samuel31:6 Hnin at dongah ah Saul neh a ca pathum
1Samuel31:7 Israel hlang rhoek a rhaelrham uh khaw
1Samuel31:8 A vuen ah rhok hloem ham Philisti rhoek ha pawk uh hatah Gilboa tlang ah Saul neh a ca rhoek pathum ana cungku te a hmuh uh.
1Samuel31:9 a lu te a tloek pa uh tih a hnopai te pit uh. Te phoeiah amamih kah muei im neh pilnam taengah phong ham Philisti kaepvai kah kho tom la a tueih uh.
1Samuel31:10 A hnopai te Ashtoreth im ah a khueh uh tih a rhok te Bethshan vongtung ah a hen uh.
1Samuel31:11 Philisti loh Saul a saii te Jabesh Gilead khosa rhoek a yaak.
1Samuel31:12 Te dongah tatthai hlang boeih loh thoo uh tih khoyin khing ah cet uh. Bethshan vongtung lamkah Saul rhok neh a ca rhoek kah rhok te a loh uh. Te phoeiah Jabesh la a khuen uh tih pahoi a tih uh.
1Samuel31:13 A rhuh te a khuen uh tih Jabesh kah kolanhlaeng hmuiah a up uh tih hnin rhih a yaeh uh.
2Samuel1:1 Saul a dueknah hnukah David te Amalek a tloek lamkah ha mael. Te vaengah David te Ziklag ah hnin ni om.
2Samuel1:2 Hnin thum a om phoeiah Saul taengkah hlang te caem lamkah tarha ha pawk. A himbai te a pawnsoem la a lu dongkah laipi neh David taengla ha pawk vaengah lai la yalh tih a bawk.
2Samuel1:3 Anih te David loh
2Samuel1:4 Te dongah anih te David loh
2Samuel1:5 Te dongah amah taengla aka puen cadong te David loh
2Samuel1:6 Amah taengla aka puen cadong loh
2Samuel1:7 Te vaengah a hnukla ha mael tih kai m'hmuh hatah ng'khue tih
2Samuel1:8 Te phoeiah kai te
2Samuel1:9 Te vaengah
2Samuel1:10 Tedae a cungku coeng he tah hing mahpawh tila ka ming dongah anih te ka pai tih ka duek sak. Te phoeiah a lu dongkah rhuisam te neh a ban dongkah cak te ka loh tih ka boei taengla pahoi kang khuen
2Samuel1:11 Te dongah David loh a himbai te a paco tih a phen hatah a taengkah hlang rhoek long khaw boeih a rhoi uh.
2Samuel1:12 cunghang neh a cungku uh coeng dongah Israel imkhui ham khaw
2Samuel1:13 Te phoeiah amah taengla aka puen camoe te David loh

2Samuel1:15 Te phoeiah David loh cadong pakhat te a khue tih
2Samuel1:16 Anih te David loh
2Samuel1:17 Saul neh a capa Jonathan te David loh rhahlung neh a rhaengsae.
2Samuel1:18 Te dongah Jashar cabu dongkah a daek liva laa he Judah ca rhoek a cang ham a thui.

2Samuel1:20 Gath ah na puen pawh

2Samuel1:23 Saul neh Jonathan lung uh rhoi. A hing khuiah naepnoi rhoi tih a duek vaengah tuiphih pawh. Aatha lakah yanghoep rhoi tih
2Samuel1:24 Nangmih a lingdik neh omthennah aka bawn tih

2Samuel1:26 Ka manuca Jonathan nang ham kai n'daengdaeh. Kai taengah na hlahmae sut tih

2Samuel2:1 He hnukah khaw David loh BOEIPA te a dawt tih
2Samuel2:2 Te dongah David te a yuu rhoi
2Samuel2:3 Amah taengkah a hlang rhoek khaw David loh a cako neh rhip a caeh puei tih Hebron khopuei rhoek ah kho a sak uh.
2Samuel2:4 Te vaengah Judah hlang rhoek te ha pawk uh tih David te Judah imkhui kah manghai la pahoi a koelh uh. Te phoeiah Jabesh Gilead hlang rhoek loh Saul a up uh te thui ham David taengla puen uh.
2Samuel2:5 Jabesh hlang rhoek taengla David loh puencawn a hlah tih
2Samuel2:6 BOEIPA loh nangmih ham sitlohnah neh uepomnah han saii saeh. Hekah hno na saii uh dogah kai long khaw nangmih taengah hnothen he ka saii van bitni.
2Samuel2:7 Te dongah na kut te thahuel lamtah hlang tatthai la om laeh na boei Saul te duek cakhaw Judah imkhui ah manghai la kai khaw ng'koelh ta
2Samuel2:8 Tedae Saul taengkah caempuei mangpa Ner capa Abner loh Saul capa Ishbosheth a loh tih Mahanaim a paan puei.
2Samuel2:9 Anih te Gilead
2Samuel2:10 Saul capa Ishbosheth te kum sawmli a lo ca vaengah Israel te a manghai thil tih kum nit manghai. Tedae Judah imkhui tah David hnukah bang uh.
2Samuel2:11 A khohnin he a tarhing la om. Manghai David he Hebron kah Judah imkhui ah kum rhih neh hla rhuk om.
2Samuel2:12 Ner capa Abner loh Saul capa Ishbosheth kah sal rhoek te Mahanaim lamloh Gibeon la a khuen.
2Samuel2:13 Zeruiah capa Joab neh David kah sal rhoek khaw hlah uh tih amih neh Gibeon tuibuem ah tun hum uh. Te vaengah pakhat rhoek te tuibuem khat ben ah
2Samuel2:14 Abner loh Joab taengah

2Samuel2:16 Te vaengah pakhat loh a hui lu te a kop

2Samuel2:19 Asahel loh Abner hnuk te a hloem tih Abner hnuk lamkah banvoei
2Samuel2:20 Abner te a hnuk la mael tih
2Samuel2:21 Te dongah anih te Abner loh
2Samuel2:22 Abner loh koep a rhaep tih Asahel te
2Samuel2:23 Tedae nong ham te a aal coeng dongah anih te Abner loh a hnuk longah caai neh a bung ah a thun. Te vaengah caai a nam la pawlh tih pahoi a cungku dongah amah ah duek. Te dongah Asahel cungku tih a duek nah hmuen la aka pawk boeih tah sut pai uh.
2Samuel2:24 Tedae Abner hnuk aka hloem Joab neh Abishai tah khomik a tlak daengah Gibeon khosoek longpuei
2Samuel2:25 Abner hnukkah Benjamin koca rhoek khaw coi uh thae tih rhoi at la om uh. Te phoeiah amih te som lu pakhat soah pai uh.

2Samuel2:27 Te dongah Joab loh
2Samuel2:28 Joab loh tuki a ueng vaengah pilnam loh boeih pai uh. Te daengah Israel hnuk te hloem voel pawt tih
2Samuel2:29 Abner neh a hlang rhoek tah khoyin khing Arabah longah khong uh. Jordan a poeng uh phoeiah
2Samuel2:30 Joab loh Abner hnuk te a mael tak tih pilnam pum te a coi. Te vaengah David kah hlang sal hlai ko neh Asahel te hma.

2Samuel3:4 a pali ah Haggith capa Adonijah
2Samuel3:5 a parhuk ah David yuu Eglah capa Ithream tih

2Samuel3:20 Abner loh a taengkah hlang pakul neh Hebron kah David te a paan. Te dongah David loh Abner neh anih taengkah hlang rhoek ham buhkoknah a saii pah.

2Samuel3:23 Joab neh amah taengkah caempuei te boeih ha pawk uh vaengah Ner capa Abner tah manghai taengla kun tih anih te a tueih dongah ngaimong la a caeh te Joab taengla a puen pa uh tih a thui pa uh.
2Samuel3:24 Te dongah Joab loh manghai taengla kun tih
2Samuel3:25 Ner capa Abner te nang hloih ham ha pai tila na ming. Te dongah na thoengnah neh na kunnah
2Samuel3:26 Te phoeiah Joab te David taeng lamloh coe tih Abner hnukah puencawn a tueih. Te dongah Abner te Sirah tuito lamloh a mael puei uh dae David loh ming pawh.
2Samuel3:27 Hebron la Abner ha mael vaengah anih te Joab loh vongka khui la duem a mawt. Te phoeiah a bung ah pahoi a thun tih Joab kah a manuca Asahel kah thii a yueng la Abner khaw duek.
2Samuel3:28 Te phoei lamkah te David loh a yaak tih
2Samuel3:29 Joab lu so neh a napa imkhui boeih soah phuei uh saeh. Joab imkhui ah a thi a hnai neh aka pahuk
2Samuel3:30 Gibeon caem vaengah a manuca Asahel a ngawn pah dongah Joab neh a mana Abishai loh Abner te a ngawn rhoi.
2Samuel3:31 David loh Joab neh a taengkah pilnam boeih taengah
2Samuel3:32 Abner te Hebron ah a up uh. Manghai loh a ol a huel tih Abner phuel ah rhap. Te vaengah pilnam khaw boeih rhap uh.
