2Samuel3:36 Pilnam pum loh a hmat uh tih a mik ah cop uh. Manghai loh a saii boeih tah pilnam mik ah boeih cop.
2Samuel3:37 Ner capa Abner a ngawn ham te manghai taeng lamkah a om moenih tila tekah khohnin ah pilnam pum neh Israel pum loh a ming.
2Samuel3:38 Te vaengah manghai loh a sal rhoek te
2Samuel3:39 Tihnin ah ka mongkawt cakhaw manghai la ng'koelh tih Zeruiah koca tongpa rhoek lakah ka ning. Thae aka saii taengah a boethae bangla BOEIPA loh thuung saeh
2Samuel4:1 Hebron ah Abner a duek te Saul capa loh a yaak vaengah a kut la sut kha tih Israel rhoek khaw boeih let uh.
2Samuel4:2 Saul capa he hlang panit caem mangpa la om rhoi. Pakhat ming tah Baanah tih a pabae ming tah Benjamin koca lamkah Beeroth Rimmon capa Rekhab ni. Te vaengah Beeroth khaw Benjamin la a tae thil coeng.
2Samuel4:3 Tedae Beeroth te Gatayim la yong tih a om coeng dongah tihnin due pahoi bakuep.
2Samuel4:4 Te vaengah Saul capa Jonathan kah a ca tongpa kho khaem tah kum nga lo ca coeng. Jezreel lamkah Saul neh Jonathan kah olthang a pawk vaengah anih aka poeh loh anih te a poeh tih a rhaelrham puei. Tedae a rhaelrham hamla a tamto dongah a paloe puei tih vik khaem. Anih ming tah Mephibosheth ni.
2Samuel4:5 Beeroth Rimmon capa Rekhab neh Baanah te cet rhoi tih khothun kholing ah Ishbosheth im la pawk rhoi. Te vaengah Isboeseth te imphu kah thingkong dongah ana yalh.
2Samuel4:6 Amih rhoi te cangrhang aka lo bangla im khui la kun rhoi tih a bung ah a thun rhoi. Te phoeiah Rekhab neh a mana Baanah te vawl vi uh rhoi.
2Samuel4:7 Im a pha rhoi vaengah Ishbosheth tah imhman thingkong dongkah baiphaih dongah yalh. Te dongah anih te a ngawn rhoi tih a duek sak phoeiah a lu te a rhaih pah rhoi. Anih lu te a khuen rhoi tih khoyin khing Arabah long ah cet rhoi.
2Samuel4:8 Ishbosheth lu te Hebron kah David taengla a pawk puei rhoi tih manghai te
2Samuel4:9 Tedae David loh Beeroth Rimmon capa Rekhab neh a mana Baanah te a doo tih
2Samuel4:10 Saul a duek tarha vaengah kai taengla ha puen tih a thui te amah mikhmuh neh aka phong bangla om. Tedae anih kah olthangthen ka thuung ham te amah ni ka tuuk tih Ziklag ah ka ngawn.
2Samuel4:11 Hlang dueng
2Samuel4:12 David loh tueihyoeih rhoek te a uen tih amih rhoi te a ngawn uh

2Samuel6:1 David loh hlang boeih a coi tih Israel khuikah te thawng sawmthum a coelh.
2Samuel6:2 Te phoeiah caempuei BOEIPA ming la a ming a khue tih a soah Cherub loh a ngol thil
2Samuel6:3 Pathen thingkawng te leng a thai dongah a hol uh tih som kah Abinadab im lamloh a khuen uh. Te vaengah leng a thai te Abinadab capa Uzzah neh Ahio loh a hmaithawn.
2Samuel6:4 Som kah Abinadab im lamloh Pathen thingkawng a khuen uh vaengah te Ahio te thingkawng hmai ah cet.
2Samuel6:5 David neh Israel imkhui pum loh BOEIPA kah mikhmuh loh ah hmaical thing
2Samuel6:6 Nakhawn a pha uh vaengah vaito loh a soek uh hatah Pathen kah thingkawng te Uzzah loh a cuk thil tih a tuuk.
2Samuel6:7 Te vaengah BOEIPA kah a thintoek te vik sai. Te dongah Uzzah te Pathen loh pahoi a ngawn. A lolhnah a om dongah Pathen kah thingkawng taengah pahoi duek.
2Samuel6:8 BOEIPA loh Uzzah puut te va dongah David lungoe. Te dongah tekah hmuen te ti hnin due Perezuzzah la a khue.
2Samuel6:9 Te khohnin vaengah David loh BOEIPA te a rhih coeng tih
2Samuel6:10 BOEIPA thingkawng te David khopuei ah amah taengla khuen ham David loh huem pawh. Tedae David loh Ghitti Obededom im la a thak.
2Samuel6:11 BOEIPA thingkawng tah Ghitti Obededom im ah hla thum yalh. Te vaengah Obededom neh a imkhui pum te BOEIPA loh yoe a then sak.
2Samuel6:12 Te dongah manghai David taengla puen uh tih
2Samuel6:13 BOEIPA thingkawng aka kawt rhoek te kan rhuk a kan phoeiah tah vaito a puetsuet te a ngawn thil.
2Samuel6:14 David khaw a sarhi boeih neh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah lam. Te vaengah David loh takhlawk hnisui te a vah.
2Samuel6:15 David neh Israel imkhui tom loh BOEIPA thingkawng te tamlung neh
2Samuel6:16 BOEIPA thingkawng te David khopuei khuila a pawk vaengah Saul canu Mikhal loh bangbuet lamkah a dan. Te vaengah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah manghai David soipet tih a lam te a hmuh. Te dongah anih te a lungbuei khuiah a sawtsit.
2Samuel6:17 BOEIPA thingkawng te David loh a tuk dap khui la a khuen uh tih amah hmuen ah a khueh uh. Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah hmueih te David loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a khuen.
2Samuel6:18 Hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah hmueih te a tloeng te a coeng phoeiah tah pilnam te David loh caempuei BOEIPA ming neh yoethen a paek.
2Samuel6:19 Israel hlangping boeih khuikah pilnam boeih te huta khaw tongpa khaw
2Samuel6:20 A imkhui te yoethen paek ham David a mael vaengah Saul canu Mikhal te David doe ham ha thawn uh tih
2Samuel6:21 David loh Mikhal te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah
2Samuel6:22 He lakah muep ka tahoeng vetih ka mikhmuh ah tlarhoel la ka om ni. Tedae salnu na thui rhoek long te kai n'thangpom bitni
2Samuel6:23 Te dongah Saul canu Mikhal tah a dueknah hnin hil a taengah camoe om pawh.
2Samuel7:1 Manghai te amah im ah om tih kho a sak vaengah anih hamla a kaepvai kah a thunkha boeih te BOEIPA loh a duem sak.
2Samuel7:2 Te vaengah manghai loh tonghma Nathan taengah
2Samuel7:3 Te vaengah Nathan loh manghai te
2Samuel7:4 Te kah khoyin ah om tih BOEIPA ol te Nathan taengla a pawk hatah
2Samuel7:5 “Cet lamtah ka sal David te thui pah. BOEIPA loh
2Samuel7:6 Egypt lamkah Israel ca ka khuen khohnin lamloh tahae khohnin hil im khuiah kho ka sak moenih. Tedae dap khui neh dungtlungim khuiah ni ka om tih ka van.
2Samuel7:7 Israel ca rhoek boeih te kho tom ah ka caeh puei. Olka nen khaw Israel koca pakhat khaw ka voek a? Ka pilnam Israel te luem puei ham ka uen rhoek te
2Samuel7:8 Te dongah ka sal David te
2Samuel7:9 Kho tom ah na caeh te namah taengah ka om tih na mikhmuh lamkah na thunkha boeih te ka khoe coeng. Te dongah na ming te diklai hlanglen rhoek kah a ming bangla a tanglue la ka khueh ni.
2Samuel7:10 Ka pilnam ham neh Israel ham hmuen ka khueh pah vetih anih te ka phung ni. Te vaengah amah hmuen la om vetih tlai voel mahpawh. Lamhma kah bangla anih phaep ham khaw dumlai koca rhoek loh koei uh mahpawh.
2Samuel7:11 Te khohnin van lamloh ka pilnam Israel soah lai aka tloek la kang uen coeng. Te dongah na thunkha cungkuem khui lamloh nang te kan duem sak ni. BOEIPA te nang taengah a puen bangla BOEIPA loh nang ham im a thoh ni.
2Samuel7:12 Na khohnin a cup vaengah na pa rhoek taengla na khoem uh ni. Namah hnukkah na tii na ngan
2Samuel7:13 Ka ming ham te anih loh im a sak ni vetih a ram kah ngolkhoel te kumhal duela cikngae sak ni.
2Samuel7:14 Kamah he a napa la ka om vetih
2Samuel7:15 Tedae ka sitlohnah he Saul taeng lamloh ka lat tih na mikhmuh lamloh ka khoe bangla anih taeng lamloh ka khoe mahpawh.
2Samuel7:16 Na im neh na ram tah na mikhmuh ah kumhal duela cak vetih na ngolkhoel khaw kumhal due a cikngae la om ni
2Samuel7:17 He ol boeih he olphong boeih vanbangla Nathan loh David taengla a thui pah.
2Samuel7:18 Te dongah manghai David te kun tih
2Samuel7:19 Hekah he ka Boeipa Yahovah kah na mikhmuh ah rhaidaeng pueng atah na sal kah imkhui te na thui mai. Ka Boeipa Yahovah aw hlang kah olkhueng he tah hlavak om coeng.
2Samuel7:20 Namah taengah thui ham khaw David loh ba nen nim a thap khovoeh ve. Na sal te ka Boeipa Yahovah namah loh na ming.
2Samuel7:21 Na ol kong ah ni na lungbuei kah bangla lennah cungkuem na saii. He ni na sal na ming sak.
2Samuel7:22 Te dongah ka Boeipa Yahovah na len pai. Kaimih hna neh boeih ka yaak uh vanbangla namah phoeiah tah namah bangla aka om om pawh
2Samuel7:23 Diklai ah Israel bangla
2Samuel7:24 Na pilnam khaw namah ham
2Samuel7:25 BOEIPA Pathen aw na sal ham neh a imkhui ham ol na thui coeng. Na thui bangla kumhal duela thoh puei lamtah saii laeh.
2Samuel7:26 Te dongah BOEIPA Caempuei Pathen tah na ming kumhal duela len ti pai saeh. Israel so neh na sal David imkhui te na mikhmuh ah cikngae la a om thil ni.
2Samuel7:27 Israel kah Caempuei Pathen BOEIPA namah loh na sal kah a hna te na hnacueh pah tih
2Samuel7:28 Ka Boeipa Yahovah namah tah Pathen la na om pai. Na ol khaw oltak la om tih
2Samuel7:29 Na sal imkhui te na mikhmuh ah kumhal om sak ham mulmet lamtah a yoethen sak. Ka Boeipa Yahovah na thui coeng dongah namah kah yoethennah neh na sal imkhui he kumhal duela a yoethen ni.
2Samuel8:1 David loh loh Philisti te a ngawn tih amih te a hnah daengah Philisti kut lamkah Ammah Metheg te David loh a loh.
2Samuel8:2 Moab te a tloek tih rhui a toe thil phoeiah amih te diklai la a yalh sak. Te vaengah ngawn hamla than hnih te a khueh tih than at a hing la boeih a khueh. Te dongah Moab tah David taengah sal la om tih khocang te a thak. Te dongah Moab loh David kah sal a bi tih mangmu a paek.
2Samuel8:3 Anih kut lamkah loh Perath tuiva phai te lat hamla Zobah manghai Rehob capa Hadadezer te a caeh vaengah David loh a tloek.
2Samuel8:4 Te vaengah David loh marhang caem thawngkhat ya rhih
2Samuel8:5 Zobah manghai Hadadezer bom hamla Damasku long khaw a paan dae Aram hlang thawng kul thawng hnih te David loh a ngawn.
2Samuel8:6 David loh Damasku ah khohung a khueh. Te dongah Aram tah David taengah khocang aka thak sal la om. David te a caeh nah boeih ah BOEIPA loh a khang.
2Samuel8:7 Te phoeiah Hadadezer sal rhoek taengah aka om sui photling te David loh a loh tih Jerusalem la a khuen.
2Samuel8:8 Hadadezer khopuei Betah lamkah neh Berothai lamkah rhohum te yet te manghai David loh kang a khuen.
2Samuel8:9 Hadadezer kah tatthai boeih te David loh a ngawn coeng tila Khamath manghai Toi loh a yaak.
2Samuel8:10 Te dongah Toi loh a capa Joram te manghai David taengla a tueih tih sading kawng te a dawt sak. Toi amah khaw Hadadezer kut dongah ana om coeng dongah Hadadezer a vathoh thil tih anih kah caemtloek hlang a ngawn pah te a uem coeng. Te vaengah hnopai la cak
2Samuel8:11 Manghai David loh namtom boeih taeng lamkah a hoep tih a khoem cak neh sui te khaw
2Samuel8:12 Aram lamkah
2Samuel8:13 Kolrhawk ah Aram hlang thawng hlai rhet a ngawn tih a mael vaengah David ming te om coeng.
2Samuel8:14 Te phoeiah khohung rhoek te Edom ah a khueh. Edom tom ah khohung rhoek a khueh coeng dongah Edom te David taengah sal la boeih om. David te a caeh nah boeih ah BOEIPA loh a khang.
2Samuel8:15 David loh Israel pum te a manghai thil coeng. David a om vaengah a pilnam boeih taengah duengnah neh a tiktam la a saii.
2Samuel8:16 Zeruiah capa Joab te caempuei soah
2Samuel8:17 Ahitub capa Zadok neh Abiathar capa Ahimelek te khosoih la
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada capa Benaiah
2Samuel9:1 David loh
2Samuel9:2 Te vaengah Saul im kah sal
2Samuel9:3 Te phoeiah manghai loh
2Samuel9:4 Te daengah anih te manghai loh
2Samuel9:5 Te dongah manghai David loh a tah tih Lodebar kah Ammiel capa Makir im lamloh anih te a loh.
2Samuel9:6 Saul capa Jonathan kah a ca Mephibosheth te David taengah ha pawk van neh a mikhmuh ah bakop pah tih a bawk. Te vaengah David loh
2Samuel9:7 Te vaengah anih te David loh
2Samuel9:8 Te vaengah Mephibosheth te bakop tih

2Samuel9:11 Ziba loh manghai taengah

2Samuel9:13 Mephibosheth te Jerusalem ah kho a sak tih manghai caboei dongah caboei buh rhawp a caak. Anih te a kho bok khaem.
2Samuel10:1 Ammon koca rhoek kah manghai te duek phoeiah anih yueng la a capa Hanun te tloep manghai.
2Samuel10:2 Te vaengah David loh
2Samuel10:3 Te vaengah Ammon koca rhoek kah mangpa rhoek loh a boei Hanun taengah
2Samuel10:4 Hanun loh David kah sal rhoek te a khuen tih a hnapae rhakthuem te a vok pah phoeiah
2Samuel10:5 Tedae David taengla a puen uh dongah amih aka doe te a tueih pah. Tekah hlang rhoek tah hmaithae la bahoeng a om uh coeng dongah manghai loh
2Samuel10:6 David taengah a bo a rhim te Ammon ca rhoek loh a hmuh uh. Te dongah Ammon ca rhoek loh a tah uh tih Bethrekhob neh Aramzobah rhalkap thawng kul
2Samuel10:7 David loh a yaak vaengah Joab neh caempuei hlangrhalh rhoek te boeih a tueih.
2Samuel10:8 Te vaengah Ammon ca rhoek te ha pawk uh tih caemtloek ham vongka thohka ah rhong a pai uh. Aramzobah neh Rehob
2Samuel10:9 A hnuk a hmai ah caemtloek hmapai loh anih a pai thil te Joab loh a hmuh. Te dongah Israel
2Samuel10:10 Pilnam hlangrhuel te a maya Abishai kut ah a tloeng tih Ammon ca rhoek doe hamla rhong a pai.
2Samuel10:11 Te vaengah Aram te kai lakah a tanglue atah kai taengah khangnah la ha om ne. Ammon ca rhoek ni nang lakah a tanglue van atah nang taengah khangnah la ka pawk bitni.
2Samuel10:12 Thaahuel lamtah mah pilnam ham neh mamih kah Pathen khopuei rhoek ham thaahuel uh. BOEIPA loh amah mikhmuh ah a then la a saii bitni
2Samuel10:13 Joab neh a taengkah pilnam tah Aram taengah caemtloek la thoeih. Te dongah a mikhmuh lamkah rhaelrham uh.
2Samuel10:14 Ammon ca rhoek loh Aram a rhaelrham te a hmuh uh vaengah amamih khaw Abishai mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham uh tih khopuei la pawk uh. Joab khaw Ammon ca rhoek taeng lamloh mael tih Jerusalem la cet.
2Samuel10:15 Israel mikhmuh ah amah a yawk te Aram loh a hmuh vaengah tun tingtun uh.
2Samuel10:16 Te dongah Hadadezer loh tuiva rhalvang kah Aram te a tah tih hang khuen. Te vaengah Hadadezer kah caempuei mangpa Helam neh Shobakh tah amih hmai ah lamhma rhoi.
2Samuel10:17 David taengla a puen pah vaengah Israel tom te a coi tih Jordan te a kat puei. Helam a pha vaengah Aram loh rhongpai neh David te a mah dongah anih neh tloek uh rhoi.
2Samuel10:18 Tedae Aram te Israel mikhmuh ah vik rhaelrham uh. Te dongah David Aram taengkah leng ya rhih neh marhang caem thawng sawmli te a ngawn. Caempuei mangpa Shobakh te khaw a ngawn tih pahoi duek.
2Samuel10:19 Hadadezer kah sal manghai rhoek loh Israel mikhmuh ah a yawk uh te boeih a hmuh uh daengah Israel te a rhong uh tih a taengah thotat uh. Te phoeiah Aram loh Ammon koca rhoek koep a rhun ham a rhih uh coeng.
2Samuel11:1 Kum a thok tih manghai a thoh tue vaengah David loh Joab neh a taengkah a sal rhoek
2Samuel11:2 Kholaeh tue a pha vaengah David tah a thingkong lamloh thoo tih manghai im kah imphu ah cet. Te vaengah huta pakhat tui a hluk te imphu lamloh a hmuh. Tekah huta te a mueimae bahoeng then.
2Samuel11:3 David loh hlang a tueih tih huta te a cae vaengah tah
2Samuel11:4 Te dongah David loh puencawn a tueih tih anih te a loh phai. Te phoeiah amah taengla ha pawk vaengah huta te vik a yalh puei. Te phoeiah huta loh a tihnai lamloh a ciim tih amah im la mael.
2Samuel11:5 Tedae huta te a vawn vaengah ol a tah tih David taengla puen. Te vaengah kai ka vawn coeng
2Samuel11:6 Te dongah David loh Joab taengah ol a tah tih
2Samuel11:7 A taengla Uriah a pawk vaengah David loh Joab kah sading kawng
2Samuel11:8 Te phoeiah David loh Uriah te

2Samuel11:11 Uriah loh David taengah
2Samuel11:12 David loh Uriah te

2Samuel11:14 Mincang a pha vaengah David loh Joab ham caa a daek pah tih Uriah kut ah a pat.
2Samuel11:15 Ca dongah a daek pah tih
2Samuel11:16 Joab loh khopuei te a om thil tih a dawn vaengah tatthai hlang rhoek om nah te a ming. Te dongah te hmuen ah te Uriah a khueh.
2Samuel11:17 Khopuei hlang rhoek ha pawk uh tih Joab te a vathoh hatah David sal lamkah pilnam te cungku tih Khitti Uriah khaw duek.
2Samuel11:18 Te phoeiah Joab loh hlang a tueih tih caemtloek vaengkah olka boeih te David taengla a yaak sak.
2Samuel11:19 Puencawn te a uen tih
2Samuel11:20 manghai kah a kosi te phuet tih namah te
2Samuel11:21 Jerubbesheth capa Abimelek aka ngawn te unim? Vongtung dong lamkah sumngol phaklung neh anih aka dae te huta moenih a? Te dongah ni anih te Thebez ah a duek. Balae tih vongtung la na thoeih uh
2Samuel11:22 Te dongah puencawn te cet tih a pha vaengah Joab loh anih a tueih te David taengah boeih a thui pah.
2Samuel11:23 Te vaengah puencawn loh David taengah
2Samuel11:24 A kah uh thae vaengah na sal rhoek te vongtung dong lamkah lipom kap loh a kah

2Samuel11:27 Nguekcoinah te a poeng vaengah David loh a tah tih amah im la a det. Te dongah anih yuu la pahoi om tih ca tongpa a cun pah. Tedae David loh BOEIPA kah mikhmuh ah a saii te khoboe thae ni a huet.
2Samuel12:1 BOEIPA loh Nathan te David taengla a tueih tih a taeng a pha vaengah David te
2Samuel12:2 Hlanglen tah boiva khaw
2Samuel12:3 Tedae khodaeng taengah tah a lai duen ca tumanu pakhat phoeiah a tloe om pawh. Te te a hing sak tih amah taengah a ca rhoek taengah rhoeng hang
2Samuel12:4 Hlanglen pakhat tah tekah hlang taengah yinthing la a pawk pah. Tedae anih taengla aka thoeng yiin kok nah ham amah kah boiva neh a saelhung tah loh hamla a hnaih. Te dongah khodaeng ca kah tumanu te a loh pah tih anih taengla aka thoeng hlang ham te a ngawn pah
2Samuel12:5 Te vaengah David kah a thintoek tah tekah hlang taengah sai khungdaeng. Te dongah Nathan te
2Samuel12:6 A thinphat pawt tih hekah hno he a saii dongah tumanu te rhaepli la thuung saeh
2Samuel12:7 Te vaengah Nathan loh David te
2Samuel12:8 Na boeipa kah im te namah taengah
2Samuel12:9 Balae tih a mikhmuh ah boethae saii ham BOEIPA ol te na sawtsit. Ka mikhmuh ah Khitti Uriah te cunghang neh na ngawn. A yuu te namah yuu la na rhawt pah phoeiah amah te Ammon koca rhoek kah cunghang neh na ngawn.
2Samuel12:10 Kai nan hnaep tih Khitti Uriah yuu te na rhawt pah phoeiah namah yuu la na khueh. Te dongah kumhal duela na imkhui lamkah cunghang te nong voel mahpawh.
2Samuel12:11 BOEIPA loh he ni a thui
2Samuel12:12 Yinhnuk ah na saii dae olka te kai loh Israel tom neh khomik hmaiah kam phoe ni
2Samuel12:13 Te daengah David loh Nathan taengah
2Samuel12:14 Tedae te bang khoboe neh BOEIPA kah thunkha rhoek te yah na bai la na bai sak dongah nang ham camoe aka thaang te duek rhoe duek ni
2Samuel12:15 Nathan loh amah im la a caeh nen tah Uriah yuu loh David ham a cun pah camoe te BOEIPA loh a vuek tih a rhawp pah.
2Samuel12:16 Te dongah David loh camoe hamla Pathen te a toem. Yaehnah khaw David loh a yaeh tih a khum puei. Diklai dongah yalh tih rhaehba sut.
2Samuel12:17 A imkhui kah patong rhoek loh anih te diklai lamloh thoh hamla a taengah pai uh. Tedae ngaih pawt tih amih taengah buh ca voel pawh.
2Samuel12:18 A hnin rhih dongah camoe te duek. Tedae camoe a duek te amah taengah puen hamla David kah sal rhoek loh a rhih uh. “Camoe a hing la a om vaengah pataeng anih te m'voek uh dae mamih ol te a hnatun moenih ta. Boethae saii mai koinih camoe a duek te anih taengah metlam n'ti eh
2Samuel12:19 Tedae a sal rhoek a sisuk uh te David loh a hmuh vaengah camoe duek tila David loh a yakming. Te vaengah David loh a sal rhoek te
2Samuel12:20 Te daengah David te diklai lamloh thoo tih
2Samuel12:21 Te vaengah a sal rhoek loh amah taengah
2Samuel12:22 Tedae
2Samuel12:23 Tedae a duek coeng dongah ba ham lae kai loh ka yaeh voel eh. Anih ha mael ham te ka saii thai aya? Kamah tah anih taengla ka cet suidae anih tah kai taengla ha mael pawh
2Samuel12:24 Te phoeiah David loh a yuu Bathsheba te a hloep tih a taengla a kun thil. Te vaengah anih te a yalh puei tih ca tongpa a sak pah. A ming a sak vaengah Solomon la a sak tih BOEIPA loh anih a lungnah.
2Samuel12:25 Te dongah tonghma Nathan kut ah ol a pat tih camoe ming te BOEIPA kah Jedidiah la a khue.

2Samuel13:1 Te phoeiah om tih David capa Absalom tah a ngannu sakthen om. Anih ming tah Tamar tih David capa Amnon loh a lungnah.
2Samuel13:2 A ngannu Tamar kong ah Amnon te tloh la a yuek. Anih te a oila pueng dongah khat khat a saii ham Amnon mik ah rhaisang.
2Samuel13:3 Te vaengah David maya Shimeah capa
2Samuel13:4 Te dongah anih te
2Samuel13:5 Te dongah anih te Jehonadab loh
2Samuel13:6 Amnon te satlo bangla yalh toengloeng tih anih te sawt hamla manghai te ha pawk. Te vaengah Amnon loh manghai taengah
2Samuel13:7 Te dongah David loh Tamar te a im la a tah tih
2Samuel13:8 Tamar te a nganpa Amnon im la a caeh vaengah anih te ana yalh pah. Vaidamtlam te a loh tih a duep
2Samuel13:9 Thi-am te a loh tih a mikhmh ah a poep pah hatah caak hamla a aal. Te phoeiah Amnon loh
2Samuel13:10 Te phoeiah Amnon loh Tamar te
2Samuel13:11 A caak ham a taengah a tawn pah vaengah tah amah te vik a tuuk tih
2Samuel13:12 Tedae anih te
2Samuel13:13 Kai he kamah kah kokhahnah neh melam ka caeh eh. Namah khaw Israel khuiah hlang ang boeiloeih bangla na om ve. Manghai taengah thui kanoek lamtah nang taengah tah kai khaw n'hloh mahpawh
2Samuel13:14 Tedae a ol te yaak ngaih pawh. A ngannu te rhap a kop tih a yalh puei.
2Samuel13:15 Te phoeiah tah anih te Amnon loh lat a hnoel tih a hmuhuetnah bahoeng a nah pah. A thiinah vaengkah a hmuhuetnah te a lungnah vaengkah lungnah lakah nah. Te dongah anih te Amnon loh
2Samuel13:16 Amnon te
2Samuel13:17 Te dongah amah aka khut a taengca te

2Samuel19:20 Kamah ka tholh te na sal loh a ming. Tedae tihnin ah ka boei manghai doe hamla aka suntla Joseph imkhui pum khuiah lamhma la ka pawk coeng he
2Samuel19:21 Zeruiah capa Abishai loh a doo tih
2Samuel19:22 David loh
2Samuel19:23 Te phoeiah manghai loh Shimei te
2Samuel19:24 Saul capa Mephibosheth khaw manghai doe hamla suntla. Te vaengah a kho yuut pawh
2Samuel19:25 Te tlam te om tih manghai doe ham te Jerusalem a pha. Te vaengah anih te manghai loh
2Samuel19:26 Te dongah
2Samuel19:27 Tedae ka boei manghai taengah na sal te a thainawn thil. Ka boei manghai tah Pathen kah puencawn banghui ni. Na mikhmuh ah then na ti bangla n'saii nawn.
2Samuel19:28 A pa kah a cako he boeih om voel pawh. Ka boei manghai taeng lamkah loh hlang duek la om uh coeng dae na sal te na caboei dongah buh caak puei ham na paek sak
2Samuel19:29 Te dongah anih te manghai loh
2Samuel19:30 Mephibosheth loh manghai taengah
2Samuel19:31 Giladi Barzillai khaw Rogelim lamkah suntla tih Jordan ngan
2Samuel19:32 Barzillai tah kum sawmrhet lo coeng tih bahoeng patong ca coeng. Anih tah hlang len muep a om dongah manghai te Mahanaim ah a yalh vaengah anih loh a cangbam.
2Samuel19:33 Te dongah manghai loh Barzillai te
2Samuel19:34 Barzillai loh manghai te
2Samuel19:35 Tihnin ah kai kum sawmrhet aka lo ca long he a laklo ah a thae a then khaw ka ming aya?
2Samuel19:36 Na sal loh manghai te Jordan bet m'poeng puei bitni. Ba ham lae manghai loh he bang khoboe neh kai nan thuung aih eh.
2Samuel19:37 Na sal he mael mai pawn saeh lamtah a nu a pa kah phuel kaep kamah kho ah ka duek mai eh. Na sal Khimham loh ka boei manghai te ng'kat puei saeh
2Samuel19:38 Te dongah manghai loh
2Samuel19:39 Pilnam loh Jordan te Jordan boeih a kat daengah ni manghai te a kat pueng. Manghai loh Barzillai te a mok tih yoethen a paek phoeiah amah hmuen la mael.
2Samuel19:40 Manghai loh Gilgal poeng duela Khimham loh a caeh puei. Te vaengah Judah pilnam boeih neh Israel pilnam rhakthuem loh manghai a thak rhoela a thak uh.
2Samuel19:41 Te vaengah Israel hlang boeih te manghai taengla pakcak pawk uh tih manghai taengah
2Samuel19:42 Te vaengah Judah hlang boeih loh Israel hlang te
2Samuel19:43 Te dongah Israel hlang loh Judah hlang te a doo tih
2Samuel20:1 Te vaengah hlang muen pakhat om
2Samuel20:2 Te dongah Israel hlang boeih tah David hnuk lamloh Bikhri capa Sheba hnuk la cet uh. Tedae Judah hlang tah Jordan lamloh Jerusalem duela a manghai nen ni a kaibaeng uh.
2Samuel20:3 David te Jerusalem kah amah im la a pawk vaengah im tawt la a paih a yula huta parha te manghai loh a loh tih im hloeh ah a khueh. Amih te a cangbam van ngawn dae amih taengla moe pah voel pawh. Amih te a duek hnin duela a daengdaeh dongah a khosaknah he nuhmai la om uh.
2Samuel20:4 Manghai loh Amasa taengah
2Samuel20:5 Amasa loh Judah rhoek te hueh hamla cet ngawn dae uelh
2Samuel20:6 Te dongah David loh Abishai taengah
2Samuel20:7 Te dongah Joab kah hlang rhoek
2Samuel20:8 Amih te Gibeon lungnu ah a om uh vaengah Amasa te amih mikhmuh ah a pawk pah. Te dongah Joab loh a himbai neh a pueinak te a muk. Capang dongkah cunghang te cihin neh a cinghen ah a sol dae a khuen vaengah vik a colh pah.
2Samuel20:9 Joab loh Amasa te
2Samuel20:10 Te vaengah Joab kut dongkah cunghang te Amasa loh hmuethmat pawh. Te dongah Amasa te tumca neh a bung ah a laih tih a bung te diklai la pawk a sop pah. Anih te a talh mueh la duek. Te phoeiah Joab neh a mana Abishai loh Bikhri capa Sheba te a hloem.
2Samuel20:11 Te vaengah Joab kah tueihyoeih khui lamkah hlang pakhat te a taengah pai tih
2Samuel20:12 Amasa tah long lung ah a thii neh a bol vaengah hlang pakhat a hmuh. Te dongah pilnam te boeih a hloh tih Amasa te longpuei lamloh lohma la a thoeih uh. Anih taengla aka thoeng boeih loh a hmuh vaengah a pai thil tih anih te himbai a khuk thil.
2Samuel20:13 Long lamloh a khoe van nen tah hlang boeih loh Bikhri capa Sheba hnuk hloem hamla Joab te a paan.
2Samuel20:14 Te vaengah Israel koca boeih te Abel lungnu neh Bethmaakha due
2Samuel20:15 Abelbethmaakah a pha uh vaengah anih te koep a dum uh. Khopuei te tanglung malh a lun thil uh tih rhalmahvong te a pai thil. Joab neh a pilnam pum loh vongtung te cungku sak ham a thuk.
2Samuel20:16 Te vaengah khopuei lamkah huta aka cueih te pang tih
2Samuel20:17 A taengla a thoeng pah vaengah huta loh
2Samuel20:18 Te phoeiah a thui lam khaw thui pah. Hlamat ah a thui uh tih Abel ah toem la toem uh tih cing uh
2Samuel20:19 Kai long tah Israel he oltak la ka thuung vaengah nang long tah khopuei neh Israel khuikah a manu te ngawn ham na mae. Balae tih BOEIPA kah rho na yoop eh?
2Samuel20:20 Joab loh a doo tih
2Samuel20:21 He tah ol voel moenih. Tedae Ephraim tlang kah hlang pakhat
2Samuel20:22 Huta loh pilnam boeih te a cueihnah neh a paan dongah Bikhri capa Sheba kah a lu te a rhaih pa uh tih Joab taengla a voeih uh. Te daengah tuki te a ueng tih
2Samuel20:23 Te dongah Israel caempuei boeih te Joab loh
2Samuel20:24 Adoram loh saldong boei
2Samuel20:25 Sheva te cadaek
2Samuel20:26 Jairi Ira khaw David taengah khosoih la om van.
2Samuel21:1 David tue vaengah kum thum tah kum khat phoeiah kum khat khokha tlung. Te dongah David loh BOEIPA maelhmai te a toem. Te vaengah BOEIPA loh Saul neh anih imkhui loh Gibonee a ngawn vaengkah thii kawng te a thui.
2Samuel21:2 Te dongah manghai loh Gibonee rhoek te a khue tih amih te
2Samuel21:3 David loh Gibonee rhoek taengah
2Samuel21:4 Te dongah Gibonee rhoek loh
2Samuel21:5 Te phoeiah manghai te
2Samuel21:6 Anih koca lamkah hlang parhih te kaimih taengah han tloeng lammah han tloeng saeh lamtah
2Samuel21:7 Tedae amih laklo kah rhoi BOEIPA kah olhlo bangla manghai tah Saul koca Jonathan capa Mephibosheth taengah a thinphat. Te tah David laklo neh Saul capa Jonathan laklo kah ni.
2Samuel21:8 Tedae manghai loh Aiah canu Rizpah loh Saul ham a sak pah ca tongpa panit
2Samuel21:9 Te phoeiah amih te Gibonee kut ah a paek tih BOEIPA mikhmuh kah tlang ah a hoeng uh tih amih parhih tah a parhih rhenten cungku uh. Amih tah cangah cuek vaengkah cangtun cangah a moecuek hnin vaengah a duek sak uh.
2Samuel21:10 Te vaengah Aiah canu Rizpah loh tlamhni te a loh tih cangah tong lamloh vaan lamkah tui loh amih a bo thil duela lungpang dongah a phaih thil. Te dongah khothaih ah vaan vaa
2Samuel21:11 Saul kah yula Aiah nu Rizpah kah a saii te David taengla a puen pa uh.
2Samuel21:12 Te dongah David te cet tih Saul rhuh neh a capa Jonathan rhuh te Jabesh Gilead khokung taeng lamloh a loh. Amih te Bethshan toltung lamkah a huen uh. Te tah Philisti kah amih a kuiok nah neh amih a kingkaek nah ni. Philisti kah Gilboa ah Saul te Philisti loh hnin at neh pahoi a ngawn.
2Samuel21:13 Saul kah a rhuh neh a capa Jonathan kah a rhuh te khaw te lamloh a khuen uh daengah a rhuh a hoeng uh tangtae khaw te a soem uh.
2Samuel21:14 Saul neh a capa Jonathan kah a rhuh te Benjamin kho Zela kah a napa Kish phuel ah a up uh tih manghai loh a uen bangla boeih a saii uh. Te phoeiah ni khohmuen ham a thangthui te Pathen loh a rhoi pueng.
2Samuel21:15 Te vaengah Philisti neh Israel laklo ah caem koep om tih David neh amah taengkah a sal rhoek a suntlak thil. Philisti te a vathoh vaengah David lamlum.
2Samuel21:16 Ishbibenob
2Samuel21:17 Tedae David te Zeruiah capa Abishai loh a bom tih Philisti te a tloek pah. Anih te a ngawn van dongah David kah hlang rhoek loh anih taengah a toemngam uh tih
2Samuel21:18 Te phoeiah om bal tih Goba ah Philisti caem koep thoo bal tih Khushathi Sibbekhai loh Rapha cahlah Saph te a ngawn.
2Samuel21:19 Goba tangkhuet ah Philisti neh caemtloek koep om bal tih Bethlehem Jaareoregim capa Elhanan loh Ghitti Goliath te a ngawn. Te vaengkah a caai tueng mah hnitah nah tampai bangla om.
2Samuel21:20 Gath ah khaw caemtloek koep om tih a hlang te a songsang neh a cungnueh khaw om. A kut dongkah kutdawn neh a kho khodawn parhuk parhuk om tih pakul pali rhenten a lo pah. Anih te khaw Rapha lamkah ni a sak.
2Samuel21:21 Israel te a veet dongah David maya
2Samuel21:22 Te rhoek pali te Gath ah Rapha lamkah a sak uh tih David kut neh a sal rhoek kah kut ah cungku uh.
2Samuel22:1 A thunkha cungkuem kut lamkah oe
2Samuel22:2 Te vaengah
2Samuel22:3 Ka lungpang Pathen amah dongah ni ka ying
2Samuel22:4 Thangthen ham tueng BOEIPA te ka khue dongah ka thunkha rhoek taeng lamloh ng'khang.
2Samuel22:5 Dueknah tuiphu loh kai n'li tih
2Samuel22:6 Saelkhui kah rhui loh kai m'ven tih
2Samuel22:7 Ka kho a bing vaengah BOEIPA te ka khue tih ka Pathen taengah ka pang. Te vaengah ka pang ol te a bawkim lamloh a hna neh a yaak.
2Samuel22:8 Te vaengah diklai te tuen la tuen tih hinghuen. Anih taengah a sai dongah vaan kah a yung te tlai tih tuen.
2Samuel22:9 A hnarhong lamkah hmaikhu thoeng tih
2Samuel22:10 Te phoeiah vaan a koiloep tih
2Samuel22:11 Cherub dongah ngol bal tih a ding vaengah khohli phae sola phoe.
2Samuel22:12 A kaepvai khohmuep neh khomong khomai dongkah tui tun te dungtlungim la a khueh.
2Samuel22:13 Amah hmaikah a aa loh a hmai-alh te a dom.
2Samuel22:14 BOEIPA te vaan lamloh a kawk vaengah Khohni loh a ol a huel.
2Samuel22:15 Thaltang a kah tih amih te a taekyak phoeiah
2Samuel22:16 BOEIPA kah tluungnah neh a hiil dongkah a thintoek yilh loh lunglai kah yung hoep tih sokca tuipuei khaw tueng.
2Samuel22:17 A sang lamloh yueng uh tih tui dueng khui lamkah kai he n'tuuk tih n'doek.
2Samuel22:18 Kai ham tah tlung uh dae ka thunkha hlangtlung neh ka lunguet taeng lamkah kai n'huul.
2Samuel22:19 Ka rhainah hnin ah kai m'mah uh cakhaw BOEIPA tah kai ham tukcawt longkhawn la om.
2Samuel22:20 Kai khuiah a naep dongah kai he hoengpoeknah la kai n'khuen tih n'pumcum sak.
2Samuel22:21 Ka duengnah bangla BOEIPA loh kai n'thung tih
2Samuel22:22 BOEIPA kah longpuei te ka ngaithuen tih ka Pathen taeng lamloh ka poehlip van pawh.
2Samuel22:23 Amah kah laitloeknah boeih te tah a laitloeknah bangla ka hmaiah ka khueh tih a khosing lamloh ka phael pawh.
2Samuel22:24 A hmaiah cuemthuek la ka om tih ka thaesainah lamkah khaw ka cue uh.
2Samuel22:25 A mikhmuh kah ka duengnah
2Samuel22:26 Hingcim taengah uepom la na om tih
2Samuel22:27 Aka meet uh taengah na meet uh tih
2Samuel22:28 Pilnam mangdaeng te na khang tih
2Samuel22:29 BOEIPA namah tah ka hmaithoi la na om tih
2Samuel22:30 Namah nen tah caem khaw ka poeng tih
2Samuel22:31 Pathen tah a longpuei khangmai tih
2Samuel22:32 BOEIPA phoeikah Pathen te unim? Mamih kah Pathen phoeiah tah unim lungpang bal?
2Samuel22:33 Ka lunghim Pathen tah ka thadueng la om tih
2Samuel22:34 Ka kho sayuk kho bangla a khueh tih
2Samuel22:35 Ka kut he caemtloek ham a cang tih ka ban loh rhohum lii khaw a phuk thai.
2Samuel22:36 Namah kah daemnah photling te ka taengah nam paek tih
2Samuel22:37 Ka kungdak kah ka kholaeh khaw na aeh dongah ka kho paloe pawh.
2Samuel22:38 Ka thunkha rhoek te ka hloem tih
2Samuel22:39 Amih te ka khah tih ka phop daengah ni thoo uh thai pawt tih ka kho tangah a bakop uh.
2Samuel22:40 Caemtloek ham khaw kai he thadueng nan vah sak tih
2Samuel22:41 Te dongah ka thunkha rhoek te kai taengah a rhawn na duen sak tih
2Samuel22:42 BOEIPA taengah khaw pang uh coeng dae khang voel pawt tih
2Samuel22:43 Te dongah amih te diklai laipi bangla ka neet tih
2Samuel22:44 Ka pilnam kah tuituknah khui lamkah khaw kai nan hlawt. Namtom kah a lu la kai nan hloe dongah ming pawt pilnam loh kai taengah thotat.
2Samuel22:45 Kholong ca rhoek loh kai taengah mai a tum uh tih
2Samuel22:46 Kholong ca rhoek loh tahah uh tih
2Samuel22:47 BOEIPA kah hingnah dongah ka lungpang tah a yoethen pai tih
2Samuel22:48 Pathen loh kai hamla tawnlohnah a paek tih
2Samuel22:49 Ka thunkha rhoek taeng lamkah kai nan poh
2Samuel22:50 Te dongah BOEIPA nang te namtom taengah kan uem vetih na ming te ka tingtoeng ni.
2Samuel22:51 A manghai kah khangnah imsang tah len pai. Te dongah ni sitlohnah he a koelh taengah khaw
2Samuel23:1 He tah David kah olka
2Samuel23:2 BOEIPA kah Mueihla he kai dongah cal tih
2Samuel23:3 Israel Pathen loh kai taengah a thui tih
2Samuel23:4 Mincang khosae khomik aka thoeng bangla
2Samuel23:5 Ka imkhui he Pathen neh doda uh ngawn pawt cakhaw kumhal paipi tah kamah taengah ni a khueh. A cungkuem dongah rhong a tael tih ka daemnah cungkuem te a ngaithuen. Te dongah ka hue ngaih boeih te khaw cuen voel pawh.
2Samuel23:6 Tedae aka muen tah hling bangla a thaek banlak tih kut nen khaw lo voel pawh.
2Samuel23:7 Amih aka ben hlang long tah thi neh caai tueng khaw cung tih amah hmuen ah hmai neh a hoeh la a hoeh uh
2Samuel23:8 He rhoek he tah David kah hlangrhalh rhoek kah a ming ni. Takhemoni Joshebbashebeth tah boeilu la om tih anih tah amah kah caai neh yahuem sut. Caai nen te hlang ya rhet mai voei khat la a rhokpam sak.
2Samuel23:9 Anih hnuk
2Samuel23:10 Te dongah anih te thoo tih a kut a kohnue neh cunghang dongah a kut rhap a khoom duela Philisti te a tloek. Te dongah BOEIPA loh amah khohnin ah loeihnah tanglue a saii pah tih pilnam khaw anih hnukah hnopai pit ham dawk la ha pawk uh.
2Samuel23:11 Anih phoeiah Harari Agee capa Shammah a om vaengah Philisti tah mulhing bangla tingtun uh. Te vaengah lohma kah khamyai ah rhacik khawk om tapkhoeh. Pilnam tah Philisti mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham coeng.
2Samuel23:12 Te vaengah khamyai bangli ah pai tih pilnam te a huul. Philisti te a ngawn vaengah BOEIPA loh loeihnah tanglue a saii pah.
2Samuel23:13 A lu sawmthum pathum khuikah sawmthum te suntla uh tih cangah vaengah Adullam lungko kah David taengla pawk uh. Te vaengah Philisti mulhing tah Rephaim kol ah rhaeh pueng.
2Samuel23:14 Te vaengah David te rhalvong khuiah om tih Philisti rhaltawt hmuen tah Bethlehem ah om van.
2Samuel23:15 David loh vongka kah Bethlehem tuito tui ke a ngaidam tih
2Samuel23:16 Te dongah hlangrhalh pathum loh Philisti kah rhaehhmuen te a va uh tih vongka kah Bethlehem tuito tui a than uh. Te phoeiah a khuen uh tih David taengla a pawk puei uh. Tedae a ok ham huem pawt tih BOEIPA hmaiah a hawk.
2Samuel23:17 Te vaengah
2Samuel23:18 Zeruiah capa Joab mana Abishai tah pathum kah a lu la om. Anih loh a caai te a haeng tih ya thum rhokpam sak. Te dongah anih tah pathum lakah a ming om.
2Samuel23:19 Pathum lakah a thangpom het a? Te dongah amih taengah mangpa la om cakhaw pathum te a pha moenih.
2Samuel23:20 Kabzeel lamkah Jehoiada capa Benaiah tah hlangtang capa
2Samuel23:21 Anih loh Egypt hlang tah a mueimae hlang aka then khaw ngawn bal. Egypt kut dongah caai om dae a conghol neh suntlak thil. Te phoeiah Egypt kut lamkah caai te a rhawth pah tih amah caai neh amah te a ngawn.
2Samuel23:22 Te te a saii dongah Jehoiada capa Benaiah tah hlangrhalh pathum dongah a ming thum.
2Samuel23:23 Sawmthum lakah a thangpom dongah pathum taengah thum sak voel pawt tih anih te David amah kah a taengom la a khueh.

2Samuel23:25 Kharodi Shamah neh Kharodi Elika

2Samuel23:39 Khitti Uriah neh tun ah sawmthum parhih lo uh.

2Samuel24:3 Tedae Joab loh manghai te
2Samuel24:4 Tedae manghai kah olka loh Joab neh tatthai mangpa rhoek te a hut a tet. Te dongah Joab tah Israel pilnam te soep hamla caem neh mangpa rhoek
2Samuel24:5 Jordan a poeng uh tih Gad neh Jazer soklong khui kah khopuei bantang Aroer ah rhaeh uh.
2Samuel24:6 Te vaengah Gilead neh Tahtimhodshi kho te a paan uh tih Danjaan neh Sidon kaepvai khaw a pha uh.
2Samuel24:7 Tyre hmuencak
2Samuel24:8 Kho tom te a hil uh tih hla ko phoeiah hnin kul a thok daengah Jerusalem la pawk.

2Samuel24:10 Pilnam te a tae phoeiah David te a lungbuei loh a ngawn. Te dongah David loh BOEIPA taengah
