2Samuel24:12 “Cet lamtah he he David taengah thui pah
2Samuel24:13 Te dongah Gad te David taengah cet tih a puen pah. Te vaengah David te
2Samuel24:14 David loh Gad taengah
2Samuel24:15 Te dongah mincang lamloh khoning tue duela BOEIPA loh Israel soah duektahaw a paek. Te vaengah pilnam te Dan lamloh Beersheba duela hlang thawng sawmrhih duek.
2Samuel24:16 Jerusalem te phae hamla puencawn loh a kut a thueng. Tedae yoethae kongah BOEIPA khaw damti coeng tih puencawn te
2Samuel24:17 Pilnam aka ngawn puencawn te a hmuh vaengah David loh BOEIPA taengah a bih tih
2Samuel24:18 Tekah khohnin ah Gad te David taengla pawk tih
2Samuel24:19 Te dongah BOEIPA loh a uen Gad kah ol vanbangla David khaw cet.
2Samuel24:20 Te vaengah Araunah loh a dan hatah manghai neh a sal rhoek loh amah taengla ham paan te a hmuh. Te dongah Araunah loh hlah uh tih manghai hmaiah a maelhmai neh diklai la a bakop pah.
2Samuel24:21 Te vaengah Araunah loh
2Samuel24:22 Araunah loh David taengah
2Samuel24:23 Soeprhaep boeih te Araunah loh manghai hut la manghai taengah a paek. Te vaengah Araunah loh manghai te
2Samuel24:24 Tedae manghai loh Araunah taengah
2Samuel24:25 Te phoeiah David loh BOEIPA ham hmueihtuk pahoi a suem tih hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah hmueih te a khuen. Te daengah te khohmuen ham BOEIPA taengah thangthui tih Israel sokah lucik te khaw cing van.
1Kings1:1 Manghai David tah a kum khaw patong la om coeng tih himbai neh a khuk uh akhaw anih ham bae voel pawh.
1Kings1:2 Te dongah
1Kings1:3 Te phoeiah hula sakthen te a Israel khorhi khui boeih ah a tlap uh. Te vaengah Shunam nu Abishag te a hmuh uh tih anih te manghai taengla a khuen uh.
1Kings1:4 Te hula tah bahoeng a sakthen tih manghai ham hmaiben la om tih manghai te a khut. Tedae manghai loh anih te a hmaiben moenih.
1Kings1:5 Te vaengah Haggith capa Adonijah te phuel uh tih
1Kings1:6 Tedae a napa kah a tue vaengah
1Kings1:7 Zeruiah capa Joab nen khaw
1Kings1:8 Tedae khosoih Zadok
1Kings1:9 Adonijah loh boiva neh saelhung a puetsuet te Enrogel kah
1Kings1:10 Tedae tonghma Nathan
1Kings1:11 Te dongah Nathan loh Solomon manu Bathsheba te a voek tih
1Kings1:12 Te dongah halo lamtah cilsuep neh namah kang uen mai pawn eh. Namah kah hinglu khaw
1Kings1:13 Halo lamtah manghai David te paan laeh. Te vaengah amah te
1Kings1:14 Manghai ham na thui pah li vaengah namah hnukah tloep ka kun saeh lamtah nang ol te cawt kan duel eh
1Kings1:15 Te dongah Bathsheba loh manghai te imkhui la thaeng a paan. Te vaengah manghai tah bahoeng patong coeng tih Shunam nu Abishag tah manghai taengah a thohtat pah.
1Kings1:16 Bathsheba te buluk tih manghai te a bawk vaengah tah manghai loh
1Kings1:17 Te phoeiah anih te
1Kings1:18 Tedae Adonijah a manghai coeng ke ka boei manghai long khaw na ming moenih a?
1Kings1:19 Vaito a puetsuet neh boiva muep a ngawn tih manghai koca boeih
1Kings1:20 Ka boei manghai nang
1Kings1:21 Ka boei manghai te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah kamah neh ka capa Solomon te hlangtholh la vik om ve
1Kings1:22 Manghai taengah a thui li vaengah tonghma Nathan te pakcak ha pawk.
1Kings1:23 Te dongah manghai taengla puen uh tih
1Kings1:24 Te phoeiah Nathan loh
1Kings1:25 Tihnin ah suntla mai tih vaito a puetsuet neh boiva khaw muep a ngawn. Manghai koca rhoek boeih neh caempuei mangpa khaw
1Kings1:26 Tedae na sal kai kamah neh khosoih Zadok
1Kings1:27 Tahae kah olka he ka boei manghai taeng lamkah ni a phuet atah na sal khaw na ming sak van kolla. A hnukah ka boei manghai kah ngolkhoel dongah ulae aka ngol eh
1Kings1:28 Te phoeiah manghai David loh a doo tih
1Kings1:29 Te vaengah manghai loh a toemngam tih
1Kings1:30 Israel Pathen BOEIPA rhang neh nang taengah rhep ka toemngam bangla
1Kings1:31 Te vaengah Bathsheba tah a maelhmai neh diklai la buluk tih manghai taengah a bakop pah. Te phoeiah
1Kings1:32 Te phoeiah manghai David loh
1Kings1:33 Te phoeiah manghai loh amih taengah
1Kings1:34 Anih te khosoih Zadok neh tonghma Nathan loh Israel manghai la koelh saeh. Te vaengah tuki te ueng lamtah manghai Solomon tah hing pai saeh
1Kings1:35 Te phoeiah anih te nang khuen tih ha pawk vaengah ka ngolkhoel dongah ngol saeh lamtah kamah yueng la manghai saeh. Anih te ni Israel so neh Judah soah rhaengsang la om ham ka uen
1Kings1:36 Jehoiada capa Benaiah loh manghai te a doo tih
1Kings1:37 Ka boei manghai taengah Yahovah a om vanbangla Solomon taengah khaw om rhoe om van saeh. A ngolkhoel khaw ka boei manghai David kah ngolkhoel lakah rhoeng ngai saeh
1Kings1:38 Te phoeiah khosoih Zadok
1Kings1:39 Te phoeiah khosoih Zadok loh situi ki te dap khui lamloh a loh tih Solomon te a koelh. Te vaengah tuki te a ueng uh tih pilnam boeih loh
1Kings1:40 Pilnam khaw anih hnukah boeih cet uh. Te vaengah pilnam tah phitphoet aka tum neh kohoenah dongah bahoeng a kohoe uh. Amih ol dongah diklai khaw thulh uet.
1Kings1:41 Adonijah neh a taengkah a khue rhoek boeih loh a yaak uh vaengah buh caak te pak a toeng uh. Tuki ol te Joab loh a yaak vaengah
1Kings1:42 A thui li vaengah khosoih Abiathar capa Jonathan te pakcak ha pawk. Te dongah Adonijah loh
1Kings1:43 Jonathan loh a doo tih Adonijah taengah
1Kings1:44 Anih te manghai loh khosoih Zadok
1Kings1:45 Anih te khosoih Zadok neh tonghma Nathan loh Gihon ah manghai la a koelh coeng. Te lamloh kohoe la a caeh uh dongah khorha kah a pang a ngawl ol te ni na yaak uh.
1Kings1:46 Tedae Solomon tah mangpa ngolkhoel dongah ngol bal pueng.
1Kings1:47 Te vaengah manghai kah sal rhoek tah ka boei rhoek kah manghai David te uem ham ha pawk uh tih
1Kings1:48 Te vaengah manghai long khaw
1Kings1:49 Te vaengah Adonijah neh a khue boeih khaw lakueng neh thoo uh tih hlang boeih loh amah longpuei la cet uh.
1Kings1:50 Adonijah tah a rhih coeng dongah Solomon mikhmuh lamloh thoo. Te phoeiah cet tih hmueihtuk ki te a tuuk.
1Kings1:51 Te dongah Solomon taengah a puen pah tih
1Kings1:52 Te vaengah Solomon loh
1Kings1:53 Manghai Solomon a tah daengah hmueihtuk dong lamloh amah rhum tih kun. Tedae manghai Solomon taengah a bakop vaengah tah anih te Solomon loh
1Kings2:1 David kah khohnin loh a duek ham a paan coeng dogah a capa Solomon te a uen tih
1Kings2:2 “Kai tah diklai boeih kah longpuei ah ka caeh dongah huel uh lamtah hlang la om laeh.
1Kings2:3 Moses kah olkhueng dongah a daek bangla na Pathen BOEIPA kah a kuek te tah
1Kings2:4 Te daengah ni BOEIPA loh a ol te a thoh eh. Te te kai taengah a thui coeng tih
1Kings2:5 Te phoeiah Zeruiah capa Joab loh kai soah a saii te khaw
1Kings2:6 Te dongah na cueihnah bangla saii lamtah a sampok te Saelkhui ah ngaimong la suntlak sak boeh.
1Kings2:7 Giladi kah Barzillai koca rhoek taengah tah sitlohnah tueng sak lamtah na maya Absalom mikhmuh lamkah ka yong vaengah kai taengah a tawn uh van dongah na caboei dongkah aka ca taengah om uh saeh.
1Kings2:8 Na taengkah kah Bahurim Benjamin koca Gera capa Shimei te ne. Anih loh kai thae m'phoei thil he rhunkhuennah neh n'daeh. Mahanaim la ka caeh nah hnin vaengah kai doe ham amah te Jordan la ha suntla. Tedae anih taengah BOEIPA rhangneh ka toemngam tih
1Kings2:9 Tedae nang hlang cueih loh anih taengah hmil boeh. Anih taengah metla saii ham khaw na ming bitni. A sampok te saelkhui ah a thii neh suntlak sak
1Kings2:10 Te phoeiah David te a napa taengah khoem uh tih David khopuei ah a up.
1Kings2:11 Israel sokah David a manghai tue he kum sawmli lo. Hebron ah kum rhih manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum sawmthum kum thum manghai.
1Kings2:12 Solomon he a napa David kah ngolkhoel dongah a ngol tangloeng daengah a ram khaw rhap cikngae.
1Kings2:13 Te vaengah Haggith capa Adonijah te Solomon manu Bathsheba taengah ha pawk tih
1Kings2:14 Te phoeiah
1Kings2:15 Te dongah
1Kings2:16 Tedae nang taeng lamkah te huithuinah pakhat ni kam bih coeng. Ka maelhmai he mangthuung tak boeh
1Kings2:17 Te dongah
1Kings2:18 Bathsheba loh
1Kings2:19 Te dongah Adonijah yueng te a taengah thui pah ham Bathsheba te manghai Solomon taengla kun. Manghai khaw anih doe ham thoo tih a taengah a bakop pah. A ngolkhoel dongah a ngol neh manghai manu ham ngolkhoel a phaih pah tih a bantang ah a ngol pah.
1Kings2:20 Te phoeiah
1Kings2:21 Te dongah
1Kings2:22 Te dongah manghai Solomon loh a manu te a doo tih
1Kings2:23 Te phoeiah manghai Solomon loh BOEIPA dongah a toemngam tih
1Kings2:24 BOEIPA kah hingnah loh kai n'thoh tih kai he n'ngol sak coeng. A pa David kah ngolkhoel dongah kai n'ngol sak tih a thui bangla ka im a thoh coeng. Adonijah te tihnin ah duek kuekluek saeh
1Kings2:25 Te phoeiah manghai Solomon loh Jehoiada capa Benaiah kut te a tueih tih anih sola a cuuk thil dongah Adonijah te duek.
1Kings2:26 Manghai loh khosoih Abiathar te khaw
1Kings2:27 Solomon loh Abiathar te BOEIPA kah khosoih la aka om lamloh a khoe vaengah tah Shiloh kah Eli imkhui ah a thui BOEIPA ol te soep.
1Kings2:28 Te vaengah olthang loh Joab te a paan. Joab he Adonijah taengla buung tih Absalom taengah buung pawh. Te dongah Joab te BOEIPA kah dap la rhaelrham tih hmueihtuk ki te a tuuk.
1Kings2:29 Tedae manghai Solomon taengah
1Kings2:30 Benaiah khaw BOEIPA kah dap khuila kun tih a taengah
1Kings2:31 Manghai loh anih te
1Kings2:32 Amah lakah ah aka dueng tih aka then hlang panit te a cuuk thil dongah amah thii te BOEIPA loh a lu dongah mael sak saeh. A pa David kah a ming pawt ah Israel kah caempuei mangpa Ner capa Abner khaw
1Kings2:33 Amih rhoi thii te Joab lu so neh a tiingan soah kumhal duela mael saeh. Tedae David so neh a tiingan soah khaw
1Kings2:34 Te dongah Jehoiada capa Benaiah te cet tih anih te a cuuk thil. Anih te a duek sak phoeiah khosoek kah amah im ah a up.
1Kings2:35 Manghai loh anih yueng la caempuei soah Jehoiada capa Benaiah te a khueh tih manghai loh Abiathar yueng la Zadok te khosoih a paek.
1Kings2:36 Manghai loh Shimei te a tah tih a khue. Te phoeiah anih te
1Kings2:37 Tedae na mop hnin te om tih Kidron soklong te na kat vaengah na ming rhoe na ming bitni. Na duek rhoe na duek vetih na thii te namah lu ah ni a tlak eh
1Kings2:38 Shimei loh manghai taengah
1Kings2:39 Tedae kum thum a bawtnah te a pha vaengah tah Shimei kah sal rhoi te Gath manghai Maakah capa Akhish taengla yong rhoi. Te dongah Shimei taengla puen tih
1Kings2:40 Te dongah Shimei te thoo tih a laak te a khih. Te phoeiah a sal rhoi toem ham Gath kah Akhish taengla cet. Shimei te cet tih a sal rhoi te Gath lamloh a khuen.
1Kings2:41 Tedae Shimei Jerusalem lamloh Gath la cet tih a mael te Solomon taengla a puen pah.
1Kings2:42 Te dongah manghai loh Shimei te a tah tih a khue. Te phoeiah anih te
1Kings2:43 Te lalah balae tih BOEIPA kah olhlo neh olpaek nang taengah kang uen te na ngaithuen pawh?” a ti nah.
1Kings2:44 Te phoeiah manghai loh Shimei te
1Kings2:45 Tedae manghai Solomon tah a yoethen tih David kah ngolkhoel khaw kumhal due BOEIPA mikhmuh ah cikngae la om ni
1Kings2:46 Manghai loh Jehoiada capa Benaiah te a uen coeng dongah cet tih Shimei te a cuuk thil tih a duek sak. Te phoeiah ram he Solomon kut ah cikngae coeng.
1Kings3:1 Solomon loh Egypt manghai Pharaoh te a masae nah. Pharaoh canu te a loh dae anih te David khopuei la a thak tih amah im neh BOEIPA im neh Jerusalem kaepvai kah vongtung a thoh te a khah hlan khuiah a om ah.
1Kings3:2 Te vaeng tue hil BOEIPA ming ham im a sak pawt dongah pilnam loh hmuensang ah a nawn.
1Kings3:3 Solomon loh BOEIPA te a lungnah dongah a napa David kah khosing dongah pongpa. Tedae hmuensang ah a nawn tih a phum.
1Kings3:4 Te vaengah manghai tah hmuensang tanglue te pahoi nawn ham Gibeon la cet. Solomon loh te kah hmueihtuk dongah hmueihhlutnah thawngkhat a khuen.
1Kings3:5 Gibeon ah tah BOEIPA te Solomon ham khoyin kah a mang ah a phoe pah. Te vaengah Pathen loh
1Kings3:6 Te dongah Solomon loh
1Kings3:7 Ka Pathen
1Kings3:8 Na pilnam lakli kah na sal loh pilnam miping na coelh te tae thai pawt tih a cung la a soep moenih.
1Kings3:9 Te dongah na sal taengah na pilnam kah laitloek pah ham
1Kings3:10 Solomon loh he ol he a bih vanbangla Boeipa mikhmuh ah tah ol he voelphoeng coeng.
1Kings3:11 Te dongah Pathen loh anih te
1Kings3:12 Na ol bangla ka saii bitni ne. Aka cueih tih aka yakming lungbuei te nang taengah kam paek bitni ne. Namah bang namah mikhmuh ah om pawt tih nang hnukah khaw namah bang he phoe mahpawh.
1Kings3:13 Na bih pawt te khaw nang taengah khuehtawn neh thangpomnah la kam paek ni. Na hing tue khuiah tah manghai rhoek lakli ah khaw namah bang he hlang om mahpawh.
1Kings3:14 Na pa David a pongpa bangla ka oltlueh neh ka olpaek ngaithuen ham te ka longpuei ah na pongpa atah na khohnin khaw ka pueh ni
1Kings3:15 Solomon a haenghang vaengah mang la tarha a om pah. Te dongah Jerusalem la mael tih ka Boeipa kah paipi thingkawng hmai ah pai. Hmueihhlutnah a khuen tih rhoepnah te a saii phoeiah a sal boeih ham khaw buhkoknah a saii.
1Kings3:16 Te vaengah pumyoi nu rhoi te manghai taengla pawk rhoi tih a mikhmuh ah pai rhoi.
1Kings3:17 Te phoeiah huta pakhat loh
1Kings3:18 Kai loh camoe ka cun phoeikah a hnin thum dongah he kah huta khaw camoe a cun van. Kaimih rhoi bueng coeng tih im khuikah kaimih rhoi taengah yin a om moenih. Im ah tah kaimih rhoi bueng coeng ni.
1Kings3:19 He huta kah a capa tah khoyin ah a yalh thil tih duek.
1Kings3:20 Te dongah khoyin bangli ah thoo tih ka capa te kamah taeng lamloh a loh. Na salnu he muelh a ti vaengah a rhang dongla a yalh sak tih a capa aka duek te kai kah rhang dongla a yalh sak.
1Kings3:21 Mincang ah ka capa te khut ham ka thoo dae vik ana duek. Mincang ah anih te ka phatuem dae ka cun ka capa la vik ana om pawh
1Kings3:22 Huta tloe van long khaw
1Kings3:23 Te vaengah manghai loh
1Kings3:24 Te phoeiah manghai loh
1Kings3:25 Te phoeiah manghai loh
1Kings3:26 Te vaengah a capa aka hing huta tah a capa soah a haidamnah tloo tih manghai te a thui pah tih
1Kings3:27 Manghai loh a doo tih
1Kings3:28 Manghai kah laitloeknah loh a tang te Israel pum loh a yaak vaengah manghai mikhmuh ah a rhih uh. Te vaengah laitloeknah saii ham a khui kah Pathen cueihnah te a hmuh uh.
1Kings4:1 Solomon manghai he om vaengkah Israel pum soah manghai.
1Kings4:2 Te vaengah anih kah mangpa rhoek he
1Kings4:3 Cadaek Shisha ca rhoi Elihoreph neh Ahijah
1Kings4:4 Caempuei sokah Jehoiada capa Benaiah neh khosoih Zadok neh Abiathar
1Kings4:5 A sola ka pai Nathan capa Azariah
1Kings4:6 Im hman kah Ahishar neh saldong sokah Abda capa Adoniram
1Kings4:7 Solomon taegah Israel pum yueng la aka pai rhoek he hlai nit lo tih manghai neh a imkhui te a cangbam uh. Cangbam ham te kum khat khui hla khat ah pakhat a om pah.
1Kings4:8 Amih ming he Ephraim tlang ah Benhur
1Kings4:9 Makaz
1Kings4:10 A taengkah Arubboth
1Kings4:11 Dore khamyai pum ah Abinadab capa. Solomon canu Taphath te anih kah yuu la om.
1Kings4:12 Taanakh
1Kings4:13 Ramothgilead ah Geber capa tih
1Kings4:14 Mahanaim ah Iddo capa Ahinadab
1Kings4:15 Naphtali ah Ahimaaz tih
1Kings4:16 Asher neh Bealoth ah Hushai capa Baana
1Kings4:17 Issakhar ah Paruah capa Jehoshaphat
1Kings4:18 Benjamin ah Ela capa Shimei
1Kings4:19 Gilead khohmuen
1Kings4:20 Judah neh Israel he a hlangmi lamtah tuipuei kah laivin bangla ping uh tih a caak
1Kings4:21 Solomon long he Philisti khohmuen kah tuiva lamloh Egypt khorhi duela ram tom te he a taemrhai. Khocang te a khuen uh tih a hing tue khuiah Solomon taengah thotat uh.
1Kings4:22 Te vaengah hnin at dongkah Solomon kah a caak he
1Kings4:23 Saelhung pumlen pumrha
1Kings4:24 Tiphsah lamloh tuiva rhalvangan boeih neh Gaza hil
1Kings4:25 Judah neh Israel kah hlang he Solomon tue khuiah tah Dan lamloh Beersheba hil amah misur hmui neh a thaibu hmuiah ngaikhuek la kho a sak.
1Kings4:26 Solomon taengah a ngoldoelh ham marhang im thawng sawmli neh marhang caem thawng hlai nit om.
1Kings4:27 Te rhoek loh manghai Solomon te a cangbam uh tih a pai puei uh. Amah hla khat ah hlang pakhat neh manghai Solomon kah caboei taengla aka mop boeih khaw hnopai neh mueh uh pawh.
1Kings4:28 Marhang ham neh leng marhang ham cangtun neh cangkong khaw
1Kings4:29 Pathen loh Solomon te cueihnah a paek dongah a lungcuei khaw muep ping. Te vaengah lungbuei te tuipuei tuikaeng kah laivin bangla a daang a ka pah.
1Kings4:30 Solomon kah cueihnah khothoeng ca boeih kah cueihnah lakah khaw
1Kings4:31 Hlang boeih lakah khaw
1Kings4:32 Thuidoeknah thawng thum a thui tih a laa khaw thawng khat panga om.
1Kings4:33 Thingkung te Lebanon kah lamphai lamloh pangbueng lamkah aka poe pumpiding hil khaw a thui. Rhamsa kawng neh vaa kawng khaw
1Kings4:34 A cueihnah te a yaak uh vaengah pilnam cungkuem lamlong khaw
1Kings5:1 A napa yueng manghai la anih a koelh uh te a yaak vaengah Tyre manghai Khiram loh a sal rhoek te Solomon taengla a tueih. Amah tue khuiah tah Khiram he David kah a lungnah la om.
1Kings5:2 Solomon long khaw Khiram taengla a tueih tih
1Kings5:3 “A pa David te BOEIPA loh a khoh dongkah a kho khopha hmui la a khueh pah hlan hil caemrhal loh a vael dongah a Pathen BOEIPA ming la im thoh ham a coeng pawt te na ming.
1Kings5:4 Tedae ka Pathen BOEIPA loh a duem sak coeng dongah kai ham tah kaepvai ah khingkhoekkung khaw om pawt tih yoekam khaw thae pawh.
1Kings5:5 BOEIPA loh a pa David taengah a thui tih
1Kings5:6 Te dongah uen mai lamtah Lebanon lamkah lamphai te kai hamla vung uh mai saeh. Ka sal rhoek khaw na sal rhoek taengah om uh bitni. Na sal rhoek kah thapang khaw na thui bangla namah taengah boeih kam paek bitni. Sidoni bangla thing vung ham aka ming hlang khaw kaimih taengah a om pawt te na ming.
1Kings5:7 Solomon ol te Khiram yaak la a pha vaengah tah a kohoe tangkik tih
1Kings5:8 Te dongah Khiram loh Solomon taengla a tueih tih
1Kings5:9 Lebanon lamkah te ka sal rhoek loh tuipuei la han colh saeh. Te phoeiah kai ham na tueih nah hmuen hil tuipuei longah paan la kan khuen eh. Te te pahoi ka boe phoeiah tah nang loh khuen. Nang lamloh ka im kah caak ham m'pae lamtah ka kongaih te han saii
1Kings5:10 Te dongah Khiram loh Solomon te lamphai thing khaw
1Kings5:11 Solomon loh Khiram te a im kah a caak la cang kore thawng kul
1Kings5:12 A taengah a thui bangla BOEIPA loh Solomon te cueihnah a paek. Te dongah Khiram laklo neh Solomon laklo ah rhoepnah om tih a boktlap la moi a boh rhoi.
1Kings5:13 Israel tom kah saldong te manghai Solomon loh a khuen tih hlang thawng sawmthum te saldong la om.
1Kings5:14 Lebanon la hla khat ah thawng rha te thovaelnah la a tueih. Lebanon ah hla khat
1Kings5:15 Solomon taengah hnophueih aka phuei thawng sawmrhih neh tlang ah lungto aka dae he thawng sawmrhet om.
1Kings5:16 Solomon taengah bitat aka pai thil mangpa bueng mah thawng thum ya thum lo tih bitat dongah aka tlun pilnam te a taemrhai uh.
1Kings5:17 Manghai kah a uen bangla lung len khaw
1Kings5:18 Solomon kah imsa rhoek neh Khiram kah imsa rhoek long khaw
1Kings6:1 Israel ca rhoek Egypt kho lamloh a coe uh te kum ya li neh kum sawmrhet dongah om coeng. Israel soah Solomon a manghai nah a kum li
1Kings6:2 Solomon manghai loh BOEIPA ham im te a yun dong sawmrhuk
1Kings6:3 Bawkim im hmai kah ngalha he im hmai kah a daang neh a yun dong kul lo. Im hmai bueng kah a daang dong rha lo.
1Kings6:4 Im kah khohue bangbuet tah a caek la a saii.
1Kings6:5 Im kah pangbueng taengah rhaenghmuen a sak tih
1Kings6:6 Rhaenghmuen khaw a hmui kah rhaenghmuen tah a daang dong nga
1Kings6:7 Im a sak vaengah lungsong lung a hmabuet neh a sak. Thilung khaw
1Kings6:8 Im bantang hael kah a bangli ah impalai thohka om. Te vaengah khenden khuihlak lamloh a bangli la
1Kings6:9 Im te a sak tangloeng tih a coeng nen tah im kah te tlueng neh
1Kings6:10 Rhaenghmuen te im pum ah a sang dong nga la a sak tih im te lamphai thing neh a tuuk sak.
1Kings6:11 Te vaengah BOEIPA ol te Solomon taengla ha pawk tih
1Kings6:12 Im he na sak vanbangla
1Kings6:13 Israel ca lakli ah kho ka sak vetih ka pilnam Israel te ka hnoo mahpawh
1Kings6:14 Te tlam te Solomon loh im a sak tih a coeng.
1Kings6:15 Im kah pangbueng te a thung vaengah imkhui neh lamphai thingphael a thung. Im kah cirhong lamloh bangyai pangbueng hil kah imkhui te thing a ben. Im cirhong te hmaical thingphael neh a ci.
1Kings6:16 Im bawtnah lamloh khat ben a bawtnah hil te dong kul a khueh. Cirhong lamloh pangbueng hil te lamphai thingphael neh a saii. Te vaengah im khui ham khaw
1Kings6:17 Te vaengah im hmai kah bawkim mah dong sawmli lo coeng.
1Kings6:18 Im khui kah lamphai te a khuiah padae muei bangla a thuk. Lamphai boeih te tamlaep bangla a phuelh sak dongah lungto tueng voel pawh.
1Kings6:19 Im khui kah cangimphu te khaw a khuiah BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng khueh pahoi ham a rhoekbah.
1Kings6:20 Cangimphu te a hmai ah a yun dong kul
1Kings6:21 Solomon loh im te a khui ah sui cilh neh a ben thil tih cangimphu hmai kah khotawt te sui rhui neh a kha. Te khaw sui a ben thil.
1Kings6:22 Im pum a coeng hil ah im pum te sui a ben. Cangimphu dongkah hmueihtuk pum te khaw sui a ben.
1Kings6:23 Cangimphu khuikah cherubim rhoi te situi thing neh a sang dong rha la a saii.
1Kings6:24 Cherubim lamhma kah a phae vang dong nga lo tih cherubim pabae kah a phae khaw dong nga lo. Te dongah a phae hmoi pakhat lamloh a phae hmoi pakhat hil he dong rha lo.
1Kings6:25 Cherubim a pabae te dong rha lo tih cherubim rhoi te cungnueh pakhat
1Kings6:26 Lamhma kah cherubim khaw
1Kings6:27 Cherubim te im khuikah a laklung ah a khueh. Cherubim a phae te a phuel vaengah pakhat kah a phae loh pangbueng te a ben tih
1Kings6:28 Cherubim te khaw sui a ben.
1Kings6:29 Im kah pangbueng phai boeih te cherubim muei neh rhophoe muei neh thingthuk a bang pah tih a khui ah khaw poengben ah khaw rhaipai phuelh.
1Kings6:30 Im kah cirhong te a khui ah khaw
1Kings6:31 Cangimphu thohka kah thohkhaih te situi thing a saii tih ngalha neh rhungsut he a vae panga aka om rhungsut ngalha la a saii.
1Kings6:32 Situi thing thohkhaih rhoi khaw a soah cherubim
1Kings6:33 Bawkim thohka ham rhungsut tah situi thing neh a vae pali la a saii bal.
1Kings6:34 Hmaical thing thohkhaih rhoi te khaw thohkhaih pakhat dongah thingphael panit neh thohhna
1Kings6:35 Cherubim
1Kings6:36 A khui kah vongup te lungrhaih than thum
1Kings6:37 A kum li dongkah Ziv hla ah BOEIPA im te a toong.
1Kings6:38 Kum hlai khat dongkah a hla rhet nah Bul hla dongah tah im te a ol cungkuem neh
1Kings7:1 Solomon loh amah im te a sak bal tih kum hlai thum phoeiah tah a im pum te a coeng.
1Kings7:2 Lebanon duup im te khaw a yun dong yakhat
1Kings7:3 Than at dongah hlai nga tih tung sawmli panga lo. A sokah thingphael soah khaw lamphai neh a khop thil.
1Kings7:4 Khohue than thum om tih a khosaeng neh khosaeng khaw rhaep thum la hum uh.
1Kings7:5 Thohka neh khuihlet rhungsut boeih he hniboeng la om tih
1Kings7:6 Ngalha tung rhoek te a yun dong sawmnga neh a daang dong sawmthum la a saii. Te rhoek hmai ah ngalha om tih te rhoek hmai ah tung neh a khuep khaw om.
1Kings7:7 Laitloek nah ngolkhoel kah ngalha ham khaw tiktamnah ngalha pahoi a saii tih Cirhong pakhat lamloh cirhong pakhat hil te lamphai a ci.
1Kings7:8 A om nah a im khaw a im pabae vongup ah pahoi om tih ngalha dongkah a kutngo bangla om. Tekah ngalha bangla Solomon kah a loh Pharaoh canu ham khaw im a sak pah.
1Kings7:9 Lung vang boeih te lungrhaih kah cungnueh tarhing ah hlawh neh a baih tih Imkhui neh imkawt te tungyung lamloh songpoi hil
1Kings7:10 Lung vang neh lung nu te
1Kings7:11 A so kah lung vang te khaw lungrhaih neh lamphai kah cungnueh tarhing la om.
1Kings7:12 Vong puei kaepvai ah lungrhaih than thum
1Kings7:13 Te vaengah manghai Solomon loh Tyre lamkah Khiram te a tah tih a loh.
1Kings7:14 Anih tah Naphtali koca lamkah nuhmai nu kah a capa tih a napa tah rhohum aka saii Tyre hlang ni. Te dongah rhohum neh bitat cungkuem saii ham vaengah khaw cueihnah neh
1Kings7:15 Te phoeiah rhohum tung rhoi te a hlawn tih tung pakhat kah a sang he dong hlai rhet lo. Tung a pabae te rhuihet neh dong hlai nit la a yen.
1Kings7:16 Rhohum hlawn tung soi ah khueh ham tungthi panit a saii. Lamhma kah tungthi te a sang dong nga lo tih
1Kings7:17 Sahamlong bitat dongkah sahamlong
1Kings7:18 Tung neh a soi kah tungthi te thingcam ham te sahamlong pakhat soah tale thaih than nit la pin om. Te tlam te a pabae kah tungthi ham khaw a saii tangloeng.
1Kings7:19 Tung soi kah tungthi te ngalha khuiah tuilipai muei bangla om tih dong li lo.
1Kings7:20 Tung rhoi sokah tungthi rhoi tah sahamlong
1Kings7:21 Tung te bawkim kah ngalha dongah a ling. Bantang tung te a ling tih a ming te Jakhin a sui. Banvoei tung te a ling bal tih a ming Boaz a sui.
1Kings7:22 Tung soi kah tuilipai muei nen ni tung dongkah bitat khaw a soep.
1Kings7:23 Tuili pakhat te rhohum hlawn neh saii tih pin pumrhuelh. A rhai khat lamloh a rhai khat hil te dong rha lo. A dung te rhui dong nga lo. A pum te a rhui khat neh dong sawmthum la a ven.
1Kings7:24 A rhai te a hmui kah padae neh dong khat dongah lungrha tah pin a bang. Tuili pin aka vael padae than nit te a hlawnnah neh a hlawn.
1Kings7:25 Te te saelhung hlai nit soah pai tih pumthum tlangpuei la mael
1Kings7:26 A thah khaw kutsom tluk thah tih a rhai te tuilipai kah rhaiphuelh boengloeng rhai muei bangla om. Te khuiah bath thawng hnih ael.
1Kings7:27 Rhohum tungkho parha a saii tih tungkho pakhat te a yun dong li
1Kings7:28 Tungkho kah a muei tah he tlam he om. Te rhoek te a soenglong om tih a soenglong te tungkal laklo ah om.
1Kings7:29 Tungkal laklo kah a soenglong soah sathueng
1Kings7:30 Tungkho pakhat ham rhohum lengkho pali
1Kings7:31 A rhai te a khui ah a so la dong at aka poe tungthi dongah om. A rhai kah a kho phek la pumrhuelh dong khat phoeiah dong kaek lo. A rhai dongah khaw muei om dae a soenglong te hniboeng la om tih pumrhuelh pawh.
1Kings7:32 Soenglong te a hmui lamloh lengkho pali om tih tungkho dongah lengkho kah a cung om. Lengkho pakhat kah a sang he dong khat phoeiah dong kaek lo.
1Kings7:33 A kho kah a muei tah leng kho muei bangla om. A cung neh a amkhawn khaw
1Kings7:34 Tungkho pakhat dongkah a kil pali dongah mueihong pali om tih tungkho lamloh mueihong hil pha uh.
1Kings7:35 Tungkho soi kah a pumrhuelh phai te a sang dong kaek lo. Tungkho soi kah a khocung neh a soenglong te pha uh.
1Kings7:36 A khocung hman neh a soenglong dongah a soenglong soah khaw cherubim
1Kings7:37 Tungkho parha te hlawn pakhat
1Kings7:38 Rhohum baeldung parha a saii te baeldung pakhat dongah bath sawmli ael. Baeldung pakhat te dong li lo tih
1Kings7:39 Tungkho te im bantang hael ah panga
1Kings7:40 Khiram loh baeldung
1Kings7:41 Tung panit neh tung soi kah tungthi tuidueh panit
1Kings7:42 sahamlong rhoi dongkah tale thaih ya li
1Kings7:43 tungkho parha neh tungkho dongkah baeldung parha
1Kings7:44 tuili pakhat neh tuili hmuikah vaito hlai nit
1Kings7:45 am neh hmaisoh neh baelcak neh hnopai boeih
1Kings7:46 Te rhoek te manghai loh Jordan vannaem ah Sukkoth laklo neh Zarethan laklo kah khohmuen amlai neh a hlawn.
1Kings7:47 Solomon loh hnopai a khueh boeih te bahoeng bahoeng a hmoeng dongah rhohum kah a khiing khaw khe lek pawh.
1Kings7:48 Solomon loh BOEIPA im kah hnopai cungkuem
1Kings7:49 Hmaitung rhoek te sui cim cangimphu hmai kah bantang ah panga
1Kings7:50 cingkhaa neh paitaeh
1Kings7:51 Manghai Solomon loh BOEIPA im kah a saii bitat cungkuem te cung coeng. Te dongah Solomon a napa David kah hnocim te a khuen tih cak neh sui khaw
1Kings8:1 BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng te Zion David khopuei lamloh Jerusalem kah manghai Solomon taengla khuen ham Solomon loh Israel a ham rhoek
1Kings8:2 Te dongah Israel hlang boeih te manghai Solomon taengla Ethanim hla
1Kings8:3 Israel kah a ham rhoek boeih a pawk uh neh khosoih rhoek loh thingkawng te a koh uh.
1Kings8:4 BOEIPA kah thingkawng te a khuen uh tih tingtunnah dap neh dap kah hmuencim hnopai boeih te Levi khosoih rhoek loh a khuen uh.
1Kings8:5 Manghai Solomon neh thingkawng hmai ah anih taengla amah neh aka tuentah uh Israel rhaengpuei boeih loh a khawk la boiva neh saelhung a nawn uh te daek uh lek pawt tih tae uh lek pawh.
1Kings8:6 Te vaengah khosoih rhoek loh BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng te im khui kah cangimphu khuikah amah hmuen la a khuen uh. Te te cherubim phae hmui kah hmuencim kah hmuencim la a khueh.
1Kings8:7 Cherubim loh thingkawng hmuen te phae a phuel thil tih cherubim loh thingkawng so neh a so kah a cung soah a khuk.
1Kings8:8 A cung te a hlawt van dongah a cung hmoi te cangimphu hmai kah hmuencim lamloh tueng. Tedae poeng lamloh tueng pawt cakhaw tahae khohnin duela om.
1Kings8:9 Thingkawng khuiah Horeb ah Moses loh a khueh lungto cabael rhoi phoeiah a tloe om pawh. Egypt kho lamloh a coe uh phoeiah teah ni BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek taengah paipi a saii.
1Kings8:10 Hmuencim lamloh khosoih rhoek a khoe uh vaengah tah BOEIPA im te cingmai loh a khuk.
1Kings8:11 BOEIPA im te BOEIPA kah thangpomnah a bae dongah khosoih rhoek khaw cingmai hmai ah thohtat ham pai uh thai pawh.
1Kings8:12 Te vaengah Solomon loh
1Kings8:13 Namah loh kumhal due kho na sak nah ham hmuen la na imhmuen kah im a sak khaw ka sak coeng
1Kings8:14 Te phoeiah manghai loh a maelhmai te a hooi tih Israel hlangping boeih te yoethen a paek vaengah Israel hlangping boeih khaw pai uh.
1Kings8:15 Te vaengah
1Kings8:16 'Ka pilnam Israel te Egypt lamkah ka khuen khohnin lamloh ka ming om sak ham neh im thoh sak ham Israel koca boeih khuikah khopuei te ka coelh moenih. Tedae David te ka pilnam Israel soah om sak ham ka coelh
1Kings8:17 Israel Pathen BOEIPA ming la im sak ham he a pa David kah thinko ah om coeng.
1Kings8:18 Tedae BOEIPA loh a pa David te
1Kings8:19 Tedae nang loh im na thoh pawt vetih na pumpu lamkah aka thoeng na capa lat long ni kai ming ham im a thoh eh
1Kings8:20 BOEIPA loh a thui ol te a cak sak dongah a pa David phoeiah a thoh. Te dongah ni BOEIPA kah a thui bangla Israel kah ngolkhoel dongah ka ngol tih Israel Pathen BOEIPA ming la im ka sak.
1Kings8:21 Te phoeiah Egypt kho lamloh amih a khuen vaengah a pa rhoek taengah a saii BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng ham hmuen pahoi ka khueh
1Kings8:22 Te vaengah Solomon te Israel hlangping pum hmai kah BOEIPA hmueihtuk hmai ah pai tih a kut te vaan la a phuel.
1Kings8:23 Te phoeiah
1Kings8:24 A pa David amah taengah na thui te na sal taengah na ngaithuen. Na ka neh na thui tih tahae khohnin kah bangla na kut neh na soep sak.
1Kings8:25 Te dongah Israel Pathen BOEIPA aw
1Kings8:26 Te dongah Israel Pathen aw
1Kings8:27 Tedae Pathen he diklai ah ngol tang nim? Vaan neh vaan phoeikah vaan rhoek long pataeng nang n'cangbam uh thai moenih. Te dongah he im ka sak long aisat he.
1Kings8:28 Tedae na sal kah thangthuinah neh anih kah lungmacil taengla mael lah. Ka Pathen BOEIPA aw tamlung neh thangthuinah te han ya lah. Tihnin ah na sal he na mikhmuh ah thangthui coeng.
1Kings8:29 “He im soah khoyin khothaih na mik dai thil lah. Te hmuen ah
1Kings8:30 He hmuen la a thangthui uh vaengah
1Kings8:31 Hlang he a hui taengah tholh tih tap hamla a soah thaephoeinah a khuen tih ha pawk vaengah he im kah na hmueihtuk hmai ah a tap atah
1Kings8:32 Namah loh vaan lamkah hnatun lamtah rhoi pah. Halang boe sak ham na sal rhoek te laitloek pah. A khosing te amah lu ah khueh pah. Aka dueng tang sak ham te a duengnah bangla anih ham khueh pah.
1Kings8:33 Na pilnam Israel khaw na taengah tholh uh tih thunkha mikhmuh ah a yawk vaengah
1Kings8:34 namah loh vaan lamkah hnatun lamtah na pilnam Israel kah tholhnah te khodawkngai pah. Te phoeiah amih te a napa rhoek taengah na paek khohmuen la mael puei.
1Kings8:35 Na taengah tholh tih vaan ke a khaih dongah khotlan a om pawt vaengah
1Kings8:36 namah loh vaan lamkah hnatun lamtah na sal rhoek neh na pilnam Israel kah tholhnah te khodawkngai pah. Longpuei then te amih thuinuet lamtah a khuiah pongpa uh saeh. Te vaengah na pilnam taengah rho la na paek na khohmuen ah khotlan pae.
1Kings8:37 Khohmuen ah khokha pai tih duektahaw vaengah
1Kings8:38 Hlang boeih lamkah neh
1Kings8:39 namah loh na om nah hmuen vaan lamkah hnatun lamtah khodawkngai pah. Na saii vaengah hlang te a thinko na ming dongah a cungkuem te amah khosing bangla khueh pah. Namah bueng loh hlang ca boeih kah thinko na ming.
1Kings8:40 A pa rhoek taengah na paek khohmuen maelhmai dongkah mulhing rhoek loh amah tue khuiah namah te n'rhih uh saeh.
1Kings8:41 Kholong ham bal khaw
1Kings8:42 Na ming tanglue te ya uh saeh. Na tlungluen kut neh na ban khaw thueng lamtah ha pawk saeh lamtah he im ah thangthui saeh.
1Kings8:43 Namah loh na om nah hmuen vaan lamloh hnatun pah. Kholong khaw namah taengah a bih bangla a cungkuem dongah rhoirhi pah. Te daengah ni diklai pilnam boeih loh na ming te a ming uh eh. Na pilnam Israel bangla nang rhih ham neh he im ah na ming khue ham ka sak te a ming eh.
1Kings8:44 Te te na coelh tih na ming ham im ka sak vanbangla amih te longpuei ah na tueih tih na pilnam loh a thunkha taengah caemtloek la a caeh vaengah khopuei long kah BOEIPA taengah a thangthui uh atah.
1Kings8:45 Amih kah thangthuinah neh a lungmacil te vaan lamloh hnatun pah lamtah amih kah laitloeknah saii pah.
1Kings8:46 Aka tholh pawt hlang he a om pawt oeh dongah nang taengah tholh uh tih amih taengah na thin a toek vaengah
1Kings8:47 Tedae a sol nah khohmuen ah a lungbuei ah pahoi mael uh. Amih a sol nah khohmuen ah namah taengla mael uh tih rhennah a bih vaengah 'Ka tholh uh tih ka paihaeh uh dongah ka boe uh' a ti atah.
1Kings8:48 Amih aka sol a thunkha rhoek khohmuen ah a thinko boeih
1Kings8:49 Te dongah amih kah thangthuinah neh amih kah lungmacil te na khosak nah hmuen vaan lamloh hnatun lamtah amih laitloeknah te saii pah.
1Kings8:50 Namah taengah aka tholh na pilnam taeng neh amih kah boekoeknah cungkuem taengah khodawkngai pah. Nang taengah boe a koek cakhaw amih aka sol kah mikhmuh ah amih te haidamnah dongah pae lamtah amih te haidam uh eh.
1Kings8:51 Amih te Egypt lamkah thi hmai-ulh khui lamloh na khuen na pilnam neh na rho ni.
1Kings8:52 Na mik na sal kah lungmacil taeng neh na pilnam Israel kah lungmacil taengah aka dai la om saeh
1Kings8:53 Ka Boeipa Yahovah aw
1Kings8:54 BOEIPA taengah thangthui ham thangthuinah neh lungmacil boeih he Solomon a khah phoeiah BOEIPA hmueihtuk hmai kah a khuklu dongah aka cungkueng lamloh thoh tih a kut te vaan la a phuel.
1Kings8:55 Pai tih Israel hlangping cungkuem te yoethen a paek vaengah ol ue neh
1Kings8:56 “A cungkuem ah a thui bangla a pilnam Israel taengah duemnah aka pae BOEIPA tah a yoethen pai. A sal Moses kut ah a thui a ol then boeih te ol pakhat khaw a hloo moenih.
1Kings8:57 Mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA he a pa rhoek taengah a om bangla mamih taengah khaw om saeh. Mamih he n'hnoo boel saeh lamtah mamih he m'phap boel saeh.
1Kings8:58 A pa rhoek a uen bangla mamih thinko he amah taengla buung ham
1Kings8:59 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah rhennah ka bih vanbangla ka ol he khoyin khothaih aka yoei mamih kah BOEIPA Pathen taengah om saeh. Te daengah ni hnin at kah olka dongah aka om a sal kah laitloeknah neh a pilnam Israel kah laitloeknah he amah khohnin ah a saii thai eh.
1Kings8:60 Te daengah ni diklai pilnam boeih loh YAHWEH amah phoeiah Pathen tloe om pawh tila a ming eh.
1Kings8:61 Tedae tahae khohnin kah bangla a oltlueh dongah pongpa ham neh a olpaek ngaithuen ham tah nangmih kah thinko te mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA taengah a rhuemtuet la om saeh
1Kings8:62 Te phoeiah manghai neh a taengkah Israel boeih loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hmueih a nawn uh.
1Kings8:63 Solomon loh rhoepnah hmueih a nawn tih BOEIPA taengah saelhung thawng kul thawng hnih neh boiva thawng yakhat thawng kul a nawn. Te tlam te manghai neh Israel ca boeih loh BOEIPA im te a uum uh.
1Kings8:64 Teah te hmueihhlutnah neh khocang khaw
1Kings8:65 Te vaeng tue ah Solomon loh khotue a saii tih a taengkah Israel boeih he Lebokhamath lamloh Egypt soklong duela khawk hlangping uh. Mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hnin rhih
1Kings8:66 A hnin rhet dongah pilnam te a tueih tih manghai te yoethen a paek uh. BOEIPA loh a sal David ham neh a pilnam Israel ham a saii hnothen cungkuem ham kohoe neh lungbuei then la a dap te a paan uh.
1Kings9:1 Solomon loh BOEIPA im neh manghai im a sak ham khaw
1Kings9:2 BOEIPA he Gibeon ah a taengla phoe bangla Solomon taengah a pabae la a phoe pah.
1Kings9:3 BOEIPA loh anih te
1Kings9:4 Nang khaw na pa David a pongpa bangla thinko kah thincaknah
1Kings9:5 Na pa David taengah ka thui tih
1Kings9:6 Nangmih khaw
1Kings9:7 Te vaengah Israel te amamih taengah ka paek khohmuen hman lamloh ka saii vetih ka ming hamla ka ciim im he khaw ka maelhmai lamloh ka hnoo ni. Israel te pilnam cungkuem lakli ah thuidoeknah neh thuinuetnah la om ni.
1Kings9:8 He im he a sangkoek la om cakhaw he long aka pah boeih tah hal ni. Te vaengah kutving neh
1Kings9:9 Tedae
1Kings9:10 Kum kul a bawtnah a pha vaengah Solomon loh im panit
1Kings9:11 Tyre manghai Khiram loh Solomon te lamphai thing nen khaw
1Kings9:12 Tedae Khiram te Solomon loh anih taengah a paek khopuei sawt ham la Tyre lamloh a caeh vaengah tah a mik ah cop pawh.
1Kings9:13 Te vaengah
1Kings9:14 Te vaengah Khiram loh manghai taengah sui talent ya pakul a pat.
1Kings9:15 Saldong olka dongah he manghai Solomon loh BOEIPA im neh amah im
1Kings9:16 Egypt manghai Pharaoh loh cet tih Gezer te a tuuk. Te te hmai neh a hoeh phoeiah khopuei kah khosa Kanaan rhoek te a ngawn. Te phoeiah khopuei te a canu
1Kings9:17 Solomon loh Gezer neh a dang Bethhoron te a thoh.
1Kings9:18 Tedae Baalath
1Kings9:19 Rhuengim khopuei boeih
1Kings9:20 Amori
1Kings9:21 khohmuen ah amih hnukah aka sueng a ca rhoek
1Kings9:22 Tedae Israel ca te tah Solomon loh sal la khueh pawh. Amih te caemtloek hlang neh a sal rhoek
1Kings9:23 Solomon kah bitat soah aka pai mangpa rhoek he ya nga sawmnga lo tih bitat dongah aka thotat pilnam te a taemrhai uh.
1Kings9:24 Tedae Pharaoh canu tah anih ham a sak pah a im te David khopuei lamloh a paan daengah vaikhap te a sak pah.
1Kings9:25 Solomon loh kum khat ah voei thum tah hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah te BOEIPA ham a sak pah hmueihtuk dongah a nawn. Te te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a phum tih im te a cung sak.
1Kings9:26 Solomon manghai loh Eziongeber ah sangpho a saii. Te te Edom khohmuen kah carhaek tuili kaeng kah Elath taengah om.
1Kings9:27 Te vaengah Khiram loh a sal rhoek khaw
1Kings9:28 Te dongah Ophir la pawk uh vaengah te lamloh sui talent ya li pakul a khuen uh tih manghai Solomon taengla a pawk puei uh.
1Kings10:1 BOEIPA ming dongah Solomon kah olthang te Sheba manghainu loh a yaak vaengah olkael neh anih te noemcai ham ha pawk.
1Kings10:2 Jerusalem la tatthai a muep yet neh
1Kings10:3 Anih ol boeih te Solomon loh a taengah a hlat pah. Anih taengah a hlat pah pawt ham khaw manghai ham ol a hlael a om moenih.
1Kings10:4 Sheba manghainu loh Solomon kah cueihnah cungkuem neh im a sak te khaw
1Kings10:5 a caboei dongkah caak neh a sal rhoek kah ngolhmuen
1Kings10:6 Te dongah manghai te
1Kings10:7 Ka pawk hlan hil tah olka la ka tangnah moenih
1Kings10:8 Na hlang rhoek loh a yoethen
1Kings10:9 Nang dongah hmae tih BOEIPA loh kumhal hil Israel a lungnah dongah Israel ngolkhoel dongah nang aka khueh BOEIPA na Pathen tah a yoethen pai. Te dongah nang te tiktamnah neh duengnah saii ham ni manghai la ng'khueh
1Kings10:10 Te vaengah manghai taengla a paek te sui talent ya pakul lo tih botui neh lung vang khaw bahoeng yet. Sheba manghainu loh manghai Solomon taengah a khawk la paek botui bang he koep a phoe noek moenih.
1Kings10:11 Khiram kah sangpho long khaw Ophir lamkah sui a khuen pah
1Kings10:12 Manghai loh almak thing te BOEIPA im neh manghai im kah longkawn la
1Kings10:13 Manghai Solomon loh manghainu Sheba te a kongaih boeih a rhoi pah. Solomon manghai kah kutmuei voel ah anih te a bih sarhui a paek thil pueng. Te phoeiah anih te mael tih a sal rhoek neh amah kho la cet.
1Kings10:14 Kum khat ah Solomon taengah aka pawk sui he a khiing sui talent ya rhuk sawmrhuk parhuk lo.
1Kings10:15 Long yaam hlang rhoek taeng lamkah khaw
1Kings10:16 Manghai Solomon loh Sui photlinglen yahnih a saii tih photlinglen pakhat dongah sui ya rhuk cet la a boh.
1Kings10:17 Sui photlingca te ya thum lo tih photlingca khat dongah sui mina pathum cet la a boh. Te rhoek te manghai Lebanon duup im ah a khueh.
1Kings10:18 Manghai loh vueino ngolkhoel len khaw a saii tih sui cilh neh a ben thil.
1Kings10:19 Ngolkhoel dongla tangtlaeng parhuk om tih ngolkhoel kah a hnuk sampoeng tah pumrhuelh. Ngolnah hmuen kah khatben khatbang ah a kut om tih a kut kaep ah sathueng pumnit pai.
1Kings10:20 Tangtlaeng parhuk dongkah khatben khatbang ah aka pai sathueng te pum hlai nit lo. Ram tom ah te bang te a saii uh moenih.
1Kings10:21 Manghai Solomon kah tui-ok hnopai boeih he sui tih Lebanon duup im kah hnopai boeih khaw sui cilh ni. Solomon tue vaengah tah cak he hno khat la a ngai pawt dongah nuen sak pawh.
1Kings10:22 Manghai kah Tarshish sangpho khaw tuipuei kah Khiram sangpho neh kum thum ah vai a voei pah. Tarshish sangpho loh sui neh cak khaw
1Kings10:23 Solomon manghai he diklai manghai boeih lakah khuehtawn dongah khaw
1Kings10:24 Pathen loh a lungbuei ah a khueh pah a cueihnah te hnatun hamla diklai boeih loh Solomon kah maelhmai te a toem uh.
1Kings10:25 Amih loh a khocang la cak hnopai
1Kings10:26 Solomon loh leng neh marhang caem te a coi tih amah taengah leng thawng khat ya li neh marhang caem thawng hlai nit om. Te rhoek te leng khopuei rhoek neh Jerusalem kah manghai taengah a pael.
1Kings10:27 Manghai loh cak te Jerusalem ah lungto bangla a khueh tih lamphai te kolrhawk kah aka ding thaihae bangla a hmoek.
1Kings10:28 Solomon taengah marhang kah pongthohnah dongah Egypt lamkah neh Kue lamkah khaw a loh. Manghai ham aka thimpom rhoek loh Kue lamkah te a phu la a loh uh.
1Kings10:29 Egypt lamkah leng pakhat ah tangka ya rhuk la
1Kings11:1 Solomon manghai long Pharaoh canu phoeiah khaw Moab
1Kings11:2 Namtom rhoek lamkah te tah BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek taengah
1Kings11:3 Anih taengah a yuu la boeinu ya rhih neh yula ya thum om tih a yuu rhoek loh anih kah lungbuei te a buung sak.
1Kings11:4 Solomon te a patong tue a pha vaengah tah a thinko te a yuu rhoek loh pathen tloe rhoek taengla a buung sak coeng dongah a thinko loh a napa David kah thinko bangla a Pathen YAHWEH taengah rhuemtuet la om pawh.
1Kings11:5 Solomon te Sidoni kah pathen Ashtoreth hnuk neh Ammoni kah sarhingkoi Milkom hnukah cet.
1Kings11:6 Solomon loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii dongah a napa David bangla BOEIPA hnuk kae pawh.
1Kings11:7 Solomon loh Jerusalem imdan kah tlang ah Moab kah sarhingkoi Khemosh ham neh Ammon koca rhoek kah sarhingkoi Molek ham te hmuensang a thoh pah.
1Kings11:8 Te tlam te kholong nu a yuu rhoek boeih ham khaw a saii pah dongah amamih kah pathen rhoek taengah phum uh tih nawn uh.
1Kings11:9 A taengah voei nit a phoe lalah Israel Pathen YAHWEH taeng lamloh a thinko a maelh dongah BOEIPA he Solomon taengah a thintoek.
1Kings11:10 Pathen tloe rhoek taengah pongpa pawt ham he ol he a taengah a uen lalah BOEIPA kah a uen te ngaithuen pawh.
1Kings11:11 Te dongah BOEIPA Solomon te
1Kings11:12 Tedae na pa David kongah namah tue ah ka saii pawt vetih na capa kut lamlong tah ka phen ni.
1Kings11:13 Tedae ram pum he ka phen mahpawh. Ka sal David ham neh ka coelh Jerusalem ham na capa taengah koca pakhat ka paek ni
1Kings11:14 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Solomon taengah Satan la Edom kah manghai tiingan lamloh Edom Hadad te a tlung sak.
1Kings11:15 David he Edom taengah om tih rhok up hamla caempuei mangpa Joab a caeh vaengah Edom ah tongpa te boeih a ngawn.
1Kings11:16 Edom ah tongpa boeih a ngawn hil Joab neh Israel pum boeih hla rhuk pahoi om uh.
1Kings11:17 Tedae Hadad amah neh a taengkah a napa sal rhoek lamkah Edom hlang rhoek tah yong uh tih Egypt la pawk uh. Te vaengah Hadad tah camoe ca pueng.
1Kings11:18 Midian lamloh thoo uh tih Paran la pawk uh. Te vaengah a taengkah hlang rhoek te Paran lamloh a khuen uh tih Egypt kah Egypt manghai Pharaoh taengah cet uh. Te dongah anih te im a paek
1Kings11:19 Hadad te Pharaoh mik ah mikdaithen la muep a hmuh. Te dongah anih te yuu la amah yuu mana
1Kings11:20 Tahpenes mana loh anih ham te a capa Genubath a sak pah. Tedae Tahpenes loh Pharaoh im khui ah a khut pah dongah Genubath khaw Pharaoh im kah Pharaoh ca rhoek lakli ah om.
1Kings11:21 David a napa rhoek neh khoem uh coeng tih caempuei mangpa Joab a duek te Hadad loh Egypt ah a yaak. Te dongah Hadad loh Pharaoh taengah
1Kings11:22 Te vaengah Pharaoh loh anih te
1Kings11:23 Pathen loh Solomon taengah a boei Zobah manghai Hadadezer taeng lamloh aka yong Eliada capa Rezon te khingkhoekkung la a tlung sak.
1Kings11:24 Te vaengah a taengah hlang a coi tih caem mangpa la om. David loh amih te a ngawn ham vaengah tah Damasku la cet tih a khuiah kho a sak uh dongah Damasku ah manghai uh.
1Kings11:25 Hadad he a boethae hman ah Solomon tue khuiah tah Israel taengah khingkhoekkung la tlung. Israel taengah a mueipuel doela Aram ah manghai.
1Kings11:26 Solomon kah sal
1Kings11:27 A napa David khopuei kah a puut te a bing neh vaikhap a sak dongkah ol ah ni manghai Solomon te kut a thueng thil.
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam tah a hlang khaw tatthai hlangrhalh la om. Te dongah Solomon te camoe kah bitat a saii te a hmuh vaengah Joseph im kah hnorhih boeih te anih a soep sak.
1Kings11:29 A tue a pha vaengah Jeroboam te Jerusalem lamloh a caeh hatah tonghma Shiloh Ahijah loh longpueng ah a mah. Te vaengah himbai thai neh yol uh tih amih rhoi bueng te lohma ah om rhoi.
1Kings11:30 Ahijah loh a pum dongkah himbai thai te a tuuk tih a hnipen hlai nit la a phen.
1Kings11:31 Te phoeiah Jeroboam te
1Kings11:32 Tedae ka sal David kong neh Israel koca boeih lamloh ka coelh Jerusalem khopuei kongah anih ham koca pakhat om ni.
1Kings11:33 Kai n'toeng uh tih Sidoni pathen Ashtoreth taengah
1Kings11:34 Tedae ram pum he anih kut lamloh ka bong mahpawh. Ka olpaek neh ka khosing a ngaithuen dongah amah ka coelh ka sal David kongah a hingnah tue khuiah khoboei la anih ka khueh pueng.
1Kings11:35 A capa kut lamlong tah ram he ka loh vetih nang taengah koca parha kam paek ni.
1Kings11:36 Te dongah a capa te koca pakhat ka paek ni. Te daengah ni Jerusalem khopuei kah ka mikhmuh ah hnin takuem ka sal David kah hmaithoi a om eh. Te tah kamah ham ka ming pahoi khueh ham ka coelh.
1Kings11:37 Nang te kan loh vaengah na hinglu kah a sahnaih boeih soah na manghai vetih Israel soah manghai la na om ni.
1Kings11:38 Nang kang uen boeih te na hnatun tih ka longpuei ah na pongpa atah
1Kings11:39 He dongah he David tiingan te ka phaep ni. Tedae hnin takuem moenih
1Kings11:40 Solomon loh Jeroboam te duek sak ham a mae dae Jeroboam te thoo tih Egypt kah Egypt manghai Shishak taengla yong. Te dongah Solomon a dueknah rhi hil Egypt ah om.
1Kings11:41 Solomon kah a ol coih khaw
1Kings11:42 Jerusalem kah Israel boeih soah Solomon kah a manghai tue te kum sawmli lo.
1Kings11:43 Solomon te a napa rhoek taengla khoem uh tih a napa David khopuei ah a up phoeiah tah anih yueng la a capa Rehoboam tloep manghai.
1Kings12:1 Rehoboam te manghai sak hamla Israel pum loh Shekhem la a pawk dongah anih khaw Shekhem la cet.
1Kings12:2 Te tla a om neh Nebat capa Jeroboam loh a yaak dae amah te Egypt ah om pueng. Manghai Solomon mikhmuh lamloh a yong phoeiah Jeroboam he Egypt ah kho a sak.
1Kings12:3 Te vaengah a tah uh vanbangla a taengla a khue uh. Te dongah Jeroboam neh Israel hlangping boeih te cet tih a pha uh vaengah Rehoboam te a voek uh.
1Kings12:4 “Na pa loh kaimih kah hnamkun he a siing coeng. Tedae namah loh na pa kah thohtatnah mangkhak lamloh
1Kings12:5 Tedae amih te

1Kings12:7 A thui uh phoeiah amah te a voek uh tih
1Kings12:8 Tedae a ham rhoek kah cilsuep a paek te a voeih. Amah neh aka pantai hang tih a mikhmuh ah aka pai camoe rhoek te a dawt.
1Kings12:9 Te vaengah amih te
1Kings12:10 Te dongah anih te amah neh aka pantai hmaih camoe rhoek loh a doo uh tih
1Kings12:11 A pa loh nangmih soah hnamkun a rhih a tloeng coeng. Tedae kai loh nangmih kah hnamkun te ka koei pueng ni. A pa loh nangmih te rhuihet neh n'toel dae kai loh nangmih te saelkhui ta-ai neh kan toel ni
1Kings12:12 A caeh vaengah tah manghai loh a uen tih
1Kings12:13 Te vaengah manghai loh pilnam te mat a voek tih a ham rhoek kah cilsuep a paek te khaw a voeih.
1Kings12:14 Te dongah camoe kah cilsuep bangla amih te a voek tih

1Kings12:17 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek tah Judah khopuei rhoek ah kho a sak uh tih amih soah Rehoboam te manghai.
1Kings12:18 Te vaengah manghai Rehoboam loh saldong aka pai thil Adoram te a tueih hatah Israel pum loh anih te lungto neh a dae tih duek. Tedae manghai Rehoboam tah leng dongah luei ham huel uh tih Jerusalem la rhaelrham.
1Kings12:19 Te dong tahae khohnin duela Israel loh David imkhui boe a koek thil.
1Kings12:20 Jeroboam a mael te Israel pum loh a yaak vaengah tah anih te a tah uh tih rhaengpuei taengla a khue uh. Te phoeiah anih te Israel boeih soah a manghai sak uh. Tedae Judah koca bueng phoeiah tah David imkhui hnukah a om moenih.
1Kings12:21 Rehoboam te cet tih Jerusalem a pha neh Judah imkhui pum te a coi. Israel imkhui vathoh thil ham neh ram te Solomon capa Rehoboam taengla mael sak ham caemtloek la aka tlun thai te a coelh. Te vaengah Benjamin koca he thawng yakhat neh thawng sawmrhet lo.
1Kings12:22 Tedae Pathen kah ol tah Pathen kah hlang Shemaiah taengla pawk tih

1Kings12:27 Pilnam he Jerusalem kah BOEIPA im ah hmueih nawn ham cet tih pilnam kah lungbuei he a boei Judah manghai Rehoboam taengla mael khaming. Te vaengah kai n'ngawn uh vetih Judah manghai Rehoboam taengla mael uh ni

1Kings12:30 Pilnam he Dan hil a mikhmuh ah huek a caeh uh dongah hekah hno he tholhnah la om coeng.
1Kings12:31 Hmuensang kah im te a saii tih Levi koca lamkah aka om mueh khobawt pilnam lamkah te khosoih la a saii.
1Kings12:32 Jeroboam loh a hla rhet dongkah hlasae hnin hlai nga vaengah te Judah kah khotue bangla khotue a phueng. Vaitoca taengah nawn ham a saii vanbangla Bethel kah a saii hmueihtuk dongah a khuen. Bethel ah khosoih rhoek te a pai sak hmuensang khaw a saii.
1Kings12:33 Amah lungbuei lamkah bueng neh a thainawn hla dongkah
1Kings13:1 Pathen kah hlang he BOEIPA ol neh Judah lamloh Bethel la pakcak pawk. Te vaengah Jeroboam tah hmueih phum ham hmueihtuk taengah pai.

1Kings13:5 Te phoeiah BOEIPA ol lamloh Pathen hlang kah a paek kopoekrhai bangla hmueihtuk te paeng tih maehhloi khaw hmueihtuk dong lamloh luk.

1Kings13:9 BOEIPA ol loh kai n'uen tangloeng tih

1Kings13:11 Te vaengah tonghma patong pakhat tah Bethel ah kho a sak. Te dongah a capa te a pawk vaengah Pathen kah hlang loh Bethel ah hnin at neh bitat cungkuem a saii khaw

1Kings13:16 Tedae
1Kings13:17 Ka taengkah ol he BOEIPA ol dongkah ni. Teah te buh ca boeh
1Kings13:18 Te vaengah amah te
1Kings13:19 Te dongah a taengla mael tih a im ah buh a caak
1Kings13:20 Te phoeiah amih te caboei dongah ngol uh.
1Kings13:21 Te vaengah Judah lamkah aka pawk Pathen hlang te a o tih
1Kings13:22 Na mael tih namah taengah
1Kings13:23 Buh a caak phoei neh a ok phoeiah tah anih aka mael puei tonghma loh anih ham laak a khih pah.
1Kings13:24 Tedae a caeh vaengah anih te sathueng loh longpuei ah a mah tih anih te a duek sak. A rhok te long ah a voeih tih a om vaengah laak te a taengah pai. Sathueng khaw rhok taengah pai.
1Kings13:25 Te vaengah hlang aka cet loh longpuei ah rhok yalh tih rhok taengah sathueng a pai te lawt a hmuh uh. Te dongah tonghma patong a om nah khopuei ah a thui uh.
1Kings13:26 Te vaengah longpueng lamloh anih aka mael puei tonghma loh a yaak tih
1Kings13:27 Te phoeiah a ca rhoek te
1Kings13:28 A caeh vaengah a rhok te long ah ana voeih tih rhok taengah laak neh sathueng a pai te a hmuh. Sathueng loh rhok te ca pawt tih laak te khaw nget pawh.
1Kings13:29 Tonghma loh Pathen hlang kah rhok te a pom tih laak dongla a tloeng phoeiah a mael puei. Te phoeiah rhaengsae ham neh up hamla tonghma patong kah khopuei la a pawk puei.
1Kings13:30 A rhok te amah phuel ah a yalh sak vaengah
1Kings13:31 Anih te a up phoeiah tah a ca rhoek te a uen tih
1Kings13:32 BOEIPA ol lamloh Bethel kah hmueihtuk ham neh Samaria khopuei rhoek kah hmuensang im boeih ham a doek ol te thoeng rhoe thoeng bitni
1Kings13:33 He ol phoeiah khaw Jeroboam he a longpuei thae lamloh a mael moenih. Tedae a bal vaengah khobawt pilnam khui lamkah te hmuensang khosoih la a khueh. A kut loh a pha rhang la aka omtoem tah hmuensang khosoih la ana om van.
1Kings13:34 He hno dongah Jeroboam imkhui ah tholhnah la om tih diklai maelhmai lamloh aka thup ham neh aka mitmoeng sak ham ni a om coeng.
1Kings14:1 Te vaeng tue ah Jeroboam capa Abijah te tlo.
1Kings14:2 Te dongah Jeroboam loh a yuu te
1Kings14:3 Na kut dongah buhham neh buhrhaeng cun rha
1Kings14:4 Jeroboam yuu loh a saii van tangloeng. Thoo tih Shiloh la cet tih Ahijah im a pha. Ahijah khaw a patong neh a mik hmang tih hmu thai voel pawh.
1Kings14:5 Tedae BOEIPA Ahijah taengah
1Kings14:6 Thohka a pha vaengah a kho ol te Ahijah loh a yaak tih
1Kings14:7 Cet lamtah Jeroboam taengah thui pah. Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Nang he pilnam khui lamloh kan pomsang tih nang he ka pilnam Israel soah rhaengsang la kang khueh.
1Kings14:8 Ram he David imkhui lamloh ka phen tih nang taengah kam paek coeng. Tedae ka olpaek aka ngaithuen tih ka mik ah a thuem bueng saii ham a thinko boeih neh kai hnukah aka pongpa ka sal David bangla na om moenih.
1Kings14:9 Namah hmai kah aka om boeih lakah na saii khaw na thae aih. Na cet tih namah ham pathen tloe na saii. Mueihlawn neh kai nan veet tih kai he na nam la nan voeih.
1Kings14:10 Te dongah Jeroboam im ah boethae ka khuen coeng he. Jeroboam lamloh pangbueng aka yun thil tih a khoh khaw
1Kings14:11 BOEIPA loh a thui coeng dongah Jeroboam kah a duek rhok te khopuei ah ui loh a caak vetih lohma ah aka duek te vaan kah vaa rhoek loh a caak ni.
1Kings14:12 Namah thoo lamtah na im la mael laeh. Na kho loh khopuei khuila a kun neh camoe te duek ni.
1Kings14:13 Anih te Israel pum loh a rhaengsae vetih a up ni. Jeroboam im ah Israel Pathen BOEIPA kah hno then he a khuiah a hmuh dongah Jeroboam khui lamloh anih bueng he ni phuel khuila a pha eh.
1Kings14:14 BOEIPA loh Israel soah manghai a pai sak ni. Anih loh tahae khohnin ah Jeroboam imkhui te a thup pawn ni.
1Kings14:15 BOEIPA loh Israel te tui dongkah capu a vikvawk bangla a ngawn vetih a napa rhoek taengah a paek he khohmuen then dong lamloh Israel te a phuk ni. Amamih kah Asherah a saii uh neh BOEIPA te a veet uh dongah amih te tuiva rhalvangan duela a haeh uh ni.
1Kings14:16 Jeroboam kah tholhnah kong ah tholh tih Israel a tholh vanbangla Israel te a tloeng ni
1Kings14:17 Te phoeiah Jeroboam yuu te thoo tih mael. Tirzah la cet tih im kah cingkhaa te a cawt vaengah camoe te duek.
1Kings14:18 BOEIPA ol loh a sal tonghma Ahijah kut ah a thui bangla camoe a up uh vaengah Israel pum loh anih te a rhaengsae uh.
1Kings14:19 Ol noi la Jeroboam kah a vathoh neh a manghai te
1Kings14:20 A khohnin la Jeroboam he kum kul kum nit a manghai phoeiah tah a napa rhoek taengla khoem uh. Te phoeiah tah anih yueng la a capa Nadab tloep manghai.
1Kings14:21 Solomon capa Rehoboam tah Judah ah manghai. Rehoboam a manghai vaengah kum sawmli kum khat lo ca coeng. Israel koca boeih khui lamloh amah ming te pahoi khueh ham BOEIPA loh a coelh Jerusalem khopuei ah kum hlai rhih manghai. A manu ming tah Ammoni nu Naamah ni.
1Kings14:22 Judah khaw BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii. A tholhnah neh a tholh uh te a napa rhoek kah a saii boeih lakah BOEIPA a thatlai sak uh.
1Kings14:23 Amih loh hmuensang neh kaam te amamih ham a thoh uh. Som a sang boeih neh thing hing hmui boeih ah Asherah a ling uh.
1Kings14:24 BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh ah a haek namtom rhoek kah tueilaehkoi cungkuem bangla a saii uh tih khohmuen ah hlanghalh khaw om.
1Kings14:25 Rehoboam manghai te a kum nga dongla a pha vaengah Egypt manghai Shishak loh Jerusalem te a paan.
1Kings14:26 Te vaengah BOEIPA im kah thakvoh neh manghai im kah thakvoh khaw vik a phueih. Solomon loh a saii sui photling boeih te khaw a pum la a loh tih a khuen.
1Kings14:27 Te dongah manghai Rehoboam loh a yueng la rhohum photling a saii tih manghai im thohka aka tawt imtawt mangpa kut ah a soep sak.
1Kings14:28 BOEIPA im la manghai a kun dingdoeng vaengah imtawt rhoek loh te te a muk uh. Te phoeiah tah imtawt kah tanhnaem la koep a khoem uh.
1Kings14:29 Rehoboam kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
1Kings14:30 Rehoboam laklo neh Jeroboam laklo ah hnin takuem caemtloek om.
1Kings14:31 Rehoboam te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah David khopuei kah a napa rhoek taengah a up. A manu ming he Ammoni Naamah ni. Te phoeiah anih yueng la a capa Abijam te manghai.
1Kings15:1 Nebat capa Jeroboam manghai kah kum hlai rhet vaengah Judah ah Abijam manghai.
1Kings15:2 Jerusalem ah kum thum manghai tih a manu ming tah Absalom canu Maakah ni.
1Kings15:3 A mikhmuh ah a saii pah a napa kah tholhnah cungkuem dongah pongpa tih a napa David kah thinko bangla a Pathen BOEIPA taengah a thinko rhuemtuet la a om moenih.
1Kings15:4 Tedae David kongah ni a Pathen BOEIPA loh anih te Jerusalem ah hmaithoi a paek. Anih hnukah a capa te a phoe sak tih Jerusalem te a pai sak.
1Kings15:5 David tah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem he a saii tih anih a uen boeih te a phaelh moenih. A hing tue khuiah Khitti Uriah kah lai bueng ni lai dawk a om.
1Kings15:6 Rehoboam laklo neh Jeroboam laklo ah he a hing tue khuiah caemtloek om.
1Kings15:7 Abijam kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek moenih a? Abijam laklo neh Jeroboam laklo ah caemtloek ni aka om.
1Kings15:8 Abijam te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah anih te David khopuei ah a up uh. Te phoeiah a capa Asa he anih yueng la manghai.
1Kings15:9 Israel manghai Jeroboam kah a kum kul dongah Judah manghai Asa he manghai.
1Kings15:10 Anih te Jerusalem ah sawmli kum khat manghai. A manu ming tah Absalom canu Maakah ni.
1Kings15:11 Asa tah a napa David bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem ni a saii.
1Kings15:12 Te dongah hlanghalh rhoek te khohmuen lamloh a haek tih a napa rhoek loh a saii mueirhol te boeih a khoe.
1Kings15:13 A manu Maakah pataeng Asherah ham rhobuk a saii dongah manghainu lamloh a khoe. A rhobuk te Asa loh a phae pah tih Kidron soklong ah a hoeh.
1Kings15:14 Hmuensang te khoe uh sitoe pawt cakhaw amah tue khuiah tah Asa kah thinko he BOEIPA taengah rhuemtuet la om.
1Kings15:15 A napa kah hnocim neh amah kah hnocim khaw
1Kings15:16 Amah tue khuiah tah Asa laklo neh Israel manghai Baasha laklo ah caemtloek om.
1Kings15:17 Israel manghai Baasha loh Judah te a paan tih Ramah te a tuung. Judah manghai Asa taengah aka kun ham neh aka vuenva ham khaw pae pawh.
1Kings15:18 Asa loh BOEIPA im thakvoh khuiah aka sueng cak neh sui boeih
1Kings15:19 Te vaengah
1Kings15:20 Benhadad loh manghai Asa ol te a ngai pah. Te dongah amah taengkah mangpa tatthai rhoek te Israel khopuei rhoek ah a tueih tih Ijon
1Kings15:21 Baasha loh a yaak van neh Ramah a sak te a toeng tih Tirzah la kho a sak.
1Kings15:22 Asa manghai loh Judah pum te a yaak sak vaengah ommongsitoe om voel pawh. Te dongah Baasha loh Ramah a sak nah lungto neh thing te a puen uh. Te nen te manghai Asa loh Benjamin Geba neh Mizpah te a sak.
1Kings15:23 Asa kah ol noi boeih neh a thayung thamal boeih
1Kings15:24 Asa te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah a napa David khopuei kah a napa rhoek taengah a up. Te phoeiah a capa Jehoshaphat te anih yueng la manghai.
1Kings15:25 Judah manghai Asa kah a kum bae dongah Jeroboam capa Nadab he Israel soah manghai tih Israel soah kum nit manghai.
1Kings15:26 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii tih a napa kah longpuei ah pongpa. Anih kah tholhnah khuiah kah Israel te a tholh sak.
1Kings15:27 Anih te Issakhar imkhui kah Ahijah capa Baasha loh a ven. Te dongah Baasha loh Nadab neh Gibbethon aka dum Israel boeih te Philisti kah Gibbethon ah a ngawn.
1Kings15:28 Judah manghai Asa kah a kum thum dongah Baasha loh Nadab te a duek sak tih Nadab yueng la manghai.
1Kings15:29 A manghai van neh Jeroboam imkhui te boeih a ngawn tih Jeroboam hiil la aka hiil boeih te hlun pawh. A sal Shiloh Ahijah kut ah a thui BOEIPA ol bangla Nadab te a mit sak.
1Kings15:30 Jeroboam kah tholhnah tah tholh coeng tih Israel te khaw a tholh sak. A konoinah lamloh Israel Pathen BOEIPA te a veet.
1Kings15:31 Nadab kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te khaw Israel manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
1Kings15:32 Amah tue khuiah tah Asa laklo neh Israel manghai Baasha laklo ah caemtloek puet om.
1Kings15:33 Judah manghai Asa kah a kum thum dongah Ahijah capa Baasha he Israel boeih soah manghai van tih Tirzah ah kum kul kum li om.
1Kings15:34 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii tih Jeroboam kah longpuei ah pongpa. Anih kah tholhnah khuiah Israel te a tholh sak.
1Kings16:1 BOEIPA ol tah Baasha hamla Hanani capa Jehu taengla ha pawk tih
1Kings16:2 “Nang te laipi lamloh kan pomsang tih ka pilnam Israel soah rhaengsang la nang kang khueh. Tedae Jeroboam kah longpuei ah na pongpa tih ka pilnam Israel te na tholh sak dongah amih kah tholhnah neh kai nan veet.
1Kings16:3 Baasha hnuk neh a imkhui hnuk te ka hlawp pah coeng he. Te dongah na imkhui te Nebat capa Jeroboam imkhui bangla kang khueh ni.
1Kings16:4 Khopuei ah Baasha kah a duek rhok te ui loh a caak vetih kohong kah a duek rhok te vaan kah vaa loh a caak ni
1Kings16:5 Baasha kah ol noi neh a saii te khaw
1Kings16:6 Baasha te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah Tirzah ah a up. Te phoeiah a capa Elah te anih yueng la manghai.
1Kings16:7 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae cungkuem a saii tih a kut saii neh amah a veet dongah
1Kings16:8 Judah manghai Asa kah a kum kul kum rhuk vaengah Baasha capa Elah he Tirzah kah Israel ah kum nit manghai.
1Kings16:9 Anih tah amah kah sal
1Kings16:10 Zimri a pawk vaengah Elah te a ngawn tih a duek sak. Judah manghai Asa kah kum kul kum rhih vaengah Elah yueng la manghai.
1Kings16:11 A manghai neh a ngolkhoel dongah a ngol vanbangla Baasha imkhui te boeih a ngawn tih pangbueng aka yun thil khaw
1Kings16:12 BOEIPA ol bangla Zimri loh Baasha imkhui te boeih a mitmoeng sak. Te te Baasha hamla tonghma Jehu kut ah ana thui coeng.
1Kings16:13 Baasha kah tholhnah cungkuem neh a capa Elah kah tholhnah dongah tholh uh. Te dongah Israel te a tholh sak tih amih kah a honghi neh Israel Pathen BOEIPA te a veet.
1Kings16:14 Elah kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te Israel manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
1Kings16:15 Judah manghai Asa kah kum kul kum rhih
1Kings16:16 Pilnam aka rhaeh loh a yaak vaengah
1Kings16:17 Te dongah Omri neh a taengkah Israel pum tah Gibbethon lamloh thoeih uh tih Tirzah te a dum uh.
1Kings16:18 Khopuei a buem pah te Zimri loh a hmuh van neh manghai im kah impuei la kun. Te phoeiah manghai im te a kaep ah hmai neh a hoeh tih amah khaw duek.
1Kings16:19 A tholhnah dongah a tholhnah bangla BOEIPA mik ah boethae a saii te tholh coeng. Israel te tholh sak ham aka saii Jeroboam kah longpuei neh a tholhnah dongah ni a pongpa.
1Kings16:20 Zimri kah ol noi
1Kings16:21 Te vaengah Israel pilnam he rhakthuem la vik a paek. Pilnam rhakthuem te Ginath capa Tibni taengah om tih amah te a manghai sak. A rhakthuem te Omri hnuk a vai.
1Kings16:22 Tedae Omri hnukkah pilnam loh Ginath capa Tibni hnukah pilnam te a khuk vaengah Tibni te duek tih Omri te manghai.
1Kings16:23 Judah manghai Asa kah kum sawmthum kum khat vaengah
1Kings16:24 Shemer taengkah Samaria tlang te cak talent panit neh a lai. Tlang soah kho a thoong tih a thoong khopuei ming te tlang kah boei Shemer ming neh Samaria la a khue.
1Kings16:25 Omri loh BOEIPA mik ah boethae a saii tih amah hmai kah boeih lakah thae a huet.
1Kings16:26 Nebat capa Jeroboam kah longpuei neh anih kah tholhnah cungkuem dongah ni a pongpa. Anih kah tholhnah loh Israel te a tholh sak tih amih kah a honghi neh Israel Pathen BOEIPA te a veet.
1Kings16:27 Omri kah ol noi a khueh te khaw
1Kings16:28 Omri te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah Samaria ah a up. Te phoeiah a capa Ahab te anih yueng la manghai.
1Kings16:29 Judah manghai Asa kah kum sawmthum kum rhet kum vaengah Omri capa Ahab te Israel soah manghai. Omri capa Ahab loh Samaria ah Israel soah kum kul kum nit a manghai thil.
1Kings16:30 Omri capa Ahab loh anih hmai kah boeih lakah khaw BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii.
1Kings16:31 Nebat capa Jeroboam kah tholhnah dongah a pongpa te phoeng a? A yuu te Sidoni manghai Ethbaal canu Jezebel te a loh. Cet bal tih Baal taengah tho a thueng tih a taengah bakop.
1Kings16:32 Baal hamla hmueihtuk a suem pah tih Samaria ah Baal im a sak.
1Kings16:33 Ahab loh Asherah a saii. A saii te khaw amah hmai kah aka om Israel manghai boeih lakah khaw Israel Pathen BOEIPA a veet te Ahab loh a koei.
1Kings16:34 Anih tue vaengah Betheli Hiel loh Jerikho te a thoh. Nun capa Joshua kut ah a thui BOEIPA ol bangla a caming Abiram neh a toong tih a canoi Segub neh thohkhaih a pai sak.
1Kings17:1 Gilead lampah lamkah Tishbi Elijah loh Ahab taengah
1Kings17:2 Te phoeiah anih taengla BOEIPA ol ha pawk tih
1Kings17:3 “Nang te He lamloh cet laeh
1Kings17:4 Soklong kah tui te o lamtah nang aka cangbam ham vangak ka uen coeng
1Kings17:5 Te dongah cet tih BOEIPA ol bangla a saii. Cet tih Jordan rhaldan kah Kertih soklong ah kho a sak.
1Kings17:6 Vangak loh anih ham te mincang ah buh neh maeh
1Kings17:7 Khohmuen ah khonal a om pawt dongah khohnin a thok vaengah soklong khaw kak.
1Kings17:8 Te vaengah BOEIPA ol te anih taengla cet tih
1Kings17:9 “Thoo
1Kings17:10 Te dongah thoo tih Zarepthah la cet. Khopuei thohka te a pha vaengah nuhmai nu loh thingpaem tarha ana coi. Anih te a khue tih
1Kings17:11 Tui than la a caeh vaengah anih te koep a khue tih
1Kings17:12 Te vaengah
1Kings17:13 Tedae Elijah loh anih te
1Kings17:14 Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. BOEIPA loh diklai hman ah khonal a paek la a paek tue hlan atah vaidam canghaek khaw muei pawt vetih situi um khaw kak mahpawh
1Kings17:15 Cet tih Elijah ol bangla a saii dongah amah neh
1Kings17:16 Vaidam canghaek te ko pawt tih situi um khaw Elijah kut ah a thui BOEIPA ol bangla kak tlaih pawh.
1Kings17:17 He ol a om phoeiah im kung nu kah a capa te tlo. A tloh te bahoeng nul coeng tih a khuiah a hiil pataeng om pawh.
1Kings17:18 Te dongah Elijah te
1Kings17:19 Tedae huta te
1Kings17:20 Te phoeiah BOEIPA te a khue tih
1Kings17:21 Camoe dongah voei thum bakop tih BOEIPA te a khue. Te vaengah ah
1Kings17:22 Elijah ol te BOEIPA loh a yaak dongah camoe kah hinglu te a khui la mael tih hing.
1Kings17:23 Elijah loh camoe te a loh tih imhman lamloh im khuila a suntlak puei. A manu taengah a paek tih Elijah loh
1Kings17:24 Te vaengah huta loh Elijah te
1Kings18:1 Khohnin muep a koe phoeikah a kum thum dongah BOEIPA ol te Elijah taengla pawk tih
1Kings18:2 Te dongah Elijah te Ahab taengah phoe hamla cet. Te vaengah Samaria ah khokha tlung.
1Kings18:3 Te dongah Ahab loh im kah Obadiah te a khue. Te vaengah Obadiah tah BOEIPA bahoeng aka rhih la om.
1Kings18:4 BOEIPA kah tonghma rhoek te Jezebel loh a thup ham a om vaengah khaw Obadiah loh tonghma yakhat te a khuen tih amih te lungko pakhat ah hlang sawmnga rhip a thuh. Te phoeiah amih te buh neh tui neh a cangbam.
1Kings18:5 Ahab loh Obadiah te
1Kings18:6 Khohmuen tom til hamla amamih tael uh thae. Ahab te amah bueng longpuei pakhat ah cet tih Obadiah khaw amah bueng longpuei pakhat ah cet.
1Kings18:7 Obadiah te longpueng ah a om vaengah anih te Elijah loh tapkhoeh a doe. Anih te a hmat coeng dongah a maelhmai dongah buluk tih
1Kings18:8 Te phoeiah Obadiah te
1Kings18:9 Te phoeiah
1Kings18:10 Nang kah Pathen BOEIPA kah hingnah dongah
1Kings18:11 Tedae nang loh
1Kings18:12 Kai he nang taeng lamloh ka nong tih BOEIPA kah Mueihla loh ka ming nah pawt la nang n'khuen khaming. Ahab taengla puen ham ka caeh vaengah nang m'hmu pawt mai koinih kai n'ngawn ni ta. Tedae na sal he ka camoe lamloh BOEIPA te ka rhih ngawn ne.
1Kings18:13 Jezebel loh BOEIPA kah tonghma rhoek a ngawn vaengah ka saii te ka boeipa taengla ha puen pawt nim? BOEIPA tonghma hlang yakhat te lungko pakhat ah hlang sawmnga
1Kings18:14 Tedae tahae ah
1Kings18:15 Elijah loh
1Kings18:16 Obadiah te Ahab doe hamla cet tih a taengah a puen pah. Te dongah Ahab khaw Elijah doe hamla cet.
1Kings18:17 Ahab loh Elijah te a hmuh vaengah Ahab loh anih te
1Kings18:18 Te vaengah
1Kings18:19 Karmel tlang la kamah taengah Israel pum neh Baal tonghma rhoek ya li sawmnga
1Kings18:20 Ahab loh Israel ca boeih te a tah tih tonghma rhoek neh Karmel tlang ah a tingtun sak.
1Kings18:21 Te vaengah Elijah te pilnam pum taengla mop tih
1Kings18:22 Elijah loh pilnam taengah
1Kings18:23 Kaimih ham vaito pumnit m'pae uh laeh. Vaito pumat te amih ham coelh uh saeh lamtah top uh saeh. Te phoeiah thing soah tloeng uh saeh lamtah hmai toih uh boel saeh. Kai khaw vaito pakhat te ka ngawn vetih thing soah ka tloeng van ni
1Kings18:24 Na pathen rhoek kah ming te khue uh lamtah kai khaw YAHWEH ming te ka khue eh. Tedae hmai neh aka doo Pathen te tah Pathen tang la om ni
1Kings18:25 Te phoeiah Elijah loh Baal tonghma rhoek taengah
1Kings18:26 Te dongah vaito khuen uh te amih taengah a paek uh tih a ngawn uh. Baal ming te mincang lamloh khothun hil a khue uh. “Baal
1Kings18:27 Khothun a pha vaengah Elijah tah amih taengah omsaa tih
1Kings18:28 Te dongah ol a len la pang uh. Amih kah khosing bangla a pum dongkah thii a long hil cunghang neh cai neh a hlap uh.
1Kings18:29 Khothun a poeng tih khocang nawn hil khaw tonghma uh. Tedae ol om pawt tih a doo voel pawt dongah hnatungnah khaw om pawh.
1Kings18:30 Elijah loh pilnam boeih te
1Kings18:31 A taengah BOEIPA ol pawk tih
1Kings18:32 BOEIPA ming neh hmueihtuk lung te koep a khoeng tih hmueihtuk kaep ah cangti sum nit cet la tuilong a saii.
1Kings18:33 Thing te a hawn phoeiah vaito te a top tih thing soah a tloeng.
1Kings18:34 Te phoeiah amrhaeng pali dongah tui than uh lamtah hmueihhlutnah soah khaw
1Kings18:35 Tui te hmueihtuk kaepvai la long tih tuilong ah pataeng tui bae.
1Kings18:36 Khocang nawn tue a pha vaengah tonghma Elijah te thoeih tih
1Kings18:37 Kai he n'doo lah
1Kings18:38 Te vaengah BOEIPA kah hmai suntla tih hmueihhlutnah neh thing khaw
1Kings18:39 Pilnam cungkuem loh a hmuh vaengah a maelhmai dongla buluk uh tih
1Kings18:40 Elijah amih taengah
1Kings18:41 Te phoeiah Elijah loh Ahab te
1Kings18:42 Te dongah Ahab te caak ham neh ok hamla cet. Tedae Elijah tah Karmel som la luei. Te phoeiah diklai la kuisu uh tih a maelhmai te a khuklu neh a khuklu laklo ah a khueh.
1Kings18:43 Te phoeiah amah kah a tueihyoeih te
1Kings18:44 A voei rhih dongla a pha vaengah tah
1Kings18:45 Rhaih
1Kings18:46 BOEIPA kut te Elijah soah a om dongah a cinghen te a yen tih
1Kings19:1 Elijah kah a saii boeih
1Kings19:2 Jezebel loh Elijah taengla puencawn a tueih tih
1Kings19:3 A rhih dongah thoo tih a hinglu hamla yong. Judah kah Beersheba a pha vaengah a tueihyoeih te pahoi a om tak.
1Kings19:4 Anih te khosoek la cet tih hnin at longcaeh a pha. Te vaengah hlingcet hmui ah ngol tih a hinglu a duek ham a bih. Te dongah
1Kings19:5 Yalh tih hlingcet hmui ah a ih vaengah puencawn loh anih te tarha a taek tih
1Kings19:6 A paelki hatah a lu ah cangrhoh buh neh tui um lawt a om pah. Te dongah a caak a ok tih koep yalh.
1Kings19:7 BOEIPA kah puencawn a pabae la mael tih anih te a taek. Te phoeiah
1Kings19:8 Te dongah thoo tih uh a caak
1Kings19:9 Lungko khuila pahoi kun tih a rhaeh vaengah BOEIPA ol anih taengla pak a pawk pah. Te vaengah anih te
1Kings19:10 Te dongah
1Kings19:11 Te vaengah
1Kings19:12 Lingluei hnukah hmai om dae hmai khuiah BOEIPA a om moenih. Hmai hnuk ah tah bidip ol dingsuek la om.
1Kings19:13 Elijah loh a yaak vaengah a himbai neh a maelhmai a cun. Te phoeiah cet tih lungko thohka ah pai. Te vaengah anih taengla ol hlawt a caeh pah tih
1Kings19:14 Te dongah
1Kings19:15 BOEIPA loh anih te
1Kings19:16 Nimshi capa Jehu te Israel kah manghai la koelh laeh. Abelmeholath lamkah Shaphat capa Elisha te namah yueng tonghma la koelh.
1Kings19:17 Hazael cunghang lamkah aka loeih te Jehu loh a duek sak vetih Jehu cunghang lamkah aka loeih te Elisha loh a duek sak ni.
1Kings19:18 Baal taengah khuklu aka cungkueng pawt boeih
1Kings19:19 Te lamloh a caeh vaengah Shaphat capa Elisha te a hmuh. Te vaengah a mikhmuh ah rhoi hlai nit ana balak. Amah tah a hlai nit nah dongah balak. Elijah loh anih te a paan tih a taengah a himbai a voeih pah.
1Kings19:20 Vaito te pak a hlak tih Elijah hnukah yong. Te vaengah Elijah te
1Kings19:21 Te dongah Elijah hnuk lamloh mael tih vaito rhoi at te a loh. Te te a ngawn tih maeh te vaito mah kah hnopai neh a thoong. Te phoeiah pilnam te a paek tih a caak uh. Te phoeiah thoo tih Elijah hnukah cet tih thotat.
1Kings20:1 Aram manghai Benhadad loh amah kah thadueng boeih neh a taengkah manghai sawmthum panit
1Kings20:2 Te phoeiah khopuei la Israel manghai Ahab taengla puencawn a tueih.
1Kings20:3 Ahab te
1Kings20:4 Israel manghai loh a doo tih
1Kings20:5 Puencawn rhoek te mael tih
1Kings20:6 Thangvuen tahae tue ah ka sal rhoek nang taengla kan tueih vetih na im neh na sal rhoek im khaw a phuelhthaih uh ni. Na mik loh a ngailaemnah boeih te a kut dongah a tloeng uh vetih a khuen ni
1Kings20:7 Israel manghai loh khohmuen kah a ham rhoek boeih te a khue tih
1Kings20:8 Te vaengah anih te a ham boeih neh pilnam boeih loh
1Kings20:9 Te dongah Benhadad kah puencawn rhoek te
1Kings20:10 Benhadad loh anih te ol a tah tih
1Kings20:11 Israel manghai loh a doo tih
1Kings20:12 Amah neh manghai rhoek loh dungtlungim ah a ok uh li vaengah he ol he a yaak. Te dongah a sal rhoek te
1Kings20:13 Te vaengah Israel manghai Ahab taengla tonghma pakhat pakcak a mop pah tih
1Kings20:14 Te vaengah Ahab loh
1Kings20:15 Te dongah paeng kah mangpa cadong rhoek te a soep tih yahnih sawmthum panit lo uh. Amih phoeiah Israel ca boeih
1Kings20:16 Te phoeiah khothun ah a muk uh dae Benhadad tah amah neh anih aka bom manghai rhoek
1Kings20:17 Te vaengah paeng kah mangpa cadong rhoek te lamhma la khoong uh tih Benhadad taengla a tueih. Te dongah a taengla puen uh tih
1Kings20:18 Te vaengah
1Kings20:19 Te tlam te khopuei lamloh paeng kah mangpa cadong rhoek khoong uh tih amih hnukah tatthai rhoek te om uh.
1Kings20:20 Hlang pakhat loh hlang pakhat van a tloek uh dongah Aram rhoek te rhaelrham uh. Amih te Israel loh a hloem dae Aram manghai Benhadad tah marhang caem neh marhang dongah vik loeih.
1Kings20:21 Israel manghai te cet tih marhang khaw leng khaw a ngawn pah. Aram soah hmasoe len neh a ngawn.
1Kings20:22 Te vaengah tonghma te Israel manghai taengla thoeih. Te phoeiah anih te
1Kings20:23 Te vaengah Aram manghai kah sal rhoek loh
1Kings20:24 He ol bangla saii laeh. Manghai rhoek te amah hmuen lamloh rhip khoe lamtah amih yueng la rhalboei rhoek te tloep khueh laeh.
1Kings20:25 Namah loh nang lamkah caem a ha tarhing ah namah ham caem te hueh laeh. Marhang khaw marhang tarhing ah
1Kings20:26 Kum a thok vaengah tah Benhadad loh Aram te a soep tih Israel caemtloek thil ham Aphek la cet.
1Kings20:27 Israel ca rhoek khaw soep uh thae
1Kings20:28 Te vaengah Pathen kah hlang te mop tih Israel manghai te a voek. Te phoeiah
1Kings20:29 Te rhoek danah hnin rhih rhaeh uh tih a hnin rhih dongah a pha vaengah caemtloek te pha uh. Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek loh khohnin pakhat neh Aram rhalkap thawng yakhat a ngawn uh.
1Kings20:30 Aka sueng rhoek te Aphek khopuei la rhaelrham uh van dae hlang aka sueng duen thawng kul thawng rhih te vongtung loh a cungku thil. Benhadad te rhaelrham tih khopuei ah imkhui kah imkhui patoeng la kun.
1Kings20:31 Te vaengah a sal rhoek loh anih te
1Kings20:32 Te dongah tlamhni te a cinghen ah
1Kings20:33 Te vaengah hlang rhoek loh lung a sawt uh tih tokthuet uh. Anih te a hmuek coeng dongah
1Kings20:34 Te vaengah Benhadad loh Ahab te
1Kings20:35 Tonghma ca rhoek khuikah hlang pakhat loh BOEIPA ol bangla a hui taengah
1Kings20:36 Te dongah anih te
1Kings20:37 Hlang tloe te a hmuh vaengah
1Kings20:38 Te phoeiah tonghma te cet tih longpuei ah manghai ana pai thil. Te vaengah a mik dongkah mikben neh vik a ben.
1Kings20:39 Manghai a pah phai vaengah manghai te a pang thil tih
