2Kings5:12 Amanah kah Abana neh Damasku kah Pharpar tuiva he Israel tui boeih lakah a then moenih a? Te rhoek ah ka sil uh cakhaw ka caihcil mahpawt a?” a ti. Te phoeiah mael tih kosi neh cet.
2Kings5:13 Tedae Naaman sal rhoek te thoeih uh tih amah te a thui pa uh. Te vaengah
2Kings5:14 Te daengah suntla tih Pathen hlang kah ol bangla Jordan ah voei rhih nuem uh. Te vaengah a saa te camoe ca kah saa bangla a khaam pah tih a caihcil pah.
2Kings5:15 Te dongah Pathen hlang taengah amah khaw a lambong boeih neh cet tih Elisha mikhmuh ah a pai pah. Israel khui bueng phoeiah tah diklai pum ah Pathen tloe om pawh tila ka ming coeng he. Te dongah na sal taeng lamkah yoethennah he doe mai laeh
2Kings5:16 Tedae
2Kings5:17 Naaman loh
2Kings5:18 He ol dongah khaw na sal he BOEIPA loh khodawkngai saeh. Ka boei khaw Rimmon im ah kun tih pahoi bakop coeng. Anih te ka kut dongah a hangdang vaengah tah Rimmon im ah ka bakop coeng. Rimmon im ah ka bakop mai cakhaw he ol lamlong tah na sal he BOEIPA loh khodawkngai mai saeh
2Kings5:19 Te phoeiah anih te
2Kings5:20 Te vaengah Pathen hlang Elisha kah tueihyoeih Gehazi loh
2Kings5:21 Gehazi loh Naaman hnuk a hloem vaengah a hnukah a yong pah te Naaman loh a hmuh. Te dongah anih doe ham te leng dong lamloh rhum tih
2Kings5:22 Te vaengah
2Kings5:23 Naaman loh
2Kings5:24 Molpuei la a pawk vaengah amih kut lamkah te a loh tih im ah a tung. Te phoeiah hlang rhoek te a tueih tih khoe uh.
2Kings5:25 Anih te kun tih a boei rhoek taengah a pai pah. Te vaengah Elisha loh anih te
2Kings5:26 Hlang te nang doe ham a leng dong lamloh a mael vaengah ka lungbuei he anih taengah a caeh moenih a? Tangka na loh ham neh himbai
2Kings5:27 Naaman kah hmaibae loh namah neh na tiingan te kumhal duela n'dom laeh saeh
2Kings6:1 Tonghma ca rhoek loh Elisha te
2Kings6:2 Jordan la cet uh mai sih lamtah te lamkah tungpum te hlang pakhat loh pakhat kawt sih. Te phoeiah mamih ham hmuen pahoi saii uh sih lamtah pahoi khosa uh sih
2Kings6:3 Te vaengah pakhat loh
2Kings6:4 Amih neh cet tih Jordan la a pawk vaengah thing te a saek uh.
2Kings6:5 Pakhat loh tungpum a vung vaengah thi te tui khuila a tlak pah. Te dongah pang tih
2Kings6:6 Te dongah Pathen kah hlang loh
2Kings6:7 Te phoeiah
2Kings6:8 Te vaengah aka om Aram manghai loh Israel a vathoh thil. A sal rhoek te a uen tih
2Kings6:9 Pathen kah hlang loh Israel manghai te a tah tih
2Kings6:10 Pathen kah hlang loh anih taengah a thui pah hmuen la Israel manghai a tueih vaengah tah a thuituen phoeiah khaw a thuituen dongah a tuem uh te vai bueng pawt tih hnavoei bueng bal moenih.
2Kings6:11 Hekah ol soah Aram manghai kah lungbuei tah thikthuek coeng. A sal rhoek te a khue tih amih te
2Kings6:12 Tedae a sal rhoek khuikah pakhat loh
2Kings6:13 Te dongah
2Kings6:14 Te lam te marhang neh leng neh tatthai muep a tueih. Khoyin ah a paan uh tih khopuei te pin a vael uh.
2Kings6:15 Pathen kah hlang aka bongyong te thoo tih
2Kings6:16 Tedae
2Kings6:17 Elisha te thangthui tih
2Kings6:18 Anih taengla a suntlak uh vaengah Elisha te BOEIPA taengah thangthui tih
2Kings6:19 Te vaengah Elisha loh amih te
2Kings6:20 Amih te Samaria la a kun van neh Elisha loh
2Kings6:21 Amih te a hmuh vaengah Israel manghai loh Elisha te
2Kings6:22 Tedae
2Kings6:23 Te dongah amih ham buhloei muep a tael pah tih a caak a ok uh phoeiah amih te a tueih. A boei rhoek taengla a mael uh phoeiah tah Aram caem te Israel khohmuen la mop ham khoep uh voel pawh.
2Kings6:24 Te phoeiah pataeng Aram manghai Benhadad loh amah kah caem boeih te a coi. Te phoeiah cet tih Samaria te a dum.
2Kings6:25 Te dongah Samaria ah khokha la muep pai. Amih taengah laak lu pakhat te tangka sawmrhet neh
2Kings6:26 Te tlam te a om vaengah Israel manghai te vongtung dongah a pongpa vaengah a taengah huta pakhat pang tih
2Kings6:27 Tedae
2Kings6:28 Te phoeiah manghai loh anih te
2Kings6:29 Te dongah kai capa te ka thong rhoi tih ka caak rhoi. Tedae hnin at ah tah anih te
2Kings6:30 Huta ol te manghai loh a yaak van neh a himbai te a phen. Amah khaw vongtung dongah a caeh doela pilnam a sawt vaengah a pum dongkah tlamhni te a khui hil tarha a hmuh.
2Kings6:31 Te dongah
2Kings6:32 Elisha te amah im ah ngol tih a taengah a ham rhoek ngol uh. Te vaengah a mikhmuh ah hlang a tueih pah dae anih taengla puencawn a pha hlan ah amah loh a ham rhoek te
2Kings6:33 Amih te a voek li vaengah puencawn khaw anih taengla pakcak suntla tih
2Kings7:1 Elisha loh
2Kings7:2 A kut ah manghai loh a hangdang thil rhalboei loh Pathen kah hlang te a doo tih
2Kings7:3 Te vaengah aka pahuk hlang pali te vongka kah thohka taengah om uh tih pakhat loh a hui taengah
2Kings7:4 Khopuei la cet sih n'ti vaengah nim khopuei ah khokha pai tih pahoi n'duek uh ni
2Kings7:5 Te dongah hlaemhmah ah thoo uh tih Aram kah rhaehhmuen la cet uh. Aram rhaehhmuen kah a bawt te a pha uh vaengah tah hlang tarha om pawh.
2Kings7:6 Ka Boeipa loh Aram caem te leng ol
2Kings7:7 Te dongah thoo uh tih hlaemhmah ah rhaelrham uh coeng. A dap khaw
2Kings7:8 Aka pahuk rhoek te rhaehhmuen bawt la a pawk uh vaengah dap pakhat ah kun uh. A caak uh tih a ok uh phoeiah te lamkah cak neh sui neh himbai khaw a phueih uh. Cet uh tih a thuh uh phoeiah mael uh tih dap a tloe la kun uh. Te lamkah a phueih uh phoeiah cet uh tih a thuh uh.
2Kings7:9 Te vaengah tah pakhat loh a hui taengah
2Kings7:10 Cet uh tih khopuei kah thoh tawt te a khue uh. Amih te a voek uh tih
2Kings7:11 Thoh tawt khaw pang uh tih manghai im khuila puen uh.
2Kings7:12 Manghai te khoyin ah thoo tih a sal rhoek taengah
2Kings7:13 Te vaengah a sal pakhat loh a doo tih
2Kings7:14 Te dongah marhang leng panit a loh phoeiah tah manghai loh Aram caem hnukah a tueih tih
2Kings7:15 Amih hnuk te Jordan duela a hlak uh. Tedae Aram khaw amamih te tamto la tamto uh coeng tih longpuei takuem ah himbai neh hnopai te a bae la a voeih uh. Te dongah puencawn rhoek te mael uh tih manghai taengah puen uh.
2Kings7:16 Te daengah pilnam te cet tih Aram rhaehhmuen te a poelyoe uh. Te vaengah BOEIPA ol bangla vaidam sum at te shekel khat
2Kings7:17 Manghai loh rhalboei la a khueh tih a ban ah a hangdang thil te vongka ah a om sak. Tedae anih te pilnam loh vongka ah a daep tih Pathen kah hlang loh a thui bangla duek. Te te anih taengla manghai a suntlak vaengah a thui pah coeng.
2Kings7:18 Pathen kah hlang loh manghai ham a thui pah vaengah
2Kings7:19 Rhalboei loh Pathen kah hlang te a doo tih
2Kings7:20 Anih ham a thoeng tangloeng dongah anih te pilnam loh vongka ah a til tih duek.
2Kings8:1 Elisha loh a capa aka hing huta te a voek tih
2Kings8:2 Te dongah huta te thoo tih Pathen hlang kah ol bangla a saii. Amah neh a imkhui te a caeh puei tih Philisti khohmuen ah kum rhih bakuep.
2Kings8:3 Kum rhih kah a bawtnah a pha vaengah tah huta te Philisti khohmuen lamloh mael. Te vaengah cet tih amah imkhui ham neh a khohmuen ham te manghai taengah pang.
2Kings8:4 Manghai loh Pathen hlang kah tueihyoeih Gehazi te voek tih
2Kings8:5 Te dongah aka duek tangtae a hing sak tih a capa koep aka hing huta loh a imkhui ham neh a khohmuen ham manghai taengah a pang te khaw manghai taengah a tae pah. Te phoeiah Gehazi loh
2Kings8:6 Manghai loh huta te a dawt tih a taengah a tae pah vaengah tah manghai loh anih ham te imkhoem pakhat a khueh pah tih
2Kings8:7 Elisha te Damasku la a caeh vaengah Aram manghai Benhadad te ana tlo. Te dongah a taengla a puen pah tih
2Kings8:8 Manghai loh Hazael te
2Kings8:9 Te dongah anih doe hamla Hazael te cet tih a kut dongah khocang neh Damasku kah thennah cungkuem te kalauk sawmli phueih la a khuen. Cet tih a mikhmuh ah a pai vaengah tah
2Kings8:10 Elisha loh anih te
2Kings8:11 Te phoeiah tah a maelhmai te a khueh
2Kings8:12 Te vaengah Hazael loh
2Kings8:13 Tedae Hazael loh
2Kings8:14 Elisha taeng lamloh nong tih a boei taengla a pawk vaengah anih te
2Kings8:15 Tedae a vuen pha vaengah himbai thah a loh tih tui khuila a nuem phoeiah manghai kah maelhmai te a dah pah. Te vaengah manghai te duek tih Hazael te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings8:16 Israel manghai Ahab capa Joram kah a kum nga dongkah Judah manghai Jehoshaphat phoeiah tah Judah manghai Jehoshaphat capa Jehoram te manghai.
2Kings8:17 Kum sawmthum kum nit a lo ca vaengah anih te manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum
2Kings8:18 Anih khaw Israel manghai rhoek kah longpuei ah pongpa. Ahab canu te anih yuu la a om dongah Ahab imkhui kah a saii bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii.
2Kings8:19 A sal David amah taengah a thui bangla anih ham neh a ca rhoek ham hnin takuem hmaithoi a khueh pah ham dongah ni BOEIPA loh Judah te phae a ngaih pawh.
2Kings8:20 Anih tue vaengah ni Edom loh Judah kut hmui lamkah boe a koek tih amamih ham manghai a manghai sak.
2Kings8:21 Joram te amah taengkah leng boeih neh Zair te a paan. Khoyin ah thoo tih Edom te a tloek. A kaepvai te amah neh leng mangpa rhoek loh a dum vaengah pilnam tah amah dap la rhaelrham coeng.
2Kings8:22 Edom tah tahae khohnin duela Judah kut hmui lamloh boe a koek. Libnah khaw te vaeng tue ah boe a koek coeng.
2Kings8:23 Joram kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te khaw Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
2Kings8:24 Joram te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah David khopuei ah a napa rhoek taengah a up. Te phoeiah a capa Ahaziah te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings8:25 Israel manghai Ahab capa Joram kah kum hlai nit kum vaengah Judah manghai Jehoram capa Ahaziah te manghai van.
2Kings8:26 Ahaziah he kum kul kum nit a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum khat manghai. A manu ming tah Israel manghai Omri canu Athaliah ni.
2Kings8:27 Anih he Ahab imkhui loh a cava nah dongah Ahab imkhui kah longpuei ah pongpa tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah Ahab imkhui bangla boethae a saii.
2Kings8:28 Ahab capa Joram neh Ramothgilead kah Aram manghai Hazael te caem la a paan vaengah Arammi loh Joram te a ngawn.
2Kings8:29 Te dongah manghai Joram khaw Aram manghai Hazael a vathoh thil vaengkah Ramah ah Arammi loh a ngawn. Te hmasoe te hoeih sak ham Jezreel la mael. Tedae anih te a nue coeng dongah Judah manghai Jehoram capa Ahaziah khaw Ahab capa Joram te sawt hamla Jezreel la suntla.
2Kings9:1 Tonghma Elisha loh tonghma ca pakhat te a khue tih a taengah
2Kings9:2 Te la na pawk vaengah Nimshi koca Jehoshaphat capa Jehu pahoi te so lah. Cet lamtah anih te a manuca lakli lamloh thoh. Te phoeiah anih te imkhui kah imkhui la khuen.
2Kings9:3 Te phoeiah situi um te lo lamtah a lu ah suep pah. Te vaengah
2Kings9:4 Te dongah tonghma tueihyoeih cadong tah Ramothgilead la cet.
2Kings9:5 A pawk vaengah caem mangpa rhoek tarha ana ngol uh tih
2Kings9:6 Te dongah thoo tih imkhui la a kun puei phoeiah a lu soah situi neh a suep pah. Te phoeiah anih te
2Kings9:7 Na boei Ahab imkhui te ngawn kuekluek. Ka sal tonghma rhoek kah thii neh BOEIPA sal boeih kah thii te Jezebel kut lamloh phu ka loh ni.
2Kings9:8 Ahab imkhui he boeih milh ni. Ahab lamkah ngawn tah pangbueng aka yun thil khaw
2Kings9:9 Ahab imkhui te Nebat capa Jeroboam imkhui bangla
2Kings9:10 Jezebel te ui loh Jezreel khoyo ah a ngaeh vetih up uh mahpawh
2Kings9:11 Jehu te a boei rhoek kah sal rhoek taengla a moe vaengah tah anih te
2Kings9:12 Tedae
2Kings9:13 Te vaengah hlang loh a himbai a loh uh paitok tih tangtlaeng hlaklong soah anih ham a khueh uh. Te phoeiah tuki te a ueng uh tih
2Kings9:14 Nimshi koca Jehoshaphat capa Jehu loh Joram te a taeng. Te vaengah Joram amah neh Israel pum loh Aram manghai Hazael te a hmai lamloh Ramothgilead ah aka mah la om.
2Kings9:15 Tedae manghai Jehoram tah Aram manghai Hazael loh a vathoh thil tih Arammi loh a ngawn vaengkah a hmasoe te toi ham Jezreel la mael. Te vaengah Jehu loh
2Kings9:16 Te dongah Jehu te leng dongah ngol tih Jezreel la a caeh caeh vaengah teah te Joram ana yalh coeng. Te vaengah Judah manghai Ahaziah khaw Joram te sawt hamla suntla van.
2Kings9:17 Te vaengah Jezreel kah rhaltoengim dongah aka pai loh tawt vaengah Jehu cako te a hmuh. Amah taengla a pawk vaengah tah
2Kings9:18 Anih te doe hamla marhang dongah aka ngol te cet tih
2Kings9:19 Te dongah a pabae la marhang dongah aka ngol te a tueih tih amih taengla pawk. Te vaengah
2Kings9:20 Rhaltawt te puen bal tih
2Kings9:21 Te dongah Jehoram loh
2Kings9:22 Jehoram loh Jehu te a hmuh van neh
2Kings9:23 Jehoram te a kut a palet doela rhaelrham tih Ahaziah te
2Kings9:24 Jehu loh a kut neh lii te a phuk tih Jehoram te a ban laklo ah a kah. Te vaengah palaa te a lungkoe lamloh a pawlh pah dongah amah kah leng khuiah pahoi sop uh.
2Kings9:25 Te vaengah a rhalboei pathum nah Bidkar taengah
2Kings9:26 Naboth thii neh anih ca rhoek kah thii te BOEIPA olphong bangla hlaem ah ka hmuh pawt nim. Te dongah BOEIPA olphong bangla he khamyai ham te nang taengah kan thuung ni. Te dongah BOEIPA ol bangla anih he khamyai ah hal lamtah voei laeh
2Kings9:27 Judah manghai Ahaziah loh a hmuh vaengah Bethhaggan longpuei la rhaelrham. Tedae anih hnuk te Jehu loh a hloem tih Ibleam taengkah Gur kham ah tah
2Kings9:28 Anih te a sal rhoek loh Jerusalem hil a ngol sak tih David khopuei kah amah phuel ah tah anih te a napa rhoek neh a up uh.
2Kings9:29 Ahab capa Joram kah kum hlai khat kum vaengah Ahaziah te Judah soah manghai.
2Kings9:30 Jehu Jezreel la a pawk daengah Jezebel loh a yaak. Te dongah a mik te mikdum la a khueh tih a lu te khuem phoeiah bangbuet lamloh a dan.
2Kings9:31 Jehu te vongka lamloh a kun van neh
2Kings9:32 Te vaengah a maelhmai te bangbuet taengla loe hang tih
2Kings9:33 Tedae
2Kings9:34 Cet tih a caak a ok phoeiah tah
2Kings9:35 Jezebel te up ham cet uh dae amah te hmuh uh voel pawh. A luhong
2Kings9:36 Te dongah mael uh tih a taengla puen uh. Te dongah Jehu loh
2Kings9:37 Jezebel kah rhok he Jezreel khoyo kah lohma rhi ah aek bangla om rhoe om ni
2Kings10:1 Ahab ca rhoek he Samaria ah sawmrhih om. Te dongah Jehu loh ca a daek tih Samaria la a pat. Jezreel kah mangpa a ham rhoek neh Ahab aka tangnah rhoek taengah
2Kings10:2 Tahae ah he kah ca loh nangmih taeng neh nangmih taengkah na boei ca rhoek taengah ha pawk vanbangla nangmih taengah leng neh marhang
2Kings10:3 Na boei ca rhoek khui lamloh a thuem neh a then te hmu uh laeh. A napa kah ngolkhoel dongah ngol sak uh lamtah na boei rhoek imkhui ham vathoh uh
2Kings10:4 Tedae bahoeng
2Kings10:5 Te dongah im hman kah neh khopuei kah khaw
2Kings10:6 Te dongah amih ham a pabae la ca a daek pah tih
2Kings10:7 Ca te amih taengla a pha van neh manghai ca rhoek te a tuuk uh tih hlang sawmrhih a ngawn uh. A lu te vaihang dongah a sang uh tih Jehu taengah Jezreel la a pat uh.
2Kings10:8 Puencawn a pawk vaengah tah a taengla a puen pah tih
2Kings10:9 Te dongah mincang a pha neh a paan tih a pai thil. Te phoeiah
2Kings10:10 BOEIPA loh Ahab imkhui ham a thui vanbangla BOEIPA ol tah diklai la a rhul pawt te ming uh laeh. BOEIPA loh a sal Elijah kut dongah a thui te a saii coeng
2Kings10:11 Jezreel kah Ahab im ah aka sueng boeih neh a tanglue boeih
2Kings10:12 Te phoeiah thoo tih Samaria la aka paan Betheked longpuei ah cet.
2Kings10:13 Jehu te Judah manghai Ahaziah kah pacaboeina neh a hum vaengah tah
2Kings10:14 Tedae
2Kings10:15 Te lamloh a nong van neh anih aka doe Rekhab capa Jehonadab te a hmuh. Te vaengah anih te a uem tih
2Kings10:16 Te phoeiah
2Kings10:17 Samaria a pha van neh Ahab lamkah kah aka sueng boeih te a ngawn. Elijah taengah a thui BOEIPA ol bangla Ahab te a milh hil Samaria ah a saii.
2Kings10:18 Jehu loh pilnam pum te a coi tih amih taengah
2Kings10:19 Te dongah Baal kah tonghma boeih neh a taengah tho aka thueng boeih
2Kings10:20 Jehu loh
2Kings10:21 Jehu loh Israel pum te a tah dongah Baal kah thothueng rhoek tah boeih pawk uh. Aka pawk pawt hlang te a hmaai uh pawt dongah Baal im la kun uh tih Baal im ah khatben lamloh khatben hil bae uh.
2Kings10:22 Hnikhoem te khaw
2Kings10:23 Te phoeiah Jehu neh Rekhab capa Jehonadab te Baal im la cet. Te vaengah Baal thothueng rhoek te
2Kings10:24 Hmueih neh hmueihhlutnah saii ham a khun phoeiah tah Jehu loh amah kah hlang sawmrhet te tol ah a khueh tih
2Kings10:25 Hmueihhlutnah a saii te a khah van neh Jehu loh imtawt rhoek neh boeilu rhalboei taengah
2Kings10:26 Baal im kah kaam te a khuen uh tih a hoeh uh.
2Kings10:27 Baal kah kaam te a palet uh tih Baal im khaw a palet uh. Te dongah tihnin hil te te nat kah nat la a khueh uh.
2Kings10:28 Jehu loh Baal te Israel khui lamkah a milh sak.
2Kings10:29 Te cakhaw Israel aka tholh sak Nebat capa Jeroboam kah tholhnah bangla Bethel neh Dan kah sui vaitoca hnuk lamloh Jehu a nong moenih.
2Kings10:30 BOEIPA loh Jehu te
2Kings10:31 Tedae Jehu loh Israel Pathen BOEIPA kah olkhueng dongah a thinko boeih neh pongpa hamla a ngaithuen moenih. Israel aka tholh sak Jeroboam kah tholhnah dong lamloh a nong moenih.
2Kings10:32 Te khohnin ah Israel te kuet hamla BOEIPA a tawn uh coeng dongah ni Israel khorhi te Hazael loh a pum la a ngawn pah.
2Kings10:33 Khocuk Jordan lamloh Gad koca
2Kings10:34 Jehu kah ol noi neh a cungkuem a saii te khaw
2Kings10:35 Jehu te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah anih te Samaria ah a up uh. Te phoeiah a capa Jehoahaz te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings10:36 Te vaeng tue ah Jehu loh Israel te Samaria ah kum kul kum rhet a manghai thil.
2Kings11:1 Ahaziah manu Athaliah loh a capa a duek te a sawt tih a hmuh vaengah thoo tih a ram kah tiingan boeih te a thup.
2Kings11:2 Tedae Manghai Joram canu
2Kings11:3 Anih taengla BOEIPA im ah kum rhuk a thuh vaengah Athaliah khohmuen a manghai thil.
2Kings11:4 A kum rhih dongah Jehoiada a tah. Te vaengah yakhat mangpa rhoek te pumoepnah ham neh imtawt hamla hlang yakhat a khuen. Amih te BOEIPA im ah amah taengla a khuen tih amih neh paipi a saii. Te phoeiah amih te BOEIPA im ah a toemngam tih manghai capa te amih a tueng.
2Kings11:5 Te phoeiah amih te a uen tih
2Kings11:6 Hlop thum ah hlop at te Sur vongka ah
2Kings11:7 Nangmih Sabbath kah aka pawk boeih khuiah hlop nit loh BOEIPA im kah a kuek te manghai yueng la ngaithuen uh saeh.
2Kings11:8 Manghai kaepvai ah hlang loh a kut dongkah a tubael neh vael uh lamtah rhongpai taengla aka pawk tah duek saeh. Manghai a kun vaengah khaw a vuenva vaengah anih taengah om uh
2Kings11:9 A cungkuem dongah khosoih Jehoiada kah a uen bangla yakhat kah mangpa yakhat loh a saii. Te dongah Sabbath aka paan hlang loh Sabbath aka paan taengah tah amah kah hlang rhoek te a khuen uh tih khosoih Jehoiada taengla pawk uh.
2Kings11:10 Te vaengah khosoih loh yakhat kah mangpa
2Kings11:11 Te dongah hlang aka tawt rhoek te a kut dongkah a kubael neh im kaep bantang lamloh im kaep kah banvoei hil
2Kings11:12 Te vaengah manghai capa te a khuen tih anih te rhuisam neh olphong te a tloeng thil. Anih te a manghai sak tih a koelh vaengah tah kut a paeng uh tih
2Kings11:13 Pilnam aka tawt ol te Athaliah loh a yaak daengah tah BOEIPA im kah pilnam taengla pawk.
2Kings11:14 A sawt vaengah a khosing vanbangla manghai te tung taengah tarha ana pai coeng. Mangpa rhoek neh olueng rhoek khaw manghai taengah pai tih khohmuen pilnam boeih khaw a kohoe uh. Olueng te a ueng vaengah tah Athaliah loh a himbai te a phen tih
2Kings11:15 Te vaengah khosoih Jehoiada loh caem aka puei yakhat mangpa yakhat te a uen tih amih te
2Kings11:16 Anih te kut a hlah thil tih manghai im kah marhang khuirhai longpuei a pha vaengah pahoi duek.
2Kings11:17 Jehoiada loh BOEIPA laklo neh manghai laklo ah khaw pilnam laklo ah khaw paipi a saii. BOEIPA kah pilnam la om sak ham te manghai laklo neh pilnam laklo ah a saii.
2Kings11:18 Khohmuen pilnam boeih te Baal im a paan uh tih a hmueihtuk te a palet uh. A muei te khaw phaeng a neet uh. Baal khosoih Mattan te khaw hmueihtuk hmai ah a ngawn uh tih khosoih loh BOEIPA im dongah cawhkung te a khueh.
2Kings11:19 Te phoeiah yakhat mangpa rhoek neh pumoepnah te khaw
2Kings11:20 Te vaengah khohmuen pilnam boeih a kohoe tih khopuei khaw mong coeng. Tedae Athaliah tah manghai im kah manghai cunghang neh a duek sak uh.
2Kings11:21 Jehoash he kum rhih a lo ca vaengah manghai coeng.
2Kings12:1 Jehu kah a kum rhih dongah Jehoash te manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum sawmli manghai. A manu ming tah Beersheba lamkah Zihiah ni.
2Kings12:2 Jehoash loh amah tue khuiah tah khosoih Jehoiada kah a thuinuet bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem ni a saii.
2Kings12:3 Te cakhaw hmuensang te khoe pawh. Hmuensang ah pilnam a nawn tih a phum pueng.
2Kings12:4 Jehoash loh khosoih rhoek taengah
2Kings12:5 khosoih rhoek long khaw amah kah a hmat hlang taeng lamkah te amamih loh doe uh saeh lamtah im a puut cungkuem a hmuh vanbangla BOEIPA im kah a puut te amih loh biing uh saeh
2Kings12:6 Tedae manghai Jehoash a kum kul kum thum a lo duela khosoih rhoek loh im puut te biing uh pawh.

2Kings12:8 Khosoih rhoek loh a rhoih uh dongah pilnam taeng lamkah tangka te coi uh voel pawt tih im puut te khaw biing uh pawh.
2Kings12:9 Khosoih Jehoiada loh thingkawng pakhat te a loh tih a tlaeng dongah a khui a buet. Te te BOEIPA im la aka kun hlang kah bantang
2Kings12:10 Thingkawng dongkah tangka hlom te a hmuh van neh manghai kah cadaek neh khosoih ham te cet rhoi. Te phoeiah phoeiah BOEIPA im kah a hmuh tangka te a cun tih a tae.
2Kings12:11 Tangka te aka soepsoei rhoek loh BOEIPA im bi saii aka saii aka dawn
2Kings12:12 Im aka biing rhoek taeng neh lungto aka phaek taengah khaw
2Kings12:13 Tedae BOEIPA im kah a khuen tangka lamloh BOEIPA im kah cakben baeldung
2Kings12:14 Te te bitat aka saii rhoek taengah a paek uh tih te nen te BOEIPA im a moem uh.
2Kings12:15 Amih khaw uepomnah neh a saii uh dongah bitat aka saii rhoek taengah paek ham amih kut ah tangka a paek uh hlang rhoek te a tae uh voel moenih.
2Kings12:16 Khosoih la a om uh dongah hmaithennah tangka neh boirhaem tangka tah BOEIPA im la khuen pawh.

2Kings12:19 Joash kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?

2Kings13:1 Judah manghai Ahaziah capa Joash kah kum kul kum thum vaengah Jehu capa Jehoahaz loh Israel te Samaria ah kum hlai rhih a manghai thil.

2Kings13:3 Te dongah BOEIPA kah thintoek te Israel taengla sai tih anih tue khuiah tah amih te Aram manghai Hazael kut hmui neh Hazael capa Benhadad kut hmuiah a tloeng.
2Kings13:4 Tedae Aram manghai loh amih a nen vanbangla Israel sokah nennah te a hmuh dongah Jehoahaz loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nguek tih BOEIPA loh a ol a hnatun pah.
2Kings13:5 BOEIPA loh Israel aka khang ham te a paek dongah Aram kut hmui lamloh loeih uh. Te dongah Israel ca khaw hlaem hlavai kah bangla a dap ah kho a sak uh.

2Kings13:12 Joash kah ol noi neh a saii boeih khaw

2Kings14:1 Israel manghai Jehoahaz capa Joash kah a kum bae dongah Judah manghai Joash capa Amaziah te manghai van.

2Kings14:3 BOEIPA mik ah a thuem te a saii dae a napa David bangla om pawh. A napa Joash kah a saii te a cung la a saii.
2Kings14:4 Tedae hmuensang te a khoe pawt dongah pilnam te hmuensang ah a nawn tih a phum pueng.
2Kings14:5 A kut dongah ram a cak pah van nen tah a napa manghai aka ngawn pah a sal rhoek te khaw a ngawn.
2Kings14:6 Tedae Moses kah olkhueng cabu dongah a daek vanbangla hlang aka ngawn kah a ca rhoek te tah duek sak pawh. Te te BOEIPA loh a uen tih
2Kings14:7 Anih loh kolrhawk. kolrhawk ah Edom te thawng rha a ngawn tih caemtloek vaengah Sela te a loh. Te dongah a ming te tahae khohnin hil Joktheel la a khue.

2Kings14:10 Edom te na ngawn na ngawn tih na phuel uh. Na lungbuei na thangpom akhaw namah im ah khosa saw. Balae tih boethae te na huek mai
2Kings14:11 Tedae Amaziah loh hnatun pawt tih Israel manghai Jehoash te a paan. Te dongah Judah kah Bethshemesh ah tah Judah manghai Amaziah te a maelhmai hmu uh rhoi.

2Kings16:2 Ahaz amah he kum kul a lo ca vaengah manghai. Jerusalem ah kum hlai rhuk manghai dae a napa David bangla a Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii moenih.
2Kings16:3 Israel manghai rhoek kah longpuei ah pongpa tih namtom kah tueilaehkoi la a ca pataeng hmai dongah a kat sak. BOEIPA loh amih te Israel ca mikhmuh lamkah ni a haek coeng.
2Kings16:4 Hmuensang neh som ah khaw
2Kings16:5 Aram manghai Rezin neh Israel manghai Remaliah capa Pekah loh caemtloek la Jerusalem a paan rhoi. Te vaengah Ahaz te a dum rhoi dae a vathoh ham tah coeng rhoi pawh.
2Kings16:6 Te vaeng tue ah Aram manghai Rezin loh Aram hamla Elath te a lat pah. Elath lamkah Judah te rhoek a biit dongah Arammi neh Edom loh Elath puen uh tih tahae khohnin duela pahoi kho a sak uh.
2Kings16:7 Ahaz loh Assyria manghai Tiglathpileser taengah puencawn a tueih tih
2Kings16:8 Te vaengah Ahaz loh cak neh sui khaw
2Kings16:9 Anih ol te Assyria manghai loh a ngai pah dongah Assyria manghai loh Damasku te a paan. Te te a buem van neh a khuikah rhoek te Kir la a poelyoe tih Rezin te khaw a duek sak.
2Kings16:10 Manghai Ahaz te Assyria manghai Tiglathpileser doe ham Damasku la pawk. Te vaengah Damasku kah hmueihtuk te a hmuh. Te dongah manghai Ahaz loh khosoih Uriah taengla hmueihtuk kah mueiloh neh a kutngo cungkuem dongkah a muei te a pat.
2Kings16:11 Te dongah Damasku lamkah manghai Ahaz loh a cungkuem a pat pah vanbangla khosoih Uriah loh hmueihtuk te a sak tih Damasku lamkah manghai Ahaz a mael hlan ah khosoih Uriah long khaw ana saii pah van.
2Kings16:12 Damasku lamkah manghai a pawk vaengah tah manghai loh hmueihtuk te a hmuh. Te dongah manghai loh hmueihtuk taengla tawn uh tih a sola luei.
2Kings16:13 Te phoeiah a hmueihhlutnah neh a khocang te a phum. A tuisi te a doeng tih rhoepnah thii te hmueihtuk dongah amah la a haeh.
2Kings16:14 BOEIPA mikhmuh kah rhohum hmueihtuk te khaw im hmai lamkah hmueihtuk laklo neh BOEIPA im laklo lamloh a puen tih tlangpuei hmueihtuk kaep ah a khueh.
2Kings16:15 Manghai Ahaz loh khosoih Uriah te a uen
2Kings16:16 A cungkuem dongah manghai Ahaz kah a uen bangla khosoih Uriah loh a saii.
2Kings16:17 Manghai Ahaz loh tungkho soenglong te a top tih te dong lamkah baeldung te khaw a khoe. Tuli te a dangkah rhohum vaito dong lamloh te a hlak tih lung phaih dongah a khueh.
2Kings16:18 Hlamim khaw im taengkah a sak Sabbath hlamim tah Assyria manghai kah maelhmai kongah ni BOEIPA im kah manghai khuirhai voel la a det.
2Kings16:19 Ahaz kah ol noi neh a bi saii te Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
2Kings16:20 Ahaz te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah David khopuei kah a napa rhoek taengah a up. Te phoeiah a capa Hezekiah te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings17:1 Judah manghai Ahaz kah kum hlai nit vaengah Elah capa Hosea loh Samaria ah Israel kum ko a manghai thil.
2Kings17:2 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii dae anih hmai kah Israel manghai aka om rhoek bangla om pawh.
2Kings17:3 Assyria manghai Shalmaneser loh Hosea te a caeh thil vaengah tah Assyria manghai kah sal vik om tih a taengah khocang a mael.
2Kings17:4 Tedae Assyria manghai loh Hosea te lairhui la a hmuh. Egypt manghai So taengla puencawn a tueih tih a kum
2Kings17:5 Assyria manghai te khohmuen tom la cet tih Samaria a pha vaengah tah khoupuei te kum thum a dum.
2Kings17:6 Hosea kah a kum ko dongah tah Assyria manghai loh Samaria te a loh tih Israel te Assyria la a poelyoe. Te phoeiah amih te Halah kah Gozan tuiva Habor neh Madai khopuei rhoek ah kho a sak sak.
2Kings17:7 Egypt manghai Pharaoh kut hmui lamkah neh Egypt khohmuen lamloh amih aka caeh puei a Pathen YAHWEH taengah Israel ca rhoek tholh uh tih pathen tloe te a rhih uh dongah ni he he a thoeng.
2Kings17:8 Namtom kah khosing bangla pongpa uh pueng. Te rhoek te BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh lamkah a haek coeng dae Israel manghai rhoek loh koep a pak uh.
2Kings17:9 Olka dongah Israel ca rhoek a hawn uh dongah a Pathen BOEIPA taengah thuem uh pawt tangkhuet. Te dongah aka rhalrhing kah rhaltoengim lamloh khopuei hmuencak hil
2Kings17:10 Amih ham kaam neh Asherah te som sang boeih neh thing hing tom kah hmui ah a ling uh.
2Kings17:11 Namtom rhoek bangla hmuensang tom ah hnap a phum uh. Te rhoek te BOEIPA amih mikhmuh lamkah a poelyoe coeng dae BOEIPA te veet hamla boethae hno a saii uh.
2Kings17:12 BOEIPA loh amih taengah hebang hno he saii pawt ham a thui pah lalah mueirhol te tho a thueng thil uh.
2Kings17:13 BOEIPA loh Israel neh Judah te tonghma boeih kah tonghma neh khohmu boeih kah kut lamloh a rhalrhing sak tih
2Kings17:14 Tedae hnatun uh pawt tih a Pathen BOEIPA aka tangnah pawh a napa rhoek kah a rhawn bangla a rhawn te a siing uh.
2Kings17:15 A a oltlueh neh a paipi te a hnawt uh. Te te a napa rhoek taengah a saii tih a olphong neh amih te a rhalrhing sak. Tedae lalah a honghi hnukah pongpa uh tih hoemdawk uh. A kaepvai kah namtom rhoek hnukah amih bangla saii pawt ham BOEIPA loh amih a uen.
2Kings17:16 A Pathen BOEIPA kah olpaek cungkuem te a hnoo uh tih amamih ham mueihlawn vaitoca rhoi panit a saii uh. Asherah a saii phoeiah vaan caempuei cungkuem te a bakop thil uh tih Baal taengah tho a thueng uh.
2Kings17:17 A capa khaw
2Kings17:18 Te dongah BOEIPA he Israel taengah bahoeng a thintoek tih amih te a mikhmuh lamloh a khoe. Te vaengah Judah koca amah bueng phoeiah tah pakhat khaw hlun pawh.
2Kings17:19 Judah pataeng a Pathen BOEIPA kah olpaek te tuem pawt tih Israel kah a pak khosing dongah pongpa uh.
2Kings17:20 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Israel kah tiingan boeih te a hnawt tih amih te a phaep. Amih te a mikhmuh lamloh a voeih duela aka tukvat rhoek kah kut dongah a tloeng.
2Kings17:21 Israel te David imkhui lamloh a phen tih Nebat capa Jeroboam te a manghai sak. Jeroboam loh Israel te BOEIPA taeng lamloh a rhoe tih a heh dongah amih te tholh a len neh a tholh sak.
2Kings17:22 Israel ca rhoek he Jeroboam kah a saii tholhnah cungkuem dongah pongpa uh tih te lamloh a nong uh moenih.
2Kings17:23 A sal tonghma boeih kah kut ah a thui bangla BOEIPA loh Israel te a mikhmuh lamloh a khoe. Te dongah ni tahae khohnin hil Israel te amah khohmuen lamloh Assyria la a poelyoe.
2Kings17:24 Te vaengah Assyria manghai loh Babylon lamkah neh Kuthah lamkah khaw
2Kings17:25 Amih kah khosak a tong van neh BOEIPA te hnap rhih uh pawh. Te dongah BOEIPA loh amih taengah sathueng a hlah pah tih amih aka ngawn la om.
2Kings17:26 Te vaengah Assyria manghai taengla puen uh tih
2Kings17:27 Te dongah Assyria manghai loh a uen tih
2Kings17:28 Te dongah Samaria lamkah a poelyoe khosoih rhoek khuiah pakhat tah mael. Bethel ah kho a sak tih BOEIPA metla rhih ham khaw amih te a thuinuet.
2Kings17:29 Tedae amah namtu
2Kings17:30 Babylon hlang rhoek loh Succothbenoth te a sak tih Kuthah hlang loh Nergal te a sak. Khamath hlang rhoek loh Ashima te a sak van.
2Kings17:31 Avvii loh Nibbaz neh Tartak te a saii tih Sepharvi loh Sepharvaim kah pathen Adrammelech neh Anamelek ham a ca rhoek te hmai ah a hoeh uh.
2Kings17:32 BOEIPA aka rhih la om uh dae amih kah a hmatoeng lamloh hmuensang khosoih a khueh uh tih amih ham hmuensang im ah aka nawn rhung la om uh.
2Kings17:33 BOEIPA aka rhih la om uh cakhaw namtom rhoek kah khosing bangla amah pathen taengah tho aka thueng la om uh. Te lamlong ni amih te a poelyoe.
2Kings17:34 Tahae khohnin hil amih he hnukbuet kah khosing bangla a saii uh tih amih loh BOEIPA te rhih uh pawh. Israel ming a phuk thil Jakob kah koca rhoek loh BOEIPA kah a uen bangla a khosing neh a laitloeknah khaw
2Kings17:35 BOEIPA loh amih taengah paipi a saii tih amih a uen vaengah
2Kings17:36 BOEIPA bueng long ni thadueng len neh a ban a yueng tih nangmih te Egypt kho lamloh n'khuen. Amah te rhih uh lamtah amah taengah bakop uh
2Kings17:37 Nangmih ham a daek oltlueh neh laitloeknah te khaw
2Kings17:38 Nangmih taengah paipi ka saii te hnilh uh boel lamtah a tloe pathen rhoek te rhih uh boeh.
2Kings17:39 Nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA bueng te rhih uh. Te daengah ni amah loh nangmih te na thunkha cungkuem kah kut lamloh n'huul eh
2Kings17:40 Tedae hnatun uh pawt tih lamhma kah a khosing bangla a saii uh.
2Kings17:41 Te dongah natom rhoek he BOEIPA aka rhih la om uh cakhaw a ca neh a ca phoeikah a ca rhoek tah a mueidaep kah thothueng la om uh. Amih loh tahae khohnin hil a napa rhoek kah a saii bangla a saii uh.
2Kings18:1 Israel manghai Elah capa
2Kings18:2 Anih te kum kul kum nga a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum kul kum ko manghai. A manu ming tah Zekhariah canu Abi ni.
2Kings18:3 A cungkuem dongah a napa David kah a saii bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem ni a saii.
2Kings18:4 Anih tah hmuensang te a khoe tih kaam te khaw a phaek. Asherah te a top tih Moses loh a saii rhohum rhul te a phop. Te tue ah aka om Israel ca rhoek loh a taengah hmueih a phum uh dongah te te Nehushtan la a khue.
2Kings18:5 Israel Pathen BOEIPA dongah pangtung tih anih hnukah Judah manghai boeih khuiah khaw anih bang a om moenih. Anih hmai ah khaw a om moenih.
2Kings18:6 BOEIPA taengah balak tih a hnuk lamloh nong pawh. BOEIPA loh Moses taengah a uen vanbangla a olpaek te a tuem.
2Kings18:7 BOEIPA te a taengah a om pah vanbangla a cungkuem ah a thoeng pah tih a cangbam. Te dongah Assyria manghai te a tloelh tih anih taengah thotat pawh.
2Kings18:8 Anih loh Philisti te Gaza neh a khorhi hil
2Kings18:9 Manghai Hezekiah kah a kum li dong neh Israel manghai Elah capa Hosea kah a kum rhih dongah tah Assyria manghai Shalmaneser loh Samaria a paan tih a dum.
2Kings18:10 Tedae kum thum a thok vaengah khopuei te a loh. Te dongah Hezekiah kah a kum rhuk neh Israel manghai Hosea kah a kum ko dongah Samaria te a loh.
2Kings18:11 Assyria manghai loh Israel te Assyria la a poelyoe tih amih te Halah neh Habor kah Gozan tuiva
2Kings18:12 A Pathen BOEIPA ol te ngai uh pawt tih a paipi te a poe uh. A cungkuem te BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh a uen coeng dae ngai uh pawt tih vai uh pawh.
2Kings18:13 Manghai Hezekiah kah kum hlai li dongah tah Assyria manghai Sennacherib loh Judah kah vong cak khopuei boeih te a paan tih a loh pah.
2Kings18:14 Te dongah Judah manghai Hezekiah loh Assyria manghai te Lakhish la a tah tih
2Kings18:15 Hezekiah loh BOEIPA im neh manghai im thakvoh khuikah a hmuh cak boeih te a phai.
2Kings18:16 Te vaeng tue ah Hezekiah loh BOEIPA bawkim kah thohkhaih te a khong coeng. Rhungsut a ben te khaw Judah manghai Hezekiah loh Assyria manghai taengah a phai.
2Kings18:17 Te dongah Assyria manghai loh rhalboei neh Rabsaris khaw
2Kings18:18 Manghai te a khue uh vaengah amih taengla im aka tawt Hilkiah capa Eliakim neh cadaek Shebna
2Kings18:19 Te vaengah Rabshakeh loh amih te
2Kings18:20 Hmuilai dongah ol kak nen tah caemtloek kah cilsuep neh thayung thamal na thui. Kai nan tloelh ham khaw u dongah nim na pangtung van coeng.
2Kings18:21 Capu conghol aka paep
2Kings18:22 Kai taengah
2Kings18:23 Tahae ah ka boeipa Assyria manghai neh rhikhang laeh. A soah aka ngol nan paek thai atah nang te marhang thawng hnih he kam pae eh.
2Kings18:24 Egypt kah leng neh marhang caem dongah na pangtung cakhaw ka boei kah sal rhoek khuiah rhalboei ca pakhat kah maelhmai te metlam na mael eh?
2Kings18:25 BOEIPA lamkah mueh la he hmuen la ka pawk aya? Te te phae ham te BOEIPA loh kai taengah
2Kings18:26 Te vaengah Hilkiah capa Eliakim
2Kings18:27 Tedae Rabshakeh loh amih te
2Kings18:28 Te phoeiah Rabshakeh te pai tih Judah ol neh a len la pang. Te phoeiah a thui tih
2Kings18:29 Manghai loh he ni a thui. Nangmih te Hezekiah loh n'rhaithi boel saeh. A kut lamloh nangmih n'huul ham a coeng moenih.
2Kings18:30 Nangmih te Hezekiah loh BOEIPA dongah m'pangtung sak tih
2Kings18:31 Hezekiah ol te hnatun uh boeh. Assyria manghai loh he ni a thui. Kai taengah yoethennah mah saii uh. Kai taengla ha mop uh lamtah hlang loh amah misur neh amah thaibu te rhip ca saeh. Hlang loh amah kah tuito tui te o saeh.
2Kings18:32 Kai taengla na pawk hlan vaengah namah khohmuen banghui khohmuen la nangmih kang khuen coeng. Te tah cangpai neh misur thai khohmuen ni
2Kings18:33 Namtom pathen rhoek loh a khohmuen dongah hlang te Assyria manghai kut lamloh a huul khaw a huul uh nim?
2Kings18:34 Khamath neh Arpad pathen rhoek te melae? Hena Sepharvaim neh Ivvah pathen rhoek te melae? Ka kut lamloh Samaria a huul uh tang a?
2Kings18:35 Khohmuen pathen boeih khuiah khaw ka kut lamloh a khohmuen aka huul te unim? BOEIPA loh Jerusalem te kai kut lamkah a huul tang aya?” a ti nah.
2Kings18:36 Tedae manghai kah olpaek loh
2Kings18:37 Te phoeiah im aka tawt Hilkiah capa Eliakim
2Kings19:1 Manghai Hezekiah loh a yaak van neh a himbai te a phen. Tlamhni te a bai tih BOEIPA im la cet.
2Kings19:2 Te phoeiah im aka hung Eliakim
2Kings19:3 Te phoeiah Isaiah te
2Kings19:4 Rabshakeh kah ol cungkuem te na Pathen BOEIPA loh a yaak khaming. Anih te a boei Assyria manghai loh aka hing Pathen veet hamla a tueih. Na Pathen BOEIPA loh a yaak bangla a ol soah a tluung bitni. Te dongah a meet la a hmuh rhoek ham mah thangthuinah khueh mai laeh
2Kings19:5 Manghai Hezekiah kah sal rhoek te khaw Isaiah taengla pawk uh tangloeng.
2Kings19:6 Te vaengah amih te Isaiah loh
2Kings19:7 Kai loh a khuiah mueihla ka paek tih olthang a yaak coeng ke. Te dongah amah kho la mael bitni. Anih te amah kho ah cunghang dongla ka cungku sak ni
2Kings19:8 Lakhish lamkah a caeh te a yaak vaengah Rabshakeh khaw nong tih Assyria manghai loh Libnah ana vathoh thil te a hmuh.
2Kings19:9 Kusah manghai Tirhakah kawng a yaak vaengah khaw
2Kings19:10 Te vaengah
2Kings19:11 Assyria manghai rhoek loh diklai tom ah a saii te na yaak coeng he. Amih te a thup ham coeng dongah na loeih uh hatko.
2Kings19:12 Kai napa rhoek aka phae namtom pathen loh amih Gozan neh Haran
2Kings19:13 Khamath manghai neh Arpad manghai
2Kings19:14 Hezekiah loh puencawn kut lamkah capat te a doe tih a tae. Te phoeiah BOEIPA im la cet tih Hezekiah loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a kut a phuel.
2Kings19:15 Hezekiah te BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thangthui tih
2Kings19:16 BOEIPA aw na hna kaeng lamtah ya lah
2Kings19:17 BOEIPA aw Assyria manghai rhoek loh namtom rhoek neh a khohmuen te khaw a khah coeng.
2Kings19:18 Amih kah pathen rhoek te hmai khuila a pup coeng. Te rhoek te pathen pawt tih hlang kut dongkah bibi
2Kings19:19 Kaimih kah Pathen BOEIPA aw tahae ah kaimih he anih kut lamloh n'khang laeh. Te daengah ni diklai ram pum loh nang namah bueng te Pathen BOEIPA la m'ming eh
2Kings19:20 Te dongah Amoz capa Isaiah loh Hezekiah taengla ol atah tih
2Kings19:21 Ol he BOEIPA loh anih a thui thil coeng. Zion nu
2Kings19:22 Unim na veet tih na hliphen? U taengah nim ol na huel? Israel kah a cim la na maelhmai kah koevoeinah na phueih thil.
2Kings19:23 Na puencawn rhoek kah kut lamloh ka Boeipa te na veet tih
2Kings19:24 Kamah loh ka rhawt dae kholong tui ni ka ok. Ka kho dongkah khopha loh Egypt sokko khaw boeih ka kak sak
2Kings19:25 Hlamat tue lamloh ka saii te na ya daengrhae pawt nim? Te te ka hlinsai tih ka thoeng sak coeng. Te dongah vong cak khopuei aka hnuei tih lungkuk aka pong sak la na om coeng.
2Kings19:26 A khuikah khosa rhoek khaw a kut toi uh coeng. Rhihyawp uh tih yak uh coeng. Lohma kah baelhing neh imphu kah baeldaih sulnoe khopol bangla om uh tih canghli kah mawn bangla om.
2Kings19:27 Tedae na ngol khaw
2Kings19:28 Kai nan tlai thil tih nan lawn khaw kai hna la ha pawk coeng. Te dongah ka thisum neh na hnarhong ah kan toeh vetih ka kamrhui he na hmuilai ah kam bang ni. Te lamkah na pawk vanbangla nang te tekah longpuei lamloh kam mael sak ni.
2Kings19:29 He tah nang ham miknoek la om saeh. Kum khat pong vetih kum bae dongah anboe te ca. Kum thum dongah tawn uh lamtah at uh. Misur khaw phung uh lamtah a thaih te ca uh.
2Kings19:30 A dang ah a yung aka sueng Judah imkhui kah rhalyong te a koei vetih a soah a thaih thai ni.
2Kings19:31 Jerusalem lamkah a meet neh Zion tlang lamkah rhalyong loh a pawk vaengah
2Kings19:32 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Assyria manghai kongah he ni a thui. Anih te he khopuei la ha pawk mahpawh. Heah he thaltang khaw nuen mahpawh. photling te khaw dan pawt vetih tanglung khaw lun thil mahpawh.
2Kings19:33 Tekah longpuei lamloh ha pawk vanbangla te lamlong ni a mael eh. He khopuei khuila kun mahpawh. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong coeng ni.
2Kings19:34 Kamah ham neh ka sal David kongah khopuei he daem sak ham ka tungaep ni
2Kings19:35 Te khoyin ah tah BOEIPA kah puencawn te cet tangloeng tih Assyria caem khuikah te thawng yakhat sawmrhet thawng nga a ngawn. Te dongah mincang kah a thoh uh vaengah tah amih te a rhok la boeih ana duek.
2Kings19:36 Te dongah puen uh tih a nong phoeiah tah Assyria manghai Sennacherib khaw mael tih Nineveh ah kho a sak.
2Kings19:37 Te phoeiah om tih anih te a pathen Nisrock im ah tho a thueng dae a capa Adrammelech neh Sharezer loh cunghang neh a ngawn. Amih rhoi te Ararat kho a poeng rhoi dongah a capa Esarhaddon te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings20:1 Te vaeng tue ah Hezekiah te tlo tih dalh duek. Te dongah tonghma Amoz capa Isaiah te anih taengla pawk tih
2Kings20:2 Te dongah a maelhmai te pangbueng taengla a hooi sak. Te phoeiah BOEIPA taengah thangthui tih
2Kings20:3 “Aw BOEIPA
2Kings20:4 Isaiah loh khopuei vongup bangli a pha moenih. Te vaengah BOEIPA ol te anih taengla pawk tih
2Kings20:5 “Mael lamtah ka pilnam kah rhaengsang Hezekiah te thui pah. Na pa David kah Pathen BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Na thangthuinah te ka yaak tih na mikphi khaw ka hmuh coeng. Kai loh nang kang hoeih sak coeng ne
2Kings20:6 Na khohnin te kum hlai nga kan thap vetih namah neh khopuei he khaw Assyria manghai kut lamloh kan huul ni. Khopuei he kamah ham neh ka sal David hamla ka tungaep ni
2Kings20:7 Te phoeiah Isaiah loh
2Kings20:8 Hezekiah loh Isaiah taengah
2Kings20:9 Te vaengah Isaiah loh
2Kings20:10 Te vaengah Hezekiah
2Kings20:11 Tonghma Isaiah loh BOEIPA a khue thil tangloeng vaengah tah tangtlaeng dongkah khokhawn khaw mael tih Ahaz kah tangtlaeng dongah khaw a hnuk la tangtlaeng parha rhum van.
2Kings20:12 Te vaeng tue ah Hezekiah a tloh te Babylon manghai Baladan capa Merodakbaldan loh a yaak dongah Hezekiah taengla capat neh khocang a pat.
2Kings20:13 Hezekiah loh amih te a yaak sak tih amih te a likmal im kah cak neh sui khaw
2Kings20:14 Te dongah tonghma Isaiah loh manghai Hezekiah te a paan tih amah taengah
2Kings20:15 Te phoeiah
2Kings20:16 Tedae Isaiah loh Hezekiah te
2Kings20:17 A tue ha pawk vetih na im kah a cungkuem neh na pa rhoek loh tahae khohnin due a kael te khaw Babylon la a phueih vetih paih mahpawh. BOEIPA loh ol a thui coeng.
2Kings20:18 Namah lamloh aka thoeng na ca sak rhoek te khaw a khuen
2Kings20:19 Tedae
2Kings20:20 Hezekiah kah ol noi neh a thayung thamal boeih khaw
2Kings20:21 Hezekiah te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh phoeiah tah a capa Manasseh te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings21:1 Manasseh a manghai vaengah kum hlai nit ni a lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah kum sawmnga kum nga manghai. A manu ming tah Hephzibah ni.
2Kings21:2 BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh lamkah a haek namtom rhoek kah tueilaehkoi bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii.
2Kings21:3 Mael tih a napa Hezekiah loh a phae hmuensang te a sak. Baal ham hmueihtuk a thoh tih Israel manghai Ahab kah a saii bangla Asherah te a saii. Vaan kah caempuei cungkuem taengah bakop tih te rhoek taengah tho a thueng.
2Kings21:4 BOEIPA loh
2Kings21:5 BOEIPA im kah vongup rhoi ah vaan caempuei cungkuem ham hmueihtuk a suem pah.
2Kings21:6 A ca te hmai dongah a kat sak. Kutyaek a sawt tih lung a sawt. Rhaitonghma a dawt tih a mikhmuh ah boethae saii ham neh BOEIPA veet ham te hnam la tlung.
2Kings21:7 Asherah mueithuk a saii te im ah a khueh. Te te BOEIPA loh a ca David taeng neh Solomon taengah tah
2Kings21:8 A cungkuem dongah amih ka uen bangla saii ham a ngaithuen uh mak atah a napa rhoek taengah ka paek khohmuen lamloh Israel kah khokan rhaehba sak ham ka khoep mahpawh. Te dongah a cungkuem dongkah olkhueng te ka sal Moses loh amih a uen coeng.
2Kings21:9 Tedae a ngai uh pawt dongah Manasseh loh amih kho a hmang sak. Te dongah BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh lamkah a milh sak namtom rhoek lakah boethae a saii.
2Kings21:10 BOEIPA loh a sal
2Kings21:11 “Judah manghai Manasseh loh tueilaehkoi a saii vanbangla te rhoek te a mikhmuh kah Amori rhoek loh a saii boeih lakah khaw thae. Te dongah Judah khaw a mueirhol neh a tholh sak.
2Kings21:12 Te dongah ni Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh he he a thui. Kai loh Jerusalem neh Judah soah boethae ka khuen pah coeng. Te te aka ya la aka ya boeih tah a hna rhoi te umya uh bitni.
2Kings21:13 Jerusalem soah Samaria rhilam neh Ahab im kah mikrhael ka toe ni. Bael a huih
2Kings21:14 Ka rho kah a meet te ka phap vetih amih te a thunkha kut ah ka paek ni. Te vaengah a thunkha cungkuem taengah maeh neh maehbuem la om uh ni.
2Kings21:15 Ka mikhmuh ah boethae a saii uh tih a napa rhoek Egypt lamkah a caeh uh khohnin lamloh tahae khohnin hil kai aka veet la om uh.
2Kings21:16 Ommongsitoe thii khaw Manasseh loh muep te a long sak aih. Jerusalem a hmoi lamloh a hmoi hil a li sak. Amah kah tholhnah bueng kolla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae saii hamla Judah te a tholh sak.
2Kings21:17 Manasseh kah ol noi neh a cungkuem a saii te khaw
2Kings21:18 Manasseh te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah amah im kah dum
2Kings21:19 Amon he kum kul kum nit a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum nit manghai. A manu ming tah Jotbah lamkah Haruz canu Meshullemeth ni.
2Kings21:20 A napa Manasseh kah a saii bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah thae a saii bal.
2Kings21:21 A napa kah a pongpa bangla longpuei cungkuem ah pongpa. A napa kah thothueng bangla mueirhol taengah tho a thueng tih te rhoek taengah bakop.
2Kings21:22 A napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA te a hnoo tih BOEIPA kah longpuei ah pongpa pawh.
2Kings21:23 Tedae anih te Amon sal rhoek loh a taeng tih manghai te amah im ah a duek sak uh.
2Kings21:24 Te dongah Amon manghai aka taeng boeih te khohmuen pilnam loh a ngawn. Te phoeiah tah khohmuen pilnam loh a capa Josiah te anih yueng la a manghai sak uh.
2Kings21:25 Amon kah ol noi neh a saii te Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
2Kings21:26 Anih te Uzzah dum kah amah phuel ah a up. Te phoeiah a capa Josiah te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings22:1 Josiah he kum rhet a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah sawmthum kum khat manghai. A manu ming tah Bozkath lamkah Adaiah canu Jedidah ni.
2Kings22:2 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii. A napa David kah longpuei cungkuem dongah pongpa tih banvoei bantang la phael pawh.
2Kings22:3 Manghai Josiah kah kum hlai rhet dongla a pha vaengah tah manghai loh BOEIPA im kah cadaek Meshullam koca Azaliah capa Shaphan te a tah tih
2Kings22:4 “Khosoih puei Hilkiah taengla cet lamtah BOEIPA im kah a khuen tangka te cum sak saeh. Te te cingkhaa aka tawt loh pilnam taeng lamkah ni a coi.
2Kings22:5 Te phoeiah BOEIPA im kah im bitat aka saii aka hung kut ah aka pae rhoe pae saeh. Te te BOEIPA im ah bi aka saii taeng neh im puut aka biing roek taengah
2Kings22:6 kutthai rhoek ham neh im aka sa rhoek ham khaw
2Kings22:7 Tedae amih khaw uepomnah neh a saii uh dongah amih kut dongah a paek tangka te amih taengah koep toem voel pawh.
2Kings22:8 Te vaengah khosoih puei Hilkiah loh cadaek Shaphan taengah
2Kings22:9 Te phoeiah cadaek Shaphan te manghai taengla pawk tih manghai te ol a mael. Te vaengah
2Kings22:10 Cadaek Shaphan te manghai taengla puen tih
2Kings22:11 Manghai loh olkhueng cabu dongkah ol te a yaak van neh a himbai te a phen coeng.
2Kings22:12 Te dongah manghai loh khosoih Hilkiah
2Kings22:13 “Cet uh
2Kings22:14 Te dongah khosoih Hilkiah
2Kings22:15 Te vaengah amih te
2Kings22:16 BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Kai loh he hmuen so neh a khuikah khosa rhoek soah khaw boethae ka khuen coeng. Cabu dongkah ol cungkuem te Judah manghai loh a tae coeng te.
2Kings22:17 Kai n'toeng uh tih a kut dongkah bitat cungkuem neh kai veet hamla a tloe pathen taengah phum uh. Te dongah ka kosi loh he hmuen he a hlup tih daeh voel mahpawh.
2Kings22:18 BOEIPA toem hamla nangmih aka tueih Judah manghai te a taengah Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh a thui ol he na yaak bangla thui pah.
2Kings22:19 He hmuen so neh a khuikah khosa soah ah imsuep neh rhunkhuennah la om sak ham ka cal te na yaak vaengah na thinko phoena tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah na kunyun coeng. Te vaengah na himbai te na phen tih ka mikhmuh ah na rhah khaw ka yaak bal coeng. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
2Kings22:20 Te dongah kai loh nang te na pa rhoek taengla kan humcui sak bini ne. Na phuel ah ngaimong la khoem vetih he hmuen soah ka khuen boethae cungkuem te na mik loh hmu mahpawh
2Kings23:1 Te vaengah manghai loh a tah dongah Judah neh Jerusalem kah a ham boeih te anih taengla tingtun uh.
2Kings23:2 Manghai neh Judah hlang boeih
2Kings23:3 Te vaengah manghai te tung taengah pai tih BOEIPA hnukah pongpa ham
2Kings23:4 Te phoeiah manghai loh khosoih boei Hilkiah neh hnukthoi khosoih rhoek khaw
2Kings23:5 Te vaengah Judah manghai rhoek kah a khueh mueirhol khosoih rhoek khaw
2Kings23:6 Asherah te BOEIPA im lamloh Jerusalem vongvoel kah Kidron soklong la a khuen. Te te Kidron soklong ah a hoeh tih laipi la a tip sak. Te phoeiah a hloi te pilnam paca kah phuel ah a hawk.
2Kings23:7 BOEIPA im kah hlanghalh im te khaw a palet pah. Te ah te huta rhoek loh Asherah ham im a tah uh.
2Kings23:8 Khosoih boeih te Judah khopuei lamloh a khuen tih khosoih rhoek loh hnap a phum thil hmuensang te Geba lamloh Beersheba duela a poeih pah. Khopuei mangpa Joshua vongka thohka kah vongka hmuensang te khaw a palet. Te te khopuei vongka kah banvoei ah rhip om.
2Kings23:9 Hmuensang khosoih rhoek te Jerusalem ah BOEIPA hmueihtuk taengla mop uh pawt sitoe cakhaw a manuca lakli ah vaidamding a caak uh.
2Kings23:10 Hlang loh a capa khaw
2Kings23:11 Judah manghai rhoek loh khomik taengla a nawn tih BOEIPA im kah a kun lamloh imkhoem Nathanmelek imkhan kaep kah imhlai laklo hil a khueh marhang te khaw a paa sak. Khomik leng te khaw hmai ah a hoeh.
2Kings23:12 Judah manghai rhoek loh a saii Ahaz imhman
2Kings23:13 Hmuensang te Jerusalem imdan kah khaw
2Kings23:14 Kaam te a phaek tih Asherah te a top pah phoeiah tah a hmuen te hlang rhuh a bae sak.
2Kings23:15 Bethel kah hmueihtuk te khaw
2Kings23:16 Josiah te a mael vaengah phuel te tlang ah hnap a hmuh. Te dongah hlang a tueih tih phuel lamkah a rhuh te a poh sak. Te phoeiah hmueihtuk soah a hoeh tih BOEIPA ol bangla a poeih. Pathen kah hlang loh a doek vaengah te kah ol te a doek coeng.
2Kings23:17 Te vaengah
2Kings23:18 Tedae
2Kings23:19 Samaria khopuei rhoek ah BOEIPA veet hamla Israel manghai rhoek loh a sak hmuensang im boeih te khaw Josiah loh a khoe. Te rhoek te Bethel ah a saii bangla khoboe cungkuem neh a saii.
2Kings23:20 Hmuensang khosoih boeih te hmueihtuk dongah pahoi ngawn tih hlang rhuh te a soah a hoeh daengah Jerusalem la mael.
2Kings23:21 Te phoeiah manghai loh pilnam pum te a uen tih
2Kings23:22 Laitloek rhoek loh Israel lai a tloek tue lamkah te Israel manghai rhoek neh Judah manghai rhoek tue boeih ah khaw hekah Yoom bang he a saii uh moenih.
2Kings23:23 Tedae manghai Josiah kah kum hlai rhet daengah ni Yoom he BOEIPA ham Jerusalem ah a saii pueng.
2Kings23:24 BOEIPA im ah khosoih Hilkiah loh a hmuh cabu khuiah a daek olkhueng ol te thoh hamla ham Josiah loh rhaitonghma neh hnam khaw
2Kings23:25 Anih bangla BOEIPA taengah a thinko boeih
2Kings23:26 Tedae BOEIPA kah a thintoek thinsa puei te a mael moenih. Manasseh loh anih veet vanbangla konoinah cungkuem dongah a thintoek loh Judah a sai thil pueng.
2Kings23:27 Te dongah BOEIPA loh
2Kings23:28 Josiah kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te khaw Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
2Kings23:29 Anih tue vaengah Egypt manghai Pharaoh Neko te Assyria manghai taengah Perath tuiva la cet. Te dongah manghai Josiah te anih mah hamla cet dae Megiddo ah anih te a hmuh vaengah anih te a duek sak.
2Kings23:30 Te dongah a sal rhoek loh a duek rhok te a tloeng uh tih Megiddo lamloh Jerusalem la a khuen uh. Te phoeiah anih te amah phuel ah a up uh. Te vaengah khohmuen pilnam loh Josiah capa Jehoahaz te a loh tih a koelh uh phoeiah anih te a napa yueng la a manghai sak uh.
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaz he kum kul kum thum a lo ca vaegah manghai tih Jerusalem ah hla thum manghai. A manu ming tah Libnah lamkah Jeremiah canu Hamutal ni.
2Kings23:32 A napa rhoek kah a cungkuem a saii bangla BOEIPA mik ah boethae a saii.
2Kings23:33 Anih te Pharaoh Neko loh Khamath khohmuen kah Riblah ah a khoh. Jerusalem ah a manghai tah a manghai sak dae khohmuen kah cawn la cak talent yakhat neh sui talent khat te a thoh sak.
2Kings23:34 Pharaoh Neko loh Josiah capa Eliakim te a napa Josiah yueng la a manghai sak tih a ming te Jehoiakim la a hoi pah. Tedae Jehoahaz loh a loh tih Egypt la a khuen vaengah pahoi duek.
2Kings23:35 Cak neh sui khaw Jehoiakim loh Pharaoh taengla a paek. Te phoeiah Pharaoh kah kueknah bangla cak te paek ham khohmuen te a kawt. Pharaoh Neko taengah paek hamla khohmuen pilnam kah tangka neh sui mai a phu bangla hlang taengah lai a suk.
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakim he kum kul kum nga a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai khat manghai. A manu ming Zebidah he khaw Rumah lamkah Pedaiah canu Zebidah ni.
2Kings23:37 Tedae a napa rhoek kah a saii bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae cungkuem te a saii.
2Kings24:1 Anih tue vaengah te Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh a muk. Te dongah Jehoiakim tah sal la kum thum om coeng dae mael tih Nebukhadnezzar te a tloelh.
2Kings24:2 BOEIPA loh anih taengla Khalden caem neh Aram caem khaw
2Kings24:3 Manasseh kah tholhnah cungkuem a saii dongah BOEIPA ol bangla a mikhmuh lamloh khoe ham Judah taengah rhep thoeng coeng.
2Kings24:4 Ommongsitoe thii khaw a long sak tih Jerusalem te ommongsitoe thii loh a li. Te dongah BOEIPA loh khodawkngai ham huem pawh.
2Kings24:5 Jehoiakim kah ol noi neh a saii boeih te Judah manghai rhoek kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek uh moenih a?
2Kings24:6 Jehoiakim te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah a capa Jehoiakhin te anih yueng la manghai.
2Kings24:7 Te vaengah Egypt manghai taengah aka om boeih te Egypt soklong lamloh Perath tuiva hil te Babylon manghai loh a loh pah coeng dongah Egypt manghai loh a khohmuen lamkah mop hamla koep khoep voel pawh.
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakhin he kum hlai rhet a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah hla thum manghai. A manu ming tah Jerusalem lamkah Elnathan canu Nehushta ni.
2Kings24:9 A napa rhoek kah a saii bang boeih la BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii bal.
2Kings24:10 Te vaeng tue ah Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar kah sal rhoek te Jerusalem la cet
2Kings24:11 Te dongah khopuei la Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar a pawk vaengah tah a sal rhoek loh khopuei te ana dum uh coeng.
2Kings24:12 Judah manghai Jehoiakhin loh a manu khaw
2Kings24:13 Te lamlong tah BOEIPA im kah thakvoh neh manghai im kah thakvoh khaw boeih a phueih pah. BOEIPA kah a thui bangla BOEIPA bawkim ham Israel manghai Solomon loh a saii sui hnopai cungkuem te khaw a khuen.
2Kings24:14 Jerusalem boeih neh mangpa boeih te khaw a poelyoe tih tatthai hlangrhalh rhoek thawng rha boeih a poelyoe. Khohmuen pilnam kah khodaeng bueng phoeiah tah kutthai neh thidae khaw boeih paih pawh.
2Kings24:15 Te vaengah Jehoiakhin khaw te
2Kings24:16 Te vaengah tatthai hlang boeih thawng rhih
2Kings24:17 Babylon manghai loh Jehoiakhin yueng la a napanoe Mattaniah a manghai sak tih a ming te Zedekiah la a hoi pah.
2Kings24:18 Zedekiah he kum kul kum khat a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai khat manghai. A manu ming Hamutal tah Libnah lamkah Jeremiah canu Hamutal ni.
2Kings24:19 Anih khaw Jehoiakim kah a saii bang boeih la BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii.
2Kings24:20 Amih te a mikhmuh lamloh a voeih hil BOEIPA kah thintoek he Jerusalem taeng neh Judah taengah om pueng. Tedae Zedekiah loh Babylon manghai te a tloelh.
2Kings25:1 Zedekiah a manghai te kum dongla a pha vaengkah hla rha
2Kings25:2 Te dongah khopuei tah Zedekiah manghai kah kum hlai khat hil vongup khuiah om.
2Kings25:3 A hla ko phoeiah tah khopuei ah khokha tlung coeng. Te dongah khohmuen pilnam ham buh om voel pawh.
2Kings25:4 Tedae khopuei te a pook vaengah tah caemtloek hlang boeih khaw khoyin ah manghai dum kaep
2Kings25:5 Tedae Khalden caem loh manghai hnuk te a hloem tih uh tih Jerikho kolken ah a kae uh. Te dongah a caem boeih khaw anih taeng lamloh taekyak uh.
2Kings25:6 Manghai te a tuuk uh tih Riblah kah Babylon manghai taengla a khuen uh phoeiah anih sokah laitloeknah te a thui uh.
2Kings25:7 Zedekiah koca rhoek te a mikhmuh ah a ngawn uh. Zedekiah mik te khaw a dael sak tih rhohum neh a khih phoeiah Babylon la a khuen.
2Kings25:8 Babylon manghai
2Kings25:9 Te vaengah BOEIPA im neh manghai im khaw
2Kings25:10 Jerusalem kaepvai kah vongtung te khaw imtawt boei kah Khalden caem pum loh a palet uh.
2Kings25:11 Khopuei ah aka sueng pilnam kah a coih rhoek khaw
2Kings25:12 Tedae khohmuen kah khodaeng te tah imtawt boei loh dumpho neh lotawn la a paih.
2Kings25:13 BOEIPA im kah rhohum tung te khaw
2Kings25:14 Am neh hmaisoh te khaw
2Kings25:15 Baelphaih neh baelcak te khaw sui
2Kings25:16 Solomon loh BOEIPA im ham a saii tung panit
2Kings25:17 Tung pakhat kah a sang he dong hlai rhet lo tih a sokah tungthi te rhohum la om. Tungthi kah a sang he a dong la dong thum lo. Tungthi soah sahamlong neh talae thaih om tih a kaep boeih te rhohum ni. Te phek la tung pabae dongah khaw sahamlong neh om.
2Kings25:18 Imtawt boei loh khosoih boeilu Seraiah neh khosoih hnukthoi Zephaniah khaw
2Kings25:19 Te vaengah khopuei lamkah caemtloek hlang so neh manghai maelhmai aka hmu tih khopuei ah aka phoe hlang panga soah hlangtawt la aka om imkhoem pakhat loh khohmuen pilnam aka muk caempuei mangpa kah cadaek neh khopuei ah aka phoe khohmuen pilnam hlang sawmrhuk te a khuen.
2Kings25:20 Imtawt boei Nebuzaradan loh amih te a loh tih Riblah kah Babylon manghai taengla a thak.
2Kings25:21 Amih te Babylon manghai loh a ngawn dongah Khamath khohmuen kah Riblah ah a duek sak. Te tlam ni Judah te amah khohmuen dong lamloh a poelyoe.
2Kings25:22 Pilnam khaw Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh a caknoi rhoek te tah Judah khohmuen ah sueng uh van tih amih ham te Shaphan koca Ahikam capa Gedaliah te a khueh pah.
2Kings25:23 Babylon manghai loh Gedaliah a khueh te amih kah tatthai mangpa boeih rhoek neh hlang rhoek loh a yaak uh dongah Mizpah kah Gedaliah te a paan uh. Te vaengah Nethaniah capa Ishmael
2Kings25:24 Gedaliah loh amih ham neh amih hlang rhoek ham khaw a toemngam tih amih te
2Kings25:25 Tedae hla rhih dongla a pha vaengah tah mangpa tiingan lamkah Elishama koca Nethaniah capa Ishmael neh a taengkah hlang parha te ha pawk tih Gedaliah te a ngawn uh. Te dongah Mizpah kah anih taengah aka om Judah rhoek neh Khalden rhoek khaw duek.
2Kings25:26 Te dongah pilnam pum te tanoe lamloh kangham hil thoo uh tih tatthai mangpa rhoek khaw tih Khalden te a rhih uh dongah Egypt la pawk uh.
2Kings25:27 Judah manghai Jehoiakhin hlangsol kah sawmthum kum rhih neh a hla hlai nit hlasae hnin kul hnin rhih vaengkah Babylon manghai Evilmerodakh a manghai kum dongah Judah manghai Jehoiakhin kah a lu te thong im lamloh a loeih sak.
2Kings25:28 Anih te a then a thui pah tih a ngolkhoel te khaw amah taengkah Babylon manghai rhoek kah ngolkhoel lakah a sola a paek.
2Kings25:29 Anih kah thong himbai te a tho pah tih a hing tue khuiah tah amah mikhmuh ah buh phat a caak sak.
2Kings25:30 Anih ham te buhkak mai akhaw a hing tue khuitah a hnin bal

1Chronicles1:44 Bela a duek phoeiah tah Bozrah lamkah Zerah capa Jobab te anih yueng la manghai.
1Chronicles1:45 Jobab a duek phoeiah anih yueng la Temani khohmuen lamkah Husham te manghai.
1Chronicles1:46 Husham a duek phoeiah anih yueng la Moab khohmuen ah Midian aka ngawn Bedad capa Hadad te manghai. A khopuei ming tah Avith ni.
1Chronicles1:47 Hadad a duek phoeiah anih yueng la Masrekah lamkah Samlah te manghai.
1Chronicles1:48 Samlah a duek phoeiah tah anih yueng la Rehoboth tuiva lamkah Saul te manghai.
1Chronicles1:49 Saul a duek phoeiah tah anih yueng la Akbor capa Baalhanan manghai.
1Chronicles1:50 Baalhanan a duek phoeiah anih yueng la Hadad manghai. A khopuei ming tah Pau tih a yuu ming tah Mezahad nu Matred canu Mehetabel ni.
1Chronicles1:51 Hadad a duek phoeiah Edom khoboei aka om rhoek tah

1Chronicles2:1 Israel koca rhoek he tah Reuben
1Chronicles2:2 Dan
1Chronicles2:3 Judah koca la Er
1Chronicles2:4 A langa Tamar long khaw anih ham te Perez neh Zerah a sak pah dongah Judah koca he a pum la panga lo.
1Chronicles2:5 Perez koca ah Khetsron neh Hamul.
1Chronicles2:6 Zerah koca ah Zimri
1Chronicles2:7 Karmee koca Akhar loh Israel a lawn tih yaehtaboeih la boe a koek.
1Chronicles2:8 Ethan koca ah Azariah.
1Chronicles2:9 Khetsron koca la Jerahmeel loh anih ham te Ram neh Khelubai a sak pah.
1Chronicles2:10 Ram loh Amminadab a sak. Amminadab loh Judah koca kah khoboei Nahshon a sak.
1Chronicles2:11 Nahshon loh Salma te a sak tih Salma loh Boaz te a sak.
1Chronicles2:12 Boaz loh Obed a sak tih Obed loh Jesse a sak.
1Chronicles2:13 Jesse loh a caming la Eliab
1Chronicles2:14 a pali ah Nethanel
1Chronicles2:15 a parhuk ah Ozem
1Chronicles2:16 A ngannu khaw om tih Zeruiah neh Abigal he a ngannu nah. Zeruiah koca ah Abishai
1Chronicles2:17 Abigal loh Amasa a sak. Amasa napa tah Ishmael Jether ni.
1Chronicles2:18 Khetsron capa Kaleb loh a yuu Azubah neh Jerioth lamloh ca a sak. Anih ca rhoek he Jesher
1Chronicles2:19 Azubah a duek neh Kaleb loh a Epharath te amah taengla a loh tih anih ham te Hur a sak pah.
1Chronicles2:20 Hur loh Uri te a sak tih Uri loh Bezalel a sak.
1Chronicles2:21 A hnukah Khetsron te Gilead napa Makir canu taengla kun. Khetsron anih te a loh tih kum sawmrhuk a lo ca vaengah tah Khetsron ham te Segub a sak pah.
1Chronicles2:22 Segub loh Jair a sak tih Gilead khohmuen kah khopuei pakul pathum te anih hut la om.
1Chronicles2:23 Tedae Geshuri
1Chronicles2:24 A hnukah Khetsron he Kalebephratha ah duek. Khetsron yuu Abijah loh anih ham te Tekoa napa Ashhur a sak pah.
1Chronicles2:25 Khetsron caming Jerahmeel koca ah a caming Ram neh Bunah
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahmeel te a yuu tloe om tih a ming tah Onam manu Atarah ni.
1Chronicles2:27 Jerahmeel caming Ram koca la Maaz
1Chronicles2:28 Onam koca la Shammai neh Jada om tih Shammai koca la Nadab neh Abishur om.
1Chronicles2:29 Abishur yuu ming tah Abihail tih anih ham Ahban neh Molid a sak pah.
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab koca la Seled neh Appaim om dae Seled tah camoe om kolla duek.
1Chronicles2:31 Appaim koca la Ishi
1Chronicles2:32 Shammai mana Jada koca la Jether neh Jonathan om dae Jether tah camoe om kolla duek.
1Chronicles2:33 Jonathan koca la Peleth
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan te ca tongpa om pawt tih huta rhoek bueng om. Sheshan taengah Egypt sal
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshan loh a canu te a sal Jarha taengah a yuu la a paek dongah anih ham te Attai a sak pah.
1Chronicles2:36 Attai loh Nathan a sak tih Nathan loh Zabad a sak.
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad loh Ephlal a sak tih Ephlal loh Obed a sak.
1Chronicles2:38 Obed loh Jehu a sak tih Jehu loh Azariah a sak.

1Chronicles10:1 Philisti loh Israel te a vathoh thil dongah Israel hlang tah Philisti mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham tih Gilboa tlang ah a rhok la cungku uh.
1Chronicles10:2 Philisti te Saul hnuk neh anih koca rhoek hnukah balak uh. Te dongah Philisti loh Saul koca rhoek Jonathan
1Chronicles10:3 Caemtloek rhoek khaw Saul kaepvai ah tah a saeng pah. Te dongah anih aka hmu rhoek loh te lii neh a kah tih a kah bangla a pawlh pah.
1Chronicles10:4 Te dongah Saul loh a hnopai aka phuei te
1Chronicles10:5 A hno phuei loh Saul a duek te a hmuh vaengah tah amah khaw cunghang dongah kaeh tih duek.
1Chronicles10:6 Saul a duek phoeiah tah a ca rhoek pathum neh a imkhui pum khaw rhenten duek uh.
1Chronicles10:7 Saul neh anih koca rhoek a duek te tuikol kah Israel hlang cungkuem loh a hmuh vaengah tah rhaelrham uh. Te vaengah amah khopuei te a hnoo uh tih a rhaelrham uh. Te dongah Philisti rhoek ha pawk uh tih a khuiah kho a sak uh.
1Chronicles10:8 A vuen ah rhok te lim hamla Philisti rhoek pawk uh. Te vaengah Gilboa tlang ah aka cungku Saul neh a ca rhoek te a hmuh uh.
1Chronicles10:9 Anih te a lim uh phoeiah a lu khaw
1Chronicles10:10 A hnopai te amamih kah pathen im ah a khueh uh tih a luhong te Dagon im ah a ling uh.
1Chronicles10:11 Philisti loh Saul taengah a saii boeih te Jabesh Gilead pum loh a yaak uh.
1Chronicles10:12 Te dongah tatthai hlang boeih tah thoo uh tih Saul rhok neh a ca rhoek kah rhok te a loh uh. Te rhoek te Jabesh la a pawk puei uh tih a rhuh te Jabesh kah rhokael hmuiah a up uh. Te vaengah hnin rhih a yaeh uh.
1Chronicles10:13 Saul he amah kah boekoeknah dongah ni a duek. BOEIPA taengah boe a koek tih BOEIPA ol te a ngaithuen pawt dongah rhaitonghma te dawt ham a toem.
1Chronicles10:14 BOEIPA te a toem pawt dongah ni anih te a duek sak tih ram te Jesse capa David taengla a paek pah.
1Chronicles11:1 Israel pum te Hebron kah David taengla tingtun uh tih
