1Chronicles16:1 Pathen thingkawng te a khuen uh tih David loh amah te ham a tuk pah dap khui ah a khueh uh. Te phoeiah hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah te Pathen mikhmuh ah a nawn uh.
1Chronicles16:2 David loh hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah hmueih a tloeng te a coeng phoeiah tah pilnam te BOEIPA ming neh yoethen a paek.
1Chronicles16:3 Israel hlang boeih te tongpa khaw
1Chronicles16:4 BOEIPA kah thingkawng hmai ah aka thotat Levi khui lamkah te Israel Pathen BOEIPA aka thoelh ham khaw
1Chronicles16:5 Boeilu Asaph neh a hnukthoi Zekhariah
1Chronicles16:6 Khosoih Benaiah neh Jahaziel tah Pathen kah paipi thingkawng hmai ah olueng neh phat om.
1Chronicles16:7 Te vaengah tue ah BOEIPA te lamhma la uem ham David loh Asaph neh a manuca rhoek taengah a paek.
1Chronicles16:8 BOEIPA te uem uh lamtah
1Chronicles16:9 Amah te hlai uh lamtah
1Chronicles16:10 Amah kah hmuencim ming dongah thangthen uh lamtah
1Chronicles16:11 BOEIPA te toem uh lamtah a sarhi neh a maelhmai te tlap yoeyah uh.
1Chronicles16:12 A saii kopoekrhai neh a ka laitloeknah bangla amah kah khobaerhambae te poek uh.
1Chronicles16:13 Israel tiingan he amah kah sal tih
1Chronicles16:14 Amah tah mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA ni
1Chronicles16:15 A paipi te kumhal duela poek uh. Cadilcahma thawngkhat ham khaw ol a uen coeng.
1Chronicles16:16 Te te Abraham taengah a saii tih a olhlo te Isaak taengah a khueh.
1Chronicles16:17 Kumhal paipi te Israel taengkah oltlueh bangla Jakob taengah khaw a pai sak.
1Chronicles16:18 “Kanaan khohmuen te Nang taengah na rho neh khoyo la kam paek ni.
1Chronicles16:19 Na hlang te hlangmi a yol neh a khuiah aka bakuep la om.
1Chronicles16:20 Namtom lamloh namtom taengla
1Chronicles16:21 Amih hnaemtaek ham te hlang taengla a tloeng pawt dongah amih yueng la manghai rhoek te a tluung pah.
1Chronicles16:22 Ka koelh rhoek te ben uh boeh
1Chronicles16:23 Diklai pum loh BOEIPA te hlai uh lah
1Chronicles16:24 Amah thangpomnah te namtom taengah
1Chronicles16:25 BOEIPA tah len tih muep thangthen pai saeh. Pathen boeih lakah amah a rhih om pai.
1Chronicles16:26 Pilnam kah pathen boeih tah mueirhol rhoek ni. Tedae BOEIPA loh vaan a saii.
1Chronicles16:27 A mikhmuh ah mueithennah neh rhuepomnah
1Chronicles16:28 Pilnam paca te BOEIPA taengah pae uh
1Chronicles16:29 A ming thangpomnah te BOEIPA taengah pae uh lamtah
1Chronicles16:30 A mikhmuh ah diklai pum he hinghuen saeh. Lunglai ngawn tah cikngae tih tuen pawh.
1Chronicles16:31 Vaan rhoek te a kohoe saeh lamtah diklai khaw omngaih saeh. Namtom rhoek taengah BOEIPA a manghai te thui uh saeh.
1Chronicles16:32 Tuitunli neh a cungkuem khaw kawk saeh lamtah
1Chronicles16:33 Diklai laitloek ham ha pawk coeng dongah duup thing rhoek khaw BOEIPA mikhmuh ah tamhoe uh saeh.
1Chronicles16:34 A sitlohnah te kumhal due ham a then dongah BOEIPA te uem uh.
1Chronicles16:35 “Kaimih kah khangnah Pathen
1Chronicles16:36 Israel Pathen BOEIPA tah
1Chronicles16:37 Te phoeiah Asaph neh a manuca rhoek te a hnin
1Chronicles16:38 Obededom neh a pacaboeina he sawmrhuk parhet lo. Thoh tawt la Jeduthun capa Obededom neh Hosah.
1Chronicles16:39 Khosoih Zadok neh a manuca khosoih rhoek tah Gibeon hmuensang kah BOEIPA dungtlungim hmai ah
1Chronicles16:40 BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah aka nawn la
1Chronicles16:41 Amih taengah Heman
1Chronicles16:42 Te vaengah Heman neh Jeduthun tah amih taengah olueng neh tlaklak aka tum la
1Chronicles16:43 Te phoeiah pilnam boeih te amah im la rhip cet uh tih David khaw a imkhui te yoethen paek hamla mael van.
1Chronicles17:1 David te amah im ah a om van nen tah David loh tonghma Nathan taengah
1Chronicles17:2 Te vaengah Nathan loh David te
1Chronicles17:3 Te khoyin ah tah Pathen kah ol te Nathan taengla pawk tih
1Chronicles17:4 “Cet lamtah ka sal David te thui pah. BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Kai hamla om nah im na sak moenih.
1Chronicles17:5 Israel ka khuen khohnin lamloh tahae khohnin hil he im khuiah ka om hlan. Tedae dap khat lamloh dap khat neh dungtlungim ah ni ka om.
1Chronicles17:6 Israel boeih te a cungkuem dongah ka caeh puei. Israel kah laitloek pakhat taengah ol ka thui coeng te ta? Te te ka pilnam luem puei ham ka uen tih
1Chronicles17:7 Te dongah ka sal David taengah he he thui pah laeh. Caempuei BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Kai loh nang te tolkhoeng lamloh
1Chronicles17:8 Na caeh nah takuem ah nang te kan om puei. Na thunkha boeih te na mikhmuh lamloh ka khoe. Na ming te diklai kah hlanglen ming la ka khueh ni.
1Chronicles17:9 Ka pilnam Israel ham hmuen ka khueh vetih anih te ka phung ni. Te vaengah a hmuiah kho a sak vetih tlai voel mahpawh. Lamhma kah bangla anih hmawn sak ham khaw dumlai ca rhoek loh koei uh voel mahpawh.
1Chronicles17:10 Ka pilnam Israel soah lai aka tloek la kang uen khohnin lamloh
1Chronicles17:11 Na khohnin loh cum tih na pa rhoek taengla na cet cakhaw na tiingan te namah hnukah ka thoh ni. Na ca rhoek taeng lamloh aka om te khaw a ram cikngae sak ni.
1Chronicles17:12 Anih loh kai hamla im a sak vetih a ngolkhoel te kumhal duela ka cikngae sak ni.
1Chronicles17:13 Kai he anih taengah pa la ka om vetih anih khaw kamah taengah capa la om ni. Na hmai ah aka om taeng lamloh ka lat bangla ka sitlohnah he anih taeng lamloh ka lat mahpawh.
1Chronicles17:14 Anih te kamah im neh ka ram ah kumhal duela ka pai sak ni. A ngolkhoel khaw kumhal duela a cikngae la om ni
1Chronicles17:15 He ol cungkuem neh hekah mangthui cungkuem bangla Nathan loh David taengah a thui pah tangloeng.
1Chronicles17:16 Te phoeiah manghai David te cet tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah ngol. Te vaengah Pathen BOEIPA aw kai he unim?
1Chronicles17:17 He tah Pathen namah mikhmuh ah rhaidaeng. Tedae a hlahoei lamkah khaw na sal imkhui ham na thui. Tangtlaeng Pathen BOEIPA loh boeimang hlang la kai nan hmuh.
1Chronicles17:18 Na sal thangpomnah ham te namah taengah David loh metlam koep a thap eh? Namah loh na sal he na ming coeng.
1Chronicles17:19 BOEIPA aw na sal ham kong ah lennah cungkuem te ming sak ham na lungbuei kah bangla lennah cungkuem he na saii.
1Chronicles17:20 BOEIPA namah bang he om pawt tih Pathen a tloe a om moenih. Tedae namah tah a cungkuem dongah kaimih hna neh kan yaak uh coeng.
1Chronicles17:21 Diklai ah namtu pakhat khaw na pilnam Israel bangla om nim? Namah ham lennah ming la khueh ham
1Chronicles17:22 Na pilnam Israel te namah ham kumhal kah pilnam la na khueh. BOEIPA namah tah amih kah Pathen la na om pai.
1Chronicles17:23 BOEIPA aw
1Chronicles17:24 Te dongah na ming te kumhal duela cak vetih pantai ni. “Israel Pathen tah Israel Pathen
1Chronicles17:25 Kai kah Pathen namah loh a im sak hamla na sal kah hna he na vueh pah. Te dongah ni na sal loh na mikhmuh ah thangthui ham a hmuh.
1Chronicles17:26 Pathen amah khaw BOEIPA namah coeng dongah ni hnothen he na sal ham na thui pah.
1Chronicles17:27 Na sal imkhui he yoethen sak ham neh na mikhmuh ah kumhal duela om sak ham na mulmet coeng. BOEIPA namah loh yoethen na paek dongah kumhal duela a yoethen.
1Chronicles18:1 Te phoeiah khaw David loh Philisti te a ngawn tih amih te a kunyun sak. Te vaengah Gath neh a khobuel rhoek te Philisti kut lamloh a lat.
1Chronicles18:2 Moab te a ngawn bal dongah Moab khaw David taengah khocang aka thak sal la om uh.
1Chronicles18:3 Zobah manghai Hadadezer loh a kut dongah Perath tuiva phai te khueh hamla a caeh vaengah David loh Khamath duela a ngawn.
1Chronicles18:4 Anih taeng lamkah te David loh leng thawngkhat
1Chronicles18:5 Te vaengah Aram Damasku tah Zobah manghai Hadadezer bom hamla ha pawk. Tedae David loh Aram kah hlang thawng kul neh thawng hnih a ngawn.
1Chronicles18:6 David loh Aram Damasku ah khohung a khueh tih Aram te David taengah khocang aka thak sal om. David te a caeh nah takuem ah BOEIPA loh a khang.
1Chronicles18:7 David loh Hadadezer sal rhoek pum dongah aka om sui photling te a loh tih Jerusalem la a khuen.
1Chronicles18:8 Hadadezer khopuei Tibhath lamkah neh Kun lamkah rhohum te yet te David loh bahoeng a loh pah. Te nen te Solomon loh rhohum tuili khaw
1Chronicles18:9 David loh Zobah manghai Hadadezer kah caem boeih a ngawn pah te Khamath manghai Toi loh a yaak.
1Chronicles18:10 Hadadezer a vathoh thil tih Toi kah caemtloek hlang rhoek hamla Hadadezer te a ngawn pah. Te dongah amah te sading kawng dawt ham neh amah uem puei hamla manghai David taengah a capa Hadoram te a tueih tih sui hnopai boeih neh cak khaw rhohum khaw a khuen sak.
1Chronicles18:11 Te rhoek te khaw Manghai David loh BOEIPA taengah namtom cungkuem taeng lamkah
1Chronicles18:12 Zeruiah capa Abishai loh kolrhawk ah Edom te thawng hlai rhet a ngawn.
1Chronicles18:13 Te dongah Edom ah khohung rhoek a khueh tih Edom boeih te David taengah sal om uh. A caeh nah takuem ah David te BOEIPA loh a khang.
1Chronicles18:14 David te Israel boeih soah a manghai vaengah a pilnam boeih ham khaw tiktamnah neh duengnah aka saii la om.
1Chronicles18:15 Zeruiah capa Joab tah caempuei soah
1Chronicles18:16 Ahitub capa Zadok neh Abiathar capa Abimelek te khosoih
1Chronicles18:17 Jehoiada capa Benaiah te Kerethi neh Phelethi soah a khueh. David koca rhoek te tah manghai kut ah lamhma uh.
1Chronicles19:1 Te phoeiah tah Ammon koca rhoek kah manghai Nahash te duek tih a capa te anih yueng la manghai.
1Chronicles19:2 Te vaengah David loh
1Chronicles19:3 Tedae Ammon koca rhoek kah mangpa rhoek loh Hanun taengah
1Chronicles19:4 Te dongah Hanun loh David kah sal rhoek te a tuuk. Amih te sam a vok pah
1Chronicles19:5 A caeh uh vaengah tah a hlang rhoek kawng te David ham a puen pa uh. Hlang rhoek khaw hmaithae la mat a om uh coeng dongah amih aka doe te a tueih. Te vaengah manghai loh
1Chronicles19:6 David taengah bo a rhim uh te Ammon koca rhoek loh a hmuh uh. Te dongah Hanun neh Ammon koca rhoek loh Aramnaharaim
1Chronicles19:7 Te dongah amamih ham te leng thawng sawmthum thawng hnih te a paang uh. Manghai Maakah neh a pilnam te khaw cet uh tih Medeba rhaldan ah rhaeh uh. Ammon koca rhoek khaw amamih khopuei lamloh coi uh thae tih caemtloek la pawk uh.
1Chronicles19:8 David loh a yaak vaengah Joab neh hlangrhalh caempuei te boeih a tueih.
1Chronicles19:9 Ammon koca rhoek te cet uh tih khopuei thohka ah caemtloek rhong a pai uh. Te vaengah manghai aka pawk rhoek te lohma ah amamih bueng om uh.
1Chronicles19:10 Joab loh caemtloek hmai ah a hnuk a hmai la a om te a hmuh. Te dongah Israel khuikah a coelh boeih te koep a coelh tih Aram te mah hamla rhong a pai.
1Chronicles19:11 Pilnam kah a coihpaih te a mana Abishai kut ah a khueh tih Ammon koca rhoek te mah hamla rhong a pai uh.
1Chronicles19:12 Te vaengah
1Chronicles19:13 Thaahuel uh lamtah mah pilnam ham neh mamih kah Pathen khopuei rhoek ham khaw thaahuel uh sih. BOEIPA loh a mikhmuh ah a then a saii bitni
1Chronicles19:14 Te phoeiah Joab neh a taengkah pilnam loh Aram te caemtloek la a thoeih hatah a mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham uh.
1Chronicles19:15 Ammon koca rhoek loh Aram a rhaelrham te a hmuh vaengah amamih khaw Joab mana Abishai mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham uh tih khopuei khuila a kun coeng dongah Joab khaw Jerusalem la mael.
1Chronicles19:16 Aram loh Israel mikhmuh ah a yawk te a hmuh vaengah puencawn rhoek te a tueih uh. Te vaengah Aram loh tuiva rhalvangan lamkah te a khuen uh tih Hadadezer kah caempuei mangpa Shophate amih hmai ah a lamhma sak.
1Chronicles19:17 Tedae David taengla a puen pah dongah Israel pum te a coi tih Jordan te kat. Amih te a paan tih a rhaldan ah rhong a pai. David loh Aram te caemtloek neh doe hamla rhong a pai tih a vathoh thil uh.
1Chronicles19:18 Aram te Israel mikhmuh lamloh a rhaelrham coeng dongah David loh Aram kah leng caem thawng rhih
1Chronicles19:19 Israel mikhmuh ah a yawk uh te Hadadezer kah sal rhoek loh a hmuh. Te dongah David te a sah tih a taengah thotat uh. Te phoeiah Aram loh Ammon koca te rhun ham ngaih voel pawh.
1Chronicles20:1 Kum a thok tue kah manghai a pawk tue vaengah tah Joab loh tatthai caempuei te a hmaithawn tih Ammon koca kah khohmuen te a phae pah. Te phoeiah cet tih Rabbah te a dum. David te Jerusalem ah kho a sak vaengah Joab loh Rabbah te a tloek tih a koengloeng.
1Chronicles20:2 David loh amih kah manghai rhuisam te a lu dong lamloh a loh pah. Te te a khiing sui talent khat lo tih a khuiah lung vang om. Te tah David lu dongah om tih khopuei kah kutbuem a khuen khaw bahoeng yet.
1Chronicles20:3 A khuikah pilnam te khaw a khuen tih hlawh taengah
1Chronicles20:4 A hnukah khaw Gezer ah Philisti neh caemtloek koep puek bal. Te vaengah Khushathi Sibbekhai loh Rapha cahlah lamkah Sippai te a ngawn sak tih a kunyun sak uh.
1Chronicles20:5 Te phoeiah Philisti neh caemtloek om bal tih Jair kah Jair capa Elhanan loh Ghitti Goliath mana Lahmi te a ngawn. Anih kah caai tueng te hni tak kah tampai bangla om.
1Chronicles20:6 Gath ah caemtloek om bal tih cungkui hlang kaw om. A kutdawn khodawn parhuk
1Chronicles20:7 Israel te a veet dongah anih te David maya Shimea capa Jonathan loh a ngawn.
1Chronicles20:8 Rapha lamkah a sak rhoek he Gath ah David kut neh a sal rhoek kut ah cungku uh.
1Chronicles21:1 Satan loh Israel a thoh thil tih Israel tae hamla David a vueh.
1Chronicles21:2 Te dongah David loh Joab taeng neh pilnam mangpa rhoek taengah
1Chronicles21:3 Tedae Joab loh
1Chronicles21:4 Tedae manghai kah ol loh Joab te a khum a la. Te dongah Joab te nong tih Israel tom te a pha phoeiah Jerusalem la pawk.
1Chronicles21:5 Te phoeiah Joab loh pilnam hlangboel hlangmi te David taengla a paek. Te vaengah Israel boeih te cunghang aka pom thai hlang thawng thawng khat neh thawng yakhat om. Judah kah cunghang aka pom hlang he thawng ya li neh thawng sawmrhih lo.
1Chronicles21:6 Tedae manghai ol loh Joab te a tuei dongah Levi neh Benjamin tah amih lakli ah nuen sak pawh.
1Chronicles21:7 He ol he Pathen mik ah lolh dongah Israel te a ngawn.
1Chronicles21:8 David loh Pathen taengah
1Chronicles21:9 Te vaengah BOEIPA loh David kah khohmu Gad te a voek tih
1Chronicles21:10 Cet lamtah David te thui pah. BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Kai loh nang te pathum kam kan doe tih te khuikah pakhat te namah ham tuek lamtah nang taengah kan saii eh
1Chronicles21:11 Te phoeiah Gad te David taengla pawk tih amah te
1Chronicles21:12 Khokha kum thum nim
1Chronicles21:13 David loh Gad taengah kai he puen ka cak tangkik coeng. A haidamnah he a len tangkik dongah BOEIPA kut ah ka tla mai eh. Tedae hlang kut ah tah ka tla boel eh
1Chronicles21:14 Te dongah BOEIPA Israel soah duektahaw a paek tih Israel hlang thawng sawmrhih cungku.
1Chronicles21:15 Te phoeiah Pathen loh Jerusalem phae hamla puencawn a tueih. Tedae a phae te BOEIPA loh hmuh tanglang vaengah tah boethae khaw damti. Te dongah khopuei aka phae puencawn te
1Chronicles21:16 David loh a mik a huel vaengah diklai laklo neh vaan laklo ah aka pai BOEIPA puencawn te a hmuh. Te long te a kut dongah a cunghang a muk tih Jerusalem te a nuen. Te dongah David neh a ham rhoek tah a maelhmai ah tlamhni neh a khuk uh tih bakop uh.
1Chronicles21:17 David loh Pathen taengah
1Chronicles21:18 Te daengah BOEIPA kah puencawn loh Gad te
1Chronicles21:19 Te dongah David khaw BOEIPA ming neh a thui Gad ol bangla cet.
1Chronicles21:20 Ornan a mael vaengah puencawn te a hmuh. Te vaengah a taengkah a capa pali tah thuh uh dae Ornan tah cang a til.
1Chronicles21:21 David te Ornan taengla pawk tih Ornan loh a paelki vaengah David te a hmuh. Te dongah cangtilhmuen lamloh thoeih tih David taengah a maelhmai te diklai la buluk.
1Chronicles21:22 David loh Ornan te
1Chronicles21:23 Ornan loh David taengah
1Chronicles21:24 Tedae manghai David loh Ornan te
1Chronicles21:25 Te dongah David loh Ornan te a hmuen phu la sui shekel a khiing ya rhuk a paek.
1Chronicles21:26 Te phoeiah David loh BOEIPA ham hmueihtuk pahoi a suem tih hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah te a nawn. BOEIPA a khue vaengah anih te hmueihtuk sokah hmueihhlutnah dongah vaan lamkah hmai neh a voek.
1Chronicles21:27 Te daengah BOEIPA loh puencawn te a voek tih a cunghang te tuengim khuila a sang.
1Chronicles21:28 Te vaeng tue kah Jebusi Ornan cangtilhmuen ah BOEIPA loh anih a doo te David loh a hmuh van neh pahoi a nawn.
1Chronicles21:29 Moses loh khosoek kah a saii BOEIPA kah dungtlungim neh te vaeng tue kah hmueihhlutnah hmueihtuk tah Gibeon hmuensang ah om pueng.
1Chronicles21:30 Tedae BOEIPA puencawn kah cunghang ha loh a let sak coeng dongah David loh a mikhmuh la a caeh ham khaw
1Chronicles22:1 David loh
1Chronicles22:2 Te dongah David loh Israel khohmuen kah yinlai te calui ham a thui tih Pathen im aka sak vaengkah lungrhaih lung aka phaek aka dae la a khueh.
1Chronicles22:3 Vongka thokhaih thohkhaih kah thicung ham neh hnarhui ham David loh a sikim sak dongah thi khaw puh mai tih rhohum khaw a puh coeng dongah a khiing tae lek pawh.
1Chronicles22:4 Lamphai thing khaw a pum tae lek pawt hil Sidoni neh Tyre lamkah a pawk pah. Lamphai thing he David ham tah thawt mai.
1Chronicles22:5 David loh
1Chronicles22:6 Te phoeiah a capa Solomon te a khue tih Israel Pathen BOEIPA im sak hamla anih te a uen.
1Chronicles22:7 Te vaengah David loh a capa Solomon te
1Chronicles22:8 Tedae BOEIPA ol te kai taengla ha pawk tih
1Chronicles22:9 Na taengah capa na sak coeng te ta. Anih tah hlang mong la om vetih anih te a kaepvai kah a thunkha cungkuem lamloh ka duem sak ni. Solomon ngawn tah a ming khaw om vetih anih tue vaengah tah Israel te rhoepnah neh rhalmongnah ka paek ni.
1Chronicles22:10 Anih loh ka ming ham he im a sak vetih anih te kamah taengah capa la om ni. Kai khaw a taengah a napa la ka om ni. A ram kah ngolkhoel khaw Israel soah kumhal duela ka cikngae sak ni
1Chronicles22:11 Ka capa aw na taengah BOEIPA om saeh lamtah n'thaihtak sak saeh. BOEIPA na Pathen im te na taengkah a thui bangla sa.
1Chronicles22:12 Israel soah nang n'uen vaengah he na Pathen BOEIPA kah olkhueng te ngaithuen hamla BOEIPA loh nang taengah lungmingnah neh yakmingnah m'pae bal saeh.
1Chronicles22:13 BOEIPA loh Israel ham Moses a uen vanbangla oltlueh neh laitloeknah te vai hamla na ngaithuen atah na thaihtak ni. Te dongah thaahuel lamtah namning sak
1Chronicles22:14 Kamah kah phacipphabaem nen ni BOEIPA im hamla a soepsoei coeng he. Sui he talent thawng yakhat
1Chronicles22:15 Namah taengah bitat aka saii khaw
1Chronicles22:16 Sui neh
1Chronicles22:17 Te phoeiah David loh Israel mangpa boeih te khaw a capa Solomon te bom hamla a uen.
1Chronicles22:18 Nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA he nangmih taengah a om moenih a? Khohmuen khosa rhoek te ka kut dongah m'paek tih kaepvai ah khaw nangmih te n'duem sak. Te dongah khohmuen he BOEIPA mikhmuh neh a pilnam mikhmuh ah khoem uh coeng.
1Chronicles22:19 Nangmih kah Pathen BOEIPA te toem hamla na thinko neh na hinglu te pae uh laeh. Thoo uh lamtah Pathen BOEIPA kah rhokso te sa uh laeh. BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng neh Pathen kah hmuencim hnopai te BOEIPA ming ham a sak im khuila khuen ham om
1Chronicles23:1 David te patong coeng tih khohnin khaw cum coeng. Te dongah a capa Solomon te Israel soah a manghai sak.
1Chronicles23:2 Te phoeiah Israel mangpa boeih neh khosoih rhoek khaw
1Chronicles23:3 Te vaengah Levi rhoek te tongpa kum sawmthum lamloh a so hang te a tae tih amih kah hlangmi te a pum la hlang thawng sawmthum neh thawng rhet om.
1Chronicles23:4 Te rhoek khuiah BOEIPA im kah bitat aka mawt te thawng kul thawng li om tih rhoiboei rhoek neh laitloek rhoek he thawng rhuk om.
1Chronicles23:5 Thoh tawt rhoek te thawng li
1Chronicles23:6 David loh amih te boelnah neh a tael. Gershon kah Levi koca rhoek ah Kohath neh Merari.
1Chronicles23:7 Gershon lamloh Ladan neh Shimei.
1Chronicles23:8 Ladan koca ah a lucuek te Jehiel tih Zetham neh a pathum te Joel.
1Chronicles23:9 Shimei koca rhoek Shelmoth neh Haziel
1Chronicles23:10 Shimei koca rhoek ah Jahath
1Chronicles23:11 Jahath te a lucuek tih Zizah he a pabae la om. Tedae Jeush neh Beriah tah a ca ping pawh. Te dongah napa pakhat imkhui pakhat bangla cawhkung pakhat la om uh.
1Chronicles23:12 Kohath koca rhoek la Amram
1Chronicles23:13 Amram koca ah Aaron neh Moses dae
1Chronicles23:14 Pathen kah hlang Moses neh anih koca rhoek te Levi koca la a khue uh.
1Chronicles23:15 Moses koca ah Gershom neh Eliezer.
1Chronicles23:16 Gershom koca kah boeilu tah Shubael.
1Chronicles23:17 Eliezer koca aka om rhoek khuiah Rehabiah he boeilu dae Eliezer te ca a tloe om pawh. Tedae Rehabiah koca rhoek tah a pueh la ping uh.
1Chronicles23:18 Izhar koca khui Shelomith he boeilu la om.
1Chronicles23:19 Hebron koca ah Jeriah te a cacuek
1Chronicles23:20 Uzziel koca rhoek ah Maikah te a cacuek tih Isshiah te a pabae.
1Chronicles23:21 Merari koca ah Mahli neh Mushi
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazar a duek vaengah he a taengah ca tongpa a om moenih. Tedae ca huta rhoek bueng om tih amih te a manuca Kish koca rhoek loh a loh uh.
1Chronicles23:23 Mushi koca rhoek la Mahli
1Chronicles23:24 He rhoek tah Levi koca rhoek kah a napa rhoek imkhui lamloh a napa boeilu rhoek ni. tongpa kum kul neh a so hang lamloh BOEIPA im kah thothuengnah ham bitat a saii uh. Amih te a hlangmi neh a ming tarhing la a soep uh.
1Chronicles23:25 David loh

1Chronicles24:1 Aaron koca rhoek kah a boelnah rhoek la
1Chronicles24:2 Tedae Nadab neh Abihu tah a napa rhoek hmai ah duek rhoi. Amih rhoi te ca tongpa a om pawt dongah Eleazar neh Ithamar te khosoih rhoi.
1Chronicles24:3 Amih khaw David loh ana tael coeng tih Eleazar koca lamkah Zadok neh Ithamar koca lamkah Ahimelek loh amih kah thothuengnah dongah amih aka cawhkung la a khueh.
1Chronicles24:4 Eleazar koca kah hlang rhoek he Ithamar koca lakah khaw boeilu la muep thoeng. Amih Eleazar koca lamloh a napa imkhui kah boeilu la aka phaeng uh he hlai rhuk lo. Ithamar koca lamkah khaw a napa rhoek imkhui kah te parhet lo uh.
1Chronicles24:5 Te tlam he hmulung neh amih te a tael uh. Te dongah Eleazar koca lamkah kah neh Ithamar koca lamkah he hmuencim mangpa neh Pathen mangpa la om uh.

1Chronicles26:1 Thoh tawt rhoek kah boelnah tah

1Chronicles26:4 Obededom koca la Shemaiah a cacuek
1Chronicles26:5 Ammiel te a parhuk
1Chronicles26:6 Anih capa Shemaiah kah ca sak rhoek tah amamih khaw tatthai hlangrhalh la a om uh dongah a napa imkhui ah ukkung rhoek la om uh.
1Chronicles26:7 Shemaiah koca rhoek la Othni
1Chronicles26:8 He boeih he Obededom koca lamkah ni. Amamih neh a ca rhoek khaw
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiah koca rhoek neh a manuca rhoek te khaw tatthai capa hlai rhet om.
1Chronicles26:10 Merari koca lamkah Hosah taengah khaw Shimri koca he boeilu om van. Anih te caming la om pawt sitoe cakhaw a napa loh anih te boeilu la a khueh.
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkiah te a pabae
1Chronicles26:12 He rhoek he thoh tawt rhoek kah boelnah ni. BOEIPA im ah thohtat ham voeivang kah a manuca rhoek bangla rhaltawt tongpa boeilu la om uh.
1Chronicles26:13 Kangham khaw tanoe bangla vongka
1Chronicles26:14 Te vaengah Shelemiah ham hmulung te khocuk la a tlak pah tih lungmingnah neh aka uen a capa Zekhariah ham hmulung a naan uh vaengah tah a hmulung te tlangpuei la a tlak pah.
1Chronicles26:15 Obededom ham te tuithim ah
1Chronicles26:16 Shuppim ham neh Hosah ham tah khotlak kah thongim aka pan longpuei kah Shalleketh vongka neh thongim voeivang ah.
1Chronicles26:17 Levi te khocuk ah parhuk tih tlangpuei ah khaw hnin at ham te pali
1Chronicles26:18 Imhlai ham te khotlak kah longpuei ah pali
1Chronicles26:19 He tah thoh tawt Korah koca lamkah neh Merari koca kah boelnah ni.
1Chronicles26:20 Levi Ahijah long tah Pathen im kah thakvoh neh hmuencim kah thakvoh te a hung.
1Chronicles26:21 Gershon ca rhoek lamkah Ladan koca ah he Ladan tah a napa rhoek kah a lu la om. Gershon Ladan lamloh Jehieli om.
1Chronicles26:22 Jehieli koca lamkah Zetham neh a mana Joel loh BOEIPA im kah thakvoh a hung.
1Chronicles26:23 Amrami lamkah khaw

1Chronicles26:25 A manuca Eliezer lamloh a capa Rehabiah
1Chronicles26:26 Shelmoth neh a manuca rhoek he khaw hmuencim kah thakvoh boeih soah om uh. Te tah manghai David neh a napa rhoek kah a lu rhoek
1Chronicles26:27 Caemtloek lamkah neh kutbuem dong lamkah khaw BOEIPA im a duel vaengkah hamla a ciim uh.
1Chronicles26:28 A cungkuem te khohmu Samuel
1Chronicles26:29 Izhari lamkah Kenaniah neh anih koca rhoek tah Israel rhamvoel kah bitat dongah rhoiboei neh laitloek la om uh.
1Chronicles26:30 Khebroni lamkah Hashabiah neh a manuca rhoek he tatthai capa thawng khat ya rhih om tih Jordan khotlak rhalvangan kah Israel te BOEIPA kah bitat neh manghai kah thothuengnah cungkuem dongah aka cawhkung la om.
1Chronicles26:31 Khebroni lamkah Khebroni boeilu Jeriah loh a napa rhoek kah a rhuirhong neh David kah ram ah kum sawmli a toem uh hatah amih khuikah tatthai hlangrhalh rhoek te Gilead Jazer ah a hmuh.
1Chronicles26:32 A manuca rhoek khaw
1Chronicles27:1 Israel ca rhoek tah a hlangmi bangla a napa boeilu rhoek khaw
1Chronicles27:2 Hla lamhmacuek ham boelnah pakhat dongkah Zabdiel capa Jashobeam neh anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:3 Perez koca lamkah te lahmacuek hla dongah caempuei mangpa boeih kah boeilu la om.
1Chronicles27:4 A hla bae kah boelnah dongah Akhohi Dodai tih anih boelnah neh rhaengsang Mikloth khaw om. Anih kah boelnah khuiah thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:5 A hla thum dongkah a pathum nah caempuei mangpa tah khosoih boeilu Jehoiada capa Benaiah tih anih kah boelnah khuiah thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:6 Benaiah he tah sawmthum khuikah hlangrhalh la a om dongah sawmthum soah om van. Anih kah boelnah khuiah a capa Ammizabad om.
1Chronicles27:7 A hla li dongkah a pali nah tah Joab mana Asahel. Anih phoeiah tah a capa Zebadiah tih a boelnah khuiah thawng kul thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:8 A hla nga dongkah a panga nah ham te mangpa Izrah Shamhuth tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:9 A hla rhuk dongkah a parhuk nah ham te Tekoa Ikkesh capa Ira tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:10 A hla rhih dongkah a parhih nah ham te Ephraim koca lamkah Pelonee Helez tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:11 A hla rhet dongkah a parhet nah ham te Zarkhii kah Khushathi Sibbekhai tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:12 A hla ko dongkah a pako nah ham te Benjamin koca lamkah Anatoth Abiezer tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:13 A hla rha dongkah parha nah ham te Zarkhii lamkah Netophah Maharai tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:14 A hla hlai khat dongkah hlai khat nah ham te Ephraim koca lamkah Pirathon Benaiah tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:15 A hla hlai nit dongkah hlai nit nah ham te Othniel lamkah Netophah Heldai tih anih kah boelnah khuiah he thawng kul neh thawng li om.
1Chronicles27:16 Israel koca rhoek so neh Reuben soah he Zikhri capa rhaengsang Eliezer om. Simeon soah tah Maakah capa Shephatiah om.
1Chronicles27:17 Levi soah Kemuel capa Hashabiah
1Chronicles27:18 Judah soah David manuca rhoek lamkah Elihu
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun soah Obadiah capa Ishmaiah
1Chronicles27:20 Ephraim koca soah Azaziah capa Hosea
1Chronicles27:21 Gilead kah Manasseh rhakthuem soah Zekhariah capa Iddo. Benjamin soah Abner capa Jaasiel.
1Chronicles27:22 Dan soah Jeroham capa Azarel. He rhoek he Israel koca kah mangpa rhoek ni.
1Chronicles27:23 BOEIPA loh Israel te vaan kah aisi bangla ping sak ham a thui coeng dongah David loh camoe kum kul neh a hmui tah a hlangmi hlum pawh.
1Chronicles27:24 Zeruiah capa Joab loh soep hamla a tong coeng dae a khah moenih. Te vaengah Israel soah thinhul a tlak thil dongah a hlangmi te David manghai kah khokhuen olka dongah hlangmi la kun pawh.
1Chronicles27:25 Manghai thakvoh soah Adiel capa Azmaveth. Thakvoh soah
1Chronicles27:26 Khohmuen kah thothuengnah dongah lohma kah bitat aka saii soah Kelub capa Ezri.
1Chronicles27:27 Ramathi Shimei misurdum so neh misurdum lamkah misur thakvoh soah Shipmi Zabdi.
1Chronicles27:28 Kolrhawk kah olive neh thaihae soah Gadery Baalhanan. Situi thakvoh soah Joash.
1Chronicles27:29 Sharon ah aka luem saelhung soah Sharon Shitrai
1Chronicles27:30 Kalauk soah Ishmael Obil
1Chronicles27:31 Boiva soah Hagri Jaziz. He boeih he David manghai taengkah khuehtawn mangpa rhoek ni.
1Chronicles27:32 Hlang aka uen David nupu Jonathan he aka yakming neh cadaek la om. Hakhomi capa Jehiel tah manghai koca rhoek neh om.
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithophel manghai taengah olrhoep la om tih Arkii Hushai tah manghai a hui nah.
1Chronicles27:34 Ahithophel phoeiah tah Benaiah capa Jehoiada neh Abiathar tih Joab te manghai kah caempuei mangpa la om.
1Chronicles28:1 David loh Israel mangpa boeih
1Chronicles28:2 Te phoeiah David manghai te a kho neh pai tih
1Chronicles28:3 Tedae Pathen loh kai taengah
1Chronicles28:4 Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh kai he Israel soah kumhal hil manghai la om ham a pa imkhui pum lamloh n'coelh. Judah te khaw rhaengsang la coelh bal. Te dongah Judah imkhui lamloh a pa imkhui tih a pa pacaboeina khui lamloh kai he tah Israel boeih soah manghai sak ham a ngaingaih.
1Chronicles28:5 BOEIPA loh kai he ca muep m'paek dae ka ca boeih khuiah khaw BOEIPA ram kah ngolkhoel dongah Israel ngol thil ham tah ka capa Solomon te ni a coelh.
1Chronicles28:6 Kamah taengah khaw
1Chronicles28:7 Tahae khohnin kah bangla ka olpaek neh ka laitloeknah vai ham te a tlungmu mak atah a ram te kumhal duela ka cikngae sak ni
1Chronicles28:8 Te dongah BOEIPA kah hlangping
1Chronicles28:9 Ka capa Solomon nang khaw na pa kah Pathen te ming. Amah te lungbuei neh a rhuemtuet la thothueng lamtah hinglu neh omtoem lah. Thinko boeih he BOEIPA loh a toem tih kopoek kah benbonah boeih khaw a yakming. Amah te na toem atah nang taengah ha phoe vetih amah te na hnoo atah a yoeyah la nang n'hlahpham ni.
1Chronicles28:10 BOEIPA loh Im sak hamla nang n'coelh te hmu laeh. Rhokso hamla thaahuel lamtah saii.
1Chronicles28:11 David loh a capa Solomon taengah ngalha neh a im khaw
1Chronicles28:12 BOEIPA im kah vongup ham neh a kaepvai kah imkhan boeih ham khaw
1Chronicles28:13 Khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek kah boelnah ham khaw
1Chronicles28:14 Thothuengnah sui hnopai cungkuem neh thothuengnah dongkah ham sui te khaw a khiing neh
1Chronicles28:15 Sui hmaitung neh a hmaithoi dongkah a khiing tah sui hmaitung kah a khiing bangla hmaitung neh a hmaithoi te a khueh. Cak hmaitung ham khaw hmaitung pakhat neh hmaitung pakhat kah thohtatnah bangla hmaitung neh a hmaithoi kah a khiing te a khueh.
1Chronicles28:16 Rhungkung caboei dongkah caboei neh caboei ham sui khaw a khiing neh
1Chronicles28:17 Ciksum neh baelcak khaw
1Chronicles28:18 Bo-ul hmueihtuk dongkah sui a ciil khaw a khiing neh
1Chronicles28:19 BOEIPA kut lamkah ca dongah khaw cungkuem coeng tih a muei dongkah bitat cungkuem dongah khaw kai he n'cangbam coeng.
1Chronicles28:20 Te phoeiah David loh a capa Solomon te
1Chronicles28:21 Pathen im kah thothuengnah cungkuem ham khaw khosoih neh Levi rhoek kah boelnah om coeng he. Hlangcong cungkuem lamkah khaw bitat cungkuem dongah
1Chronicles29:1 David manghai loh hlangping boeih taengah
1Chronicles29:2 Te dongah ka Pathen im ham he ka thadueng cungkuem neh ka sikim coeng. Sui dongkah ham sui
1Chronicles29:3 Te phoeiah ka Pathen im ham tah ka moeihoeih pueng. Kamah taengah aka om sui neh cak lungthen pataeng ka Pathen im ham a pueh a la ka paek coeng. Hmuencim im ham tah a cungkuem dongah ka sikim coeng.
1Chronicles29:4 Ophir sui te sui talent thawng thum
1Chronicles29:5 Sui ham tah sui khaw
1Chronicles29:6 Te vaengah a napa mangpa rhoek
1Chronicles29:7 Pathen im kah thothuengnah hamla sui talent thawng nga
1Chronicles29:8 Amah taengah a hmuh lungto te khaw Gershon Jehiel kut ah BOEIPA im kah thakvoh ham a paek uh.
1Chronicles29:9 BOEIPA te lungbuei neh rhuemtuet la a puhlu uh dongah a puhlu uh soah pilnam a kohoe tih David manghai khaw kohoenah a len neh a kohoe.
1Chronicles29:10 David loh BOEIPA te hlangping boeih kah mikhmuh ah a uem. Te vaengah David loh
1Chronicles29:11 Lennah neh thayung thamal khaw
1Chronicles29:12 Khuehtawn neh thangpomnah he na mikhmuh lamkah ni. A cungkuem soah aka taemrhai khaw namah ni. Na kut dongah thadueng neh thayung thamal om tih pantai sak ham neh a cungkuem taengah talong ham khaw na kut dongah om.
1Chronicles29:13 Kaimih kah Pathen aw
1Chronicles29:14 Tedae he tla puhlu ham neh thadueng khawk ham khaw kai he unim
1Chronicles29:15 Kaimih khaw a pa rhoek boeih bangla na mikhmuh ah yinlai neh lampah la ka om uh. Kaimih kah khohnin he diklai ah khokhawn bangla om tih ngaiuepnah om pawh.
1Chronicles29:16 Kaimih kah Pathen YAHWEH aw
1Chronicles29:17 Kai kah Pathen namah loh thinko na loepdak tih a vanatnah na ngaingaih te ka ming. Kai loh ka thinko dueng neh ni a cungkuem he ka puhlu coeng. Te dongah na pilnam pahoi a hmuh tih namah taengah a puhlu ham kohoenah neh ka hmuh coeng.
1Chronicles29:18 Kaimih napa Abraham
1Chronicles29:19 Ka capa Solomon te a rhuemtuet la thinko pae lamtah na olpaek neh na olphong khaw
1Chronicles29:20 Te phoeiah David loh hlangping boeih te
1Chronicles29:21 BOEIPA taengah hmueih a nawn uh tih te khohnin kah a vuen ah vaito thawngkhat
1Chronicles29:22 Te khohnin ah tah BOEIPA mikhmuh ah kohoenah a len neh a caak uh tih a ok uh. Te phoeiah David capa Solomon te a pabae la a manghai sak uh tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah rhaengsang la
1Chronicles29:23 Solomon te a napa David yueng manghai la BOEIPA ngolkhoel dongah a ngol van neh thaihtak tih Israel pum loh anih ol te a ngai uh.
1Chronicles29:24 Mangpa neh hlangrhalh boeih
1Chronicles29:25 BOEIPA loh Solomon te Israel pum kah mikhmuh ah a so la a pantai sak tih anih soah ram kah mueithennah te a paek. Te bang te anih hmai kah Israel manghai boeih soah a om moenih.
1Chronicles29:26 Jesse capa David he Israel boeih soah manghai.
1Chronicles29:27 Israel soah a manghai tue te kum sawmli lo. Hebron ah kum rhih manghai tih Jerusalem ah sawmthum kum thum manghai.
1Chronicles29:28 Khohnin loh khuehtawn neh thangpomnah neh ngaikhuek la sampok then ah duek. Te phoeiah a capa Solomon te anih yueng la manghai.
1Chronicles29:29 Manghai David kah lamhnuk lamhma ol khaw khohmu Samuel kah olka dongah khaw
1Chronicles29:30 A ram pum neh a thayung thamal khaw
2Chronicles1:1 David capa Solomon loh a ram ah thaa a huel vaengah anih te a Pathen BOEIPA loh a so la a pantai sak hang.
2Chronicles1:2 Te vaengah Solomon loh Israel boeih te khaw
2Chronicles1:3 Te phoeiah Solomon neh a taengkah hlangping boeih te Gibeon kah hmuensang la cet uh. Teah te khosoek ah BOEIPA kah sal Moses loh a saii Pathen kah tingtunnah dap khaw om.
2Chronicles1:4 David loh Pathen thingkawng te Kiriathjearim loh amah te ham a saelh hmuen la a khuen. Te ham te David loh Jerusalem ah dap a tuk pah.
2Chronicles1:5 Tedae Hur koca Uri capa Bezalel kah a saii rhohum hmueihtuk te tah BOEIPA kah dungtlungim hmai ah a khueh tih te te Solomon neh hlangping loh a dawt.
2Chronicles1:6 Te phoeiah Solomon te tingtunnah dap ah BOEIPA mikhmuh kah rhohum hmueihtuk taengla pahoi cet tih a soah hmueihhlutnah thawngkhat a nawn.
2Chronicles1:7 Tekah khoyin ah tah Pathen te Solomon taengah phoe tih anih te
2Chronicles1:8 Te dongah Solomon loh Pathen taengah
2Chronicles1:9 BOEIPA Pathen aw
2Chronicles1:10 Kai he cueihnah neh cangnah m'pae mai laeh lamtah pilnam mikhmuh ah he ka kun ka ael
2Chronicles1:11 Te dongah Pathen loh Solomon te
2Chronicles1:12 Cueihnah neh cangnah te nang taengah kam paek. Te phoeiah khuehtawn neh koeva neh thangpomnah khaw nang taengah kam paek ni. Te bang te nang hmai kah manghai rhoek taengah khaw om pawt tih nang hnukah khaw te bang te om mahpawh
2Chronicles1:13 Te phoeiah Solomon tah Gibeon kah hmuensang lamkah tingtunnah dap hmai lamloh Jerusalem la cet tih Israel te a manghai thil.
2Chronicles1:14 Te phoeiah Solomon loh leng neh marhang caem te a coi tih a taengah leng thawngkhat ya li neh marhang caem thawng hlai nit a om pah. Te te leng khopuei khui neh Jerusalem kah manghai taengah a khoem.
2Chronicles1:15 Manghai loh cak neh sui te Jerusalem ah lungto bangla a kuk tih lamphai te kolrhawk ah aka ding thaihae bangla a hawn.
2Chronicles1:16 Solomon kah marhang rhoek te Egypt lamkah neh Kue lamloh a thawt pah. Kue lamkah te manghai kah thimpom a phu la a loh uh.
2Chronicles1:17 A khuen uh vaengah khaw Egypt lamkah te leng pakhat ah tangka ya rhuk neh marhang pumat te ya sawmnga neh a khuen uh. Te tlam ni Khitti manghai boeih neh Aram manghai rhoek taengah khaw amamih kut neh a khuen uh.
2Chronicles2:1 Te phoeiah Solomon loh BOEIPA ming ham im sak ham neh a ram ham im sak hamla cai.
2Chronicles2:2 Solomon loh boe a soep vaengah hnophuei hlang thawng sawmrhih
2Chronicles2:3 Te phoeiah Solomon loh Tyre manghai Huram taengah ol a tah tih
2Chronicles2:4 Kai loh im ka sak he ka Pathen BOEIPA ming ham ni. Te te ciim ham neh a mikhmuh ah botui bo-ul phum ham om. Sainoek la rhungkung buh neh hmueihhlutnah tah rhoek hlaem ham neh mincang ham khaw
2Chronicles2:5 Kaimih kah Pathen tah pathen boeih lakah a len dongah ni im te khaw a len la ka sak.
2Chronicles2:6 Tedae a im sak pah ham te u long thadueng a capit eh? Vaan neh vaan phoeikah vaan long pataeng anih te a cangbam uh thai moenih. A mikhmuh ah ka phum uh ham bueng phoeiah tah a im ka sak ham khaw kai he unim?
2Chronicles2:7 Te dongah sui neh
2Chronicles2:8 Lebanon lamkah lamphai hmaical thing neh algum te kai hamla ham pat mai. Lebanon thing vung hamla aka ming tah namah kah sal rhoek ni tila ka ming dongah ni. Tedae ka sal rhoek he na sal rhoek taengah om ngawn ne.
2Chronicles2:9 Im te a len neh khobaerhambae la ka sak ham dongah thing khaw kamah taengah a cung la a sikim ham om van.
2Chronicles2:10 Thing aka vung tih aka top ham khaw na sal rhoek te cang yen kore thawng kul
2Chronicles2:11 Te dongah Tyre manghai Huram loh ca neh a voek tih
2Chronicles2:12 Te vaengah Huram loh
2Chronicles2:13 Te dongah yakmingnah aka ming
2Chronicles2:14 Anih he Dan nu lamkah huta pakhat kah a capa tih a napa he Tyre hlang ni. Anih tah sui neh
2Chronicles2:15 Te dongah cang neh cangtun khaw
2Chronicles2:16 Na ngoengaihnah boeih tarhing ah Lebanon lamkah thing te kaimih loh kam vung vetih Joppa tuipuei lamloh nang taengah pan kan thak uh bitni. Te te namah loh Jerusalem la khuen
2Chronicles2:17 A napa David loh mingsoepnah a soep hnukah Solomon loh Israel khohmuen kah yinlai hlang te boeih a soep tih thawng yakhat neh thawng sawmnga neh thawng thum ya rhuk a hmuh.
2Chronicles2:18 Amih khuiah thawng sawmrhih te hnophuei la
2Chronicles3:1 Solomon loh Moriah tlang kah Jerusalem ah BOEIPA im te sak hamla a tong. Te te a napa David taengah a tueng pah vanbangla Jebusi Ornan cangtilhmuen kah David hmuen ah a tawn.
2Chronicles3:2 Te dongah a ram kah a a kum li
2Chronicles3:3 Te phoeiah Solomon loh he tlam he a sut tih Pathen im te a sak. Hlamat kah cungnueh dongah a yun te a dong la dong sawmrhuk
2Chronicles3:4 A hmai kah Ngalha te khaw im hmai kah a daang bangla a yun dong kul
2Chronicles3:5 Im puei te khaw hmaical thing neh a thung tih sui then a ben. A soah rhophoe neh cangtui-rhaica ne a cam.
2Chronicles3:6 Im te boeimang la lung vang neh
2Chronicles3:7 Im kah tungpum cingkhaa khaw
2Chronicles3:8 Te phoeiah hmuencim kah hmuencim im te im hmai a daang dongah a yun dong kul
2Chronicles3:9 Thicung kah a khiing sui shekel sawmnga lo tih imhman te sui a ben thil.
2Chronicles3:10 Hmuencim kah hmuencim im ah cherubim rhoi te mueisai kah bibi neh a saii tih te rhoi te khaw sui a ben.
2Chronicles3:11 Cherubim kah a phae khaw a sen dong kul lo. Pakhat kah a phae vang te dong nga lo tih im kah pangbueng soah a ben. A phae vang te khaw dong nga lo tih cherubim pakhat kah a phae te a ben.
2Chronicles3:12 Cherubim pakhat kah a phae bal te dong nga lo tih im pangbueng te a ben. Te vaengah a phae vang te dong nga loh tih cherub pakhat kah phae te a ben.
2Chronicles3:13 Cherubim kah a phae he dong kul la a phuel. Te rhoi te amah kho dongah pai tih a maelhmai te imkhui la mang.
2Chronicles3:14 Hniyan te a thim
2Chronicles3:15 Im hmai kah tung rhoi khaw dong sawmthum panga a sen la a saii tih a soi kah yael te dong nga lo.
2Chronicles3:16 Cangimphu khuiah te cangtui-rhaica a saii tih tung soi ah a khueh. Tale thaih te yakhat a saii tih cangtui-rhaica dongah a bang.
2Chronicles3:17 Tung rhoi te bawkim hmai ah a ling tih pakhat te bantang ah
2Chronicles4:1 Rhohum hmueihtuk te a yun dong kul
2Chronicles4:2 Tuili te a saii tih a rhai lamloh a rhai hil te dong rha la a hlawn. a kaepvai pumrhuelh te khaw rhui a sen dong nga neh a kaep ah a yen vaengah dong sawmthum lo.
2Chronicles4:3 A hmui ah vaito muei om tih a kaep
2Chronicles4:4 Tuli te vaito pum hlai nit soah a pai sak. Pathum te tlangpuei la mael
2Chronicles4:5 A thah kutsom pakhat lo tih a rhai te boengloeng rhai mueimae bangla om. Rhaiphuelh tuilipai a doeng tih bath thawng thum kun.
2Chronicles4:6 Baeldung khaw parha a saii tih bantang ah panga
2Chronicles4:7 Sui hmaitung parha te amamih kah khosing bangla a saii tih bawkim khuiah te bantang ah panga
2Chronicles4:8 Caboei parha a saii tih bawkim khuikah bantang ah panga
2Chronicles4:9 Khosoih rhoek kah vongup khaw tungkha a len neh thungkha dongkah thohkhaih te a saii tih a thohkhaih te rhohum a ben thil.
2Chronicles4:10 Tuili te khaw khothoeng bantang hael kah tuithim imdan ah a khueh.
2Chronicles4:11 Huram loh am neh hmaisoh khaw
2Chronicles4:12 Tung panit neh tuidueh khaw
2Chronicles4:13 Sahamlong rhoi dongkah hamla tale thaih ya li lo. Sahamlong pakhat dongah tale thaih than nit om tih tung soi tungthi dongkah tuidueh rhoi te a thingcam.
2Chronicles4:14 Tungkho khaw a saii tih tungkho soah baeldung a saii.
2Chronicles4:15 Tuili pakhat te khaw a hmui ah vaito hlai nit.
2Chronicles4:16 Te phoeiah am neh hmaisoh khaw
2Chronicles4:17 Te rhoek te Jordan vannaem kah Sukkoth laklo neh Zeredah laklo
2Chronicles4:18 He hnopai boeih he Solomon loh a cungkuem la muep a saii tih rhohum kah a khiing te khe lek pawh.
2Chronicles4:19 Solomon loh Pathen im kah hnopai cungkuem
2Chronicles4:20 Hmaitung neh a hmaithoi dongkah a a tok ham khaw cangimphu hmai ah a khosing bangla sui cilh neh a saii.
2Chronicles4:21 Rhaiphuelh neh hmaithoi khaw
2Chronicles4:22 Te phoeiah paitaeh neh baelcak khaw
2Chronicles5:1 Solomon loh BOEIPA im bitat a saii te boeih cung coeng. Te phoeiah a napa David loh Pathen im kah thakvoh khuiah a khueh hnopai boeih te cak khaw
2Chronicles5:2 Te vaengah Solomon loh David khopuei Zion lamkah BOEIPA paipi thingkawng te Jerusalem la khuen hamla Israel kah a hamca rhoek neh koca boeilu boeih
2Chronicles5:3 Te dongah hla rhih vaengkah khotue ah tah Israel hlang boeih te manghai taengah tingtun uh.
2Chronicles5:4 Israel a hamca rhoek boeih a pawk van neh Levi rhoek loh thingkawng te a koh.
2Chronicles5:5 Te vaengah thingkawng neh tingtunnah dap khaw
2Chronicles5:6 Manghai Solomon neh Israel rhaengpuei boeih te thingkawng hmai kah a kaepvai tuentah uh tih boiva neh saelhung a nawn uh. Te te a cungkuem coeng dongah daek lek pawt tih tae uh lek pawh.
2Chronicles5:7 Te phoeiah Khosoih rhoek loh BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng te cherubim phae hmui kah
2Chronicles5:8 Thingkawng hmuen soah phae aka phuel cherubim om. Te dongah cherubim loh thingkawng so neh a cung soah a so duela a khuk.
2Chronicles5:9 A cung te sen tih a cung kah hmoicue te thingkawng lamloh cangimphu hmai ah tueng. Tedae poeng la tueng pawt tih tahae khohnin hil pahoi om.
2Chronicles5:10 Thingkawng khuiah a tloe om pawt tih Moses loh Horeb ah a khueh cabael rhoi bueng ni. Te tah Egypt lamloh a caeh uh phoeiah BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek taengah paipi la a saii pah.
2Chronicles5:11 Tedae khosoih boeih loh boelnah ham a ngaithuen uh mueh la a ciim uh te a hmuh dongah khosoih rhoek hmuencim lamloh nong uh.
2Chronicles5:12 Amih laa aka sa Levi boeih khui kah Asaph
2Chronicles5:13 Te vaengah olueng aka ueng aka ueng ham te pakhat la om. BOEIPA te thangthen ham neh uem ham vaengah ol pakhat la yaak sak ham laa a sak uh. BOEIPA te thangthen ham vaengah olueng neh
2Chronicles5:14 Pathen im te BOEIPA thangpomnah a bae dongah he cingmai hmai ah thohtat ham neh pai ham khaw khosoih rhoek loh noeng uh pawh.
2Chronicles6:1 Te vaengah Solomon loh
2Chronicles6:2 Tedae kai loh namah ham imhmuen im neh kumhal kah kho na sak thil ham hmuen te ka sak coeng
2Chronicles6:3 Te phoeiah manghai loh a maelhmai te a hooi tih Israel hlangping boeih te yoethen a paek vaengah Israel hlangping khaw boeih pai uh.
2Chronicles6:4 Te phoeiah
2Chronicles6:5 'Egypt khohmuen lamloh ka pilnam ka khuen khohnin lamloh ka ming om sak ham im sa la Israel koca boeih taeng lamkah khopuei te ka coelh moenih. Ka pilnam Israel soah rhaengsang la om sak ham hlang te ka coelh moenih.
2Chronicles6:6 Tedae Jerusalem te ka ming om nah hamla pahoi coelh tih David te ka pilnam Israel soah om sak ham ka coelh
2Chronicles6:7 Israel Pathen BOEIPA ming la im sak ham a pa David kah thinko ah om coeng.
2Chronicles6:8 Tedae BOEIPA loh a pa David te
2Chronicles6:9 Tedae nang loh im na sa pawt vetih na pumpu lamkah aka thoeng na capa long te ka ming ham im a sak eh
2Chronicles6:10 BOEIPA loh a ol te a thui bangla a pai puei coeng dongah a pa David yueng la ka pai. Te phoeiah BOEIPA kah a thui bangla Israel ngolkhoel dongah ka ngol tih Israel Pathen BOEIPA ming la im ka sak.
2Chronicles6:11 Teah te Israel ca rhoek taengah a saii BOEIPA kah paipi thingkawng khaw pahoi ka khueh bal
2Chronicles6:12 Te phoeiah Israel hlangping boeih hmai kah BOEIPA hmueihtuk hmai ah pai tih a kut a phuel.
2Chronicles6:13 Solomon loh rhohum baeldung a saii tih tungkha laklo ah a yun dong nga
2Chronicles6:14 Te phoeiah
2Chronicles6:15 Namah kah sal
2Chronicles6:16 Te dongah
2Chronicles6:17 Te dongah
2Chronicles6:18 Tedae Pathen he diklai dongkah hlang taengah kho a sak tang nim? Vaan neh vaan phoeikah vaan long namah te n'cangbam thai pawt vaengah
2Chronicles6:19 Tedae na sal kah thangthuinah neh a lungmacil taengla na mael. Ka Pathen BOEIPA aw
2Chronicles6:20 Na ming pahoi khueh ham na thui nah hmuen im he
2Chronicles6:21 Na sal neh na pilnam Israel loh he hmuen la a thangthui uh vaengkah huithuinah te hnatun pah. Namah loh na vaan kah khosak nah hmuen lamloh hnatun lamtah na yaak neh khodawkngai lah.
2Chronicles6:22 Hlang te a hui taengah tholh tih anih soah lai a suk hamla amah te a tap la a tap khaming. Te vaengah he im kah na hmueihtuk hmai ah thaephoei la ha pawk khaming.
2Chronicles6:23 Te vaengah namah loh vaan lamkah hnatun lamtah saii pah. Halang te thuung ham neh a khoboe te amah lu ah tloeng pah ham khaw
2Chronicles6:24 Na pilnam Israel te na taengah a tholh uh dongah thunkha mikhmuh ah yawk khaming. Tedae mael uh tih namah ming te a uem uh doela he im khuikah namah mikhmuh ah thangthui neh rhenah a bih uh ni.
2Chronicles6:25 Te vaengah namah loh vaan lamkah kah hnatun lamtah na pilnam Israel kah tholhnah te khodawkngai pah. Amih te amamih taeng neh a napa rhoek taengah na paek khohmuen la mael puei.
2Chronicles6:26 Nang taengkah a tholh uh dongah vaan ke khaih tih khotlan khaw om pawt khaming. Te vaengah he hmuen la thangthui uh tih na ming te a uem uh khaming
2Chronicles6:27 namah loh vaan lamkah hnatun lamtah na sal rhoek neh na pilnam Israel kah tholhnah te khodawkngai pah. Longpuei then te amih thuinuet lamtah a khuiah pongpa uh saeh. Te vaengah na pilnam taengah rho la na paek na khohmuen ah he khotlan tueih pah.
2Chronicles6:28 Khokha neh diklai ah duektahaw a pai vaengah
2Chronicles6:29 Hlang boeih taeng lamkah neh na pilnam Israel boeih lamkah aka thoeng thangthuinah boeih neh
2Chronicles6:30 Namah loh na khosak nah hmuen
2Chronicles6:31 Te daengah ni amamih tue khuiah namah kah longpuei ah pongpa uh vetih a pa rhoek taengkah na paek diklai hman kah mulhing rhoek loh namah te n'rhih uh eh.
2Chronicles6:32 Na pilnam Israel lamkah mueh la
2Chronicles6:33 namah loh na khosak nah hmuen
2Chronicles6:34 Na pilnam te a thunkha taengah caemtloek la pawk tih
2Chronicles6:35 Te vaengah a thangthuinah neh a lungmacil te vaan lamloh yaak pah lamtah amih kah tiktamnah te saii pah.
2Chronicles6:36 Hlang tah aka tholh pawt he a om pawt dongah namah taengah tholh uh. Te dongah amih taengah na thintoek tih amih te thunkha mikhmuh la na tloeng. Te vaengah amih te aka sol rhoek loh khohmuen a hla a yoei la a sol uh.
2Chronicles6:37 Te cakhaw a sol nah khohmuen ah a thinko neh pahoi mael uh tih yut uh. Amih kah tamna khohmuen ah namah taengah rhennah a bih uh tih
2Chronicles6:38 Amih a sol nah
2Chronicles6:39 Amih kah thangthuinah neh amih kah lungmacil te na khosak nah hmuen lamloh
2Chronicles6:40 Ka Pathen aw om uh mai laeh saeh
2Chronicles6:41 Te dongah Pathen BOEIPA aw
2Chronicles6:42 BOEIPA Pathen aw
2Chronicles7:1 Solomon loh a thangthui te a khah vaengah vaan lamkah hmai suntla tih hmueihhlutnah neh hmueih te a hlawp. Te vaengah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah im ah bae.
2Chronicles7:2 BOEIPA im te BOEIPA kah thangpomnah bae tih BOEIPA im la khosoih rhoek a kun ham coeng uh pawh.
2Chronicles7:3 Im soah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah neh hmai a suntlak te Israel ca boeih loh a hmuh uh vaengah lungphaih soah diklai la a maelhmai neh cungkueng uh tih a bawk uh. A sitlohnah loh kumhal hil ham a then dongah BOEIPA te a uem uh.
2Chronicles7:4 Te vaengah manghai neh pilnam boeih loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hmueih a nawn uh.
2Chronicles7:5 Solomon manghai loh hmueih la saelhung thawng kul thawng hnih
2Chronicles7:6 Khosoih rhoek te amamih kah hutnah dongah pai uh tih Levi rhoek khaw BOEIPA kah lumlaa hnopai neh om uh. A sitlohnah te kumhal hil ham dongah BOEIPA te uem hamla manghai David loh te te a saii. David amih kut neh a thangthen. Te dongah khosoih rhoek loh amih hmai ah a ueng la ueng atah Israel pum khaw boeih pai uh.
2Chronicles7:7 Solomon loh BOEIPA im hmai kah vongup laklung te a ciim tih hmueihhlutnah neh rhoepnah maehtha te pahoi a saii. Solomon loh a saii rhohum hmueihtuk tah hmueihhlutnah khaw
2Chronicles7:8 Te vaeng tue ah Solomon neh a taengkah Israel pum loh hnin rhih khuiah khotue a saii. Hlangping Lebokhamath lamloh Egypt soklong hil muep khawk.
2Chronicles7:9 Tedae hnin rhih hmueihtuk nawnnah la
2Chronicles7:10 A hla rhih dongkah hnin kul hnin thum vaengah tah pilnam te amamih kah dap la a tueih. BOEIPA loh David ham neh Solomon ham khaw
2Chronicles7:11 Solomon loh BOEIPA im neh manghai im te a khah coeng. A cungkuem te Solomon kah lungbuei ah cuen pah bangla a saii ham te BOEIPA im nen khaw
2Chronicles7:12 Te phoeiah BOEIPA te Solomon taengla khoyin ah a phoe pah tih amah taengah
2Chronicles7:13 Vaan ka khaih tih khotlan a om pawt mai akhaw
2Chronicles7:14 A soah ka ming a phuk thil ka pilnam he kunyun tih a thangthui atah
2Chronicles7:15 He hmuen kah thangthuinah dongah ka mik dai om pawn vetih ka hna khaw khui ni.
2Chronicles7:16 Kumhal duela ka ming pahoi om sak ham he im he ka coelh tih ka ciim coeng dongah ka mik neh ka lungbuei loh hnin takuem pahoi om pawn ni.
2Chronicles7:17 Nang khaw na pa David a pongpa bangla ka mikhmuh ah na pongpa atah nang kang uen boeih te saii hamla ka oltlueh neh ka laitloeknah he ngaithuen.
2Chronicles7:18 Na pa David taengah ka saii tih
2Chronicles7:19 Tedae na mael uh tih ka khosing neh ka olpaek
2Chronicles7:20 Te vaengah amih taengah ka paek ka khohmuen dong lamloh amih te ka poelh ni. Ka ming hamla ka ciim im he khaw ka mikhmuh dong lamloh ka voeih vetih pilnam cungkuem taengah thuidoeknah neh thuinuetnah la ka khueh ni.
2Chronicles7:21 Im he a sangkoek la om cakhaw aka pah boeih te a taengah hal vetih
2Chronicles7:22 Te vaengah
2Chronicles8:1 Solomon loh BOEIPA im neh amah im a sak te kum kul a bawnnah la a pha coeng.
2Chronicles8:2 Te phoeiah Huram loh Solomon taengla a paek khopuei rhoek te Solomon loh a thoh tih Israel ca rhoek pahoi kho a sak sak.
2Chronicles8:3 Te phoeiah Solomon loh Khamath Zobah la cet tih te te a loh.
2Chronicles8:4 Khosoek kah Tadmor te khaw
2Chronicles8:5 Thohkhaih thohkalh neh vongtung vongup kah khopuei
2Chronicles8:6 Baalath neh rhuengim khopuei boeih khaw Solomon hut la om. Leng kah khopuei boeih neh marhang caem khopuei khaw marhang Solomon kah huengaihnah boeih te tah a Jerusalem ah khaw
2Chronicles8:7 Khitti neh Amori
2Chronicles8:8 Amih koca lamkah te amih hnuk la khohmuen ah sueng uh. Amih te Israel ca rhoek a khah uh pawt dongah tahae khohnin hil Solomon taengah saldong la cet.
2Chronicles8:9 Tedae Israel ca te tah Solomon loh amah kah bitat dongah sal la khueh pawh. Amih tah caemtloek hlang neh amah kah rhalboei mangpa rhoek
2Chronicles8:10 Manghai Solomon kah khohung mangpa la pai tih pilnam soah aka taemrhai rhoek te yahnih sawmnga lo.
2Chronicles8:11 Solomon loh Pharaoh canu tah David khopuei lamloh anih ham a sak pah im la a thak tih
2Chronicles8:12 Te vaengah Solomon loh ngalha hmai kah a suem BOEIPA kah hmueihtuk dongah BOEIPA ham kah hmueihhlutnah a khuen.
2Chronicles8:13 Moses kah olpaek bangla a hnin hnin ah nawn hamla Sabbath ham neh hlasae ham khaw
2Chronicles8:14 A napa David kah khosing bangla khosoih kah boelnah te amih kah thothuengnah ham
2Chronicles8:15 Olka cungkuem neh thakvoh kawng dongah khaw khosoih rhoek neh Levi taengkah manghai olpaek he a phaelh uh moenih.
2Chronicles8:16 Solomon kah bitat boeih he BOEIPA im kah tungkho a sut khohnin lamloh rhuemtuet la BOEIPA im a khah hil cung coeng.
2Chronicles8:17 Te vaengah Solomon te Edom khohmuen kah tuipuei tuikaeng Eziongeber neh Elath la cet.
2Chronicles8:18 Te phoeiah Huram te a sal rhoek kut lamloh amah taengla sangpho neh a tah. Te dongah sangpho neh tuipuei aka ming a sal rhoek khaw Solomon kah sal neh Ophir la pawk uh. Te lamloh sui talent ya li sawmnga te a khuen uh tih manghai Solomon taengla pawk uh.
2Chronicles9:1 Sheba manghainu loh Solomon kah olthang te a yaak. Te dongah loh Solomon te olkael neh noemcai ham
2Chronicles9:2 Anih ol boeih te amah taengah Solomon loh a thui pah. Tedae a taengah a thui tloel ham hil tah Solomon ham ol a kael aih moenih.
2Chronicles9:3 Sheba manghainu loh Solomon kah cueihnah neh im a sak te khaw
2Chronicles9:4 A caboei dongkah caak neh a sal rhoek kah tolrhum khaw
2Chronicles9:5 Te dongah manghai te
2Chronicles9:6 Te cakhaw ka pawk tih ka mik loh a hmuh hlan hil amih ol dongah ka tangnah pawh. Tedae kai taengah rhuekthuem khaw a thui moenih ko he. Na cueihnah olthang ka yaak lakah a puehkan na khoep.
2Chronicles9:7 Na hlang rhoek a yoethen. Na mikhmuh ah phat aka pai rhoek neh na cueihnah aka ya na sal rhoek khaw a yoethen.
2Chronicles9:8 Na Pathen BOEIPA tah om pai saeh
2Chronicles9:9 Te phoeiah manghai te sui talent ya pakul
2Chronicles9:10 Te phoeiah Khiram Huram kah sal rhoek neh Solomon kah sal rhoek long khaw Ophir lamkah sui a khuen pa uh. Algum thing neh lung vang khaw a khuen uh.
2Chronicles9:11 Manghai loh algum thing te BOEIPA im neh manghai im kah longpuei la
2Chronicles9:12 Manghai Solomon loh manghainu Sheba te a kongaih boeih a rhoi pah. Te vaengah a dawt te amah manghai ham a khuen pah lakah yet. Te phoeiah mael tih amah neh a sal rhoek te amah kho la pawk.
2Chronicles9:13 Solomon taengla kum khat dongah aka pawk sui he a khiing la sui talent ah ya rhuk neh sawmrhuk parhuk lo.
2Chronicles9:14 Te bueng kolla long yaam hlang neh thimpom rhoek loh a khuen pah
2Chronicles9:15 Te dongah manghai Solomon loh sui photlinglen yahnih a saii tih photlinglen pakhat dongkah caeh rhoeh la a boh vaengah sui ya rhuk a boh thil.
2Chronicles9:16 Sui photlingca te ya thum ham khaw photlingca pakhat rhip ah a caeh rhoeh ah sui ya thum a boh thil. Te rhoek te manghai loh Lebanon duup im ah a khueh.
2Chronicles9:17 Te phoeiah manghai loh vueino ngolkhoel a len a saii tih sui cilh a ben thil.
2Chronicles9:18 Ngolkhoel te tangtlaeng parhuk om tih sui khotloeng te ngolkhoel dongah a buen. Ngolnah hmuen te he ben ah khaw ke ah khaw a kut om. A kut rhoi taengah sathueng pumnit pai.
2Chronicles9:19 Khatben khatbang kah tangtlaeng parhuk soah sathueng hlai nit pahoi pai. Te bang te ram takuem ah a saii moenih.
2Chronicles9:20 Manghai Solomon kah tui-ok hnopai boeih khaw sui ni. Lebanon duup kah im kah hnopai boeih khaw sui kak ni. Cak he Solomon tue vaengah tah koihvaih pawh hno pakhat bangla a ngai.
2Chronicles9:21 Huram kah sal rhoek neh Tarshish la aka cet manghai kah sangpho rhoek long khaw kum thum ah vai mael uh. Tarshish sangpho loh sui neh cak khaw
2Chronicles9:22 Manghai Solomon he diklai manghai boeih lakah khuehtawn neh cueihnah dongah pantai ngai.
2Chronicles9:23 Pathen loh a lungbuei ah a khueh pah coeng dongah anih kah cueihnah hnatun hamla diklai manghai boeih loh Solomon kah maelhmai te a tlap uh.
2Chronicles9:24 Amih loh a khocang neh cak hnopai khaw
2Chronicles9:25 Solomon taengah marhang neh leng im thawng li
2Chronicles9:26 Te phoeiah tuiva lamloh Philisti khohmuen hil khaw
2Chronicles9:27 Manghai loh cak te Jerusalem ah lungto bangla a khueh tih lamphai te kolrhawk ah aka ding thaihae bangla a hawn.
2Chronicles9:28 Te phoeiah Egypt lamkah neh diklai pum lamkah marhang te Solomon hamla a khuen uh.
2Chronicles9:29 Solomon kah ol coih na a tong lamloh a bawt khaw tonghma Nathan kah olka khui neh Shiloh Ahijah kah tonghma ol khuiah khaw
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon tah Israel boeih te Jerusalem ah kum sawmli a manghai thil.
2Chronicles9:31 Solomon te a napa rhoek taengla khoem uh tih a napa David khopuei ah a up uh. Te phoeiah a capa Rehoboam te anih yueng la manghai.

2Chronicles10:16 Amih ol te manghai loh a hnatun pawt khaw Israel pum loh a ming. Te dongah pilnam loh manghai te a mael thil tih
2Chronicles10:17 Tedae Israel ca rhoek tah Judah khopuei rhoek ah kho a sak uh tih amih soah Rehoboam manghai.

2Chronicles12:1 Rehoboam kah ram neh a thadueng he cikngae bangla om amah neh Israel boeih long khaw BOEIPA kah olkhueng te a hnawt.
2Chronicles12:2 Rehoboam manghai kah a kum nga dongah tah BOEIPA taengah boe a koek uh dongah ah Egypt manghai Shishak loh Jerusalem te a muk.
2Chronicles12:3 Te vaengah leng thawngkhat yahnih
2Chronicles12:4 Judah kah kasam khopuei rhoek te a loh tih Jerusalem la pawk.
2Chronicles12:5 Te vaengah tonghma Shemaiah te Jerusalem kah Shishak maelhmai kongah aka tingtun Rehoboam neh Judah mangpa rhoek taengla pawk tih amih te
2Chronicles12:6 Te daengah Israel mangpa rhoek neh manghai khaw kunyun tih
2Chronicles12:7 Te dongah a kunyun uh te BOEIPA loh a hmuh vaengah BOEIPA ol Shemaiah taengla pawk tih
2Chronicles12:8 Tedae anih taengah sal la a om uh daengah kai kah thothuengnah neh diklai ram kah thothuengnah te a ming uh eh
2Chronicles12:9 Egypt manghai Shishak loh Jerusalem te a paan vaengah BOEIPA im thakvoh neh manghai im kah thakvoh te a loh. A cungkuem te a loh tih Solomon loh a saii sui photling khaw a khuen.
2Chronicles12:10 Te dongah te rhoek yueng la manghai Rehoboam loh rhohum photling a saii tih manghai im kah thohka aka tawt
2Chronicles12:11 Manghai te BOEIPA im la a caeh dingdoeng vaengah imtawt rhoek khaw cet uh tih photling te a bai uh. Te phoeiah imtawt kah tanhnaem la a thak uh.
2Chronicles12:12 Amah a kunyun van dongah BOEIPA kah thintoek khaw anih lamloh mael tih a bawtnah hil phae pawh. Tedae Judah ah khaw ol then om pueng.
2Chronicles12:13 Manghai Rehoboam tah Jerusalem ah cak tih sawmli kum khat a lo ca hil manghai. Rehoboam a manghai van neh Jerusalem khopuei ah kum hlai rhih manghai. Te tah Israel koca boeih lamloh amah ming pahoi khueh ham ni BOEIPA loh a coelh. Rehoboam manu ming tah Ammoni Naamah ni.
2Chronicles12:14 Tedae BOEIPA te toem hamla a lungbuei a cikngae pawt dongah boethae a saii.
2Chronicles12:15 Rehoboam kah olka a kung neh a doong te tonghma Shemaiah olka
2Chronicles12:16 Rehoboam khaw a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah David khopuei ah a up uh. Te phoeiah a capa Abijah te anih yueng la manghai.
2Chronicles13:1 Manghai Jeroboam kah kum hlai rhet dongah Abijah Judah ah manghai tih
2Chronicles13:2 Jerusalem ah kum thum manghai. A manu ming tah Gibeah lamkah Uriel canu Mikaiah ni. Te vaengah Abijah laklo neh Jeroboam laklo ah caemtloeknah om.
2Chronicles13:3 Abijah loh caemtloek te tatthai hlangrhalh neh pin uh tih caemtloek la hlang thawng ya li a coelh. Te vaengah Jeroboam loh caemtloek te a coelh tatthai hlangrhalh hlang thawng ya rhet neh rhong a pai thil.
2Chronicles13:4 Te vaengah Abijah tah Ephraim tlang kah Zemaraim tlang so ah pai tih
2Chronicles13:5 Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh David he Israel soah kumhal ham ram a paek te na ming uh pawt nim? Anih taeng neh anih koca taengah paipi lungkaeh om.
2Chronicles13:6 Tedae David capa Solomon kah sal Nebat capa Jeroboam te thoo tih a boei te a tloelh.
2Chronicles13:7 Hlang muen capa olhong hlang rhoek te amah taengla a coi tih Solomon capa Rehoboam taengah ning uh. Rehoboam tah camoe la om tih a thinko a mongkawt dongah amih mikhmuh ah thaahuel thai pawh.
2Chronicles13:8 Te dongah David koca kut kah BOEIPA ram hmai ah thaahuel ham na ti uh coeng. Na hlangping uh muep dae nangmih taengkah sui vaitoca te Jeroboam long ni nangmih ham pathen la a saii.
2Chronicles13:9 BOEIPA kah khosoih
2Chronicles13:10 Tedae kaimih taengah mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA a om dongah amah neh BOEIPA taengah aka thotat Aaron koca
2Chronicles13:11 Mincang
2Chronicles13:12 Pathen tah kaimih taengah a lu la om coeng he. A khosoih rhoek neh olueng rhoek khaw nangmih Israel ca rhoek te yuhui thil ham tamlung neh om coeng. Na pa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA te vathoh thil uh boeh
2Chronicles13:13 Te vaengah Jeroboam tah amih hnuk lamloh caeh hamla rhong te a hil. Te dongah Judah hmai la om uh tih rhong te amih hnuk ah om.
2Chronicles13:14 Judah rhoek te a mael uh vaengah caemtloek rhoek te amih taengah a hnuk a hmai la tarha a om pah. Te dongah BOEIPA taengla pang uh tih khosoih rhoek loh olueng te a ueng uh.
2Chronicles13:15 Te phoeiah Judah hlang yuhui uh. Om bal tih Judah hlang te a yuhui vaengah tah Pathen loh Jeroboam neh Israel boeih te Abijah neh Judah mikhmuh ah a yawk sak.
2Chronicles13:16 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek tah Judah mikhmuh lamloh rhaelrham uh tih amih te Pathen loh amamih kut ah a paek.
2Chronicles13:17 Amih te Abijah neh a pilnam loh hmsoe len neh a ngawn. Te dongah Israel kah hlang coelh thawng ya nga a rhok la yalh.
2Chronicles13:18 Te vaeng tue ah Israel ca rhoek te kunyun uh dae Judah ca rhoek tah a napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA dongah a hangdang uh dongah a namning uh.
2Chronicles13:19 Abijah loh Jeroboam hnuk te a hloem tih anih taeng lamkah Bethel khopuei rhoek neh a khobuel rhoek khaw
2Chronicles13:20 Jeroboam kah thadueng te Abijah tue vaengah koep a saibawn moenih. Anih te BOEIPA loh a yawk sak tih duek.
2Chronicles13:21 Te cakhaw Abijah te cuung uh tih a yuu hlai li a loh. Te dongah capa pakul panit neh canu hlai rhuk a sak.
2Chronicles13:22 Abijah kah ol noi neh a khoboe khaw

2Chronicles14:2 Asa loh a Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah hnothen neh a thuem ni a saii.
2Chronicles14:3 Kholong hmueihtuk neh hmuensang te a khoe tih kaam te a phaek. Asherah khaw a top.
2Chronicles14:4 A napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA toem ham neh a olkhueng neh a olpaek vai ham khaw Judah rhoek te a uen.
2Chronicles14:5 Judah khopuei tom lamkah hmuensang neh bunglawn te a khoe tih a mikhmuh ah a ram khaw mong.
2Chronicles14:6 Khohmuen te a mong dongah Judah kah kasam khopuei rhoek te a sak. Anih te BOEIPA loh a duem sak dongah te vaeng tue ah a taengah caemtloeknah om pawh.

2Chronicles14:11 Te vaengah Asa loh amah kah Pathen BOEIPA te te a khue tih
2Chronicles14:12 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Kushi te Asa mikhmuh neh Judah mikhmuh ah a yawk sak tih Kushi rhoek te rhaelrham uh.
2Chronicles14:13 Amih te Asa neh a taengkah pilnam loh Gerar hil duela a hloem tih Kushi lamloh a cungku sak. Amih te hinglu hlawtnah a om pawt hil BOEIPA mikhmuh neh a caem mikhmuh ah a khah coeng tih kutbuem khaw a yet la muep a phueih uh.

2Chronicles15:19 Asa kah ram te kum sawmthum kum nga duela caemtloeknah a om moenih.
2Chronicles16:1 Asa ram kah sawmthum kum rhuk vaengah Israel manghai Baasha loh Judah te a paan tih Judah manghai Asa taengla kunael vuenva sak pawt ham Ramah te a sak.
2Chronicles16:2 Asa loh cak neh sui te BOEIPA im neh manghai im kah thakvoh khui lamloh a poh tih Damasku ah kho aka sa Aram manghai Benhadad taengla a pat.
2Chronicles16:3 “Paipi he kai laklo neh nang laklo ah
2Chronicles16:4 Te dongah Benhadad loh manghai Asa te a rhoi tih anih ham te Israel khopuei rhoek ah tatthai mangpa rhoek te a tueih pah. Te vaengah Ijon
2Chronicles16:5 Baasha loh a yaak van neh Ramah a sak te a toeng tih a bitat te a paa sak.
2Chronicles16:6 Te vaengah manghai Asa loh Judah pum te a khuen tih Baasha loh a sak nah Ramah lungto neh thing te a phueih pah. Te nen te Geba neh Mizpah a sak.
2Chronicles16:7 Te vaeng tue ah khohmu Hanani tah Judah manghai Asa taengla pawk tih anih te
2Chronicles16:8 Kushi neh Lubim khaw a cungkuem dongah tatthai la a om uh moenih a? Leng neh
2Chronicles16:9 Amah taengah rhuemtuet la a thinko ka hong te moem hamla BOEIPA loh diklai pum ah a mik a van sak thikthuek. Tahae ah na pavai ngawn cakhaw tahae lamloh na taengah caemtloek om coeng
2Chronicles16:10 Tedae Asa te khohmu taengah hue a sak tih anih taengkah a thintoek ah anih te hloong im khuila a khueh. Te vaeng tue ah Asa loh pilnam te a neet.
2Chronicles16:11 Asa olka a kung neh a dong he khaw Judah neh Israel kah manghai cabu khuiah a daek uh ne.
2Chronicles16:12 Asa kah a ram te sawmthum kum ko vaengah anih te tloh loh a dom. A kho dongkah a tloh te so duela a om pah. A tlohtat khuiah pataeng aka hoeih sak ham BOEIPA te a toem moenih.
2Chronicles16:13 Asa khaw a napa rhoek taengah khoem uh tih a manghai te sawmli kum khat a lo vaengah duek.
2Chronicles16:14 Anih te amah kah phuel ah ah a up uh. Te te amah loh David khopuei ah a vueh. Anih te thingkong dongah a yalh sak uh tih botui neh si bibi neh a comluem a thungnom tih a vuei. Anih ham hmai len muep a hueng uh.
2Chronicles17:1 Asa capa Jehoshaphat anih yueng la manghai tih Israel te a ning thil.
2Chronicles17:2 Tatthai te Judah khopuei boeih ah cakrhuet la a khueh tih Judah khohmuen ah khaw a napa Asa loh a loh Ephraim khopuei rhoek ah khaw khohung a khueh.
2Chronicles17:3 A napa David kah longpuei ah a pongpa dongah Jehoshaphat te BOEIPA loh a om puei. Lamhma ah khaw Baal te a toem moenih.
2Chronicles17:4 Tedae a napa kah Pathen te a toem. A olpaek neh pongpa tih Israel khoboe bangla om pawh.
2Chronicles17:5 BOEIPA loh ram te anih kut ah a cikngae sak tih Judah pum loh Jehoshaphat taengla khocang a paek uh. Te dongah anih te a cungkuem dongah khuehtawn neh thangpomnah neh om.
2Chronicles17:6 A lungbuei te BOEIPA kah longpuei la a phoh tih hmuensang neh Asherah te Judah lamloh a khoe bal.

2Chronicles24:1 Joash te kum rhih a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum sawmli manghai. A manu ming tah Beersheba lamkah Zihiah ni.
2Chronicles24:2 Khosoih Jehoiada kah a tue khuiah tah Joash loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii.
2Chronicles24:3 Anih ham te Jehoiada loh yuu panit a paek tih canu capa a sak.
2Chronicles24:4 Te dongah a hnuk lamtah BOEIPA im te tlaih ham te Joash kah lungbuei ah a om pah.
2Chronicles24:5 Te phoeiah khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek te a coi tih amih te
2Chronicles24:6 Manghai loh boeilu Jehoiada te a khue tih a taengah
2Chronicles24:7 Halangnu Athaliah kah a ca rhoek loh Pathen im te a muk uh coeng. BOEIPA im kah hnocim boeih khaw Baal hamla a saii uh
2Chronicles24:8 Te dongah manghai loh a ti bangla thingkawng pakhat a saii uh tih BOEIPA im poeng ben vongka ah a khueh uh.
2Chronicles24:9 Te phoeiah ah tah khosoek kah Israel taeng lamloh Pathen kah sal Moses buham te BOEIPA taengla khuen ham te Judah ah khaw Jerusalem ah ol a paek uh.
2Chronicles24:10 Te vaengah mangpa boeih neh pilnam boeih khaw a kohoe uh. Te dongah a khuen uh tih a thingkawng dongah a bae la a sang uh.
2Chronicles24:11 A tue a pha vaengah tah thingkawng te Levi kut lamloh manghai kah cawhkung taengla a khuen. Amih loh tangka muep a hmuh vaengah tah manghai kah cadaek neh khosoih boeilu kah hlangtawt te ha pawk. Te vaengah thingkawng te a kong uh tih a khuen uh. Amah a hmuen la a mael puei uh tih a hnin
2Chronicles24:12 Te te manghai neh Jehoiada loh BOEIPA im kah thothuengnah bitat aka saii taengah a paek tih BOEIPA im a tlaih vaengkah lungto aka dae neh kutthai rhoek
2Chronicles24:13 Aka saii rhoek loh bitat a saii uh van dongah amih kut dongkah bitat tah sading la cet. Pathen im te a lan a tang bangla a thoh uh tih a duel uh.
2Chronicles24:14 A khah uh phoeiah tah tangka coih te manghai neh Jehoiada mikhmuh la a khuen uh. Te te BOEIPA im kah hnopai la
2Chronicles24:15 Jehoiada te patong tih a khohnin khaw cup coeng. A dueknah te khaw kum ya sawmthum a lo ca vaengah duek.
2Chronicles24:16 Anih tah Israel khuiah khaw Pathen ham neh a im ham a then a saii dongah David khopuei ah manghai rhoek taengah a up uh.
2Chronicles24:17 Tedae Jehoiada a dueknah hnukah tah Judah mangpa rhoek te cet uh tih manghai taengah bakop uh. Te vaengah manghai loh amih taengkah te a hnatun.
2Chronicles24:18 A napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA im te a hnoo uh tih Asherah neh muei taengah tho a thueng uh. Amih kah dumlai kongah Judah neh Jerusalem soah thinhulnah om coeng.
2Chronicles24:19 Amih te BOEIPA taengla mael puei ham amih taengah tonghma rhoek a tueih tih amih te a rhalrhing sak uh akhaw hnatun uh pawh.
2Chronicles24:20 Te vaengah Pathen kah Mueihla loh khosoih Jehoiada capa Zekhariah te a thing. Te dongah pilnam te a taengah a pai thil tih amih te
2Chronicles24:21 Te dongah anih te a taeng uh tih manghai olpaek bangla BOEIPA im kah vongup ah lungto neh a dae uh.
2Chronicles24:22 Zekhariah napa Jehoiada loh Joash taengah a tueng sak sitlohnah te manghai Joash loh poek moenih. Tedae a capa te a ngawn pah tih a duek thuk vaengah tah
2Chronicles24:23 Kum te thoknah a pha vaengah tah Aram caem loh anih taengla cet. Judah neh Jerusalem te a kun thil uh. Te vaengah pilnam lamkah pilnam mangpa boeih te a phae uh tih amih kah kutbuem boeih te Damasku manghai taengla a pat uh.
2Chronicles24:24 Aram caem te hlang a yol neh cet dae
2Chronicles24:25 Anih taeng lamloh a khoe uh vaengah anih te boengha boengha hoeng la hnoo uh. Khosoih Jehoiada koca rhoek kah thii kongah anih te a sal rhoek loh a taeng uh tih a baiphaih dongah amah la a ngawn uh. A duek vaengah anih te David khopuei ah a up uh. Tedae manghai phuel ah up moenih.
2Chronicles24:26 Anih aka taeng rhoek tah Ammoni Shimeath capa Zabad
2Chronicles24:27 Anih koca rhoek neh a cungkuem dongah anih kah laipuei olrhuh khaw
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziah te kum kul kum nga a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum kul kum ko manghai. A manu ming tah Jerusalem lamkah Jehoaddin ni.
2Chronicles25:2 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii dae thinko rhuemtuet nen moenih.
2Chronicles25:3 Anih kut hmuiah ram te a cak vanbangla a napa manghai aka ngawn a sal rhoek te a ngawn.
2Chronicles25:4 A ca rhoek te tah Moses cabu dongkah olkhueng khuiah a daek bangla duek sak pawh. Te ah te BOEIPA loh a uen tih
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziah loh Judah te a coi tih amih te a napa imkhui tarhing ah thawngkhat mangpa
2Chronicles25:6 Israel lamkah tatthai hlangrhalh thawng yakhat te cak talent yakhat neh a paang.
2Chronicles25:7 Te vaengah Pathen kah hlang te anih taengla pawk tih
2Chronicles25:8 Na cet tih caemtloek vaengah thaahuel la na saii mai cakhaw Pathen loh nang te thunkha mikhmuh ah m'palet sak ni. Pathen taengah tah bom ham neh palet sak ham khaw thadueng om a ti nah.
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziah loh Pathen kah hlang te
2Chronicles25:10 Te dongah amih te Amaziah loh a phihrha sak tih anih taengla aka pawk caem te khaw Ephraim lamloh amah hmuen la a caeh sak. Te vaengah amih kah thintoek te Judah taengah sai khungdaeng tih amah hmuen la thinling thintoek neh mael uh.
2Chronicles25:11 Te phoeiah tah Amaziah loh thaa a huel tih a pilnam te a khool. Kolrhawk la cet bal tih Seir koca thawng rha te a ngawn.
2Chronicles25:12 Te vaengah Judah ca rhoek te a hing la thawng rha a sol tih amih te thaelpang pango la a khuen uh. Te phoeiah amih te thaelpang pango lamloh a tulh uh tih a pum la sah uh.
2Chronicles25:13 Caemtloek vaengah anih neh aka pongpa khuiah caem pa rhoek te Amaziah loh a mael sak vaengah tah
2Chronicles25:14 Edom aka ngawn lamloh Amaziah a mael hnukah atah Seir ca rhoek kah pathen te a khuen. Te te amah ham pathen la a khueh tih a mikhmuh ah a bakop pah
2Chronicles25:15 Te dongah BOEIPA kah thintoek te Amaziah taengah sai tih a taengla tonghma a tueih pah. Te vaengah anih te
2Chronicles25:16 A taengah a thui ham a om li vaengah anih te
2Chronicles25:17 Judah manghai Amaziah loh a uen phoeiah tah Israel manghai Jehu koca
2Chronicles25:18 Tedae Israel manghai Joash loh Judah manghai Amaziah te ol a pat tih
2Chronicles25:19 Edom te na ngawn te na thui tih na lungbuei thangpom ham na phuel uh coeng te. Namah im ah om laeh. Balae tih boethae te na huet? Te dongah ni namah neh na taengkah Judah khaw na cungku puei
2Chronicles25:20 Tedae Amaziah loh a hnatun pawt he Pathen taeng lamkah coeng dongah ni. Edom pathen te a toem uh dongah amih kut ah a tloeng van.
2Chronicles25:21 Israel manghai Joash te cet tangloeng tih Judah kah Bethshemesh ah Judah manghai Amaziah neh a maelhmai a hmuh uh.
2Chronicles25:22 Te vaengah Judah te Israel mikhmuh ah yawk tih hlang khaw amah kah dap la rhaelrham uh.
2Chronicles25:23 Jehoahaz koca Joash capa Judah manghai Amaziah te khaw Israel manghai Joash loh Bethshemesh ah a tuuk tih anih te Jerusalem la khuen. Te phoeiah Jerusalem vongtung te Ephraim vongka lamloh bangkil vongka hil dong ya li te a phae pah.
2Chronicles25:24 Te vaengah sui neh cak boeih khaw
2Chronicles25:25 Israel manghai Jehoahaz capa Joash a dueknah hnukah Judah manghai Joash capa Amaziah he kum hlai nga hing pueng.
2Chronicles25:26 Amaziah kah ol noi a kung neh a dong khaw
2Chronicles25:27 Te vaeng tue lamlong tah Amaziah te BOEIPA hnuk lamloh nong tih anih te Jerusalem ah lairhui neh a taeng uh. Te dongah Lakhish la rhaelrham tih anih hnukah Lakhish la a tueih uh tih anih te pahoi a duek sak uh.
2Chronicles25:28 Anih te marhang neh a phueih uh tih Judah khopuei kah a napa rhoek taengah a up uh.
2Chronicles26:1 Judah pilnam pum loh Uzziah te a loh uh tih anih te kum hlai rhuk a lo ca vaengah a napa Amaziah yueng la a manghai sak uh.
2Chronicles26:2 Anih loh Elath te a sak tih manghai te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh hnukah tah Judah la a mael puei.
2Chronicles26:3 Uzziah te kum hlai rhuk a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah sawmnga kum nit manghai. A manu ming tah Jerusalem lamkah Jekoliah ni.
2Chronicles26:4 A napa Amaziah loh a saii bang boeih la BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii.
2Chronicles26:5 Anih te Pathen hmuh hamla aka yakming Zekhariah tue vaengah tah Pathen aka toem la om. Te dongah BOEIPA a toem khohnin vaengah tah Pathen loh anih te a thaihtak sak.
2Chronicles26:6 Te phoeiah cet tih Philisti a vathoh thil tih Gath vongtung
2Chronicles26:7 Philisti taeng neh Arab taengah khaw anih te Pathen loh a bom. Arab rhoek te Gurbaal neh Mehunim ah kho a sak uh.
2Chronicles26:8 Ammoni loh Uzziah taengla khocang a paek uh. Anih te a so la tlung hang tih Egypt khorhi duela a ming thang.
2Chronicles26:9 Uzziah loh rhaltoengim te Jerusalem kah bangkil vongka ah khaw
2Chronicles26:10 Khosoek ah rhaltoengim a sak tih tuito khaw muep a vueh. Anih taengah boiva muep om tih kolrhawk ah khaw
2Chronicles26:11 Uzziah taengah caempuei la a khuen vaengah caemtloek aka saii tatthai khaw om. Caem kah a cawhnah hlangmi bangla cadaek Jeiel Jeuel kut neh manghai mangpa lamkah Hananiah kut hmuikah rhoiboei Maaseiah kut ah a khueh.
2Chronicles26:12 A napa rhoek kah boeilu hlangmi boeih he tatthai hlangrhalh thawng hnih ya rhuk lo.
2Chronicles26:13 Amih kut hmuiah caempuei tatthai thawng ya thum thawng rhih ya nga om tih thunkha taengah khaw manghai aka bom ham tatthai thadueng neh caemtloek la phaep uh.
2Chronicles26:14 Amih caempuei boeih ham te Uzziah loh photling
2Chronicles26:15 Rhaltoengim so neh bangkil soah aka om ham khaw
2Chronicles26:16 Tedae a thadueng hnukah a poci hil a lungbuei a sang dongah a Pathen BOEIPA taengah boe a koek. Te dongah bo-ul hmueihtuk dongah phum hamla BOEIPA bawkim ah kun.
2Chronicles26:17 Anih hnukah khosoih Azariah neh a taengkah BOEIPA khosoih tatthai ca sawmrhet bang.
2Chronicles26:18 Te vaengah manghai Uzziah te a pai thil uh tih amah taengah
2Chronicles26:19 Te dongah Uzziah loh a hmaital doela a kut dongah botui phum ham hmaibael a pom. Khosoih rhoek taengah khaw a hmai a tal li vaengah BOEIPA im khui
2Chronicles26:20 Khosoih boeilu Azariah neh khosoih boeih loh anih taengla a mael vaengah anih te a tal ah tarha pahuk coeng tih anih taengah hlawt let uh. BOEIPA loh anih te a ben dongah amah khaw khoe uh paitok coeng.
2Chronicles26:21 Te dongah manghai Uzziah te a dueknah hnin duela pahuk tih im hloeh ah kho a sak. A pahuk dongah BOEIPA im lamloh a hloeh la rhoe uh. Te vaengah a capa Jotham loh khohmuen pilnam te manghai im ah lai a tloek a pah.
2Chronicles26:22 Uzziah kah ol noi te a kung a dong khaw tonghma Amoz capa Isaiah loh a daek.
2Chronicles26:23 Uzziah te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah manghai te pahuk a ti uh tih phuel hmuen kah a napa rhoek taengah a up uh. Te phoeiah a capa Jotham te anih yueng la manghai.
2Chronicles27:1 Jotham te kum kul kum nga a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai rhuk manghai. A manu ming tah Zadok canu Jerusha ni.

2Chronicles28:1 Ahaz te a manghai vaengah kum kul lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai rhuk manghai. Tedae a napa David bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii moenih.
2Chronicles28:2 Israel manghai rhoek longpuei ah pongpa tih Baal rhoek hamla mueihlawn khaw a saii pah.
2Chronicles28:3 Anih loh kolrhawk ah a phum tih BOEIPA loh Israel ca mikhmuh lamkah a haek namtom rhoek kah a tueilaehkoi la hmai dongah a ca rhoek a pup.
2Chronicles28:4 Hmuensang ah khaw

2Chronicles28:8 A manuca khui lamkah Israel ca rhoek te a yuu khaw

2Chronicles28:10 Judah koca neh Jerusalem nang te salnu la

2Chronicles28:13 Te phoeiah amih te

2Chronicles28:15 Te vaengah ming neh a phoei hlang rhoek te thoo uh tih tamna te a talong uh. Amih pumtling boeih te khaw kutbuem lamkah neh a khuk uh tih amih a bai sak uh. Amih te a khom sak phoeiah a cah uh tih a tul uh. Amih te a yuh uh phoeiah tattloel boeih ham te laak dongah a khool uh. Amih te rhophoe khopuei Jerikho kah a manuca taengla a thak uh phoeiah Samaria la mael uh.

2Chronicles28:19 Israel manghai Ahaz kong ah ni BOEIPA loh Judah te a kunyun sak. Anih loh Judah ah a hlahpham dongah ni BOEIPA taengah boekoeknah la boe a koek uh.

2Chronicles28:26 Anih kah ol noi neh a longpuei boeih te a kung a dong khaw
