2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiah he kum kul kum nga a lo ca vaengah manghai tih Jerusalem ah kum kul kum ko manghai. A manu ming tah Zekhariah canu Abijah ni.
2Chronicles29:2 A napa David kah a saii bang boeih la BOEIPA mik ah a thuem ni a saii.
2Chronicles29:3 A manghai cuek kum dongkah a hla lamhma cuek vaengah BOEIPA im kah thohkhaih te a ong tih a tlaih.
2Chronicles29:4 Khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek te a khuen tih amih te khocuk toltung ah a kuk.
2Chronicles29:5 Te phoeiah amih te
2Chronicles29:6 A pa rhoek loh boe a koek uh tih mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae a saii uh dongah amah te a hnawt uh. A maelhmai te BOEIPA kah dungtlungim lamloh mangthong uh tih a rhawn a maelh uh.
2Chronicles29:7 Ngalha kah thohkhaih khaw a khaih uh tih hmaithoi te a thih uh. Bo-ul khaw phum uh pawt tih hmueihhlutnah te Israel Pathen kah hmuencim ah nawn uh pawh.
2Chronicles29:8 Te dongah BOEIPA kah thinhulnah loh Judah neh Jerusalem te a tlak thil tih amih te tonganah la
2Chronicles29:9 Te dongah a pa rhoek khaw cunghang dongah cungku uh coeng ke. He kongah ni mamih capa
2Chronicles29:10 Kai thinko khuiah Israel Pathen BOEIPA neh paipi saii ham om coeng. Te daengah ni a thintoek thinsa khaw mamih taeng lamloh a mael eh.
2Chronicles29:11 Ka ca rhoek khaw vawk vapsa uh boeh. Nangmih te BOEIPA loh amah mikhmuh ah aka pai ham
2Chronicles29:12 Te dongah Levi lamkah aka thoo rhoek tah
2Chronicles29:13 Elizaphan koca lamloh Shimri
2Chronicles29:14 Heman koca lamloh Jehiel neh Shimei
2Chronicles29:15 A pacaboeina te a coi tih a ciim uh phoeiah tah manghai olpaek bangla BOEIPA im caihcil ham BOEIPA ol dongah pongpa uh.
2Chronicles29:16 Khosoih rhoek khaw BOEIPA im te caihcil hamla a khui la kun uh. BOEIPA bawkim ah a tihnai a hmuh boeih te BOEIPA im kah vongup la a sat uh. Te phoeiah Levi rhoek loh a doe uh tih Kidron soklong kah a voel la a thak uh.
2Chronicles29:17 Im ciim ham te a hla khat dongah lamhma la a tong uh tih te hla kah a hnin rhet dongah tah BOEIPA kah ngalha taengla pawk uh. A hnin rhet dongah BOEIPA im te a ciim uh tih lamhmacuek hla kah hnin hlai rhuk dongah a khah uh.
2Chronicles29:18 Te phoeiah manghai Hezekiah taengah a khui la kun uh tih
2Chronicles29:19 Manghai Ahaz loh a ram ah boekoeknah la a hlahpham hnopai boeih te khaw ka soepsoei uh tih BOEIPA kah hmueihtuk hmai ah ka ciim uh coeng ke
2Chronicles29:20 Te vaengah manghai Hezekiah te thoo tih khopuei mangpa rhoek te a coi phoeiah BOEIPA im la cet.
2Chronicles29:21 Te phoeiah vaito pumrhih
2Chronicles29:22 Te dongah saelhung a ngawn uh phoeiah tah a thii te khosoih rhoek loh a duen uh tih hmueihtuk dongah a haeh uh. Tutal khaw a ngawn uh tih a thii te hmueihtuk dongah a haeh uh bal. Tuca khaw a ngawn uh tih a thii te hmueihtuk dongah a haeh uh.
2Chronicles29:23 Boirhaem maae te tah manghai neh hlangping mikhmuh la a mop uh tih a soah a kut a tloeng uh.
2Chronicles29:24 Hmueihhlutnah neh boirhaem he manghai loh Israel boeih ham a thui coeng. Te dongah khosoih a ngawn uh van nen tah Israel pum kah te dawth pah hamla a thii te hmueihtuk dongah a khueh uh.
2Chronicles29:25 BOEIPA im kah Levi rhoek tah David neh manghai kah khohmu Gad
2Chronicles29:26 Te dongah Levi rhoek te David kah a tumbael neh
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekiah loh hmueihtuk dongah hmueihhlutnah nawn ham a thui tih hmueihhlutnah tue a tong. Te vaengah BOEIPA laa neh olueng te a kut dongkah Israel manghai David tumbael neh a tong.
2Chronicles29:28 Hlangping boeih loh a bakop van neh laa te a sak tih olueng aka ueng long khaw hmueihhlutnah boeih a coeng hil a ueng.
2Chronicles29:29 A nawn bawt ah manghai neh a taengkah a hmuh boeih loh cungkueng uh tih a bawk uh.
2Chronicles29:30 David neh khohmu Asaph kah olka bangla BOEIPA thangthen hamla manghai Hezekiah neh mangpa rhoek loh Levi rhoek te a uen. Te dongah kohoenah neh a thangthen uh phoeiah buluk tih a bawk uh.
2Chronicles29:31 Te phoeiah Hezekiah loh a doo tih
2Chronicles29:32 A pum la hlangping loh hmueihhlutnah a khuen te vaito sawmrhih
2Chronicles29:33 Hnocim la saelhung ya rhuk
2Chronicles29:34 Tedae khosoih rhoek tah a sii la om uh tih hmueihhlutnah boeih te hlaih hamla noeng uh pawh. Te dongah amih te a manuca Levi rhoek loh bitat a coeng hil neh khosoih a ciim hil a duel uh. Levi rhoek tah khosoih rhoek lakah a ciim ham thinko thuem uh.
2Chronicles29:35 Hmueihhlutnah khaw a cungkuem la rhoepnah maehtha neh
2Chronicles29:36 Pathen loh pilnam ham a soepsoei tih ol te thaeng a thoeng coeng dongah Hezekiah neh pilnam boeih loh a kohoe.
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiah loh Israel pum neh Judah a tah tih Ephraim neh Manasseh ham khaw Jerusalem kah BOEIPA im la a mop ham neh
2Chronicles30:2 A hla bae dongah tah Yoom saii hamla manghai khaw
2Chronicles30:3 Tedae Yoom te te vaeng tue ah saii hamla noeng uh pawh. Khosoih rhoek khaw a rhoeh hil ciim uh hlan tih pilnam khaw Jerusalem ah tingtun hlan.
2Chronicles30:4 Te vaengah ol he manghai mikhmuh ah khaw
2Chronicles30:5 A daek bangla a saii uh dae a cungkuem uh pawt dongah
2Chronicles30:6 Manghai neh a mangpa rhoek kut dongkah ca aka yong puei rhoek tah Judah neh Israel pum ah cet uh tih manghai olpaek bangla
2Chronicles30:7 A napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA taengah boe aka koek na pa rhoek neh na manuca rhoek bangla om uh boeh. Te dongah amih te na hmuh uh bangla imsuep la a khueh.
2Chronicles30:8 Tahae atah na pa rhoek bangla na rhawn te mangkhak sak uh boeh. BOEIPA taengah kut duen uh laeh. Kumhal hamla a ciim tangtae a rhokso kungla ha mop uh lamtah na Pathen BOEIPA taengah thothueng uh. Te daengah ni a thintoek thinsa te nangmih taeng lamloh a mael eh.
2Chronicles30:9 BOEIPA taengla na mael uh mak atah na manuca rhoek neh na ca rhoek khaw
2Chronicles30:10 Te phoeiah ca thak la aka om rhoek te khopuei lamloh khopuei khat hil
2Chronicles30:11 Te cakhaw Asher lamkah
2Chronicles30:12 BOEIPA ol dongah manghai neh mangpa rhoek olpaek te vai sak ham
2Chronicles30:13 A hla bae dongah tah vaidamding khotue te saii hamla pilnam loh Jerusalem ah muep tingtun uh tih hlangping khaw muep cungkuem uh.
2Chronicles30:14 Te dongah thoo uh tih Jerusalem kah hmueihtuk te a khoe uh. Hlupnah hnopai boeih te khaw a khoe uh tih Kidron soklong la a voeih uh.
2Chronicles30:15 A hla bae dongkah hnin hlai li vaengah tah Yoom te a ngawn uh. Te vaengah khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek tah a hmaithae uh. Te dongah a ciim uh phoeiah hmueihhlutnah te BOEIPA im la a khuen uh.
2Chronicles30:16 Pathen kah hlang Moses olkhueng dongkah a laitloeknah bangla amamih paihmuen ah pai uh. Khosoih rhoek loh Levi kut lamkah thii te a haeh uh.
2Chronicles30:17 Hlangping lakli ah aka ciim uh pawt khaw muep om. Te dongah aka cim pawt boeih kah Yoom ngawnnah ham neh BOEIPA taengah ciim ham te Levi rhoek loh a hut nah.
2Chronicles30:18 A puehkan la pilnam aka ping Ephraim
2Chronicles30:19 Hmuencim kah ciimnah bangla om pawt cakhaw a napa rhoek kah Pathen
2Chronicles30:20 BOEIPA loh Hezekiah taengkah te a yaak van neh pilnam te a hoeih sak.
2Chronicles30:21 Jerusalem ah aka mop Israel ca rhoek loh hnin rhih khuiah vaidamding khotue te a saii uh. Hnin bal hnin bal BOEIPA taengah kohoenah a len neh a thangthen uh. Khosoih neh Levi rhoek loh BOEIPA te a sarhi tumbael neh a thangthen uh.
2Chronicles30:22 BOEIPA kah lungmingnah then neh aka cangbam Levi pum kah lungbuei ah Hezekiah loh a thui pah. Te dongah hnin rhih tingtunnah khuiah tah rhoepnah hmueih la a nawn te a caak uh tih a napa rhoek Pathen BOEIPA te a uem uh.
2Chronicles30:23 Te phoeiah hnin rhih koep saii ham te hlangping boeih loh a thui dongah kohoenah neh hnin rhih a saii uh.
2Chronicles30:24 Judah manghai Hezekiah loh hlangping ham vaito thawng khat
2Chronicles30:25 Te vaengah Judah hlangping boeih khaw
2Chronicles30:26 Te dongah Jerusalem ah kohoenah a len om coeng. Israel manghai David capa Solomon tue lamloh he bang he Jerusalem ah a om noek moenih.
2Chronicles30:27 Levi khosoih rhoek te pai uh tih pilnam yoethen a paek uh. Amih kah thangthuinah loh a hmuencim kah khuirhung vaan duela a pha dongah amih ol te a hnatun pah.
2Chronicles31:1 A cungkuem te a coeng uh vaengah aka pumphoe Israel boeih te Judah khopuei la cet uh tih kaam te a phaek uh. Asherah te a top uh tih Judah pum ah hmuensang neh hmueihtuk te a palet uh. Te phoeiah Benjamin
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiah loh khosoih rhoek neh Levi kah boelhnah te a khueh. Amih kah boelnah bangla hlang te amah kah thothuengnah tarhing ah khosoih la
2Chronicles31:3 BOEIPA olkhueng khuikah a daek bangla manghai loh a khuehtawn te hmueihhlutnah ham khaw
2Chronicles31:4 Khosoih neh Levi kah buham a paek tih BOEIPA olkhueng dongah thaa a huel uh ham te pilnam taeng neh Jerusalem khosa rhoek taengah a thui pah.
2Chronicles31:5 Ol te a haeh coeng dongah Israel ca rhoek loh cangpai thaihcuek
2Chronicles31:6 Judah khopuei rhoek ah kho aka sa Amih Israel ca neh Judah rhoek long khaw saelhung boiva parha pakhat neh a Pathen BOEIPA taengah a ciim hnocim parha pakhat khaw a khuen uh tih a som som la a paek uh.
2Chronicles31:7 A hla thum dongah a hlom la a hmoek uh te a tong uh tih a hla rhih dongah a coeng uh.
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiah neh mangpa rhoek a pawk uh tih a hlom te a hmuh vaengah BOEIPA neh a pilnam Israel te a uem uh.
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekiah loh Khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek taengah a hlom kawng te a dawt.
2Chronicles31:10 Te dongah anih te Zadok imkhui lamkah khosoih boeilu Azariah loh a doo tih
2Chronicles31:11 Te dongah Hezekiah loh BOEIPA im khuikah imkhan te rhoekbah hamla a uen tih a rhoekbah uh.
2Chronicles31:12 Te phoeiah khosaa neh parha pakhat khaw
2Chronicles31:13 Te vaengah Jehiel neh Azaziah
2Chronicles31:14 Khocuk kah thoh tawt
2Chronicles31:15 Anih kut hmuikah Eden neh Miniamin
2Chronicles31:16 Amih te tongpa ca kum thum neh a so hang khaw
2Chronicles31:17 Khosoih rhoek khaw a napa imko neh
2Chronicles31:18 Amih hlangping boeih kah camoe boeih khaw
2Chronicles31:19 Khosoih Aaron koca rhoek ham khaw amamih kah khopuei
2Chronicles31:20 Hezekiah loh Judah pum ah he bang a saii he vaengah a Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah uepomnah neh a thuem neh a then ni a saii.
2Chronicles31:21 Bitat boeih dongah khaw Pathen im kah thothuengnah neh a tong tih olkhueng ham neh olpaek ham khaw a Pathen te a thinko boeih neh toem dongah a saii vaengah thaihtak van.
2Chronicles32:1 He oltak olka hnukah tah Assyria manghai Sennacherib ta cet tih Judah la pawk. Te vaengah khopuei vong cak rhoek te a rhaeh thil tih amah hut la ka muk eh a ti.
2Chronicles32:2 A mikhmuh ah caemtloek ham Jerusalem la Sennacherib a pawk te Hezekiah loh a hmuh.
2Chronicles32:3 Te dongah a mangpa rhoek neh a hlangrhalh rhoek taengah khopuei rhamvoel kah tuiphuet tui te mak hamla a uen tih a bom uh.
2Chronicles32:4 Te dongah pilnam te muep tingtun tih tuisih boeih neh khohmuen khui la aka long soklong khaw a mak uh. Te vaengah
2Chronicles32:5 Te phoeiah thaa a huel uh tih vongtung aka puut boeih te a biing uh. Rhaltoengim so neh a tloe vongtung rhamvoel hil a hil tih David khopuei kah vaikhap te a moem. Pumcumnah neh photling khaw a cungkuem la a saii.
2Chronicles32:6 Pilnam soah caemtloek mangpa rhoek a khueh tih amih te khopuei vongka toltung ah amah taengla a coi. Te vaengah amih thinko ah a thui pah tih
2Chronicles32:7 Thaahuel uh lamtah namning uh
2Chronicles32:8 Anih taengah pumsa kah bantha ni a om. Mamih taengah tah mamih kah Pathen BOEIPA he mamih aka bom ham neh mamih kah caemtloeknah te aka vathoh puei la om coeng
2Chronicles32:9 A hnukah tah Assyria manghai Sennacherib loh a sal rhoek te Jerusalem la a tueih. Te vaengah anih te amah taengkah a khohung boeih neh Lakhish imdan ah Judah manghai Hezekiah neh Jerusalem kah Judah boeih te a pai thil.
2Chronicles32:10 Te vaengah
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiah loh nangmih te m'vueh moenih a? Khokha neh tuihalh ah duek sak hamla nangmih m'voeih tih
2Chronicles32:12 A hmuensang neh a hmueihtuk aka khoe khaw Hezekiah amah moenih a? Te vaengah Judah taeng neh Jerusalem taengah a uen tih
2Chronicles32:13 Kai neh a pa loh khohmuen pilnam boeih taengah ka saii te na ming pawt nim? Khohmuen namtom pathen rhoek loh
2Chronicles32:14 Kai napa rhoek loh a thup namtom pathen rhoek boeih soah unim aka om? A pilnam te ka kut lamloh huul hamla unim aka coeng thai eh? Kai kut lamloh nangmih huul hamla nangmih kah Pathen te coeng thai aya?
2Chronicles32:15 Tahae ah nangmih te Hezekiah loh n'rhaithi boel saeh lamtah he tlam he nangmih te m'vuet boel saeh. Anih te tangnah uh boeh. Namtom neh ram boeih pathen boeih long pataeng ka kut lamkah neh a pa rhoek kut lamloh a pilnam a huul ham a noeng moenih. Nangmih kah pathen loh nangmih te ka kut lamloh n'huul mahpawh
2Chronicles32:16 A sal rhoek khaw Pathen BOEIPA taeng neh BOEIPA kah sal Hezekiah taengah cal uh pueng.
2Chronicles32:17 Israel Pathen BOEIPA te veet hamla cabu a daek uh tih a taengah cal uh. Diklai namtom kah pathen rhoek loh ka kut lamkah a pilnam a huul pawt bangla
2Chronicles32:18 Amih hih ham neh amih te let ham
2Chronicles32:19 Jerusalem kah Pathen te hlang kut dongkah bisai
2Chronicles32:20 He kongah manghai Hezekiah neh tonghma Amoz capa Isaiah tah thangthui tih vaan a khue rhoi.
2Chronicles32:21 Te dongah BOEIPA loh puencawn a tueih tih Assyria manghai rhaehhmuen kah tatthai hlangrhalh boeih neh mangpa rhaengsang rhoek te a thup pah. Te dongah amah khohmuen la maelhmai yahpohnah neh mael tih amah pathen im la pawk. Te vaengah a cakhueh neh a ko khui lamkah a cakhueh loh anih te cunghang dongah hnap cungku uh.
2Chronicles32:22 BOEIPA loh Hezekiah neh Jerusalem khosa rhoek te Assyria manghai Sennacherib kut lamkah khaw
2Chronicles32:23 Te dongah BOEIPA ham khocang neh Judah manghai Hezekiah ham kawnthen khaw Jerusalem la muep a pawk pah. Te dongah a hnuk lamloh namtom cungkuem kah mikhmuh ah a phueih.
2Chronicles32:24 Te vaeng tue ah Hezekiah te a duek ham duela tlo. Te dongah BOEIPA taengah a thangthui hatah anih te a doo tih a taengah kopoekrhai pakhat a paek.
2Chronicles32:25 Tedae a sokah a tiing la Hezekiah loh a thuung pawt dongah a lungbuei a sang sak. Te dongah anih so neh Judah
2Chronicles32:26 Te phoeiah tah a lungbuei a sang khui lamloh Hezekiah amah neh Jerusalem khosa rhoek khaw kunyun tih Hezekiah tue vaengah tah BOEIPA kah thinhulnah loh amih thoeng thil pawh.
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiah taengah khuehtawn khaw om tih thangpomnah neh muep rhoeng. Te dongah amah loh cak ham neh sui ham khaw
2Chronicles32:28 Canghum cangpai
2Chronicles32:29 Pathen loh anih te khuehtawn muep a paek khungdaeng dongah amah ham khopuei a saii tih saelrhoi boiva neh saelhung khaw a cungkuem la det.
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiah amah loh Gihon tui hnun te a soah a ueng tih David khopuei kah khotlak hil a dang la a hlawn. Hezekiah tah a cungkuem dongah a bibi khaw a thaihtak pah.
2Chronicles32:31 Tedae khohmuen ah aka thoeng kopoekrhai kawng dawt ham te Babylon mangpa rhoek loh a taengla hmuiyoi a tueih vaengah tah anih te noemcai ham neh
2Chronicles32:32 Hezekiah kah ol noi neh a sitlohnah te tonghma Amoz capa Isaiah kah mangthui khuiah khaw
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiah te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah tah anih te David koca rhoek kah phuel tangkham ah a up uh. A dueknah hnin ah anih te Judah pum neh Jerusalem khosa rhoek loh thangpomnah a saii uh. Te phoeiah tah a capa Manasseh te anih yueng la manghai.
2Chronicles33:1 Manasseh te a manghai vaengah kum hlai nit lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah sawmnga neh kum nga manghai.
2Chronicles33:2 BOEIPA loh Israel ca mikhmuh lamkah a haek tangtae namtom kah tueilaehkoi bangla BOEIPA mik ah boethae a saii.
2Chronicles33:3 Mael tih a napa Hezekiah loh a palet tangtae hmuensang te a thoh. Baal hamla hmueihtuk a suem tih Asherah a saii. Vaan caempuei boeih taengah bakop tih te rhoek taengah tho a thueng.
2Chronicles33:4 BOEIPA loh
2Chronicles33:5 BOEIPA im vongup rhoi ah vaan caempuei cungkuem ham hmueihtuk a suem.
2Chronicles33:6 Anih loh a ca rhoek te kolrhawk kah hmai khuila a kat sak. Kutyaek a sawt
2Chronicles33:7 Mueimae mueithuk a saii te Pathen im ah a khueh. Te te Pathen loh David taeng neh a capa Solomon taengah khaw
2Chronicles33:8 Tedae Israel kah kho te na pa rhoek taeng ka thoh khohmuen dong lamloh nong sak ham ka khoep mahpawh. Moses kut lamloh amih ka uen bangla olkhueng neh oltlueh neh laitloeknah boeih te a cungkuem la vai ham a ngaithuen mak atah
2Chronicles33:9 Tedae Manasseh loh namtom rhoek lakah boethae saii ham Judah neh Jerusalem khosa rhoek te kho a hmang sak. Te rhoek te BOEIPA loh Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh lamkah a mitmoeng coeng dae ta.
2Chronicles33:10 BOEIPA loh Manasseh taeng neh a pilnam taengah a thui dae hnatung uh pawh.
2Chronicles33:11 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Assyria manghai kah caempuei mangpa rhoek te amih taengla a thak. Manasseh te mutlo hling neh a tuuk uh tih rhohum neh a khih uh phoeiah Babylon la a khuen uh.
2Chronicles33:12 A taengah puen a cak vaengah tah a Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah nue coeng tih a napa rhoek kah Pathen mikhmuh ah muep kunyun.
2Chronicles33:13 Tedae a taengla a thangthui vaengah tah anih te a rhoi tih a lungmacil te a hnatun pah. Te dongah amah khaw a ram te Jerusalem la mael. Te vaengah Manasseh loh YAHWEH amah he Pathen ni tila a ming.
2Chronicles33:14 A hnukah tah David khopuei rhamvoel kah vongtung te khotlak kah Gihon soklong ah a sak tih nga vongka a pha. Ophel te a tuung tih muep a sang sak. Judah kah vong cak khopuei boeih ah tatthai mangpa rhoek a khueh.
2Chronicles33:15 Kholong pathen rhoek neh a mueimae te khaw BOEIPA im lamloh a khoe tih
2Chronicles33:16 BOEIPA kah hmueihtuk te cikngae la sak bal tih a soah rhoepnah neh uemonah hmueih te a nawn. Judah taengah khaw Israel Pathen BOEIPA taengah thothueng hamla a thui pah.
2Chronicles33:17 Tedae pilnam te hmuensang ah a nawn pueng tih a Pathen BOEIPA te khaw a bawk uh.
2Chronicles33:18 Manasseh kah ol noi khaw
2Chronicles33:19 A thangthuinah neh a thangthui khaw
2Chronicles33:20 Manasseh te a napa rhoek taengla a khoem uh vaengah anih te amah im ah a up uh. Te phoeiah tah a capa Amon te anih yueng la manghai.
2Chronicles33:21 Amon a manghai vaengah kum kul kum nit lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah kum nit manghai.
2Chronicles33:22 A napa Manasseh kah a saii bangla BOEIPA mik ah boethae a saii. A napa Manasseh kah a saii mueidaep cungkuem taengah Amon loh a nawn tih tho a thueng.
2Chronicles33:23 A napa Manasseh kah a kunyun bangla BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a kunyun moenih. Amon amah lat loh dumlai a pung sak.
2Chronicles33:24 Te vaengah anih te a sal rhoek loh a taeng uh tih amah im ah a duek sak uh.
2Chronicles33:25 Te dongah manghai Amon aka taeng boeih te khohmuen pilnam loh a ngawn. Te phoeiah tah khohmuen pilnam loh a capa Josiah te anih yueng la a manghai sak.
2Chronicles34:1 Josiah a manghai vaengah kum rhet lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah kum sawmthum kum khat manghai.
2Chronicles34:2 Tedae BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a thuem a saii phoeiah a napa David kah longpuei ah a pongpa dongah banvoei bantang la phael pawh.
2Chronicles34:3 A manghai hang vaengah kum rhet lo tih amah camoe pueng dae a napa David kah Pathen te toem hamla a tong. Kum hlai nit vaengah Judah neh Jerusalem te caihcil hamla a tong tih hmuensang neh Asherah
2Chronicles34:4 Baal rhoek kah hmueihtuk te anih mikhmuh ah a palet uh tih a so hang kah bunglawn neh Asherah te khaw a top. Mueidaep neh mueihlawn te a dae tih a tip sak. Te phoeiah tah te rhoek taengkah aka nawn rhoek kah phuel hman ah a haeh.
2Chronicles34:5 Khosoih rhoek kah a rhuh te khaw amah hmueihtuk
2Chronicles34:6 Manasseh khopuei rhoek neh Ephraim ah khaw
2Chronicles34:7 Hmueihtuk te a palet uh tih Asherah neh mueidaep te khaw a tip la a phop. Israel khohmuen tom kah bunglawn boeih te a top phoeiah Jerusalem la mael.
2Chronicles34:8 A manghai te kum hlai rhet vaengah tah khohmuen neh im caihcil hamla Azaliah capa Shaphan a tueih. A Pathen BOEIPA im aka duel ham te khocil aka khoem Jehoahaz capa Joah neh khopuei mangpa Maaseiah te a khueh.
2Chronicles34:9 Te phoeiah khosoih puei Hilkiah taengla cet uh tih Pathen im la aka pawk uh tangka te a paek uh. Te te cingkhaa aka tawt Levi rhoek loh Manasseh
2Chronicles34:10 Te phoeiah tah BOEIPA im kah bitat saii a khueh kut ah a paek uh. Te te bitat aka saii khaw
2Chronicles34:11 Kutthai taeng neh im aka sa taengah khaw
2Chronicles34:12 Hlang rhoek long khaw bitat dongah uepomnah neh a saii uh. Amih soah te Merari koca lamkah Levi Jahath neh Obadiah
2Chronicles34:13 Hnophuei soah khaw
2Chronicles34:14 BOEIPA im la aka pawk tangka te a loh uh vaengah khosoih Hilkiah loh Moses kut dong lamkah BOEIPA olkhueng cabu te a hmuh.
2Chronicles34:15 Hilkiah loh cadaek Shaphan te a voek tih
2Chronicles34:16 Shaphan loh cabu te manghai taengla a khuen. Manghai te ol koep a mael tih
2Chronicles34:17 BOEIPA im ah a hmuh tangka te a khok uh coeng. Te te aka soep kut dong neh bitat aka saii kut ah a paek uh
2Chronicles34:18 Te phoeiah cadaek Shaphan te manghai taengla puen tih
2Chronicles34:19 Tedae manghai loh olkhueng ol te a yaak vaengah a himbai te a phen.
2Chronicles34:20 Te dongah manghai loh Hilkiah neh Shaphan capa Ahikam
2Chronicles34:21 Amih te
2Chronicles34:22 Te phoeiah Hilkiah neh manghai taengkah rhoek te Himbai aka khoem Hasrah koca Tikvah capa Shallum yuu
2Chronicles34:23 Te vaengah amih te
2Chronicles34:24 BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Kai loh he hmuen so neh a khuikah khosa rhoek soah Judah manghai mikhmuh ah a tae bangla cabu khuikah a daek thaephoeinah cungkuem neh yoethaenah ka thoeng sak coeng.
2Chronicles34:25 Kai n'hnawt uh tih a phum khaw a kut dongkah khoboe cungkuem neh kai veet hamla pathen tloe rhoek taengah a phum uh. Te dongah ka kosi loh he hmuen he a bo thil vetih daeh mahpawh.
2Chronicles34:26 BOEIPA toem hamla nangmih aka tueih Judah manghai te khaw amah taengah he he thui pah. Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Tekah ol te na yaak coeng.
2Chronicles34:27 Na thinko phoena tih Pathen mikhmuh ah na kunyun coeng. Amah ol te he hmuen ham neh amah khosa rhoek ham na yaak. Te vaengah ka mikhmuh ah khaw na kunyun. Na himbai te na phen tih ka mikhmuh ah na rhah vaengah khaw ka yaak. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
2Chronicles34:28 Kai loh nang te na pa rhoek taengla kang khoem sak vetih namah phuel ah ngaimong la n'up uh bitni ne. He hmuen so neh amah khosa rhoek soah yoethae cungkuem ka khuen te na mik loh hmu mahpawh
2Chronicles34:29 Te phoeiah manghai loh Judah neh Jerusalem kah a hamca boeih te a tah tih a coi.
2Chronicles34:30 Manghai neh Judah hlang boeih khaw
2Chronicles34:31 Manghai te amah paihmuen ah pai tih BOEIPA hnukah pongpa ham neh a olpaek neh a olphong khaw
2Chronicles34:32 Jerusalem neh Benjamin kah a hmuh boeih taengah khaw a cak sak. Te dongah Jerusalem kah khosa rhoek long khaw a napa rhoek kah Pathen taengah Pathen kah paipi bangla a saii uh.
2Chronicles34:33 Josiah loh tueilaehkoi boeih te tah Israel ca rhoek kah khohmuen tom lamloh a khoe. Israel kah aka phoe boeih te khaw amamih kah Pathen BOEIPA taengah thothueng sak ham tho a thueng. Anih tue khuiah tah a napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA hnuk lamloh nong uh pawh.
2Chronicles35:1 Josiah loh Jerusalem ah BOEIPA kah Yoom te a saii tih hla khat hnin hlai li vaengah Yoom te a ngawn uh.
2Chronicles35:2 Khosoih rhoek khaw amamih kah hutnah dongah a khueh tih BOEIPA im kah thothuengnah dongah amih te a duel.
2Chronicles35:3 BOEIPA ham aka cim Israel pum taengah aka yakming tih aka sim Levi rhoek taengah
2Chronicles35:4 Israel manghai David kah ca neh a capa Solomon ca bangla na pa rhoek imkhui ah namamih kah boelnah neh soepsoei uh lamtah sikim uh laeh.
2Chronicles35:5 Pilnam paca rhoek te na manuca kah a napa imkhui te khaw
2Chronicles35:6 Yoom te ngawn uh lamtah ciim uh laeh. Na manuca ham khaw Moses kut dongkah BOEIPA ol bangla vai sak ham sikim uh laeh
2Chronicles35:7 Josiah loh pilnam paca ham boiva la tu neh maae ca boeih a tawn tih Yoom kah aka mop boeih ham a pum la thawng sawmthum neh saelhung thawng thum lo. He rhoek he manghai kah khuehtawn lamkah ni.
2Chronicles35:8 A mangpa rhoek long khaw pilnam ham
2Chronicles35:9 Kohnaniah neh Kohnaniah phoeikah a mana rhoi Shemaiah neh Nethanel long khaw
2Chronicles35:10 Thothuengnah a sikim phoeiah tah khosoih rhoek khaw amah paihmuen ah
2Chronicles35:11 Yoom te a ngawn uh tih khosoih rhoek loh a kut neh a haeh uh phoeiah tah Levi rhoek loh a hlaih uh.
2Chronicles35:12 Moses cabu khuikah a daek bangla pilnam paca kah a napa imkhui pacaphung taengah a paek ham khaw
2Chronicles35:13 Khosing bangla Yoom te hmai neh a hmin sak uh. Buhcim te am dongah a thong uh tih voh dongah khaw
2Chronicles35:14 A hnukah tah amamih ham neh khosoih rhoek ham khaw a soepsoei uh. Aaron koca khosoih rhoek long hmueihhlutnah neh maehtha te kholaeh hil a nawn uh. Te dongah ni Levi rhoek loh amamih ham neh Aaron koca khosoih rhoek ham khaw a soepsoei pa uh.
2Chronicles35:15 Asaph koca rhoek long tah David neh Asaph
2Chronicles35:16 Te khohnin ah BOEIPA kah thothuengnah cungkuem loh sikim tangloeng coeng. Manghai Josiah kah olpaek bangla Yoom saii ham neh BOEIPA kah hmueihtuk dongah hmueihhlutnah nawn hamla om coeng.
2Chronicles35:17 Te vaeng tue kah Yoom ah aka mop Israel ca rhoek loh vaidamding khotue te khaw hnin rhih khuiah a bul uh.
2Chronicles35:18 Tonghma Samuel tue lamloh Israel khuiah te tlam te Yoom ana saii moenih. Israel manghai boeih long pataeng Josiah neh khosoih rhoek
2Chronicles35:19 Josiah kah ram kum hlai rhet vaengah Yoom he a saii.
2Chronicles35:20 Josiah loh im te boeih a cikngae sak hnukah tah Egypt manghai Neko Perath kah Karkhemish ah vathoh hamla pawk. Te dongah Josiah khaw anih mah hamla cet.
2Chronicles35:21 Tedae a taengla puencawn a tueih pah tih
2Chronicles35:22 Tedae Josiah tah anih taeng lamloh a maelhmai hooi pawh. Anih taengah vathoh ham te sa uh. Pathen ka lamkah Neko ol te hnatun pawt tih Megiddo kolbawn ah vathoh hamla cet.
2Chronicles35:23 Tedae aka nuen rhoek loh manghai Josiah te a kah uh. Te dongah manghai loh a sal rhoek taengah
2Chronicles35:24 Te dongah anih te a sal rhoek loh leng dong lamkah a hal uh tih a hmatoeng kah leng dongah a tloeng uh. Te phoeiah anih te Jerusalem la a khuen uh dae duek tih a napa rhoek kah phuel ah a up uh. Te vaengah Judah pum neh Jerusalem loh Josiah hamla nguekcoi uh.
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremiah khaw Josiah ham rhaengsae tih tihnin duela laa sa nu
2Chronicles35:26 Josiah kah ol noi neh BOEIPA olkhueng dongah a daek bangla a sitlohnah khaw
2Chronicles35:27 a olka a kung neh a dong khaw Israel neh Judah manghai rhoek cabu dongah a daek coeng ke.
2Chronicles36:1 Khohmuen pilnam loh Josiah capa Jehoahaz te a loh uh tih anih te a napa yueng la Jerusalem ah a manghai sak uh.
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahaz a manghai vaengah kum kul kum thum lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah hla thum manghai.
2Chronicles36:3 Tedae anih te Egypt manghai loh Jerusalem ah a khoe tih khohmuen te cak talent yakhat
2Chronicles36:4 Egypt manghai loh Jehoahaz mana Eliakim te Judah neh Jerusalem ah a manghai sak tih a ming te Jehoiakim la tho pah. Tedae a maya Jehoahaz te tah Neko loh a loh tih Egypt la a khuen.
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakim te a manghai vaengah kum kul neh kum nga lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai khat manghai. Tedae a Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae ni a saii.
2Chronicles36:6 Anih te Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh a muk tih anih te Babylon la khuen ham rhohum neh a khih.
2Chronicles36:7 BOEIPA im kah hnopai te khaw Nebukhanezar loh Babylon la a khuen. Te te Babylon kah amah bawkim ah a khueh.
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoiakim ol kah noi neh amah kah tueilaehkoi a saii te khaw
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakhin a manghai vaengah kum rhet lo ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah hla thum neh hnin rha manghai. Tedae BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae ni a saii.
2Chronicles36:10 Kum a thok vaengah tah manghai Nebukhanezar loh hlang a tueih tih anih te BOEIPA im kah sahnaih hnopai neh Babylon la a khuen. Te phoeiah a manuca Zedekiah te Judah neh Jerusalem ah a manghai sak.
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah a manghai vaengah kum kul neh kum khat loh ca pueng tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai khat manghai.
2Chronicles36:12 Tedae a Pathen BOEIPA mikhmuh ah boethae ni a saii. BOEIPA olka dongkah tonghma Jeremiah mikhmuh ah khaw a kunyun moenih.
2Chronicles36:13 Manghai Nebukhanezar te khaw a tloelh tih anih te Pathen neh a toemngam thil. A rhawn te a siing tih Israel Pathen BOEIPA taengla mael ham khaw a thin te thah.
2Chronicles36:14 Khosoih rhoek neh pilnam mangpa boeih khaw boekoek la ping uh. Namtom rhoek kah tueilaehkoi bang boeih la boekoeknah neh boe a koek uh tih Jerusalem ah a ciim BOEIPA im te a poeih uh.
2Chronicles36:15 A pilnam so neh a khuirhung soah khaw lungma a ti dongah thoh ham neh tueih hamla a napa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA loh amih taengla a puencawn rhoek kut neh a tueih.
2Chronicles36:16 Tedae Pathen kah puencawn rhoek taengah pahoeh palaeh la om uh. Te dongah a ol te a sawtsit uh tih a tonghma rhoek te a phok uh. A pilnam taengah hoeihnah a om pawt hil BOEIPA kah kosi a paan uh aih.
2Chronicles36:17 Te dongah amih taengla Khalden kah Khalden manghai te a thak pah tih a tongpang rhoek te amamih kah rhokso im ah cunghang neh a ngawn pah. Tongpang neh oila khaw
2Chronicles36:18 Pathen im kah hnopai boeih a yit a len khaw
2Chronicles36:19 Pathen im te a hoeh uh tih Jerusalem vongtung te a palet uh. A impuei boeih te hmai neh a hoeh uh tih a ngailaemnah hnopai boeih te khaw a phae uh.
2Chronicles36:20 cunghang lamkah aka a meet rhoek te Babylon la a poelyoe tih amah taeng neh a ca rhoek taengah Persia ram a manghai hil sal la om uh.
2Chronicles36:21 Jeremiah ka dongkah BOEIPA ol te cup ham dongah khohmuen loh a Sabbath a ngaingaih hil a pong khohnin te kum sawmrhih boeih a cup duela kangkuen.
2Chronicles36:22 Persia manghai Cyrus kah kum khat vaengah tah Jeremiah ka dongkah BOEIPA ol te a cup sak ham BOEIPA loh Persia manghai Cyrus kah mueihla te a haeng pah. Te dongah a ram pum ah ol a thak tih cadaek nen khaw
2Chronicles36:23 “Persia manghai Cyrus loh he ni a thui. Diklai ram tom he vaan kah Pathen BOEIPA loh kai taengah m'paek coeng. Amah loh kai he Judah kah Jerusalem ah a im sa la m'hmoel coeng. Nangmih khuikah long te khaw a pilnam cungkuem taeng lamloh a taengkah a Pathen BOEIPA neh pongpa saeh
Ezra1:1 Persia manghai Cyrus kah kum khat vaengah tah Jeremiah ka dongkah BOEIPA ol te cup sak ham BOEIPA loh Persia manghai Cyrus kah mueihla te a haeng pah. Te dongah a ram pum ah ol a thak tih cadaek nen khaw
Ezra1:2 “Persia manghai Cyrus loh he ni a thui. Diklai ram tom he vaan kah Pathen BOEIPA loh kai taengah m'paek coeng. Amah loh kai he Judah kah Jerusalem ah a im sa la m'hmoel coeng.
Ezra1:3 Nangmih khuikah long te khaw a pilnam cungkuem taeng lamloh a taengah a Pathen om saeh. Te dongah Judah kah Jerusalem la cet lamtah Israel Pathen BOEIPA im te sa saeh. Pathen amah he Jerusalem ah om.
Ezra1:4 A bakuep nah hmuen takuem lamkah aka sueng boeih loh Jerusalem kah Pathen im dongkah ham amah hmuen kah hlang rhoek te cak neh
Ezra1:5 Te vaengah Judah neh Benjamin napa boeilu rhoek khaw
Ezra1:6 A kaepvai boeih long khaw amih kut te cak hnopai neh
Ezra1:7 Te phoeiah Nebukhanezar loh Jerusalem lamkah a khuen tih a pathen im ah a khueh BOEIPA im hnopai te manghai Cyrus loh a khuen a khueh bawk imm kah hnopai boeih te khaw
Ezra1:8 Te te Persia Manghai Cyrus loh hnokhoem Mithredath kut ah a khuen sak tih Judah khoboei Sheshbazzar taengah a tae sak.
Ezra1:9 Te rhoek boeih te sui cailoeng sawmthum
Ezra1:10 sui bael sawmthum
Ezra1:11 sui neh cak hnopai boeih te thawng nga ya li lo. Vangsawn te Babylon lamloh Jerusalem la a caeh vaengah Sheshbazzar loh boeih a khuen.
Ezra2:1 Te vaengah paeng tom ca rhoek he vangsawn tamna lamloh mael uh. Amih te Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh Babylon la a poelyoe coeng cakhaw hlang he tah amah khopuei Jerusalem neh Judah la mael uh.
Ezra2:2 Amih te Zerubbabel
Ezra2:3 Parosh koca te thawng hnih neh ya sawmrhih panit.
Ezra2:4 Shephatiah koca rhoek tah ya thum sawmrhih panit.
Ezra2:5 Arah koca rhoek tah ya rhih sawmrhih panga.
Ezra2:6 Pahathmoab koca neh Jeshua koca Joab hil te thawng hnih ya rhet neh hlai nit.

Ezra2:70 Te tlam te khosoih neh Levi khaw
Ezra3:1 Hla rhih a pha vaengah tah khopuei kah Israel ca rhoek khaw Jerusalem ah pilnam neh hlang pakhat bangla tingtun uh.
Ezra3:2 Te vaengah Jozadak capa Jeshua neh a manuca khosoih rhoek
Ezra3:3 Khohmuen pilnam lamloh amih taengah mueirhih la om cakhaw a tungkho ah hmueihtuk a suem uh. Te phoeiah a soah BOEIPA kah hmueihhlutnah te khuen tih hlaem neh mincang kah hmueihhlutnah la a nawn uh.
Ezra3:4 A daek bangla pohlip khotue te a saii uh. Te vaengah a hnin
Ezra3:5 Sainoek hmueihhlutnah a hnukah khaw hlasae ham neh BOEIPA kah a ciim khoning boeih ham
Ezra3:6 Hla rhih kah hnin at lamloh BOEIPA taengah hmueihhlutnah nawn ham a tong uh dae BOEIPA kah bawkim tah suen hlan.
Ezra3:7 Te dongah tangka te lungto aka dae taeng neh kutthai taengah a paek uh. Caak neh buhkoknah khaw
Ezra3:8 A kum bae dongah tah amih te Jerusalem kah Pathen im la pawk uh. A hla bae dongah Shealtiel capa Zerubbabel
Ezra3:9 Te vaengah Jeshua khaw koca khaw a boeinaphung ah
Ezra3:10 BOEIPA bawkim te aka sa rhoek loh a suen van vaengah khosoih rhoek tah thoicam uh tih olueng neh pai uh. Asaph koca Levi rhoek khaw Israel manghai David kut dongkah bangla BOEIPA thangthen ham tlaklak neh om uh.
Ezra3:11 A sitlohnah te Israel taengah kumhal duela a then tangloeng dongah BOEIPA te thangthen ham neh uem hamla a doo uh. BOEIPA im a suen dongah BOEIPA te a thangthen tih pilnam boeih khaw tamlung neh a len la yuhui uh.
Ezra3:12 Tedae khosoih rhoek a kum ngai neh Levi rhoek khaw
Ezra3:13 Te dongah pilnam kah kohoenah tamlung ol khaw
Ezra4:1 Vangsawn ca rhoek loh Israel Pathen BOEIPA ham bawkim a sak te Judah neh Benjamin kah rhal rhoek loh a yaak uh.
Ezra4:2 Te phoeiah Zerubbabel taeng neh a napa boeilu rhoek taengla mop uh tih a taengah
Ezra4:3 Tedae amih te Zerubbabel neh Jeshua long khaw
Ezra4:4 Te vaengah khohmuen pilnam aka om loh Judah pilnam kut te a kha sak tih a sak ham vaengah amih te a hih khaw a hih uh.
Ezra4:5 Persia manghai Cyrus tue khui neh Persia manghai Darius kah ram duela Judah kah cilsuep te phae pah ham amih te olrhoep a paang thil uh.
Ezra4:6 Ahasuerus ram ah khaw a ram a moecuek vaengah Judah neh Jerusalem khosa taengah toenah ca a daek uh.
Ezra4:7 Artaxerxes tue vaengah khaw Bishlam
Ezra4:8 Hlangcal boei Rehum neh cadaek Shimshai loh Jerusalem kawng te manghai Artaxerxes taengah ca a daek pah bal.
Ezra4:9 Hlangcal boei Rehum
Ezra4:10 a tloe namtu te khaw boeilen tongmang Osnapper loh a khuen coeng. Amih te Samaria khopuei neh sok paem ah a khueh coeng.
Ezra4:11 Manghai Artaxerxes amah taengla a pat ca kah a toeng he na tueihyoeih sok paem kah hlang taengla ha pawk coeng.
Ezra4:12 Nang taeng lamloh kaimih taengla aka luei Yahudi rhoek te manghai taengah khaw mingpha la om saeh. Jerusalem khopuei la boekoek neh halang ni a khuen uh. Vongtung aka thung long khaw vongtung te a coeng
Ezra4:13 Khopuei he a thung tih vongtung a coeng atah mangmu khaw
Ezra4:14 Manghai im kah lungkaehtael te ka laeh uh van lamlong tah kaimih kongah manghai kah mingthae a hmuh ham khaw rhoeprhui moenih. Te dongah ni kam pat uh tih manghai taengah kam mingpha sak uh.
Ezra4:15 Na pa rhoek kah cathut cabu nen khaw thoelh saeh lamtah cathut cabu khuiah na hmuh bitni. Khopuei he khaw boekoek khopuei
Ezra4:16 Khopuei he tung tih vongtung he coeng koinih sok paem kah khoyo hmatoeng he nang hamla om pawh tila kaimih loh manghai taengah kam ming sak.
Ezra4:17 Manghai loh hlangcal boei Rehum
Ezra4:18 Kaimih taengla ca nan pat uh te kai taengah a tae tih a kong.
Ezra4:19 Kai lamloh hlangcal ka khueh tih a thoelh uh vaengah khopuei he khosuen khohnin lamloh manghai taengah lai a loh uh. A khuiah tloelhnah neh caemrhal a puek te a hmuh uh.
Ezra4:20 Manghai tlungluen rhoek khaw Jerusalem ah om uh tih sok paem boeih te a hung uh. Mangmu
Ezra4:21 Hlang rhoek he paa sak ham hlangcal ka khueh coeng. Kai lamloh hlangcal a om hlan ah khopuei te thung uh boel saeh.
Ezra4:22 He dongah a saii ham te dalrhanah a om khaw ngaithuen uh. Balae tih manghai vaitah sak ham pocinah a pungtai mai eh.
Ezra4:23 Manghai Artaxerxes kah ca a toeng te Rehum
Ezra4:24 Jerusalem Pathen im kah imsak te paa tangloeng tih Persia manghai Dairus ram kah kum bae hil paa van.
Ezra5:1 Te vaengah tonghma Haggai neh tonghma Iddo capa Zekhariah te tonghma rhoi. Amih rhoi tah a soah Israel Pathen ming a phuk thil Judah neh Jerusalem kah Yahudi tonghma rhoek ni.
Ezra5:2 Te vaengah Shaeltiel capa Zerubbabel neh Jozadak capa Jeshua te thoo tih Jerusalem kah Pathen im sak ham te a tong uh. Pathen tonghma rhoek khaw amih rhoi taengah om tih amih rhoi te a bom uh.
Ezra5:3 Te vaeng tue ah amih taengla sok paem boei Tattenai
Ezra5:4 He im aka sa hlang rhoek ming te amih taengah ka thui uh bal coeng
Ezra5:5 Tedae amih kah Pathen mik loh Yahudi a hamca rhoek a om thil dongah Darius taengla hlangcal pawk tih te ham te ca a mael hlan hil amih te paa sak pawh.
Ezra5:6 Sok paem boei Tattenai
Ezra5:7 Anih taengla ol a pat uh vaengah a khui ah he tlam he a daek. Darius manghai taengah ngaimongnah boeih om saeh.
Ezra5:8 Judah paeng kah boeilen Pathen im la ka caeh te manghai taengah mingpha saeh. Te te lung nu a sak uh tih thoh khuiah thing neh a pae. Imsak he tluem tluem a saii tih a kut dongah bi khaw song.
Ezra5:9 A hamca rhoek te ka dawt tangloeng bal tih amih te
Ezra5:10 Nang taengah mingpha sak ham amih te a ming khaw ka dawt uh. Amih lu soah hlang rhoek ming te khaw ka daek uh hamla.
Ezra5:11 Tedae ol te kaimih taengla ham mael uh tih amamih te
Ezra5:12 Tedae a pa rhoek loh vaan Pathen te a veet uh lamloh amih te Khalden kah Babylon manghai Nebukhadnezzar kut ah a paek. Te vaengah im he a khaih tih pilnam he Babylon la a khuen.
Ezra5:13 Babylon manghai Cyrus kah kah kum ah tah manghai Cyrus loh Pathen im he sak hamla saithainah a paek.
Ezra5:14 Pathen im kah hnopai pataeng sui neh cak khaw Jerusalem bawkim lamkah te
Ezra5:15 Te phoeiah anih te
Ezra5:16 Sheshbazzar cet tangloeng tih Jerusalem kah Pathen im te khoengim a tloeng. Te lamlong tah tahae hil a sak uh dae coeng uh pawh.
Ezra5:17 Manghai ham khaw a ngaih coeng mak atah Babylon manghai kah cabu im kah te pahoi thoelh saeh. Jerusalem ah Pathen im sak hamla manghai Cyrus lamloh saithainah a paek te a om khaming. Te dongah manghai kah a ngaihnah mah kaimih taengla ham pat saeh.
Ezra6:1 Te vaengah Darius manghai loh saithainah a paek tangloeng tih Babylon kah a khueh cabu im kah cabu te a thaih uh.
Ezra6:2 Tedae Media paeng kah manghai im
Ezra6:3 Manghai Cyrus kah kum khat dongah tah manghai Cyrus amah loh Jerusalem kah Pathen im te saithainah a paek tih
Ezra6:4 Lung nu than thum
Ezra6:5 Pathen im hnopai pataeng sui khaw cak khaw
Ezra6:6 Tattenai
Ezra6:7 Pathen im kah imsak nen he hlah uh laeh. Yahudi boei neh Yahudi a hamca rhoek loh Pathen im he amah hmuen la sa uh saeh.
Ezra6:8 Yahudi a hamca rhoek taengah na saii uh ham te kai lamloh saithainah om coeng tih Pathen im he sa saeh. Te vaengah manghai koe lamloh sok paem mangmu lamtah tluem tluem hnonah saeh. Hlang rhoek taengah pae saeh lamtah paa boel saeh.
Ezra6:9 A ngoe te tah vaan Pathen taengah hmueihhlutnah vaito ca neh tutal khaw tuca khaw
Ezra6:10 Vaan pathen taengah hlihlim neh a nawn la om uh saeh lamtah manghai neh a ca rhoek kah hingnah ham thangthui saeh.
Ezra6:11 Kai lamkah saithainah om tih he ol aka poe hlang boeih tah a im kah rhungsut te phong saeh lamtah a sut phoeiah anih te hoei saeh. Te dongah a im khaw kawnhnawt la om saeh.
Ezra6:12 Pathen loh amah ming a khueh thil Jerusalem kah Pathen im he hoilae ham neh palet ham a kut a thueng boeih tah manghai neh pilnam khaw palet van saeh. Kai Darius kah saithainah ka khueh he tluem tluem saii saeh
Ezra6:13 Sok paem boei Tattenai
Ezra6:14 Yahudi a hamca rhoek khaw a sak uh vaengah tonghma Haggai neh Iddo capa Zekhariah kah olphong dongah thaihtak uh. Persia manghai Cyrus
Ezra6:15 Te dongah manghai Darius ram kah a kum rhuk
Ezra6:16 Te dongah Israel ca rhoek
Ezra6:17 Te vaengah Pathen im nawnnah ham te vaito yakhat
Ezra6:18 Moses cabu dongkah cadaek bangla Jerusalem kah Pathen imsak dongah khosoih rhoek khaw amah boelnah neh
Ezra6:19 Tedae vangsawn koca rhoek loh hla khat hnin hlai li vaengah Yoom te a saii uh.
Ezra6:20 Khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek loh pakhat la caihcil uh tih amih te boeih a cim phoeiah tah vangsawn ca boeih ham khaw
Ezra6:21 Te vaengah vangsawn lamkah aka mael Israel ca rhoek neh a kaepvai khohmuen kah namtom tihnai khui lamloh Israel Pathen BOEIPA te toem ham aka hoep uh boeih loh a caak uh.
Ezra6:22 Vaidamding khotue khaw hnin rhih khuiah kohoenah neh a saii uh. Israel Pathen kah Pathen im bitat dongah amih kut te moem pah ham Assyria manghai loh amih taengah lungbuei a tho dongah BOEIPA loh amih te ko a hoe sak.
Ezra7:1 He kah olka hnukah Persia manghai Artaxerxes kah ram ah Hilkiah koca Azariah kah a ca
Ezra7:2 Shallum capa Hilkiah
Ezra7:3 Amariah capa Ahitub
Ezra7:4 Zerahiah capa Meraioth
Ezra7:5 Abishua capa Bukki
Ezra7:6 Ezra he Babylon lamloh a mael vaengah Moses olkhueng dongkah a cadaek te amah loh a ming. Te te Israel Pathen BOEIPA loh a paek. A Pathen BOEIPA kut loh anih soah a om dongah a kueknah boeih te manghai loh a taengah a paek.
Ezra7:7 Te vaengah Israel ca rhoek lamkah khaw
Ezra7:8 Manghai kah kum rhih nah hla nga vaengah tah Jerusalem pawk.
Ezra7:9 Hla khat dongkah lamhmacuek hnin vaengah Babylon lamkah tangtlaeng a tongnah lamloh hla nga dongkah lamhmacuek hnin ah tah Jerusalem ah pawk. A Pathen kah kut tah anih soah then tangloeng.
Ezra7:10 Ezra he BOEIPA olkhueng thuep ham neh vai ham khaw
Ezra7:11 He kah capat catlaep he manghai Artaxerxes loh BOEIPA kah olpaek ol neh Israel ham a oltlueh dongkah cadaek saya
Ezra7:12 Manghai boeih kah manghai Artaxerxes loh vaan Pathen kah oltlueh cadaek khosoih Ezra tah a yoethen pai.
Ezra7:13 Ka ram khui kah a puhlu boeih ham kai lamloh saithainah ka paek coeng. Israel pilnam neh a khosoih rhoek khaw
Ezra7:14 He kong dongah Manghai neh anih kah olrhoep parhih taeng lamloh Judah taeng neh Jerusalem taengah na kut dongkah na Pathen oltlueh te thoelh hamla a pat coeng.
Ezra7:15 Amah kolhmuen Jerusalem kah Israel Pathen taengah manghai neh a olrhoep rhoek loh a puhlu cak neh sui khaw khuen ham om.
Ezra7:16 Cak neh sui boeih te Babylon paeng pum ah na hmuh bitni. Jerusalem kah a Pathen im ham tah pilnam khaw a puhlu tih khosoih rhoek long khaw a puhlu.
Ezra7:17 He kong ah tangka nen he vaito
Ezra7:18 Namah taengkah neh na manuca taengkah boeih te tah cak khaw
Ezra7:19 Te hnopai te na Pathen im kah thothuengnah ham nang taengah kam paek. Te te Jerusalem kah Pathen taengah cum coeng.
Ezra7:20 Na Pathen im kah a tloe a ngoe dongah thoh hamla nang soah aka tla te tah manghai cabu im lamkah te thoo mai.
Ezra7:21 Manghai Artaxerxes kai kamah lamloh sok paem kah hnokhoem boeih taengah saithainah ka paek. A cungkuem dongah vaan Pathen kah oltlueh cadaek khosoih Ezra nang n'dawt saeh lamtah tluem tluem saii.
Ezra7:22 Cak talent yakhat hil
Ezra7:23 Vaan Pathen kah saithainah lamkah boeih he vaan Pathen im dongah tluem tluem saii saeh. Balae tih kosi manghai kah ram neh a ca a bo thil eh.
Ezra7:24 Te phoeiah khosoih boeih neh Levi khaw
Ezra7:25 Ezra nang khaw na Pathen kah cueihnah rhangneh na kut dongkah aka taemrhai ham neh laitloekung m'hmoel coeng. Te tlam te a om uh daengah ni sok paem kah pilnam cungkuem taengah neh na Pathen oltlueh aka ming boeih taengah khaw
Ezra7:26 Na Pathen kah oltlueh neh manghai kah oltlueh aka vai pawt boeih te tah laitloeknah tluem tluem om saeh. Anih te dueknah nen khaw
Ezra7:27 Mamih napa rhoek kah Pathen YAHWEH tah a yoethen pai saeh. Tahae kah bangla Jerusalem kah BOEIPA im te cam hamla manghai kah lungbuei ah a cuen sak.
Ezra7:28 Kai ham khaw manghai neh a olrhoep mikhmuh ah
Ezra8:1 He rhoek kah a napa boeilu neh a khuui he Babylon lamloh manghai Artaxerxes ram tue vaengah kamah neh aka mael rhoek ni.
Ezra8:2 Phinekha koca lamkah Gershom
Ezra8:3 Shekaniah koca lamkah
Ezra8:4 Pahathmoab koca lamkah Zerahiah capa Elioenai neh a taengkah tongpa yahnih.
Ezra8:5 Jahaziel capa Shekaniah koca neh a taengkah tongpa ya thum.
Ezra8:6 Adin koca lamloh Jonathan capa Ebed neh a taengkah tongpa sawmnga.
Ezra8:7 Elam koca lamloh Athaliah capa Isaiah neh a taengkah tongpa sawmrhih.
Ezra8:8 Shephatiah koca lamloh Michael capa Zebadiah neh a taengkah tongpa sawmrhet.
Ezra8:9 Joab koca lamloh Jehiel capa Obadiah neh a taengkah tongpa yahnih hlai rhet.
Ezra8:10 Shelomith koca lamloh Josiphiah capa neh a taengkah tongpa ya sawmrhuk.
Ezra8:11 Bebai koca lamloh Bebai capa Zekhariah neh a taengkah tongpa pakul parhet.
Ezra8:12 Azgad koca lamloh Hakkatan capa Johanan neh a taengkah tongpa ya parha.
Ezra8:13 Lamhnuk kah Adonikam koca lamkah khaw a ming la Eliphelet
Ezra8:14 Bigvai koca lamloh Uthai
Ezra8:15 Amih te Ahava la aka pawk tuiva ah ka tingtun sak tih hnin thum pahoi ka rhaeh uh. Te vaengah pilnam khui neh khosoih khuikah te ka yakming dae Levi koca rhoek lamkah ka hmu pawh.
Ezra8:16 Te phoeiah boeilu rhoek Eliezer ham
Ezra8:17 Te te ka khuen sak tih Kasiphia hmuen kah boeilu Iddo taengah ka uen. A manuca Iddo taengah thui ham ol te amih ka dongah ka khueh pah coeng. Mamih kah Pathen im ah aka thohtat te mamih taengla hang khuen ham te Kasiphia hmuen kah tamtaeng rhoek a khueh.
Ezra8:18 Mamih kah Pathen kah kut he mamih soah a then dongah ni kaimih taengla lungming hlang ha pawk. Israel ca Mahli koca lamloh Levi capa khaw
Ezra8:19 Hashabiah neh a taengkah a manuca Merari koca Isaiah. Te dongah amih koca te pakul lo.
Ezra8:20 Tamtaeng rhoek te khaw David neh mangpa rhoek loh Levi kah thothuengnah dongkah ham a paek. Tamtaeng boeih a ming neh yahnih pakul la mingpha ngawn.
Ezra8:21 Kaimih kah Pathen mikhmuh ah yalh sak ham neh amah te toem hamla
Ezra8:22 Manghai taengah tah
Ezra8:23 He ham he ka yaeh uh tangloeng tih ka Pathen taengah aka toem uh daengah kaimih he n'rhoi.
Ezra8:24 Te vaengah khosoih mangpa rhoek lamkah te Sherebiah
Ezra8:25 Amih ham te cak neh sui khaw mah Pathen im kah khosaa hnopai te ka khiing khaw ka khiing pah coeng. Te te manghai neh a olrhoep rhoek loh
Ezra8:26 Amih kut ah cak talent rhui ya rhuk sawmnga
Ezra8:27 Sui bael pakul
Ezra8:28 Te vaengah amih te
Ezra8:29 Jerusalem BOEIPA im
Ezra8:30 Te phoeiah tah khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek loh cak neh sui neh hnopai a khiing te Jerusalem ah kaimih kah Pathen BOEIPA im la thak ham a doe uh.
Ezra8:31 Jerusalem la caeh ham te hla khat hnin hlai nit vaengah Ahava tuiva lamloh hlah uh. Te vaengah kaimih kah Pathen kut tah kaimih soah om tih kaimih he longpueng kah thunkha neh rhongngol kut lamloh n'huul.
Ezra8:32 Jerusalem ka pha uh van neh hnin thum pahoi ka duem uh.
Ezra8:33 A hnin li dongah tah ka Pathen im ah cak
Ezra8:34 A khiing boeih kah a tarhing neh te vaeng tue kah a khiing te boeih a thum sak.
Ezra8:35 Tamna lamkah aka mael vangsawn koca rhoek loh Israel Pathen taengah hmueihhlutnah a nawn uh. BOEIPA taengkah hmueihhlutnah boeih he Israel pum ham vaito hlai nit
Ezra8:36 Manghai kah olkhan rhoek te manghai kah khoboei rhoek taeng neh tuiva rhalvangan kah rhalboei taengla a paek uh. Te dongah pilnam neh Pathen im te khaw a talong uh.
Ezra9:1 Te rhoek te a coeng phoeiah tah kai taengla mangpa rhoek ha mop uh tih
Ezra9:2 Amih nu te amamih ham neh a ca ham khaw a loh uh. Cangtii cae he khohmuen pilnam neh pitpom uh coeng. Te dongah mangpa kut neh ukkung rhoek he boekoeknah neh lamhma la om
Ezra9:3 He ol he ka yaak vaengah ka himbai neh ka hnikul te ka phen. Ka lu sam neh ka hmuimul te ka poelh tih dingrhak la ka ngol.
Ezra9:4 Vangsawn kah boekoeknah dongah ni ka kaepvai khaw Israel Pathen ol bangla a thuen neh boeih tingtun uh. Kai khaw hlaemhmah khocang hil dingrhak ka ngol.
Ezra9:5 Hlaem khocang vaengah tah ka komawtnah lamloh
Ezra9:6 Te vaengah
Ezra9:7 A pa rhoek tue lamloh tahae khohnin duela kaimih he lai puei neh ka om uh. Kaimih thaesainah loh kamamih khaw
Ezra9:8 Tedae mamih rhalyong aka sueng ham mamih Pathen BOEIPA taeng lamkah lungmacil tah mikhaptok ca kah ham khaw om coeng. Te te kaimih ham a hmuencim hmuen ah hlingcong aka pae ham ni. Kaimih kah Pathen tah kaimih mik aka sae sak neh kaimih pinyennah khuiah kaimih hinglu hlawtnah bet aka pae la om.
Ezra9:9 Mamih he sal la n'om sitoe cakhaw mamih kah pinyennah khuiah mamih kah Pathen loh mamih n'hnoo moenih. Mamih taengah Persia manghai mikhmuh ah mamih he hinglu hlawtnah paek ham
Ezra9:10 Na olpaek ka hnawt uh dongah he hnukah mamih kah Pathen te metlam n'thui pueng eh?
Ezra9:11 Na sal tonghma kut ah na uen tih
Ezra9:12 Te dongah na canu rhoek te amih koca rhoek taengah pae uh boeh. Amih nu rhoek te na ca rhoek ham loh pah boeh. Amih sadingnah neh a hnothen khaw kumhal duela toem uh boeh. Na tlung tih khohmuen a thennah te na caak mai akhaw
Ezra9:13 Kaimih kah boethae khoboe dongah
Ezra9:14 Na olpaek phae tih pilnam tueilaehkoi nen he masae cava nah ham ka mael uh aya? A meet neh rhalyong a tal hil khah hamla kaimih taengah na thintoek pawt nim?
Ezra9:15 Israel Pathen BOEIPA tah na dueng pai tih tahae khohnin kah bangla loeihnah neh ka sueng uh. Kaimih he namah mikhmuh ah kamamih kah dumlai neh ka om uh. He dongah na mikhmuh ah ka pai ngoeng pawh
Ezra10:1 Ezra he a thangthui vaengah khaw a uem vaengah khaw a rhah neh Pathen im hmai ah bakop. A taengah ah Israel hlangping lamloh tongpa neh huta neh camoe neh uep tingtun uh khungdaeng. Pilnam khaw lungnat neh bungbung rhap uh.
Ezra10:2 Te vaengah Elam kah Elam koca Jehiel capa Shekaniah loh a doo tih Ezra te
Ezra10:3 Te dongah ka boei rhoek neh mamih kah Pathen olpaek dongah aka thuen rhoek kah cilsuep bangla huta rhoek neh amih kah a cun boeih te tueih hamla mamih kah Pathen taengah paipi saii uh pawn sih lamtah olkhueng bangla vai uh saeh.
Ezra10:4 Olka he namah hut coeng dongah thoo lamtah kaimih khaw nang taengah ka om uh. Thaahuel lamtah saii laeh
Ezra10:5 Te dongah Ezra thoo tih a toemngam. Levi khosoih mangpa rhoek neh Israel boeih long khaw te ol bangla saii ham a toemngam uh.
Ezra10:6 Te phoeiah tah Ezra te Pathen im hmai lamloh thoo tih Eliashib capa Jehohanan kah imkhan la cet. Buh te pahoi a paan dae ca pawt tih vangsawn boekoeknah ham a nguekcoi dongah tui khaw o pawh.
Ezra10:7 Te dongah vangsawn koca boeih te Jerusalem la coi ham Judah neh Jerusalem ah ol a pat.
Ezra10:8 Mangpa rhoek neh a hamca rhoek kah cilsuep bangla hnin thum khuiah aka pawk pawt boeih tah a khuehtawn boeih thup pah saeh lamtah anih te vangsawn hlangping lamloh hoep saeh
Ezra10:9 Te dongah ah Judah hlang neh Benjamin
Ezra10:10 Te vaengah khosoih Ezra pai tih amih te
Ezra10:11 Te dongah na pa rhoek kah Pathen BOEIPA taengah tholh phongnah khueh uh laeh. A kolonah te saii uh lamtah khohmuen pilnam taeng lamkah neh kholong nu taeng lamloh hoep uh laeh
Ezra10:12 Hlangping pum loh a doo uh tih ol a len la
Ezra10:13 Tedae pilnam he ping tih khonal tue la om bal. Te dongah tollong ah pai ham thadueng a om moenih. He ol dongah boekoek la a ping dongah bitat he hnin at nen bueng pawt tih hnin nit ah coeng mahpawh.
Ezra10:14 Hlangping boeih hamla mamih kah mangpa rhoek he pai mai saeh. Te phoeiah mah kho khuikah kholong nu neh kho aka sa boeih te a caeng tue bangla kun sak saeh. He olka dongah mamih Pathen kah thintoek thinsa te mamih lamloh a mael hil amih neh kho
Ezra10:15 Asahel capa Jonathan neh Tikvah capa Jahaziah he he a tlai thil tih amih rhoi te Levi Meshullam neh Shabbethai loh a bom.
Ezra10:16 Te dongah vangsawn koca rhoek loh a saii uh. Te phoeiah khosoih Ezra loh hlang rhoek te a napa imkhui tarhing ah a napa boeilu neh a boel. A hla rha dongkah hnin lamhmacuek vaengah Amih boeih te a ming neh ol dawt hamla ngol uh.
Ezra10:17 Lamhmacuek hla kah lamhmacuek khohnin ah kholong nu neh aka om hlang boeih te a khah uh.
Ezra10:18 Te vaengah khosoih koca rhoek khuiah Jeshua koca lamkah Jozadak capa neh amah boeinaphung Maaseiah
Ezra10:19 Te dongah a yuu rhoek te tueih hamla a kut te a yuh uh tih amamih kah dumlai dongah boiva la tutal a rhaem uh.
Ezra10:20 Te phoeiah Immer koca rhoek lamloh Hanani neh Zebadiah.
Ezra10:21 Harim koca lamloh Maaseiah
Ezra10:22 Pashur koca lamloh kah Elioenai
Ezra10:23 Levi lamloh Jozabad
Ezra10:24 Laa sa rhoek lamloh Eliashib
Ezra10:25 Israel khuiah khaw Parosh koca lamloh Ramiah
Ezra10:26 Elam koca lamloh Mattaniah
Ezra10:27 Zattu koca lamloh Elioenai
Ezra10:28 Bebai koca lamloh Jehohanan
Ezra10:29 Bani koca lamloh Meshullam

Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliah capa Nehemiah ol khaw kum kul Kislev hla vaengah om coeng. Te vaengah kai tah Shushan rhalmah im ah ka om.
Nehemiah1:2 Te vaengah ka manuca rhoek khuikah pakhat Hanani ha pawk. Amah neh Judah lamkah hlang rhoek khaw om. Amih taengah tamna lamloh aka sueng rhalyong Judah kawng neh Jerusalem kawng te ka dawt.
Nehemiah1:3 Te vaengah paeng khuikah yoethae len khui neh kokhahnah khuiah tamna lamkah aka sueng
Nehemiah1:4 He ol he ka yaak vaengah ka ngol tih ka rhap. Khohniyung ah ka nguekcoi neh ka om. Vaan Pathen mikhmuh ah ka yaeh tih ka thangthui.
Nehemiah1:5 Te phoeiah
Nehemiah1:6 Na sal kah thangthuinah te yaak hamla na hna khui tih na mik aka dai la om laeh. Kai he tihnin ah khaw na sal Israel ca ham khoyin khothaih na mikhmuh ah ka thangthui coeng. Namah taengah ka tholh uh bangla Israel ca kah tholhnah te kam phoe. Kamah neh a pa imkhui khaw ka tholh uh coeng.
Nehemiah1:7 Na taengah laikoi la ka laikoi uh coeng tih na sal Moses taengah na uen olpaek neh oltlueh khaw
Nehemiah1:8 Na sal Moses ol na uen tih
Nehemiah1:9 Tedae kai taengla na mael uh tih ka olpaek he ngaithuen neh na vai atah vaan khobawt la nangmih aka heh te om cakhaw amih te te lamloh ka coi vetih ka ming om sak ham ka coelh hmuen la amih te pahoi ka khuen rhoe ka khuen.
Nehemiah1:10 Amih te na sal neh na pilnam ni. Te rhoek te na len thadueng neh
Nehemiah1:11 Ka Boeipa aw
Nehemiah2:1 Artaxerxes manghai kah kum kul nah Nisan hla vaengah tah a mikhmuh ah misurtui om. Te dongah misurtui te ka pom tih manghai te ka doe. Tedae a mikhmuh ah a thae la ka om pawh.
Nehemiah2:2 Te vaengah manghai loh kai te
Nehemiah2:3 Tedae manghai te
Nehemiah2:4 Te vaengah manghai loh kai taengah
Nehemiah2:5 Te vaengah manghai te
Nehemiah2:6 Te phoeiah manghai neh a taengah aka ngol manghainu loh kai taengah
Nehemiah2:7 Te dongah manghai te
Nehemiah2:8 Khotu aka tawt Asaph taengkah ca dongah manghai ham daek pah lamtah im taengkah rhalmah im
Nehemiah2:9 Te dongah tuiva rhalvangan kah rhalboei rhoek taengah ka cet tih manghai kah ca te amih taengah ka paek. Te dongah manghai kai taengah tatthai mangpa rhoek neh marhang caem te han tueih.
Nehemiah2:10 Te vaengah Khoroni Sanballat neh Ammoni sal Tobiah loh a yaak. Israel ca rhoek kah hnothen tlap pah ham hlang a pawk te boethae duet la amih taengah thae a huet.
Nehemiah2:11 Te phoeiah Jerusalem la ka pawk vaengah hnin thum pahoi ka om.
Nehemiah2:12 Tedae khoyin kamah neh ka taengkah hlang sii rhoek te ka thoh puei. Ka Pathen loh Jerusalem ah saii ham ka lungbuei ah a khueh te hlang taengah ka doek moenih. Te vaengah a soah ka ngol nah rhamsa bueng phoeiah tah kai taengah rhamsa a om moenih.
Nehemiah2:13 Khoyin ah kolrhawk vongka longah ka cet tih maetangsih hmai la
Nehemiah2:14 Te phoeiah tuiphuet vongka neh manghai tuibuem la ka kat dae kamah neh aka kat rhamsa ham hmuen om pawh.
Nehemiah2:15 Hlaem ah soklong la ka cet tih vongtung te ka hil. Te phoeiah kolrhawk vongka longah ka pawk tih ka mael.
Nehemiah2:16 Tedae ukkung rhoek loh mela ka caeh tih mebang ka saii khaw a ming uh moenih. Bitat aka saii kah a hmatoeng te Judah taengah khaw
Nehemiah2:17 Te phoeiah amih te
Nehemiah2:18 Ka Pathen kut te tah kai soah then tih manghai ol loh kai taengah a thui te khaw amih taengah ka thui bal. Te vaengah
Nehemiah2:19 Tedae Khoroni Sanballat
Nehemiah2:20 Te vaengah amih te ol ka mael tih amamih taengah
Nehemiah3:1 Te vaengah khosoih ham Eliashib te thoo tih a manuca khosoih rhoek neh boiva vongka te a sak uh. Te te a ciim phoeiah tah a thohkhaih a thoh uh. Te vaengah Meah rhaltoengim hil neh Hananel rhaltoengim duela a ciim uh.
Nehemiah3:2 A hmatoeng ah Jerikho hlang rhoek loh a sak uh. A hmatoeng patoeng ah Imri capa Zakkuur loh a sak.
Nehemiah3:3 Nga vongka te Senaah koca rhoek loh a sak uh. Amih loh a mak uh phoeiah tah a thohkhaih khaw
Nehemiah3:4 Amih hmatoeng ah Koz koca
Nehemiah3:5 Amih hmatoeng bal ah Tekoa rhoek a tlaih uh. Tedae amih khuiah aka khuet rhoek loh a boei kah thohtatnah te a rhawn ah khuen uh pawh.
Nehemiah3:6 Te vaengah Jeshanah te tah Paseah capa Joiada neh Besodeiah capa Meshullam loh a thaih. Amih loh te te a mak uh. Te phoeiah tah a thohkhaih neh a thohhna khaw a
Nehemiah3:7 Amih hmatoeng te Gibonee Melatiah neh Gibeon hlang Meronoti Jardon neh Mizpah loh tuiva rhalvangan kah rhalboei ngolkhoel hil a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:8 Anih hmatoeng ah sui aka picai Harhaiah capa Uzziel loh a tlaih. A hmatoeng ah botui saikung capa Hananiah loh a tlaih tih Jerusalem vongtung thah duela a buk uh.
Nehemiah3:9 Amih hmatoeng ah Jerusalem conghol ngancawn kah mangpa Hur capa Rephaiah loh a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:10 Amih hmatoeng ah Harumaph capa Jedaiah neh a im hmai loh a tlaih. A hmatoeng patoeng tah Hasabneiah capa Hattush loh a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:11 Cungnueh pabae te Harim capa Malkhiah neh Pahathmoab capa Hasshub loh rhaltoengim tapkhuel hil a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:12 A hmatoeng ah Jerusalem conghol ngancawn kah mangpa Hallohesh capa Shallum amah neh a tanu rhoek loh a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:13 Kolrhawk vongka te Hanun neh Zanoah khosa rhoek loh a tlaih. Amih loh te te sak uh tih a thohkhaih
Nehemiah3:14 Natva vongka te Bethhakkerem conghol mangpa Rekhab capa Malkhiah loh a tlaih. Te te a sak phoeiah a thohkhaih
Nehemiah3:15 Tuiphuet vongka te Mizpah conghol mangpa Kolhozeh capa Shallun loh a tlaih. Amah loh a sak tih a cak la a dih phoeiah. Te phoeiah a thohkhaih
Nehemiah3:16 Anih phoeikah te Bethzur conghol hlangvang mangpa Azbuk capa Nehemiah loh a tlaih tih David phuel rhaldan hil
Nehemiah3:17 Anih phoeikah te Bani capa Rehum neh Levi rhoek loh a tlaih uh. Anih hmatoeng ah Keilah conghol hlangvang mangpa Hashabiah loh amah kah conghol la a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:18 Anih phoeiah te Keilah conghol hlangvang mangpa Henadad capa Bavvai neh amih boeinaphung loh a tlaih uh.
Nehemiah3:19 Anih hmatoeng ah Mizpah mangpa Jeshua capa Ezer loh a tlaih. A cungnueh pabae te lungpok haica imki kah aka cet imdan lamloh a tong.
Nehemiah3:20 Anih hnuk te Zakkai Zabbai capa Barukh te sai tih a tlaih. A cungnueh pabae bal te imki lamloh khosoih len Eliashib im thohka hil a pha.
Nehemiah3:21 Anih hnuk te Koz koca Uriah capa Meremoth loh a tlaih. A cungnueh khat bal te Eliashib im thohka lamloh Eliashib im a bawtnah hil a pha.
Nehemiah3:22 Anih phoeikah te vannaem hlang rhoek kah khosoih rhoek loh a tlaih uh.
Nehemiah3:23 Anih phoeikah Benjamin neh Hasshub loh amih im dan kah a tlaih. Anih phoeiah Ananiah koca Maaseiah capa Azariah loh amah im taeng te a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:24 Anih phoeikah te Henadad capa Binnui loh a tlaih. Cungnueh pakhat ah Azariah im lamloh imki neh bangkil hil a pha.
Nehemiah3:25 Uzzai capa Palal te manghai im hluen lamkah aka cawn imki neh rhaltoengim hmai ah. A hmatoeng te thongim vongtung kaep te te Parosh capa Pedaiah loh a hut nah.
Nehemiah3:26 Te vaengah tamtaeng la aka om rhoek loh Ophel kungkueng ah khocuk la tui vongka hmai neh rhaltoengim aka cawn phai ah kho a sak uh.
Nehemiah3:27 Anih phoeikah te Tekoa rhoek loh a tlaih uh. A cungnueh pakhat te rhaltoengim len hmai lamloh cawn tih Ophel vongtung hil a pha.
Nehemiah3:28 Marhang vongka kungkueng kah khosoih rhoek loh amah im hmai kah te rhip a tlaih uh.
Nehemiah3:29 Anih phoeikah Immer capa Zadok long khaw amah im hmai te a tlaih. A hmatoeng te khocuk vongka aka tawt Shekaniah capa Shemaiah loh a tlaih.
Nehemiah3:30 Anih hmatoeng
Nehemiah3:31 Anih hmatoeng
Nehemiah3:32 Bangkil imhman laklo te boiva vongka hil te aka picai rhoek neh thimpom rhoek loh a tlaih uh.
Nehemiah4:1 Kaimih loh vongtung ka sak te Sanballat loh a yaak vaengah tah anih te sai. Te dongah Judah rhoek te muep a veet tih a tamdaeng.
Nehemiah4:2 A manuca rhoek neh Samaria tatthai mikhmuh ah cal tih
Nehemiah4:3 A taengkah Ammoni Tobiah long khaw
Nehemiah4:4 Hnaephnapnah dongah ka om uh he kaimih kah Pathen loh ya van lamtah amih kah kokhahnah he amih lu dongah mael saeh. Amih te tamna khohmuen ah kutbuem la pae.
Nehemiah4:5 Na im sa rhoek mikhmuh ah a veet dongah amih kah thaesainah te hlipdah boel lamtah a tholhnah te na mikhmuh lamloh huih pah boeh.
Nehemiah4:6 Bibi saii ham tah pilnam kah lungbuei om dongah vongtung te ka sak uh tangloeng tih vongtung boeih te a rhakthuem duela a phaai uh coeng.
Nehemiah4:7 Jerusalem vongtung loh sading la a caeh te Sanballat
Nehemiah4:8 Te dongah amih boeih te Jerusalem paan rhenten tih vathoh thil ham
Nehemiah4:9 Tedae ka Pathen taengah ka thangthui uh tih amih mikhmuh ah amih ham khoyin khothaih rhaltawt ka pai sak uh.
Nehemiah4:10 Te vaengah Judah loh
Nehemiah4:11 Mamih kah rhal rhoek long khaw
Nehemiah4:12 Te vaengah amih taengkah khosa Judah rhoek te ha pawk uh tih kaimih te hmuen takuem ah voei rha hil
Nehemiah4:13 Te dongah a laedil ah khaw
Nehemiah4:14 Ka hmuh vaengah ka pai tih hlangcoelh rhoek taengah khaw
Nehemiah4:15 Pathen loh amih kah cilsuep a phae pah tih kaimih taengah m'ming sak te kaimih kah thunkha rhoek loh a yaak uh. Te daengah kaimih boeih ka mael uh tih hlang loh amah bitat ham vongtung te ka paan uh.
Nehemiah4:16 Te khohnin lamlong tah kai ca rhoek te rhakthuem loh bitat a saii vaengah a rhakthuem loh cai neh
Nehemiah4:17 Vongtung aka sa khaw
Nehemiah4:18 Te vaengah vongtung aka sa hlang loh a cunghang te a cinghen ah a vah tih a sak. Ka taengkah rhoek loh tuki te a ueng uh.
Nehemiah4:19 Te phoeiah hlangcoelh rhoek taengah khaw
Nehemiah4:20 Tuki ol na yaak nah hmuen ah tah kaimih taengla pahoi tingtun uh. Mamih kah Pathen loh mamih ham a vathoh bitni
Nehemiah4:21 Te dongah bitat ka saii uh vaengah a rhakthuem loh mincang a thoeng paek lamloh aisi a thoeng hil cai ka muk thil uh.
Nehemiah4:22 Te vaeng tue ah khaw pilnam hlang neh a ca rhoek te
Nehemiah4:23 Kai bueng pawt tih ka manuca rhoek khaw
Nehemiah5:1 Te vaengah pilnam neh a yuu rhoek tah a manuca Judah taengah pangngawlnah muep om.
Nehemiah5:2 Te vaengah. “Ka capa neh ka canu neh ka ping dongah cangpai ka dang uh daengah ni ka caak uh vetih ka hing uh eh
Nehemiah5:3 Ka khohmuen
Nehemiah5:4 “Ka khohmuen neh ka misurdum kah manghai mangmu ham te tangka la ka rhong.
Nehemiah5:5 Mah manuca kah pumsa khaw mamih kah pumsa banghui coeng ni. Amih ca rhoek khaw mah ca rhoek banghui ni. Te cakhaw mamih loh mah ca tongpa neh mah ca huta rhoek te sal la ka khoh sak aya? Kaimih canu lakah khaw a khoh rhoek om coeng. Tedae mamih kah khohmuen neh mamih kah misurdum a tloe taengla om coeng tih mamih kut he Pathen pum dongah a om moenih.
Nehemiah5:6 Amih kah a pang neh ol he ka yaak vaengah kai taengah muep sai coeng.
Nehemiah5:7 Tedae ka khuikah ka lungbuei tah a manghai van dongah hlangcoelh rhoek neh ukkung rhoek te ka toel. Te vaengah amih te
Nehemiah5:8 Te phoeiah amih te
Nehemiah5:9 Ka thui cakhaw ol then na vai uh pawt dongah ni ka thui. Mamih kah thunkha namtom kah kokhahnah dong mai ah mamih kah Pathen hinyahnah neh na pongpa uh pawh nama?
Nehemiah5:10 Kamah khaw
Nehemiah5:11 A khohmuen neh a misurdum khaw
Nehemiah5:12 Te daengah
Nehemiah5:13 Ka poehla te ka khong tih
Nehemiah5:14 Te pataeng kai he Judah khohmuen ah amih kah rhalboei la om ham n'uen khohnin lamkah te
Nehemiah5:15 Tedae rhalboei lamhma rhoek loh ka mikhmuh ah pilnam te a nan tih amih taengkah buh neh misurtui khaw
Nehemiah5:16 Te phoeiah vongtung kah bitat ham rhaitat he tah thaa ka huel tih khohmuen ka lai uh moenih. Ka taengkah camoe boeih khaw bitat ham pahoi ka coi.
Nehemiah5:17 Te vaengah Judah neh ukkung rhoek te hlang ya sawmnga neh namtom lamkah kaimih taengla aka pawk te ka caboei kah kaimih m'vael uh.
Nehemiah5:18 Kai ham te hnin at ham he vaito pummat a ngawn tih
Nehemiah5:19 Ka Pathen aw he pilnam ham hnothen la boeih ka saii he kai ham khaw poek van lah.
Nehemiah6:1 Vongtung ka sak uh te Sanballat
Nehemiah6:2 Te dongah Sanballat neh Geshem loh kai taengla ol han tah tih
Nehemiah6:3 Amih rhoi taengla puencawn rhoek te ka tueih tih
Nehemiah6:4 He ol he kai taengla voei li ham pat uh coeng dae amih te he tlam ni ol ka mael.
Nehemiah6:5 A voei nga nah dongah khaw he kah ol bangla Sanballat loh kai taengla a taengca kut neh ham pat dae ca te a kut dongah a ong coeng.
Nehemiah6:6 A khuikah a daek te namtom lakli neh Geshem te a yaak sak tih
Nehemiah6:7 Tonghma rhoek pataeng Jerusalem ah nang kawng aka doek la

Nehemiah6:9 A pum la kaimih n'hih uh tih

Nehemiah6:11 Tedae
Nehemiah6:12 Te vaengah Pathen loh anih tueih pawt la he tila ka hmat. Tedae anih te Tobiah neh Sanballat loh a paang dongah ni kai taengah tonghma ol a thui.
Nehemiah6:13 Kai hih tih he tla ka saii vaengah kai tholh sak ham neh amih taengah ming thae la om sak ham anih te a paang tangloeng
Nehemiah6:14 Ka Pathen aw
Nehemiah6:15 Te cakhaw Elul pakul panga kah sawmnga neh hnin nit vaengah tah vongtung a khah uh.
Nehemiah6:16 Ka thunkha boeih loh a yaak uh tih kaimih kaep kah namtom boeih loh a rhih dongah a maelhmai rhep a buenglueng uh. Bitat a saii he kaimih kah Pathen taeng lamkah ni tila a ming uh.
Nehemiah6:17 Te vaeng khohnin ah Judah hlangcoelh rhoek loh amih ca te Tobiah taengla muep a pha sak tih Tobiah taeng lamkah te khaw amih taengla cet.
Nehemiah6:18 Arah capa Shekaniah loh Tobiah a cava nah tih a capa Jehohanan long khaw Berekiah capa Meshullam canu te a loh dongah Judah kah boei rhoek khaw anih taengah olhlo neh muep om uh.
Nehemiah6:19 Ka mikhmuh ah a then aka thui khaw om uh tih a taengla kai ol aka thak khaw om uh. Tobiah long khaw kai hih hamla ca ham pat.

Nehemiah8:1 Pilnam pum te tui vongka hmai kah toltung ah hlang pakhat bangla tingtun uh. Te vaengah cadaek Ezra te
Nehemiah8:2 A hla rhih kah lamhmacuek hnin vaengah tah khosoih Ezra loh olkhueng te hlangping mikhmuh ah tongpa lamloh huta ham khaw
Nehemiah8:3 Te lamkah te tui vongka hmai kah toltung imdan ah khopo lamloh khothun khovang hil a tae. tongpa neh huta neh aka yakming rhoek kah hmai neh olkhueng cabu dongla hna aka kaeng pilnam cungkuem ham a tae pah.
Nehemiah8:4 Te vaengah cadaek Ezra te olthui vaengah kah ham a dawn tlaang thing dongah pai. Anih taengah Mattithiah neh Shema
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra loh cabu te pilnam boeih kah mikhmuh ah a ong. Pilnam boeih so la om tih cabu a ong vaengah pilnam khaw boeih pai uh.
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra loh boeilen Pathen BOEIPA te a uem vaengah pilnam pum loh a kut thueng neh Amen Amen tila a doo uh. Te phoeiah a tal te diklai la a buluk uh tih BOEIPA te a bawk uh.
Nehemiah8:7 Jeshua
Nehemiah8:8 Pathen kah olkhueng cabu lamkah te puk a tae uh tih lungmingnah khaw a paek dongah tingtunnah ham khaw a yakming uh.
Nehemiah8:9 Te vaengah tongmang boei Nehemiah amah neh khosoih cadaek Ezra
Nehemiah8:10 Amih te
Nehemiah8:11 Aka ngam Levi rhoek long khaw pilnam boeih taengah
Nehemiah8:12 Amih taengah a thuicaih pah ol te a yakming uh coeng dongah tah pilnam pum te caak ham neh ok hamla
Nehemiah8:13 A hnin bae dongah tah pilnam pum kah a napa boeilu rhoek
Nehemiah8:14 Te vaengah
Nehemiah8:15 Te dongah amamih kho takuem ah a yaak sak uh tih ol a haeh uh. Jerusalem ah khaw
Nehemiah8:16 Pilnam te cet tih a khuen phoeiah tah amamih ham dungtlungim te a imphu ah khaw
Nehemiah8:17 Tamna lamkah aka mael hlangping boeih long khaw dungtlungim a saii uh tih dungtlungim ah kho a sak uh. Nun capa Jeshua tue lamloh te khohnin hil Israel ca rhoek loh ana saii moenih. Te dongah kohoenah khaw muep om khungdaeng mai.
Nehemiah8:18 Pathen kah olkhueng cabu te a hnin
Nehemiah9:1 Te hla kah hnin kul neh hnin li vaengah tah Israel ca rhoek yaehnah neh
Nehemiah9:2 Te vaengah Israel kah tiingan tah kholong ca boeih taeng lamloh hoep uh tih pai uh. Amamih kah tholhnah neh a napa rhoek thaesainah te a phoe puei uh.
Nehemiah9:3 Amamih paihmuen ah pai uh tih a Pathen BOEIPA kah olkhueng cabu te hnin at ah voei li a tae uh. A tholhnah te voei li a phoe puei uh phoeiah a Pathen BOEIPA te a bawk uh.
Nehemiah9:4 Te vaengah Levi Jeshua
Nehemiah9:5 Te phoeiah Levi Jeshua
Nehemiah9:6 YAHWEH amah khaw namah ni. Nang namah bueng loh vaan phoeikah vaan khaw
Nehemiah9:7 Namah he YAHWEH Pathen ni. Abram te na coelh. Anih te Khalden Ur lamloh na khuen tih a ming te Abraham la na khueh pah.
Nehemiah9:8 A thinko loh na mikhmuh ah a uepom te na hmuh dongah Kanaan
Nehemiah9:9 Egypt ah a pa rhoek kah phacipphabaem te na hmuh. Carhaek tuili ah amih kah a pang te khaw na yaak coeng.
Nehemiah9:10 Miknoek neh kopoekrhai te Pharaoh taengah khaw
Nehemiah9:11 Tuitunli pataeng amih mikhmuh ah na phih tih tuitunli laklung lamloh laiphuei dongah kat uh. Tedae amih aka hloem rhoek te tui len khuiah lungto bangla a laedil la na voeih.
Nehemiah9:12 Amih te khothaih ah cingmai tung neh na mawt tih
Nehemiah9:13 Sinai tlang ah na suntla tih amih te vaan lamloh na voek. Te vaengah amih te a thuem laitloeknah neh oltak olkhueng khaw
Nehemiah9:14 Namah kah cimcaihnah Sabbath te amih na ming sak tih olpaek
Nehemiah9:15 Amih kah khokha khuiah khaw amih te vaan lamkah buh na paek. A tuihalh khuiah amih te thaelpang khui lamkah tui na paek. Amih taengah khohmuen pang hamla kun ham khaw na thui pah. Te te amih taengah paek ham na kut na thueng coeng.
Nehemiah9:16 Tedae amih neh a pa rhoek te lokhak uh tih a rhawn te a mangkhak sak uh. Te dongah na olpaek te hnatun uh pawh.
Nehemiah9:17 Hnatun ham a aal uh tih namah kah khobaerhambae te poek uh pawh. Te te amih taengah na saii dae a rhawn mangkhak uh tih
Nehemiah9:18 Amamih ham mueihlawn vaitoca a saii uh vaengah pataeng khaw
Nehemiah9:19 Namah tah na haidamnah len tih amih na khosoek ah hnoo pawh. Longpuei ah amih mawt hamla khothaih ah amih hmaikah cingmai tung kha a nong moenih. Hmai tung loh khoyin ah amih te a tue tih longpuei ah te pongpa uh.
Nehemiah9:20 Amih cangbam hamla na Mueihla then te na paek. Na manna te amih ka lamloh na hloh moenih. Amih kah tuihalh vaengah khaw amih te tui na paek.
Nehemiah9:21 Amih te kum sawmli na cangbam tih khosoek ah a vawt uh moenih. A himbai khaw hmawn pawt tih a kho khaw phat uh pawh.
Nehemiah9:22 Amih te ram neh pilnam na paek tih a kaelcong lam khaw amih na phaeng. Te dongah Sihon khohmuen
Nehemiah9:23 Amih koca rhoek te vaan kah aisi bangla na ping sak tih amih te khohmuen pakhat la na thak. Te te a napa rhoek taengah khaw kun sak ham neh pang sak ham na thui coeng.
Nehemiah9:24 A ca rhoek te kun uh tih khohmuen te a pang uh. Te vaengah amih mikhmuh ah khohmuen kah khosa Kanaan rhoek te na kunyun sak. Te rhoek te a manghai khaw
Nehemiah9:25 Te vaengah khopuei cakrhuet neh khohmuen laithen rhoek a loh uh. Thennah cungkuem aka bae im khaw
Nehemiah9:26 Te pataeng a koek tih nang te n'tloelh uh. Na olkhueng te a nam la a rhoe uh tih amih te namah taengla mael sak ham amih taengah aka laipai na tonghma rhoek te a ngawn uh phoeiah kokhahnah muep a saii uh.
Nehemiah9:27 Te dongah amih te a rhal kut ah na paek tih amih te a daengdaeh uh. Tedae amih kah citcai tue ah tah namah taengah pang uh tih namah loh vaan lamkah na yaak. Te cakhaw na haidamnah a len neh amih te khangnah te khangnah na paek tih amih te a rhal kut lamloh na khang.
Nehemiah9:28 Te phoeiah amih te na mikhmuh ah boethae saii ham a muel la mael uh. Te dongah amih te a thunkha kut dongla na hnoo tih amih te a taemrhai uh. Te vaengah mael uh tih namah taengah a pang uh hatah namah loh vaan lamkah na yaak. A tue te yet khuiah amih te na haidamnah neh na huul.
Nehemiah9:29 Amih te na olkhueng dongla mael sak ham a taengah na rhalrhing sak. Tedae a lokhak uh dongah na olpaek neh na laitloeknah te hnatun uh pawh. Amih taengkah a tholh uh te hlang loh a vai tih amih taengah nunan a hing pah. Te vaengah laengpang a duen uh tih boe a koek uh dongah a rhawn mangkhak neh ol hnatun uh pawh.
Nehemiah9:30 Amih te kum a sen na dangrhoek tih amih taengah na Mueihla neh na tonghma rhoek kut lamloh na rhalrhing dae hnakaeng uh pawh. Te dongah amih te diklai pilnam kut ah na paek.
Nehemiah9:31 Tedae na haidamnah a len dongah amih te a bawtnah hil na saii moenih. Namah te lungvatnah neh thinphoei Pathen la na om dongah amih te na hnoo moenih.
Nehemiah9:32 Te dongah kaimih Pathen tah boeilen hlangrhalh neh rhih om Pathen pawn ni. Paipi neh sitlohnah khaw a ngaithuen. Bongboepnah cungkuem he na mikhmuh ah a mailai moenih. Te te kaimih soah
Nehemiah9:33 Kaimih taengla aka thoeng boeih soah khaw namah na dueng bal pueng. Oltak la na saii dongah ka boe uh coeng.
Nehemiah9:34 Ka manghai rhoek
Nehemiah9:35 Amih te a ram khuiah khaw na thennah neh a taengah muep na paek. Khohmuen ah hubung neh lothen te amih mikhmuh ah na paek dae na taengah thothueng uh pawt tih a khoboe thae lamloh mael uh pawh.
Nehemiah9:36 Kaimih tah tihnin ah sal la ka poeh uh coeng he. Khohmuen te khaw a thennah neh a thaih caak hamla a pa rhoek taengah na paek coeng dae kaimih tah a khuiah sal la ka om coeng he.
Nehemiah9:37 Ka tholh uh dongah kaimih soah na khueh manghai rhoek ham tah a cangvuei khaw a bom pah. Te vaengah kaimih pum soah aka taemrhai tih ka rhamsa soah a kolonah bangla a saii uh. Te dongah citcai neh muep ka om uh.
Nehemiah9:38 He boeih ham khaw kaimih loh olkamnah ka saii uh tih ka daek uh. Te vaengah kaimih kah mangpa rhoek
