Nehemiah13:1 Te khohnin ah Moses cabu khuikah te pilnam kah a hna ah a tae pah. Te vaengah cabu khuiah te Ammoni neh Moab tah kumhal due Pathen kah hlangping khuila kun sak pawt ham a daek te a hmuh.
Nehemiah13:2 Israel ca rhoek te buh neh
Nehemiah13:3 Olkhueng te a yaak van neh namcom boeih tah Israel taeng lamloh a hoep uh.
Nehemiah13:4 Te hlan vaengah khosoih Eliashib te Tobiah neh a yoei la kaimih kah Pathen im kah imkhan ah khueh.
Nehemiah13:5 Anih ham te imkhan a len a saii pah. Te dongah a hmai ah khocang
Nehemiah13:6 Te vaeng rhuet te Jerusalem ah ka om moenih. Babylon manghai Artaxerxes kah sawmthum kum nit daengah ni manghai taengla ka mael tih khohnin a thoknah manghai taengah ka bih.
Nehemiah13:7 Tedae Jerusalem la ka mael vaengah tah Eliashib loh Tobiah ham boethae a saii te ka yakming. Anih ham te Pathen im kah vongup khuiah khai a saii pah.
Nehemiah13:8 Te lalah kai he muep n'noih dongah Tobiah im kah hnopai boeih te imkhan lamloh poeng la ka voeih pah.
Nehemiah13:9 Ka thui bangla imkhan te a caihcil uh phoeiah ni Pathen im kah hnopai te khaw khocang hmueihtui neh ka mael pueng.
Nehemiah13:10 Levi rhoek buham a moe pawt te khaw ka ming. Te vaengah Levi khaw
Nehemiah13:11 Te dongah ukkung rhoek te ka ho tih
Nehemiah13:12 Te daengah Judah pum loh parha pakhat
Nehemiah13:13 Thakvoh rhoek te khosoih Shelemiah
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pathen aw he ham he kai m'poek lah. Ka Pathen im ham neh a rhaltawt rhoek ham ka saii vanbangla ka sitlohnah te na khoe moenih.
Nehemiah13:15 Amih tue vaengah Judah khui lamloh Sabbath ah misur rhom aka pok
Nehemiah13:16 A khuiah nga neh aka phu boeih aka khuen tih Sabbath vaengah Judah koca rhoek taeng neh Jerusalem ah aka yoi Tyre rhoek loh kho a sak uh.
Nehemiah13:17 Te dongah Judah hlangcoelh rhoek te ka ho tih amih te
Nehemiah13:18 Na pa rhoek loh he he a saii uh moenih a? Te dongah ni mamih kah Pathen loh mamih soah neh khopuei soah he yoethae cungkuem a pai sak. Nangmih loh Sabbath na poeih tih Israel te thinsa na koei thil uh.
Nehemiah13:19 Te dongah Sabbath hlan kah Jerusalem vongka a khup nen tah ka ti nah bangla thohkhaih rhoek a khaih uh. Te vaengah Sabbath a poeng hil a ong uh pawt ham ka thui pah. Ka tueihyoeih rhoek te vongka ah ka pai sak tih Sabbath hnin ah hnorhih puen uh voel pawh.
Nehemiah13:20 Te dongah thimpom rhoek neh hnoyoih cungkuem aka yoi rhoek tah Jerusalem kah vongvoel ah vai khaw hnavoei khaw rhaeh uh.
Nehemiah13:21 Tedae amih te ka rhalrhing sak tih amamih taengah khaw
Nehemiah13:22 Te phoeiah Levi rhoek te khaw a caihcil la om ham
Nehemiah13:23 Te vaeng hnin ah pataeng Judah rhoek loh Ashodi
Nehemiah13:24 A ca rhoek khaw rhakthuem Ashodi ol la cal uh tih amih te pilnam neh pilnam pataeng Judah ol la a voek ham hmat uh pawh.
Nehemiah13:25 Te dongah amih te ka ho tih thae ka phoei. Amih hlang te ka taam tih ka poelh. Amih te Pathen taengah ka toemngam
Nehemiah13:26 Israel manghai Solomon khaw he nen he a tholh dongah moenih a? Namtom te yet lakli ah anih bang manghai a om moenih. A Pathen loh a lungnah la a om dongah anih te Pathen loh Israel boeih soah manghai la a khueh lalah anih te kholong nu rhoek loh a tholh sak.
Nehemiah13:27 He boethae duet boeih saii ham
Nehemiah13:28 Te dongah khosoih len Eliashib capa Joiada koca lamkah Khoroni Sanballat kah a cava khaw ka taeng lamloh ka yong sak.
Nehemiah13:29 Ka Pathen aw amih te poek lah. A khosoihbi khaw
Nehemiah13:30 Amih te kholong boeih taeng lamloh ka caihcil tih hamsum te khosoih la
Nehemiah13:31 A tue a caeng vaengkah nawnnah thing ham neh thaihcuek ham khaw
Esther1:1 Amah Ahasuerus tue vaengah he he om. Ahasuerus tah India lamloh Kusah duela paeng ya pakul parhih a manghai thil.
Esther1:2 Te vaeng tue ah manghai Ahasuerus tah Shushan rhalmah im kah a ram ngolkhoel dongah ngol.
Esther1:3 A manghai nah kum thum vaengah a mangpa rhoek neh a sal boeih ham buhkoknah a saii. Te vaengah a mikhmuh ah Persia tatthai khaw
Esther1:4 Te vaengah a ram kah thangpomnah khuehtawn neh
Esther1:5 Khohnin a cup vaengah tah manghai loh Shushan rhalmah im ah a hmuh pilnam
Esther1:6 Hniyan a bok neh a thim khaw baibok daidi rhui neh cak hnaai te a bang. Lungphaih a ling
Esther1:7 Manghai kut kah bangla a ram kah misurtui khaw phul tih hnopai khaw hnopai neh a thovael phoeiah
Esther1:8 Te vaengah a okcaknah te olkhan bangla tanolh pawh. Manghai loh a im kah boeiping boeih te hlang neh hlang kah kolonah bangla saii ham a uen.
Esther1:9 Vashti manghainu long khaw manghai Ahasuerus kah manghai im ah nu buhkoknah a saii.
Esther1:10 A hnin rhih vaengah tah misurtui lamloh manghai kah lungbuei khaw umya coeng. Te dongah manghai Ahasuerus mikhmuh kah aka thotat imkhoem parhih Mehuman
Esther1:11 Vashti manghainu te manghai rhuisam neh manghai mikhmuh ah khuen ham a thui pah. Anih te a mueimae a then dongah a sakthen te pilnam neh mangpa rhoek tueng ham a ngaih.
Esther1:12 Tedae manghai kah dumlai dongah imkhoem kut neh caeh ham tah Vashti manghainu loh a aal. Te dongah manghai khaw bahoeng a thintoek tih a kosi loh a khuiah a alh pah.
Esther1:13 Te dongah manghai loh olkhan neh dumlai aka ming boeih kah mikhmuh ah manghai kah ol vanbangla a tue aka ming hlang cueih rhoek
Esther1:14 amah taengah aka yoei Persia mangpa parhih Karshena
Esther1:15 “Olkhan dongkah bangla manghainu Vashti te metlam ka saii eh? Imkhoem kut dongkah manghai Ahasuerus olpaek te a vai moenih
Esther1:16 Te vaengah Memukan loh manghai neh mangpa rhoek kah mikhmuh ah
Esther1:17 Manghainu kah ol he huta boeih taengla pawk vetih a mikhmuh ah a boei a hnaep pawn ni. Amih long te
Esther1:18 Tahae khohnin ah Persia neh Madai boeinu rhoek
Esther1:19 Manghai ham a then mak atah manghai ol te a mikhmuh lamloh tueih saeh. Persia neh Madai olkhan khuiah daek saeh. Te dongah te te poe boel saeh lamtah Vashti te manghai Ahasuerus mikhmuh ah mop voel boel saeh. Anih kah ram khaw manghai loh anih lakah aka then a hui taengla pae saeh.
Esther1:20 Ram he len cakhaw a ram tom ah manghai kah oltloeknah a saii te a yaak daengah ni huta boeih
Esther1:21 Ol te manghai neh mangpa rhoek kah mikhmuh ah then coeng. Te dongah manghai loh Memukan ol bangla a saii.
Esther1:22 Te phoeiah tah manghai kah paeng tom la cabu a pat. Paeng pakhat taengah amah paeng kah ca neh
Esther2:1 He ol hnukah tah manghai Ahasuerus kah kosi tah daeh tih Vashti khaw
Esther2:2 Te dongah amah aka bong manghai tueihyoeih loh
Esther2:3 Manghai loh a ram kah paeng tom ah hlangtawt khueh saeh lamtah a mueimae aka then hula
Esther2:4 Te vaengah manghai mik ah aka then hula te tah Vashti yueng la manghai saeh
Esther2:5 Shushan rhalmah im ah Judah hlang om tih a ming te Benjamin hlang
Esther2:6 Anih te khaw Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh Judah manghai Jekoniah a poelyoe vaengah Jerusalem lamloh vangsawn la a poelyoe van.
Esther2:7 Te vaengah Mordekai loh a panoe canu Esther Hadassah te a poeh. Esther te a manu a napa om voel pawh. Hula tah a sakthen suisak neh a mueimae khaw then. A manu a napa a duek vaengah ni anih te Mordekai loh amah taengah a canu la a loh.
Esther2:8 Manghai ol neh a olkhan te a yaak sak vaengah tah hula rhoek te Shushan rhalmah im kah Hegai kut dongla muep a coi. Te dongah Esther khaw manghai im kah huta aka ngaithuen Hegai kut dongla a khuen.
Esther2:9 Hula te a mik ah cop. Te dongah a mikhmuh ah sitlohnah a dang tih a thentui khaw a let sak. Anih ham a maehvae te khaw a paek. Anih te sawt hamla manghai im lamloh tanu parhih a paek. Te phoeiah Esther neh a tanu rhoek te huta im then la puen.
Esther2:10 Mordekai loh thui pawt ham a taengah a uen dongah Esther loh a pilnam neh a pacaboeina kawng te thui pawh.
Esther2:11 Te vaengah Mordekai tah Esther kah sadingnah neh anih te metla a saii ming hamla huta im kah vongtung hmai ah a hnin
Esther2:12 Hula
Esther2:13 Te tlam te manghai taengla hula a caeh vaengah tah a thui boeih te a taengah a paek tih anih te huta im lamloh manghai im la a khuen.
Esther2:14 Anih te hlaem vaengah kun tih mincang ah tah manghai yula aka ngaithuen imkhoem Shaashgaz kut dongkah huta im a pabae la mael. Anih te manghai loh a ngaih tih a ming neh a khue pawt atah manghai taengla koep kun voel pawh.
Esther2:15 Te vaengah Mordekai loh amah canu la a loh a napanoe Abihail canu Esther khaw manghai taengla a caeh ham aitlaeng loh a pha. Tedae huta aka ngaithuen manghai imkhoem Hegai kah a uen voel ah hno a tloe a bih moenih. Te dongah Esther tah anih aka so boeih kah mikhmuh ah mikdaithen aka dang la om.
Esther2:16 Te dongah a manghai nah kum rhih
Esther2:17 Manghai loh Esther te huta boeih lakah a lungnah dongah mikdaithen khaw a phueih. oila boeih lakah khaw a mikhmuh ah a sitlohnah a dang. Te dongah manghai rhuisam te a lu ah a khuem sak tih anih te Vashti yueng la a manghai sak.
Esther2:18 Te phoeiah manghai loh a mangpa rhoek neh a sal boeih ham buhkoknah muep a saii pah. Esther kah buhkoknah neh bihoepnah khaw paeng ah a saii tih manghai kut van la buham a tael.
Esther2:19 A pabae la oila rhoek a coi vaengah Mordekai te manghai vongka ah ngol.
Esther2:20 Mordekai loh a taengah a uen vanbangla Esther loh a pacaboeina kawng neh a pilnam kawng te thui pawh. Esther tah Mordekai kah olpaek aka ngai la om tih te te a rhoengnah.
Esther2:21 Te vaeng tue ah Mordekai te manghai vongka ah a ngol hatah cingkhaa aka ngaithuen manghai kah imkhoem rhoi Bigthan neh Teresh tah a thintoek tih manghai Ahasuerus te kut hlah thil ham a mae rhoi.
Esther2:22 Tedae ol te Mordekai loh a ming dongah manghainu Esther taengla puen. Esther loh manghai taengah Mordekai ming neh a thui pah.
Esther2:23 Ol te a cae vaengah phoe tangloeng tih amih rhoi te thing dongah a kuiok sak. Te te manghai mikhmuh kah khokhuen olka cabu dongah a daek.
Esther3:1 He ol hnuk ah tah manghai Ahasuerus loh Agagite Hammedatha capa Haman te a pantai sak tih anih te a ludoeng. A ngokhoel te a taengkah mangpa rhoek boeih so ah a khueh pah.
Esther3:2 Manghai sal boeih tah manghai vongka ah cungkueng uh tih Haman taengah bakop uh. He dongah he anih te manghai loh a uen coeng dae Mordekai tah cungkueng pawt tih bakop pawh.
Esther3:3 Manghai vongka kah manghai sal rhoek loh Mordekai te
Esther3:4 Anih te a hnin
Esther3:5 Anih taengah Mordekai cungkueng neh a bakop pawt te Haman loh a hmuh vaengah Haman tah kosi la hah.
Esther3:6 Mordekai kah pilnam kawng te a taengah a puen pa uh dongah amah bueng loh Mordekai kut hlah thil ham a mik neh rhep a hnaep. Te dongah Haman loh Ahasuerus ram pum ah Mordekai kah pilnam
Esther3:7 Ahasuerus manghai kah kum hlai nit
Esther3:8 Te phoeiah Haman loh manghai Ahasuerus taengah pilnam pakhat om tih yaal uh coeng. Na paeng ram pum ah pilnam laklo ah yaal uh. Tedae amih kah khoboe te mah pilnam boeih taeng lamloh a thovael uh tih manghai khoboe khaw a vai uh moenih. Manghai taengah a duem uh ham khaw a tluk moenih.
Esther3:9 Manghai ham a then mak atah
Esther3:10 Te vaengah manghai loh a kutcaeng te a kut dong lamloh a dul tih Judah aka daengdaeh Agagite Hammedatha capa Haman taengla a paek.
Esther3:11 Manghai loh Haman taengah
Esther3:12 Te dongah lamhmacuek hla
Esther3:13 Hla hlai nit
Esther3:14 Paeng
Esther3:15 Tatloe rhoek khaw manghai ol bangla a khuen uh paitok. Oltlah te Shushan rhalmah im ah a saii tangloeng dae manghai neh Haman te a ok ham kho a sak rhoi dongah Shushan khopuei khaw a lukil.
Esther4:1 A saii boeih te Mordekai loh a ming. Te dongah Mordekai loh a himbai te a phen tih tlamhni neh hmaiphu a yil. Khopuei khui ah cet tih a pang khaw a len la hlut hlut pang.
Esther4:2 Tedae tlamhni pueinak neh manghai vongka khuila a kun uh noek pawt dongah manghai vongka hmai hil tah cet.
Esther4:3 A paeng
Esther4:4 Te vaengah Esther kah hula rhoek neh a imkhoem te cet tih a taengah a puen pah dongah manghainu khaw sut poi. Te dongah Mordekai te himbai bai sak ham neh a dongkah a tlamhni te dul pah ham a tueih pah dae doe pawh.
Esther4:5 Esther loh a mikhmuh ah aka thotat manghai imkhoem Hathakh te a khue tih Mordekai kawng te metla om tih mebang khaw ming hamla a uen.
Esther4:6 Hathakh khaw khopuei toltung ah manghai vongka hmai kah Mordekai taengla cet.
Esther4:7 Te vaengah Mordekai loh amah aka mah boeih khaw
Esther4:8 amih mitmoeng sak ham Shushan ah olkhan catlaep ca a paek te Esther tueng ham neh a taengah thui pah ham khaw Hathakh taengah a paek. Esther te manghai taengah amah hloep ham aka kun la
Esther4:9 Hathakh te mael tih Mordekai ol te Esther taengah a thui pah.
Esther4:10 Esther loh Hathakh te a voek tih Mordekai ham te anih taengah
Esther4:11 “Manghai kah sal rhoek boeih neh pilnam khaw
Esther4:12 Esther kah ol te Mordekai taengla a puen pa uh.
Esther4:13 Mordekai loh Esther taengla ol a mael hamla
Esther4:14 Tahae tue ah he kholak ah na ngam khaw na ngam mai khaming. Judah ham khangnah he hmuen tloe lamloh ha pai bitni. Tedae namah neh na pa imkhui loh na milh uh khaw u long a ming. Tedae hae tue vaengkah ham manghai la na poeh?” a ti nah.
Esther4:15 Te dongah Esther loh Mordekai taengla ol a mael tih
Esther4:16 “Cet laeh
Esther4:17 Te dongah Mordekai te cet tih Esther loh a taengah a uen bangla boeih a saii.
Esther5:1 A hnin thum dongah tah Esther loh manghai himbai a bai tih manghai im hmai kah
Esther5:2 Manghai loh vongup ah aka pai manghainu Esther te a hmuh. A mikhmuh ah khaw mikdaithen a phueih dongah manghai loh a kut dongkah sui mancai te Esther taengla a doe. Esther te a nawn vaengah mancai kah a hmuidong te a ben.
Esther5:3 Te phoeiah anih te manghai loh
Esther5:4 Te vaengah Esther loh
Esther5:5 Te dongah Esther ol te ngai hamla saii ham manghai loh Haman taengah a thui paitok. Te phoeiah manghai neh Haman loh Esther kah a saii buhkoknah te a paan.
Esther5:6 Misurtui neh buhkoknah a om vaengah manghai loh Esther te
Esther5:7 Te vaengah Esther loh
Esther5:8 Manghai mik ah mikdaithen ka hmuh atah
Esther5:9 Te khohnin ah Haman tah kohoe neh lungbuei then la vuenva. Tedae Haman loh Mordekai te manghai vongka ah a hmuh hatah thoh pah pawt tih a taengah tonga pawh. Te dongah Haman loh Mordekai te kosi a hong thil.
Esther5:10 Tedae Haman te thiim uh tih amah im la pawk. Te phoeiah hlang a tueih tih a lungnah rhoek neh a yuu Zeresh te a khue.
Esther5:11 Haman loh amih taengah a khuehtawn thangpomnah khaw
Esther5:12 Te phoeiah Haman loh
Esther5:13 Tedae te boeih he kai neh a tluk moenih. Hnin takuem ah manghai vongka kah aka ngol Judah Mordekai te vawk ka hmuh
Esther5:14 Te dongah anih te a yuu Zeresh neh a lungnah boeih loh
Esther6:1 Te kah khoyin ah tah manghai te a ih hoelh. Te dongah khokhuen olka poekkoepnah cabu te loh hamla a thui pah. Te vaengah manghai mikhmuh ah aka tae pah ham khaw om uh.
Esther6:2 Te vaengah cingkhaa aka tawt
Esther6:3 Te dongah manghai loh
Esther6:4 Manghai loh
Esther6:5 Te vaengah manghai kah tueihyoeih rhoek loh a taengah
Esther6:6 Haman a kun van neh a taengah
Esther6:7 Te dongah Haman loh manghai taengah
Esther6:8 manghai amah pum dongkah a bai nawn manghai pueinak
Esther6:9 Te phoeiah pueinak neh marhang te angrhaeng manghai kah mangpa rhoek lamkah pakhat kut ah pae saeh. Te vaengah manghai loh amah kah umponah dongah khueh ham a ngaih hlang te bai sak saeh. Te phoeiah anih te khopuei toltung la marhang dongah ngol sak saeh lamtah a hmai ah
Esther6:10 Te phoeiah manghai loh Haman te
Esther6:11 Te dongah Haman loh pueinak neh marhang te a loh tih Mordekai te a bai sak. Te phoeiah anih khopuei toltung la a ngol sak tih a hmai ah
Esther6:12 Te phoeiah Mordekai te manghai vongka la mael. Tedae Haman tah a im la mael paitok tih rhahdoe cangpoem ah a lu te a muei.
Esther6:13 Haman loh a taengah aka thoeng boeih te a yuu Zeresh taeng neh a lungnah boeih taengah a thui. Te vaengah amah te a hlangcueih rhoek neh a yuu Zeresh loh
Esther6:14 Anih te a thui uh li vaengah manghai imkhoem rhoek ha pawk uh tih Haman te Esther kah a saii buhkoknah kung la tlek a khuen uh.
Esther7:1 Manghai neh Haman te manghainu Esther neh ok hamla cet.
Esther7:2 Buhkoknah a hnin bae dongkah misurtui bal a ok vaengah tah manghai loh Esther te

Esther7:4 Kamah khaw
Esther7:5 Manghai Ahasuerus te cal tih Esther manghainu taengah
Esther7:6 Te vaengah Esther loh
Esther7:7 Manghai khaw buhkoknah misurtui kung lamloh a kosi neh thoo tih impuei dum la cet. Tedae Haman tah boethae loh manghai taeng lamkah amah a khah te a hmuh dongah a hinglu kongah manghainu Esther te hloep ham pai pueng.
Esther7:8 Te phoeiah manghai te impuei dum lamloh buhkoknah im kah misurtui kung la mael. Te vaengah Haman te Esther kah a thingkong soah ana bakop pah. Te dongah manghai loh
Esther7:9 Te vaengah imkhoem rhoek khui lamkah pakhat Harbona loh manghai mikhmuh ah
Esther7:10 Mordekai ham a tawn pah thing dongah Haman te a kuiok sak uh van daengah ni manghai kah kosi khaw a daeh pueng.
Esther8:1 Amah te khohnin ah manghai Ahasuerus loh Judah
Esther8:2 Manghai loh Haman lamkah aka mael a kutcaeng te a dul tih Mordekai taengla a paek. Esther loh Mordekai te Haman im ah a khueh.
Esther8:3 Te phoeiah Esther loh a rhaep tih manghai mikhmuh ah a thui pah. A kho kung ah yalh tih rhap. Te vaengah a taengah Agagite Haman kah boethae neh Judah rhoek a taeng thil a kopoek te paa sak ham a bih.
Esther8:4 Te vaengah manghai loh Esther taengla sui mancai a doe. Te dongah Esther te thoo tih manghai mikhmuh ah pai.
Esther8:5 Te phoeiah
Esther8:6 Boethae loh ka pilnam a tlak thil ham te metlam ka ueh vetih ka sawt eh? Ka pacaboeina kah mitmoengnah ham te metlam ka ueh vetih ka sawt eh?” a ti nah.
Esther8:7 Te vaengah manghai Ahasuerus loh manghainu Esther taeng neh Judah Mordekai taengah
Esther8:8 Nangmih loh Judah rhoek ham te na mik ah then na ti bangla manghai ming neh daek pah laeh. Te phoeiah ca te manghai kah kutcaeng neh hnah thil. Manghai ming neh a daek tih manghai kutcaeng neh a hnah thil tah a yueh ham voel moenih
Esther8:9 Te dongah te khohnin ah manghai kah cadaek rhoek khue uh thae. Te te a kum kul kum thum nah
Esther8:10 Manghai Ahasuerus ming neh a daek tih manghai kutcaeng a hnah thil. Te phoeiah cabu te marhangpa
Esther8:11 Manghai loh Judah rhoek te khopuei
Esther8:12 Te te hla hlai nit
Esther8:13 Catlaep ca te paeng
Esther8:14 Boei marhang dongah aka ngol tatloe rhoek loh tlek a thak uh. Te phoeiah manghai ol neh Shushan rhalmah im ah olkhan a paek te a khuen paitok.
Esther8:15 Mordekai khaw manghai mikhmuh lamloh manghai pueinak
Esther8:16 Judah ham khaw khosae neh kohoenah
Esther8:17 Paeng neh paeng tom ah khaw
Esther9:1 Amah hla hlai nit
Esther9:2 Judah rhoek khaw amih boethae aka tlap thil rhoek te kut hlah ham manghai Ahasuerus paeng tom kah amamih khopuei ah tingtun uh. Pilnam boeih soah a birhihnah loh a tlak dongah amih mikhmuh ah hlang a pai thai moenih.
Esther9:3 Paeng kah mangpa boeih neh khoboei rhoek khaw
Esther9:4 Mordekai te manghai im ah len tih a thang khaw paeng tom ah cet. Mordekai he hlang la pongpa coeng tih pantai coeng.
Esther9:5 Judah loh a thunkha boeih te cunghang hmasoe neh
Esther9:6 Shushan rhalmah im ah Judah rhoek a ngawn tih hlang ya nga milh.
Esther9:7 Te phoeiah Parshandatha
Esther9:8 Poratha
Esther9:9 Parmashta
Esther9:10 Judah aka daengdaeh Hammedatha capa Haman koca parha te a ngawn uh. Tedae kutbuem dongah tah a kut te hlah uh pawh.
Esther9:11 Te khohnin ah Shushan rhalmah im kah a ngawn hlangmi rhoek te manghai mikhmuh la pawk.
Esther9:12 Manghai loh Esther manghainu taengah
Esther9:13 Te dongah Esther loh
Esther9:14 Te dongah manghai loh te tlam te saii ham om
Esther9:15 Judah
Esther9:16 Manghai paeng khuikah Judah aka coih rhoek khaw amamih hinglu te pai puei ham
Esther9:17 Adar hla kah hnin hlai thum phoeikah a hlai li dongah tah amah duem uh. Te te buhkoknah neh kohoenah hnin la a khueh uh.
Esther9:18 Judah khuiah khaw Shushan kah Judah rhoek tah a hlai thum ah
Esther9:19 Te dongah vongah khopuei ah vangca hlang la kho aka sa Judah rhoek long tah Adar hla kah hnin hlai li te kohoenah neh buhkoknah la
Esther9:20 Te ol te Mordekai loh a daek tih manghai Ahasuerus paeng pum kah Judah hlang a yoei a hla boeih taengah ca a pat.
Esther9:21 Kum takuem kum khat dongkah Adar hla hnin hlai li neh a hlai nga hnin vaengah te te saii ham om tila amih soah a cak sak.
Esther9:22 Te khohnin van vaengah amih Judah rhoek ham khaw a thunkha rhoek taeng lamloh duem uh. Tekah hla vaengah tah amih ham kothaenah te kohoenah la
Esther9:23 Saii hamla a phueng uh tih Mordekai loh amih ham a daek pah te tah Judah rhoek long khaw a doe uh.
Esther9:24 Judah pum aka daengdaeh Agagite Hammedatha capa Haman loh amih Judah rhoek te milh sak ham a moeh. Amih khawkkhek ham neh milh sak ham Pur hmulung te a naan bal.
Esther9:25 Tedae manghai mikhmuh ah a phoe vaengah tah anih kah kopoek thae neh Judah rhoek a moeh thil te amah lu ah tla tih amah neh a ca rhoek te thing dongah kuiok sak ham khaw ca neh mael ham a thui.
Esther9:26 Te dongah te khohnin te Pur ming lamloh Purim la a khue uh. Teka ca dongah ol boeih a om dongah he dong lamloh mebang a hmuh uh tih amih taengah mebang a thoeng khaw a sawt uh.
Esther9:27 Judah rhoek loh a doe
Esther9:28 Te khohnin te poek uh tih thawnpuei neh cadilcahma loh a cako
Esther9:29 Abihail canu Esther manghainu neh Judah Mordekai loh Purim ca he pabae la cak sak ham saithainah boeih neh a daek.
Esther9:30 Ngaimongnah oltak ol te manghai Ahasuerus kah paeng ya pakul parhih kah Judah boeih taengah ca a pat.
Esther9:31 Purim hnin he amah tuetang vaengah Judah Mordekai neh Esther manghainu loh amih ham a thoh pah vanbangla a thoh puei uh. Te vaengah amamih hinglu ham neh a tiingan ham khaw yaehnah neh a pang ol neh a saii uh.
Esther9:32 Esther kah olpaek he Purim ol la a cak sak tih cabu khuiah khaw a daek.
Esther10:1 Te te manghai Ahasuerus loh khohmuen neh tuipuei sanglak ah Ahasuerus kah saldong te a paek.
Esther10:2 Mordekai kah a saithainah bitat boeih neh a thayung thamal khaw
Esther10:3 Judah Mordekai he manghai Ahasuerus kah hnukthoi la om tih Judah lakli ah khaw len. A manuca boeih loh a moeithen tih a pilnam ham hnothen a toem pah. A tiingan boeih kah rhoepnah te a thui.
Job1:1 Hlang pakhat
Job1:2 Anih te capa parhih neh canu pathum a sak.
Job1:3 Anih kah boiva he boiva thawng rhih
Job1:4 A ca rhoek khaw cet uh tih amah khohnin vaengah amah im kah buhkoknah rhip a saii uh. Te vaengah a ngannu pathum te a tah uh tih a khue uh. A ngannu rhoek khaw amih neh a caak a ok uh.
Job1:5 Buhkoknah khohnin a poeng van neh Job loh amih te a tah tih a ciim. “Job loh ka ca rhoek he tholh uh mai khaming
Job1:6 Hnin at ah Pathen ca rhoek te cet uh tih BOEIPA taengah pai. Te vaengah Satan khaw amih lakli ah cet.
Job1:7 BOEIPA loh Satan te
Job1:8 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Satan te
Job1:9 Satan loh BOEIPA te a doo tih
Job1:10 Namah loh anih ham neh a imkhui ham khaw
Job1:11 Tedae na kut na hlah tih anih hut te boeih ben lah
Job1:12 BOEIPA loh Satan te
Job1:13 Hnin at vaengah a capa rhoek neh a canu rhoek loh a maya caming im ah buh a caak uh tih misurtui a ok uh.
Job1:14 Te vaengah Job taengla puencawn ha pawk tih
Job1:15 Tedae Sheba tah capit uh tih te rhoek te a mawt coeng. Camoe rhoek te khaw cunghang ha neh a ngawn uh. Kai kamah bueng he nang taengah aka puen la dawk ka loeih
Job1:16 Te te a thui li vaengah pakhat ha pawk tih
Job1:17 Te te thui li vaengah pakhat ha pawk tih
Job1:18 Te te a thui vaengah pakhat a pawk pah tih
Job1:19 Te vaengah rhalvang khosoek lamloh khohli puei tarha cu tih im kil pali te a nen. Te dongah camoe rhoek a cungku thil tih duek uh. Kai kamah bueng he nang taengah aka puen la dawk ka loeih
Job1:20 Te vaengah Job thoo tih a hnikul te a phen. A lu te a vok. Diklai la khup tih bakop.
Job1:21 Te phoeiah
Job1:22 A cungkuem dongah he Job tholh pawt tih Pathen taengah khaw a hohap a paek moenih.
Job2:1 A tue a pha vaengah Pathen ca rhoek loh cet uh BOEIPA taengah pai uh. Te vaengah Satan khaw BOEIPA taengah pai hamla amih lakli ah cet.
Job2:2 BOEIPA loh Satan te
Job2:3 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Satan te
Job2:4 Satan loh BOEIPA te a doo tih
Job2:5 Tedae na kut hlah laeh lamtah a rhuh neh a saa te ben lah saeh
Job2:6 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Satan te
Job2:7 Te dongah Satan te BOEIPA mikhmuh lamloh khoe uh tih Job te buhlut thae neh a kho khopha lamloh a luki duela a ngawn.
Job2:8 Te te khoeih hamla amah loh paikaek a loh tih hmaiphu khui ah ngol.
Job2:9 Te vaengah anih te a yuu loh
Job2:10 Tedae amah te na ang cal la na cal. Pathen taeng lamloh hnothen n'doe tih yoethae he n'doe mahpawt nim?” a ti nah. Te boeih khuiah pataeng Job he a hmuilai nen khaw a tholh moenih.
Job2:11 Anih soah yoethae cungkuem a pai he Job kah a hui pathum a yaak. Te vaengah Temani Eliphaz
Job2:12 A hla lamloh a mik te a huel uh vaengah amah te hmat uh pawh. Te dongah a ol a huel uh tih rhap uh. A hnikul te rhip a phen uh tih laipi te a lu soah vaan la a haeh uh.
Job2:13 Anih te diklai dongah khothaih hnin rhih neh khoyin hnin rhih a ngol puei uh. Thakkhoeihnah loh mat a tluek te a hmuh dongah a taengah ol cal uh pawh.
Job3:1 Te phoeiah Job a ka te a ang tih a khohnin te a tap.
Job3:2 Te vaengah Job loh a doo tih
Job3:3 Amah kah thang nah khohnin neh
Job3:4 Te khohnin te a hmuep la om palueng vetih
Job3:5 Te te hmaisuep neh dueknah hlipkhup loh suk saeh. A soah khomai yaal saeh lamtah
Job3:6 Tekah hlaem te a hmuep loh lo saeh lamtah kum khat kah khohnin dongah a kohoe boel saeh
Job3:7 Tekah hlaem te pumhong la om saeh lamtah a khuiah omngaih laa cuen boel saeh ne.
Job3:8 Khohnin thae aka phoei thil tih
Job3:9 Hlaemhmah aisi khaw hmuep saeh lamtah
Job3:10 Ka bungko thohkhaih te a khaih mai vetih thakthaenah he ka mik lamloh a thuh mai kolla.
Job3:11 Balae tih bung khuiah ka duek pawh. Bungko lamloh ka thoeng tih ka pal hae.
Job3:12 Balae tih khuklu loh kai n'doe
Job3:13 Ka yalh to palueng koinih la ka ip mong vetih ka duem lah ni.
Job3:14 Manghai rhoek neh a imrhong aka thoh diklai olrhoep rhoek taengla
Job3:15 Amih taengkah sui mangpa rhoek neh a im ah tangka aka hawn rhoek taengah.
Job3:16 Rhumpu bangla n'thuh kanoek vetih vangnah aka hmuh noek pawh camoe rhoek bangla ka om pawt mako.
Job3:17 Teah te halang rhoek loh khoponah a toeng uh tih thadueng aka bawt khaw pahoi duem.
Job3:18 Thongtla rhoek te rhenten rhalthal uh tih
Job3:19 Tanoe neh kangham khaw amah la om pahoi tih sal khaw a boei taeng lamloh sayalh coeng.
Job3:20 Balae tih thakthaekung taengah vangnah
Job3:21 Dueknah hamla aka rhingda long khaw dang hae pawt tih kawn lakah te te a too.
Job3:22 Phuel a hmuh uh vaengah omngaihnah neh a ngaingaih la a kohoe uh.
Job3:23 A longpuei te hlang ham tah a thuh dae a taengah Pathen loh a mak pah.
Job3:24 Ka buh hmai ah ka hueinah ha pawk tih ka kawknah he tui bangla pha.
Job3:25 Birhihnah neh ka birhih akhaw kamah m'vuei tih ka rhih nawn te khaw kamah taengah thoeng.
Job3:26 Ka dingsuek pawt tih ka mong pawh
Job4:1 Te vaengah Temani hoel Eliphaz loh a doo.
Job4:2 Te vaengah nang te ol neh n'noemcai saeh
Job4:3 Muep na toel tih kut kha rhoek khaw na talong coeng te.
Job4:4 Aka paloe rhoek te na olthui loh a thoh tih khuklu aka khun khaw na caang sak.
Job4:5 Tedae namah taengla ha loe tih na ngak coeng
Job4:6 Na hinyahnah
Job4:7 Poek van laeh
Job4:8 Ka hmuh vanbangla boethae aka thoe tih aka soem khaw amah long ni thakthaenah a ah.
Job4:9 Pathen kah hiil dongah milh uh tih a thintoek khohli dongah khap uh coeng.
Job4:10 Sathueng khaw kawknah neh sathuengca khaw a ol neh om dae sathuengca khaw a no tloong.
Job4:11 Maeh a mueh lamloh sathueng te milh tih sathuengnu ca rhoek khaw pam uh.
Job4:12 Ka taengah ol a huen tih a olduem loh kai hna a lat sak.
Job4:13 Hlang he khoyin olphong lamkah pomnah khuiah a ih muelh vaengah.
Job4:14 birhihnah loh kai m'mah tih thuennah neh ka rhuh boeih a rhih sak.
Job4:15 Mueihla loh ka maelhmai a pah vaengah ka mul ka saa poenghu.
Job4:16 A pai vaengah khaw a mueimae ka hmat moenih. A muei tah ka mikhmuh ah om tih bidip ol a yaak.
Job4:17 Pathen lakah hlanghing he tang tih anih aka saii lakah ah hlang caihcil ngai a?
Job4:18 A sal rhoek soah tangnah pawt tih a puencawn te a lolh la a khueh atah
Job4:19 Laipi neh lai im dongah kho aka sa aisat te bungbo hmai ah a khoengim pop coeng.
Job4:20 Mincang lamloh hlaem duela a phop te a yoeyah la a milh khaw mingpha pawh.
Job4:21 Amih lamkah a a hlangrhuel a phil pah vaengah a duek uh moenih a? Te dongah cueihnah neh a om moenih a?
Job5:1 Khue laeh nang aka doo om nim? U hlangcim taengah na mael ve.
Job5:2 Aka ang te konoinah loh a ngawn tih hloih loh thatlainah a duek sak.
Job5:3 Aka ang loh a yung a hlak ka hmuh vaengah a tolkhoeng buengrhuet ka tap.
Job5:4 A ca rhoek te khangnah lamloh lakhla tih vongka ah a phop uh vaengah aka huul om pawh.
Job5:5 A cangah te bungpong loh a caak pah tih hlinghang lamkah a loh dae a thadueng te tuihal loh a mam pah.
Job5:6 Laipi lamloh boethae thoeng pawt tih diklai lamloh thakthaenah a poe bal moenih.
Job5:7 Tedae hlang he thakthaenah khuiah a sak tih rhaek ca rhoek bangla ding hang.
Job5:8 Tedae kai tah Pathen te ka toem vetih Pathen taengah ni ka dumlai khaw ka hal eh.
Job5:9 A len la a saii vaengah khobaerhambae te khenah lek pawh
Job5:10 Diklai hman ah khotlan a paek tih lohma li ah tui a hlah.
Job5:11 Tlarhoel rhoek te hmuensang ah a khueh tih kopang rhoek te khangnah khuila a hoeptlang.
Job5:12 Aka thaai kah kopoek te a phae tih a kut loh lungming cueihnah saii thai pawh.
Job5:13 Aka cueih khaw amah kah rhaithinah neh a tuuk tih aka hlang hnuei kah cilsuep he hma paitok.
Job5:14 Khothaih ah a hmuep neh hum uh tih khothun ah khoyin bangla a phatuem uh.
Job5:15 Khodaeng te amih ka dongkah cunghang lamlong khaw tlungluen kut lamloh a khang.
Job5:16 Te dongah tattloel ham ngaiuepnah om dae dumlai loh amah ka a buem.
Job5:17 Pathen loh a toel hlanghing he a yoethen tih Tlungthang kah thuituennah sit boeh.
Job5:18 Amah loh a tloh sak dae a hma te a poi pah tih a kut dongah hoeih uh.
Job5:19 Citcai parhuk lamloh nang n'huul vetih a parhih ah yoethae loh nang soah m'ben mahpawh.
Job5:20 Nang te khokha vaengah dueknah lamloh
Job5:21 Olka dongkah rhuihet lamloh n'thuh vetih rhoelrhanah a pai vaengah na rhih mahpawh.
Job5:22 Rhoelrhanah khui neh khokha rhamling khuiah na luem vetih diklai mulhing te na rhih mahpawh.
Job5:23 Na paipi te khohmuen lungto taengah om vetih kohong mulhing loh nang taengah n'thuung ni.
Job5:24 Na dap kah rhoepnah te na ming vetih na tolkhoeng na soep vaengah na hmaai mahpawh.
Job5:25 Na tiingan muep na ming vetih na cadil cahma te khohmuen baelhing bangla om ni.
Job5:26 A tue vaengkah canghlom a coi bangla na hminkhah vaengah phuel te na paan ni.
Job5:27 He tah amah la n'khe uh tangloeng he ne. He he hnatun lamtah namah loh namah dongah ming
Job6:1 Job loh a doo tih
Job6:2 Ka konoinah ka thuek
Job6:3 Tuitunli kah laivin lakah n'nan ngawn coeng. Te dongah ka ol he lawn coeng.
Job6:4 Tlungthang thaltang dongah a sue te ka khuiah ka mueihla loh a mam. Pathen kah hihhamnah loh kai taengah rhong a pai.
Job6:5 Kohong marhang khaw baelhing soah pang tih
Job6:6 Lungkaeh om kolla ankak a caak tih aiduei dakda dongah a hlihlim om aya?
Job6:7 Amih te ka hinglu loh ben ham a aal tih ka buh khaw kolet la om.
Job6:8 Ka huithuinah he ulong m'paek vetih a thoeng eh? Tedae ka ngaiuepnah he Pathen long ni m'paek eh?
Job6:9 Pathen he mulmet vetih kai he m'phop
Job6:10 Te vaengah kai ham hloephloeinah om dae lah sue. Te vaengah bungtloh khuiah ka uem mako. Hlangcim te ka phah pawt bangla n'lungma sak pawt mako.
Job6:11 Ka ngaiuep ham ka thadueng khaw menim? Ka hinglu ka hlawt ham ka hmailong khaw menim?
Job6:12 Ka thadueng he lungto thadueng nim? Ka saa he rhohumsen a?
Job6:13 Kai ham he kamah kah bomnah om ngawn pawt tih lungming cueihnah khaw kai lamloh a heh coeng.
Job6:14 Ngaidaeng loh tlungthang hinyahnah a hnoo vaengah pataeng a baerhoep taengkah sitlohnah a dang van.
Job6:15 Ka manuca rhoek khaw soklong bangla la hnukpoh tih sokca soklong bangla kak.
Job6:16 Amih te vueltling loh a nu sak tih vuelsong a yut pah.
Job6:17 Kho a awlh vaengah a bae neh huu tih amah hmuen lamloh kak uh.
Job6:18 A caehlong longpuei a hoi uh tih laipuem la a caeh dongah milh uh.
Job6:19 Tema caehlong kah rhoek loh a paelki uh tih
Job6:20 A pangtung uh dongah yak uh tih a taengla a pawk uh akhaw a hmai tal.
Job6:21 A taengah a hong la na om uh van coeng dongah rhihkoi na hmuh vaengah na rhih uh.
Job6:22 “Kai taengah m'pae uh lamtah na thadueng lamloh kai hamla kapbaih pae uh.
Job6:23 Rhal kut lamloh kai n'loeih sak lamtah hlanghaeng kut lamloh kai n'lat uh
Job6:24 Kai n'thuinuet lamtah ka ngam bitni. Metla ka palang khaw kai he m'ming sak uh.
Job6:25 Balae tih hlang dueng ol rhap rhap a cal? Nangmih lamloh a tluung ham khaw balae a tluung?
Job6:26 Olthui te tluung hamla na moeh uh nama? Ol khaw khohli bangla talsae mai pawn ni.
Job6:27 Cadah ham aisat hmulung na naan vetih na hui hamla na tael pah nim?
Job6:28 Tedae mulmet uh laeh
Job6:29 Mael uh laeh
Job6:30 Ka lai dongah dumlai om nim? Ka dang loh talnah yakming pawt maco.
Job7:1 Diklai hman ah hlanghing hamla caempuei a om moenih a? A khohnin te kutloh kah khohnin banghui ni.
Job7:2 Sal bangla hlipkhup a hloep tih kutloh bangla a bisai a lamtawn.
Job7:3 Ka taengah a poeyoek la a hla ka pang van tih thakthaenah hlaem he kai hamla a khueh.
Job7:4 Ka yalh tih
Job7:5 Ka saa loh a rhit a bai
Job7:6 Ka khohnin loh tampai lakah bawn tih lungli lungla la ngaiuepnah bawt.
Job7:7 Ka hingnah mueihla he poek lah. Hnothen hmuh ham khaw ka mik loh mael voel mahpawh.
Job7:8 Kai aka so mik loh kai m'mae voel mahpawh. Na mik te kai soah om dae kai ka om voel pawh.
Job7:9 Cingmai loh haai tih cing
Job7:10 A im la koep mael pawt vetih a hmuen loh anih hmat voel mahpawh.
Job7:11 Te dongah kai khaw ka ka tuem mahpawh. Ka mueihla khobing doela ka thui vetih. Ka hinglu khahing doela ka lolmang pueng ni.
Job7:12 Kai he tuipuei tuihnam tih nim kai soah thongim na khueh.
Job7:13 Ka soengca kai n'hloep bitni
Job7:14 Mueimang neh kai nan rhihyawp sak tih olphong neh kai nan let sak.
Job7:15 Ka hinglu loh ka rhuhrhong lakah khaknah neh dueknah ni a coelh.
Job7:16 Ka kohnue coeng
Job7:17 Mebang hlanghing lae amah na pantai sak tih a taengah na lungbuei na khueh te.
Job7:18 Anih te mincang ah na cawh tih mikhaptok ah ni anih te na loepdak.
Job7:19 Balae tih kai lamloh na mangthong pawt eh? Ka timtui ka dolh hil kai nan rhael moenih.
Job7:20 Hlang aka kueinah nang taengah ka tholh tih balae ka saii? Balae tih kai he na kutnoek la nan khueh. Te dongah kai ham tah hnorhih la ka om coeng.
Job7:21 Te dongah ka boekoek he na phueih tih kai kah thaesainah he nan khoe mai pawt lae? Laipi khuila ka yalh pawn ni. Kai na toem cakhaw ka om voel moenih
Job8:1 Shuhi Bildad loh a doo tih
Job8:2 “He he me hil nim na thui ve? Na ka kah ol tah khohli bangla khuet coeng.
Job8:3 Pathen loh tiktamnah he a khun sak tih Tlungthang loh duengnah te a khun sak mai a?
Job8:4 Na ca rhoek te anih taengah a tholh vaengah amih te amamih kah boekoek kut dongla a tueih.
Job8:5 Namah loh Pathen te na toem tih Tlungthang te na hloep mak atah
Job8:6 Na cil tih na thuem koinih nang yueng la haenghang vetih na duengnah rhamtlim te n'thuung pataeng pawn ni.
Job8:7 Na tongnah te a yiit om cakhaw na hmailong te muep rhoeng ni.
Job8:8 Lamhma kah cadil taengah dawt laeh lamtah a napa rhoek khenah te soepsoei laeh.
Job8:9 Mamih loh n'hlaem paek kah long khaw m'ming uh moenih
Job8:10 Amih te na thuinuet pawt tih a
Job8:11 Nongtui pawt ah talik thawn tih tui om mueh ah capu rhoeng a?
Job8:12 Te te a duei pueng ah a hlaek pawt akhaw sulrham boeih hmai ah rhae coeng.
Job8:13 Pathen aka hnilh boeih kah caehlong neh lailak kah ngaiuepnah tah bing tangloeng.
Job8:14 A uepnah neh a pangtungnah bumba im te khaw bawtboeng.
Job8:15 A im dongah hangdang dae pai thai pawh. Te te a kuel dae thoo pawh.
Job8:16 Anih te khosae li ah thingsup tih a dum ah a dawn sai.
Job8:17 A yung loh lungkuk dongah a ven tih lungto im te a hmuh.
Job8:18 Te te a hmuen lamloh a phuk van vaengah
Job8:19 He he a longpuei kah omthennah coeng koinih laipi tloe lamloh a poe uh khaming.
Job8:20 Pathen loh cuemthuek hnawt ngawn pawt tih thaehuet kut te a moem moenih.
Job8:21 Na ka dongah nueihbu neh na hmui dongah tamlung bae.
Job8:22 Na lunguet rhoek loh yahpohnah a bai uh vetih halang kah dap tah om mahpawh
Job9:1 Job loh koep a doo tih
Job9:2 A tueng te ka ming tangloeng dae hlanghing he Pathen taengah metlam a tang thai eh?
Job9:3 Amah te oelh ham ngaih cakhaw
Job9:4 A thinko cueih tih a thadueng khaw len rhapsat. A thuung dongah anih taengah unim aka mangkhak?
Job9:5 Tlang khaw haimo coeng tih a thintoek ah amih a maelh te khaw ming uh pawh.
Job9:6 Diklai he a hmuen lamloh tlai tih a tung khaw tuen coeng.
Job9:7 Khomik te a uen tih thoeng pawh
Job9:8 Vaan ke amah bueng loh a cueh tih tuitunli kah hmuensang dongah a cawt.
Job9:9 Ning buhol neh airhitbom khaw
Job9:10 Khenah tloel duela hno len a saii tih tae lek pawt hil ah khobaerhambae coeng.
Job9:11 Kai taeng long a pah mai akhaw ka hmu pawt tih a tinghil akhaw anih te ka yakming moenih.
Job9:12 Paco cakhaw ulong anih a mael sak? Ulong long anih te
Job9:13 Pathen tah a thintoek mael pawt tih Rahab aka bom rhoek khaw a hmui
Job9:14 Te dongah anih aisat te kai loh ka doo thai vetih a taengah ka ol ka coelh thai aya?
Job9:15 Ka tang cakhaw kai lai aka tloek taengah ka doo thai pawt tih rhennah ni ka bih.
Job9:16 Ka khue tih kai n'doo cakhaw ka ol a hnatun tila ka tangnah moenih.
Job9:17 Hlithae neh kai kai m'phop tih lunglilungla la ka tloh ping.
Job9:18 Ka mueihla he mael hamla kai m'pae pawt dae olkhaa ni kai n'kum sak.
Job9:19 Thadueng dongah khaw len rhapsat tih laitloeknah dongah khaw unim kai aka tuentah he?
Job9:20 Ka ka neh ka tang akhaw ka boe hae ni
Job9:21 Ka cuemthuek dae ka hinglu khaw ka ming pawt tih ka hingnah khaw ka kohnue.
Job9:22 Te dongah pakhat la
Job9:23 Rhuihet loh a duek sak buengrhuet kae vaengah ommongsitoe kah noemcainah te a tamdaeng.
Job9:24 Diklai he halang kut ah pae tih a laitloek kah maelhmai te a khuk. Te pawt koinih amah te unim?
Job9:25 Ka khohnin khaw aka yong lakah bawn tih a yong dongah a then khaw hmuh uh pawh.
Job9:26 Sangpho canghlong bangla tinghil tih
Job9:27 “Kai he ka kohuetnah ka hnilh pawn eh
Job9:28 Ka nganboh he boeih ka rhih tih kai nan hmil mahpawh tila ka ming.
Job9:29 Kai ka boe coeng dae balae tih a honghi nen he ka kohnue eh?
Job9:30 Vuelsong tui dongah ka hluk vetih ka kut lunghuem neh ka cil cakhaw
Job9:31 vaam khuila kai nan nuem hae vetih ka himbai neh kamah khaw n'tuei uh ni.
Job9:32 Hlang he kamah bangla a om pawt dongah anih te ka doo koinih laitloeknah la rhenten m'pawk uh ni.
Job9:33 Mamih laklo ah oltloek tih mamih rhoi soah a kut aka tloeng om pawh.
Job9:34 A cungkui te kai taeng lamloh a khoe mai vetih a mueirhih loh kai n'let sak pawt mako.
Job9:35 Ka thui neh anih ka rhih pawt dae kai he kamah taengah te tlam te ka om moenih.
Job10:1 Ka hingnah soah ka hinglu loh a ko-oek coeng. Ka kohuetnah he kamah taengah ka sah tih ka hinglu a khahing hil ka thui.
Job10:2 Pathen taengah
Job10:3 Na kut thaphu na hnawt vaengah halang kah cilsuep dongah na sae tih na hnaemtaek te nang ham then a?
Job10:4 Hlanghing he na sawt tih na hmuh bangla nang taengah pumsa mik om a?
Job10:5 Na khohnin he hlanghing khohnin bangla
Job10:6 Te dongah kai kah thaesainah te na tlap tih ka tholhnah hnukah nan toem.
Job10:7 Ka boe pawt tih na kut lamloh a huul thai pawt te na mingnah dongah om pataeng.
Job10:8 Na kut loh kai n'noih pai tih thikat la kai n'saii akhaw kai nan dolh pawn ni.
Job10:9 Amlai bangla kai nan saii tih laipi la kai nan mael sak te poek mai lah.
Job10:10 Suktui bangla kai nan sui tih sukkhal bangla kai nan khal sak moenih a?
Job10:11 Kai he ka vin ka saa neh nan dah tih ka rhuh neh tharhui neh nan cun.
Job10:12 Hingnah neh sitlohnah te kai taengah nan khueh tih ka mueihla loh na ngoldoelh a ngaithuen.
Job10:13 Tedae na thinko ah na khoem he na khuiah tila ka ming.
Job10:14 Ka tholh sitoe cakhaw kai nan ngaithuen dongah kai kah thaesainah lamloh kai nan hmil moenih.
Job10:15 Ya-oe kai he ka boe akhaw
Job10:16 Sathuengca bangla a phul atah kai nan mae tih kai taengah khobaerhambae la na mael.
Job10:17 Na laipai neh kai hmai ah nan tlaih tih kai taengah na konoinah na hong. Thovaelnah neh caempuei la kai taengah na pai.
Job10:18 Balae tih bung khui lamloh loh kai nan poh. Ka pal palueng vetih mik loh kai m'hmu pawt mako.
Job10:19 A om khaw a om pawt bangla bungko lamloh phuel la n'khuen.
Job10:20 Ka khohnin he bawn tih a muei la a muei moenih a? Kai lamkah he na dueh na dueh vetih ka ngaidip laem mako.
Job10:21 Ka caeh hlan vaengah hmaisuep khohmuen neh dueknah hlipkhup la ka mael pawt mako.
Job10:22 khoyinnah kho tah dueknah hlipkhup a hmuep bangla om tih cikngae pawh. Te dongah a hmuep la sae
Job11:1 Naamathi Zophar loh a doo tih
Job11:2 “Ol cungkuem te a doo moenih a? Hlang he a hmuilai ngawn tah tang dae ta.
Job11:3 Na olsai te hlang loh ngam vetih na tamdaeng vaengah a hmaithae mahpawt nim?
Job11:4 Te vaengah
Job11:5 Nang taengah aka thui la Pathen loh unim dawk a paek tih a hmuilai ong koinih.
Job11:6 Lungming cueihnah he rhaepnit a lo dongah cueihnah olhuep te nang taengah a thui pawn ko. Namah kah thaesainah lamloh Pathen loh nang n'hnilh te ming.
Job11:7 Pathen kah khenah na hmuh tih Tlungthang kah a khuetnah hil na hmuh a?
Job11:8 Vaan la a sang te metlam na saii eh? Saelkhui lakah a dung te metlam na ming eh?
Job11:9 A himbaidok loh diklai lakah a puet tih tuitunli lakah dangka ngai.
Job11:10 A hil tih a tlaeng tih a tingtun sak phoeiah tah ulong anih a mael sak.
Job11:11 Amah loh a poeyoek hlang rhoek khaw a ming ngawn dae boethae a hmuh vaengah yakming pawh.
Job11:12 Tedae tuihong hlang loh hloih koinih kohong marhang neh laak te hlang la a sak khaming.
Job11:13 Na lungbuei na cikngae tih a taengla na kut na phuel koinih
Job11:14 Na kut dongkah boethae te na lakhla tak tih na dap ah dumlai na khueh pawt atah
Job11:15 A lolhmaih kolla na maelhmai na ludoeng van bitni. Na om vaengah khaw tluektluek na long vetih na rhih om mahpawh.
Job11:16 Nang ham tah thakthaenah te na hnilh vetih tui aka long voelh bangla na poek bitni.
Job11:17 Na khosak khaw khothun lakah sae vetih
Job11:18 Ngaiuepnah a om dongah na pangtung vetih ngaikhuek la na too phoeiah na yalh bitni.
Job11:19 Na kol vaengah na lakueng neh na maelhmai muep thae voel mahpawh.
Job11:20 Tedae halang kah mik tah kha vetih thuhaelnah khaw amih lamloh bing ni
Job12:1 Job loh a doo tih
Job12:2 Na pilnam khaw nangmih taengkah vcueihnah a duek ham tueng pai.
Job12:3 Tedae kai khaw nangmih bangla thinko ka khueh. Nangmih lamloh ka yalh sut moenih. Te dongah u taengah nim he bang a om pawt eh?
Job12:4 Pathen taengah ka pang khaw a hui taengah nueihbu la ka om. A cuemthuek neh a dueng khaw nueihbu la a doo.
Job12:5 Mongkawt kah kopoek ah yoethaenah he nueihbu la om tih a kho aka paloe ham a tawn pah bangla om.
Job12:6 Rhoelrhak kah dap te dingsuek lah tih
Job12:7 Tedae rhamsa rhoek te dawt laeh lamtah nang n'thuinuet bitni. Vaan kah vaa long khaw nang taengla ha puen bitni.
Job12:8 Diklai taengah khaw lolmang lamtah nang n'thuinuet vetih tuitunli kah nga loh nang hamla han tae bitni.
Job12:9 He he BOEIPA kut loh a saii tila te boeih khuikah aka ming pawt te unim?
Job12:10 A kut dongah mulhing boeih kah hinglu neh hlang pumsa boeih kah mueihla khaw om.
Job12:11 Lai caak a ten bangla olthui te hna loh a nuemnai moenih a.
Job12:12 Patong taengah cueihnah om tih khohnin aka sen te a lungcuei om.
Job12:13 A taengah cueihnah om tih a taengah thayung thamal
Job12:14 A koengloeng phoeiah tah thoh uh thai pawt tih hlang te a tlaeng phoeiah tah a ong pa uh thai moenih.
Job12:15 Tui te a kueng tih kak coeng ke. Te te a hlah bal tih diklai a khuk.
Job12:16 Sarhi neh lungming cueihnah khaw amah hut
Job12:17 Ol aka uen te khotling la a khuen tih laitloek rhoek te a yan.
Job12:18 Manghai rhoek kah thuituennah a ah pah tih amih kah cinghen te hailaem a khih pah.
Job12:19 Khosoih rhoek te khotling la a khuen tih khangmai rhoek khaw a paimaelh.
Job12:20 A tangnah kah a ka khaw a baeh tih patong rhoek a omih khaw a loh pah.
Job12:21 Hlangcong rhoek soah nueihbu a hawk tih sokca cihin khaw hlong coeng.
Job12:22 Hmaisuep lamkah a dung khaw phoe coeng tih dueknah hlipkhup te vangnah khuila a khuen.
Job12:23 Namtom te a puel sak phoeiah a milh sak. Namtom te a yaal tih a mawt.
Job12:24 Diklai pilnam boeilu kah lungbuei a doek pah tih amih te laipuem ah longpuei a om pawt la kho a hmang sak.
Job12:25 Vangnah om pawt vaengah hmaisuep a phatuem uh tih yurhui bangla amih te kho a hmang sak.
Job13:1 A cungkuem he ka mik loh a hmuh coeng. Te te Ka hna yaak tih a yakming coeng.
Job13:2 Nangmih kah mingnah bangla kai khaw ka ming tih nangmih kai he nangmih lakah ka toem moenih.
Job13:3 Tedae kai tah Tlungthang taengah ka thui tih Pathen taengah ka ngaih bangla ka tluung lah sue.
Job13:4 Tedae nangmih ah laithae kap tih nangmih boeih te mueirhol siboei ni.
Job13:5 U long nim n'ngam sak lah sue? Na ngam uh lah vetih nangmih ham cueihnah la om mako.
Job13:6 Kai kah toelthamnah hnatun dae lamtah ka hmuilai dongkah tuituknah he hnatung uh.
Job13:7 Pathen yueng la dumlai na thui uh vetih amah yueng la vuelvaeknah na thui uh aya?
Job13:8 A maelhmai na then sak uh vetih Pathen yueng la na ho uh aya?
Job13:9 Nangmih te n'khe vetih hlanghing taengkah omsaa bangla a taengah na omsaa uh koinih then aya?
Job13:10 Yinhnuk ah maelhmai na dan uh koinih a tluung ham khaw nangmih te ni n'tluung eh.
Job13:11 A boeimang loh nangmih te n'let sak tih amah kah birhihnah loh nangmih soah tla het mahpawt nim?
Job13:12 Nangmih poekkoepnah he hmaiphu dongkah thuidoeknah banghui
Job13:13 Kai taengah hilphah uh lamtah ka cal mai akhaw kamah taengah mebang khaw thoeng mai saeh.
Job13:14 Balae tih ka saa te ka no dongla ka khueh vetih ka hinglu he ka kut neh ka pom eh.
Job13:15 Kai n'rhaem mai cakhaw amah taengah ka ngaiuep mahpawt nim? Ka longpuei he a mikhmuh ah ka thui pueng ni.
Job13:16 He khaw kai hamla khangnah la om pai. Lailak tah a mikhmuh la kun mahpawh.
Job13:17 Nangmih hna dongkah ka olthui neh ka olhoe he hnatun khaw hnatun mai dae.
Job13:18 Ka tang ni tila ka ming dongah laitloeknah ka tawn coeng he.
Job13:19 Kai aka ho te unim? Ka ngam mai laeh vetih ka pal mai mako.
Job13:20 Kai taengah panit bueng saii boeh
Job13:21 Na kut te kai dong lamloh lakhla sak lamtah na mueirhih neh kai n'let sak boeh.
Job13:22 Te phoeiah n'khue lamtah ka doo bitni. Ka thui saeh lamtah kai he n'thuung saeh.
Job13:23 Ka taengkah thaesainah neh tholhnah he meyet nim? Ka boekoeknah neh ka boirhaem lai kai n'tueng lah.
Job13:24 Balae tih na maelhmai na thuh
Job13:25 Hawnlae a yawn nim na na sairhing vetih divawt rhae te na hloem eh?
Job13:26 Kai taengah khahing te nan daek tih ka camoe thaesainah te kai nan pang sak.
Job13:27 Ka kho he hloong dongah nan buen tih ka caehlong boeih na ngaithuen. Ka kho dongkah khotang ham kha na vuel coeng.
Job13:28 Te khaw keet bangla hmawn tih himbai bangla bungbo loh a caak.
Job14:1 Huta kah a sak hlang he a khohnin toi tih khoponah khaw hah.
Job14:2 Rhaipai bangla phuelh tih a oh uh. Khokhawn bangla yong tih pai voel pawh.
Job14:3 Te soah ngawn tah na mik tueng tih kai he na taengkah laitloeknah dongla na khuen.
Job14:4 Rhalawt lamloh a cuem la aka khueh te unim? Pakhat pataeng om pawh.
Job14:5 A khohnin neh a hla taenah khaw namah taengah hangdang. A oltlueh te a oltlueh bangla na saii tih poe thai pawh.
Job14:6 Anih lamloh vawl mangthong lamtah amah hnin at kutloh bangla a ngaingaih hil toeng saeh.
Job14:7 Thing ham tah a vung akhaw ngaiuepnah om pueng. Te dongah koep mikhing vetih a dawn khaw ngoeng mahpawh.
Job14:8 Diklai khuiah a yung patong mai tih laipi khuiah a ngo duek cakhaw
Job14:9 tui bo ah duei vetih thinghloe bangla a pae cawn ni.
Job14:10 Tedae hlang tah duek tih rhaa uh coeng. Hlang he a pal phoeiah tah melam a om.
Job14:11 Tuitunli lamkah tui khaw khawk dae tuiva loh a khah vaengah tah kak.
Job14:12 Hlang khaw yalh tih thoo voel pawh. Vaan a om pawt due khaw haenghang pawh. Amih te ih kung lamloh haenghang uh mahpawh.
Job14:13 Unim saelkhui ah a paek lah ve? Kai he nan khoem lah vetih na thintoek a mael duela kai nan thuh lah mako. Kai hamla oltlueh na khueh vetih kai nan poek mako.
Job14:14 Hlang he duek koinih hing venim? Kamah kah caempuei hnin boeih he ka thovaelnah a pawk hil ka lamtawn bitni.
Job14:15 Nan khue vaengah kai loh nang te ka doo bitni. Na kut dongkah bibi dongah na moo bitni.
Job14:16 Ka khokan he na tae pawn vetih ka tholhnah khaw na dawn mahpawh.
Job14:17 Ka boekoek hnocun khuiah catui a hnah thil tih kai kah thaesainah na dah thil bitni.
Job14:18 Tedae Tlang khaw cungku tih moelh. Lungpang pataeng a hmuen lamloh thoeih.
Job14:19 Lungto khaw tui loh a hoh tih a kongnawt loh diklai laipi a yo. Te dongah hlanghing kah ngaiuepnah na pal sak.
Job14:20 Anih te a yoeyah la na khulae tih a hmai a talh la a van daengah anih te na tueih.
Job14:21 A ca rhoek a thangpom uh dae a ming moenih. Muei uh cakhaw amih a yakming moenih.
Job14:22 Tedae a pumsa tah a taengah tih thak a khoeih tih a hinglu khaw amah hamla nguekcoi
Job15:1 Te phoeiah Temani Eliphaz loh a doo.
Job15:2 Te vaengah
Job15:3 A taengah hmaiben pawt tih a hoeikhang pawh olthui te ol neh a tluung aya?
Job15:4 Nang aisat
Job15:5 Na ka loh namah kah thaesainah a cang tih thaai ol na coelh.
Job15:6 Na ka loh nang m'boe sak tih kai long moenih. Na hmuilai long ni namah te n'doo.
Job15:7 Hlang lamhma la n'sak tih som a om hlan lamloh n'yom coeng a?
Job15:8 Pathen kah baecenol te na yaak tih namah hamla cueihnah na buem a?
Job15:9 Ka ming uh pawt te metlam na ming tih kaimih taengah amah a om pawt khaw na yakming?
Job15:10 Sampok khaw
Job15:11 Pathen loh hloephloeinah neh na taengah dikdik a cal ol nang hamla vawt a?
Job15:12 Balae tih na lungbuei na a khuen? Balae tih na mik loh a mikmuelh?
Job15:13 Na thintoek te Pathen taengla na hooi tih na ka lamloh ol na tha.
Job15:14 Huta kah a sak te mebang hlanghing nim aka cim tih aka tang te?
Job15:15 A hlangcim khuikah a hlangcim koek pataeng tangnah pawt tih vaan pataeng amah mikhmuh ah a cil moenih.
Job15:16 Tui bangla dumlai aka mam hlang
Job15:17 Nang taengah kan thui eh kai ol he hnatun dae. Ka hmuh te kan tae eh.
Job15:18 Te te hlangcueih rhoek loh a thui uh tih a napa rhoek taeng lamloh a phah uh moenih.
Job15:19 Amih te amamih bueng ham khohmuen a paek vaengah amih lakli ah kholong a nuen sak moenih.
Job15:20 Halang tah hnin takuem amah kilkul tih hlanghaeng ham a kum tarhing la khoem uh.
Job15:21 Ngaimongnah khuiah pataeng anih aka rhoelrhak ham a hna ah birhihnah ol a pawk pah.
Job15:22 Hmaisuep lamloh mael ham tangnah pawt tih rhaltawt long khaw amah cunghang te dongah tawt uh.
Job15:23 Buh hamla amah poeng tih a kut ah hmaisuep khohnin bangla a tawn te metlam a ming eh?
Job15:24 Anih te rhal loh a let sak tih caem dongah a coekcoe la aka om manghai bangla khobing loh anih te a khulae.
Job15:25 Pathen taengah a kut a thueng tih Tlungthang taengah phuel uh.
Job15:26 A rhawn kah uen a thah la a taengah a photling a yong puei.
Job15:27 A maelhmai te a tha neh a khuk tih a uen duela bungkawt laep.
Job15:28 Tedae khopuei khosa khaw a im ding te lungkuk la a phaek uh tih a khuiah khosa uh pawh.
Job15:29 Boei pawt vetih a thadueng khaw pai mahpawh. Amih kah khohrhang loh diklai ah pungtai mahpawh.
Job15:30 Hmaisuep lamloh nong thai mahpawh. A dawn te hmairhong loh a hae vetih a ka dongkah yilh loh a khoe ni.
Job15:31 A poeyoek dongah tangnah boel saeh lamtah a poeyoek dongah khohmang boel saeh. A hnothung khaw a poeyoek lamni a om eh.
Job15:32 A khohnin loh cup pawt vetih a rhophoe khaw hing mahpawh.
Job15:33 Misur a thaihkang bangla hul vetih olive rhaipai bangla rhul ni.
Job15:34 Lailak kah hlangboel tah pumhong la om vetih kapbaih kah dap tah hmai loh a hlawp ni.
Job15:35 thakthaenah la vawn tih boethae a sak. A bungko khaw hlangthai palat cuen
Job16:1 Te phoeiah Job loh a doo tih
Job16:2 “Te bang ol te muep ka yaak coeng. Nangmih boeih kah a hloep khaw thakthaenah ni.
Job16:3 Khohli ol te a bawtnah om a? Balae tih na doo hamla nang n'huek.
Job16:4 Kai khaw nang bangla ka thui thai ta. Na hinglu te ka hinglu yueng la om koinih olthui neh nangmih te kan sun vetih ka lu lamloh nangmih taengah ka hinghuen van ni.
Job16:5 Ka ka neh nangmih te kan duel lah vetih ka hmuilai kah thaphohnah n'hoeptlang mako.
Job16:6 Ka thui akhaw ka thakkhoeihnah a rhoei moenih. Ka paa koinih kai lamloh metlam a caeh eh?
Job16:7 Ka hlangboel boeih khaw na pong uh tih ka ngak ngawn coeng.
Job16:8 Kai nan tonga khaw laipai la om coeng. Ka laithae khaw ka taengah pai sak tih ka mikhmuh ah n'doo coeng.
Job16:9 A thintoek loh a baeh tih kai soah a konaeh. Kai taengah a no te a tah coeng. Ka rhal loh kai soah a mik a huel.
Job16:10 A ka neh kai n'ang thil uh. Kokhahnah neh ka kam han taam uh tih kai taengah huek ha cu uh.
Job16:11 Pathen loh kai he hlang thae taengla n'det tih halang kut dongla kai m'muek.
Job16:12 Thayoeituipan la ka om vaengah kai m'phae. Ka rhawn ah n'khak tih kai he n'taekyak. Te dongah kai he amah ham kutnoek la m'pai sak coeng.
Job16:13 Ka taengah a lithen rhoek loh m'vael uh tih ka kuel a khoh. Lungma a ti kolla diklai dongah ka hmuet phawt coeng.
Job16:14 A puut hman ah a puut loh kai m'va. Hlangrhalh bangla kai taengah cu.
Job16:15 Ka vin soah tlamhni ka hui tih ka ki khaw laipi neh ka poelyoe coeng.
Job16:16 Ka maelhmai he rhahnah neh nok la nok uh tih ka mikkhu khaw nut coeng.
Job16:17 Te cakhaw boethae ka kut ah kuthlahnah om pawt tih ka thangthuinah khaw cil.
Job16:18 Diklai nang loh ka thii he vuei boeh. Ka pang ol he khaw hmuen om boel saeh.
Job16:19 Vaan ah pataeng kai kah laipai om tih ka hlangcal khaw hmuensang ah om coeng ke.
Job16:20 Ka hui khaw Pathen taengah kai kah hmuiyoi la om tih ka mik khaw pha coeng.
Job16:21 Hlang capa tah hlang ham neh a hui ham Pathen taengah a thui ta.
Job16:22 Kum a tarhing ah ha pawk vetih ka mael voel mueh caehlong ah ka cet pawn ni.
Job17:1 Ka mueihla he pat tih ka khohnin loh khum coeng
Job17:2 Ka taengah a omsasaipat pai moenih a? Te dongah amih koek ham khaw ka mik ah rhaeh pai saeh.
Job17:3 Kai kah rhikhang he namah hamla khueh laeh. Anih te ulong ka kut dongla a khoom eh?
Job17:4 Amih kah lungbuei te lungmingnah lamloh na khoem pah coeng. Te dongah na pomsang sak mahpawh.
Job17:5 Khoyo la a hui a phoe vaengah a ca rhoek mik tah hma coeng.
Job17:6 Kai he pilnam kah a thuidoek la n'khueh tih maelhmai dongkah timthoihnah la ka om.
Job17:7 Ka mik he konoinah neh hmang coeng tih ka pumrho he khokhawn bangla boeih om.
Job17:8 Te dongah aka thuem khaw a pong sak tih lailak taengah ommongsitoe a haenghang sak.
Job17:9 Tedae aka dueng loh amah longpuei te a tuuk vetih a kut cim khaw a thaa sai ni.
Job17:10 Amih te boeih na mael sak uh coeng. Na pawk uh to cakhaw nangmih ah hlangcueih ka hmu mahpawh.
Job17:11 Ka khohnin loh thok coeng. Ka thinko kah kohnek la ka poeknah mawth coeng.
Job17:12 Khoyin te khothaih la a khueh tih
Job17:13 Saelkhui te ka im bangla ka lamtawn tih
Job17:14 Vaam taengah
Job17:15 Te dongah menim nim ka ngaiuepnah tih ka ngaiuepnah he unim aka mae?
Job17:16 Saelkhui thohka te suntla vetih laipi khuila rhenten n'ael aya?” a ti.
Job18:1 Shuhi Bildad loh a doo tih
Job18:2 “Olthui kah taikhaihnah te me hil nim na khueh ve. Yakming lamtah a hnukah thui sih.
Job18:3 Balae tih rhamsa bangla nan poek
Job18:4 A thintoek ah amah hinglu pataeng a baeh ta. Diklai loh a hnoo tih lungpang te a hmuen lamloh a thoeih akhaw nang hut a?
Job18:5 Halang rhoek kah vangnah ngawn tah thi tih a hmai te hmaihli bang lam pataeng aa pawh.
Job18:6 Vangnah khaw a dap khuiah hmuep tih a hmaithoi khaw amah taengah a thih pah.
Job18:7 A thahuem kah khokan pataeng caek tih a cilsuep loh amah a voeih.
Job18:8 A kho loh lawk khuila a tueih tih sahamlong khuila a pongpa sak.
Job18:9 A khodil te pael loh a tuuk tih amah te kokthah dongah man.
Job18:10 A rhuihet te diklai dongah a tung tih
Job18:11 Anih te mueirhih loh a kaepvai ah a let sak tih a kho ah taekyak uh.
Job18:12 A boethae ah bungpong la om tih a cungdonah hamla rhainah khaw a sikim pah.
Job18:13 Dueknah caming a vin saa a caak pah tih a rhuhrhong a hnom pah.
Job18:14 A pangtungnah a dap lamloh a poh tih mueirhih manghai taengla a luei sak.
Job18:15 Amah kah pawt long khaw anih kah dap ah kho a sak tih
Job18:16 A yung khui ah koh tih a so duela a pae khaw ngat.
Job18:17 Anih poekkoepnah te diklai lamloh paltham tih a ming te rhamvoel hmai ah om pawh.
Job18:18 Anih te vangnah lamloh a hmuep la a thaek uh tih anih te lunglai lamloh a poeng sak uh.
Job18:19 A taengah a ca tal tih a pilnam taengah a cadil om pawh. A lampahnah ah khaw rhaengnaeng om pawh.
Job18:20 Amah tue vaengah pong tih a hnuk a hmai la hlithae loh a tuuk.
Job18:21 He tah boethae kah dungtlungim tih Pathen aka ming pawt kah a hmuen khaw he tlam ni
Job19:1 Job loh a doo tih
Job19:2 Me hil nim ka hinglu na pae sak vetih ol neh kai nan phop uh ve?
Job19:3 Voei rha ka hmai na thae sak uh coeng
Job19:4 Ka taengah ka tholh a rhaeh pueng dongah ka palang tueng pataeng ngawn.
Job19:5 Kai soah na pantai mai tih kai kokhahnah bangla kai taengah na tluung tueng pai.
Job19:6 Pathen loh kai n'khun sak tih amah kah tluum te ka kaepvai ah a vael.
Job19:7 Kuthlahnah te ka doek tih bomah ka bih cakhaw n'doo pawt dongah tiktamnah om pawh.
Job19:8 Ka caehlong he a biing tih ka muk tloel. Ka hawn ah a hmuep a khueh.
Job19:9 Kai kah thangpomnah te kai dong lamloh a pit tih ka lu dongkah rhuisam khaw a dul.
Job19:10 Kai kaepvai lamloh m'palet tih ka pongpa vaengah ka ngaiuepnah he thing bangla a puen.
Job19:11 A thintoek he kai taengah a sai vaengah kai he amah taengah a rhal bangla m'moeh.
Job19:12 Anih kah caem te rhenten ha pawk uh tih a longpuei te kai m'picai thil uh. Te phoeiah ka dap ah pin rhaeh uh.
Job19:13 Ka manuca rhoek kai taeng lamloh lakhla coeng tih ka ming rhoek khaw kai lamloh kholong uh coeng.
Job19:14 Ka yoei uh rhoek loh n'toeng uh tih ka ming uh rhoek loh kai n'hnilh uh coeng.
Job19:15 Ka im pah neh ka salnu rhoek loh kholong bangla kai m'poek uh. Amih mikhmuh ah kholong hlang la ka om.
Job19:16 Ka sal te ka khue dae oei pawh. Anih te ka ka neh ka hloep.
Job19:17 Ka mueihla he ka yuu taengah a kholong pah tih ka bungko kah ka ca rhoek taengah khaw rhennah ka bih.
Job19:18 Casenca rhoek long pataeng kai he n'hnaep uh tih
Job19:19 Ka baecenol dongkah hlang boeih loh kai n'tuei uh tih ka lungnah he kamah taengah poehlip uh.
Job19:20 Ka vin neh ka saa hil khaw ka rhuh dongla kap tih ka no dongkah nohli neh ka loeih.
Job19:21 Ka hui rhoek nangmih loh kai n'rhen uh
Job19:22 Balae tih Pathen bangla kai nan hloem uh. Kai saa lamkah khaw na hah uh hae mahpawh.
Job19:23 Kai ol a daek uh te unim a paek bal uh. Cabu dongkah bangla a unim a paek vetih a taem uh ve?
Job19:24 Thi cacung neh kawnlawk te lungpang dongah a yoeyah la a dae uh.
Job19:25 Kai tah kai aka tlan te hing tih hmailong kah laipi dongah thoo ni tila ka ming.
Job19:26 Ka vin hnukah he hluep uh cakhaw
Job19:27 Kai kamah long khaw ka hmuh vetih ka mik long khaw a hmuh pueng ni. Te dongah ka rhang kah ka kuel loh rhalawt te a hue moenih.
Job19:28 Ka khuikah ol hnun a hmuh parhi te
Job19:29 nangmih te cunghang hmai ah bakuep uh laeh. Amah dumlai tah dumlai bangla na ming uh hamla cunghang lamloh thaesainah kosi om coeng
Job20:1 Te phoeiah Naamathi Zophar loh a doo tih
Job20:2 “Te dongah ka pomnah kai thuung tih kamah khuiah ka tawn uh coeng dongah ni.
Job20:3 Ka thuituennah he mingthae la ka yaak dongah ka yakmingnah dongah mueihla loh kai n'doo.
Job20:4 Suen lamloh diklai dongah hlang a khueh parhi te na ming a?
Job20:5 Halang kah omngaih laa tah yoei tih lailak kah kohoenah khaw mikhaptok hil mai ni.
Job20:6 A thinlennah te vaan duela cet tih a lu loh khomai duela puet cakhaw
Job20:7 a aek bangla a yoeyah la milh vetih anih aka hmu rhoek loh
Job20:8 Mang bangla a ding phoeiah tah anih te hmu uh pawh. Khoyin kah olphong bangla khum hmata.
Job20:9 A mik loh a hmuh khaw rhaep mahpawh. Anih te amah hmuen ah mae voel mahpawh.
Job20:10 A ca rhoek loh tattloel rhoek te a moeithen uh tih a kut loh a thahuem te a mael uh.
Job20:11 A rhuh tah a cacawn rhoek bangla hah uh dae a cacawn rhoek khaw amah neh laipi dongah ni a yalh eh.
Job20:12 A ka dongah tui mai cakhaw boethae te a lai tih hmui ah a thuh.
Job20:13 Te te a hnaih tih a toeng pawt dongah a ka khui la a ma-uem.
Job20:14 A bung khuikah a buh te a khui ah minta sue la poeh ni.
Job20:15 Khuehtawn a dolh vaengah a bung khui lamloh lok vetih anih te Pathen loh a talh ni.
Job20:16 Minta sue loh a khut vetih rhulthae lai loh amah a ngawn ni.
Job20:17 Soklong
Job20:18 Thatloh phu te a thuung akhaw a hnothung kah thadueng bangla a dolh pawt dongah yoka pawh.
Job20:19 tattloel te a neet phoeiah amah loh a sak mueh im te a hnoo sak tih a rawth pah.
Job20:20 A bungko lamkah thayoeituipan te ming pawt tih a nai nen khaw loeih pawh.
Job20:21 A caak ham caknoi om pawh. Te dongah a thennah poem hae mahpawh.
Job20:22 A khuehtawn neh a hah vaengah anih te a daengdaeh vetih thakthaekung kah kut boeih te anih soah thoeng ni.
Job20:23 Anih bung hah sak ham a taengah amah kah thintoek thinsa a tueih pah vetih a buhcak te anih soah a tlan sak.
Job20:24 Thicung lungpok haica lamloh yong dae anih te rhohum lii loh a kah.
Job20:25 A yueh vaengah a pumpu lamloh a pawlh pah. Te vaengah a hmuet khui lamkah mueirhih te amah soah rhaek la a caeh pah ni.
Job20:26 Hmaisuep cungkuem te khoem hamla a tung. A hmuh mueh hmai loh anih te a hlawp vetih a dap kah rhaengnaeng khaw a talh pah ni.
Job20:27 Anih kah thaesainah te vaan loh a hliphen uh vetih diklai loh amah taengah a tai pah ni.
Job20:28 A thintoeknah hnin ah tah a im kah cangpai khaw a poelyoe pah vetih a hawk pah ni.
Job20:29 Halang hlang loh tebang khoyo te Pathen taeng lamkah a dang tih Pathen loh a ol rho la a khueh pah
Job21:1 Te phoeiah Job loh a doo tih tih
Job21:2 Ka ol hnatun
Job21:3 Ka thui vaengah kai ol he ueh mai lamtah ka thui hnukah nan tamdaeng akhaw.
Job21:4 Kai khaw ka kohuetnah he hlang hut a? Balae tih ka mueihla loh a ngen pawt mai eh?
Job21:5 Kai taengla a mael vaengah hal tih a kut neh a ka te a puei.
Job21:6 Ka poek bal vaengah ka let tih ka pumsa he tuennah loh a tuuk.
Job21:7 Halang rhoek tah haimo la a hing uh akhaw balae tih tatthai la a len uh.
Job21:8 A mikhmuh kah a tiingan rhoek neh a mikhmuh kah a cadil cahma khaw amih taengah a cikngae sak.
Job21:9 Amih im khaw birhihnah lamloh ngaimongnah la om tih Pathen kah conghol loh amih soah cuk thil pawh.
Job21:10 A vaito a pil vaengah a vaito a pom khaw tuei pawt tih thangyah tlaih pawh.
Job21:11 A casenca rhoek te boiva bangla a hlah uh tih a camoe rhoek loh soipet uh.
Job21:12 Kamrhing neh rhotoeng te a phueih uh tih phavi ol neh a kohoe uh.
Job21:13 Amamih vaengkah tue then khuiah muei uh tih hmawn uh. Mikhaptok ah saelkhui la ael uh.
Job21:14 Tedae Pathen taengah
Job21:15 Anih taengah m'thothueng ham khaw unim tlungthang? A taengah n'cuuk uh ham khaw balae a hoeikhang eh?” a ti uh.
Job21:16 Amih kah thennah khaw amamih kut ah om pawt lah ko ke. Halang rhoek kah cilsuep te kai lamloh lakhla saeh.
Job21:17 Halang rhoek kah hmaithoi tah metlam khaw thi tih amamih kah rhainah amamih soah a thoeng pah. A thintoek neh a rhilong a suem pah.
Job21:18 Khohli hmai ah cangkong bangla om uh tih cangkik bangla cangpalam loh a khuen.
Job21:19 Pathen loh a ca rhoek ham a khoem coeng. A boethae te amah taengah thuung saeh lamtah ming saeh.
Job21:20 A sitlohthamlam te a mik
Job21:21 A hnukah a imkhui ham a kongaih te balae? A hla kah a tarhing khaw bawt coeng.
Job21:22 Pathen te mingnah a tukkil a? Amah he pomsang tih lai a tloek.
Job21:23 A cungkuem dongah bidipbisok tih thayoeituipan la amah kah thincaknah rhuhrhong neh aka duek he
Job21:24 A rhangsuk khaw suktui buem tih a rhuh hliing khaw sulpuem.
Job21:25 Hinglu khahing la duek tih hnothen aka ca pawt he khaw
Job21:26 laipi khuiah rhenten yalh tih a rhit loh a soah a yol.
Job21:27 Nangmih kah kopoek ka ming phoeiah tangkhuepnah neh kai soah nan hul ni te.
Job21:28 “Hlangcong im te menim? Halang tolhmuen kah dap te menim?” na ti uh.
Job21:29 Longpuei aka poeng rhoek te na dawt uh pawt tih amih kah miknoek khaw na hmat uh pawt nim?
Job21:30 Rhainah khohnin lamloh boethae te a tuem tih thinpom khohnin lamloh a khuen te ta.
Job21:31 A khoboe te a mikhmuh ah aka phoe pah te unim? A saii bangla a taengah aka thuung te unim?
Job21:32 Anih khaw phuel la a khuen vaengah laivuei ni a h ak thil.
Job21:33 Anih ham soklong kah dikmuh khaw tui. Anih hnuk te hlang boeih loh a thoelh tih anih hmai kah hlangmi tae lek pawh.
Job21:34 Te dongah balae tih a honghi la kai he nan hloep uh? Nangmih kah taikhaih khaw boekoeknah la cul coeng
Job22:1 Temani Eliphaz loh a doo tih
Job22:2 Pathen te hlang loh hmaiben a? Lungming khaw amah la dawk hmaiben uh.
Job22:3 Na tang mai tih na mueluemnah mai akhaw
Job22:4 Na hinyahnah dongah nang te laitloeknah neh n'khuen tih nang n'tluung a?
Job22:5 Na boethae tangkik pawt nim? Nang kah thaesainah te a bawtnah om pawh.
Job22:6 Lunglilungla la na manuca na laikoi tih pumtling kah himbai te na pit pah.
Job22:7 Buhmueh rhathih te tui na tul pawt tih bungpong te buh na hloh pah.
Job22:8 Bantha aka khueh hlang loh amah hamla khohmuen a khueh tih a sokah khosa mikhmuh ah a dangrhoek.
Job22:9 Nuhmai te kuttling la na tueih tih cadah te a ban na phop pah.
Job22:10 Na kaepvai kah pael dongah he khaw na birhihnah neh buengrhuet na let.
Job22:11 A hmuep khaw na hmu pawt tih tuili tui loh nang n'khuk.
Job22:12 Pathen tah vaan sang kah moenih a? So lah
Job22:13 Te lalah
Job22:14 Anih te khomai loh a huep tih tueng pawh. Te vaengah vaan kah kueluek dongah cet
Job22:15 Boethae hlang rhoek loh a cawt khosuen caehlong nim na ngaithuen salah?
Job22:16 A tonga uh vaengah a tue pawt ahkhaw tuiva loh amih kah khoengim te a hawt pah.
Job22:17 “Pathen te mamih taeng lamloh nong saeh
Job22:18 Amah loh amih im te hnothen a cung sak sitoe cakhaw halang kah cilsuep tah kai lamloh lakhla saeh.
Job22:19 Aka dueng rhoek loh a hmuh vaengah a kohoe uh tih ommongsitoe loh amih te a tamdaeng.
Job22:20 Mamih kah thinnaeh a thup vetih amih kah a coih te hmai loh hlawp het pawt nim?
Job22:21 Amah neh hmaiben lamtah te nen te thuung laeh. Nang taengah hnothen ha pawk bitni.
Job22:22 A ka lamkah olkhueng mah doe laeh
Job22:23 Tlungthang taengla na mael atah n'thoh bitni dumlai mah na dap lamloh lakhla sak.
Job22:24 Pasing te laipi bangla
Job22:25 Te vaengah na pasing te tlungthang la
Job22:26 Te daengah ni Tlungthang dongah na ngailaem vetih Pathen taengla na maelhmai na dangrhoek bitni.
Job22:27 A taengah na thangthui vaengah nang ol a yaak vetih na olcaeng khaw cung ni.
Job22:28 Olkhueh te na tuiphih vaengah nang hamla thoo vetih na longpuei ah vangnah loh a tue ni.
Job22:29 A kunyun uh vaengah koevoeinah na thui dae tlahoei mik ni a khang eh.
Job22:30 Ommongsitoe pawt khaw loeih vetih na kut kah cimcaihnah loh a loeih sak ni
Job23:1 Job loh a doo tih
Job23:2 Tihnin ah khaw boekoek bangla ka kohuetnah loh ka kut he ka hueinah neh a nan.
Job23:3 U loh n'khueh khaw ka ming vetih amah te ka hmuh phoeiah amah kah hmuenmol la ka pha lah mako?
Job23:4 A mikhmuh ah laitloeknah ka khueng lah vetih ka ka ah toelthamnah ka paem lah mako.
Job23:5 Olthui te ka ming tih kai n'doo vaengkah kai hamla a thui te ka yakming lah mako.
Job23:6 Thadueng cungkuem neh kai n'ho saeh a? Amah loh kai taengah khueh het mahpawt a?
Job23:7 Aka thuem te a hmaiah a tluung pahoi lah vetih kai he laitloek khui lamloh a yoeyah la ka loeih mako.
Job23:8 Khothoeng la ka caeh mai akhaw amah a om moenih. A hnuk ah khaw anih te ka yakming moenih.
Job23:9 Banvoei ah a saii vaengah hmuh moenih. Bantang la a mael vaengah ka hmuh moenih.
Job23:10 Tedae longpuei a ming dongah kai he ka taengah n'noemcai tih sui bangla ka thoeng.
Job23:11 A khokan te ka khopha loh a vai. A longpuei te ka ngaithuen tih ka phael moenih.
Job23:12 A hmuilai kah olpaek khaw ka hlong pawt tih ka buhvae lakah a ka lamkah ol ni ka khoem.
Job23:13 Tedae amah tah pakhat la om tih ulong anih a mael thil thai? Te dongah a hinglu kah a ngaih bangla a saii.
Job23:14 Ka oltlueh te a thuung tih te bang te amah taengah yet.
Job23:15 Te dongah a mikhmuh lamloh ka let coeng. Ka yakming dongah amah te ka rhih.
Job23:16 Pathen loh kai lungbuei a phoena sak tih tlungthang loh kai n'let sak.
Job23:17 Tedae a hmuep kah maelhmai loh m'biit pawt tih ka maelhmai te a khohmuep loh a dah moenih.
Job24:1 Balae tih Tlungthang taeng lamkah a tue te a khoem uh pawh. Amah aka ming
Job24:2 Rhilung a rhawt uh
Job24:3 Cadah kah laak te a vai pah tih nuhmai kah vaito te a laikoi pa uh.
Job24:4 Khodaeng rhoek te longpuei lamloh a tulh tih khohmuen kah mangdaeng rhoek khaw rhenten a thuh.
Job24:5 Amamih kah bisai la khosoek ah kohong marhang bangla pawk uh coeng ke. Amah ham kolken maeh neh camoe ham buh khaw a toem uh.
Job24:6 Lohma ah a kamvuelh te a ah
Job24:7 Pumtling rhoek te pueinak tling la a rhaehba sak uh tih khosik vaengah himbai mueh uh.
Job24:8 Tlang kah cingtui loh a het uh tih hlipyingnah a om mueh la lungpang a kop uh.
Job24:9 Cadah khaw rhangsuk lamloh a suh uh tih mangdaeng rhoek te a laikoi.
Job24:10 Pumtling loh pueinak tling van tih bungpong doela canghmoek a puen.
Job24:11 A pangbueng ah situi a kuelh tih va-am a cawt uh lalah tui hal uh.
Job24:12 Khopuei lamkah hlang rhoek loh nguekcoi uh tih duekrhok hinglu loh bomnah a bih. Tedae Pathen loh hohap te a dueh moenih.
Job24:13 Amih te vangnah aka tloelh lakli ah om uh tih a longpuei hmat uh pawh. Te dongah a hawn ah khosa uh pawh.
Job24:14 Hlang aka ngawn loh vangnah hnukah thoo tih mangdaeng neh khodaeng te a rhaem. Khoyin ah hlanghuen bangla om.
Job24:15 Samphaih mik loh hlaemhmah a lamtawn. Hlang mik loh kai m'mae mahpawh a ti dongah a maelhmai te a huephael la a khueh.
Job24:16 A hmuep vaengah im a muk. Khothaih ah amih te a tlaeng uh tih vangnah te ming uh pawh.
Job24:17 Dueknah hlipkhup mueirhih neh a hmat uh rhoi dongah dueknah hlipkhup te mincang neh amih taengah rhenten thoeng.
Job24:18 Anih te tui hman ah hoeptuep. Amih kah hmakhuen te diklai ah a tap dongah misurdum kah longpuei la mop voel pawh.
Job24:19 Rhamrhae neh kholing ah
Job24:20 A bung loh anih a hnilh hil ah a rhit te a poek voel pawt hil a tui sak. Tedae dumlai tah thing bangla tlawt.
Job24:21 Ca aka cun mueh caya aka luem puei neh nuhmai khaw loha pawh.
Job24:22 Aka lueng pataeng a thadueng neh a kuel tih thoo mai dae hingnah dongah tangnah om pawh.
Job24:23 Anih te ngaikhuek la pae saeh lamtah hangdang saeh. Tedae Amih longpuei ah a mik a paelki.
Job24:24 Bet a pomsang uh vaengah amih te pahoi om uh pawt tih tlumhmawn uh. A pum la a buem uh tih cangmo vueilue bangla a baih uh.
Job24:25 Te pawt koinih unim kai aka laithae sak? Ka ol he a hong bangla a khueh mako
Job25:1 Te phoeiah Shuhi Bildad loh a doo tih
Job25:2 “A taemrhai ham neh birhihnah he amah hut ni. Amah kah hmuensang ah rhoepnah a saii.
Job25:3 A caem taengah hlangmi om nim? U soah nim amah kah vangnah a hlah pawh.
Job25:4 Te dongah hlanghing he Pathen taengah metlam a tang thai? Huta kah a sak te metlam a cim eh?
Job25:5 A mikhmuh ah hla pataeng khaw aa pawt tih aisi khaw a cil moenih.
Job25:6 Hlanghing aisat a rhit banghui ni
Job26:1 Job loh a doo tih
Job26:2 “Metlam thadueng mueh te na bom tih sarhi aka tak mueh bantha te na khang?
Job26:3 Metlam lae cueihnah aka tal te na uen tih a cungkuem ah lungming cueihnah na ming sak.
Job26:4 U taengah nim ol na thui tih nang lamloh u kah hiil nim aka thoeng?
Job26:5 Sairhai tah tui hmui ah kilkul uh tih kho a sak.
Job26:6 A taengah saelkhui khaw pumtling om tih Abaddon khaw himbai om pawh.
Job26:7 Tlangpuei kah a hong dongah hil na yaal tih bang aka om pawt soah khaw diklai a dingkoei sak.
Job26:8 A khomai khuiah tui a cun tih cingmai te a hmui ah a ueth pawh.
Job26:9 A cingmai te a soah a yaal tih ngolkhoel hmai a dah.
Job26:10 Vangnah neh a hmuep laklo kah a khuetnah hamla tui hman ah a rhi a rhuen pah.
Job26:11 Vaan kah tung khaw hlinghloek uh tih a tluungnah dongah a ngaihmang uh.
Job26:12 A thadueng loh tuipuei te a phih tih a lungcuei neh Rahab a phop.
Job26:13 A mueihla loh vaan kah khocil a thoeng sak tih a kut loh yingyet rhul khaw a toeh.
Job26:14 He tah a longpuei dongkah longpuei hmoi puen ni he. A thayung thamal kah khohum khuiah amah kah ol duem te metlam n'yaak? A thayung thamal te u long a yakming pai eh?” a ti.
Job27:1 Job loh amah kah thuidoeknah a huel ham te a koei tih
Job27:2 “Pathen kah hingnah loh kai kah laitloeknah a khoe tih Tlungthang lo ka hinglu a phaep.
Job27:3 Ka khuikah ka hiil boeih neh ka hnarhong khuikah kah he Pathen mueihla ni.
Job27:4 Ka hmuilai loh dumlai thui boel saeh lamtah ka lai loh palyal la caitawk boel saeh.
Job27:5 Nangmih te kan tang sak atah kai ham savisava. Ka pal duela ka muelhtuetnah he kamah lamloh ka khoe mahpawh.
Job27:6 Ka duengnah te ka kop vetih ka hlah mahpawh. Kamah tue lamlong tah ka thinko he veet voel mahpawh.
Job27:7 Ka thunkha te a halang bangla
Job27:8 Lailak kah ngaiuepnah tah menim? A mueluem tih Pathen loh a hinglu a bong pah.
Job27:9 A soah citcai loh a pai vaengah a pangngawlnah te Pathen loh a hnatun nim?
Job27:10 Tlungthang dongah pang a dok vetih
Job27:11 Pathen kah kut te nangmih kan thuinuet phoe vetih
Job27:12 Nangmih boeih khaw na hmuh vaengah balae tih a honghi neh na hoemdawk he.
Job27:13 Halang hlang loh Pathen taeng lamkah khoyo neh hlanghaeng loh Tlungthang taeng lamkah rho a dang he
Job27:14 a ca te cunghang hamla a ping pah tih a cadil cahma khaw buh cung uh mahpawh.
Job27:15 A rhaengnaeng
Job27:16 Cak te laipi bangla hmoeng vetih hnicu te dikpo bangla soe ni.
Job27:17 Tawn cakhaw aka dueng loh a bai vetih cak te ommongsitoe loh a tael ni.
Job27:18 A im te ning bangla a sak tih dungtlungim bangla rhalrhing a khueh.
Job27:19 Hlanglen la yalh dae khoem uh mahpawh. A mik a dai dae amah om voel pawh.
Job27:20 Anih te tui bangla mueirhih loh a phatawt khoyin ah cangpalam a pom.
Job27:21 Anih te kanghawn loh a khuen tih khum. Te vaengah anih te amah hmuen lamloh a yawn.
Job27:22 Anih te a voeih tih lungma a ti pawt dongah a kut lamloh yong la yong coeng.
Job27:23 A taengah a kut a paeng uh tih anih te amah hmuen lamloh kut a ving thil.
Job28:1 Cak ham a khorhui om tih sui ham khaw a ciil nah hmuen om.
Job28:2 Thicung khaw laipi lamloh a loh tih lungto te rhohum la a tlae.
Job28:3 A bawtnah te a hmuep neh a khuetnah a cungkuem hil a khueh. Anih loh lungto te a hmuep neh dueknah hlipkhup ah khaw a hoem.
Job28:4 Soklong te aka bakuep taeng lamloh a yoe tih kho neh caeh khaw a hnilh uh. Hlanghing lamkah aka tlayae rhoek khaw hinghuen uh.
Job28:5 Diklai amah lamloh buh thoeng tih a hmui ah hmai bangla a om.
Job28:6 A lungto te minhum hmuen tih a taengah sui laipi om.
Job28:7 A hawn te vatlung loh ming pawt tih maisi mik hmu pawh.
Job28:8 Te te sa ca rhoek loh cawt pawt tih te donglong te sathuengca long khaw pawn pawh.
Job28:9 Hmailung soah a kut a hlah tih tlang pataeng a yung ah a phil.
Job28:10 Sokko lungpang dongah a khoel tih umponah cungkuem khaw a mik loh a hmuh.
Job28:11 Tuiva tuilong khaw a kueng tih olhuep te khosae la a khuen.
Job28:12 Tedae me rhoek ah nim cueihnah a hmuh tih yakmingnah hmuen he menim?
Job28:13 A phu te hlanghing loh ming pawt tih mulhing khohmuen ah a hmuh moenih.
Job28:14 Tuidung loh
Job28:15 Te ham te cui cilh khaw pae thai pawt tih cueihnah a phu te cak khaw a khiing pah.
Job28:16 Ophir sui nen khaw
Job28:17 Te te sui neh canglung neh tluk pawt tih a hnothung he suicilh hnopai bal moenih.
Job28:18 Maerhuhlung neh disaehlung khaw thui lawk pawt tih cueihnah rhovoep tah lungvang lakah then.
Job28:19 Te te Kusah vaya nen khaw tluk pawt tih sui cilh nen khaw ting pawh.
Job28:20 Te dongah cueihnah he me lamkah nim ha pawk tih yakmingnah hmuen he menim?
Job28:21 Mulhing boeih kah mik lamloh a thuh pah tih vaan kah vaa taeng lamloh a thuh.
Job28:22 Abaddon neh dueknah loh
Job28:23 Pathen loh a longpuei a yakming tih a hmuen te khaw amah loh a ming.
Job28:24 Amah loh diklai khobawt hil a paelki tih vaan hmui khaw boeih a hmuh.
Job28:25 Yilh kah a khiing a khueh pah tih tui khaw cungnueh neh a nueh.
Job28:26 Amah loh khotlan ham rhi a suem tih rhaek ol ham khaw longpuei a khueh.
Job28:27 Cueihnah te a hmuh tih a tae. Cueihnah te a sikim sak tih a khe bal.
Job28:28 Hlang taengah khaw
Job29:1 Job loh amah kah thuidoeknah a pom te a cong tih
Job29:2 “Kai he hlamat kah hla bangla aka khueh tih Pathen kah khohnin bangla kai aka tuem te unim?
Job29:3 Amah loh a hmaithoi te ka lu soah a thangthen tih amah kah vangnah nen ni a hmuep ah khaw ka caeh.
Job29:4 Ka cavaa tue vaengah khaw ka dap ah Pathen kah baecenol la ka om.
Job29:5 Tlungthang te kai taengah om pueng tih
Job29:6 Ka khokan te suknaeng neh a hluk tih lungpang loh kai ham situi sokca a long sak.
Job29:7 Vangpuei vongka ah ka thoeng tih toltung ah ka ngolhmuen cikngae sak.
Job29:8 Kai m'hmuh uh vaengah cadong rhoek te thuh uh. Patong rhoek khaw thoo uh tih pai uh.
Job29:9 Mangpa rhoek loh olthui te a phah uh tih a kut te a ka dongla a khueh uh.
Job29:10 Rhaengsang rhoek ol te a phah tih a lai khaw a dang dongla kap.
Job29:11 Hna loh a yaak vaengah kai n'uem tih mik loh a hmuh vaengah kai n'rhalrhing sak.
Job29:12 Mangdaeng loh bomnah a bih tih cadah neh a taengah aka bom aka om pawt khaw ka loeih sak.
Job29:13 Hlang milh kah yoethennah te kai soah pai tih nuhmai kah lungbuei khaw ka tamhoe sak.
Job29:14 Duengnah te ka bai tih hnikul bangla kai n'khuk. Ka tiktamnah he ka sammuei nah ni.
Job29:15 Mikdael taengah mik la
Job29:16 Kai tah khodaeng taengah a napa la ka om tih ming pawt kah tuituknah te ka khe pah.
Job29:17 Boethae kah pumcu te ka thuk pah tih a no lamkah maeh te ka voeih pah.
Job29:18 Te dongah
Job29:19 Ka yung loh tui taengla a muk tih buemtui loh ka cangvuei dongah rhaeh.
Job29:20 Ka thangpomnah ka taengah thai tih ka lii ka kut dongah tinghil.
Job29:21 Kai taengah a hnatun uh tih a lamtawn uh dongah ka cilsuep ham kuemsuem uh.
Job29:22 Ka ol hnukah talh uh voel pawt tih kai olthui he amih soah tla.
Job29:23 Kai ham tah khotlan bangla a lamtawn uh tih a ka loh tlankhol bangla a ang uh.
Job29:24 Amih taengah ka luem dae n'tangnah uh pawt tih ka maelhmai vangnah dongah khaw yalh uh pawh.
Job29:25 Amih kah longpuei te ka coelh tih boeilu la ka ngol Caem lakli ah manghai bangla kho ka sak tih rhahdoe cangpoem akhaw a hloep.
Job30:1 Tedae a kum la kai lakah aka noe long khaw kai taengah luem uh coeng. Te rhoek kah a napa pataeng ka boiva kah ui taengah khueh ham ka hnawt lah mako.
Job30:2 Amih kut dongkah thadueng khaw kai taengah metlam a om? Amih te a hminkhah lamni a paltham.
Job30:3 Vaitahnah neh khokha rhamling lamkah pumhong loh hlaem vaengah khohaeng neh imrhong kah rhamrhae te a cilh.
Job30:4 Tangpuem dongkah baekkoi te a hlaek uh tih a buh la hlingcet yung a khueh.
Job30:5 A nam lamloh haek uh tih amih taengah hlanghuen bangla a o uh.
Job30:6 Soklong cakhom kah laipi neh thaelsawk khui ah kho a sak.
Job30:7 Tangpuem khuiah pang uh tih lota hmuiah poem uh.
Job30:8 Aka ang ca rhoek neh ming mueh ca rhoek ni khohmuen lamloh a hawt uh.
Job30:9 Te dongah amih kah rhotoeng la ka om coeng tih amih taengah ol la ka om.
Job30:10 Kai aka tuei rhoek tah kai lamloh lakhla uh tih ka mikhmuh ah la timtui khaw tuem uh pawh.
Job30:11 A lirhui lakah ka lirhui he pawl coeng. Te dongah kai he m'phaep tih ka mikhmuh ah kamrhui han tueih uh.
Job30:12 Ka bantang kah hlangyoe loh tlai ka kho a kalh. Amih kah rhainah caehlong te kai taengah a picai uh.
Job30:13 Ka talnah khuiah ka hawn a mak uh tih
Job30:14 A puut aka len bangla ael uh tih a khohli rhamrhael hmuiah paluet uh.
Job30:15 Kai soah mueirhih pai tih khohli bangla ka moeihoeihnah a hloem vaengah kai kah khangnah te khomai bangla a yah.
Job30:16 Kai lamloh ka hinglu a kingling coeng tih phacip phabaem khohnin loh kai n'tuuk.
Job30:17 Khoyin ah ka rhuh te ka pum dong lamloh a cueh. Kai aka thuek he a dim moenih.
Job30:18 Thadueng cungkuem dongah ka pueinak a phuelhthaih tih ka angkidung te rhawnmoep bangla ka vah.
Job30:19 Kai he dikpo khuila n'dong tih laipi neh hmaiphu bangla n'thuidoek.
Job30:20 Na taengah bomnah kam bih dae kai nan doo moenih. Ka pai akhaw kai he nan yakming moenih.
Job30:21 Kai soah a muen la na poeh tih na ban thaa neh kai nan konaeh thil.
