Job30:22 Kai he khohli dongah nan phueih. Kai nan ngol thil vaengah kai nan paci sak tih lungming cueihnah a yawn.
Job30:23 Mulhing boeih kah tingtunnah im la dueknah neh kai nan mael sak ham khaw ka ming.
Job30:24 A yoethaenah khuiah bombihnah a yaak vaengah kut aka thueng he lairhok dongah a om moenih.
Job30:25 Khohnin a mangkhak dongah ka rhap tih khodaeng dongah ka hinglu a omdam moenih.
Job30:26 A then ka lamtawn vaengah boethae ha pawk. Vangnah te ka ngaiuep vaengah a hmuep ha pai.
Job30:27 Ka bung he tlawk tih a kuemsuem moenih. Kai he phacip phabaem khohnin loh n'doe.
Job30:28 Khomik a tal dongah maelhmai a hmuep la ka cet. Hlangping neh ka pai tih ka pang.
Job30:29 Pongui kah a manuca neh tuirhuk vanu kah a hui la ka om.
Job30:30 Ka vin khaw kamah dong lamloh mu tih ka rhuh khaw kholing neh tlum coeng.
Job30:31 Ka rhotoeng te nguekcoinah la
Job31:1 Paipi te ka mik neh ka saii dongah me tlam lae oila te ka yakming eh?
Job31:2 A so lamkah Pathen khoyo neh hmuensang lamkah Tlungthang rho te menim?
Job31:3 Boethae ham rhainah neh boethae aka saii ham yoethaenah moenih a?
Job31:4 Amah loh ka longpuei a hmuh tih ka khokan boeih he a tae moenih a?
Job31:5 A poeyoek taengah ka pongpa tih ka kho loh a hlangthai palat taengla a tawn uh atah
Job31:6 Duengnah cooi dongah kai n'khiing saeh lamtah Pathen loh ka muelhtuetnah ming saeh.
Job31:7 Longpuei lamloh ka khokan a buung atah
Job31:8 ka soem vaengah a tloe loh ca saeh lamtah ka cadil rhoek te ha uh saeh.
Job31:9 Huta loh ka lungbuei a hlae tih ka hui kah thohka ah ka rhongngol atah
Job31:10 Ka yuu loh a tloe la kuelh tih a taengah hlang tloe bakop mai saeh.
Job31:11 Te dongah te khonuen rhamtat neh te te thaesainah rhokhan ni.
Job31:12 Te hmai loh Abaddon duela a hlawp tih ka cangvuei te boeih ha.
Job31:13 Ka salpa neh ka salnu loh kai taengah a tuituk vaengah tiktamnah ka hnawt atah
Job31:14 Pathen a thoh vaengah balae ka saii vetih n'hip vaengah amah te metlam ol ka mael eh?
Job31:15 Bungko khuiah kai aka saii loh anih a saii moenih a? Kaimih he bung khuiah pakhat n'cuen sak.
Job31:16 tattloel kah kongaih te ka hloh pah tih nuhmai mik te ka khah sak koinih
Job31:17 Kamah buhkam te kamah bueng loh ka caak tih cadah loh ca pawt koinih
Job31:18 Ka camoe lamloh napa bangla ka taengah pantai tih nuhmai khaw a nu bung lamloh ka mawt.
Job31:19 Pueinak mueh tih himbai tling la aka milh khodaeng te ka hmuh mai tih
Job31:20 A pumpu
Job31:21 Vongka ah kai bomkung te ka hmuh vaengah ka kut he cadah soah ka ka thueng atah
Job31:22 ka laengpang he a hnuk lamloh loh rhul saeh lamtah ka ban a cung dong lamloh tlawt mai saeh.
Job31:23 Pathen taengkah rhainah te kai ham ka birhihnah la a om dongah a boeimangnah te ka noeng moenih.
Job31:24 Sui te ka uepnah la ka khueh tih sui cilh te ka pangtungnah la ka thui koinih
Job31:25 Ka thadueng len tih ka kut loh a khuet la a hmuh dongah ka kokhahnah atah
Job31:26 Vangnah dongah a thangthen tih hla vang a thoeih te ka hmuh vaengah
Job31:27 ka lungbuei he yinhnuk ah hloih tih ka kut loh ka ka te mok koinih.
Job31:28 He khaw a so kah Pathen taengah ka basa la om vetih thaesainah lai la om ni.
Job31:29 Ka lunguet kah yoethaenah dongah ka kohoe tih yoethae loh anih taengla a thoeng te ka haenghang puei atah
Job31:30 A hinglu te thaephoeinah neh hoe hamla ka ka he laihmu la ka khueh aih moenih.
Job31:31 Ka dap kah hlang rhoek loh
Job31:32 Ka thohkhaih kah yinlai te caehlong ka ong pah tih vongvoel ah a rhaeh moenih.
Job31:33 Hlang bangla ka boekoeknah ka dah tih kai kah thaesainah he ka thindang ah ka det mai akhaw
Job31:34 hlangping te yet taengah ka sarhing tih huiko kah nueihbu loh kai rhihyawp sak. Te dongah ka kuemsuem tih thohka la ka moe pawh.
Job31:35 Kai taengkah aka hnatun la kamah taengah u long nim m'paek lah mako? Ka kutha he Tlungthang loh kai n'doo saeh lamtah ka tuituknah he hlang loh cabu la daek saeh.
Job31:36 Te te ka laengpang ah ka koh vetih te te ka soah rhuisam la ka laikoeinah het mahpawt nim?
Job31:37 Ka khokan tarhing la a taengah ka puen lah vetih anih te rhaengsang bangla ka paan lah mako.
Job31:38 Ka khohmuen loh kai m'pang thil tih a kong te rhenten rhap koinih
Job31:39 A thadueng te tangka mueh la ka caak tih a kungmah kah hinglu ka yawn sak atah
Job31:40 Cang yueng la mutlo hling
Job32:1 Amah mikhmuh ah amah te a dueng sak dongah te rhoek hlang pathum Job a doo te kangkuen uh.
Job32:2 Te dongah Ram koca kah Buzi Barakel capa Elihu kah a thintoek tah Job taengah sai coeng. Pathen lakah amah hinglu te a tang sak dongah a thintoek khaw sai.
Job32:3 Hlatnah hmu uh pawt dae Job te a boe sak uh dongah anih kah thintoek khaw a hui pathum taengah sai van.
Job32:4 Amih boeih khuiah Elihu tah a kum la a ham dongah Job te ol neh a rhing.
Job32:5 Hlang pathum ka dongah hlatnah a om pawt te Elihu a hmuh vaengah a thintoek te sai.
Job32:6 Te dongah Buzi Barakel capa Elihu loh a doo tih
Job32:7 Cueihnah he a khohnin nen khaw a thui uh vetih kum a yet a tukkil uh mako ka ti.
Job32:8 Mueihla he hlanghing ah om dae Tlungthang hiil long ni amih a yakming sak.
Job32:9 Muep aka cueih neh patong rhoek khaw laitloeknah te a yakming uh moenih.
Job32:10 Te dongah kai taengkah hnatun uh lah ka ti. Kai khaw ka poeknah ka thui van eh.
Job32:11 Nangmih ol te ka lamtawn ne. Olthui na khe uh vaengah nangmih kah lungcuei te hna ka kaeng thil.
Job32:12 Nangmih khaw kan yakming vaengah Job taengkah a tluung ol te aka doo na om uh moenih he.
Job32:13 “Cueihnah m'hmuh coeng
Job32:14 Olthui neh kai taengah rhong a pai pawt dongah nangmih ol neh anih te ka thuung mahpawh
Job32:15 Amih lamkah ol khaw vawt uh tih
Job32:16 Koep doo mueh la pai uh tih a cal uh pawt dongah ka lamtawn aya?
Job32:17 Kai khaw kamah hamsum te ka doo vetih kai khaw kamah kah poeknah te ka thui van ni.
Job32:18 Olthui khaw ka hah tih ka bungko kah mueihla loh kamah n'kilh coeng.
Job32:19 Ka bungko he misurtui bangla khui pawt tih tui-um thai bangla ueth.
Job32:20 Ka thui daengah ni kai ham a hoengpoek eh. Ka hmuilai ka ong vetih ka doo pueng ni.
Job32:21 Hlang maelhmai te ka dan tarha pawt vetih hlang te ka hlae tarha mahpawh.
Job32:22 Hlang hlae ham khaw ka ming moenih
Job33:1 Job
Job33:2 Ka ka ong coeng he. Ka ka khuikah ka lai loh a thui.
Job33:3 Ka ol he ka lungbuei dueng lamkah tih ka hmuilai kah mingnah loh cimphan la a thui.
Job33:4 Pathen Mueihla loh kai n'saii tih Tlungthang kah hiil loh kai n'hing sak.
Job33:5 Kai thuung hamla na coeng mak atah tawn uh lamtah ka mikhmuh ah pai laeh.
Job33:6 Pathen taengah kai he nang ka bangla ka om tih kai khaw dikpo lamkah ni m'pet.
Job33:7 Kai he mueirhih moenih nang nang n'let sak mako. Ka kut long khaw nang n'nan thil mahpawh.
Job33:8 Tedae ka hna ah na thui tih olthui ol khaw ka yaak.
Job33:9 “Ka cil tih boekoek ka khueh moenih. Ka caih tih kai taengah thaesainah om moenih.
Job33:10 Te cakhaw kai taengkah noihhainah a hmuh vaengah kai amah kah thunkha bangla a moeh.
Job33:11 Ka kho he hloong dongah a buen tih ka caehlong boeih a dawn
Job33:12 Tedae na tang moenih he. Pathen he hlanghing lakah a len dongah nang te kan doo.
Job33:13 Balae tih amah te na ho. A ol te boeih n'doo moenih ta.
Job33:14 Pathen loh pakhat la a thui dae a hmuhming pawt atah hnavoei la a thui.
Job33:15 Ih loh hlang a hnah vaengkah khoyin olphong mueimang ah khaw
Job33:16 Hlang hna te a khui sak tih amih kah rhalrhingnah neh a daeng pah.
Job33:17 Hlang loh a khoboe lamloh a nong sak tih hlang lamkah koevoeinah a khuk pah.
Job33:18 A hinglu te vaam khui lamloh
Job33:19 A thingkong dongah nganboh neh a tluung tih tuituknah loh a rhuhrhong boeih te phat a thuek pah.
Job33:20 A hingnah loh buh te khaw a hinglu loh hoehhamnah maeh khaw a lawt pah.
Job33:21 A saa te caphoei cuk bangla mueihmuh ah a khah tih a rhuh a hmuh pawt khaw a ming sak.
Job33:22 A hinglu loh vaam khuila
Job33:23 Anih kah duengnah te hlang taengah aka puen la thawngkhat lamkah pakhat ngawn tah amah taengah puencawn oldoe om khaming.
Job33:24 Te dongah anih te a rhen mai vetih 'Tlansum ka dang tih hlan kah aka suntla khui lamloh anih he doek laeh
Job33:25 A saa te camoe bangla noe vetih a cacawn tue vaengkah bangla saibawn suidae.
Job33:26 Pathen taengah a thangthui vanbangla anih te a moeithen ta. A maelhmai te tamlung neh a hmuh vaengah tah anih te hlanghing taengah duengnah neh a mael sak.
Job33:27 Hlang rhoek taengla a mae tih
Job33:28 Kamah hinglu
Job33:29 He boeih he Pathen loh hlang taengah voei nit voei thum a saii ne.
Job33:30 Hlan khui lamkah a hinglu te hingnah khosae neh tue hamla a mael sak.
Job33:31 Job nang hnatung lamtah kai ol he hnatun. Hilphah lamtah kai loh kan thui eh.
Job33:32 Kai nan thuung ham ol a om atah thui lah. Nang tang sak ham ka ngaih dongah ni.
Job33:33 Kai taengkah he na hnatun pawt atah hilphah lamtah nang te cueihnah kan cang sak bitni
Job34:1 Elihu loh koep a doo tih
Job34:2 Aka cueih rhoek ka ol hnatun uh lamtah aka ming rhoek loh kai taengla hnakaeng uh.
Job34:3 Hna loh olthui a nuemnai tih lai loh caak te a ten.
Job34:4 Tiktamnah te mamih ham coelh uh sih lamtah a then te mamih lakli ah ming uh sih.
Job34:5 Job loh
Job34:6 Ka tiktamnah khaw ka laithae bang mai la boekoeknah pawt mai ah ka thaltang loh rhawp coeng
Job34:7 Tui bangla tamdaengnah aka o Job bang hlang he om nim.
Job34:8 Boethae aka saii neh rhoihui bangla yiin tih halang hlang rhoek taengah khaw pongpa.
Job34:9 'Pathen taengah a ngaingaih vaengah hlang hmaiben pawh
Job34:10 Te dongah thinko aka khueh hlang rhoek loh kai taengah hnatun uh. Halangnah he Pathen lamlong savisava tih Tlungthang he dumlai neh savisava coeng.
Job34:11 Hlang kah bisai he amah taengla a thuung tih hlang a caehlong bangla amah loh a hmuh.
Job34:12 Pathen tah boe tueng pawt tih Tlungthang loh tiktamnah te a khun sak moenih.
Job34:13 Amah loh diklai ah unim a khueh tih lunglai he a pum la u taengah nim a tloeng.
Job34:14 Amah taengkah loh a khueh a lungbuei
Job34:15 Pumsa boeih he rhenten pal vetih hlang he laipi la mael ni.
Job34:16 Yakmingnah a om atah he he hnatun lamtah ka olthui ol he hnakaeng lah.
Job34:17 Tiktamnah aka thiinah aisat loh a ngoldoelh tih aka dueng khuet loh m'boe sak aya?
Job34:18 Manghai te
Job34:19 Amah loh mangpa maelhmai dan pawt tih tattloel maelhmai lakah rhoeikhang kah a hmat tloe moenih. Amih boeih te amah kut dongah kutngo ni.
Job34:20 Mikhaptok ah a duek dongah pilnam khoyin pathung ah tuen tih khum uh. Kut nen pawt akhaw aka lueng a khoe uh.
Job34:21 A mik te hlang kah longpuei dongah a khueh tih a khokan boeih te a hmuh.
Job34:22 Boethae aka saii rhoek thuh hamla hmaisuep om pawt tih dueknah hlipkhup khaw a om moenih.
Job34:23 Pathen taengkah laitloeknah dongla a pha ham coeng dongah hlang te koep a cae moenih.
Job34:24 Aka khuet khenah a om pawt ah a phaek tih amih yueng la a tloe a khueh.
Job34:25 Amih kah khoboe te a hmat dongah khoyin ah a maelh tih pop uh.
Job34:26 Halang rhoek ham tah hmuh nah hmuen ah amih te kut a paeng thil.
Job34:27 Te dongah ni a hnuk lamloh nong uh tangloeng tih a longpuei boeih te cangbam uh pawh.
Job34:28 tattloel kah pangngawlnah te a taengla pawk tih mangdaeng kah pangngawlnah a yaak.
Job34:29 Tedae amah te mong tih ulong a boe sak. Maelhmai a thuh vaengah ulong anih a mae? Tedae namtom so neh hlang khat soah khaw rhenten om ta.
Job34:30 Lailak hlang a manghai khaw pilnam ham hlaeh la poeh.
Job34:31 Pathen taengah tah
Job34:32 Nang kam hmuh pawt ah kai nan thuinuet coeng. Dumlai ka saii mai cakhaw ka koei voel boel eh
Job34:33 Na hnawt coeng dongah te kah te namah taeng lamloh na thuung aya? Namah loh na coelh coeng
Job34:34 Thinko aka khueh hlang rhoek loh kai taengah thui uh lamtah hlang cueih loh kai taengkah he hnatun saeh.
Job34:35 Job he mingnah neh cal pawt tih a ol long a cangbam moenih.
Job34:36 A pa nae
Job34:37 A tholhnah te mamih laklo ah boekoek neh a koei uh tih kut a paeng dongah Pathen taengah a ol pung
Job35:1 Elihu loh koep a doo tih
Job35:2 “'Patheni lakah kamah duengnah ngai
Job35:3 'Ka tholhnah lamloh nang hamla balae a hmaiben tih balae a hoeikhang
Job35:4 Namah neh na taengkah na hui rhoek kah olthui te ka thuung eh.
Job35:5 Vaan ke paelki lamtah hmu van lah. Nang lakah aka sang khomong ke dan lah.
Job35:6 Na tholh koinih amah te metlam a ben eh? Na boekoeknah pungtai koinih amah taengah balae a saii eh.
Job35:7 Na tang atah amah taengah balae na paek? Na kut lamloh balae a loh?
Job35:8 Nang bang
Job35:9 Hnaemtaeknah cungkuem hmuiah aka tlung bantha lamloh bombih hamla pang uh.
Job35:10 Tedae
Job35:11 Diklai rhamsa lakah mamih n'cang puei tih vaan kah vaa lakah mamih n'cueih sak
Job35:12 Pang uh pahoi cakhaw boethae rhoek kah hoemdamnah hmai ah tah a doo moenih.
Job35:13 Patheni loha poeyoek la hnatun pawt tih Tlungthang long khaw a hmuhming moenih.
Job35:14 A hmuhming pawt tih na thui vaeng aisat
Job35:15 Tedae a thintoek te cawh voel pawt oeh coeng tih halangnah te khaw ming voel pawh.
Job35:16 Job loh a honghi la a ka a ang tih mingnah om pawt ah a olthui yet
Job36:1 Elihu loh koep a cong tih
Job36:2 “Kamah taengah bet m'bulbo uh lamtah nangmih te olthui khaw Pathen yueng la koep kan thui eh.
Job36:3 Ka poeknah he khohla lamloh kam phueih tih duengnah he kai aka saii ham ni ka khueh.
Job36:4 Ka olthui he a honghi pawt dongah nang taengkah lungming khaw a cuemthuek ham tueng pai.
Job36:5 Pathen tah khuet tih lungbuei thadueng a khuet te a sit moenih ne.
Job36:6 Halang te hlun pawt tih mangdaeng te tiktamnah la a paek.
Job36:7 A mik te hlangdueng taeng lamloh khap pawt tih manghai rhoek te ngolkhoel dongah a ngol sak. Te phoeiah amih a yoeyah la a thuung tih a sang sak.
Job36:8 Tedae hmaipom neh pin uh tih phacip phabaem rhuihet neh a tuuk uh atah
Job36:9 Amih kah bisai neh a boekoeknah dongah a len uh te khaw amih taengah a thui pah.
Job36:10 Thuituennah hamla amih hna te a vueh pah tih boethae lamloh mael hamla a thui pah.
Job36:11 A hnatun uh tih tho a thueng koinih a khohnin then neh thok tih a kum te a naepnoi la boeih.
Job36:12 Tedae a hnatun uh pawt atah pumcumnah neh a paan uh vetih mingnah aka tal bangla pal uh ni.
Job36:13 Lungbuei lailak rhoek loh thintoek a khueh uh tih amih a khih vaengah pataeng bomnah bih pawh.
Job36:14 Amih hinglu te camoe la
Job36:15 A phacip phabaem vaengah mangdaeng khaw a pumcum sak tih a hna te nennah neh a toeh.
Job36:16 Rhal ka lamloh hmuenka la nang m'poh. Te lam te mangdaeng mangtok om pawt tih na caboei dongkah mongnah maehhloi ngang.
Job36:17 Halang kah dumlai khaw na cung sak tih dumlai neh laitloeknah loh m'moep.
Job36:18 Kosi loh nang te boeinah neh m'vuet ve ne. Te dongah tlansum cungkuem loh nang m'phaelh boel.
Job36:19 Rhal khuiah pawt khaw
Job36:20 A hmuikah pilnam a khum sak ham khoyin khaw hloem aih boeh.
Job36:21 Ngaithuen
Job36:22 Pathen tah amah thadueng neh thaphoh uh coeng ke. Amah bangla unim aka saya?
Job36:23 Anih ham a longpuei te u long nim a tae pah tih u long nim
Job36:24 Amah kah bisai na rhoeng sak ham te poek. Te ni hlang rhoek loh a hlai uh.
Job36:25 Hlang boeih loh te te a hmuh uh tih hlanghing loh khohla lamkah a paelki.
Job36:26 Pathen tah a len dongah a kum tarhing te m'ming uh lek pawt tih khenah lek pawh.
Job36:27 Tui dongkah aangpi a yoek tih khotlan te a tuihu lamloh a ciil.
Job36:28 Khomong khaw cip tih hlang soah muep pha.
Job36:29 Khomai maiyan neh a dungtlungim kah pang ol a yakming mai ngawn.
Job36:30 A vangnah loh a taengah a kah tih tuitunli yung duela a khuk.
Job36:31 Te nen te pilnam taengah lai a tloek tih a yet taengah caak a paek.
Job36:32 A kut dongkah vangnah loh a khuk tih phek a cuuk ham khaw te te a uen.
Job36:33 A khohum loh amah kawng te a doek tih boiva pataeng thintoek neh cet.
Job37:1 He dongah ka lungbuei lakueng tih a hmuen lamloh cungpet.
Job37:2 A ol dongkah khoponah te hnatun hnatun. A ka lamloh caitawknah thoeng.
Job37:3 Vaan boeih hmuiah a hlah tih a vangnah loh diklai hmoi duela pawk.
Job37:4 A hnukkah a kawk ol khaw a hoemdamnah ol neh hum tih a ol a yaak vaengah rhaek uelh sak boeh.
Job37:5 Pathen loh a ol neh khobaerhambae a saii khungdaeng tih hum dae m'ming uh moenih.
Job37:6 Vuelsong neh khotlan khonal te
Job37:7 Amah kutngo hlang boeih ming sak ham hlang boeih kah kut te rhodaek a soei pah.
Job37:8 Te vaengah mulhing khaw a khui la kun tih a khuisaek ah kho a sak.
Job37:9 Cangpalam te imkhui lamloh
Job37:10 Pathen kah hiil lamloh rhaelnu khaw a khueh tih tui daang mangdaeng mangtok la om.
Job37:11 Khomai te cingtui loh a rhih sak tih cingmai loh amah kah vangnah te a taekyak.
Job37:12 Te khaw diklai kah lunglai hman ah a uen boeih te saii hamla a niing
Job37:13 Te te caitueng lam khaw
Job37:14 Job
Job37:15 Te rhoek soah Pathen loh a khueh tih a cingmai kah vangnah a sae te na ming a?
Job37:16 Poeknah rhuemtuet
Job37:17 Tuithim loh khohmuen a mong sak vaengah na himbai te aka bae sak
Job37:18 Hmaidan a hlawn bangla khomong a thah la amah taengah na nulh thai aya?
Job37:19 Amah taengah metla n'thui ham khaw kaimih tueng lah. Hmaisuep hmai ah n'tawn uh thai pawt oe.
Job37:20 Hlang loh a dolh hamla thui cakhaw ka thui bangla amah taengah a tae pa aya?
Job37:21 Tahae ah khaw vangnah a hmuh uh moenih. A aa te khohli loh a yawn tih a caihcil hnukkah khomong dongah tueng.
Job37:22 Tlangpuei lamkah sui te mueithennah rhih om Pathen taengla pawk.
Job37:23 Tlungthang te thadueng a len dongah a tiktamnah m'hmuh lek moenih. Duengnah khaw a cungkuem dongah hlang a phaep moenih.
Job37:24 Hlang rhoek loh amah te a rhih uh tangloeng dongah lungbuei aka cueih rhoek takuem khaw a sawt moenih
Job38:1 BOEIPA loh Job te hlipuei khui lamloh a doo tih
Job38:2 Mingnah aka tal olthui neh cilsuep aka hmuep sak te unim?
Job38:3 Hlang bangla na pumpu yen lamtah nang kan dawt bangla kai he n'tueng laeh.
Job38:4 Diklai ka suen vaengah melam na om? Yakmingnah na ming atah thui lah.
Job38:5 U loh a khodang a khueh khaw na ming van nim? A soah rhilam aka yueng khaw unim?
Job38:6 A buenhol te me dongah nim a buen tih
Job38:7 Mincang aisi rhoek rhenten tamhoe uh tih Pathen ca rhoek boeih yuhui uh.
Job38:8 Tuitunli te a bung lamloh a poh tih a coe vaengah thohkhaih neh a tlaeng.
Job38:9 Kai loh cingmai kah a pueinak neh anih kah yinnah hni khaw ka khueh pah.
Job38:10 Ka oltlueh he anih ham ka tlueh pah tih thohkalh neh thohkhaih khaw ka khueh pah.
Job38:11 He hil ka ti vaengah ha mop lamtah koei boeh. Na hoemdamnah tuiphu te he ah he khueh laeh.
Job38:12 Namah tue vaengah mincang ke na uen a? Khothaih ke na ming tih amah hmuen ah khothaih a om khaw na ming.
Job38:13 Te lamkah halang rhoek khoek ham neh diklai hmoi a tuuk sak ham khaw.
Job38:14 Dikpo kutbuen bangla poehlip tih pueinak bangla pai.
Job38:15 Halang rhoek te amamih kah vangnah a hloh pah tih ban a thueng khaw a tlawt sak.
Job38:16 Tuitunli kah tuiput la na pawk tih tuidung kah khenah dongah na pongpa vai a?
Job38:17 Nang taengah dueknah vongka rhoek ah uh tih dueknah hlipkhup vongka te na hmuh a?
Job38:18 Diklai hmuenka duela na yakming nim? A cungkuem la na ming atah thui lah.
Job38:19 Vangnah aka om longpuei he menim? Hmaisuep kah a hmuen he melae?
Job38:20 Te te amah khorhi la na thak van tih a im kah a hawn khaw na yakming van nim?
Job38:21 Nang n'sak tih na khohnin kah a tarhing a puh daengah ni na ming pueng.
Job38:22 Vuelsong thakvoh khuila na kun tih rhaelnu thakvoh na hmuh a?
Job38:23 Te te rhal tue vaengkah ham khaw
Job38:24 Diklai ah kanghawn loh a taekyak tih
Job38:25 Tuilong lungpook ham neh rhaek ol ham longpuei aka tael te unim?
Job38:26 A khuiah tongpa aka om pawh khosoek neh hlang aka tal khohmuen ah khaw rhotui aka tlan sak la
Job38:27 khohli rhamrhael neh imrhong aka hah sak la
Job38:28 Khotlan te a napa om a? Buemtui tuicip te ulong a sak?
Job38:29 Rhaelnu he u kah bungko lamkah nim a thoeng tih
Job38:30 Tui khaw lungto bangla thuh uh tih tuidung hman ah khal.
Job38:31 Airhitbom kah omngaih omloe te na hlaengtang tih buhol phueihrhui khaw na hlawt thai aya?
Job38:32 Mazzaroth aisi te amah tue vaengah na thoeng sak tih Ayish aisi te a ca rhoek neh na mawt a?
Job38:33 Vaan kah khosing te na ming atah amah kah laithuithainah te diklai ah na khueh a?
Job38:34 Na ol te khomai dongla na huel thai tih tuili tui te na khuk thai a?
Job38:35 Rhaek na tueih vaengah cet uh tih nang taengah
Job38:36 Kodang khuila cueihnah aka khueh te unim? Kopoek khuiah yakmingnah aka pae te unim?
Job38:37 Cueihnah neh khomong aka tae te unim? Vaan tuitang aka thael te unim?
Job38:38 Me vaengah lae Laipi a hlawn la a hlom tih dikmuh a man sak?
Job38:39 sathuengnu hamla maeh na mae pah tih sathuengca kah hingnah na tom pah a?
Job38:40 Me vaengah lae a khuisaek ah a ngam uh tih thingpuep khui ah a kol uh?
Job38:41 A sakah te vangak ham aka tawn pah te unim? A camoe
Job39:1 Thaelpang kah sathai a piil tue na ming tih sayuk a rhai na dawn a?
Job39:2 Hla a cup la na tae tih a piil tue na ming a?
Job39:3 A ca rhoek loh a koisu uh tih a huel daengah a bungtloh loh a hlah.
Job39:4 A ca a man uh te cangpai neh rhoeng tih a caeh uh phoeiah tah amih taengla mael uh pawh.
Job39:5 Sayalh la kohong marhang aka hlah te unim? Laak lueng kah kuelrhui aka hlam te unim?
Job39:6 A im te kolken la
Job39:7 Khorha kah hlangping te a lawn tih aka tueihno kah pang ol hnatun pawh.
Job39:8 A luemnah tlang te a cawt tih sulhing boeih te a yoep.
Job39:9 Cung loh nang taengah a thohtat hamla a huem vetih na kongduk dongah rhaeh aya?
Job39:10 Cung te a rhuivaeh kong ah na pael vetih nang hnukah tuikol te a thoe aya?
Job39:11 A thadueng a len dongah a soah na pangtung vetih na thaphu te a taengah na hnoo aya?
Job39:12 Na cangti te a khuen
Job39:13 Kalaukva kah phae loh yoka cakhaw bungrho phaemul neh a dii aih nim.
Job39:14 A duei te diklai dongah a hnoo tih laipi khuiah a awp.
Job39:15 A kho loh a hep te a hnilh tih kohong mulhing long khaw te te a til.
Job39:16 A ca rhoek te amah kah pawt bangla a hit sak tih a poeyoek la a thaphu te birhihnah pawh.
Job39:17 Pathen loh anih te cueihnah a hnilh sak tih a taengah yakmingnah tael pah pawh.
Job39:18 Hmuensang la a phuel uh tue vaegah tah marhang neh a sokah aka ngol te a nueih thil.
Job39:19 Marhang taengah thayung thamal na paek a? A rhawn te a hnoo neh na thing pah a?
Job39:20 Anih te kaisih bangla na pet sak a? A phit vaengkah mueithennah khaw mueirhih la poeh.
Job39:21 Tuikol te a phuet uh vaengah thadueng neh a ngaingaih lungpok haica doe hamla pawk.
Job39:22 Rhihnah te a nueih thil tih a rhihyawp pawt dongah cunghang ha lamloh a mael moenih.
Job39:23 A taengah liva a khoek tih caai neh soe kaw hmaihluei la om.
Job39:24 Hinghuen neh khoponah neh diklai a coih tih tuki ol te tangnah pawh.
Job39:25 Tuki te a rhoeh la
Job39:26 Nang kah yakmingnah dongah nim mutlo loh a phae a phuel tih a ding
Job39:27 Nang kah ka dongah atha te sang hang tih a bu a pomsang a?
Job39:28 Thaelpang ah kho a sak tih thaelpang hmuisum neh rhalvong ah khaw rhaeh ta.
Job39:29 Te lamloh caak a thaih tih a hla lamkah te a mik loh a paelki.
Job39:30 Te vaengah a vapuel
Job40:1 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Job te a voek tih
Job40:2 Tlungthang te a ho a? Cawtkung aka tluung te Pathen loh doo nawn saeh
Job40:3 Te vaengah Job loh BOEIPA te a doo tih
Job40:4 “Kai n'kosinah coeng he. Namah te metlam kan thuung eh? Ka kut he ka ka dongla ka puei mai coeng.
Job40:5 Vai ka thui vaengah ka doo voel pawt dongah pabae nen khaw ka koei mahpawh
Job40:6 Te phoeiah BOEIPA loh Job te hlipuei khui lamloh a voek tih
Job40:7 Hlang bangla na pumpu te yen laeh. Nang kan dawt vaengah kai m'ming sak.
Job40:8 Ka laitloeknah he na phae tang aya? Na tang hamla kai nan boe sak aya?
Job40:9 Nang te Pathen bangla na ban om tih ol neh rhaek bangla na hum a?
Job40:10 Hoemdamnah neh na oeknah te oi laeh lamtah mueithennah neh rhuepomnah te bai laeh.
Job40:11 Na thinpom thintoek te sah laeh. Thinthah boeih te so lamtah anih te kunyun sak laeh.
Job40:12 Thinthah boeih te so lah. Anih te kunyun sak lamtah halang rhoek khaw a hmui la daep laeh.
Job40:13 Amih te laipi khuila det lamtah a thuh khuiah khaw a maelhmai te rhenten poi pah.
Job40:14 Te vaengah na bantang kut loh nang te n'khang thai tila kai loh nang kang uem van ni.
Job40:15 Behemoth te namah neh kan saii tih saelhung bangla sulrham ka cah coeng ke.
Job40:16 A thadueng te a cinghen ah
Job40:17 A mai te lamphai thing bangla a hloih tih a phaiboeng
Job40:18 A rhuh te rhohum tuicawn bangla
Job40:19 Anih tah Pathen kah longpuei a tongnah om tih
Job40:20 Tlang kah cakkoi te anih taengla a phueih uh tih kohong mulhing boeih te pahoi luem uh.
Job40:21 Yinhnuk ah hlip hmuila capu neh nongtui dongah yalh.
Job40:22 Anih te hlip kah a hlipkhup loh a dah tih anih te soklong tuirhi a vael.
Job40:23 Tuiva loh a kawt akhaw a tamto moenih. Jordan loh a ka a hoh pa akhaw a omtoem.
Job40:24 Anih te a mik neh a loh tih hlaeh neh a hnarhong a toeh a?
Job41:1 Leviathan te vaih neh na doek tih rhui neh a lai na yueh pah thai a?
Job41:2 A hnarhong ah canghlong na hen thai tih mutlo hling neh a kam na toeh a?
Job41:3 Nang ham tah huithuinah loh puh vetih nang taengah a mongkawt la cal mai aya?
Job41:4 Nang taengah paipi a saii vetih anih te kumhal kah sal la na loh aya?
Job41:5 Anih te vaa bangla na luem puei vetih anih te na hula hamla na khih pa aya?
Job41:6 Anih ham te thimpom rhoek tael uh thae vetih Kanaan laklo ah a paekboe uh aya?
Job41:7 A vin dongah palaphae neh
Job41:8 Anih soah na kut tloeng lamtah poek laeh. Caemtloeknah khaw na koei voel mahpawh.
Job41:9 A ngaiuepnah khaw a laithae ni te. A mueimae mah a hut tang aya?
Job41:10 Anih a haeng ham khaw a muen aih bal moenih. Te dongah ka mikhmuh ah aka pai thai te unim?
Job41:11 Kai n'doe bangla unim ka thuung eh? Vaan hmui kah boeih te kamah kah ni.
Job41:12 Amah ham bueng pawt tih a olsai neh thayung thamal ol khaw
Job41:13 A pueinak te a hmai la ulong poelyoe pah. Kamrhui rhaepnit neh anih te ulong a paan?
Job41:14 A maelhmai kah thohkhaih te ulong a ong eh? A no khaw mueirhih la pin om.
Job41:15 A lip photling a hoemnah khaw kutbuen neh a caek la a khaih.
Job41:16 Khat te khat taengla tawn uh tih a laklo ah yilh khaw hue pawh.
Job41:17 Hlang he a manuca taengah balak tih a tuuk uh daengah ni a pam uh pawh.
Job41:18 A ikthi loh vangnah a thangthen tih a mik khaw mincang khosaeng banghui ni.
Job41:19 A ka lamkah hmaithoi thoeng tih hmai hli coe.
Job41:20 A hnarhong lamkah hmaikhu khaw voh neh canghlong a yawn bangla thoeng.
Job41:21 A hinglu loh hmai-alh a tak sak tih a ka lamloh hmaihluei thoeng.
Job41:22 A rhawn ah a sarhi naeh tih a mikhmuh ah rhihnah loh malawk.
Job41:23 A saa laep te a pum dongah malh kap tih khok pawh.
Job41:24 A lungbuei te lungto bangla ning tih a dangkah phaklung bangla ning.
Job41:25 A boeimang vaengah tah tholh pocinah khui lamloh Pathen taengah bakuep uh.
Job41:26 Anih aka kae cunghang neh caai khaw
Job41:27 Thi te cangkong bangla
Job41:28 Liva capa loh anih a yong sak moenih. Payai lungto pataeng anih taengah tah divawt la poeh.
Job41:29 Caemboh te divawt bangla a poek tih soe kah hinghuennah te a nueih thil.
Job41:30 A hmui ah paikaek paihat la om dae tangnong soah sui a hnil.
Job41:31 A laedil te am bangla a tlawk sak tih tuitunli te anhoi bangla a khueh.
Job41:32 A hnukah a hawn a phi sak tih tuidung khaw sampok bangla a poek.
Job41:33 Paepnah om kolla a saii dongah laipi dongah anih aka tluk a om moenih.
Job41:34 Aka sang boeih te a hmuh. Amah tah hlang oek koca boeih sokah manghai ni
Job42:1 Te phoeiah Job loh BOEIPA te a doo tih
Job42:2 “A cungkuem he na noeng tih namah kah thuepnah oel thai pawh tila ka ming rhoe
Job42:3 Mingnah om mueh ah cilsuep aka dael he unim? Ka thui tangloeng ngawn dae ka yakming moenih. Kai lamlong tah khobaerhambae coeng tih ka ming voel moenih.
Job42:4 Hnatun dae lamtah ka thui dae eh. Nang kan dawt vaengah mah kai m'ming sak.
Job42:5 Hna dongah olthang la nang kan yaak dae ka mik loh nang m'hmuh coeng.
Job42:6 Te dongah ka kohnue coeng tih laipi neh hmaiphu khuiah damti coeng.
Job42:7 BOEIPA loh Job taengah hekah ol he a thui hnukah tah BOEIPA loh Temani Eliphaz te
Job42:8 Te dongah namamih ham vaito pumrhih neh tuital pumrhih te lo uh lamtah ka sal Job taengla cet uh laeh. Te vaengah namamih hamla hmueihhlutnah nawn uh lamtah ka sal Job te nangmih ham thangthui saeh. Anih maelhmai tah ka doe vetih nangmih taengah boethaehalang ka saii mahpawh. Ka sal Job bangla kai kawng he a sikim la na thui uh moenih
Job42:9 Te phoeiah Temani Eliphaz
Job42:10 A hui rhoek ham a thangthui phoeiah tah Job kah a koe
Job42:11 Te vaengah a manuca boeih neh a tanu
Job42:12 BOEIPA loh Job te a tongnah kah lakah a hmailong te yoethen a paek. Te dongah a taengah boiva thawng hlai li
Job42:13 A taengah capa parhih neh canu pathum a khueh bal.
Job42:14 A cuek ming te Jemimah
Job42:15 Job canu rhoek bangla diklai pum ah huta sakthen a phoe moenih. Amih te khaw a napa loh a nganpa rhoek lakli ah rho a paek.
Job42:16 Te phoeiah Job te kum ya sawmli hing. A ca rhoek te khaw
Job42:17 Te dongah Job tah patong tih a khohnin a cup la duek.
Psalms1:1 Halang rhoek kah caemtuh dongah aka cet pawt tih
Psalms1:2 Tedae BOEIPA kah olkhueng dongah a hlahmae tih khoyin khothaih olkhueng dongah aka thuep tah

Psalms1:4 Halang rhoek tah te tlam pawt tih anih te cangkik bangla yilh loh lat a yawn.
Psalms1:5 Te dongah halang rhoek te laitloeknah dongah
Psalms1:6 BOEIPA loh aka dueng rhoek kah longpuei te a ngaithuen dongah halang rhoek kah longpuei tah khoep bing ni.

Psalms5:11 Tedae namah dongah aka ying boeih loh a kohoe uh saeh lamtah kumhal ah tamhoe uh saeh. Te vaengah amih te na thingthung tih na ming aka lungnah rhoek loh namah ming neh sundaep uh saeh.

Psalms7:7 Te dongah namtu rhaengpuei loh

Psalms9:1 BOEIPA te ka lungbuei boeih neh ka uem vetih
Psalms9:2 Namah dongah ka kohoe vetih sundaep ni
Psalms9:3 Ka thunkha rhoek loh ha loe uh vaengah a hnuk la paloe uh tih na hmai ah milh uh.
Psalms9:4 Ka hamsum nan khueh dongah ka dumlai khaw ngolkhoel dongah na ngol thil tih duengnah neh lai nan tloek.
Psalms9:5 Namtom rhoek khaw na tluung tih halang te na milh sak. A ming te kumhal duela na phae yoeyah.
Psalms9:6 Thunkha te a yoeyah la imrhong cung uh. Khopuei rhoek khaw na phuk tih amih kah poekkoepnah khaw bing coeng.

Psalms9:8 Te dongah lunglai he duengnah neh lai a tloek vetih

Psalms9:10 Nang aka tlap tah BOEIPA loh na hnoo pawt dongah nang ming aka ming tah namah dongah pangtung ni.

Psalms9:12 Amih taengah thii phu aka suk loh mangdaeng kodo kah pangngawlnah te a poek tih hnilh pawh.
Psalms9:13 Aw BOEIPA kai n'rhen lah. Ka lunguet taengkah phacipphabaem he ham hmu lamtah dueknah vongka lamkah kai he m'pomsang lah.
Psalms9:14 Te daengah ni Zion nu kah vongka ah nang koehnah boeih a doek uh vetih
Psalms9:15 Namtom rhoek loh amamih kah vaam a saii uh khuila amamih buek uh tih a dongrhui a thing uh dongah a kah a kho man.

Psalms9:18 Tedae khodaeng te yoeyah la hnilh pawt vetih mangdaeng kodo kah ngaiuepnah khaw a yoeyah la pat mahpawh.
Psalms9:19 Aw BOEIPA thoo lah
Psalms9:20 Aw BOEIPA amih te mueipuelnah na khueh daengah ni amih te hlanghing la namtom a ming sak uh eh. Selah

Psalms13:6 BOEIPA te kai ham a then dongah ka hlai ni.
Psalms14:1 Hlang ang loh amah lungbuei neh
Psalms14:2 Vaan lamkah BOEIPA loh hlang ca rhoek te hmuh hamla a dan. Pathen aka toem lungming khaw om van nim?
Psalms14:3 Hlang boeih loh thikat la taengphael uh tih rhonging uh. A then aka saii om pawh. Pakhat khaw om pawh.
Psalms14:4 Ka pilnam vaidam la aka bai tih aka yoop
Psalms14:5 Aka dueng thawnpuei taengah Pathen a om dongah birhihnah neh pahoi birhih uh.
Psalms14:6 Mangdaeng kah a cilsuep te na rholrhak cakhaw BOEIPA te anih kah hlipyingnah ni.
Psalms14:7 Zion lamkah Isreal khangnah u long hang khuen. BOEIPA loh a pilnam thongtla te a lat vaengah Jakob omngaih saeh lamtah Israel a kohoe saeh.
Psalms15:1 Aw BOEIPA nang kah dap ah unim aka bakuep eh? Na tlang cim dongah unim kho aka sa?
Psalms15:2 Cuemthuek la aka pongpa tih duengnah aka saii neh a thinko dang lamkah oltak aka thui
Psalms15:3 a lai neh aka thainawn mueh
Psalms15:4 Amah mikhmuh ah a sawtsit te a hnaep. Tedae BOEIPA aka rhih te a oep dongah talh sak ham toemngam cakhaw aka voei mueh
Psalms15:5 A tangka a casai la aka pu pawh
Psalms16:1 Aw Boeipa Pathen namah dongah ka ying tih kai n'dawndah lah.
Psalms16:2 Ka Boeipa Yahovah namah taengah
Psalms16:3 Diklai ah aka cim tih
Psalms16:4 A tloe aka oei rhoek tah a nganboh la pung. Amih thii te tuisi ka bueih pawt vetih ka hmuilai neh amih ming te ka khuen mahpawh.
Psalms16:5 BOEIPA tah kai kah buham khoyo neh ka boengloeng la om. Namah loh ka hmulung khaw na duel.
Psalms16:6 Rhilong khaw kai ham tah
Psalms16:7 Kai aka uen aka to BOEIPA te a yoethen saeh. Khoyin ah khaw ka kuel loh kamah n'toel.
Psalms16:8 BOEIPA loh kai kah bantang ben ah om tih
Psalms16:9 Te dongah ka lungbuei a kohoe tih ka kah thangpomnah loh a omngaih vaengah
Psalms16:10 Ka hinglu he Saelkhui la na hnoo pawt vetih
Psalms16:11 Hingnah caehlong te kai nan tueng tih
Psalms17:1 Duengnah he han ya lah BOEIPA! ka tamlung he hnatung lamtah ka ka ah hlangthai palat om kolla ka thangthuinah he na hna han kaeng lah.
Psalms17:2 Ka laitloeknah he namah taeng lamkah halo saeh lamtah na mik loh vanatnah te hmuh van saeh.
Psalms17:3 Ka lungbuei he noem lah
Psalms17:4 Hlang kah thaphu dongah na hmuilai lamkah olka nen ni kai loh dingca kah a caehlong te ka rhael.
Psalms17:5 Na namtlak kah ka khokan khaw ka kho a paloe pawt ham n'duel dae.
Psalms17:6 Kai nan doo dongah kamah loh nang ni kang khue. Pathen aw kai taengla na hna han duen lamtah ka olthui he hnatun lah.
Psalms17:7 Caemrhal lamkah aka ying rhoek te na bantang kut neh aka khang
Psalms17:8 Na mikhmuh ah thenhnaih nu bangla na phae hlip ah kai n'ying sak lamtah
Psalms17:9 kai aka rhoelrhak sak halang rhoek neh
Psalms17:10 Amih te a komoelh uh
Psalms17:11 Tahae ah kaimih kah khokan te a hil uh tih amih mik loh kaimih he m'vael uh coeng. Kaimih he Diklai la aka tulh ham tawn uh.
Psalms17:12 A mueisa mah rhamsa ngaeh ham aka moo sathueng neh sathuengca bangla a huephael ah kho a sak.
Psalms17:13 Aw BOEIPA thoo lah
Psalms17:14 BOEIPA namah kut dongkah hlang rhoek lamloh
Psalms17:15 Kai ngawn tah
Psalms18:1 Te dongah
Psalms18:2 BOEIPA tah ka thaelpang
Psalms18:3 Thangthen ham aka koih BOEIPA te ka khue vaengah ka thunkha rhoek kut lamkah ka daem.
Psalms18:4 Dueknah rhuihet loh kai n'yen tih aka muen soklong loh kai n'let sak.
Psalms18:5 Saelkhui kah rhuihet loh kai m'ven tih dueknah hlaeh loh kai m'mah.
Psalms18:6 Ka kho a bing vaengah BOEIPA te ka khue tih ka Pathen taengah ka pang. A bawkim lamloh ka ol a yaak tih ka pang ol loh amah hmai neh a hna khuila a pha.
Psalms18:7 Te vaengah diklai tuen tih hinghuen. Amah taengah a sai dongah tlang yung rhoek khaw tlai uh tih tuen uh.
Psalms18:8 A hnarhong lamkah hmaikhu thoeng tih a ka lamkah hmai loh a laeh vaengah hmai-alh khaw tak.
Psalms18:9 Te phoeiah vaan te a koiloep tih a suntlak vaengah yinnah tah a kho hmui la pawk.
Psalms18:10 Cherub dongah ngol bal tih a ding vaengah khohli phae soah ding hang.
Psalms18:11 Khohmuep te a kaepvai kah a hlipyingnah la
Psalms18:12 Amah hmai kah a aa te a khomai khui lamkah rhael neh hmai alh la coe.
Psalms18:13 Te phoeiah BOEIPA tah vaan lamkah loh ha kawk tih Khohni loh a ol a huel vaengah rhael neh hmai alh la thoeng.
Psalms18:14 A thaltang a kah tih amih te a taek a yaak. Rhaek neh a daeh tih amih te khawkkhek.
Psalms18:15 Na thintoek kah na hiil yilh neh BOEIPA nang kah tluungnah dongah sokca kah tui phoe tih lunglai khaw a yung hoep.
Psalms18:16 A sang lamloh yueng uh tih tui dueng khui kah kai he n'tuuk tih n'doek.
Psalms18:17 Kai ham tah tlung uh coeng dae ka thunkha hlangtlung taeng lamkah neh ka lunguet taeng lamloh kai n'huul.
Psalms18:18 Ka rhainah khohnin ah amih loh kai m'mah uh cakhaw kai ham tukcawt longkhawn la BOEIPA om.
Psalms18:19 Tedae ka khuiah a naep dongah kai he a hoengpoeknah la n'thak tih kai n'pumcum sak.
Psalms18:20 Ka duengnah bangla BOEIPA loh kai n'thuung tih ka kut kah cimcaihnah vanbangla kai taengah ha mael.
Psalms18:21 BOEIPA kah longpuei ka ngaithuen tih ka Pathen taeng lamkah ka poehlip van pawh.
Psalms18:22 Te dongah a laitloeknah boeih te kamah hmai ah ka khueh tih a khosing te kamah taeng lamkah ka phaelh pawh.
Psalms18:23 Amah hmaiah cuemthuek la ka om tih kamah kah thaesainah lamloh khaw ka cue uh.
Psalms18:24 Te dongah ka duengnah neh amah mikhmuh ah ka kut kah cimcaihnah vanbangla kai taengah BOEIPA loh n'thuung coeng.
Psalms18:25 Hingcim taengah uepom la na om tih
Psalms18:26 Aka meet uh taengah na meet uh tih voeldak te tah na hnueih.
Psalms18:27 Namah loh pilnam mangdaeng te na khang tih mikhmuh kah aka pomsang rhoek khaw na kunyun sak.
Psalms18:28 Ka BOEIPA Pathen namah loh ka hmaithoi nan tok tih ka hmaisuep khaw a tue.
Psalms18:29 Namah neh caem ka poeng tih ka Pathen nen tah pangbueng khaw ka poe thai.
Psalms18:30 Pathen tah a longpuei khangmai tih BOEIPA tah olthui a cimcaih dongah anih khuiah aka ying boeih ham tah photling la a om pah.
Psalms18:31 BOEIPA phoeiah Pathen te unim? Mamih kah Pathen phoeiah tah unim lungpang bal?
Psalms18:32 Pathen loh kai he khuehtawn m'vah sak tih
Psalms18:33 Ka kho he sayuk bangla han sai tih
Psalms18:34 Ka kut he caemtloek ham a cang tih
Psalms18:35 Namah kah khangnah photling te kai taengah nan paek tih
Psalms18:36 Ka kungdak kah ka kholaeh khaw na aeh dongah ka kho paloe pawh.
Psalms18:37 Ka thunkha rhoek te ka hloem tih amih te ka kae phoeiah amih ka khah hlanah ka balkhong moenih.
Psalms18:38 Amih te ka phop daengah ni thoo uh thai pawt tih ka kho tangah a bakop uh.
Psalms18:39 Caemtloek ham khaw kai he thadueng nan vah sak tih kai aka tlai thil rhoek te kamah hmuila na koisu.
Psalms18:40 Te dongah ka thunkha rhoek kah a rhawn te kai taengah na duen sak tih ka lunguet te ka biit.
Psalms18:41 BOEIPA taengah pang uh coeng dae khang voel pawt tih amih te doo voel pawh.
Psalms18:42 Te dongah amih te khohli hman kah laipi bangla ka neet tih long kah tangnong bangla ka hawk.
Psalms18:43 Pilnam kah tuituknah khui lamkah kai nan hlawt. Namtom kah a lu la kai nan khueh te aka ming pawt pilnam loh kai taengah tho a thueng.
Psalms18:44 Ka ol te a hna dongah olthang la a yaak uh vaengah kholong ca rhoek loh kai taengah mai a tum uh.
Psalms18:45 Kholong ca rhoek loh tahah uh tih amamih vongtung khui lamkah samoe uh.
Psalms18:46 BOEIPA he hingnah la a om dongah ka lungpang tah a yoethen pai tih ka daemnah Pathen tah pomsang pai saeh.
Psalms18:47 Pathen loh kai hamla tawnlohnah a paek dongah kai dangah ni pilnam a voek.
Psalms18:48 Ka thunkha rhoek taeng lamkah kai nan hlawt
Psalms18:49 Te dongah BOEIPA nang te namtom taengah kan uem vetih na ming te ka tingtoeng ni.
Psalms18:50 A manghai kah khangnah tah len khaw len pai. Te dongah ni sitlohnah he a koelh taengah khaw
Psalms19:1 Vaan loh Pathen kah thangpomnah a doek tih
Psalms19:2 Hnin at phoeiah hnin at a olkhueh te a thaa tih
Psalms19:3 olkhueh om pawt tih
Psalms19:4 diklai pum ah amih ol te cet tih
Psalms19:5 Te dongah khomik te yulo bangla imkhui lamkah halo tih
Psalms19:6 Vaan a bawt lamkah ha thoeng tih
Psalms19:7 BOEIPA kah olkhueng tah a cuemthuek dongah ka hinglu loh a dawn sai. BOEIPA kah olphong he thuem tih
Psalms19:8 BOEIPA kah olrhi tah a thuem dongah lungbuei ko a hoe sak. BOEIPA kah olpaek tah a cil dongah mik a tueng sak.
Psalms19:9 BOEIPA hinyahnah he a cimcaih dongah a yoeyah la cak. BOEIPA kah laitloeknah oltak neh thikat la tang uh.
Psalms19:10 Sui lakah naikap tih
Psalms19:11 Te rhoek nen ni na sal loh na thuituen te a kuem tih
Psalms19:12 U long nim a tholhhik khaw a yakming tih
Psalms19:13 Na sal he thinlen khui lamkah nan n'hloh tih
Psalms19:14 Ka ol ka ka neh ka lungbuei kah phungding ol he ka lungpang neh kai aka tlan BOEIPA nang hmai ah kolonah la om uh saeh.
Psalms20:1 Citcai hnin vaengah BOEIPA loh nang n'doo saeh lamtah
Psalms20:2 Nang aka bomkung te hmuencim lamkah han tueih saeh lamtah Zion lamkah nang n'duel saeh.
Psalms20:3 Na khosaa boeih te han poek saeh lamtah na hmueihhlutnah te han doe saeh. Selah
Psalms20:4 Namah thinko bangla nang taengah m'pae saeh lamtah na cilsuep boeih khaw han soep sak saeh.
Psalms20:5 Nang kah khangnah dongah ka tamhoe uh vetih
Psalms20:6 Amah kah a koelh te BOEIPA loh a khang tih a bantang kah daemnah thayung thamal neh vaan hmuencim lamkah a doo tila ka ming.
Psalms20:7 Leng dongkah rhoek neh marhang dongkah rhoek khaw om uh dae kaimih tah mamih BOEIPA Pathen ming ni ka thoel uh.
Psalms20:8 Amih te kha uh tih cungku uh cakhaw mamih tah n'thoo uh tih n'rhalrhing uh.
Psalms20:9 Aw BOEIPA manghai ke han khang lamtah tihnin ah ka khue uh te khaw han doo saeh.
Psalms21:1 BOEIPA nang kah sarhi dongah manghai a kohoe tih
Psalms21:2 Anih ham a lungbuei kah a ngaihlihnah khaw na doo tih
Psalms21:3 Anih te yoethennah then neh na doe tih a lu ah suicilh rhuisam na khueh pah.
Psalms21:4 Namah taengkah hingnah ham bih vaengah anih ham kumhal ah khohnin na puh sak tih na paek yoeyah.
Psalms21:5 Nang kah khangnah lamloh a thangpomnah tanglue tih
Psalms21:6 Anih te yoethennah na paek yoeyah dongah namah hmai kah kohoenah neh a ko na hoe sak.
Psalms21:7 Te dongah manghai loh BOEIPA dongah pangtung tih
Psalms21:8 Na thunkha boeih te na kut loh a hmuh vetih
Psalms21:9 Namah na phoe tue vaengah amih te hmaipom hmai bangla na khueh bitni. BOEIPA kah a thintoek loh amih te a dolh vetih hmai loh a hlawp ni.
Psalms21:10 Amih kah a thaihtae te diklai lamkah
Psalms21:11 Nang taengah tangkhuepnah a thae la moeh uh tih n'taeng uh dae a phu uh hae moenih.
Psalms21:12 Tedae na liva neh amih maelhmai te na nuen vaengah amih te a hnuk la na rhoe bitni.
Psalms21:13 BOEIPA te pomsang pai saeh. Na sarhi te ka hlai uh vetih na thayung thamal te ka tingtoeng uh ni.
Psalms22:1 Ka Pathen
Psalms22:2 Aw ka Boeipa Pathen khothaih ah ka pang dae nan doo pawt tih khoyin ah khaw ka duemnah om pawh.
Psalms22:3 Tedae nang tah Israel kah koehnah dongah a cim la na ngol coeng.
Psalms22:4 A pa rhoek loh nang dongah pangtung uh. A pangtung uh dongah amih te na hlawt.
Psalms22:5 Nang taengah pang uh tih a poeng a hal uh coeng. Nang dongah pangtung uh tih yak uh pawh.
Psalms22:6 Tedae kai he talam ni
Psalms22:7 Kai aka hmu boeih loh
Psalms22:8 “BOEIPA dongah a hmae dongah BOEIPA amah dongah hangdang saeh anih te hlawt saeh lamtah huul saeh
Psalms22:9 Tedae namah loh bung khui lamkah kai nan poh tih
Psalms22:10 Bung khui lamkah ka om paek vaengah nang dongah ka voei uh. A nu bung khui lamkah mah nang he kai kah Pathen ni.
Psalms22:11 Citcai loh ha yoei tih aka bom khaw a om pawt dongah kai taeng lamkah n'lakhla tak boeh.
Psalms22:12 Kai he vaitotal rhoek loh muep m'vael uh tih Bashan vaito aka lueng rhoek loh kai n'dum uh.
Psalms22:13 Sa aka nget tih aka kawk sathueng bangla kai taengah a ka a ang uh.
Psalms22:14 Tui bangla n'hawk uh tih ka rhuh khaw boeih phit coeng. Ka lungbuei he khoirhat bangla om tih ka ko khui ah paci coeng.
Psalms22:15 Ka thadueng he paikaek bangla rhae tih
Psalms22:16 Ui rhoek loh kai m'hil uh tih
Psalms22:17 Ka rhuh boeih ka tae thai. Amih loh kai he m'paelki uh tih m'hmuh uh.
Psalms22:18 Ka himbai te amamih tael uh thae tih kai kah
Psalms22:19 Tedae BOEIPA nang loh n'lakhla tak boeh. Ka thayung aw kai bomnah ham ha tawn uh laeh.
Psalms22:20 Ka hinglu he cunghang lamkah
Psalms22:21 Sathueng ka lamkah kai n'khang lamtah cung ki dong lamkah kai he n'doo lah.
Psalms22:22 Ka manuca taengah na ming ka doek vetih namah te hlangping lakli ah kan thangthen eh.
Psalms22:23 BOEIPA aka rhih rhoek loh amah te thangthen uh. Jakob kah tiingan boeih loh amah te oep uh lamtah Israel tiingan boeih loh amah taengah bakuep uh.
Psalms22:24 Mangdaeng te hnaep pawt tih citcai khaw tuei pawh. A maelhmai te anih taeng lamloh thuh pawt tih
Psalms22:25 Nang lamloh hlangping pasae taengah koehnah ka khueh vetih BOEIPA aka rhih rhoek taengah ka olcaeng ka thuung ni.
Psalms22:26 Kodo buh a caak uh vetih hah uh ni. Amah aka toem rhoek loh BOEIPA a thangthen uh ni. Nangmih kah thinko te a yoeyah la hing ni.
Psalms22:27 Kho bawt kho le boeih loh a poek uh vaengah BOEIPA taengla ha bal uh vetih namtom a hui a ko boeih loh namah hmai ah bakop uh bitni.
Psalms22:28 Mangpa neh namtom taemrhai he BOEIPA hut ni.
Psalms22:29 Diklai kuirhang boeih loh a caak uh vetih anih hmai ah bakop uh ni. Laipi la aka suntla neh a hinglu aka hing pawt boeih khaw cungkueng uh ni.
Psalms22:30 A tii a ngan loh amah taengah tho a thueng uh vetih
Psalms22:31 Pilnam la saii ham a cun taengla halo uh vetih BOEIPA kah duengnah te a doek uh ni.
Psalms23:1 BOEIPA tah kai n'dawn dongah
Psalms23:2 Toitlim annoe ah kai n'kol sak tih
Psalms23:3 Ka hinglu han thoelh tih
Psalms23:4 Dueknah hlipkhup kolrhawk ah ka caeh vaengah pataeng
Psalms23:5 Kai aka daengdaeh hmaiah pataeng
Psalms23:6 Ka hingnah tue puet te
Psalms24:1 Diklai neh a a cungkuem khaw
Psalms24:2 Amah loh tuitunli dongah a sut tih tuiva dongah a pai sak.
Psalms24:3 BOEIPA tlang la unim aka luei vetih a hmuen cim ah unim aka pai eh?
Psalms24:4 A kut aka ommongsitoe tih thinko aka caih
Psalms24:5 BOEIPA taeng lamkah yoethennah neh daemnah Pathen amah taengkah duengnah te a dang eh.
Psalms24:6 BOEIPA te a tlap la aka tlap thawnpuei tah Jakob Pathen namah maelhmai aka tlap rhoek pai ni. Selah
Psalms24:7 Aw vongka rhoek na lu dangrhoek uh lah. Khosuen thohka rhoek khaw pom uh hang lamtah thangpomnah manghai kun lah saeh.
Psalms24:8 Thangpomnah manghai he unim? BOEIPA hlangtlung pa-al neh hlangrhalh pai ni. BOEIPA tah caemtloek hlangrhalh pai ni.
Psalms24:9 Aw vongka rhoek na lu dangrhoek uh lah. Khosuen thohka rhoek khaw rhoep uh lamtah thangpomnah manghai kun lah saeh.
Psalms24:10 Thangpomnah manghai amah he unim? Thangpomnah manghai tah caempuei BOEIPA amah pai ni. Selah
Psalms25:1 BOEIPA nang taengla ka hinglu kan nawn.
Psalms25:2 Ka Pathen nang dongah ka pangtung nah. Yah m'poh sak boeh. Ka thunkha loh kai soah sundaep boel saeh.
Psalms25:3 Nang aka lamtawn boeih tah yahpok uh pawt vetih
Psalms25:4 BOEIPA na longpuei te kai n'tueng lamtah na caehlong te kai n'cang puei lah.
Psalms25:5 Na oltak dongla kai n'hoihaeng lamtah kai n'cang puei lah. Namah tah ka daemnah Pathen la na om dongah nang te khohnin yung ah kan lamtawn.
Psalms25:6 BOEIPA nang kah haidamnah neh khosuen lamkah na sitlohnah te poek lah.
Psalms25:7 Ka camoe kah tholhnah neh ka boekoek te na poek moenih. BOEIPA nang kah thennah dongah na sitlohnah bangla kai he nan poek.
Psalms25:8 BOEIPA tah then tih thuem. Te dongah hlangtholh rhoek te longpuei ah a thuinuet.
Psalms25:9 Kodo rhoek te tiktamnah neh a hoihaeng tih kodo rhoek te a longpuei neh a cang puei.
Psalms25:10 BOEIPA kah caehlong boeih tah
Psalms25:11 Aw BOEIPA na ming khoem lamtah kai kah thaesainah len mai cakhaw khodawk han ngai mai.
Psalms25:12 BOEIPA aka rhih hlang he unim? Anih ni longpuei ah a coelh vetih a thuinuet eh.
Psalms25:13 Hnothen dongah a hinglu loh rhaeh rhong vetih a tiingan loh khohmuen a pang uh ni.
Psalms25:14 Amah aka rhih rhoek te BOEIPA loh baecenol neh a paipi a ming sak.
Psalms25:15 Ka mik loh BOEIPA dongah a hmaitang taitu dongah ka kho he lawk dong lamloh a doek.
Psalms25:16 Kai oingaih cangloeng neh mangdaeng ham ka taengla ha mael lamtah kai n'rhen dae.
Psalms25:17 Ka thinko citcai loh pungtai tih khobing khui lamkah kai n'lo lah.
Psalms25:18 Kai kah phacip phabaem neh ka thakthaenah he hmu lamtah ka tholh boeih te khuen lah.
Psalms25:19 Ka thunkha rhoek loh metlam a pungtai uh tih kuthlahnah loh hmuhuetnah neh kai m'hmuet uh he ham hmu lah.
Psalms25:20 Ka hinglu he dawndah lamtah kai n'huul dae. Nang dongah ka ying dongah yah m'poh sak boeh.
Psalms25:21 Nang kan lamtawn dongah thincaknah
Psalms25:22 Aw Pathen
Psalms26:1 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms26:2 Aw BOEIPA kai he n'loepdak lamtah kai n'noemcai lah. Ka kuel neh lungbuei he picai la picai mai.
Psalms26:3 Ka mik dongah na sitlohnah ka hmaitang tih na oltak dongah ka cet.
Psalms26:4 Hlang taengah a poeyoek la ka ngol pawt tih aka thuhrhawk neh ka yok pawh.
Psalms26:5 Thaehuet rhoek kah a ngolhlung te ka thiinah tih halang rhoek taengah ka ngol pawh.
Psalms26:6 Ka kut he cimnah neh ka silh tih
Psalms26:7 Uemonah ol te ka doek tih namah kah khobaerhambae boeih te ka tae.
Psalms26:8 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms26:9 Ka hinglu he hlangtholh rhoek neh
Psalms26:10 Amih kut dongah boethae om tih a bantang kut ah kapbaih a poem uh.
Psalms26:11 Tedae kai tah kamah thincaknah neh ka cet. Kai n'lat lamtah kai n'rhen lah.
Psalms26:12 Ka kho he tlangkol ah pai tih khangkhung lakli ah BOEIPA te a yoethen pai ni.
Psalms27:1 BOEIPA tah kai kah vangnah neh ka daemnah ni. Unim ka rhih bal eh. BOEIPA tah ka hingnah lunghim ni. Unim ka rhih pueng eh?
Psalms27:2 Thaehuet ka rhal rhoek neh ka thunkha rhoek loh ka saa caak ham ka taengla halo vaengah paloe uh vetih cungku uh ni.
Psalms27:3 Caem loh ka taengah rhaeh cakhaw ka lungbuei loh rhih mahpawh. Caemtloek loh kai taengah a thoh vaengah he khaw ka pangtung ni.
Psalms27:4 Ka hingnah khohnin boeih he BOEIPA im ah khosak tih BOEIPA kah mueithen te hmuh ham neh a bawkim ah hnukdawn ham pakhat bueng te ka hue tih BOEIPA taengah ka bih.
Psalms27:5 Yoethae hnin ah amah kah po ah kai n'khoem ni. A dap kah a huephael ah kai n'thuh vetih lungpang sola kai n'pomsang ni.
Psalms27:6 Ka kaepvai kah ka thunkha rhoek sola ka lu a pomsang pawn vetih amah kah dap ah hmueih ka nawn ni. Tamlung neh ka hlai vetih BOEIPA te ka tingtoeng ni.
Psalms27:7 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms27:8 Ka lungbuei loh nang kawng dongah
Psalms27:9 Kai taeng lamkah na hmai thuh boeh. Na sal kah thintoek dongah mangthong boel mai. Kai aka bomkung la na om tih kai nan phap sut pawt dongah ka daemnah Pathen nang loh kai nan hnoo moenih.
Psalms27:10 A nu neh a pa long pataeng kai n'hnoo rhoi dae BOEIPA loh kai n'khoem.
Psalms27:11 Kai he na longpuei n'thuinuet lamtah ka lungawn rhoek kongah kai he tlangkol caehlong ah m'mawt lah BOEIPA.
Psalms27:12 A hong kah laipai rhoek neh kuthlahnah kah hil loh kai taengah tlai uh dae ka rhal rhoek kah hinglu dongah kai nan tloeng moenih.
Psalms27:13 Aka hing rhoek kah khohmuen ah BOEIPA kah a thennah te hmuh ham ka tangnah pueng.
Psalms27:14 BOEIPA te lamtawn lah. Thaahuel lamtah na lungbuei ning sak. Te dongah BOEIPA te lamtawn lah.
Psalms28:1 Kai kah lungpang
Psalms28:2 Nang taengah ka pang vaengah
Psalms28:3 Halang tih boethae aka saii rhoek neh kai he hmaih n'sol boeh. A hui taengah rhoepnah a thui dae a thinko khuiah thae.
Psalms28:4 Amih a bisai neh a khoboe thaenah vanbangla amih ham khueh pah. A kut bibi vanbangla amih neh aka tiing te hmoel lamtah amih taengah pae.
Psalms28:5 BOEIPA kah thaphu neh a kut dongkah bibi a yakming uh pawt dongah amih te a koengloeng vetih koep suem mahpawh.
Psalms28:6 Ka huithuinah ol a yaak dongah BOEIPA te a yoethen saeh.
Psalms28:7 BOEIPA tah ka sarhi neh ka photling ni. Amah te ka lungbuei loh a pangtung tih n'bom dongah ka lungbuei sundaep. Te dongah ka laa neh amah te ka uem ni.
Psalms28:8 BOEIPA tah amih kah sarhi neh
Psalms28:9 Na pilnam te khang lamtah na rho te a yoethen saeh. Amih te luem puei lamtah amih te kumhal duela phuei lah.
Psalms29:1 Pathen ca rhoek BOEIPA te paan uh lah. Thangpomnah

Psalms29:4 BOEIPA ol tah thadueng neh
Psalms29:5 BOEIPA ol loh lamphai thing a koi tih BOEIPA loh Lebanon kah lamphai thing a khaem.
Psalms29:6 Lebanon vaitoca neh Sirion cung ca bangla n'cungpet sak.
Psalms29:7 BOEIPA ol loh hmaisai hmai khaw a muk.

Psalms30:2 Ka BOEIPA Pathen
Psalms30:3 BOEIPA namah long ni ka hinglu he
Psalms30:4 Amah kah hlangcim rhoek BOEIPA te tingtoeng uh lamtah a hmuencim kah poekkoepnah te uem uh.
Psalms30:5 A thintoek vaengah khaw mikhaptok hil mai ni. A kolonah te hing khui ham ni. Khoyin ah rhahnah neh rhaehba cakhaw mincang ah tamlung la coeng.
Psalms30:6 Tedae ka ommongnah khuiah kai loh
Psalms30:7 BOEIPA nang kah kolonah dongah kai ham sarhi tlang te na cak sak. Na maelhmai na thuh vaengah ka let coeng.
Psalms30:8 BOEIPA nang te kan khue tih ka Boeipa taengah rhennah ka bih.

Psalms30:12 Te dongah thangpomnah loh
Psalms31:1 BOEIPA nang dongah ka ying tih kumhal duela yah sak boeh. Na duengnah neh kai n'hlawt lah.
Psalms31:2 Na hna te kai taengah rhep duen lamtah kai he tlek n'huul lah. Kai ham lunghim lungpang la
Psalms31:3 Nang tah ka thaelpang neh ka rhalvong ni. Te dongah namah ming ham kai nan mawt tih nan khool.
Psalms31:4 Namah te ka lunghim coeng dongah kai ham a tung uh lawk lamkah te nan doek.
Psalms31:5 Ka mueihla he na kut ah kan hlah tih oltak Pathen BOEIPA loh kai he nan lat.
Psalms31:6 A poeyoek la a honghi aka ngaithuen khaw ka hmuhuet tih kai tah BOEIPA ni ka pangtung.
Psalms31:7 Namah kah sitlohnah neh kai kah phacip phabaem te nan hmuh tih ka hinglu kah citcai te nan ming dongah ka omngaih vetih ka kohoe ni.
Psalms31:8 Te dongah kai he thunkha kut ah nan tloeng mueh la ka kho he a hoengpoeknah ah nan sut.
Psalms31:9 Konoinah dongah ka mik
Psalms31:10 Ka hingnah he kothae loh a ngawn tih ka hueinah neh ka kum thok. Kamah kah thaesainah dongah ka thadueng yaai tih ka rhuh hmawn. Te vaengah tol long ah kai aka hmu kamah hmaiben rhoek te kai lamloh birhihnah neh yong uh.
Psalms31:11 Kamah puencak dongah hlang boeih neh ka imben kah kokhahnah la mat ka om.
Psalms31:12 Duek tangtae bangla a lungbuei ah kai n'hnilh. Am poo bangla ka om.
Psalms31:13 theetnah he kaepvai ah rhihnah la muep ka yaak. Amih te kai soah tingtun tih
Psalms31:14 Tedae kai tah BOEIPA nang dongah ka pangtung tih nang te ka Pathen ni ka ti.
Psalms31:15 Ka khohnin he na kut dongah om. Ka thunkha kut neh kai aka hloem kut lamkah kai n'huul lah.
Psalms31:16 Na sal taengah na maelhmai te han sae sak lah. Na sitlohnah neh kai n'khang lah.
Psalms31:17 BOEIPA nang kan khue vaengah yah m'poh sak boeh. Halang rhoek te yahpok saeh lamtah saelkhui la duem uh saeh.
Psalms31:18 Hlang dueng te hoemnah neh nueihbu la a hong aka thui mangkhak rhoek loh a kam khom saeh.
Psalms31:19 Namah aka rhih rhoek ham na khoem pah tih hlang capa rhoek hmuh ah namah dongla aka ying rhoek ham na saii pah na thennah he bahoeng len.
Psalms31:20 Hlang kah tangkhuepnah lamloh na hmai kah a huephael ah amih te na thuh. Tuituknah ol lamkah pohlip ah amih te na khoem.
Psalms31:21 Khopuei vongup khuiah kai ham a sitlohnah khobaerhambae la a tueng dongah BOEIPA tah a yoethen pai.
Psalms31:22 Te dongah ka tamto vaengah
Psalms31:23 Amah kah hlangcim rhoek boeih loh BOEIPA te lungnah uh lah. Oltak te BOEIPA loh a kueinah tih hoemnah aka saii te a khawk la a thuung.
Psalms31:24 BOEIPA dongah aka ngaiuep boeih loh thahuel uh lamtah na thinko cak sak uh.
Psalms32:1 Tholh a vuei pah tih
Psalms32:2 BOEIPA loh anih taengah thaesainah te poek pah pawt tih a mueihla te vuelvaeknah dongah aka om pawt hlang tah a yoethen.
Psalms32:3 Hil ka phah tih hnin at puet kah ka kawknah loh ka rhuh hmawn.
Psalms32:4 Khoyin khothaih kai he na kut loh n'nan tih khohal kholing kah ka hlantui la poeh. Selah
Psalms32:5 Ka tholh he nang kan ming sak tih kai kah thaesainah khaw hlipdah moenih. “ Ka dumlai te BOEIPA taengah ka uem ni
Psalms32:6 Te dongah hlangcim boeih loh a tue a om vaengah namah taengla thangthui saeh. Te daengah ni lungpook tui a yet vaengah anih te a pha pawt eh.
Psalms32:7 Nang tah kai ham hlipyingnah ni. Rhal khui lamka h kai he nan kueinah dongah kai hlawt ham lumlaa neh nan vael. Selah
Psalms32:8 Nang kan cangbam sak vetih caeh long te nang kan thuinuet ni. Kan uen vetih ka mik te nang soah ka khueh ni.

Psalms33:4 BOEIPA kah olka tah thuem tih
Psalms33:5 Duengnah neh tiktamnah aka lungnah
Psalms33:6 BOEIPA kah olka loh vaan rhoek neh
Psalms33:7 Tuitunli kah tui rhoek te som bangla na calui tih
Psalms33:8 Amah kah diklai pum loh BOEIPA te rhih uh saeh. Lunglai boeih kah khosa rhoek loh amah taengah bakuep uh saeh.
Psalms33:9 Amah loh a thui tih amah la coeng. Amah loh a uen tih amah khak pai.
Psalms33:10 BOEIPA loh namtom kah silsuep te hnalval pah tih

Psalms33:12 A Pathen YAHWEH kah namtu tah a yoethen

Psalms33:14 A ngol hmuen lamloh diklai khosa boeih te a dawn.
Psalms33:15 Amih kah lungbuei tun aka hlinsai loh
Psalms33:16 Manghai he tatthai hlangrhalh hlangping loh khang pawt tih
Psalms33:17 Loeihnah ham marhang khaw a hong tih
Psalms33:18 Amah aka rhih so neh a sitlohnah dongah aka hangdang rhoek sokah BOEIPA mik aih ke.
Psalms33:19 Amih kah hinglu te dueknah lamkah huul ham neh khokha kut khui lamkah hing sak ham ni.

Psalms34:1 A tuetang boeih dongah BOEIPA te ka uem vetih
Psalms34:2 Ka hinglu loh BOEIPA dongah thangthen saeh. kodo rhoek loh ya saeh lamtah a kohoe uh saeh.
Psalms34:3 BOEIPA te kai neh pomsang uh sih lamtah a ming te tun pomsang uh sih.
Psalms34:4 BOEIPA te ka tlap vaengah kai n'doo tih ka rhihnahkoi boeih lamloh kai n'huul.
Psalms34:5 BOEIPA te a paelki vaengah hlampan uh tih a maelhmai tal uh pawh.
Psalms34:6 Mangdaeng loh a khue te khaw BOEIPA loh a yaak dongah citcai boeih lamkah anih te a khang.
Psalms34:7 Amah aka rhih rhoek kah kaepvai ah BOEIPA kah puencawn te rhaeh tih amih te a pumcum sak.

Psalms34:11 Camoe rhoek halo uh. Kai ol he ya uh lah. BOEIPA hinyahnah te nangmih kan cang puei eh.
Psalms34:12 Khohnin then hmuh ham aka lungnah tih hingnah dongah aka omtoem hlang te ulae?
Psalms34:13 Na lai te a thae lamkah
Psalms34:14 A thae te nong tak lamtah hnothen te saii lah. Rhoepnah te tlap lamtah anih te hloem lah.
Psalms34:15 Hlang dueng rhoek soah BOEIPA mik om tih amih kah a pang uh te a hna a kaeng.
Psalms34:16 Thae aka saii rhoek te diklai kah poekkoepnah lamkah khoe ham BOEIPA loh a hmai a thuh.
Psalms34:17 Hlang dueng rhoek a pang uh vaengah BOEIPA loh a yaak tih amamih kah citcai boeih lamkah amih te a huul.
Psalms34:18 Lungbuei aka rhek taengah BOEIPA a yoei pah tih mueihla aka hnipdik te a khang.
Psalms34:19 Hlang dueng kah yoethae he yet dae yoethae khui boeih lamkah anih te BOEIPA loh a huul.
Psalms34:20 Anih kah a rhuh boeih a ngaithuen pah dongah pakhat khaw paep mahpawh.
Psalms34:21 Halang te boethae loh a duek sak vetih
Psalms34:22 A sal rhoek kah a hinglu te BOEIPA loh a lat tih amah dongah aka ying boeih tah boe uh mahpawh.
Psalms35:1 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms35:2 Kai bomnah ham photling neh photlinglen te muk lamtah thoo lah.
Psalms35:3 Kai aka hloem rhoek te caai neh khoh lamtah sulbung neh ham mah lah. Ka hinglu taengah
Psalms35:4 Ka hinglu aka mae rhoek he yahpok saeh lamtah a hmaithae uh saeh. Kai a thae la aka moeh rhoek te a hnuk la balkhong uh saeh lamtah ngam uh saeh.
Psalms35:5 Khohli dong kah cangkik bangla om uh saeh lamtah BOEIPA kah puencawn loh hawk nawn saeh.
Psalms35:6 Amih kah longpuei te hmaisuep neh longhnal la om saeh lamtah BOEIPA kah puencawn loh amih te hloem saeh.
Psalms35:7 A tloengtlaih van la kai ham lawk a tung uh tih ka hinglu ham vaam a too uh.
Psalms35:8 Anih kah a ming mueh la khohli rhamrhael loh kae saeh lamtah lawk a tung te amah man saeh. Anih taengah khohli rhamrhael la tlak thil saeh.
Psalms35:9 Te vaengah ka hinglu loh BOEIPA ah omngaih vetih amah kah khangnah dongah ngaingaih ni.
Psalms35:10 Ka rhuh ka rhong boeih loh
Psalms35:11 Kuthlahnah kah laipai rhoek te ha tlai uh tih kai loh ka ming mueh te n'dawt uh.
Psalms35:12 Ka hinglu kah polpainah ham a then yueng la boethae neh kai n'thuung uh.
Psalms35:13 Tedae kai tah amih te tloh a nue vaengah tlamhni ka pueinak nah. Ka hinglu he yaehnah neh ka phaep vaengah ka thangthuinah loh ka kodang la ha bal.
Psalms35:14 Paya bangla ka manuca bangla ka ngai. A nu kah rhahdoe cangpoem bangla ka van tih kopang doela lu ka singling.
Psalms35:15 Tedae ka cungdonah te ko a khah uh tih tingtun uh. Hlanghaeng rhoek loh ka ming pawt vaengah ka taengah tingtun uh. Kai n'hliphen uh vaengah toeng uh pawh.
Psalms35:16 Lailak loh kai he buh bangla tamdaengtamkha neh a no n'tah thil uh.
Psalms35:17 Aw Boeipa
Psalms35:18 Hlangping a yet taengah nang kan uem vetih pilnam rhaengpuei lakli ah nang kan thangthen ni.
Psalms35:19 A hong mai khaw ka thunkha rhoek loh kai dongah n'kokhah uh tih a lunglilungla la kai aka hmuhuet loh a mik m'mikhip thil boel saeh.
Psalms35:20 Rhoepnah a thui uh mueh la khohmuen he dingsuek tila thailatnah ol te a moeh uh.
Psalms35:21 Te dongah kai taengah a ka a ang uh tih
Psalms35:22 Na hmuh coeng BOEIPA. Na hilphah boeh. Kai taeng lamkah n'lakhla tak boeh ka Boeipa.
Psalms35:23 Kamah kah tuituknah dongah kai ka tiktamnah ham haenghang lamtah thoo laeh ka Pathen neh ka Boeipa.
Psalms35:24 Ka BOEIPA Pathen aw
Psalms35:25 Amih lungbuei ah

Psalms36:2 A mik neh amah kah thaesainah hmuh ham

Psalms36:4 A thingkong dongah boethae te a moeh. Long then pawt ah pai tih a thae te hnawt pawh.
Psalms36:5 Aw BOEIPA na sitlohnah loh vaan duela a pha. Na uepomnah loh khomong a pha.

Psalms37:1 Thaehuet rhoek dongah sai boel lamtah dumlai aka saii taengah thatlai boeh.

Psalms37:8 Thintoek te rhael

Psalms37:10 Tedae kolkalh ah om vetih halang te om mahpawh. A hmuen ham khaw na yakming pah suidae amah om hae mahpawh.
Psalms37:11 Tedae kodo rhoek tah khohmuen a pang uh vetih ngaimongnah cungkuem dongah ngailaem uh ni.
Psalms37:12 Halang loh hlang dueng te a mangtaeng tih a taengah a no a tah thil.
Psalms37:13 A khohnin halo te a hmuh dongah anih te Boeipa loh a nueih thil.
Psalms37:14 Halang rhoek loh cunghang a yueh uh tih mangdaeng cungku sak ham neh a thuem longpuei kah khodaeng ngawn ham lii a phuk uh.
Psalms37:15 Tedae amih kah cunghang loh amamih kah lungbuei te a hun pah vetih a liva khaw tlawt ni.
Psalms37:16 Aka dueng kah a yol a khueh te halang kah muep a tawn lakah then.
Psalms37:17 Halang rhoek kah a ban te khaem vetih hlang dueng te BOEIPA loh a talong ni.
Psalms37:18 Cuemthuek rhoek kah khohnin te BOEIPA loh a ming pah dongah
Psalms37:19 Yoethaenah tue vaengah yak uh pawt vetih lamlum tue vaengah hah uh ni.
Psalms37:20 Tedae halang rhoek te milh uh vetih BOEIPA kah thunkha thunhling te rhamtlim paithen bangla hmata ni. Hmaikhu bangla khumpael ni.
Psalms37:21 Halang loh a pu vaengah thuung pawt dae hlang dueng long tah a rhen tih a paek.
Psalms37:22 Amah kah yoethen a paek rhoek loh khohmuen a pang uh tih a tap rhoek te moeng uh ni.
Psalms37:23 BOEIPA loh hlang kah khokan a cikngae sak tih a longpuei khaw a ngaih pah.
Psalms37:24 BOEIPA loh a kut a talong pah dongah
Psalms37:25 Camoe la ka om tih ka patong coeng dae hlang dueng a hnoo dongah a tiingan loh buh a bih te ka hmuh noek moenih.
Psalms37:26 Hnin takuem a moeihoeih tih cang pu a hlah dongah a tiingan kah yoethennah la poeh.
Psalms37:27 A thae te nong tak lamtah a then saii lah. Te daengah ni kumhal duela kho na sak eh.
Psalms37:28 BOEIPA loh tiktamnah a ngaih dongah a hlangcim rhoek a hnoo mueh la kumhal due a ngaithuen. Tedae halang kah tiingan te a khoe.
Psalms37:29 Hlang dueng loh khohmuen a pang vetih a khuiah yoeyah la kho a sak ni.
Psalms37:30 Hlang dueng kah a ka loh cueihnah a thuep tih a lai loh tiktamnah a thui.
Psalms37:31 A Pathen kah olkhueng loh a lungbuei ah hing tih a khokan khaw paloe pawh.
Psalms37:32 Halang loh hlang dueng te a tawt tih ngawn ham a tlap.
Psalms37:33 BOEIPA loh hlang dueng te halang kut ah hnoo pawt vetih laitloek vaengah anih te boe sak mahpawh.
Psalms37:34 BOEIPA te lamtawn lamtah a long te vai. Te vaengah khohmuen pang sak ham nang n'pomsang vetih halang rhoek a phae te na hmuh ni.
Psalms37:35 Halang hlanghaeng ka hmuh vaengah thinghing mupoe bangla daih.
Psalms37:36 Tedae a khumpael vanneh anih te vik om voelpawh. Anih te ka tlap van dae ka hmu voelpawh.
Psalms37:37 Ngaimong hlang ham khohmai a om pueng dongah a cuemthuek ke dawn lamtah a thuem ke hmu lah.
Psalms37:38 Tedae boekoek rhoek te mitmoeng uh vetih halang rhoek kah hmailong khaw boeih a khat ni.
Psalms37:39 Te dongah hlang dueng rhoek kah loeihnah he BOEIPA taengkah la om tih citcai tue vaengah amih ham lunghim la om.
Psalms37:40 Te dongah BOEIPA loh amih te a bom tih a hlawt. BOEIPA ah a ying uh dongah halang kut lamkah amih te a hlawt tih a khang.
Psalms38:1 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms38:2 Na thaltang loh kai dongah sap ha tlaeh tih na kut loh kai n'nan.
Psalms38:3 Nang kah kosi dongah ka pum he hlang la om voelpawh. Ka tholh dongah ka rhuh a sading pawh.
Psalms38:4 Kai kah thaesainah loh ka lu hang khuk tih
Psalms38:5 Ka anglat dongah
Psalms38:6 Ka ngam paihaeh tangkik hil khohnin yungah kopang neh ka van.
Psalms38:7 Ka uen khaw boeih duih tih
Psalms38:8 Ka lungmit tih ka paep dongah
Psalms38:9 Ka ngaihlihnah boeih he
Psalms38:10 Ka lungbuei a thimpom tih ka thadueng hnoeng. Te dongah ka mik khaw tueng pawh.
Psalms38:11 Ka tlohtat dongah ka lungnah ka paya rhoek loh saisai m'pai tak tih ka huiko khaw a hla lam ni a pai uh coeng.
Psalms38:12 Ka hinglu aka mae rhoek loh n'hlaeh tih
Psalms38:13 Tedae kai tah hnapang bangla ka ya voelpawt tih olmueh loh a ka a ang pawt bangla ka om.
Psalms38:14 Te dongah aka ya thai pawt tih a ka ah toelthamnah aka om pawt hlang bangla ka om.
Psalms38:15 BOEIPA nang dongah ka hangdang tih nang loh nan doo bitni ka Boeipa ka Pathen aw.
Psalms38:16 Te dongah
Psalms38:17 Cungdonah ham ka tawn uh tih ka nganboh loh kamah taengah om taitu.
Psalms38:18 Te dongah kai kah thaesainah te ka doek. Kamah kah tholhnah dongah ka mawn.
Psalms38:19 Tedae ka thunkha rhoek kah hingnah tah ting tih a honghi dongah ka lunguet loh pungtai.
Psalms38:20 Te dongah a then te a thae neh aka thuung rhoek loh kai n'khingkhoek vaengah a then te kamah loh ka vai rhoela ka vai.
Psalms38:21 Ka BOEIPA Pathen aw
Psalms38:22 Kai bomkung la ha tawn uh laeh ka loeihnah Boeipa.
Psalms39:1 “Ka lai te tholh boel saeh tila ka khosing ka ngaithuen vetih ka hmai ah halang khui atah ka ka dongah kahu ka khueh mai bitni
Psalms39:2 Duemnah neh ka tum uh tih a then lamloh ka ngam hatah ka thakkhoeihnah loh n'lawn.
Psalms39:3 Ka kohnuenah neh ka ko khuiah ka lungbuei loh ling sut tih hmai la a rhong dongah ka lai neh
Psalms39:4 “Aw BOEIPA
Psalms39:5 Ka khohnin he kutsom pakhat dawk nan khueh tih ka khosaknah he namah hmai ah a hong la coeng. Te dongah hlang boeih he a honghi la rhip pai. Selah
Psalms39:6 Tedae hlang he mueihlip bangla cet tih a honghi la ko uh. A hmoek dae u loh a coi khaw ming pawh.
Psalms39:7 Tedae balae ka lamtawn pueng. Ka ngaiuepnah he ka Boeipa namah dongah ni a om.
Psalms39:8 Ka dumlai boeih lamkah kai n'huul lah. Hlang ang kah kokhahnah la kai nan khueh moenih.
Psalms39:9 Namah loh na saii coeng dongah ka ka ang muehla ka khom.
Psalms39:10 Na kut rham loh kai n'khah coeng dongah namah kah phaepnah he kai taeng lamkah han khoe laeh.
Psalms39:11 Thaesainah dongah toelthamnah neh hlang na toel. Bungbo kah a cak bangla a hlangthen te na hma sak dongah hlang boeih he a honghi ni. Selah
Psalms39:12 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms39:13 Ka cet tih ka khum hlan ah ka ngai a dip ham khaw kai taeng lamkah mangthong mai dae.
Psalms40:1 BOEIPA te ka lamtawn rhoela ka lamtawn dongah kai taengla ha hooi tih ka ka pang ol a yaak.
Psalms40:2 Te dongah longlonah tangrhom
Psalms40:3 Te phoeiah mamih Pathen koehnah ham laa thai te ka ka dongah han khueh tih a yet loh a hmuh uh vaengah a rhih uh vetih BOEIPA dongah pangtung uh ni.
Psalms40:4 BOEIPA te amah kah pangtungnah la aka khueh hlang te a yoethen tih hlang oek neh laithae vilvak taengla mael pawh.
Psalms40:5 Aw BOEIPA ka Pathen namah loh namah kah khobaerhambae muep na saii dongah kaimih ham na kopoek te nang taengah aka tae pawh. Ka puen tih ka thui te ka doek lakah tahoeng coeng.
Psalms40:6 Hmueih neh khosaa te na hmae moenih. Kai ham hna nan vueh tih hmueihhlutnah neh boirhaem khaw na hoe moenih.
Psalms40:7 Te dongah
Psalms40:8 Ka Boeipa Pathen na kolonah saii ham ka hmae tih na olkhueng loh ka ko khui ah om coeng he
Psalms40:9 Duengnah te hlangping a yet taengah ka phong tih ka kam ka khuem pawt he BOEIPA namah loh na ming.
Psalms40:10 Na duengnah te ka lungbuei khui ah ka thuh pawh. Na uepomnah neh loeihnah te ka thui coeng. Na sitlohnah neh uepomnah te hlangping a yet taengah ka phah pawh.
Psalms40:11 BOEIPA nang loh na haidamnah te
Psalms40:12 Tae lek pawt hil ah yoethae loh kai taengah a li. Kamah kah thaesainah loh kamah n'kae dogah sawt la huut pawh. Ka lu dongkah sam lakah yet tih ka lungbuei ka tlo-oeng sut.
Psalms40:13 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms40:14 Ka hinglu khoengvoep ham aka mae rhoek te yak uh saeh lamtah a hmai tal uh boeih saeh. Kai kah yoethae aka omtoem rhoek khaw a hnuk la balkhong uh saeh lamtah a hmaithae uh saeh.
Psalms40:15 Amih kah yahpohnah dongah kai te
Psalms40:16 Nang aka tlap boeih namah dongah a ngaingaih la a kohoe uh saeh lamtah namah kah loeihnah aka ngaih rhoek tah
Psalms40:17 Ka mangdaeng tih ka khodaeng dae kai he Boeipa loh n'thoelh nawn saeh. Kai kah bomkung neh kai aka hlawt ka Pathen nang na uelh moenih.
Psalms41:1 Yoethaenah hnin ah tattloel te aka cangbam tah a yoethen. Anih te BOEIPA loh a loeih sak.
Psalms41:2 BOEIPA loh anih te a dawndah vetih a hlun ni. Khohmuen nen khaw uem la uem vetih
Psalms41:3 BOEIPA loh kolet soengca dongkah te khaw a duel. A thingkong boeih te a tlohtat lamloh na palet bitni.
Psalms41:4 Kai loh
Psalms41:5 Ka thunkha rhoek loh kai he
Psalms41:6 Hmuh hamla aka pawk boeih tah a lungbuei khaw a poeyoek lam ni a cal. Amah ham boethae a coi tih
Psalms41:7 Ka lunguet boeih loh kai he a thae la m'moeh uh dongah kai taengah tun sisuk uh.
Psalms41:8 “Anih tah a olka aka muen loh a kap thil tih a yalh atah thoh hamla koei mahpawh.
Psalms41:9 Ka ngaimongnah hlang te tah amah dongah ka pangtung dae
Psalms41:10 Tedae BOEIPA nang loh kai n'rhen lamtah amih khoboe te thuung ham kai n'thoh lah.
Psalms41:11 Ka thunkha rhoek te kai soah a yuhui pawt dongah kai taengah na naem te ka ming.
Psalms41:12 Kai khaw kamah kah thincaknah neh kai nan duel tih kumhal namah hmai ah kai nan khueh.
Psalms41:13 Israel kah Pathen BOEIPA tah kumhal lamkah kumhal due a yoethen pai. Amen neh Amen.
Psalms42:1 Rhangrhaeh loh sokca tui a phoe bangla ka hinglu loh Pathen namah te m'phoe.
Psalms42:2 Pathen tah mulhing Pathen oeh dongah ka hinglu loh halthi sut. Me vaengah nim ka caeh vetih Pathen maelhmai ka hmuh ve?
Psalms42:3 Hnin at puet kai taengah
Psalms42:4 Hekah he ka poek vaengah ka hinglu loh ka khuiah paeng. Amih loh Pathen im ah uemonah tamlung ol neh a lilup la a lam uh vaengah ka cet sui tih rhoiding neh vawlhvawlh ka van lah sue.
Psalms42:5 Ka hinglu loh ba dongah na ngam sut tih ka khuiah huenghueng na ko? Amah hmai kah khangnah ka uem ham pueng dongah Pathen te ngaiuep lah.
Psalms42:6 Aw ka Pathen
Psalms42:7 Na tuikun ol neh tuidung te tuidung taengla patoeng a khue. Na tuiphu neh na tuilae boeih loh kai soah n'li.
Psalms42:8 Tedae BOEIPA loh khothaih ah a sitlohnah a uen dongah khoyin ah a lumlaa neh ka hingnah Pathen taengah thangthuinah ka khueh.
Psalms42:9 Ka thaelpang Pathen taengah
Psalms42:10 Kamah kah puencak vaengah amih loh kai taengah hnin at puet
Psalms42:11 Aw ka hinglu badongah na ngam sut tih ka khuiah huenghueng ko? Pathen te ngaiuep lah. Ka hmai kah khangnah neh ka Pathen amah te ka uem dae mako.
Psalms43:1 Aw Pathen kai n'tang sak lamtah hlangcim pawh namtu neh tuituknah te oelh lah. Hlangthai palat neh dumlai hlang kut lamloh kai n'hlawt lah.
Psalms43:2 Pathen namah ngawntah ka lunghim pai ni. Ba ham lae kai nan hlahpham? Thunkha kah haemtaek dongah ba ham lae kopang neh ka van eh?
Psalms43:3 Na khosae neh na oltak te han tueih lah. Amih loh na tlang cim neh na tolhmuen la kai m'mawt saeh lamtah n'thak saeh.
Psalms43:4 Tedae Pathen kah hmueihtuk taengah khaw
Psalms43:5 Aw ka hinglu badongah na ngam sut tih ka khuiah huenghueng na ko? Pathen te ngaiuep lah. Ka hmai kah khangnah neh ka Pathen amah te ka uem dae lah mako?
Psalms44:1 Pathen aw
Psalms44:2 Na kut neh namtom na haek tih a pa rhoek te na thoh. Namtu te talh sak ham a pa rhoek na hlun.
Psalms44:3 A cunghang loh khohmuen pang sak uh pawt tih a bantha loh amih a khang moenih. Tedae amih te na moeithen dongah na bantang kut kah na bantha
Psalms44:4 Ka manghai Pathen nang loh Jakob kah khangnah ham uen lah.
Psalms44:5 Nang rhang neh ka rhal rhoek te ka thoeh uh. Kaimih taengkah aka tlai rhoek na ming neh ka suntlae uh.
Psalms44:6 Ka liva dongah ka pangtung pawt tih ka cunghang loh kai n'khang moenih.
Psalms44:7 Tedae ka rhal kut lamkah kaimih nan khang tih kaimih kah ka lunguet rhoek te na yah sak.
Psalms44:8 Hnin takuem Pathen rhang neh ka thangthen uh tih na ming te kumhal duela ka uem uh ni. Selah
Psalms44:9 Tedae nan hlahpham tih kaimih kah hmaithae na sai dae ka caempuei taengla na pawk tloe moenih.
Psalms44:10 Rhal taeng lamkah kaimih he a hnuk la let nan khuen vaengah ka lunguet rhoek loh amamih vik te tukvat uh thae.
Psalms44:11 Boiva bangla kaimih he maeh la nan mop tih namtom taengah kaimih he nan thaek nan yak.
Psalms44:12 A rhoeh pawt dongah na pilnam na yoih dae amih phu nen khaw na rhoeng hae pawh.
Psalms44:13 Imben rhoek ham kokhahnah
Psalms44:14 Namtom rhoek taengah thuidoeknah neh namtu pawt kah lu thuknah ham ni kaimih he nan khueh.
Psalms44:15 Kamah kah mingthae loh hnin takuem kamah hmuh ah om tih
Psalms44:16 aka veet kah ol neh thunkha nah phu aka lo kah mikhmuh ah a hliphen dongah ka maelhmai he yahpohnah loh a thing khoep.
Psalms44:17 He boeih loh kaimih taengah ha pai dae nang kan hnilh uh pawt tih na paipi dongah rhi ka lat uh moenih.
Psalms44:18 Ka lungbuei he a hnuk la balkhong pawh. Kaimih khokan long khaw na caehlong te phaelh pawh.
Psalms44:19 Tedae pongui kho ah kaimih nan phen tih dueknah hlipkhup neh nan khuk thil.
Psalms44:20 Ka Pathen ming ka hnilh uh tih rhalawt pathen taengah kut ka phuel uh atah
Psalms44:21 Lungbuei kah a huephael aka ming Pathen loh hekah he khe mahpawt a?
Psalms44:22 Nang ham dongah maeh aka ngawn kah boiva la poek uh tih hnin takuem ah kaimih n'ngawn uh.
Psalms44:23 Haenghang laeh ba dongah lae na ih. Ka Boeipa
Psalms44:24 Ba dongah lae na hmai na thuh tih kaimih pum kah phacipphabaem neh hnaemtaeknah na hnilh?
Psalms44:25 Kaimih hinglu loh laipi dongla ngam tih kaimih bung loh diklai la khoem uh coeng.
Psalms44:26 Kaimih kah bomkung aw thoo lamtah na sitlohnah dongah kaimih n'lat dae.
Psalms45:1 Ka lungbuei ah ol then aka phul
Psalms45:2 Namah tah hlang capa rhoek lakah na sawtthen pai. Na ka lamkah mikdaithen khaw a phuet dongah Pathen loh nang tekumhal duela yoethen m'paek.
Psalms45:3 Na mueithennah hlangrhalh neh na rhuepomnah cunghang te na phai ah vah lah.
Psalms45:4 Na rhuepomnah tah oltak
Psalms45:5 Manghai kah thunkha rhoek lungbuei ah na thaltang loh haat tih pilnam loh na kho hmuiah cungku uh saeh.
Psalms45:6 Pathen namah kah ngolkhoel tah kumhal ah cak yoeyah. Na ram kah mancai khaw tlangtlae mancai la om.
Psalms45:7 Duengnah te na lungnah tih halangnah te na hmuhuet. Te dongah nang kah Pathen la ka om
Psalms45:8 Vueino lumim kah na suibai boeih te murrah
Psalms45:9 Manghai rhoek kah a canu rhoek khaw namah kah paithen dongah nuen uh. Na bantang ben ah Ophir sui neh aka thoeihcam uh manghainu te pai.
Psalms45:10 Tanu takhong loh ya lamtah hmu lah. Na hna khaw kaeng lamtah na pilnam neh na pa im te hnilh laeh.
Psalms45:11 Te daengah ni na sakthen te manghai loh n'sahnaih eh. Anih tah na boeipa la a om dongah anih taengah bakop lah.
Psalms45:12 Te vaengah Tyre nu neh pilnam hlanglen rhoek loh na maelhmai te khosaa neh han sak uh ni.
Psalms45:13 Manghai canu tah a khuiah khuehtawn cungkuem om tih a pueinak khaw sui neh a vaeh thil.
Psalms45:14 Rhaekva neh manghai taengla a khuen coeng. Anih hnukah oila a tanu rhoek loh nang taengla han thak uh.
Psalms45:15 Kohoenah neh omngaihnah la a khuen uh tih
Psalms45:16 Na pa rhoek yuengla na ca rhoek om uh vetih amih te diklai pum kah mangpa rhoek la na khueh ni.
Psalms45:17 Namah ming te thawnpuei phoeikah thawnpuei boeih taengah ka thoelh ni. Te dongah pilnam loh kumhal ah nang uem uh yoeyah ni.

Psalms47:5 Pathen tah tamlung neh
