Psalms48:1 BOEIPA tah len tih a tlang cim kah Pathen khopuei ah a sang la thangthen ham tueng.
Psalms48:2 Diklai pum kah a omthennah hmuensang Zion tlang tah a sakthen pai. Tlangpuei tlanghlaep te Manghai Puei kah khorha la om.
Psalms48:3 Te khopuei kah impuei ah Pathen amah te imsang la ha tueng.
Psalms48:4 Manghai rhoek loh tuentah uh thae tih tun khong uh ke.
Psalms48:5 Amih loh a hmuh uh ngaihmang neh let uh tangkhuet tih tamto uh.
Psalms48:6 Amih te thuennah loh cacun bungtloh bangla pahoi a phatawt.
Psalms48:7 Khothoeng yilh neh Tarshish sangpho te na phae.
Psalms48:8 Mamih loh n'yaak uh vanbangla caempuei BOEIPA kah khopuei te m'hmuh uh van coeng. Mamih kah Pathen khopuei te Pathen amah loh kumhal la a thoh ni. Selah
Psalms48:9 Na bawkim khui ah Pathen namah kah sitlohnah te ka poek uh.
Psalms48:10 Pathen namah ming bangla nang koehnah long khaw kho bawt duela boeih a pha tih na bantang kut ah duengnah soep.
Psalms48:11 Namah kah laitloeknah dongah Zion tlang loh a kohoe tih Judah nu rhoek khaw omngaih uh.
Psalms48:12 Zion ke hil lamtah vael lah. A rhaltoengim rhoek te tae lah.
Psalms48:13 A rhalmahvong te na lungbuei ah kuem lah. Anih kah impuei te hmailong kah cadilcahma taengah na thui ham khaw hil lah.
Psalms48:14 Ba dongah tikoinih tekah Pathen te kumhal ah mamih kah Pathen la om yoeyah. Amah loh duek duela mamih m'hmaithawn bitni.
Psalms49:1 Pilnam boeih loh hekah he ya uh lah. Khosaknah dongkah khosa boeih loh hnatun uh.
Psalms49:2 Hlang capa rhoek long khaw
Psalms49:3 Ka ka loh cueihnah a thui vetih ka lungbuei poeknah loh a lungcuei om bitni.
Psalms49:4 Ka hna he thuidoeknah taengla ka kaeng vetih
Psalms49:5 Yoethaenah hnin ah ka khodil kah thaesainah loh kai m'vael dae ba ham lae ka rhih eh?
Psalms49:6 A thadueng dongah pangtung uh tih a khuehtawn a yet neh thangthen uh dae
Psalms49:7 hlang loh a manuca te a lat khaw a lat thai moenih. A tlansum te Pathen taengah a paek thai moenih.
Psalms49:8 A hinglu kah tlansum tah kuelka tih kumhal a toeng.
Psalms49:9 Te koihnih a yoeyah la hing pueng sui tih hlan khaw hmuh pawt sue.
Psalms49:10 Aka cueih rhoek long tah a duek te a hmuh. Aka ang neh kotalh khaw a milh vaengah a khuehtawn te hlang tloe ham a caehtak.
Psalms49:11 Amih kah poeknah nen tah a im te kumhal ah
Psalms49:12 Tedae hlang he umponah khaw a rhaerhong moenih
Psalms49:13 Tetla amamih khosing te a uepnah tih amih kah olthui te a hnukbang rhoek loh a pom uh. Selah
Psalms49:14 Amih te saelkhui kah boiva la tael uh vetih
Psalms49:15 Tedae Pathen loh ka hinglu he saelkhui kut lamkah n'lat dongah kai he n'loh bit ni. Selah
Psalms49:16 Hlang pakhat loh boei tih a im kah thangpomnah loh pungtai cakhaw rhih boeh.
Psalms49:17 A duek vaengah pakhat khaw khuen mahpawh. A thangpomnah loh anih te suntlak puei mahpawh.
Psalms49:18 A hing vaengah a hinglu te yoethen a paek tih namah te na hoeikhang vaengah nang uem uh dae
Psalms49:19 A napa rhoek kah cadilcahma la cet vetih yoeyah la vangnah hmu uh mahpawh.
Psalms49:20 Hlang he umponah neh om dae a yakming pawt atah rhamsa aka hmata rhoek bangla om.
Psalms50:1 Pathen
Psalms50:2 Pathen kah a sakthen a soepnah loh Zion lamkah ha sae.
Psalms50:3 Mamih kah Pathen te halo tih omlip pawh. A hmai ah hmai loh a hlawp tih a taengvai ah boehoeng khohli.
Psalms50:4 A pilnam te laitloek ham a sosang kah vaan rhoek neh diklai te a tuentah.
Psalms50:5 Hmueih neh ka paipi aka saii
Psalms50:6 Pathen amah loh lai a tloek dongah a duengnah te vaan rhoek long khaw a thui uh. Selah
Psalms50:7 Ka pilnam aw ya van lah. Israel taengah ka voek vetih Pathen kamah
Psalms50:8 Nang kah hmueih neh na hmueihhlutnah dongah nang kan tluung moenih. Tekah hmueih te Ka hmai ah om taitu ngawn.
Psalms50:9 Na im kah vaitotal khaw
Psalms50:10 Duup kah mulhing boeih neh tlang thawngkhat kah rhamsa boeih ke kamah koe ni.
Psalms50:11 Tlang kah vaa boeih te ka ming tih kohong kah satlung khaw kamah taengah om coeng.
Psalms50:12 Lunglai neh a khuikah boeih te kamah taengah om tih ka lamlum cakhaw nang taengah ka thui mahpawh.
Psalms50:13 Vaito lueng saa te ka caak vetih kikong thii te ka ok aya?
Psalms50:14 Uemonah te Pathen taengah nawn lamtah na olcaeng te Khohni taengah thuung lah.
Psalms50:15 Te dongah citcai tue vaengah kai n'khue lah. Nang kan pumcum vetih kai nan thangpom ni.
Psalms50:16 Tedae Pathen loh halang te
Psalms50:17 Thuituennah na hmuhuet tih ka ol he na hnukla na voeih.
Psalms50:18 Hlanghuen na hmuh vaengah
Psalms50:19 Boethae ham na ka na hnonah tih na lai kah thailatnah neh na sun.
Psalms50:20 Na pacaboeina taengah na ngol tih na cal van dae na manu ca te boekoekthingka na paek.
Psalms50:21 Hekah he na saii vaengah ka omlip hatah namah bangla om khaw om ni tila na poek. Nang te kan tluung vetih na mikhmuh ah kan yan ni.
Psalms50:22 He he Pathen aka hnilh rhoek loh yakming uh laeh. Kam poel vetih aka huul om pawt ve.
Psalms50:23 Uemonah aka nawn loh kai n'thangpom tih longpuei a rhoek a bah dongah Pathen kah daemnah te anih ka tueng ni
Psalms51:1 Pathen aw kai n'rhen lah. Na sitlohnah neh na haidamnah a cungkuem vanbangla ka boekoeknah he han huih mai.
Psalms51:2 Kai kah thaesainah loh a yet khaw a yet oeh dongah kai n'sil lamtah ka tholhnah lamkah kai n'caihcil lah.
Psalms51:3 Kamah kah boekoek te kamah loh ka ming tih ka tholhnah loh kamah hmaiah om taitu.
Psalms51:4 Nang namah bueng taengah ka tholh tih na mikhmuh ah boethae ka saii. Tedae na thui vaengah nan tang sak tih nan cawh vaengah nan cim sak.
Psalms51:5 Thaesainah neh ka thang tih tholhnah neh a nu loh kai n'yom.
Psalms51:6 Kodang khuikah oltak te na ngaih dongah cueihnah na kael neh kai nan tuk nan kil.
Psalms51:7 Pumpiding neh kai nan cil daengah ni ka caihcil eh. Kai nan silh daengah ni vuelsong lakah ka bok eh.
Psalms51:8 Omngaihnah neh kohoenah te kai nan yaak sak dongah na khaem tangtae rhuhrhong long khaw omngaih uh saeh.
Psalms51:9 Ka tholhnah dongah na maelhmai thuh mai lamtah ka thaesainah boeih he han huih lah.
Psalms51:10 Pathen aw kai ham aka caih lungbuei han suen lamtah ka khui kah mueihla he cikngae la pan han tlaih lah.
Psalms51:11 Kai he namah mikhmuh lamkah m'voei boel lamtah kai taengkah Mueihla Cim lo boel mai.
Psalms51:12 Na daemnah
Psalms51:13 Boekoek rhoek te na khosing ka cang puei vetih hlangtholh rhoek loh nang taengla ha bal uh bitni.
Psalms51:14 Pathen
Psalms51:15 Ka Boeipa aw

Psalms51:17 Pathen kah a ngaih hmueih tah mueihla aka paeng ke ni. Lungbuei aka paeng tih aka paep te Pathen nang loh na hnawt moenih.

Psalms51:19 Te vaengah

Psalms67:2 Te dongah na longpuei te diklai dongah
Psalms67:3 Pathen namah kah pilnam rhoek loh nang uem uh saeh. Pilnam boeih loh nang uem uh saeh.
Psalms67:4 Pilnam rhoek taengah a tlangtlae la lai na tloek tih

Psalms67:7 Pathen loh mamih yoethen m'paek vetih diklai khobawt boeih loh amah te a rhih uh ni.
Psalms68:1 Pathen he thoo vetih a thunkha rhoek taekyak uh mako. A lunguet rhoek khaw a mikhmuh lamkah rhaelrham uh mako.
Psalms68:2 Halang rhoek he Pathen hmai ah hmaikhu a yah bangla na yah vetih
Psalms68:3 Tedae hlang dueng rhoek tah kohoenah neh Pathen hmai ah sundaep a kohoe uh saeh lamtah ngaingaih uh saeh.
Psalms68:4 Pathen te hlai lamtah a ming te tingtoeng uh lah. Vaan kolken dongah aka ngol BOEIPA ming te pomsang uh lamtah a hmai ah sundaep uh.
Psalms68:5 Amah kah khuirhung hmuencim ah aka om Pathen tah cadah rhoek kah a napa neh nuhmai rhoek kah laitloekkung la om.
Psalms68:6 Pathen loh oingaih cangloeng te imlo neh kho a sak sak tih thongtla rhoek te lolmangcil neh a khuen. Tedae thinthah rhoek tah rhamrhae ah kho a sak uh.
Psalms68:7 Pathen aw na pilnam hmai ah na caeh vaengah
Psalms68:8 Israel Pathen
Psalms68:9 Pathen namah loh kothoh khonal nan suep tih thahnoeng khaw na rho neh na thoh.
Psalms68:10 Pathen nang loh mangdaeng ham na hnothen te na soepboe pah tih a khuiah na hingnah loh kho a sak uh.
Psalms68:11 Ka Boeipa loh a olkhueh te a paek tih olthangthen aka phong caempuei khaw len.
Psalms68:12 Manghai rhoek kah caempuei loh yong rhoela yong uh tih im kah toitlim te kutbuem la a tael.
Psalms68:13 Tuvong ah na yalh uh vaengkah te

Psalms68:15 Pathen kah tlang
Psalms68:16 Ba dongah tlang som rhoek loh na pangoe uh. Tekah tlang te Pathen amah loh khosak thil ham a nai tih BOEIPA loh yoeyah la kho a sak thil ni.
Psalms68:17 Pathen kah leng tah a rhaepnah thawng thawngrha lo. Hmuencim kah aka om Sinai kah amih lakli ah Boeipa om.
Psalms68:18 Hmuen sang la na luei tih tamna rhoek na sol vaengah BOEIPA Pathen namah loh khosak puei ham hlang taeng neh thinthah rhoek taengkah kutdoe pataeng na doe.

Psalms68:30 Capu mulhing ke tluung lah. Pilnam saelca rhoek neh aka lueng rhaengpuei khaw cak boeng neh a san thil. Caemrhal aka ngaih pilnam rhoek khaw a haeh.

Psalms68:35 Pathen namah kah rhokso ah a rhih om pai. Israel Pathen amah loh pilnam taengah sarhi neh thadueng a paek. Pathen tah a yoethen pai saeh.
Psalms69:1 Tui loh ka hinglu te ham pha dongah Pathen aw kai n'khang lah.
Psalms69:2 Sihnok laedil la ka buek tih tungtainah om kolla tui dung la ka pha voek dongah tuili loh kai n'yo coeng.
Psalms69:3 Ka pang te khaw ka kohnue coeng. Ka olrhong khaw koh coeng. Ka Pathen te ka lamtawn ah ka mik kha coeng.
Psalms69:4 Lunglilungla la ka lunguet rhoek loh ka lu dongkah sam lakah yet. A honghi mai neh kai aka biit ka thunkha rhoek loh yet uh. Ka huen pawt te ka sah.
Psalms69:5 Ka anglat te Pathen namah loh na ming tih ka dumlai he nang taeng lamloh a thuh uh moenih.
Psalms69:6 Ka Boeipa caempuei Yahovah
Psalms69:7 Nang ham te kokhahnah ka phueih tih ka maelhmai he mingthae loh a dah.
Psalms69:8 Ka pacaboeina rhoek taengah ka hlanglak tih ka manu ca rhoek taengah ka kholong.
Psalms69:9 Na im thatlainah dongah kai n'yoop tih nang aka veet rhoek kah kokhahnah khaw kai soah tla.
Psalms69:10 Te dongah ka hinglu kah yaehnah neh ka rhap dae kai taengah kokhahnah la pawk.
Psalms69:11 Ka tlamhni pueinak ka bai vaengah amih ham thuidoeknah la ka om.
Psalms69:12 Vongka kah aka ngol rhoek loh kai taengah lolmang a taeng uh tih yu o rhoek kah rhotoeng la ka om khoeng.
Psalms69:13 Tedae Pathen kah kolonah tue vaengah
Psalms69:14 Tangnong khui lamkah kai n'huul lamtah m'buek sak boeh. Ka lunguet neh tui dung lamkah n'huul lah.
Psalms69:15 Tuili tui loh kai n'yo boel saeh lamtah a laedil la kai n'yoop boel saeh. Tangrhom loh kai a ka n'khuep thil boel saeh.
Psalms69:16 Na sitlohnah a then dongah kai n'doo lah BOEIPA. Na haidamnah cungkuem neh kai taengla ha mael lah.
Psalms69:17 Te dongah na maelhmai te na sal taeng lamkah thuh boel mai. Ka taengah n'daengdaeh dongah a loe la kai n'doo dae.
Psalms69:18 Ka hinglu taengla ha yoei lamtah n'tlan dae. Ka thunkha rhoek kongah kai n'lat dae.
Psalms69:19 Namah loh kai kah kokhahnah
Psalms69:20 Kokhahnah dongah ka lungbuei rhek tih ka mangoeng sut. Te dongah aka suem ham ka lamtawn dae om pawt tih
Psalms69:21 Ka buh dongah anrhat han hlum uh tih ka tuihalh vaengkah ham a thuui n'tul uh.

Psalms69:24 Amih te na kosi lun thil lamtah na thintoek thinsa loh amih te doom saeh.
Psalms69:25 Amih kah lumim te kho pong la om saeh lamtah a dap ah khosa hlang om boel saeh.
Psalms69:26 Na ngawn te a hloem uh tih na rhok kah nganboh te a tae uh.
Psalms69:27 Thaesainah te amamih kah thaesainah neh a koei dongah nang kah duengnah te bawn uh boel saeh.
Psalms69:28 Hingnah cabu khui lamkah phae lamtah hlang dueng rhoek neh hmaih daek boeh.

Psalms69:32 Kodo rhoek loh a hmuh vetih a kohoe uh ni. Pathen aka tlap rhoek

Psalms70:1 Kai aka huul ham Pathen nang ha om lah. Kai bomkung la BOEIPA nang ha tawn uh lah.
Psalms70:2 Ka hinglu aka mae rhoek te yahpok uh saeh lamtah a hmai tal uh saeh. Kai kah yoethae aka omtoem rhoek khaw a hnuk la balkhong uh saeh lamtah a hmaithae uh saeh.
Psalms70:3 “Ahuei ahuei
Psalms70:4 Nang aka tlap rhoek boeih tah namah dongah ngaingaih uh vetih a kohoe uh ni. Namah kah khangnah aka lungnah rhoek loh

Psalms71:1 BOEIPA nang dongah ka ying tih
Psalms71:2 Na duengnah neh
Psalms71:3 Caeh taitu vaengkah ham

Psalms71:6 Bungko khui lamkah nang dongah ka hangdang coeng. Namah loh a nu ko khui lamkah kai nan poh. Namah te kai kah koehnah la na om yoeyah.
Psalms71:7 Hlang tom taengah mikdairhueng bangla ka om cakhaw namah te ka hlipyingnah sarhi la na om.
Psalms71:8 Namah kah boeimangnah rhangneh namah koehnah te hnin takuem ka ka ah baetawt.
Psalms71:9 Ka patong tue vaengah kai m'voei boeh. Ka thadueng a bawt vaengah kai nan hnoo mahpawh.
Psalms71:10 Ka thunkha rhoek loh kai taengah cal uh tih ka hinglu dawn ham tun caai uh.
Psalms71:11 “Anih he Pathen loh a hnoo coeng dongah hloem uh sih lamtah tu uh sih. Anih aka huul ham khaw hlang a om moenih
Psalms71:12 Pathen aw kai taeng lamkah lakhla tak boeh. Kai bomkung ham ka Pathen nang ha tawn rhoe ha tawn uh laeh.
Psalms71:13 Ka hinglu aka khingkhoek rhoek te yahpok uh saeh lamtah hmata uh saeh. Kai kah yoethae aka hue rhoe te kokhahnah neh mingthae loh thing uh saeh.
Psalms71:14 Tedae kai loh ka ngaiuep yoeyah vetih namah koehnah te boeih ka khoep ni.
Psalms71:15 A pum ka ming pawt cakhaw namah kah loeihnah dongah na duengnah ni ka ka loh khohnin yungah a thui eh.

Psalms71:20 Kai he citcai neh yoethaenah muep nan hmuh khaw nan hmuh sak dae koep nan hing khaw nan hing sak vetih diklai laedil lamkah koep nan lat bal ni.
Psalms71:21 Ka lennah nan pueh vetih kai nan hloep bal ni.
Psalms71:22 Kai khaw ka Pathen namah kah uepomnah te thangpa toembael neh kan uem vetih Israel kah a cim namah te rhotoeng neh ka tingtoeng ni.
Psalms71:23 Ka hinglu he na lat coeng dongah nang te kan tingtoeng vaengah ka hmui ka lai neh ka tamhoe ni.
Psalms71:24 Kai kah yoethae aka hue rhoek loh yah a poh uh tih a hmai a tal uh coeng dongah ka lai long khaw hnin takuem nang kah duengnah te a thuep ni.
Psalms72:1 Pathen aw
Psalms72:2 Na pilnam te duengnah neh
Psalms72:3 Tlang rhoek neh som rhoek loh duengnah dongah pilnam ham rhoepnah hang khuen uh saeh.
Psalms72:4 Pilnam mangdaeng rhoek te tang sak saeh. Khodaeng ca rhoek te khang saeh lamtah hlang aka hnaemtaek te phop saeh.
Psalms72:5 Khomik a om khui neh hla a om khuiah cadilcahma kah cadilcahma loh namah n'rhih uh saeh.
Psalms72:6 Lotul kah khotlan bangla
Psalms72:7 Amah tuetang van vaengah hla loh a hmop hlandue ngaimongnah cungkuem neh a dueng la cawn saeh.
Psalms72:8 Te vaengah tuitunli lamkah tuitunli due khaw tuiva lamkah diklai khobawt due taemrhai saeh.
Psalms72:9 Anih hmai ah kohong rhoek loh cungkueng uh saeh lamtah a thunkha rhoek loh laipi laem uh saeh.
Psalms72:10 Tarshish neh tuikaeng manghai rhoek loh khosaa han tloeng uh saeh. Sheba neh Seba manghai rhoek loh kutdoe neh moe uh saeh.
Psalms72:11 Manghai rhoek boeih khaw anih taengah bakop uh saeh. Namtom rhoek boeih loh a taengah thothueng saeh.
Psalms72:12 Khodaeng loh pang tih mangdaeng aka bom a om pawt vaengah anih loh huul saeh.
Psalms72:13 Tattloel neh khodaeng te rhen saeh lamtah khodaeng kah hinglu te khang saeh.
Psalms72:14 Tattloel neh vawtthoek kah a thii te a mikhmuh ah a phutlo. Te dongah amih kah hinglu te hnaephnapnah kut lamkah neh kuthlahnah khui lamkah tlan pah saeh.
Psalms72:15 A hing van vaengah Sheba kah sui te anih taengah pae saeh. Te phoeiah anih ham thangthui pah saeh lamtah hnin takuem anih te yoethen pae yoeyah saeh.
Psalms72:16 Khohmuen ah cangpai cangthawt om saeh lamtah
Psalms72:17 Kumhal ah a ming om saeh. Khomik a om khuiah anih ming te rhoeng rhoe rhoeng saeh. Namtom boeih khaw anih rhang neh a yoethen uh saeh lamtah anih te a uem uh saeh.

Psalms73:5 hlanghing kah thakthaenah loh amih te nan pawt tih hlanghing taengkah lucik khaw ya uh pawh.

Psalms73:7 A mik tha te coe tih

Psalms73:14 Tedae hnin takuem lucik neh ka om tih mincang takuem ah kai taengah toelthamnah ha om.
Psalms73:15 Te tlam te ka tae koinih na ca rhoek kah thawnpuei te kan hnukpoh tak ve ka ti.
Psalms73:16 Hekah he ming ham ka moeh dae ka mik ah thakthaenah la om.
Psalms73:17 Pathen kah rhokso khuila ka kun daengah amih kah hmailong te ka yakming.
Psalms73:18 Amih te long hnal ah na khueh tih pocinah la na cungku sak taktak.
Psalms73:19 Mikhaptok ah mueirhih loh imsuep neh a thup uh tih a cing te metlam a om uh.

Psalms73:21 Ka thinko loh khikhi hal tih ka hmuet a phawt vaengah.

Psalms73:23 Tedae kai tah nang taengah ka om taitu tih ka bantang kut nan tuuk.
Psalms73:24 Na cilsuep neh kai nan mawt tih thangpomnah hnukah kai nan khoem ni.

Psalms74:1 Pathen aw ba aih nim yoeyah la na hlahpham aih? Na thintoek loh na rhamtlim kah boiva taengah mawngmawng khuu.
Psalms74:2 Hlamat kah na lai na hlangboel khaw
Psalms74:3 Hmuencim khuikah thunkha rhoek te yoeyah pocinah neh boeih talh ham na khokan te pomsang lah.
Psalms74:4 Nang kah tingtunnah khui ah nang aka daengdaeh rhoek te kawk uh tih miknoek khaw amamih kah miknoek te a khueh uh.
Psalms74:5 Thing ding ah a so la hai aka thueng bangla tueng.
Psalms74:6 Tedae ah hai neh a thuk a thingthuk boeih khaw thilung neh nawn a phop uh.
Psalms74:7 Na rhokso te hmai neh a hoeh uh tih na ming aka phuei tolhmuen te diklai duela a poeih uh.
Psalms74:8 A lungbuei nen tah
Psalms74:9 Mahmih kah miknoek khaw m'hmu uh pawh. Tonghma om voelpawt tih mamih khuiah aka ming thai he mevaeng hil nim a om pawt ve?
Psalms74:10 Pathen loh me hil nim rhal loh a veet vetih thunkha loh na ming he a yoeyah la a tlaitlaek venim?
Psalms74:11 Balae tih na kut na yueh. Na rhang kah na oltlueh khui lamloh na bantang kut neh khap kanoek saw.
Psalms74:12 Tedae Pathen he hlamat lamkah diklai tollung ah khangnah aka saii ka manghai pai ni.
Psalms74:13 Namah loh tuitunli te na sarhi neh na kak sak tih tui tuihnam rhoek kah a lu te na phop pah.
Psalms74:14 Nang loh Leviathan kah a lu te na neet tih kohong ham neh pilnam ham caak la na paek.

Psalms74:16 Khothaih khaw namah kah
Psalms74:17 Namah loh diklai kah rhilung boeih na suem tih khohal neh sikca khaw namah loh na hlinsai.
Psalms74:18 BOEIPA aka veet thunkha neh na ming yah aka bai pilnam ang he poek lah.
Psalms74:19 Na vahui kah a hinglu te satlung taengla na pae pawt tih na mangdaeng rhoek kah a hingnah khaw a yoeyah la na hnilh moenih.
Psalms74:20 Kuthlahnah rhamtlim te diklai khohmuep khuiah a baetawt dongah paipi te paelki laeh.
Psalms74:21 Mangdaeng hmaithae khaw hlanghnaep pahnap la mael boel saeh lamtah na ming te khodaeng rhoek thangthen uh saeh.
Psalms74:22 Pathen aw thoo laeh. Namah kah tuituknah khaw oelh van laeh. Hlang ang loh hnin takuem nang n'kokhahnah ke thoelh laeh.
Psalms74:23 Nang aka daengdaeh rhoek kah ol te na hnilh moenih. Nang aka tlai thil rhoek kah longlonah tah cet yoeyah.

Psalms77:1 Pathen taengah ka ol ka huel tih ka pang. Pathen taengah ka ol ka huel tih kai taengla a hna han kaeng.
Psalms77:2 Ka citcai tue vaengah ka Boeipa ka toem. Khoyin ah ka ban ka lam tih kha tlaih pawh. Ka hinglu hloep ham a aal.
Psalms77:3 Pathen ka ngaidam tih ka ko. Lolmang ka taeng vaengah ka mueihla rhae.
Psalms77:4 Ka mikhmuh ah miklung nan buem tih kai n'cahoeh he ka thui lek pawh. Selah
Psalms77:5 Khosuen hlamat kum kah khohnin te ka poek.
Psalms77:6 Khoyin ah ka rhotoeng ka ngaidam. Ka thinko ah lolmang ka taeng tih ka mueihla a sat.
Psalms77:7 Ka Boeipa loh kumhal duelam nim n'hlahpham vetih koekthoek kan doe bal eh ti voel pawt nim?
Psalms77:8 A sitlonah loh a yoeyah la a toeng vetih a olkhueh loh cadilcahma phoeikah cadilcahma ham bawtpat pawn a ya?
Psalms77:9 Pathen loh sitlohthamlam ham a hnilh tih a haidamnah te thintoek loh a uep bal nim? Selah
Psalms77:10 Ka nue coeng ka ti vaengah he Khohni kah bantang kut loh n'talh.
Psalms77:11 BOEIPA kah khoboe tah ka ngaidam rhoe ka ngaidam pai tih hlamat lamkah na khobaerhambae khaw ka ngaidam.
Psalms77:12 Te dongah na bisai boeih te ka thuep vetih na bibi boeih te lolmang ka taeng puei ni.
Psalms77:13 Pathen namah kah longpuei cim ah mebang pathen lae Pathen bangla aka tanglue bal?
Psalms77:14 Khobaerhambae aka saii Pathen namah loh pilnam rhoek taengah na sarhi khaw na tueng sak.
Psalms77:15 Na pilnam Jakob neh Joseph koca te bantha neh na tlan. Selah
Psalms77:16 Tui rhoek loh Pathen namah m'hmuh uh. Tui rhoek loh namah m'hmuh uh vaengah kilkul uh tih a laedil pataeng tlai.
Psalms77:17 Khomai loh tui han hawk. Khomong khaw a ol hum. Na thaltang rhoek khaw thui.
Psalms77:18 Humhae khui lamkah na khohum ol ah rhaek la phaa tih lunglai khaw tlai coeng
Psalms77:19 Tuitunli dongkah na longpuei neh tui puei dongah khaw na lamkat patoeng
Psalms77:20 Na pilnam te Moses kut
Psalms78:1 Ka pilnam aw ka olkhueng he hnatun uh lah. Ka ka lamkah olthui dongah na hna hooi uh lah.
Psalms78:2 Hlamat lamkah olkael te ka ka dongkah thuidoeknah neh ka ong vetih ka thaa dae ni.
Psalms78:3 Tekah te n'yaak uh tih m'ming uh vanbangla a pa rhoek loh mamih taengah han thui uh.
Psalms78:4 BOEIPA koehnah
Psalms78:5 Jakob ham laipainah a khueng tih Israel dongah olkhueng la a ling te ni a ca rhoek taengah patoeng ming sak ham a pa rhoek a uen.
Psalms78:6 Te daengah ni caldilcahma loh a ming uh eh. Hmailong ah a cun camoe rhoek long khaw a thoh uh puei vetih a ca rhoek taengah a tae pa eh.
Psalms78:7 Te vaengah a uepnah khaw Pathen pum ah a khueh uh vetih Pathen kah khoboe te hnilh uh mahpawh. A olpaek khaw a kueinah uh.
Psalms78:8 A napa rhoek bangla thinthah neh hlang koek cadil
Psalms78:9 Liva aka muk tih aka kaap Ephraim ca rhoek khaw caemrhal tue vaengah a hnuk la bung uh.
Psalms78:10 Pathen kah paipi te ngaithuen uh pawt tih a olkhueng neh pongpa ham khaw a aal uh.
Psalms78:11 Te dongah amah kah bibi neh khobaerhambae amih a tueng te a hnilh uh.
Psalms78:12 Egypt kho Zoan hmuen kah a napa rhoek mikhmuh ah khobaerhambae a saii pah.
Psalms78:13 Tuitunli te a phih pah tih amih a kat puei vaengah tui khaw som bangla pai.
Psalms78:14 Te phoeiah amih te khothaih ah cingmai neh khoyin puet te hmai vang neh a mawt.
Psalms78:15 Khosoek ah lungpang rhoek te a hep pah tih tuidung bangla muep a tul.
Psalms78:16 Thaelpang khuikah tuicip a thoeng sak tih tuiva tui bangla a hlawn.
Psalms78:17 Tedae rhamrhae ah Khohnite a koek uh tih a taengah tholh ham koep a koei uh.
Psalms78:18 Amih kah hinglu dongah caak a hoe uh te khaw a thinko neh Pathen ni a noemcai uh.
Psalms78:19 Pathen taengah khaw
Psalms78:20 Lungpang a boh tih tui a phuet vaengah soklong la long coeng ke. A pilnam ham buh khaw a paek thai vetih maeh a tael pah venim?
Psalms78:21 BOEIPA loh a yaak vaengah a paan tih Jakob te hmai neh a kolh. Israel taengah khaw thintoek a khuen bal.
Psalms78:22 Pathen te tangnah uh pawt tih Boeipa kah khangnah dongah a pangtung uh pawt dongah ni.
Psalms78:23 Tedae a sokah khomong te a uen tih vaan thohkhaih rhoi te a ong.
Psalms78:24 Te dongah amih kah a cak ham manna a tlan sak tih amih te vaan cangpai a paek.
Psalms78:25 Hlang loh rhaelnu buh a caak tih lampu khaw amih ham kodam la a thak pah.
Psalms78:26 Vaan lamkah kanghawn a hlah tih a sarhi neh tuithim yilh khaw a thawn.
Psalms78:27 Te dongah maeh loh laipi bangla
Psalms78:28 a dap kaepvai kah a lambong lakli ah a hlak pah.
Psalms78:29 Te dongah a caak uh tih muep cung uh. Amih kah ngaihlihnah vanbangla amih te a paek.
Psalms78:30 A ka dongah caak a paem uh pueng akhaw amamih kah hoehhamnah te kholong uh tak pawh.
Psalms78:31 Te dongah Pathen thintoek amih taengla loh pai. Te vaengah amih khuikah thaomthathueng rhoek te a ngawn tih Israel cadongcaloe rhoek te a tulh.
Psalms78:32 Te boeih khui lamkah tholh uh bal pueng tih Boeipa kah khobaerhambae te tangnah uh pawh.
Psalms78:33 Te dongah amih kah khohnin loh a honghi la
Psalms78:34 Amih te a ngawn van daengah ni Boeipa te a tlap uh. Mael uh tih Pathen a toem uh.
Psalms78:35 Te daengah amih kah lungpang Pathen neh amih aka tlan Khohni Pathen te a ngaidam uh.
Psalms78:36 Tedae amah te a ka neh a hloih uh tih a lai neh a taengah laithae uh.
Psalms78:37 Amih kah lungbuei te khaw Boeipa taengah hong pawt tih a paipi te tangnah uh pawh.
Psalms78:38 A thinphoei loh thaesainah khaw a dawth tih amih te phae pawh. Te dongah a thintoek khaw puet a hnop tih a kosi khaw boeih sah pawh.
Psalms78:39 Amih te pumsa lah om tih yilh loh a khum phoeiah ha mael pawt te khaw a poek.
Psalms78:40 Khosoek ah Boeipa mat a koek uh vanbangla khopong ah Boeipa te a noih uh.
Psalms78:41 Te dongah Pathen te koekthoek a noemcai uh tih Israel kah hlang Cim te a phen uh.
Psalms78:42 Rhal khui lamkah Boeipa kut loh amih a lat khohnin te poek uh pawh.
Psalms78:43 Amah kah miknoek te Egypt ah
Psalms78:44 A sokko khaw thii la a poeh sak tih tuicip kangna khaw o uh thai pawh.
Psalms78:45 Amih aka yok ham pil neh amih aka phae ham bukak khaw a hlah pah.
Psalms78:46 A cangthaih te phol taengla
Psalms78:47 Amih kah misur te rhael neh
Psalms78:48 A rhamsa te rhael taengla
Psalms78:49 A thintoek thinsa kah a thinpom khaw
Psalms78:50 A thintoek ham a hawn a saelh coeng. Amih kah hinglu te dueknah lamkah khaw hnaih pawh. Te dongah a hingnah te duektahaw taengla a paek pah.
Psalms78:51 Egypt kah caming boeih neh Ham dap kah thahuem tanglue te a ngawn pah.
Psalms78:52 Tedae a pilnam te boiva bangla a khuen tih khosoek khuiah tuping bangla a hmaithawn.
Psalms78:53 Amih te ngaikhuek la a mawt tih rhih uh pawt dae a thunkha rhoek te tuitunli loh a khuk.
Psalms78:54 Te dongah amah kah bantang kut neh a men tlang cim khorhi la amih te a khuen.
Psalms78:55 Namtom rhoek te amih hmai lamkah a haek pah tih rho la rhilong te a suem pah. Te dongah Israel koca loh amih kah dap ah kho a sak uh.
Psalms78:56 Tedae Khohni Pathen te a noemcai uh tih a koek uh
Psalms78:57 A napa rhoek bangla balkhong uh tih hnukpoh uh. Lii a pawl la poeh uh.
Psalms78:58 A hmuensang neh Boeipa a veet uh tih a mueidaep neh a thatlai sak uh.
Psalms78:59 Pathen loh a yaak vaengah lungoe tih Israel te rhep a hnawt.
Psalms78:60 Te dongah Shiloh pohmuen neh hlang lakli kah a khueh dap te a phap sut.
Psalms78:61 A sarhi te tamna la
Psalms78:62 A pilnam te cunghang taengla a tloeng tih a rho taengah khaw lungoe.
Psalms78:63 Tongpang rhoek te hmai loh a hlawp dongah oila rhoek thangthen uh pawh.
Psalms78:64 A khosoih rhoek te cunghang dongah cungku uh tih a nuhmai rhoek khaw rhap uh pawh.
Psalms78:65 Te vaengah Boeipa loh aka ip muelh bangla
Psalms78:66 A rhal rhoek te tloep a tloek tih amih te kumhal kokhahnah la a khueh.
Psalms78:67 Joseph kah dap khaw a hnawt tih Ephraim kah mancai te a tuek tloe moenih.
Psalms78:68 Tedae a lungnah Zion tlang kah Judah mancai te a tuek.
Psalms78:69 Te dongah a rhokso te a sang la a sak tih kumhal due diklai bangla a suen.
Psalms78:70 A sal David te a tuek dongah boiva vongup lamkah a loh.
Psalms78:71 A pilnam Jakob neh a rho Israel te luem puei ham ni anih te cacun hnuk lamkah a khuen.

Psalms79:4 Kaimih he imben rhoek kah kokhahnah
Psalms79:5 BOEIPA aw me hil nim na thin a toek ve? Na thatlainah te hmai bangla rhong yoeyah aya?

Psalms81:3 Hlasae
Psalms81:4 Hekah he Israel ham Jakob Pathen kah laitloeknah oltlueh coeng ni.
Psalms81:5 Ka yak ming mueh ol
Psalms81:6 A laengpang dongkah hnorhih te ka khoe pah tih a kut khaw voh khui lamkah loeih.
Psalms81:7 Citcai khuiah nan khue tih nang kan pumcum sak. Khohum hlip lamkah nang kan doo tih Meribah tui ah nang kan loep kan dak. Selah
Psalms81:8 Ka pilnam loh hnatun lamtah kai ol te na hnatun atah Israel nang taengah ka laipai ni.

Psalms84:1 Caempuei BOEIPA namah kah tolhmuen tah

Psalms85:1 BOEIPA namah loh khohmuen he na moeithen tih Jakob khuikah thongtla thongtla te na hlawt.
Psalms85:2 Na pilnam kah thaesainah na phueih pah tih
Psalms85:3 Na thinpom te boeih na rhoe tih thintoek thinsa te na hnop.
Psalms85:4 Kaimih kah khangnah Pathen aw kaimih he koep n'thoh lamtah kaimih taengkah na konoinah te dip sak laeh.
Psalms85:5 Kumhal duela kaimih taengah na thintoek vetih
Psalms85:6 Namaelmahpawtnim? Kaimihnan hingsak vetih na pilnam loh namah dongah a kohoe mako.
Psalms85:7 BOEIPA namah kah sitlohnah te kaimih n'tueng lamtah na khangnah te kaimih taengah m'pae lah.
Psalms85:8 A pilnam taeng neh a hlangcim taengah ngaimongnah a thui dongah BOEIPA Pathen loh a thui te ni ka hnatun eh. Tedae anglatnah la mael boel saeh.
Psalms85:9 Mamih kho khuiah thangpomnah rhaehrhong sak ham amah rhih taengah BOEIPA khangnah te rhep yoei sak lah.
Psalms85:10 Sitlohnah neh uepomnah loh humcui rhoi tih duengnah neh rhoepnah loh mok uh rhoi.
Psalms85:11 Diklai lamkah uepomnah poe tih vaan lamkah duengnah loh a sawt.
Psalms85:12 BOEIPA loh hnothen a paek dongah mamih kah khohmuen loh cangpai a khueh bal ni.
Psalms85:13 Duengnah te a mikhmuh ah cet tih a khokan ham longpuei a khueh pah.
Psalms86:1 BOEIPA aw kai he ka mangdaeng tih ka khodaeng oeh dongah na hna kaeng lamtah kai n'doo dae.
Psalms86:2 Kai tah ka cim dongah ka hinglu he hang ngaithuen dae. Ka Pathen namah dongah ka pangtung vanbangla namah loh na sal he n'khang dae.
Psalms86:3 Ka Boeipa nang te hnin takuem kang khue coeng dongah kai he n'rhen lah.
Psalms86:4 Ka Boeipa nang taengah ka hinglu neh ka dangrhoek coeng dongah na sal kah hinglu he kohoe sak lah.
Psalms86:5 Ka Boeipa tah na then tih na kamyawm dongah ni
Psalms86:6 BOEIPA aw
Psalms86:7 Kai nan doo ham ni ka citcai hnin ah nang kang khue.
Psalms86:8 Pathen rhoek khuiah ka Boeipa namah bang he om pawt tih namah kah bibi bang khaw om pawh.
Psalms86:9 Na saii namtom boeih te halo uh vetih ka Boeipa namah mikhmuh ah bakop uh ni. Te vaengah na ming te a thangpom uh ni.
Psalms86:10 Namah te na tanglue coeng dongah khobaerhambae aka saii khaw Pathen namah bueng ni na om.
Psalms86:11 BOEIPA aw na longpuei te kai n'thuinuet lamtah na oltak dongah ka pongpa lah eh. Na ming rhih ham ka thinko saicin sak lah.
Psalms86:12 Ka Boeipa ka Pathen namah te ka thinko boeih neh kan uem vetih kumhal duela na ming ka thangpom ni.
Psalms86:13 Na sitlohnah loh kai ham len tih saelkhui hmui lamkah ka hinglu na huul.
Psalms86:14 Pathen aw thinlen rhoek loh kai n'thoh thil uh tih rhaengpuei hlanghaeng loh ka hinglu mae uh cakhaw amih hmai kah namah a hmaitang uh moenih.
Psalms86:15 Ka Boeipa nang tah thinphoei neh lungvatnah dongah thintoek aka ueh tih sitlohnah neh uepomnah aka baetawt Pathen la na om.
Psalms86:16 Kai taengla ha mael lamtah kai rhen lah. Na sarhi te na sal taengah pae lamtah na salnu kah a ca te khang lah.
Psalms86:17 Hnothen kah miknoek te kai taengah saii lamtah ka lunguet rhoek loh hmu uh saeh. BOEIPA namah loh kai nan bom tih ka hal coeng dongah amih te yak uh saeh.

Psalms87:3 Pathen khopuei namah te n'thangpom a ti pai. Selah

Psalms102:2 Kai kah puencak tue vaengah na maelhmai te kai taeng lamkah thuh boeh. Kang khue tue vaengah kai taengla na hna han kaeng lamtah kai he koe n'doo lah.
Psalms102:3 Ka khohnin he hmaikhu bangla hmata tih ka rhuhrhong khaw hmaingen bangla tlum.
Psalms102:4 Ka lungbuei he baelhing bangla a haih tih a rhae sut dongah ka buh caak pataeng ka hnilh coeng.
Psalms102:5 Ka hueinah ol dongah ka pumsa tah ka rhuh dongla kap coeng.
Psalms102:6 Khosoek kah khosoek saelbu bangla ka lutlat sut tih
Psalms102:7 Ka hak ah khaw imphu kah aka pangoe vaa bangla ka om.
Psalms102:8 Ka thunkha loh hnin takuem kai m'veet uh tih kai aka yan rhoek loh kai ming neh a toemngam uh.
Psalms102:9 Hmaiphu te buh la ka caak tih ka tuiok khaw rhahnah neh ka thoek.
Psalms102:10 Kai nan ludoeng tangtae khaw na kosi
Psalms102:11 Ka khohnin he mueihlip bangla puh tih baelhing bangla ka rhae sut.
Psalms102:12 Tedae BOEIPA namah tah kumhal ah na ngol coeng tih namah poekkoepnah tah cadilcahma phoeikah cadilcahma duela om.
Psalms102:13 Na thoo vetih a tue bangla Zion na haidam bitni. Anih rhen hamla khoning a pha coeng dongah.
Psalms102:14 Na sal rhoek loh Zion kah lungto te a ngaingaih uh tih a laipi te khaw a rhen uh.
Psalms102:15 Te dongah BOEIPA namah ming te namtom rhoek loh
Psalms102:16 Zion te BOEIPA loh a thoh vetih a thangpomnah neh phoe ni.
Psalms102:17 Dueidah thahnoeng thangthuinah taengla mael vetih amih kah thangthuinah te sit mahpawh.
Psalms102:18 Hmailong kah cadilcahma ham khaw hekah he daek saeh lamtah a suen pilnam loh BOEIPA thangthen saeh.
Psalms102:19 A sang hmuencim lamkah a dan tih diklai te BOEIPA loh vaan lamkah a paelki.
Psalms102:20 Thongtla kah a kiinah hnatun ham
Psalms102:21 BOEIPA ming te Zion ah
Psalms102:22 BOEIPA taengah thothueng ham pilnam rhoek neh ram rhoek tah tun tingtun uh ni.
Psalms102:23 Ka thadueng he longpuei ah a khah tih
Psalms102:24 Te dongah
Psalms102:25 A cuek vaengah diklai na suen tih vaan ke khaw namah kutngo ni.
Psalms102:26 Amih te milh uh cakhaw namah tah na nguel yoeyah. Te dongah amih te himbai bangla boeih hnawn uh vetih pueinak bangla na tho vaengah thovael uh van ni.
Psalms102:27 Tedae namah tah amah la na om tih na kum khaw bawt pawh.
Psalms102:28 Na sal rhoek kah a ca rhoek loh kho a sak uh vetih a tiingan loh namah mikhmuh ah pai ni
Psalms103:1 Aw ka hinglu
Psalms103:2 Aw ka hinglu
Psalms103:3 Nang kah thaesainah boeih te khodawk han ngai tih
Psalms103:4 Na hingnah vaam khui lamkah aka tlan tih sitlohnah neh haidamnah te nang aka khuem sak loh
Psalms103:5 Na kamrhui te hnothen neh a kum sak tih na camoe tue te atha bangla a thahuel sak.
Psalms103:6 Hlang kah hnaemtaek aka yok rhoek boeih ham BOEIPA loh duengnah neh tiktamnah a saii pah.
Psalms103:7 Moses taengah amah khosing
Psalms103:8 Thinphoei neh lungvatnah BOEIPA loh thintoek a ueh tih sitlohnah neh baetawt.
Psalms103:9 A yoeyah la ho pawt vetih
Psalms103:10 Mamih kah tholhnah bangla mamih taengah saii pawt tih mamih kah thaesainah bangla mamih taengah han suk moenih.
Psalms103:11 Diklai soah vaan a sang bangla amah aka rhih rhoek ham a sitlohnah khaw len.
Psalms103:12 Khocuk lamkah khotlak a lakhla bangla mamih kah boekoeknah te mamih taeng lamkah a lakhla sak coeng.
Psalms103:13 A napa loh camoe rhoek te a haidam bangla amah aka rhih rhoek te BOEIPA loh a haidam.
Psalms103:14 Amah loh mamih kah benbonah he a ming tih mamih he laipi ni tila a poek.
Psalms103:15 Hlanghing kah a tue sulrham bangla om tih khohmuen tamlaep bangla khooi van mai.
Psalms103:16 Khohli loh anih a pah tih a hmata atah amah hmuen hmat voel pawh.
Psalms103:17 Tedae BOEIPA kah sitlohnah tah amah aka rhih rhoek taengah khosuen lamkah kumhal duela om tih a duengnah a ca rhoek kah a ca rhoek patoeng taengah
Psalms103:18 a paipi aka tuem tih a olrhi vai ham aka thoelh rhoek taengah om.
Psalms103:19 BOEIPA loh vaan ah a ngolkhoel a hol tih a ram a cungkuem te a taemrhai.
Psalms103:20 A olthui ol ngai ham amah kah olka bangla aka saii
Psalms103:21 Amah kah caempuei boeih loh BOEIPA te uem uh lamtah amah kah bibi boeih loh a kolonah te saii uh lah.
Psalms103:22 A khohung hmuen boeih kah a kutngo boeih BOEIPA te uem uh lah. Aw ka hinglu
Psalms104:1 Aw ka hinglu
Psalms104:2 Khosae neh himbai bangla muelh aka thing uh himbaiyan bangla vaan ah dup aka phaih
Psalms104:3 A imhman te tui soah aka ci
Psalms104:4 khohli te a puencawn la aka saii tih hmai tak aka tueih loh
Psalms104:5 diklai khaw amah hmuen ah a suen tih kumhal ah tuen yoeyah pawh.
Psalms104:6 Anih te tuidung neh pueinak bangla na khuk tih tui rhoek loh tlang rhoek soah pai uh.
Psalms104:7 Namah kah tluungnah dongah rhaelrham uh tih na khohum ol dongah tamto uh.
Psalms104:8 Tlang tom a lan uh tih amih ham na suen kolbawn hmuen la suntla uh.
Psalms104:9 Khorhi na suem te a poe uh thai pawt dongah diklai khuk ham ha mael uh thai pawh.
Psalms104:10 Tuisih rhoek te soklong la a loei tlang rhoek laklo ah long uh.
Psalms104:11 Kohong kah mulhing boeih te tui a tul uh tih kohong marhang rhoek khaw a tuihalh dip uh.
Psalms104:12 A taengah vaan kah vaa loh kho a sak uh tih thingsam laklo ah a ol huphup loei.
Psalms104:13 Tlang boeih te a imhman lamkah aka suep
Psalms104:14 Rhamsa ham sulrham poe tih
Psalms104:15 Te dongah misurtui loh hlanghing thinko ko a hoe sak
Psalms104:16 BOEIPA loh a ling thingkung
Psalms104:17 Teah te vaa loh bu a tuk tih
Psalms104:18 Tlang sang boeih te sathai ham om tih
Psalms104:19 Khoning ham hla a saii tih khomik loh a khotlak khaw a ming.
Psalms104:20 Khohmuep na khueh tih khoyin ha pawk vaengah duup kah mulhing boeih loh a khuiah yuel uh.
Psalms104:21 Maeh te sathueng rhoek a kawk thil uh tih a caak te Pathen taengah a tlap uh.
Psalms104:22 Khomik a thoeng neh vawl khoem uh tih a khuisaek la kol uh.
Psalms104:23 Hlang he a bisai ham neh a thohtatnah la kholaeh hil cet.
Psalms104:24 BOEIPA nang kah kutngo he yet tangkik. Te rhoek boeih te cueihnah nen ni na saii. Na hnopai rhoemah diklai ah baetawt coeng.
Psalms104:25 Tuitunli aka len tih a dang
Psalms104:26 Teah te sangpho rhoek loh pongpa uh tih a khuiah aka luem ham Leviathan te na sai.
Psalms104:27 A tuetang vaengah amih caak paek ham khaw amih loh namah taengla boeih lamso uh.
Psalms104:28 Amih taengah na paek te a rhuh uh. Na kut na hlam tih hnothen kum uh.
Psalms104:29 Na maelhmai na thuh vaengah let uh. A hil na khoem pah vaengah pal uh tih laipi la bal uh.
Psalms104:30 Na mueihla na tueih daengah anmih te suen uh tih diklai maelhmai khaw na tlaih pueng.
Psalms104:31 BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah kumhal duela om tih
Psalms104:32 Diklai a paelki vaengah thuen tih
Psalms104:33 Ka hingnah neh BOEIPA te ka hlai vetih ka om rhuet vaengah ka Pathen te ka tingtoeng ni.
Psalms104:34 Ka olding he anih ham a lungtui saeh. Kai tah BOEIPA dongah ka kohoe coeng.
Psalms104:35 Hlangtholh rhoek te diklai lamloh mitmoeng uh saeh lamtah halang rhoek khaw koep om boel saeh. Aw ka hinglu
Psalms105:1 BOEIPA te uem uh lah. A ming te khue uh lah. A khoboe te pilnam rhoek taengah tukkil uh lah.
Psalms105:2 Amah te hlai uh lah. Amah te tingtoeng uh lamtah amah kah khobaerhambae boeih te lolmang taeng uh lah.
Psalms105:3 A ming cim neh thangthen uh lamtah
Psalms105:4 BOEIPA neh amah kah a sarhi te tlap lah. A maelhmai khaw tlap taitu lah.
Psalms105:5 A kopoekrhainah a saii neh a ka dongkah laitloeknah bangla anih khobaerhambae khaw
Psalms105:6 A sal Abraham tiingan neh a coelh Jakob koca rhoek loh thoelh uh lah.
Psalms105:7 BOEIPA amah ni mamih kah Pathen coeng. A laitloeknah khaw diklai pum ah om.
Psalms105:8 A paipi tekumhal duela a thoelh dongah cadilcahma thawngkhat ham olka a uen.
Psalms105:9 Abraham neh Isaak taengah a sai a olhlo te
Psalms105:10 Jakob taengah oltlueh la
Psalms105:11 Te dongah
Psalms105:12 A hlang kah hlangmi te a sii la om pueng tih
Psalms105:13 Te vaengah namtom taeng lamkah namtom taengla
Psalms105:14 Amih aka hnaemtaek ham hlang khueh pah pawt tih amih kongah manghai rhoek khaw a tluung pah.
Psalms105:15 Ka koelh soah ben boel lamtah ka tonghma rhoek te thaehuet thil boeh
Psalms105:16 Khokha a khue vaengah kho khuiah conghol neh caak boeih te a phae pah.
Psalms105:17 Amih hmai kah a tueih hlang
Psalms105:18 A kho te hlong neh a phaep pah uh a hinglu ah thicung loh a toeh.
Psalms105:19 A olthui a thoeng tue a pha due BOEIPA kah olthui loh ol loh anih te a cil a poe.
Psalms105:20 Manghai loh a tah dongah pilnam aka taem loh anih a doek tih a hlah.
Psalms105:21 Amah im kah boei neh a hnopai boeih aka taemrhai hamla
Psalms105:22 A hinglu bangla a mangpa rhoek te khoh tih a hamca rhoek te cueih sak ham te a khueh.
Psalms105:23 Te vaengah Israel loh Egypt la kun tih Jakob loh Ham kho ah bakuep.
Psalms105:24 Tedae a pilnam te muep a pungtai sak tih a rhal rhoek lakah a yet sak.
Psalms105:25 BOEIPA loh a sal rhoek te rhaithi sak tih
Psalms105:26 A sal Moses neh anih ham a coelh Aron te a tueih.
Psalms105:27 Amih rhoi loh Egypt rhoek taengah Boeipa kah miknoek olka a tueng sak rhoi tih
Psalms105:28 Khohmuep a tueih tih a hmuep sak dongah Boeipa kah olthui olka te koek uh thai pawh.
Psalms105:29 A tui te thii la a poeh sak tih a nga khaw a duek sak.
Psalms105:30 A kho kah bukak rhoek te a manghai rhoek kah imkhui la a khae sak.
Psalms105:31 Amah loh a uen tih a khorhi tom ah pil neh pilhlip uihli tlung.
Psalms105:32 Khonal te rhael la a poeh sak tih a kho ah hmaisai hmai la coeng.
Psalms105:33 A misur neh a thaibu te khaw a haih pah tih a khorhi kah thing te a khaem pah.
Psalms105:34 A uen bal tih kaisih neh lungang te tae na pawt la halo.
Psalms105:35 Te vaengah a kho kah baelhing boeih a caak tih a khohmuen kah a thaihtae khaw a caak pah.
Psalms105:36 A kho khuikah caming boeih neh a thahuem boeih khuikah a thaihcuek te a ngawn pah.
Psalms105:37 Te vaengah amih te cak neh
Psalms105:38 Amih Egypt rhoek te birhihnah loh a vuei tih amih rhoek a nong vaengah a kohoe uh.
Psalms105:39 Himbaiyan bangla cingmai a yaal pah tih khoyin ah hmai a vang pah.
Psalms105:40 A bih vaengah tanghuem a khuen pah tih vaan kah buh te amih a kum sak.
Psalms105:41 Lungpang a ong vaengah tui ha phuet tih rhamrhae ah tuiva la a long sak te
Psalms105:42 a sal Abraham taengkah a olkhueh cim te a poek dongah ni.
Psalms105:43 A pilnam khaw omngaihnah tamlung a coelh neh a khuen.
Psalms105:44 Te vaengah namtu rhoek kah a thakthaenah namtom khohmuen te a paek tih a pang uh te
Psalms105:45 a oltlueh ngaithuen sak ham neh a olkhueng te kueinah sak ham ni. BOEIPA te thangthen lah.
Psalms106:1 BOEIPA te thangthen uh. Amah kah sitlohnah tah kumhal hil ham a then dongah BOEIPA te uem uh lah.
Psalms106:2 BOEIPA kah thayung thamal te unim aka thui thai vetih amah koehnah te boeih aka yakming thai eh?
Psalms106:3 A tuetang boeih dongah tiktamnah aka ngaithuen tih duengnah aka saii tah a yoethen pai saeh.
Psalms106:4 Aw BOEIPA
Psalms106:5 Na coelh rhoek kah hnothen te hmuh sak ham
Psalms106:6 A pa rhoek neh ka tholh uh dongah
Psalms106:7 A pa rhoek loh Egypt ah nang kah khobaerhambae bangla cangbam uh pawt tih
Psalms106:8 Tedae a ming neh a thayung thamal te ming sak hamla amih te a khang.
Psalms106:9 Carhaek li te a ho tih a kak sak phoeiah tuidung longah khosoek bangla amih te a caeh puei.
Psalms106:10 Te vaengah amih te a lunguet kut lamloh a khang tih thunkha kut lamkah a tlan.
Psalms106:11 A rhal rhoek te tui loh a khuk uh tih pakhat kangna khaw sueng uh pawh.
Psalms106:12 A kah olkhueh te a tangnah uh tih amah koehnah te a hlai uh.
Psalms106:13 A kah bibi te koeloe a hnilh uh tih a oluen te rhing uh pawh.
Psalms106:14 Te dongah khosoek ah hoehhamnah a pael uh tih khopong ah Pathen a noemcai uh.
Psalms106:15 Amih kah huithuinah te a paek ngawn dae a hinglu dongah pimyet a tueih pah.
Psalms106:16 Rhaehhmuen ah Moses taeng neh BOEIPA kah hlang cim Aron taengah thatlai uh.
Psalms106:17 Diklai te ang tih Dathan te a dolh dongah Abiram hlangboel te khup a vuei.
Psalms106:18 A hlangboel lakliah hmai loh rhong tih halang rhoek te hmaisai loh a hlawp.
Psalms106:19 Horeb ah vaitoca mueihlawn a saii uh tih a bawk uh.
Psalms106:20 Amih kah thangpomnah te rham aka ca vaitotal muei la a hoi uh.
Psalms106:21 Egypt ah hno len a saii tih amih aka khang Pathen
Psalms106:22 Ham kho ah khobaerhambae aka sai
Psalms106:23 Amih te mitmoeng sak ham a ti vaengah a mikhmuh kah a puut ah a coelh Moses pai pawt koinih a kosi mael pawt vetih a phae pawn ni.
Psalms106:24 Sahnaih khohmuen te a hnawt uh dongah a olkhueh te tangnah uh pawh.
Psalms106:25 Amih kah dap khuiah cailak uh tih BOEIPA ol te hnatun uh pawh.
Psalms106:26 Te dongah amih te khosoek ah cungku sak ham
Psalms106:27 Namtom taengah a tiingan cungku sak ham neh diklai ah thaekyak ham kut a thueng thil.
Psalms106:28 Te dongah Baalpeor neh sun uh tih aka duek kah hmueih te a caak uh.
Psalms106:29 A khoboe neh BOEIPA a veet uh dongah
Psalms106:30 Tedae Phinekha te thoo tih a thangthui daengah lucik khaw a cing.
Psalms106:31 Te vaengah anih te cadilcahma phoeikah cadilcahma ham kumhal hil duengnah la a nawt.
Psalms106:32 Meribah tui taengah a thintoek uh bal tih amih kongah Moses te a talh.
Psalms106:33 A mueihla te a koek uh dongah a ka nen khaw cal buengrhuet.
Psalms106:34 Amih taengkah BOEIPA loh a uen bangla pilnam rhoek mitmoeng sak uh pawh.
Psalms106:35 Tedae namtom rhoek neh pitpom uh hmaih tih amih kah bibi te a awt uh.
Psalms106:36 Te dongah amamih ham hlaeh la aka poeh muei taengah tho a thueng uh.
Psalms106:37 Te vaengah a ca huta khaw
Psalms106:38 Kanaan muei taengah a nawn uh tih ommongsitoe thii
Psalms106:39 A bibi neh a poeih uh tih a khoboe neh cukhalh uh.
Psalms106:40 Te dongah a pilnam te BOEIPA kah thintoek loh sai coeng tih a rho te a tuei.
Psalms106:41 Te vaengah amih te namtom kut ah a paek tih a lunguet loh amih te rhep a buem.
Psalms106:42 A thunkha rhoek loh amih a nen uh tih a kut hmuiah a kunyun sak uh.
Psalms106:43 Amih te koep koep puet a huul coeng dae amamih kah kopoek neh a koek uh dongah amamih kah thaesainah neh tlumhmawn uh.
Psalms106:44 Tedae amih kah a tamlung te a yaak vaengah amih kah rhal te a hmuh pah.
Psalms106:45 Te vaengah a paipi te amih ham a poek pah tih a sitlohnah khuikah a sitlohnah cungkuem neh ko koep a hlawt.
Psalms106:46 Te dongah amih aka sol rhoek boeih loh amih taengah haidamnah ham a paek.
Psalms106:47 Kaimih kah Pathen BOEIPA kaimih he n'khang lamtah na ming cim uem ham neh nang koehnah dongah ka domyok ham khaw
Psalms106:48 Israel Pathen
Psalms107:1 A sitlohnah tah kumhal hil ham a then dongah BOEIPA te uem uh lah.
Psalms107:2 Rhal kut lamkah a tlan hlang loh BOEIPA kah a tlan te thui saeh.
Psalms107:3 Te vaengah amih te khocuk
Psalms107:4 Khosoek khopong ah khopuei tolrhum longpuei a hmuh uh mueh la kho a hmang uh.
Psalms107:5 Bungpong neh tuihalh la a khuiah a hinglu te rhae.
Psalms107:6 Kho a bing vaengah BOEIPA te a khue uh tih khobing khui lamkah amih te a huul.
Psalms107:7 Te dongah amih te tolrhum khopuei la caeh ham a thuem longpuei neh a hoihaeng.
Psalms107:8 Hlang koca rhoek ham a sitlohnah neh khobaerhambae aka sai BOEIPA te uem uh pai saeh.
Psalms107:9 A hinglu aka halthi te tuihalh a dip pah sak tih a hinglu aka pongnaeng te khaw hnothen a cung sak.
Psalms107:10 Hlangvang tah khohmuep neh dueknah hlipkhup kah thirhui neh phacipphabaem la aka ngol thongtla la coeng uh.
Psalms107:11 Pathen kah olka te a koek uh tih Khohnikah oluen khaw a tlaitlaek uh.
Psalms107:12 Te dongah thakthaenah dongla a kunyun sak tih a lungbuei a toh uh vaengah bom pawh.
Psalms107:13 Tedae kho a bing uh vaengah BOEIPA taengla pang uh tih amih te khobing khui lamkah koep a khang.
Psalms107:14 Amih te khohmuep neh dueknah hlipkhup lamkah a poh tih a kuelrhui khaw a bawt pah.
Psalms107:15 Hlang koca rhoek ham a sitlohnah neh khobaerhambae aka sai BOEIPA te uem uh pai saeh.
Psalms107:16 Rhohum thohkhaih te a phil tih thicung thohkalh khaw a tloek.
Psalms107:17 Amih tah boekoek longpuei kah hlang ang neh amamih kah thaesainah dongah phaep uh.
Psalms107:18 A hinglu loh caak boeih a tuei pah uh tih dueknah vongka te a paan uh.
Psalms107:19 Kho a bing vaengah BOEIPA taengah pang uh tih amih te khobing khui lamkah a khang.
Psalms107:20 A ol a hlah phoeiah amih a hoeih sak tih amih rhomhmop te a poeng a hal sak.
Psalms107:21 Hlang koca rhoek ham a sitlohnah neh khobaerhambae aka saii BOEIPA te uem uh pai saeh.
Psalms107:22 Te dongah uemonah hmueih te nawn uh saeh lamtah tamlung neh a bibi te doek uh saeh.
Psalms107:23 Sangpho neh tuitunli ah suntla uh tih tui puei ah bitat aka saii rhoek loh
Psalms107:24 BOEIPA kah bibi neh a laedil kah khobaerhambae te a hmuh uh.
Psalms107:25 A voek vaengah hlipuei khohli thoo tih tuilae khaw samboek.
Psalms107:26 Vaan la luei uh tih tuidung la a suntlak uh vaengah a hinglu tah yoethaenah neh paci uh.
Psalms107:27 Yurhui bangla lam uh tih a yuka dongah a cueihnah boeih hma uh.
Psalms107:28 Kho a bing vaengah BOEIPA taengla pang uh tih amih te khobing khui lamkah a poh.
Psalms107:29 Hlipuei te bidip la a duem sak tih tuiphu rhoek khaw ngam uh.
Psalms107:30 Tuiphu a sap vaengah a kohoe uh tih amamih kah a naepnah langdai la a mawt.
Psalms107:31 Hlang koca rhoek ham a sitlohnah neh khobaerhambae aka saii BOEIPA te uem uh pai saeh.
Psalms107:32 Te dongah pilnam hlangping lakliah amah te pomsang uh saeh lamtah patong rhoek kah tolrhum ah thangthen uh saeh.
Psalms107:33 Tuiva te khosoek la
Psalms107:34 Cangthen kho khaw boethae loh kho a sak thil dongah lungkaehlai la
Psalms107:35 khosoek te tuibap tui la
Psalms107:36 Teah te bungpong rhoek kho a sak sak tih tolrhum khopuei a thong uh.
Psalms107:37 Te vaengah khohmuen a tawn uh tih misur a tue dongah a vuei a thaih cuen.
Psalms107:38 Amih te yoethen a paek tih muep a ping uh vaengah a rhamsa khaw polpai sak pawh.
Psalms107:39 Tedae a polpai uh vaengah caya yoethae neh kothae dongah ngam uh sut.
Psalms107:40 Hlangcong rhoek te nueihbu a hawk thil tih long mueng laipuem ah kho a hmang sak.
Psalms107:41 Tedae khodaeng te phacipphabaem lamkah a hoeptlang tih a hui a ko te boiva bangla a khueh.
Psalms107:42 Aka thuem rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah a kohoe uh dae dumlai boeih long tah a ka khoep a buem.
Psalms107:43 U khaw aka cueih long tah hekah he kuem saeh lamtah BOEIPA kah sitlohnah te yakming uh saeh.
Psalms108:1 Pathen aw ka lungbuei cikngae la ka hlai vetih ka thangpomnah nen khaw ka tingtoeng ni.
Psalms108:2 Thangpa neh rhotoeng haenghang lamtah khopo ah kai ka haeng lah eh.

Psalms108:4 Na sitlohnah tah vaan lakah sang tih
Psalms108:5 Pathen tah vaan ah

Psalms108:8 Gilead he kai kah tih

Psalms109:1 Kai kah koehnah Pathen aw hilphah boeh.
Psalms109:2 Halang kah a ka neh hlangthai palat kah a ka te kai taengah ong uh tih a lai loh a honghi a thui uh.
Psalms109:3 Hmuhuetnah olka neh kai m'vael uh tih a honghi nen khaw kai n'nen uh.
Psalms109:4 Kai kah lungnah dongah kai n'khingkhoek uh cakhaw kai loh thangthuinah ka khueh pah.
Psalms109:5 Hnothen te kai taengah boethae neh
Psalms109:6 Anih te halang loh cawh saeh lamtah a bantang kut ah Satan pai pah saeh.
Psalms109:7 Anih te laitloek vaengah a halang phoe pah saeh lamtah a thangthuinah te tholh la poeh saeh.
Psalms109:8 A hing tue khaw a bawn la om saeh lamtah
Psalms109:9 A ca rhoek te cadah la
Psalms109:10 A ca rhoek khaw poeng poeng uh saeh lamtah buh bih uh saeh. A imrhong khui lamkah vawtthaih uh saeh.
Psalms109:11 A khueh boeih te puhlah loh n'hlaeh saeh lamtah a thaphu te kholong loh poelyoe pah saeh.
Psalms109:12 Anih taengah sitlohnah aka khueh om boel saeh lamtah a ca cadah rhoek te aka rhen om boel saeh.
Psalms109:13 A hmailong kah cadilcahma te phae la om saeh lamtah a ming khaw a tloe la hmata bal saeh.
Psalms109:14 A napa rhoek kah thaesainah te BOEIPA hmaiah poek saeh lamtah a manu kah tholhnah te hmata boel.
Psalms109:15 A tholhnah te BOEIPA hmaiah om taitu saeh lamtah amih poekkoepnah te diklai lamkah phae la om saeh.
Psalms109:16 Sitlohnah khueh ham poek pawt tih khodaeng lungma neh thinko aka paeng hlang te duek sak ham a hloem.
Psalms109:17 Rhunkhuennah te a lungnah dongah amah tlak thil saeh. Yoethennah khuiah a naem pawt dongah a taeng lamkah vikvik lakhla saeh.
Psalms109:18 Rhunkhuennah te khaw a himbai la bai saeh lamtah a kotak khuiah tui bangla
Psalms109:19 Amah te himbai cun bangla om pah saeh lamtah cihin bangla yen taitu saeh.
Psalms109:20 Hekah he BOEIPA taeng lamkah kai aka khingkhoek rhoek neh ka hinglu he a thae la aka thui rhoek kah thaphu la om saeh.
Psalms109:21 Tedae namah tah ka Boeipa Yahovah coeng ni. Na sitlohnah then te na ming ham
Psalms109:22 Kai tah mangdaeng neh khodaeng la ka om tih ka lungbuei khaw ka kotak ah thiip coeng.
Psalms109:23 Khokhawn a khuup vaengkah bangla ka khum tih kaisih bangla ka congpet.
Psalms109:24 Yaehnah dongah ka khuklu hlinghlawk tih ka pum dongkah ka tha khaw pim coeng.
Psalms109:25 Te vaengah kai he amih kah kokhahnah la ka om tih kai m'hmuh uh vaengah a lu a hinghuen uh.
Psalms109:26 BOEIPA ka Pathen aw kai n'bom lah. Namah kah sitlohnah vanbangla kai n'khang lah.
Psalms109:27 Te vaengah BOEIPA namah loh na kut neh na saii te ming uh saeh.
Psalms109:28 Amih te thaephoei thil uh cakhaw namah loh yoethen na paek bitni. Tlai thil uh cakhaw yahpok uh saeh lamtah na sal loh a kohoe saeh.
Psalms109:29 Kai aka khingkhoek rhoek te mingthae loh a vuei uh vetih amamih kah yahopohnah loh hnikul bangla cun uh ni.
Psalms109:30 Ka ka neh a nah la BOEIPA ka uem vetih hlangping lakli ah amah te ka thangthen ni.

Psalms110:4 “Melkhizedek banghui la kumhal duela na khosoih coeng

Psalms111:1 BOEIPA te thangthen lah. Aka thuem rhoek kah tingtunnah neh rhaengpuei lakliah thinko boeih neh BOEIPA ka uem ni.

Psalms111:5 Amah aka rhih rhoek te maeh a paek tih a paipi te a kumhal duela a thoelh.

Psalms112:3 A im ah boeinah neh khuehtawn soep tih a duengnah a yoeyah la cak.

Psalms119:1 BOEIPA kah olkhueng bangla cuemthuek longpuei ah
Psalms119:2 A olphong aka kueinah tih lungbuei boeih neh Amah aka tlap rhoek tah a yoethen pai.
Psalms119:3 A thae a hu khaw saii uh pawt tih BOEIPA kah longpuei ah pongpa uh.
Psalms119:4 Na olrhi te rhep ngaithuen sak ham namah loh na uen coeng.
Psalms119:5 Na oltlueh ngaithuen ham ka longpuei mah cikngae uh koinih.
Psalms119:6 Na olpaek boeih te ka paelki vaengah ka yak mahpawh.
Psalms119:7 Na duengnah dongkah tiktamnah te ka awt vanbangla thinko dueng neh nang kan uem eh.
Psalms119:8 Na oltlueh te ka ngaithuen bitni vetih kai he nan hnoo tlaih mahpawh.
Psalms119:9 Na olka bangla khosak ham khaw cadong loh a caehlong te ba nen lae a saelh?
Psalms119:10 Ka lungbuei boeih neh nang kan tlap dongah na olpaek lamloh kai nan palang sak moenih.
Psalms119:11 Nang taengah laihmuh pawt ham na olthui khaw ka lungbuei ah ka khoem coeng.
Psalms119:12 BOEIPA nang tah na yoethen pai. Na oltlueh te kai n'cang puei lah.
Psalms119:13 Na ka lamkah laitloeknah boeih te ka hmui ka lai neh ka tae eh.
Psalms119:14 Boeirhaeng cungkuem dongkah vanbangla na olphong longpuei dongah ka ngaingaih.
Psalms119:15 Na olrhi dongah ka lolmang tih na caehlong te ka paelki.
Psalms119:16 Na khosing dongah ka naepnoi tih
Psalms119:17 Na sal ham he ham phai lah
Psalms119:18 Na olkhueng dongah khobaerhambae te ka paelki van ham khaw ka mik ham phen lah.
Psalms119:19 Kai he diklai hmanah yinlai la ka om cakhaw na olpaek te kai taeng lamloh na thuh moenih.
Psalms119:20 Na laitloeknah dongah hnin takuem ah mueihuenah neh ka hinglu khaw mawth.
Psalms119:21 Na olpaek lamkah aka palang neh thaephoei thinlen rhoek khaw na tluung.
Psalms119:22 Na olphong te ka kueinah dongah kai sokah kokhahnah neh nueihbu he hang khoe lah.
Psalms119:23 Kai taengah mangpa rhoek loh ngolhlung uh tih ca uh cakhaw na sal tah na oltlueh dongah ni a lolmang eh.
Psalms119:24 Na olphong tah ka hlahmaenah neh ka cilsuep hlang rhoek la om.
Psalms119:25 Ka hinglu he laipi khuiah kol cakhaw na ol bangla kai n'hing sak.
Psalms119:26 Ka longpuei he ka tae vaengah kai nan doo tih na oltlueh neh kai n'tukkil lah.
Psalms119:27 Na olrhi kah a longpuei te kai n'yakming lamtah namah kah khobaerhambae dongah ni ka lolmang eh.
Psalms119:28 Ka hinglu he pha-ueknah neh yut cakhaw na ol bangla kai n'thoh lah.
Psalms119:29 A honghi kah longpuei te kai lamloh hoep lamtah na olkhueng neh kai n'rhen lah.
Psalms119:30 Uepomnah longpuei te ka coelh tih na laitloeknah te ka mop.
Psalms119:31 BOEIPA nang kah olphong dongah ka balak tih kai nan yah sak pawh.
Psalms119:32 Ka lungbuei na dangka sak tih na olpaek longpuei ah ka yong.
Psalms119:33 BOEIPA aw na oltlueh longpuei te kai n'thuinuet lamtah a bawt due ka kueinah lah eh.
Psalms119:34 Kai n'yakming sak lamtah na olkhueng te ka kueinah eh. Te vaengah ka lungbuei boeih neh ka ngaithuen bitni.
Psalms119:35 Na olpaek a hawn dongah ka hmae vanbangla te nen te kai n'hoihaeng lah.
Psalms119:36 Mueluemnah ham pawt tih na olphong ham ka lungbuei ham maelh lah.
Psalms119:37 A poeyoek la aka hmu lamloh ka mik hang hoi lamtah na longpuei ah kai hing sak.
Psalms119:38 Nang hinyahnah ham te na sal taengah na olthui cak sak.
Psalms119:39 Namah kah laitloeknah he then tih kai loh ka rhih kokhahnah te m'poeng sak lah.
Psalms119:40 Na olrhi te hue coeng he
Psalms119:41 BOEIPA aw na olthui vanbangla na sitlohnah neh namah lamkah loeihnah he kai taengla pawk saeh.
Psalms119:42 Na ol dongah ka pangtung coeng dongah kai aka veet kah olka te ka doo van eh.
Psalms119:43 Na laitloeknah dongah ka ngaiuep vanbangla oltak ol he ka ka lamloh rhap huul boel mai.
Psalms119:44 Te dongah na olkhueng ni kumhal duela ka ngaithuen taitu yoeyah eh.
Psalms119:45 Na olrhi te ka toem dongah a mungkung la ka pongpa van bitni.
Psalms119:46 Na olphong te manghai rhoek taengah ka thui bal vetih ka yak mahpawh.
Psalms119:47 Na olpaek dongah ka naepnoi tih ka lungnah.
Psalms119:48 Na olpaek rhoek te ka kut ka phuel. Te te ka lungnah dongah na oltlueh dongah ni ka lolmang eh.
Psalms119:49 Kai nan ngaiuep sak ham khaw na sal taengkah ol he thoelh lah.
Psalms119:50 Te tah kai kah phacipphabaem vaengah ka hloephloeinah la om tih na olthui long ni kai n'hing sak.
Psalms119:51 Thinlen rhoek loh kai n'hnael uh cakhaw na olkhueng lamkah a voel la ka phael moenih.
Psalms119:52 BOEIPA aw khosuen lamkah na laitloeknah te ka poek tih ko ka hlawt.
Psalms119:53 Na olkhueng aka hnoo halang rhoek kongah a ling a lai loh kai n'do coeng.
Psalms119:54 Na oltlueh te kai ham tah ka lampahnah im ah laa la om.
Psalms119:55 BOEIPA aw
Psalms119:56 Te te kai taengah om coeng tih na olrhi te ka kueinah.
Psalms119:57 BOEIPA ka hamsum la na ol ngaithuen ham ni ka thui.
Psalms119:58 Lungbuei boeih neh na mikhmuh ah ka nue coeng tih na olthui bangla kai n'rhen lah.
Psalms119:59 Ka longpuei ka moeh tih na olphong taengla ka kho ka hoi.
Psalms119:60 Ka tawn uh vetih na olpaek ngaithuen ham ka uelh mahpawh.
Psalms119:61 Halang kah rhuihet loh kai n'hih cakhaw na olkhueng te ka hnilh mahpawh.
Psalms119:62 Na duengnah neh tiktamnah dongah nang uem ham khoyin pathung ah ka thoo.
Psalms119:63 Kai tah nang aka rhih tih na olrhi aka ngaithuen rhoek boeih kah a hui la ka om.
Psalms119:64 BOEIPA nang kah sitlohnah neh diklai khaw hah coeng tih na oltlueh neh kai n'tukkil lah.
Psalms119:65 Na ol bangla BOEIPA na sal taengah a then na saii coeng.
Psalms119:66 Na olpaek te ka tangnah dongah
Psalms119:67 Ka poeih uh hlanah ka taengphael cakhaw na olthui ni ka ngaithuen coeng.
Psalms119:68 Na then tih na voelphoeng dongah na oltlueh te kai n'tukkil lah.
Psalms119:69 A honghi kah thinlen loh kai n'coe thil cakhaw ka lungbuei boeih neh na olrhi ka kueinah coeng.
Psalms119:70 Amih lungbuei te maehtha bangla moelh cakhaw kai tah na olkhueng nen ni ka naepnoi.
Psalms119:71 Kai ham tah m'phaep te khaw hoeikhang mai. Te nen ni na oltlueh te n'tukkil eh.
Psalms119:72 Na ka dongkah olkhueng te kai ham tah sui neh ngun thawngkhat lakah then.
Psalms119:73 Na olpaek ka awt ham ni na kut loh kai n'saii tih
Psalms119:74 Na ol te ka ngaiuep dongah nang aka rhih rhoek loh kai m'hmuh uh vaengah a kohoe uh.
Psalms119:75 BOEIPA nang kah laitloeknah tah duengnah la om tih uepomnah neh kai nan phaep te ka ming.
Psalms119:76 Na sal taengkah na olthui bangla na sitlohnah tah kai aka hloep la om laeh saeh.
Psalms119:77 Na haidamnah te kai taengla ha pawk saeh lamtah na olkhueng te ka hlahmaenah la ka hing puei eh.
Psalms119:78 Thinlen rhoek loh a honghi neh kai n'khun sak uh te yak uh saeh. Kai tah na olrhi dongah ni ka lolmang eh.
Psalms119:79 Nang aka rhih tih na olphong aka ming la aka ming rhoek tah kai taengla ha mael uh saeh.
Psalms119:80 Kai lungbuei he na oltlueh dongah cuemthuek la a om daengah ni ka yah pawt eh.
Psalms119:81 Namah kah loeihnah dongah ka hinglu a khum vaengah na ol dongah ka ngaiuep.
Psalms119:82 Na olthui te ka mik la kha coeng tih
Psalms119:83 Hmaikhu dongkah tuitang bangla ka om dae na oltlueh te ka hnilh moenih.
Psalms119:84 Na sal kah khohnin tah mebang nim? Kai aka hloem rhoek soah me vaengah nim laitloeknah na saii ve?
Psalms119:85 Thinlen rhoek loh kai hamla rhom a vueh uh te na olkhueng moenih.
Psalms119:86 Na olpaek boeih he uepomnah ni
Psalms119:87 Pacilpahnai la diklai lamloh kai n'khah uh. Tedae na olrhi te ka hnoo moenih.
Psalms119:88 Na sitlohnah dongah kai hing lamtah na ka dongkah olphong te ka ngaithuen bitni.
Psalms119:89 BOEIPA namah kah ol tah vaan ah kumhal duela pai.
Psalms119:90 Na uepomnah tah diklai a soepboe lamloh thawnpuei neh cadilcahma duela cak.
Psalms119:91 Na laitloeknah bangla na sal boeih ham khaw tahae khohnin due cak.
Psalms119:92 Na olkhueng te ka hlahmaenah pawt koinih kamah kah phacipphabaem dongah ni ka paltham eh.
Psalms119:93 Te rhoek rhangneh kai nan hing sak dongah na olrhi te kumhal duela ka hnilh mahpawh.
Psalms119:94 Kai he namah ham ni. Na olrhi te ka toem dongah kai he n'khang lah.
Psalms119:95 Kai phae ham halang rhoek loh kai n'lamtawn uh cakhaw na olphong ni ka yakming eh.
Psalms119:96 Boeih a soepnah he a bawtnah om dae na olpaek tah dangka tangkik tila ka hmuh.
Psalms119:97 Na olkhueng te hnin takuem ka thuepnah ham bahoeng ka lungnah.
Psalms119:98 Na olpaek te kai taengah kumhal duela om tih ka thunkha rhoek lakah kai n'cueih sak.
Psalms119:99 Na laipainah te ka thuepnah coeng dongah kai aka tukkil boeih lakah n'cangbam.
Psalms119:100 Na olrhi te ka kueinah dongah patong rhoek lakah khaw ka yakming.
Psalms119:101 Boethae caehlong boeih lamloh ka kho ka tuem daengah ni na ol te ka ngaithuen thai eh.
Psalms119:102 Namah loh kai nan thuinuet coeng dongah na laitloeknah lamloh ka phaelh moenih.
Psalms119:103 Na olthui he ka dang dong neh ka ka dongah khoitui lakah khaw bahoeng didip.
Psalms119:104 Na olrhi lamloh ka yakming tangloeng dongah laithae kah caehlong tah boeih ka thiinah.
Psalms119:105 Na ol tah ka kho ham hmaithoi neh ka hawn ham vangnah la om.
Psalms119:106 Na duengnah dongkah laitloeknah te ngaithuen hamla ka toemngam tih ka cak sak coeng.
Psalms119:107 Mat ka phaep uh vaengah he BOEIPA aw na ol bangla kai n'hing sak.
Psalms119:108 BOEIPA aw ka ka dongkah kothoh he doe mai lamtah na laitloeknah te kai n'tukkil lah.
Psalms119:109 Ka hinglu he ka kut khuiah om taitu dae na olkhueng te ka hnilh mahpawh.
Psalms119:110 Halang rhoek loh kai hamla pael phoh cakhaw na olrhi lamloh kho ka hmang moenih.
Psalms119:111 Kumhal due ka lungbuei omngaihnah ham na olphong te ka pang coeng.
Psalms119:112 Na oltloek te kumhal a bawt bawt duela vai ham ni ka lungbuei ka maelh.
Psalms119:113 Cikcoknah te ka hmuhuet tih
Psalms119:114 Ka hlipyingnah neh ka photling tah namah tih
Psalms119:115 Thaehuet rhoek te kai lamloh nong lamtah ka Pathen kah olpaek te ka kueinah eh.
Psalms119:116 Na olthui bangla kai nan talong daengah ni ka hing vetih ka ngaiuepnah lamloh kai nan yah sak pawt eh.
Psalms119:117 Kai nan duel daengah ni ka daem vetih na oltloeh te ka mang thil taitu eh.
Psalms119:118 Amih kah a huep he a honghi la a om dongah na oltlueh lamloh aka palang rhoek boeih te suntlae.
Psalms119:119 Diklai halang boeih te aek la na kangkuen sak tangloeng dongah ni na olphong te ka lungnah.
Psalms119:120 Na taengah birhihnah neh ka saa khaw poeng hu tih na laitloeknah te ka rhih.
Psalms119:121 Tiktamnah neh duengnah ka saii dongah kai aka hnaemtaek rhoek taengla kai nan voei pawh.
Psalms119:122 Na sal kah a then te rhikhang lamtah thinlen loh kai hnaemtaek boel saeh.
Psalms119:123 Namah kah khangnah dong neh na duengnah olthui dongah ka mik kha coeng.
Psalms119:124 Na sitlohnah bangla na sal taengah saii lamtah na oltlueh te kai n'tukkil lah.
Psalms119:125 Na sal kai he kamah nan yakming sak daengah ni na olphong te ka ming eh.
Psalms119:126 BOEIPA aw
Psalms119:127 Te dongah na olpaek tah sui lakah khaw suicilh lakah khaw ka lungnah.
Psalms119:128 Olrhi boeih he boeih ka dueng sak tangloeng dongah laithae caehlong tah boeih ka thiinah.
Psalms119:129 Na olphong rhoek he khobaerhambae tangloeng dongah ni ka hinglu khaw a kueinah.
Psalms119:130 Na ol kah khohue loh a sae vaengah hlangyoe rhoek pataeng a yakming sak.
Psalms119:131 Ka ka te ka ang tih na olpaek te mam ham ka rhingda.
Psalms119:132 Na ming aka lungnah rhoek taengkah laitloeknah vanbangla kai taengla ha hooi lamtah kai n'rhen lah.
Psalms119:133 Na olthui bangla ka khokan he cikngae sak lamtah boethae boeih loh kai soah taemrhai boel saeh.
Psalms119:134 Hlang kah hnaemtaeknah lamloh kai n'lat lamtah na olrhi te ka ngaithuen eh.
Psalms119:135 Na maelhmai te na sal taengah sae sak lamtah na oltlueh te kai n'cang puei lah.
Psalms119:136 Na olkhueng te a ngaithuen uh pawt dongah ka mik dongkah sokca tui loh long.
Psalms119:137 BOEIPA nang na dueng dongah na laitloeknah khaw thuem.
Psalms119:138 Na olphong kah duengnah neh uepomnah tangkik te khaw na uen.
Psalms119:139 Ka rhal rhoek loh na ol a hnilh uh dongah ka thatlainah loh kamah n'thah.
Psalms119:140 Na olthui he a cae payik coeng dongah na sal long khaw a lungnah.
Psalms119:141 Kai canoi dongah n'hnaep cakhaw na olrhi te ka hnilh moenih.
Psalms119:142 Na duengnah tah kumhal ham duengnah la om tih na olkhueng khaw oltak la om.
Psalms119:143 Rhal neh a caeknah loh kai soah ha thoeng dae na olpaek tah kai kah hlahmaenah la om.
Psalms119:144 Na olphong kah duengnah te kumhal duela kai m'ming sak lamtah ka hing puei eh.
Psalms119:145 Lungbuei boeih neh kang khue vaengah kai n'doo lamtah BOEIPA nang kah oltlueh te ka kueinah eh.
Psalms119:146 Nang kang khue vaengah kai n'khang lamtah na olphong te ka ngaithuen eh.
Psalms119:147 Hlaemhmah hlanah ka kun tih ka pang he na ol dongkah na ol te ni ka ngaiuep.
Psalms119:148 Na olthui dongah lolmang hamla hlaemhmah ah ka mik ca.
Psalms119:149 Na sitlohnah bangla ka ol hnatun lamtah BOEIPA aw na laitloeknah bangla kai n'hing sak.
Psalms119:150 Khonuen rhamtat aka hloem rhoek te capit uh cakhaw na olkhueng lamloh lakhla uh.
Psalms119:151 BOEIPA namah na yoei dongah na olpaek boeih khaw oltak la om.
Psalms119:152 Na olphong lamloh kumhal duela na suen te hlamat ah ni ka ming coeng.
Psalms119:153 Na olkhueng te ka hnilh pawt dongah kai kah phacipphabaem he hmu lamtah kai n'pumcum sak lah.
Psalms119:154 Kai kah tuituknah te rhoe laeh
Psalms119:155 Halang taeng lamloh khangnah a hla te khaw na oltlueh a toem uh pawt dongah ni.
Psalms119:156 Na haidamnah he a len dongah BOEIPA aw na laitloeknah bangla kai n'hing sak.
Psalms119:157 Kai aka hloem rhoek neh ka rhal khaw yet dae na olphong lamloh ka phaelh moenih.
Psalms119:158 Na olthui a ngaithuen uh pawt dongah hnukpoh te ka hmuh vaengah ka ko-oek.
Psalms119:159 Na olrhi ka lungnah te hmu lamtah BOEIPA aw na sitlohnah bangla kai n'hing sak.
Psalms119:160 Na ol tah oltak boeilu la om tih pai tih na duengnah dongkah laitloeknah boeih kumhal duela cak.
Psalms119:161 Mangpa rhoek loh lunglilungla la kai n'hloem uh cakhaw na ol phoeikah na ol dongkah ni ka lungbuei loh a rhih.
Psalms119:162 Na olthui dongah tah kutbuem muep aka dang bangla ka ngaingaih.
Psalms119:163 Na olkhueng ka lungnah dongah laithae he ka thiinah tih ka tuei.
Psalms119:164 Na duengnah dongkah laitloeknah dongah namah te hnin at ah voeirhih kan thangthen.
Psalms119:165 Na olkhueng aka lungnah rhoek ham ngaimongnah yet tih amih taengah hmuitoel khaw om pawh.
Psalms119:166 Namah kah khangnah te ka lamso dongah BOEIPA aw na olpaek te ka vai.
Psalms119:167 Na olphong te muep ka lungnah dongah ka hinglu te a ngaithuen.
Psalms119:168 Namah hmaikah ka longpuei boeih ham na olrhi neh na olphong ni ka ngaithuen.
Psalms119:169 Ka tamlung loh BOEIPA namah mikhmuh la ha pawk saeh lamtah na ol bangla kai n'yakming sak.
Psalms119:170 Kai kah lungmacil loh na mikhmuh la ha pawk saeh lamtah na olthui bangla kai n'huul lah.
Psalms119:171 Na oltlueh te kai nan cang puei dongah ka hmuilai kah koehnah he phuet saeh.
Psalms119:172 Namah kah duengnah olpaek boeih dongah na olthui te ka hmuilai loh doo saeh.
Psalms119:173 Na olrhi te ka coelh coeng dongah kai na kut te aka bom la om saeh.
Psalms119:174 BOEIPA nang kah khangnah te ka hue dongah na olkhueng ni ka hlahmaenah coeng.
Psalms119:175 Ka hinglu he a hing daengah ni nang n'thangthen vetih na laitloeknah loh kai n'bom eh.
Psalms119:176 Tu bangla kho ka hmang tih aka milh dae
Psalms120:1 Kamah kah citcai khuiah BOEIPA te ka khue tih kai n'doo.
Psalms120:2 BOEIPA aw ka hinglu he laithae hmuilai lamkah neh palyal ol lamloh huul lah.
Psalms120:3 Palyal ol te nang taengah bahamnim m'paek vetih bahamnim nang taengah hang koei eh?
Psalms120:4 Hlangrhalh kah thaltang khaw hlingcet alh bangla sum yipkip.
Psalms120:5 Meshek ah ka bakuep tih Kedar dap ah kho ka sak dongah kai ngawn tah ka tuisawih coeng!
Psalms120:6 Rhoepnah aka hmuhuet taengah ka hinglu loh kho puet a sak coeng.
Psalms120:7 Kai loh rhoepnah ka thui vaengah amih te caemtloek la thoo uh.
Psalms121:1 Kai bomkung me lamkah nim ha pawk ve? tila tlang taengah ka mik ka huel.
Psalms121:2 Kai aka bomkung tah vaan neh diklai aka saii BOEIPA taeng lamkah ni.
Psalms121:3 Na kho te paloe ham khueh pawt vetih nang aka dawn te a mikku mahpawh.
Psalms121:4 Israel aka dawn loh tarha a mikku pawt vetih ip mahpawh.
Psalms121:5 BOEIPA loh nang n'ngaithuen tih BOEIPA tah na bantang kut ah na hlipkhup la om.
Psalms121:6 Khothaih ah khomik loh
Psalms121:7 BOEIPA loh nang te yoethae cungkuem lamloh n'khoembael vetih na hinglu te a ngaithuen ni.
Psalms121:8 Na cet tih na pawk due
Psalms122:1 Kai taengah
Psalms122:2 Jerusalem nang kah vongka ah kaimih kho loh pai uh tih om uh.
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem te khopuei la tun cingcui sak ham ni a thoong.
Psalms122:4 BOEIPA kah koca koca tah olphong bangla BOEIPA ming te uem ham Israel taengla pahoi cet uh.
Psalms122:5 David im kah laitloeknah ngolkhoel ham ngolkhoel te pahoi a hol uh.
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem kah sadingnah hamla bih uh. Nang aka lungnah rhoek tah dingsuek saeh.
Psalms122:7 Na rhalmahvong khuiah rhoepnah
Psalms122:8 Ka manuca neh ka hui rhoek ham khaw
Psalms122:9 Mamih Pathen BOEIPA im ham ni nang kah hnothen khaw ka toem eh.
Psalms123:1 Vaan ah aka ngol nang taengla ka mik te ka huel.
Psalms123:2 A boei rhoek kut taengkah salpa rhoek kah mik bangla
Psalms123:3 Nueihbu he ka muep cung coeng dongah rhen kaimih he n'rhen lah. BOEIPA aw kaimih he n'rhen lah.
Psalms123:4 Mongkawt kah tamdaengnah
Psalms124:1 Israel loh
Psalms124:2 Hlang loh mamih taengah a tlai vaengah mamih ham BOEIPA om pawt koinih;
Psalms124:3 Mamih taengah a thintoek neh a sai vaengah mamih he a hingsai n'dolh uh ni.
Psalms124:4 Tui loh mamih n'yo vetih soklong loh mamih hinglu he a kawt pawn ni.
Psalms124:5 Lungpok tui loh mamih kah hinglu a et ni.
Psalms124:6 Amih no dongah maeh la mamih aka tloeng pawh BOEIPA te a yoethen pai saeh.
Psalms124:7 Mamih kah hinglu tah vaa bangla pael neh a hlaeh khui lamloh loeih. Pael te rhek tih mamih n'loeih uh.
Psalms124:8 Vaan neh diklai aka saii BOEIPA ming dongah mamih bomkung om.
Psalms125:1 BOEIPA dongah aka pangtung rhoek tah Zion tlang bangla
Psalms125:2 Jerusalem kaepvai kah tlang rhoek tah amah ham coeng ni. Te dongah BOEIPA tah a pilnam a kaepvai ah
Psalms125:3 Halangnah mancai loh aka dueng rhoek kah hmulung te naan boel saeh. Te daengah ni aka dueng loh a kut te dumlai la a hlah pawt eh.
Psalms125:4 BOEIPA aw aka then taeng neh
Psalms125:5 Tedae BOEIPA aw
Psalms126:1 BOEIPA loh Zion hlangsol te ham mael puei vaengah mang man bangla ka om uh.
Psalms126:2 Te vaengah mamih ka ah nueihbu neh mamih lai ah tamlung khaw bae. Te dongah namtom taengah
Psalms126:3 Mamih ham aka saii BOEIPA he a khuet dongah kohoe la ng'om uh.
Psalms126:4 BOEIPA aw kaimih thongtla thongla te tuithim kah sokca bangla mael sak lah.
Psalms126:5 Mikphi neh aka tawn rhoek loh tamlung neh a ah uh ni.
Psalms126:6 Cet rhoe cet tih rhah doeah cangtii rhovoep aka phuei tah a cangpa pawn doela tamlung neh ha mael rhoe ha mael ni.
Psalms127:1 a soah aka sa rhoek khaw a poeyoek lam ni a thakthae uh. BOEIPA loh khopuei a hung pawt atah aka hung khaw a poeyoek lam ni a hak.
Psalms127:2 A thoh neh hlah uh tih kholaeh daengla aka duem
Psalms127:3 Ca rhoek he BOEIPA rho neh bungko thaihtae kah thapang ni ne.
Psalms127:4 Camoe ca rhoek khaw hlangrhalh kut dongkah thaltang bangla om tangloeng.
Psalms127:5 Te rhoek neh a liva aka bae sak hlang te tah a yoethen. Vongka kah thunkha neh a oelh uh rhoi vaengah yahpok uh mahpawh.
Psalms128:1 BOEIPA aka rhih tih a longpuei ah aka pongpa boeih tah a yoethen.
Psalms128:2 Na kut dongkah thatloh vanbangla na yoethen na caak van vetih na taengkah hnothen om ni.
Psalms128:3 Na yuu khaw misur bangla na im a imthael ah thaihsu vetih na ca rhoek te olive thingnoe bangla na caboei kong ah om uh ni.
Psalms128:4 Te dongah BOEIPA aka rhih hlang tah a yoethen pai he.
Psalms128:5 Zion lamkah BOEIPA loh nang yoethen m'pae saeh lamtah na hingnah khohnin takuem ah Jerusalem kah a thennah te hmuh van.
Psalms128:6 Na ca rhoek kah a ca rhoek khaw hmu van. Israel soah rhoepnah om saeh.
Psalms129:1 Ka camoe lamloh kai mat n'daengdaeh he Israel loh thui laeh saeh.
Psalms129:2 Ka camoe lamloh kai he mat n'daengdaeh uh dae kai he n'noeng moenih.
Psalms129:3 Ka uen soah a thoe a thoe uh tih a hma sokah a hma te a yoe uh.
Psalms129:4 Aka dueng BOEIPA loh halang rhoek kah rhuivaeh te a tlueh pah.
Psalms129:5 Zion aka thiinah rhoek boeih tah yahpok uh saeh lamtah a hnuk la balkhong uh saeh.
Psalms129:6 Imphu kah sulrham bangla om saeh. Te tah amah hmuen ah a rhae la a phuk.
Psalms129:7 Te te a ah tih a ban neh a kulup akhaw a kutpha dongah a bae moenih.
Psalms129:8 Te vaengah aka kongpa rhoek loh
Psalms130:1 A dung lamloh BOEIPA nang kang khue.
Psalms130:2 Boeipa aw ka ol he ya lamtah ka huithuinah ol te na hna phek kaeng lah.
Psalms130:3 Ka Boeipa Yahovah aw thaesainah he na dawn koinih unim aka pai thai eh?
Psalms130:4 Tedae namah taengkah khodawkngainah daengah ni n'rhih uh pueng.
Psalms130:5 Ka lamtawn BOEIPA te ka hinglu loh a lamtawn tih a ol dongah ka ngaiuep.
Psalms130:6 Mincang aka rhingda rhoek loh mincang a rhingda uh lakah ka hinglu loh Boeipa ni a rhingda.
Psalms130:7 BOEIPA taengah sitlohnah neh amah taengkah te tlannah he a puh dongah ni Israel loh BOEIPA dongah a ngaiuep.
Psalms130:8 Te dongah amah loh Israel te thaesainah cungkuem lamloh a lat ni.
Psalms131:1 BOEIPA aw ka lungbuei sang pawt tih ka mik khaw a pomsang moenih. Te dongah kamah lakah aka tanglue rhoek neh a rhaisang taengah khaw ka pongpa pawh.
Psalms131:2 Tedae ka hinglu khaw hal tih ka kuemsuem coeng. A manu taengkah suk aka toeng bangla ka khuikah ka hinglu khaw a toeng coeng.
Psalms131:3 Aw Israel
Psalms132:1 Aw BOEIPA David ham a phaep pah te boeih poek pah.
Psalms132:2 BOEIPA taengah a caeng tih Jakob samrhang taengah khaw a caeng coeng.
Psalms132:3 Ka dap im khuila ka pawk pawt vetih ka soengca rhaenghmuen khaw ka paan mahpawh.
Psalms132:4 Ka mik te ih sak ham
Psalms132:5 BOEIPA ham a hmuen neh Jakob kah samrhang ham tolhmuen ka hmuh duela.
Psalms132:6 Khohmuen duup ah m'hmuh te Epharath ah khaw n'yaak uh coeng.
Psalms132:7 A tolhmuen la cet uh sih lamtah a kho kah khotloeng taengah bawk uh sih.
Psalms132:8 Aw BOEIPA nang na duemnah neh na sarhi thingkawng taengah thoo lah.
Psalms132:9 Na khosoih rhoek loh duengnah bai uh saeh lamtah na hlangcim rhoek loh tamhoe uh saeh.
Psalms132:10 Na sal David ham tah na koelh kah maelhmai te na mangthuung tak moenih.
Psalms132:11 BOEIPA loh David taengah oltak la a caeng coeng. Na bungko thaihtae lamkah khaw te lamloh mael pawt vetih na ham ngolkhoel soah kang khueh bitni.
Psalms132:12 Ka paipi neh amih ka tukkil ka olphong te na ca rhoek loh a ngaithuen uh atah a ca rhoek khaw na ngolkhoel dongah a yoeyah la ngol uh ni.
Psalms132:13 BOEIPA loh Zion te a coelh tih amah tolrhum la a sahnaih thil.
Psalms132:14 Ka duemnah he ka sahnaih coeng dongah a yoeyah la pahoi ka ngol thil ni.
Psalms132:15 A sakah te ka uem ka uem pah vetih a khuikah khodaeng rhoek te buh ka cung sak ni.
Psalms132:16 Te vaengah a khosoih rhoek te khangnah ka bai sak vetih a hlangcim rhoek loh tamhoe la tamhoe uh ni.
Psalms132:17 David ham ki pahoi ka cawn sak vetih ka koelh ham hmaithoi ka tok pah ni.
Psalms132:18 A thunkha rhoek te yahpohnah ka bai sak vetih anih te a rhuisam neh ka khooi sak ni.

Proverbs25:1 Tahae Solomon kah thuidoeknah rhoek he Judah manghai Hezekiah kah hlang rhoek loh a puen uh bal.
Proverbs25:2 Pathen kah thangpomnah loh olka te a thuh tih
Proverbs25:3 Buhuengpomnah he vaan ah
Proverbs25:4 Ngun te a aek met pah. Te daengah ni hnopai aka saii ham khaw a poeh pa eh.
Proverbs25:5 Halang khaw manghai mikhmuh lamkah loh haek uh. Te daengah ni a ngolkhoel loh duengnah dongah a ngol eh.
Proverbs25:6 Manghai mikhmuh ah namah pom uh boeh
Proverbs25:7 Na mik loh a hmuh vanbangla
Proverbs25:8 Toe koeloe ham khaw khuen boeh. Meltam khaw
Proverbs25:9 Namah lamkah oelhtaihnah te na hui neh tuituk uh rhoi. Tedae baecenol he tah a tloe la puek sak boeh.
Proverbs25:10 Uepom loh nang n'ya vetih nang taengah theetnah loh paa tlaih pawt ve.
Proverbs25:11 A buelhmaih la a thui olka tah cak ben dongkah sui thaihthawn la om.

Proverbs25:13 Cangah tue vaengkah vuelsong a dingsuek bangla

Proverbs25:17 Na kho te na hui im ah a rhoeh la hawn sak aih
Proverbs25:18 A hui taengah a hong laipai la aka phoe hlang tah caemboh

Proverbs25:20 Boethae lungbuei te laa neh aka hlai khaw
Proverbs25:21 Na lunguet khaw a pongnaeng atah buh cah lamtah

Proverbs25:23 Tlangpuei yilh loh khonal hang khuen. A huephael kah olka loh a mikhmuh ah kosi a sah.
Proverbs25:24 Imkhui ah huta kah olpungkacan neh hohmuhnah hloih dongkah lakah tah
Proverbs25:25 Khohla bangsang kho lamkah olthang then khaw buhmueh rhathih vaengkah hinglu ham tui ding bangla om.

Proverbs27:2 Hlanglak loh nang n'thangthen saeh lamtah
Proverbs27:3 Lungto kah a rhih neh laivin kah a khiing khaw om. Te rhoi lakkah hlang ang kah konoinah tah rhih.
Proverbs27:4 Kosi kah a muennah neh thintoek lungpook khaw tho coeng dae
Proverbs27:5 Hmantang kah toelthamnah he
Proverbs27:6 Lungnah dongah hlang loh n'tloh sak tah tangnah ham om dae
Proverbs27:7 Aka hah kah hinglu loh khoilitui pataeng a suntlae dae
Proverbs27:8 A hmuen lamkah aka poeng hlang khaw
Proverbs27:9 Situi neh bo-ul loh lungbuei ko a hoe sak. Hinglu dongkah cilsuep loh a hui taengah olding la om.
Proverbs27:10 Namah hui neh olrhoep khaw na pa kah a hui khaw hnoo boeh. Rhainah hnin ah na manuca kah im te na cet pawt ve ne. A hla kah manuca lakah a yoei kah na imben te then ngai.
Proverbs27:11 Ka ca nang cueih lamtah ka lungbuei a kohoe saeh. Te daengah ni kai aka veet te ol ka thuung thai eh.

Proverbs27:26 Tuca rhoek te na pueinak la
