Proverbs28:1 Halang tah a hloem pawt akhaw rhaelrham khing. Tedae aka dueng tah sathueng bangla amah pangtung uh.
Proverbs28:2 Khohmuen kah boekoek dongah mangpa la yet dae
Proverbs28:3 Hlang he khodaeng loh tattloel patoeng a hnaemtaek he khaw
Proverbs28:4 Olkhueng aka hnoo rhoek loh halang te a thangthen uh. Tedae olkhueng aka tuem long tah amih te a huek.
Proverbs28:5 Hlang thae rhoek loh tiktamnah te yakming uh pawt dae
Proverbs28:6 A thincaknah neh aka pongpa khodaeng he
Proverbs28:7 Olkhueng aka kueinah capa long tah a yakming dae
Proverbs28:8 A casai a puehkan neh a boeirhaeng aka tom long khaw
Proverbs28:9 Olkhueng a yaak lalah a hna tlap tlap khong tah
Proverbs28:10 Aka thuem te longpuei thae la aka palang sak tah cakhom ah amah lah cungku ni. Tedae cuemthuek rhoek long tah hnothen a pang uh ni.
Proverbs28:11 Hlanglen pa he a mikhmuh ah amah aka cueih koek la ngai uh dae
Proverbs28:12 Aka dueng rhoek a sundaep vaengah muep boeimang tangloeng dae
Proverbs28:13 A boekoek aka phah he a thaihtak moenih. Tedae aka phoe tih aka hnoo tah a haidam.
Proverbs28:14 Aka rhih yoeyah hlang tah a yoethen dae
Proverbs28:15 Halang loh a taemrhai vaengah pilnam tattloel te sathueng bangla a nguel thil tih vom bangla cu.
Proverbs28:16 A lungcuei aka talh rhaengsang tah tlungalnah yet. Mueluemnah aka hmuhuet la aka hmuhuet tah a hinglung vang ni.
Proverbs28:17 Hinglu kah thii neh hlang aka hnaemtaek hlang tah vaam khuila rhaelrham cakhaw
Proverbs28:18 Cuemthuek la aka pongpa tah daem tih
Proverbs28:19 Amah khohmuen aka tawn tah caak khaw kum ni. Tedae a hoenghoep bueng aka hloem tah khodaeng la hah ni.
Proverbs28:20 Uepomnah hlang kah yoethennah tah yet. Tedae boei hamla aka tanolh khaw hmil mahpawh.
Proverbs28:21 Maelhmai a loha khaw then pawh. Tedae buh kamat dongah ni hlang loh boe a koek.
Proverbs28:22 Hlang moeithae loh boeirhaeng dongah ngawn tah hlawt let dae
Proverbs28:23 Hlang aka tluung he a hnukah tah a lai aka hnal lakah
Proverbs28:24 A manu neh a napa a rheth lalah boekoek pawt la aka thui tah
Proverbs28:25 Mungkung kah hinglu long tah olpungkacan a huek. Tedae BOEIPA dongah aka pangtung ni a hoeikhang eh.
Proverbs28:26 Amah kah lungbuei dongah aka pangtung tah amah te ang coeng. Tedae cueihnah dongah aka pongpa tah amah khaw hlawt uh.
Proverbs28:27 Khodaeng taengah aka pae tah a tloelnah om pawh. Tedae a mik aka him tah tapvoepnah muep kum.
Proverbs28:28 Halang rhoek a thoh vaengah hlang loh a thuh tak. Tedae a milh vaengah aka dueng rhoek khaw pul.
Proverbs29:1 Toelthamnah a om lalah a rhawn aka mangkhak sak hlang tah hoeihnah om kolla pahoi khaem ni.
Proverbs29:2 Hlang dueng a pul vaengah pilnam a kohoe. Tedae halang loh a taemrhai vaengah pilnam huei.
Proverbs29:3 Cueihnah aka lungnah hlang loh a napa ko a hoe sak. Tedae pumyoi neh aka luem loh boeirhaeng khaw a milh sak.
Proverbs29:4 Tiktamnah dongah ni manghai loh khohmuen a pai sak. Tedae kapbaih aka ca hlang loh khohmuen a koengloeng.
Proverbs29:5 A hui taengah aka hoem hlang khaw amah khokan dongah ni lawk a tung coeng.
Proverbs29:6 Hlang boethae loh boekoeknah neh hlaeh a tung. Tedae aka dueng tah tamhoe tih a kohoe.
Proverbs29:7 Aka dueng long tah tattloel kah dumlai a ming pah. Halang long tah mingnah pataeng a yakming moenih.
Proverbs29:8 Saipaat hlang rhoek loh khorha a sat. Tedae hlang cueih rhoek long tah thintoek pataeng a dolh.
Proverbs29:9 Hlang cueih loh hlang ang taengah lai a thui. Tedae a tlai phoeiah tah luem puei cakhaw mongnah om mahpawh.
Proverbs29:10 Thii aka hal hlang rhoek loh cuemthuek te a hmuhuet uh. Tedae aka thuem rhoek long tah a hinglu a toem pah.
Proverbs29:11 Aka ang loh a mueihla khaw boeih a poh. Tedae aka cueih long tah a hnuk ah domyok a ti.
Proverbs29:12 A hong ol aka hnatung loh a taemrhai vaengah
Proverbs29:13 Khodaeng neh hlang kah a hnaephnapnah a humcui rhoi vaengah
Proverbs29:14 A ngolkhoel cikngae yoeyah sak ham atah
Proverbs29:15 Cungcik neh toelthamnah loh cueihnah a paek. Tedae a hlahpham camoe loh a manu yah a bai.
Proverbs29:16 Halang rhoek a pul vaengah boekoek khaw pul. Tedae aka dueng long tah amih a cungkunah lam ni a hmuh eh.
Proverbs29:17 Na capa te toel lamtah na duem bitni. Na hinglu ham khaw buhmong m'paek ni.
Proverbs29:18 Mangthui a om pawt atah pilnam khaw pam. Tedae olkhueng aka ngaithuen tah a yoethen pai.
Proverbs29:19 Ol bueng neh sal a toel thai moenih. Yakming cakhaw hlat hae mahpawh.
Proverbs29:20 A ol neh aka cahawt hlang khaw na hmuh coeng. Anih lakah hlang ang taengah ngaiuepnah om ngai.
Proverbs29:21 A sal te a camoe lamloh aka dom tah
Proverbs29:22 Thintoek hlang loh olpungkacan a huek tih
Proverbs29:23 Hlang kah a hoemnah loh amah a kunyun sak. Te dongah a mueihla tlarhoel tah thangpomnah loh a moem.
Proverbs29:24 Hlanghuen taengah boe aka soep tah
Proverbs29:25 Hlang kah thuennah loh hlaeh ni a tung eh. Tedae BOEIPA dongah aka pangtung tah sueng.
Proverbs29:26 Aka taemrhai kah maelhmai khaw muep a tlap uh. Tedae hlang taengkah laitloeknah tah BOEIPA hut ni.
Proverbs29:27 Hlang dueng long tah dumlai te tueilaehkoi a ti. Tedae halang long tah longpuei aka thuem te tueilaehkoi a ti van.

Proverbs31:6 Yu te aka milh taengah

Proverbs31:28 A ca rhoek loh a thoh hang neh anih te a uem uh tih

Ecclesiastes1:1 Jerusalem manghai David capa kah thuituenkung ol.
Ecclesiastes1:2 A honghi
Ecclesiastes1:3 Khohmik hmuiah a thakthae bangla a thakthaenah cungkuem lamloh hlang taengah balae a rhoeikhangnah.
Ecclesiastes1:4 Thawnpuei loh cet tih cadil thoeng coeng dae diklai he kumhal duela a pai moenih.
Ecclesiastes1:5 Khomik loh thoeng tih khomik he kun bal. Te phoeiah amah hmuen te a hloem pahoi thoeng.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Tuithim la cet tih tlangpuei la aka mael khohli he a tinghil
Ecclesiastes1:7 Soklong boeih khaw tuitunli la pawk. Tedae tuitunli tah hah tlaih pawh. Soklong rhoek khaw a long nah hmuen la mael tih cet.
Ecclesiastes1:8 Olka boeih he bonghnaek. Hlang loh a thui hamla a noeng moenih. Mik loh a hmuh te hah pawt tih hna a yaak te cung pawh.
Ecclesiastes1:9 Mebang khaw aka om tangtae bangla om bal vetih
Ecclesiastes1:10 “A thai he hmu lah
Ecclesiastes1:11 Lamhma kah neh hmailong kah khaw poekkoepnah om pawh. Aka om ham te khaw hmailong kah aka om taengah poekkoepnah om mahpawh.
Ecclesiastes1:12 Kai tah thuituenkung neh Jerusalem kah Israel soah manghai la ka om.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Vaan hmui kah a saii boeih te cueihnah neh dawtlet ham khaw
Ecclesiastes1:14 Khomik hmui kah a saii bitat boeih te ka hmuh. Te dongah a cungkuem he a honghi neh khohli doinah ni ne.
Ecclesiastes1:15 Aka khun he dueng hamla coeng pawt tih vitvawtnah khaw tae hamla coeng pawh.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Kamah tah ka lungbuei ah ka cal tih
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ka lungbuei he cueihnah ming ham neh anglatnah ming ham ka paek. Te dongah lunghmangnah he khaw khohli dongkah kohnek ni tila ka ming.
Ecclesiastes1:18 Cueihnah a cungkuem nen khaw konoinah cungkuem tih
Ecclesiastes2:1 Kai tah ka lungbuei ah
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nueihbu te ka yan tih kohoenah neh
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ka lungbuei khuikah tah ka saa he misurtui neh dangrhoek ham
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ka bibi ka rhoeng sak tih kamah ham im ka sak
Ecclesiastes2:5 Kamah hamla dum neh khotu ka tawn tih a khuiah thing thaih boeih ka tue.
Ecclesiastes2:6 Duup thing aka poe te tui suep hamla kamah loh tuibuem ka saii.
Ecclesiastes2:7 salpa neh salnu khaw ka lai tih im kah cacah khaw ka taengah om. Saelhung saelrhoi neh boiva khaw kamah taengah muep om tih
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kamah hamla cak neh sui khaw
Ecclesiastes2:9 Jerusalem ah ka rhoeng tih ka mikhmuh kah aka om boeih lakah ka lawn. Kai cueihnah khaw ka khuiah cak.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ka mik loh a hoe boeih tah ka hloh moenih. Ka lungbuei te kohoenah cungkuem lamloh ka hloh moenih. Ka thakthaenah cungkuem khuiah pataeng ka lungbuei a kohoe. He ni ka thakthaenah cungkuem dongah kai kah khoyo la a om.
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ka kut loh a saii bangla ka bibi boeih khaw
Ecclesiastes2:12 Cueihnah hmuh hamla anglatnah neh lunghmangnah khaw ka mael thil. Oepsoeh la a saii pah phoeiah manghai hnukah aka pawk te mebang hlang nim?
Ecclesiastes2:13 Vangnah he hmaisuep lakah rhoeikhangnah a om bangla cueihnah he lunghmangnah lakah rhoeikhangnah om tila ka hmuh.
Ecclesiastes2:14 Hlang cueih kah a mik tah a lu khuiah om dae aka ang tah hmaisuep ah pongpa. Te dongah amih boeih te a hmatoeng pakhat loh a mah tila ka ming van.
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ka lungbuei khuiah tah
Ecclesiastes2:16 Aka ang bangla aka cueih ham khaw kumhal duela poekkoepnah om mahpawh. Oepsoeh la khohnin aka pai boeih dongah a hnilh pawn ni. Aka cueih khaw aka ang bangla duek aya?
Ecclesiastes2:17 Te dongah hingnah te ka hmuhuet coeng. Khomik hmuikah a saii bitat he kai ham tah thae coeng. A cungkuem he a honghi neh khohli doinah mai ni.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ka thakthaenah boeih he ka hmuhuet coeng. Khomik hmuikah thakthaekung ka om. Te te ka hnukah aka om hlang ham ni ka khueh eh.
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ulong a ming huek? Lunghmang khaw hlangcueih om nim? Tedae ka thakthaenah boeih te a taemrhai hae ni. Te nen te ka thakthae tih te nen te ka cueih dae khomik hmuiah tah te khaw a honghi mai ni.
Ecclesiastes2:20 Te dongah ka lungbuei he talsae la ka mael puei. Khomik hmuiah thakthaenah cungkuem neh ka thakthae.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Hlang tah bangla cueihnah neh
Ecclesiastes2:22 A thakthaenah cungkuem dong neh a lungbuei kah kohnek dongah khaw hlang hamla balae aka om? Anih te khomik hmuikah thakthaekung la om.
Ecclesiastes2:23 A khohnin te nganboh
Ecclesiastes2:24 A caak tih a ok bangla hlang ham hnothen a om moenih. Tedae a hinglu a hmuh te ni a thakthaenah khui lamloh hnothen la a om. He khaw Pathen kut lamkah ni tila ka hmuh.
Ecclesiastes2:25 Kai lamkah rhamvoel ah unim aka ca thai tih unim aka tawn bal?
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amah mikhmuh kah aka then hlang te tah cueihnah
Ecclesiastes3:1 A cungkuem dongah a tuetang om tih vaan hmuikah kongaih boeih dongah khaw a tue om.
Ecclesiastes3:2 Cun ham tue neh duek ham tue khaw om. Aka phung hamla phung ham tue neh haih ham tue om.
Ecclesiastes3:3 Ngawn ham tue neh hoeih sak ham tue khaw om. Phae ham tue neh sak ham tue khaw om.
Ecclesiastes3:4 Rhah tue neh luem tue khaw om. Rhaengsae tue neh soipet tue khaw om.
Ecclesiastes3:5 Lungto voeih tue neh lungto calui tue khaw om. Kop tue neh a kop lamloh lakhla tue khaw om.
Ecclesiastes3:6 Tlap tue neh paltham tue khaw om. Ngaithuen tue neh voeih tue khaw om.
Ecclesiastes3:7 Phen tue neh bo tue khaw om. Duem om ham tue neh thui tue khaw om.
Ecclesiastes3:8 Lungnah tue neh thiinah tue om. Caemtloek tue neh rhoepnah tue om.
Ecclesiastes3:9 Anih thakthaekung lamloh mebang rhoeikhangnah lae a saii?.
Ecclesiastes3:10 Anih te phaep hamla Pathen loh hlang ca rhoek soah a paek te khaw bibi la ka hmuh.
Ecclesiastes3:11 A cungkuem he amah tue neh sakthen la a saii tih kumhal kah te khaw amih lungbuei ah a khueh pah. Te pawt cakhaw
Ecclesiastes3:12 Amah hingnah dongah kohoe ham neh a then saii ham lakah amih ham a then a om moenih.
Ecclesiastes3:13 Hlang boeih he khaw ca mai saeh lamtah o mai saeh
Ecclesiastes3:14 Pathen loh a cungkuem a saii tila ka ming. Amah tah kumhal duela om. Amah soah thap ham om pawt tih anih lamkah te yueh ham khaw a om bal moenih. Te dongah a mikhmuh ah a rhih uh ham ni Pathen loh a saii.
Ecclesiastes3:15 Aka om oepsoeh te khaw
Ecclesiastes3:16 Laitloeknah hmuen ah halangnah hnap om tih
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ka lungbuei ah tah
Ecclesiastes3:18 Hlang ca rhoek kah dumlai dongah khaw ka lungbuei ah
Ecclesiastes3:19 Hlang ca rhoek kah a hmatoeng neh rhamsa kah hmatoeng khaw hmatoeng pakhat ni. Amih ham he kah dueknah bangla ke dueknah khaw om tih a cungkuem ham hil pakhat la om. Te dongah rhamsa lakah hlang kah kumkonah a om moenih. A cungkuem he a honghi ni.
Ecclesiastes3:20 A cungkuem he hmuen pakhat la cet. A cungkuem laipi lamloh ha thoeng. A cungkuem he laipi la mael.
Ecclesiastes3:21 Hlang ca rhoek kah mueihla tah a so la cet tih rhamsa mueihla tah diklai khuila a suntlak thuk khaw ulong a ming?
Ecclesiastes3:22 Te dongah a hamsum bangla a bibi dongah hlang a kohoe lakah ah a then om pawh tila ka hmuh. A hnukah aka thoeng ham te hmuh sak hamla nih te ulong anih a khuen thai?
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ka mael tih khomik hmuikah a hnaemtaek rhoek boeih te ka sawt. Te te khomik hmuiah a saii uh tih a hnaemtaek rhoek kah mikphi aih ke
Ecclesiastes4:2 Kai tah aka hing pueng amih hlang hing rhoek lakah aka duek tangtae hlang duek rhoek te ka domyok sak mai.
Ecclesiastes4:3 Te rhoi lakah khaw
Ecclesiastes4:4 thakthaenah cungkuem neh bibi thoemthainah cungkuem khaw ka hmuh coeng. Te dongah hlang loh a hui taengkah thatlainah he khaw a honghi neh khohli doinah mai ni.
Ecclesiastes4:5 Aka ang loh a kut te a poem tih amah saa te a caak.
Ecclesiastes4:6 thakthaenah neh khohli doinah kutnarhum a bae lakah kutvang dongkah aka bae mongnah he then ngai.
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ka mael vaengah he khomik hmuiah a honghi ni ka hmuh.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Hlang he pakhat bueng om tih a pabae a om moenih. Capa neh manuca khaw a taengah a om moenih. Te dongah a thakthaenah cungkuem dongah a bawtnah om pawh. A mik
Ecclesiastes4:9 Pakhat lakah panit he then
Ecclesiastes4:10 Cungku rhoi cakhaw pakhat loh a hui te a thoh. Tedae amah pakhat bueng ki aka cungku te khomap coeng tih anih aka thoh ham koep om pawh.
Ecclesiastes4:11 Panit a yalh rhoi vaengah tah amah rhoi khaw bae dae pakhat tah metlam a bae eh?
Ecclesiastes4:12 Anih te khat khat loh khulae mai cakhaw a taengah ah panit la pai rhoi thai. Rhuihet pathum a yaep tah a yoei la a pat moenih.
Ecclesiastes4:13 Khodaeng dae aka cueih camoe he patong tih aka ang manghai lakah then. Anih te koep thuituen ham khaw a ming moenih.
Ecclesiastes4:14 A pin nah im lamloh manghai taengla aka pawk khaw
Ecclesiastes4:15 Khomik hmuiah aka pongpa mulhing boeih tah manghai yueng la aka pai camoe pabae taengah a pai te ka hmuh.
Ecclesiastes4:16 Pilnam boeih ham te a bawtnah om pawh. Amah te cungkuem taengah a hmai la a om pah dae lamhnuk rhoek loh anih taengah ko a hoe uh moenih. He khaw a honghi neh khohli dongkah kohnek mai ni.
Ecclesiastes5:1 Pathen im la na caeh vaengkah bangla na kho neh na khokan te ngaithuen. Te dongah hnatun hamla n'tawn uh he aka ang kah hmueih nawn lakah then. Amih loh boethae a saii te khaw ming uh pawh.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Pathen mikhmuh ah ol aka thak la na ka te let sak boel lamtah na lungbuei loe boel saeh. Pathen tah vaan ah om tih nang tah diklai ah ni na om. Te dongah na ol yol saeh.
Ecclesiastes5:3 Bibi a cungkuem vaengah mueimang khaw om tih olka a cungkuem vaengah hlang ang ol la poeh.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pathen taengah olcaeng na caeng vaengah na thuung ham uelh boeh. Na caeng bangla a thuung te aka ang kah kongaih moenih.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Na caeng tih na thuung pawt lakah na caeng pawt te then.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Na pumsa te tholh sak hamla na ka te khueh boeh. Tohtamaeh kah te puencawn mikhmuh ah thui boeh. Na ol dongah balae tih Pathen thin a toek? Te dongah na kut dongkah bibi te a phae.
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mueimang a yet vaengah a honghi neh ol khaw yet. Te dongah Pathen te rhih laeh.
Ecclesiastes5:8 Paeng ah khodaeng hnaemtaeknah khaw
Ecclesiastes5:9 Amah khohmuen aka tawn manghai loh a cungkuem dongah khohmuen kah rhoeikhangnah te amah la a dang.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Tangka aka lungnah khaw tangka hah pawt tih boeinah aka lungnah te khaw a vueithaih a dang moenih. He khaw a honghi mai ni.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Hnothen a ping ham vaengah te te aka ca rhoek khaw pungtai uh. Te dongah a kungmah te tah a mik loh danyoe sawthong phoeiah tah balae a thoemthainah voel.
Ecclesiastes5:12 Aka thotat tah a yol akhaw
Ecclesiastes5:13 Boethae a om he khomik hmuiah a tloh la ka hmuh. Khuehtawn he a kungmah loh a ngaithuen akhaw amah yoethaenah ham ni.
Ecclesiastes5:14 Khuehtawn he bibi thae ah a paltham mai. Te dongah capa a sak akhaw a kut dongah pakhat pataeng a om moenih.
Ecclesiastes5:15 A manu bung lamloh pumtling ha thoeng tih a caeh vaengah khaw a thoeng vaengkah banglam ni a mael. A thakthaenah lamkah te pakhat pataeng a kut dongah a khuen hamla a phueih moenih.
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ha thoeng vaengkah bangla voeivang a caeh he khaw boeih thae tih tlo bal. Te dongah khohli hamla a thakthae he anih ham balae a rhoeikhangnah.
Ecclesiastes5:17 Amah tue khuiah khaw hmaisuep ah a caak tih a tlohtat neh a thinhul ah muep hue a sak.
Ecclesiastes5:18 Sakthen la caak ham neh ok ham khaw
Ecclesiastes5:19 Pathen loh hlang boeih te a taengkah khuehtawn neh koeva a paek pai. Te dongah te lamloh a caak ham neh a hamsum a duen ham khaw
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pathen loh kohoenah neh a lungbuei a phaep pah dongah a hingnah khohnin te puet poek pawh.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Khomik hmuiah ka hmuh he boethae la om tih te te hlang soah yet coeng.
Ecclesiastes6:2 Pathen loh hlang te a taengah khuehtawn
Ecclesiastes6:3 Hlang long he yakhat a sak tih kum a yet a hing mai khaming
Ecclesiastes6:4 Anih te a honghi la ha thoeng tih a hmuep ah a caeh dongah a ming khaw a hmuep ah a vuei pah.
Ecclesiastes6:5 Khomik hmu pawt mai cakhaw mongnah he tah a tloe loh anih lakah a ming moenih.
Ecclesiastes6:6 Kum thawngkhat a rhaep la hing sitoe cakhaw hnothen a hmuh hae moenih. Hmuen pakhat la boeih a caeh moenih a?
Ecclesiastes6:7 Hlang kah thakthaenah boeih he a ka ham ni. Tedae a hinglu khaw a cung tlaih moenih.
Ecclesiastes6:8 Aka ang lakah aka cueih taengah balae a hoeikhang? Mulhing taengah aka pongpa mangdaeng te balae a ming?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Hinglu a van lakah tah mik kah a hmuethma he then. He khaw a honghi neh khohli doinah mai ni.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Mebang khaw aka om coeng te tah a ming oepsoeh la a sui dongah hlang he amah ah ming uh coeng. Tedae amah lakah thaom neh aka khulae taengah tah laitloek ham a noeng moenih.
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ol muep a lo vaengah a honghi khaw ping tih hlang hamla balae a hoeikhang?
Ecclesiastes6:12 Hingnah khohnin tarhing kah hingnah dongah a honghi neh khokhawn bangla a khum te hlang hamla metla a then khaw unim aka ming? Khomik hmuiah anih hnukla aka om te hlang taengah ulong a thui thai?
Ecclesiastes7:1 A ming te tah situi then lakah ah then tih dueknah hnin he a cun khohnin lakah then.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Nguekcoinah im la caeh te buhkoknah im la caeh lakah then. He tah hlang boeih kah a bawtnah coeng tih aka hing loh a lungbuei ah dueh saeh.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Konoinah he nueihbu lakah then. Maelhmai thaenah long ni lungbuei a voelphoeng sak.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Aka cueih kah lungbuei tah nguekcoinah im ah dae aka ang kah lungbuei tah kohoenah im ah om.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Aka cueih kah tluungnah hnatun he tah aka ang laa aka hnatun hlang lakah then.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Am lae kah hling ol bangla aka ang kah nueihbu khaw om. Te dongah he khaw a honghi ni.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Hnaemtaeknah loh hlangcueih a yan sak tih kutdoe loh lungbuei a poo sak.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Ol bawtnah he a tongnah lakah then. Aka ueh kah mueihla he aka oek kah mueihla lakah then.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Huesak hamla na mueihla neh let sak boeh. Konoinah he aka ang kah rhang dongah ni a kol.
Ecclesiastes7:10 “Balae tih hnukbuet kah a tue aka om te tahae kah lakah a then la a om?” ti boeh. Te bang te cueihnah neh na dawt moenih.
Ecclesiastes7:11 Cueihnah tah rho la then tih khomik aka hmu ham khaw hoeikhang.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Cueihnah hlipkhup ah om he tangka hlipkhup kah om banghui ni. Tedae mingnah he tah rhoeikhangnah la om tih cueihnah long tah a kungmah te a hing sak.
Ecclesiastes7:13 Pathen kah bibi te hmu lah. Amah loh a khun sak te dueng hamla aka noeng te unim?
Ecclesiastes7:14 A then tue vaengah tah a then la om. Tedae a yoethae tue vaengkah khaw hmu. He khaw dumlai dongah Pathen loh voeivang ah a khueh. Te daengah ni hlang loh a hnukah te pakhat khaw hmu pawt eh.
Ecclesiastes7:15 Kamah kah a honghi tue vaengah a cungkuem te ka hmuh. Amah kah duengnah dongah aka paltham hlang dueng om tih a boethae neh aka nguel halang khaw om.
Ecclesiastes7:16 Aka dueng koek la om boel lamtah hoeikhangnah aih ham khaw cueih boeh. Balae tih namah na phae uh?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Muep poehlip boel lamtah lunghmang la om boeh. Balae tih namah tue pawt vaengah na duek eh?
Ecclesiastes7:18 He he na tuuk vaengah na kut te ke lamloh na hlah pawt ham then. Pathen aka rhih ham tah a cungkuem te a noeng.
Ecclesiastes7:19 Cueihnah long tah aka cueih te khopuei kah aka om boei parha lakah khaw a tanglue sak.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Diklai hman ah hnothen a saii tih aka tholh pawh hlang dueng a om moenih.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ol a thui uh boeih te khaw na lungbuei paek boeh. Te pawt koinih na sal loh namah n'tap te na ya ve.
Ecclesiastes7:22 Namah loh hlang tloe na tap te na lungbuei loh a voei a yet khaw a ming.
Ecclesiastes7:23 He boeih he cueihnah neh ka noemcai tih
Ecclesiastes7:24 Te tla a om te khaw hla coeng tih a dung lakah dung coeng. Te te aka hmu te unim?
Ecclesiastes7:25 Kamah neh ka lungbuei khaw
Ecclesiastes7:26 A lungbuei te tluum neh soh la a tung tih a kut dongah pinyennah aka khueh huta he dueknah lakah khahing la ka hmuh. Pathen mikhmuh ah aka then tah anih aeng lamloh loeih suidae aka tholh tah anih loh a tuuk ni.
Ecclesiastes7:27 So lah he
Ecclesiastes7:28 Te te ka hinglu loh a tlap pueng dae ka hmuh moenih. Thawngkhat khuiah tongpa pakhat ka hmuh dae te boeih lakli ah huta ka hmuh moenih.
Ecclesiastes7:29 He bueng mah so lah. Pathen loh hlang he a thuem la a saii coeng dae amih loh phuengnah muep a tlap uh te ka hmuh.
Ecclesiastes8:1 Unim hlang cueih bangla aka om? Olka te thuingaihnah aka ming te unim? Hlang he cueihnah loh a maelhmai a sae sak tih a maelhmai khaw sarhi a tho.
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kamah manghai ka dongkah he Pathen olhlo dongkah dumlai la a om dongah ngaithuen.
Ecclesiastes8:3 A mikhmuh lamloh na caeh vaengah let boeh. Boethae ol dongah pai boeh. A cungkuem te a ngaih bangla a saii bitni.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Manghai ol dongah a khuet om tih anih te ulong
Ecclesiastes8:5 Olpaek aka tuem tah boethae ol a ming moenih. Aka cueih kah lungbuei tah a tue neh laitloeknah khaw a ming.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Hlang kah boethae he amah soah ping cakhaw ngaihnah cungkuem ham he a tuetang neh a khosing om.
Ecclesiastes8:7 Anih te metla a om te khaw a ming moenih. Te vanbangla mebang a om ham khaw te anih taengah ulong a thui thai?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Khohli te hloh hamla khohli soah hlang a boei moenih. Dueknah khohnin soah a khuet aka khueh khaw om pawh. Caemtloeknah khuiah khaw paanah a om moenih. Te dongah halangnah loh a boei te loeih sak mahpawh.
Ecclesiastes8:9 A cungkuem he ka sawt tih khomik hmuikah a saii bibi boeih he ka lungbuei ah ka dueh. Hlang loh hlang soah amah kah a yoethae ham duela a taemrhai tue khaw om.
Ecclesiastes8:10 Halang rhoek a up uh he ka sawt vaengah hmuen cim lamloh aka thoeng tih aka pongpa rhoek ni. Tedae te bang a saii nah khopuei ah a hnilh uh coeng. He khaw a honghi coeng ni.
Ecclesiastes8:11 Khoboe thae khaw oltloeknah hat a saii hae moenih. Te dongah ni hlang koca kah lungbuei tah a khuiah thae saii hamla a hah.
Ecclesiastes8:12 Aka tholh khaw boethae yakhat a saii tih anih te nguel mai cakhaw Pathen aka rhih tih a mikhmuh ah aka rhih taengah ni hnothen a om eh tila ka ming.
Ecclesiastes8:13 Tedae hnothen he halang taengah om mahpawh. Anih te pathen mikhmuh ah a rhih pawt dongah khokhawn bangla a khohnin vang mahpawh.
Ecclesiastes8:14 Diklai ah aka thoeng he a honghi mai ni. Aka dueng khaw a soah halang kah khoboe bangla aka thoeng te om tih
Ecclesiastes8:15 Te dongah kai tah kohoenah he ni ka domyok sak mai. Khomik hmuiah ah a caak
Ecclesiastes8:16 Cueihnah ming ham neh bibi hmuh ham ka lungbuei te ka paek coeng. Te long te diklai hman ah tah khothaih ah khaw
Ecclesiastes8:17 Pathen bibi boeih te ka hmuh. Te bibi te hlang loh a hmuh ham a noeng moenih. Khomik hmuiah a saii te hlang loh tlap hamla thakthae sitoe mai cakhaw a hmuh moenih. Aka cueih loh ming hamla a ti van akhaw a hmuh hamla a noeng moenih.
Ecclesiastes9:1 A cungkuem he ka lungbuei ah ka dueh tih a cungkuem he ka boelh. Aka dueng neh aka cueih khaw
Ecclesiastes9:2 A cungkuem he a cungkuem taengah a om vanbangla
Ecclesiastes9:3 Khomik hmuikah aka thoeng he cungkuem dongah thae coeng. A cungkuem ham he hmatoeng pakhat la om. Hlang koca rhoek kah lungbuei khaw boethae hah tih amamih a hing vaengah amih thinko ah anglatnah om. Te phoeiah a hnuk la duek uh.
Ecclesiastes9:4 Tedae u khaw hingnah cungkuem taengah kaibaeng tih aka sun uh te tah pangtungnah om. Ui pataeng khaw amah a hing vaengah tah sathueng aka duek lakah then.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Aka hing rhoek long tah a duek uh ham te a ming dae a duek long tah pakhat khaw a ming uh moenih. Amih ham thapang khaw ming voel pawt tih amih poekkoepnah khaw a hnilh uh coeng.
Ecclesiastes9:6 Amih kah lungnah neh amih kah hmuhuetnah khaw
Ecclesiastes9:7 Cet laeh
Ecclesiastes9:8 A tue takuem ah na himbai te a bok la om saeh lamtah na lu dongkah situi te khaw vawt boel saeh.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Khohnin yungah na lungnah yuu neh hingnah hmuh lah. Khomik hmuiah nang taengah m'paek na hingnah te a honghi ni. Hingnah dongkah na hamsum he khaw khohnin yungah nang ham tah a honghi ni. Te dongah na thakthaenah nen ni nang te khomik hmui ah thakthaekung la na om.
Ecclesiastes9:10 Na kut loh saii hamla a hmuh boeih te tah na thadueng neh saii. Na pha ham koi saelkhui ah tah bibi neh poeknah khaw
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ka mael tih khomik hmuiah he loehlangnah khaw kapyang ham pawt tih caemtloek khaw hlangrhalh rhoek ham moenih
Ecclesiastes9:12 Te dongah hlang loh amah tue te a ming van moenih. Boethae kah ngoi dongah aka man nga neh pael loh a tuuk vaa banglam ni a om. Amih hlang koca rhoek tah boethae tue loh a hlaeh tih amih te buengrhuet a tlak thil.
Ecclesiastes9:13 Khomik hmuikah cueihnah he ka hmuh vaengah kai ham tah te te len coeng.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Khopuei he yit tih a khuikah hlang te yol vaengah tah manghai puei a paan tih a vael phoeiah tluum len a sak thil.
Ecclesiastes9:15 Te vaengah a khuikah khodaeng te hlang cueih la phoe tih a cueihnah neh khopuei te a loeih sak. Tedae hlang loh khodaeng te tah hlang la poek pawh.
Ecclesiastes9:16 Te dongah
Ecclesiastes9:17 Hlangcueih ol tah aka ang rhoek aka taemrhai kah a pang lakah mongnah neh a hnatun uh.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Cueihnah he caemrhal kah hnopai lakah then dae pakhat kah tholh loh a then muep a phae.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Dueknah pilyang loh thungnom situi thaa te a rhim sak bangla vel lunghmangnah vik te cueihnah lakah khaw
Ecclesiastes10:2 Aka cueih kah lungbuei tah a bantang la mael tih aka ang kah lungbuei tah a banvoei la mael.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Longpuei ah pataeng lunghmang tah lunghmang bangla a lungbuei a talh hil pongpa tih a lunghmang te a cungkuem taengah a thui.
Ecclesiastes10:4 Aka taemrhai kah mueihla loh nang taengah pai mai cakhaw na hmuen phawt boeh. Hoeihnah long ni tholhnah a len khaw a duem sak.
Ecclesiastes10:5 Boei mikhmuh lamloh tohtamaeh la aka thoeng ka hmuh te khomik hmuiah a thae la om.
Ecclesiastes10:6 Pavai te hmuensang la muep a khueh vaengah hlanglen tah mathoe la kho a sak.
Ecclesiastes10:7 Marhang dongkah sal rhoek ka hmuh vaengah mangpa rhoek tah diklai ah sal bangla pongpa uh.
Ecclesiastes10:8 Rhom aka too khaw a khuila cungku tih vongtung aka phae khaw rhul loh amah a tuk.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Lungto aka puen khaw amah ah a kothae tih thing aka phaek khaw te nen te tohngah saeh.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Thi te duu tih a ha te a haat pawt atah thadueng khaw vak. Tedae rhoeikhangnah tah cueihnah long ni a khui sak.
Ecclesiastes10:11 Calthai a om pawt ah rhul loh a tuk atah cal kung ham rhoeikhangnah moenih.
Ecclesiastes10:12 Hlang cueih ka dongkah ol tah mikdaithen om tih aka ang kah hmuilai long tah amah a dolh.
Ecclesiastes10:13 A ka dongkah ol tongnah te lunghmangnah la om tih a ka dongkah ol bawtnah khaw boethae angvawknah la om.
Ecclesiastes10:14 Lunghmang tah ol pung tih metla a om khaw hlang loh ming pawh. A hnuk ah metla a om ham khaw a taengah ulong a thui pah voel?
Ecclesiastes10:15 Hlang ang kah thakthaenah loh amah a kohnue sak tih khopuei la caeh ham khaw ming pawh.
Ecclesiastes10:16 Na manghai khaw camoe tih na mangpa rhoek loh mincang ah nah a caak uh te
Ecclesiastes10:17 Na manghai te hlangcoelh capa van tih
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngaknah lamloh tul pae hmawn tih kut poemnah lamloh im cae.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Nueihbu ham buh a khueh tih misurtui loh hingnah ko a hoe sak. Tedae tangka loh a cungkuem te a doo.
Ecclesiastes10:20 Na cangnah nen khaw manghai te tap boeh. Imkhui kah na thingkong dongah khaw hlanglen te tap boeh. Vaan kah vaa loh ol te khuen vetih ol te a phae loh a kungmah taengah thui ve.
Ecclesiastes11:1 Na buh te tui hman ah tueih lamtah a khohnin a cungkuem phoeiah na hmuh bitni.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Parhih taeng neh parhet taengah khaw hamsum te pae lamtah khohmuen ah mebang yoethae a pai ham khaw na ming moenih.
Ecclesiastes11:3 Khomai a thah atah diklai ah khonal nam tih thing te tuithim lam khaw
Ecclesiastes11:4 Khohli aka dawn loh soem pawt vetih khomai dongkah aka so loh at mahpawh.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Khohli kah longpuei te neh ti bungko khuikah rhuh a bae te khaw na ming pawt bangla
Ecclesiastes11:6 Na cangti te mincang ah tuh lamtah hlaem ah khaw na kut te duem sak boeh. Heben hebang ah metla a khui he khaw na ming moenih. Te rhoi te vanat la then ngawn.
Ecclesiastes11:7 Vangnah he didip pai tih khomik a hmuh te mik hamla then.
Ecclesiastes11:8 Hlang he kum a yet a hing van atah a cungkuem dongah a kohoe saeh. Tedae hmaisuep kah khohnin te poek saeh. Aka thoeng ham boeih he a honghi la muep om pueng ni.
Ecclesiastes11:9 Na tongpang oila vaengah na kohoe sak lamtah na cacawn tue vaengah na lungbuei na voelphoeng sak mako. Na lungbuei kah khosing neh na mik kah hmuhnah dongah pongpa ngawn. Tedae te boeih ham te Pathen loh laitloeknah khuila nang n'khuen ni tila ming.
Ecclesiastes11:10 Te dongah konoinah te na lungbuei lamloh khoe lamtah boethae khaw na pum lamloh pit laeh. Oila neh cavaa khaw a honghi mai ni.
Ecclesiastes12:1 Yoethae khohnin a pai hlan kah na cacawn tue vaengah nang aka suen te poek. Kum loh a pha vaengah tah a khuiah kai hamla kongaih om pawh na ti ni.
Ecclesiastes12:2 Khomik neh vangnah
Ecclesiastes12:3 Te khohnin ah tah im tawt rhoek te tonga uh vetih tatthai hlang rhoek khaw khun uh ni. Sum kuelh rhoek khaw muei vetih paa ni. Bangbuet longah aka so khaw a hmuep pah ni.
Ecclesiastes12:4 Thohkhaih te imdak ah a khaih uh vetih sumkuelh ol khaw dim ni. Vaa ol dongah thoo vetih laa sa nu rhoek khaw boeih ngam uh ni.
Ecclesiastes12:5 A sang neh longpuei ah mueirhih te a rhih uh bal ni. Noe thing khaw khooi vetih tangku khaw canawt ni. Huengaihnah khaw talh tih hlang loh amah kah kumhal im la cet tih aka rhaengsae rhoek loh imdak ah a vael uh.
Ecclesiastes12:6 Cak rhui siing a pat pawt ah khaw sui tuidueh paep tih tuisih kah amrhaeng rhek. Tuito kah hmuikil khaw po coeng.
Ecclesiastes12:7 Te vaengah laipi tah a om hmuen bangla diklai la mael tih mueihla tah aka pae kung Pathen taengla mael.
Ecclesiastes12:8 A honghi kah a honghi ni
Ecclesiastes12:9 Aka cueih thuituenkung la a om bangla hoeikhangnah phoeiah khaw pilnam te mingnah neh a tukkil bal tih a khiingmong. Te vaengah thuidoeknah khaw a dueng la muep a khe.
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thuituenkung loh kongaih ol te hmuh hamla a tlap tih oltak ol te a dueng la a daek.
Ecclesiastes12:11 Hlang cueih ol tah ciksum bangla
Ecclesiastes12:12 Te phoeikah a koeinah la
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ol bawtnah la a cungkuem aka ya loh Pathen te rhih lamtah a olpaek te tuem. He he hlang boeih ham ni.
Ecclesiastes12:14 Bibi boeih neh a thuh boeih te khaw
SongOfSongs1:1 Laa rhoek khuikah Laa he Solomon kah ni.
SongOfSongs1:2 Namah hlo tah misurtui lakah then tih a ka dongkah moknah neh kai m'mok lah sue.
SongOfSongs1:3 Namah tah situi bo neh na then pai tih situi loh na ming a puem pai. Te dongah ni hula rhoek long nang n'lungnah.
SongOfSongs1:4 Namah hnukah kai m'mawt lamtah yong mai sih. Kai he manghai loh amah imhman la n'khuen coeng. Namah ah ka omngaih uh tih ka kohoe uh. Nang kah hlo rhoek tah misurtui lakah ka poek uh tih vanat la nang n'lungnah uh.
SongOfSongs1:5 Ka muem cakhaw Jerusalem nu rhoek tah Kedar dap banglam khaw
SongOfSongs1:6 Khomik loh kai n'hmuh tih ka muem dongah nim kai nan hmuh pawh? Ka manu ca rhoek te kai taengah sai tih misurdum aka hung la kai n'khueh uh. Kamah taengkah ka misurdum ka hung pawt ah.
SongOfSongs1:7 Ka hinglu kah a lungnah te kamah taengah thui lah. Melam na luem sak? Khothun ah melam na kol sak? Te boel tah balae tih na hui rhoek kah tuping taengah aka kulup bangla ka om?
SongOfSongs1:8 Huta rhoek khuiah sakthen te na ming pawt atah boiva kholaeh ah namah cet. Na maae-ca te aka dawn rhoek kah dungtlungim ah luem sak.
SongOfSongs1:9 Ka cangyaeh namah tah Pharaoh leng dongkah ka marhang manu kam puet sak.
SongOfSongs1:10 Na kam te aitlaeng neh
SongOfSongs1:11 Nang hamla sui aitlaeng neh cak hnathawn khaw n'saii bitni.
SongOfSongs1:12 Kamah kah rhai-ul tah manghai amah loh a caboei dongah a hmuehmuei la a khueh.
SongOfSongs1:13 Kamah hlo kah murrah cun tah kamah ham ka rhangsuk laklo ah rhaeh coeng.
SongOfSongs1:14 Kamah taengkah kamah hlo tah Engedi misurdum kah tlansum thaihsu ni.
SongOfSongs1:15 Ka cangyaeh tah na tah na rhoep ne
SongOfSongs1:16 Ka hlo nang tah na sakthen ne
SongOfSongs1:17 Lamphai tah mah im kah tungpum saeh lamtah hmaical mah kah paekhop saeh.
SongOfSongs2:1 Kai tah Sharon rhaimoei neh tuikol kah tuilipai ni.
SongOfSongs2:2 Mutlo hling puem kah tuilipai bangla tanu lakli tah kamah cangyaeh van pawn ni.
SongOfSongs2:3 Duup thing lakli thaihthawn kah bangla tongpa lakli ah tah kamah hlo van pawn ni. A hlipkhup ah ka naep tih ka ngol vaengah a thaih khaw ka dang dongah didip mai.
SongOfSongs2:4 Misur im la kai n'khuen tih kai soah amah kah lungnah hnitai a hlaek.
SongOfSongs2:5 Ka lungnah he a tloh dongah yukhap neh kai n'duel tih thaihthawn neh kai n'caih sak.
SongOfSongs2:6 A banvoei kut te ka lu hmui la a tloeng tih a bantang kut loh kai n'kop.
SongOfSongs2:7 Jerusalem nu rhoek nang te kan caeng coeng. Kohong kah sakhi rhuinu long khaw sayuk long khaw n'haeng boel saeh. Lungnah loh a ngaih duela haenghang boeh.
SongOfSongs2:8 Kai hlo ol tah tlang dong a poe
SongOfSongs2:9 Kamah hlo tah kirhang neh rhangrhaeh ca aka puet ni. Mah kah thoh hlip ah pai he ne
SongOfSongs2:10 Kamah hlo loh n'doo tih kai taengah

SongOfSongs2:16 Kamah hlo tah kamah ham saeh lamtah kai khaw anih hamla tuilipai lakli ah ka luem.

SongOfSongs3:1 Ka hinglu kah a lungnah te khoyin ah ka thingkong dongah ka tlap. Anih te ka tlap dae amah ka hmuh moenih.
SongOfSongs3:2 Ka thoo laeh vetih kho khopuei khui neh imdak ah khaw
SongOfSongs3:3 Khopuei te a hil tih aka tawt rhoek loh kai m'hmuh uh. Ka hinglu kah a lungnah te na hmuh uh nim?
SongOfSongs3:4 Amih lamloh vel ka poeng vaengah ka hinglu kah a lungnah te ka hmuh. Amah te ka tuuk tih a nu im hil neh kai n'yom nah imkhui hil amah ka khuen duela anih te ka hlah pawh.
SongOfSongs3:5 Jerusalem nu rhoek nang te kan caeng coeng. Kohong kah sakhi rhuinu long khaw sayuk long khaw n'haeng boel saeh. Lungnah loh a ngaih duela haenghang boeh.
SongOfSongs3:6 murrah a phum neh thimpom vaidik boeih lamkah hmueihtui tah hmaikhu tung bangla khosoek lamloh aka cet he unim?
SongOfSongs3:7 Solomon taengkah a baiphaih aih ke. A kaepvai kah hlangrhalh sawmrhuk rhoek khaw Israel hlangrhalh khui lamkah ni.
SongOfSongs3:8 Amih boeih tah cunghang a muk uh tih caemtloek neh phaep uh. Hlang loh khoyin kah birhihnah dongah a phai ah a cunghang a vah.

SongOfSongs4:1 Ka cangyaeh nang tah na sakthen ne. Namah tah na samtum te a hnuk kah na vahui mik neh na sakthen ne. Na sam tah Gilead tlang lamkah aka laai maae tuping bangla om.
SongOfSongs4:2 Na no te tuihlu lamkah aka luei mul rhuep tuping bangla om. Te boeih te phae tih amih te a dueidah laemhong moenih.
SongOfSongs4:3 Na hmui tah rhuihet a lingdik bangla om tih na olding tah na samtum hnuk ah na baengpae kah tale phaklung bangla rhoeprhui mai.
SongOfSongs4:4 Na rhawn tah David kah rhaltoengim bangla om. Te te lungsang neh a sak tih hlangrhalh phatling boeih la a soah phatling thawngkhat a bang.
SongOfSongs4:5 Na rhangsuk rhoi tah tuilipai lakli kah aka luem sakhi rhuinu caphae ca rhoi bangla om.
SongOfSongs4:6 Khothaih thoeng tih khokhawn a bawt hil murrah tlang hil neh hmueihtui som duela kamah hamla ka cet ni.
SongOfSongs4:7 Ka cangyaeh nang tah boeih na sakthen tih na khuiah a lolhmaih om pawh.
SongOfSongs4:8 Vasakung nang Lebanon lamloh kamah taengah
SongOfSongs4:9 Ka ngannu aw kai nan hloih coeng. Vasakung aw na mik lamkah pakhat pakhat neh
SongOfSongs4:10 Ka ngannu neh vasanu nang hlo tah sawtthen tangkik. Na hlo tah misurtui lakah hoeikhang tih
SongOfSongs4:11 Vasanu nang kah hmuilai ah khoilitui cip tih na lai yung te khoitui neh suktui om. Na himbai kah hmuehmuei khaw Lebanon hmuehmuei bangla om.
SongOfSongs4:12 Ka ngannu vasanu tah dum la a mak
SongOfSongs4:13 Khotu tale neh
SongOfSongs4:14 Dingtawn rhai-ul
SongOfSongs4:15 Dum kah tuisih
SongOfSongs4:16 Tlangpuei aw haenghang lamtah tuithim aw ha thoeng laeh. Ka dum he yaap lamtah a botui te sih lah saeh. Kai hlo loh amah dum la cet saeh lamtah a thaihtae cangtham ca lah saeh.
SongOfSongs5:1 Ka ngannu vasanu aw
SongOfSongs5:2 Ka ih muelh vaengah ka hlo kah a khoek ol loh ka lungbuei a haeng. Ka ngannu
SongOfSongs5:3 Ka angkidung te ka pit coeng tih metlam ka bai eh? Ka kho te ka silh dae metlam ka ti sak eh?
SongOfSongs5:4 Ka hlo loh a kut te a put longah a thawt tih anih ham ka ko umya.
SongOfSongs5:5 Kamah hlo te ong pah ham kamah ka thoh vaengah ka kut dongah murrah cip. Ka kutdawn dongkah murrah te thohhna kut dongla long.
SongOfSongs5:6 Ka hlo hamla ka ong pah vaengah ka hlo tah dongpam tih khum. Ka hinglu tah anih voek hamla cet coeng. Anih te ka toem dae amah ka hmuh moenih. Amah ka khue dae kai n'doo moenih.
SongOfSongs5:7 Khopuei ah aka hil tih aka tawt rhoek loh kai m'hmuh tih kai te n'ngawn uh. Vongtung aka tawt rhoek loh kai te n'hi sak uh tih ka pum dong lamkah ka lumuek hni te a phueih uh.
SongOfSongs5:8 Jerusalem nu nang te ka caeng coeng. Kai hlo te na hmu koinih ka lungnah a tloh te a taengah metlam na thui eh?

SongOfSongs5:10 Kamah hlo tah ngo tih thim
SongOfSongs5:11 A lu tah sui kah suicilh la om
SongOfSongs5:12 A mik rhoi tah sokca tui taengkah vahui bangla
SongOfSongs5:13 A kam rhoi tah canglak botui
SongOfSongs5:14 A kut tah timsuih neh a moep sui hnaai van pawn ni. A bung khaw vueino saphi
SongOfSongs5:15 A phai rhoi tah suicilh buenhol dongkah a sut lungbok tung van pawn ni. A mueimae neh Lebanon kah lamphai thing coelh van pawn ni.
SongOfSongs5:16 Kamah hlo he a ka didip tih a pum la ngailaemnah la om. He tah ka hui Jerusalem nu.

SongOfSongs6:6 Na no khaw tuihlu lamloh aka luei tumanu ping van pawn ni. Amih tah boeih phae tih a taengah dueidah laemhong a om moenih.

SongOfSongs7:1 Na kho te hlangcong canu kah khokhom neh sawtthen tangkik. Na phai dongkah phaibong khaw kutthai kut kah bibi neh himbai bangla om.
SongOfSongs7:2 Na yenrhui te kueluek baeldung bangla homtui long khaw vaitah pawh. Na bungko te khaw tuilipai loh cang hlom neh a ven.
SongOfSongs7:3 Na rhangsuk rhoi tah sakhi rhuinu caphae ca rhoi van pawn ni.
SongOfSongs7:4 Na rhawn tah rhaltoeng vueino van pawn ni. Na mik tah Bathrabbim vongka kah Heshbon tuibuem van pawn ni. Na hnarhong tah Damasku rhaldan aka tawt Lebanon rhaltoengim van pawn ni.

SongOfSongs8:1 U long nim nang te a nu rhangsuk dongkah ka manuca cahni bangla n'khueh lah sue. Nang te poeng ah kam hmuh tih namah kam mok akhaw kai he n'hnoelrhoeng pawt sue.
SongOfSongs8:2 Namah te kan hmaithawn vetih nang te kai aka tukkil a nu im la kang khuen lah mako. Nang te kamah kah tale thingtui
SongOfSongs8:3 A banvoei kut te ka lu hmuiah om saeh lamtah a bantang kut loh kai n'kop saeh.
SongOfSongs8:4 Jerusalem nu rhoek
SongOfSongs8:5 Khosoek lamloh cet tih amah hlo dongah aka hangdang he unim? Thaihthawn hmui ah nang kang haeng tih te ah te na nu nang n'laikoi. Nang n'laikoi nah ah pahoi n'cun.
SongOfSongs8:6 Kai he na lungbuei ah kutbuen bangla
SongOfSongs8:7 Lungnah he tui yet loh thih hamla a noeng pawt tih tuiva loh a yo moenih. Hlang loh a im kah boeirhaeng boeih te lungnah ham pae cakhaw amah te a hnoelrhoeng lam ni a hnoelrhoeng uh eh.
SongOfSongs8:8 Mah taengkah ngannu tah noe pueng tih anih te rhangsuk om hlan. Anih te a thui khohnin vaengah mah ngannu ham balae n'saii eh?
SongOfSongs8:9 Anih te vongtung koinih a soah cak lumim n'sak sui tih anih te thohkhaih koinih a taengah lamphai thingphael n'dan pah sue.
SongOfSongs8:10 Kamah he vongtung tih ka rhangsuk he rhaltoengim bangla om. Te dongah a mikhmuh ah tah rhoepnah ka hmu la ka om.
SongOfSongs8:11 Baalhamon ah Solomon kah misurdum om. Misurdum te lo hung taengla a paek. A thaih la hlang loh cak thawngkhat a khuen pah.
SongOfSongs8:12 Kamah kah ka misurdum tah kamah mikhmuh ah om. Solomon nang ham thawngkhat saeh lamtah a thaih aka hung rhoek ham te yahnih saeh.
SongOfSongs8:13 Dum ah aka om mah hui rhoek loh na ol a hnatung bangla kai khaw n'yaak sak lah.
SongOfSongs8:14 Kamah hlo oe yong laeh oe. Namah loh botui tlang ah rhangrhaeh ca neh kirhang khaw puet laeh oe.
Isaiah1:1 Judah manghai rhoek Uzziah
Isaiah1:2 Vaan rhoek loh ya uh lamtah diklai long khaw hnakaeng saeh. BOEIPA loh
Isaiah1:3 Vaito loh amah aka lai te a ming tih laak long a boei kah kongduk te a hmat. Ka pilnam Israel loh ming voel pawt tih yakming voel pawh.
Isaiah1:4 A nunae
Isaiah1:5 Balae tih koep kang ngawn eh? Koeknah te na koei uh tih na lu te a tlohtat kak la
Isaiah1:6 A kho khopha lamloh a lu due hlang la om voel pawh. A tloh neh a hma
Isaiah1:7 Na khohmuen te khopong la om coeng. Na khopuei rhoek hmai neh a hoeh coeng. Na diklai khaw na mikhmuh ah kholong loh han caak coeng. Te dongah khopong neh imrhong bangla a kholong boeih coeng.
Isaiah1:8 Zion nu misur dum kah poca bangla
Isaiah1:9 Caempuei BOEIPA loh mamih he rhaengnaeng la bet n'hlun pawt koinih Sodom bangla ng'om vetih Gomorrah bangla n'lutlat uh.
Isaiah1:10 Sodom rhalboei rhoek BOEIPA olka te ya uh lah. Gomorrah pilnam loh mamih Pathen kah olkhueng te hnakaeng thil lah.
Isaiah1:11 Nangmih hmueih aka khawk te kai ham ee te? BOEIPA loh
Isaiah1:12 Kai mikhmuh ah phoe hamla na pawk uh vaengah na kut dongkah he unim aka suk tih kai kah vongup nan taelh uh.
Isaiah1:13 A Poeyoek la khocang nang khuen neh ng'koei boeh. Bo-ul khaw kai ham tueilaehkoi ni. Hlasae neh Sabbath ah tingtunnah a khue te khaw
Isaiah1:14 Nangmih kah hlasae neh na tingtunnah te ka hinglu loh a hmuhuet tih
Isaiah1:15 Na kut na phuel uh vaengah nangmih taeng lamloh ka mik vik ka him ni. Thangthuinah loh puh cakhaw na kut ah hlang thii a bae dongah ka hnatun mahpawh.
Isaiah1:16 Sil uh lamtah cim uh. Na khoboe thaenah khaw khoe uh lamtah ka mikhmuh lamkah thaehuet te toeng uh.
Isaiah1:17 Voelphoeng hamla cang uh. Tiktamnah te tlap. Hlang hnaepnah te toel uh. Cadah te rhuun uh lamtah
Isaiah1:18 Ha mop uh lamtah tluung uh thae pawn sih. BOEIPA loh
Isaiah1:19 Na huem uh tih na hnatun uh atah khohmuen kah a thennah te na caak uh ni.
Isaiah1:20 Tedae na aal tih na koek uh atah BOEIPA ol a thui coeng dongah cunghang na yook uh ni.
Isaiah1:21 Khorha cakrhuet
Isaiah1:22 Nangmih kah ngun te aek la poeh tih na yuhuem khaw tui neh poek uh coeng.
Isaiah1:23 Na mangpa rhoek a thinthah uh tih a pum la hlanghuen neh hui uh thae. Kapbaih a lungnah tih kapbaih ni a hloem. Cadah te laitloek pa uh pawt tih nuhmai kah tuituknah khaw amamih taengah phoe puei pawh.
Isaiah1:24 Te dongah caempuei Boeipa
Isaiah1:25 Nangmih taengah ka kut kan thuung ni. Te vaengah na khen te lunghuem neh ka dung vetih na ti boeih ka khong ni.
Isaiah1:26 Na laitloek te hnukbuet kah bangla
Isaiah1:27 Zion te tiktamnah neh a lat vetih duengnah neh ha mael ni.
Isaiah1:28 Tedae boekoek rhoek neh BOEIPA aka hnoo hlangtholh rhoek tah pocinah loh rhenten a khah ni.
Isaiah1:29 Thingnu na nai uh te yak vetih
Isaiah1:30 Rhokael te a hnah a hoo bangla
Isaiah1:31 Aka tlung khaw malpawt la
Isaiah2:1 Judah neh Jerusalem ham Amoz capa Isaiah loh olka a hmuh.
Isaiah2:2 Hmailong kah a tue a pha vaengah BOEIPA im tlang te cikngae la om ni. Tlang dong neh som cawn vetih namtom boeih loh amah taengah hlampan uh ni.
Isaiah2:3 Pilnam rhoek muep cet uh vetih
Isaiah2:4 Namtom rhoek lakli ah lai a tloek vetih
Isaiah2:5 Jakob imkhui halo lamtah BOEIPA kah vangnah khuiah cet uh sih.
Isaiah2:6 Na pilnam Jokob imkhui te na phap coeng. Khothoeng lamloh a et. Philisti bangla kutyaek a sawt uh tih kholong ca rhoek neh kut a paeng uh.
Isaiah2:7 A khohmuen ah ngun neh sui khaw bae tih a thakvoh khaw vawt pawh. A khohmuen ah marhang khaw bae tih a leng te bawt pawh.
Isaiah2:8 A khohmuen ah a kut dongkah kutsai mueirhol bae tih a kutdawn neh a saii te a bakop thil uh.
Isaiah2:9 Te dongah hlang he ngam vetih tongpa khaw kunyun ni. Tedae amih te dangrhoek boeh.
Isaiah2:10 BOEIPA taengkah birhihnah hmai lamloh
Isaiah2:11 Hlang kah a oeknah mik tah kunyun vetih hlang buhuengpomnah khaw ngam ni. Te dongah te khohnin ah tah BOEIPA amah long ni a hoeptlang eh.
Isaiah2:12 Caempuei BOEIPA kah khohnin he thinthah neh aka pomsang boeih ham khaw
Isaiah2:13 Lebanon lamphai boeih
Isaiah2:14 Tlang sang boeih ham khaw
Isaiah2:15 Rhaltoengim sang boeih ham khaw
Isaiah2:16 Tarshish sangpho boeih ham khaw
Isaiah2:17 Te dongah hlang kah a oeknah te a ngam sak vetih
Isaiah2:18 Mueirhol rhoek khaw boeih khum ni.
Isaiah2:19 Diklai he huek ham a thoh vaengah BOEIPA kah birhihnah hmai neh amah mingthennah rhuepomnah lamloh lungpang lungko neh laipi khui te a paan uh.
Isaiah2:20 Te khohnin ah hlang loh amah kah cak mueirhol
Isaiah2:21 Diklai huek ham a thoh vaengah BOEIPA kah birhihnah hmai neh a hoemdamnah rhuepomnah lamloh lungpang thaelrhaep neh thaelpang thaelvap la pawk uh ni.
Isaiah2:22 A hnarhong neh aka hiil hlang te toeng laeh

Isaiah3:15 Ba aih lae nang tloe tah? Ba aih lae nangmih tloe tah? Ka pilnam te na phop uh tih mangdaeng rhoek te a maelhmai ah na neet uh. Ka Caempuei Boeipa Yahovah kah olphong ni he.

Isaiah5:1 A misurdum ham ka lungnah kamah hlo te laa la ka hlai pawn ni. Molsom dongkah laimen ca ah ka lungnah misurdum om.
Isaiah5:2 Te te a yoe tih a com phoeiah cangsawt misur te a phung. A laklung ah rhaltoengim a sak tih va-am a than pah. Misur a thaih ham te a lamtawn dae a rhol la a thaih pah.
Isaiah5:3 Jerusalem khosa neh Judah hlang
Isaiah5:4 Ka misur ham te balae koep ka saii eh? Te ham te bi ka saii moenih a? Misur a thaih te ka lamtawn dae balae tih a rhol la a thaih?
Isaiah5:5 Ka misurdum ah ka saii te nangmih kam ming sak pawn ni. A buk te a khoe vetih cahawp hamla om pawn ni. A vongtung te a phae vetih cawtkoi hamla om pawn ni.
Isaiah5:6 Te te lobuek la ka khueh vetih bah uh mahpawh. Yawt uh voel pawt vetih lota neh hling loh a cun ni. Khomai te khaw ka uen vetih khotlan loh tlan thil mahpawh.
Isaiah5:7 Caempuei BOEIPA kah misurdum tah Israel imkhui neh a hlahmaenah thinghloe Judah hlang ni. Tiktamnah te a lamtawn dae thilongnah
Isaiah5:8 Anunae im neh im loh ben uh tih
Isaiah5:9 Ka hna dongah caempuei BOEIPA loh im len khaw imsuep la khueh het mahpawt nim? A len neh a len khaw khosak sak mahpawt nim?
Isaiah5:10 Misurdum rhoihma parha ah bath pakhat la cul vetih
Isaiah5:11 Anunae mincang ah thoo tih yu a hloem uh tih

Isaiah5:13 Te dongah a mingnah tal tih ka pilnam a poelyoe pawn ni. A thangpomnah te khokha kah a hlang la
Isaiah5:14 Te dongah saelkhui loh a hinglu a ka sak tih a rhi om kolla a ka a ang. Te vaengah a rhuepomnah neh a hlangping khaw

Isaiah5:25 BOEIPA kah a thintoek loh a pilnam taengah sai tangloeng coeng. Te vaengah a kut a thueng thil tih a ngawn. Te dongah tlang rhoek khaw tlai uh tih a rhok te rhamvoel laklo ah natcaeh bangla hmoeng. Te boeih nen khaw a thintoek mael pawt tih a kut a thueng pueng.
Isaiah5:26 Khohla kah namtom rhoek ham rholik a ling pah tih

Isaiah5:28 A thaltang te sum vilcik tih a lii khaw boeih tangkuek. A marhang khomae te hmailung bangla
Isaiah5:29 Anih kah a kawknah tah sathuengnu bangla kawk la kawk. Sathueng ca bangla a nguel tih maeh khaw a tuuk. A khuen coeng tah huul pah voel pawh.
Isaiah5:30 Tekah khohnin ah tah tuipuei phoenanah bangla a nguel thil ni. Khohmuen te a paelki vaengah khohmuep khobing neh khosae khaw muei loh khoep a hmuep sak ni.

Isaiah10:3 Cawhtnah tue vaengah balae na saii vetih khohla bangsang lamkah khohli rhamrhael ha pawk vaengah u taengah lae na rhaelrham eh? Bomnah ham neh na thangpomnah te melam na hnoo eh?

Isaiah10:27 Te khohnin a pha vaengah na laengpang dongkah a hnorhih neh na rhawn dongkah a hnamkun han sawn vetih hnamkun te situi loh a pat sak ni.

Isaiah11:1 Jesse kah a ngo dong lamkah a pa te duei vetih a yung lamkah a pae te pungtai ni.
Isaiah11:2 BOEIPA kah Mueihla
Isaiah11:3 Anih te BOEIPA hinyahnah dongah hmae tih a mik dongkah a hmuethma neh laitloek mahpawh
Isaiah11:4 tattloel rhoek te duengnah neh lai a tloek pah vetih khohmuen kah kodo rhoek ham te tlangtlae la ol a tloek pah ni. A ka dongkah mancai neh diklai a taam vetih a hmuilai kah a mueihla neh halang te a duek sak ni.
Isaiah11:5 A cinghen ah duengnah hailaem
Isaiah11:6 Uithang neh tuca
Isaiah11:7 Vaito neh vom khaw hmaih luem vetih a ca rhoek khaw tun kol uh ni. Sathueng long khaw saelhung bangla cangkong ni a caak pawn eh.
Isaiah11:8 Cahni khaw minta khui rhai ah hnang vetih rhulthae khui la sukkan paek loh a kut a puei ni.
Isaiah11:9 Kai kah tlang cim tom ah thaehuet uh mahpawh
Isaiah11:10 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah amah taengah pilnam kah rholik la aka pai Jesse kah a yung te namtom rhoek loh a tlap uh vetih a thangpomnah te duemnah la om ni.
Isaiah11:11 Te khohnin a pha vaengah Assyria
Isaiah11:12 Namtom rhoek ham rholik a ling pah vetih a heh tangtae Isreal a coi vetih Judah khui lamkah a taekyak tangtae te diklai a kil pali lamloh a coi ni.
Isaiah11:13 Ephraim kah thatlainah te nong vetih
Isaiah11:14 Philisti tlanghlaep ah khotlak la camawt uh vetih khothoeng ca rhoek te rhenten a poelyoe uh ni. Edom neh Moab khaw a kut dongah a rhanah uh la
Isaiah11:15 BOEIPA loh Egypt tuipuei kah a ol te a bil pah vetih tuiva te a kut a thueng thil ni. A khohli hlihueng neh soklong te parhih la a phih sak vetih khokhom neh a cawt ni.
Isaiah11:16 Egypt kho lamkah a caeh hnin vaengah Israel ham a om pah van bangla Assyria lamkah a caknoi a pilnam aka sueng ham longpuei a om pah ni.
Isaiah12:1 Tekah khohnin ah
Isaiah12:2 Kamah kah khangnah Khohni te ka pangtung vetih ka sarhi ham khaw ka birhih mahpawh. BOEIPA YAHWEH laa he khaw kai ham khangnah la om
Isaiah12:3 Khangnah tuisih lamkah omngaihnah neh tui na than uh van bitni.
Isaiah12:4 Tekah khohnin ah
Isaiah12:5 Rhimomnah a saii te diklai pum loh a ming coeng dongah BOEIPA te tingtoeng uh lah.
Isaiah12:6 Israel kah Hlangcim te na lakli ah a tanglue coeng dongah Zion nu rhoek loh hlampan uh lamtah tamhoe uh laeh
Isaiah13:1 Amoz capa Isaiah loh Babylon kah olrhuh te a hmuh coeng.
Isaiah13:2 Tlang aka tlaai soah rholik thoh uh lah. Amih te ol huel thil uh lamtah kut hlaek pa uh. Te daengah ni hlangcong thohka la a pawk uh eh.
Isaiah13:3 Kamah kah ka ciim rhoek te kamah loh ka uen coeng. Ka hoemnah dongah aka yalpo ka hlangrhalh rhoek te ka thintoek ham rhung la ka khue bal.
Isaiah13:4 Tlang sokah hlangping ol tah pilnam mueiloh
Isaiah13:5 BOEIPA tah diklai pum he laikoi hamla khohla bangsang kho lamkah neh vaan khobawt lamloh amah kah kosi tubael neh ha pawk uh coeng.
Isaiah13:6 BOEIPA kah khohnin loh yoei coeng tih rhung uh laeh. Tlungthang taeng lamkah rhoelrhanah la ha pawk ni.
Isaiah13:7 Te dongah kut aka om khaw boeih kha vetih hlanghing kah thinko khaw boeih paci ni.
Isaiah13:8 Thohrhui khaw let vetih rhuihet aka tu ca-om bangla khaem uh ni. Amih maelhmai te hmaihluei la om vetih hlang loh amah hui te khaw maelhmai a hmaang uh thae ni.
Isaiah13:9 BOEIPA kah khohnin tah a thinpom neh muenying muenyang la ha pawk coeng ke. Khohmuen te imsuep la khueh ham thintoek thinsa neh ha pawk tih a khuikah hlangtholh rhoek te a mitmoeng sak pawn ni.
Isaiah13:10 Vaan kah aisi neh amih kah buhol long khaw a aa thangthen mahpawh. Khomik khaw a thoeng vaengah hmuep vetih hla long khaw a vangnah neh tue voel mahpawh.
Isaiah13:11 Lunglai dongkah boethae neh halang rhoek kah thaesainah te khaw ka cawh ni. Thinlen kah hoemdamnah te ka paa sak vetih
Isaiah13:12 Hlanghing he suicilh lakah
Isaiah13:13 Te dongah vaan te ka tlai sak vetih caempuei BOEIPA kah a thinpom neh amah kah thintoek thinsa khohnin ah tah diklai te a hmuen lamloh hinghuen ni.
Isaiah13:14 Te vaengah a heh uh kirhang neh boiva bangla om ni. Hlang loh a pilnam te a coi uh kolla mael uh vetih amah kho la rhip rhaelrham uh ni.
Isaiah13:15 A hmuh carhui a thun vetih a khoengvoep nah la cunghang neh boeih a cungku sak ni.
Isaiah13:16 Amih kah a ca rhoek te a mikhmuh ah a til pa ni. A im te a reth pa uh vetih a yuu rhoek taengah a yalh rhoe a yalh pa uh ni.
Isaiah13:17 Amih taengah kamah loh tangka aka moeh pawt tih sui aka ngaih pawh Madai te ka haeng pah coeng he.
Isaiah13:18 Camoe rhoek te liva neh a taam uh vetih bungko thaihtae te khaw haidam uh mahpawh. A ca rhoek te amih kah mik loh rhen uh mahpawh.
Isaiah13:19 Ram tom kah kirhang neh Khalden kah hoemdamnah a boei a mang
Isaiah13:20 Babylon te a yoeyah la om pawt vetih thawnpuei phoeikah cadilcahma duela om mahpawh. Te vaengah Arab khaw puen uh pawt vetih boiva aka dawn khaw te ah te kol uh mahpawh.
Isaiah13:21 Te vaengah kohong loh pahoi a kol thil vetih a im ah huiha loh bae ni. Tuirhuk vanu loh hnap a rhaeh thil vetih sathai loh a cungpet thil ni.
Isaiah13:22 A lohnong ah sa-ui kuk vetih a bawkim ah pongui loh pangdoknah a khueh ni. A tue ha pawk ham yoei coeng tih a khohnin tah koe voel mahpawh.
Isaiah14:1 BOEIPA loh Jakob te a haidam vetih Israel te koep a coelh ni. Amih te amah khohmuen ah a khueh vetih yinlai loh amih taengah naep ni. Te vaengah yinlai khaw Jakob imkhui la thawth uh ni.
Isaiah14:2 Amih te pilnam loh a khuen vetih amah hmuen la a thak ni. BOEIPA kah khohmuen ah amih te Israel imkhui kah salnu neh salpa la a pang uh ni. Te vaengah amih kah a sol te a hlang sol a khueh uh vetih amih aka tueihno rhoek te a taemrhai uh ni.
Isaiah14:3 Na tloh khui lamloh
Isaiah14:4 Te vaengah Babylon manghai taengah thuidoeknah he na khuen vetih
Isaiah14:5 BOEIPA loh halang kah conghol neh boei kah mancai khaw a khaem pah coeng.
Isaiah14:6 Hmasoe kah a thinpom neh pilnam a ngawn. Koeknah pawt khaw
Isaiah14:7 Duem aka mong diklai pum khaw tamlung neh rhong uh coeng.
Isaiah14:8 Hmaical loh nang te n'kokhah thil tih na yalh vaeng lamkah long ni Lebanon lamphai loh
Isaiah14:9 Saelkhui te nang doe hamla ha pawk vaengah nang ham te a laedil ah tlai coeng. Diklai kikong boeih kah sairhai te nang hamla a haeng coeng tih namtom manghai boeih te a ngolkhoel lamloh a thoh sak.
Isaiah14:10 Amih te boeih a doo uh vetih nang taengah
Isaiah14:11 Na hoemdamnah na thangpa ol te
Isaiah14:12 Yaoe thuipa khaw vaan lamloh na cungku mai tih khothaih capa khaw diklai la m'vung tih namtom taengah aka rhaa uh mai.
Isaiah14:13 Nang khaw na thinko ah
Isaiah14:14 Hmuensang khomai dongah ka cet vetih Khohnite ka puet eh
Isaiah14:15 Tedae tangrhom laedil kah saelkhui la na suntla coeng.
Isaiah14:16 Nang aka hmu rhoek loh namah te m'hmaitang uh. Nang kawng te
Isaiah14:17 Lunglai te khosoek la aka khueh tih khopuei khaw a koengloeng. A thongtla te im la hlah pawh
Isaiah14:18 Namtom manghai boeih khaw a thangpomnah neh a im ah a pum la rhip yalh uh.
Isaiah14:19 Tedae nang te thingpae bangla na phuel lamloh m'voeih. cunghang neh a thun tih a ngawn kah pueinak bangla n'tuei coeng. Lungto tangrhom khuila aka suntla rhok bangla n'suntlae coeng.
Isaiah14:20 Na khohmuen kah na pilnam te na phae tih na ngawn coeng dongah phuel ah khaw amih te pitpom sak mahpawh. Thaehuet rhoek kah tiingan tah kumhal duela thoel boel saeh.
Isaiah14:21 Amih te thoo mahpawt nim
Isaiah14:22 Amih voelah caempuei BOEIPA kah olphong te ka thoh puei vetih Babylon ming neh a ca aka sueng te khaw
Isaiah14:23 Khopuei te kharhoeng hut neh tuibap tui la ka khueh ni. Lungtang neh ka nawt vetih ka mitmoeng sak ni. Caempuei BOEIPA kah olphong coeng ni he.
Isaiah14:24 caempuei BOEIPA loh a toemngam tih
Isaiah14:25 Ka khohmuen kah Assyria khaem hamla ka tlang dongah ka suntlae ni. Te vaengah amih lamkah a hnamkun te a dul vetih a laengpang dong lamkah a hnorhih a hal ni.
Isaiah14:26 Hekah cilsuep he diklai pum ham ni a poek tih kut he khaw namtom rhoek boeih a thueng thil coeng.
Isaiah14:27 caempuei BOEIPA loh a uen coeng dongah u long a phae voel. A kut te a thueng coeng dongah u long a yueh thai voel.
Isaiah14:28 Manghai Ahaz a dueknah kum ah hekah olrhuh he ha pawk.
Isaiah14:29 Nang aka ngawn mancai a tlawt te Philistia nang loh boeih kokhahnah boeh. Rhul a yung te rhulthae la thoeng vetih a thaih te aka ding minyuk la poeh ni.
Isaiah14:30 Tattloel rhoek kah caming rhoek te luem uh vetih khodaeng rhoek khaw ngaikhuek la kol uh ni. Tedae na yung te khokha neh ka duek sak vetih na a meet te a ngawn ni.
Isaiah14:31 Vongka nang rhung laeh. Khopuei nang pang laeh. Tlangpuei lamkah hmaikhu ha thoeng tih a caempa khuiah a pangoe pawt dongah Philistia nang tah boeih paci coeng.
Isaiah14:32 BOEIPA loh Zion a suen tih a khuiah a pilnam mangdaeng a ying ham te namtom puencawn loh metlam a doo eh.
Isaiah15:1 Moab Ar a rhoelrhak hlaem kah Moab olrhuh. Hlaempang pakhat ah a rhoelrhak tih hmata coeng. Kirmoab tah hmata coeng.
Isaiah15:2 Nebo so neh Moab Medeba soah a rhahnah la Dibon hmuensang im te a paan tih rhung. A lu khaw boeih lungawng tih a hmuimul boeih tlong.
Isaiah15:3 A kawtpoeng ah tlamhni a bai uh tih
Isaiah15:4 Heshbon neh Elealeh pang tih a ol te Jahaz duela a yaak. Te dongah Moab kah aka pumcum rhoek tah a hinglu a yuhui pah tih a khuiah pae coeng.
Isaiah15:5 Ka lungbuei he Moab hamla neh anih kah Zoar duela yingyetnah vaito ham khaw pang coeng. Luhith kham te a rhah doeah luei tih a kungkueng kah Horonaim longpuei khaw pocinah pang ol loh a haenghang.
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim tui khaw rhaerhap la om tih sulrham khaw rhae coeng
Isaiah15:7 Te dongah koeva a dang neh a cawhnah te soklong tuirhi kung la a phueih uh.
Isaiah15:8 Moab khorhi te a pang loh a vael. A rhungol te Eglaim duela
Isaiah15:9 Dimon tui khaw thii baetawt. Tedae Dimon te Moab rhalyong neh ka koei thil vetih khohmuen kah a meet ham sathueng ka khuen pah ni.
Isaiah16:1 Khohmuen aka hung tuca te Sela khosoek lamloh Zion nu kah tlang duela thak uh laeh.
Isaiah16:2 Anih tah a bu a hno tih aka poeng vaa bangla om tih Arnon lamkai kah Moab nu rhoek khaw te tlam te om uh.
Isaiah16:3 cilsuep khaw pae rhoela pae uh. Oltloeknah saii uh. Khothun lung kah na mueihlip te khoyin bangla khueh laeh. A yong vaengah a heh rhoek te thuh lamtah phoe boeh.
Isaiah16:4 Ka heh Moab te namah taengah bakuep saeh. Aka rhoelrhak kah mikhmuh lamloh amih hlipyingnah om saeh. Hlangphaep khaw khawk van ni. rhoelrhanah khaw khum bitni. Hlang aka taelh khaw diklai lamloh cing ni.
Isaiah16:5 Ngolkhoel te sitlohnah neh a cikngae sak ve tih
Isaiah16:6 Moab kah hoemdamnah tah a poikuk la
Isaiah16:7 Te tangloeng ni Moab loh amah Moab pum ham a rhung te. Kirhareseth rhae te a rhung thil tih aka rhawp yungyi ham na caitawk thil.
Isaiah16:8 Heshbon lohmali kah Sibam misur tah huum coeng tih
Isaiah16:9 Te dongah ni Jazer kah a rhah bangla Sibam misur te ka rhah tangkhuet. Heshbon neh Elealeh nang te ka mikphi neh hmilhmal sak. Nang kah khohal neh na cangah kah tamlung khaw paa coeng.
Isaiah16:10 Cangthai dong lamkah kohoenah neh omngaihnah khaw khum coeng. Misurdum ah khaw tamhoe voel pawh. Misurtui te yuhui thil voel pawh. Va-am te a mael khaw a mael thil voel pawt dongah tamlung khaw ka bawt sak coeng.
Isaiah16:11 Te dongah ka ko ah Moab ham rhotoeng bangla
Isaiah16:12 Moab kah a ngak a phoe pah khaw om bitni. Thangthui hamla hmuensang kah a rhokso te a paan vaengah coeng thai mahpawh.
Isaiah16:13 Hekah ol he BOEIPA loh hlamat ah ni Moab ham a thui coeng.
Isaiah16:14 Tahae BOEIPA loh koep a thui tih
Isaiah17:1 Damasku kah olrhuh
Isaiah17:2 Aroer khopuei a hnoo uh te tuping ham a om pah vetih a kol thil vaengah hawt mahpawh.
Isaiah17:3 Ephraim lamkah hmuencak neh Damasku lamkah ram khaw kangkuen ni. Aram aka sueng te Israel ca rhoek kah thangpomnah la om ni. caempuei BOEIPA kah olphong coeng ni.
Isaiah17:4 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah Jakob kah thangpomnah tlayae vetih a pum a putsut te khaw yawih ni.
Isaiah17:5 Cangat loh canghli lamkah a coi tih a ban ah cangvuei a pawn vaengkah bangla om ni. Rapha kol kah cangmo aka yoep bangla om bal ni.
Isaiah17:6 Tedae olive a hlinghloek vaengah soi thaih dong panit pathum neh a thairhah dongkah pali panga a om banghui la aka yoep rhoek te om ni. Israel Pathen Yahovah kah olphong coeng ni.
Isaiah17:7 Tekah khohnin ah tah hlang loh amah aka saii te a uem vetih a mik loh Isreal kah aka Cim te a hmuh ni.
Isaiah17:8 A kut saii hmueihtuk te uem voel pawt vetih
Isaiah17:9 Te khohnin ah a lunghim khopuei te thingkho a hnoo bangla a om pah ni. Israel ca rhoek mikhmuh lamloh a hnoo uh moldong te khaw khopong la poeh ni.
Isaiah17:10 Namah kah daemnah Pathen te na hnilh tih
Isaiah17:11 Na thinghloe te hnin at dongah na hlul sak dae mincang kah na cangtii te pahoi a cuen sak dae cang som a kha hnin ah thakkhoeihnah nen ni a rhawp.
Isaiah17:12 Anunae pilnam tah tuipuei kah hue a sak bangla muep hlangping uh tih
Isaiah17:13 Namtu rhoek tui yet kah longlonah bangla a phul vaengah amah te a tluung tih khohla bangsang la rhaelrham. Hli toe tlang kah cangkik bangla a hloem tih humhae neh cangpalam bangla tinghil sut.
Isaiah17:14 Kholaeh tue vaengah mueirhih loh mincang due anih khueh voel mahpawh ke. Mamih a rheth kah hamsum neh mamih aka poelyoe kah hmulung tah he coeng ni.
Isaiah18:1 Anunae Kusah tuiva rhalvangan kah tungrhit phae khohmuen aih.
Isaiah18:2 Laipai rhoek te tuipuei longkah tui soah paan neh aka tueih. Puencawn aw
Isaiah18:3 Lunglai dongkah aka om boeih neh diklai khosa rhoek loh tlang kah rholik a tai vaengah na hmuh uh vetih tuki a ueng vaengah na yaak uh bitni.
Isaiah18:4 Te dongah BOEIPA loh kai taengah
Isaiah18:5 Cangah tomlael daengla boeih a pailum dongah thaihkang khaw a hmin la poeh. Rhaipai neh a dawn te vin neh a baih ni. A baek te khaw a hlaek vetih a saih ni.
Isaiah18:6 Tlang kah vatlung ham neh lan kah rhamsa ham rhenten a hnoo pa uh ni. Anih te vatlung loh a poelyoe vetih diklai rhamsa boeih a soek ni.
Isaiah18:7 Te tue vaengah tah caempuei BOEIPA taengah kutdoe a khuen ni. Aka cangdoek neh a sa aka thool pilnam neh heben hebang lamkah aka rhih pilnam
Isaiah19:1 Egypt kah olrhuh
Isaiah19:2 Egypt te Egypt neh ka et thil vetih hlang long he a manuca khaw
Isaiah19:3 Egypt kah a mueihla tah a khui ah hoep vetih a cilsuep ka hmaang sak ni. Te vaengah te mueirhol taengla
Isaiah19:4 Egypt te mangkhak boei rhoek kut ah ka det vetih amih te manghai aka tlung loh a ngol thil ni. Caempuei Yahovah Boeipa kah olphong coeng ni.
Isaiah19:5 Tuipuei tui khaw kak ni. Tuiva khaw rhaeng vetih haang ni.
Isaiah19:6 Tuiva te khaw pam vetih bawn ni. Egypt capu sokko te kak vetih carhaek khaw tloih ni.
Isaiah19:7 Sokko neh sokko hmoi kah sulhing neh sokko mutue boeih khaw rhae ni. Cuhu vetih om voel mahpawh.
Isaiah19:8 Tuihoi rhoek te huei uh vetih sokko ah vaih aka voei
Isaiah19:9 Hlamik a yawt neh aka thotat tih
Isaiah19:10 A rhungsut te tlawt vetih
Isaiah19:11 Zoan mangpa rhoek khaw ang uh tangkik coeng tih Pharaoh kah olrhoep hlangcueih rhoek kah cilsuep khaw a dom coeng. Pharaoh te metlamlae
Isaiah19:12 Nang kah hlangcueih rhoek te maelae me? Nang taengah ha puen uh laeh vetih caemgpuei Yahovah loh Egypt a caai thil te a ming uh laeh mako.
Isaiah19:13 Zoan mangpa rhoek te nga uh tih Noph mangpa rhoek khaw rhaithi uh thae. Egypt nim te amah koca rhoek te a cong cong ah kho a hmang uh coeng.
Isaiah19:14 BOEIPA loh a khui ah lungbuei lukil hnaven neh a thoek tih kho a hmang uh coeng. Egypt loh amah khoboe cungkuem dongah khohmang bangla a lok neh rhui uh.
Isaiah19:15 A lu neh a mai khaw
Isaiah19:16 Tekah khohnin ah tah Egypt khaw huta bangla om vetih lakueng ni. Te vaengah anih a thueng thil caempuei BOEIPA kah kut thueng hmai ah birhih pueng ni.
Isaiah19:17 Judah khohmuen te Egypt taengah birhihkuihut la om ni. Anih a phoei carhui te khaw a taengah birhih ni. caempuei BOEIPA kah cilsuep loh anih a uen coeng.
Isaiah19:18 Tekah khohnin ah Egypt kho ah Kanaan ol la aka cal khopuei panga om ni. Te vaengah caempuei BOEIPA taengla ol aka caeng khopuei pakhat te tah koengloengnah khopuei a ti ni.
Isaiah19:19 Tekah khohnin ah Yahovah kah hmueihtuk te Egypt khohmuen kah a laklung ah
Isaiah19:20 Egypt khohmuen ah caempuei BOEIPA kah miknoek neh laipai la om ni. Aka nen kah mikhmuh ah BOEIPA taengla a pang uh vaengah amih aka khang tih aka tungaep ham te a tueih pah vetih amih te huul ni.
Isaiah19:21 BOEIPA loh Egypt te a tukkil vetih Egypt loh BOEIPA te a ming uh ni. Te khohnin ah hmueih neh khocang neh tho a thueng uh. Te vaengah BOEIPA taengah olcaeng neh a caeng uh vetih a thuung uh ni.
Isaiah19:22 BOEIPA loh Egypt te a yawk sak ni. A yawk sak tih a hoeih daengah ni BOEIPA taengla a mael uh eh. Amih a thangthui uh vaengah amih te a hoeih sak ni.
Isaiah19:23 Te khohnin ah Egypt lamloh Assyria duela longpuei om. Assyria te Egypt la
Isaiah19:24 Te khohnin ah Israel te a pathum la Egypt neh Assyria taengah diklai laklung kah yoethennah neh om van ni.

Isaiah21:1 Tuithim ah khosoek lamloh cangpalam bangla tinghil tih

Isaiah21:3 Te dongah ka cinghen he tloh kah a thueknah khaw cung coeng. Ca om vaengkah a tloh bangla kai n'tuuk. Ka yaak nen khaw ka paihaeh tih ka hmuh nawn khaw ka let coeng.
Isaiah21:4 Tuennah loh kai n'let sak tih ka thinko ah kho a hmang. Ka huengaihnah hlaemhmah te kai ham tah thuennah la poeh.

Isaiah22:1 Kolrhawk ham olrhuh
Isaiah22:2 Pang ol loh khopuei ah a bae la khorha te hue a sak thil. Na rhok neh aka yalpo te cunghang kah a ngawn pawt tih caemtloek kah a duek sak moenih a?
Isaiah22:3 Na rhalboei rhoek te lii om kolla rhenten boeih yong uh coeng. Nang aka hmu rhoek te boeih a khih uh coeng. Khohla kah aka yong rhoek te rhenten a khih uh coeng.
Isaiah22:4 Te dongah
Isaiah22:5 Ka Boeipa caempuei Yahovah taengkah soekloeknah
Isaiah22:6 Elam loh liva neh marhang caem hlang leng hang khuen tih Kir loh photling a dul. Kira rhoel loh photling amuk uh.
Isaiah22:7 Na tuikol hmuennaep aka om khaw leng loh a baetawt thil marhang caem loh vongka ah tawn la tawn uh coeng.
Isaiah22:8 Judah kah himbaiyan te a lim coeng. Tekah khohnin ah duup im kah lungpok haica te na paelki coeng.
Isaiah22:9 David khopuei kah a ueth hma na hmuh te yet coeng dae tuibuem dang kah tui te na coi.
Isaiah22:10 Jerusalem kah im te khaw na tae uh tih vongtung na tuung ham im te na phil uh.
Isaiah22:11 Tuibuem rhuem kah tui ham te vongtung laklo ah tui-im na saii uh. Tedae te aka saii te na paelki uh pawh. Te aka hlinsai daengrhae te na hmu uh pawh.
Isaiah22:12 Rhah ham neh rhaengsae ham khaw
Isaiah22:13 Saelhung top ham neh boiva ngawn ham
Isaiah22:14 caempuei BOEIPA loh ka hna dongah han dueh coeng. Nangmih kah thaesainah he na duek uh duela han dawth mahpawh. Ka Boeipa caempuei Yahovah a thui coeng.
Isaiah22:15 Ka Boeipa caempuei Yahovah he ni a thui. Cet lamtah im kah hmaiben lah Shebna te paan laeh.
Isaiah22:16 Nang taengkah he balae? Na taengkah he u bang nim? Namah ham tah he ah he phuel na vueh tih
Isaiah22:17 BOEIPA tah nang aka hut tih hlang aka hlak neh nang aka buem la aka buem ham om coeng.
Isaiah22:18 Nang te palung hluem bangla n'kolong la
Isaiah22:19 Nang te na rhaltawt hmuen lamloh kan thaek vetih na ngolhmuen lamloh nang kan koengloeng ni.
Isaiah22:20 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah Hilkiah capa Eliakim te ka sal la ka khue ni.
Isaiah22:21 Na angkidung te anih ka bai sak vetih na lamko neh anih ka talong ni. Na khohung te anih kut dongah ka paek vetih Jerusalem kah khosa ham neh Judah imkhui kah a napa la om ni.
Isaiah22:22 David im kah cabi te anih kah laengpang dongah ka paek ni. A ong vetih kalh voel mahpawh
Isaiah22:23 Anih te hmuen cak ah ciphuem neh ka khing vetih a napa im ham thangpomnah ngolkhoel la om ni.
Isaiah22:24 A napa im kah thangpomnah boeih
Isaiah22:25 Te khohnin ah caempuei BOEIPA kah olphong loh
Isaiah23:1 Tyre olrhuh
Isaiah23:2 Sanglak kah khosa rhoek te kuemsuem saeh. Tuipuei aka hlaikan Sidon thimpom loh nang n'cung sak coeng.
Isaiah23:3 Shihor cangti neh sokko cangvuei kah a cangthaih tah tui len soah namtom kah a thimpom la poeh coeng.
Isaiah23:4 Tuipuei lunghim loh tuipuei te a voek tih
Isaiah23:5 Egypt taengkah olthang vanbangla Tyre olthang long khaw a thuek uh.
Isaiah23:6 Tarshish la hlaikan uh laeh
Isaiah23:7 Hlamat kum lamloh mah hmuen la he tlam a na yalpo uh? Khohla la bakuep ham a khokan te a khuen uh.
Isaiah23:8 Tyre aka uen he unim? A thimpom aka khuem sak tih diklai aka thangpom Kanaan mangpa rhoek te ta?
Isaiah23:9 Hoemdamnah poeih pah ham
Isaiah23:10 Na khohmuen kah aka pam sokko bangla Tarshish nu kah haikang om voel pawh.
Isaiah23:11 A kut te tuipuei soah a thueng tih ram khaw a tlai sak. A lunghim te milh sak hamla BOEIPA loh Kanaan te a uen.
Isaiah23:12 Te vaengah
Isaiah23:13 Khalden khohmuen aih ke
Isaiah23:14 Na lunghim a rhoelrhak coeng dongah Tarshish sangpho rhoek aw rhung laeh.
Isaiah23:15 Tekah khohnin ah tah Tyre aka hmaai khaw kum sawmrhih khuiah manghai pakhat kah a tue vaengkah bangla om ni. Kum sawmrhih a thok vaengah tah Tyre taengah pumyoi laa la a poeh pah ni.
Isaiah23:16 Rhotoeng te khuen lamtah a pumyoi khopuei te hil laeh. A hnilh tangtae te tluep tluep tum pah lamtah laa khaw lum saeh. Te daengah ni na poek thai eh.
Isaiah23:17 Kum sawmrhih kah a bawtnah a pha vaengah BOEIPA loh Tyre te a hip ni. Te vaengah a paang te a mael pah vetih diklai hman kah diklai ram rhoek khaw boeih cukhalh uh ni.
Isaiah23:18 Tedae a thimpom neh a paang te BOEIPA ham a cim la om ni. Te vaengah kael pawt vetih tuung bal mahpawh. Te cakhaw BOEIPA mikhmuh kah khosa rhoek ham tah dakda then a cungnah hil a caak te a thimpomnah la om ni.
Isaiah24:1 BOEIPA loh diklai a hlaih tih a pong sak coeng ke. Te dongah a maelhmai a paihaeh sak vetih khosa rhoek khaw a taekyak pah ni.
Isaiah24:2 Te vaengah khosoih taengah khaw pilnam taengkah bangla
Isaiah24:3 Diklai he a hlaih
Isaiah24:4 Diklai khaw nguekcoi neh tahah
Isaiah24:5 Diklai he a khuikah khosa rhoek kongah poeih uh coeng. Olkhueng te a poe uh
Isaiah24:6 Te dongah thaephoeinah loh diklai a yoop tih a khuikah khosa rhoek khaw boe uh coeng. Te dongah diklai khosa rhoek tah sai uh tih hlanghing khaw a yolkai ni a sueng coeng.
Isaiah24:7 misur thai khaw nguekcoi tih misur kung huum
Isaiah24:8 Kamrhing kah omthennah khaw paa
Isaiah24:9 Laa te khaw misur neh yun uh voel pawh. A ok ham yu te khaw paeng coeng.
Isaiah24:10 Pawmpam khorha tah po tih kun thil ham im khaw boeih a khaih.
Isaiah24:11 Misurtui ham te kawtpoeng tom ah henah om
Isaiah24:12 Khopuei ah imsuep te a hlun tih vongka te a bungnah la a top.
Isaiah24:13 Te dongah diklai laklo ah khaw
Isaiah24:14 Amih te a ol a huel uh tih BOEIPA kah hoemdamnah te a tamhoe puei uh. Te vaengah tuipuei lamkah khaw a hlampan puei uh.
Isaiah24:15 Te dongah BOEIPA tah hmaipuei dongah
Isaiah24:16 Diklai khobawt lamkah kirhang hlangdueng laa te n'yaak uh coeng. Tedae
Isaiah24:17 Birhihnah neh rhom khaw
Isaiah24:18 Birhihnah ol ah rhaelrham vetih rhom ah aka cungku khaw om ni. Rhom khui lamkah aka coe khaw pael neh a boh ni. Hmuensang lamkah bangbuet khaw ong uh tih diklai khaw a yung a hoep.
Isaiah24:19 Diklai khaw thae la thae coeng. Diklai he rhek la rhek coeng. Diklai he tuen la tuen coeng.
Isaiah24:20 Diklai he yurhui bangla vikvuek la vikvuek uh tih tlak bangla rhaehba sut. A boekoek loh amah a nan tih a cungku vaengah koep thoo mahpawh.
Isaiah24:21 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah BOEIPA loh hmuensang kah hmuensang caempuei te khaw rhoek khaw
Isaiah24:22 Tangrhom khuikah hlongkhoh te hlop at la a coi uh vetih rhomhmop ah a khoh uh ni. Tedae khohnin muep a koe phoeiah ni a cawh eh.
Isaiah24:23 Hla khaw a maelhmai tal vetih kholing khaw yaai ni. Zion tlang sokah Jerusalem neh amah kah thangpomnah te patong rhoek hmaiah caempuei BOEIPA te manghai ni.
Isaiah25:1 YAHWEH namah ni ka Pathen. Namah te kan pomsang vetih na ming ni ka uem eh. Hlamat lamloh oltak uepomnah neh na cilsuep te khobaerhambae la na saii coeng.
Isaiah25:2 Khopuei te khaw lungkuk la
Isaiah25:3 Te dongah namtom khorha kah hlangtlung pilnam loh nang n'thangpom uh vetih hlanghaeng rhoek loh nang n'rhih uh ni.
Isaiah25:4 Tattloel ham lunghim la
Isaiah25:5 Rhamrhae kah kholing bangla
Isaiah25:6 caempuei BOEIPA loh pilnam pum ham situi neh buhkoknah
Isaiah25:7 Pilnam cungkuem soah maelhmai khuprhup aka cun neh namtom cungkuem soah mueihlawn aka khuk tah
Isaiah25:8 Dueknah loh a yoeyah la a yoop ni. Maelhmai tom kah mikphi te
Isaiah25:9 Tekah khohnin ah tah
Isaiah25:10 Hekah tlang soah BOEIPA kah kut loh a om thil ni. Tedae aeknaeng tui dongkah cangkong a til bangla Moab te a hmuila a til ni.
Isaiah25:11 Tui aka ya loh tuiya ham a phuel uh bangla a laklung ah a kut a phuel vetih a boeimang neh a kut dongkah kutrham te khaw a kunyun pah ni.
Isaiah25:12 Na imsang hmuencak vongtung te a kunyun sak vetih diklai laipi a ben duela a ngam sak ni.
Isaiah26:1 Tekah khohnin ah tah Judah kho ah hekah laa he a sak ni. “Mamih ham sarhi la aka tak khopuei
Isaiah26:2 Vongka rhoek ong uh lamtah oltak aka ngaithuen namtu loh a dueng la kun van saeh.
Isaiah26:3 Benbonah aka talong tih namah dongah aka pangtung kah rhoepnah ngaimongnah tah na kueinah ni.
Isaiah26:4 BOEIPA dongah a yoeyah la pangtung lah. BOEIPA YAHWEH dongah kumhal lungpang a om.
Isaiah26:5 Hmuensang khorha kah khosa khaw a ngam sak. Aka pomdoep uh te khaw diklai ah a kunyun
Isaiah26:6 Te vaengah mangdaeng kah a kho
Isaiah26:7 Aka dueng kah caehlong tah vanat tih aka thuem kah namtlak te a dueng la na saelh pah.
Isaiah26:8 BOEIPA namah kah caehlong tah tiktam pai
Isaiah26:9 Ka hinglu neh khoyin ah nang kan ngaidam. Ka khui kah ka mueihla long khaw nang kan toem. Diklai hman kah na laitloeknah vanbangla lunglai dongkah khosa rhoek loh duengnah a cang uh.
Isaiah26:10 Halang te rhen mai cakhaw khohmuen kah duengnah khaw a cang moenih. Oldueng a phayoe sak tih BOEIPA kah rhimomnah te hmu pawh.
Isaiah26:11 BOEIPA nang kah kut thueng te hmu uh pawh. Pilnam kah thatlainah loh hmu saeh lamtah yahpok kolo saeh. Na rhal rhoek kah hmai long khaw amih te hlawp nawn saeh.
Isaiah26:12 BOEIPA aw
Isaiah26:13 Kaimih kah Pathen BOEIPA nang voelkah boei rhoek loh kaimih n'rhukom thil. Na ming neh namah bueng ni kam poek uh.
Isaiah26:14 Aka duek rhoek te hing uh pawt tih sairhai he khaw thoo uh noek pawh. Te dongah amih te na hip tih na milh sak. Te vaengah amih poekkoepnah khaw boeih na paltham sak.
Isaiah26:15 Namtom te na thap coeng. BOEIPA namah loh na thap namtom loh namah n'thangpom coeng tih diklai khobawt khaw boeih na lakhla sak.
Isaiah26:16 Rhal lakli ah khaw BOEIPA namah te ng'hip uh tih amih te na thuituennah neh na calthai loh a kilh.
Isaiah26:17 Aka vawn loh loh camoe om ham a tawn uh bangla
Isaiah26:18 Ka vawn uh tih pumrih uh dae khohli ni ka cun uh. Diklai ah khangnah khaw n'saii uh pawt tih lunglai kah khosa khaw cungku uh hae pawh.
Isaiah26:19 Namah ah aka duek rhoek tah hing uh ni. Ka rhok he khaw thoo ni. Laipi dongkah khosa rhoek khaw haenghang vetih tamhoe ni. Namah kah buemtui khosae buemtui bangla diklai long he sairhai rhoek te a cungku sak ni.
Isaiah26:20 Ka pilnam aw cet lamtah namah imkhui la kun laeh. Na thohkhaih te khai laeh. Kosi a poeng la a poeng hil tah mikhaptok ca khaw na hnuk longah bet thuhdae.
Isaiah26:21 Diklai khosa rhoek kah thaesainah te cawh hamla amah hmuen lamloh BOEIPA ha pawk coeng ke. Te vaengah a sokah thii te diklai loh a phoe vetih a pum dongkah a ngawn uh te khaw phah voel mahpawh.
Isaiah27:1 Tekah khohnin ah tah BOEIPA loh a cunghang aka ning tih aka len neh aka tlungluen neh Leviathan rhul aka yingyet khaw
Isaiah27:2 Tekah khohnin ah tah naidoeh misurdum te doo laeh.
Isaiah27:3 BOEIPA kamah loh te ka kueinah tih mikhaptok ah ka suep. Te te khoyin loh cawh ve ka ti dongah khothaih ah kah ka kueinah.
Isaiah27:4 Kosi he kai taengah om pawh. Caemtloek vaengkah lota hling kai taengah aka pae te unim? Te te cuk thil vetih rhenten ka hlup mako.
Isaiah27:5 Te cakhaw ka lunghim te hangdang thil saeh lamtah kamah taengah rhoepnah saii saeh
Isaiah27:6 A yung a hlak tue a pha vaengah Jakob te khooi ni. Te vaengah Israel khaw saihnim vetih a thaih loh lunglai ah baetawt ni.
Isaiah27:7 Hmasoe banglam nim anih te a boh khaw a boh aih? Ngawnnah banglam nim a ngawn khaw a ngawn aih.
Isaiah27:8 A rhimong la tueih ham na mah coeng. A hil neh khothaih kanghawn bangla khak a haek.
Isaiah27:9 Te dongah he nen ni Jakob kah thaesainah a dawth pah vetih a tholh kah a thaih boeih he a khoe pa eh. Te vaengah hmueihtuk kah lungto boeih te lungbok lung bangla a khueh ni. Asherah neh bunglawn a dae pah vetih te thoo voel mahpawh.
Isaiah27:10 Khopuei cakrhuet tolkhoeng bueng te a hlah tih
Isaiah27:11 A vuei aka rhae he a khaem uh. Huta ha pawk vaengah te a tok uh dae pilnam kah yakmingnah om pawh. Te dongah anih aka saii loh anih a haidam tih anih aka saii loh anih te rhen pawh.
Isaiah27:12 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah tuiva lamloh Egypt soklong duela cangmo te BOEIPA loh a boh ni. Nangmih Israel ca rhoek te pakhat phoeiah pakhat n'yoep ni.
Isaiah27:13 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah tuki a len te a ueng vetih Assyria khohmuen ah aka milh khaw ha pawk uh ni. Egypt kho kah a heh rhoek loh Jerusalem kah tlang cim dongah BOEIPA a bawk uh ni.

Isaiah28:3 Ephraim yurhui kah rhimomnah rhuisam te a kho hmuiah a taelh uh ni.
Isaiah28:4 Laimen kolrhawk lu kah a boeimang kirhang rhaipai bangla aka hoo te khohal hlan kah thaihloe bangla om ni. Te te aka hmuh la aka hmuh dongah a kut nen khaw pahoi a dolh.

Isaiah28:20 Khawk sak hamla thingkong te a rhaem pah tih
