Isaiah28:22 Hmuiyoi voel boeh
Isaiah28:23 Ka ol he hnakaeng lamtah ya uh lah
Isaiah28:24 Lotawn ham lo aka yoe loh hnin takuem a yoe a? A khohmuen te a yawt tih a thoe ta.
Isaiah28:25 A hman te a hnil moenih a? Tlangsungsing a phul tih sungsing khaw a haeh. Cang te a kok dongah a phung tih a rhibawn ah cangtun neh cangkuem a duen ta.
Isaiah28:26 Anih te a toel vaengah a Pathen kah tiktamnah te a taengah a thuinuet pah.
Isaiah28:27 Tlangsungsing te thingphael neh a boh tih sungsing te leng kho neh a kuelh thil moenih. Tedae tlangsungsing te caitueng neh
Isaiah28:28 Buh khaw tip coeng dae a yoeyah la nook mahpawh. Te te a boh vaengah a leng kho neh a khawkkhek thil moenih. A marhang caem neh a tip sak moenih.
Isaiah28:29 He khaw caempuei BOEIPA taeng lamkah ni. Amah kah cilsuep tah khobaerhambae la ha pawk tih a lungming cueihnah a pantai sak.
Isaiah29:1 Anunae Ariel
Isaiah29:2 Ariel te ka kilh vetih rhahdueknah neh ngueknah om bitni. Te vaengah hmueihtuk la ka taengah om ni.
Isaiah29:3 Nang te kaluek la kang rhaeh thil vetih nang taengah laivung kan lun ni. Te phoeiah nang taengah kasam ka too ni.
Isaiah29:4 Na kunyun vaengah diklai lamloh m'voek vetih na olthui loh laipi lamkah n'rhuepthuep sak ni. Te vaengah na ol te diklai lamloh rhaitonghma bangla ha om vetih
Isaiah29:5 Tedae nang taengah aka lueng he laipi canghet bangla muep om ni. Hlanghaeng hlangping khaw cangkik bangla poeng vetih buengrhuet la pahoi om ni.
Isaiah29:6 caempuei BOEIPA loh
Isaiah29:7 Ariel aka muk namtom boeih neh aka muk carhui boeih
Isaiah29:8 Bungpong khaw mang a man vaengkah bangla om ni. A caak coeng akhaw a haenghang neh a hinglu hoep hailek tih tuihalh ni a man. A ok akhaw a haenghang vaengah a buhmueh rhathih neh a hinglu halthi coeng ke. Tangkuet la Zion tlang aka muk namtom boeih khaw hlangping la om ni.
Isaiah29:9 Uelh uh laeh
Isaiah29:10 BOEIPA loh mikku mueihla te nang soah ham bueih tih na mik na hna nah tonghma rhoek te a tahoeng sak tih na lu nah khohmu rhoek te a dah pah coeng.
Isaiah29:11 Mangthui boeih he miknoek a daeng. cabu dongah nangmih ham ol la om coeng. Te te cabu aka hmat taengah a paek tih
Isaiah29:12 Cabu te cabu aka ming pawt taengah a paek tih
Isaiah29:13 Te dongah ka Boeipa loh
Isaiah29:14 Te dongah pilnam he khobaerhambae neh mueipuel sak ham mueipuel hnatlak la ka koei ni he. Te vaengah aka cueih rhoek kah cueihnah he paltham vetih aka yakming rhoek kah yakmingnah khaw thuh uh ni.
Isaiah29:15 Anunae cilsuep thuh ham te BOEIPA taeng lamloh aka muelh uh mai. A khoboe uh khaw khohmuep khuikah la om rhoe tih
Isaiah29:16 Nangmih khuplat rhoek aw
Isaiah29:17 A yolkai bet pueng pawt nim? Lebanon te cangphil cangngol neh ha mael vetih a cangthai te duup bangla a ngai ni.
Isaiah29:18 Tekah khohnin ah tah cabu dongkah olka te hnapang rhoek loh a yaak uh vetih khohmuep neh hmaisuep lamkah mikdael mik long khaw a hmuh uh ni.
Isaiah29:19 Kodo rhoek tah BOEIPA dongah kohoenah neh thap uh vetih khodaeng hlang rhoek khaw Israel kah hlangcim dongah omngaih uh ni.
Isaiah29:20 Hlanghaeng te a khawk sak vetih hmuiyoi khaw a khah ni. Boethae neh aka hak rhoek khaw boeih a saii uh pueng ni.
Isaiah29:21 Hlang he olka dongah lai a hmuh. Vongka ah a tluung neh dong a naat tih aka dueng te a honghi neh a vuei a nan uh.
Isaiah29:22 Te dongah ni Abraham aka lat BOEIPA loh Jakob imkhui te
Isaiah29:23 Ka kut dongkah bibi te a ca rhoek loh a hmuh vaengah amah khui ah ka ming a ciim uh ni. Te vaengah Jakob kah a Hlangcim te a ciim uh vetih Israel Pathen taengah a sarhing uh ni.
Isaiah29:24 Te vaengah mueihla khohmang rhoek kah yakmingnah te a ming uh vetih cailak rhoek kah rhingtuknah a cang bitni
Isaiah30:1 Anunae a cilsuep te saii hamla BOEIPA kah olphong soah thinthah camoe rhoek aih. Tedae kai lamkah neh mueirhoi a hloe moenih. Ka mueihla kah bal moenih. Te dongah tholh te tholh neh a khoengvoep.
Isaiah30:2 Pharaoh kah lunghim khuiah bakuep ham neh Egypt kah hlipkhup ah ying hamla Egypt aka suntlak thil tih aka cet rhoek loh kai kah olka he a dawt uh moenih.
Isaiah30:3 Tedae Pharaoh kah lunghim te nangmih ham yahpohnah la
Isaiah30:4 A mangpa rhoek loh Zoan ah om uh tih a puencawn rhoek loh Hanes ham ben uh cakhaw
Isaiah30:5 pilnam te a hoeikhang pah voel pawt tih bomkung la a om pawt neh a hoeikhang pawt dongah boeih a borhim vetih yah a bai ni. Te dongah yahpohnah neh kokhahnah la om bal ni.
Isaiah30:6 Citcai khohmuen kah tuithim rhamsa ham olrhuh
Isaiah30:7 Egypt long khaw a honghi neh a poeyoek lam ni a bom. Te dongah amih te
Isaiah30:8 Paan laeh
Isaiah30:9 Laithae koca rhoek kah a ca rhoek
Isaiah30:10 Khohmu taengah
Isaiah30:11 Longpuei lamloh nong uh
Isaiah30:12 Te dongah Israel kah a cim loh
Isaiah30:13 Te dongah nangmih taengah tah thaesainah he khaw vongtung dongah a puut loh a yam tih a cungku bangla ha om ni. Aka pomdoep uh khaw a pocinah lam ni buengrhuet a om pahoi mai.
Isaiah30:14 Amsai loh tuitang kaek a dae banghui la rhek vetih lungma ti mahpawh. Hmai rhong dongkah hmai soh ham neh kangueng lamkah tui bak nah ham kangna paikaek kah a kaek te hmu mahpawh.
Isaiah30:15 Te dongah ni Israel kah a cim ka Boeipa Yahovah loh he ni a thui. Maelnah neh mongnah dongah a mong la n'khang coeng tih ueppangnah dongah na thayung thamal khaw om dae ta na ngaih uh pawh.
Isaiah30:16 Te phoeiah
Isaiah30:17 Tlang lu kah cungkui bangla
Isaiah30:18 Tedae BOEIPA loh nangmih rhen ham n'rhingda tangloeng tih nangmih aka haidam la pomsang uh tangkhuet. Tiktamnah Pathen Yahovah amah te aka rhingda boeih tah a yoethen.
Isaiah30:19 Jerusalem kah khosa Zion pilnam aw na rhap rhoe na rhap voel mahpawh. Na pang ol te a yaak vaengah n'rhen rhoe
Isaiah30:20 Boeipa loh nang te rhal kah buh neh hnaemtaeknah tui m'pae cakhaw na saya rhoek te khaw khoe mahpawh. Tedae na saya aka hmu rhoek te na mik ah om bitni.
Isaiah30:21 Na hnuk lamkah ol loh
Isaiah30:22 Na cak ben mueidaep neh
Isaiah30:23 Te vaengah khohmuen kah na tuh na cangti te khotlan loh a suep ni. Khohmuen kah cangpai buh neh kuirhang la om ni. Tekah khohnin ah tah rhamtlim dangka ah na boiva loh pulpulh luem ni.
Isaiah30:24 Diklai kah aka tho aka tat saelhung neh laak pataeng cangcopcung neh
Isaiah30:25 Tlang sang tom ah khaw
Isaiah30:26 Hla kah a vang te khomik kah a vang bangla om ni. Khomik kah a vang khaw khohnin hnin rhih kah a vang bangla a pueh parhih la om ni. BOEIPA long tah a pilnam kah a tlawt te a poi pah tih a hmapuei hmasoe khaw a hoeih sak.
Isaiah30:27 BOEIPA ka a ming tah khohla bangsang lamkah a thintoek aka ung khui lamkah ha thoeng coeng ke. A hmuilai kah kosi hmaihu te a thah la baetawt tih a ol khaw hmai bangla tak.
Isaiah30:28 A hil khaw a rhawn duela a muelh tih aka yo soklong la
Isaiah30:29 Laa khaw nangmih taengah tah khotue a ciim hlaem kah bangla om vetih
Isaiah30:30 A ol mueithennah te BOEIPA loh n'yaak sak vetih
Isaiah30:31 BOEIPA ol loh Assyria te a rhihyawp sak vetih
Isaiah30:32 BOEIPA loh a ning a hol pah vaengah a pum dongkah kamrhing te khaw
Isaiah30:33 Tophet khaw hlaemvai lamkah ni rhong a pai thil coeng. Te khaw manghai ham a soepsoei pah rhoe. A hlanhmai te a dung a ka sak tih hmai te khaw thing muep a hueng thil. BOEIPA kah a hiil kat hmai soklong bangla te te a dom.
Isaiah31:1 Anunae bomnah bomnah dang ham Egypt ka suntlak thil rhoek aih
Isaiah31:2 Tedae BOEIPA amah khaw a cueih dongah yoethae a thoeng sak thai. A ol khaw a yueh voel pawt dongah thaehuet imkhui neh boethae aka saii kah bomkung te a tlai thil ni.
Isaiah31:3 Egypt te hlang ni
Isaiah31:4 Te dongah sathueng neh cathueng ca loh a maeh a nguel thil bangla BOEIPA loh kai taengah a thui. Boiva aka dawn te rhoihui la a khue thil dae amih ol ah rhihyawp pawt tih amih hlangping long khaw a paa sak moenih. Te dongah caempuei BOEIPA tah Zion tlang neh som te muk hamla ha suntla ni.
Isaiah31:5 Vaa bangla lam tangloeng tih caempuei BOEIPA loh Jerusalem a tungaep ni. A tungaep vetih a huul ni. A kan vetih a loeih sak ni.
Isaiah31:6 Koeknah dongah aka muelh Israel ca rhoek aw
Isaiah31:7 Tekah khohnin ah tah hlang boeih loh amah cakhli mueirhol
Isaiah31:8 Assyria te hlang pawt kah cunghang dongah cungku vetih tongpa pawt kah cunghang loh anih te a hlap ni. cunghang taeng lamloh a rhaelrham vaengah a tongpang rhoek te saldong la om uh ni.
Isaiah31:9 A thaelpang khaw rhihnah loh a poe vetih a mangpa rhoek te rholik kongah a rhihyawp uh ni. BOEIPA kah olphong tah Zion ah amah kah hmaipuei la
Isaiah32:1 Manghai tah duengnah neh manghai vetih mangpa rhoek loh a tiktam la boei uh ni.
Isaiah32:2 Te vaengah tah khohli vaengkah congket conglong neh hlipuei vaengkah a huephael bangla
Isaiah32:3 Aka hmu rhoek loh a mik buem uh voel pawt vetih aka ya kah a hna long khaw hnatung uh pawn ni.
Isaiah32:4 Thinko aka loe long khaw ming hamla a yakming ni. Ol khol khaw a loe la puk cal ni.
Isaiah32:5 Hlang ang te hlangcong la khue voel pawt vetih ngukngak te hlang rhoeikhang ti nah mahpawh.
Isaiah32:6 Lailak la saii ham neh BOEIPA te rholrhaknah thui ham
Isaiah32:7 Ngukngak loh a boethae hnopai te khonuen rhamtat la a khueh tih
Isaiah32:8 Tedae hlangcong long tah moeihoeihnah neh a uen tih moeihoeihnah neh pai van.
Isaiah32:9 Mongkawt nu rhoek thoo uh lamtah ka ol hnatun uh. Palyal tanu rhoek ka olthui he hnakaeng uh lah.
Isaiah32:10 Palyal rhoek te kum at hnin at ah na tlai uh bitni. Misurbit loh n'khah vetih cangah khaw pha mahpawh.
Isaiah32:11 Mongkawt nu te lakueng saeh
Isaiah32:12 Naidoeh lohma ham neh misur thaihsu ham te rhangsuk mah rhaengsae laeh.
Isaiah32:13 Hling neh lota he ka pilnam kah hmuenlung ham a yam pah coeng tih
Isaiah32:14 Impuei te a phap vetih khopuei a lilup khaw a hnoo ni. Molpuei neh rhaltawt imsang te kohong marhang kah a omthennah neh tuping uemnah la poeh vetih kumhal due lungtokhui la om ni.
Isaiah32:15 Hmuensang lamkah Mueihla te mamih soah han kingling vaengah tah khosoek khaw cangphil cangngol la poeh tih khoham cangphil cangngol bangla a poek.
Isaiah32:16 Te vaengah tah khosoek ah tiktamnah loh kho a sak vetih
Isaiah32:17 Duengnah kah a khoboe tah rhoepnah la
Isaiah32:18 Ka pilnam long tah rhoepnah tolkhoeng neh pangtungnah tolhmuen ah duemnah neh a mongkawt la kho a sak ni.
Isaiah32:19 Te dongah duup khaw rhael aka bo loh a hnaa vetih khopuei khaw tlarhoelnah la kunyun ni.
Isaiah32:20 Te dae tui kaeng te boeih aka tawn tih vaito neh laak kho neh aka tluek rhoek tah na yoethen uh.
Isaiah33:1 Anunae aka rhoelrhak khaw na rhoelrhak yoe mahpawh
Isaiah33:2 BOEIPA kaimih he n'rhen lah
Isaiah33:3 Hlangping ol ah pilnam rhoek loh yong uh tih
Isaiah33:4 Na kutbuem te cangah kah phol bangla kol ni. Kaisih cungpet bangla cu ni.
Isaiah33:5 BOEIPA tah hmuensang la kho a sak dongah pomdoep rhoe pai saeh. Zion tah tiktamnah
Isaiah33:6 Namah tue vaengkah khangnah khohrhang
Isaiah33:7 Thinom te kawtpoeng ah a doek uh tih rhoepnah puencawn rhoek khaw bungbung rhap uh coeng ke.
Isaiah33:8 Longpuei rhoek khaw pong uh tih caehlong kah aka pongpa khaw kangkuen. Paipi te a phae tih khopuei rhoek te a sawtsit tih hlanghing la toeksap pawh.
Isaiah33:9 Khohmuen a tahah te a nguekcoi thil. Lebanon khaw tal tih tloih coeng. Sharon te a kolken bangla om coeng tih Bashan neh Karmel khaw congpet coeng.
Isaiah33:10 BOEIPA loh
Isaiah33:11 Diphung la na vawn uh tih divawt na cun uh. Na hil dongkah hmai loh namah n'hlawp coeng.
Isaiah33:12 Pilnam te tihkoi lungbok bangla om uh vetih
Isaiah33:13 Ka saii te khohla loh ya pai lamtah ka thayung thamal he a yoei loh ming uh pai.
Isaiah33:14 Hlangtholh rhoek tah Zion ah rhi uh tih lailak rhoek loh thuennah a buem uh. Mamih khuiah hmai kah a hlawp la aka bakuep te unim? Kumhal hmaingen la mamih khuiah aka bakuep te unim?
Isaiah33:15 Duengnah dongah aka pongpa tih vanat la aka thui
Isaiah33:16 anih tah hmuensang ah kho a sak vetih
Isaiah33:17 Manghai kah a sakthen te na mik loh a hmuh khohla bangsang kho te khaw a hmuh ni.
Isaiah33:18 Cadaek te ta? hno aka thuek te melae? rhaltoengim aka toek te melae? tila na lungbuei loh mueirhih te a thuep ni.
Isaiah33:19 Pilnam aka saan te na hmu voel mahpawh. Pilnam kah ol khuet neh tamdaeng ol n'yakmingnah pawt te khaw ya voel mahpawh.
Isaiah33:20 Mamih kah tingtunnah khorha Zion ke so lah. Na mik loh mongkawt tolkhoeng Jerusalem te a hmuh bitni. Dap te puen pawt vetih a hlingcong khaw a yoeyah la phong mahpawh. A rhuihet te pakhat pataeng pat mahpawh.
Isaiah33:21 Aka khuet BOEIPA tah mamih ham a kut aka dangka sak sokko tuiva hmuen la om pahoi coeng. A soah lawngkaih kah sangpho khaw cet pawt vetih timbaw aka khuet khaw kat mahpawh.
Isaiah33:22 BOEIPA loh mamih kah lai aka tloek tih
Isaiah33:23 Na rhuihet te hlong tih a cungkui yung khaw a kueng voel pawt dongah a rholik khaw a ku uh moenih. Te dongah kutbuem maeh te tael ni. Khokhaem rhoek khaw puh vetih maeh te a poelyoe uh ni.
Isaiah33:24 Imben loh
Isaiah34:1 Namtom rhoek loh hnatun hamla ha mop lah. Namtu rhoek loh hnatung uh saeh lamtah diklai neh lunglai boeih neh a cadil cahma rhoek boeih loh yaa saeh.
Isaiah34:2 BOEIPA kah a thinhul te namtom boeih taengah
Isaiah34:3 Amih a ngawn te a voeih vaengah a rhok kah a bothae te rhim ni. Amih thii loh tlang a yut sak ni.
Isaiah34:4 Vaan dong caempuei boeih te muei vetih vaan cabu bangla kolong uh ni. Amih kah caempuei boeih te misur hnah a hoo bangla
Isaiah34:5 Ka cunghang loh vaan ah hmilhmal tih Edom a cuk thil. Pilnam te kamah kah yaehtaboeih loh laitloeknah neh a pha coeng.
Isaiah34:6 BOEIPA kah cunghang tah a thii hah coeng. Bozrah kah BOEIPA hmueih neh Edom khohmuen kah maeh len kongah maehtha neh
Isaiah34:7 Cung neh vaito lueng khaw amih taengla suntla ni. Te vaengah a khohmuen te thii neh hmilhmal vetih a laipi khaw maehtha bangla men ni.
Isaiah34:8 BOEIPA taengah phulohnah khohnin neh
Isaiah34:9 A soklong te kunhnai la
Isaiah34:10 Khoyin khothaih kumhal duela thi mahpawh. A khu khaw cadilcahma lamkah cadilcahma patoeng taengla cet ni. A yoeyah kah a yoeyah la khap uh vetih te long te paan uh voel mahpawh.
Isaiah34:11 Khosoek saelbu
Isaiah34:12 A hlangcoelh rhoek khaw a ram ah hah a khueh uh vetih a mangpa rhoek khaw a honghi la boeih om ni.
Isaiah34:13 A impuei te dohui hling loh
Isaiah34:14 Te vaengah kohong neh sa-ui hum vetih maae loh a hui a khue ni. Vathae khaw pahoi paa vetih amah ham ngolbuel a hmuh ni.
Isaiah34:15 Te ah valah loh bu a tuk vetih oi ni. A khae phoeiah tah a hlipkhup ah a ku thil ni. Te ah te valae rhoek khaw tingtun uh vetih a la te a paa cu ni.
Isaiah34:16 BOEIPA kah cabu dongah cae uh lamtah tae uh lah. Amih kah pakhat khaw hmaai mahpawh. A la pakhat khaw a paa vawt uh mahpawh. Ka ka loh a uen coeng dongah amih te BOEIPA kah a mueihla loh a coi ni.
Isaiah34:17 Amah loh amih ham hmulung a nan pah. A kut loh amih ham rhilam a suem pah te kumhal duela a pang uh ni. Cadilcahma phoeikah cadilcahma loh a khuiah kho a sak uh ni.
Isaiah35:1 Khosoek neh rhamrhae loh ngaingaih bitni. kolken khaw omngaih vetih rhaimoei bangla muem ni.
Isaiah35:2 Phuelh rhoe phuelh vetih omngaih ni. Lebanon kah omngaihnah neh thangpomnah a tamhoe puei ni. Karmel kah rhuepomnah a taengah a paek vetih Sharon loh
Isaiah35:3 Kut kha te talong uh lamtah khuklu aka tangdawt khaw duel uh.
Isaiah35:4 Lungbuei aka loe te
Isaiah35:5 Te vaengah mikdael khaw a mik tueng vetih hnapang rhoek khaw a hna khui ni.
Isaiah35:6 Rhangrhaeh khokhaem bangla a poe vetih olmueh khaw a ol neh tamhoe ni. Khosoek ah tui phuet vetih kolken ah soklong la om ni.
Isaiah35:7 Unghae te tuibap la
Isaiah35:8 Te vaengah longpuei pahoi om vetih longpuei te khaw Longpuei Cim la a khue ni. Hlang rhalawt tah te lam te cet mahpawh. Tedae amah te longpuei la a pongpa vaengah tah aka ang pataeng khohmang uh mahpawh.
Isaiah35:9 Sathueng khaw om mahpawh
Isaiah35:10 BOEIPA kah a lat rhoek tah mael uh vetih tamlung neh a lu dongkah kumhal kohoenah neh Zion la kun uh ni. Omngaihnah neh kohoenah loh a kae vetih kothae neh hueinah tah rhaelrham ni.
Isaiah36:1 Hezekiah manghai te kum hlai li a lo vaengah Assyria manghai Sennacherib loh a paan. Te vaengah Judah khopuei cakrhuet te boeih a muk tih a tuuk.
Isaiah36:2 Te phoeiah Assyria manghai loh khotawt Rabshakeh te Lakhish lamloh Jerusalem kah manghai Hezekiah taengah tatthai neh duel a tueih pah. Te vaengah hno suk lo long kah a so tuibuem
Isaiah36:3 Te dongah im khoem Hilkiah capa Eliakim tah cadaek Shebna
Isaiah36:4 Te vaengah amih te khotawt Rabshakeh loh
Isaiah36:5 Hmuilai lamkah olka mailai khaw caemtloek ham cilsuep neh thayung thamal ni ka ti. Kai he tloelh hamla unim na pangtung thil coeng.
Isaiah36:6 Capu conghol a paep tangtae la na pangtung thil dae te. Te Egypt soah aka hangdang hlang tah a kut a hun tih a toeh. Egypt manghai Pharaoh aka pangtung thil boeih tah te tlam pawn ni.
Isaiah36:7 Kai taengah
Isaiah36:8 Te dongah ka boeipa te
Isaiah36:9 Ka boeipa kah sal khuikah rhalboei pakhat kah maelhmai te metlam na mael tak eh. Tetca khaw leng ham neh marhang caem ham Egypt na pangtung thil mai.
Isaiah36:10 BOEIPA mueh lam a khohmuen he phae ham ka caeh? BOEIPA loh kamah taengah
Isaiah36:11 Te vaengah Eliakim
Isaiah36:12 Tedae khotawt Rabshakeh loh
Isaiah36:13 Te phoeiah khotawt Rabshakeh pai tih Judah ol neh a len la pang. Te vaengah
Isaiah36:14 Manghai loh
Isaiah36:15 Hezekiah te na pangtung uh mahpawh. BOEIPA ming neh
Isaiah36:16 Hezekiah ol te hnatun uh boeh. Te dongah ni Assyria manghai loh
Isaiah36:17 Kamah ka pawk vetih nangmih te namamih kah khohmuen bang cangpai hmuen
Isaiah36:18 “ BOEIPA loh mamih n'huul bitni
Isaiah36:19 Khamath neh Arpad pathen te ta? Sepharvaim pathen ta? Samaria te ka kut lamloh a huul noek a?
Isaiah36:20 He diklai pathen boeih soah aka om te unim? Ka kut dong lamloh a khohmuen aka huul te unim? Jerusalem te Yahovah loh ka kut lamkah a huul tang aya te?” a ti
Isaiah36:21 Tedae hil a phah uh tih anih te ol kamat khaw doo uh pawh. Te vaengah
Isaiah36:22 Te phoeiah imkhui kah Hilkiah capa Eliakim
Isaiah37:1 Manghai Hezekiah loh a yaak vaengah a himbai a phen
Isaiah37:2 Te vaengah a im om Eliakim neh cadaek Shebna
Isaiah37:3 Te vaengah a taengah
Isaiah37:4 Khotawt Rabshakeh kah olka te Yahovah na Pathen loh a yaak khaming. Aka hing Pathen veet hamla a boei Assyria manghai loh anih te a tueih coeng. Te ol Yahovah na Pathen loh a yaak coeng dongah a tluung bitni. A meet aka om duen ham khaw thangthuinah neh thothueng laeh
Isaiah37:5 Manghai Hezekiah kah sal rhoek te Isaiah taengla a pawk uh vaengah
Isaiah37:6 amih te Isaiah loh
Isaiah37:7 Anih te mueihla ka paek vaengah olthang a yaak vetih amah kho la mael bitni. Te vaengah anih te amah kho ah cunghang neh ka cungku sak bitni
Isaiah37:8 Lakhish lamloh a nong te a yaak vaengah khotawt Rabshakeh khaw mael van dae Assyria manghai loh Libnah a vathoh thil te a hmuh.
Isaiah37:9 Kusah manghai Tirhakah te a yaak coeng lahko. Nang vathoh thil ham ha pawk coeng a ti lah ko. A yaak tangloeng vaengah tah Hezekiah taengla puencawn a tueih tih
Isaiah37:10 “Judah manghai Hezekiah te thui pah. 'Na pangtung thil na Pathen loh nang n'rhaithi boel saeh
Isaiah37:11 Assyria manghai rhoek loh diklai tom te a saii tih amih a thup te namah loh na yaak coeng dongah na loeih uh venim te.
Isaiah37:12 A pa rhoek loh a phae Gozan
Isaiah37:13 Khamath manghai neh Arpad manghai
Isaiah37:14 Puencawn kut lamkah ca te Hezekiah loh a doe tih a tae. Te phoeiah BOEIPA im la cet tih BOEIPA mikhmuh ah Hezekiah loh a phaih.
Isaiah37:15 Hezekiah tah BOEIPA taengah thangthui tih
Isaiah37:16 caempuei BOEIPA Israel Pathen
Isaiah37:17 BOEIPA na hna kaeng lamtah hnatun lah. BOEIPA aw na mik dai lamtah hmu van lah. Sennacherib ol te boeih ya van lah. Aka hing Pathen veet hamla hlang a tueih lah ko te.
Isaiah37:18 Aw BOEIPA
Isaiah37:19 Amih kah pathen te hmai ah a pup pah. Te te pathen moenih. Hlang kut kah bibi thing neh lungto mailai ni
Isaiah37:20 Mamih Pathen Yahovah loh mamih he anih kut lamloh n'khang pawn saeh. Te vaengah diklai ram pum loh nang namah bueng te BOEIPA la m'ming uh saeh
Isaiah37:21 Te dongah Amoz capa Isaiah loh Hezekiah te a tah tih
Isaiah37:22 He ol he BOEIPA loh anih ham ni a thui. Zion nu oila nang te n'hnoelrhoeng tih
Isaiah37:23 Unim na veet tih na hliphen dae? Unim ol na huel thil van dae na mik nen tah Israel kah a cim taengah a sang la na huel.
Isaiah37:24 Na sal rhoek kah kut loh Boeipa namah te m'veet. Te vaengah ka leng te yet neh Lebanon hlaep kah tlang sang khaw kamah ka yoeng coeng. Lamphai thingsang neh hmaical thinghloe khaw ka top coeng. A khobawt hmuensang kah a cangphil cangngol duup khaw ka pha coeng.
Isaiah37:25 Kamah loh ka rhawt tih tui ka ok. Egypt sokko boeih ka kho kah khopha neh kak sak.
Isaiah37:26 Hlamat kum lamloh ka nuen te daengrhae daengkhoi la na ya pawt nim. Ka hlom tangtae te ka paan coeng he
Isaiah37:27 Amih khosa rhoek kah a kut toi tih rhihyawp uh. Te dongah khohmuen kah baelhing khaw yahhat la om. Imphu kah sulrham
Isaiah37:28 Na om van tih na hlah uh van mai. Na pawk te khaw ka ming ngawn dae kai taengah na tlai hae.
Isaiah37:29 Kai taengah na tlai neh na mongkawt te ka hna la ha pawk coeng. Te dongah ka thisum neh na hnarhong ah ka dueh vetih na ka ah ka kamrhui kam ban ni. Te vaengah nang te kam mael puei vetih longpuei ah na pongpa ni.
Isaiah37:30 Te phoeiah hekah he nang ham ah miknoek la om ni. Kum khat pong vetih a kum bae ah anboe te caak ham om. Tedae a kum thum dongah tawn lamtah at bal. Misur te phung lamtah a thaih te ca khaw ca kolo van.
Isaiah37:31 Judah imkhui kah rhalyong te khaw a thap vetih a laedil kah a yung aka sueng tah a hman ah a thaih cuen ni.
Isaiah37:32 Te vaengah Jerusalem lamkah a meet neh Zion tlang lamkah rhalyong te khaw ha pawk ni. Te tlam te caempuei BOEIPA kah thatlainah loh a saii ni.
Isaiah37:33 Te ham te BOEIPA loh a thui tangloeng. Assyria manghai te he khopuei khuila kun pawt vetih thaltang pataeng kap mahpawh. photling nen khaw mah pawt vetih tanglung khaw lun thil mahpawh.
Isaiah37:34 Ha pawk nah longpuei long te mael vetih he khopuei khuila ha kun mahpawh. BOEIPA kah olphong coeng ni.
Isaiah37:35 He khopuei he ka tungaep vetih
Isaiah37:36 Te dongah BOEIPA kah puencawn loh a paan tih Assyria rhaehhmuen ah thawng ya rhet thawng nga te a ngawn pah. Mincang a thoh uh vaengah tah amih te a rhok la boeih duek uh.
Isaiah37:37 Te daengah puen uh tih vik cet. Assyria manghai Sennacherib khaw mael tih Nineveh ah kho a sak.
Isaiah37:38 Amah a om vaengah a pathen Nisrock im te a bakop hatah a ca rhoi Adrammelech neh Sharezer loh cunghang neh a tloek rhoi. Te dongah amih rhoi Ararat kho la poeng rhoi tih ana pa yuengla a capa Esarhaddon te tloep manghai.
Isaiah38:1 Te a tue rhuet ah Hezekiah tah a duek ham rhoela tlo. Te vaengah tonghma Amoz capa Isaiah tah anih taengla ha pawk tih amah te
Isaiah38:2 Tedae Hezekiah loh a maelhmai te pangbueng taengla a hoi tih BOEIPA taengah thangthui.
Isaiah38:3 Te vaengah
Isaiah38:4 Te dongah BOEIPA ol loh Isaiah taengla ha pawk tih
Isaiah38:5 Hezekiah taengah cet lamtah thui pah
Isaiah38:6 Namah neh hekah khopuei he Assyria manghai kut lamkah ka huul vetih khopuei he khaw ka tungaep ni.
Isaiah38:7 BOEIPA taeng lamkah miknoek pakhat he nang ham coeng ni. BOEIPA loh ol a thui tangtae bangla a saii ni.
Isaiah38:8 Khomik te tangtlaeng parha ka thoeih sak tih Ahaz kah tangtlaeng dongah aka tla tangtlaeng mueihlip te ka mael sak coeng he
Isaiah38:9 Amah te nue coeng dae a tloh khui lamloh a hing vaengah Judah manghai Hezekiah kah cadaek.
Isaiah38:10 Kai tah
Isaiah38:11 Mulhing khohmuen kah BOEIPA tah ka hmu voel mahpawh
Isaiah38:12 Ka thawnpuei te a khum puei tih kai kah boiva aka dawn kah dap bangla kai taeng lamloh a khuen. Hni aka tak bangla ka hingnah a awn tih phaivoep dong lamloh kai m'mueluem. Te dongah khothaih lamloh khoyin duela kai nan thuung sak.
Isaiah38:13 Mincang due sathueng bangla ka hnil tih ka rhuh khaw boeih a khaem te khothaih lamloh khoyin duela kai nan thuung sak.
Isaiah38:14 Vasoe
Isaiah38:15 Kai taengah a thui tih amah loh a saii coeng dongah metlae ka ti eh? Ka hinglu kah khahing neh ka kum boeih khaw vawlhvawlh ka van mai bitni.
Isaiah38:16 Ka Boeipa aw te rhoek nen hing mai saeh. A khuikah aka om boeih nen ni ka mueihla kah a hingnah khaw a om. Te dongah kai he nan man sak akhaw kai n'hing sak mai.
Isaiah38:17 Ka taengkah khahing neh ka phaep uh he sadingnah ham ni. Namah loh vaam khui lamkah ka hinglu he na ven bueng kolla ka tholhnah boeih te na nam la na voeih coeng.
Isaiah38:18 Nang aka uem te saelkhui moenih. Dueknah loh nang n'thangthen nim. Tangrhom ah aka suntla rhoek loh na oltak te a lamso moenih.
Isaiah38:19 Aka hing aka hing long ni namah te kai bangla ng'uem dae amah. Tihnin ah ana pa loh camoe rhoek taengah na oltak te a ming sak pai.
Isaiah38:20 BOEIPA loh kai n'khang dongah mamih kah hingnah tue a om khui atah BOEIPA im ah rhotoeng n'tum uh pawn ni.
Isaiah38:21 Te phoeiah Isaiah loh
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiah loh
Isaiah39:1 Te vaeng tue ah Hezekiah tlo tih koep a thoh te Babylon manghai Baladan capa Merodachbaladan loh a yaak tih ca neh khocang a pat.
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiah loh te te a kohoe tih a anhoi im khaw
Isaiah39:3 Te phoeiah tonghma Isaiah loh manghai Hezekiah te a paan tih
Isaiah39:4 Te phoeiah
Isaiah39:5 Te vaengah Isaiah loh Hezekiah te
Isaiah39:6 A khohnin ha pawk vaengah na im kah aka om boeih neh na pa rhoek loh tihnin duela a kael te khaw a phueih ni. Babylon loh hno pakhat khaw caknoi mahpawh
Isaiah39:7 Namah lamkah na sak na ca rhoek lamloh aka thoeng rhoek te khaw a khuen uh vetih Babylon manghai bawkim ah imkhoem la poeh uh ni
Isaiah39:8 Hezekiah loh Isaiah taengah
Isaiah40:1 Hloep uh pai
Isaiah40:2 Jerusalem te a lungbuei ah thui pah lamtah amah taengah hoe pah. Amah kah thaesainah moeithen pah ham a caempuei khaw cung coeng. A tholhnah cungkuem ham te rhaepnit la BOEIPA kut a yook.
Isaiah40:3 Khosoek kah pang ol dongah BOEIPA kah longpuei rhoekbah uh. Mamih Pathen ham longpuei te kolken duela dueng sak uh.
Isaiah40:4 Kolrhawk khaw boeih nolh saeh lamtah tlang som boeih khaw kunyun sak uh laeh. Cangngok te tlangtlae la
Isaiah40:5 BOEIPA kah a ka loh a thui coeng dongah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah te phoe vetih pumsa ah thikat la boeih a hmuh uh ni.
Isaiah40:6 Ol long tah pang dae a ti tih a thui coeng. Balae ka pang thil eh? Pumsa boeih he sulrham banghui ni
Isaiah40:7 Sulrham khaw rhae tih tamlaep pai tloih. Pilnam khaw BOEIPA kah a hil sulrham bangla a yawn taktak.
Isaiah40:8 Sulrham he rhae tih rhaipai loh rhul mai cakhaw mamih Pathen kah olka tah kumhal duela pai.
Isaiah40:9 Zion ham aka phong loh na tlang sang la luei lah. Jerusalem ham aka phong khaw na thadueng ol neh pomsang lah. Rhih boeh pomsang laeh. Judah khopuei rhoek taengah
Isaiah40:10 Ka Boeipa Yahovah tah a tlungluen neh ha pawk tih a bantha loh anih ham a taemrhai pah coeng ke. A thapang khaw amah taengah
Isaiah40:11 Amah kah tuping aka dawn bangla a ban neh a luem sak. Tuca rhoek te a coi tih a rhang dongah a poem. Cacun khaw a khool bal.
Isaiah40:12 A kutpha dongah tui aka loeng
Isaiah40:13 BOEIPA kah mueihla aka noem tih a cilsuep neh anih aka ming sak hlang te unim?
Isaiah40:14 Anih aka uen tih aka yakming sak khaw
Isaiah40:15 Namtom rhoek khaw tuiduen dongkah tuicip bangla
Isaiah40:16 Lebanon pataeng toih rhoeh pawt tih a mulhing hmueihhlutnah la rhoeh pawh.
Isaiah40:17 Namtom boeih khaw amah hmaikah aka om pawt bangla a poei-oep lakah khaw a honghi lam ni a ngai uh.
Isaiah40:18 Te dongah Pathen te u taengah nim na lutlat sak vetih amah te mebang nen nim phek na tluk sak uh eh?
Isaiah40:19 Mueithuk te kutthai loh a hloe tih sui aka dung loh sui neh a nulh thil. Cak rhui nen khaw a cam.
Isaiah40:20 Tangkik tanglai loh khocang la thing aka keet pawt te a coelh. Aka tuen pawh mueithuk aka saek ham te kutthai hlangcueih a tlap.
Isaiah40:21 Na ming uh pawt nim? Na ya uh pawt nim? A lu lamloh nangmih taengah thui pawt nim? Diklai kah a yung na yakming uh pawt nim?
Isaiah40:22 Diklai kueluek soah aka ngol tih tangku bangla kho aka sa
Isaiah40:23 Boeica rhoek te a hong taengla aka pae neh diklai kah laitloek rhoek khaw a honghi la a khueh.
Isaiah40:24 A phung uh pawt tih a soem uh pawt hmanah a ngo khaw diklai ah saicin bal pawh. Te dongah amih te phawn a hmuh vaengah tah koh pahoi tih hlipuei loh divawt bangla a khuen.
Isaiah40:25 Te dongah kai naka puet tih A Cim neh ka vanat aka ti te unim?
Isaiah40:26 Na mik te a sang la dangrhoek lamtah so uh lah. He he aka suen khaw unim? A caempuei a tarhing ah a thoeng sak tih amih te a ming neh boeih a khue. A thahuem khaw cang kahlak tih thadueng neh a om rhapsat coeng dongah hlang pakhat pataeng a hmaai moenih.
Isaiah40:27 Balae tih Jakob nang na cal. Israel sawt long khaw
Isaiah40:28 Na ming het pawt nim? Khosuen Pathen Yahovah na ya noek pawt nim? Diklai bawt aka suen te tawnba pawt tih a kohnue moenih. A lungcuei te khenah om mahpawh.
Isaiah40:29 Lamlum te thadueng a paek tih thahuem aka khueh pawt te thaomnah a rhoeng sak.
Isaiah40:30 Camoe rhoek te tawnba uh tih kohnue uh. Tongpang rhoek khaw a paloe lam ni a paloe uh.
Isaiah40:31 Tedae BOEIPA aka lamtawn rhoek tah a thadueng sai vetihatha bangla a phae neh luei ni. Yong uh cakhaw kohnue uh mahpawh. Cet thikthuek cakhaw tawnba uh mahpawh
Isaiah41:1 Sanglak te kai hmaiah duem om uh. Namtu rhoek khaw thadueng cawn saeh lamtah ha mop uh saeh. Te vaengah
Isaiah41:2 Khocuk lamloh aka haenghang te unim? Anih te a kho kungah duengnah la a khue. Namtom rhoek te a mikhmuh ah a tloeng pah. Manghai rhoek te a hnaa tih a cunghang neh laipi bangla a saii
Isaiah41:3 Amih loh a hloem vaengah a kho loh a cawt noek pawh caehlong te sading la a poeng.
Isaiah41:4 A lu lamloh a saii tih a khuen phoeiah cadilcahma aka khue te unim? Lamhma khaw kai Yahovah ni
Isaiah41:5 Sanglak rhoek loh a hmuh uh tih a rhih uh. Diklai khobawt rhoek khaw a lakueng uh dongah ha tawn uh tih halo uh.
Isaiah41:6 Hlang loh a hui te bom uh saeh lamtah a manuca te
Isaiah41:7 Kutthai loh sui aka cilpoe te a thaphoh. Kilung neh aka picai loh thilung aka hnaa te
Isaiah41:8 Tedae ka lungnah Abraham tiingan
Isaiah41:9 Diklai khobawt lamloh nang kan doek tih
Isaiah41:10 Rhih boeh
Isaiah41:11 Nang taengah aka lungoe boeih tah yak uh vetih a hmaithae uh ni. Namah taengah tuituknah aka khueh hlang rhoek a hong la om vetih milh uh ni.
Isaiah41:12 Na rhalcak te hlang na tlap cakhaw na hmu mahpawh. Nang kah caemtloek hlang rhoek te a hong neh a poei-oep la om ni.
Isaiah41:13 Kai tah na bantang kut aka moem tih nang taengah
Isaiah41:14 Jakob talam
Isaiah41:15 Nang te tloep dongkah thingphael no a thai kah kungmah la kang khueh ni. Tlang na til vetih na tip sak ni. Som khaw cangkik bangla na khueh ni.
Isaiah41:16 Amih te na rhuek vaengah yilh loh a khuen vetih hlipuei loh a taekyak ni. Tedae nang tah BOEIPA dongah na omngaih vetih Israel kah a cim dongah na thangthen bitni.
Isaiah41:17 Mangdaeng neh khodaeng loh tui a tlap. Tuihalh dongah a lai om kolla koh coeng. Kai Israel Pathen Yahovah loh amih te ka doo tih amih te ka hnoo moenih.
Isaiah41:18 Caphoei cuk ah tuiva
Isaiah41:19 Khosoek ah lamphai
Isaiah41:20 Te vaengah BOEIPA kut loh a saii tih Israel kah a cim loh a suen te hmu uh saeh lamtah ming uh saeh
Isaiah41:21 BOEIPA loh
Isaiah41:22 Hnukbuet kah aka thoeng te mamih taengah tawn saeh lamtah thui uh saeh. Amih loh mebang a thui akhaw mamih kah lungbuei ah khueh uh sih. A hmailong ah mamih kah n'yaak bangla a thoeng te ming uh sih.
Isaiah41:23 A hnuk ah aka lo te thui lamtah nangmih na pathen uh te kam hmat uh eh. Na thae na then khaw ka uem uh vetih ka sawt khaw ka sawt mai bitni.
Isaiah41:24 Nangmih te tangkik tanglai ni he. Na bisai khaw a hong lakah nah. Nangmih aka coelh te khaw tueilaehkoi ni.
Isaiah41:25 Tlangpuei lamloh ka haeng tih khocuk khomik taeng lamloh halo. Ka ming te a phuk tih ukkung rhoek te amlai bangla a pah. Te vaengah amsai bangla tangnong a daep.
Isaiah41:26 A tong lamkah unim aka puen tih mikhmuh lamkah khaw ka ming vetih thuem ka ti uh eh. Aka puen khaw om pawh
Isaiah41:27 Amih he lamhma la Zion taengah khaw
Isaiah41:28 Ka hmuh nawn khaw hlang om pawh. Amih ka dawt vaengah ol mael hamla amih aka uen khaw om pawh.
Isaiah41:29 Amih te boeih ah boethae ni ke. A bibi khaw a poei-oep
Isaiah42:1 Ka sal he ne. Anih he ka moem tih kamah loh ka coelh. Ka hinglu loh a moeithen tih anih soah ka Mueihla ka khueh dongah namtom ham tiktamnah a khuen pah ni.
Isaiah42:2 Anih tah pang pawt vetih huel uh bal mahpawh. A ol te tollong ah ya uh mahpawh.
Isaiah42:3 Capu aka paep te khaem pawt vetih thut aka nap khaw thih mahpawh. Oltak neh tiktamnah te a thoeng sak.
Isaiah42:4 Diklai ah tiktamnah a khueh duela muei pawt vetih paep mahpawh. A olkhueng te khaw khonglong tuiva loh a ngaiuep uh ni.
Isaiah42:5 Vaan aka suen tih aka dih
Isaiah42:6 “Kai Yahovah loh nang te duengnah khuila kang khue coeng. Na kut te kan moem vetih nang kang kueinah ni. Nang te pilnam kah patai la
Isaiah42:7 Mikdael te mik tueng sak ham
Isaiah42:8 Kai Yahovah loh ka ming neh ka thangpomnah he a tloe taengla
Isaiah42:9 Lamhma te ha thoeng coeng tih a thai la ka puen coeng he. A poe hlan ah nangmih kan yaak sak
Isaiah42:10 Diklai khobawt lamloh tuitunli la aka suntla rhoek
Isaiah42:11 Khosoek neh khopuei
Isaiah42:12 Thangpomnah te BOEIPA taengah tloeng uh saeh
Isaiah42:13 BOEIPA tah hlangrhalh la thoeng tih caemtloek hlang la haenghang coeng. A thatlainah neh yuhui vetih a kawk vaengah a thunkha rhoek te a poe ni.
Isaiah42:14 Kumhal ham ka ngam coeng tih hil ka phah. Cacun bangla ka thiim uh tih
Isaiah42:15 Tlang som rhoek te ka khah vetih a baelhing khaw boeih ka rhae ni. Tuiva te sanglak la ka khueh vetih tuibap khaw ka haang sak ni.
Isaiah42:16 Mikdael rhoek te a ming noek pawh longpuei ah ka pongpa puei ni. A ming uh pawh a hawn ah amih te a hoihaeng ni. Khohmuep khaw amih mikhmuh ah khosae la
Isaiah42:17 Mueithuk dongah aka pangtung tih na mueihloe te
Isaiah42:18 Hnapang rhoek loh ya uh. Mikdael rhoek loh paelki saeh lamtah hmu uh van saeh.
Isaiah42:19 Ka sal phoeiah atah mikdael te unim? Hnapang khaw ka puencawn la ka tueih te unim? Paya bangla aka thuung mikdael neh BOEIPA kah sal bangla mikdael khaw unim?
Isaiah42:20 Na hmuh khaw muep na hmuh uh dae na ngaithuen uh moenih
Isaiah42:21 BOEIPA loh amah kah duengnah dongah hmae tih olkhueng a pomsang nen ni amah thangpom uh.
Isaiah42:22 Pilnam he a poelyoe tih a rheth coeng. Amih boeih te a khui ah khoep a tlaeng tih thong im ah a thuh uh. Te vaengah maeh la poeh tih hlang loh a muk te huul uh pawh. Te vaengah mael laeh aka ti khaw om pawh.
Isaiah42:23 Nangmih ah unim he hna a kaeng vetih
Isaiah42:24 Jakob te muk la muk ham
Isaiah42:25 Te dongah anih te a kosi thintoek neh a hawk thil tih caem kah tlungalnah neh a kaepvai ah a hlawp coeng. Tedae ming pawt tih a taeng a dom pah te khaw a lungbuei ah dueh pawh.
Isaiah43:1 Jakob nang aka suen tih Israel nang aka hlom Yahovah loh tahae ah tah
Isaiah43:2 Tui te na kat vaengah nang taengah ka om vetih tuiva loh nang n'yo mahpawh. Hmai dongah na caeh vaengah na duih mahpawh. Hmaisai long khaw nang te n'dom mahpawh.
Isaiah43:3 Kai tah Yahovah na Pathen
Isaiah43:4 Ka mikhmuh ah na phutlo tih n'thangpom coeng. Kai khaw nang kan lungnah tih nang yueng la hlang taengah
Isaiah43:5 Nang taengah kang om puei dongah rhih boeh. Na tiingan te khocuk lamloh kam pawk puei vetih namah te khotlak lamloh kan coi ni.
Isaiah43:6 tlangpuei taengah pae laeh
Isaiah43:7 ka ming neh ka khue boeih te hang khuen
Isaiah43:8 Mikdael mik neh hnapang hna aka om pilnam te khuen laeh.
Isaiah43:9 Namtom boeih te tun coi uh thae tih namtu rhoek khaw tingtun uh. Hekah he amih taengah unim aka puen tih lamhma kah te mamih taengah aka yaak sak. Amamih kah laipai te tloeng saeh lamtah tang uh saeh. Te vaengah ya uh saeh lamtah oltak te thui uh saeh.
Isaiah43:10 Nangmih tah kamah kah laipai rhoek ni. BOEIPA kah olphong coeng ni. Ka sal te khaw na ming uh tih kai nan tangnah uh ham ni ka tuek. Te daengah ni kai kamah mikhmuh ah pathen te poeh tarha pawt tih ka hnukah a om pawt ham khaw na yakming uh eh.
Isaiah43:11 Kai
Isaiah43:12 Kamah ka puen tih ka khang coeng. Ka yaak coeng dongah nangmih taengah kholong a om moenih. Nangmih tah kai laipai rhoek ni. “Kai tah Pathen ni” a ti he khaw BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Isaiah43:13 A tue khohnin dongah khaw kamah coeng hoeh
Isaiah43:14 Nangmih aka tlan BOEIPA
Isaiah43:15 Kai nangmih kah Yahovah cim
Isaiah43:16 Tuitunli ah longpuei aka khueh tih tui len dongah aka hawn BOEIPA loh
Isaiah43:17 Rhenten yalh khungdaeng tih a thoh uh kolla
Isaiah43:18 hnukbuet te poek voel boel lamtah yan kah te khaw thoelh uh boeh.
Isaiah43:19 Kai loh a thai la ka saii te poe coeng he. Khosoek ah longpuei
Isaiah43:20 Ka coelh ka pilnam tul ham khopong kah tuiva tui te khosoek ah ka paek. Te dongah kohong mulhing pongui neh kalauk vanu loh kai n'thangpom.
Isaiah43:21 Kamah ham ka hlom pilnam loh kai koehnah mah tae uh saeh.
Isaiah43:22 Tedae Jakob loh kai he nan khue pawt tih Israel loh kai ham na kohnue coeng.
Isaiah43:23 Na hmueihhlutnah boiva te kai taengla nang khuen moenih. Na hmueih nen khaw kai nan thangpom moenih. Khocang nen khaw nang tho kan thueng sak pawt tih hmueihtui nen khaw nang kan kohnue sak moenih.
Isaiah43:24 Canhnam an te kai hamla tangka neh na lai moenih. Na hmueih tha nen khaw kai nan hmilhmal sak moenih. Tedae na tholhnah neh kai taengah tho na thueng tih
Isaiah43:25 Kai
Isaiah43:26 Kai he n'thoelh lah
Isaiah43:27 Na pa cuek te tholh rhoe tih nang kah oldoe rhoek loh kai taengah boe a koek uh.
Isaiah43:28 Te dongah hmuencim mangpa te ka poeih vetih Jakob te yaehtaboeih la
Isaiah44:1 Ka sal Jakob neh ka coelh Israel loh hnatun laeh.
Isaiah44:2 Hekah nang aka saii Yahovah long ni a thui. Te dongah bungko khuiah nang aka hlinsai loh nang m'bom ni. Ka sal Jakob nang rhih boeh
Isaiah44:3 Tuihalh te tui neh
Isaiah44:4 Te vaengah rhahlawn tui taengkah tuirhi bangla sulrham lakli ah daih ni.
Isaiah44:5 He long khaw
Isaiah44:6 Israel manghai Yahovah neh anih aka tlan caempuei BOEIPA loh
Isaiah44:7 Te dongah kamah bangla aka om te unim? Khue saeh lamtah doek lah saeh. Khosuen kah pilnam ka khueh parhi te ka hmaiah tael lah saeh. Aka thoeng tih aka thoeng ham te khaw a taengah puen uh.
Isaiah44:8 Rhih boeh
Isaiah44:9 Amih mueithuk aka hlinsai boeih khaw a honghi ni. A sanaep nen khaw a hoeikhang uh moenih. Amih loh amamih kah laipai rhoek khaw hmu uh pawt tih a ming uh pawt dongah yah a poh uh.
Isaiah44:10 Unim pathen aka picai tih a hoeikhang pawt ham mueithuk aka hloe?
Isaiah44:11 Anih hui rhoek tah boeih yak uh pawn ni ke. Amih kah kutthai rhoek te hlang boeiloeih ni. Amih te boeih coi uh thae saeh lamtah pai uh saeh. A rhih uh vetih rhenten yak uh ni.
Isaiah44:12 Kutthai loh thi tubael te hmaisa-aek neh a saii. Thilung neh a hlinsai tih a thadueng ban neh a saii. A lamlum vaengah thadueng bawt tih tui a ok pawt dongah tawnba.
Isaiah44:13 Kutthai loh thing te a rhi a nueh tih thisum neh a rhuen. Suet neh a yael tih cumkai neh a hiil. Te phoeiah im ah hol hamla hlang kah a muei la
Isaiah44:14 Te ham te lamphai khaw a saii tih yongmai neh thingnu khaw a loh. Te ham te duup kah thing caang neh rhumrhet thing khaw a phung tih khonal neh a rhoeng sak.
Isaiah44:15 Hlang kah a toih ham khaw a om pah. Amah te a loh bal tih pahoi a om. A cum bal tih buh a thong nah. Pathen la nunan a saii tih a saii mueithuk te a bawk tih a buluk thil.
Isaiah44:16 A ngancawn te hmai dongah a hoeh
Isaiah44:17 A meet te pathen la
Isaiah44:18 A mik loh a hmuh tih a lungbuei loh a cangbam ham khaw malh a bol coeng dongah ming uh pawt tih yakming pawh.
Isaiah44:19 A lungbuei khaw a taengla mael pah pawh. Mingnah khueh pawt tih a lungcuei khaw om pawh. “A ngancawn te hmai dongah ka hoeh tih a alh dongah buh ka thong. Maeh ka hai tih ka caak. A coih te khaw tueilaehkoi la ka saii saeh lamtah thingkung thinglong taengah ka buluk eh
Isaiah44:20 Hmaiphu kah aka luem rhoek loh a lungbuei omsaa tih amah a phaelh sak. A hinglu te a huul thai pawt dongah
Isaiah44:21 He rhoek he Jakob neh Israel loh thoelh saeh. Nang tah kai kah sal ni. Nang te kamah taengah sal la ka hlinsai coeng. Nang Israel loh kai nan hnilh voel mahpawh.
Isaiah44:22 Na boekoek te khomai bangla
Isaiah44:23 BOEIPA loh a saii coeng dongah vaan rhoek te tamhoe laeh. Diklai laedil rhoek khaw yuhui uh laeh. Tlang rhoek loh duup puei tamlung neh a khuikah thing rho boeih te rhong puei saeh. BOEIPA loh Jakob a tlan tih Israel soah khaw kohang coeng.
Isaiah44:24 Nang aka tlan tih bungko khuiah nang aka hlinsai BOEIPA loh
Isaiah44:25 Olsai kah miknoek te aka phae tih
Isaiah44:26 A sal kah ol a thoh tih a puencawn kah cilsuep te a thuung. Jerusalem kah aka thui te kho a sak sak saeh lamtah Judah khopuei rhoek te khoeng uh saeh. Te vaengah a imrhong te ka thoh bitni.
Isaiah44:27 Tuidung te
Isaiah44:28 Cyrus te kamah kah boiva aka dawn ni ka ti. Ka hue ngaih boeih khaw han thuung ni. Jerusalem te khoeng saeh lamtah bawkim khaw suen saeh ka ti.
Isaiah45:1 Amah kah a koelh Cyrus te BOEIPA loh
Isaiah45:2 Kamah he na mikhmuh ah ka pongpa vetih ngoem te ka nolh rhoe ka nolh ni. Rhohum thohkhaih te ka thuk vetih thi thohkalh ka tloek ni.
Isaiah45:3 Hmaisuep khuikah thakvoh neh a huephael kah kawn te nang taengah kam paek bitni. Te daengah ni BOEIPA kamah he na ming neh aka khue Israel Pathen la na ming eh.
Isaiah45:4 Ka sal Jakob neh ka coelh Israel ham nang te na ming nen ni kang khue. Kai nan ming pawt cakhaw nang kan mingkhaep coeng.
Isaiah45:5 Kai he Yahovah ni. Kai kah a voelah a tloe a om moenih
Isaiah45:6 Kai Yahovah kamah pawt atah a tloe om pawt tih a tloe a om pawt te khocuk khomik taeng lamloh khotlak duela ming uh saeh.
Isaiah45:7 Vangnah aka hlinsai tih a hmuep aka suen. Rhoepnah aka saii tih boethae aka suen. Te rhoek boeih aka saii khaw BOEIPA kamah ni.
Isaiah45:8 Vaan khaw a so lamkah ha pha lamtah khomong khaw duengnah ha sih saeh. Diklai te ong uh saeh lamtah daemnah loh thaihsu saeh. Duengnah khaw cuen laeh saeh. Te te kai Yahovah long ni ka suen.
Isaiah45:9 Anunae
Isaiah45:10 Anunae
Isaiah45:11 Israel kah Yahovah cim neh anih aka hlinsai loh
Isaiah45:12 Kai loh diklai khaw diklai hman kah hlang khaw ka saii. Kai loh ka suen tangtae vaan ke khaw kamah kut loh a dih tih a caenmpuei rhoek khaw boeih ka uen.
Isaiah45:13 Anih te duengnah dongah ka haeng vetih a longpuei te boeih ka dueng pah ni. Anih loh kai kah khopuei te a khoeng vetih ka hlangsol la a tueih ni. A phu khaw thui mahpawh
Isaiah45:14 BOEIPA loh Egypt kah thaphu khaw
Isaiah45:15 Namah tah Israel Pathen
Isaiah45:16 Amih te thikat la boeih yak uh vetih a hmaithae uh bal ni. Muei saii kutthai rhoek te mingthae neh van uh ni.
Isaiah45:17 Israel te BOEIPA loh kumhal loeihnah dongah a khang ni. Kumhal ah a yoeyah la na yak voel pawt vetih na hmaithae voel mahpawh.
Isaiah45:18 He khaw vaan aka suen BOEIPA long ni a thui. Pathen amah loh diklai a hlom tih a saii. Diklai he pawmpam la om pawt ham a soepsoei phoeiah khosa rhoek ham a suen tih a hlinsai pah. BOEIPA kamah phoeiah a tloe a om moenih.
Isaiah45:19 A huephael neh diklai hmaisuep hmuen ah ka thui moenih. Jakob tiingan taengah khaw a honghi la kai n'tlap ka ti nah moenih. Duengnah aka thui BOEIPA kamah loh vanat la ka puen.
Isaiah45:20 Namtom hlangyong rhoek te coi uh thae lamtah ha kun uh laeh. Thikat la ha mop uh laeh. Amamih kah mueithuk thing a phueih nawn khaw ming uh pawt tih aka khang thai pawh pathen taengah thangthui uh.
Isaiah45:21 Puen uh lamtah ha mop uh lah. Tun ah khaw uen uh thae saeh. Hlamat lamloh aka yaak sak tih dingkhoi dingrhae la aka puen te unim? BOEIPA kamah moenih a? Duengnah Pathen kamah pawt atah Pathen tloe om pawh. Kai phoeiah he khangkung om moenih.
Isaiah45:22 Diklai khobawt boeih loh kai taengla ha mael uh lamtah khang la om uh lah. Kai Pathen phoeiah Pathen koep a om moenih.
Isaiah45:23 Kamah loh ka toemngam coeng dongah ka ka lamloh aka thoeng duengnah ol tah balkhong voel mahpawh. Kai taengah khuklu boeih a cungkueng vetih ol boeih a caeng ni.
Isaiah45:24 Kai BOEIPA bueng dongah ni duengnah neh a sarhi la a thui eh. Amah taengah aka lungoe rhoek khaw a taengla ha pawk uh vetih boeih yak uh ni.
Isaiah45:25 Israel kah tiingan boeih tah BOEIPA rhangneh tang uh vetih a thangthen uh ni.
Isaiah46:1 Bel te koisu tih Nebo khun coeng. Amih kah muei te mulhing neh rhamsa dongah om. Na hnohoei pataeng buhmueh rhathih ham tah hnorhih la a tloeng.

Isaiah53:2 Tedae a mikhmuh ah cahni banglam khaw rhamrhae diklai lamkah thing yung bangla rhoeng. Anih te a suisak om pawt tih rhuepomnah om pawh. Anih te m'hmuh vaengah a mueimae a om pawt dongah nim anih te n'nai uh eh.
Isaiah53:3 A hnaep uh tih hlang kah a hnawt a khoe la poeh. Nganboh aka yook hlang neh tloh aka ming la om. A maelhmai aka hlip bangla a hnaep dongah anih te n'nawtna uh pawh.
Isaiah53:4 Mamih kah tlohtat te amah loh a phueih tih mamih kah nganboh te khaw a tloeng thil. Tedae kaimih loh anih te Pathen kah a ben neh a ngawn tih a phaep la m'poek uh.
Isaiah53:5 Mamih boekoek dongah anih poeih uh. Mamih kah thaesainah kongah anih te a phop. Mamih kah rhoepnah ham thuituennah te anih dongla cul. A boengha loh mamih he n'hoeih sak.
Isaiah53:6 Mamih boeih he tu bangla kho m'hmang uh. Hlang long he amah mah kah khosing la n'hooi uh coeng. Te dongah mamih boeih kah thaesainah te BOEIPA loh anih pum dongah a hong.
Isaiah53:7 Anih a tueihno tih a phaep dae maeh la a khuen boiva bangla a ka ang pawh. Tumanu bangla a mul aka vok pah mikhmuh ah tum uh tih a ka ang pawh.
Isaiah53:8 Thongtla neh laitloeknah dongah a khuen. A thawnpuei te unim aka lolmang eh? Ka pilnam kah boekoek neh amih kah tloh kongah anih vik te mulhing khohmuen lamloh a hlap.

Isaiah54:10 “Tlang rhoek te nong uh tih som rhoek ke tuen uh cakhaw kai kah sitlohnah he nang taeng lamloh nong mahpawh. Kai kah rhoepnah paipi tah tuen mahpawh
Isaiah54:11 Mangdaeng loh a thikthuek khaw damti pawh. Kai loh namah kah canglung lungto neh kan kol sak dongah minhum dongah nang kan hol bitni.
Isaiah54:12 Na puthue te aithilung
