Jeremiah46:1 BOEIPA ol he Namtom ham tonghma Jeremiah taengla ha pawk.
Jeremiah46:2 Judah manghai Josiah capa Jehoiakim kah a kum li dongah Perath tuiva kaep aha aka om tih
Jeremiah46:3 photlingca neh photlinglen neh rhongpai uh lamtah caemtloek ham thoeih uh laeh.
Jeremiah46:4 Marhang te khit uh lamtah marhang caem khaw cet laeh saeh. Lumuek neh pai uh lamtah cai te met uh laeh. Caempho te bai uh laeh.
Jeremiah46:5 Balae tih a paep neh a hnuk la aka balkhong te ka hmuh. Amih kah hlangrhalh rhoek khaw dae uh tih thuhaelhnah khuila rhaelrham uh coeng. Te dongah kaepvai kah rhihnah te mael uh thil pawh. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah46:6 Kapyang khaw rhaelrham thai pawt tih hlangrhalh khaw loeih thai pawh. Tlangpuei kah Perath tuiva hmoi ah paloe uh tih cungku uh.
Jeremiah46:7 Sokko bangla aka phul tih tuiva tui bangla aka tuen he unim?
Jeremiah46:8 Egypt tah sokko bangla phul tih tuiva tui bangla tuen. Te dongah
Jeremiah46:9 Marhang rhoek te cet lamtah leng rhoek te yan uh laeh. Kusah hlangrhalh rhoek neh photlingca aka pom Put rhoek khaw
Jeremiah46:10 Tedae te khohnin tah
Jeremiah46:11 Egypt nu
Jeremiah46:12 Na yah te namtom loh a yaak vetih na henah te diklai ah khawk ni. Hlangrhalh soah hlangrhalh khaw paloe uh rhoi vetih a rhenten la cungku rhoi ni.
Jeremiah46:13 Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh Egypt khohmuen tloek ham ha pawk vaengah he ol he BOEIPA loh tonghma Jeremiah taengah a thui.
Jeremiah46:14 Egypt taengah puen lamtah Migdol ah khaw yaak sak. Noph neh Tahpanhes ah khaw yaak sak. “Pai uh lamtah namah ham rhuengphong laeh
Jeremiah46:15 Aka lueng nang te balae tih ng'kawt mai eh? Anih te BOEIPA loh a thaek vetih pai tloel ni.
Jeremiah46:16 Hlang loh a hui soah a cungku khaw paloe neh a khoep hae. Te dongah
Jeremiah46:17 “Tingtunnah aka paan tah longlonah Egypt manghai Pharaoh
Jeremiah46:18 Kai hingnah manghai olphong tah a ming khaw caempuei BOEIPA ni. Te dongah tlang ah Tabor bangla
Jeremiah46:19 Egypt nu taengkah khosa loh namah ham vangsawn hnopai te saii laeh. Noph te imsuep la om vetih khosa a om pawt hil a hnueih ni.
Jeremiah46:20 Egypt bawnthen vaito aw tlangpuei lamkah pilyang ha pawk rhoe ha pawk coeng.
Jeremiah46:21 A kutloh rhoek khaw a kotak ah vaitoca bangla toitup. Amih te oeih
Jeremiah46:22 A ol te rhul a colh vaengkah bangla
Jeremiah46:23 He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. A duup te a hum pah ni. Kaisih lakah khaw a puh dongah hoem lek pawt tih amih te tae lek pawh.
Jeremiah46:24 Tlangpuei pilnam kut ah a paek vaengah Egypt nu te yak bitni.
Jeremiah46:25 Israel Pathen caempuei BOEIPA loh
Jeremiah46:26 Amih te a hinglu aka toem kut ah
Jeremiah46:27 Ka sal Jakob nang rhih boel lamtah Israel nang khaw rhihyawp boel saeh. Nang te khohla lamloh
Jeremiah46:28 Ka sal Jakob nang rhih boeh. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Nang taengah ka om tih namtom boeih kah a boeihnah te ka khueh coeng. Te ah te nang kang heh cakhaw nang kah a bawtnah te ka saii moenih. Nang te tiktamnah neh kan thuituen vetih nang te kam hmil rhoe kam hmil mahpawh.
Jeremiah47:1 Gaza Pharaoh a ngawn hlanah Philisti ham BOEIPA ol te tonghma Jeremiah taengla ha pawk.
Jeremiah47:2 He ni BOEIPA loh a thui. Tlangpuei lamkah tui ha phul tih soklong la poeh coeng ke. A long vaengah khohmuen neh a khopuei boeih neh a khuikah khosa te a yo ni. Te vaengah hlang te pang vetih khohmuen kah khosa khaw boeih rhung ni.
Jeremiah47:3 A marhang lueng kah khomae kah rhetlonah ol ah
Jeremiah47:4 Philisti pum rhoelrhak ham khaw
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza te lungawng la om vetih Ashkelon khaw hmata ni. A tuikol kah a meet te me hil nim na hlap ve?
Jeremiah47:6 Anunae BOEIPA kah cunghang aih
Jeremiah47:7 Metlam na mong pai eh? BOEIPA loh Ashkelon ham te te a uen tih tuipuei langkaeng ham khaw pahoi a khueh coeng.
Jeremiah48:1 Israel Pathen caempuei BOEIPA loh Moab ham he ni a thui. Anunae Nebo aih te
Jeremiah48:2 Moab koehnah te koep om mahpawh. Heshbon ah anih te a moeh tih boethae loh a pongpa thil. Madmen khaw namtom lamloh saii uh sih. Namah hnukah cunghang loh m'paan daengah na kuemsuem bitni.
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim lamkah rhoelrhanah pangngawlnah ol neh pocinah tanglue aih te.
Jeremiah48:4 Moab te bawt vetih a pang te a canoi loh a yaak ni.
Jeremiah48:5 Luhith kah Luhith tangkham te a rhah a rhah doeah luei. Horonaim singling ah khaw rhal taengkah pocinah pangngawlnah te a yaak uh.
Jeremiah48:6 Rhaelrham lamtah na hinglu ham poenghal puei laeh. Khosoek kah koknai bangla na om coeng.
Jeremiah48:7 Na bibi neh na thakvoh dongah na pangtung dongah namah khaw n'tuuk pawn ni. Khemosh kah a khosoih rhoek neh a mangpa rhoek vangsawn la rhenten a khuen ni.
Jeremiah48:8 Khopuei tom ah aka rhoelrhak te ha pawk vetih khopuei te loeih mahpawh. BOEIPA loh a thui coeng dongah tuikol loh moelh vetih tlangkol tim ni.
Jeremiah48:9 Moab te ding sak ham a phae pae lamtah khuen laeh saeh. A khopuei te imsuep la om vetih a khuiah khosa om mahpawh.
Jeremiah48:10 Vuelvaeknah neh BOEIPA kah bitat aka saii tah thae a phoei coeng tih ak thii lamloh a cunghang aka hloh khaw thae a phoei thil.
Jeremiah48:11 Moab he a camoe lamloh rhalthal tih a sampa dongah mong te. Am khat lamloh am khat dongla kong noek pawt tih vangsawn la a caeh noek moenih. A khuikah a omih te cak tangloeng tih a bo khaw sap pawh.
Jeremiah48:12 Te dongah BOEIPA kah olphong khohnin ha pawk tangloeng he. Hlang aka khuum rhoek te a taengla ka tueih vetih anih a khuum uh ni. A am te a khawk pah vetih a khap a thaeh pah ni.
Jeremiah48:13 A pangtungnah Bethel kah Israel imkhui a yah bangla Khemosh kongah Moab te yak ni.
Jeremiah48:14 Balae tih
Jeremiah48:15 Moab a rhoelrhak vetih a khuen ni. A tongpang hlangrhoei rhoek te a maeh la suntla uh ni. A ming dongah caempuei BOEIPA manghai kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah48:16 Moab rhainah ha pawk ham yoei coeng tih a boethae loh bahoeng loe ni.
Jeremiah48:17 A kaepvai boeih neh a ming aka ming boeih loh anih te a suem uh tih
Jeremiah48:18 Dibon nu dongkah khosa rhoek aw thangpomnah dongkah khosak lamloh rhum lamtah tuihalh dongla ngol uh laeh. Moab aka rhoelrhak loh nang te m'paan vetih na hmuencak te a phae ni.
Jeremiah48:19 Longpuei taengah pai lamtah Aroer khosa rhoek ke tawt ne. Aka rhaelrham pa neh aka loeih nu te dawt lamtah
Jeremiah48:20 Moab khaw rhihyawp tih yak coeng. Rhung la
Jeremiah48:21 Te dongah ah laitloeknah he tlangkol khohmuen la
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon la
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaim la
Jeremiah48:24 Kerioth la
Jeremiah48:25 Moab ki ngun coeng tih a ban khaw khaem coeng. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah48:26 BOEIPA te a pantai thil dongah anih te rhuihmil sak. Te daengah ni Moab te a lok dongah kut a paeng vetih amah khaw nueihbu la a om eh.
Jeremiah48:27 Israel khaw nang ham tah nueihbu la a om het pawt nim? Na ol neh anih na hnet dingdoeng bangla hlanghuen lakli ah a hmuh khaw a hmuh a?
Jeremiah48:28 Moab khosa rhoek aw khopuei te hnoo uh lamtah thaelpang ah khosa uh. Rhalvangan kah rhom rhai ah butuk uh lamtah
Jeremiah48:29 Moab kah hoemdamnah neh thinthah pangkha la a oeknah neh a hoemdamnah khaw
Jeremiah48:30 Kai tah BOEIPA kah a thinpom olphong khaw ka ming dae a olsai tangloeng pawt tih a saii van moenih.
Jeremiah48:31 Te dongah Moab ham ka rhung tangloeng coeng
Jeremiah48:32 Jazer kah a rhah lakah Sibam misur nang ham ka rhap. Na baek te tuipuei la yam tih Jazer tuipuei duela a pha. Na khohal thaih neh na misurbit te aka rhoelrhak loh a cuhu sak.
Jeremiah48:33 Kohoenah neh omngaihnah he cangphil cangngol lamkah
Jeremiah48:34 Heshbon lamkah kah a pang te Elealeh duela
Jeremiah48:35 He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Moab kah hmuensang ah aka pongpa tih a pathen taengah aka phum rhoek te ka kangkuen sak ni.
Jeremiah48:36 Te dongah ka lungbuei he Moab ham tah phitphoet bangla cai tih ka lungbuei he Kirhareseth hlang ham phitphoet bangla cai. Te dongah koeva a tung te paltham coeng.
Jeremiah48:37 A lu khaw boeih lungawng tih hmuimul khaw boeih a kuet uh. A kut hma khaw cungkuem tih
Jeremiah48:38 Moab imphu tom neh a toltung tom ah a rhaengsae uh. Moab te a ngaih pawh hnopai bangla ka phaek coeng. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah48:39 Rhihyawp tih rhung kanoek a? Moab loh rhawn a maelh te yak kanoek a? Te dongah Moab he nueihbu la
Jeremiah48:40 He ni BOEIPA loh a thui.atha bangla ding tih Moab soah a phae a khuk.
Jeremiah48:41 Kerioth te a tuuk vetih rhalmahim te a loh pah ni. Te khohnin ah tah Moab hlangrhalh lungbuei ah huta puencak kah lungbuei bangla om ni.
Jeremiah48:42 BOEIPA te a taloeh thil dongah Moab he pilnam lamloh mitmoeng ni.
Jeremiah48:43 Moab khosa nang ham birhihnah rhom neh pael om coeng lah ko. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah48:44 Ngaihuet neh birhihnah hmai lamloh aka rhaelrham te rhom ah cungku ni. Rhom lamloh aka yoeng te khaw pael neh a boh ni. Moab loh sokah a cawhnah kum te amah soah ka thoeng sak ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah48:45 Heshbon hlip ah aka pai te Heshbon lamkah hmai loh a coe thil tih thadueng om kolla rhaelrham coeng. Te vaengah Sihon laklo lamkah hmaisai loh Moab baengki neh longlonah ca rhoek kah luki te a hlawp pah.
Jeremiah48:46 Anunae Moab nang aih te
Jeremiah48:47 Hmailong tue ah tah Moab thongtla te ka mael puei ni. BOEIPA kah olphong coeng ni. He hil he Moab ham laitloeknah coeng ni.
Jeremiah49:1 BOEIPA loh Ammon ca rhoek ham he ni a thui. Israel te a ca om pawt tih anih aka pang khaw a om moenih a? Balae tih Gad Milkom loh a huul tih a khopuei kah a pilnam kho a sak.
Jeremiah49:2 Te dongah BOEIPA kah olphong khohnin ha pawk tangloeng coeng he. Ammon koca Rabbah ah caemtloek tamlung ka yaak coeng tih khopong imrhong la poeh ni. A tanu te hmai neh a hlup uh ni. Amah aka huul rhoek te Israel loh koep a huul ni. He tah BOEIPA long ni a thui.
Jeremiah49:3 Ai te a rhoelrhak dongah Heshbon nang rhung laeh. Rabbah nu rhoek pang uh lamtah tlamhni vah laeh. Rhaengsae lamtah tanglung khuiah tinghil laeh. Milkom neh a khosoih rhoek
Jeremiah49:4 Hnukmael nu aw
Jeremiah49:5 Na kaepvai boeih lamkah birhihnah te kai loh nang soah ka thoeng sak ni. He tah ka Boeipa caempuei Yahovah kah olphong ni. Hlang loh a mikhmuh ah a heh tih aka yong te khaw coi mahpawh.
Jeremiah49:6 Tedae he phoeiah ni Ammon ca rhoek khuikah thongtla te ka mael puei ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong eh.
Jeremiah49:7 Edom kawng he caempuei BOEIPA loh a thui. Teman ah cueihnah om voel pawt nim? Aka yakming lamkah cilsuep he bing tih amih kah cueihnah khaw awk aih.
Jeremiah49:8 Dedan khosa rhoek te thuh ham rhaelrham lamtah muelh hoihaeng uh laeh. Anih ka cawh tue ah tah Esau kah rhainah te anih soah ka thoeng sak ni.
Jeremiah49:9 Misur ka bit loh na taengla ha pawk koinih a yoep koi khaw a paih mahpawh. Hlanghuen long khaw khoyin ah a ngaih te phae eh.
Jeremiah49:10 Tedae Esau te ka baeh vetih a huephael te ka hliphen pah ni. Te vaengah thuh thai pawt vetih a tiingan neh
Jeremiah49:11 Na cadah rhoek te hnoo lamtah ka hing sak bitni. Te phoeiah na nuhmai ni kai dongah aka pangtung thai.
Jeremiah49:12 BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Amih kah tiktamnah mueh a mam ham aih ke. Boengloeng dongah a mam la a mam uh mai. Te dongah nang te m'hmil khaw m'hmil venim? M'hmil pawt vetih na mam rhoe na mam ni.
Jeremiah49:13 BOEIPA kah olphong neh kamah loh ka toemngam coeng. Bozrah te imsuep la
Jeremiah49:14 Olthang te BOEIPA taeng lamloh ka yaak coeng. Laipai khaw namtom taengah ka tueih coeng. Coi uh thae lamtah anih te paan uh laeh. Te phoeiah caemtloek la thoo uh laeh.
Jeremiah49:15 Nang te namtom taengah tanoe neh hlang taengkah a hnaep la kang khueh ni ne.
Jeremiah49:16 Na mueipuelnah loh nang n'rhaithi coeng. Na lungbuei althanah neh thaelrhaep thaelpang ah aka om. Hmuensang som te na loh tihatha bangla na bu na sang sak cakhaw te lamloh nang te kan suntlak sak ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah49:17 Edom te imsuep la om vetih aka pah boeih khaw a taengah pong uh ni. Te vaengah a hmasoe cungkuem neh hlip ni.
Jeremiah49:18 Sodom
Jeremiah49:19 Sathueng bangla Jordan mingthennah lamloh tolkhoeng puei la cet coeng ke. Anih so lamloh ka hoep uh vetih ka cungpoeh ni. Anih te coelh ham unim ka khueh eh? Kamah bang he unim
Jeremiah49:20 Te dongah BOEIPA loh Edom ham a uen cilsuep neh Teman khosa taengah a moeh a kopoek te hnatun uh. Boiva ca a koeng pah pawt atah a tolkhoeng khaw amih kongah pong mahpawt nim?
Jeremiah49:21 Amih kah cungku ol ah diklai he hinghuen vetih pangngawlnah ol te carhaek tuipuei duela a yaak uh ni.
Jeremiah49:22 Thahum bangla luei vetih tih ding ni ne. Te vaengah Bozrah te a phae a khuk thil ni. Te khohnin ah tah Edom hlangrhalh kah lungbuei te puencak nu kah lungbuei bangla om ni.
Jeremiah49:23 Damasku ham olthang thae a yaak dongah Khamath neh Arpad yak coeng. Tuipuei mawnnah dongah paci tih mong thai pawh.
Jeremiah49:24 Damasku te tahah tih rhaelrham ham a mael hatah lueihlaknah loh a cuuk thil. Citcai dongah ca-om nu bangla tharhui loh a doek.
Jeremiah49:25 Ka omthennah khorha koehnah aih he
Jeremiah49:26 Te dongah a toltung ah a tongpang rhoek cungku uh vetih caemtloek hlang boeih khaw te khohnin ah kuemsuem uh ni.
Jeremiah49:27 Damasku vongtung te hmai ka hlup vetih Benhadad impuei khaw a hlawp pah.
Jeremiah49:28 Nebukhanezar
Jeremiah49:29 A dap neh a boiva te a rhawt pa uh ni. A himbaiyan neh a hnopai boeih khaw
Jeremiah49:30 Hazor khosak rhoek loh khosak ham rhaelrham lamtah muelh rhaehba khing mai laeh. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar te nang soah a cilsuep a uen tih a kopoek neh nang soah amih te a moeh.
Jeremiah49:31 Thoo uh lamtah thayoeituipan neh ngaikhuek la aka om namtom te paan uh laeh. Amah bueng te kho a sak uh dongah thohkhaih om pawt tih thohkalh khaw om pawh.
Jeremiah49:32 A kalauk te maeh la
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor khaw kumhal kah khopong pongui kah khuirhung la poeh ni. Teah te hlang loh khosa pawt vetih a khuiah hlang capa khaw bakuep mahpawh.
Jeremiah49:34 Judah manghai Zedekiah a ram a tongcuek vaengah Elam ham BOEIPA ol te tonghma Jeremiah taengla ha pawk.
Jeremiah49:35 “Caempuei BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Elam kah a thayung thamal vueilue lii te ka khaem coeng he.
Jeremiah49:36 Vaan khobawt pali lamkah khohli pali te Elam taengla ka khuen ni. Te khohli cungkuem taengla amih te ka thaek vetih namtom hmuen khaw om mahpawh. Te kah te Elam khuiah Elam kah a heh long pataeng a pha moenih.
Jeremiah49:37 Elam te a thunkha rhoek kah mikhmuh neh a hinglu aka toem rhoek mikhmuh ah ka rhihyawp sak ni. Ka thintoek thinsa te amih soah yoethae la ka thoeng sak ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Amih ka khah duela amih hnukah cunghang neh ka tueih ni.
Jeremiah49:38 Elam ah ka ngolkhoel ka hol vetih te lamkah manghai neh mangpa rhoek te ka milh sak ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah49:39 Tedae hmailong kah khohnin a pha vaengah Elam kah thongtla
Jeremiah50:1 Tonghma Jeremiah kut dongah BOEIPA loh Babylon ham neh Khalden khohmuen ham ol a thui.
Jeremiah50:2 Namtom taengah puen lamtah yaak sak laeh. Rholik te thoh uh lamtah na yaak sak te phah boeh. “Babylon te a loh vetih Bel khaw yak ni
Jeremiah50:3 Tlangpuei lamkah namtom loh anih te a paan vetih a khohmuen te imsuep la a khueh ni. A khuiah khosa ham hlang om pawt vetih rhamsa ni rhaehba ham a pongpa eh.
Jeremiah50:4 BOEIPA kah olphong khohnin kah a tue vaengah tah amih Israel ca rhoek neh Judah ca he tun pongpa ham ha pawk uh ni. Te vaengah a rhah neh pongpa uh vetih BOEIPA a Pathen te a toem uh ni.
Jeremiah50:5 A maelhmai a hooi uh vetih Zion longpuei te a dawt uh ni. Ha pawk uh vaengah BOEIPA taengla naep uh vetih kumhal kah paipi te hnilh mahpawh.
Jeremiah50:6 Ka pilnam he boiva aka milh bangla om rhoe om coeng. Amih aka dawn loh amih te kho a hmang sak tih tlang ah hnukcol la mael sak. Tlang lamloh som la luei uh tih a kolhmuen te a hnilh uh.
Jeremiah50:7 Amih te aka hmu sarhui loh ngaeh uh ni. A rhal rhoek loh
Jeremiah50:8 Babylon lakli lamloh rhaehba lamtah Khalden khohmuen lamloh coe rhoe coe uh laeh. Boiva kah mikhmuh ah kikong bangla om uh.
Jeremiah50:9 Tlangpuei khohmuen lamloh namtom pilnu hlangping te ka haeng tih Babylon taengla ka thak coeng he. Anih te rhong a pai thil vetih a thaltang khaw pahoi a rhawt pah ni. Hlangrhalh tah cakol bangla kuttling la mael mahpawh.
Jeremiah50:10 Khalden khaw anih aka buem boeih kah kutbuem la om vetih cung uh ni.
Jeremiah50:11 Na kohoe la hoe uh tih kai kah rho aka tukvat uh loh na sundaep la na sundaep uh. Cang aka til vaito bangla na pet na pet uh tih na hlampan khaw vaito lueng bangla na hlampan uh.
Jeremiah50:12 Na nu te yak vetih nang aka cun khaw namtom thaihdong
Jeremiah50:13 BOEIPA kah a thinhul ah khosa uh pawt vetih a pum la khopong la poeh ni. Babylon kah aka cet boeih tah pong vetih a hmasoe cungkuem ah hlip ni.
Jeremiah50:14 Lii aka pom boeih Babylon kaepvai ah rhongpai uh lamtah anih te omtoem uh laeh. BOEIPA taengah a tholh dongah thaltang te hnaih uh boeh.
Jeremiah50:15 Anih te a kaepvai ah yuhui thil uh. A kut kha tih a yung yung ah cungku coeng. BOEIPA kah tawnlohnah dongah khaw a vongtung khaw koengloeng uh coeng. Anih sokah phu a loh bangla a taengah saii rhoe saii pah.
Jeremiah50:16 Babylon lamkah lo aka tawn neh cangah tue ah vinkui aka pom te saii laeh. Aka vuelvaek kah cunghang hman ah hlang he amah pilnam taengla mael saeh lamtah hlang he amah khohmuen la rhaelrham saeh.
Jeremiah50:17 Israel khaw sathueng kah a yaal tu bangla a heh coeng. Lamhma ah Assyria manghai loh a yoop tih a hmailong he Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh a khat pah.
Jeremiah50:18 Te dongah Israel Pathen caempuei BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Assyria manghai taengah ka cawh bangla Babylon manghai neh a khohmuen te ka cawh coeng ne.
Jeremiah50:19 Tedae Israel te amah tolkhoeng la ka mael vetih Karmel neh Bashan ah
Jeremiah50:20 Te khohnin neh BOEIPA kah olphong tue ah Israel kah thaesainah te tlap cakhaw om mahpawh. Judah tholhnah te khaw hmu uh mahpawh. Ka hlun rhoek te khodawk ka ngai ni.
Jeremiah50:21 Merathaim khohmuen amah te paan uh. Pekod khosa rhoek te khap uh lamtah amih hnukkah te thup uh. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Te dongah nang kang uen te a cungkuem la saii uh.
Jeremiah50:22 Khohmuen kah caemtloek ol neh pocinah tanglue aih te.
Jeremiah50:23 Diklai pum kah kilung tah tlawt tih paep coeng. Balae tih Babylon he namtom lakli ah imsuep la a poeh.
Jeremiah50:24 Babylon aw na ming pawt vaengah nang kan hlaeh tih na man van coeng. BOEIPA te na huek dongah ni m'hmuh tih n'tuuk van.
Jeremiah50:25 BOEIPA loh a thakvoh te a ong tih Khalden khohmuen ah caempuei Yahovah Boeipa kah bitat ham a kosi hnopai te a poh coeng.
Jeremiah50:26 Khobawt lamloh anih te paan laeh. A cangboh te ong lamtah
Jeremiah50:27 A vaito khaw boeih kaeh pah uh lamtah maeh la suntla uh saeh. Anunae amih aih te
Jeremiah50:28 Babylon khohmuen lamloh rhaelrham neh hlangyong rhoek ol loh Mamih BOEIPA Pathen kah tawnlohnah neh a bawkim kah tawnlohnah ni Zion ah a doek eh.
Jeremiah50:29 Lithen Babylon la yaak sak uh. Lii aka kap boeih loh a kaepvai ah rhaeh uh. A khuikah te rhalyong la om boel saeh. A khoboe bangla amah te thuung uh. Israel kah a cim BOEIPA taengah a lokhak dongah a saii boeih te a taengah saii uh.
Jeremiah50:30 Te dongah a tongpang rhoek te a toltung ah cungku uh ni. Te khohnin ah anih kah caemtloek hlang boeih khaw kuemsuem uh ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah50:31 He tah caempuei Yahovah ka Boeipa kah olphong ni. Nang taengah ka altha he khaw
Jeremiah50:32 Althanah te paloe vetih cungku ni. Anih aka thoh te om mahpawh. A khopuei ah hmai ka hlup vetih a kaepvai boeih a hlawp ni.
Jeremiah50:33 Caempuei BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Israel ca neh Judah ca te rhenten a hnaemtaek uh. Amih aka sol boeih loh amih te a parhaeng uh tih amih hlah ham a aal uh.
Jeremiah50:34 Amih aka tlan tah tlungluen tih a ming khaw caempuei YAHWEH ni. Amih kah tuituknah te a oelh rhoe a oelh pah ni. Te daengah ni khohmuen te a hoep vetih Babylon khosa rhoek te a tlai sak eh.
Jeremiah50:35 BOEIPA olphong bangla cunghang te Khalden taeng neh Babylon khosa rhoek taengah
Jeremiah50:36 cunghang te olsai taengah ka tueih vetih nga uh ni. cunghang te a hlangrhalh rhoek taengah ka tueih vetih rhihyawp uh ni.
Jeremiah50:37 cunghang te a marhang taeng neh a leng taengah
Jeremiah50:38 Te mueidaep khohmuen neh mueirhih dongah a yan uh te a tui sokah kholing loh a rhae bitni.
Jeremiah50:39 Te dongah kohong sa-ui neh kho a sak uh vetih a khuiah tuirhuk vanu loh kho a sak ni. Te vaengah a yoeyah la khosa voel pawt vetih cadilcahma phoeikah cadilcahma duela khosa mahpawh.
Jeremiah50:40 He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Pathen loh Sodom neh Gomorrah neh a imben rhoek imrhong la a khueh bangla hlang loh khosa pawt vetih a khuiah hlang capa loh bakuep mahpawh.
Jeremiah50:41 Tlangpuei lamkah pilnam ha pawk coeng ke. Te vaengah diklai khobawt lamkah namtom pilnu neh maghai boeiping rhoek khaw haenghang uh.
Jeremiah50:42 Amih muenying muenyang loh lii neh soe a pom uh tih haidam uh pawh. A ol te tuipuei bangla kawk. Te phoeiah Babylon nu nang taengkah caemtloek ham te marhang dongah ngol uh tih hlang bangla rhong a pai.
Jeremiah50:43 Amih kah olthang te Babylon manghai loh a yaak vaengah a kut khaw tahah coeng. Citcai loh anih te ca-om bangla bungtloh neh a kolek.
Jeremiah50:44 Sathueng bangla Jordan kah mingthennah lamloh tangkuek tolkhoeng la cet. Amih te ka hoep vetih te lamloh ka yong rhoe ka yong sak ni. Anih aka coelh te khaw ka cawh ta. Kamah bangla unim aka tih unim kai aka tuentah? He he unim aka dawn tih ka mikhmuh ah unim aka pai thai?
Jeremiah50:45 Te dongah Babylon ham a uen BOEIPA kah cilsuep neh Khalden khohmuen ham a kopoek a moeh te hnatun uh. Boiva ca rhoek te a sol kuekluek pawt vetih a tolkhoeng ah pong kuekluek mahpawt nim?
Jeremiah50:46 Babylon a tuuk ol dongah diklai tuen vetih a pang te namtom lakli ah a yaak ni.
Jeremiah51:1 BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Kutcaihnah mueihla te Babylon taeng neh
Jeremiah51:2 Babylon taengah kholong rhoek neh anih aka vam te ka tueih ni. A yoethae hnin ah tah a khohmuen te a kaepvai ah a om thil vetih a hlaih ni.
Jeremiah51:3 A lii aka nuen loh nuen khaw nuen mai saeh lamtah a caempho te khuen saeh. Te vaengah a tongpang rhoek te hnaih kolla a caempuei khaw boeih thup uh saeh.
Jeremiah51:4 Khalden khohmuen kah rhok neh a kawtpoeng kah a thun rhoek khaw cungku uh ni.
Jeremiah51:5 Amih kah Pathen caempuei BOEIPA loh Israel neh Judah te a hnong van pawt bangla Israel kah aka cim taeng lamkah moeithennah tah amih khohmuen ah cung coeng.
Jeremiah51:6 Babylon khui lamloh rhaelrham saeh lamtah hlang loh a hinglu te hlawt saeh. Amih kah thaesainah dongah ngam boeh. BOEIPA kah tawnlohnah tue ah tah amah neh a tiing a taengah a thuung.
Jeremiah51:7 BOEIPA kut kah Babylon sui boengloeng loh diklai pum a rhuihmil sak. A misurtui te namtom loh a ok tih namtom khaw yan uh.
Jeremiah51:8 Babylon te buengrhuet cungku vetih bawt ni. Anih ham rhung uh lamtah thingpi loh pa uh lah
Jeremiah51:9 Babylon te n'toi khaw n'toi dae a hoeih moenih. Anih te hnoo uh lamtah hlang loh amah khohmuen la cet uh saeh. A laitloeknah loh vaan duela a pha tih khomong duela a toh.
Jeremiah51:10 BOEIPA loh mamih kah duengnah hang khuen te khuen uh sih lamtah mamih Pathen BOEIPA kah khoboe te Zion ah doek uh sih.
Jeremiah51:11 Thaltang te meet lamtah photling te cung sak uh. BOEIPA loh Madai manghai kah mueihla te a haeng coeng. A thuepnah lamloh BOEIPA kah tawnlohnah neh a bawkim kah tawnlohnah dongah Babylon te phae kuekluek ham om.
Jeremiah51:12 Babylon vongtung te rholik ling thil uh. Thongim te bingbo lamtah rhaltawt hlah uh. Rhongngol te soepsoei uh. Babylon khosa rhoek a voek tih BOEIPA loh a mangtaeng te khaw a saii bal ni.
Jeremiah51:13 A tui aka buem taengah kho aka sa
Jeremiah51:14 Caempuei BOEIPA loh a hinglu neh a toemngam coeng. Hlang te lungang bangla nang kan cung sak kuekluek vetih nang te tamlung neh n'doo uh ni.
Jeremiah51:15 A thadueng lamloh diklai a saii tih a cueihnah loh lunglai a picai. A lungcuei neh vaan a cueh.
Jeremiah51:16 Vaan kah tui len khaw ol a paek tih diklai khobawt lamkah khomong a luei sak. Khotlan ham rhaek a saii tih a thakvoh lamloh khohli hang khuen.
Jeremiah51:17 A mingnah lamloh hlang boeih a dom tih mueithuk aka picai boeih khaw yak. A tuisi hong neh amih khuiah mueihla a om moenih.
Jeremiah51:18 Amamih kah a honghi neh a hohap bibi te a cawhnah tue ah paltham bitni.
Jeremiah51:19 Jakob kah khoyo tah te bang moenih. A ming khaw caempuei YAHWEH tih a cungkuem amah kah rho koca la a hlinsai.
Jeremiah51:20 Nang tah ka caemboh neh caemtloek tubael ni. Nang te namtom kan daeh nah vetih nang te ram kam phae nah ni.
Jeremiah51:21 Nang te marhang neh a sokah aka ngol te kan daeh nah vetih nang te leng neh a sokah aka ngol te kan daeh nah ni.
Jeremiah51:22 Nang te huta tongpa kan daeh nah vetih nang te patong camoe kan daeh nah bal ni. Nang te tongpang
Jeremiah51:23 Nang te boiva aka dawn neh a tuping khaw kan daeh nah vetih nang te lopho neh a tarhoi kan daeh nah ni. Nang te rhalboei neh ukkung te kan daeh nah ni.
Jeremiah51:24 Zion kah namah mikhmuh ah a boethae cungkuem a saii uh te Babylon taeng neh Khalden khosa boeih taengah ka thuung ni. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah51:25 Kutcaihnah tlang nang taengah ka pai coeng ne. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni. Diklai boeih aka phae khaw nang taengla ka kut ka thueng ni. Te vaengah thaelpang lamloh nang kam paluet vetih ungkhang tlang la nang kang khueh.
Jeremiah51:26 Nang lamkah te bangkil lung neh tungkho lung khaw lo uh mahpawh. BOEIPA kah olphong bangla kumhal due khopong la na om ni.
Jeremiah51:27 Diklai ah rholik thoh uh lamtah namtom taengah tuki ueng uh. Namtom taengah ciim uh lamtah a ram soah khaw yaak sak uh. Minni Ararat neh Ashkenaz te rhalboei khueh thil lamtah marhang te lungang hathawp bangla yuel sak uh.
Jeremiah51:28 Namtom Madai manghai rhoek neh a rhalboei rhoek
Jeremiah51:29 Khosak pawt hil Babylon khohmuen te imsuep la khueh ham Babylon sokah BOEIPA kopoek te a thoh dongah khohmuen hinghuen tih kilkul ni.
Jeremiah51:30 Babylon hlangrhalh loh vathoh ham khaw paa uh tih rhalmahim ah ngol uh. Amih kah thayung thamal te tla coeng tih huta bangla om uh. A tolhmuen a hlup uh tih a thohkalh ngen coeng.
Jeremiah51:31 A khopuei a bawt duela a loh pah te Babylon manghai taengah puen ham
Jeremiah51:32 Lamkai te a tlaeng uh tih tuibap te hmai neh a hoeh uh. Te dongah caemtloek hlang rhoek khaw let uh.
Jeremiah51:33 Israel Pathen caempuei BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. A til tue ah tah Babylon nu te cangtilhmuen bangla om pawn vetih a taengah cangah tue pai pawn ni.
Jeremiah51:34 Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar loh kaimih n'yoop tih kamah khaw n'yoop coeng
Jeremiah51:35 Zion khosa rhoek loh
Jeremiah51:36 Te dongah BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Na tuituknah te kai loh kang rhoe tih nang kah tawnlohnah khaw ka phu ka loh ni. Te vaengah a tuipuei te ka kak sak vetih a thunsih te ka haang sak ni.
Jeremiah51:37 Babylon te pongui kah khuirhung lungkuk la om vetih imsuep neh a thuithetnah la khosa om mahpawh.
Jeremiah51:38 Sathuengca bangla huek kawk uh tih sathueng casen bangla cai uh.
Jeremiah51:39 A bae vaengah a buhkoknah ka khueh pah saeh lamtah amih ka rhuihmil sak eh. Te daengah ni sundaep uh tih aka ip loh kumhal due a ih vaengah a haenghang uh pawt eh. He tah BOEIPA kah olphong ni.
Jeremiah51:40 Amih te tuca bangla ngawn ham tutal neh kikong bangla ka suntlak sak ni.
Jeremiah51:41 Balae tih Sheshak te a loh veith diklai pum kah koehnah te a loh eh? Balae tih Babylon he namtom taengah imsuep la a om eh?
Jeremiah51:42 Babylon soah tuitunli loh a khuk tih a tuiphu tuilipo loh a et.
Jeremiah51:43 A khopuei te rhamrhae khohmuen neh khohmuen kolken kah imsuep la poeh. A khuihah hlang boeih khosa pawt tih hlang capa tah te longah ah pongpa pawh.
Jeremiah51:44 Babylon kah Bel te ka cawh coeng tih a dolhhnap te a ka lamloh ka yawt pah. Te dongah namtom khaw a taengah hlampan voel pawt tih Babylon vongtung khaw cungku van.
Jeremiah51:45 Ka pilnam te a khui lamloh coe laeh saeh lamtah hlang loh a hinglu te BOEIPA kah thintoek thinsa lamloh loeih sak laeh.
Jeremiah51:46 Nangmih thinko te phoena vetih khohmuen kah olthang na yaak vaengah na rhih uh ve. Kum khat dongkah olthang phoeiah kum khat dongah olthang he ha pawk. Diklai ah kuthlahnah he aka taemrhai loh aka taemrhai taengah a khueh.
Jeremiah51:47 Te dongah khohnin ha pawk coeng he. Babylon mueidaep te ka cawh coeng dongah a khohmuen boeih yak pawn ni. A rhok boeih te a khui ah yalh ni.
Jeremiah51:48 Te vaengah vaan neh diklai loh Babylon a tamhoe thil vetih anih aka rhoelrhak te tlangpuei lamloh amih taengah boeih ha pawk ni.
Jeremiah51:49 Israel rhok aka yalh sak khaw Babylon tangkhuet
Jeremiah51:50 Cunghang lamkah hlangyong rhoek loh pai kolla cet uh. Khohla lamloh BOEIPA te poek uh lamtah Jerusalem te na thinko ah dueh.
Jeremiah51:51 BOEIPA im kah rhokso ah kholong rhoek kun uh tih mamih maelhmai he mingthae han hluk te kokhahnah la n'yaak uh dongah n'yak uh.
Jeremiah51:52 Te dongah BOEIPA kah olphong khohnin ha pawk coeng he. A mueidaep te ka cawh thil vetih a khohmuen pum ah a rhok neh kii ni.
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon te vaan la luei mai tih a sarhi hmuensang te bit cakhaw anih aka rhoelrhak te kamah taeng lamloh thoeng uh ni.
Jeremiah51:54 Babylon lamkah a pang ol neh Khalden khohmuen lamkah pocinah tanglue aih te.
Jeremiah51:55 BOEIPA loh Babylon te a rhoelrhak coeng tih
Jeremiah51:56 Babylon aka rhoelrhak te anih taengla pawk ni. Te vaengah a hlangrhalh rhoek a tuuk vetih
Jeremiah51:57 A mangpa rhoek neh a hlangcueih
Jeremiah51:58 Caempuei BOEIPA loh he ni a thui. Babylon vongtung a thah te a phae rhoe a phae ni. A vongka a sang hmai dongah a hlup uh ni. Pilnam kah a kohnue carhil khaw a poeyoek la om tih namtu khaw hmai carhil dongah tawnba uh bal.
Jeremiah51:59 Judah manghai Zedekiah a manghai kah a kum li dongah amah neh Babylon la a caeh vaengah tonghma Jeremiah loh Maaseiah koca Neriah capa Seraiah te ol a uen. Te vaengah Seraiah kah a mangpa tah duemnah la om.
Jeremiah51:60 Te dongah Babylon ah aka pawk ham boethae cungkuem neh Babylon ham a daek ol cungkuem te khaw cabu pakhat dongah Jeremiah loh a daek.
Jeremiah51:61 Te vaengah Jeremiah loh Seraiah taengah
Jeremiah51:62 Te vaengah
Jeremiah51:63 Cabu na tae te na khah vaengah lungto te khit thil lamtah Perath laklung la voei ne.
Jeremiah51:64 Te vaengah
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah a manghai vaengah kum kul kum khat lo ca tih Jerusalem ah kum hlai khat tah manghai van. A manu ming tah Hamutal tih
Jeremiah52:2 Jehoiakim loh boethae cungkuem a saii bangla Zedekiah loh BOEIPA mikhmuh ah a saii.
Jeremiah52:3 Te dongah a mikhmuh lamloh amih a voeih due Jerusalem neh Judah taengah BOEIPA kah thintoek om coeng. Zedekiah loh Babylon manghai te a tloelh.
Jeremiah52:4 Te dongah anih a manghai te kum ko hla rha a pha tih hlasae a hnin rha vaengah tah Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar amah neh a caem boeih te Jerusalem la ha pawk. A taengah rhaeh uh tih a kaepvai ah buep a saii uh.
Jeremiah52:5 Manghai Zedekiah kah a kum hlai khat duela khopuei te vongup khuila pawk.
Jeremiah52:6 A hla li kah hlasae hnin ko dongah tah khopuei khuiah khokha tlung tih khohmuen kah pilnam ham buh om pawh.
Jeremiah52:7 Te dongah khopuei te a va uh tih caemtloek hlang rhoek khaw boeih yong uh. Khoyin ah tah khopuei lamloh manghai dum kaep kah vongtung laklo kah vongka longpuei longah coe uh. Tedae khopuei kaep kah Khalden taeng lamloh kolken longpuei la cet uh.
Jeremiah52:8 Te dongah Khalden caem loh manghai hnukah a hloem uh tih Zedekiah te Jerikho kolken ah a kae uh. Te dongah a caem khaw anih taeng lamloh boeih taekyaak uh.
Jeremiah52:9 Tedae manghai te a tuuk uh tih Khamath khohmuen Riblah kah Babylon manghai taengla khuen uh tih anih sokah laitloeknah a thui pah.
Jeremiah52:10 Babylon manghai loh Zedekiah ca rhoek te a mikhmuh ah a ngawn pah tih Judah mangpa boeih te khaw Riblah ah a ngawn.
Jeremiah52:11 Te phoeiah Zedekiah mik te a dael sak tih rhohum neh a khih. Anih te Babylon kah Babylon manghai taengla a khuen tih a dueknah khohnin duela a im kah ngoldoelhnah im ah a khueh.
Jeremiah52:12 Babylon manghai Nebukhanezar manghai kah a kum hlai ko kum
Jeremiah52:13 BOEIPA im te a hoeh tih manghai im neh Jerusalem kah im boeih
Jeremiah52:14 Jerusalem kaepvai kah vongtung boeih te imtawt boeiping hmuikah Khalden caem pum loh a palet uh.
Jeremiah52:15 Te vaengah pilnam khodaeng neh khopuei ah aka sueng pilnam hlangrhuel khaw
Jeremiah52:16 Tedae khohmuen kah khodaeng rhoek tah imtawt boeiping Nebuzaradan loh dumpho neh lotawn la a paih.
Jeremiah52:17 Khalden loh BOEIPA im kah rhohum tung neh tungkho khaw
Jeremiah52:18 Am neh hmaisoh khaw
Jeremiah52:19 Baeldung neh baelphaih khaw
Jeremiah52:20 Tung panit tui-im pakhat hmuikah tungkho
Jeremiah52:21 Tung a sang mah tung pakhat dongah a sang dong hlai rhet om coeng tih rhuihet neh dong hlai nit a som coeng. A thah kutdawn pali thah tih khui.
Jeremiah52:22 A sokah tungthi khaw rhohum tih tungthi pakhat kah a sang te dong nga om. Tungthi sokah sahamlong neh tale khaw tih a kaepvai rhohum boeih ni. A pabae tung te phek la tale neh om.
Jeremiah52:23 Te dongah tale thaih te sawmko phoeiah parhuk om tih a kaepvai kah Sahamlong dongah khaw a pum la tale thaih yakhat om.
Jeremiah52:24 Imtawt boeiping loh khosoih boeilu Seraiah khaw
Jeremiah52:25 Caemtloek hlang soah hlangtawt la aka om imkhoem pakhat neh manghai maelhmai ka so hlang parhih a khuen. Te te khopuei khuiah a hmuh uh tih khohmuen pilnam aka hueh caempuei mangpa kah cadaek neh khopuei khui kah a hmuh khohmuen pilnam hlang sawmrhuk te khopuei lamloh a khuen.
Jeremiah52:26 Amih te imtawt boeiping Nebuzaradan loh a khuen tih Riblah kah Babylon manghai taengla a thak.
Jeremiah52:27 Amih te Babylon manghai a ngawn tih Khamath khohmuen kah Riblah ah amih te a duek sak. Judah tah amah khohmuen dong lamloh a poelyoe tangloeng.
Jeremiah52:28 A kum rhih dongah tah Nebukhanezar loh pilnam he Judah hlang thawng thum phoeiah pakul pathum a poelyoe coeng.
Jeremiah52:29 Nebukhanezar kah a kum hlai rhet dongah Jerusalem lamkah hinglu ya rhet sawmthum patnit a khuen.
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukhanezar kah kum kul kum thum dongah imtawt boeiping Nebuzaradan loh Judah hinglu ya rhih sawmli panga neh hinglu boeih thawng li ya rhuk te a poelyoe.
Jeremiah52:31 Judah manghai Jehoiakhin hlangsol kah kum sawmthum kum rhih hla hlai nit hlasae hnin kul hnin nga lo coeng. Babylon manghai Evilmerodakh a ram a pai kum ah tah Judah manghai Jehoiakhin lu te thongim kah im lamloh a hlah.
Jeremiah52:32 A taengah a then a thui pah tih manghai rhoek ngolkhoel soah khaw
Jeremiah52:33 Te dongah a thongim himbai te a thovael tih manghai hmai kah buh te a hing tue khuiah phat a caak.
Jeremiah52:34 A buhkak tah buhkak mai akhaw anih te rhawp a paek. A hing tue khui neh a dueknah khohnin duela a hnin
Lamentations1:1 Balae tih pilnam aka ping khopuei te amah bueng kho a sak. Namtom taengah a cungkuem te nuhmai bangla om tih
Lamentations1:2 Khoyin ah rhap
Lamentations1:3 Judah te phacipphabaem neh thohtatnah cungkuem lamloh a poelyoe uh. Anih te namtom taengah om tih ngolbuel pataeng a dang moenih. Anih aka hloem boeih loh anih te longcaek ah a kae uh.
Lamentations1:4 Rhahdoe cangpoem ah khaw Zion longpuei kah khoning ah ha pawk uh pawh. A vongka khaw boeih pong coeng. A khosoih khaw huei uh coeng. A oila rhoek khaw pae uh tih amah te phaep uh.
Lamentations1:5 A rhal te a lu la a om pah tih a thunkha khaw dingsuek uh. A boekoek a yet dongah BOEIPA loh a pae sak tih a ca rhoek te a rhal hmai ah tamna la cet uh.
Lamentations1:6 A tanu khui lamloh Zion nu tah a rhuepomnah cungkuem khaw a coe pah coeng. A mangpa rhoek te rhangrhaeh bangla om uh tih luemnah hmu uh pawh. Te dongah aka hloem kah mikhmuh ah thadueng om kolla yong uh.
Lamentations1:7 Jerusalem loh a phacipphabaem neh a airhoeng hnin ah tah hlamat kum kah khuehtawn cungkuem neh a om uh te a poek. A pilnam loh rhal kut dongah cungku tih anih te aka bom om pawh. Rhal loh anih a hmuh vaengah a rhawpnah te a nueih thil uh.
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem a tholh te tholhnah coeng ni. Te dongah anih a thangpom khaw longhnawt la boeih poeh coeng. Anih kah a yah aka hmuh ham khaw haam uh. Amah khaw huei tih a hnuk la mael.
Lamentations1:9 A hnihmoi kah a tihnai neh a hmailong khaw poek pawh. Anih aka hloep a om van pawt ah khobaerhambae la suntla van hlak uh. BOEIPA aw kai kah phacipphabaem dongah thunkha rhoek a pantai khaw hmuh lah saw.
Lamentations1:10 A ngailaemnah cungkuem soah rhal loh a kut a duen. Namah kah hlangping taengah kun pawt ham na uen lalah a rhokso ah namtom a kun te a hmuh.
Lamentations1:11 A pilnam te boeih huei uh. Buh a tlap uh tih a khuehtawn a paek uh. A hinglu hlawt ham ni a ngailaemnah khaw caak la a thung. BOEIPA so lamtah a hnom ham ka om he paelki lah.
Lamentations1:12 Longpuei kah aka khum boeih ke paelki uh lamtah so uh lah
Lamentations1:13 Hmuensang lamkah ka rhuh khuilah hmai han tueih. Ka kho ham lawk a tung tih a man sak dongah kai he a hnuk la m'mael sak. Hnin at puet ah kai he pumthim hainak neh aka pong la n'khueh.
Lamentations1:14 Ka boekoek hnamkun te a kut neh a hlin tih ka rhawn dongla a pawk vaengah rhap a cuet. Ka thadueng a tangdawt sak tih kai aka thoh thai pawt kah kut dongah Boeipa loh kai n'khueh. Ka boei cungkuem khaw ka kotak ah tah Boeipa loh a suntlae coeng. Ka tongpang rhoek neet ham kai he tingtunnah ng'hueh thil. Judah nu oila te ka Boeipa loh misur rhom ah a nook.
Lamentations1:15 Te dongah kai kamah mik khaw rhap tih ka mik lamkah tui a suntlak. Kai aka hloep tih hinglu aka mael sak khaw kai lamloh lakhla coeng. Ka ca rhoek aka om khaw thunkha loh a et tih pong uh.
Lamentations1:16 Zion loh a kut te a phuel dae anih te hloep pawh. A kaepvai kah a rhal te BOEIPA loh Jakob ham a uen coeng dongah Jerusalem khaw amih lakli ah pumom la poeh.
Lamentations1:17 BOEIPA amah tah dueng dae a ol te ka koek oeh. Pilnam aw
Lamentations1:18 Amih te ka lungnah la ka khue dae kai m'phok uh. Khopuei kah ka khosoih rhoek neh patong rhoek loh amamih caak a tlap uh pangthuem ah pal uh tih a hinglu te a mael puei uh.
Lamentations1:19 BOEIPA aw kai taengkah puencak he hmu lah. Ka ko tah noong tih ka khui ah ka lungbuei a maelh. A koek khaw ka koek oeh coeng dongah imkhui kah dueknah bangla kawtpoeng ah cunghang loh a cakol sak.
Lamentations1:20 Ka huei te a yaak uh dae kai he n'hloep moenih. Ka thunkha boeih loh ka yoethae he a yaak uh vaengah ngaingaih uh. Namah ham na saii tih na khue khohnin na pha vaengah kai bangla om uh bitni.
Lamentations1:21 Amih kah boethae cungkuem te na mikhmuh ah phoe saeh. Kai taengah na poelyoe bangla amih te poelyoe van. Ka boekoek cungkuem dongah ka hueinah khaw yet tih ka lungbuei hal coeng.
Lamentations2:1 Ka Boeipa loh a dolh phoeiah Jakob toitlim boeih te lungma a ti moenih. A thinpom neh Judah nu kah hmuencak khaw a koengloeng pah. A ram neh a mangpa te diklai la a khueh pah tih a poeih pah.
Lamentations2:2 Thintoek thinling ah Israel ki khaw boeih a ngun sak. A thunkha mikhmuh ah a hnuk la bantang kut a maelh vaengah Jakob dongah hmaisai hmai bangla a dom tih a kaepvai a hlawp pah.
Lamentations2:3 Thunkha bangla a lii a phuk tih rhal bangla amah bantang ah pai. A mik ah ngailaemnah boeih te a ngawn tih Zion nu kah dap ah hmai bangla kosi a hawk pah.
Lamentations2:4 Ka Boeipa he thunkha bangla om. Israel a dolh tih a impuei boeih khaw a dolh pah. A hmuencak a phae pah tih Judah nu kah rhahdueknah neh ngueknah a ping sak.
Lamentations2:5 A po te dum bangla a hlaih tih a tingtunnah khaw a phae pah. BOEIPA loh Zion kah khoning neh Sabbath khaw a hnilh sak. A thintoek neh kosi dongah manghai neh khosoih khaw a tlaitlaek.
Lamentations2:6 Ka Boeipa loh a hmueihtuk a hlahpham tih a rhokso khaw a hai coeng. Impuei vongtung khaw thunkha kut ah a det. Te dongah tingtunnah khohnin bangla BOEIPA im ah ol a huel uh.
Lamentations2:7 BOEIPA loh Zion nu kah vongtung phae ham a moeh rhilam a toe coeng. A dolh lamloh a kut poem pawt tih rhalmahvong khaw a nguekcoi sak dongah vongtung khaw rhenten tahah.
Lamentations2:8 A vongka te diklai la buek tih muelh. A thohkalh khaw tlawt coeng. A manghai neh a mangpa rhoek khaw namtom taengah om. Olkhueng khaw tal tih a tonghma rhoek loh BOEIPA lamkah a mangthui te hmu uh pawh.
Lamentations2:9 Zion nu patong loh diklai ah ngol uh tih ngam uh. A lu ah laipi a phul uh tih tlamhni a vah uh. Jerusalem rhoek oila loh a lu te diklai la a buluk uh.
Lamentations2:10 Mikphi lamloh ka mik thana coeng. Ka pilnam nu kah pocinah
Lamentations2:11 A manu rhoek taengah tah
Lamentations2:12 Jerusalem nu nang te metlam kang hih eh? Nang taengah metlam kan lutlat eh? Nang taengah ba nen lae ka tluk eh? Zion nu oila nang kan hloep ham akhaw na pocinah loh tuitunli bangla len tih unim nang aka hoeih sak ve.
Lamentations2:13 Na tonghma rhoek loh nang ham a poeyoek neh a rhorhap ni a hmuh uh. Na thongtlak kawng dongah thongtla la na mael ham vaengah nang kah thaesainah te a phoe uh moenih. Nang ham a poeyoek neh vuelvaeknah kah olrhuh ni a hmuh.
Lamentations2:14 Longpuei kah aka cet boeih loh nang taengah kut a paeng uh tih kut a ving uh. Jerusalem nu nang taengah a lu a huen uh tih
Lamentations2:15 Na thunkha boeih loh nang taengah a ka a ang uh tih hlip uh. No a tah uh tih
Lamentations2:16 A olthui neh aka mueluem kah a mangtaeng te BOEIPA loh a saii. Hlamat kum lamloh a uen te a koengloeng coeng. Tedae lungma ti pawt dongah na rhal kah ki te a pomsang tih thunkha loh nang soah ko a khah.
Lamentations2:17 A lungbuei tah ka Boeipa taengah pang. Zion nu vongtung aw
Lamentations2:18 Khoyin khoyin ah thoo lamtah tamhoe laeh. Hlaemhmah pukthung ah na lungbuei te ka Boeipa mikhmuh ah tui bangla bueih. Longpuei takuem kah longrhai ah khokha lamloh aka rhae na camoe rhoek kah hinglu ham khaw amah taengah na kut phuel lah.
Lamentations2:19 BOEIPA aw u taengah na poelyoe khaw so lamtah paelki. Huta loh amah thaihtae camoe hnatuem te ca tangkhuet saeh a? Ka Boeipa kah rhokso ah khosoih neh tonghma te ngawn saeh a?
Lamentations2:20 Camoe patong loh tollong diklai dongah yalh uh. Ka oila rhoek neh ka tongpang rhoek khaw cunghang dongah cungku uh. Na thintoek hnin kah na ngawn tih lungma na ti kolla na ngawn.
Lamentations2:21 Tingtunnah khohnin bangla ka rhihnah te ka kaepvai ah na hueh. BOEIPA kah thintoek khohnin ah hlangyong neh rhaengnaeng om pawh. Ka poeh tih ka pom te ka thunkha loh a khah coeng.
Lamentations3:1 Kai tah a thinpom caitueng dongkah phacipphabaem aka hmu hlang ni.
Lamentations3:2 Kai te m'hmaithawn tih hmaisuep ah n'caeh sak vaengah vangnah om pawh.
Lamentations3:3 Kai taengah a tloeng tangloeng tih khohnin yung ah a kut a hluem.
Lamentations3:4 Ka vin neh ka saa a hmawn sak tih ka rhuh a paep sak.
Lamentations3:5 Kai he rhahalung n'suem thil tih sue neh bongboepnah te m'ven thil.
Lamentations3:6 Ka khosak he khosuen kah aka duek bangla khohmuep ah ka om.
Lamentations3:7 Kai taengah khoep a biing tih ka rhohum loh n'nan he ka loeih pawh.
Lamentations3:8 Ka khue tih ka pang vaengah pataeng ka thangthuinah te a toeng.
Lamentations3:9 Lungrhaih neh ka longpuei a biing tih ka hawn a paihaeh sak.
Lamentations3:10 Kai taengah tah vom neh sathueng pataeng a huephael kah sathueng bangla amah rhongngol coeng.
Lamentations3:11 Ka longpuei ah m'phaelh sak tih kai n'soek dongah kai aka pong la n'khueh.
Lamentations3:12 A lii a phuk tih thaltang ham kutnoek la kai n'tai.
Lamentations3:13 Anih kah liva ca loh ka kuel khuila pawlh.
Lamentations3:14 Ka pilnam pum kah nueihbu neh khohnin yung ah amih kah rhotoeng la ka poeh.
Lamentations3:15 Ankhaa te kai ng'kum sak tih pantong neh kai m'hmilhmal sak.
Lamentations3:16 Ka no he lungcang neh a mawth tih hmaiphu khuiah kai m'vuei.
Lamentations3:17 Ka hinglu he ngaimongnah lamloh a hlahpham tih a then khaw ka hnilh.
Lamentations3:18 Te dongah kai kah hmailong neh BOEIPA lamkah ka ngaiuepnah khaw paltham coeng ka ti.
Lamentations3:19 Kai kah phaiphabaem neh ka airhoeng khaw
Lamentations3:20 A poek a poek vaengah ka khuikah ka hinglu tah tlayae la tlayae coeng.
Lamentations3:21 He he ka ngaiuep dongah ni ka lungbuei he ka mael puei.
Lamentations3:22 BOEIPA kah sitlohnah tah bawt pawt tih a haidamnah khaw muei pawh.
Lamentations3:23 Mincang ah na uepomnah thai khaw ping.
Lamentations3:24 Ka hinglu loh
Lamentations3:25 ***
Lamentations3:26 BOEIPA kah loeihnah dongah tah rhingoel ngolsut ham khaw a then.
Lamentations3:27 A camoe vaengah hnamkun a phueih te ni hlang ham khaw a then.
Lamentations3:28 Amah soah a poeh bangla amah bueng khosa saeh lamtah kuemsuem saeh.
Lamentations3:29 A ka te laipi khuiah vuei saeh lamtah ngaiuepnah a om khaming.
Lamentations3:30 Amah aka ngawn ham a kam duen pah saeh lamtah kokhahnah neh kum saeh.
Lamentations3:31 Ka Boeipa loh kumhal duela a hlahpham ngawn moenih.
Lamentations3:32 Pae sak bal mai cakhaw a sitlohnah dongkah sitlohnah a khawk vanbangla a haidam bitni.
Lamentations3:33 Hlang ca te a lungbuei a phaep pah tih a pae sak bal moenih.
Lamentations3:34 Khohmuen kah thongtla boeih te a kho hmuiah a phop ham
Lamentations3:35 Khohni kah mikhmuh ah hlang kah tiktamnah hnawt ham
Lamentations3:36 A tuituknah neh hlang a khun sak ham khaw ka Boeipa loh a hmuh ngaih moenih.
Lamentations3:37 Ka Boeipa loh a uen pawt te om ni tila unim aka thui thai.
Lamentations3:38 A thae neh a then khaw Khohni ka lamloh thoeng pawt nim.
Lamentations3:39 A tholhnah sokah a tholhnah yuvat ah balae tih tongpa hlang hing loh a kohuet mai eh.
Lamentations3:40 Mamih kah longpuei he phuelhthaih tih n'khe phoeiah BOEIPA taengla mael uh sih.
Lamentations3:41 Mamih kah thinko neh kut he vaan kah Pathen taengah phuel uh sih.
Lamentations3:42 Kaimih kah boekoek neh nang kan koek uh te khodawk nan ngai uh moenih.
Lamentations3:43 Thintoek neh na cun uh vaengah kaimih nan hloem tih lungma ti kolla nan ngawn.
Lamentations3:44 Thangthuinah neh paan ham khaw namah te cingmai neh na cun uh.
Lamentations3:45 Kaimih he pilnam lakli ah yun-aek neh kawnhnawt la nan khueh.
Lamentations3:46 Ka thunkha boeih loh kaimih taengah a ka a ang uh.
Lamentations3:47 Birhihnah neh rhom khaw kaimih taengah omdamnah neh pocinah la thoeng.
Lamentations3:48 Ka pilnam nu kah a pocinah dongah ka mik he sokca tui la long.
Lamentations3:49 Ka mik loh a hawk vetih a bawtnah om pawt hil kak mahpawh.
Lamentations3:50 A dan neh BOEIPA loh vaan lamkah a hmuh duela.
Lamentations3:51 Ka khopuei tanu boeih kongah ka mik loh ka hinglu he a poelyoe.
Lamentations3:52 Lunglilungla maila kai he ka thunkha rhoek loh vaa bangla m'mae khaw m'mae uh mai.
Lamentations3:53 Ka hingnah te tangrhom ah a det uh tih
Lamentations3:54 Ka lu he tui loh a et vaengah tah n'tuiphih muema ka ti.
Lamentations3:55 BOEIPA na ming te tangrhom laedil lamloh kang khue.
Lamentations3:56 Ka hilhoemnah ham ka pang te hna na buem pawt dongah ka ol na yaak coeng.
Lamentations3:57 Namah kang khue khohnin ah na mop tih
Lamentations3:58 Ka hinglu kah tuituknah khaw ka Boeipa loh na rhoe tih ka hingnah na tlan.
Lamentations3:59 BOEIPA aw ka lolhmaihnah na hmuh cakhaw ka laitloeknah dongah n'tang sak lah.
Lamentations3:60 Kai soah amih kah tawnlohnah boeih neh amih kah kopoek boeih te na hmuh.
Lamentations3:61 BOEIPA aw kai soah amih kah kokhahnah neh amih kah kopoek boeih te na yaak coeng.
Lamentations3:62 Khohnin yung ah a phungding ol neh kamah taengah yunga kai m'pai thil uh.
Lamentations3:63 A hoepnah neh a painah ah
Lamentations3:64 BOEIPA aw
Lamentations3:65 Amih te lungbuei kotalh la khueh lamtah na tapvoepnah te amih soah thoeng sak.
Lamentations3:66 BOEIPA aw thintoek te na hloem dongah ni amih te vaan hmui lamloh na mitmoeng sak.
Lamentations4:1 Sui te bahoeng muhut
Lamentations4:2 Zion ca rhoek loh suicilh neh lung vang a thuek balae tih aka picai kut dongkah a bibi tuitang paikaek bangla a poek uh.
Lamentations4:3 Pongui long pataeng rhangsuk a pumcum tih a ca a khut. Ka pilnam tanu tah kalaukva khuiah khosoek kah kalaukva bangla muen.
Lamentations4:4 Tuihalh ah cahni kah a lai te a dang la kap tih camoe rhoek loh buh a hoe dae amih aka pae om pawh.
Lamentations4:5 Buhmong laka ca rhoek tollong ah aka pong hlampai dongah aka tangnah rhoek loh natva ni a kop uh.
Lamentations4:6 Sodom kah tholhnah lakah ka pilnam nu kah thaesainah he rhoeng. Mikhaptok ah mael tih anih te kut long khaw a sambai moenih.
Lamentations4:7 A hlangcoelh rhoek te vuelsong lakah cil tih suktui lakah bok. A rhuhrhong te lungvang lakah
Lamentations4:8 A suisak te amhmol lakah hmuep tih tollong ah hmat uh voel pawh. A vin a rhuh dongah ben uh tih thing koh bangla om.
Lamentations4:9 Khokha dongah rhok lakah cunghang dongkah rhok la om te then. Amih te khohmuen thaih loh a thun tih cae uh.
Lamentations4:10 Lungma nu rhoek kut loh a ca a thong uh tih ka pilnam canu kah pocinah dongah amih kah a caak la poeh uh.
Lamentations4:11 BOEIPA loh a kosi a sah tih a thintoek thinsa te a kingling. Zion ah hmai a hlup tih a khoengim a hlawp.
Lamentations4:12 Jerusalem vongka longah rhal neh thunkha a kun te diklai manghai neh lunglai dongkah khosa boeih boeih loh tangnah uh pawh. A tonghma rhoek kah tholhnah neh a khosoih rhoek kah thaesainah loh a khui ah hlangdueng kah thii a hawk sak.
Lamentations4:13 Tollong ah mikdael la vikvuek uh tih a pueinak te ben thai pawt ham thii neh nok uh.
Lamentations4:14 Amih rhalawt rhoek te
Lamentations4:15 BOEIPA mikhmuh ah amih a taekyak te amih paelki ham a khoep moenih. Khosoih rhoek kah maelhmai khaw dan uh pawt tih patong neh hamca rhoek khaw rhen uh pawh.
Lamentations4:16 Amih a khoengvoep bangla mamih khaw n'khoengvoep uh. Kaimih kah bomnah ham khaw kaimih mik ni a kha. Aka daem sak pawh namtom te mamih kah rhaltawt lamloh n'rhaltawt thil khaw a honghi ni.
Lamentations4:17 Mamih kah toltung ah pongpa ham mamih kah kholaeh a thuih uh. Mamih kah a bawtnah loh ha tawn uh tih mamih kah khohnin a cup coeng dongah mamih kah a bawknah ha pawk coeng.
Lamentations4:18 Mamih aka hloem rhoek te vaan kahatha lakah kapyang la om uh. Mamih he tlang ah n'hlak tih khosoek ah khaw mamih n'rhongngol thil uh.
Lamentations4:19 BOEIPA loh a koelh mamih hnarhong lamkah hil pataeng amih kah rhomhmop koeh ah man. Te te namtom taengah khaw
Lamentations4:20 Uz Kho kah khosa
Lamentations4:21 Zion nu nang kah thaesainah tah bawt tih nang poelyoe ham koei voel mahpawh. Edom nu nang kah thaesainah khaw a cawh vetih na tholhnah te a phoe ni.
Lamentations5:1 BOEIPA aw poek lamtah kaimih taengkah aka thoeng te paelki laeh. Paelki lamtah kaimih sokah kokhahnah he hmu lah.
Lamentations5:2 Kaimih kah rho te hlanglak taengla
Lamentations5:3 Cadah la ka om uh tih nuhmai bangla ka manu napa a om moenih.
Lamentations5:4 Kamamih tui ha tangka neh ka ok uh tih kamamih kah thing ha a phu daengah ha pawk.
Lamentations5:5 Ka rhawn ah n'hloem uh vaengah ka kohnue uh pawt bangla kaimih he n'duem sak pawh.
Lamentations5:6 Buh ka cung uh ham khaw Egypt neh Assyria taengah kut ka duen uh.
Lamentations5:7 A pa rhoek khaw a tholh uh tih kaimih taengah a om voel moenih. Tedae kaimih loh amih kah thaesainah te ka phueih uh.
Lamentations5:8 Sal rhoek kaimih soah n'taemrhai uh tih amih kut lamkah aka bawt om pawh.
Lamentations5:9 Khosoek cunghang hmai ah ka hinglu nen ni ka buh ka dang uh. Khokha rhamling hmai ah ka vin khaw hmaiulh bangla tloo coeng.
Lamentations5:10 Zion kah huta rhoek neh Judah khopuei kah oila rhoek khaw a tholh puei uh.
Lamentations5:11 Amih kut neh mangpa rhoek a kuiok sak tih patong rhoek kah maelhmai khaw hiin uh pawh.
Lamentations5:12 Tongpang rhoek loh phaklung a phueih uh tih camoe rhoek te thingpum dongah paloe uh.
Lamentations5:13 Vongka lamkah patong rhoek neh
Lamentations5:14 Kaimih lungbuei kah omthennah he kangkuen coeng tih kaimih kah lamnah khaw nguekcoinah la poeh.
Lamentations5:15 Mamih lu kah rhuisam khaw yulh coeng. Anunae n'tholh uh khaw mamih ham coeng ni.
Lamentations5:16 Te dongah ko mamih lungbuei he pumthim hainak la coeng. He dongah mamih kah maelhmai khaw a hmuep.
Lamentations5:17 Zion tlang aka pong te a soah maetang ni a pongpa coeng.
Lamentations5:18 BOEIPA namah tah kumhal duela na om tih
Lamentations5:19 BOEIPA aw kaimih he namah taengah m'mael sak laeh. Ka mael uh van daengah ni hlamat kah bangla kaimih kah khohnin thai neh ka mael uh eh.
Lamentations5:20 Kaimih taengah a nah la na thintoek tih kaimih he nan hnawt nan hnawt mai.
Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawmthum dongkah a hla li sa hnin nga lo coeng. Kebar tuiva kah vangsawn lakli ah ka om vaengah vaan ong uh tih Pathen kah mangthui te ka hmuh.
Ezekiel1:2 Te vaengah manghai Jehoiachin hlangsol kah kum nga hla nga lo coeng.
Ezekiel1:3 Kebar tuiva Khalden kho kah khosoih Buzi capa Ezekiel taengah BOEIPA ol om rhoe om coeng. Te vaengah BOEPA kut anih soah pahoi tueng.
Ezekiel1:4 Ka sawt vaengah tlangpuei lamkah hlipuei khohli tarha ha pawk. Cingmai kah a thah neh hmai khaw phaa tih a kaepvai neh a laklung kah a aa rhoe mah hmai lung kah hnaibok kah pang bangla om.
Ezekiel1:5 A laklung lamkah te khaw mulhing pali phek coeng tih a mueimae tah hlang phek la om.
Ezekiel1:6 Tedae khat rhip loh maelhmai pali neh amih khat rhip dongah phae pali om.
Ezekiel1:7 Amih kho tah a kho khaw thuem tih amih kho khopha tah saelca kho khopha bangla om. Te vaengah rhohum ngo kah a pang bangla khooi.
Ezekiel1:8 A phae hmui kah a kut khaw hlang kut bangla om. Amih pali te a vae pali ah khaw a maelhmai neh a phae boeih om.
Ezekiel1:9 A manu neh a la te a phae hum uh tih hoi uh thai pawh. Tekah hlang te a caeh vaengah tih a maelhmai neh a dannah la dawk pongpa uh.
Ezekiel1:10 Amih maelhmai te hlang maelhmai phek la om. Amih pali te bantang benah sathueng maelhmai la om tih a pli la banvoei benah vaito maelhmai neh a pali la atha maelhmai kap.
Ezekiel1:11 A maelhmai khaw amah coeng tih a phae te a so la phuel uh. Khat neh khat te sisuk uh rhoi tih a pum te a khuk rhoi.
Ezekiel1:12 Te dongah a maelhmai kah a dannah la rhip cet uh. Mela a om akhaw mueihla te tangrhoeng cet rhoe cet coeng. Te dongah amamih kah a caeh bangla mael uh pawh.
Ezekiel1:13 A mueimae tah mulhing phek neh hmai dongkah hmai-alh aka alh bangla
Ezekiel1:14 Mulhing te a thoeihyet vaengah rhaek kah a mueimae bangla ha mael.
Ezekiel1:15 Te vaengah mulhing rhoek te khaw a maelhmai pali neh mulhing diklai taengkah diklai dongah lengkho pakhat rhip te khaw kak ka hmuh.
Ezekiel1:16 Amih kah moeiboe tah timsuih a pang phek tih amih pali te pakhat phek la om uh. Amih kah mueimae neh a moeiboe tah lengkho laklung ah lengkho aka om phek la om.
Ezekiel1:17 A vae pali longah a pongpa uh ham khaw cet uh dae a caeh uh bangla mael uh thai pawh.
Ezekiel1:18 Amih te a uen thah tih amih te a rhiim om. A uen te amih pali kah a pang kaepvai ah bae.
Ezekiel1:19 Mulhing rhoek a thoeih uh vaengah a taengkah lengkho te thoeih. Mulhing te diklai dong lamloh a phoh uh vaengah lengkho rhoek khaw phoh uh van.
Ezekiel1:20 Melam khaw mueihla te a caeh rhoe a caeh ham a om atah mueihla taengla pahoi cet uh van. Mulhing mueihla he lengkho ah a om dongah lengkho khaw amih voeivang ah phoh uh van.
Ezekiel1:21 A caeh ham vaengah thoeih uh tih a pai uh ham vaengah pai uh. Diklai dong lamloh a phoh uh vaengah lengkho loh amih voeivang ah a phoh van. Lengkho khuiah mulhing mueihla a om.
Ezekiel1:22 Mulhing lu sokah te bangyai phek la om. Rhaelnu a pang bangla a rhih om tih amih lu so duela yaal hang.
Ezekiel1:23 bangyai hmui ah a manu loh a la taengla a phae a phuel te thuem. Amih aka thing rhoi khaw rhip om tih a pum aka dah rhoi te khaw rhip om.
Ezekiel1:24 A phae ol te tui len ol bangla
Ezekiel1:25 Amih te pai tih a phae hlah vaengah amih lu sokah bangyai so lamloh ol ha thoeng.
Ezekiel1:26 Amih lu sokah bangyai so te minhum lung kah a mueimae bangla ngolkhoel phek om. Ngolkhoel mueiloh soah hlang kah mueimae bangla mueiloh om hang bal.
Ezekiel1:27 A cinghen lamloh a so duela a kaepvai te rhohumbok kah a pang neh imkhui hmai mueimae bangla ka hmuh. A cinghen lamloh a dang thuk kah a mueimae khaw hmai mueimae bangla a kaepvai ah a aa ka hmuh.
Ezekiel1:28 Khonal khohnin ah cingmai dongkah pampacung mueimae bangla om. A kaepvai kah a aa mueimae khaw BOEIPA kah thangpomnah mueimae phek ni. Ka hmuh vaengah ka maelhmai dongah ka cungku tih ol a thui ka yaak.
Ezekiel2:1 Kamah taengah kah
Ezekiel2:2 Kai taeng a thui bangla ka khuiah Mueihla ha kun. Te vaengah ka kho dongah ka pai tih kamah taengah a thui te ka yaak.
Ezekiel2:3 Te vaengah kai te
Ezekiel2:4 Ca rhoek khaw a maelhmai mangkhak neh a lungbuei khaw tlungluen uh. Kai loh nang te amih taengah kan tueih. Te dongah amih te
Ezekiel2:5 Amih loh a hnatun akhaw a toeng akhaw amih boekoek imkhui ham tonghma tah amamih lakli ah a om te ming saeh.
Ezekiel2:6 Tedae nang hlang capa loh amih te rhih boel lamtah amih ol te rhih boeh. Nang te hlingpuem tangti neh saelkhui ta-ai lakli ah na hing cakhaw amih ol te rhih boeh. Amih mikhmuh ah rhihyawp boeh amih te boekoek imkhui ni.
Ezekiel2:7 Tedae amih boekoek dongah a hnatun uh akhaw a toeng uh akhaw ka ol he amih taengah thui kuekluek.
Ezekiel2:8 Nang hlang capa namah taengah kan thui he hnatun. Boekoek imkhui bangla boekoek la om boeh. Na ka ang lamtah namah taengah kam paek te ca
Ezekiel2:9 Ka sawt vaengah kai taengla cabu cayol neh a kut tarha han thueng.
Ezekiel2:10 Ka mikhmuh ah te te a phaih vaengah a hnuk a hmai ah ca a daek. A khuiah rhahlung neh caitawknah neh yoethaenah a daek nah.

Ezekiel3:2 Te dongah ka ka te ka ang tih cayol te ka caak.

Ezekiel3:4 Te phoeiah kai taengah
Ezekiel3:5 A hmuilai aka khuet neh ol aka kael pilnam taengah pawt tih Israel imkhui taengah ni nang kan tueih.
Ezekiel3:6 A hmuilai aka khuet tih a ol a kael neh a olka na yakming pawh pilnam cungkuem taengah moenih. Amih taengah pawt koinih nang kan tueih khaw amih loh nang ol te a hnatun uh suidae.
Ezekiel3:7 Tedae Israel imkhui loh nang ol te hnatun ham huem uh pawh. Kai ol pataeng hnatun ham a ngaih uh moenih. Israel imkhui boeih tah a tal tlungluen tih a lungbuei khaw mangkhak uh.
Ezekiel3:8 Na maelhmai te amih maelhmai bangla ka tlungluen vetih na tal khaw amih tal bangla te ka tlungluen sak bitni ne.
Ezekiel3:9 Na tal te hmailung lakah tlungluen lungning la kang khueh bitni. Amih te rhih boel lamtah amih boekoek imkhui kah a mikhmuh ah rhihyawp boeh
Ezekiel3:10 Te phoeiah kamah te
Ezekiel3:11 Cet lamtah na pilnam paca vangsawn te paan laeh. Amih te thui pah lamtah a hnatun akhaw a toeng akhaw Boeipa Yahovah loh a thui he amih taengah thui pah
Ezekiel3:12 Te vaengah mueihla loh kai te n'dangrhoek tih ka hnukkah amah hmuen ah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah a tanglue la a uem te hinghuennah ol la yaak.
Ezekiel3:13 Mulhing manu neh a la te a phae hum ol neh a voeivang kah lengkho ol khaw hinghuennah tanglue ol la ka yaak.
Ezekiel3:14 Te phoeiah mueihla kai n'dangrhoek tih ng'khuen. Tedae BOEIPA kut he kai soah ha tlungluen tih ka mueihla tah kosi neh khahing la ka cet.
Ezekiel3:15 Te dongah Kebar tuiva ah kho aka sa Telabib vangsawn taengla ka pawk. Amih khosa rhoek taengah pahoi ka om tangloeng dae hnin rhih ka om mah amih lakli ah ka pong coeng.
Ezekiel3:16 Hnin rhih a bawtnah a pha vaengah BOEIPA ol kai taengla ha pawk.

Ezekiel3:18 Halang te
Ezekiel3:19 Tedae nang halang te na thuituen lalah a halangnah neh a halang longpuei lamloh a mael pawt atah
Ezekiel3:20 Hlang dueng khaw a duengnah lamloh mael tih dumlai a saii van atah a mikhmuh ah hmuitoel ka khueh pah vetih anih te duek ni. A tholhnah dongah anih na thuituen pawt koinih a duek vaengah duengnah a saii poek uh mahpawh. Tedae a thii te nang kut dongah kan toem ni.
Ezekiel3:21 Aka dueng te a tholh pawt ham a dueng la amah na thuituen van atah anih khaw tholh mahpawh. A thuituen lamloh hing rhoe hing vetih nang khaw na hinglu te na huul van ni
Ezekiel3:22 Te phoeiah kai soah BOEIPA kah kut pahoi om tih kai taengah
Ezekiel3:23 Te dongah ka thoo tih kolbawn la ka cet. Te vaengah BOEIPA kah thangpomnah tah thangpomnah bangla pahoi a pai tarha te Kebar tuiva ah ka hmuh tih ka hmai longah ka bakop.
Ezekiel3:24 Te vaengah ka khuila mueihla ha kun tih ka kho lamloh kai n'thoh. Te daengah kai te m'voek tih kamah taengah
Ezekiel3:25 Nang hlang capa te ne

Ezekiel4:1 Nang hlang capa ah namah loh laiboeng lo lamtah namah mikhmuh ah tloeng laeh. A soah Jerusalem khopuei te tarhit laeh.
Ezekiel4:2 A taengah vong khueh pah lamtah a taengah buep khueh pah. A taengah tanglung khueng lamtah a taengah rhaehhmuen khueh. A kaepvai te maehdoelh khueh pah.
Ezekiel4:3 Te phoeiah namah loh thi thiphael namah ham lo lamtah namah laklo neh khopuei laklo ah thi pangbueng la khueh. Te vaengah na maelhmai te a taengla hoi pah. Vongup ah a om bangla la khopuei te na dum bitni. He miknoek he Israel imkhui ham ni.
Ezekiel4:4 Te phoeiah nang te banvoei kah na vae neh yalh lamtah Israel imkhui kah thaesainah te a soah tloeng pah. A soah na yalh khohnin tarhing ah amih kah thaesainah te na phueih ni.
Ezekiel4:5 Amih kah thaesainah kum tarhing bangla nang te kan tueih tih khohnin ya thum neh hnin sawmko ah Israel imkhui kah thaesainah te na phueih van ni.
Ezekiel4:6 Te rhoek te na coeng van neh na vae bantang dongah yalh lamtah Judah imkhui kah thaesainah te khohnin la hnin sawmli phueih pah. A kum la kum ham te hnin at ni nang kan tueih.
Ezekiel4:7 Te phoeiah Jerusalem vong la na maelhmai hooi lamtah na ban te khawn lamtah
Ezekiel4:8 Te vaengah nang dongah rhuivaeh kang khih ni ne. Te dongah na vongup kah khohnin na poeng hill na vae khat ben lamloh na vae khat ben duela na hoi uh thai mahpawh.
Ezekiel4:9 Te phoeiah namah loh namah ham cang neh cangtun
Ezekiel4:10 Na caak te khaw a khiing la shekel pakul mah ca. A khohnin ham te a tue
Ezekiel4:11 Tui khaw khoe dongah bunang parhuk o lamtah a tue a tue vaengah o.
Ezekiel4:12 Cangtun buh te na caak vaengah hlang kah natcaeh aek neh amih mikhmuh ah hai.
