Matthew11:5 Mikdael loh a hmuh tih aka khaem loh cet coeng. Hmaibae loh cing coeng
Matthew11:6 U khaw kai kongah a khah pawt atah yoethen la om
Matthew11:7 Amih boeih a caeh uh phoeiah Jesuh loh hlangping taengah Johan kawng te a tong tih
Matthew11:8 Tedae ba sawt ham nim na caeh uh? a hnal la aka phuekhlaak hlang te nim? Himbai hnal aka bai ke manghai im ah om uh ke.
Matthew11:9 Ba sawt ham nim na caeh uh? Tonghma a? Thuem
Matthew11:10 “Nangmih hmai ah kamah kah puencawn ka tueih ke. Anih loh nangmih hmaiah na longpuei a rhoekbah ni
Matthew11:11 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui. Huta kah a cun khuiah tuinuem Johan lakah aka tanglue phoe pawh
Matthew11:12 Tuinuem Johan tue lamloh tahae duela vaan ram te a ael thil tih
Matthew11:13 Johan duela tonghma rhoek neh olkhueng loh boeih a phong coeng.
Matthew11:14 Tedae doe hamla na ngaih uh koinih
Matthew11:15 Hna aka khueh loh ya saeh.
Matthew11:16 Tedae hekah cadil he ba nen lae ka thuidoek lah ve? Hnoyoih hmuen ah ngol uh tih hlang tloe aka khue
Matthew11:17 Nangmih hamla phavi ka tum uh akhaw na lam uh pawh. Hlo ka hlai akhaw na rhaengsae uh pawh.
Matthew11:18 Johan ha pawk tih a caak a ok pawt hatah
Matthew11:19 Hlang capa ha pawk tih a caak a ok hatah
Matthew11:20 Te phoeiah a thaomnah a kumngai a tueng sak kho rhoek te a yut uh pawt dongah ol a tong tih
Matthew11:21 Anunae Khorazim nang te. Anunae Bethsaida nang te
Matthew11:22 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui. Laitloeknah khohnin ah Tyre neh Sidon tah nangmih lakah a phoeng la om ni.
Matthew11:23 Kapernaum nang khaw
Matthew11:24 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui. Laitloeknah khohnin ah Sodom kho tah nang lakah a phoeng la om ni
Matthew11:25 Tevaeng tue ah Jesuh loh a doo tih
Matthew11:26 Ue apa na hmaiah kolonah la a om tangloeng dongah ni.
Matthew11:27 A pa loh kai he a cungkuem la m'paek coeng. Te dongah pa pawt koinih capa te a ming moenih. Capa pawt koinih pakhat long khaw pa te a ming moenih. Tedae u khaw a ngaih atah capa loh a pumphoe pah coeng.
Matthew11:28 Hnorhih rhoek neh thakthae rhoek boeih te kai taengla halo lah
Matthew11:29 Ka hnamkun he na pum dongah phuei uh lamtah kamah taeng lamkah he cang uh. Muelhtuet neh thinko tlayae la ka om dongah na hinglu ham duemnah na hmuh uh ni.

Matthew12:1 Te vaeng tue kah Sabbath ah Jesuh tah lohma longah cet. A hnukbang rhoek tah a bungpong uh tih cangvuei a yun uh tih koe a kueh a uh.
Matthew12:2 Tedae Pharisee rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah Jesuh te
Matthew12:3 Tedae Jesuh loh
Matthew12:4 Pathen im khuila kun tih a hmai kah buh a caak te ta. Te te anih kah a caak tueng la a om moenih
Matthew12:5 Sabbath ah bawkim kah khosoih rhoek loh Sabbath te a poeih dae ommongsitoe la a om uh te olkhueng khuiah na tae uh moenih a?
Matthew12:6 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui
Matthew12:7 Tedae metla a om khaw na ming uh koinih
Matthew12:8 Hlang capa tah Sabbath boeipa la om
Matthew12:9 Te lamloh thoeih tih amamih kah tunim la pawk.
Matthew12:10 Te vaengah kut khaem hlang pakhat khoem om. Te dongah anih a paelnaeh ham te a dawt uh tih
Matthew12:11 Tedae amih te
Matthew12:12 Hlang he tu lakah muep tanglue ta. Te dongah Sabbath ah a then saii he tueng ta
Matthew12:13 Te phoeiah tekah hlang te
Matthew12:14 Tedae Pharisee rhoek tah cet uh tih anih te poci sak hamla dawtletnah a khueh uh.
Matthew12:15 Jesuh loh a ming vaengah te lamloh khoe uh. Te vaengah anih te hlangping loh muep a vai. Te dongah amih te boeih a hoeih sak.
Matthew12:16 Tedae amah te mingpha la saii pawt ham amih te a uen.
Matthew12:17 Te daengah ni tonghma Isaiah loh a thui tih
Matthew12:18 Ka sal he ne
Matthew12:19 Anih long tah oelhtaih mahpawh
Matthew12:20 Tiktamnah te voelphoengnah la a khuen hlan atah capu aka paep te khaem pawt vetih thut aka nap khaw thih mahpawh.
Matthew12:21 A ming te khaw namtom rhoek loh a ngaiuep ni
Matthew12:22 Te phoeiah rhaithae a kaem olmueh mikdael te a taengla a khuen uh tih anih te a hoeih sak. Te daengah olmueh te cal thai tih kho a hmuh thai.
Matthew12:23 Te vaengah hlangping khaw boeih limlum uh tih
Matthew12:24 Tedae Pharisee rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah anih tah rhaithae rhoek kah boei Belzebul nen pawt koinih rhaithae he haek mahpawh
Matthew12:25 Amih kah poeknah te a hmuh vaengah
Matthew12:26 Satan loh Satan te haek koinih amah te neh amamih paekboe uh ni ta. Te vaengah a ram loh metlam a pai eh?
Matthew12:27 Kai loh Beezebul rhangneh rhaithae ka haek koinih
Matthew12:28 Tedae Pathen Mueihla rhangneh kai loh rhaithae ka haek atah nangmih taengah Pathen kah ram ha pai coeng dongah ni.
Matthew12:29 Aka tlung te lamhma la a pin pawt atah metlam lae aka tlung kah im khuila a kun vetih hnopai te a poelyoe pah thai eh? a pin phoei daengah ni im te a muk eh.
Matthew12:30 Kai taengah aka om pawt tah kai neh hlihloeh la om tih
Matthew12:31 He dongah nangmih taengah kan thui
Matthew12:32 Hlang capa te ol aka tha thil te khaw tholh a hlah pueng ni. Tedae Mueihla Cim te aka cal thil te tah tahae tue neh aka lo ham dongah khaw anih te tholh hlah pah mahpawh.
Matthew12:33 Thing then loh a thaih a then sak tih thing thae loh a thaih a thae sak. Te dongah thing he a thaih loh a mingpha sak.
Matthew12:34 Rhulthae rhoek kah casak rhoek
Matthew12:35 Hlang then loh khohrhang then khuikah a then a sat tih
Matthew12:36 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui
Matthew12:37 Na ol loh n'tang sak vetih na ol loh n'boe sak ni
Matthew12:38 Te phoeiah cadaek rhoek hlangvang neh Pharisee rhoek loh Jesuh te a doo uh tih
Matthew12:39 Tedae amih te a doo tih
Matthew12:40 Jonah tah nga bung khuiah khothaih hnin thum neh khoyin hnin thum a om bangla hlang capa tah diklai ko khuiah khothaih hnin thum neh khoyin hnin thum om van ni.
Matthew12:41 Laitloeknah hnin ah Nineveh hlang rhoek tah hekah cadil taengah pai uh vetih a boe sak ni. Jonah kah olhoe dongah amih yut uh. Tedae hekah aka om he Jonah lakah len dae ta he.
Matthew12:42 Tuithim boeinu tah Solomon kah cueihnah hnatun hamla diklai bawt lamkah loh ha pawk dongah tahae kah cadil he laitloeknah ah a pai thil vetih a boe sak ni. Tedae heah he Solomon lakah aka len om dae ta he.
Matthew12:43 Mueihla thae loh hlang lamkah a coe phoeiah tuihang hmuen boeih ah cet tih duemnah a toem dae hmu pawh.
Matthew12:44 Te vaengah ka caeh tangtae te ka im la ka bal ni a ti. Te dongah
Matthew12:45 Te phoeiah cet tih amah lakah aka thae mueihla a tloe parhih te amah taengla a khuen. Te phoeiah te rhoek ah kun uh tih kho a sak. Te dongah te hlang te lamhma kah lakah a hnukkhueng kah a om te thae. Tahae kah cadil he khaw rhaithae lam ni a om tangkhuet eh
Matthew12:46 Hlangping te a voek li vaengah a manu neh a mana rhoek loh anih te voek ham a toem uh tih poeng ah pakcak pai uh.
Matthew12:47 Te dongah pakhat loh
Matthew12:48 Te dongah amah aka voek te

Matthew13:1 Te hnin ah Jesuh tah im lamloh cet tih tuili kaengah ngol.
Matthew13:2 Te vaengah hlangping rhoek tah anih taengah muep tingtun uh. Te dongah amah tah lawng khuiah ngol hamla kun. Tedae hlangping tah tuikaeng ah boeih pai.
Matthew13:3 Te phoeiah amih taengah nuettahnah neh muep a thui tih
Matthew13:4 Cangti a haeh vaengah a ngen te longpuei ah tla. Te dongah vaa loh a paan tih a kueh.
Matthew13:5 Angen tah lungrhong dongah tla tih
Matthew13:6 A yung a om pawt dongah khomik ha thoeng vaengah tah a kaeng tih koh.
Matthew13:7 Angen tah hling khuiah tla tih hling te a rhoeng vaengah tah cang te a huep.
Matthew13:8 Tedae a ngen tah lai then dongah tla tih a thaih
Matthew13:9 Hna aka khueh loh ya saeh
Matthew13:10 Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh tih
Matthew13:11 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
Matthew13:12 Aka khueh te tah a paek thil vetih a coih pah ni. Tedae aka khueh pawt te a khueh duen pataeng te a taeng lamkah loh a lat pah ni.
Matthew13:13 Te dongah ni amih taengah nuettahnah neh ka thui pah. A hmuh uh dae hmat uh pawh. A hnatun uh dae ya uh pawt tih hmuhming uh pawh.
Matthew13:14 Te dongah Isaiah kah tonghma ol te amih taengah
Matthew13:15 Pilnam kah thinko he tah a talh pah coeng. Te dongah hna neh a hnatun uh tloel tih a mik khaw a him uh. A mik neh a hmuh uh tih
Matthew13:16 Tedae nangmih kah mik loh a hmuh tih na hna loh a yaak dongah a yoethen.
Matthew13:17 Rhep kan thui
Matthew13:18 Te dongah nangmih loh cangti aka tuh kah nuettahnah he hnatun uh.
Matthew13:19 Ram kah olka te a yaak dae aka hmuhming pawt boeih tah
Matthew13:20 Lungrhong sokah a haeh te tah ol te a yaak vaengah omngaihnah neh tlek aka doe ni.
Matthew13:21 Tedae a khuiah a yung a khueh pawt dongah kolkalh ni a om. Tedae olka kongah hnaemtaeknah neh phacip phabaem a om vaengah voeng a khah.
Matthew13:22 Hling laklikah a tuh tah ol te aka ya la om dae dilai kah mawntangnah neh khuehtawn kah hmilhmaknah loh ol te a thing tih a tlongtlai la poeh.
Matthew13:23 Tedae lai then sokah a tuh tah ol te a yaak tih aka hmuhming la om. Anih tah a ngen yakhat
Matthew13:24 A tloe nuettahnah te amih a paek tih
Matthew13:25 Tedae hlang a ih vaengah a rhal ha pawk tih
Matthew13:26 Khopol te muem tih a vuei a thaih vaengah tah paitaang te khaw phoe.
Matthew13:27 Te vaengah a sal rhoek loh a kungmah te a paan uh tih
Matthew13:28 Te vaengah amih te
Matthew13:29 Tedae amah loh
Matthew13:30 Cangah duela bok rhoeng sak mai. Cangah tue ah cangat rhoek te
Matthew13:31 A tloe nuettahnah amih a paek tih
Matthew13:32 Te te a mu aka om boeih lakah yiit. Tedae a rhoeng vaengah toian aka om boeih lakah tanglue tih thing la poeh. Te daengah ni vaan kah vaa loh ha pawk uh tih a hlaeng dongah bu a tuk
Matthew13:33 A tloe nuettahnah neh amih te
Matthew13:34 Jesuh loh he rhoek boeih he nuettahnah neh hlangping taengah a thui. Nuettahnah pawt atah amih taengah ol a thui moenih.
Matthew13:35 Te daengah ni tonghma loh a phong
Matthew13:36 Hlangping te a tueih phoeiah im khuila kun. Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a taengla a paan uh tih
Matthew13:37 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a doo tih
Matthew13:38 Lohma tah diklai ni. Te phoeiah cangti then tah ram kah a ca rhoek ni. Tedae paitaang tah rhaithae kah a ca rhoek ni.
Matthew13:39 Te te aka haeh rhal te tah rhaithae ni. Cangah tue tah lunglai tue a bawtnah ni. Cangat rhoek tah puencawn rhoek ni.
Matthew13:40 Te dongah paitaang a yoep uh tih hmai neh a hoeh bangla kumhal kah a bawtnah dongah om van ni.
Matthew13:41 Hlang capa loh a puencawn rhoek te a tueih ni. Te vaengah thangkui neh olaeknah aka saii rhoek boeih te a ram lamloh a bit uh ni.
Matthew13:42 Te phoeiah amih te hmai alh khuila a phum uh ni. Te rhoek ah rhah neh
Matthew13:43 Te vaengah aka dueng rhoek tah Pa kah ram ah khomik bangla sae uh ni. Hna aka khueh loh ya saeh.
Matthew13:44 Vaan ram tah lohma ah a thuh sut khohrhang phek la om. Te te hlang loh a hmuh vaengah a thuh tih a omngaihnah neh cet. Te phoeiah a khueh boeih te a yoih tih te kah lohmuen te a lai.
Matthew13:45 Te phoeiah vaan ram tah laitha then aka toem hnoyoi hlang phek la om.
Matthew13:46 Laitha a phu aka tlo pakhat la a hmuh dongah
Matthew13:47 Vaan ram tah tuili khuila lawk aka voei bangla om bal tih namtu cungkuem lamkah khaw a coi.
Matthew13:48 Te te a bae vaengah lihmoi la a kawt uh. Te phoeiah ngol uh tih a then te busui khuila a sang uh. Tedae a thae te a tah phawn a voeih uh.
Matthew13:49 Kumhal kah a bawtnah dongah om van ni. Puencawn rhoek loh cet uh vetih aka dueng lakli kah boethae rhoek te a hoep ni.
Matthew13:50 Te phoeiah amih te hmai alh khuila a voeih uh ni. Te hmuen ah rhah neh no rhuengnah ni aka om eh.
Matthew13:51 “He rhoek boeih he na hmuhming uh a?” a ti nah. Amah taengah
Matthew13:52 Te dongah amih taengah
Matthew13:53 Jesuh loh nuettahnah he bawt a khah tih te lamloh vik nong.
Matthew13:54 Te phoeiah amah tolrhum la pawk tih amamih kah tunim ah amih te a thuituen hatah let uh tih
Matthew13:55 “Anih he lettama capa la om moenih a? A manu tah Mary la a khue uh moenih a? A mana rhoek khaw James
Matthew13:56 A ngannu rhoek khaw mamih taengah boeih a om uh moenih a? Te dongah anih taengkah boeih he me lamkah nim? a ti uh.
Matthew13:57 Tedae anih kongah amamih te a khah uh. Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te
Matthew13:58 Tedae amih kah hnalvalnah kongah a thaomnah muep tueng sak pawh.

Matthew14:4 Johan loh anih te
Matthew14:5 Johan te ngawn a ngaih dae Johan te tonghma la a khueh uh dongah hlangping te a rhih.
Matthew14:6 Tedae Herod kah cunnah a pha vaengah
Matthew14:7 Te dongah huta kah a bih te tah paek ham olhlo neh a phong.
Matthew14:8 Tedae a manu kah caemtuh dongah
Matthew14:9 Manghai loh a kothae dae a olhlo neh
Matthew14:10 Te dongah hlang a tueih tih Johan te thongim khuiah a rhaih.

Matthew14:12 Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh tih rhok te a khuen uh. A up uh phoeiah tah Jesuh taengla pawk uh tih puen uh.
Matthew14:13 Jesuh loh a yaak vaengah
Matthew14:14 A caeh vaengah hlangping muep a hmuh hatah amih ham a thinphat tih

Matthew14:17 Tedae te rhoek loh
Matthew14:18 Tedae
Matthew14:19 Te phoeiah hlangping rhoek te khopol dongah ngolhlung ham ol a paek. Vaidam panga neh nga panit te a loh. Vaan la oeloe tih a uem phoeiah vaidam te a aeh tih hnukbang rhoek a paek. Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek loh hlangping te a paek.
Matthew14:20 Hlang boeih loh a caak uh tih hah uh. Te phoeiah a coih
Matthew14:21 Huta rhoek neh camoe rhoek thui kolla aka ca rhoek he tongpa thawngnga tluk lo uh.
Matthew14:22 Hlangping te phang a tueih hlanah hnukbang rhoek te lawng khuila kun ham tlek a tanolh tih rhalvangan la a lamhma sak.
Matthew14:23 Tedae hlangping te a hlah a phoeiah amah bueng thangthui hamla tlang la luei. Hlaem a pha vaengah amah bueng pahoi om.
Matthew14:24 Lawng tah lan lamloh phalong muep a pha coeng. Te vaengah hli oel om tih tuiphu loh a hinghuen.
Matthew14:25 Jesuh tah khoyin bangli ah
Matthew14:26 Amah tuili soah a caeh te a hnukbang rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah

Matthew14:28 Peter loh a doo tih
Matthew14:29 Te dongah
Matthew14:30 Tedae khohli a tloh te a hmuh vaengah a rhih tih dalh buek. Te vaengah pang tih
Matthew14:31 Jesuh loh a kut tlek a yueng tih a tuuk phoeiah Peter te
Matthew14:32 Lawng dongah amih rhoi a yoeng rhoi vaengah khohli te dip.
Matthew14:33 Te vaengah lawng dongkah rhoek loh Jesuh te a bawk uh tih
Matthew14:34 A hlaikan uh vaengah Gennesaret kho la pawk uh.
Matthew14:35 Te hmuen kah hlang rhoek loh amah te a hmat uh dongah te rhoek pingpang tom ah a tueih uh. Te dongah
Matthew14:36 Te vaengah a himbai dongkah salaw taek dawk ham te anih a hloep uh. Te dongah aka taek rhoek tah boeih hoeih uh.
Matthew15:1 Te phoeiah Pharisee rhoek neh cadaek rhoek tah Jerusalem lamloh Jesuh te a paan uh tih
Matthew15:2 “Balae tih na hnukbang rhoek loh a ham rhoek kah singyoe te a aek uh? Buh a caak uh vaengah a kut sil uh pawh
Matthew15:3 Tedae amih te a doo tih
Matthew15:4 Pathen loh
Matthew15:5 Tedae nangmih loh
Matthew15:6 A napa a hinyah pawt moenih
Matthew15:7 Hlangthai palat rhoek
Matthew15:8 Pilnam long he a hmui neh kan n'hinyah uh. Tedae a thinko tah kai lamloh voelh hla coeng.

Matthew18:9 Te phoeiah na mik loh nang n'khah atah te te koeih lamtah namah lamloh voei. Mik vang neh hingnah khuila kun te nang ham hnothen la om. Mik panit om tih hell hmai khuila voeih lakah tah.

Matthew22:4 Sal a tloe rhoek te koep a tueih tih
Matthew22:5 Tedae amih loh a sawtrhoel uh tih a ngen tah amah kah lo la

Matthew22:7 Te dongah manghai tah kosi a hong tih a rhalkap rhoek te a tueih. Te vaengah hlang aka ngawn rhoek te a poci sak tih a khopuei te a hlup pah.
Matthew22:8 Te phoeiah a sal rhoek taengah
Matthew22:9 Te dongah longpuei caehtung ah cet uh lamtah na hmuh uh sarhui te yulueinah ah khue uh
Matthew22:10 Te phoeiah sal rhoek tah longpuei ah cet uh tih a hmuh uh sarhui te a thae neh a then khaw a coi uh. Te dongah yulueinah tah aka bul rhoek neh bae uh.

Matthew27:5 Te dongah tangka te bawkim khuiah a voeih tih vik khoe uh. Te phoeiah cet tih kuiok.
Matthew27:6 Tedae khosoihham rhoek loh tangka te a loh uh tih
Matthew27:7 Te dongah dawtletnah a khueh uh tih te nen te kholong rhoek kah phuel la ambop kah lo te a lai uh.
Matthew27:8 Te dongah te kah lohmuen tah tihnin due
Matthew27:9 Te dongah tonghma Jeremiah loh a thui tah soep coeng. Te vaengah
Matthew27:10 Te phoeiah ka boeipa loh a thuinuet bangla ambop kah lohmuen te tangka la a paek uh
Matthew27:11 Jesuh te khoboei hmaiah a pai vaengah khoboei loh a dawt tih
Matthew27:12 Te vaengah khosoihham rhoek neh patong rhoek loh Jesuh te a paelnaeh dae a doo moenih.
Matthew27:13 Te dongah Pilat loh Jesuh te
Matthew27:14 Tedae Jesuh loh olka kam khat nen pataeng a lan pawt dongah khoboei te bahoeng a ngaihmang.
Matthew27:15 Khotue ah ana sainoek tah khoboei loh hlangping ham amamih ngaih thongtla pakhat te a hlah.
Matthew27:16 Te vaengah Barabbas Jesuh la a khue thongtla mingthang te a khueh uh.
Matthew27:17 Amih a tingtun uh vaengah Pilat loh amih te
Matthew27:18 Uethnetnah dongah anih he a voeih uh tila a ming.
Matthew27:19 Pailat te laitloek ngolkhoel dongah a ngol vaengah a yuu loh anih te ol a tah tih
Matthew27:20 Tedae khosoihham rhoek neh a ham rhoek loh Barabbas te bih tih Jesuh te poci hamla hlangping te a yoek uh.
Matthew27:21 Te phoeiah khoboei loh amih te a doo tih
Matthew27:22 Pilat loh amih taengah
Matthew27:23 Tedae Pilat loh
Matthew27:24 Pilat loh a hoeikhang hae mahpawh olpungnah ni aka om tila a hmuh. Tui a loh tih hlangping hmaiah kut a yuh phoeiah
Matthew27:25 Te dongah pilnam boeih loh a doo tih
Matthew27:26 Te vaengah amih hamla Barabbas te a hlah pah. Tedae Jesuh te a tam tih tai ham a paek.
Matthew27:27 Te phoeiah Jesuh te khoboei kah rhalkap rhoek loh khoboeiyung la a khuen uh tih caem pum loh a tingtun thil uh.
Matthew27:28 A himbai te a pit pa uh tih rhalkap himbai a nukyum te anih a bai sak uh.
Matthew27:29 Hling rhuisam khaw a vaeh uh tih a lu soah a khuem sak uh. Te phoeiah capu kong te a bantang kut ah a pom sak uh. Te vaengah a hmaiah cungkueng neh a tamdaeng uh tih
Matthew27:30 Te phoeiah Jesuh te a timthoih uh
Matthew27:31 Jesuh a tamdaeng uh vaengah rhalkap himbai te a pit pa uh tih amah kah himbai te a bai sak uh. Te phoeiah tai hamla a khuen uh.
Matthew27:32 A caeh uh vaengah Kurena hlang
Matthew27:33 Te phoeiah Golgotha a ti hmuen la pawk uh. Te tah lurhuh la a khue hmuen ni.
Matthew27:34 Te vaengah ankhaa neh a thoek misurtui te ok hamla Jesuh te a paek uh dae a ten vaengah ok ham ngaih pawh.
Matthew27:35 Anih a tai uh phoeiah tah a himbai te tael uh thae tih hmulung a naan uh.
Matthew27:36 Te phoeiah ngol uh tih amah te pahoi a tawt uh.
Matthew27:37 Te vaengah a paelnaehnah te a lu soah a khing pa uh tih

Matthew27:39 Aka van paitai loh a lu a hinghuen uh tih anih te a soehsal uh.

Matthew27:47 Aka pai rhoek khuikah hlangvang a yaak uh vaengah

Matthew27:59 Joseph loh rhok te a loh phoeiah hnipen aka caih neh a yen

Matthew28:1 Sabbath poeng kah Sabbath aka paan cuek mincang vaengah Magadala Mary neh a tloe Mary te hlan hip hamla ha pawk uh.

Matthew28:3 A mueisa tah khophaa bangla om tih a himbai te khaw vuelsong bangla bok.
Matthew28:4 Te vaengah aka tawt rhoek loh a rhihnah neh thuen uh tih duek rhok bangla om uh.

Mark1:1 Pathen Capa Jesuh Khrih kah olthangthen a tongnah.
Mark1:2 Isaiah dongah a daek tangtae bangla
Mark1:3 Khosoek ah pang ol loh

Mark1:5 Te dongah Judah kho boeih neh Jerusalem pum loh anih taengla khong uh. Te vaengah a tholhnah te a phong uh tih Jordan tuiva ah Johan loh a nuem.
Mark1:6 Te vaengah aka om Johan loh kalauk mul a bai tih
Mark1:7 A hoe vaengah
Mark1:8 Kai loh nangmih te tui ah kan nuem
Mark1:9 Tekah khohnin a pha vaengah Jesuh khaw Galilee kah Nazareth lamkah halo tih
Mark1:10 Tui khui lamkah koe a thoh vaengah
Mark1:11 Te vaengah vaan lamkah ol ha thoeng tih
Mark1:12 Te phoeiah anih te Mueihla loh khosoek la thaeng a khuen.
Mark1:13 Khosoek ah khohnin sawmli a om vaengah Satan loh a satlung. Te vaengah satlung taengah khaw om dae anih te puencawn rhoek loh a khut uh.
Mark1:14 Tedae Johan te a voeih uh phoeiah
Mark1:15 Te vaengah

Mark1:17 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih rhoi te
Mark1:18 Te dongah lawk na te pak a hlah rhoi tih Jesuh te a vai rhoi.
Mark1:19 Tedae hawt a caeh vaengah Zebedee capa James neh a mana Johan te a hmuh. Te vaengah amih rhoi te lawng khuiah lawk a bo rhoi.
Mark1:20 Te dongah amih rhoi te pahoi a khue hatah a napa Zebedee neh lawng khuiah a kutloh rhoek te pak a hlah tih amah hnukah cet rhoi.
Mark1:21 Kapernaum la a kun uh vaengkah Sabbath ah tah tunim la tlek kun tih a thuituen.
Mark1:22 Te vaengah anih kah thuituennah soah let uh. Amih a thuituen te saithainah aka khueh la om tih cadaek rhoek bangla om pawh.
Mark1:23 Amih kah tunim ah hlang pakhat tah mueihla thae neh lawt om.
Mark1:24 Te vaengah pang tih
Mark1:25 Tedae Jesuh loh anih te a ho tih
Mark1:26 Te vaengah mueihla thae loh anih te suvaih sak. Te phoeiah ol a len la pang tih anih lamloh coe.
Mark1:27 Te vaengah boeih a ngaihmang uh. Te dongah amamih te oelh uh thae tih

Mark1:29 Te phoeiah tunim lamloh tlek cet uh tih James neh Johan khaw
Mark1:30 Tedae Simon masae tah tlo tih yalh. Te dongah anih ham te Jesuh taengah tlek a thui uh.
Mark1:31 Te dongah a paan tih a kut te a tuuk pah. Anih te a thoh vaengah anih te satloh loh a hlah tih amih te a kok.
Mark1:32 Hlaem a pha tih khomik a tlak vaengah
Mark1:33 Te vaengah kho pum ah aka om te thohka ah tingtun uh.
Mark1:34 Te phoeiah tlohtat soeprhep aka khueh hlangtlo muep a hoeih sak. Rhaithae khaw muep a haek. Tedae amah te aming uh dongah rhaithae rhoek te cal sak pawh.
Mark1:35 Tedae khohmuep aih ah yueya thoo tih aka nong te khosoek hmuen la cet tih thangthui.
Mark1:36 Te vaengah Simon neh a taengkah rhoek loh Jesuh hnuk a dawn uh.
Mark1:37 Tedae Jesuh te a hmuh uh vaengah a taengah
Mark1:38 Te vaengah amih te
Mark1:39 Te dongah Galilee pum ah cet tih amih kah tunim ah olthangthen a hoe phoeiah rhaithae te a vai.
Mark1:40 Te vaengah
Mark1:41 Te vaengah a thinphat tih a kut te a yueng. Anih te a taek tih
Mark1:42 Te vaengah hmaibae tah anih lamloh pahoi nong tih cim.
Mark1:43 Te phoeiah thanueih ah anih te tlek a tueih.
Mark1:44 Tedae anih te
Mark1:45 Tedae a caeh neh a tong tih pung a hoe dongah ol te yilhcet. Te dongah Jesuh tah kho khuiah loloh kun thai voel pawh. Te phoeiah tah khosoek hmuen ah vawl om dae anih te a taengvai lamloh a paan uh.
Mark2:1 Khohnin a di phoeiah Kapernaum la koep kun tih im ah om tila a yaak.

Mark2:3 Te vaengah aka khawn te pali loh Jesuh taengla khuen ham a koh uh tih ha pawk uh.
Mark2:4 Tedae hlangping kongah a taengla a khuen thai pawt dongah a om nah tueng kah imphu te a hlih uh. Te phoeiah a ong uh tih aka khawn te phakdoeng dongah a yalh doela a hlak uh.
Mark2:5 Jesuh loh amih kah tangnah te a hmuh vaengah aka khawn te

Mark2:7 “Balae tih anih hetla a cal

Mark2:10 Te daengah ni
Mark2:11 Aka khawn te
Mark2:12 Te vaengah thoo tih hlang boeih hmaiah phakdoeng te pahoi a loh tih cet. Te dongah boeih limlum uh tih Pathen te thangpom ham

Mark2:14 A khum phai vaengah
Mark2:15 Levi im ah om tih buh a vael. Te vaengah mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek tah Jesuh neh a hnukbang rhoek taengah muep ngol uh. Te phoeiah anih aka vai rhoek khaw muep om uh.
Mark2:16 Hlangtholh rhoek neh mangmucoi rhoek taengah a caak te Pharisee rhoek kah cadaek rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek taengah

Mark2:19 Jesuh loh amih te

Mark4:1 Tuili kaengah khaw thuituen ham koep a tong tih hlangping loh a taengah a kumngai a tingtun pah. Te dongah amah te tuili kah lawng khuiah ngol hamla kun. Te vaengah hlangping tah tuili taengkah lan soah boeih om uh.
Mark4:2 Te vaengah amih te nuettahnah neh muep a thuituen tih a thuituennah dongah amih te
Mark4:3 “ Hnatun uh lah
Mark4:4 A tuh la a om vaengah a ngen tah long ah tla. Te dongah vaa loh a paan tih a kueh.
Mark4:5 Te phoeiah a tloe tah laimen muep aka om pawh lungrhong soah tla tih laimen a dung la a om pawt dongah tlek poe.
Mark4:6 Tedae khomik a thoeng vaengah a kaeng atah a yung a om pawt dongah koh
Mark4:7 Te phoeiah a tloe tah hling khuiah tla. Hling te rhoeng vaengah cangti te a thing tih a thaih thaii pawh.
Mark4:8 Te phoeiah
Mark4:9 Te dongah
Mark4:10 Te dongah amah bueng a om vaengah
Mark4:11 Te dongah amih te
Mark4:12 Te daengah ni a hmuh tah a hmuh uh sui dae a hmat uh pawt eh
Mark4:13 Te phoeiah amih te
Mark4:14 Aka tuh loh olthangthen ni a tuh.
Mark4:15 He tah longpuei kaep kah a soem ol te ni. A yaak vaengah Satan tlek cet tih amih khuiah a soem ol a loh pah.
Mark4:16 Te phoeiah he rhoek tah lungrhong sokah a haeh rhoek ni. Te rhoek loh ol te a yaak uh vaengah omngaihnah neh tlek a doe.
Mark4:17 Tedae a khuiah a yung a om uh pawt tih kolkalh bueng om uh. Te phoeiah olka kongah phacip phabaem neh hnaemtaeknah a om atah voeng a khah uh.
Mark4:18 A tloe rhoek hling lakli ah a tuh khaw om. Te rhoek khaw ol aka ya rhoek ni.
Mark4:19 Tedae diklai kah mawntangnah
Mark4:20 Tedae lai then ah tuh la aka om rhoek tah ol te a yaak uh vaengah a doe uh tih a ngen tah thumkip
Mark4:21 Te phoeiah amih te
Mark4:22 Te dongah a huephael akhaw a phoe mueh la a om moenih. A huep te a thoeng mueh moenih. Te van daengah ni mingpha la a om eh.
Mark4:23 Yaak nah hna aka khueh long te tah ya saeh
Mark4:24 Te phoeiah amih te
Mark4:25 Aka khueh te tah a paek thil vetih aka khueh pawt te a khueh duen te anih taeng lamloh a lat pah ni
Mark4:26 Te phoeiah
Mark4:27 Tedae khoyin khothaih ip vaeng thoo vaeng cakhaw cangtii daih tih a rhoeng te a ming moenih.
Mark4:28 Diklai amah loh a thaihtak sak tih lamhma la cangkung
Mark4:29 Tedae cangvuei loh hmin tih cangah a pha atah vin tlek a pom
Mark4:30 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh
Mark4:31 Pathen ram tah mukang mu bangla om. Te te diklai dongah a haeh vaengah tah diklai hmankah a tii boeih lakah a yit koek la om.
Mark4:32 A haeh phoeiah rhoeng tih toian boeih lakah a tanglue la coeng
Mark4:33 A yaak thai la hebang nuettahnah neh amih taengah ol muep a thui pah.
Mark4:34 Nuettahnah pawt atah amih taengah a thui moenih. Tedae a hnukbang rhoek ham bueng ni boeih a thuicaih pah.
Mark4:35 Te khohnin hlaem a pha vaengah amih te
Mark4:36 Te phoeiah hlangping te a hlah uh tih lawng khuiah aka om Jesuh te pahoi a khuen uh. Lawng tloe rhoek khaw Jesuh taengah om uh.
Mark4:37 Te vaengah khohli aka tlo hlipuei te hli. Te dongah tuiphu loh lawng te a boh dongah lawng dalh buek.

Mark4:41 Tedae a rhih uh tih a rhihnah uh khaw khosava. Te dongah khat neh khat

Mark5:15 Jesuh taengla a pawk uh vaengah rhaithae aka kaem a ngol te a hmuh uh. Anih te yol uh tih muet uh. Anih te caempuei caempa a khueh dongah a rhih uh.

Mark5:17 Te dongah amih vaang lamloh nong hamla Jesuh te a hloep uh.

Mark5:23 Jesuh te tlal a hloep tih

Mark5:25 Te vaengah kum hlainit khuiah thii aka buk huta pakhat om.
Mark5:26 Siboei tom taengah khaw muep patang coeng tih a taengkah khaw boeih vak coeng. Tedae hoeikhang pawt tih a thae la lat a om pah.

Mark5:31 Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a taengah
Mark5:32 Tedae te aka saii te hmuh ham a sawt.
Mark5:33 Huta long khaw a taengah aka thoeng te a ming dongah a rhih neh birhih coeng. Te dongah a paan tih bakop doela Jesuh taengah oltak te boeih a thui pah.

Mark9:35 Te vaengah Ngol tih hlainit te a khue. Amih te khaw

Mark9:37 Amih te khaw
Mark9:38 Johan loh Jesuh taengah
Mark9:39 Tedae Jesuh loh
Mark9:40 Te dongah mamih neh kingkalh la aka om pawt te tah mamih ham ni a om.
Mark9:41 Khrih kah hut la na om uh dongah ka ming neh tui boengloeng khat nangmih aka tul te tah a thapang te poci loengloeng mahpawh tila nangmih taengah rhep ka thui.
Mark9:42 U long khaw kai aka tangnah camoe rhoek he pakhat khaw a khah atah a rhawn ah laak phaklung a oi tih tuili ah voei koinih anih ham hnothen la lat om coeng.
Mark9:43 Nang khaw na kut loh n'khah atah hlueng mai. Kut panit om tih hmai aka duek pawh hell la caeh lakah hingnah khuiah a ngun la kun te nang ham hnothen la om.
Mark9:44 Na kho long khaw nang n'khah atah hlueng mai.
Mark9:45 Kho rhoi om tih hell khuila m'voeih lakah a khaem neh hingnah khuila kun te nang hnothen la om.
Mark9:46 Na mik long khaw nang n'khah atah koeih mai.
Mark9:47 Mik panit om tih hell la m'voeih lakah mikvang neh Khohni ram khuiah kun te nang ham hnothen la om.
Mark9:48 Te ah tah amih kah a rhiit khaw duek pawt tih hmai khaw thi pawh.
Mark9:49 Rhoepsaep boeih te hmai dongah a baek ni.

Mark14:72 Ai a pabae la pahoi khong tih Jesuh loh anih taengah
Mark15:1 Khosoihham rhoek
Mark15:2 Te vaengah Pilat loh Jesuh te
Mark15:3 Khosoihham rhoek long khaw Jesuh te tholh muep a paelnaeh uh.
Mark15:4 Te dongah Pilat loh Jesuh te koep a dawt tih
Mark15:5 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo bakhaw voel pawt dongah Pilat te a ngaihmang.
Mark15:6 Te vaengkah khotue takuem ah thongtla pakhat te a hoep tih ana hlah pah.
Mark15:7 Te dongah rhalthoh rhoek neh a khoh Barabbas a ti te om. Anih loh olpungnah dongah ngawnnah a saii.
Mark15:8 Hlangping te khaw cet uh tih a saii noek la amamih ham koe a bih uh.
Mark15:9 Tedae Pilat loh amih te a doo tih
Mark15:10 Uethnetnah dongah khosoihham rhoek loh anih taengla a voeih uh te a ming.
Mark15:11 Tedae khosoihham rhoek loh hlangping te a hueh tih Barabbas te amih ham lat a hlah sak.
Mark15:12 Te dongah Pilat loh amih te a doo tih
Mark15:13 Te rhoek loh
Mark15:14 Tedae Pilat loh amih taengah
Mark15:15 Pilat loh hlangping kolo la saii a ngaih dongah amih ham Barabbas te a hlah pah. Tedae Jesuh te a tam tih tai ham a paek.
Mark15:16 Te phoeiah rhalkap rhoek loh Jesuh te khoboeiyung a om nah vongup khuila a khuen uh tih caem te a pum la a hueh uh.
Mark15:17 Te phoeiah Jesuh te daidi neh a khuk uh tih hling rhuisam a vaeh uh te a khuem sak uh.
Mark15:18 Te phoeiah
Mark15:19 Te phoeiah a lu te capu neh a boh uh tih a timthoih uh. Khuklu te khaw cungkueng uh tih Jesuh te a bawk uh.
Mark15:20 Jesuh te a tamdaeng uh phoeiah daidi te a pit pa uh. Te phoeiah a himbai te a bai sak uh tih tai hamla a khuen uh.
Mark15:21 Te vaengah Kurena hlang Alexander neh Rufus kah a napa Simon lohma lamkah ha pawk tih pal khum rhoi dae Jesuh kah thinglam te koh sak ham khak a tanolh uh.
Mark15:22 Te phoeiah Jesuh te Golgotha hmuen la a khuen uh. Tekah te lurhuh hmuen ni a thuingaih.
Mark15:23 Te vaengah myrrh misurtui te Jesuh a paek uh dae doe pawh.
Mark15:24 Jesuh te a tai uh phoeiah a himbai te a phen pa uh tih amamih khat khat loh a khuen ham te hmulung a naan uh.
Mark15:25 Khonoek pathum a lo vaengah Jesuh te a tai uh.
Mark15:26 Te phoeiah a paelnaehnah ming te a daek tih
Mark15:27 Anih neh dingca panit te khaw bantang ah pakhat banvoei ah pakhat a tai uh.
Mark15:28 Aka van paitai loh anih te a soehsal uh tih a lu a hinghuen uh.
Mark15:29 Te vaengah
Mark15:30 Namah te khang uh lamtah thinglam lamkah rhum lah
Mark15:31 Khosoihham rhoek neh cadaek rhoek van long khaw a tamdaeng uh tih khat khat taengah
Mark15:32 Israel manghai Khrih thinglam lamkah rhum laeh
Mark15:33 Khonoek parhuk a pha neh diklai pum ah yinnah loh khonoek pako duela a thing.
Mark15:34 Khovang khonoek pako vaengah Jesuh tah
Mark15:35 Te vaengah a taengkah aka pai khuikah a ngen loh a yaak uh tih
Mark15:36 Hlang pakhat aka yong loh caethum te yuthui neh a sul tih cungkui dongah a kaek. Te phoeiah Jesuh te a tul tih
Mark15:37 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh ol a len la a huel tih pat.
Mark15:38 Te vaengah bawkim kah hniyan te a soi lamloh a hmui due panit la pawn.
Mark15:39 Anih hmai ah aka pai rhalboei long khaw a pat te a hmuh vaengah
Mark15:40 Te vaengah a hla lamkah aka dan huta rhoek khaw om uh. Amih khuiah Magadala Mary
Mark15:41 Amih tah Galilee ah a om vaeng lamkah loh Jesuh te a vai uh tih a khut uh. Te phoeiah a tloe
Mark15:42 Te phoeiah hlaem a pha coeng tih rhuengphongnah om. Te dongah te tah huetnah la om.
Mark15:43 Te vaengah Arimathea lamkah khoboei hlangcong Joseph te ha pawk. Anih tah amah long khaw Pathen kah ram te aka lamtawn la om. Pilat taengah ngaingaih la cet tih Jesuh kah rhok te a bih.
Mark15:44 Jesuh a duek tarha te Pilat khaw a ngaihmang. Te dongah rhalboei te a khue tih
Mark15:45 Rhalboei lamkah te a mingpha daengah rhok te Joseph a paek.
Mark15:46 Te vaengah a himbai lai neh a hlak. Himbai te a yen tih phoeiah anih hlan ah a khueh. Te tah lungpang dongah a thuk tangtae la om. Te phoeiah tah hlan rhai te lungto a paluet thil.
Mark15:47 Magadala Mary neh Joses manu Mary long khaw a khueh nah te a hmuh.
Mark16:1 Sabbath poeng phoeiah Magadala Mary neh James manu Mary neh Salome loh bo-ul a lai tih boeipa te hluk ham la cet rhoi.
Mark16:2 Sabbath phoeikah lamhmacuek vaengah yueya aih pueng dae phuel la a pawk vaengah tah khomik thoeng coeng.
Mark16:3 Te vaengah amamih te
Mark16:4 Tedae a sawt uh vaengah
Mark16:5 Phuel khuila a kun uh vaengah hnikul a bok aka bai cadong pakhat tah bantang ben ah ana ngol te a hmuh uh tih a ngaihmang uh.
Mark16:6 Tedae anih loh amih taengah
Mark16:7 Tedae
Mark16:8 Te vaengah amih te thuennah neh
Mark16:9 A thoh phoeikah Sabbath yarh lamhma cuek mincang ah tah Magadala Mary taengah lamhma la a phoe pah. Rhaithae parhih te anih lamkah ni a haek pah.
Mark16:10 Anih te cet tih Jesuh taengah aka om tih a nguek neh aka rhap rhoek taengah puen.
Mark16:11 Jesuh hing tih a hmuh te a yaak uh dae a hnalval tak uh.
Mark16:12 Te phoeiah amih khuikah hlang panit te a kho la cet rhoi tih a pongpa rhoi vaengah mueimae a hloeh la a phoe pah.
Mark16:13 Amih rhoi te cet tih a tloe rhoek taengah puen rhoi dae te rhoi te tangnah uh pawh.
Mark16:14 Tedae hnuktloih la vael hlaikhat rhoek taengah a phoe pa tih amih kah hnalvalnah neh thinthahnah te a toel. Jesuh thoo coeng tih a hmuh uh lalah tangnah uh pawh.
Mark16:15 Te phoeiah amih te
Mark16:16 Aka tangnah tih aka tuinuem tah daem vetih aka hnalval rhoek tah boe ni.
Mark16:17 Te dongah miknoek tah aka tangnah rhoek thuep ni. Ka ming neh rhaithae a haek uh ni. Ol thai te a thui uh ni.
Mark16:18 A kut neh rhul a tuuk uh ni. Sue khat khat a ok uh mai akhaw amih te tloh sak mahpawh. Aka tlo soah kut a tloeng uh vetih sading la om uh ni

Luke2:4 Te vaengah Joseph khaw Galilee
Luke2:5 Minghlum ham vaengah amah ham a bae Mary te pumrhih la om pueng.
Luke2:6 A om rhoi kuelhuelh ah a caom tue loh a kae.
Luke2:7 Tedae a capa camingomthang te a cun vaengah tah impahnah.
Luke2:8 Te vaengah amah tekah pingpang ah tudawn rhoek om uh. A tuping te khoyin ah thongim la a khoem uh tih a rhaeh thil uh.
Luke2:9 Te vaengah Boeipa kah puencawn tah amih taengah a phoe pah. Amih te Boeipa kah thangpomnah loh a tue dongah rhihnah neh bahoeng a rhih uh.

Luke2:17 A hmuh uh vaengah

Luke2:20 Tudawn rhoek tah amih taengah a thui pah bangla boeih a hmuh uh. A yaak uh dongah te Pathen a thangpom uh tih a thangthen uh phoeiah bal uh.

Luke6:30 Na taengah aka bih boeih te pae lamtah

Luke6:33 Nangmih ham aka then rhoek taengah dawk na then van koinih nangmih ham mebang lungvatnah lae a om eh? Amah te bang te hlangtholh rhoek long khaw a saii uh ta.

Luke6:36 Na pa te sitlohthamla la a om van dongah silohthamlam la om uh.
Luke6:37 Hlang te lai na thui thil uh pawt daengah ni lai la n'thui uh loengloeng pawt eh. Hlang te boe sak uh boeh nangmih m'boe sak uh loengloeng mahpawh. Tholh te hlah pa uh lamtah nangmih khaw han hlah van ni.

Luke8:30 Te phoeiah anih te Jesuh loh

Luke13:17 He he a thui vaengah
Luke13:18 Te dongah koep a thui tih
Luke13:19 Tedae metlam ka thuidoek eh te? Te te mukang mu phek la om. Te te hlang loh a loh tih a dum ah a haeh. Tedae a rhoeng vaengah thing la poeh tih vaan kah vaa loh a hlaeng dongah bu a tuk.

Luke20:9 Te dongah pilnam taengah hekah nuettahnah he a tong tih

Luke20:11 Te phoeiah sal a tloe a rhaep la a tueih bal. Tedae anih a boh uh tih yah a bai phoeiah a tling la a tueih uh.
Luke20:12 A pathum nen khaw a rhaep tih a tueih dae te khaw hmalaem la a haek uh.
Luke20:13 Te dongah dum boei loh
Luke20:14 Tedae anih te lotawn rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah khat neh khat dawtlet uh thae tih
Luke20:15 Te dongah anih te a vai uh tih dum voelah a gawn uh. Te vaengah dum boei loh amih te metlam a saii eh?
Luke20:16 Tedae amih lotawn rhoek te a paan vetih a poci sak ni
Luke20:17 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te a sawt tih
Luke20:18 Tekah lungto aka tlak thil boeih te tah tlawt uh vetih

Luke24:39 Kai kamah ni tite ka kut rhoi neh ka kho rhoi he so uh. Kai he n'phathuep uh lamtah m'ming uh
Luke24:40 He he a thui phoeiah a kut rhoi neh a kho rhoi te amih a tueng.
Luke24:41 Tedae omngaihnah lamloh a hnalval uh pueng tih a ngaihmang uh dongah amih te
Luke24:42 Amih loh amah te nga phoeng kaekvang a paek uh.
Luke24:43 Te dongah a doe tih amih hmaiah a caak pah.
Luke24:44 Te phoeiah amih te
Luke24:45 Te daengah cacim hmuhming ham te a lungbuei puk uh.
Luke24:46 Te dongah amih te
Luke24:47 Jerusalem lamkah loh tong uh lamtah namtom boeih taengah tholh khodawkngainah ham yutnah te amah ming neh hoe ham a daek tangloeng coeng.
Luke24:48 Nangmih tah he rhoek kah laipai rhoek ni.
Luke24:49 Kai loh nangmih taengah a pa kah olkhueh te kan tueih coeng he. Tedae nangmih tah a sang lamkah thaomnah na bai uh hlan atah kho khuiah ana ngol uh
Luke24:50 Amih te Bethany duela voelh a khuen phoeiah a kut a phuel tih amih te yoethen a paek.
Luke24:51 Amih yoethen a paek nen tah amih taeng lamloh khoe uh tih vaan la a khuen.
Luke24:52 Te vaengah amih loh amah te a bawk uh tih Jerusalem ah omngaihnah neh muep bal uh.
Luke24:53 Te phoeiah bawkim khuiah om taitu uh tih Pathen te a uem uh.
John1:1 A tongcuek ah Ol om tih ol tah Pathen neh om. Te dongah ol tah Pathen ni.
John1:2 Anih tah a tongcuek ah Pathen neh om.
John1:3 A cungkuem he anih rhangneh om tih anih pawt atah khat khaw om thai pawh.
John1:4 Anih tah hing tih a khuiah hingnah om. Tekah hingnah te khaw hlang kah vangnah la om.
John1:5 Te phoeiah vangnah tah a hmuep khui sae tih a hmuep loh anih buem pawh.
John1:6 Te vaengah Pathen kah hlang tueih
John1:7 Anih tah vangnah kawng te laipai ham
John1:8 Anih te vangnah la om pawt dae vangnah kawng aka phong ham ni.
John1:9 Vangnah taktak tah om. Te tah hlang boeih aka tue ham diklai la ha pawk.
John1:10 Diklai ah amah om tih anih rhangneh diklai he om dae diklai loh amah te ming pawh.
John1:11 Amah rhoek taengah a pawk pah dae
John1:12 Tedae anih aka doe boeih neh
John1:13 Amih tah thii kah
John1:14 Te phoeiah Ol tah pumsa la coeng tih mamih khuiah om. Te dongah a thangpomnah te m'hmuh uh. Te tah oltak neh lungvatnah aka bae Pa taeng lamkah khueh duen thangpomnah ni.
John1:15 Johan loh anih kawng te a phong vaengah pang tih
John1:16 A soepnah lamloh lungvatnah sokah lungvatnah khaw mamih loh boeih n'dang uh coeng.
John1:17 Moses lamloh olkhueng m'paek tih
John1:18 Pathen te ana hmuh noek moenih
John1:19 Jerusalem kah Judah rhoek loh khosoih rhoek neh Levi rhoek te Johan taengah a tueih uh tih
John1:20 Te vaengah a phong tih a basa moenih. Te dongah
John1:21 Te vaengah amah te
John1:22 Te dongah amah te
John1:23 Te daengah

John1:25 Te vaengah amah a dawt uh tih
John1:26 Johan loh amih te a doo tih
John1:27 Anih te kai hnukah ha pawk dae a khokhom rhui ka hlam ham pataeng a koihhilh la ka om moenih
John1:28 He rhoek he tah Jordan rhalvangan kah Bethany ah om. Te rhoek ah Johan loh a nuem khaw om coeng.
John1:29 A vuenhnin ah a taengla Jesuh ha pawk te a hmuh tih
John1:30 Kai loh

John1:32 Te phoeiah Johan loh a phong tih
John1:33 Amah te ka hmat moenih. Tedae tui ah nuem ham kai aka tueih loh kai taengah
John1:34 Kai loh ka hmuh coeng dongah Pathen capa tah anih ni tite ka phong coeng.

John1:36 Jesuh a caeh te a sawt doeah
John1:37 Te vaengah hnukbang panit loh anih kah a thui te a yaak rhoi tih Jesuh a vai rhoi.

John2:1 Te phoeiah a thum hnin ah Galilee kah Kana ah yulueinah om
John2:2 Te vaengah Jesuh neh a hnukbang rhoek tah yulueinah ah rhen a khue.
John2:3 Te vaengah misurtui vawt tih Jesuh kah a manu loh Jesuh taengah
John2:4 Tedae Jesuh loh a manu taengah
John2:5 A manu loh tueihyoeih rhoek te
John2:6 Te vaengah Judah rhoek kah a khueh uh cimcaihnah ham lungto amrhaeng parhuk tah tapkhoeh om. Te dongah doh nit neh doh thum tah rhip ael.
John2:7 Jesuh loh amih taengah
John2:8 Te phoeiah amih te
John2:9 Taemkung loh misurtui la aka poeh tui te a ten dae me lamkah a thoeng khaw ming pawh. Tedae tui aka duek tueihyoeih rhoek loh a ming.
John2:10 Te dongah taemkung loh yulokung amah te a khue tih
John2:11 Jesuh loh miknoek a saii te Galilee kah Kana ah a tongcuek tih amah kah thangpomnah te a phoe Te dongah a hnukbang rhoek loh amah te a tangnah uh.
John2:12 Te phoeiah amah loh a manu
John2:13 Judah rhoek kah yoom tah om tom tih Jesuh khaw Jerusalem la cet.
John2:14 Bawkim ah vaito
John2:15 Te dongah rhui te rhuihet la a saii tih tu neh vaito te bawkim khui lamloh boeih a vai. Te phoeiah tangkathung rhoek kah tangka te a hawk pah tih caboei te boeih a palet pah.
John2:16 Te phoeiah vahu aka yoi rhoek te
John2:17 Na im kah kosi loh kai n'yoop ni tila a daek tangtae aka om te a hnukbang rhoek loh a poek uh.

John2:19 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John2:20 Te dongah Judah rhoek loh
John2:21 Te tah amah pum kah bawkim kawng ni a thui dae.
John2:22 Te dongah duek lamkah a thoh daengah ni a thui he khaw a hnukbang rhoek loh a poek uh. Te veangah Jesuh loh a thui olka neh cacim te a tangnah uh.
John2:23 Khotue kah yoom vaengah tah Jerusalem ah om tih amah ming te muep a tangnah uh. Amah kah miknoek a saii te khaw a hmuh uh.
John2:24 Tedae Jesuh loh boeih a ming dongah amah neh amah te amih taengah pumpae rhep pawh.

John3:1 Te vaengah Pharisee khuikah hlang pakhat
John3:2 Anih loh khoyin ah a taengla a paan tih

John3:4 Nikodemu loh amah te
John3:5 Jesuh loh
John3:6 Pumsa kah a cun tah pumsa la om tih Mueihla kah a cun tah mueihla la om van.
John3:7 Nang taengah kan thui te ngaihmang sak boeh
John3:8 Khohli loh a ngaih la hli tih a ol te na yaak. Tedae me lamkah ha pawk tih mela a caeh khaw na ming moenih. Mueihla kah a cun khaw te tlam ni boeih a om
John3:9 Nikodemu loh a doo tih
John3:10 Jesuh loh anih te a doo tih
John3:11 Nang taengah rhep
John3:12 Nangmih taengah diklai koe ka thui vaengah na tangnah uh pawt atah nangmih taengah vaan koe te ka thui koinih metlam na tangnah uh eh?
John3:13 Te dongah vaan lamkah aka rhum hlang capa pawt koinih vaan la luei uh mahpawh.
John3:14 Moses loh khosoek ah rhul a tai bangla hlang capa khaw tai ham a kuek van.
John3:15 Te dongah amah aka tangnah boeih tah dungyan hingnah a dang ni.
John3:16 Pathen loh diklai a lungnah tangloeng tih khueh duen capa te a paek. Amah aka tangnah boeih tah poci pawt vetih dungyan hingnah a dang ni.
John3:17 Pathen loh diklai te laitloek a thil hamla diklai ah capa a tueih moenih. Tedae anih lamloh diklai te khang ham ni a tueih.
John3:18 Amah aka tangnah tah laitloek thil mahpawh
John3:19 Laitloeknah he om ngawn coeng. Vangnah tah diklai la ha pawk coeng dae hlang rhoek loh a khoboe thae a khueh dongah vangnah lakah yinnah te lat a lungnah uh.
John3:20 A thae la aka khoboe boeih loh vangnah te a hmuhuet tih a khoboe te a toeltham pawt ham ni vangnah khuila ha pawk pawh.
John3:21 Oltak aka saii tah vangnah khuila ha pawk. Te daengah ni Pathen ming neh a saii a bitat te a phoe sak eh
John3:22 He phoeiah Jesuh tah a hnukbang rhoek neh Judah kho la pawk. Te vaengah amih taengah tapkhoeh om tih a nuem.
John3:23 Salim Johan long khaw Salim kaep kah Aenon ah om tih a nuem. Tui khaw muep a om tapkhoeh dongah ha pawk uh vaengah nuem uh.
John3:24 Johan te thongim ah hlak la a om hlan dongah ni.
John3:25 Te phoeiah Johan kah hnukbang rhoek te Judah hoel neh cimcaihnah kawng olpungnah om.
John3:26 Te dongah Johan te a paan uh tih
John3:27 Johan loh a doo tih
John3:28 Nangmih loh kai taengah na phong uh te
John3:29 Yulokung loh vasakung te a khueh la om dae yulokung kah paya long tah khueh pawh. Aka pai tih aka hnatun loh yulokung kah ol dongah omngaihnah neh omngaih. Te dongah ka omngaihnah tah soep coeng.
John3:30 Anih te a rhoeng mak atah
John3:31 A so lamkah aka pawk tah hlang boeih soah om. Diklai ah aka om tah diklai kah la om tih diklai lamkah te a thui. Vaan lamkah aka pawk tah a soah boeih om.
John3:32 A hmuh neh a yaak te a phong. Tedae anih kah olphong te doe uh pawh.
John3:33 Anih kah olphong aka doe loh Pathen tah oltak ni tila kutnoek a daeng coeng.
John3:34 Anih te Pathen loh a tueih dongah Pathen kah olthang ni a thui. Mueihla a paek te khaw a tarhing a khueh pah moenih.
John3:35 Pa loh capa te a lungnah dongah a cungkuem he a kut ah a paek.
John3:36 Capa aka tangnah loh dungyan hingnah a khueh. Tedae capa ol aka aek tah hingnah hmu pawt tih anih loh Pathen kah kosi a rhaeh thil.

John4:3 Judea te pak a hlah tih Galilee la koep cet.
John4:4 Te vaengah Samaria te a hil phai ham a kuek.
John4:5 Te dongah Sychar la a khue Samaria kho puei kah Jakob loh a capa Joseph a paek khohmuen taeng te a pha.
John4:6 Teah te Jakob tuisih om. Te vaengah Jesuh tah yincaehnah lamloh thakthae tih tuisih taengah ngol.
John4:7 Khonoek parhuk tluk a lo vaengah Samaria nu tah tui than la ha pawk. Anih te Jesuh loh
John4:8 Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek tah kho khuiah caak lai hamla cet uh.

John4:45 Khotue vaengkah Jerusalem ah a saii boeih te a hmuh uh. Amih khaw khotue te a paan uh. Te dongah Galilee la ha pawk vaengah tah Galilee rhoek loh amah a doe uh.
John4:46 Te dongah Galilee kah Kana la koep pawk. Te ah ni tui khaw misurtui la a saii. Te vaengah Kapernaum ah capa aka tlo rhalboei pakhat te ana om.

John4:54 He he Judea lamkah loh Galilee la ha pawk vaengah Jesuh loh koep a saii a miknoek pabae ni.
John5:1 He phoeiah Judah rhoek kah khotue om tih Jesuh tah Jerusalem la cet.
John5:2 Te vaengah Jerusalem kah tuthohka ah Bethesda tila Hebrew loh a khue tuibuem pakhat om tih impup panga om.
John5:3 Te rhoek ah te aka yuii
John5:4 Saivai ah puencawn ha pawk atah tui a hinghuen sak. Tui a hinghuen vaengah aka cungpung lamhma tah hoeih.
John5:5 Te vaengah kum sawmthum kum rhet khuiah a tloh aka kaem hlang pakhat te tapkhoeh om.
John5:6 Jesuh loh aka yalh sut te a hmuh vaengah kum muep di coeng tila a ming. Te dongah anih te
John5:7 Aka tlo loh Jesuh te
John5:8 Jesuh loh anih te
John5:9 Tekah hlang tah sading la pahoi a om dongah a phakdoeng te a koh tih pongpa. Tekah khohnin tah Sabbath la om.
John5:10 Te dongah aka hoeih tangtae te Judah rhoek loh
John5:11 Te long khaw amih te a doo tih
John5:12 Amah te
John5:13 Tedae aka hoeih loh Jesuh te unim ti khaw a ming moenih. Tekah hmuen ah hlangping a om vaengah ni Jesuh tah pawlh a bit uh coeng.
John5:14 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh anih te bawkim khuiah a hmuh tih
John5:15 Tekah hlang te cet tih amah sading la aka om sak te Jesuh ni tila Judah rhoek taengah puen.
John5:16 Hekah he Sabbath ah a saii dongah Judah rhoek loh Jesuh te a hnaemtaek uh.
John5:17 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te
John5:18 Te vaengah Sabbath te a phae bueng kolla Pathen khaw a pa a ti tih Pathen te amah neh vanat la a khueh bal dongah Judah rhoek loh amah te ngawn ham taoe a mae uh.
John5:19 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John5:20 Pa loh capa te a lungnah dongah amah loh a saii te a taengah boeih a tueng. Te lakah bibi tanglue te a taengah a tueng bal ni. Te daengah ni na ngai a hmang uh eh.
John5:21 Pa loh aka duek rhoek te a thoh tih a hing sak bangla capa long khaw a ngaih te tah a hing sak van.
John5:22 Pa loh pakhat khaw lai a tloek thil moenih. Tedae laitloeknah he capa taengah boeih a paek coeng.
John5:23 Te daengah ni pa a hinyah bangla capa te boeih a hinyah eh. Capa te aka hinyah pawt long tah anih aka tueih pa te hinyah pawh.
John5:24 Nangmih taengah rhep rhep kan thui
John5:25 Nangmih taengah rhep rhep kan thui
John5:26 Pa loh a khuiah hingnah a khueh bangla capa long te khaw a khuiah hingnah khueh ham a paek van.
John5:27 Hlang capa la a om dongah laitloeknah saii ham saithainah khaw amah taengah a paek.
John5:28 A tue ha pawk coeng dongah phuel khuikah rhoek boeih loh a ol te a khuiah a yaak uh vetih ha moe uh ni.
John5:29 He he ngaihmang sak uh boeh. A then aka saii rhoek tah hingnah dongkah thohkoepnah la
John5:30 Kai tah kamah lamkah loh bakhaw saii ham ka coeng moenih. Ka yaak bangla lai ka tloek dongah kai kah laitloeknah khaw a dueng la om. Kamah kongaih te ka toem pawt tih kai aka tueih kung kah kongaih te ka toem.
John5:31 Kai loh kamah kawng ka phong koinih kai kah olphong te oltak om pawh.
John5:32 Kai kawng aka phong te hlang tloe om. Te dongah kai kawng a phong te aka thuem olphong ni tila ka ming.
John5:33 Nangmih loh Johan taengla na tueih uh vaengah oltak te a phong.
John5:34 Kai loh hlang taengkah olphong te ka doe moenih. Tedae nangmih khang ham he rhoek he ka thui.
John5:35 Anih te tok tangtae hmaiim la om tih a vang hatah nangmih loh anih kah vangnah khuiah kohoe kolkalh ham na ngaih uh.
John5:36 Tedae kai loh Johan lakah olphong tanglue ka khueh. Tekah bitat te coeng hamla pa loh kai taengah m'paek coeng. Tekah bibi ka saii dongah kai aka tueih a pa loh kai kawng te a phong.
John5:37 Kai aka tueih a pa loh kai kawng te a phong. A ol te na ya uh noek pawt tih a mueimae khaw na hmu uh noek pawh.
John5:38 A ol te na khuiah na khueh uh pawt tih a naeh pawt dongah amah loh a tueih te khaw na tangnah uh pawh.
John5:39 A khuiah dungyan hingnah om ni tila na poek uh dongah cacim te na khe uh. Tedae te dongkah aka om rhoek loh kai kawng ni a phong uh.
John5:40 Te phoeiah hingnah dang ham kai taengla na lo ngaih uh moenih.
John5:41 Hlang lamkah thangpomnah te ka doe moenih.
John5:42 Tedae nangmih loh namamih khuiah Pathen kah lungnah na khueh uh pawt te ka ming.
John5:43 A pa kah ming neh kai ka pawk dae kai nan doe uh moenih. Hlang tloe te amah ming neh amah ngaih la ha pawk koinih anih te na doe uh suidae.
John5:44 Nangmih loh metlam na tangnah uh thai eh. Khat khat lamkah thangpomnah te na doe uh vaengah Pathen bueng lamkah thangpomnah te na toem uh moenih.
John5:45 Pa taengah nangmih te kai loh m'paelnaeh ni tila poek uh boeh. Nangmih aka paelnaeh la Moses om
John5:46 Moses te na tangnah uh koinih kai nan tangnah uh ni. Anih long khaw kai kawng ni a daek.
John5:47 Tedae anih kah cabu te na tangnah uh pawt atah metlamlae kai olka he na tangnah uh eh?” a ti nah.
John6:1 Te phoeiah Jesuh tah Galilee [Tiberias] tuili rhalvangan la cet.
John6:2 Aka tlo rhoek soah a saii miknoek te a hmuh uh dongah amah te hlangping loh muep a vai.
John6:3 Te dongah Jesuh te tlang la luei tih a hnukbang rhoek taengah pahoi ngol.
John6:4 Te vaengah Judah rhoek kah yoom khotue te om tom coeng.
John6:5 Jesuh loh a mik te a dai hatah a taengla hlangping muep ha lo te a hmuh. Te dongah Philip la
John6:6 Amah loh saii ham a cai te a ming dongah anih te noemcai ham ni a ti nah.
John6:7 Philip loh Jesuh te
John6:8 A hnukbang rhoek khuikah pakhat Simon Peter kah a mana Andrew loh a taengah
John6:9 “Nga lungnit neh cangtun vaidam hluem nga aka khueh tongpa ca tah om ta he
John6:10 Jesuh loh
John6:11 Te dongah Jesuh loh vaidam te a loh tih a uem phoeiah aka vael rhoek taengah a tael. Te vanbangla nga te khaw a ngaih yet te a paek.
John6:12 A hah uh phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek te
John6:13 Te dongah a caak uh phoeikah cangtun vaidam panga kah a coih a nueipil te a coi uh vaengah voh hlainit dongah a sang uh.
John6:14 Miknoek a saii te hlang rhoek loh a hmuh tih
John6:15 Amah te tuuk tih manghai la khueh ham paan la a cai uh te Jesuh loh a ming. Te dongah amah bueng tlang la koep khoe uh.
John6:16 Hlaem a pha vaengah tah a hnukbang rhoek te tuili la suntla uh.
John6:17 Lawng khuila kun uh tih tuili rhalvangan kah Kapernaum la cet uh. Te phoeiah a hmuep loh a kae coeng dae Jesuh tah amih taengah pawk hlan.
John6:18 Te vaengah khohli puei hli tih tuili te a haeng.
John6:19 Phalong pakul panga neh sawmthum tluk a kaih uh vaengah Jesuh te tuili soah cet tih lawng taengla halo te a hmuh uh tih a rhih uh.
John6:20 Tedae amih te
John6:21 Te vaengah ngaingaih uh tih amah te lawng khuila a doe uh. Te daengah a caeh thil uh kho te lawng loh tlek a pha.
John6:22 Tekah a vuen ah tuili rhalvangan kah hlangping aka pai loh lawng pakhat bueng pawt atah teah a tloe a om pawt khaw
John6:23 Tiberias lamkah lawng a tloe rhoek tah Boeipa loh vaidam te a uem tih a caak nah uh hmuen te vat a pha uh.
John6:24 Jesuh neh a hnukbang rhoek a om pawt te hlangping loh a hmuh. Te dongah amih tah lawng khuila kun uh tih Jesuh toem ham Kapernaum la pawk uh.
John6:25 Amah tuili ah val a hmuh uh vaengah
John6:26 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John6:27 Aka poci thai caak ham pawt tih dungyan hingnah la aka naeh caak ham mah saii uh. Te tah Pa Pathen kah kutnoek a daeng tangtae hlang capa loh nangmih m'paek ni
John6:28 Te dongah amah te
John6:29 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John6:30 Te dongah amah te
John6:31 A pa rhoek loh khosoek ah manna te a caak uh. Amih kah caak ham te vaan lamkah vaidam a paek te a daek tangtae om van
John6:32 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te
John6:33 Pathen kah vaidam tah vaan lamkah aka rhum la om tih diklai ah hingnah a paek
John6:34 Te dongah amah te
John6:35 Jesuh loh amih te
John6:36 Tedae nangmih loh kai nan hmuh uh lalah nan tangnah uh moenih ka ti.
John6:37 Pa loh kai m'paek boeih te tah kamah taengla ha pawk vetih
John6:38 Vaan lamkah ka suntlak he kamah kongaih saii ham pawt tih kai aka tueih kah kongaih te saii ham ni.
John6:39 He tah kai aka tueih kah kongaih ni. Te daengah ni kamah m'paek boeih te ka hlong pawt eh. Tedae a hnukkhueng khohnin ah te te ka thoh ni.
John6:40 He tah a pa kah kongaih ni. Te daengah ni capa aka hmu tih amah te aka tangnah boeih loh dungyan hingnah a dang eh.
John6:41 “Kai tah vaan lamkah aka suntla vaidam ni
John6:42 Te dongah
John6:43 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John6:44 Kai aka tueih pa loh anih te a doek pawt atah kai taengah ha pawk thai moenih. Anih te kai loh a hnukkhueng khohnin ah ka thoh ni.
John6:45 Tonghma cabu dongah a daek te om coeng tih Pathen kah a thuituen la boeih om uh ni. Pa taengkah a yaak tih aka cang boeih tah kai taengla ha pawk.
John6:46 Pathen taengah aka om pawt atah pakhat long khaw pa te a hmuh moenih. Amah long tah pa te a hmuh coeng.
John6:47 Nangmih taengah rhep
John6:48 Kai tah hingnah buh ni.
John6:49 Na pa rhoek loh khosoek ah manna a caak uh tih duek uh.
John6:50 He tah vaan lamkah aka suntla vaidam la a om dongah aka ca tah duek van pawh.
John6:51 Kai tah vaan lamkah aka suntla tih aka hing vaidam ni. Khat khat long ni he kah vaidam he a caak atah yoeyah la hing ni. Kai tah diklai hingnah la aka om ka pumsa ni vaidam la kam paek eh
John6:52 Te dongah Judah rhoek tah amamih hnuei uh thae tih
John6:53 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te
John6:54 Ka saa aka ca tih ka thii aka o tah dungyan hingnah a khueh. A hnukkhueng khohnin ah anih te kai loh ka thoh ni.
John6:55 Ka saa tah caak tang la om tih ka thii tah ok koi tang la om.
John6:56 Ka saa aka ca neh ka thii aka o tah ka khuiah te naeh tih kai khaw anih khuiah ka naeh.
John6:57 Aka hing a pa loh kai n'tueih tih a pa rhangneh kai ka hing bangla ka saa aka ca tah kai rhangneh hing van ni.
John6:58 He tah vaan lamkah aka suntla vaidam ni. Na pa rhoek loh a caak uh tih a duek uh bang moenih. Tekah vaidam aka ca tah yoeyah la hing ni
John6:59 He rhoek he Kapernaum kah tunim ah a thuituen vaengah a thui.
John6:60 A hnukbang rhoek loh muep a yaak uh vaengah
John6:61 He kawngah a hnukbang rhoek a kohuet uh te Jesuh amah loh a ming dongah amih te
John6:62 Hlang capa te lamhma kah a om nah la a luei te na hmu uh koinih ta ?
John6:63 Mueihla tah aka hing sak la om tih
John6:64 Tedae nangmih khuiah aka om pakhat loh a tangnah moenih
John6:65 Te phoeiah
John6:66 Te lamkah tah a hnukbang rhoek te a hnuk la muep nong uh tih a taengah pongpa uh pawh.
John6:67 Te dongah Jesuh loh hlainit rhoek te
John6:68 Amah te Simon Peter loh
John6:69 Kumhal hingnah ol na khueh te ka tangnah uh dongah nang tah Pathen kah hlangcim ni tila ka ming uh
John6:70 Jesuh loh amih te
John6:71 Simon capa Judas Iskariot ni a thui. Hlainit khuiah anih pakhat loh Jesuh te voeih hamla cai.
John7:1 Te phoeiah Jesuh tah Galilee ah vik pongpa. Amah te Judah rhoek loh ngawn ham a mae uh dongah Judea ah caeh ham ngaih pawh.
John7:2 Tedae Judah rhoek kah dungtlung khotue om tom coeng.
John7:3 Te dongah a mana rhoek loh amah te
John7:4 A huep la a saii vaengah amah te sayalhnah neh om ham aka tlap pakhat khaw a om moenih. He rhoek na saii mai vetih diklai ah na phoe mai mako
John7:5 A manuca rhoek long khaw amah te a tangnah uh moenih.
John7:6 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te
John7:7 Diklai loh nangmih m'hmuhuet thai mahpawh
John7:8 Nangmih tah khotue la cet uh. Kai tah hekah khotue la ka cet mahpawh
John7:9 He rhoek he a thui phoeiah Jesuh tah Galilee ah vik naeh.
John7:10 Tedae A mana rhoek tah khotue la a caeh uh phoeiah tah amah khaw koep cet. Tedae a huep la duem om tih loloh moe pawh.
John7:11 Khotue vaengah Judah rhoek loh Jesuh te a toem uh tih
John7:12 Te dongah anih kawng hlangping te kohuetnah la muep om uh. A ngen loh
John7:13 Tedae Judah rhoek a rhihnah dongah a kawng te sayalh la thui pawh.
John7:14 Tedae khotue bangli vaengah Jesuh te bawkim la cet tih a thuituen.
John7:15 Te dongah Judah rhoek tah a ngaihmang uh tih
John7:16 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John7:17 Khat khat loh a kongaih te saii ham a ngaih atah thuituennah he Pathen lamkah a? Kai kamah lamkah a ka thui ? tite a ming ni.
John7:18 Amah lamkah aka thui loh amah thangpomnah te a toem. Tedae anih aka tueih kah thangpomnah aka toem long tah
John7:19 Moses loh nangmih te olkhueng m'paek moenih a? Tedae nangmih olkhueng aka vai pawt loh balae tih kai ngawn ham nan mae uh?” a ti nah.
John7:20 Hlangping long khaw
John7:21 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John7:22 Moses loh nangmih te yahvinrhetnah ham m'paek. Te te Moses kah moenih a pa rhoek kah ni. Te dongah Sabbath ah hlang kah yahvin na rhet uh.
John7:23 Yahvinrhetnah he hlang loh Sabath ah a dang daengah Moses kah olkhueng te phae pawt atah Sabath ah hlang pum pakhat sading la ka khueh dongah nim kai taengah na thintoek nama?
John7:24 A hmanhu ah laitloek uh boeh. Tedae laitloeknah he a dueng la laitloek uh
John7:25 Te dongah Jerusalem kah a ngen loh
John7:26 sayalh la a thui dae amah tah a voek uh moenih ca he. Anih he Khrih ni tila boei rhoek loh rhep a ming uh nim?
John7:27 Te dongah anih he me lamkah ha thoeng khaw m'ming. Tedae Khrih halo vaengkah tah me lamkah a thoeng khaw
John7:28 Te dongah Jesuh loh bawkim khuiah a thuituen vaengah pang tih
John7:29 Kai loh amah te ka ming. Amah taengah ka om tih te long te kai n'tueih
John7:30 Te dongah amah tuuk ham a mae uh dae a tue te a pai hlan dongah anih te kut hlah uh thil pawh.
John7:31 Tedae hlangping lamkah a yet loh amah te a tangnah tih
John7:32 Anih kawng neh hlangping kah a kohuet te Pharisee rhoek loh a yaak uh. Te dongah anih tuuk ham tueihyoeih rhoek te khosoihham rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek loh a tueih uh.
John7:33 Te vaengah Jesuh loh
John7:34 Kai nan toem uh vaengah kamah nan hmu uh mahpawh. Te vaengah ka om nah khaw nam pha uh thai mahpawh
John7:35 Te dongah Judah rhoek loh amamih te
John7:36 'Kai he nan toem uh cakhaw kai na hmu uh mahpawh. Te dongah ka om nah khaw na pha uh thai pawh
John7:37 Khotue tung kah hnukkhueng khohnin ah Jesuh te pai tih a pang doela
John7:38 Cacim loh a thui bangla
John7:39 Tedae amah aka tangnah rhoek loh a dang ham Mueihla kawng te a thui. Jesuh a thangpom hlan dongah Mueihla tah ana pae hlan.
John7:40 Te dongah hekah olka he hlangping lamkah a yaak uh
John7:41 A ngen loh
John7:42 Cacim loh
John7:43 Tedae anih kongah hlangping te paekboenah om.
John7:44 Amih khuikah a ngen loh amah te tuuk ham a ngaih uh. Tedae anih soah kut hlah uh pawh.
John7:45 Te vaengah tueihyoeih rhoek te khosoihham neh Pharisee rhoek taengla ha pawk uh. Te rhoek loh amih taengah
John7:46 Tueihyoeih rhoek loh
John7:47 Te dongah Pharisee rhoek loh amih te
John7:48 Boei rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek khuikah khat khat loh anih te tangnah pawt nim?
John7:49 Tedae hlangping loh olkhueng a ming pawt te rhunkhuen la poeh
John7:50 Amih taengah om tih hnukbuet ah Jesuh taengla aka pawk Nikodemu loh amih taengah
John7:51 “A saii te amah lamloh lamhma la a yaak tih a ming pawt atah hlang te mamih kah olkhueng loh laitloek thil pawt maco?” a ti nah.
John7:52 Te dongah anih te a doo uh tih
John7:53 Te phoeiah amah im la rhip cet uh.
John8:1 Tedae Jesuh tah olive tlang la cet.
John8:2 Mincang ah bawkim la koep ha pawk hatah pilnam pum loh a taengla a paan uh. Te dongah ngol tih amih te a thuituen.
John8:3 Te vaengah cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek loh huta pakhat te a samphaihnah neh a tuuk uh tih a khuen uh.
John8:4 Anih te a laklung ah a pai sak uh phoeiah
John8:5 Tedae olkhueng dongah tah hebang he dae hamla Moses loh mamih n'uen coeng. Te koinih nang tah metlae na ti eh?” a ti na uh.
John8:6 Tedae he nen he amah paelnaeh ham a khueh uh dongah a noemcai uh tih a voek uh. Te dongah Jesuh loh buluk thuk tih kutdawn neh lai ah a daek.
John8:7 Tedae amah te koepkoep a dawt uh vaengah pai tih amih te
John8:8 Te phoeiah koep buluk tih lai ah a daek.
John8:9 A yaak uh vaengah patong lamkah a tong tih pakhat pakhat ah boeih cet uh. Te dongah Jesuh neh a laklung kah aka om huta bueng la cul.
John8:10 Te vaengah Jesuh te pai tih
John8:11 Te dongah te long te
John8:12 Te phoeiah Jesuh te amih taengah koep cal tih
John8:13 Te dongah amah te Pharisee rhoek loh
John8:14 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih
John8:15 Nangmih loh pumsa neh lai na tloek uh. Kai tah ukhaw lai ka tloek moenih.
John8:16 Tedae lai ka tloek van coeng atah kamah bueng ka om pawt tih kai aka tueih a pa neh kai ka om rhoi dongah kai kah laitloeknah tah a thuem la om pataeng.
John8:17 Olkhueng dongah khaw nangmih ah hlang panit kah olphong te thuem tila a daek coeng.
John8:18 Kai loh kamah kawng aka phong la ka om dae kai aka tueih a pa loh kai kawng a phong
John8:19 Te dongah amah te
John8:20 Bawkim ah a thuituen vaengah hekah ol he tangkabu kaepah a thui dae amah kah a tue a pha hlan dongah anih te tuu uh pawh.
John8:21 Te dongah amih te
John8:22 Te dongah Judah rhoek loh
John8:23 Te vaengah amih te
John8:24 Te dongah namamih kah tholh ah na duek uh ni tila nangmih taengah ka thui. Kai he amah ni tila na tangnah uh pawt atah namamih kah tholh ah na duek uh ni
John8:25 Te dongah amah te
John8:26 Nangmih kawng te thui ham neh laitloek ham muep om. Tedae kai aka tueih tah oltak la a om. Kai khaw anih taengkah ka yaak te ni diklai ah ka thui
John8:27 Amih taengah Pa kah a thui tila ming uh pawh.
John8:28 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih taengah
John8:29 Te dongah kai aka tueih te kai taengah om tih anih kolo te ka saii taitu dongah kamah bueng n'hlahpham moenih
John8:30 Hekah a thui vanbangla amah te muep a tangnah uh.
John8:31 Te dongah Jesuh loh amah aka tangnah Judah rhoek taengah
John8:32 Oltak te na ming uh van daengah ni oltak loh nangmih n'loeih sak eh
John8:33 Te dongah Jesuh amah te
John8:34 Jesuh loh amih te
John8:35 Sal tah im ah kumhal duela a naeh moenih
John8:36 Te dongah capa loh nangmih n'loeih sak atah aka loeih la rhep na om uh ni.
John8:37 Abraham kah tiingan la na om uh tila ka ming. Tedae kai kah olka he nangmih ah a om pawt dongah kai ngawn hamla nan mae uh.
John8:38 Kai loh Pa taengkah ka hmuh te ka thui dae nangmih tah na pa taengkah na yaak uh te na saii uh
John8:39 Te dongah Jesuh te a doo uh tih
John8:40 Tedae kai Pathen taeng lamkah oltak ka yaak tih nangmih taengah aka thui hlang te ngawn ham na mae uh coeng. Abraham loh he tla he a saii moenih.
John8:41 Nangmih loh na pa bisai te na saii uh
John8:42 Jesuh loh amih te
John8:43 Ba dongah kai kah olcal te na ming uh pawh. Kai kah olka te hnatun ham na coeng uh pawt dongah ni.
John8:44 Na pa lamkah rhaithae la na om uh rhoe tih na pa kah hoehhamnah te saii ham na ngaih uh. Anih te a cuekca lamkah hlang aka ngawn ni. A khuiah oltak a om pawt dongah oltak ah pai pawh. Laithae neh laithae napa la om tih a cal vaengah a laithae te a phoe.
John8:45 Tedae kai loh oltak ka thui dongah kai nan tangnah uh pawh.
John8:46 Nangmih ah unim kai kah tholh aka toeltham ? Oltak ka thui atah balae tih kai nan tangnah uh pawh ?
John8:47 Khohni taeng lamkah aka om loh Khohni kah olka te a hnatun. Te dongah na hnatun uh pawt khaw Khohni kah hut la na om uh pawt dongah ni
John8:48 Judah rhoek loh amah te a dawt uh tih
John8:49 Jesuh loh
John8:50 Kai loh kamah thangpomnah ka mae moenih. Tedae aka toem tih lai aka tloek te om ngawn.
John8:51 Nangmih taengah rhep rhep ka thui. Khat khat loh kai ol a kuem atah kumhal duela dueknah hmu loengloeng mahpawh
John8:52 Te dongah Judah rhoek loh amah te
John8:53 A pa Abraham lakah tanglue la na om pawt nim? Anih khaw duek coeng
John8:54 Jesuh loh
John8:55 Amah te na ming uh pawt cakhaw kai tah amah te ka ming. Amah ka ming pawh te ka thui koinih nangmih phek la laithae la ka om ni. Tedae amah te ka ming tih a ol te ka kuem coeng.
John8:56 Na pa Abraham loh kai kah khohnin a hmuh ham te a kohoe tih a hmuh vaengah omngaih
John8:57 Te dongah Judah rhoek loh amah te
John8:58 Jesuh loh amih te
John8:59 Te vaengah amah te dae ham lungto a rhuh uh. Tedae Jesuh loh a thuh tak tih bawkim lamkah vik cet.
John9:1 A khum phai vaengah a thaang lamkah mik aka dael hlang te a hmuh.
John9:2 Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh amah te a dawt uh tih
John9:3 Jesuh loh
John9:4 Khohnin a om vaengah kai aka tueih kah bi te mamih loh saii ham a kuek. Khoyin ha pawk vaengah saii ham coeng mahpawh.
John9:5 Diklai ah ka om vaengah
John9:6 Hekah he a thui vanneh diklai a timthoih tih timtui neh dikpo a bol. Te phoeiah dikpo te a mik dongah a hluk pah.
John9:7 Te phoeiah anih te
John9:8 Te dongah imben rhoek neh anih te buhbih ni tila aka hmu noek rhoek loh
John9:9 A tloe rhoek loh
John9:10 Te dongah anih te
John9:11 Te long te
John9:12 Te vaengah
John9:13 Hnukbuet kah mikdael te Pharisee rhoek taengah a khuen uh.
John9:14 Jesuh loh dikpo a bol tih a mik a tueng sak vaengkah khohnin te Sabbath la om.
John9:15 Te dongah Pharisee rhoek long khaw metlam a tueng thai tila anih te koep a dawt uh. Te long te amih taengah
John9:16 Te dongah Pharisee rhoek khuikah hlangvang loh
John9:17 Te dongah mikdael te
John9:18 Judah rhoek loh anih mikdael la om tih koep tueng tila a tangnah uh pawt dongah mik aka tueng coeng kah a manu napa te luemluem a khue uh.
John9:19 Te phoeiah amih roi te a dawt uh tih
John9:20 Te dongah a manu napa loh a doo rhoi tih
John9:21 Tedae metla a tueng tarha khaw ka ming rhoi pawh. A mik aka ong pah te khaw ka ming pawh. Amah te dawt uh a lungcuei coeng. Amah kawng te amah loh a thui bitni
John9:22 A manu napa loh Judah rhoek te a rhih dongah ni te te a thui. Khat khat long ni Khrih te a phoei atah a hael om saeh tila Judah rhoek loh oepsoeh la a kotluep uh.
John9:23 Te dongah ni a manu napa loh
John9:24 Te dongah mikdael la aka om hlang te a pabae la a khue uh tih
John9:25 Te long khaw
John9:26 Te dongah amah te
John9:27 Amih te
John9:28 Te vaengah anih te ol a bai uh tih
John9:29 Pathen loh Moses a voek te ka ming uh. Tedae anih me lamkah a phoe khaw ka ming uh moenih
John9:30 Tekah hlang loh amih te a doo tih
John9:31 Pathen loh hlangtholh rhoek kah ol te a hnatun moenih. Tedae Pathen aka hinyahkung pakhat te om tih a kongaih a saii atah anih ol a hnatun pah te m'ming.
John9:32 Mikdael la aka thang khat khat kah mik koep tueng tila khosuen lamkah n'yaak noek moenih.
John9:33 Pathen taeng lamkah anih ha om pawt koinih saii thai loengloeng mahpawh
John9:34 Te dongah anih te a doo uh tih
John9:35 Anih phawn poengla a haek uh te Jesuh loh a yaak phoeiah anih te a hmuh tih
John9:36 Te long te a doo tih
John9:37 Jesuh loh anih te
John9:38 Te dongah
John9:39 Te vaengah Jesuh loh
John9:40 Tekah te a taengkah aka om Pharisee rhoek loh a yaak uh. Te vaengah amah te
John9:41 Jesuh loh
John10:1 “Nangmih taengah rhep rhep kan thui
John10:2 Tedae tu kah tudawn la aka om tah thohka longah kun.
John10:3 Anih te imtawt loh thohka a ong pah tih tu loh a ol te a yaak. Amah kah tu te khaw a ming neh a khue tih a mawt.
John10:4 Amah kah te boeih a hlah vaengah a hmaiah cet tih tu rhoek loh a ol te a hmat uh dongah anih te a vai uh.
John10:5 Tedae hlanglang tah vai uh loengloeng pawt vetih hlanglang kah ol te a hmat uh pawt dongah anih taeng lamloh rhaelrham uh ni
John10:6 Hekah thuidoeknah he amih taengah Jesuh loh a thui dae amih taengah a thui te metla a om khaw tekah rhoek loh ming uh pawh.
John10:7 Te donagah Jesuh loh
John10:8 Kai hmaikah aka pawk boeih tah hlanghuen neh dingca rhoek ni. Tedae tu loh amih ol te a hnatun moenih.
John10:9 Kai tah thohka la ka om
John10:10 Hlanghuen tah huen ham
John10:11 Kai tah tudawn then la ka om. Tudawn then loh a hinglu te tu rhoek ham a hmoel.
John10:12 Kutloh tah tudawn lam khaw om pawh. A tu khaw amah kah om pawh. Uithang ha pawk te a hmuh vaengah tu a hno tih a rhaelrham tak dongah uithang loh a poelyoe tih a thaek.
John10:13 Kutloh la a om dongah tu ham anih a ngaihuet pawh.
John10:14 Kai tah tudawn then la ka om dongah kamah kah rhoek te ka ming tih kamah kah rhoek loh kai m'ming uh.
John10:15 Pa loh kai m'ming tih kai loh pa te ka ming vanbangla ka hinglu te khaw tu rhoek ham ka hmoel.
John10:16 Tedae hekah vongup ah aka om mueh tu a tloe rhoek te ka khueh pueng. Amih khaw ka khue ham a kuek. Te vaengah kai ol te a yaak uh vetih tuping pakhat
John10:17 Kai loh ka hinglu te koep dang ham ka voeih dongah pa loh kai n'lungnah.
John10:18 Kai lamkah hingnah te a rhawt uh thai moenih. Tedae te te kai kamah lamkah ni ka voeih. Te te voeih ham saithainah ka khueh tih koep lat ham khaw saithainah ka khueh. Hekah olpaek he a pa taeng lamkah ka dang
John10:19 Hekah olka kongah Judah rhoek khuiah paekboenah koep om.

John14:11 Pa ah ka om tih kai ah a pa a om te kai n'tangnah uh. Te pawt atah a bibi nen te tangnah uh.
John14:12 Nangmih taengah rhep rhep ka thui kai pa taengla ka caeh ham coeng dongah kai aka tangnah loh kai kah bi saii te a saii vetih hekah lakah a len la a saii ni.
John14:13 Kai ming neh na bih carhui te tah han saii bitni. Te daengah ni pa tah capa dongah a thangpom eh.
John14:14 Khat khat long ni kai ming neh kai nan hloep uh atah kai loh kan saii ni.
John14:15 Kai nan lungnah uh atah kai kah olpaek te na tuem uh ni.
John14:16 Kai khaw pa taengah ka bih vetih nangmih taengah kumhal ah aka om ham a tloe baerhoep te nangmih m'paek ni.
John14:17 Oltak Mueihla te diklai loh so pawt tih a ming pawt dongah doe thai pawh. Tedae anih te nangmih taengah naeh tih nangmih khuiah a om ham dongah na ming uh.
John14:18 Nangmih taengla ka pawk coeng dongah cadah la nangmih kan hnoo mahpawh.
John14:19 Kolhkalh ah diklai loh kai m'hmuh mahpawh. Tedae nangmih loh kai nan hmuh uh. Kai ka hing dongah nangmih khaw na hing uh ni.
John14:20 Tekah khohnin ah a pa dongah kai ka om tih nangmih khaw kai dongah

John14:25 He rhoek he nangmih taengah ka om vaengah ka thui coeng.
John14:26 Tedae kai ming rhangneh a pa loh Mueihla cim te baerhoep la han tueih ni. Anih loh a cungkuem ah nangmih te n'thuituen vetih kai loh nangmih taengah ka thui boeih te nangmih n'thoelh sak ni.
John14:27 Ngaimongnah nangmih taengah kan hlah. Ka ngaimongnah te nangmih kan paek. Kai loh nangmih kan paek he diklai loh a paek bang moenih. Nangmih thinko te thuen sak boeh
John14:28 Nangmih ham ka thui te na yaak uh coeng. Ka cet vetih nangmih taengla koep ka pawk ni. Kai nan lungnah uh koinih pa taengla ka caeh te na omngaih pawn ko. Pa tah kai lakah tanglue la om ta.
John14:29 A om hlankah nangmih ham ka thui coeng he. Te daengah ni a om vaengah na tangnah eh.
John14:30 Diklai boei tah ha pawk coeng dongah nangmih taengah muep ka cal mahpawh. Tedae kai soah saithainah a khueh loengloeng moenih.
