2Thessalonians2:7 Olhuep tah olaeknah dongah tueng coeng. Tedae a khui lamloh a saii hlan ah te long te hnap a tuuk.
2Thessalonians2:8 Te phoeiah lailak te khaw pumphoe ni. Anih te Boeipa Jesuh amah ka kah hil neh a ngawn vetih amah a lonah kah a phoenah loh a thup ni.
2Thessalonians2:9 Te kah Satan kah bibi lamloh a lonah la a om dongah saithainah neh miknoek boeih
2Thessalonians2:10 Te dongah boethae kah hmilhmaknah cungkuem neh poci uh tih oltak kah lungnah dongah amih khang ham te doe uh pawh.
2Thessalonians2:11 Te dongah amih loh laithae te a tangnah uh ham Pathen loh amih taengah aka tlung tholhhiknah he khaw a tueih pah.
2Thessalonians2:12 Te daengah ni oltak aka tangnah pawt tih boethae dongah lung aka tlun rhoek boeih lai a tloek eh.
2Thessalonians2:13 Tedae Boeipa loh a lungnah manuca rhoek
2Thessalonians2:14 Te ham ni kaimih kah olthangthen rhangneh nangmih khaw n'khue. Te t ah mamih Boeipa Jesuh Khrih kah thangpomnah te dangnah ham ni.
2Thessalonians2:15 Te dongah manuca rhoek pai uh van laeh. Kaimih kah olka lamloh
2Thessalonians2:16 Amah mamih kah Boeipa Jesuh Khrih neh mamih kah pa Pathen loh mamih n'lungnah tih dungyan thaphohnah neh lungvatnah dongkah ngaiuepnah then te m'paek.
2Thessalonians2:17 Nangmih thinko te han hloep saeh lamtah bibi takuem neh olka then dongah cawt n'duel saeh.
2Thessalonians3:1 A tloihsoi ah manuca rhoek kaimih ham thangthui uh. Te daengah ni Boeipa kah olka loh ha yong vetih nangmih taengkah vanbangla a thangpom eh.
2Thessalonians3:2 Te daengah ni aka lang neh hlang thae taeng lamloh loh n'hlawt eh. Tangnah he boeih a khueh uh moenih
2Thessalonians3:3 Tedae Boeipa tah uepom la om
2Thessalonians3:4 Nangmih ham boeipa dongah ka pangtung uh. Kang uen te na saii uh tih na saii uh bal bitni.
2Thessalonians3:5 Boeipa loh nangmih kah thinko te Pathen kah lungnah neh Khrih kah uehnah khuila hoihaeng saeh.
2Thessalonians3:6 Manuca rhoek nangmih te mamih kah Boeipa Jesuh Khrih ming neh kang uen uh. Vapsa la aka pongpa tih manuca boeih te na rhael uh. Te dongah tebang singyoe te kaimih lamkah na dang uh moenih
2Thessalonians3:7 Kaimih nan awt uh ham bahoeng a kuek te nangmih loh na ming uh. Nangmih taengah ka cungpoeh uh pawt tih pakhat kah buh yoe khaw ka caak uh moenih
2Thessalonians3:8 Tedae thakthaenah
2Thessalonians3:9 Saithainah ka khueh uh pawt dongah moenih
2Thessalonians3:10 Nangmih taengah ka om uh vaengah pataeng nangmih te he ni kang uen uh. Khat khat long ni bi saii a ngaih pawt atah ca van boel saeh.
2Thessalonians3:11 Nangmih khuikah hlangvang tah vapsa la pongpa uh te ka yaak uh. Bi tah saii uh pawt dae tomban la om uh.
2Thessalonians3:12 Te tlam te Boeipa Jesuh Khrih ah kang uen uh tih kan hloep uh. Te daengah ni kammueh la aka saii rhoek loh amah buh te a caak uh eh.
2Thessalonians3:13 Tedae manuca rhoek nangmih tah a then te thathae uh boeh
2Thessalonians3:14 Khat khat loh capat dongkah kaimih ol te a ngai pawt atah anih te kuem uh. Anih te na rhoinaeng puei pawt daengah ni a yah eh.
2Thessalonians3:15 Tedae rhal bangla poek boel lamtah manuca bangla rhalrhing sak uh.
2Thessalonians3:16 Tahae ah ngaimongnah boeipa amah loh a longim boeih neh a cungkuem lamloh nangmih te ngaimongnah m'pae saeh. Boeipa tah nangmih boeih taengah n'om puei saeh.
2Thessalonians3:17 Kuttuknah he tah
2Thessalonians3:18 Mamih kah Boeipa Jesuh Khrih lungvatnah tah nangmih taengah boeih om saeh.
1Timothy1:1 Mamih kah khangkung Pathen neh mamih kah ngaiuepnah Jesuh Khrih kah olpaek vanbangla Jesuh Khrih kah caeltueih Paul loh
1Timothy1:2 tangnah dongah ka ca tak Timothy taengah kan pat. Pa Pathen neh mamih Boeipa Jesuh Khrih lamkah lungvatnah
1Timothy1:3 Makedonia la ka caeh vaengah Ephisa ah aka om nang te kan uen. Te daengah ni khat khat loh a thuituen tholh pawt ham khaw
1Timothy1:4 Te rhoek te tangnah dongah Pathen kah hnokhoemnah lakah olpungnah la lat a coeng sak.
1Timothy1:5 Tedae oluen dongkah a cuinah loh thinko a caih lamkah lungnah
1Timothy1:6 He lamkah hlangvang tah hlihloeh tih olhongpaika la mael uh.
1Timothy1:7 Saya la om ham a ngaih uh. Tedae a thui te khaw yakming uh pawh tih ba khaw a cak sak uh moenih.
1Timothy1:8 Tedae khat khat long ni a longim la a rhoidoeng atah olkhueng tah then tila m'ming uh.
1Timothy1:9 Aka dueng ham olkhueng he khueh pawh tila m'ming. Tedae lailak rhoek neh thinthah rhoek ham
1Timothy1:10 Hlanghalh rhoek
1Timothy1:11 Yoethen Pathen kah thangpomnah vanbangla tekah olthangthen te kai m'paek coeng.
1Timothy1:12 Kai aka thaphoh mamih kah Khrih Jesuh Boeipa taengah uemonah ka khueh. Kai he uepom la m'poek dongah bibi la ng'khueh.
1Timothy1:13 Lamhma la ska soehsal tih aka hnaemtaekkung neh hnaephnapkung la ka om. Tedae hnalvalnah dongah mangvawt la ka saii oeh dongah n'rhen.
1Timothy1:14 Mamih Boeipa kah lungvatnah tah Khrih Jesuh ah tangnah
1Timothy1:15 Ol tah uepom neh hlang boeih kah a doe tueng la om. Te dongah ni Khrih Jesuh tah hlangtholh khang ham diklai la ha pawk. Amih khuiah kai tah tanglue la ka om coeng.
1Timothy1:16 Tedae he nen he n'rhen coeng. Te daengah ni Khrih Jesuh tah thinsennah boeih neh ka khuiah a tueng lamhma eh. Amah soah tangnah ham aka cai rhoek kah dungyan hingnah ham a ninglam pakhat la om sak ham ni.
1Timothy1:17 Tahae ah kumhal kah Manghai
1Timothy1:18 Camoe Timothy nang te he oluen he kan tloeng. Nang soah tonghma ol bangla ka lamhma sak coeng. Te daengah ni te nen te aka then vathohnah te na vathoh thai eh.
1Timothy1:19 Tangnah neh aka then mingcimnah te pom lah. Te te hlangvang loh a tueihno uh dongah tangnah sangpho a poci pa uh.
1Timothy1:20 Amih khuiah Hymenaeus neh Alexander nuen rhoi van. Amih rhoi te Satan taengah ka voeih daengah ni ueih rhoi vetih a soehsal pawt eh.
1Timothy2:1 Te dongah rhenbihnah
1Timothy2:2 Te daengah ni khosaknah he hingcimnah neh hinomnah cungkuem dongah rhalthal neh dingsuek la kho n'sak uh eh.
1Timothy2:3 He ni he then tih mamih kah khangkung Pathen hmaiah mikcop la om.
1Timothy2:4 Amah loh hlang boeih khang ham neh oltak mingnah la pha sak ham a ngaih.
1Timothy2:5 Pathen tah pakhat ni. Pathen neh hlang rhoek kah rhikhangkung tah hlang Jesuh Khrih pakhat ni a om.
1Timothy2:6 Amah loh hlang boeih ham tlansum la paek tih laipainah te amah tue ah a tueng sak.
1Timothy2:7 Te ham olhoe neh caeltueih la kai n'khueh dongah oltak ni ka thui. Tangnah neh oltak dongah kai namtom kah saya he ka laithae moenih.
1Timothy2:8 Te dongah hmuen takuem ah tongpa rhoek te thintoek neh oelhtaihnah om kolla kut cim te phuel tih thangthui sak ka ngaih.
1Timothy2:9 Te vanbangla huta rhoek khaw amamih he bainak dongah yahyongnah
1Timothy2:10 Tedae bibi then neh Pathen hinyahnah ham ol a caeng te huta rhoek ham rhoeh coeng.
1Timothy2:11 Huta tah a cungkuem dongah boengainah neh kammueh la cang saeh.
1Timothy2:12 Te dongah huta loh thuituen ham neh tongpa soah ka tanglue sak pawh. Tedae kammueh la om sak ham ni ka ngaih.
1Timothy2:13 Adam tah Eve hlanah a hlinsai lamhma ta.
1Timothy2:14 Te phoeiah Adam te a hmilhmak moenih. Tedae huta tah boekoeknah la om ham a hoilae pah coeng.
1Timothy2:15 Tedae tangnah dongah lungnah neh cimcaihnah
1Timothy3:1 He ol tah a uepom pai. Khat khat long ni hiphoelnah te a hue atah bibi then ni a hue.
1Timothy3:2 Te dongah hiphoelkung he hmabuet la
1Timothy3:3 Yumi mahpawh
1Timothy3:4 Amah imkhui te a then la mawt saeh. A ca rhoek te hinomnah neh boengainah khuiah boeih om uh saeh.
1Timothy3:5 Te dongah khat khat long ni amah imkhui te mawt ham a ming pawt atah Pathen kah hlangboel te metlam a cuncah eh?
1Timothy3:6 Tanoe hlangthai boel saeh. Te daengah ni koevoei uh pawt vetih rhaithae kah dumlai khuiah a cungku pawt eh.
1Timothy3:7 Te phoeiah poeng lamkah laipai then khueh ham a kuek. Te daengah ni hnaelcoenah neh rhaithae kah thaang dongah a cungku pawt eh.
1Timothy3:8 Te vanbangla tueihyoeih rhoek khaw a hinom kap saeh. Olrhak boel saeh. Misurtui te muep ngaithuen boel saeh. Tangkarhai boel saeh.
1Timothy3:9 A caih la mingcimnah neh tangnah olhuep te pom saeh.
1Timothy3:10 Amih te lamhma la nuemnai phoeiah cimbit la aka om loh bi saeh.
1Timothy3:11 a yuu rhoek khaw hinom saeh. Hmui yoi mahpawh
1Timothy3:12 Tueihyoeih rhoek he yuu pakhat kah va la om saeh. A ca rhoek neh amah imkhui te a then la mawt saeh.
1Timothy3:13 Balh aka doedan rhoek long ni a paihmuen then a kutloh tih tangnah neh Jesuh Khrih ah muep a sayalh.
1Timothy3:14 He rhoek he nang ham ka daek tih nang taengah thamaa la pawk ham ka ngaiuep.
1Timothy3:15 Tedae ka koe mai atah Pathen imkhui kah a kuek khosak te na ming van ni. Te tah aka hing Pathen kah hlangboel
1Timothy3:16 Hingcimnah olhuep kah a len he oelh om pawt la om. Amah tah pumsa ah tueng tih mueihla loh a tang sak te puencawn rhoek loh a hmuh. Namtom rhoek taengla a hoe dongah diklai ah a tangnah uh tih thangpomnah neh a loh.
1Timothy4:1 Te dongah hmailong tue ah hlangvang loh tangnah te a nong tak ni tila Mueihla loh phaeng a thui coeng. Te vaengah laithaelaidang mueihla neh rhaithae kah thuituennah te a ngaithuen uh ni.
1Timothy4:2 A mingcimnah te laithae kah thailatnah neh a kolh uh coeng.
1Timothy4:3 Yuloh vasak ham a paa tih uepom rhoek neh oltkak aka ming rhoek loh uemonah neh a doe ham Pathen loh a suen cakok te a rhael sak.
1Timothy4:4 Pathen kah kutngo tah boeih then tih hnawt ham moenih uemonah neh doe ham ni.
1Timothy4:5 Pathen kah olka neh rhikhangnah loh a ciim coeng.
1Timothy4:6 He he manuca rhoek taengah a then la na tloeng pah atah Khrih Jesuh kah tueihyoeih la na om ni. Tangnah olka neh n'hlinsai tih thuituennah then te na thuep coeng.
1Timothy4:7 Tedae a rhonging neh yancil a rhuem hnawt lamtah hingcimnah ham namah hlinsai uh.
1Timothy4:8 Pumrho hlinsainah tah hoeikhang la bet akhaw om. Tedae hingcimnah tah tahae kah hingnah neh hmailong kah olkhueh aka om boeih ham hoeikhang la om.
1Timothy4:9 Olka tah uepom neh hlang boeih kah a doe ham tueng.
1Timothy4:10 He ham kongah n'thakthae uh tih n'thingthuel uh cakhaw aka hing Pathen ni n'ngaiuep uh. Amah tah hlang boeih neh olpuei la uepom rhoek kah khangkung la om.
1Timothy4:11 He rhoek he uen lamtah thuituen.
1Timothy4:12 Na camoe te han hnaep boel saeh
1Timothy4:13 Ka pawk hil olcim taenah
1Timothy4:14 Nang dongah kutdoe te sawtrhoel boeh. Te tah tonghma ol lamloh kangham rhoek kah kut tloengnah nen ni nang m'paek.
1Timothy4:15 He he na mangtuk tih a khuiah na om daengah ni na rhoengcawtnah loh hlang boeih taengah mingpha la a om eh.
1Timothy4:16 Namah te laehdawn uh lamtah thuituennah te oei lah. He tla saii daengah ni namah khaw
1Timothy5:1 Patong te tluung boeh. Tedae pa pakhat bangla
1Timothy5:2 Hamca te manu bangla
1Timothy5:3 Nuhmai rhoek khaw nuhmai taktak te tah hinyah lah.
1Timothy5:4 Tedae nuhmai khat khat loh a ca rhoek mai khaw a cadil rhoek mai khaw a khueh atah amah imkhui ah thothueng ham neh buhungnah te a manu napa taengah thuung ham lamhma la cang sak. He tah Pathen hmuhah mikcop la om.
1Timothy5:5 Tedae nuhmai taktak tih aka omdam loh Pathen soah lat a ngaiuep tih rhenbihnah neh thangthuinah dongah khoyin khothaih om.
1Timothy5:6 Tedae omthen aka bawn tah a hing puengthuem ah duek coeng.
1Timothy5:7 Te rhoek khaw na uen daengah ni hmabuet la a om uh eh.
1Timothy5:8 Tedae khat khat loh amah huiko neh olpuei la imkhuikho te kho a khan pawt atah tangnah te a hno tih aka tangnahmueh lakah a thae la om.
1Timothy5:9 Nuhmai la hlum ham tah kum sawmrhuk hmuiah om mahpawh. Va pakhat bueng aka khueh huta
1Timothy5:10 Ca khut atah
1Timothy5:11 Tedae a haw vaengah tah Khrih te vasak a ngaih dongah nuhmai tanoe rhoek te rhoe dae.
1Timothy5:12 Lamhma kah tangnah te a phae uh dongah laitloeknah a yook uh.
1Timothy5:13 Te vaengah palyal khaw pahoi a cang uh
1Timothy5:14 Te dongah tanoe rhoek tah vasak sak ham
1Timothy5:15 Hlangvang loh Satan hnukah oepsoeh la hoi uh.
1Timothy5:16 Uepom pakhat loh nuhmai rhoek a khueh atah amih te sawtlet saeh lamtah hlangboel te bakbahap boel saeh. Te daengah ni nuhmai tang rhoek te a sawtlet thai eh.
1Timothy5:17 A then la aka mawt patong neh olpuei la olka neh thuituennah dongah aka thakthae rhoek tah rhaepnit la hinyahnah ham tueng pai.
1Timothy5:18 Cacim loh a ti coeng ta. Cangtil vaito pin boeh
1Timothy5:19 Laipai panit pathum pawt atah a ham kah lai te doe boeh.
1Timothy5:20 Aka tholh rhoek te hlang boeih hmaiah na toeltham daengah ni a tloe long khaw rhihnah a khueh eh.
1Timothy5:21 Pathen
1Timothy5:22 Kut he tokrhat la tloeng thil boeh. Hlanglang rhoek kah tholhnah te boek pah boeh. Namah te a cuem la tuem uh.
1Timothy5:23 Tui bueng te o boeh. Tedae na bung dongah puet na tloh te khaw misurtui bet saem pah.
1Timothy5:24 Hlang a ngen kah tholhnah tah laitloeknah la a pha hlanah lohaa coeng. Tedae a ngen kah tah a hnong pah.
1Timothy5:25 Khoboe then khaw lohaa van. Te dongah thuh hamla tloekloek aka om rhoek loh noeng uh pawh.
1Timothy6:1 Hnamkun hmuikah aka om sal boeih loh a boeikung rhoek te a cungkuem dongah hinyahnah ham tueng la poek saeh. Te daengah ni Pathen ming neh thuituennah te a soehsal pawt eh.
1Timothy6:2 Uepom la aka om boeilung rhoek tah manuca la a om uh dongah hnaep uh boeh. Tedae salbi uh taoe saeh. Uepom la a om uh dongah thintlo tah bibi then neh a bom. He he thuituen lamtah hloephoelh.
1Timothy6:3 Khatkhat loh a thuituen tholh tih
1Timothy6:4 Tedae olpungnah neh naenamnah ham ni a yahuem. Te lamkah loh uethnetnah
1Timothy6:5 Olcenkama loh hlang kah lungbuei te a phae tih oltak te a hmil. Calomnah te hingcimnah ni tila a poek uh.
1Timothy6:6 Tedae hingcimnah dongah rhaemhalnah ni a len koek calomnah la a om.
1Timothy6:7 Diklai la bakhaw n'khuen uh pawt bangla diklai lamloh pakhat khaw n'khuen uh thai moenih.
1Timothy6:8 Tedae aka om duen cakok neh pueinak nen he rhaemhal uh sih.
1Timothy6:9 Tedae khuehtawn ham aka ngaih rhoek tah cuekhalhnah neh thaang ah khaw
1Timothy6:10 Tangkangaih tah boethae cungkuem kah a yung la om. Te te aka nai hlangvang tah tangnah lamloh phael uh tih amamih te lungnat loh mat a cueh.
1Timothy6:11 Tedae aw Pathen kah hlang nang loh he he rhaelrham tak lamtah duengnah
1Timothy6:12 Tangnah kah thingthuelnah te a then la thingthuel lamtah dungyan hingnah te lo lah. Te ham ni ng'khue tih a then olphoei te laipai a yet hmaiah phong.
1Timothy6:13 A cungkuem aka hing sak Pathen neh Pontius Pilat hmaiah aka then olphoei aka phong Jesuh Khrih hmaiah nang kang uen.
1Timothy6:14 Mamih Boeipa Jesuh Khrih kah a phoenah duela olpaek te cuemhmuet neh hmabuet la na tuem mako.
1Timothy6:15 Te khaw amah tue ah tah yoethen neh mangpa bueng loh
1Timothy6:16 Amah bueng ni aka nguel la om tih m'phavawt vangnah khuiah kol. Anih aka hmu he hlang om pawt tih a hmuh ham khaw coeng thai pawh. Amah taengah te hinyahnah neh thaomnah dungyan la om saeh. Amen.
1Timothy6:17 Ta kumhal kah kuirhang rhoek te kopoek sang pawt ham
1Timothy6:18 a then sai ham
1Timothy6:19 Amamih hmailong ham aka then khoengim te a tunghlaep uh tih hingnah taktak te a khueh uh van ham uen ne.
1Timothy6:20 Aw Timothy
1Timothy6:21 Angen loh tangnah dongah ol a caeng uh te a hlihloeh sak uh. Lungvatnah nangmih taengah om saeh.
2Timothy1:1 Jesuh Khrih ah hingnah olkhueh vanbangla Pathen kah kongaih neh Jesuh Khrih kah caeltueih kai Paul loh ka ca thintlo Timothy taengah kan yaak sak.
2Timothy1:2 A pa Pathen neh mamih Boeipa Jesuh Khrih kah lungvatnah
2Timothy1:3 Pathen taengah lungvatnah ka khueh. Amah te manu napa lamloh mingcimnah neh a caih la ka bawk. Nang ham poekkoepnah te khoyin khothaih kamah kah rhenbihnah dongah puet ka khueh.
2Timothy1:4 Nang kah mikphi te ka poek vaengah omngaihnah neh ka baetawt hamla nang hmuh ka rhingda.
2Timothy1:5 Na khuikah tangnah taktak te thoelhnah la ka loh. Te tah na numca Lois neh na nu Euniki khuiah ana hing lamhma coeng. Te dongah namah khuikah te ni ka pang van.
2Timothy1:6 Te paelnaehnah dongah Pathen kah kutdoe te huek hamla nang kan thoelh. Te tah kai kah kut tloengnah lamloh nang soah om coeng.
2Timothy1:7 Pathen loh mamih ham rhalyawpnah mueihla m'pae pawt tih thaomnah
2Timothy1:8 Te dongah mamih Boeipa kah laipai ham amah kah thongtla la kai ka om khaw yak boeh. Tedae Pathen kah thaomnah tarhing ah olthangthen te patang puei.
2Timothy1:9 Mamih n'khang tih aka cim khuenah neh n'khue te mamih kah bibi nen pawt tih Pathen amah kah mangtaengnah neh lungvatnah rhangnen ni. Te te khosuen tue hlanah ni Jesuh Khrih ah mamih m'paek coeng.
2Timothy1:10 Tedae mamih khangkung Khrih Jesuh kah a phoenah dongah tah phoe coeng. Dueknah te a hmil ngawn coeng
2Timothy1:11 Te ham ni olhoe neh caeltueih neh saya la kai m'hmoel.
2Timothy1:12 He paelnaehnah dongah ka patang van coeng he. Tedae ka tangnah te ka ming tih ka yak pawh. Ka hnokhueh he te khohnin due dawndah ham a coengthai la a om te ka ngaitang coeng.
2Timothy1:13 Jesuh Khrih ah tangnah
2Timothy1:14 A then hnokhueh te mamih ah aka hing Mueihla Cim lamloh tuem ne.
2Timothy1:15 Asia kah rhoek loh kai boeih n'nong tak uh te na ming. Amih khuiah Phikelu neh Harmokene khaw om.
2Timothy1:16 Onesiphor im ah Boeipa loh rhennah han khueh saeh. Kai he n'caih sak taitu tih kai kah kuelrhui te yah puei pawh.
2Timothy1:17 Tedae Rom ah aka om loh kai te ngahngah n'toem tih m'hmuh.
2Timothy1:18 Tekah khohnin ah Boeipa kah rhennah dang sak ham Boeipa loh anih ham pae saeh. Rhep na ming bangla Ephisa ah khaw bahoeng n'bomcen.
2Timothy2:1 Te dongah ka ca nang Khrih Jesuh ah lungvatnah neh thaphoh uh.
2Timothy2:2 Te khaw kai lamloh laipai a yet neh na yaak coeng. He he uepom hlang taengah pae ne. Amih tah a tloe thuituen ham khaw khangmai la om bitni.
2Timothy2:3 Jesuh Khrih kah rhalkap then la patang puei.
2Timothy2:4 Aka vathoh loh a khosaknah dongkah khosak rhamok neh a tingtong pawt daengah ni caemthoh te kolo la a om eh.
2Timothy2:5 Khat khat long khaw a loehlang dae a longim pawt la a loehlang atah rhuisam a khuem moenih
2Timothy2:6 Thakthae lotawn te lamhma la a thaih a dang ham a kuek
2Timothy2:7 Ka thui te yakming lah. A cungkuem dongah yakmingnah te Boeipa loh nang ham m'paek bitni.
2Timothy2:8 Kaimih kah olthangthen vanbangla David tiingan lamkah neh duek lamkah aka thoo Jesuh Khrih te poek
2Timothy2:9 Te ham te laihmuh bangla thongtlak hilah ka patang dae Pathen kah Olka tah pinyen hlan
2Timothy2:10 Te dongah a coelh rhoek ham te boeih ka ueh
2Timothy2:11 He ol he a uepom ta. N'duek atah n'hing puei van ni ta.
2Timothy2:12 N'ueh uh atah m'manghai uh van ni ta. N'hnawt uh van atah amah loh mamih he n'hnawt van ni.
2Timothy2:13 Amah a hnawt thai pawt dongah n'hnalval uh cakhaw anih tah uepom la naeh ngawn ta.
2Timothy2:14 He rhoek he thoelh pah. Pathen hmaiah naenam pawt ham kang uen. A hoeikhang ham pawt he aka ya rhoek kah pocinah ham ni te.
2Timothy2:15 Oltak olka te aka paekhlae
2Timothy2:16 Tedae a rhonging kah olhong te rhael
2Timothy2:17 Amih kah olka te khaw hmapuek manrhaicak bangla cet ni. Te khuiah Hymenaeus neh Philetu om rhoi.
2Timothy2:18 Amih rhoi loh oltak te a hlihloeh sak rhoi tih thohkoepnah om coeng a ti rhoi. Te vaengah hlangvang kah tangnah te a palet rhoi.
2Timothy2:19 Tedae Pathen kah khoengim tah khangmai la pai
2Timothy2:20 Tahae kah im puei ah sui neh caben hnopai bueng pawt tih thing neh diklai umam khaw om
2Timothy2:21 Te dongah khat khat loh he lamkah amah a cilpoe atah boeikung kah a congpang koi neh bibi then boeih ham a hmoel tih a ciim thangpomnah hnopai la om ni.
2Timothy2:22 Te dongah cadongcaloe kah hoehhamnah te rhaelrham tak lamtah duengnah
2Timothy2:23 Tedae aka ang neh angvawk kah olpungnah te hnawt lamtah rhalthohnah ni a saii uh tila ming lah.
2Timothy2:24 Te dongah Boeipa kah sal loh hnueih ham a kuek moenih
2Timothy2:25 Thimkalh rhoek muelhtuetnah neh toel mai. Amih te Pathen loh oltak mingnah dongla yutnah khaw a paek khaming
2Timothy2:26 Te daengah ni amah loh amah kongaih la a tuuk khaw rhaithae kah thaang lamloh a sae uh eh.
2Timothy3:1 Tedae he he ming lah. Khohnin hnukkhueng ah te tah a rhai tue pai ni.
2Timothy3:2 Hlang he pahuul
2Timothy3:3 kotalh
2Timothy3:4 hlangyoi
2Timothy3:5 Hingcimnah lungsak a khueh dae te hingcimnah kah thaomnah aka hnawt la om uh ni. Te vaengah hekah rhoek he nong tak.
2Timothy3:6 Amih lakli kah aka om rhoek te im la yuel uh tih hoehhamnah cungkuem loh a payawk uh dongah tholh neh a vueinan huta thae te a sol uh.
2Timothy3:7 A cang uh vawptawp dae oltak kah mingnah te pha thai uh pawh.
2Timothy3:8 Te dongah Jenne neh Jambres loh Moses a kamkaih rhoi bangla he rhoek long kaw oltak te a kamkaih uh van. A lungbuei poci tih tangnah dongah aka lolhmaih hlang rhoek ni.
2Timothy3:9 Tedae taoe koep cungphoek mahpawh. Te rhoi kah a om van bangla amih kah a anglat khaw a cungkuem taengah phaeng phoe bitni.
2Timothy3:10 Tedae nang tah kai kah thuituennah
2Timothy3:11 Te te kai hamla Antiok ah
2Timothy3:12 Te dongah Khrih Jesuh ah hingcim la hing aka ngaih boeih te tah a hnaemtaek uh ni.
2Timothy3:13 Tedae bothae hlang neh laithae rhoek tah hlang a rhaithi uh doeah amamih rhaithi la om tih a thae la cungpoeh uh ni.
2Timothy3:14 Nang tah na cang tih na ngaitang dongah te naeh lah. U taengkah na cang khaw ming lah.
2Timothy3:15 A cim cabu he cahni lamloh na ming coeng te ta. Te long te Khrih Jesuh ah tangnah rhangneh khangnah dongla nang n'cuek sak thai.
2Timothy3:16 Cacim boeih he Pathen kah hil la om tih thuituennah ham
2Timothy3:17 Te nen ni Pathen kah hlang loh hlangsoep la a om vetih bibi then te boeih a cuum sak eh.
2Timothy4:1 Pathen neh Khrih Jesuh hmaiah kang uen. A phoenah
2Timothy4:2 Ol te hoe pah. Na bihoep tamto akhaw pai thil laeh. Thinsennah thuituennah cungkuem neh toeltham lamtah
2Timothy4:3 Aka cuem thuituennah neh a yaknaem uh pawt vaengah ni a tue a pai eh. Tedae a hoehhamnah bangla amamih kah hnavue aka thak saya rhoek te a kuk uh ni.
2Timothy4:4 Te phoeiah oltak lamkah a hna te a khong uh vetih cil taengla mael uh ni.
2Timothy4:5 Tedae nang tah a cungkuem ah cue uh lamtah olthangthen bibi te patang doeah saii. Na bibi te khaw ming lah.
2Timothy4:6 Ka phum uh coeng tih ka voeinah tue khaw ha pai coeng.
2Timothy4:7 Aka then thingthuelnah te ka thingthuel coeng. Hma te ka khah coeng. Tangnah te ka kuem coeng.
2Timothy4:8 Tahae lamkah kai ham duengnah rhuisam te a khueh coeng. Te te aka duenglaitloekkung boeipa loh tekah khohnin ah kai n'thuung ni. Te phoeiah kai bueng pawt tih a phoenah aka lungnah rhoek boeih te khaw a paek ni.
2Timothy4:9 Kai taengah koe aka pawk la na haam mako.
2Timothy4:10 Demas loh kai n'phap tih ta kumhal kah he a lungnah. Te dongah Thessalonika la
2Timothy4:11 Ka taengah Luka bueng ni aka om. Marku te lo lamtah namah neh ha puei uh. Kai ham tah bibi dongah congpang koila om.
2Timothy4:12 Tedae Tukhiko te Ephisa la ka tueih coeng.
2Timothy4:13 Na lo vaengah Troas kah Karpuh taengah himbai neh cayol olpuei la maehpho ka khueh te hang khuen.
2Timothy4:14 Rhohum aka bi Alexander loh kai soah thae muep a tueng sak. Boeipa loh anih te amah khoboe bangla a thuung bitni.
2Timothy4:15 Mamih kah olka te bahoeng a kamkaih dongah nang khaw anih te ngaithuen.
2Timothy4:16 Kai kah olthungnah lamhma vaengah kai taengla ha pawk uh pawh. Hlang boeih loh kai n'phap cakhaw amih te ngaiyaknah boel sih.
2Timothy4:17 Tedae Boeipa loh kai m'pai puei tih kai n'thaphoh. Te daengah ni kai lamkah olhoe te soep sak vetih namtom loh boeih a yaak eh. Te tlam ni sathueng ka lamloh n'hlawt.
2Timothy4:18 Boeipa loh khoboe thae boeih lamkah kai n'hlawt vetih vaan kah amah ram khuila n'daem sak ni. Amah te kumhal ah kumhal duela thangpomnah om saeh. Amen.
2Timothy4:19 Priska neh Aquila
2Timothy4:20 Erastu te Kawrin ah om tih Trophimu te a tloh dongah Miletu ah ka khueh.
2Timothy4:21 Sikca hlanah pawk hamla na haam mako. Ubuluh
2Timothy4:22 Boeipa loh na mueihla te om puei saeh. Lungvatnah tah nangmih taengah om saeh.
Titus1:1 Pathen kah sal neh Jesuh Khrih kah caeltueih kai Paul loh
Titus1:2 Te te oltak Pathen loh khosuen tue hlanah ni a kam coeng.
Titus1:3 Tedae olhoe dongah amah kah olka tah amah tue vaengah phoe coeng. Tekah te mamih khangkung Pathen kah olpaek vanbangla kai taengah a hal coeng.
Titus1:4 A cui la tangnah dongah ka ca tak Titu taengah
Titus1:5 Te ham ni Krete ah nang kang khueh. Te daengah ni Kai loh nang kan uen vanbangla kho takuem ah a hamca rhoek na tuek vetih a vawtthoek te na soepsoei thai eh.
Titus1:6 Tedae khat khat ni cimbit la a om atah
Titus1:7 Hiphoelkung he Pathen kah hnokhoem la a om dongah a cimbit la om ham a kuek. Cungpoeh boel saeh
Titus1:8 Tedae moeihoeih la
Titus1:9 Thuituennah vanbangla olka te uepom la tu saeh. Te daengah ni thaphoh vetih boekoek rhoek te aka cuem thuituennah nen khaw
Titus1:10 Thinthah rhoek
Titus1:11 Amih te kamkhuem sak ham a kuek coeng. Amih loh rhaidaeng a ti uh mueh la imkhui tom a palet uh tih amah hoeikhangnah ham te a thuituen uh.
Titus1:12 Amih khuikah hlang pakhat
Titus1:13 Hekah laipai tah thuem. Tekah paelnaehnah lamloh amih te rhap toeltham. Te daengah ni tangnah dongah a sa a ding uh eh.
Titus1:14 Judah rhoek kah yancil neh oltak aka phaelh hlang rhoek kah olpaek te hnatung boeh.
Titus1:15 A rhoepsaep he aka caih rhoek ham a caih la om. Tedae aka boi rhoek neh aka tangnahmueh rhoek ham tah caih pawh. Tedae amih kah lungbuei neh mingcimnah khaw boi uh coeng.
Titus1:16 Pathen te ming ham a phong uh dae a khoboe neh a hnawt uh. Rhalawt la om uh tih lokhak uh. Bibi then boeih nen khaw lolhmaih uh.
Titus2:1 Tedae nang tah aka cuem thuituennah neh aka rhoep te thui lah.
Titus2:2 Patong rhoek te aka khuel la
Titus2:3 Te vanbangla a ham rhoek te omih ah hingcim la om saeh
Titus2:4 Te daengah ni tanoe rhoek te
Titus2:5 A cuepmueih la
Titus2:6 Te vanbangla cadong tanoe rhoek te a muet uh ham hloephoelh lah.
Titus2:7 A cungkuem ah namah te bibi then kah mueimae la tueng lah. Thuituennah dongah rhuepomnah neh hinomnah tueng sak.
Titus2:8 Olka te a koemboek la thuem saeh. Te daengah ni aka kingkalh loh yak vetih mamih te a thae la thui ham a khueh pawt eh.
Titus2:9 Sal rhoek te soeprhaep boeih ah a boeikung taengah boengai saeh lamtah a kolo la om saeh
Titus2:10 Thuhrhawk boel saeh. Tedae a tangnah te cungkuem dongah a then la tueng coeng. Te daengah ni a cungkuem dongah mamih khangkung Pathen kah thuituennah neh a thoeihcam eh.
Titus2:11 Pathen kah lungvatnah loh hlang boeih taengah khangnah te a thoeng sak coeng.
Titus2:12 Hlangrhong neh lunglai kah hoehhamnah te hnawt ham mamih n'toel coeng. Kumhal ah a cuepmueih la
Titus2:13 Ngaiuepnah yoethen neh boeilen Pathen kah thangpomnah khaw
Titus2:14 Amah loh mamih yueng la amah pae uh. Te daengah ni mamih te olaeknah cungkuem lamloh n'tlan tih amah ham a khueh pilnam
Titus2:15 Hekah he na thui phoeiah hloephoelh lamtah olpaek boeih neh toeltham lah. Nang te n'hnoel boel saeh.
Titus3:1 Amih te boeilu rhoek taengah
Titus3:2 Soehsal uh boel saeh. Kodo neh oldip kadip la om ham
Titus3:3 Hnukbuet ah mamih khaw hlangang altha la ng'om uh tih n'rhaithi uh. Hoehhamnah neh omthenbawnnah rhoepsaep dongah sal m'bi uh. Phayoenah neh uethnetnah dongah kho n'sak uh. Khat neh khat rhalawt la hmuhuet uh thae.
Titus3:4 Tedae mamih khangkung Pathen kah rhennah neh lungnah ta a thoeng vaengah
Titus3:5 mamih loh duengnah dongah bibi n'saii uh nen moenih. Tedae amah kah rhennah vanbangla koepcunnah dongkah silhnah neh Cim Mueihla kah tlaihvongnah rhangnen ni mamih n'khang.
Titus3:6 Tekah te mamih khangkung Jesuh Khrih rhangneh mamih soah kodam la han lun coeng.
Titus3:7 Te daengah ni Boeipa kah lungvatnah rhangneh n'tang uh coeng tih dungyan hingnah kah ngaiuepnah dongah rhopangkung la n'om uh coeng.
Titus3:8 Hekah olka tah a uepom. Te dongah nang khaw cak sak la ka cai. Te daengah ni Pathen aka tangnah rhoek loh bibi then tuuk ham a ngaithuen uh eh. Hekah he then tih hlang ham hoeikhang la om.
Titus3:9 Tedae aka ang kah olpungnah khaw
Titus3:10 Hlaephlae hlang te vai phoeiah a pabae la rhalrhingnah pae lamtah hnawt.
Titus3:11 Tebang tah boe tih tholh tila ming. Aka boe la om coeng.
Titus3:12 Nang taengla Artemas nim
Titus3:13 Olming Zenas neh Apollos te ngahngah thak. Te daengah ni a vawtthoek pawt eh.
Titus3:14 A ngoengaih tangkik vanbangla mah rhoek long khaw bibi then tuuk ham cang van saeh. Te daengah ni a tlongtlai la a om uh pawt eh.
Titus3:15 Kai taengah aka om rhoek boeih loh nang kut n'tuuk uh. Tangnah dongah mamih aka lungnah rhoek te kuttu. Lungvatnah tah nangmih boeih taengah om saeh.
Philemon1:1 Jesuh Khrih kah thongtla Paul neh Timothy loh manuca neh kaimih kah thintlo neh bibipuei Philimon
Philemon1:2 ka ngannu Apphia neh kaimih kah rhalkappuei Arklipas neh nang im kah hlangboel taengah kan yaak sak.
Philemon1:3 Mamih kah Pa Pathen neh Boeipa Jesuh Khrih taeng lamkah Lungvatnah neh ngaimongnah nangmih taengah om saeh.
Philemon1:4 Ka thangthuinah takuem ah nang kah na saii te ka poek taitu tih ka Pathen te ka uem.
Philemon1:5 Boeipa Jesuh so neh hlang cim rhoek boeih soah nangmih kah lungnah neh tangnah na khueh uh te ka yaak.
Philemon1:6 Te daengah ni mamih ah Khrih ham a then mingnah cungkuem neh na tangnah dongkah rhoinaengnah te khuekcet la a om eh.
Philemon1:7 Nang kah lungnah dongah omngaihnah neh thaphohnah muep ka khueh coeng. Manuca na saeh
Philemon1:8 Te dongah a tueng te tah Khrih ah sayalhnah muep khueh sak ham ni nang n'tueih.
Philemon1:9 Patong bangla aka om Paul long he lungnah neh lat kan hloep.
Philemon1:10 Tedae Khrih Jesuh kah thongtla long khaw ka ca ham te nang kan hloep coeng. Amah Onesima he hloong dongah ni ka sak.
Philemon1:11 Anih te hnukbuet ah nang ham a hoeihae coeng dae
Philemon1:12 Anih te nang tengah kan tueih. Te ni ka kotak ah aka om.
Philemon1:13 Anih te ka taengla khueh ka ngaih. Te daengah ni olthangthen kah hloong khuiah khaw nang yueng la kai m'bongyong eh.
Philemon1:14 Tedae nang kah mingpueinah pawt atah saii ka ngaih moenih. Te daengah ni nang a then loh kueknah lam pawt tih
Philemon1:15 tahae kah hnin at na paek uh rhoi dongah
Philemon1:16 Anih he sal voel pawt tih sal lakah olpuei la kai ham tah thintlo manuca la om coeng. Pumsa neh Boeipa ah nang ham muep lat hoekhang coeng.
Philemon1:17 Te dongah kai he pueipo la nan khueh atah kai bangla anih te doe.
Philemon1:18 Tedae nang soah thae tih lai a ba khoem atah te te kai hut la nawt laeh.
Philemon1:19 Kai Paul loh kamah kut neh kan daek coeng. Kamah loh kan sah bitni. Te te nang taengah
Philemon1:20 Thuem pai
Philemon1:21 Nang kah olngainah te ka pangtung dongah ni nang taengah kan daek. Ka thui te a pueh la na saii pataeng ni tila ka ming.
Philemon1:22 Pahoi ah kai ham khaw pahnah rhoekbah lah. Nangmih kah thangthuinah rhangneh nangmih khodawkngai ham te ka ngaiuep.
Philemon1:23 Jesuh Khrih kongah kai kah thongtlapuei Epaphras
Philemon1:24 kai kah bibipuei rhoek Marku
Philemon1:25 Boeipa Jesuh Khrih kah lungvatnah tah nangmih kah mueihla neh om saeh.
Hebrews1:1 Pathen loh a pa rhoek te tonghma rhoek lamloh a hnukhmai la puet a voek dingrhae coeng.
Hebrews1:2 Tedae tahae kah hnukkhueng khohnin ah capa lamloh mamih taengah a thui. Anih te cungkuem aka pangkung la a hmoel tih lunglai te khaw anih rhangneh a saii.
Hebrews1:3 Anih tah thangpomnah khosaeng neh a ngaikhueknah kah mueimae la om. A thaomnah olka neh a cungkuem a khoem. Tholh cimcaihnah a saii tih hmuen sang kah Boeilennah bantang ah ngol.
Hebrews1:4 Heyet a then la aka om puencawn boeih lakah amih loh poekhloep la a ming a pang.
Hebrews1:5 Mebang puencawn rhoek khaw
Hebrews1:6 Te dongah lunglai la camingomthang koep han khuen vaengah
Hebrews1:7 Tedae puencawn rhoek ngawn tah
Hebrews1:8 Tedae capa te tah
Hebrews1:9 Duengnah te na lungnah tih olaeknah te na hmuhuet. Te dongah Pathen loh nang n'koelh. Na Pathen loh na pueipo lakah kohoenah situi n'koelh pai.
Hebrews1:10 Te phoeiah
Hebrews1:11 Amih tah poci vetih himbai bangla boeih rhuem ni. Tedae nang tah na nguel ni.
Hebrews1:12 Amih te hni bangla na yol vetih himbai bangla thovael uh bal ni. Tedae nang tah amah la na om tih na kum khaw bawt mahpawh.
Hebrews1:13 Te dongah mebang puencawn rhoek taengah nim
Hebrews1:14 Khangnah te pang hamla aka cai rhoek te bibinah dongah a tueih
Hebrews2:1 Te dongah mamih loh n'yaak uh te taoe hnatung ham om. Vik n'hloo ve.
Hebrews2:2 Puencawn rhoek lamloh a thui olka tah khangmai la a om dongah boekoeknah neh althanah loh a taphu a yook te thuem.
Hebrews2:3 Metla mamih loh te tluk aih la khangnah n'sawtrhoel te n'poenghal aya? Boeipa dong lamloh a thui bangla a tongcuek kah a dang khaw te loella. Aka ya rhoek long khaw mamih ham a cak sak coeng ta.
Hebrews2:4 Pathen kah miknoek nen khaw
Hebrews2:5 Aka lo ham lunglai te puencawn rhoek taengah boengai sak mahnim. Te ni n'thui uh.
Hebrews2:6 Tedae pakhat loh hmuen pakhat ah laipai tih
Hebrews2:7 Anih te puencawn rhoek lakah vel na hlak coeng dae thangpomnah neh hinyahnah te anih na khuem sak.
Hebrews2:8 A cungkuem te a kho hmuiah boe na ngai sak
Hebrews2:9 Tedae puencawn rhoek lakah tangat vel a hlak vaengah dueknah dongkah patangnah lamloh thangpomnah neh hinyahnah Jesuh a khuem sak te m'hmuh uh. Te daengah ni Khohni kah lungvatnah lamloh a cungkuem yuengla dueknah te a ten eh.
Hebrews2:10 Te tah amah ham tueng coeng. A cungkuem tah amah ham neh a cungkuem te amah lamloh om coeng. Patangnah lamloh amih kah khangnah rhuihnun te soep sak ham thangpomnah khuila ca rhoek te muep a khuen.
Hebrews2:11 Aka ciim sak neh aka ciim rhoek tah pakhat kah boeih ni. Te paelnaehnah nen tah amih te manuca rhoek la khue ham yak pawh.
Hebrews2:12 Te vaengah
Hebrews2:13 Te phoeiah
Hebrews2:14 Te dongah camoe rhoek loh thii neh pumsa a boek uh coeng. Amah long khaw amih bangla a cabol coeng. Te daengah ni thaomnah aka khueh dueknah te dueknah lamloh a hmil eh. Te dueknah tah rhaithae ni.
Hebrews2:15 Te phoeiah ni a hing khui sal aka bi kuekluek ham rhoek te dueknah rhihnah lamloh boeih a hlah eh.
Hebrews2:16 Puencawn rhoek te rhep tu pawt tih Abraham kah tiingan ni a tuuk.
Hebrews2:17 Te dongah manuca rhoek te boeih thuidoek ham a kuek. Te daengah ni pilnam kah tholhnah dawth pah hamla Pathen taengah rhen koi neh uepom khosoihham la a om eh.
Hebrews2:18 Amah loh patang khaw amah la a noemcai coeng dongah a noemcai rhoek te a bom thai coeng.
Hebrews3:1 Te dongah vaan kah khuenah neh pueipo
Hebrews3:2 Anih te Moses bangla a im pum ah uepom neh aka om la a khueh van.
Hebrews3:3 Im aka rhoekbah loh hinyahnah cungkuem a khueh ngai bangla anih tah Moses lakah thangpomnah muep a tueng pah.
Hebrews3:4 Im boeih he khat khat loh a rhoekbah dae Pathen loh a cungkuem te a rhoekbah.
Hebrews3:5 Tedae a im pum kah uepom Moses long tah laipainah ham te tueihyoeih bangla a thui uh ni.
Hebrews3:6 Tedae Khrih tah amah im ah capa bangla om tih mamih khaw sayalh la ngaiuep thangpomnah te rhep n'tuuk uh atah a im kah la n'om uh.
Hebrews3:7 Te dongah Mueihla Cim loh a thui vanbangla
Hebrews3:8 Khosoek ah noemcainah khohnin kah koeknah bangla na thinko te ning sak uh boeh.
Hebrews3:9 Te ah te na pa rhoek loh noemcainah neh a n'noemcai uh dongah kum sawmli khuiah kai kah khoboe te a hmuh uh.
Hebrews3:10 Te dongah tekah cadil rhoek te ka noih tih
Hebrews3:11 Ka kosi neh ka toemngam vanbangla kai kah duemnah khuiah kun uh mahpawh.
Hebrews3:12 Manuca rhoek
Hebrews3:13 Tedae tihnin n'khue vanbangla hnin takuem amah la hloep uh thae. Te daengah ni tholhnah dongkah hmilhmaknah dongah nangmih khuikah pakhat long khaw a ning pawt eh.
Hebrews3:14 Te dongah Khrih kah a pueipo la n'om uh daengah ni ngaikhueknah kah a tongnah te a bawt due a khangmai la n'tuuk uh eh.
Hebrews3:15 A thui bangla tihnin ah a ol te na yaak uh atah koeknah vaengkah bangla nangmih kah thinko te ning sak uh boeh.
Hebrews3:16 A yaak uh lalah aka koek te unim? Tedae Moses loh Egypt lamkah a caeh puei rhoek boeih moenih a?
Hebrews3:17 Te vaengah kum sawmli a noih te unim? Aka tholh rhoek taengah moenih a? Amih kah a pum tah khosoek ah la a yalh.
Hebrews3:18 Te phoeiah ol aek rhoek pawt koinih amah kah duemnah khuila kun pawt ham a toemngam te unim?
Hebrews3:19 Te dongah hnalvalnah neh kun ham tah coeng uh mahpawh tila m'hmuh uh.
Hebrews4:1 Te dongah amah kah duemnah khuiah kun ham olkhueh a paih te nangmih khuiah khat khat loh a hlavawt la a poek khaming tila birhih uh sih.
Hebrews4:2 Amih bangla olthangthen aka phong lam ni n'om uh ngawn. Tedae a yaak rhoek te tangnah neh a rhoih uh pawt dongah a hnavue kah olka tah phu voel pawh.
Hebrews4:3 A ti bangla aka tangnah rhoek tah duemnah khuila n'kun uh. Ka kosi neh ka toemngam vanbangla kai duemnah khuiah kun venim. Te cakhaw diklai a tongnah lamloh a bibi te ana om coeng.
Hebrews4:4 Te dongah pakhat ah hninrhih ham a thui tangloeng. Te vaengah Pathen tah a bibi boeih lamkah hnin rhih vaengah duem.
Hebrews4:5 Te phoeiah amah hmuen la
Hebrews4:6 Te dongah a khuila kun ham hlangvang a khueh tangloeng pueng. Tedae hnukbuet kah aka phong rhoek tah althanah dongah kun uh pawh.
Hebrews4:7 Te phoeiah khohnin pakhat te “Tihnin” la a hoep tih kum heyet phoeiah ni David loh a thui. A thui bangla
Hebrews4:8 Joshua loh amih te a duem sak atah hekah khohnin phoeiah a tloe ham tah thui mahpawh.
Hebrews4:9 Te dongah duemhnin tah Pathen kah pilnam ham ni a om.
Hebrews4:10 Te dongah amah kah duemnah khuiah aka kun tah Pathen loh amah bibi lamkah a duem vanbangla anih khaw amah bibi lamkah duem.
Hebrews4:11 Te dongah tekah duemnah khuiah kun hamla haam uh sih. Te daengah ni althanah moeiboe dongah pakhat khaw amah la a bung pawt eh.
Hebrews4:12 Te dongah Pathen kah olka tah hing tih khuekcet. cunghang boeih lakah voeivang la haat tih hinglu neh mueihla
Hebrews4:13 Amah hmaikah a thuhphah suentae a om moenih. Tedae a cungkuem he a tlingyal neh a mikhmuh ah rha uh coeng. Anih taengah mamih ol te a paek.
Hebrews4:14 Khosoihham koek
Hebrews4:15 Mamih kah vawtthoeknah aka rhen thai mueh khosoihham n'khueh uh moenih. A cungkuem dongah mamih mueiloh la a noemcai coeng dae tholhnah a khueh moenih.
Hebrews4:16 Te dongah lungvatnah ngolkhoel taengah sayalh la paan uh sih. Te daengah ni rhennah n'dang vetih bomnah he tapkhoeh la lungvatnah neh m'hmuh eh.
Hebrews5:1 Hlang lamkah a tuek khosoihham boeih tah Pathen taengah hlang yuengla a tuek. Te daengah ni nawnnah neh tholh yuengla hmueih khaw a hlut.
Hebrews5:2 Mangvawt rhoek neh taengphael rhoek te a rhen thai dongah amah khaw vawtthoeknah neh vueinan uh.
Hebrews5:3 Te dongah tholh kongah nawn ham te pilnam ham neh amah ham khaw a kuek.
Hebrews5:4 Te phoeiah khat khat loh a thangpomnah te a loh moenih. Tedae Aaron bangla Pathen long ni a khue van.
Hebrews5:5 Khrih khaw khosoihham la om ham amah neh amah a thangpom tangloeng moenih. Tedae anih te
Hebrews5:6 Te vanbangla a tloe ah khaw
Hebrews5:7 Amah loh a pumsa la a om tue vaengah
Hebrews5:8 A capa la om dae a patang neh olngainah te a cang.
Hebrews5:9 Te dongah dungyan khangnah a hnun la a ol aka ngai rhoek boeih taengah rhuemtuet la a om pah.
Hebrews5:10 Melkhizedek kah aitlaeng bangla Pathen loh khosoihham la a khue coeng.
Hebrews5:11 Anih olka tah mamih taengah cung coeng dae hnavue te kolhnaw la a om dongah ka thuicaih tloel.
Hebrews5:12 A tue loh saya la om ham a kuek coeng dae Khohni kah olrhuh a tongnah kah a niing te pakhat loh nangmih koep n'thuituen na ngoe uh. Te dongah buh hap mueh la suktui aka ngoe la na om uh.
Hebrews5:13 Suktui aka cabol boeih tah cahmang la om tih
Hebrews5:14 Tedae lungcuei tah buh hap a om pah coeng. Te rhoek kah hmuhtoeihnah rhangneh yaknganah te a hlinsai uh dongah a thae neh a then khaw boelhkhoehnah khueh uh.
Hebrews6:1 Te dongah Khrih kawng tongnah olka te khueh uh sih. A soepnah la la thoeih uh sih. Aka duek bibi lamkah yutnah
Hebrews6:2 Pathen taengah tangnah
Hebrews6:3 Hekah he Pathen loh ham hmoel atah n'saii uh bitni.
Hebrews6:4 Vai khaw kho aka hmuh tih vaan kutdoe khaw aka ten
Hebrews6:5 Pathen kah olka then neh aka lo ham tue kah thaomnah a ten phoeiah
Hebrews6:6 aka bung tah Pathen capa te amah la koep a tai tih a yan dongah a thai la koep yutnah ham coeng thai pawh.
Hebrews6:7 Diklai loh a soah rhotui aka tla takuem te a ok dae amih aka tawn ham aka hoeikhang toi an a thoeng sak atah Pathen taengah yoethennah a dang.
Hebrews6:8 Tedae hling neh lota a thoeng sak atah lolhmaih tih rhunkhuennah yoei coeng. A hnukkhueng ah tah a hoehnah hamla om coeng.
Hebrews6:9 Tedae thintlo rhoek
Hebrews6:10 Pathen tah nangmih kah bibi neh amah ming ham lungnah na tueng sak uh te khaw
Hebrews6:11 Tedae nangmih khat rhip te a bawt duela na ngaiuepnah dongkah ngaikhueknah dongla thahluenah neh amah la na phoe uh hamla ka ngaih uh.
Hebrews6:12 Te daengah ni kolhnaw la na om uh pawt vetih tangnah
Hebrews6:13 Pathen loh Abraham te a caeng vaengah toemngam ham a tanglue a khueh pawt dongah amah neh amah te toemngam uh.
Hebrews6:14 Te vaengah
Hebrews6:15 Te dongah olkhueh te thinsen neh a dang tangloeng.
Hebrews6:16 Hlang loh a tanglue la a toemngam dae olhlo a caksaknah ham a bawt ah pakainah la boeih om.
Hebrews6:17 Te khuiah Pathen loh olkhueh dongkah rhopangkung taengah amah kah mangtaengnah olhlo neh khangmai la rhi a khang te muep tueng a ngaih.
Hebrews6:18 Te daengah ni hno panit loh a khangmai sak. Te khuiah Pathen te laithae thai pawt dongah ni ngaiuepnah a tawn te tuuk ham aka yong rhoek loh khangmai la thaphohnah n'khueh.
Hebrews6:19 Te ni hinglu dongkah cumkai la n'khueh uh tih hniyan khui ah khangmai la rhep kun rhenten coeng.
Hebrews6:20 Te ah mamih yueng lamhma la Jesuh kun tih Melkhizedek kah aitlaeng bangla kumhal ah khosoihham la om coeng.
Hebrews7:1 Khohni Pathen kah khosoih
Hebrews7:2 A cungkuem lamkah parha ah pakhat te khaw Abraham loh anih a boe. Khatben ah lamhma la
Hebrews7:3 Pamueh numueh
Hebrews7:4 Patuel Abraham long pataeng a kutbuem khuikah parha pakhat a paek atah anih khaw bahoeng len tila hmu uh.
Hebrews7:5 Levi ca rhoek long tah khuikah khosoih te a dang. Olkhueng vanbangla pilnam taengah parha pakhat coi olpaek khaw a khueh uh. Tedae Abraham pumpu lamloh ha thoeng boeiloeih tih a manuca la om.
Hebrews7:6 Tedae amih kah rhuirhong mueh loh Abraham taengkah parha pakhat a doe tih olkhueh aka dang te a uem.
Hebrews7:7 Te dongah then loh mathoe a uem te boeih pakainah moenih.
Hebrews7:8 Te vaengah hlang duek loh parha pakhat te a dang dae hing tila pahoi a phong pah.
Hebrews7:9 Te phoeiah olka a thui vanbangla Abraham lamlong ni Levi long khaw a doe parha pakhat te a dang.
Hebrews7:10 Melkhizedek loh anih a doe vaengah Levi he a napa kah a pumpu ah ni a om pueng.
Hebrews7:11 Levi khosoih lamloh hmakhahnah a om tangloeng atah pilnam loh amah soah ol a rhi coeng. Melkhizedek kah aitlaeng bangla a tloe khosoih aka phoe taengah banim a ngoe pueng? Aron kah aitlaeng bangla khue pawt nim?
Hebrews7:12 Khosoih bi te a thovael vaengah olkhueng kah thovaelnah khaw a kueknah om.
Hebrews7:13 Amah kawng a thui uh he khaw a tloe koca taengah cabol coeng. Te lamkah te tah hmueihtuk aka ngaithuen moenih.
Hebrews7:14 Te dongah mamih kah Boeipa te Judah lamkah ha thoeng te lohaa coeng. Tekah koca ham khosoih bi te Moses loh ana thui moenih.
Hebrews7:15 Te phoeiah a cimphan la muep om pueng. Melkhizedek kah mueiloh bangla khosoih a tloe a phoe mak atah.
Hebrews7:16 Anih tah pumsa olpaek kah olkhueng dongah om pawt tih aka nguel hingnah kah thaomnah dongah ni a om.
Hebrews7:17 “Nang tah Melkhizedek kah aitlaeng bangla kumhal ah na khosoih coeng
Hebrews7:18 Olpaek te lamhma he tattloel tih a hloo dongah a hnawt a khoe la poeh.
Hebrews7:19 Olkhueng loh soep sak pawt dae ngaiuepnah then ham rhoekbahnah la om. Te nen ni Pathen taengla n'yoei uh.
Hebrews7:20 Te tlam khaw olhlonah tal aih pawt dae
Hebrews7:21 Tedae te lamloh olhlonah neh amah te
Hebrews7:22 Heyet lamlong tah Jesuh he paipi then kah rhi aka khang la om coeng.
Hebrews7:23 Te vaengah aka nguel ham te duek loh a kanghalh dongah khosoih la aka om rhoek khaw muep lo uh.
Hebrews7:24 Tedae kumhal duela aka naeh tih a cak la aka om khosoih khaw amah ni.
Hebrews7:25 Te dongah anih lamloh Pathen aka paan rhoek khuek a khang thai bal. A yoeyah la hing ham te amih yueng la huithui coeng.
Hebrews7:26 Tebang hlangcim
Hebrews7:27 Anih tah khosoihham rhoek bangla a kueknah te hnin takuem a khueh moenih. Lamhma kah long tah amah kah tholhnah ham hmueih nawn. Te phoeikah rhoek ni pilnam ham pueng. Hekah long tah amah te bangtlang saii uh tih a nawn.
Hebrews7:28 Olkhueng loh vawtthoeknah aka om hlang te khosoihham la a tuek. Tedae olkhueng hnukah olhlonah ol loh capa te kumhal duela a soep sak coeng.
Hebrews8:1 Tebang khosoihham ng'khueh uh te a cuinah la n'thui coeng. Anih tah vaan kah Boeilennah ngolkhoel bantang ah ngol.
Hebrews8:2 Hmuencim neh dap tang kah bibikung la om. Te te hlang long pawt tih Boeipa long ni a tuk.
Hebrews8:3 Khosoihham boeih te kutdoe neh hmueih nawn ham a tuek. Pakhat khaw a khueh tangkik coeng dongah tekah te khaw nawn saeh.
Hebrews8:4 Diklai ah om tangloeng ngawn koinih khosoih la ka om eh a ti moenih. Olkhueng dongah kutdoe aka nawn rhoek lam ni a om uh.
Hebrews8:5 Amih loh vaan kah moeiboe neh mueihlip te a bawk uh. Moses loh dap a coeng tom a mangthui pah. A hmuh dongah
Hebrews8:6 Tedae thothueng tanglue a dang coeng. Paipi dongah rhikhangkung aka then lam khaw muep om. Te long te a then la olkhueh ol a rhi thil.
Hebrews8:7 Lamhma te cuemthuek la om koinih a hmuen pabae tlap mahpawh.
Hebrews8:8 Tedae amih te a coel dongah
Hebrews8:9 Amih kut te ka tuuk tih Egypt kho lamloh amih ka doek hnin vaengkah a napa rhoek taengah ka saii paipi bang te moenih. Amih tah kai kah paipi dongah a ngol pai uh pawt dongah kai long khaw amih te ka sawtrhoel. Boeipa loh a ti.
Hebrews8:10 Hekah paipi tah te khohnin phoeiah ni Israel imkhui ah ka saii eh. Boeipa long ni a thui. Ka olkhueng he a kopoek ah ka paek vetih amih thinko ah ka daek pah ni. Te vaengah amih taengah Pathen la ka om vetih amih khaw ka pilnam la om uh ni.
Hebrews8:11 Te vaengah pakhat rhip loh a pilnam te khaw
Hebrews8:12 Amih kah boethae te poekpoei rhola la ka om pah vetih amih kah tholhnah te ka poek khuep voel mahpawh.
Hebrews8:13 A thai a thui rhang neh paipi lamhma te a rhuem sak. Te dongah a rhuemrho neh a rhuemrho tah khum tom coeng.
Hebrews9:1 Lamhma loh thothuengnah rhilam neh diklai hmuencim khaw rhep om tangloeng.
Hebrews9:2 Dap ana rhoekbah tih a khuiah lamhma la hmaitung
Hebrews9:3 Dap khuikah hniyan pabae phoeikah te tah hmuencim boeih kah hmuencim ana ti.
Hebrews9:4 Sui rhokso neh a kaeng boeih sui neh a khuk Paipi thingkawng te om tih a khuiah manna aka om sui am
Hebrews9:5 Te soah thangpomnah cherubim loh dawthnah te a khu. Te te a cungvang la tahae ah thui ham om pawh.
Hebrews9:6 Tedae te kah te a rhoekbah tangloeng coeng. Khosoih rhoek tah dap lamhma khuila vawp vawp ana kun uh yoeyah daengah thothuengnah te ana coeng uh.
Hebrews9:7 Tedae a pabae khuiah tah khosoihham bueng loh kum khat ah vai a kun te thii nen voel moenih. Te nen te amah neh pilnam kah mangvawtnah yuengla a nawn.
Hebrews9:8 He he Mueihla Cim loh a thuicaih ta. Olpungnah dap lamhma te a om pueng atah hmuencim kah longpuei te a khui moenih.
Hebrews9:9 Te tah a tue ham nuettahnah la ha pai coeng. Te vanbangla kutdoe neh hmueih a khuen loh tho aka thueng te mingcimnah a soep sak thai moenih.
Hebrews9:10 Caak ham neh ook ham
Hebrews9:11 Tedae Khrih tah kut neh sai mueh
Hebrews9:12 Maae neh vaito thii nen pawt tih amah thii neh dungyan tlannah dang ham hmuencim ah kun bangtlang coeng.
Hebrews9:13 Maae
Hebrews9:14 Khrih kah thii tah bahoeng voel a. Amah tah Mueihla rhangneh Pathen taengah cuemthuek la dungyan amah nawn uh coeng. Te aka hing Pathen taengah thothueng ham khoboe aka duek lamloh mamih kah mingcimnah he a cilpoe pawn ni.
Hebrews9:15 Te dongah paipi thai kah rhikhangkung la om tangloeng. Te daengah ni dueknah he boekoeknah paipi lamhma hmuiah tlannah la thoeng vetih olkhueh te dungyan rho la a khue rhoek loh a dang eh.
Hebrews9:16 Paipi te tah aka tael kah a dueknah te tueng sak ham a kueknah om.
Hebrews9:17 Paipi tah a duek thil daengah ni a khangmai. Akai saii te a hing vaengah tah khangmai pawt mai khaming.
Hebrews9:18 Te dongah lamhma kah paipi he thii muehla a cak sak moenih.
Hebrews9:19 Olpaek boeih te olkhueng dongkah bangla Moses lamloh pilnam boeih taengah a thui coeng. Vaito neh maae thii
Hebrews9:20 Te phoeiah
Hebrews9:21 Te phoeiah dap te khaw
Hebrews9:22 Te dongah olkhueng vanbangla thii loh a cungkuem a cim sak banghui tih thiilongnah pawt atah khodawkngainah om pawh.
Hebrews9:23 Moeiboe te vaan kah nen he cilpoe ham a kueknah om tangloeng. Tedae amih vaan kah rhoek te tah tahae kah hmueih lakah aka then neh a cimcaih sak.
Hebrews9:24 Khrih tah oltak kah mueimae kutsai hmuencim la a kun moenih. Tedae amah te vaan kah Pathen mikhmuh ah mamih yueng la phoe coeng.
Hebrews9:25 Te daengah ni khosoihham loh kum takuem hmuencim ah hlanglang thii neh a kun bangla amah pum a nawn taitu pawt eh.
Hebrews9:26 Te koinih diklai a tongnah lamloh khing a patang ham a kuek ni. Tedae tahae ah tah amah kah hmueih lamloh tholh khoe ham kumhal kah a bawtnah dongah rhenten phoe coeng.
Hebrews9:27 Hlang he vai a duek phoeiah laitloeknah khaw a tong vanbangla
Hebrews9:28 Khrih long khaw a yet kah tholh te phueih ham vaikhat la a nawn coeng. Te dongah a pabae ah tah tholh om muehla amah aka lamtawn rhoek taengah khangnah khuen ham phoe ni.
Hebrews10:1 Olkhueng tah aka lo ham hno then kah mueihlip la om tih anih te hno taktak kah muei moenih. Kum takuem ah hmueih te amah la a nawn uh dae a soep la phat paan sak thai pawh.
Hebrews10:2 Te koinih hmueih a nawn te bawt tlaih mahpawh. Te dongah vaikhat thothueng neh a cim sak te tholhnah dongah mingcimnah khueh voel mahpawh.
Hebrews10:3 Tedae kum takuem tholh poekkoepnah amih ah aka om te
Hebrews10:4 vaito neh maae thii loh tholh a khoe tloel dongah ni.
Hebrews10:5 Te dongah diklai la aka kun loh
Hebrews10:6 Tholh dongah hmaihlutnah khaw na lungtlun uh pawh.
Hebrews10:7 Te vaengah
Hebrews10:8 A sokah hmueih khaw nawnnah hmaihlutnah khaw tholh kongah na ngaih pawt tih na lungtlun pawh tila ka thui. Te te olkhueng bangla a nawn rhoek ni
Hebrews10:9 Te phoeiah
Hebrews10:10 A kongaih loh Jesuh Khrih kah pum te a nawn bangtlang dongah a ciim la n'om uh.
Hebrews10:11 Te phoeiah khosoih boeih loh hnin takuem pai tih tho a thueng vaengah amah la hmueih a nawn taitu dae te long te tholh a khoe thai moenih.
Hebrews10:12 Tedae amah loh tholhnah yueng vaikhat la hmueih a nawn tih Pathen kah bantang ah kumhal la ngol coeng.
Hebrews10:13 Te lamkah a tloihsoi ah a rhal te a kho kah khotloeng la a khueh duela a rhing.
Hebrews10:14 Vaikhat la nawnnah lamloh te rhoek te kumhal due rhuemtuet la a ciim sak.
Hebrews10:15 Te dongah Mueihla Cim long khaw mamih taengah a phong.
Hebrews10:16 Te phoeiah
Hebrews10:17 Te phoeiah amih kah tholh neh olaeknah te ka poek khuep voel mahpawh
Hebrews10:18 Amih kah khodawkngainah tah melae? Tholh ham hmueih a om pawt ah.
Hebrews10:19 Te dongah
Hebrews10:20 Tekah hniyan lamloh mamih ham aka hing longpuei thai a ong coeng. Te tah amah pum ni a thui.
Hebrews10:21 Te phoeiah Pathen im kah khosoih puei n'khueh uh coeng.
Hebrews10:22 Tangnah kah ngaikhueknah dongah thinko oltak neh paan uh sih. A thae la mingcimnah thinko te haek uh sih lamtah pum te tui cil neh tuihlu uh sih.
Hebrews10:23 Ol aka caeng kung te a uepom dongah aka cak ngaiuepnah dongkah olphoei mah pom uh sih.
Hebrews10:24 Te phoeiah lungnah
Hebrews10:25 Mamih kah humtunnah he pakhat kah khosing bangla phap uh boel lamtah hloep uh thae. Heyet khaw khohnin a yoei te boeih na hmuh ngai coeng.
Hebrews10:26 Oltak kah mingnah te n'dang phoeiah mamih he kalthalh la n'tholh he tholh hlah ham hmueih a om moenih.
Hebrews10:27 Tedae laitloeknah mueirhih neh aka kingkalh te dolh ham aka cai kosi hmai pakhat ni a lamtawnnah coeng.
Hebrews10:28 Khat khat loh Moses kah olkhueng te a aal vaengah sitlohnah om kolla panit pathum kah laipai neh duek.
Hebrews10:29 Pathen capa aka suntlae rhoek loh tholhphu a thae la muep a yook ham te na poek uh nim. Te nen la a ciim dae
Hebrews10:30 “Kutthungnah he kai kah
Hebrews10:31 Aka hing Pathen kut ah cungku te mueirhih la om.
Hebrews10:32 Te dongah hnukbuet kah a tue te thoelh uh. Te vaengkah loehlangnah muep aka hmuh loh patangnah te ueh uh.
Hebrews10:33 A ngen vaengah hnaelcoenah neh phacip phabaem neh a yan uh. A ngen vaengah tebang khosa rhoek kah pueipo la na om uh.
Hebrews10:34 Thongtla rhoek te khaw na rhen uh. Nangmih kah khuehtawn te halhkanah neh aka rhawt khaw omngaihnah neh na doe uh. Khuehtawn then neh aka kuei amah a om te na ming uh.
Hebrews10:35 Te dongah na sayalhnah te voei uh boeh. Te long te taphu a len a khueh.
Hebrews10:36 Uehnah uh ham he a ngoe. Te daengah ni Pathen kah kongaih aka saii loh olkhueh te na dang uh eh.
Hebrews10:37 Kolkalh pueng ah aka pawk long tah boeih boeih ha pawk vetih koe mahpawh.
Hebrews10:38 Tedae ka hlang dueng tah tangnah neh hing ni. Te vaengah tonga koinih anih soah ka hinglu loh a lungtlun mahpawh.
Hebrews10:39 Mamih tah pocinah ham tonganah pawt tih hinglu dangnah ham tangnah n'khueh uh.
Hebrews11:1 A hmuethma hmuh pawt hno dongah ngaikhueknah neh n'ngaiuep he ni tangnah la aka om coeng.
Hebrews11:2 He nen ni a ham rhoek long khaw a phong uh.
Hebrews11:3 Hmuh mueh lamkah hmuh koi la coeng sak ham Pathen kah olka loh lunglai a tarhoek tila tangnah neh n'yakming uh.
Hebrews11:4 Tangnah neh Abel loh Kain lakah Pathen taengah hmueih muep a nawn. Te lamlong tah hlang dueng ni tila ana oep. Pathen kah a kutdoe te ana oep dongah aka duek long khaw tangnah neh a thui pueng.
Hebrews11:5 Tangnah rhangneh dueknah te hmuh pawt ham Enok tah a thovael sak. Tedae Pathen loh a tholvael dongah anih te hmu voel pawh. Thovaelnah a om hlanah mah Pathen taengkah kolo neh ana oep coeng.
Hebrews11:6 Tedae tangnah mueh la kolo n'tong thai pawh. Pathen aka paan loh amah tah om tih amah aka tlap rhoek te taphu om tila a tangnah a kuek.
Hebrews11:7 Noah loh a hmuh pawt te a mangthui vaengah a hinyah tih tangnah neh amah cako khangnah ham sangpho te a rhoekbah. Te nen te diklai a boe sak tih tangnah neh duengnah rhopangkung la coeng.
Hebrews11:8 Tangnah neh a khue vaengah rho la pang aka cai hmuen te paan ham Abraham loh a ngai. Te vaengah mela a caeh khaw a ming mueh lam ni a caeh.
Hebrews11:9 Tangnah neh hlanglang la olkhueh ram ah kuepkol. Olkhueh
Hebrews11:10 Te vaengah khoengim a khueh tangtae khopuei te ni a lamtawn. Pathen tah te khopuei kah kutthai neh rhaengpuei ham bibikung la om.
Hebrews11:11 Cayaa Sarah amah long khaw a pumrho neh a tuetang kah a voelah a tiingan a tongnah ham thaomnah te tangnah neh a dang. Te khaw aka caeng te uepom la a poek dongah ni.
Hebrews11:12 Te dongah pakhat lamlong khaw muep thaang coeng. Aka duek he khaw vaan kah aisi yet la
Hebrews11:13 Amih rhoek boeih loh tangnah neh duek uh. Olkhueh te dang uh pawt dae a hla lamkah a dan uh tih a doe uh. Te phoeiah diklai ah yinlai neh lampah ni tila a phong uh.
Hebrews11:14 Tebang aka thui rhoek loh a tolrhum a ngaidam uh te a phoe uh.
Hebrews11:15 Tedae te lamkah ha suntlak uh te poek uh ngawn koinih a voei uh tue khaw a khueh uh suidae.
Hebrews11:16 Tedae vaan ah a then ngai aka om te a ngaidam uh coeng. Te dongah amih loh Pathen te amamih kah Pathen la khue ham yak uh pawh. Amih ham kho pakhat a rhoekbah pah coeng.
Hebrews11:17 Abraham te a noemcai vaengah tangnah neh Isaak te a nawn tih khueh duen aka nawn la olkhueh te a dang.
Hebrews11:18 Anih ham te
Hebrews11:19 Pathen loh aka duek rhoek lamkah pataeng a thoh thai tila ana poek coeng. Te lamkah ni anih te nuettahnah lam khaw a dang.
Hebrews11:20 Tangnah nen ni lo ham aka cai Jakob neh Esau kawng khaw Isaak loh a uem.
Hebrews11:21 Tangnah neh Jakob loh a duek tom vaengah Joseph ca rhoek te rhip a uem tih a conghol soi ah a bawk.
Hebrews11:22 Tangnah nen ni Joseph loh a duek tom ah Israel ca rhoek kah sunglatnah kawng te a poek tih a rhuh kawng te a uen.
Hebrews11:23 Tangnah nen ni Moses te a napa loh a thaang neh hla thum ana thuh. Camoe te sakthen la hmuh uh vaengah manghai kah oltloek te rhih uh pawh.
Hebrews11:24 Tangnah nen ni Moses loh lungcuei la a om vaengah Pharaoh canu kah a capa a ti nah te a aal.
Hebrews11:25 Kolkalh ham tholhnah neh omngaihbawnnah khueh lakah Pathen kah pilnam te patang puei lat a tuek.
Hebrews11:26 Taphu te a lamso dongah Khrih kah hnaelcoenah te Egypt kah khohrhang lakah khuehtawn tanglue la a poek.
Hebrews11:27 Tangnah neh Egypt a hnoo tih manghai kah thinsanah te rhih pawh. Hmuhmueh te hmuh bangla a ueh.
Hebrews11:28 Tangnah neh yoom neh thii haek te a saii. Te daengah ni camingomthang aka ngawn loh amih te a ben pawt pai eh.
Hebrews11:29 Tangnah neh Tuili Sen te lan long bangla phueihuet la a hlaikan uh. Te te dang ham aka cai Egypt rhoek tah buek uh.
Hebrews11:30 Tangnah neh Jerikho pangbueng te hnin rhih khuiah a vael uh vaengah tim.
Hebrews11:31 Tangnah neh hlanghalh Rahab loh rhalyuep rhoek te ngaimong la a doe dongah ol aek rhoek taengah poci pawh.
Hebrews11:32 Te phoeiah balae ka thui pueng eh? Gideon
Hebrews11:33 Amih loh tangnah neh ram khaw a na
Hebrews11:34 Hmai kah thaomnah a thih
Hebrews11:35 Thohkoepnah neh huta rhoek loh amamih kah aka duek tangtae te a dang uh. Tedae a ngen loh aka then ngai thohkoepnah dang ham tlannah te doe mueh la phaep uh.
Hebrews11:36 A ngen tah tamdaengnah neh noemcainah nganboh a yook uh bueng kolla hloong neh thongim khaw a yook uh.
Hebrews11:37 A dae uh
Hebrews11:38 Diklai tah amih neh a tiing la a om moenih. kohong ah
Hebrews11:39 Tedae amih tangnah neh aka phong boeih loh olkhueh te a dang uh moenih.
Hebrews11:40 Pathen kah a rhan te pakhat khaw mamih ham a then
Hebrews12:1 Te dongah mamih khawm ta
Hebrews12:2 Tangnah hmapaikung neh hmakhapkung Jesuh te hmaitang uh sih. Anih loh omngaihnah a tawn coeng dongah yahpohnah thinglam te a hnaep tih a ueh phoeiah Pathen kah ngolkhoel bantang ah ngol.
Hebrews12:3 Hlangtholh rhoek lamloh amah a pakainah thil a ueh te poek uh. Te daengah ni na hinglu te tawnba neh na ko a bawt pawt eh.
Hebrews12:4 Tholhnah aka hnuei rhoek te a thii hil na oel uh hlan.
Hebrews12:5 Ka ca rhoek bangla nangmih m'voek tih
Hebrews12:6 Boeipa loh a lungnah te a toel tih ca la a doe boeih te a boh.
Hebrews12:7 Pathen loh nangmih te ca la n'bawnhlak bangla hlinsainah khaw ueh uh. Ca aka toel pawh napa te unim?
Hebrews12:8 Tedae tekah hlinsainah na khueh uh pawt atah halhca la boeih om tih ca la na om uh pawh.
Hebrews12:9 Te phoeiah pa rhoek te mamih pumsa hlinsaikung la n'khueh uh tih n'yahnah uh. Te dongah mueihla kah pa taengah taoe boengai neh taoe hing boel sih a?
Hebrews12:10 Amih long tah khohnin kolkalh ham a poek uh tarhing ah n'toel uh. Tedae Amah long tah amah kah cimcaihnah te dang sak ham ni mamih n'rhoeikhang sak.
Hebrews12:11 Te dongah hlinsainah a om vaengah ngawn tah omngaihnah pawt tih kothaenah ni tila boeih a poek. Tedae hnukkhueng ah tekah a hlinsai rhangneh duengnah thaihtak te ngaimong la n'thuung.
Hebrews12:12 Te dongah kut aka kha neh khuklu aka hlinghlawk te duel uh.
Hebrews12:13 Na kho te caehlong a dueng la saii pah. Te daengah ni aka khaem loh mael pawt vetih lat a hoeih eh.
Hebrews12:14 A cungkuem taengah rhoepnah
Hebrews12:15 Khat khaw Pathen kah lungvatnah lamloh talae pawt ham hiphoel uh. Pakhat khaw olkhaa yung aka poe hang loh tulnoi tih te long te muep m'boi sak boel saeh.
Hebrews12:16 Pakhat long khaw hlanghalh neh Esau bangla rhonging boel saeh. Anih long te caak kamat la amah kah caming te a thuung.
Hebrews12:17 Yoethennah a hnawt te a tloihsoi ah pang a ngaih te khaw na ming uh. Te dongah te te mikphi neh tlap cakhaw yutnah hmuen a hmuh moenih.
Hebrews12:18 Hmaitak hmai
Hebrews12:19 Te kah te aka ya rhoek loh amih taengah olka a thap pawt ham a bih uh.
Hebrews12:20 Olpaek te a ueh uh pawt dongah suva long pataeng tlang te a ben atah mat a dae.
Hebrews12:21 Te vaengkah mikhmuh ah mueirhih te om tangloeng tih Moses loh
Hebrews12:22 Tedae Zion tlang
Hebrews12:23 vaan ah minghlum tangtae hlangboel camingomthang neh
Hebrews12:24 paipi thai kah rhikhangkung Jesuh taengah khaw
Hebrews12:25 Nangmih taengah aka thui te na hnawt uh pawt ham ngaithuen uh. amih loh diklai ah a mangthui te a poenghal pawt atah vaan lamkah te mamih loh m'phaelh tak he muep nah ngai ni ta.
Hebrews12:26 A ol loh diklai a hinghoek vaengah ni ana caeng coeng tih
Hebrews12:27 Te long te a hinghoek rhoek kah thovaelnah a saii ham te rhenten a thuicaih koep coeng. Te daengah ni aka hinghoek pawt rhoek loh a naeh uh eh.
Hebrews12:28 Te dongah cakrhuet pawh ram n'dang uh tih lungvatnah te khueh uh sih. Tekah nen te Pathen kah kolo la yahyongnah
Hebrews12:29 Mamih kah Pathen tah hmai la rhong taktak coeng.
Hebrews13:1 Manuca lungnah tah naeh saeh.
Hebrews13:2 Yinlailungnah te hmaai uh boeh. Te nen te a ngen long tah puencawn rhoek khaw buengrhuet a pah sak.
Hebrews13:3 Thongtla rhoek te thongtla hmaih bangla poek uh. Amih te a hnaephnap uh vanbangla pum ah nangmih khaw na om uh.
Hebrews13:4 Yulueinah te hlang boeih loh kueinah saeh lamtah ihnah te cuem saeh. Tedae hlanghalh rhoek neh samphaih rhoek te Pathen loh lai a tloek bitni.
Hebrews13:5 Omih dongah tangka moo boel saeh. Aka om duen neh rhaemhal saeh. Amah loh
Hebrews13:6 Te dongah mamih loh
Hebrews13:7 Nangmih aka kholcui rhoek te poek uh. Amih long nangmih taengah Pathen kah olka te a thui. Amih kah caehlong te thuep uh lamtah tangnah dongah a omih te awt uh.
Hebrews13:8 Jesuh Khrih tah hlaem neh tihnin kumhal due khaw amah la om.
Hebrews13:9 A cungkuem la aka lang thuituennahte khaw khuentoeng uh boeh. Cakok neh pawt tih lungvatnah neh thinko a cak he then. Tekah cakok neh aka pongpa rhoek tah a hoeikhang moenih.
Hebrews13:10 Hmueihtuk pakhat n'khueh uh coeng. Te lamkah te caak hamla dap khuikah thothueng rhoek loh saithainah a khueh uh moenih.
Hebrews13:11 Tholhnah kongah khosoihham loh rhamsa thii te hmuencim la a khuen tih a pum te vong voelah a hoeh uh.
Hebrews13:12 Jesuh khaw a thii lamloh pilnam te ciim ham vongka kah a voelah patang tangloeng.
Hebrews13:13 Te dongah amah taengah rhalkapim voella cet uh sih lamtah amah kah hnaelcoenah te phuei uh sih.
Hebrews13:14 Khopuei aka nguel he n'khueh uh pawt dongah tih aka lo ham te n'toem uh.
Hebrews13:15 Amah lamloh Pathen taengah a cungkuem dongkah thangthennah hmueih te nawn uh tangloeng sih. Te tah a ming aka phong hmuilai kah a thaih coeng ni.
Hebrews13:16 Tedae boethen neh doedannah te hmaai uh boeh. Tebang hmueih ni Pathen loh a uem.
Hebrews13:17 Nangmih aka kholcui rhoek te pangtung uh lamtah boengai uh. Amih loh olka a thuung uh vanbangla nangmih hinglu ham hak uh. Te daenngah ni he kah omngaihnah neh a saii uh vetih a huei uh pawt eh. Te te nangmih ham a sungdaeh la om ve.
Hebrews13:18 A cungkuem ah a buelhmaih la khosak ham ka ngaih uh tih a then la mingcimnah ka khueh uh tila ka ngaitang uh dongah kaimih ham thangthui uh.
Hebrews13:19 He he saii ham muep kan hloep daengah ni nangmih taengla koe kam pha eh.
Hebrews13:20 Tahae ah ngaimongnah Pathen loh
Hebrews13:21 A kongaih saii sak ham te hnothen cungkuem neh nangmih n'tarhoek saeh. A hmaikah a kolo te Jesuh Khrih rhangneh mamih ah a saii coeng. Thangpomnah tah kumhal kah kumhal duela amah kah ni. Amen.
Hebrews13:22 Nangmih kan hloep coeng
Hebrews13:23 Mamih kah manuca Timothy ha loeih te na ming uh coeng. Anih te yueya ha pawk atah nangmih te kang hip bitni.
Hebrews13:24 Nangmih aka kholcui rhoek boeih neh hlangcim rhoek boeih te toidal uh. Italy lamkah rhoek long khaw nangmih n'toidal uh.
Hebrews13:25 Lungvatnah tah nangmih boeih taengah om saeh.
James1:1 Pathen neh Boeipa Jesuh khrih kah sal James loh canglak mupoe koca hlainit taengah ka omngaih.
James1:2 Ka manuca rhoeh noemcainah rhoepsaep na um uh te omngaihnah la boeih poek uh.
James1:3 Nangmih kah nuemnainah loh tangnah dongkah uehnah a thoeng sak te ming uh.
James1:4 Uehnah loh khoboe te a lungcuei la khueh saeh. Te daengah ni lungcuei neh hlangsoep la na om vetih na vawtthoek pawt eh.
James1:5 Nangmih khuiah khat khat loh cueihnah a vawt atah kohuet kolla hawt boeih aka pae Pathen taengah bih saeh lamtah anih te a paek bitni.
James1:6 Tedae boelhkhoeh kolla tangnah neh bih saeh. Aka boelhkhoeh tah tuili kah tuiphu aka niknuk neh aka kilkul banghui ni.
James1:7 Tekah hlang loh boeipa taengkah pakhat khaw a dang ham la cai boel saeh.
James1:8 Cikcok hlang tah rhoepsaep dongah a longpuei khaw likloek sut.
James1:9 Tedae manuca aka tlayae long tah amah kah a sang neh pomsang saeh.
James1:10 Kuirhang long khaw a mathoe neh thangpom seh. Anih khaw khopol rhaipai bangla khum ni.
James1:11 Khomik loh a linglai neh a thoeng vaengah khopol te koh. Rhaipai khaw rhul tih a maelhmai kah mueithen long khaw tlum. Kuirhang khaw a caehlong ah muei tangloeng.
James1:12 Yoethen hlang long tah noemcainah a ueh. Ueppang la aka om long ni hingnah rhuisam te a dang eh. Te tah amah aka lungnah rhoek ham a kam pah coeng.
James1:13 Noemcai vaegah Pathen loh n'noemcai ti boel saeh. Pathen ham tah a thae he hnalbat la om tih amah khaw a noemcai moenih.
James1:14 Cuekcawn hlang boeih tah amah kah hoehhamnah loh a payawk tih a yoek.
James1:15 Hoehhamnah loh a cuen dongah tholhnah a cun. Tholhnah loh a ham vaengah dueknah a cun.
James1:16 Thintlo ka manuca rhoek te n'rhaithi uh boel saeh.
James1:17 Doedannah then boeih neh lungcuei kutdoe tah a so lamkah ni. Pa kah vangnah khui lamkah ha suntla coeng. Anih taengah poehlipnah neh hoilaenah mueihlip a om moenih.
James1:18 A kutngo khuiah thaihcuek pakhat la mamih om sak ham ni oltak kah a ngaih vanbangla a ol loh mamih n'cun.
James1:19 Ka thintlo manuca rhoek ming uh lah. Hlang boeih loh hnatun ham te voeiloe la
James1:20 Hlang kah thintoek loh Pathen kah duengnah te a saii moenih.
James1:21 Te dongah khoboe rhong neh phayoenah dongkah baecoihnah te boeih hnawt uh. Na hinglu khang ham aka coeng thai mutue ol te muelhtuetnah neh doe uh.
James1:22 Ol aka rhoihkung la om uh lamtah aka yakung dawk loh amah te yoek uh boel saeh.
James1:23 Khat khat loh ol yakung la om tih a rhoihkung pawt atah
James1:24 Amah te hmat uh coeng dae a caeh nen tah metla a om khaw hnap a hmaai.
James1:25 Tedae poenghalnah lungcuei olkhueng te aka so tih aka om thil
James1:26 Khat khat loh aka cuep la a ngai uh tih a ol a tuem kolla
James1:27 Pa neh Pathen hmaiah amih phacip phabaem khuikah cadah rhoek neh nuhmai rhoek te hip ham
James2:1 Ka manuca rhoek
James2:2 Nangmih kah tunim khuikah hlang pakhat te sui kubuen
James2:3 na paelki tih himbai a cim thik aka bai te
James2:4 Namah khuiah na boelhkhoeh uh neh
James2:5 Ka manuca thintlo hnatun uh lah. Diklai khodaeng rhoek te tangnah dongah Pathen loh a kuirhang sak ham neh a lungnah rhoek ham a kam pah ram kah rhopangkung la a tuek moenih a?
James2:6 Tedae
James2:7 Amih loh nangmih te ming then m'phoei thil uh tih ng'soehsal uh moenih a?
James2:8 Boei olkhueng te cacim vanbangla na soep sak atah na imben te namah bangla lungnah lamtah buelh saii.
James2:9 Tedae maelhmai na sawt uh atah tholhnah na saii tih olkhueng loh boekoekkung la n'toeltham.
James2:10 Anih loh olkhueng te boeih a tuem dae pakhat dongah a tongtah atah boeih a yook kuekluek coeng.
James2:11 Aka thui loh
James2:12 Te dongah poenghalnah olkhueng neh laitloek ham aka caai loh na thui bangla saii van saw.
James2:13 Laitloeknah te mawth tih rhennah khueh pawt cakhaw rhennah loh laitloeknah te a koevoei tak.
James2:14 Balae aka hoeikhang
James2:15 Paca boeina neh tanu takhong loh a tlingyal la om tih vuenhlaem buh vawtthoek mai ni.
James2:16 Nangmih khuikah khat khat loh amih te
James2:17 Te dongah tangnah long khaw khoboe a khueh pawt atah amah te aka duek la om.
James2:18 Tedae khat khat loh
James2:19 Nang loh Pathen tah pakhat ni tila na tangnah tih buelh na saii ngawn. Rhaithae rhoek long pataeng a tangnah uh tih a maehma uh ta.
James2:20 Olhong hlang aw
James2:21 A pa Abraham tah a bisai neh a tang moenih a? A capa Isaak te hmueihtuk dongah a nawn ta.
James2:22 Tangnah loh a bisai neh a bongyong daengah ni a bisai dongah tangnah a soep te na hmu uh.
James2:23 Te dongah Cacim loh a thui te soep coeng. Abraham loh Pathen te a tangnah vaengah anih te duengnah dongah a tae thil tih Pathen kah paya la a khue.
James2:24 Hlang tah tangnah bueng nen pawt tih bisai lamloh a tang te na ming uh.
James2:25 Rahab hlanghalh khaw a bisai lamloh a tang moenih a? Puencawn rhoi te a doe tih a tloe long a tueih ta.
James2:26 Mueihla aka tal pum tah aka duek la a om vanbangla bisai aka tal tangnah khaw a duek la om van.

James3:3 Marhang ka khuila kamrhui ng'khueh pah daengah ni amih te mamih taengah naem sak eh. Te phoeiah ni a pum tom khaw n'hoihaeng sak pueng.
James3:4 Sangpho khaw ke
James3:5 Lai khaw a pumrho a yit la om dae muep hoem van. Hmai pom loh duup puei a dom coeng ke.
James3:6 Lai tah hmai ni
James3:7 Satlung neh vaa kah a hui boeih
James3:8 Tedae lai he hlang kah a mong sak thai koi moenih. Boethae likloek
James3:9 Te nen te Boeipa neh pa te ng'uem uh tih

James3:11 Tuisih te a khui pakhat lamloh a didip neh a thanghap phuet sak pawt maco.
James3:12 Ka manuca rhoek
James3:13 Nangmih khuiah

James3:17 Tedae a so lamkah cueihnah tah lamhma tih cuem
James3:18 Duengnah kah a thaih tah rhoepnah neh aka tuh long ni rhoepnah a saii.

James4:9 Cip uh lamtah

James4:12 Olrhikung neh laitloekkung tah pakhat ni. Amah loh khang ham neh a paci sak ham coeng thai. Tedae imben lai aka tloek thil nangmih te u nim.
James4:13 “Tihnin neh thangvuen ah hekah kho la n'cet vetih kum khat a thok hil hno n'yoih ni
James4:14 Nangmih loh thangvuen kah na hingnah te metla a om khaw na hmat uh moenih. Tuihu loh kolkalh ah phoe tih a cing banglam ni na om uh.
James4:15 “Boeipa loh a ngaih tih ng'hing uh atah he khaw
James4:16 Namamih kah oekhlawnnah neh na pomsang uh coeng dae tebang hoemdamnah boeih tah a thae lamni a om.
James4:17 Te dongah a then saii ham a ming tih a saii pawt dongah anih ham tholhnah la a om pah.
James5:1 Kuirhang rhoek te maerhae coeng
James5:2 Na khuehtawn loh hmawn coeng tih na himbai khaw keet la poeh coeng.
James5:3 Na sui neh ngun khaw aek coeng. A sue te nangmih taengah mingpha la om vetih na saa te hmai bangla a caak ni. Khohnin hnukkhueng dongah ni na tung uh coeng.
James5:4 Na lo na ah te bibikung kah thapang na hmil pah long te namamih n'doek coeng he. Aka at rhoek kah a pang loh caempuei boeipa kah a hna khuila kun coeng.
James5:5 Diklai hmanah na pumdom uh tih omthen na bawn uh
James5:6 Aka dueng te na boe sak uh tih na ngawn uh dae nangmih te m'pakai moenih.
James5:7 Te dongah manuca rhoek
James5:8 Boeipa a lonah tah a yoei coeng dongah nangmih khaw thinsen uh lamtah na thinko te duel uh laeh.
James5:9 Manuca rhoek khat neh khat huei uh boeh
James5:10 Manuca rhoek
James5:11 Akah ueh rhoek ni ng'uem uh he. Job kah a uehnah te na yaak uh coeng. A hnukkhueng la hlang rhen kho neh lungma aka ti tah Boeipa ni tila Boeipa te na hmuh uh coeng.
James5:12 Tedae ka manuca rhoek
James5:13 Nangmih khuiah pakhat long ni a patang atah thangthui saeh. Pakhat ni a ngai a dip atah tingtoeng sa saeh.
James5:14 Nangmih khuiah khat khat ni a tattloel atah hlangboel kah a ham rhoek te khue saeh. Te vaengah anih te Boeipa ming neh thangthui uh thil saeh lamtah situi neh hluk uh saeh.
James5:15 Tangnah paipi long tah kobawt khaw a khang vetih anih te Boeipa loh a thoh ni. Tholhnah a saii te om mai cakhaw anih te a hlah ni.
James5:16 Te dongah
James5:17 Elijah he mamih vanbangla hlang boeiloeih ni. Tedae thangthuinah neh a thangthui vaengah rhotui tlan pawh. Te vaengah diklai ah kum thum neh hla rhuk rhotui tlan pawh.
James5:18 Tedae koep a thangthui vaengah vaan loh rhotui a paek tih diklai loh a thaih a cuen sak.
